Name: Artsy
Description: The world’s largest online art marketplace.

Name: FramebyFrame Animation
Description:
Animation is one of the greatest art form, and too often we don't see the hard work the animator put on every drawing or every 3D poses. Frame by Frame was born to show amazing work in slow motion, so that everyone can enjoy, understand and study what some of the best artist on this planet did.

Watching animation clip frame by frame is a very good way to practice your eyes as an animator in order to understand spacing and posing. 

For now, Frame by Frame is only available via Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/framebf

Name: NABA Nuova Accademia di Belle Arti
Description:
Founded in 1980, NABA, Nuova Accademia di Belle Arti, with campus in Milan and in Rome, is the largest art academy in Italy. Since 1981 NABA is legally recognised by the Higher Education in Art and Music system (AFAM, Alta Formazione Artistica e Musicale), regulated by the Ministry of University and Research (MUR). As a recognised Academy, NABA offers in its two campus in Milan and Rome academic diplomas equivalent to first and second level university degrees in the fields of design, fashion design, graphics and communication, multimedia arts, new technologies, set design, visual arts. The Academy was founded by Ausonio Zappa in Milan in 1980 with the involvement of Guido Ballo and Tito Varisco during a first phase, later attracting to its faculty artists such as Gianni Colombo and many others, the idea being to abandon rigorous academic traditions and instead introduce new visions and languages based on contemporary artistic and professional practice. For the 2023 edition and for the third year in a row, QS World University Rankings by Subject named NABA as the first and only Italian Academy of Fine Arts among the 100 best universities in the Art & Design field. This achievement confirms the excellence of the Academy's distinctive didactic methodology, revolving around a strong vocation for research and for the constant relationship with the artistic and professional context.
Currently the courses are attended by more than 5,000 students from all over Italy and from over 80 international countries in Milan and Rome Capus. The continued success of NABA is based on the multidisciplinary approach of all its programs and relies upon a well-balanced combination of theory taught by distinguished professionals and practical work with leading companies and studios.

Name: freelance
Description: ROYA CREATIVE

Name: Affordable Art Fair
Description:
When Will Ramsay established the Affordable Art Fair in 1999, his vision was to create a relaxed and welcoming environment in which art-lovers could browse and buy 1,000s of original contemporary paintings, sculptures, photographs and prints.

Fast-forward 25 years and Will’s ethos still holds true; our 16 fairs around the world welcome over 220,000 visitors per year, who can take their pick from a mix of local, national and international galleries showcasing a huge array of artworks by established artists and rising stars, all priced under £7,500/€10,00/$12,000. 

We hold fairs in Amsterdam, Austin, Berlin, Boston, Brisbane, Brussels, Hamburg, Hong Kong, London, Melbourne, New York, Singapore, Stockholm, Sydney and Vienna. Each unique fair is the ideal day out with family and friends, filled with a creative smorgasbord of artist performances, innovative talks and tours, hands-on workshops, live music and irresistible restaurants and bars. 

In total, over 3.5 million people have visited an Affordable Art Fair, taking home over 550,000 pieces of artwork to loving new homes since our humble beginnings!

CONTACT US:
+44 (0)208 246 4844
help@affordableartfair.com

Name: Saatchi Gallery
Description:
Saatchi Gallery was founded in 1985 with the aim of bringing contemporary art to as wide an audience as possible and make it accessible by providing an innovative platform for emerging artists to show their work. 

Saatchi Gallery exists as a registered charity to provide an innovative platform for contemporary art and culture. 

We are committed to supporting artists and rendering contemporary art accessible to all.  We strive to present projects in physical and digital spaces that are engaging, enlightening and educational for diverse audiences.

Name: Fundación Colección Thyssen-Bornemisza
Description: La Fundación Colección Thyssen-Bornemisza es una entidad sin ánimo de lucro cuyo fin es la conservación, estudio, pública exposición y difusión de la colección de obras de arte que alberga el Museo Thyssen-Bornemisza.

Name: National Gallery of Australia
Description:
The National Gallery is Australia’s national art museum with a collection of more than 160,000 works of art. It’s a must-see destination for visitors to Canberra and is well known for its major exhibitions and stunning permanent collection displays. The National Gallery’s website is visited by more than 1.7million people every year and it is an important resource for students, scholars and lovers of art and culture. The National Gallery’s mission is to inspire Australians now and for generations to come.

We are a creative, aspirational and collaborative team with a wide variety of qualifications and backgrounds. This includes specialist curators and conservators, researchers, collection managers, educators, fundraisers, communicators, business professionals and volunteers. We want everyone to experience art and culture.

Name: Ewan Sea Photographer
Description: A sea photographer, Ewan Lebourdais has been a passionate photographer for 20 years. He combines his passion for the sea with his desire to put forward his graphic ideas. Come and discover his universe and his history. All his photos are available for sale. Discover his world by following his travelling exhibitions and publications.

Name: Château de Fontainebleau
Description:
"La vraie demeure des rois, la maison des siècles." (Napoléon à Sainte-Hélène, août 1816)
Avec plus de 1500 pièces déployées au cœur de 130 hectares de parc et jardins, Fontainebleau est le seul château royal et impérial habité continuellement pendant sept siècles. Visiter Fontainebleau, c'est bénéficier d'une présentation exceptionnelle de l'histoire, l'histoire de l'art et l'architecture françaises.

Name: Crozier Fine Arts
Description:
As a global leader in fine art logistics and services, we safeguard the integrity, continuity, and legacy of art. 

Crozier was founded on a commitment to innovation, client-focused service, and specialized knowledge that meet the evolving needs of our clients.

With 38 international locations across the US, Europe, and Asia, Crozier provides comprehensive art logistics solutions, including art transportation, storage, customs support, expert guidance, and more, all over the world.

Shipping your artwork doesn’t need to be scary. Crozier’s global transportation network can safely move your art across borders and overseas. International collaborations and industry partnerships further allow us to move, handle, and manage art globally—and keep it safe when you need to jet.  

Crozier is part of Iron Mountain Incorporated (NYSE: IRM), the global leader in innovative storage and information management services, storing and protecting valued assets, including highly sensitive data, critical business information, and cultural and historical artefacts.

Name: Halcyon
Description: Founded in 1982, Halcyon Gallery specialises in modern and contemporary art working closely with emerging and established international artists.  From its inception, Halcyon Gallery has championed painters and sculptors who display exceptional talent, technical skill and intrinsic creativity and with whom we have worked to produce world-class art exhibitions that translate to a global audience.

Name: Zawyeh Gallery
Description: Zawyeh Art Gallery is an independent visual art gallery in Ramallah, Palestine. It was founded by Ziad Anani in 2013. In addition to presenting local artists to an international audience, the gallery’s mission is to promote established and emerging artists from Palestine through various thematic exhibitions. Zawyeh exhibits artworks in a variety of media including painting,sculpture, photography, and video.

Name: Art Defender
Description: L’unica società in Italia che offre servizi integrati per l’art collection management. Con strutture di oltre 12.000 mq a Torino, Milano, Bologna, Firenze e Roma, grazie a un team di professionisti e un network di partner di eccellenza, ci poniamo come interlocutori privilegiati di collezionisti, operatori del settore, musei e aziende, per conservare, gestire e valorizzare al meglio i loro patrimoni. Siamo l’unica realtà italiana a disporre di una rete di caveau di massima sicurezza e ad offrire ai nostri clienti una gamma completa e integrata di soluzioni, disegnate per rispondere alle loro esigenze più complesse. Art Defender connette, in una piattaforma di servizi unica nel suo genere, aziende e professionisti che operano nel settore dell’arte, a livello nazionale e internazionale. Case d’asta, studi legali, compagnie assicurative e fiduciarie, così come wealth manager, fiscalisti, dealer e restauratori sono solo alcuni degli attori che costituiscono il nostro network: una rete di player selezionati per ambito di specializzazione e livello di eccellenza. I nostri servizi si rivolgono a tutti i soggetti - privati o istituzionali - che collezionano o detengono opere d’arte e pleasure assets: collezionisti, aziende, antiquari, galleristi, musei, corporate collections e fondazioni sono i nostri clienti di riferimento, a cui mettiamo a disposizione esperienza, professionalità, indipendenza e riservatezza. I quattro principali ambiti di attività in cui operiamo sono: la conservazione, la consulenza, l’assicurazione e la logistica.

Name: Winston Artory Group
Description:
Winston Artory Group is the nation's leading independent art appraisal and art advisory firm, with offices in NY, MA, DC, NC, FL, TX, CO, CA, as well as representation in three locations overseas. Independent of any auction house or dealer, Winston Artory Group specializes in confidential and objective appraisal services, advice on the acquisition and disposal of all fine and decorative art, jewelry, and collectibles, and collection management.

APPRAISALS
Winston Artory Group specializes in providing appraisals for all purposes, including insurance, estate tax and estate planning, donation, damage or loss, art as collateral, and family division. 

ADVISORY 
Whether you wish to acquire an individual work or build an entire collection, Winston Artory Group will help you articulate your vision and guide you through the process. If you wish to sell works in your collection, Winston Artory Group is uniquely positioned to impartially advise you on every step of the sales process.

COLLECTION MANAGEMENT
Winston Artory Group will also introduce you to a wide range of highly specialized services, individually tailored to help you best maintain and manage your collection, including: collection management software, annual inspections and condition reports, curatorial advice, coordination and oversight of conservation, restoration, installation, shipping, storage, and professional photography, and comprehensive supervision of museum exhibition loans.

Name: Fondation Carmignac
Description: La Fondation Carmignac, créée en 2000 à l’initiative d’Edouard Carmignac, est une fondation d’entreprise qui s’articule autour de deux axes : une collection qui comprend près de 300 œuvres et le Prix du photojournalisme remis annuellement. En partenariat avec la Fondation Carmignac, un lieu d’exposition accessible au public, la Villa Carmignac, a été créée sur le site de Porquerolles afin d’y exposer la collection et organiser des actions culturelles et artistiques.

Name: Art Marketing Academy
Description: The Art School

Name: ESMA - Ecole Supérieure des Métiers Artistiques
Description:
L’ESMA est une école d’arts appliqués qui compte plus de 30 ans d’expérience, et qui a vu naître bon nombre de graphistes, d'architectes d'intérieur, de game designers, de concept artists ou encore animateurs 3D.

L’école vous ouvre la voie à 5 cycles professionnels : Cinéma d'Animation 3D & Effets Spéciaux (titre RNCP niveau 7), Architecture d'Intérieur, Design Graphique, Jeu Vidéo (titre RNCP niveau 6) et Illustration Concept Art (titre RNCP niveau 6). A cela s'ajoute 2 années préparatoires : Prépa Design et Prépa Entertainment.
La formation Cinéma d'Animation 3D & Effets Spéciaux est dispensée dans sa version anglophone pour les campus de Lyon et de Montpellier.

Membre du réseau des écoles métiers Icônes, l’ESMA participe à la réussite des étudiants et s’engage à les accompagner dans leur insertion professionnelle.

Découvrez l’intégralité de nos formations sur notre site officiel, enrichie des créations de nos étudiants, ainsi que les campus de Bordeaux, Lyon, Montpellier, Nantes, Rennes, Toulouse et Montréal.

Name: MTArt Agency
Description: Founded in 2015, MTArt agency is the art sector's leading talent agency representing some of the most talented, forward-thinking artists in the world. With a track record of delivering over 300 projects across major global cities, brands, and institutions—including Apple TV, Le Louvre and the World Cup, MTArt Agency and its team are experts in crafting compelling visual stories that captivate large audiences and secure global press coverage through public art projects, artworks' acquisitions, visual campaigns and licensing. MTArt Agency was listed as one of the fastest growing companies in the UK on the Sunday Times Power list and is currently expanding to the US and Middle East markets. MTArt Agency has been supported by a number of established investors and funds, including Frederic Jousset, Todd Ruppert, Simon de Pury and Saul Klein.

Name: Winston Art Group
Description:
Winston Art Group is the nation's leading independent art appraisal and art advisory firm, with offices in NY, MA, DC, NC, FL, TX, CO, CA, as well as representation in three locations overseas. Independent of any auction house or dealer, Winston Art Group specializes in confidential and objective appraisal services, advice on the acquisition and disposal of all fine and decorative art, jewelry, and collectibles, and collection management.

APPRAISALS
Winston Art Group specializes in providing appraisals for all purposes, including insurance, estate tax and estate planning, donation, damage or loss, art as collateral, and family division. 

ADVISORY 
Whether you wish to acquire an individual work or build an entire collection, Winston Art Group will help you articulate your vision and guide you through the process. If you wish to sell works in your collection, Winston Art Group is uniquely positioned to impartially advise you on every step of the sales process.

COLLECTION MANAGEMENT
Winston Art Group will also introduce you to a wide range of highly specialized services, individually tailored to help you best maintain and manage your collection, including: collection management software, annual inspections and condition reports, curatorial advice, coordination and oversight of conservation, restoration, installation, shipping, storage, and professional photography, and comprehensive supervision of museum exhibition loans.

Name: DRAW RECRUITMENT LIMITED
Description:
DRAW was formed in 2016, bringing together two of the most respected talent agencies in the global art market — Drummond Read Recruitment and Art//Work Recruitment.

With over 20 years’ combined experience, we have a thorough understanding of the Fine Art, Antiques, Auction and Luxury Markets sectors in the UK and internationally, as well as access to the finest, best-qualified candidates. We have developed strong, long-standing relationships with leading clients in a wide variety of areas including:

Auction Houses
Galleries and dealerships
Museums
Insurance Companies and banks
Restoration and conservation
Art advisory and private collections
Artists’ studios
Luxury brands, high end and designer
Online businesses

We specialise in:
Permanent Recruitment
Temporary and Contract Recruitment
Executive Search
Talent Sourcing
HR Services for clients

Name: Art Angels
Description: We are grateful to have over the years supported 1,000's of artists and the creative community by placing artwork to optimize their environments. All profits are donated to charities that contribute to human development. LEARN MORE AT WWW.MNANGELS.ORG

Name: Crown Fine Art
Description:
Global Art Logistics - Storage - Transport - Installation - Specialist care

At Crown Fine Art, we’re just as passionate about art as you. Our dedicated experts provide an exceptional global service that spans fine art transportation, installation, storage and everything in between. 

Our in-depth knowledge and logistics expertise, earned over years of experience, is trusted by private customers, museums, galleries and auction houses worldwide.

We ensure safety and discretion, and provide a smooth, efficient and cost-effective service from start to finish. Tailored to your needs, our personal approach to every project sets us apart.

The internationally renowned Crown Worldwide Group established Crown Fine Art to meet growing demand for specialist art storage, and the trusted expertise required to move art safely and efficiently whether it's across the city, the continent or the world.

Crown Fine Art now has over 50 years of experience and expertise in this field.

Today’s company was formed in an alliance between Gerlach Art Packers and Shippers, Oxford Exhibition Services and Lavanchy. The legacy of each of these companies has contributed to Crown Fine Art’s vast global network and expert knowledge. 

#SharingThePassion

Name: Nederlands Dans Theater (NDT)
Description:
The purpose of Nederlands Dans Theater (NDT) is to offer unique experiences and perspectives in dance that engage conversation and promote diversity. NDT is a leading contemporary dance company dedicated to creation, research, and talent development. The company is led by artistic director Emily Molnar and managing director Marc Pil. In its commitment to innovation throughout all aspects of the company, NDT collaborates with international choreographers and artists and connects with audiences and communities in The Hague, the Netherlands, and all over the world.

At the heart of NDT is a commitment to collaboration, curiosity, innovation and community. Like all art, dance creates, provokes and inspires an open space for dialogue towards an inclusive society. We believe every human being deserves to experience the pleasure of art and that today, more than ever, we need channels of expression to help us examine the world.

Name: Art Lovers Australia
Description:
100% Australian Owned & Operated | The Gallery Created by Artists for Lovers of Art
Art Lovers Australia is a curated, online art gallery delivering quality artwork for sale by some of Australia's most talented emerging and mid-career artists. 

We make it easier and more affordable for everyone to discover and own art.

Our business is based on our shared love of art and our genuine desire to see artists thrive. When people ask why we started Art Lovers Australia, it feels overwhelming to explain how a lifetime of loving art, creating, teaching, exhibiting and gallery visits lead to Art Lovers. We knew so many phenomenal artists that just weren’t being seen – traditional galleries, understandably, could only support a limited number of artists and the rest just weren’t getting exposure.

Our online gallery allows us to support a huge number of emerging and mid career artists.  And every day we are discovering new talent to share with other Art Lovers.

Name: Teatro Municipal
Description: Teatro Municipal de Santiago donde se realizan los mayores espectáculos de opera, ballet y conciertos.

Name: INSTITUT POUR LA PHOTOGRAPHIE
Description: Started by the Région Hauts-de-France in collaboration with Les Rencontres d'Arles, the Institut pour la photographie is a new resource centre, for dissemination, dialogue and experimentation in order to develop the photographic culture within the general public and to support research and creation. Its programme is based on synergy between five main lines : exhibitions, conservation of photographer's archive, education, edition and a grant programme for new projects. Situated at the crossroads of Europe, this new structure forms part of an inclusive approach stemming from initiatives and local expertise with an international ambition.

Name: Maison de la danse de Lyon
Description:
La Maison de la Danse de Lyon propose une programmation éclectique : des chorégraphes majeurs aux jeunes créateurs, des danses du monde au répertoire classique, de la comédie musicale au nouveau cirque, toute la diversité de la danse est à l'honneur.
Notre page Linkedin nous permet de partager avec vous nos moments partenaires ainsi que nos résidences et coproductions.

Name: CN D - Centre national de la danse
Description: Établissement au service des professionnels et du public, le CN D a pour missions l’accompagnement et la formation des danseurs professionnels, la conservation et la diffusion du patrimoine chorégraphique, le soutien à la création d’œuvres chorégraphiques.

Name: Avant Arte
Description:
Avant Arte is a curated platform connecting the world’s leading artists and public arts institutions with a new generation of enthusiasts, collectors and patrons.

We collaborate with the most exciting contemporary artists such as Ai Weiwei, Mickalene Thomas, Maurizio Cattelan and Jenny Holzer to create limited editions of the highest quality, from prints and sculptures to digital works.

Our global community of over 4 million collectors and art enthusiasts reflects the growing energy and curiosity of a new generation transforming how art is discovered and supported. Through fundraising editions – created in collaboration with artists including Ed Ruscha, Grayson Perry and Alex Katz – we have raised over $18 million for major cultural institutions such as LACMA, the Contemporary Art Society and the Guggenheim, among others. These fundraising collaborations help to strengthen public access to art and engage the new generation of patrons who will shape its future.

Our mission is to make discovering and collecting art more accessible, connecting artists, institutions and audiences in meaningful ways that expand art’s reach and impact.

Name: Freeman's Auctions
Description:
Freeman’s is a premier American auction house offering services in multiple categories including fine art, jewelry, design, books and manuscripts, furniture, decorative arts, antiquities, couture, and Asian works of art. 

With 16 regional locations nationwide, the firm provides auctions, appraisals, private sales, and art advisory services, connecting clients to the global art market. 

Freeman’s strives to bring art, history, and design to life by connecting people with extraordinary objects through exceptional service and expertise.

Name: Art Dealers Association of America (ADAA)
Description: The Art Dealers Association of America (ADAA) is a non-profit membership organization of the nation's leading galleries in the fine arts. Founded in 1962, ADAA seeks to promote the highest standards of connoisseurship, scholarship and ethical practice within the profession. ADAA members deal in paintings, sculpture, prints, drawings and photographs from the Renaissance to the present day. ADAA has over 200 member galleries in nearly 40 U.S. cities.

Name: Golden Artist Colors
Description:
Golden Artist Colors is a successful, employee-owned company that has produced some of the industry’s best artists’ paints and paint products for more than 30 years. Situated in beautiful New Berlin, New York, GAC was  selected by Inc. magazine as “2011 Top Small Company Workplaces,” thanks in part to its focus on creating a strong community that extends from its workplace to the artists it serves.
Golden Artist Colors manufactures GOLDEN Artist Acrylics, Williamsburg Artist Oil Colors, QoR Artist Watercolors, PanPastel Artist Pastels, and Golden Paintworks decorative paints.

Name: Royal Talens
Description:
Royal Talens produces and supplies a wide range of top quality paints and artists' materials for artists, creative hobbyists and educational institutes. Since its foundation in 1899, Talens has been building a worldwide name and reputation. In Apeldoorn some 400 staff produce and market more than 7000 different articles. 

From these head quarters the Benelux as well as the French, Danish, Polish, British, Irish, German, Italian and Austrian markets are served, and the export operations to some 100 countries coordinated. There are also separate sales and distribution organisations in France, Switzerland, Germany, Spain, Japan and the United States. Royal Talens is an independent subsidiary of the Sakura Color Products Corporation.

The mission of Royal Talens is to facilitate and stimulate creative expression in painting and drawing. We innovatively market inspiring top-quality products and knowledge worldwide in every relevant segment. We do this, based on a thorough understanding of consumer needs.

Name: Menhir Fx
Description:
Menhir FX is an independent 2D / 3D animation studio dedicated to the video game industry based in Montpellier (France).  

Our team aspires to create exciting and emotive ideas and narratives. Whether it's trailers, cutscenes, special effects, or assets to be integrated, we adapt to the creative and budgetary needs of many studios. 

We help publishers and independent developers achieve their goals — we make people want to play.

_____

Menhir FX est un studio d’animation 2D / 3D indépendant dédié à l’industrie du jeu vidéo, basé à Montpellier (France).

Notre équipe aspire à créer des idées et des récits forts, émotionnels et captivants. Qu’il s’agisse de trailers, de cinématiques, d’effets spéciaux ou d’assets à intégrer, nous nous adaptons aux besoins créatifs et budgétaires de nombreux studios.

Nous aidons les éditeurs et les développeurs indépendants à atteindre leurs objectifs — nous donnons envie aux gens de jouer.

Name: Faculty of Arts and Architecture / Islamic Azad University, South Tehran Branch
Description: دانشکده هنر و معماری واحد تهران جنوب/ دانشگاه آزاد اسلامی

Name: Art Shortlist
Description:
In a world where the digital revolution continues to simplify and improve services. The Art Shortlist platform connects sellers and buyers of artworks in complete confidentiality.

The solution is simple:
- A user interface to negotiate with other users and formalize transactions securely.
- One of the lowest commissions on the art market: 15%
- A team of experts offering appraisals, expertises, advices for the sale and acquisition of artworks.
 
Whether you are an individual, a collector, an artist, a professional or an institution: Art Shortlist is your trusted solution.

Name: 1 immeuble, 1 œuvre
Description:
Le 16 décembre 2015, le ministère de la Culture lançait le programme « 1 immeuble, 1 œuvre », en collaboration avec les acteurs de l’immobilier et la Fédération des Promoteurs Immobiliers de France (FPI France). Aujourd’hui, 94 entreprises, promoteurs, foncières, investisseurs et bailleurs sociaux, s’engagent à commander ou à acheter une œuvre d’art à un artiste vivant pour chacun de leurs programmes immobiliers, soutenant ainsi activement la création artistique. 

L’association « Le Club 1 immeuble, 1 œuvre » fédère les membres signataires, les accompagne dans la mise en œuvre du programme et fait rayonner leur engagement. Le ministère de la Culture et la Fédération des Promoteurs Immobiliers de France (FPI France) sont membres de droit de l’association. Arthur Toscan du Plantier en est le Président.

Le programme 1 immeuble, 1 œuvre s’inscrit dans la politique ministérielle de soutien à la création artistique et de diffusion des arts visuels auprès du public le plus large. Plus de 650 œuvres ont déjà été installées sur l’ensemble du territoire français.

Les œuvres d’art favorisent les échanges entre les personnes, sans distinction d’âge, de niveau d’éducation ou de milieu social, et contribuent à l’amélioration de la qualité de vie des occupants et des usagers des bâtiments. Intégrant la démarche de responsabilité sociétale des entreprises, la charte « 1 immeuble, 1 œuvre », invite ainsi l’art et la culture dans le quotidien des entreprises.

Et si l’art s’affranchissait des murs des galeries pour s’inviter au cœur de notre quotidien, dans des lieux où l’on ne fait d'habitude que passer ? Ce rêve est devenu réalité en 2015 avec la charte « 1 immeuble, 1 œuvre ». Son ambition ? Faire appel à toute la diversité de la création à chaque nouvelle construction. Peintures, sculptures et photographies se sont mises à embellir nos vies transformant la ville en musée à ciel ouvert. – Rima Abdul-Malak

Name: Photo Elysée
Description:
Photo Elysée is one of the world’s leading museums entirely dedicated to photography. Since its establishment in 1985, it has improved public understanding of photography through innovative exhibitions, key publications and engaging events.

Recognised as a centre of expertise in the field of conservation and enhancement of visual heritage, it holds a unique collection including more than 170'000 positive prints, 800'000 negatives on glass and flexible supports, more than 100'000 plates and slides, around 1'000 albums and portfolios, more than a dozen Collections and full Archives including those of Charles Chaplin, René Burri, Nicolas Bouvier, Ella Maillart. By supporting young photographers, offering new perspectives on the masters and confronting photography with other art forms, Photo Elysée experiments with the image.


Based in Switzerland, it presents four major exhibitions in Lausanne each year and an average of fifteen in prestigious museums and festivals around the world. Regional by character and international in scope, it seeks to constantly develop new and exciting ways to interact with audiences and collaborate with other institutions.

Name: Kunstenbond
Description:
Kunstenbond is de vakbond van de culturele en creatieve sector. Professioneel gemaakt is professioneel betaald. Eerlijke betaling, goede contracten, meer zekerheid en een veilige werkvloer moeten vanzelfsprekend worden. Dat is waar de Kunstenbond elke dag voor strijdt.

Cover foto: Anne Claire de Breij

Name: Pinault Collection
Description:
Depuis près de cinquante ans, François Pinault rassemble avec passion et engagement l’une des collections d’art contemporain les plus importantes au monde.
La Collection Pinault réunit aujourd’hui près de 10 000 œuvres, du 20ᵉ siècle à nos jours, présentées dans trois musées emblématiques : la Bourse de Commerce à Paris ainsi que le Palazzo Grassi et la Punta della Dogana à Venise.
Au-delà de ses propres musées, la Collection s’incarne également à travers une résidence d’artiste à Lens, l’attribution du Prix Pierre Daix consacré à l’histoire de l’art, la création récente d’une bourse Pierre Daix dédiée à la recherche émergente, ainsi qu’une politique active de prêts et d’expositions hors les murs menées, depuis 2007, en partenariat avec des institutions en France et à l’international.
Pinault Collection déploie en outre une programmation d’arts vivants, qui s’articule notamment autour de concerts et de conférences.
Toutes ces initiatives poursuivent une même ambition : rendre l’art accessible au plus grand nombre et multiplier les formes de partage avec le public.

Name: Villa Arson
Description:
La Villa Arson est établissement d'enseignement supérieur artistique du ministère de la Culture et composante à personnalité morale de l'Université Côte d'Azur. Unique en son genre, elle réunit dans un même site une école d’art, un centre d’art, une résidence d’artistes et une bibliothèque spécialisée.
Implantée sur la colline Saint-Barthélémy, la Villa Arson occupe un vaste domaine de plus de deux hectares qui offre un splendide panorama sur la ville de Nice et la Baie des Anges. Labyrinthe de béton, de pierres et de plantes entremêlées, où s’imbriquent harmonieusement autour de l’ancienne demeure de la famille Arson, rues intérieures avec patios, amphithéâtres en plein air, terrasses et jardins suspendus.
Conçu dans les années 1960 par l’architecte Michel Marot, cet ensemble architectural singulier, érigé au milieu d’un jardin méditerranéen, est à découvrir par la promenade.
Architecture non dominante et sans façade, elle se déploie sur 17000 m2 en épousant la topographie de la colline.
Des œuvres d’artistes contemporains dialoguant avec l’architecture et les jardins ponctuent la visite.

Name: PIASA
Description: In the heart of Paris, in the prestigious rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré, PIASA, a French auction house, showcases a unique identity through its cutting edge selections in art and design. Bolstered by regular collaborations with great interior designers, its artistic line is its signature. Combining elegance and authenticity, PIASA reinvents traditions by associating creativity and modernity.

Name: ITECOM ART DESIGN
Description:
ITECOM propose 15 formations dédiées aux arts appliqués et au multimédia
Un savoir-faire depuis 35 ans dans le milieu de la création et du Web.

Name: Vhils Studio
Description:
Portuguese artist Alexandre Farto (b. 1987) has been interacting visually with the urban environment under the name of Vhils since his days as a prolific graffiti writer in the early- to mid-2000s.

His groundbreaking bas-relief carving technique – which forms the basis of the Scratching the Surface project and was first presented to the public at the VSP group exhibition in Lisbon in 2007 and at the Cans Festival in London the following year –, has been hailed as one of the most compelling approaches to art created in the streets in the last decade.

This striking form of visual poetry, showcased around the world in both indoor and outdoor settings, has been described as brutal and complex, yet imbued with a simplicity that speaks to the core of human emotions. An ongoing reflection on identity, on life in contemporary urban societies and their saturated environments, it explores themes such as the struggle between the aspirations of the individual and the demands of everyday life, or the erosion of cultural uniqueness in the face of the dominant model of globalised development and the increasingly uniform reality it has been imposing around the world. It speaks of effacement but also of resistance, of destruction yet also of beauty in this overwhelming setting, exploring the connections and contrasts, similarities and differences, between global and local realities...

Name: SKVR
Description:

Het stimuleren van enthousiasme in (de beoefening van) kunst en het ontwikkelen van creatief talent is alles waar het ons om draait.

Cursussen
Je kunt bij SKVR lessen en cursussen volgen in beeldende kunst, dans, fotografie, video & digitale media, muziek, schrijven en theater. 

Onderwijs

Wijkinitiatieven
SKVR werkt ook samen met diverse organisaties en scholen in de Rotterdamse wijken aan diverse projecten.

Name: National Art School
Description:
The National Art School is an independent specialist visual arts higher education institution with origins that can be traced back to 1843. 

With a rich tradition of artistic practice and a well-renowned alumni, the School is an important part of Australia’s cultural heritage and contributes to its ongoing artistic and cultural development through the education of emerging artists, as well as engaging the broader community through a vibrant program of public events and exhibitions. 

Housed in the historic walls of the old Darlinghurst Gaol in Sydney’s premier Arts precinct, the National Art School offers a select number of full time programs; Bachelor of Fine Art, Bachelor of Fine Art (Honours) and Master of Fine Art (by Research), and for the community, a comprehensive range of part-time and intensive short courses for developing artists of all skill levels.

Name: Billich Gallery
Description:
From the White House to the Vatican, the collection of Presidents and Kings, Sydney-based artist Charles Billich is one of the most prominent living Australian painters. In a career spanning some forty years, he has exhibited at some of the world’s best venues and has been an honoured guest and resident artist on many occasions. From the Vatican Museum to the White House, the Olympic Museum in Lausanne to His Majesty King George V Tupou Palace in Tonga, the Red Cross Museum in Geneva to numerous university, government, corporate and private collections, Charles Billich has an eclectic and ubiquitous following.

Australia

Name: MUART CHILE
Description:
Somos un grupo de Mujeres cuyo arte se ve influenciado por la formación profesional de cada una. Nos movemos a través de diversas miradas que van desde la Ciencia al Diseño, de las Matemáticas a la Filosofía, de la Educación a la Arquitectura, de la Bioquímica a la Escultura, de la Restauración a la Auditoria, de la gestión de Empresa a la Poesía, de la Ingeniería  a la Ilustración, lo que potencia la creatividad colectiva del grupo. 

  Cada artista ha hecho su propio camino de investigación en disciplinas tales como  pintura, escultura, grabado, arte textil, orfebrería, vitreaux y fotografía, lo que nos ha  permitido ir a la vanguardia de las Artes Visuales. La magia de este ensamblaje ha dado vida a un resultado único, fruto de la percepción particular de cada artista.

Nuestra propuesta se orienta a difundir la riqueza e identidad de nuestro país, la presencia de la mujer en el arte y pueblos originarios, desarrollando proyectos culturales que se traducen en un sentir o una crítica frente a temas de contingencia nacional o mundial, ya sea sociales o medioambientales.

Name: Silesian Theatre | Teatr Śląski im. Stanisława Wyspiańskiego w Katowicach
Description:
The Wyspiański Silesian Theatre in Katowice is the largest drama stage in Upper Silesia. Its traditions date back to 1922, when in the capital of the new, autonomous Silesian voivodeship forming part of reborn Poland, a Polish theater was established. The theater building was erected in the eastern part of the Katowice market square in the years 1905-1907 for the German City Theatre. Architect Karl Moritz gave it the neo-Classicist style with elements of Modernism.

Theatre mission is to be national stage in Silesia. In its repertoire, above all on Main Stage, permanet place take outstanding items of Polish and world classic drama. In last year openings had also drama written in Silesian local dialect ("Polterabend" by Stanisław Mutz, dir. Tadeusz Bradecki and "The Fifth Quarter of the Globe" by Kazimierz Kutz, dir. Robert Talarczyk). In 1981 came into being Chamber Stage where most often are staged modern Polish and foreign dramas. Third place of presentation is Malarnia (Paint Shop) Stage, created in 1992 in former Masonic lodge premises. Recently, the Silesian Theatre presentations are also staged on The Mall Stage located inside a nearby shopping centre.

Name: ART & STRINGS
Description:
Money only becomes valuable when it is exchanged for positive experiences. 
 
Sustainable investments and impact investing are enjoying increasing demand. ART & STRINGS is an ideal partner in the search for meaningful areas of investment which offer not only a financial yield but also a cultural and emotional return, and which have a measurable positive impact on the environment and/or society, and above all on culture.

The ART & STRINGS team is made up of experts in finance, investment, the instrument and art trade, publishing, science, marketing and trusts, as well as talent promotion and patronage, and – as the name suggests – specialises in two alternative asset classes: art and high-quality historical stringed instruments.

In terms of ART, emphasis is placed on contemporary art (post-war), such as that of G. Richter, A. Kiefer, G. Baselitz, R. Trockel, G. Uecker, T. Cragg, B. Venet, M. Lüpertz, J. Immendorff and S. Balkenhol, as well as S. Marienfeld, P. Doig, J. Burgert and O. Nkanga.

The main focus in the STRINGS branch is on historical violin makers such as A. Stradivari, G. Guarneri del Gesù, G. B. Guadagnini and C. Bergonzi.

ART & STRINGS offers investors not only the necessary know-how, but also the access to the market that is so vital. What is special about ART & STRINGS is that it thinks and acts like an investor: all of the artworks and instruments belong to ART & STRINGS; “what we offer, we do ourselves” – from the acquisition of an object (including due diligence), to portfolio management, to its sale.

“We want to make the Foundation’s years of positive experiences accessible to other investors. When it comes to sustainable investments with impact and an emotional return, we really know what we’re talking about.” 
Dr. Joachim Brunne, CEO and Foundation’s Board of Directors

Name: Figura | Dutch Academy of Figurative Sculpture
Description:
At Figura Academy, we are passionate about the timeless art of sculpture. Our mission is to cultivate creativity, technical skill, and artistic excellence through comprehensive education and hands-on experience.

About Us:

Figura Academy offers programs tailored to both budding sculptors and seasoned artists looking to refine their craft. We emphasize observation and craftsmanship, engaging our students to sculpt the human figure from structural, gestural, and anatomical standpoints. To achieve this, we work with live models, providing an authentic and dynamic learning experience. We believe in fostering a supportive and inspiring environment where students can thrive and express their unique artistic visions.

Our program includes:
-Sculpture Workshops (figure and portrait)
-Evening Course
-Complete Sculpture program (2-year, part-time course)
-Company events (Team-building, Incentives)

At Figura Academy, we are dedicated to helping you achieve your artistic potential and making your mark in the world of sculpture.

Visit us at www.figura-sculpture.com to learn more about our program or contact us today for your tailor made offer. Join Figura Academy and shape your future in sculpture.

Name: ACAM Srl
Description:
ACAM - (Art, Creativity, Architecture, Management) è in Italia la prima società di consulenza tematica nella sfera dei beni culturali. Nel privato come nel pubblico, offre consulenza professionale specializzata nell'ambito del recupero, della conservazione e della valorizzazione, in breve della buona gestione, dei beni e delle attività culturali ed intellettuali quali sono l’arte, la creatività e l’architettura. 

ACAM opera con particolare riguardo nella sfera dei beni materiali (mobili e immobili) ed immateriali (proprietà intellettuale) che siano vincolati o comunque tutelabili, ivi comprese le opere dell’architettura contemporanea in possesso di un “importante carattere artistico”.

Grazie al contributo specialistico di collaboratori e professionisti esterni facenti parte di un network ufficiale, la società è in grado di offrire consulenze e servizi nei quali ogni apporto professionale specifico viene gestito e coordinato in un’unica struttura. 

Il network ACAM è suddiviso in quattro settori fondamentali:

1. SETTORE TECNICO, PROGETTAZIONE E RESTAURO
Consulenza tecnica e gestione dei processi di recupero e trasformazione del bene

2. SETTORE LEGALE, AMMINISTRATIVO E GIUDIZIALE
Assistenza legale diversificata e tutela della proprietà intellettuale

3. SETTORE ECONOMICO, MANAGEMENT E FISCALITÀ
Consulenza economica e fiscale specifica ed assistenza alla gestione del bene

4. SETTORE COMUNICAZIONE, MARKETING E RELAZIONI ESTERNE
Assistenza alla valorizzazione del bene e costruzione della sua “immagine”

ACAM, oltre ad operare per raggiungere gli obiettivi prefissati con i clienti, persegue in prima persona la missione di valorizzare e promuovere, nell'interesse collettivo, il patrimonio culturale generale.

Name: Kolly Gallery AG
Description:
Born in Fribourg in 1979, Julien Kolly can be described as one of the pioneers of the street art culture in Switzerland. Director of the communication agency vingtneuf degres, he opens, in September 2006, his first gallery, GT29, in collaboration with the Nuithonie theater in Villars-sur-Glâne.

Two years later, he founded La Grille in Yverdon-les-Bains which, at a rate of one show per month, allowed him to build a network of national and international artists at the forefront of the graphic culture and the latest trends. Dare, Alëxone, Swet, Tilt, Flying Förtress, MadC, Smash137, Lenz, L’Atlas or Dave the Chimp are a few names that invaded (left an ephemeral trace on) the walls of the gallery.

Eager for new challenges, he has now decided to promote the graffiti and street art universe in Zurich, cosmopolitan city known for its international artistic influence. The Kolly Gallery will open on 2014 February 27th.

Name: VITRINE London / Basel
Description:
VITRINE was a contemporary art gallery dedicated to artistic experimentation and emerging interdisciplinary practices. Founded in 2010 in a 16-meter vitrine in Bermondsey Square, London, the gallery operated until 2024, expanding to spaces in Bermondsey Street (2012–2015), Basel, Switzerland (2016–2024), and Fitzrovia, London (2022–2024). A digital platform complemented its physical locations from 2020–2023.

Known for its transparent spaces in Bermondsey Square and Basel's Vogesenplatz, VITRINE made art accessible 24/7 to the public, fostering engagement through satellite exhibitions, gallery collaborations, and international art fairs.

The gallery earned a reputation for discovering and nurturing new international talent, representing artists from the UK, Switzerland, Europe, Asia, Latin America, and the US. Focused on diversity, the program championed interdisciplinary approaches in installation, sculpture, and performance, often addressing socio-political issues. It showcased site-responsive practices in alternative settings beyond the traditional white cube, supporting underrepresented voices in the art market.

VITRINE adopted a hybrid business model early on, securing public and private funding to support artist-driven projects. Its portfolio included an extensive array of outdoor sculptures, highlighted by the Sculpture At program in Bermondsey Square (2014–2018).

Collaboration was central to VITRINE’s ethos. From 2023–2024, the gallery hosted joint exhibitions with international peer galleries, fostering dialogue across global art communities.

A member of the New Art Dealers Alliance (NADA) and the Gallery Climate Coalition (GCC), VITRINE maintained a strong commitment to sustainability and partnerships throughout its history.

Name: Auktionshaus im Kinsky
Description:
MODERNE KUNST | ZEITGENÖSSISCHE KUNST | ALTE MEISTER | GEMÄLDE DES 19. JAHRHUNDERTS | ANTIQUITÄTEN | JUGENDSTIL & DESIGN I SCHMUCK & UHREN

Das Auktionshaus im Kinsky sorgt seit 1993 dafür, dass die Interessen von Verkäufern und Käufern, von Kunstliebhabern und Sammlern zusammenfinden und ihre Wünsche in einem einzigartigen Bieterwettstreit rasch und unkompliziert zu allseitiger Zufriedenheit erfüllt werden.

Mit knapp 25 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern bietet das im Kinsky seinen Kundinnen und Kunden eine umfassende und vor allem persönliche Betreuung. Wir nehmen uns Zeit für Sie und stellen Ihnen unser fundiertes Wissen und unsere langjährige Erfahrung zur Verfügung.

In den mehrmals jährlich stattfindenden Auktionen versteigert das Auktionshaus im Kinsky Kunstwerke und Objekte aus den Bereichen: Zeitgenössische Kunst, Moderne Kunst, Gemälde des 19. Jahrhunderts und Alte Meister, Jugendstil & Design, Antiquitäten sowie den Bereichen Schmuck & Uhren. In all diesen Bereichen konnten Weltrekorde und Spitzenpreise erzielt werden.

Das Auktionshaus im Kinsky hat seinen Sitz im Palais Kinsky in Wien. Dort erstrecken sich die Auktionsräume über zwei Etagen. Darüber hinaus hat sich das Haus in Graz mit einer Filiale und einer Repräsentanz niedergelassen.

Name: HISK/Hoger Instituut voor Schone Kunsten/Higher Institute for Fine Arts
Description:
Hoger Instituut voor Schone Kunsten
Advanced Studies & Practice-based Research in Visual Arts

Het HISK organiseert postacademisch onderwijs op het gebied van beeldende en audiovisuele kunst. Het biedt jonge kunstenaars uit binnen- en buitenland gedurende twee jaar werkruimte en pedagogische begeleiding aan. Binnen het programma wordt gestreefd naar een werkbaar evenwicht tussen de eigen praktijk, gesprekken met gastdocenten, workshops, reading groups, studiereizen en publieksgerichte presentaties.

De internationale en cultureel diverse samenstelling van de groep kunstenaars zorgt voor kruisbestuivingen en dialogen. Door het unieke concept van het HISK kunnen de kunstenaars investeren in het onderzoek van hun werk in een ruime artistieke, culturele en maatschappelijke context.

Na twee jaar ontvangt de kunstenaar het certificaat ‘Laureaat van het Hoger Instituut voor Schone Kunsten’. Het grootste deel daarvan bouwt een succesvolle loopbaan uit in de internationale kunstwereld.

*******

Higher Institute for Fine Arts
Advanced Studies & Practice-based Research in Visual Arts

HISK offers a post-academic course in visual arts and provides young artists from Belgium and the world with a workspace and pedagogical guidance for a duration of two years. The emphasis at the HISK lies on individual practice and close contact with a community of distinguished visiting lecturers - artists, writers, curators and scholars. Based on diversity of artistic practices and positions, the unique HISK concept gives the artists every opportunity for critical research within a broader aesthetic, social and political context. 

At the end of the two years, the participating artists receive a certificate as a ‘Laureate of the Higher Institute for Fine Arts'. The majority of them are now pursuing successful professional careers in the international art world.

The HISK board is currently working on a possible relaunch. As soon as there is more news you will learn about it here.

Description: Arts Connection, The Arts Council of San Bernardino County is the local arts agency for San Bernardino County and serves all artists and arts organizations in this region. Our office is based out of 5500 University Pkwy # VA307, San Bernardino, California, United States. We also have a community space at the Garcia Center for the Arts in downtown San Bernardino, CA.

Name: SARAH DALY ART
Description:
Sarah Daly is an Australian artist and AI researcher. She is a painter who uses technology as a tool to inform her creative process. She is currently undertaking a PhD at the Queensland University of Technology investigating creative AI. She studied visual arts and art history at the Queensland College of Art and the University of Queensland and completed masters level work at the Chelsea School of Arts in London.

After early years in Papua New Guinea surrounded by local artists, then living across Asia, Europe and Australia, her work is guided by the maps and patterns within landscapes. Her paintings show a deep connection with our environment and an empathy towards how we live. Sarah collaborates with an AI generative adversarial network to create her work. 

Sarah Daly recently produced 106 portraits for the Women in AI Awards 2022 and was the AI Artist in Residence at the ISPIM Innovation Conference in Copenhagen in June 2022. She works from studios in Brisbane and Barcelona.

Name: INTERFERENCE
Description:
INTERFERENCE LIGHT ART PROJECT est un projet communautaire et participatif qui vise à être l’initiateur du premier festival de lumière en Tunisie et en Afrique.

Durant le festival, les lumières s'associent à l'art, à travers le mapping, des projections,.. et en interaction avec l'architecture et le design, accompagnés de réflexions sur des sujets bien spécifiques, qui se rapportent à la société, la culture et l'économie.

Une trentaine d’artistes Tunisiens et internationaux pionniers dans le domaine du light art, sélectionnés par notre équipe de curateurs, vont vivre dans la Médina pour collaborer et échanger avec la communauté locale pour préparer des installations lumineuses ouvertes au grand publique.

Ces artistes invités vont créer des œuvres sur mesure pour répondre a un objectif : le partage d’une sensibilité pour la lumière comme medium et le désir de créer ,ensemble ,une synergie créative.

Cela mettra l’accent notamment sur le rôle de l’artiste quant à son engagement à promouvoir une culture démocratique, ainsi que l’étude de l’art en espace publique comme moteur de changement.

Name: Customworks
Description:
Customworks specialises in manufacturing bespoke gifts for the heritage, museum and tourism markets around the world. With low minimum production runs, our products appeal to a wide range of clients, from some of the most prestigious art institutions to the smallest of heritage sites. 

Our team has grown from just 6 to over 50 since 1998. During the past 25 years our sales and design teams have become experts in the heritage market and also in retail merchandising. With this expert knowledge we are able to offer advice on the right product mix and design for specific museum and tourist sites. 

In addition to our bespoke service, Customworks licenses the most iconic images from the world of art and literature and offers these wholesale to the retail, heritage and tourism markets. Our wholesale collections include William Morris, van Gogh, Monet, and Frida Kahlo.

A la portée de tous publics, nous nous démarquons par nos pièces uniques, originales et modernes, qui séduisent aussi bien les acheteurs particuliers que professionnels. Interlocuteur privilégié auprès des artistes, nous sommes consultés par des amateurs d’art et des spécialistes à la recherche d’œuvres de qualité.

Nous proposons à nos clients une offre clé-en-mains comprenant le repérage, la vente et la livraison des œuvres, pour un service de qualité, à l’image de la galerie.

Inaugurée début 2015, la galerie est fortement implantée localement et connaît un essor touchant une clientèle internationale.

Name: Stanley Picker Gallery
Description: Stanley Picker Gallery at Kingston University is one of the leading examples of a university gallery in the UK. Its public activities are dedicated to the research, commissioning and presentation of innovative new practice across the fields of art, design and architecture for general, academic and specialist audiences.

Name: Literature Works
Description:
The home for creative writers in the south west of England. We are an arts organisation and a registered charity offering access to stories and creative writing.  We support progression and we showcase talent. We offer paid opportunities to writers and we work with communities.

We nurture talent: Literature Works exists to support new, developing and established writers in the South West from diverse communities. Literature is for everyone and we all have tales to tell. We offer a programme of courses, masterclasses, mentoring and advice, supporting writers to develop their craft and sustain a living as working writers.

We break down barriers:  Literature Works champions the use of creative writing and reading as a socially engaged practice to strengthen communities and enhance wellbeing, helping to tackle key challenges, such as social isolation, inequality and discrimination.

We share our expertise and love of literature by working in collaboration with fantastic partners from a range of sectors including, education, healthcare, commercial publishers and booksellers and many more arts and heritage organisations.

We connect people: to each other, to opportunities and to their stories.

Name: Questmite
Description: We are a one-of-a-kind content website that keeps up with all the Business, Technology, and Lifestyle & Culture developments across the world.

Name: Zinnema
Description:
Zinnema’s doors are wide open for amateur artists looking to flourish within the rich and diverse atmosphere of a big city. Zinnema encourages artists to explore their inner most selves and find inspiration in both familiar and unfamiliar places.

It is a professional home for your projects, but also a platform for support and collaboration.

Name: Made In Future
Description: Um estúdio cultural que olha para futuros através de uma comunidade digital desenhada para aprimorar nossa visão sobre o contexto contemporâneo.

Name: Videodrome 2
Description: Lieu indépendant dédié à la diffusion cinématographique alternative, animé par une programmation collective, passionnée, frénétique.

Name: 39+ Art Space
Description:
Established in January 2022, 39+ Art Space is a Singapore-based art gallery that focuses on showcasing artworks and collections of upcoming and established international artists. The gallery was born out of a desire to introduce and promote international artists across Asia, by introducing Asian artists to the global stage - as well as to work with post-war secondary art sectors.
 
Close to Central Business District (CBD), it is located at 39 Keppel Road Tanjong Pagar Distripark, a developing and innovative multidisciplinary arts cluster with rich heritage. It inhabits the same warehouse building as Singapore Art Museum (SAM), the annual showcase of S.E.A Focus, and tax-free art storage warehouse.

Name: MOMENTUM WORLDWIDE, The global platform for time-based art
Description:
MOMENTUM is a non-profit platform for time-based art, active worldwide since 2010, with headquarters in Berlin. Having been founded by Dr. Rachel Rits-Volloch in Australia as a parallel event to the 17 Biennale of Sydney in May 2010, MOMENTUM moved to Berlin in January 2011. 

MOMENTUM’s program is composed of local and international Exhibitions, Artist and Curator Residencies, Video Art in Public Space Initiatives, a Performance Program and Archive, an Education Archive, and a growing Collection.

By enabling Exhibition, Discussion, Research, Creation, Collection, and Exchange, MOMENTUM is a platform which challenges the notion of time-based art in the context of both historical and technological development. Visual languages continue to evolve in concert with the technologies which drive them, and it is the role of visual artists to push the limits of these languages. As the world speeds up, and time itself seems to flow faster, MOMENTUM provides a program focused on the growing diversity and relevance of time-based practices, exploring how time-based art reflects the digitization of our societies and the resulting cultural change.  

Positioned as both a local and global platform, MOMENTUM serves as a bridge joining professional art communities, irrespective of institutional and national borders. Working on a model of international partnerships and cooperations, MOMENTUM supports artists and artistic innovation, bringing to Berlin work by international artists that would not otherwise have been seen here, and ensuring an international audience for exceptional local artists. The key ideas driving MOMENTUM are: Cooperation, Exchange, Education, Innovation, and Inspiration. MOMENTUM continuously seeks innovative answers to the question ‘What is time-based art?’.

MORE INFO: http://momentumworldwide.org/about-us/mission/

Name: LeCollectionneurModerne
Description:
LeCollectionneurModerne is a cross-media project that offers a new way of discovering contemporary art through the Internet.

Our videos are created as virtual exhibitions of art works series.They show their physical appearances and highlight the artist’s commitment.

Through social networks, our website or our partners virtual galleries, users will be informed of current events and will be able to buy creations of the most inspired artists, with just a few clicks.

Name: Studio Sixty Six
Description: Founded in 2013. We represent emerging, mid-career, and established artists from across Canada in our national capital, Ottawa.

Name: Galerie Charlot
Description:
Galerie Charlot is a fine art company based out/in France.

Valérie Hasson-Benillouche founded Galerie Charlot in 2010 with the desire of defending innovative practices in contemporary art and developing the relationship between Art, Technology and Science. 

OFF exhibitions such as Artists and Robots (Grand Palais, Paris 2018), Coding the World (2018), The Factory of the Living (2019) at the Centre Pompidou or Electronic Superhighways (Whitechapel, London, 2016) reﬂect the place of the gallery’s artists within international institutions.

The gallery’s artists are part of collections such as the Hermes Collection, Société Générale, FMAC, CCC OD, Audemars Piguet, Moma, Whitney Museum, Tate Modern, ZKM, Oddo, C21 Hotels, Shisheido...Frankel, Beep, Artphilein foundations...

The gallery is a reference for a clientele which ranges from young to leading art collectors appreciating its challenging vision for today’s and tomorrow’s talents.

Name: Oklahoma Arts Institute at Quartz Mountain
Description:
The Oklahoma Arts Institute at Quartz Mountain is a private, non-profit organization with a mission to provide exceptional multidisciplinary arts experiences that develop individual talent and inspire a lifelong passion for the arts. Since 1977, the Oklahoma Arts Institute has recruited nationally renowned artists to teach a fine arts program for talented Oklahoma youth and a series of continuing education workshops for adults. All programs are held at the Quartz Mountain Arts and Conference Center in Lone Wolf, Oklahoma.

The Oklahoma Summer Arts Institute is an intensive, two-week academy in the literary, visual, and performing arts for Oklahoma’s most artistically advanced high school students. Students are selected through a statewide competitive audition process, and all accepted students automatically receive a full scholarship to the program, worth over $4,200.

The Oklahoma Fall Arts Institute is a series of four-day weekend workshops for educators and adult artists of all ability levels, including true beginners. Instruction is offered in the literary, visual, and performing arts, including workshops tailored to educators, who can receive full scholarships to the program. Over 50,000 Oklahoma public school children are reached each year through their teachers’ attendance at the Fall Institute.

The Oklahoma Arts Institute at Quartz Mountain is funded through a unique public/private partnership. Major funding is provided by private donors secured by the Oklahoma Arts Institute, with matching funds from the Oklahoma State Department of Education and additional support from the Oklahoma Arts Council and the Oklahoma Tourism and Recreation Department.

Name: Muzeum Łazienki Królewskie
Description: Muzeum Łazienki Królewskie to letnia rezydencja króla Stanisława Augusta. Tworzą ją klasycystyczne zabytki i historyczne ogrody.

Name: A+g Design Resources
Description:
We are an art consulting firm specializing in creating artwork packages for Healthcare | Senior Living | Student and High-Rise Residential | Corporate spaces. Servicing our clients nationwide with white-glove art delivery and on-site coordination. 

Whether your vision is to reflect brand, make a bold artistic statement, or create calming experiences, we creatively build custom packages to visually enhance & compliment the design & architecture of any space.

What We Do: 
Art Consulting
Art Design & Fabrication
Graphic Design
Custom Framing
Large Format Printing
Accessory Solutions
Nationwide Delivery, White Glove On-site Coordination & Installation

Name: Gallery Veronica Ruiz de Velasco
Description:
Veronica Ruiz De Velasco possesses an innate talent for brush stroke, color and technique that was cultivated under some of the world’s masters. Her artwork comes alive, however, as she lays her heart and soul into each painting. Veronica’s vision is to share her passion with the world, mentor young upcoming artists and share in the art world as it has shared with her.

Veronica Ruiz De Velasco stands among the greatest living artists of our time. Her talent has been recognized as genius by the masters, and her technique is only surpassed by her passion for every piece of art she creates.

As a young woman, Veronica considered putting her passion and enthusiasm toward a career in acting but soon learned that a love and talent for art lived deep within her soul. Her innate talent was quickly noted by top artists in the Mexican art community, and she became a rising star. Mexican master, Teodulo Romulo, saw in Veronica a unique talent that had to be nurtured and encouraged.

Shortly after being discovered by the masters of the Mexican art community, Ruiz de Velasco was invited to individually exhibit her work at the Museo de Arte Moderno (National Museum of Modern Art) in Mexico. She was the youngest artist ever to receive this honor at that time. The Museo de Arte Moderno included Ruiz de Velasco in their prestigious 25-year anniversary book featuring Mexico's leading artists.

As the young artist’s talent began to create a buzz in the art community of Mexico City, the world began to take notice. Artistic masters in Mexico and Europe opened their doors to support Veronica and help her refine her technique. Her natural artistic talents were catapulted with the help of the best schools and private teachings in the world.

As the worldwide art community recognized and lined up to support the rising star, Veronica’s success was nearly instantaneous.

Name: MeetFactory
Description:
MeetFactory is a non-profit international center for contemporary art founded in 2001 by the artist David Černý. 

The program of MeetFactory consists in four dramaturgic departments - music, theatre, gallery and the artist-in-residence program. 

The music program presents the international independent music scene, holding six to eight performances per month in the music hall fitted with high-end audio equipment. 

The theatre program focuses on contemporary prose, as well as experimental interdisciplinary projects, often involving visual artists, musicians, or non-actors. 

The three galleries offer space for critical confrontation of the national and international art scenes. The MeetFactory Gallery focuses on original curatorial projects, while the Kostka Gallery presents solo shows of emerging and established artists. The program of the Wall Gallery, a side-facade of the building, comprises of large-scale realizations beyond street art. 

The international Artist-in-Residence program is the largest studio program in the Czech Republic. MeetFactory facilitates fifteen studios, which annually host over thirty visual artists, curators, musicians, theatre directors or writers. We foster the involvement of our artists in residence not only within the programming of MeetFactory, but also in the context of the Czech and Central European art scenes. 

Besides the four dramaturgic departments the program of MeetFactory is oriented on inter-genre and educational projects which offer the public new forms of encounter with contemporary art.

Name: Art-Thessaloniki International Contemporary Art Fair
Description: Art-Thessaloniki International Contemporary Art Fair is an international art fair held in Thessaloniki, Greece organized by TIF HELEXPO SA and Pantelis Tsatsis (Art Director).

Name: BmoreArt
Description:
BmoreArt is an independent, Baltimore-based magazine that reflects the art and culture of our city and the surrounding region, including Maryland, Washington, DC, and Northern Virginia. We provide creative and critical coverage of the cultural landscape and work with a diverse team of local writers, editors, and artists.

Our thematic print journal is released twice a year in fall and spring, and our online site is updated daily. To encourage participation and inclusion in the region, BmoreArt publishes a weekly event “Picks” post every Tuesday, a curated list of the best upcoming exhibits and events. The site also includes a calendar of cultural events, a gallery and resource guide, a weekly e-newsletter, and opportunities to participate, share, and comment. In addition to our online and print publications, we engage through social media and events, including magazine launch parties in Baltimore’s most iconic locations and speaker series for artists, collectors, and arts professionals.

Name: PLUS-ONE Projects
Description:
PLUS-ONE is a contemporary art gallery that represents and exhibits a mix of Belgian and international artists. The gallery also seeks collaboration with different participants within the visual arts scene in order to create curated projects.

We invite the starting and established collectors and contemporary art enthusiasts to discover the visual art we show that in our opinion is striking within the contemporary art world.

The gallery has 2 locations, one in Berchem, in the former warehouse of a shirtmaker, and the second in Nieuw Zuid, an exciting and ambitious urban development in the south (zuid) part of the city where the museums are located.

Name: Festival Jaim
Description:
JAIM //Jeux-Arts-Industrie-Mulhouse// est un festival populaire et inédit en France fédérant les acteurs du territoire du Sud Alsace. 

Pour sa 1ère édition les 24, 25, 26 juin 2022, le programme est ambitieux. Les animations sont multidisciplinaires et multiformes afin de faire au plaisir le public. 
Les entreprises industrielles, le monde de l’éducation, des institutions culturelles, des associations sportives et de loisirs ainsi que des artistes participent à la dynamique et la vie du festival. 

Les collectivités locales, régionales, européennes ainsi que des mécènes et des passionnés portent cet événement à la croisée des chemins entre industrie, arts, innovations, jeux et émotions. 

Ainsi est né JAIM, le festival de l’industrie, imaginé par la Société Industrielle de Mulhouse et Mulhouse Alsace Attractiv’. Tous ces acteurs souhaitent donner une image remarquable et distinctive de l’industrie en France et au-delà.

Name: Trias, Centrum voor de Kunsten
Description:
Trias, Centrum voor de Kunsten is een kunsteducatiecentrum in de gemeenten Rijswijk en Leidschendam-Voorburg. Trias biedt cursussen op het gebied van kunst en cultuur aan kinderen, jongeren en volwassenen. Trias biedt een breed kunsteducatieprogramma met groepslessen en samenspel in alle kunstdisciplines. Bij Trias kun je cursussen muziek, dans, theater, beeldend en nieuwe media volgen.

Kunsteducatie bestaat uit workshops, lessen en cursussen door professionele kunstdocenten, waarin aandacht wordt besteed aan het aanleren van praktische vaardigheden, reflecterend vermogen en presenteren. Presentaties van de cursisten horen daarbij. Er wordt deelgenomen aan festivals, er worden festivals georganiseerd en er zijn verbindingen met culturele instellingen en amateurverenigingen.

Groepslessen zijn een belangrijke pijler binnen de filosofie van Trias. Dit onderwijskundig model heeft zich in de loop der jaren bewezen. Samen kunst beleven betekent afstemmen en elkaar de ruimte geven. Dit leidt tot meer begrip en waardering voor elkaar. Verschillen in culturele achtergrond, huidskleur of opleidingsniveau blijken dan geen hindernissen meer. Het versterkt de onderlinge verbondenheid. Leerlingen werken samen, luisteren naar elkaar, helpen elkaar en leren elkaar accepteren en waarderen.

In ruim een kwart eeuw heeft Trias zich niet alleen toegelegd op kunsteducatie in de vrije tijd, maar richt ze haar activiteiten ook op het regulier onderwijs, omdat hier de primaire doelgroep te vinden is. Dat betekent een uitbreiding van de programmering voor (brede) scholen voor het primair onderwijs (inclusief naschoolse opvang) en voortgezet onderwijs. 

Trias biedt een uitgebreid programma aan basisscholen en middelbare scholen. Samen met de school wordt gekeken waar de behoeftes liggen.

Name: AsK Writes
Description: ASK write is a company dealing with all the content writing tasks since 2015. We help people in writing quality content and deliver it to the client with no possible revisions required.

Name: Palacio de Memoria
Description: Palacio De Memoria is a restored pre war mansion and cultural destination from the 1930s. It was abandoned in the 1980s and in 2015, by adaptive reuse inspired by the original Spanish revival style mansion and art deco and post-war architecture, it is transformed into an arts and events center, museum, and auction house. Thus Palacio de Memoria was reopened to the public since 2018.

Name: Perkins Center for the Arts
Description:
Perkins Center for the Arts is recognized by the New Jersey State Council on the Arts as a Major Presenting Organization and has received a Citation of Excellence, for arts programs that promote participation, understanding, and communication among diverse audiences. The Center presents free and fee-based arts programs which support and expand relationships with artists, students, members, donors and new audiences in Burlington, Camden, Gloucester Counties and the greater Delaware Valley region. Perkins Center was incorporated in 1977 and is housed in a historic 1910 Tudor home and carriage house. In 2002, the Center expanded to a second facility in Collingswood, NJ. 

The Center has developed strong community-based arts programs for the audiences we serve with a special focus in the city of Camden. Perkins Center's community-based programs are built on partnerships with organizations that have a complementary vision of the importance of the arts for individuals as well as the arts importance in the building of communities. Perkins Center strives to enrich lives and inspire learning, collaboration, interdisciplinary and intercultural experiences through the arts. We believe that quality arts experiences, made available to all members of society, have the power to transform people's lives and bring about positive change.

Name: WD Art Gallery
Description:
With a taste developed for research and the desire to share, WD Art gallery is committed to helping you discover known and unknown artists from the late 19th and 20th centuries. The works of art on offer, mostly figurative (paintings, drawings, lithographs, photographs, etc.), are selected by qualified experts.
 
 
Aimed at both amateurs and collectors, the gallery offers works at prices consistent with its desire to democratize art.
 
 
United by the same passion, the two founders with atypical careers, Bertrand Delbos and Nathan Waks have agreed to offer you this new way of disseminating art. For them, each work sold by the gallery should be an opportunity to learn or to discover.

Name: Antiquarian Booksellers Association
Description: Founded in 1906 and the oldest organisation of its kind in the world, the Antiquarian Booksellers’ Association is the senior trade body for dealers in antiquarian and rare books, manuscripts and allied materials in the UK, Ireland and overseas. Members are elected solely on the basis of proven experience, expertise and integrity. They are expected to observe the highest professional and ethical standards and to foster the mutual trust and respect that exists between the trade and the public.

Name: Phoenix Athens Gallery and Residency
Description:
Phoenix Athens is a nonprofit gallery and residency space in Athens Greece that was started in November 2018 by Greek-American artist Dimitri Yin. 

Phoenix Athens provides two gallery spaces for exhibitions, allowing residents and locals to share and exhibit their art and engage with the community through talks and workshops. 
The Villa Exarchia Residency provides residencies to artists and students who wish to produce and exhibit work that is inspired or informed by Greece. Mentorship and guidance is provided to residents with networking opportunities also made available through the public programme.

Phoenix Athens aims to provide an inclusive and democratic model for the arts, serving as a bridge between generations as well as communities of individuals in Greece.

Name: Vertigo
Description:
Vertigo does light art installations, often large scale, often outdoors.

Projects include:
2019: Ekko, light and sound installation, Copenhagen Contemporary
2018: The Wave, outdoor light art installation, London Lumiere Festival
2018: Kongens Fald, video scenography, Royal Theatre, Copenhagen
2018: WeatherLoop, Light and sound installation, Rundetårn, Copenhagen  2018: Ghosts & Robots, lighting scenography, Royal Theatre, Copenhagen
2017: Volitant, light and sound installation, Reflektor Light Festival, Copenhagen

Name: Passion Works
Description:
To Inspire and Liberate the Human Spirit Through the Arts!

Passion Works Studio invites makers of all abilities to work and thrive within partnerships celebrating the power of creativity, connection and purpose.

Name: Warrior Painters
Description:
Warrior Painters was founded in 2016 as a way to connect artists from all walks of life, who share the same passion of capturing natural and architectural diversity through plein-air painting. We are best known for organizing weekend paint sessions in Los Angeles and San Francisco. During this social distancing time, we organize virtual paint sessions and many other fun events on Discord. 

With 2,400+ members on Facebook, the group has found its way to bring together professionals as well as aspiring artists both in-person and online. 

Each of us has a variety of skill sets, and we pride ourselves on our inclusiveness. Our philosophy is: Everyone has something to contribute to the artistic discourse.

To learn more, follow us on Instagram @warriorpainters or join our Facebook Group "Weekend Warrior Painters"

Also check out our art training branch Warrior Art Camp: https://www.warriorartcamp.com/

If you are interested in gallery collaborations or brand sponsorships, please contact: warriorpainters@gmail.com

Name: Efie Gallery
Description:
Efie Gallery is a contemporary art gallery in Dubai specialising in the representation and advancement of artists of African origin, both from the African continent and its global diaspora.

Since its inception in 2021, and the opening of its permanent space in 2022 in Al Khayat Art Avenue, the gallery has been establishing itself as a global platform for some of Africa’s most significant artists, working with the likes of El Anatsui, Aïda Muluneh, Maggie Otieno, Isshaq Ismail and Yaw Owusu.

Efie Gallery enables and supports cross-cultural exchange between Africa, the Middle East and beyond. In addition to its wide-ranging roster of artists and exhibitions, the gallery operates a dynamic residency programme that facilitates collaborations with local artists, institutions and community members, supporting artists in the narrative and vision of their work.

Part of Dubai’s Al Quoz Creative Zone, set to become a world-leading hub for creativity and entrepreneurship, Efie Gallery aims to create a vibrant ecosystem for contemporary African art in the UAE. The space also displays the gallery’s founders’ collection of rare vinyl and shellac records from around the world, celebrating the intersection of art and music.

Efie is the Twi word for ‘home’, addressing the notion of belonging and how it can be determined by culture, history and identity for communities across the world. Founded by Ghanaian family Valentina, Kwame and Kobi Mintah, Efie Gallery is committed to fostering dialogue between African artists and the wider world.

Name: London Art Portfolio

Name: Masterworks Fine Art Inc.
