Description: In the mid-1970s, Masterworks Fine Art was a sole proprietorship. Our first website was launched in 1993 and by November, 2001 Masterworks Fine Art was founded. Our business philosophy of establishing a lifetime of personal and professional relationships with our clients allows us to look to collectors' long-term needs, removing the urgency or pressure on our part from any particular transaction. By listening carefully and sharing our knowledge and experience, Masterworks Fine Art strives to enhance the collecting experience for our clients. We seek to aid the art buyer to make informed and wise decisions when looking to purchase works of fine art. Masterworks Fine Art is confident that the interested collector will find value and quality in the artwork we offer that range from the 16th century all the way to contemporary artists.

Name: Art Resource, Inc
Description:
Art Resource is the world’s most comprehensive fine art database available for licensing, comprised of more than 3,000,000 digital images, accessible via user-friendly search by subject, theme, location or artist’s name through its website, www.artres.com. Art Resource's expert staff are on hand to offer clients a full range of research services. We put the power of the masterpiece at your fingertips.

Art Resource functions as the official rights and permissions bureau for approximately 200 of the world's major museums and collections including The Museum of Modern Art, The Metropolitan Museum of Art, The Whitney Museum of American Art, The Art Institute of Chicago, The Guggenheim Museum, The Los Angeles County Museum of Art, The Kimbell Art Museum, The Morgan Library & Museum, and the Smithsonian American Art Museum. 

Along with our North American presence, we also represent from abroad The National Gallery London, Tate Britain, The British Museum as well as all 51 national museums of France, under the aegis of the Réunion des Musées Nationaux, including the Musee du Louvre, the Musee d'Orsay, the Musee Picasso, Centre Georges Pompidou, the Musee and Chateaux of Versailles, and as well as all 21 Berlin State Museums, among them the Egyptian Museum and the Pergamon Museum.

In addition, Art Resource represents fine art images from over 6,000 museums, institutions and monuments worldwide on a non-exclusive basis.

Name: ZHEN.
Description:
ZHEN. is an artwork authentication platform powered by blockchain. 

In the spirit of the company motto, Reimagine Ownership, ZHEN. seeks to upend the everyday experience of owning artwork as we currently know it. By leveraging the properties of blockchain, ZHEN. is revolutionizing the very notion of ownership, expanding its definition to include both the physical and digital worlds and future-proofing provenance through radical transparency.

As one of the first real-world use cases for blockchain, ZHEN. is not only at the forefront of the intersection of art and technology, but also the pioneer of a brand new industry category.

Name: The Carnegie
Description: The Carnegie is a multidisciplinary arts venue for all ages which provides theatre events, educational programs and art exhibitions to the Northern Kentucky and Greater Cincinnati community. The Carnegie facility reflects its threefold nature: within its 17,000 square foot facility are The Carnegie Galleries, crowned by a landmark Beaux Arts dome; the magnificent, newly renovated Otto M. Budig Theatre; and the Eva G. Farris Education center. The Carnegie is the largest arts venue in Northern Kentucky.

Name: Academy of Visual and Performing Arts
Description: Academy of Visual and Performing Arts is a 6-12 creative arts public charter school for students in Fort Worth, Texas and surrounding communities. In 2023-2024, we will welcome 6th and 7th grade students, our founding class.

Name: NOORU BOX
Description:
Bien plus qu’un coffret, la culture en cadeau!
Nooru Box est une box cadeau culturelle: cinéma, littérature, musique, art contemporain. Une fois tous les deux mois recevez une sélection inédites d’articles culturels (magazines, livres, tickets d'expositions, cds, dvds)  & des goodies.
Des histoires exceptionnelles, et la culture avant tout.

Name: PauloBordhin.Arte
Description: Criação de peças – joias, esculturas, gifts, troféus, objetos cenográficos, objetos de decoração, etc – com design exclusivo a partir de fios de alumínio, de telefone, madeiras de demolição e outras materiais de reuso, incorporando conceitos de sustentabilidade, ESG, economia circular, acessibilidade e inclusão de pessoas com deficiência.

Name: Canadian Clay & Glass Gallery
Description:
The Canadian Clay and Glass Gallery is a long-standing site of excellence and a destination for contemporary art for international tourists and regional citizens. Our critically-acclaimed exhibitions challenge ideas and perceptions of the definitions of art, craft and design today. 

Our curatorial criteria sets out to redefine the role and possibilities of a media-specific museum and we lead and influence both the craft and fine arts communities with critical standards while encouraging the ongoing development of scholarship. With an emphasis on Canadian artists, our exhibitions also support international artists whose works span the range of functional, sculptural and experimental practices, stimulate contemplation, conversation and the exchange of ideas. 

A relevant and dynamic cultural organization, the Gallery provides supportive education programs to people from across the Region. Using exhibitions as a starting point, individuals develop arts vocabulary, arts appreciation and cultivate confidence in their interpretation of contemporary artworks. People who return to the Gallery many times come to understand that the Gallery is a space with dynamic exhibitions, ever-changing hands-on programs and multiple opportunities for learning. Our Gallery Shop is recognized on its own merits as a fine craft gallery, showing the best of ceramic and glass work from across the country.

Name: NeuraBloom(not-for-profit)
Description:
Neurodiverse Fine Art Programme

Empowering neurodiverse children through fine art, helping schools, local organisations, and communities build confidence, connection, and creativity locally and globally.

NeuraBloom is a not-for-profit delivering the Neurodiverse Fine Art Programme to enhance personal growth and community engagement. Using fine art, we help participants develop expression, social skills, emotional regulation, and creativity. Guided by our values - Empathy, Creativity, Development, Inclusion sessions are offered in-person or online across the UK, UAE, USA, China, India, Japan, Australia, Canada, Brazil, Germany, and South Korea.

Our Neurodiverse Fine Art Programme uses creative practice as a catalyst for learning, connection, and growth. Designed for children and adults, it supports:
- Expression & Communication
- Social Skills Development
- Emotional Regulation
- Creativity & Imagination
- Sense of Accomplishment
- Fine Motor Skills
- Cognitive Development
- Community Involvement
- Exploration of Interests
- Cultural Awareness

We collaborate with schools, educators, SMEs, PLCs, healthcare providers, and local community organisations to create inclusive, strengths-based workshops. Participants explore creativity safely, develop skills, and connect with peers. Operating in 11 countries, we offer flexible in-person and online options for broad participation.

ESG Funding Opportunity: Q1, Q2-2026
NeuraBloom is looking for local Charity Partnerships to support local communities in Q1 ,Q2-2026. Schools, SMEs, PLCs, and healthcare providers interested in contributing or partnering are encouraged to contact us to express interest.

Get Involved:
- Register Your School or Organisation: Message us to add your school or organisation to our interest list for the Neurodiverse Fine Art Programme.
- Join via: https://tinyurl.com/3af9m8x8

Name: Florida Deaf Art Show, Inc
Description: Florida Deaf Art Show, Inc is a nonprofit organization that promotes both emerging and experienced Deaf artists from the State of Florida.

Name: Musée de la Chartreuse
Description: Le musée de la Chartreuse à Douai dans le Nord-Pas-de-Calais est un musée installé dans un ensemble de bâtiments historiques et qui rassemble dans ses murs plus de 10 000 œuvres réunies à partir de la Révolution grâce à des dons et des achats successifs.

Name: Art Enables
Description: Art Enables supports the creative and professional growth of artists with disabilities, spotlights their valuable contributions to the arts, and builds an inclusive arts community through public engagement and awareness.

Name: ICO Partner in Kunst & Cultuur
Description: Het ICO Partner in Kunst & Cultuur is een professionele advies-, project- en netwerkorganisatie. De missie van het ICO is om mensen hun creatieve vermogens te laten ontdekken, ontplooien en uitdrukken. Het ICO werkt samen met een netwerk van zelfstandige professionals en andere samenwerkingspartners. Het ICO is actief in de gemeenten Aa en Hunze, Assen, Midden-Drenthe, Noordenveld en Tynaarlo en richt zich op de markten onderwijs en amateurkunst.

Name: ARTPAUGÉE
Description:
Créée en 2014, Artpaugée est née à Toulouse de l’association de deux commissaires-priseurs, Géraldine Martres et Pauline Maringe. 

Actives au niveau national, elles organisent plusieurs ventes aux enchères par an, dans diverses spécialités (bijoux et argenterie, tableaux anciens et modernes, numismatique, Extrême-Orient, armes, mobilier, objets d’art, livres anciens, etc.). 

Artpaugée est une société de ventes aux enchères jeune et moderne qui a su s’adapter aux évolutions de la profession.

Name: Woman Made Gallery
Description:
Woman Made Gallery is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization. Woman Made Gallery is a space for women and nonbinary artists, including trans women and femme/feminine-identifying genderqueer artists. We welcome artists from our local community, regionally based, and around the world.

Since our founding in 1992, WMG has shown the artistic work of more than 10,000 women and nonbinary artists in 475 exhibitions. Currently WMG is hosting eight exhibitions annually in Chicago’s University Village neighborhood location. WMG boasts a membership base of more than 350 artists annually.

Name: De Wieger Deurne
Description: De Wieger is gevestigd in het voormalige woonhuis, annex dokterspraktijk en schildersatelier van de legendarische schilderende huisarts Hendrik Wiegersma (1891-1969). De collectie van De Wieger is opgebouwd rond het werk van Wiegersma en tijdgenoten zoals Charley Toorop, Jan Sluijters, Else Berg, Toon Kelder, Dirk Filarski, Mathieu Wiegman e.v.a. In het museum krijgt u een beeld van het leven en werk van Hendrik Wiegersma en zijn wisselende exposities te zien. In de ateliers vinden wisseltentoonstellingen plaats van hedendaagse kunstenaars.

Name: Adrian Sassoon
Description: London's leading dealer in museum-quality contemporary ceramics, glass, metalwork, hardstone and French 18th Century porcelain. By appointment only.

Name: Artbox
Description:
Founded in 2013, Artbox is an artist-led creative consultancy operating at the intersection of art, technology, placemaking and economic development. We work with partners to augment places with unique experiences to:
- Activate spaces and foster community building by highlighting heritage & points of pride
- Increase & extend visitation by designing memorable and shareable VX
- Improve employee, customer & tenant retention
- Meaningfully convey brand & ESG values

Working collaboratively with artists, makers and designers, we leverage strategic insights and delivery expertise to create meaningful and engaging destination experiences. We provide art consultancy, creative activation and placemaking services - from strategy, curation, creative programming, concept development to implementation.

Our lean agile methodology differentiates us from other creative agencies: we hone in on establishing a shared understanding of your objectives, the ‘Why’, before defining and implementing a solution, the ‘What’, to achieve the best problem-solution fit.

We manage arts projects and art procurement for all tiers of government, non-profits and businesses. We provide collaborative end-to-end support for artists and partners, working with our wide networks of trusted subject matter experts.

Whether you have a problem to solve or a project to deliver, we’d love to talk.

Book an intro chat here: https://calendly.com/christie-artbox/

Name: ART-ATHINA
Description: General Director

Name: Siena Art Institute
Description:
The Siena Art Institute (SART) is a non-profit arts & sustainability organization based in the heart of Siena, Italy.

Since 2010 we lead a unique study abroad experience for Undergraduate or Post-Baccalaureate art, writing, sustainability, museum studies, political sciences and art history students. We also host artist residencies, Project Fellowships, sustainability experts residencies and a visiting artist program. For the local community, we offer art & sustainability courses, training and volunteering opportunities, talks and events.

We manage a space for horticultural, beekeeping and permacultural experimentation, "Ortoaperto". Classes and artist studios are hosted in our headquarters, a building part of the former psychiatric hospital architectural complex called Il Punto|The Point.
In 2022 the Siena Art Institute helped creating Art Cloud Greece, its sister organisation based in Athens (Greece). The organisation involves SART alumni and former resident artists and promotes workshops, training opportunities, art projects and exhibitions.
In 2024 we inaugurated our "Hidden Garden", a small grove in the shadow of Siena's medieval walls. The space, open to all - students, artists and visitors - is sustainably managed and accessible to blind, deaf and deaf-blind people.

Since 2025 the Siena Art Institute manages The Peace Room project, developed thanks to a grant from the Region of Tuscany and Giovanisì for Toscanaincontemporanea2025.

Name: Atelier Xavier Veilhan
Description: L'Atelier poético-fonctionnel de l'artiste Xavier Veilhan.

Name: Pencils n Brushes artworks
Description:
Set up in 2010, Pencils n Brushes artworks is a Visual art and design service company in the arts and crafts industry in Nigeria.  The company was officially launched in 2011. Pencils n Brushes artworks was created to be a safe haven for artist and creative minds to create the most spectacular art form seen in the country. 

Thus the company searches for the best hands, teaches and employs disciplined and creative artists with potential. A present dissatisfaction with the situation of visual artist and visual art in their immediate environment and this partly prompted the creation of the company. 

Overtime the company has created a mark in the art industry, changing the face of art one art at a time. It has also hosted mini exhibitions with its main exhibition in the G.E.M.S.T.O.N.E  leadership center, interviewed by Afro art media and has been recognized as a company poised to change the views about art in the country. 

Pencils n Brushes  is currently involved in Project Raise which seeks to empower young minds. The project is in partnership with G.E.M.S.T.O.N.E leadership center (owned by Fela Durotoye) and targets students in Primary schools, inspiring them and teaching them to balance their talents with their education. 

Pencils n brushes artworks is trusted by clients like : Wema Bank Plc, Enyo retail and Supply, Chocolate city Group, Guinness Nigeria Plc, 2706 Events, Bella Naija, LAFARGE, Stanbic IBTC, British American Tobacco, Wedding Guru etc.

Name: Teatr im. Juliusza Słowackiego w Krakowie
Description:
Teatr im. Juliusza Słowackiego w Krakowie to przestrzeń pasjonujących artystycznych spotkań twórców z widzami. 
To tutaj wiele ważnych dla polskiej kultury wydarzeń zdarzyło się po raz pierwszy. I zdarza się nieustannie.
~~~
Słowacki - ten od Dziadów!

Name: Artemis Fine Art Services
Description:
Artemis Fine Art Services is a full-logistics company specializing in the secure transportation of fine art objects, museum artifacts, and antiquities. Our team of professionals provide clients with the most comprehensive art handling, crating, and storage services. 

 Based in Dallas, Texas, we provide assurance to our clients with dedication and standards of superlative care for the preservation and protection of their collections.

Name: La Société des Auteurs de Jeux
Description: La SAJ est née d’un constat lié à l’évolution du marché du jeu de société : le nombre de jeux édités augmente, le nombre d’éditeurs également, et le nombre d’auteurs avec. Le milieu du jeu de société se professionnalise indéniablement, et force a été de constater que les auteurs n’étaient pas formellement représentés ni organisés. La question du statut fiscal de l’auteur par rapport aux institutions françaises, la reconnaissance du métier d’auteur de jeux et les difficultés pour les auteurs de jeux à se professionnaliser sont autant de problèmes qui restent à résoudre collectivement.

Name: Original Magazine
Description: Original Magazine is a contemporary and multidisciplinary publication. One of our aims is to provide a dedicated platform in which to grow the visibility of diverse creatives in the industry, and encourage them to amplify their voice through the art they create, as creativity is the perfect outlet to showcase individuality.

Name: The Contemporary Dayton
Description: The Contemporary Dayton, (The Co) formerly Dayton Visual Arts Center, was founded in 1991 by a coalition of Dayton-area artists, art supporters, and visual arts professionals who saw a need for more interaction between the public and regional artists. The Co’s founders established an organization that allows the community to see and experience the wealth and diversity of visual art being created in the area and to get to know these artists. In its 30-year history, The Co has presented a schedule of exhibitions that has explored the variety and diversity of the visual arts in communities from Dayton, Ohio and internationally.

Name: CUCO ARTS
Description: Ayudamos a mejorar la experiencia al descubrir y trabajar con creadores locales de todo el mundo. Encuéntranos en todas las plataformas sociales como @cucoarts

Name: Glorious
Description:
Welcome to Glorious. We are a creative NFT studio and marketplace working with the world’s finest artists, musicians, athletes and rights holders to create authentic, timeless and joyous digital masterpieces. 

We believe that collecting art can be as life-affirming and joyful as creating it. That the human desire to appreciate creativity is an expression of our tastes, our values and our personality. That collecting art should always be a glorious experience. No matter where it lives. That’s why we harness the powers of decentralised technologies to bring you original art that is certified authentic and opens new realms of creative opportunity. 

Our team curates world-class and breath-taking content at the cutting edge of this artistic frontier to deliver enduring and timeless works of art. We also use blockchain to empower artists and creators. We pay them through percentage royalties in perpetuity – every time their work changes hands – so they get both the recognition and reward we believe all creators deserve.

By bringing artists and collectors closer together and leading the way in this digital art revolution, we aim to create a community of creative adventurers. To usher in a new age of artistic innovation and make moments, memories and experiences that encapsulate the beauty and glorious power of human creativity.

Name: Desa Modern
Description:
Desa Modern jest inicjatorem wyjątkowego projektu limitowanych edycji dzieł sztuki –
inkografii. Inkografie to prace o charakterze kolekcjonerskim, współtworzone przy udziale
najwybitniejszych artystów współczesnych, m.in.: Edwarda Dwurnika, Rafała Olbińskiego, Waldemara
Świerzego, Jana Dobkowskiego, Tadeusza Dominika, Jarosława Modzelewskiego.

Inkografia to forma grafiki powstała za zgodą i pod nadzorem autora, co potwierdza odręczna
sygnatura artysty na każdej pracy. Wykorzystanie nowoczesnej techniki graficznej oraz najwyższej
jakości papieru pozwalają na idealne odwzorowanie obrazu stworzonego na płótnie. Desa Modern
czuwa nad tym, żeby wszystkie inkografie były odpowiednio edycjonowane. Każda posiada także
szereg specjalnych oznaczeń: indywidualny hologram z logo DESA Modern i dodatkową numeracją
kodową umożliwiającą identyfikację, wycisk suchej pieczęci oraz certyfikat na zabezpieczonym
papierze opisujący pracę i jej proweniencje.

Inkografie to niezwykły pomysł dla osób kochających sztukę. Stanowią idealne uzupełnienie aranżacji
wnętrza. Doskonale współgrają z kameralną przestrzenią prywatnych apartamentów, potrafią też
wnieść prestiż i energię koloru do przestrzeni biurowych i salonów firm.

Name: OBORO
Description:
Founded with the conviction that living transcultural artistic experiences contribute to the betterment of humankind, OBORO* is an artist-run centre that favors the development of art practices locally, nationally, and internationally. OBORO’s sphere of activity encompasses visual and media arts, performing arts, new technologies, and emerging practices.

OBORO’s more specific mandate is to support creation in various cultural practices; to encourage innovation, experimentation, the exchange of ideas, and the sharing of knowledge. OBORO’s objective is to promote awareness and dialogue within the art world and society at large and to contribute to a culture of peace.

* The name “OBORO” appeared in a dream and in a poem by Claude-Marie Caron. “OBORO” evokes the ancient myth of the “ouroboros”, the dragon-snake that swallows its tail and symbolizes transformation, renewal and a universe in continuous evolution.

Name: Vision XR Gallery
Description: Vision XR Gallery is an exclusive art gallery displaying contemporary & modern art. With Vision XR, we implement innovative technologies in the artworks and galleries. Every month, we organise a new exhibition featuring international artists.

Name: Casa dos Quadrinhos
Description: Casa dos Quadrinhos – Escola Técnica de Artes Visuais, sediada em Belo Horizonte, se destaca desde 1999 no ensino de Artes Visuais pela sua abordagem didática diferenciada, com base em uma bem estruturada e altamente conceituada equipe de professores e avançada metodologia de ensino, equiparada as melhores escolas do mundo.

Name: Pavart Art Gallery
Description:
Pavart is an emerging Contemporary Art Gallery proposing interesting artworks. Painting, Sculpture, Mixed Media, Fiberart, Performance.
We coordinate and propose Art Projects for Exhibitions and performance in Museums and concept spaces. We support artists in the growth in the Art market.

Name: Agence de mannequins ema
Description: Chez ema, chaque mannequin est orienté selon son potentiel vers les marchés québécois et internationaux en développant une stratégie personnalisée pour bâtir une carrière propre à chacun.

Name: Oliver Brothers Fine Art Restoration + Conservation
Description:
Oliver Brothers,Est.1850 is the oldest fine art restoration firm in the United States. Our firm has been serving our clients for over one hundred and sixty years. 
We restore and preserve paintings, art on paper, antique and contemporary picture frames, gilded objects, books, icons, murals, and sculpture for private collectors, museums, art dealers, auction houses, galleries, corporations, universities, historical societies, libraries, insurance companies, architects, interior designers, and others.

We have set the standard for re lining oil paintings with our patent for vacuum press table in 1937. Virtually every art restorer in the World is using this type of table in their practice today. We have many interesting stories, from armed guard in front of our studio making sure that Rembrandt painting is safe, to many discoveries underneath layers of paint and discolor varnishes.

We had an honor to work on many historically important art restoration projects. Notable artists whose works we have been treated: Avery, Goya, Carracci,Cezanne,Church, Copley, Miro,Paxton, Rembrandt, Rockwell, Wyeth (please see our website for more comprehensive list).

Oliver Brothers works with clients throughout the United States.

Our background working with antique fine art and antique picture frames has guided us in our efforts to assemble a comprehensive selection of historically accurate period frames. In addition to period frames, we also offer a wide range of contemporary picture frames.

We offer museum-quality materials and an inspiring selection of specialty frames and mats. Our conservation framing methods are designed to extend the longevity of your artwork and enhance its beauty.

If you have experienced water, fire or accidental damage to artworks, picture frames, valuable documents, or objects, please call our toll free number (855) 536-2323 or visit our Disaster Response & Recovery page http://www.oliverbrothersonline.com/disaster-response-recovery/ for more information.

Name: Alto - solutions artistiques
Description:
Créée en 2015 par une équipe de passionnées, Alto - solutions artistiques était une structure de production de spectacles vivants et d'accompagnement de projets culturels en France et à l'international. Active et impliquée dans les secteurs du théâtre, du livre, de la danse, du digital et des musiques classiques et actuelles, Alto accompagnait les acteurs culturels dans la recherche de solutions originales et innovantes afin de favoriser leur développement, et mettait à leur disposition les outils nécessaires à la création et la réalisation de tous leurs projets. Notre équipe mettait ses compétences au service d'un objectif : rendre accessible à tous l'expérience de l'art.

Alto a fermé le 31 octobre 2025 : merci à tous de nous avoir suivi !

Name: Politecnico delle Arti Bergamo - Accademia Belle Arti G. Carrara
Description:
Fondata nel 1796 per volontà del conte Giacomo Carrara, l'Accademia di Belle Arti G. Carrara di Bergamo è una delle più antiche accademie italiane.
Dal 2023, insieme al Conservatorio di Musica G. Donizetti, costituisce il Politecnico delle Arti di Bergamo: il primo innovativo polo di Alta formazione artistica in Italia. Un punto di riferimento d’eccellenza riconosciuto dal MUR (Ministero dell'Università e della Ricerca) e parte del sistema AFAM (Alta Formazione Artistica, Musicale e Coreutica).

Name: Daniel Formigo art Gallery
Description: Una pintura que no tiene dificultades no es arte, es manufactura seriada de un individuo ocioso.

Name: ELO Visual Art LLC
Description:
Evan Lorberbaum is a visual artist who creates under the moniker ELO, which is short for his movement "Encourage Life Originality". ELO aims to inspire others to reach their full potential in life through embracing their own individuality.

ELO is a fine artist whose energetic abstract style captivates while leaving the viewer wanting more. Whether it is for a private residence or commercial project, his artwork enriches and provides a spark to any physical space.

In his own words, "My experience as an artist is similar as to how we all navigate through our own lives. I am the author and protagonist of my own story. As I add and subtract layers of paint over one another, while scraping through the surface to unmask hidden perspectives, a certain feeling of welcomed unfamiliarity takes over. I am able to embrace this freedom while making the most of the unexpected through this process. The line leads me throughout controlled chaos, as my stream of consciousness guides this narrative, ultimately determining which stroke I will perform and what the canvas will say, in this life and in the next."

Name: Writearn
Description: writearn एक ऐसी वेबसाइट है, जो घर बैठे पैसा कमाने का अवसर देता है

Name: Zone Art - GEM
Description: Created in 1990, Zone Art is the arts office of Grenoble Ecole de Management. Today, with its nine branches, it is the largest arts student association in France. La Zone Art brings together more than 300 active members around a common goal: to promote and bring culture and art to life in the Grenoble area. The association's versatility is based on its different hubs, as each of them specializes in a particular branch of art (visual arts, theater, cinema, and many others) in order to allow students to open up to all the arts, through frequent and varied events.

Name: Handesmade
Description: منصـة تجمع الحرفيين بمختلف مجالاتهم الحرفية المتنوعة لخلق بيئة تجارية لتطوير سوق الحرفيين وإيصالهم الى شريحة واسعة من العملاء

Name: Association québécoise des Salons du livre (AQSL)
Description: L’Association québécoise des salons du livre est un organisme à but non lucratif qui a pour mission de représenter l'ensemble des Salons du livre membres et de défendre leurs intérêts. Elle soutient ses membres dans l'organisation d’événements d’envergure culturels et littéraires suscitant la rencontre et la découverte auprès des différents publics.

Name: Sam Shuter Studio
Description: Artist Studio

Name: Bienal das Amazônias
Description:
Território Amazônia. Lugar cujos limites ultrapassam fronteiras entre países irmãos. Índios, negros, latinos: Amazônidas. Uma única floresta. Múltiplos sons. Idiomas. Gambiarra fulgurante de cores vibrantes e traços indígenas a percorrer rios que desbravam paisagens intocadas, vilarejos, cidades, megalópoles. Um sem fim de povos separados por seus cotidianos e práticas culturais, mas aproximados em seus desafios e sua origem.

É nesse celeiro de riquezas, mistérios e importante contexto geopolítico e cultural, que acontecerá, em 2022, em Belém, no Pará, a  Bienal das Amazônias. Uma ação pensada e desenvolvida por artistas, produtores e criadores que vivem a Amazônia, com o objetivo de provocar o habitante da região a se ver e se mostrar, não apenas através da contemplação, mas da reflexão contextualizada, afirmando sua identidade plural.

As Amazônias e as artes, ambas igualmente cercadas de mistérios, prometem um rico panorama da sua produção contemporânea.

A 1ª edição da Bienal das Amazônias será lançada em fevereiro de 2022 e estará sob a chancela do quarteto criativo: Flavya Mutran, artista e pesquisadora que atua no campo da Arte e Comunicação desde 1989; Keyna Eleison, atual diretora artística do Museu de Arte Moderna do Rio de Janeiro (MAM-RJ), pesquisadora e curadora; pela curadora independente Vânia Leal, especialista em História da Arte, Mestre em Comunicação, Linguagem e Cultura; e por Sandra Benites, curadora adjunta do Museu de Arte de São Paulo Assis Chateaubriand (MASP). À frente da direção artística da Bienal das Amazônias está Yasmina Reggad, cocuradora do Pavilhão Francês na 59ª Bienal de Veneza (2022).

Além de museus, galerias e outros espaços públicos voltados para a produção artística, o público vai interagir com site specifics de obras de artistas nacionais e internacionais construídas em sinergia com a urbanidade da cidade de Belém, Pará.

Name: Flower City Arts Center
Description:
Flower City Arts Center is a community-based not-for-profit organization that educates, encourages, and inspires all people to create and enjoy the visual arts, design, and media. We embrace the fact that the arts elevate humanity, are naturally therapeutic, and provide tools for expression in the language of the heart in a world that needs healing. Flower City Arts Center strives to create social change through arts, education, and creative entrepreneurship. We provide high-quality arts programs to the most in-need people in our community.

The Flower City Arts Center celebrated 50 years in 2020. Established in 1970, The Flower City Arts Center is housed in a historic firehouse constructed in 1895-1905. We are the only community visual arts center conveniently located within the City of Rochester. In 1974, the Arts Center was incorporated as a 501(c)3 not-for-profit educational institution. In addition to our staff and board, we have up to 20 artists-in-residence and many instructors, studio artists, volunteers, and interns.

What We Do: Art for All People!
We offer foundational arts in Printmaking & Book Arts (PABA), Fine Arts, Ceramics, Photography and Digital Arts. Additionally, Flower City Arts Center runs specialized classes and inclusive programs for a wide array of people with varying physical and mental abilities. In recognition of our LGBTQIA+ community members and their allies, we are part of the Safe Space Alliance. We offer creative healing and therapeutic arts, studio space rental, three galleries with rotating public exhibits, workshops, lectures, classes, entrepreneurial projects, and memberships for the Greater Rochester Area.

Name: Farm workshop/სახელოსნო ფერმაში
Description: 1121 meters above sea level, next to the city, but detached from its chaos. Surrounded by forest and animals, complete bliss.

Name: Pont des arts Marseille Provence
Description:
Pont des Arts, agence de prestations culturelles et de guides-conférenciers professionnels, s'est installée à Marseille en 2013, et a depuis obtenu la confiance de nombreux clients, entreprises et institutions. 

Nous travaillons avec les entreprises et les agences évènementielles pour élaborer avec un programme de visite individualisé et nous prenons en charge toute l’organisation de sa réalisation.

Nous sommes également délégataires de services pour les institutions culturelles. 
En charge du marché de la médiation pour le Mucem depuis 2013, des visites guidées pour Caumont Centre d'art depuis 2015.

Name: FotoFocus Cincinnati
Description:
Founded in 2010 in Cincinnati, Ohio, FotoFocus is a nonprofit organization created to celebrate and champion photography as the medium of our time through programming that ignites a dialogue between contemporary lens-based art and the history of photography. FotoFocus presents lens-based signature programming including the FotoFocus Biennial, FotoFocus Symposium, FotoFocus Film Program, and FotoFocus Talks Series.

FotoFocus has collaborated with organizations, curators, academics, and artists to present more than 750 exhibitions and programs to provide uniquely enriching access to lens-based art, film, and practices inspired by photography. FotoFocus has awarded over 500 grants to support partners presenting projects and educational programs that are accessible and engaging to the public.

The organization has brought hundreds of internationally-renowned artists to the Greater Cincinnati region, including Doug Aitken, Tina Barney, Jo Ann Callis, Gregory Crewdson, Thomas Demand, Philip-Lorca diCorcia, Mitch Epstein, Roe Ethridge, Larry Fink, Paul Graham, Todd Hido, Barbara Kasten, Michael Kenna, Zoe Leonard, Duane Michaels, Laurel Nakadate, David Benjamin Sherry, Laurie Simmons, Sandy Skoglund, Alec Soth, Doug + Mike Starn, Joyce Tenneson, John Waters, and Roger Ross Williams.

Name: Antique Art Buyers
Description: Antique Art Buyers specialises in fine art valuations and gives the most competitive prices on such artwork. Over the years, we've purchased some of the most exquisite fine art works and delivered them to consumers at the greatest possible price. Set up an appointment with one of our consultants for a quick assessment of what needs to be sold.

Name: Gallery 505
Description:
Gallery 505 is one of Milwaukee’s finest resources for beautiful oil and acrylic paintings from around the world. We represent over 50 artists from around the world and offer their acclaimed art right here in the Milwaukee area.  We truly enjoy connecting our clients with a work of art they will adore for years to come. 

Selecting a painting for your home or business should never be intimidating but should be an exciting journey instead. With our wide selection of artists and several painting styles to choose from we are committed to finding you the ideal original work of art to fit both your space and taste. We offer one on one service and advice and will always strive to make your art and painting search easy. 

Gallery 505 is located just north of Milwaukee in beautiful downtown Whitefish Bay, Wisconsin. Open seven days a week it’s easy to find time to enjoy our gallery, artists and the art they offer. Visit our website to learn about our artists and their styles but nothing beats coming down to the gallery to see these fantastic works of art in person.

Name: Apéros Motion Design
Description:
Évènements et conférences destinés aux motions designers et aux professionnels des industries créatives. #aperosmotiondesign 
 Association loi 1901

Name: HUBSTACKS | 3D Rendering Studio
Description: We turn buildings that don’t exist (yet) into visuals that sell, stun, and speak. Rendering magic for architects & property visionaries. @hubstacks.com

Name: Artwins
Description:
La galerie en ligne Artwins présente une sélection de dessins, estampes et tableaux essentiellement du XIXe siècle, s’inscrivant dans une veine ‘fin-de-siècle’, à la fois symboliste et art Nouveau, mais également romantique, et même comique ! Vous y trouverez de nombreuses œuvres en écho avec des sujets connus de la littérature et de l’opéra, réinterprétés par les artistes de l’époque. Mon intention est également de permettre à certains artistes oubliés, notamment des femmes ou des artistes étrangers, de retrouver leurs lettres de noblesse.
Les œuvres qui vous sont proposées sont soigneusement sélectionnées pour leurs qualités plastiques et historiques, chacune faisant l’objet de recherches approfondies. 

La galerie a l'honneur de faire partie du Syndicat de la Librairie Ancienne et Moderne (SLAM) ainsi que de la Ligue Internationale de la Librairie Ancienne (LILA). Elle est également lauréate de la première édition du ‘Prix Marcus’, remis le 19 décembre 2023 par Stéphane Bern.

Name: Culture Bas-Saint-Laurent
Description: Culture Bas-Saint-Laurent travaille au développement culturel de la région par les services-conseils, par la représentation, la concertation et la promotion auprès des différents acteurs et partenaires du milieu artistique et culturel pour favoriser l’essor et la reconnaissance du potentiel artistique et culturel du Bas-Saint-Laurent.

Name: Intersections Gallery
Description:
Southeast Asia has been a cross road of people and cultures ever since the silk road caravans that crossed the deserts and the spice trade vessels that scoured the sea. Its unique genius crystallized in a hybrid culture that built up on many spiritual, philosophical  and artistic intersections.

Intersections' mission is to follow this path by creating new encounters of local and international artists and of local and international art lovers.

Intersections' ultimate aim is to bridge cultures through art.

Name: Galleria d'Arte Maggiore g.a.m.
Description:
Galleria d'Arte Maggiore g.a.m. was founded in 1978 by Franco and Roberta Calarota, who have established the international prestige of the gallery through a permanent collection of museum-quality works by 20th-century international masters. Their daughter, Alessia Calarota, became director of the gallery in 2011, linking tradition with a new perspective. Taking an innovative approach, the exhibition presented in the main location in Bologna aims to show how modern art influenced contemporary art. 

The gallery has always dealt with two fundamental aspects of the art world: the market and institutional promotion. It developed important collaborative relationships with museums and institutions in Italy and abroad (among them: the Metropolitan Museum in New York, the Musée d'Art Moderne de la Ville de Paris, Museo Nacional Centro de Arte Reina Sofia in Madrid, Museum of Palazzo Fortuny in Venice, Venice Biennale, Tate Modern in London, The Estorick of Modern Italian Art in London and many others), testifying the high quality of the works in its collection.
Being the reference on the market for some Masters as Giorgio Morandi and Giorgio de Chirico, Maggiore g.a.m. has collaborated to realize some important Institutional and private exhibitions about their work.

Galleria d'Arte Maggiore g.a.m. has taken and takes part in a selection of the world’s most important art fairs such as Art Basel, Art Basel Miami Beach, Art Basel Hong Kong, Tefaf Maastricht, Tefaf Spring New York, Frieze Masters, The Armory Show in New York, Fiac in Paris, Abu Dhabi Art, Art Cologne and Arco in Madrid.

Since 2019 the Calarota's family has open a foundation in Venice: ACP Palazzo Franchetti

Name: Fitzgerald Senior High School
Description: Fitzgerald Senior High School is a company based out of 23200 RYAN RD, WARREN, Michigan, United States.

Name: EKWC
Description:
The EKWC is an international workplace where artists, designers, and architects explore the technical and artistic possibilities of ceramics.

As an artist-in-residence center, the EKWC annually welcomes about 60 artists, designers, and architects from all over the world to experiment with ceramics. We do not only offer studios, workplaces, the most advanced equipment, and living space, but also the support of a team of technical specialists. Intensive guidance allows the participants, of whom 75% never worked with ceramics before, to realize their ideas.

As a center of excellence the EKWC fosters artistic and technical research. The knowledge and understanding acquired are documented and spread internationally through publications, exhibitions, (online) masterclasses, and conferences.

Whether you are an artist, designer, architect, or business looking for artistic inspiration or technical support: Sundaymorning@ekwc can help you realize your ideas.

Name: les arts au mur artothèque
Description:
les arts au mur artothèque, un lieu dédié à la création contemporaine tourné vers tous grâce à son mode d’action original, le prêt d’œuvres.

Depuis 19 ans, nous soutenons la création visuelle et ses artistes contemporains. Notre équipe de cinq passionnés rapprochent autour de projets artistiques exigeants des personnes de tous horizons et souvent éloignées de la culture.

Entre 2002 et 2020, près de 1003 œuvres de 516 artistes régionaux, nationaux et internationaux ont été acquises grâce au soutien de la Ville de Pessac, aux dépôts ou dons du FNAC, du CNAP et l‘artothèque du Limousin.

Les œuvres de cette collection peuvent être empruntées par tous : particuliers, scolaires, universités, entreprises, collectivités, espaces sociaux, hôpitaux, prisons… Chaque année, plus de 1600 prêts sont effectués sur le territoire néo-aquitain.

Une programmation artistique et culturelle est mise en œuvre pour diffuser et sensibiliser aux démarches des artistes présents dans la collection : expositions, résidences, programme culturel, actions éducatives…

Dans un contexte inédit qui fragilise notre filière des arts visuels, et qui bouleverse nos vies, notre rapport à l’Autre, notre travail, notre société, nous avons réimaginé de nouveaux paradigmes. Différemment souvent. Solidairement toujours. Aux côtés et avec les artistes.

L’équipe de l’artothèque a poursuivi ses activités grâce à l’engagement des institutions et de ses partenaires. Nous les en remercions et sommes heureux de partager avec vous une nouvelle année de projets et de découvertes !

Name: ARTUNER
Description:
ARTUNER is a unique online platform created to fulfill the needs of collectors and provide exclusive access to expertly curated exhibitions.

ARTUNER provides exceptional insight and guidance for collectors through our curatorial approach that’s based on a dynamic cycle of online exhibitions called “curations”. These involve artworks that are chosen exclusively for our site and organized by highly regarded curators. The result is the creation of coherent exhibitions that offer collectors the necessary background and confidence for acquiring art.

Name: Pablo
Description:
Pablo is a mobile app, free, dedicated exclusively to exhibitions. Created by UPintown, a young cultural start-up, it brings together all the information and services related to exhibition visits. Easy to use, intuitive and fast, it allows you to discover exhibitions, book and buy tickets online, register your favourite exhibitions. 
Free and without registration, it simplifies and democratizes access to art and heritage. Pablo is open to all art forms and for all audiences.

Designed as the time of a trip, Pablo is a super guide who inspires, stimulates and accompanies the visitor before, during and after the visit of an exhibition. 
Today, it covers Paris and its surroundings but tomorrow, many other cities!
It is available in French and English and developed in iOS and Android versions. 
Feel free to download it on the App Store or Google Play!

Name: ArtMix
Description:
ArtMix's mission is to transform the lives of people with disabilities through the creation of art. 

ArtMix is a non-profit arts service organization providing access to the arts for people with disabilities. ArtMix (formerly VSA Indiana) fulfills its mission through a series of arts programs led by 20+ professional Teaching Artists who provide programming in schools, community centers, hospitals, and on-site in our adaptive arts studios near downtown Indianapolis. 

Through its programming, ArtMix increases access, engagement, knowledge, and skills in and through the arts. Collectively, ArtMix programs serve more than 6,000 people each year. The programs create opportunities for learning, self-expression, and socialization, and increase community understanding and acceptance of people of all abilities. ArtMix was founded in 1982 and is a member of the VSA Affiliate Network, a program of the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts.

For more information visit artmix.org or call (317) 974-4123.

Name: Academy of Visual Arts, Frankfurt
Description:
WE ARE
the Academy of Visual Arts, Frankfurt. As a state-recognized institution, we practice interconnected working across the classical disciplinary boundaries. This makes us unique in the German university landscape. Together with artists, humanities scholars, computer scientists, architects and natural scientists, our students work on aesthetic, philosophical and technological issues and develop innovative design solutions.

»COMMUNICATION DESIGN« STUDY PROGRAM
The eight-semester full-time study program focuses on the application of communication design in the fields of Textiles and Fashion, Law and Politics, Art and Culture, Society and Social Affairs as well as Economy and Business. We combine teaching with research tasks and develop new fields of application for communication design in the context of social issues.

OUR DIDACTIC GOAL
is the formation of communicatively oriented designers who, through the teaching and development of scientific, technical and design skills, see themselves as critically reflective »authors« in socially relevant communication processes.

DEGREE
The bilingual study program concludes with a state examination.
For graduates, career entry is correspondingly diverse: In addition to the classic fields of employment in agencies, publishing houses and media companies, there are promising opportunities in institutional leadership positions in culture, art and media work, as well as at the municipal, federal or EU level.

OUR HISTORY
began in 1957, when the painter and graphic artist Carlo Ruppert founded the Westend Art School, which later became the "Academy of Visual Arts, Frankfurt". Modeled after the Bauhaus, the Academy has established itself both nationally and internationally. In close cooperation with partners from culture and business, it has since been making a fundamental contribution to the growing importance of design.

Name: Court Métrange
Description:
Le festival Court Métrange est LE festival du court métrage de genre. 	
Situé au cinéma Pathé de Rennes, l’événement présente une compétition internationale de courts métrages insolites, étranges et fantastiques, en accord en tant que membre avec les règles de l’European Fantastic Film Festival Federation (EFFFF).  
Une thématique annuelle oriente les conférences, débats, rencontres, tables rondes expositions et projections de longs métrages, lors de 12 jours de festivités dans les lieux partenaires et notamment au Village Métrange, point d’accueil du festival situé sur l’Esplanade Charles de Gaulles, juste en face du cinéma.
Ce sont également des projections et une programmation à destination du jeune public, ainsi que des actions culturelles proposées à toutes et à tous, à l’année.
Court Métrange , ainsi que  ses partenaires le CNC (dont le festival est reconnu en catégorie 1 : possibilité de recourir à l’aide à la réalisation pour le court métrage pour les films en compétition), Films en Bretagne ou encore l’association l’ARBRE, ont à cœur d’accompagner les réalisateur·trices dans le développement et la promotion de leurs œuvres.

Name: Fonds Vendôme pour l'Art Contemporain
Description:
Le Fonds Vendôme pour l’Art Contemporain se donne pour mission de soutenir des artistes originaux, pionniers et talentueux, à travers des dotations et un programme d’actions de communication ambitieux (expositions, avant-premières, rétrospectives, tirages spéciaux, évènements, opérations de relations publiques, plateformes et contenus digitaux). 

Il développe un partenariat mutuellement bénéfique entre les artistes et les donateurs engagés qui bénéficient d'une défiscalisation et d’avantages significatifs en contrepartie de leur contribution. 

Créé fin 2019, il est dirigé par Jean-Aldric Collinot, Président, et Anne Detalle, Administratrice, avec Jean-Aybert Collinot, Vice-Président, Jean-Marc Fitoussi, Directeur de la Communication et des Affaires Publiques et Stéphane Sabatin, Conseiller Fiscal.

Name: David Archbold
Description:
David Archbold Art & Art Services.
Art Advisory, Curation, Project Management, Research and Original Artworks.

Name: Istituzione Fondazione Bevilacqua La Masa
Description:
Nata nel 1898 per un lascito testamentario, la BLM si occupa di arte  contemporanea e organizza mostre ed incontri, dedicati alla promozione  di giovani artisti e alla presentazione di artisti riconosciuti a  livello internazionale.

La Fondazione si pone come luogo di eccellenza nel territorio del  Triveneto e a suo beneficio, punto di osservazione privilegiato delle  esperienze artistiche più interessanti, incubatore di progetti che  coinvolgono la comunità artistica locale, ambito di mediazione con le  realtà nazionali e internazionali di qualità.

Name: Root Gallery
Description: Founded in 2017, Root Gallery started out as a small art gallery with big ambitions. Built on the basis of trust, the gallery now represents a new generation of Dutch contemporary artists working in photography, sculpture, installation art and painting. Constantly evolving, Root Gallery seeks to strengthen its position abroad by participating in international art fairs and exhibitions, gaining valuable relationships in the process. It extends on this by fully committing to the development of ambitious and special programming in collaboration with international partners, always in the best interest of the artists. By combining attributes from a traditional gallery model with an innovative gaze, Root Gallery aims to clarify the relationship between the public and the contemporary art market. It does so by facilitating continual communication with artists, collectors and visitors, while including more and more people through vibrant events and an active online presence. Through this, Root continues to grow.

Name: Ball State University College of Fine Arts
Description:
Ball State University’s College of Fine Arts consists of high-quality, competitive, academic programs that are nationally recognized and accredited by National Association of Schools of Art and Design, National Association of Music, National Association of Theatre, and National Association of Dance. The David Owsley Museum of Art, with over 11,000 works in its collection spanning millenia and continents, is accredited by the American Association of Museums.

Students learn from a dedicated faculty and a variety of guest artists to gain awareness, appreciation, and expertise in the arts. In addition, the College of Fine Arts promotes education, engagement, and entertainment for students, the university community, and the public. Students and faculty members act as advocates for the arts in a variety of ways, ranging from education and performance to exhibition and consultation.

Name: Calamart
Description:
Galerie d'art contemporain et urbain au coeur de la vieille-ville à Genève.

Depuis 2008, Calamart présente une sélection sans cesse renouvelée d’artistes aux styles très différents, mais unis par un même souci d’esthétisme.

Les oeuvres présentées proviennent de la jeune scène suisse et européenne et sont choisies avec des critères pointus, mais toujours accessibles.

Name: Galerie Jumble - Art Urbain
Description:
Installée à Lorient, la Galerie Jumble incarne l’énergie de l’art urbain depuis sa création en 2022 par Virginie et Pascal, un couple de passionnés d’art. Ce duo insatiable de découvertes artistiques est guidé par le coup de cœur, tant pour les œuvres que pour les rencontres humaines. Avec une affection particulière pour le muralisme et le pochoir, la Galerie Jumble se distingue par son regard affûté et son engagement authentique aux côtés des artistes.

La Galerie Jumble, c’est bien plus qu’un espace d’exposition – c’est un pont entre la rue et la toile. Virginie et Pascal tissent des liens profonds avec chaque artiste, révélant de nouveaux talents prometteurs et soutenant avec ferveur ceux déjà établis. Leur objectif ? Mettre en lumière des créations originales et accompagner les collectionneurs comme les curieux dans la découverte d’un art qui prend racine dans la rue et fait vibrer les murs.

Les expositions signées Jumble vont au-delà des conventions d’une galerie traditionnelle. Les événements s’invitent dans des lieux variés de la région de Lorient, offrant un cadre libre et accessible où le public est encouragé à entrer, explorer et partager. La présence des artistes est une composante essentielle de chaque exposition, ouvrant un dialogue direct entre créateurs et spectateurs, entre œuvres murales et œuvres d’atelier. Une expérience où les frontières s’effacent pour laisser place à des échanges passionnants.

En dehors des événements, le showroom de Lorient vous accueille dans une ambiance intimiste, tout comme la galerie en ligne qui vous ouvre ses portes à tout moment pour découvrir les artistes et leurs créations.

Parmi les artistes représentés par la Galerie Jumble, on retrouve des noms comme Matt_tieu, Petite Poissone, Seb Bouchard, Kelu Abstract, Carole b., Naga, Raf Urban, Philippe Hérard, Ender, Dark, 13 bis, In Love, Horss, Snik et la dernière pépite de la galerie, Samione. Autant d’univers singuliers à découvrir pour vivre l’art urbain autrement.

Name: Art Fairs
Description:
ArtFairs , es una empresa española, promotora de Ferias de arte y eventos culturales. Organiza, desde 2009, las ferias MADRIDFOTO, Feria Internacional de fotografía y JUSTMAD, Feria Internacional de arte emergente y SUMMA Art Fair.

Desde ArtFairs, se realiza todo el proceso de la acción cultural, diseño, producción y ejecución, y las correspondientes acciones de promoción y seguimiento en medios de comunicación.  En  ArtFairs se  desarrollan de principio a fin las acciones necesarias para el éxito asegurado de un evento. Ideas, diseño, edición, comunicación, marketing promocional, recursos humanos, patrocinios, relaciones públicas… 



Más información en:

www.summafair.com
www.justmad.es 


ArtFairs, is a Spanish company, promoter of art fairs and cultural events. Since 2009 it has organised the fairs MADRIDFOTO, the international photography fair, JUSTMAD, the international fair of emerging art , JUSTMADMIA, the international fair of emerging art, Miami and SUMMA Art Fair, International Contemporary Art Fair.

At Art Fairs we carry out the whole process of the cultural event, its design, production and implementation, and the corresponding acts of promotion and monitoring in the media. At Art Fairs we carry out from beginning to end all the necessary steps for the guaranteed success of an event. Ideas, design, publishing, communication, promotional marketing, human resources, sponsorships, public relations…



More info: 
www.summafair.com
www.justmad.es

Name: _glowlikethat_
Description:
[ _glowlikethat_ ]

A fine art service provider formed in 2019 by Management learners with a customer centric attitude exploring with the strength and skill of Artwork.

[Product and Service]

We are specialised at providing customised sketches, portraits and painting for our customers at very reasonable prices. 

For more samples please visit our Instagram page https://www.instagram.com/_glowlikethat_/ we are way more active there and have the first post since we started digitalising.

[ History and Future at glance ]

We are passionate about our art skill and had planned last year 2019 to present it in public hence started with an Instagram page which helped us to earn a lot of public applause and appreciation and a few bucks of earnings.   

Now, In 2020 we are in plan to make it a brand and expand it globally via digital strength hence creating a presence on Linkedin.

We are open for collaboration, advice and suggestions.

Keep supporting ( Follow, Like and Share)

Name: Rouillac
Description: Philippe et Aymeric Rouillac sont commissaires-priseurs dans le Val de Loire. Ils organisent des ventes aux enchères, conférences, expositions et journées d'expertises gratuites. Les belles découvertes et belles enchères sont leur spécialités, multipliant les records toutes catégories confondues : pour le coffre de Mazarin (2013, 7,3 m€), un portrait de Washington (2002, 5.1 m€), une Vénus de Cranach (2001, 2,2 m€), la gourde de l'empereur de Chine (5.084.00 €, 2018), un portrait de Van Dongen (2012, 1,1 m€) ou des Frères Le Nain (3.064.000 €, 2018), la Valse de Claudel (2017, 1,4 m€), les falaise d'Étretat par Monnet (2003, 2,3 m€), un paysage de Vlamink (2000, 2,4 m€), les bateaux de Le Gray (2001, 917.000 €) ou le premier appareil de cinéma parlant (2015, 1,2 m€)...

Name: ART VIP
Description:
Galeria sztuki ART VIP w Poznaniu oferuje sprzedaż i czasowy wynajem dzieł sztuki (malarstwo, grafika, rzeźba, fotografia) od wybranych polskich artystów. Jako galeria sztuki współczesnej w szczególny sposób chcemy docenić pracę wybitnych twórców.
Artystyczną działalność ART VIP cechuje wysoki profesjonalizm. Troszczymy się o spójny wizerunek klientów oraz wysokiej jakości obsługę. To jedyne tego typu miejsce w Poznaniu, gdzie można poznać słynne obrazy, a później umieścić je na ścianie we własnym domu czy w siedzibie przedsiębiorstwa. Oferowany wynajem pozwolił nam na stworzenie przestrzeni, która przypomina najlepszy sklep z obrazami.
Kolekcja ART VIP nadaje wnętrzom elegancji, indywidualność, jak i odświeża je oraz zapewnia niezwykłe doznania wizualne. Galerie malarstwa cieszą się w ostatnim czasie coraz większą popularnością ze względu za zainteresowanie społeczeństwa sztuką współczesną. To dziedzina warta lepszego poznania – a wynajem obrazów w naszej galerii z pewnością przyczynia się do propagowania kultury.

Name: Képező
Description: At KÉPEZŐ Gallery our mission is to promote Fine Arts. We organise art-based workshops, lectures, exhibitions and cultural events. Our objective is to integrate visual arts with everyday life, education and business with a particular focus on company development, coaching and team building.

Name: Nubuke Foundation
Description:
Nubuke Foundation is a visual art and cultural institution based in East Legon, Accra, Ghana. Founded in 2006, it serves as a nexus for arts and culture across the country while supporting the artistic practice of Ghanaians: young, mid-career and experienced. We work to make the appreciation of art, culture, heritage and history accessible to all. The artistic programming includes exhibitions, readings, talks, film screenings, performances, seminars and workshops for the culturally curious.

Nubuke Foundation was awarded the Tourist Attraction of the Year 2016, by the Ghana Tourist Authority (Greater Accra Region).

 

WHAT WE OFFER

 

At Nubuke our doors are open to everyone. Visitors can expect to be mesmerised by young actors performing on our lawns or poets enchanting audiences during our monthly EhaLakasa poetry programmes. You can also relax at the Nubuke cafe and enjoy seasonal fruit juices, smoothies, and snacks in the serene atmosphere of our spacious grounds.

Nubuke's spaces can also be used for weddings, concerts, and all other events.

Name: cARTEm
Description:
We are driven by an unwavering passion for perfection, a dedication that shines through in every one of our facsimiles and art books. Over the years, cARTEm has become a global standard of excellence, renowned for crafting unique, one-of-a-kind editions.

Here, tradition and innovation come together through the efforts of a multidisciplinary team of nearly 50 experts. Our team includes historians, scholars, bibliographers, researchers, translators, photographers, artisans, and even chemists. Each member brings their expertise and passion to create exceptional works, with meticulous attention to every detail.

With every edition, we reaffirm our commitment to preserving and sharing the world’s cultural heritage. Each creation is a tribute to art, knowledge, and history.

At cARTEm, every piece tells a story, celebrating the timeless beauty of the extraordinary.

Name: Freies Museum Berlin
Description: Freie Museum Berlin is an exhibition space in the centre of Berlin as wells as a place for production of artistic and intellectual ideas dealing with concerns of society today. International cooperation giving an insider view towards unknown artistic regions in the world and open up the communicative sphere of Berlin to support the work of artists in other countries. Freies Museum Berlin is cooperating with organizers, artists and scientists to work on a positive development of our society, based on today's knowledge and awareness.

Name: Fine Arts Gurukul
Description:
A Fine Arts school that provides structured art education for 15+ years. Holding 3 prominent art schools in Bangalore. 

Pencil & Chai, Sampratishta School of Fine Arts and Junior Pencil And Chai. Managed by Fine Artists with the guidance of India’s Veteran Artists. 

Offering Diploma Courses in Fine Arts, Fine arts foundation courses, professional sketching courses, professional painting courses, and fine arts workshops mentored by India’s best artists. 

Inspiring and artist in you

Name: Arte 10, Galería
Description:
Arte 10 cumple ahora su XXVI aniversario. Arte 10 es una galería de arte moderno y contemporáneo  especializada en obra gráfica original y obra sobre papel. Puedes encontrar en esta galería no solo grabados en forma de aguafuertes, aguatintas o punta-secas, sino también litografías, serigrafías  y técnicas mixtas firmadas y numeradas por el mismísimo artista

El director de Arte 10, tras cumplir 65 años, se retira y la Galería (1990-2016), la Colección (3.000 obras de 300 artistas) y el Club Arte 10 se trasladan a su despacho de Puerta de Hierro de Madrid. Sea tan amable de solicitar cita previa al tf. +34656322789. O por email a fdiez@arte10galeria.com. No lo dude. Puede hacerlo ahora si lo desea.

We fulfill now our XXVI Anniversary. Arte 10, Gallery is specialized in 20th century Modern and Contemporary Art, with a focus on fine prints including other original works on paper. You can find original etchings, woodcuts, linocuts, lithographs or serigraphy but also sculptures, objects and artists books signed and numbered hand and pencil by the artist himself.

The Director of Arte 10, after turning 65 years old, retires and the Gallery (1990-2016), the Collection (3,000 works of 300 artists) and the Art Club 10 are moved to his office in Puerta de Hierro in Madrid. Be so kind to request an appointment by phone. +34656322789. Or by email to fdiez@arte10galeria.com. Do not hesitate. You can do it now if you want.

Name: Oevaali Art Shop, Maldives
Description: Founded in 2015 by sisters Raniya and Raya Mansoor, Oevaali Art Shop is managed and owned alongside partners Imma Rasheed and Ali Ajikko. Featuring 100% Maldivian art and design, Oevaali Art Shop is a premier and locally-loved Maldivian lifestyle brand of art and products inspired by the ocean and the seaside.

Name: Operator
Description:
Ania Catherine (b. 1990) and Dejha Ti (b. 1985) are an award-winning artist duo whose collaborative practice, Operator (est. 2016), develops critical and conceptual approaches to experience. With Ti’s background as a multimedia artist and HCI technologist, and Catherine’s as a choreographer and performance artist, they engineer medium-agnostic output, joining environments, technology, and the body. Their exploration into privacy and extractive technologies began with their performance installation, On View (2019), commissioned by the SCAD Museum of Art, and continues with the Privacy Collection, a durational release of works exploring the tension between privacy and transparency in blockchain technology.

Operator has been awarded by The Lumen Prize twice (Generative Art in 2023, Immersive Environments in 2021), ADC Award (Gold Cube), S+T+ARTS Prize (Honorary Mention), and MediaFutures (a European Commission funded programme). They have spoken at events
and institutions including Christie's Art+Tech Summit, University of Cambridge, Art Basel, ZKM, Francisco Carolinum Museum (Linz), Bloomberg ART+TECHNOLOGY, and MIT Open Documentary Lab. Originally from Los Angeles and currently based in Madrid, Spain.

Name: VILLEPIN
Description:
Shaped by Dominique and Arthur de Villepin’s passion for art, Villepin is a gallery created by collectors for collectors. Inspired by the founders’ own collections and profound knowledge of the Asian art market, Villepin offers a new gallery concept based on the art of collecting. 

Through their experience building close friendships with artists, the father-son duo wish to share their expertise with fellow collectors by curating artworks that they themselves would love to collect, ultimately nurturing a unique model of collecting based on long-term relationships with artists and their estates or foundations. With their knowledge of the region’s art scene and strong commitment to the city, the new gallery program will exhibit work by some of the world’s most important artists, focusing on those whose work carries universal messages to demonstrate the power of art to build bridges and change lives. 

Villepin prioritizes its personal relationships with artists and aspires to tell their personal stories through staging important exhibitions of their work, producing detailed publications and generating dialogue about collecting art with passion.

Name: Story Tapestries
Description:
To empower, educate, and engage community members to find their voice and tell a story through the performing, media, and visual arts. Story Tapestries combines the arts, language, and STEM with social-emotional approaches to support both individuals and the community and create an environment where the building of cultural capital, growth, innovation, collaboration, listening, and learning happens. Story Tapestries aims to provide equitable access to the arts as a source to develop yourself and the community to shift the culture of inclusivity and narrative of the community.
 
Story Tapestries (ST) as a leading arts organization that serves the community through 1) Professional and Community performances in storytelling, theater, dance, spoken word, multimedia and other art forms in a variety of public spaces  2) Workshops and in-depth training programs for adults and children to develop skills in various art forms, sharing how to use the performing, visual, and literary arts to develop their voice, build up their cultural capital and increase their literacy, social-emotional and STEAM skills.

Name: Erie Art Museum
Description: Erie Art Museum is an art museum in Erie, Pennsylvania, with a collection of over 8,000 objects, including American ceramics, Tibetan paintings, Indian bronzes, contemporary baskets, and many other mediums. The museum hosts 18 to 20 visiting exhibitions annually and shares parts of its collection with national and international partners through traveling exhibits. In October of 2011, the Erie Art Museum was awarded the National Medal for Museum and Library Service.

Name: Grupo Sintonize
Description:
Especializado na elaboração, produção e prestação de contas de projetos viabilizados através de incentivos fiscais, o Grupo Sintonize trabalha para a democratização do acesso à cultura, esporte, educação e saúde visando o impacto social. 

Utilizando os benefícios das Leis de Incentivo fiscais, e em parceria com Governos Estaduais e Federais, Secretarias de Cultura, Instituições de fomento à pesquisa, Universidades e Empresas Privadas, o Grupo Sintonize leva à população de todas as idades e classes sociais eventos gratuitos de intervenções artísticas, festivais de música, concertos de música contemporânea, exposições e oficinas de artes visuais, além de apresentações e oficinas de teatro e shows de música popular.

Name: H art
FONDATION CHU TEH-CHUN
Description:
Fondation CHU Teh-Chun is dedicated to collecting, exhibiting, preserving, and interpreting the art and archives of the artist.
Founded in 2017, the Foundation has been recognised as a non-profit organisation in Geneva.

Name: CAP Association
Description: The CAP Association is a not for profit association based in Basel, Switzerland founded with the aim of executing African photography projects in November 2016. The association was initiated through projects that were previously started in the frame work of Verein Liaison. Today the association executes the CAP Prize for Contemporary African Photography awarded annually to five photographic portfolios that engage with the African continent or its diaspora. This annual celebration of African photography quickly led to the implementation of a festival titled IAF Festival for Contemporary Art. Another project is the Edition POCPAP a limited print edition of a number of POPCAP winners photographs that are for sale online and through exhibitions. In addition the CAP Association offers a workshop and coaching program labeled CAP Academy, tought mainly by the winners of the CAP Prize, to foster photographic practices on the African continent.

Name: Carpets CC
Description:
Carpets CC by Cecilia Setterdahl helps you create truly individual and distinct spaces through her unique designs. Born from her imagination and by the inspiration she finds around her, Cecilia's work, conveys bold colours and geometric shapes for appreciation and exploration. The Carpets CC Showroom is in constant motion with new canvas, carpets and rugs being updated and displayed on a regular basis.  

Cecilia’s pieces, whether canvas or carpet, are at home in any home; Contemporary, Old World or Middle Eastern, whatever the setting, an original Cecilia Setterdahl art piece speak volumes and will bring any room to life. She likes to ensure each piece will be the talking point of any room so chooses to craft the majority of carpets as limited edition, with a maximum of 10 pieces being produced before being retired from her collection.

All carpets are hand-made in India or Afghanistan using New Zealand or Afghan wool and are either hand-knotted, hand-tufted or crafted on a hand-loom. Depending on the method of craft, carpets can take anywhere between 2 to 12 weeks to be created.

Name: Fine Art
Description: Fine Art, Sacred Applied Arts.

Name: Wine Gogh team building
Description:
Os presentamos Wine Gogh: donde el arte se mezcla con el vino para un team building inolvidable. 

¿Buscas una actividad única de team building que mejore la creatividad y el trabajo en equipo de tu empresa? En Wine Gogh ofrecemos la mejor experiencia de pintura acompañada de un buen vino en Barcelona, Madrid, Valencia y Sevilla

Nuestro equipo de expertos en arte guiará a tu equipo en una experiencia única de pintura y vino que nunca olvidarán. Además de fomentar la colaboración y la comunicación, nuestros eventos de team building te permitirán mejorar en la creatividad y liberar el estrés.

Únete a nosotros para reír, pintar y desatar tu lado artístico, mientras trabajas en equipo. Prepárate para una experiencia única! 

No pierdas la oportunidad de reservar un evento con nosotros para tu empresa y ofrecer a tus empleados una experiencia que nunca olvidarán. Contáctanos para más información!

Name: Nîmes s'illustre
Description:
NÎMES S'ILLUSTRE CÉLÈBRE LES MULTIPLES VISAGES DE L'ILLUSTRATION ! 

L’ORIGINE DE NÎMES S'ILLUSTRE
Le festival est à l’initiative de 3 nîmois.e.s qui souhaitent construire un rendez-vous annuel unique autour de l’illustration au sein de leur ville d'origine.

Notre collectif associatif a grandi depuis 2019, nous nous rejoignons bénévolement autour des motivations suivantes :
- l’intérêt pour les arts visuels en général et l’illustration en particulier, la diversité des formes et des techniques mais aussi la manière dont l’illustration regarde et éclaire toutes les questions de société ; 
- notre attachement à notre territoire d’origine, Nîmes et ses alentours, le Gard, des lieux qui ont marqué notre vie, nos vécus, nos souvenirs, et notre appartenance commune ;
- l’envie de construire et d’alimenter un projet créatif capable de proposer un événement culturel, produit avec une éthique responsable et environnementale, valorisant l’alliance de pratiques artistiques aux savoirs-faire de notre territoire.

LA VOLONTÉ DU FESTIVAL
 Mettre en lumière l’illustration
 Faire rayonner la ville de Nîmes
 Éveiller le grand public à la pluralité offerte par l’illustration
 Porter haut et fort la voix de la communauté artistique

Name: r
Description: n/a

Name: OLIVIER VAUCHER SA
Description:
De l’idée à sa mise en forme. De la pièce rêvée à sa fabrication. Nos talents donnent vie à vos créations horlogères. Au cœur de Genève, les ateliers Olivier Vaucher offrent sous un même toit une combinaison unique de technologie, de métiers d’arts et d’ateliers dédiés.
Depuis 1978, les ateliers Olivier Vaucher se mettent au service de l’extraordinaire. Grâce à nos savoir-faire à 360°, nous explorons constamment des voies créatives inédites. Nos compétences techniques et artisanales vibrent de ce « supplément d’âme » qui créé toute la différence : l’inspiration artistique. Un de nos objectifs principaux est de révéler la beauté des matières de vos mécaniques horlogères.

Getting an idea and shaping it. Dreaming of a piece and creating it. Our talents give life to your watchmaking creations. Located in the heart of Geneva, the Olivier Vaucher workshops gather an unique combination of technologies, artistic craftsmanship and specific workshops in the same place.
Since 1978, the Olivier Vaucher workshops aim to create extraordinary realizations. We always explore new paths thanks to our expertise in multiple fields. Artistic inspiration is what it adds an additional soul to our technical and craft skills and makes our creations different from others.  Revealing the beauty of the materials of your watchmaking mechanisms is definitively one of our main goals.

Name: ART2MAINS
Description:
Art2Mains est une entreprise de médiation culturelle sensorielle française proposant différents dispositifs de médiation inclusive aux institutions culturelles, aux associations, aux établissements scolaires et aux particuliers.

Notre ambition ? La démocratisation culturelle basée sur des dispositifs de médiation innovants offrant une expérience sensorielle inoubliable aux différents publics.  

Chaque structure bénéficie d'un accompagnement personnalisé afin de coconstruire chaque dispositif dans le but de répondre au mieux à ses besoins et de permettre un meilleur rayonnement sur son territoire.

Name: Monsieur L'Agent
Description: Monsieur L’Agent is a Paris-based artist management & film production company founded in 2007 by Alexis Le-Tan and Romuald Stivine. Since then, our ever growing roster of art directors, illustrators photographers and directors has forged a reputation for delivering innovative creative solutions to all kinds of projects and briefs. Our clients range from independent organizations to global brands, the music industry to publishing and advertising. With artists from France, Holland, Switzerland, Finland the UK and USA we span differing styles and aesthetics held together by the common quest for unrivaled beauty. Monsieur L’Agent’s sole emphasis is on facilitating creative results, professionally. We look forward to working with you. Our Services Artist management for art directors, illustrators and photographers, production services for film, animation, print and photo retouching. Selected Clients Aldo, Berluti, Chanel, Coca-Cola, Colette, Diptyque, EMI, Hennessy, Herman Miller, Hermès, Issey Miyake, J.M. Weston, Kenzo, Lacoste, Lancôme, LVMH, Maison Michel, Modular, Nike, Nowness, Orange, Ray Ban, Reed Expositions, Ricard, Samsung, Scion, Sony, Swatch, Uniqlo…

Name: Eames Fine Art
Description:
Eames Fine Art is owned and directed by Vincent and Rebecca Eames, both qualified art historians with over thirty years of combined experience in the art market. Eames Fine Art began life as The Fine Art Partnership in 2004 and in 2013 was incorporated by Eames Fine Art Ltd.

Eames Fine Art specialises in original prints, but also offers an enviable collection of paintings, drawings and sculptures by Modern and contemporary masters.  We also publish editions by established and up-and-coming artist printmakers. 
Passionate about what we do, we provide serious collectors as well as first-time buyers with a beautiful selection of artworks that are carefully authenticated and exquisitely presented.  We have over 12,000 artworks on site for collectors to browse through, this enables us to offer a broad range of works to suit all budgets and tastes. You will recognise works by master printmaking artists such as Pablo Picasso, Joan Miró, Howard Hodgkin, Victor Pasmore, Barbara Hepworth, John Hoyland, Henri Matisse, Fancisco Goya and many others. 

Based near London Bridge, SE1, we have a Collectors' Studio and Atelier (near to Maltby Street market and Bermondsey Street) where we house our vast collection of prints and paintings. This is open to clients by appointment during the week and we welcome drop-ins at the weekends. We also host many special collector events at the studio such as artist-led discussions, book launches, secret-bid auctions, live music, wine tastings and new edition previews and print-drops.

Our main gallery space is based on Bermondsey Street, and here we curate a regularly changing rota of exhibitions. In 2026 we already have shows planned for Norman Ackroyd, Mychael Barratt, John Piper, Ross Loveday, Joan Miró, Anita Klein, Marc Chagall, Jason Hicklin and much more. 

Please visit our website for more information about the gallery and to register for our general mailing list.

Name: British Art Fair
Description: The marketplace for Modern and Contemporary British Art. Over fifty leading dealers exhibit paintings, drawings, prints and sculpture celebrating art from Modernism to today, elegantly displayed throughout London’s prestigious Saatchi Gallery.
