In addition, there are special exhibitions and a new feature: Solo Contemporary.

Name: Espace Artistes Femmes
Description: "Contribuer à la reconnaissance artistique des femmes est mon objectif premier. Je souhaite leur offrir un lieu où elles seront libres d’exposer et communiquer sur leur art au travers d’ateliers, de cours, de conférences ou encore de visites guidées. Il va de soi que je souhaite mettre à l’honneur les femmes. De nos jours, il est question de musées ainsi que de galeries d’art. L’important est de proposer un concept novateur d’exposition qui permettrait à l’art contemporain d’avoir un nouvel essor en contribuant à la visibilité des femmes dans le monde de l’art. C’est pourquoi, je propose le concept d’« espace » qui s’ouvre vers le futur de l’art contemporain. La galerie étant un concept obsolète, il faut pouvoir, dès aujourd’hui, promouvoir une vision qui puisse être à la portée de tous et qui soit également éducative.L’art contemporain est bien souvent incompris du public. En effet, le résultat d’une oeuvre n’est pas évident pour tous et donc, afin de le rendre accessible, il est essentiel d’en faire connaître le processus. C’est pour cela que je travaille avec des artistes femmes qui sont prêtes à réaliser de la médiation culturelle avec leur propre travail. Celle-ci serait la clé, l’outil, permettant d’entrer dans la sphère vitale de l’artiste qui fait revivre sa vie au travers de ses oeuvres. Ainsi, petits et grands pourraient être sensibilisés à ce concept de l’intime – sous différents angles – qui anime les œuvres de ces artistes. La pulsion créatrice est un concept qui est inné pour elles. Simone de Beauvoir disait « on ne naît pas femme, on le devient », je dis « on ne devient pas artiste, on naît ainsi ». C’est un appel du plus profond de l’être que nous pouvons percevoir par le biais d’œuvres conçues afin de matérialiser un ressenti face au monde ou autres.Cet espace serait le moyen de démontrer toute l’importance que l’art des artistes femmes prodigue à la société.Sensibiliser tous les publics pourrait être porteur d’un accroissement positif" Marie Bagi.

Name: Tufina Art Gallery
Description: The painter, Fatmir Tufina, born in Tirana 1960, with more than 30 years of experience founded "Tufina Art Gallery", a Visual Arts Studio with modern paintings and drawings offering art for international market.  Tufina's paintings fit best on a luxury, modern or contemporary interior. The artworks are presented in collections and galleries worldwide.

Name: NOTTE
Description: NOTTE.fr is an ART SHOP specialized in the edition of graphic arts prints and other supports created by the artist Xavier NOTTE. Notte is above all an online art store, a gallery of artistic works, decorative accessories and design objects created by the contemporary artist Xavier Notte. Inhabited by a devouring passion for graphics, design and photography since his youth, Laurent Notte puts all his inspiration and soul into the creation of works of all kinds and makes them accessible to all by publishing graphic arts prints in OPEN EDITION. Thus, thanks to our Art Shop platform, you have the opportunity to discover original creations or to access illustrations, posters and works of Art Print, Doodle Art, Street Art.

Description:
We specialize in silver plated sculptures, corporate gifts, awards, recognitions, custom design sculptures.

We have different sculptors who can make your logo or sculpture in any size. We specialize in all metal finishes, like Silver, Gold and copper.

Name: Anon-Art.com
Description: Are you an artist with works to sell? Are you an art-lover looking to buy unique, original pieces? Anon-Art is the only place to buy and sell art without the distraction of the name. The artist is revealed once the auction is completed. Buy art for the eyes, not the name.

Name: Muzelinck
Description:
Muzelinck is een maatschappelijk gedreven culturele organisatie. De kern bestaat voor ons uit de stimulering van cultuur en het leggen van verbindingen tussen cultuur en andere domeinen. 

Muzelinck maakt samen met inwoners van Oss en Bernheze van jong tot oud, op school, na school of in de vrije tijd kunst. We stimuleren culturele ontmoetingen waar verbeelding centraal staat. Maak muziek, maak een schilderij, maak het samen! Door te maken, raak je de ander.

Waarom doen we dat? Omdat Kunstbeoefening bewezen positieve gezondheidseffecten heeft zoals vermindering van stress en verbetering van de geestelijke gezondheid. We bevorderen het sociale leven en maken kunst en cultuur meer toegankelijk voor de inwoners van Oss, ongeacht hun achtergrond.

Name: VIDEOFORMES
Description:
Structure de diffusion et de production artistique depuis 1984 dans le domaine des arts numériques, VIDEOFORMES organise un festival international éponyme annuel à Clermont-Ferrand présentant l’actualité de la création numérique : installations, vidéos, performances audio-visuelle, créations numériques pluridisciplinaires, projets en réalité virtuelle / augmentée, rencontres professionnelles et tables rondes sur des thématiques élargies aux industries créatives et aux évolutions sociétales liées au numérique.
VIDEOFORMES accueille chaque année des artistes en résidence, participe à des événements culturels nationaux et internationaux, propose une programmation de performances expérimentales pluridisciplinaires à la chapelle de l’Oratoire (Vidéobars), une revue numérique (Turbulences Vidéo), des archives numériques en libre accès et des actions d’Éducation Artistique et Culturelle en direction des publics scolaires.

Name: Société de l'Histoire de l'Art Français - SHAF
Description: La Société de l’Histoire de l’Art français (SHAF), fondée en 1870 et active depuis 1872, est une des plus anciennes sociétés savantes consacrées à l’histoire de l’art. Elle a pour devise « Artibus Patriae », c’est-à-dire « Aux Arts de la Patrie ». La Société de l’Histoire de l’Art français est reconnue d’utilité publique depuis 1927.

Name: Client Raiser
Description:
Since 2014, helped over 250 artists across the country in support of their professional goals.

Led workshops for the Smithsonian's Hirshhorn Museum and Sculpture Garden, Hamiltonian, Transformer, Washington Project for the Arts, Halcyon, Superfine! DC, D.C. Commission on the Arts and Humanities, Gateway Arts District, VisArts, Washington Sculptors Group, Women’s Caucus for Art, Artomatic, District of Columbia Arts Center, Montgomery Arts Association, and Capitol Hill Arts League. 

Sold over 150 pieces of art to individual collectors as well as large companies.

Hosted and partnered on numerous art exhibitions.

Member of ArtTable, a leadership organization for women in the visual arts.

Name: Maison du Geste et de l'Image
Description:
Véritable outil partagé pour les acteur·rices de l’éducation artistique, la Maison du geste et de l’image accompagne depuis 40 ans les enfants et les adolescent·es encadrés par leurs enseignant·es, les professionnel·les du périscolaire, du champ social et médico-social, en étroite collaboration avec des artistes.
Les jeunes à la Mgi expérimentent le théâtre, la danse, la vidéo, la photo, mêlés à l’écriture, au son, aux arts plastiques à travers des projets déployés sur mesure par toute l’équipe.

Name: Not-Wolf-Productions
Description:
Not-Wolf-Productions is the artwork of Robert A. Friedenberg (Bob). He started drawing in college while pursuing his doctorate in theoretical nuclear physics.  It’s become a lifelong hobby and now a concentrated passion to record and manipulate his mind’s wanderings.  His life’s experiences are woven into the personalities of his images.  Not-Wolf-Productions gets its name from Bob’s companion dog, Howi, who is frequently mistaken for a wolf. Howi is actually a Native American Indian Dog (NAID) and has absolutely no wolf in ‘em.

Not-Wolf-Productions is a collection of very detailed black & white pen & ink drawings.  Bob takes pride in adding pictures, words, symbols, equations, and anything else he can think of into his drawings to add interest, depth, and texture.  The idea is to keep you looking and always finding something new.

All Bob’s work is drawn entirely by hand using a .25mm rapidograph.  The themes of his work vary from naturalistic scenery, to intricate machinery, to the fantastic and science fiction.

Bob lives in Round Hill, Virginia with his family and trusted partner, Howi. He is an avid Sci-fi reader and very much enjoys fishing and swimming.

Giclees available on my website.  Inquire about originals.

www.NotWolfProductions.com
www.facebook.com/NotWolfProductions
www.instagram.com/NotWolfProductions
www.twitter.com/Not_Wolf_Prdtns
www.linkedin.com/company/Not-Wolf-Productions

Name: Artes Mundi
Description:
Artes Mundi is the key internationally focused flagship visual arts organisation in Wales generating unique opportunities for individuals and local communities to engage creatively with the urgent issues of our time in ways which resonate with us all. We are committed to stimulating dialogue and debates, internationally and locally, that develop greater understanding of ourselves, of others, and of the relations between familiar and distant cultures.

Artes Mundi yw’r prif sefydliad celfyddydau gweledol rhyngwladol ei ffocws yng Nghymru. Mae’n creu cyfleoedd unigryw i unigolion a chymunedau lleol ymgysylltu’n greadigol â phynciau llosg ein hoes mewn ffyrdd sy’n taro tant gyda phob un ohonom. Rydym wedi ymrwymo i ysgogi deialogau a dadleuon, yn rhyngwladol ac yn lleol, sy’n datblygu gwell dealltwriaeth o’n hunain, o eraill, ac o’r berthynas rhwng diwylliannau cyfarwydd a phellennig.

Name: Zabludowicz Collection
Description: Zabludowicz Collection is a fine art company based out of 176 Prince Of Wales Road  , LONDON, United Kingdom.

Name: Baldwin Entertainment LLC
Description: Baldwin Entertainment is headquartered in Atlanta GA, where founder Bryan Baldwin started producing and engineering EDM, Rock, R&B, and Hip-Hop music. With over 20 years of music industry experience, the team at Baldwin Entertainment is here to help cutting-edge groups share their gifts with the World.

Name: Nassima Landau
Description: Nassima Landau has become a space where contemporary art intersects with the cultural fabric of modern Tel Aviv. Through immersive exhibitions and exclusive events, we have reimagined how art is experienced—making it an integral part of social and cultural conversations.

Name: ARTHEMA
Description: Arthema Restoration is an art restoration, conservation and creation studio, specialized in decorative painting and sculpture. Since 2002, we are delivering our work in the West part of France and Paris with our 11 employees and a collaborative partners network. We have been awarded since 2012, Company of the French Living Heritage (EPV Label), a mark of recognition of the French State, put in place to reward French firms for the excellence of their traditional and industrial know-how

Name: AEF: Accademia Europea di Firenze
Description: The Florence Academy of Art is an International Fine Arts institution based in Florence, Italy, and Molndal, Sweden. Its mission is "To provide the highest level of instruction in classical methods of drawing, painting and sculpture for students wishing to pursue careers as professional artists in the Realist tradition."

Name: Aswathi's Classical Gems
Description: Classical Gems is an exquisite art school in the heart of the vibrant city of Calicut! Envisioned as a sanctuary for art enthusiasts, Classical Gems is founded by Kalamandalam Aswathi Prakash and Co-founded by Athul Prakash a dynamic Brand Manger and Marketing Strategist. Kalamandalam Aswathi is a distinguished artist with qualifications ranging from BA in Mohiniyattam & Bharathanatyam from Kerala Kalamandalam, and an MA in Bharatanatyam from Sree Sankaracharya University, Kalady. Aswathi's profound love for the rich Indian classical arts, coupled with her desire to create a nurturing space for artistic expression, became the driving force behind the establishment of this art school.

Name: Blombos (ex-Savoir / Dessiner)
Description:
La pratique artistique au service de la créativité, de l’innovation et de la collaboration

Chez Savoir / Dessiner, nous avons pour mission de rendre la pratique artistique accessible à tous : particuliers, entreprises et professionnels.

Nous voulons créer un monde où chacun peut exprimer pleinement son potentiel, à la fois créatif et personnel, pour enrichir sa vie et celle des autres.


 Un écosystème créatif unique :

- Des services dédiés aux entreprise : team building, formations(créativité, leadership, productivité…), cours récurrents et partenariats.
- Une plateforme de formations en ligne pour apprendre et pratiquer où que vous soyez
- Des cours en atelier pour progresser avec des artistes professionnels
- Une communauté de +100 000 membres, engagée pour échanger et s’inspirer
- Et surtout, une méthode pédagogique unique.


 Transformer la créativité en moteur d’épanouissement et de performance

La pratique artistique est un levier puissant pour :
 Stimuler la créativité et libérer le potentiel de chacun
 Renforcer la cohésion et favoriser la collaboration
 Encourager l’innovation par des pratiques inspirantes

 Google, Publicis Media, Naturalia, Airbnb, France TV ou encore Enedis… Ils nous font déjà confiance pour créer des projets artistiques sur-mesure pour leurs équipes.

Name: Festival Vo-Vf
Description:
Depuis 2013, le festival VoVf, le monde en livres – la parole aux traducteurs se tient le premier week-end d’octobre. Unique en son genre, cette manifestation grand public invite à découvrir la littérature étrangère à travers la voix des traducteurs et multiplie les ouvertures sur les cultures et langues du monde.
Fondé par la librairie LiraGif et organisé par l’association VoVf, le festival est préparé toute l’année par une équipe de quatre passionnés, salariés de l’association VoVf, accompagnés par les deux libraires fondateurs.

Name: Beo Art House - BAH
Description: Hobby center for creativity development. We started as a simple school for people who enjoy the art as hobbyists, and today we offer our services to people and companies, such as wall painting, mosaic, big and small scale models for promotional and other purposes. Also, we include web-shop providing artistic materials for all types of arts we have in our offer, as much as all types of original handmade products.

Name: Northeast Minneapolis Arts Association
Description:
Centered in Northeast Minneapolis, we serve working artists both here and in geographically and artistically adjacent communities. NEMAA has over 1,600 members, and is best known for producing Art-A-Whirl – the largest annual artist open studio tour in the nation. Our events make connecting with art and artists accessible to an ever-widening audience, both locally and beyond the Twin Cities.

We Believe
- The path of a professional artist should be open to anyone, regardless of race, age, gender or socioeconomic background.
- Artists thrive in environments of visibility, connection, inspiration and collaboration.
- Artists are a vital part of healthy communities and are integral to the social, economic and cultural wellbeing of societies.

We support our members by providing:

Promotion and Marketing
NEMAA provides an elevated platform for artists to display and sell their work, with year-round profile/online shop representation on our website, as well as promotion of artwork, news and events via our e-newsletter and social media channels to an ever-expanding audience. Our signature event each May, Art-A-Whirl, draws an estimated 70,000 people to Northeast Minneapolis to engage with art and artists directly in a fun, accessible and welcoming atmosphere.

Calls for Art
NEMAA keeps members abreast of current calls for art, and facilitates connections between businesses and artists for sales and display opportunities.

Education and Resources
NEMAA creates opportunities for artistic growth for artists through professional development workshops.

Fellowship, Community and Connection
NEMAA has over a thousand members, including artists, businesses, nonprofits and community supporters. NEMAA members connect to each other as friends, neighbors, clients, peers and mentors.

Name: Expure
Description:
Telling stories through art and culture.. 

Nous sommes une agence créative basée à Genève, spécialisée dans la communication, l’art et l’événementiel.

Ensemble, nous explorons et élaborons des histoires créatives au travers d’artistes passionnés.

Nous nous adressons aux marques, entreprises, municipalités et organisations souhaitant innover et apporter une touche créative dans leurs projets. 

Concrètement, nous offrons des services : 
- Communication (création de contenu et stratégie de communication) 
- Artistiques (fresques, personnalisation, décorations et création textile 
- Evénementiel (organisation d'événements) 

N’hésitez pas à nous contacter pour collaborer : info@expure.ch

Name: Rosa Spier Huis
Description:
Het Rosa Spier Huis is een woon-werkgemeenschap voor kunstenaars en wetenschappers.   Wij bieden bewoners van alle leeftijden, maar ook kunstenaars van buiten,  een podium, om hun inspiratie te delen met het publiek. Met een eigen concert- en theaterzaal, expositieruimte, galeriecafé, ateliers, studio's  en een hoogwaardig culturele programmering, vormt het huis een bijzondere ontmoetingsplaats voor kunstenaars en kunstliefhebbers van alle leeftijden
•  Wonen:  92 zelfstandige appartementen (van 60 tot 110 m2)
•  Werken: het blijven beoefenen van het eigen vak, in atelier of studio 
* Cultuur: beoefenen, beleven en delen
•  Zorg: licht tot intensief , 45 intramurale plaatsen én zorg op maat in de appartementen (wijkzorg, particulier of WLZ/VPT)

Het Rosa Spier Huis beschikt over een scala aan faciliteiten: er zijn muziekstudio’s, ateliers, een concert- en theaterzaal, expositieruimte en een bibliotheek. In deze ruimten programmeren we ieder jaar uiteenlopende culturele activiteiten, variërend van openbare concerten, theatervoorstellingen en exposities tot lezingen, workshops en presentaties voor bewoners of een specifieke doelgroep. 

Het Rosa Spier Huis biedt Particulier wonen, wijkzorg en intramurale zorg ZZP 5 t/m 10

Name: Savoir / Dessiner
Description:
La pratique artistique au service de la créativité, de l’innovation et de la collaboration

Chez Savoir / Dessiner, nous avons pour mission de rendre la pratique artistique accessible à tous : particuliers, entreprises et professionnels.

Nous voulons créer un monde où chacun peut exprimer pleinement son potentiel, à la fois créatif et personnel, pour enrichir sa vie et celle des autres.


 Un écosystème créatif unique :

- Des services dédiés aux entreprise : team building, formations(créativité, leadership, productivité…), cours récurrents et partenariats.
- Une plateforme de formations en ligne pour apprendre et pratiquer où que vous soyez
- Des cours en atelier pour progresser avec des artistes professionnels
- Une communauté de +100 000 membres, engagée pour échanger et s’inspirer
- Et surtout, une méthode pédagogique unique.


 Transformer la créativité en moteur d’épanouissement et de performance

La pratique artistique est un levier puissant pour :
 Stimuler la créativité et libérer le potentiel de chacun
 Renforcer la cohésion et favoriser la collaboration
 Encourager l’innovation par des pratiques inspirantes

 Google, Publicis Media, Naturalia, Airbnb, France TV ou encore Enedis… Ils nous font déjà confiance pour créer des projets artistiques sur-mesure pour leurs équipes.

Name: Festival of Arts / Pageant of the Masters
Description:
The Laguna Beach Festival of Arts is a 501c3 with a mission to promote, produce, and sponsor events and activities that encourage the appreciation, study and performance of the arts. Throughout each year the Festival of Arts sponsors art education and provides art scholarships and grants. Every summer the organization hosts California’s premier open-air fine art show and produces the Pageant of the Masters. 

As one of the nation’s oldest and most highly acclaimed juried fine art shows, the Festival of Arts features the artwork of over 100 award-winning artists. Patrons can enjoy the work of exhibiting artists, demonstrations and art workshops, daily art tours, live music, special events, dine at on-site restaurants and much more. 

The Pageant of the Masters is arguably one of the most unique productions in the entire world. Audiences are amazed and enchanted by ninety minutes of tableaux vivants ("living pictures"), incredibly faithful re-creations of classical and contemporary works of art, with real people posing to look exactly like their counterparts in the original pieces.

Name: Cultuurhuis KADE40
Description: KADE40 is er voor en door iedereen. Met ruim 80.000 creatieve contacten per jaar. Je vindt ons op school, wij de wijk, online en aan de Westhavenkade 40. Ons doel is om jong & oud laagdrempelig in aanraking te laten komen met kunst & cultuur om een actieve, zelfbewuste leefomgeving te creëren. We staan voor ontmoeting, creativiteit, plezier, diversiteit, inclusiviteit en gelijkwaardigheid. KADE40 is hiermee één van de belangrijkste instellingen in Vlaardingen die bijdraagt aan het culturele klimaat in de stad. Kunst voor iedereen.

Name: Conferro Heritae Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Conferro Heritae, as the name suggests, is a family of Connoisseurs of Art & Collectibles which aims to promote the opportunity, the Industry of Indian Art and collectibles entail. Conferro Heritae provides finest of Indian Art to its clients and promote the rare, unseen and exclusive set of Collectibles forming the fundamentals of Indian History and Heritage, enabling collectors and novices alike to learn, view, collect and live with the pieces rarely seen before. Conferro Heritae aims to make ‘Collecting’ an experience in itself and a journey towards learning and attaining connoisseurship in Art and collectibles through a series of knowledge sharing programs aimed to create awareness of the sector globally. 

‘Research’ is Conferro Heritae’s core competence which it feels is the backbone of learning, creating a great collection and making use of the worthy opportunities the industry offers. We believe that managing a collection should be a mix of informed decisions backed by strong research and an emotional fulfillment of living with historically significant and aesthetically strong works enlightening one’s living. 

Conferro Heritae procures and provides finest works of Indian Art & heritage by undertaking methodical study through research. Conferro Heritae's guidance is based upon thorough research-backed analysis of market dynamics existent in the art world globally. Conferro Heritae's research facilitates art connoisseurs and collectors with consistent and reliable updates.

Name: FESTIGONE LYON
Description:
Créateur d’événements et de sensations, nous avons à cœur de présenter et de donner de la visibilité à des artistes lyonnais. 
Pour ce faire nous organisons des événements (concerts, vernissage, festival ect..).

Nous croyons fermement aux vertus de l’art sur l’épanouissement humain et voulons rendre la culture et l’art accessible à un maximum de monde tout en donnant de la visibilité aux artistes émergents.

On se rencontre sur notre prochain événement ?

Name: Galeria de Arte Mamute
Description:
Com sede em Porto Alegre/RS e Florianópolis/SC, a Galeria de Arte Mamute representa  artistas com formação e pesquisa nas Artes Visuais, para oferecer a você obras de arte contemporâneas originais e exclusivas nas técnicas de pintura, desenho, escultura, gravura, fotografia e vídeo. 
 
Participa regularmente de importantes  Feiras de Arte Nacionais e Internacionais, como SP-Arte, ArtRio, SP-Arte Foto, Feira Parte(SP), Feira Pinta(Miami), BAPhoto (Buenos Aires), Latitude Art Fair (Nova York) e Not Cancelled (Viena) 
 
Reconhecida pela sua atuação como galeria de arte e promotora de conhecimento, tem recebido prêmios como melhor espaço institucional, melhor exposição e mídias tecnológicas, no mais importante prêmio de Artes Plásticas do Rio Grande do Sul, o Prêmio Açorianos, e prêmios Funarte de Artes Visuais, entre outros.
 
É membro da ABACT - Associação Brasileira de Arte Contemporânea, e do LATITUDE - Platform for Brazilian Art Galleries Abroad.

Compromissada com a produção e disseminação do conhecimento nas artes visuais, a galeria promove em seu espaço, além das exposições individuais e coletivas, inúmeras propostas teórico-prático-reflexivas, como debates com artistas, pesquisadores, curadores, colecionadores, e atividades como palestras, cursos, residências artísticas, lançamento de publicações, e defesas de mestrado e doutorado nas Artes Visuais.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Hancock Gallery
Description:
We work with both emerging and established artists to provide expert advice on 20th Century masters and art investment.
Our gallery offers an extensive range of contemporary artwork from the UK and beyond, including original oil paintings, collectable limited editions and sculpture.

Owning art can be one of the most fulfilling, enriching and rewarding ways to enhance your lifestyle. Whether you’re looking for individuality from a piece of artwork or advice on art investment, our beautiful three storey Georgian townhouse gallery will give you that inspiration. Our ornate, dedicated viewing rooms can also create an intimate and private artwork experience.

Name: Conseil québécois du patrimoine vivant
Description: Le Conseil québécois du patrimoine vivant (CQPV) constitue le regroupement national pour le patrimoine immatériel et les traditions vivantes, en relation consultative avec l’UNESCO.

Name: Colección Patricia Phelps de Cisneros
Description:
Founded in the 1970s by Patricia Phelps de Cisneros and Gustavo A. Cisneros, the Colección Patricia Phelps de Cisneros (CPPC) is based in New York City and Caracas. Its mission is to enhance appreciation of the diversity, distinction, and range of art from Latin America, and to advance scholarship of the material cultures of the Ibero-American world that covers 500 years of artistic activities in the region.

This mission is embodied in the CPPC’s expansive art collection that ranges across many genres, communities, periods, and styles. While perhaps best known for its collection of Modern geometric abstraction from Latin America, the CPPC also comprises equally important holdings of artworks and documentation by traveler artists to and within Latin America and the Caribbean from the 17th to 19th centuries; furniture, art, and objects from Latin America’s colonial period; contemporary art from Latin America and the Caribbean; and an important selection of art, artifacts, and documentation from twelve indigenous tribes of the Orinoco river basin in the Venezuelan Amazon.

Name: BrushBox Art Academy
Description: brushbox art academy, based in ahmedabad, india, is a creative art space offering art & craft classes for kids, along with fine art & digital art training for adults. our programs are designed for both hobby learners and those aspiring to build a career in visual art. we also host art & craft workshops, parties & events.

Name: Butler Gallery
Description:
Butler Gallery is one of Ireland’s most vibrant contemporary art spaces outside of Dublin. In operation since 1943, the gallery was located in medieval Kilkenny Castle from 1976-2020. After a long development the gallery move to the historic Evans’ Home in 2020. Our policy and programme are committed to exhibiting the work of Irish and emerging artists along with highlighting major international artists, when possible. We are privileged to have an important collection of Irish and international art dating from the 1800s, which we are committed to safeguarding for the future. Our dynamic education department, offering programmes for family, youth, adult and community audiences, encourages public engagement with exhibitions, contributing to audience development and raising awareness of the Gallery’s work at a local, national and international level. 

We offer our visitors contemporary exhibitions, which reflect the constantly changing nature of visual art practice and the range of media used in the making of contemporary work. The Butler Gallery exists on site and off site, as a place of interaction between artists and the public – a contemporary space within a non-contemporary setting. Occupying this unique position on the Irish art circuit, we are dedicated to remaining at the forefront of artistic excellence.

Proud to be funded by the Arts Council of Ireland.
Registered Charity No 20038977. CHY 12922

Name: ZuCot Gallery
Description:
H&T Art Partners was formed with the collective assets and knowledge of Atlanta based ZuCot Gallery and Premier Art, Inc. Partners Troy Taylor, Onaje Henderson, and Omari Henderson came together with years of existing experience in the arts to form a full-service art business focused on promoting original pieces by living African American Artists. The company’s art gallery, ZuCot Gallery, is the largest African-American owned fine art gallery in the Southeast. Located in the historic Castleberry Hill district of downtown Atlanta, the 3,500 sq. foot space offers an eclectic decor and features some of the most prolific contemporary artists of our time.

The mission is to promote original works of art by living African American artists and provide both novice and seasoned collectors with meaningful and unique services that enhance the art collecting experience. Collectors benefit from a variety of services, which include educational programming, events where like-minded individuals network, and the highest quality original works of art.

The goal is to provide both novice and seasoned collectors with out of the box services that enhance the art collecting experience. Through education programs like the Art Tasting as well as services such as Art Leasing and Virtual Viewing, H&T has been able to create an impressive list of corporate and private clients. 

Along with finding art new homes, H&T has also been successful in working with companies to aid them in reaching some of their corporate goals and live their diversity proposition through art collecting and education. Corporate clients have used the services to create special exhibitions throughout the year and educate employees and clients about the creative process and the importance of becoming custodians of culture. H&T Art Partners has worked with companies such as The Coca-Cola Company, The Home Depot, The Tom Joyner Foundation, and Kimberly Clark.

Name: Atelier
Description: Zeichnungen, Textilgraphik, Textile Reliefs, tragbare Kunst, Unikatkarten sowie andere Einzelstücke

Name: CINEMATHEQUE DE TANGER
Description:
La Cinémathèque de Tanger est un centre de conservation et de diffusion cinématographique situé au cœur de Tanger au Maroc. Association à but non lucratif, née en 2007 de la volonté d’Yto Barrada, sa fondatrice, qui, accompagnée d’autres artistes, a redonné vie à l’ancien Cinéma RIF pour créer le projet de la Cinémathèque.

Résolument tournée vers le monde, la Cinémathèque de Tanger est depuis sa création un lieu d’ouverture et de rencontres, une plateforme unique d’échanges favorisant l’interculturalité, en diffusant les productions marocaines et internationales, soucieuse d’offrir à son public une programmation de qualité.

Dans cette dynamique, elle consacre nombre d’efforts à mener une politique des publics ambitieuse, tournée vers la jeunesse et volontairement ancrée dans le tissu associatif local et national.

Name: Art History AI
Description:
What if the Mona Lisa had been painted by Frieda Kahlo? Or the Sistine Chapel had been painted by Shepard Fairey?

Using the power of AI we explore how the world's most famous works would have turned out if they had been created by another artist.

Please tag #arthistoryai if you would like to be considered to be featured on this channel.

Name: Artrade Latam
Description:
Artrade es una galería-tienda online de arte original en donde artistas independientes pueden gestionar y vender su obra, ahora gestionamos también la venta de colecciones privadas.


Entérate de todo lo que esta pasando en el mundo artistico y diferencia tus campañas con arte, compra tu obra de arte favorita y conoce los artistas en www.artradelatam.com

Name: HAIR
Description:
Heroic
adjective

Also heroical. of, relating to, or characteristic of a hero or heroine.
Synonyms: courageous, brave, gallant, valorous, valiant, dauntless

Antonyms: cowardly

Is it possible to be a heroic artist and creator in today's world?

You bet your ass it is!

As a matter of fact, your brave, valorous and dauntless creative self is needed now more than ever.  Those of you that have spent time in the creative corner, huddled against the provincial, the bigoted and the rapacious know what I'm talking about.  I challenge that I cannot be my genuine self if I remain sheepishly supplicant, whether it be out of real or distorted fear, and fade into the periphery of history.

HAIR is a network of Heroic Artists in Reality.  A place where the despotic, their false dogma and misinformation can be brought into the light, critiqued, challenged and ultimately destroyed by the righteous creative.  This is a forum for open minded individuals, both artists and aficionados, dedicated to the free and unencumbered expression of their craft in all forms and methods.  

There is a certain enthusiasm in liberty, that makes human nature rise above itself, in acts of bravery and heroism.
~Alexander Hamilton

Name: Lots Road Auctions
Description:
“For all things authentic, alternative, eclectic and magnificent”

Situated in the heart of Chelsea, Lots Road Auctions provides a unique ever changing collection of both Contemporary and Antique items. With everything from Persian Silk rugs, Matisse etchings, Godwin hand crafted furniture and those special new discoveries by unknown talents filling the two vast salesrooms; Lots Road Auctions has a lot to offer.

Every Sunday, including all bank holidays, the Contemporary and Traditional Furnishings and Decorative Items sale kicks off from 11am in the ground floor auction Room and followed by, at 3pm, the upstairs auction of Antique Furniture, Paintings, Carpets and Works of Art.

Almost every month a specialist sale is held for the avid collectors and the intrigued, featuring selections of the following; Fine Antiques, Continental Furniture, Lighting and Mirrors; Silver and Vertu; Fine Carpets and Rugs; Tribal and Asian Art and Artefacts; and Russian Art Auctions three times a year.

Highly regarded for providing an excellent service to the creative industry, Lots Road Auctions is an essential source for both trade and private collectors and interior designers thanks to the value for money and variety it offers each week.

Idle visitors are given the opportunity to pursue and view the eclectic mix of sale items for four full days and one evening throughout the course of the week. For those who are drowning in busy schedules and constant business meetings the fully illustrated catalogue is available online from Thursday 6:30pm.

Name: IMAGINART GALLERY S.L.
Description: Imaginart es una galería de arte activa desde el año 2007 que funciona como espacio expositivo y como gestora y curadora de colecciones privadas. La galería trabaja con dos líneas diferenciadas: la del arte moderno y vanguardias históricas del siglo XX y la vinculada a artistas contemporáneos. En los últimos años, la galería ha centrado sus esfuerzos especialmente en aquéllos artistas cuya obra o discurso es más incisivo y crítico con los relatos hegemónicos tanto a nivel social, como político o cultural.

Name: Mémoire de l'Avenir
Description:
Mémoire de l'Avenir est une organisation à but non lucratif dont la mission principale est de s’appuyer sur les arts et le patrimoine culturel comme moyens d'amélioration de la société. 

A travers le développement de quatre pôles interconnectés - expositions, actions pédagogiques, recherches et Humanités, Arts et Société - Mémoire de l'Avenir place la créativité et le dialogue au centre de ses actions, de ses outils et de ses méthodes afin de promouvoir la réflexion et l'éducation, la participation active et créative de même que le croisement des disciplines.

Son espace, situé dans le quartier parisien de Belleville, est conçu comme un lieu de rencontres entre artistes, penseurs et public.

PROGRAMMATION ARTISTIQUE 
Mémoire de l'Avenir organise des évènements d’art contemporain au sein de son espace ainsi que des programmations satellites. Les méthodes artistiques et curatoriales employées cherchent à proposer une approche aux œuvres sensible et intuitive. 

ATELIERS ARTS ET DIALOGUE
Mémoire de l'Avenir créé et développe également avec des artistes, des ateliers multidisciplinaires et des médiations culturelles interactives qui se basent sur une méthodologie originale élaborée par Margalit Berriet. Elle est fondée sur l’inclusion respectueuse de toutes cultures et identités et propose une approche intuitive à la créativité, se focalisant sur la notion de sensibilité comme fondement de l’apprentissage cognitif.

RECHERCHE ET PÉDAGOGIE
A travers notre programme de médiation culturelle spécifiquement conçu pour un public éloigné de la culture, les œuvres d’art ainsi que les musées, sont utilisés comme des outils et des espaces de dialogue, de débat et de questionnement critique autour d’enjeux contemporains. 

HUMANITIES, ARTS AND SOCIETY
(Un projet de UNESCO-MOST - C.I.P.S.H. - Mémoire de l’Avenir)
Plateforme internationale d'artistes, de chercheurs, de penseurs et de projets créatifs démontrant l'impact des arts et des sciences humaines dans la société.

Name: Escola Artística de Soares dos Reis
Description:
A Escola Artística de Soares dos Reis comemora este ano letivo 140 anos a servir o país no ensino das Artes. Oferece atualmente um conjunto de 5 cursos gratuitos, entre cursos de Ensino Artístico Especializado nas áreas das Artes Visuais e dos Audiovisuais, bem como, um curso de Ensino Profissional de Animação 2D e 3D. Ambas as ofertas de formação são de nível secundário, de dupla certificação no nível 4. 

Cursos de Ensino Artístico Especializado: Produção Artística, com especializações em Cerâmica, Ourivesaria, Realização Plástica do Espetáculo, Têxteis e Gravura/ Serigrafia; Design de Comunicação, com especializações em Design Gráfico e Multimédia; Design de Produto, com especializações em Cerâmica, Equipamento, Ourivesaria/ Joalharia e Têxteis; e Comunicação Audiovisual, com especializações em Cinema e Vídeo Fotografia Multimédia.

Curso Profissional: Técnico de Animação 2D e 3D.

Name: LE CASTEL ART GALLERY
Description: Art Gallery - Modern contemporary Art - Automotive Art - PopArt

Name: Kansas City Artists Coalition
Description:
The Kansas City Artists Coalition (KCAC) is a nonprofit organization that promotes visual arts awareness in Kansas City and the surrounding region, and supports the professional growth of artists.



The Kansas City Artists Coalition:

    - fosters a climate which encourages innovation and creativity among artists,
    - utilizes the collective initiative and creativity of artists for their own benefit,
    - provides a forum for contemporary visual arts through our galleries and    publications,
    - champions the work of local artists and increases the viability of Kansas City as a place for artists to live and work,
    - spreads the word about the vitality of the arts in Kansas City, Missouri and the region,
    - encourages artists to go forward with their ambitious and innovative ideas, and to seek out peers and mentors in the artists communities across the United States and the world,
    - supports artists’ work financially,
    - promotes the exchange of ideas

Name: Studio L
Description:
With an eye for detail and a unique style, my goal is to
capture images and create designs that tell a story. I serve
brands by enhancing their digital presence with tailored
strategies and engaging visuals.

Name: Tech Ops Art Space
Description:
Mission: To provide a vibrant and inclusive platform for artists to express their creativity, foster dialogue, and cultivate a deeper appreciation for the arts, enriching lives and communities.

Vision: To be a dynamic and influential art space, celebrated for our diverse range of artistic expressions, collaborative initiatives, and immersive experiences that transcend boundaries and ignite passion for the arts.

Name: Carla Priscilla Institute of Design
Description: Online Art School based in Bali

Name: Bureau des Arts emlyon
Description:
Le Bureau des Arts de emlyon business school est une association étudiante créée en 1996 qui a ses locaux au sein de l'école de management emlyon business school (69).

Axée vers la culture et les différentes pratiques artistiques, l'association organise tout au long de l'année des évènements culturels d'une grande diversité à une échelle locale et nationale.

Parmi eux : 

• Le Festival MANE (Music Awakens Night Excitement) : Festival lyonnais de musique. Tremplins électro et rap mettant en avant des artistes locaux, jeunes et talentueux. 

• Le Festival C.L.A.C (Certains L'Aiment Court) : Festival lyonnais de courts métrages. Sur deux jours, l'association organise une table ronde, des workshops, une projection suivie d'une cérémonie de remise de prix par un jury professionnel. Plus de 300 participants sont présents chaque année. 

• Les Band'appart : Concerts d'artistes locaux en appartement.

• Les Musée Home : Expositions d'artistes locaux en appartement.

• Les Cin'em : Projections de films en appartement.

• Les Cafés-Théâtres : Spectacle d'étudiants  en scène ouverte dans une salle locale. 

& pleins d'autres rendez-vous culturels sur la ville de Lyon.

Management d'artistes : Vous souhaitez vous lancer sur la scène musicale ? Notre nouveau pôle sera ravi de vous accompagner, faire votre communication, vous trouver des salles et des concerts...

Name: Super Super Markt
Description:
Created by Julius Jacobi and Rory Kirk-Duncan in 2022, Super Super Markt is an art gallery and community based out of Berlin.

Since the beginning, our mission has been to develop a community-driven platform that makes art more accessible and champions the work of a new generation of international artists.

Super Super Markt started as a nomadic exhibition project in temporary spaces – an off-licence, a deli and a collector’s home amongst others. In 2024, we opened our first gallery on Brunnenstr. 22 in Berlin, as an extension of our platform and community.

Name: Dunedin Fine Art Center
Description:
For over four decades, the Dunedin Fine Art Center (DFAC) has been offering exciting art opportunities in a most welcoming kind of way.Tampa Bay Times writer Lennie Bennett says that DFAC is “the artistic equivalent of a village square,” offering quality experiences to people of all ages. DFAC offers year-round exhibitions in seven galleries featuring national, regional and local artists. Classes for students 4.5 yrs. to 97 yrs. fill 21 studio classrooms and a changing yearly theme makes the David L. Mason Children’s Art Museum a hands-on experience not to be missed.
 
You can take some time to enjoy a delicious lunch or gourmet coffee in the Palm Café, or search out one-of-a-kind gifts in the Gallery Shop. Come out and PLAY at the Dunedin Fine Art Center and see why people say it’s where the ART is!

Name: Atelier Haute Cuisine
Description:
We are a design collective named “Atelier Haute Cuisine” that is founded in 2009 by Bernd Tyskens and Benny Conings
We don't do any cooking or other food related stuff.
But acting like cooks we mix different ingredients together so that they can contribute to a greater whole. Just like you would cook a meal.
 
The outcome can be handmade objects, lightsculptures, furniture, site specific installations and concepts.

Name: Galleria Franco Noero
Description:
Founded in Turin in 1999, the gallery distinguished itself from the very start for its courageous and significant exhibition projects crossing all artistic languages, while maintaining a particular attention to conceptual practices and to the radicality of research. Over the years, its program has maintained a constant evolution and growth, accompanied by the migration to eight different spaces in the city: a response to different architectural and planning needs, which has left artists free to create new projects in different places.
Since 2013, its center of activity has been the area around Via Mottalciata 10, in the northern part of Turin: a ductile space, completed in September 2020 with an open-air area covering one thousand square meters located just a short distance from the main premises. Alongside the organization of exhibitions in its own spaces and participation in major international fairs, the gallery collaborates with the most important Italian and international institutions as well as with the city itself, promoting the publication of books and supporting and contributing to the production of works and projects by its artists.

Name: LaBel Valette Festival
Description: Depuis 5 ans, une centaine d’artistes prennent d’assaut le château de la Valette et ses 40 hectares pour un événement exceptionnel mettant à l’honneur la street culture. Prépare toi, à 1h20 de Paris, à en prendre plein la vue avec les 10 000m2 de murs abandonnés à la créativité des artistes. Au Festival laBel Valette, les organisateurs t’accueillent à coups de bombes et de baffles dans un cadre unique.

Name: Art-Management
Description:
ART-MANAGEMENT is an art-consulting company working on the intersection of art and business. Bright international experience of our team accumulates a multilateral expertise in curatorial studies, marketing, art history, contemporary art in synergy with high sense of customer service and openness to innovations makes us rather different from other art-galleries.
The collection of a wide variety of suburban art is presented in the business-spaces in the heart of Luxembourg. We help with workspace improvement by doing company philosophy reflections and business mission visualizations, turning those into art-environment recommendations. 
From coming up with concepts, making strategic planning, budgeting to the physical realization. Traditional artworks acquiring can be proceeded in cryptocurrency also. 
Every project coordinated by us became a marvelous experience for our followers and collectors, e.g. bespoke art-event,  tailor-made art-lending, personalized art piece created on demand, exhibitions and curated shows online/offline. 
Supporting the living artists, proud to present them also virtually on TOP-world-wide professional platforms: Artnet, Widewalls, Artsper.

Name: Street Art Revolution
Description: Street Art Revolution is a Black-owned and artist-led  public art collective and design ﬁrm -- one of the few of its kind in the United States, specializing in providing carefully curated and culturally responsive public art, murals, civic design and sculptures. Street Art Revolution utilizes public art as a catalyst for positive change through a new community narrative reflecting a sense of place and respect for local culture. Never underestimate the power of art to transform communities.
Location: West Palm Beach/ San Diego, CA

Name: Fondazione Piero Cattaneo
Description:
La Fondazione, costituitasi il 14 gennaio 2010 come Associazione senza fini di lucro e oggi trasformata in Fondazione, nasce con l’intento di promuovere la figura dell’artista Cattaneo (Bergamo 1929 – 2003), personalità dalla vivace creatività e la cui ricerca artistica si è imposta nel panorama dell’arte del XX secolo in più ambiti disciplinari: dalla scultura, suo primo strumento espressivo, alla medaglistica sino al campo dell’illustrazione.

Divulgare la conoscenza della sua esperienza in relazione al contesto storico culturale in cui ha operato; studiare e diffondere l’andamento delle ricerche artistiche nel corso della seconda metà del ‘900 e proporre un dialogo aperto con le nuove realtà emergenti del XXI secolo è un obbiettivo importante di cui questa istituzione vuol farsi portatrice.

Name: The VaulT - Art Gallery
Description: TheVaulT where business, art, and design come together to create extraordinary spaces. At The Vault, we believe art is more than decoration. It’s a statement, an experience, and a powerful way to transform any space—whether it’s an office, a home, or a hospitality setting.

Name: Stern Pissarro Gallery
Description:
Established in 1964, Stern Pissarro Gallery is co-owned by David Stern and Lélia Pissarro, great-granddaughter of Camille Pissarro. The gallery specialises in Impressionist, Modern and Contemporary art as well as Camille Pissarro and his descendants.


The gallery occupies a unique position in the global art scene, representing five generations of works by the Pissarro family. With the strongest collection of Pissarro works worldwide, the gallery lends extensively to international museums and institutions and has become a centre of research and expertise for the work of Camille Pissarro’s descendants.


The gallery has delivered important exhibitions such as Marc Chagall: Master of Colour (2016) and Christo and Jeanne-Claude: A Life of Projects (2018). Stern Pissarro Gallery also exhibits in selected fairs each year such as Cologne Fine Art (COFA) and Brussels Art Fair (BRAFA).


The gallery is situated in the heartland of the London art scene over two floors of the iconic Target House building on 66 St James’s Street, Mayfair. Designed by British architect Rodney Gordon, the building’s eye-catching bronze anodised aluminium cladding makes it a pinnacle of Modernist architecture and a landmark of the area.


Our clients benefit from the extensive experience, intimate knowledge and passion of the gallery directors and their team. We can advise on all aspects of building and maintaining a collection, including framing and hanging, as well as providing unique insights into art market trends and opportunities. Combined with art-market expertise, scholarly art-historical knowledge, it is the cornerstone of the gallery’s approach

Name: Eltang & Rygaard Konservering
Description:
I Eltang & Rygaard Konservering v. Katrine Eltang og Maj Rygaard, har vi over 40 års erfaring med at løse bevaringsopgaver for kirker, kommuner, museer, tegnestuer og privatpersoner.

Vi arbejder med planlægning og udførelse af bevaringsprojekter i mange formater, primært med undersøgelse, dokumentation, konservering og restaurering af:

•	Kalkmaleri
•	Vægmaleri
•	Interiørdekorationer
•	Farvearkæologiske undersøgelser 
•	Skulpturer og monumenter

Vi rådgiver bl.a. om klima- og saltrelateret nedbrydning, om den bevaringsrelaterede projektering og om anbefalinger til præventiv bevaring efter et afsluttet projekt. I forbindelse med arbejdet med kalkmalerier udføres projektet iht. til Nationalmuseets standarder og i tæt samarbejde med museets kirkekonsulenter. Er menighedsråd eller andre interesseret i et foredrag eller anden form for formidling af projektet, hjælper vi gerne.

Vores timepris afhænger af projektets karakter, størrelse og geografiske placering og I er altid velkomne til at kontakte os for et uforpligtigende tilbud. Vi leverer samme høje kvalitet - til tiden - uanset om det er et stort eller et lille projekt, der skal løses.

Name: TENT Rotterdam
Description:
TENT is een platform voor 100% hedendaagse kunst dat zijn wortels heeft in Rotterdam. Het verbindt de kunst van de stad met wat in de wereld er omheen gebeurt. De tentoonstellingsruimte is gevestigd in een monumentaal voormalig schoolgebouw aan de Witte de Withstraat 50, de cultuurstraat van Rotterdam. TENT richt zich via haar uiteenlopende programmering op relevante ontwikkelingen binnen de hedendaagse kunst, waarbij er speciale aandacht is voor actuele thematiek. Een bezoek aan TENT is de kennismaking met de actualiteit van de kunst in Rotterdam.

TENT is a platform for 100% contemporary art that has its roots in Rotterdam. It connects the art of the city to events occurring in the wider world. The exhibition space is housed in a monumental former school building in the Witte de Withstraat, Rotterdam’s street of culture. With its diverse programme, TENT addresses relevant developments in contemporary art, whereby special attention is given to topical themes. A visit to TENT is an introduction to the topicality of art in Rotterdam.

Name: Work-Shop
Description:
Work-Shop is a crusader for all things creative. We run a wide range of quirky and affordable short courses that broaden horizons and unveil potential.

Mission
Work-Shop provides a broad range of affordable short courses in arts, crafts, and skills that can be utilised in everyday life. We promote and support local artists and industry experts.

Name: APRE Art House
Description:
Founded by Prerna SM Jain, APRE Art House commenced its journey in 2016, formalizing its presence by 2022. Situated in Colaba, the gallery has established a distinguished global footprint, with exhibitions held in cultural epicenters such as New York, New Delhi, and Mumbai. At the heart of its ethos lies a steadfast commitment to showing art that resonates with audiences both immediately and enduringly.

Spanning an expansive 10,000 square feet, the Gallery's Artist Residency Programme (MAIR) is situated in the heart of Mumbai. It embodies a nurturing space, fostering the growth and evolution of artists. This residency program serves as a testament to the gallery's unwavering dedication to the cultivation of artistic talent and innovation.

The Gallery's inaugural exhibition in Colaba, "Shadow Lands," integrated theatre, studio visits, film screenings, slam poetry, walkthroughs, and in-depth discussions. Subsequent exhibitions have been accompanied with educational engagements and experimental programs, nurturing a passion for contemporary art.

Beyond its vibrant exhibition schedule, APRE Art House is committed to fostering robust networks and cementing stakeholder relationships within the arts sector. By addressing critical needs and contextualizing socio-cultural dynamics, the gallery strives to integrate seamlessly into the ever-evolving landscape of contemporary art, providing stability and continuity amidst transformation.

With a steadfast dedication to promoting a pluralistic arts culture through physical and virtual showcases, as well as ongoing public programming, APRE Art House extends its support to artists through a comprehensive array of initiatives, including residency programs, mentorships, legal guidance, and international representation.

In the dynamic terrain of contemporary art, APRE Art House offers stability, welcoming both seasoned collectors and newcomers a trusted space to explore, learn, and engage. We warmly invite all to join us on our j

Name: New York School of the Arts
Description:
New York School of the Arts is a school that has been created to fulfill the expectation of the transformed contemporary art world. It is based on the heritage of the traditional discipline and at the same time an exploration of the new media. In the modern context of New York City, we use a strong atelier methodology along with critical and conceptual practices.

Conceived as a multidisciplinary hub, our school explores the studies of fine arts, design, architecture and music and, with our future Center of the Arts, will host an international gallery, artist’s studio and our Arts Intensive Program. Counting on the support and the expertise of important living and visiting artists, our students have access to a range of cutting-edge workshops, lectures, panel discussions, critiques, and school events.  

We offer a broad spectrum of arts educational programs, programs in general art study, studio practices, instruction on the business of art and later a study abroad program with an intention to broaden our international dimension. Students also find enrichment in museum and gallery visits as well as opportunities to participate in areas of specialized study with other partnering New York City art organizations. Students have many opportunities to exhibit their work in the School galleries, including in our prestigious year end Annual Show.  

Our dynamic and flexible program structure provides students with a solid foundation in arts education. Also, students have opportunities to experience and collaborate with visiting art professionals such as art dealers, curators, and members of other prestigious art institutions. This will facilitate connections with New York City galleries and an immersion into the New York City art scene. This multi-faceted experience provides our students with the comprehensive knowledge and support they need for a professional career in the arts.

Name: HBK Braunschweig
Description: Die Hochschule für Bildende Künste Braunschweig ist eine der führenden Kunsthochschulen Deutschlands und die einzige staatliche Kunsthochschule in Niedersachsen. Hier werden Kunst, Design und Wissenschaft unter einem Dach vereint. Das Studienangebot an der HBK umfasst ein breites Spektrum von Kunstwissenschaft und Kunstpädagogik, über Darstellendes Spiel und Freie Kunst bis hin zu Medienwissenschaften, Visuelle Kommunikation, Transformation Design und weiteren Studiengängen. Forschung und Lehre, digital wie analog, sind an der HBK äußerst vielfältig und bieten den Studierenden Abschlüsse als Bachelor of Arts, Master of Arts oder Master of Education, sowie den Diplom- und Meisterschüler*innen-Abschluss.

Name: ArteGlobaL
Description: ARTE GLOBAL was established in 2003. We are specialized in art collecting advisory services and cultural management.

Name: Zachęta — Narodowa Galeria Sztuki
Description: Zachęta — Narodowa Galeria Sztuki to instytucja, której misją jest upowszechnianie sztuki współczesnej we wszystkich jej aktualnych przejawach. Miejsce, gdzie prezentowane są najciekawsze zjawiska w sztuce XX i XXI wieku.

Name: Superposition
Description: Street Art association and gallery in Lyon - France.

Name: Academy of Arts, Architecture and Design in Prague
Description:
Vysoká škola uměleckoprůmyslová v Praze byla založena v roce 1885. Po celou dobu své existence se řadí mezi nejkvalitnější vzdělávací instituce. Důkazem je množství úspěšných absolventů, kteří patří mezi respektované odborníky s prestiží přesahující hranice České republiky. Škola je rozdělena na šest kateder – architektury, designu, volného umění, užitého umění, grafiky a teorie a dějin umění.
Jednotlivé katedry se dále člení na ateliéry dle své odborné specializace, vedené respektovaným osobnostmi.

Name: Anthea Art Investments AG
Description:
Anthea Art Investments AG is an investment and advisory boutique covering the full market spectrum including Post War & Contemporary art, Impressionist & Modern art and Old Master paintings.

Our team of experienced professionals, partners' network and in-depth knowledge of the art market allow our sophisticated, high-profile clientele top notch advisory for the sound management of their art collections and solid access to robust investment opportunities.

Name: MURAL Festival
Description: MURAL festival is THE North-American destination for all things urban art. We are the merging point of creative mind. We are the festive and innovative soul of a city brimming with artistry. The festival offers participants to attend the creation of live murals, musical concerts, conferences, exhibitions and a variety of artistic programming during the 11-day festival.

Name: Mall Galleries / Federation of British Artists
Description:
Mall Galleries hosts a diverse programme of exhibitions and events, and is home to the Federation of British Artists.

Each year we host a busy, diverse and exciting programme of exhibitions, including work by emerging as well as well-known established artists. Many of our exhibitions focus on contemporary representational art, each of them offering paintings, sculpture, prints or drawings for sale at affordable prices.

We also play host to many of the UK’s leading open art competitions, as well as other temporary exhibitions of contemporary sculpture, photography and the visual arts.

We love to welcome visitors who love contemporary art.

Mall Galleries is operated by the Federation of British Artists, a major visual arts charity established in 1961.  The Federation (FBA) comprises eight of the UK’s leading art societies, specialising in oil, portrait, marine, wildlife, watercolour, pastel, printmaking and sculpture.  Each holds their annual exhibition at Mall Galleries.  A unique national resource, the FBA has over 600 practising artists and is home to the largest life drawing society in London (Hesketh Hubbard Art Society).

Name: BRAFA Art Fair
Description:
The Brussels Art Fair (BRAFA) is one of the leading European art and antiques fairs. Here, all art works on show are for sale and quality and authenticity are two of the key requirements exhibitors face. BRAFA is an eclectic fair which encompasses a variety of specialities, from antiquity to the 21st century... 

The BRAFA Art Fair, created in 1956, is one of the world’s oldest and most prestigious art fairs, famous for the high quality fine art, antiques, modern and contemporary art and design it offers. 

BRAFA takes place at the at Brussels Expo – Heysel, an emblematic exhibition venue that benefits from spaces that are adapted for an international fair. Located in the heart of Europe, Brussels Expo is close to the centre of Brussels and offers numerous access and parking facilities.

Name: Accademia di Belle Arti di Roma
Description:
The Accademia (Academy) originates from the "Accademia di San Luca", born at the end of the sixteenth century and became the papal seat for artistic studies. At that time it was a prestigious meeting place for artists and at the same time an educational model to be imitated for similar developing institutions.
With the Unity of Italy and with Rome as the capital, there was a need to initiate a reform of art education that would respond to the needs of the young Italian state. A slow process followed which gave birth to didactic typologies oriented towards cultural research and professionalism linked to industrial and artisanal development.

The Academy first took the name of "Regia Accademia di Belle Arti denominata di San Luca" (Royal Academy of Fine Arts of San Luca), then "Istituto di Belle Arti" (Institute of Fine Arts) and finally defined itself according to the current version "Accademia di Belle Arti di Roma" (Academy of Fine Arts of Rome).
The historic complex that houses its premises in Via di Ripetta, traditionally called "The horseshoe", was built in the 1840s as a residential building and was adapted to the headquarters of the Academy with the addition of rooms designed specifically for the "Scuola Libera del Nudo" (Free School of Nude).

www.monicavelours.fr 
anais@monicavelours.fr

Name: 1-54 Contemporary African Art Fair
Description: Founded by Touria El Glaoui in 2013, 1-54 is the leading international art fair dedicated to contemporary art from Africa and its diaspora,  with annual editions in London, New York and Marrakech. Drawing reference to the fifty-four countries that constitute the African continent, 1-54 is a sustainable and dynamic platform that is engaged in contemporary dialogue and exchange.

Name: Art Herstory
Description:
Art Herstory showcases the work of women artists from centuries past on premium paper products. The mission is to renew interest in artists who were famous and sought-after in their time, but who aren't well known (yet) today;  and to delight to art lovers. Curated by Erika Gaffney.

Etsy store: https://artherstorynotes.etsy.com

Name: LABA Brescia
Description:
LABA, Libera Accademia di Belle Arti legalmente riconosciuta dal MIUR, Ministero dell’Università e della Ricerca, crede nel primato culturale dell’Italia e da vent’anni opera per la valorizzazione del patrimonio culturale e del Made in Italy.
Attraverso la formazione di giovani che possano essere protagonisti nei settori dell’arte, delle nuove tecnologie, della comunicazione, del design, della moda, della fotografia, del cinema e del teatro. Attraverso le scuole di Arti Visive, di Architettura d’Interni e Design della Decorazione, di Scenografia, di Nuove Tecnologie dell'Arte e di Progettazione Artistica per l’Impresa con i corsi di Fashion Design, Fotografia, Design e Graphic Design e Multimedia. LABA si qualifica come Istituto di Alta Formazione Artistica, capace di fondere la solidità della tradizione e la forza innovativa delle ricerche artistiche più avanzate.

Name: Claudine Colin Communication
Description:
L’agence Claudine Colin Communication, créée en 1990, est spécialisée dans la communication d’événements culturels d’envergure nationale et internationale. Chacun d’entre eux fait l’objet d’une réflexion stratégique dans laquelle nous envisageons l’apport de chacun des outils et des actions de communication. Pour chaque manifestation, nous mettons en place une communication globale que nous affinons par rapport à l’actualité culturelle, sociale ou politique quand cela est pertinent. Nous réfléchissons au projet lui-même et à ceux qui le portent, au contenu et au contenant. Notre métier consiste à produire du sens et à fabriquer de la relation. Au bon moment, aux bons endroits, auprès des bonnes personnes.

NOS DOMAINES DE COMPÉTENCES

Arts visuels : arts ancien, moderne et contemporain, photographie
Architecture et urbanisme, environnement, jardins, patrimoine
Design et arts décoratifs
Histoire et civilisation
Mécénat
Tourisme culturel

Name: NOBLE ART
Description:
Somos un colectivo artístico formado por maestros del tatuaje que demuestran que el arte requiere de creatividad, precisión, habilidad y talento.

Contamos con más de 7 estudios en las principales ciudades del mundo, ofreciendo una experiencia completa y diferente. Con servicios como tattoo, piercing, eliminación de tattoo, Beauty y academia de tattoo seguimos creciendo sin límites. 


El arte expresa emociones y carácter.
Nosotros lo hacemos a través de la tinta en el lienzo mas autentico: la piel

Creemos en el tatuaje como forma de vida, valor cultural y arte noble. Por eso nos llamamos NOBLE ART.

Somos calle, pero también lujo.
Somos cultura y estilo.
Somos NOBLE ART.

Name: REA Academy
Description:
RomEur Academy è un Accademia di alta formazione professionale nelle arti visive.

Romeur Academy forma futuri professionisti delle arti visive accompagnandoli in un percorso ottimizzato all'inserimento nel mondo del lavoro, con diplomi di II livello europeo e stage presso aziende alla fine dell' anno accademico

Name: XELA Bottlepainting
Description:
Je suis originaire de Seine et Marne. J’ai obtenu un Bac STI Arts Appliqués puis un DMA en Fresque Mosaïque à l’Ensaama Olivier de Serres à Paris. J’ai créé le concept du « Bottlepainting ». Mon nom d’artiste est XELA Bottlepainting. Je peins avec des bouteilles de vin, de champagne, de bière. La technique consiste à peindre mes œuvres avec des empreintes de goulot. De près, le visuel paraît abstrait, il est intéressant de prendre du recul pour que l’ensemble de l’œuvre se dévoile avec réalisme.
 
J’ai eu l’honneur d’exposer lors de grands événements pour le Château de Portets&Château de Simiane, la Mairie de Paris&La Baule-Escoublac, chez Ferrari à Biarritz, chez Porsche à Dijon&Annecy, lors du Grand Prix F1 de Monaco, au Cercle National des Armées, etc.
 
L'année 2025 marque les 10 ans du BOTTLEPAINTING ! Ma technique évoluera tout au long de l'année !
 
Bienvenue à toutes et à tous !
Alexandre Caillarec alias XELA Bottlepainting

Taller dedicado al arte. 
Diseño  artistico en paredes, telas, lienzos, papel.
Espacio de composicion, educacion y produccion musical.
Espacio dedicado a la escritura. Grupos de trabajo para edicion de libros. Cuentos y Poesias.
Produccion de artesanias y objetos reciclados.

Name: ARTEnet.es
Description: Founded in 2011, ARTEnet focuses its work on the promotion of current art through the internet. It is an exhibition and sale space for original works of art by artists of today.

Name: Museo de Artistas
Description: Creemos que investigar las nuevas formas de comercialización y difusión de los artistas, en relación a los medios masivos puede ser de utilidad. Reflexionando acerca de la nueva situación transnacional que se transita en el ámbito de la cultura, es indispensable contemplar el rol que los medios cumplen dentro de la industria cultural. Generalmente en los ámbitos culturales más tradicionales, aunque se reconoce el rol fundamental que desempeñan por la llegada masiva que son capaces de generar, se los considera, desde un punto de vista elitista, como desvalorizadores de la “cultura”. Desaprovechando las posibilidades que estos brindarían si fueran apropiados por el campo artístico. Se trata de sumar herramientas en función de generar nuevos sentidos.

Name: Museo de Artistas
Description: Creemos que investigar las nuevas formas de comercialización y difusión de los artistas, en relación a los medios masivos puede ser de utilidad. Reflexionando acerca de la nueva situación transnacional que se transita en el ámbito de la cultura, es indispensable contemplar el rol que los medios cumplen dentro de la industria cultural. Generalmente en los ámbitos culturales más tradicionales, aunque se reconoce el rol fundamental que desempeñan por la llegada masiva que son capaces de generar, se los considera, desde un punto de vista elitista, como desvalorizadores de la “cultura”. Desaprovechando las posibilidades que estos brindarían si fueran apropiados por el campo artístico. Se trata de sumar herramientas en función de generar nuevos sentidos.

Name: ANdÉA Association nationale des écoles supérieures d'art
Description:
Créée en 1995, l’ANdÉA fédère les écoles supérieures d'art et design sous tutelle du ministère de la Culture. Ces établissements d’enseignement supérieur et de recherche délivrant des diplômes nationaux de niveau Bac +3, Bac +5 et Bac +8, des 3es cycles et post-masters professionnels, sont représentés au sein de l’ANdÉA par plus de 200 membres issus de toutes les catégories d’acteurs : enseignant·e·s, étudiant·e·s, directeurs·ices, administrateurs·ices, chef·fe·s de services. 
Mettant en réseau des écoles territoriales et nationales de toutes envergures et de tous les territoires, l’ANdÉA est une plate-forme de réflexion, une instance de proposition et une force d’affirmation de la spécificité de l’enseignement supérieur artistique par la création. Elle défend un modèle de formation et de recherche singulier qui se caractérise par le primat de la référence au champ artistique contemporain, aux figures de l’artiste et de l’auteur et par une pédagogie fondée sur l’expérimentation, le jugement critique et le projet personnel de l’étudiant·e.

Name: De Creatieve Coalitie
Description:
Wij zijn 44 belangenorganisaties uit de culturele en creatieve sector.

Wij zijn meer dan 43.000 makers.

Wij zijn musici, beeldend kunstenaars, museumgidsen, acteurs,  fotografen, choreografen,  journalisten, mimespelers, dansers, regie-assistenten, schrijvers, cameramensen, componisten, auteur-muzikanten, theatermakers, improviserende musici, dans- en performancemakers, interieurarchitecten, ontwerpers, circusartiesten, regisseurs, locatiescouts, belangenbehartigers, gidsen, agenten, film- en televisiemakers, cinema-editors, zangpedagogen, podiumkunstenaars, stemacteurs, vertalers, technici, tekstschrijvers, school-muziekdocenten, geluidsmensen en cinematografen.

Wij werken samen en maken ons sterk voor alle werkenden in de culturele en creatieve sector.

….en wij maken cultuur.

Name: ARTSTART
Description:
ARTSTART è un sito Internet di libera informazione, opinione, commento, segnalazione di eventi nei settori arte e cultura diretto da Vittorio Schieroni, critico d'arte, curatore e organizzatore di mostre con sede a Milano. 

Nato nel marzo del 2020, ARTSTART è un punto di riferimento per collezionisti, operatori del settore e appassionati d'arte, offrendo spazio a professionisti autorevoli, idee per alimentare riflessione e dibattito, creando informazione sulle principali novità nel panorama artistico, presentando una selezione dei migliori eventi d'arte e cultura in Italia e all'estero. 

Con particolare attenzione rivolta nei confronti del mercato dell'arte, ARTSTART indaga incessantemente le molteplici manifestazioni della creatività e della cultura, le eccellenze del Made in Italy. 

Segui la stella di Polaris per orientare la tua navigazione nel vasto e complesso oceano dell'arte.

Name: Lyon & Turnbull
Description:
Operating since 1826, Lyon & Turnbull is one of the longest established fine art and antiques auction houses in the United Kingdom.  The company maintains galleries in London and Glasgow with headquarters and main saleroom in Edinburgh.   The neoclassical company HQ has been called the "most beautiful saleroom in Britain" and provides a stunning backdrop to over 20 specialist auctions per year.  

Lyon & Turnbull operates internationally, providing valuation and auction services worldwide.  Expanding its reach into the international market, the company formed an alliance with America's oldest auctioneers, Freeman’s of Philadelphia, in 2000.

Name: Corkin Gallery
Description:
Founded in 1979, Corkin Gallery is committed to the principles that move art history forward. We champion significant contemporary and historical art across a spectrum of media including painting, sculpture, photography, and installation.
Corkin Gallery features a roster of emerging and mid-career artists from around the globe whose voices and vision are trailblazing the ideas of tomorrow. We employ our expertise in modern art to show contemporary art alongside master works of the twentieth century.

 

Our team maintains well-established relationships with private collectors, museums, and corporations worldwide. Our clients range from experienced collectors to first time buyers. We value the Toronto arts community, and our exhibitions are always accessible to the public.

Name: Faculty of Arts and Architecture / Islamic Azad University, Central Tehran Branch
Description:
The faculty was established in 1987. Presently, 4938 BA students, 2854 MA students, and 62 PhD students are studying at the faculty. The faculty is also made up of 364 members. 

At BA level, majors such as picture, industrial designing, photography, architecture, music, Piti g, and drama are presented. At MA level, majors such as drama literature, picture, art studies, illustration, city design, city planning, regional planning, industrial designing, directing drama, artifact preservation , architecture, and painting  are available.

Name: The Lumen Prize
Description: The Lumen Prize champions the innovative possibilities of technology-driven creativity. We provide the pre-eminent platform showcasing artists who are pioneering new visual languages at the intersection of art and technology. Lumen is affiliated with Lumen Studios, a UK-based digital arts champion which builds opportunities for Lumen artists by curating exhibitions, commissions and events for art venues, cultural institutions and public spaces around the world as well as delivering consultancy services for partners globally.

Name: College Art Association
Description: This company page is no longer active. Please find us at: CAA Advancing Art & Design: https://www.linkedin.com/company/caavisual/

Name: AQUACENTURY -AQUARIUMS KENYA
Description: CUSTOMIZED AQUARIUMS DESIGNERS:We make coffee table aquariums, Tv stand aquariums, Tower Aquariums, Cabinet aquariums , Wall Mounted Aquariums , Desktop Aquariums  and PODIUMS

Name: GAZELLI ART HOUSE
Description:
Founded in 2010 by Mila Askarova, the Gazelli Art House in London brings a fresh perspective to Mayfair – through championing artists from all corners of the globe. Focusing on artists at the height of their practice, the gallery showcases their work through a diverse programme of exhibitions and events.

Along with its sister site in Baku, Gazelli Art House specialises in promoting art from Azerbaijan and its neighbours to introduce a greater understanding of the rich linguistic, religious and historical ties that connect these areas to international audiences.

In 2015, the gallery further expanded to support artists working in digital art through its online platform: GAZELL.iO, comprising an online Residency programme, NFT drops and collaborations, a dedicated Project Space holding monthly exhibitions, and a permanently installed VR Library – all in the heart of Mayfair.

Name: Arte Kunst Art GR
Description:
Arts Production, International Artist Residencies with an aim to support Greek based artists. 

Sculpture taught Stone Carving, Mould Making, Casting, Ceramics and Printmaking. 

Portfolio Reviews, Professional Development, Social Media, Social Media Strategies, Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Bluesky,  LinkedIn, Website Building, Email Marketing, Athens, Greece.

Follow @ArtistOpenCalls for international #ArtistOpportunities

https://linktr.ee/ArtistOpenCalls

Name: Arte e Musei Italia
Description:
Arte e Musei Italia è un'azienda che organizza sul territorio nazionale eventi, tour e visite guidate. Ci avvaliamo della collaborazione solo di Guide Abilitate. 
Arte e Musei Italia è parallelamente anche un canale media ed informativo dedicato al mondo dell'arte e della cultura

Name: CONCERTGEBOUW BRUGGE
Description:
The Concertgebouw is an international music and performing arts centre, devoted to the development and presentation of art at an international level. It focuses on music and contemporary dance. With its Sound Factory (interactive space for sound art) and its collection of visual art, the Concertgebouw provides enduring opportunities for the (active) experiencing of contemporary art. A pronounced emphasis on creativity and imagination takes its programming beyond the mere presentation of art. Underpinned by its extensive art educational activities for children, adolescents and adults, the Concertgebouw offers intense artistic experiences, in optimal circumstances, to a wide and diverse audience, both in Flanders and beyond.
 

In addition to its own artistic programme, the Concertgebouw makes its accommodation available to others for events of all types. This includes the Concert Hall (1289 seats), the Chamber Music Hall (maximum 320 seats), and the various reception rooms with their panoramic view of the historical city centre. In fact the whole building can be used for congresses, colloquia, product launches, receptions, stage presentations and much more. The Concertgebouw offers you support in the organisation of your event.

Name: DINT Doblajes Internacionales
Description:
Más de 30 años en la Industria. Pioneros en doblaje en América Latina.
DINT DOBLAJES INTERNACIONALES, la confianza de nuestros clientes es nuestro mejor reconocimiento a más de 30 años de trabajo en el mercado del doblaje.
