Name: Rijksakademie van beeldende kunsten
Description:
The Rijksakademie residency programme houses an artist community that is highly international, multi-disciplinary, experimental and critically engaged. Up to 50 artists are open to challenging themselves, and to working alongside positions that are vastly different from their own. Spending up to two years in residence, they enter into an open-ended process where they can deepen their practices, and explore new territories, in and beyond the art field.

Residents benefit from an array of opportunities for exchange, including peer to peer dialogue and visits from a wide range of leading art professionals. They have access to technical workshops, and guidance by technical specialists, who foster hands-on, innovative and collaborative approaches to making, as well as an extensive library and a historical collection.

Name: Pulchri Studio
Description:
Pulchri Studio is an artist society and contemporary art gallery, located in the beautiful and historic centre of The Hague. Pulchri Studio offers visitors the chance to see and buy an exciting range of paintings, sculptures, photographs and other works of art. Our affiliated artists show their works in seven different spaces, set over two floors. On average Pulchri Studio hosts sixty exhibitions a year, so there is always something new to see, everytime you visit! Should you tire of all this visual stimulation, do visit our cafe/restaurant for a refreshing cup of coffee or a meal and if the weather permits, relax in our courtyard-garden!

Admission is free of charge and Pulchri is open six days a week from Tuesday to Sunday from 12.00 till 17.00 hours.

The gallery rooms can be hired for seminars, meetings, dinners and parties.
Please contact Museum Catering tel 070-7200720.

Pulchri Studio offers membership to its society to both artists and art-lovers. For artists it means a chance to display their work and for art-lovers it means having access to a number of extra benefits.

Artists’ membership: Visual artists can obtain membership after approval by the Selection Committee. For information about this procedure please call 070-3461735 or mail info@pulchri.nl. 
Art-loving members can become Patrons of Pulchri Studio. Members (and their guests) will have a standing invitation for all the monthly openings and the additional events organized by the Society, such as lectures and (jazz)concerts. Members will also receive the quarterly 'Pulchri Magazine' amongst many other benefits. Registration via info@pulchri.nl or at the counter of Pulchri Studio.

Name: Weng Contemporary
Description:
Looking to start your personal art collection or expand an existing one?

Weng Contemporary is an exclusive and secure source of artworks by leading contemporary artists. Explore our website or contact us to handpick the perfect art for your unique taste!

Together, we will create an inspiring environment that sparks curiosity in all students while developing intellectually and creatively. Free thought will always be protected so that students may pursue their purpose in the world. We will ensure that students always have a path to success in all that they do because they deserve a life full of choice. Since learning is for life and life is about learning, our wish is for our name always to be synonymous with excellence.

Name: Almeida & Dale Art Gallery
Description:
Founded in 1998 with the objective of promoting works of Brazilian artists, Almeida & Dale Art Gallery has become, in more than two decades of existence, one of the most relevant galleries in the field in Brazil. Throughout this history, the gallery has been responsible for a significant role in the cultural and commercial circuit, by inserting the work and legacy of artists who are fundamental to the history of Brazilian art in important collections, collections and national and international archives.

In recent years, with Antônio Almeida and Carlos Dale as directors, the gallery's program has revisited the work of different exponents of brazilian art, promoting several retrospective exhibitions, prepared by guest curators involved in researches of the artists complete work. Produced with museological rigor, these exhibitions are usually accompanied by the launch of publications that are largely recognized for their novelty and notoriety of academic essays and for the rescue of historical texts. Almeida & Dale recently held individual exhibitions by key artists in the historical and critical panorama of Brazilian art. Relying on loans from renowned collectors and institutions, the exhibitions featured names such as Willys de Castro, Di Cavalcanti, Flávio de Carvalho, Mestre Didi, Alberto da Veiga Guignard, Alfredo Volpi, Jandira Waters, Roberto Burle Marx, stimulating renewed critical interest in Brazil and abroad.

Along with the constant promotion of exhibitions and publications, Almeida & Dale supports projects for the preservation and dissemination of Brazilian artists. In convergence with its role in the preservation of collections, since 2020 the gallery represents the estate of Luiz Sacilotto, a distinguished artist in the Brazilian concrete art movement.

Name: Écoscéno
Description: The Écoscéno Mission is to reduce the environmental impact of cultural production by providing tools and assistance to actors in the field while promoting eco-conception, mutualization, and reuse of objects and materials within the arts sector.

Name: Cité des Arts La Réunion
Description:
La Cité des Arts La Réunion est un centre culturel pluridisciplinaire situé à Sainte-Clotilde sur l'île de La Réunion, ouvert en 2016.

Polyvalence fonctionnelle : l’outil structurant du développement culturel
• Des équipements adaptés pour la création, la diffusion, la sensibilisation
• Des espaces d’accueil, d’échange et de convivialité
• Des locaux administratifs et techniques mutualisés

Démocratisation : la Cité des Arts pour tous
• Un centre culturel ouvert sur le quartier et sa population, au cœur de l’espace urbain
• Un équipement unique à la Réunion, accessible au plus grand nombre
• Un espace de rencontres et de mixité

Rayonnement : le projet emblématique d’un territoire
• Un équipement pour structurer une offre culturelle sur le territoire de la CINOR (Communauté Intercommunale du NOrd de La Réunion)
• Un pôle culturel ayant vocation à rayonner à l’échelle de la Réunion et au-delà

Pour les informations pratiques, consultez notre site internet :
https://www.citedesarts.re/Infos-pratiques

Name: EAV | Escola de Artes Visuais do Parque Lage
Description:
A Escola de Artes Visuais do Parque Lage, vinculada à Secretaria de Estado de Cultura do Rio de Janeiro, está voltada prioritariamente para o campo das artes visuais contemporâneas, com ênfase em seus aspectos interdisciplinares e transversais. Abrange também outros campos de expressão artística contemporânea (música, dança, cinema, teatro), assim como literária (literatura, poesia), vistos em suas relações com a visualidade. As atividades da EAV contemplam tanto as práticas artísticas como seus fundamentos conceituais.

A EAV configura-se como centro educacional aberto de formação de artistas e profissionais do campo da arte contemporânea; como polo cultural voltado para a formação de público a partir da realização de exposições e eventos; e como núcleo de documentação, compreendendo uma biblioteca e seu arquivo de documentos históricos sobre arte e artistas. Como referência nacional, com uma consistente imagem no meio da arte, a EAV busca criar mecanismos internos e linhas de atuação externa que permitam um diálogo produtivo com a cidade e com o circuito de arte nacional e internacional.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Satellites of Art
Description:
For art with impact!

We are an online art platform that promotes art and artists from emerging countries and sells art beyond borders.

We work as a catalyzer for inclusive debate and social impact by making art from emerging countries more visible and increasing its status in the international art scene. An easy connection between artists and buyers will enable fair selling transactions across borders.

We connect and empower artists, buyers and art enthusiasts through online platforms and special events. 

We facilitate buyers’ discovery of new talents, giving insights of the artists’ creative processes. 

We ensure secure international sales and shipment of art. 

We empower artists through networking and tailored support.

Interested in our mission?

Name: Ministry of Art
Description:
Ministry of Art is an online platform where professional artists teach live, one-on-one art sessions to children aged 4 to 18.

We create meaningful work opportunities for artists, offering steady income and flexible hours without pulling them away from their creative paths. Our sessions follow a structured curriculum, but every teacher brings their own perspective and approach to the lessons.

We focus on quality, fairness, and care in how we work with both artists and families. If you’re an artist or educator who believes in thoughtful, skill-based art instruction, we’d love for you to get to know us.

Name: Mana Contemporary
Description: Founded in 2011, Mana Contemporary is dedicated to providing a platform for contemporary art and artists through exhibitions, studio programs, and public programs. Mana’s community network began in New Jersey and has since expanded to include Mana Chicago and Mana Miami. Mana Contemporary continues to create new partnership opportunities that explore the intersection of contemporary art, design, new technologies, and music.

Name: Kunstgebouw
Description:
Kunstgebouw is expert in Zuid-Holland voor kunst en cultuur. 

Wij bieden het primair onderwijs in Zuid-Holland  Kijk|Kunst en Doe|Kunst aan. Twee complete en samenhangende cultuureducatieve programma’s die voldoen aan de kerndoelen kunstzinnige oriëntatie. Medewerkers van gemeenten, onderwijs en culturele instellingen kunnen bij ons trainingen en cursussen volgen om zich verder te professionaliseren in cultuureducatie. We adviseren en ondersteunen gemeenten en culturele instellingen bij het uitvoeren van de projecten voor Cultuureducatie met kwaliteit. We organiseren netwerkbijeenkomsten voor culturele instellingen, penvoerders van de regeling Cultuureducatie met kwaliteit en cultuurnetwerkers.

Zichtbaar maken wat er is, stimuleren wat er kan zijn.

Name: Colorado Springs Philharmonic Orchestra
Description:
The mission of the Colorado Springs Philharmonic to inspire and engage the people within the community and region through exceptional orchestral performance honoring classical greatness, encouraging lifelong creative discovery, and celebrating the human spirit and experience.

Performing in the Pikes Peak Center for the Performing Arts and Ent Center for the Arts at UCCS, the Philharmonic will present 55 live performances. Performances are divided into four main series: El Pomar Masterworks, Penrose-St. Francis Health Services Philharmonic Pops, Al and Leigh Buettner Signature Series, and Philharmonic Kids. In addition, the Philharmonic offers holiday and special event concerts and free-to-all Summer Symphony performances. 

We believe in the power of excellent orchestral music to elevate the human spirit, to serve as a catalyst for cultural vitality and economic growth and to bring people of great diversity together, to enrich lives. This inspires our vision to provide unsurpassed musical experiences for our region, state, and nation.

Name: Online Gallery
Description:
Welcome to Online Gallery, your gateway to discovering new and exciting artwork by emerging artists from every corner of the globe. We're dedicated to helping you find the perfect piece to enrich your space and inspire your soul.

At Online Gallery, we believe in the power of originality. That's why we encourage you to be original and buy original art. Our platform offers a curated selection of artworks, including originals and prints, ensuring that you discover art you truly love.

Our roster showcases talented emerging artists, providing them with a platform to share their creativity with the world. Whether you're looking to add a unique piece to your collection or searching for the perfect gift, Online Gallery has something for everyone.

But Online Gallery offers more than just an extensive collection of artwork. We also make it incredibly easy for artists to set up their own personal websites. With our premium plan, you can showcase an unlimited number of artworks, use our website generation tool for free, and receive a professional info@... email address. While domain registration is available through Online Gallery, please note that the price for the domain is not included in the premium subscription.

Setting up your website is a breeze. Simply upload your work to Online Gallery, activate your domain and website, and voila! Your artwork will be showcased on your personal website every time you publish a new piece on Online Gallery.

Join us on this journey of artistic discovery and expression. Experience the joy of owning original artwork and supporting emerging talent with Online Gallery.

Name: Galeria Aural de Arte Contemporaneo
Description:
Es un espacio cuyo proyecto está muy involucrado desde sus inicios en el desarrollo y el impulso cultural de la ciudad. Este espacio supone un lugar de acción e interacción de la creación contemporánea. Tiene por vocación formar parte de la creación de un tejido cultural en la ciudad de Alicante y del circuito de galerías del ámbito nacional e internacional. Se genera así, y desde la gestión cultural privada, una iniciativa que ofrece un escenario para el encuentro de las prácticas artísticas contemporáneas, y propuestas de la más alta calidad que sirvan de referente para la concienciación del concepto de arte como pensamiento e investigación.
Tiene como objetivo primordial la difusión y promoción y venta del arte contemporáneo mediante actuaciones específicas de colaboración con otras galerías e instituciones a través de realización de proyectos y los programas de comisariado, así como iniciar a sus clientes en el coleccionismo de arte contemporáneo configurando una plaza indispensable de mercado en una ciudad de periferia.

We pride ourselves not only on our relationship with galleries but as a private art dealer and fine art publisher. As a dealer, we specialize in the secondary art market and as a publisher, we have a growing list of popular contemporary artists.

Name: Sanchit Art
Description:
We are pleased to welcome you to Sanchit Art gallery, where the finest selection of Modern and Contemporary Indian Art is presented. 

Our gallery, which has a history dating back to the early 2000s - was established in 2010 by entrepreneur and art collector Sunil Joshan with a mission to showcase the best of Indian Art. Sanchit Joshan, who is the CEO and Gallery Director, is carrying forward the legacy.

We are recognized as leaders in the field and have built a solid reputation for excellence and reliability with our emphasis on international exhibitions, important publications, and a diverse collection from renowned artists of the highest caliber.

Come along on a voyage of discovery as we present the finest collection of Indian art and encourage a lifelong appreciation for the arts.

Name: Farm Cultural Park
Description:
Farm Cultural Park è una Istituzione Culturale privata, impegnata in un progetto di utilità sociale e sviluppo sostenibile: dare alla città di Favara e ai territori limitrofi una nuova identità connessa alla sperimentazione di nuovi modi di pensare, abitare e vivere.

Nato nel 2010 dalla intuizione di Florinda Saieva ed Andrea Bartoli, una giovane 
coppia di professionisti che ha deciso di non trasferirsi all’estero, Farm Cultural Park sorge all’interno del Cortile Bentivegna, un aggregato a sua volta costituito 
da sette piccoli cortili che ospitano piccoli palazzi di matrice araba, situato nei pressi 
del centro storico di Favara.

Gli obiettivi del progetto sono molteplici: dal rafforzamento dell’identità di Favara 
come Città della ricerca e sperimentazione di linguaggi della contemporaneità, 
alla crescita dell’attrattività complessiva e dello status dei luoghi, dalla percezione positiva del genius loci, al rafforzamento della reputazione territoriale, della visibilità 
e della promozione su mercati nazionali ed esteri.

Questo cambiamento radicale di Favara ha avuto inizio con il recupero di edifici nel centro storico della città e in pochi anni ha visto nascere attorno a Farm Cultural Park diverse Comunità: quella degli Artisti, che collaborano tra loro in progetti nazionali 
e internazionali, quella dei nuovi residenti che hanno deciso di costruire a Favara un pezzo della loro vita personale e professionale, quella dei giovani e dei volontari 
che partecipano collaborando alla realizzazione di progetti o eventi, 
e quella degli amici/sostenitori del web.

Numerosi i premi e riconoscimenti ottenuti da Farm Cultural Park in questi anni. 
Tra i più importanti il Premio Federculture 2011 e l’invito alla tredicesima 
Biennale di Architettura di Venezia.

Name: Gnana Nrithya
Description:
Welcome to Gnananrithya - Your Gateway to Cultural Enrichment through Bharatanatyam!

At Gnananrithya, we are dedicated to preserving and promoting the rich heritage of Bharatanatyam, an iconic Indian classical dance form. Our dance academy offers a holistic learning experience, catering to both adults and kids who share a passion for dance and cultural exploration.

Led by the esteemed Guru Smt. Charulatha, our academy emphasizes the importance of tradition while embracing contemporary elements, ensuring a well-rounded dance education. From mastering intricate adavus (steps) and mudras (gestures) to diving into the depths of abhinaya (expressions), our students embark on a transformative journey of artistic and spiritual growth.

Beyond dance technique, we delve into the historical context and spiritual significance of Bharatanatyam, allowing our students to connect with the roots of this captivating art. Our Guru Smt. Charulatha, with her decades of experience, guides students through the intricate rhythms, gestures, and expressions that define Bharatanatyam.

Gnananrithya is not just a dance academy; it's a haven for those who seek to embrace their cultural identity, express themselves artistically, and connect with a vibrant community of like-minded individuals. Our classes foster discipline, self-confidence, and a strong sense of purpose as students navigate the intricate world of Bharatanatyam. 

As you navigate our website, www.gnananrithya.com, you'll find detailed information about our classes, schedules, events, and the incredible work our students have achieved over the years. We encourage you to embark on this remarkable journey with us, where every step is an exploration of culture, creativity, and connection.

Join the Gnananrithya family today, and experience the magic of Bharatanatyam unfold in your life. Let's dance together, celebrate our heritage, and create lasting memories through the timeless art form that is Bharatanatyam.

Name: ATHR Gallery
Description:
Founded in 2009 in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, by Mohammed Hafiz and Hamza Serafi, ATHR Gallery has from its onset been a pioneering gallery with a focus toward elevating contemporary Middle Eastern art on a global scale. Serving as a cultural bridge between Saudi Arabia and the world, its artists have been the driving force of the gallery from the inception and have inspired the responsive mandate that evolves to accommodate the ever-changing local scene. ATHR Gallery prides itself on being adaptive – a testament to a legacy that has spanned over a decade and encompasses artists working across multiple disciplines and subject matters, from traditional media such as painting and sculpture to more unconventional methods that echo the daring nature of the gallery. The topics they address also vary wildly, covering a spectrum of narratives that range from the interpersonal to the macro-cultural. 

ATHR has expanded its presence in Saudi Arabia with two new locations following the success of its flagship space in Jeddah; ATHR Al-Ula is the first contemporary art gallery in the historical city, while its latest outpost, ATHR JAX in Riyadh, marks the gallery’s move to the capital. Following the success of ATHR Gallery, ATHR has branched out to create the ATHR Foundation, with a focus on fostering the careers of emerging artists and the development of artistic spaces. ATHR has also diversified its ventures to include AKTHR: a cultural project delivery agency for Saudi Arabia and the Gulf region.

Description: The Crucible is a nonprofit educational facility that fosters a collaboration of Arts, Industry and Community. Through training in the fine and industrial arts, The Crucible promotes creative expression, reuse of materials, and innovative design while serving as an accessible arts venue for the general public.

Name: Apparatus
Description:
Apparatus is a creative consultancy specialising in public art, place activation, design services, art acquisitions, collection management and valuations.

We coordinate creative processes from concept through to delivery. Our work supports government clients, the private sector and creative professionals to plan, manage and implement art projects and cultural programs.

Our team brings depth of experience and a disciplined, collaborative approach. We focus on clear processes, strong communication and professional standards that support excellent project outcomes.

Description: Galerie d'Art contemporain, venez découvrir notre concept innovant vous permettant d'acquérir une oeuvre unique ou de commencer un collection plus facilement.

Name: Arrowmont School of Arts and Crafts
Description:
In 1912, the Pi Beta Phi Fraternity for Women founded the Pi Beta Phi Settlement School in Gatlinburg, TN as a service project to commemorate its 50th anniversary.  Today, Arrowmont School of Arts and Crafts is a nationally renowned center of contemporary arts and crafts education. Workshops are offered for one and two weeks in the spring and summer, and one-week and weekends in the fall. Areas of study include: ceramics, fibers, metals/jewelry, painting, drawing, photography, warm glass, woodturning, woodworking, sculpture, and book and paper arts. The public is welcome year-round to visit the school’s five galleries, resource center and book and supply store. Artist residencies, assistantships, work-study, scholarships, community outreach, conferences and music programs contribute to Arrowmont’s mission of “enriching lives through art.” 

Arrowmont’s historic 14 acre campus is a hidden treasure in the heart of downtown Gatlinburg. Quaint and intimate spaces define Arrowmont’s charm. With art around every corner, it isn’t hard to find inspiration and creativity, making it the perfect location for a board, business or staff retreat, meeting, special event or large family gathering.

Name: Quiosco Cultural - Ateliê Itinerante
Description:
A Cidade de Itanhaém foi descoberta e fundada pelo navegador português Martim Afonso de Souza, no dia 22 de Abril de 1.532. Segundo historiadores ele estabeleceu o fundamento da povoação de Itanhaém entre a tribo dos Itanhaens que vivia juntamente com colonos, ao redor de pequeno porteiro na praia de Peruíbe a 13 km, ao sul de Itanhaém.

Mais é evidente que o navegador ao estabelecer essa povoação, estava na realidade fundando toda esta região e principalmente à margem direita do Rio Itanhaém do mar olha para a terra, porque a exuberante foz do rio os morros de que de um lado e de outro do rio existem acomodando pequenas e belas praias em forma de baía, costões de pedras se antepondo ao mar, Área a frente do morro Itaguassú onde hoje situa-se o Convento, formam razões mais que óbvias sob todos os enfoques, para o estabelecimento de vilas e aldeias.

Name: Nobel Week Lights Stockholm
Description:
Nobel Week Lights Stockholm is an annual light festival that takes place during the Nobel week in December.

Directly inspired by Nobel Prize-awarded discoveries, artworks illuminate the Stockholm winter darkness and invite new insights into the research, lives and contributions of Nobel Laureates.

International and local artists and designers create large-scale public light art that presents these impactful discoveries at a monumental scale while welcoming the audience to reimagine the city of Stockholm and the urban environment.

Nobel Week Lights is an opportunity for the public to share a high quality artistic experience outdoors with their nearest and dearest, completely free of charge. Light plays a critical role in the way we see the world around us, and Nobel Week Lights aims to shed new light on subjects as well as locations in the city that may have been previously unknown to the audience.

Nobel Week Lights is initiated and produced by Annika Levin, Alexandra Manson and Lara Szabo Greisman from Troika. The initiative has been undertaken in collaboration with the Nobel Prize Museum with support from the City of Stockholm, as well as a range of other partners and supporters.

Contact: info@nobelweeklights.se

Name: Bank of Art Srl
Description:
Bank of Art è un’ Art Advisory Company che si occupa della Gestione e Valorizzazione del patrimonio artistico di collezionisti privati ed enti pubblici (Es. Musei e Fondazioni).
Il ruolo che svolge è quello di filtro qualitativo, garante e responsabile nella vendita, acquisto, stima e valutazione delle opere d’arte di tutti i periodi storici. 
L’autenticità, la provenienza, lo stato di conservazione e la storicizzazione di un’opera sono gli elementi primari sui quali lavoriamo al fine di ottimizzare la vendita o l’acquisto.	

L’ART ADVISORY e l’ART INVESTMENT sono le due aree principali di intervento in cui operiamo, in ambito collezionistico e nell’ottica di diversificare gli investimenti patrimoniali.


Attraverso i nostri servizi altamente specializzati, offriamo supporto professionale e guida agli investitori e ai collezionisti di alto profilo, per costruire, gestire e valorizzare le collezioni d’arte.

•	Valutazione opere d’arte
•	Catalogazione di collezione d’arte in digitale
•	Archiviazione opere d’arte
•	Autenticazione opere d’arte
•	Supervisione restauro e diagnostica
•	Valutazione della copertura assicurativa, trasporto e custodia
•	Acquisto e Vendita
•	Ottimizzazione fiscale e legale

Name: Eyebeam
Description:
Mission // Eyebeam is a nonprofit studio for collaborative experiments with technology toward a more imaginative and just world. By providing generous support to artists for research, protection and education, Eyebeam makes ideas real.

Values // Openness: All the work here is driven by an open-source ethos.
  Invention: Build on old ideas to generate new possibilities.
  Justice: Technology by artists is a step towards equality and democracy.


History // Eyebeam was established in 1998 by John S. Johnson as a resource for artists to engage creatively with technology in an experimental setting. Originally located in a warehouse in the Chelsea neighborhood of Manhattan, Eyebeam supported makers and thinkers who spearheaded game-changing projects like reBlog, the first-ever online “sharing” protocol, and Fundrace, the first geocoding of public campaign finance data.

Many more “firsts” were had at our studios over the years, including the C-based creative coding platform, OpenFrameworks, and the first comprehensive rap lyrics database, the Rap Research Lab by Tahir Hemphill. Eyebeam has committed to amplifying the voices of artists, inventors, designers, and engineers who show us the horizon of what is possible, creating space for them to imagine the future. Society’s ever-shifting relationship to technology can be charted through the work of those that have come through our doors over the past two decades.

Eyebeam continues to be a power station for invention, providing a space for experimentation that propels and uplifts the cultural conversation. Eyebeam has opened its breadth of support to equitably compensate over 125 artists each year through its diverse programming. Now more than ever, Eyebeam radically centers artists in the cultural conversation, giving them the support to both interrogate and re-imagine what technology can be and who it is for.

Name: Heart Of Art Training Center
Description:
Heart Of Art is the home of outstanding arts and crafts education. We help you develop solid knowledge in different fields of art. through a series of informative courses and workshops, delivered but knowledgeable instructors who are up to date with the modern techniques and methods.
   هارت اوف ارت هو موطن تعليم و تدريب الفنون. حيث نساعدك على تطوير معرفة راسخة حول مختلف مجالات الفنون من خلال سلسلة من الدورات التدريبية وورش العمل ، مقدمة من مدربين ذوي معرفة عالية و على اطلاع على التقنيات والأساليب الحديثة.

Name: RAUM
Description: Stadslab RAUM verbeeldt, bevraagt en onderzoekt de toekomst van ons stadsleven. We maken exposities en programma's en doen stadsonderzoek naar actuele thema's zoals eenzaamheid, ongelijkheid en de rol van dieren en de natuur in de stad. Creative placemaking staat aan de basis van onze werkwijze en we werken in co-creatie met bewoners, publiek en andere partijen in de stad. Want RAUM vindt dat de stad pas van iedereen is, als iedereen uitgenodigd is om deel te nemen.

Name: Auctions at Showplace
Description:
ABOUT SHOWPLACE
Located at the crossroads of Manhattan's landmark Flatiron, No Mad, and Chelsea districts for over two decades, Showplace is a premier shopping destination for clients seeking the best in art, design, fashion and vintage. Treasures can be found in our newly updated dealer galleries, designer showroom and bi-weekly estate auctions.

In the spirit of accessibility and inclusivity, Showplace caters to a growing national and international community of free-thinking individuals with impeccable taste. We take pride in contributing to a rising global movement of environmentally responsible living and sustainable luxury lifestyles.

Name: The Art Fund Association LLC
Description: The Art Fund Association (“Art FA”) is a trade association comprised of professionals of, investors in, and service providers to, art investment funds and art funds of funds. Founded in 2009 by prominent art market professionals, Art FA shapes the dialogue, business practices and growth of the art fund industry by providing a forum where leaders, investors and practitioners in the global art fund industry can come together for the advancement and promotion of art investment vehicles. Art FA seeks to become a leading voice for the art fund industry and in doing so, provide its members with the ability to educate the investment community, general public, media and art world regarding art investment vehicles and their role both in the art market and as a growing component of the alternative investment industry. Art FA is also committed to helping the public through the operation of its charitable foundation, Art Funds Give Back, which through the generosity of Art FA’s members is able to support non-profit agencies dedicated to the promotion of art education in primary and secondary schools throughout the United States.

Name: L'Art Rue - الشارع فن
Description: Depuis 2006 L’Art Rue, créé par Selma et Sofiane Ouissi, fait résonner le geste créatif de l’artiste avec le contexte de Tunis, ses populations, ses enjeux et ses défis démocratiques. L'Art Rue c'est une vision artistique forte, un lieu ouvert sur son quartier et le monde, une équipe engagée et des partenaires fidèles fédérés autour du projet.

Name: Fondation H
Description:
La Fondation H est une fondation malgache d’art contemporain.

Elle a été créée à Antananarivo en 2017 à l’initiative de l’entrepreneur et mécène Hassanein Hiridjee, convaincu que l’art et la culture ont un impact sociétal fort et permettent une ouverture critique au monde. Elle est reconnue d’utilité publique depuis 2018.

Name: Ensemble Feverish Music International Culture Agency
Description:
The Ensemble Feverish which conducts festivities in order to form a well qualified ad quality audience by performing and international polyphonic music was founded in Izmir-Turkey April 2004.
   In the same year, The Ensemble Feverish performed its first concert in 1st Cesme-Izmir International Festival of Painting ‘’Peace Through Art’. The Ensemble is composed of artists who are professionally educated and attended many national and international concerts and organizations. The member of the ensemble come from different parts of country. The ensemble that makes concerts in Turkey and abroad only depending on their resources and some sponsorhsip is rapidly growing with newly participating musicians.
   From the beginning to today The Ensemble Feverish has worked diligently to establish Izmir as a center for the creation and exchange sounds and ideas between the local, national and international community. With this idea foundation was highly acclaimed by many national and international foundations.
   The Ensemble Feverish has been performing polyphonic Anatolian tunes as well as so well known compositions of classical music repertoire together with works of contemporary natinal and international composers

Name: Art Museum at the University of Toronto
Description:
The Art Museum is comprised of the Justina M. Barnicke Gallery (Hart House) and the University of Toronto Art Centre (University College). Located just a few steps apart, the two galleries were federated in 2014 and began operating under a new visual identity as the Art Museum at the University of Toronto, one of the largest gallery spaces for visual art exhibitions and programming in Toronto.

Building on the two galleries’ distinguished histories, the Art Museum organizes and presents an intensive year-round program of exhibitions and events that foster — at a local, regional, and international level — innovative research, interdisciplinary scholarship, and knowledge of art and its histories befitting Canada’s leading university and the country’s largest city.

Name: Studio Tomás Saraceno GmbH
Description: Studio Tomás Saraceno, one of the world's leading practices to overlap art and architecture, is always keen to speak to enthusiastic talented people who might be interested in joining our team in Berlin.

Name: Swann Auction Galleries
Description:
Swann Galleries was founded in 1941 as an auction house specializing in Rare Books. Today, Swann has separate departments devoted to Fine Photographs, Vintage Posters, and Fine Art, in addition to Antiquarian Books, Maps & Atlases, and Autographs.

As a member of International Auctioneers, an alliance of prestigious auction houses, our sales are publicized to auction clients around the world.

Name: ABRA - Academia Brasileira de Arte
Description: Desde a sua fundação, em 1987, a ABRA mantém um postura profissional que tem como premissa o respeito e a transparência para com seu público. Toda a equipe da ABRA não mede esforços para oferecer as melhores condições de ensino, por meio de pesquisas de exigências do mercado, métodos sempre atualizados, sistema de ensino que se adéqua ao perfil do aluno, professores com experiências nas suas respectivas áreas de atuação, equipamentos e instalações adequadas e ambiente propício ao desenvolvimento das aulas. A ideia de valorizar o indivíduo além da técnica, surgiu porque sabemos que cada ser humano possui suas particularidades e que é impossível transmitir qualquer tipo de ensinamento sem antes estabelecer um relacionamento com o aluno.

Name: RoGallery
Description:
RoGallery is a unique force in the art world. We have been an art gallery, dealer, and auction house of over 35 years located in the vibrant Queens neighborhood of Long Island City in NYC. In this time, RoGallery has established its place in the New York City art world as a trustworthy and reputable source of modern and contemporary artworks.

The gallery was founded in the early 1980's by Robert and Gail Rogal, who would become an art world power couple. They established themselves initially as limited edition print dealers by buying out the entire inventories of several major art publishing companies. Over the years their keen eye for superb artworks has expanded the collection to include thousands of original paintings, photographs and sculptures. The passion for collecting is still going strong today as we grow the RoGallery collection through purchases and quality consignments.

Customers that are within driving distance or visiting New York City are encouraged to visit us at our 10,000 square foot gallery showroom. The gallery is by appointment only. Hours are Monday - Friday 10am - 6pm ET. Please let us know in advance of your visit what artworks you would like to see. Most items are onsite, but some need to be transferred to our location for viewing.

Name: Open Road Brands, LLC.
Description:
Open Road Brands is a leading B2B partner for retailers, specializing in innovative home décor and licensed products. We excel at creating high-margin, fast-turning merchandise that captures the essence of Americana and pop culture. 

Our unique strengths include:
- Partnerships with iconic licensed brands, bringing beloved characters and content to life in fresh, marketable ways.
- Print-On-Demand technology, enabling customization and eliminating inventory risk for our retail partners.
- Domestic manufacturing in Wichita, Kansas, ensuring timely inventory and quality products at competitive prices.
- A diverse product range spanning wall art, home decor, gifts, and functional items, allowing for comprehensive in-store experiences.
- In-house creative, sales, and business strategy teams collaborating to create cohesive, compelling multi-format collections.

We serve a wide spectrum of retail partners, from large chains to small businesses, always focusing on driving sales and delighting end consumers. With Open Road Brands, retailers can offer unique, on-trend products that resonate with fans and families alike, turning spaces into personalized havens of joy and nostalgia.

Name: International Conservation Services
Description:
International Conservation Services is Australia's largest private fine arts and heritage conservation business.  We provide hands-on conservation, restoration, repair and maintenance services for the full range of cultural and historic objects.  We have conservators with specialist expertise in paintings, works of art on paper, books and archival material, textiles and clothing, furniture, frames, gilding, stone, plaster, metals, archaeological artefacts, industrial artefacts, objects, sculpture and public art, monuments, memorials, murals, mosaics and more.

ICS also provides consulting services on the management of cultural collections, including museum planning, environmental conditions, preventive conservation, condition audits and collection management policies.  ICS is a partner in Smarttrack RFID, a provider of integrated asset tracking solutions for collecting institutions (museums and galleries).

Name: Kunsthal Aarhus
Description:
Kunsthal Aarhus ligger som en lille oase i hjertet af Aarhus og viser eksperimenterende kunst fra den lokale, nationale og internationale kunstscene. Udstillingsprogrammet består af soloudstillinger med markante kunstnere, større årlige solo- og profiludstillinger og faste samarbejder om afgangsudstillingen ved Det Jyske Kunstakademi og Kunstnernes Påskeudstilling, KP & SPRING.

𝗡𝘆 𝗿𝗲𝘁𝗻𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗳𝗿𝗮 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟱-𝟮𝟬𝟯𝟬
Kunsthal Aarhus' vision sætter retningen for 2025-2030. Visionen er udarbejdet i et tæt samarbejde mellem bestyrelsen, ledelsen og medarbejderne, og den sætter fokus på fire centrale områder (image, kunstnerisk profil, community og inhouse), der tilsammen danner det, som kunsthallen stræber mod at blive.

𝗦𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗲𝗷𝗱𝗲𝗿, 𝗻𝗲𝘁𝘃æ𝗿𝗸 𝗼𝗴 𝘀𝘁ø𝘁𝘁𝗲
Kunsthal Aarhus udvikler sit netværk og engagerer sig i samarbejder lokalt, nationalt og internationalt i forbindelse med udstillinger, skulpturparken, events, fondsstøtte og sponsorater. Kunsthallen arbejder med det udgangspunkt, at samarbejder skal facilitere en udveksling mellem de involverede parter og skal bidrage til at bringe dem nye steder hen, udvikle og skarpslibe kompetencer og ressourcer. Kunsthal Aarhus ser dette og udviklingen af eksisterende samarbejder som essentielt for stedet, både kulturelt, professionelt og socialt.

Kunsthal Aarhus er ikke kun et sted for kunsten, men også et krydspunkt for musik, film, litteratur og andre kunstarter – et sted hvor kulturelle events er en markant del af stedets kulturtilbud og et socialt bindemiddel mellem publikum.

På Kunsthal Aarhus skal publikum føle, at der er plads til dem. Det er et sted, hvor man har lyst til at være, og hvor man kan nyde stemningen på alle planer – både gennem kunstneriske oplevelser, i caféen, butikken og til sociale events.

Kunsthal Aarhus har eksisteret som udstillingssted siden 1917.

Name: Arte Revide
Description: Somos uma escola, uma comunidade. Somos uma reação. Chegamos aqui com a vontade de fazer diferente, afinal de contas, cuidamos dos nossos.

Name: National Gallery of Fine Art
Description:
Established in 2014, we designed the National Gallery of Fine Art collection to inspire conservation of our natural resources while raising public awareness of the environmental issues that threaten them.

The National Gallery of Fine Art exhibitions are destinations where the public is introduced to works from the most significant photographers of this and past generations.

Our galleries provide a space for the visual expression of talent by presenting a collection rich in diversity, innovation, and artistic heritage. Our collection is one of amazement & wonder, curiosity & exploration, where the history of the world is captured one frame at a time.

Our galleries host artists’ signings, photography unveilings, and events where the public can come together to discover the world as seen through our master photographers’ eyes.

JOIN US IN MAKING A DIFFERENCE!

Name: l'Accademia di Belle Arti di Cuneo
Description:
Accademia di Belle Arti di Cuneo integra nella sua offerta formativa una ampia ed approfondita preparazione teorica ad una specifica ed attenta preparazione tecnica, nella convinzione che gli allievi debbano saper padroneggiare gli strumenti tecnici e tecnologici richiesti dal mercato del lavoro, ma soprattutto debbano sapere plasmare le idee in nove forme d'arte per essere flessibili e propositivi anche nel mondo del lavoro. 

In quest'ottica l'Accademia di Belle Arti di Cuneo accompagna i propri allievi in un percorso parallelo e complementare agli studi, un percorso di stage, mostre d'arte, sfilate, partecipazioni a progetti sul territorio...

Name: Guest Work Agency
Description:
Guest Work Agency is an art law and advisory firm that provides innovative legal solutions for art and collectibles. 

We proudly represent family offices, high-net-worth individuals, creatives, non-profits and corporates based in Australia and internationally.

Our name draws its inspiration from the first independent curating enterprise which was initiated by the groundbreaking Swiss curator Harald Szeemann, Agentur für Geistige Gastarbeit (Agency for Intellectual Guest Work).

Name: Galeria de Arte 11-12
Description:
El arte tiene sus secretos... Nosotros los conocemos.
Más de 20 años de experiencia.

Asesoría en obras de arte históricas y contemporáneas costarricenses. Presentación de obras en casa u oficinas, restauración y recomendaciones en diseño de bases para esculturas y enmarcado.

Name: MacDowell
Description:
Art and artists are made at MacDowell. For more than a century, MacDowell has given artists time, space, community, and freedom to create.

Its groundbreaking mission has nurtured more than 9,000 architects, composers, filmmakers, interdisciplinary artists, theatre artists, visual artists, and writers from across the United States and around the globe. MacDowell Fellows have won 101 Pulitzer Prizes, almost a thousand Guggenheims, 122 Rome Prizes, 34 MacArthur Fellowships, nine Academy Awards, 31 Tonys, Grammys, and more. Recipients of MacDowell residencies have included Ayad Akhtar, James Baldwin, Michael Chabon, Ta-Nehisi Coates, Louise Erdrich, Osvaldo Golijov, Cathy Park Hong, Glenn Ligon, Dee Rees, Vijay Seshadri, Ann Patchett, Colson Whitehead, and Julia Wolfe. Best-selling author and visual artist Nell Painter is the chairman of MacDowell’s Board of Directors.

Name: Bel-Air Fine Art
Description:
Founded 20 years ago, Bel-Air Fine Art is now established as one of the leading contemporary art galleries group in Europe. The group has settled 22 exhibition spaces in the most prestigious locations in Switzerland, France, Italy, Belgium and United States. Bel-Air Fine Art is followed by more than 30.000 art lovers, including 10,000 active collectors around the world.
GENEVA - PARIS - SAINT-TROPEZ - MIAMI - CANNES - COURCHEVEL - MONTE-CARLO - HONFLEUR - GSTAAD - CRANS-MONTANA - VERBIER - VENICE - FORTE DEI MARMI - MEGEVE - KNOKKE - AIX-EN-PROVENCE - SAINT-MORITZ - HONFLEUR - LAUSANNE - BEIRUT

Name: Arie Art Agency
Description:
Arie Art Agency by Arielle Dubois acts as an online art boutique dedicated to promote the best of today contemporary art and to act as a legal counsel to art collectors and the art market’s parties. 

Please visit our website to discover our services.

Name: Arielle Fine Arts
Description:
Arielle Fine Arts acts as an advisory boutique firm dedicated to art aficionados, offering both legal expertise and art advisory services, combining these two worlds:

- supporting collectors with estate and tax planning for art collections,
- and presenting a carefully curated selection of works from emerging contemporary artists.

As an art Lawyer, Arielle brings in-depth knowledge of the art market and legal structures to collectors, families, and institutions. She is admitted to the Geneva Bar and registered as a Legal Counsel in the UAE. Visit her dedicated website for more information (www.ariellelegal.com)

As an art advisor, Arielle carefully selects and presents artworks for acquisition, guided by my passion, expertise, and understanding of the market. Visit her dedicated website for more information (www.ariellefinearts.com).

Name: Hama Gallery
Description: Amsterdam - Ibiza

Name: TheCollectors.Art
Description:
TheCollectors.Art is an online art gallery designed for small and medium businesses.

We offer limited edition of original artwork prints, numbered and signed by the artists.

Decorate your professional interiors in just a few clicks.

Select a single artwork or a series of artworks and you will receive them framed, ready to hang !

Name: Fine Artist
Description: This page displays some of my canvas paintings. Works on display at MallonArt.com include figurative, landscape, portraiture and still life. Mediums include oil painting, acrylic painting, mixed media, wash and ink pen and ballpen. For a look into other portfolios of work please go to my website at http://www.mallonart.com/

Name: Randa Hijazi-Art Furniture
Description: A contemporary Canadian artist based in Laval, Quebec, working in a variety of medium.Plus paint and design the furniture

Name: Icchetuli
Description: Fueling creativity and fostering artistic excellence. Icchetuli is a fine arts school and dynamic art studio offering comprehensive education, collaborative studio space, and a vibrant community for artists of all levels. Learn, create, connect, and grow with us.

Name: Nova Contemporary
Description: Since 2016, Nova has fostered a range of emerging and established artists. Our programme is rooted in Thailand’s unique heritage, building upon its cultural and spiritual foundations. We embrace the region’s manifold of personal and collective histories while remaining sharply current, advocating for critical contemporary discourse and inquiry. The gallery acts as a ground for plurality and reconciliation, joining the past and present, as well as the individual and social. Nova serves as a pillar of the flourishing Southeast Asia art scene, striving to bring its exceptional talent to international spheres.

Name: Ballhaus Naunynstrasse
Description:
Ballhaus Naunynstrasse in Berlin is a theatre and place of cultural production for the postmigrational Turkish culture in Germany and Europe.

The main emphasis lies on theatre production, but there is also a strong interest in the latest developments in dance, film, music and literature. Cultural education projects as well as co-operations with independent companies such as Balkan Black Box, Conflict Zone Arts Asylum, Diyalog and others will complete the programme.
    
This unique theatre with its postmigrant cultural praxis offers artists a platform for developing art with a “translocal perspective”. Looking out beyond a national framework, exchange, as well as interdisciplinarity and continuity are important aspects of our programming.

Arts education projects such as Monthly Kiez Show: News from Naunynstraße and Holiday Camp – the 3rd Generation are part of the academy of autodidacts which aims to gather forces in order to offer young people from socially disadvantaged backgrounds the opportunity to work and develop within cultural and artistic projects.

The Ballhaus Naunynstraße is an institution of the district Friedrichshain-Kreuzberg, programming co-operation with Kultursprünge e.V., supported by the Senatskanzlei für Kulturelle Angelegenheiten Berlin.

See also: Transnationalism, Translation, Politics of Representation, Post-Colonialism

Name: DNA Galeria Sztuki
Description:
Galeria DNA to przestrzeń, w której sztuka i piękno spotykają się w samym sercu Wrocławia. Działalność Galerii koncentruje się wokół promocji młodych, utalentowanych twórców, którzy dopiero rozpoczynają swoją przygodę ze sztuką. Ich prace z dziedziny malarstwa, rysunku, grafiki, ceramiki, szkła, rzeźby są wyraziste, unikatowe i równie fascynujące co kod DNA. 

Pomimo młodego wieku, promowani przez galerię artyści, mogą pochwalić się już zagranicznymi wystawami, np. w Amsterdamie. Berlinie, Nowym Jorku i Londynie.

Galeria zapewnia profesjonalne doradztwo, twórczo odpowiada na potrzeby obcowania z pięknem i wyjątkowością sztuki, zarówno Klientów indywidualnych jak i instytucjonalnych.

Name: The Kala Odyssey
Description:
The Kala Odyssey is run by Pradheepa Ramasundaram, a self-taught artist, eclectic person who feels that her paintings should reflect every aspect of her personality.
An artist who constantly strives to take on challenges by trying something new in each painting that she creates.

Name: matchi.art
Description:
Décomplexer l’achat d’art pour le faire entrer dans le cadre de vie de chacun, telle est la mission de matchi.art.
Galerie d'art d'un nouveau genre, matchi.art démystifie le rapport à l'art grâce à une sélection rigoureuse d'œuvres originales, réalisées par des artistes de qualité, qu'ils soient émergents ou établis, tout en restant accessibles.

Name: Magna Talent Agency
Description: We are an Oklahoma City-based talent agency who represents professionally trained on-camera and voice over actors.

Name: Edelman Arts
Description:
Edelman Arts, a vibrant gallery and art consultancy, specializes in sales of the world’s most accomplished and sought-after names in Pre-twentieth century, Modern, and Contemporary Art. The gallery is also committed to investing in the careers of young artists whose work is significant to support.

Edelman Arts regularly mounts exhibitions, both independently and collaboratively. These have included exhibitions Surrealism: Then and Now (with Paul Kasmin Gallery), Fall 2006, Jewelry: Picasso to Kenny Scharf, Fall 2007, Dennis Oppenheim; My Mind is My House, Summer 2008, Ron Ferri: Painted Books, Summer 2009, John Margolies: Roadside America, Summer 2010, and Ilya & Emilia Kabakov: The Study of Kabakov, Fall 2011 as well as solo exhibitions and installations for our represented artists Doug Argue, Yasmine Chatila, Cathy McClure, and Christopher Winter. Edelman Arts has also been an active participant of Art Miami since 2009.

Founder Asher Edelman is an internationally recognized art dealer and collector with a lifetime of experience in the connoisseurship, acquisition and sale of fine art. Edelman was the founder of the FAE Musee d’Art Contemporain in Lausanne, Switzerland and has been a board member of numerous arts institutions.

Name: TICK TACK
Description:
LOCATION
Housed in the brutalist monument ‘De Zonnewijzer’, a 1955 key work by architect Léon Stynen, TICK TACK occupies a historic duplex at a vivid city intersection, facing the tramstation and landscape park 'De Harmonie'. The 6-meter-high windows function here as an interface between artists and audience, and between private and public space.

PROGRAM
The TICK TACK program is dual.
By day, TT presents exhibitions, at night, the windows transform into a projection screen under the name CINEMA TICK TACK.

CINEMA TICK TACK
CTT is a new and exclusive platform that brings video and digital arts to the public space.
Reaching numerous of daily passerby and communes, CTT serves as a channel, stimulating a connection in its urban setting. As a result, both day and night, TT constantly challenges the physical and mental boundaries between inside and out.

Name: MeetFrida Art Foundation
Description: MeetFrida occupies spaces with art - in inner cities, IRL and in the digital world. MeetFrida thus provides artists with new forms of visibility, opens up new distribution platforms, and appeals to audiences who previously had little affiliation with the visual arts. The foundation represents more than 70 artists worldwide.

Name: Off Limits
Description:
Off Limits is a Contemporary Art Center and a Cultural and Arts Management Company.

Off Limits is, in one hand, an Art Center dedicated to contemporary and alternative artistic manifestations; and on the other hand, a company dedicated to design, produce and coordinate cultural projects for clients.

Name: artworks
Description:
I work mainly with oil or acrylic paints. I enjoy working in both media, depending on my mood and my subjects. When creating a realistic piece, I prefer to work in oils. They are lush and fluid, perfect for the fine details typical of a traditional still life or landscape. However, when I am in an experimental mood, pushing the boundaries between abstract and realism, I opt for the bright, opaque color and fast drying property of acrylics. This medium allows me to more easily manipulate space, line and composition – resulting in personal and unique representation of my subject.

I love to paint daily, or at the very least spend time in related activities: sketching, preparing canvases and papers, and framing. When I can't, for whatever reason, I am always thinking about how soon I can get back into the studio.
I

Name: Yaradıcı Mərkəzi
Description:
Yaradici Center is the beating heart of Azerbaijan’s Creative Industries Ecosystem, established by the Ministry of Culture (under the strategy of social and economic development signed by the decree of the President of Azerbaijan for 2022 -2026) as part of the Yaradici Azerbaijan program.

We focus on turning innovative ideas into exceptional products, offering professional training, skills upscaling, and expert guidance on commercialization and business ownership. 

Our efforts span creative clusters like Cinema, Animation, Arts, Game Development, Music, Media, and more, empowering creators to thrive in the ever-evolving global marketplace.

Name: AntikBar - Original Vintage Poster Gallery
Description:
AntikBar Limited is the London gallery specialising in original vintage posters covering an extensive variety of subjects - travel, advertising, sport, cinema, war, propaganda - from around the world available online and at their gallery with worldwide delivery. 

AntikBar also holds regular poster auctions (www.antikbar.co.uk/antikbar-auctions), and provides professional linen backing and poster restoration services with their partners at Poster Mountain USA. They offer collection advice, consultancy and searches to order for collectors, individual clients, interior designers, museums and other institutions. 

Their extensive stock is available online with worldwide delivery, and at their gallery: 

Address: 404 King's Road, Chelsea, London SW10 0LJ 
Telephone: +44 (0) 20 7352 9309 
Website: www.antikbar.co.uk 

Twitter (@AntikBar): www.twitter.com/antikbar 
Instagram (@AntikBar.co.uk): www.instagram.com/antikbar.co.uk 
Pinterest: www.pinterest.com/antikbar 
Facebook: www.facebook.com/antikbar.co.uk 
WordPress: antikbarposters.wordpress.com 

Visit www.antikbar.co.uk/news_and_events for information on their upcoming auctions, exhibitions, other events and news. 

AntikBar has been featured by various publications, including the Financial Times, Antiques Trade Gazette, BBC, The Times, Antique Collecting, Luxury Living and Homes & Antiques, as well as by LAPADA for their Object of the Week and 1st Dibs for their 90th anniversary celebration of Art Deco. 

AntikBar is a Member of the International Vintage Poster Dealers Association (IVPDA), the London Art Deco Society, UK Posters Network, the King's Road Curve and The Association of Art & Antiques Dealers (LAPADA).

Name: MGA Sculpture Studio
Description:
MGA Sculpture Studio specializes in the creation of large-scale sculpture and public artwork, from concept, design, and fabrication to project management and budgeting. 

Located in the heart of St. Petersburg, Florida's Warehouse Arts District, MGA has 5,000 square feet of studio space where our team creates one-of-a-kind works of art for indoor and outdoor public spaces. Our diverse portfolio includes freestanding, suspended, wall relief, and interactive sculptures in metal acrylic, polyester resin, fiberglass, bronze, and mixed media.

Name: Adams County Arts Council
Description: Adams County Arts Council is a 501(c)3 non-profit organization located in Gettysburg, PA. The mission of the Adams County Arts Council is to cultivate an arts-rich community.

Name: Vitruvius NFT Gallery

Name: Rivich Auction
Description:
Located in Chicago, Rivich Auction is an international auction house serving bidders and consignors from all over the world. 

Our fresh-to-market auctions ensure a holistic approach to curated catalogs that make items accessible to the serious collector and the casual enthusiast alike.

From single items to entire estates, Rivich Auction gives each client attention to detail in an approachable manner. We take a hands on approach to real time estimates & appraisals, creating connections, and securing a transparent follow through for both the bidder and consigner. 

For 35 years, Rivich Auction has been trusted and respected globally.

Name: JOTHI-SEROJ
Description: JOTHI-SEROJ LTD is a company based out of France.

Name: Amazings by Dirk Denoyelle
Poets and Storytellers of India
Description:
Poets and Storytellers of India is a community of poets, storytellers, writers and artists in India. 

It is a confluence of the communities comprising, Poets of Bangalore, Poets of Kolkata, Poets of Mumbai and Poets of Noida. 

We organize gatherings, in which poets, writers and storytellers from different walks of life come to participate and share their art.

We aim at reviving the essence of poetry and stories and utilising it for a cause. 

With the fast-paced life we live, we humans forget what makes us humans. We wake up and live an automated robotic life, but being one with art, poetry and stories helps in keeping the blood flowing in our veins and replenishes us with the hope and energy to live on.

We offer a platform where people come and express what they feel through the art of poetry and stories. We have no language barriers or rhythmic constraints; people can come and talk straight from their heart.”

We intend to revive the bygone era where poetry was loved and embraced. We give people a platform to embrace their thoughts and to be themselves.
