Name: Sempre Music Academy
Description:
Sempre Music Academy is a Singapore based music school. We specialize in providing music lessons, music instruments, materials and accessories. 

Sempre Music Academy aims to introduce a fun and fulfilling method into learning music for every learner for all ages and backgrounds.

In 2022, Sempre Music Academy was awarded the Singapore SME500 award by The Association of Trade and Commerce. It was also rated by ThreeBestRated, as one of the top three music schools in Chinatown, Singapore for the year 2022 & 2023.

Name: Re d'Italia Art
Description:
Società internazionale di editoria e collezionismo d’arte.
Essa fornisce un monitoraggio costante del mercato dell’arte, sia dal punto di vista strettamente artistico, che economico-finanziario, con la finalità di affiancare i collezionisti e gli appassionati in ogni fase delle loro scelte.
Negli anni Re d’Italia Art ha avuto rapporti con i migliori artisti nazionali ed internazionali.
Il nostro gruppo e’ formato da collaboratori forti di una esperienza ventennale, fornendo un monitoraggio costante del mercato.

Name: Cult-ore Art
Description:
Cult-ore was founded self-taught metal sculptor Eddie Roberts, who studied metal fabrication and sculpture at universities around the world. After years of travelling the world in a variety of professions, Eddie always had his art in the background. He decided to pursue his passion for sculpture seriously as a career when he reached a defining point in his life.

This ‘lightbulb moment’ involved searching for and finding his biological parents after being raised by his loving adoptive family in the North East of England from birth. This significant and moving moment helped solidify Eddie’s burning ambition to pursue art as a full-time career and Cult-ore Art was born.

Cult-ore Art crafts contemporary metal sculptures and installations that represent form, shape, colour, light and raw materials, with an architectural and geometric feel. They range from large ‘Cor-ten’ structures to sleek powder-coated pieces, are abstract and symbolic in style, and create stunning centre pieces and connections that bring spaces to life.

Artwork from Cult-ore Art is inspired by the concept of the ‘line’ in nature, architecture and geometry. Designer Eddie Roberts looks at everything as if wearing X-ray lenses, breaking it down to its founding structure, whether that’s a leaf or a skyscraper. For him, it’s all about the ‘founding lines’. The sculptures are shapes that are translated from forms seen all around us every day, from the corners of buildings and rooms, to the sometimes microscopic and magnified forms of nature.

As a craftsman, Eddie has made a lifelong commitment to and built a passion for reforming metal in a way that represents the diversity of the art world today. His desire to create artwork that is accessible and that anyone can be ‘hands on’ with, rather than admiring from afar within a gallery environment makes the ‘one of a kind’ pieces he creates a true reflection of the things that are important in life.

Name: Pierre Millon Design
Description:
My parents, from their profession, never concealed the harshness of life and its constraints from me. However, as a dreamer and idealist, I quickly developed a passion for art as an escape from the abomination that Man can commit. I was at the Beaux-Arts in Bordeaux that I was able to reveal myself and work with enthusiasts from Spain to Scotland to Italy.

By drawing first, it is by adding to it the design and production of furniture, painting, where I find myself losing myself in art. Pottery and its techniques, each more incredible than the next, digital or real models, paintings, in triptych or diptych...

My work as an artist consists of the sacralization of moments of intimate encounters by works that all have a particular aura.

“I want to design for myself, but realize for you."

Your smiles when you lay your eyes on our plans, our drawings, our works, our work, discuss with you for hours the history of each of the works, that is what drives me.

My creations come to make concrete your actions, your looks to bring to your interiors a privileged space and awaken in your optimism and a form of sincerity.

Name: ArtLink.app
Description:
Artlink is an end-to-end Mixed Reality app which connects artists, cultural and educational institutions, museums, galleries and festivals to their public through new media exhibitions, products or experiences. 

We give you access to the latest AR & 3Dgraphics innovations, while allowing you to focus 100% on the creative process. 

ArtLink is a scalable, stable platform used for both testing and launching XR experiences on mobile. 

Receive on-demand help from our new media team to implement your vision.

Either you do organize a social media campaign or a large-scale live festival, we have the right tools for you!

Name: Artémis Estimations
Description:
Référence depuis plus de dix ans en matière d'expertise de tableaux et objets d'art, Artemis Estimations accompagne les particuliers et les professionnels dans le processus de mise en vente aux enchères de biens culturels. 
Pierre Grignon Dumoulin
Expert près la Cour d'Appel d'Amiens
Habilité pour les expertises d'ivoire

Name: Relational Space
Description:
Relational Space is a non-profit art gallery and forum that champions collaboration, creativity and knowledge exchange among artists, activists, scientists, policy-makers and the community. Relational Space offers a new platform where scientists and artists work together to curate art exhibitions with empirical narratives. Immersive installations ignite our senses and our intellect, engaging visitors in compelling worlds to mobilize sensation and imagination and inspire social action. To tackle the intractable challenges of our global society we must find a new language - a language of interdisciplinary, interconnectedness and intersectionality. Collaboration between science, policy, community and the arts presents boundary spanning opportunities for seeing the world in new ways and discovering new solutions for innovation and social change.

Relation Space aims to build a more just and sustainable world, inspired by art and transformed by truth.

Name: Galerie Martin Kudlek
Description:
Martin Kudlek Gallery has been selling and advising on art for over 20 years. We represent international contemporary artists featuring the diversity within the classical genres of painting, sculpture and drawing. Works of art characterized by their formal rigor and reduction on the one hand and those that embrace figurative styles charged narratively and symbolically on the other hand, build the cornerstones of the gallery program. Through regular participations at art fairs Martin Kudlek Gallery holds a broad international network within the art market. With numerous artist cooperations and exhibition projects the gallery also offers an open experimental field for contemporary art production.
We are happy to advise on private and corporate levels.

Name: Nova Contemporary
Description: Since 2016, Nova has fostered a range of emerging and established artists. Our programme is rooted in Thailand’s unique heritage, building upon its cultural and spiritual foundations. We embrace the region’s manifold of personal and collective histories while remaining sharply current, advocating for critical contemporary discourse and inquiry. The gallery acts as a ground for plurality and reconciliation, joining the past and present, as well as the individual and social. Nova serves as a pillar of the flourishing Southeast Asia art scene, striving to bring its exceptional talent to international spheres.

Name: Vogt Auction Galleries
Description: Vogt is the trusted estates leader in San Antonio and South Texas since 1975, providing estate sales, auctions, and appraisals for families and businesses alike. We have the biggest mailing list of buyers in town, we know what things are worth and will get you the most money possible, and we're honest! And we treat everyone like they’re our own grandmother.

Name: Brian Peters Studio
Description: I am an artist and designer based in Pittsburgh, PA, who specializes in 3D printed ceramic works of art. My work consists of ceramic blocks or three-dimensional tiles that are designed by writing custom digital code, and fabricated on custom 3D printers I build. Each piece is then refined by hand, fired, glazed by hand and fired again, which means that craftsmanship and artistry remain an integral part of each piece.

Name: Artist Yvette Michele
Description:
Art & Photography for Interiors | Exteriors | Products & The people who create them

Yvette Michele is an international artist specializing in multi-art disciplines. Her work is large scaled fine art originals, artistic and commercial photography. Her award winning visual signature technique is titled “The Original Sculptured Canvas”. She has showcased her art in the national exhibitions Art Basel, ArtPrize upcoming Art Expo New York. Internationally she has debuted a solo exhibition and commissioned art services.  She serves the South Florida Community in public and philanthropic art endeavors and is a South Florida resident studio artist. She creates art for private collectors, the design community in residential and commercial designs. 


Art Services for private and commercial designs include:
•	Art Commissions
•	Art Design Planning
•	Art Consulting
•	Large scale art

Trade partner for designers & architects

Yvette’s active photography practice is a compliment to her art offerings, being a design enthusiast at heart she naturally blends her passion for interiors and everything about them to showcase a room’s personality and beauty as intended by its designer. 

Photography Services Include:
•	Interior Design Portfolios
•	Real Estate Staging Photography
•	Luxury Real Estate Listing Photography
•	Personal Branding Photography 
•	Commercial Product Photography
•	

Visit Artist Yvette Michele in her studio. Located in the heart of Fort Lauderdale art district FAT Village. .Visits to the studio are by appointment 954-372-0096 & open during the districts art walks. Art products & services include original works, commissions & art consultations.

Name: Mélange, The Fine Arts Society
Description:
Mélange - the fine arts society of Ramjas College established in 1987 has been a community of art aficionados. Mélange meaning "a mixture or variety of different things" has always been a pride of Ramjas College's ECA events and activities. The Fine Arts Society functions to provide its members a space to work on their art and interact with fellow enthusiasts like them by conducting various workshops and competitions.
We believe in the motto, "LISTEN TO YOUR ART" and shape our young art enthusiasts via various art walks, magazine creations, and workshops with several renowned artists. We also collaborate with other art societies having the same vision as ours. 
Mélange as a society strives hard in gaining any opportunity which will up-skill our artists and also may benefit society. 
Dm for collaborations.

Name: Printmaking Center of New Jersey (PCNJ)
Description:
The Printmaking Center of New Jersey (PCNJ) is an uncommon, award-winning arts center founded in 1973. For 40 years, PCNJ has operated the state’s only open printmaking studios. Artists access our fully stocked studios at affordable rates to create art all day and into the night; 7 days a week. PCNJ also exhibits exceptional, thought-provoking art; offers sophisticated printmaking classes for adults; and provides traveling art programs to children to stimulate life-long creativity. Recently, PCNJ launched Combat Paper NJ, a ground-breaking program that uses art as a tool to help veterans resolve the psychological, emotional and physical effects of their combat experience.

GALLERY HOURS:
Tues. – Fri. 10AM – 4PM
Sat. Noon – 4PM

---

PCNJ MISSION

The Printmaking Center of New Jersey is an award-winning non-profit arts center. For the past 40 years The Printmaking Center has provided exhibitions, education and open working studios that support and encourage the fine art of printmaking. Our facility houses two galleries, and studios with equipment for printmaking, papermaking, letterpress, photography and book arts. Each year thousands of adults and children participate in a variety of experiences at the center.

The mission of the Printmaking Center of New Jersey is to encourage, support and promote the fine art of printmaking in all its varied forms; to promote interaction among and between artists and the general public; and to advance the artistic and professional growth of artists at varying levels of experience. Visit PrintNJ.org to donate or learn more.

Name: Lala Paintings
Description:
Lala Paintings, es un emprendimiento de la artista Lala Chitrangolo.
Su obra esta básicamente centrada en el color y las texturas.
Con taller en Argentina y en Italia, Lala expresa su alma y vivencias mediante sus obras. 
Artista multidiciplinaria, trabaja con tecnicas mixtas, utilizando oleos, acrilicos, acuarelas, pasteles etc.

Name: Architectural Artist Alvaro Alvarez
Description: Based in San Ysidro, California. Inspired by the San Diego (US) + Tijuana (Mexico) Border, Architectural Representation, Hospitality Storytelling, & Neuroscience as applied to Art Therapy to improve Mental Health.

Name: Chapel Arts Studios (CAS)
Description:
CAS is a research-led, contemporary arts organisation which exists to support and develop artists, and deliver arts education in the North Hampshire region. Our intention is to grow a sustainable organisation in which our artists and socially engaged art projects can thrive. Our main activities include developing our CAS network, and promoting creative enquiry through our flagship Education and Dissent programs.

Our Education Program is delivered through Artists Residencies, workshops, public art projects and our Art Bus, all of which can bring Arts Award courses and workshops to your organisation or community. Our most successful programs are our Arts and School partnerships. These are a tried and tested model of arts and education partnership which makes it easy for schools to work with external arts practitioners in support of their creative curriculum.

Our Dissent programme explores arts unique capacity to challenge, question and offer alternative ways of seeing. Using the Dissent program we will involve national and international partners in a dialogue about dissent – using events, exhibitions, and a variety of media.

Our CAS Network provides resources, advice, support and opportunities for professional artists post graduation and beyond. When you are a graduate you loose the infrastructure of support, resources, facilities, and advice. CAS bridges the gap between art school and life after education. CAS recognises the individuality of each artist and giving them the space to pursue their own interests and research. We are flexible and respond to the needs of each artist which allows for a greater diversity. By partnering with CAS, schools, organisations, and community groups gain access to a wealth of knowledge and experience.

Name: CRAFTINNOVA
Description:
Es el único evento nacional (con vocación internacional) que combina oficios artísticos e innovación. Se celebra en Valladolid desde 2019 y supone una renovación de la visión tradicional que se tiene de la artesanía mostrando una visión más amplia que incluye la creación digital y el uso de nuevas tecnologías.

Con esta quinta edición se retoma el carácter tractor del evento para dar un nuevo impulso a la innovación en el sector de los oficios artesanales y artísticos.

Name: Ar.Co - Centro de Arte e Comunicação Visual
Description:
Founded in 1973 as an independent art school, Ar.Co is dedicated to the experimentation, training and divulging of arts, crafts and visual communication.

From early on in the school’s history, the alternative nature of the pedagogic project has consisted mainly of bringing together a strong emphasis on practice, a daily multi-disciplinary atmosphere and a view of artistic training as a service that should “make a difference” for a public with the most diverse objectives.

The main training areas – Drawing, Painting, Photography, Jewellery, Ceramics, Illustration/Comics, Cinema/Movement Image, Art History and Theory, Individual and multi-disciplinary projects – offer complete professional programs, as well as topical opportunities for an introduction to a particular technical/aesthetic area, or for professional recycling. The therapeutic dimension of the training in the arts is, likewise, not forgotten.

As part of the overall training program, Ar.Co frequently promotes conferences and informal meetings with specialists in a number of different areas and organizes public exhibitions of the students’ production and, eventually, of national or international production in one or more areas connected to its departments’ activities.

Ar.Co collaborates regularly with other schools and institutional or private entities, both national and international, promoting initiatives relevant to the school’s objectives and voccation.

Ar.Co is a non-profit cultural association of public utility.

Name: Chicago Fine Art Salon
Description: The Chicago Fine Art Salon is a small business working to cultivate an artists community in Chicago. We host online and in-person exhibitions, fine art classes and small private events.

Name: Ben Heine Art
Description: Ben Heine Art is specialized in drawing, painting and photography.

Name: BARCO ilustración
Description: Barco ilustración is an experienced team specialised in illustrating projects for children and young people for more than twenty-five years.

Name: Canvas | School of Art and Fashion
Description:
Située à Lausanne, l'école Canvas instruit et forme des passionné•e•s et développe leur potentiel jusqu'à en faire des artistes professionnel•le•s qualifié•e•s.

Avec plus de 25 ans d'expérience, Canvas offre des enseignements de qualité dans les domaines du graphisme, de la mode et l'illustration.

Les étudiants en filière graphique apprennent à la fois les bases du Swiss Design, le rôle et la construction de la typographie, la réalisation de vidéos, le motion-design et le web design.

Les élèves en mode étudient le processus de fabrication d’un vêtement, du moodboard à la réalisation en passant par le croquis, la recherche de matière et le dessin technique.

Les étudiants en illustration sont formés aux techniques de dessins manuels et numériques tout en suivant des cours de concept art et d’anatomie artistique.

Canvas est approuvée par la FEDE et délivre, entre autres diplômes, des bachelors.

Name: PxP Contemporary
Description: PxP Contemporary is an online platform that connects collectors with high-quality, affordable artworks. We believe in transparent pricing, building meaningful relationships with our clients, providing exceptional customer service and above all, supporting the talented artists who we work with and represent. Co-founders Alicia Puig and Ekaterina Popova, with a combined 15+ years of experience working in the arts, created PxP to challenge the traditional gallery model and make buying art a more accessible, digital-friendly experience. Art lovers, whether looking to add to an already established collection or acquiring their very first piece, can browse our curated selection of art with fixed prices by contemporary artists from around the globe.

Name: collection croisée
Description: collection croisée est une plateforme dédiée à la création contemporaine internationale. Cette galerie d’art en ligne – portée par Chloé Thomas et Geoff Vallon – présente régulièrement une sélection d’œuvres à la vente. Chaque collection reflète le croisement de leur regard, à la fois singuliers et complémentaires. Ils se tournent notamment vers les champs du dessin, de la peinture, du design et de l’artisanat d’art.

Name: Kunstlicht
Description: Academic journal for visual art, visual culture and architecture affiliated with Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, the Netherlands. Kunstlicht showcases both young and established scholars working within the visual realm. It features case studies, theoretical articles and artist contributions.

Name: NemishArt
Description:
Welcome dear Visitor of this page!

My name is Yuriy Nemish and I love art in all its forms and therefore I work using different visual techniques and materials: painting, graphics, sculpture, ceramics, photography, media art. Although these types of art are quite different, but they are interesting to me in the way of expressing the image. I am convinced that time, as a certain coordinate system, forces us to perceive ourselves and the world in a different way each time, and hence to create in a different way. We live in time, where things are no longer are important as denominations, but their designation becomes especially important. Reality begins to be perceived and valued not only as a set of things, but as a system of signs (semiotic structure). In my work I study and research the so-called semiotic images, which are special signs that can acquire the characteristics of symbols outside of convention. It is interesting to study the process of describing phenomena through such signs that allow to involve the process of transferring the features of some specific phenomena to a much wider set of them, the imaginary transfer of past or present state of phenomena in the predicted future state. These are the approaches I use in painting, graphics, ceramics.

I use a slightly different approach for media art (using computer technology, computer animation). For a long time I have been working on the "visics" project, where with the help of dynamic, so-called "pure" abstract and strictly defined color forms I try to convey a certain range of feelings. Visics is a moving composition on the screen, characterized by a certain rhythm, harmony, structure of compositions, etc.

I have devoted a lot of time to photography, in particular to experimental photography, where I sought not visual reproduction of things in the world, but to create a single image that cannot be repeated. 

On this platform I will be presenting my art, my thoughts and ideas. 

Sincerely Yours,
Yuriy

Name: GE Gallery
Description: GE Gallery was founded in 2006 by Gabriel Elizondo. The gallery prides itself on its dedication to the career of artists from around the world, with an emphasis on artists from Latin America, Spain and Mexico. GE Gallery has succeeded in directing a strong, vibrant program that continues to win the support and interest of collectors locally and world-wide. More than just a gallery, GE Gallery is a bastion for the arts in the region and supports many artistic endeavors, institutions, as well as demonstrating  significant loyalty to its artists. Its beautiful space located in the neighborhood of downtown of Garza García in Mexico is also an architectural project offering 326 square meters to artists, collectors and visitors.
Location: San Pedro Garza García, Nuevo León

Name: ArtFest Fort Myers, Inc.
Description:
ArtFest Fort Myers is a 25-year tradition of celebrating creativity, community, and culture! Join us for an immersive celebration of the arts, a testament to our enduring commitment to Southwest Florida's artistic heritage.

Annually, 85,000 people gather at the riverfront in downtown Fort Myers, Florida, for this free festival on the first weekend in February. Highlights include meeting visual artists from across the country and worldwide, sampling diverse cuisines, experiencing special exhibits and artist interactions, and entertaining families with interactive art activities and performing arts.

Sponsorship at ArtFest Fort Myers is experiential and dynamic Event Marketing. It complements a company's marketing mix of TV, radio, print, and social media, driving consideration and purchases across age, gender, and ethnicity. As a result, ArtFest Fort Myers sponsors get results.

By becoming an ArtFest Fort Myers sponsor, companies have a unique and targeted way to reach over 85,000 consumers — in a relaxed, personal, and buying-oriented environment. Beyond marketing, your sponsorship supports school art education, making a tangible difference in our community.

The top three sponsorship objectives—branding, direct sales, and increasing your database—are all components of ArtFest Fort Myers's customized sponsorship packages. ArtFest Fort Myers provides a turn-key sponsor activation. We execute all the activation work on the sponsor's behalf. In addition, we work with you to meet your marketing goals. Learn more: artfestfortmyers.com/sponsors/become-an-artfest-sponsor/

ArtFest Fort Myers supports art education in schools and after-school programs.

Name: Virginie Humbrecht Illustration
Description:
Ecologie, inclusion, égalité, culture,... j'illustre les projets engagés, sous toutes leurs formes (édition, événementiel, sites web & réseaux sociaux, communication, etc).
N'hésitez pas à me contacter pour me parler de votre projet !

Name: OCA - Office for Contemporary Art Norway
Description: OCA - Office for Contemporary Art is a foundation promoting contemporary art from Norway internationally. OCA expands international opportunities and contributes to global exchanges through various activities, including grants and residencies, research visits and network development, public programmes, and publishing. OCA is funded by the Ministry of Culture and Equality and the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and is the commissioner for Norway’s contribution to the visual arts section of La Biennale di Venezia.

Name: Integrated Art Group, LLC
Description: Integrated Art Group offers a comprehensive service to clients, in which enduring art of the highest quality and value is placed in every project, while promoting awareness and appreciation of art to viewers from all walks of life in everyday settings. Integrated Art Group provides exceptional, appropriate, reasonably priced art to a wide variety of clients nationwide. Our projects, which include clients in professional offices, healthcare settings, corporations, educational environments and public agencies, have relied on us to develop, procure, frame and install art collections.

Name: Expressions-The Fine Arts and Craft Society
Description:
We are Expressions- The Fine Arts and Craft Society of Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology, Delhi.

ABOUT US
Founded in 2015 and designated in 2017, it all started with the goal of bringing together artistic minds. We are a group of driven individuals fervent about bringing our ideas to life.

OUR MISSION AND VISION
"The strength of our team is each member. The strength of each member is the team. "
 • We endeavour to shape an ebullient environment to inspire the artists with us. 
 • We seek to empower our artists by providing opportunities to enrich their explorations of arts and crafts.
 • By collaborative learning and pooling of expertise, we aim for all-inclusive growth and broadening skill-sets.

ACTIVITIES
 • Our annual fest 'Scarlet' is a wonderful learning opportunity for all aspiring artists.
 • We as a society organise competitions for worthy artists to show their skills.
 • We conduct monthly workshops and winter activities for our members.
 • Members of our society actively participate in diverse college festivals and create artworks to commemorate various occasions.
 • 'Mulaqat', our recent mural project, was thrivingly accomplished.
 • We organise informal meets to strengthen fellowship among the juniors and seniors.
Here's to learning and creating art that makes people smile.
हम मिले, रंग बरसे

Name: Australian Galleries
Description: Australian Galleries was established in Melbourne by Tam and Anne Purves in June 1956. Now under the sole directorship of Stuart Purves, Australian Galleries continues to represent significant contemporary Australian artists. The galleries' success reflects the passion and commitment to the artists it represents. Stuart Purves' personal dedication and enthusiasm to the promotion of the arts in Australia is indicative of his confidence in the important role visual art plays in the national and international psyche.

Name: Centre de la photographie de Mougins
The Aaryans Joya
Description:
Welcome to THE AARYANS, where knowledge reigns supreme and excellence is nurtured with care! 

As an English Medium Co-Educational school affiliated with CBSE, we pride ourselves on providing a holistic educational experience that empowers students to embark on a journey of lifelong learning and success.

At THE AARYANS, we believe in fostering an inclusive and supportive environment where students from all backgrounds thrive. Our commitment to academic rigor is complemented by a rich array of extracurricular activities, ensuring the holistic development of each student.

Guided by our motto, "Chariot of Knowledge," we strive to ignite curiosity, instill values, and inspire leadership among our students. Our dedicated faculty, modern infrastructure, and innovative teaching methods create a dynamic learning ecosystem where every child's potential is realized.

Join us at THE AARYANS, where we drive the chariot of knowledge toward a brighter future for every student!

Name: SARA MUSIC
Description: Our music school is dedicated to providing the highest quality of education to aspiring musicians of all levels. With a team of experienced and accomplished instructors, we offer a wide range of programs and classes, including individual lessons, ensemble rehearsals, and masterclasses. Whether you're a beginner just starting out or an advanced student looking to refine your skills, our curriculum is tailored to help you reach your full potential as a musician. With state-of-the-art facilities, a nurturing learning environment, and a passion for music, our school is the perfect place to discover your love of music and take your talents to the next level.

Name: Laboratorio de Conservación de Vitrales Espacio Transparente
Description:
El laboratorio de conservación de vitrales Espacio Transparente, comenzó su actividad en 1998, como taller de vitrales, ubicado en la plaza del Mulato Gil de Castro. En 2006 se trasladó a Valparaíso y se transformo en laboratorio de conservación de vitrales.

Nuestras áreas de trabajo son: conservación, restauración, formación, difusión, creación y seguimiento de expedientes técnicos de vitrales patrimoniales o de interés histórico. Nuestra misión es la de contribuir a la profundización del estudio de los vitrales en Chile, y a la sistematización en los trabajos de conservación y restauración de la especialidad, que favorezca la mejor preservación de estos. 

Hemos realizado estudios preliminares en obras tan importantes como el Ex Congreso Nacional o el Palacio de justicia, siendo los primeros especialistas en elaborar este tipo de estudio en nuestro país. Somos el primer laboratorio de restauración y conservación de vitrales que ha desarrollado en Chile tecnología para nuestra especialidad (sistemas de protección de vidrio para vitrales y tratamiento de patologías biológicas), y que es capaz de formar técnicos especializados en obra (programa Laboratorio-Escuela) favoreciendo la transmisión de saberes hacia las futuras generaciones. 

Desde 2013, hemos establecido una alianza de colaboración con les Ateliers Loire en Francia y La Casa Mayer en Alemania.

Name: Sangiorgio Investimenti d'Arte
Description:
Sangiorgio Investimenti d'Arte è la galleria dell'arte ad personam. Porta l’arte fuori dai luoghi che tradizionalmente la ospitano, quali musei e gallerie, per proporla a domicilio, in maniera privilegiata.

L'azienda guarda in tre direzioni: i grandi Maestri del Novecento, una vasta scelta di artisti contemporanei,
e dal 2011 sostiene e vende in esclusiva il Movimento degli Arcani.

Tutte le opere sono accompagnate da certificato di autenticità firmato dall’artista o da erede autorizzato.
Nel caso dei Grandi e degli Arcani, viene fornita anche una relazione di responsabilità critica e un certificato
di archiviazione. È possibile acquistare anche in forma rateale.

Con il Movimento degli Arcani il nome Sangiorgio ha varcato le porte dell’Onu con una mostra sui diritti umani.

Name: Armenian Treasures Foundation
Description:
Armenian Treasures Foundation stands at the intersection of cultural heritage and digital innovation. As a leader in digital cultural preservation, we are committed to documenting, digitizing, and sharing Armenia's rich cultural legacy with the world.

*Our Mission*
To preserve and promote Armenian cultural heritage through advanced digital documentation and storytelling, making centuries of traditions accessible to global audiences.

*What We Do*
Digitally document Armenian monuments, artifacts, and traditions 
Create engaging multimedia content showcasing Armenian heritage 
Develop innovative ways to present cultural treasures 
Bridge the gap between traditional heritage and modern platforms 
Educate global audiences about Armenian culture and history.
 
Based in Yerevan, Armenia, our foundation serves as a gateway to Armenian cultural wealth, connecting the past and present through cutting-edge technology. Collaborating with cultural institutions, artists, and historians, we ensure the authentic representation of Armenian heritage in the digital space.

 *Explore More*
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ArmenianTreasures
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/armeniantreasures/?hl=en
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ArmenianTreasures
Projects: https://khndzoresk.armeniantreasures.com/
Donate: https://rearmenia.com/en/fundraisers/digital-preservation-of-armenian-historical-monuments?tab=story

#KUNSTVERBINDT

𝐕𝐨𝐨𝐫 𝐬𝐚𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐰𝐞𝐫𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐧 & 𝐛𝐨𝐞𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐞𝐧: info@lerenvankunst.nl

 www.lerenvankunst.nl & www.instagram.com/lerenvankunst.nl 
(art based learning tijdens: netwerk event - teambuilding - bedrijfsuitje - klantbeleving event - museum - galerie - virtueel museum)

𝐎𝐯𝐞𝐫 𝐨𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐡𝐭𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐋𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐧𝐕𝐚𝐧𝐊𝐮𝐧𝐬𝐭.𝐧𝐥 // 𝐑𝐨𝐮𝐦𝐚𝐲𝐧𝐞 𝐒𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐬
Van Apotheker naar Kunst Ondernemer...Na 12 jaar als apotheker in de farmaceutische industrie te hebben gewerkt was het medio 2018 tijd voor een nieuw avontuur. Ze zegde haar baan op en startte Leren Van Kunst. Met LerenVanKunst.nl liet zij als eerste in Nederland ondernemers en organisaties kennis maken met de methode Art Based Learning*

Met Leren Van Kunst traint en stimuleert ze de creativiteit van 𝐎𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐫𝐬 & 𝐓𝐞𝐚𝐦𝐬: offline door het geven van 𝐀𝐫𝐭 𝐁𝐚𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠 sessies & online in het virtuele museum

* Art Based Learning is een waardevolle en beproefde methode om aandacht te besteden aan jezelf, tot nieuwe inzichten te komen en je creatieve vermogen te stimuleren. Hoe? Door te kijken naar kunst. Echt zien. Langer kijken. Door te associëren, te fantaseren, jezelf te verplaatsen in het kunstwerk. En door die ervaring weer te verbinden met jouw persoonlijke vraag.

Name: Proyecto DAR (Dones Artistes Rurals)
Description:
El Proyecto DAR (Dones Artistes Rurals) forma parte de la programación del Consorci de Museus de la Comunitat Valenciana en colaboración con el Centre del Carme  de Cultura Contemporània.

A través de este proyecto trabajamos en el desarrollo profesional y personal de las mujeres artistas de las comunidades rurales. Nuestra misión es visibilizar el trabajo de estas mujeres a través de la plataforma web, redes sociales y medios de comunicación.

Además se realizan otras acciones que tendrán lugar en los diversos encuentros programados como el análisis de necesidades para este colectivo, la planificación de proyectos comunitarios, así como el de programas de formación como por ejemplo el de orientación laboral para artistas en esta primera fase. También se cuenta con un servicio de consultoría. 

Nuestros objetivos se basan en:

*Visibilizar los trabajos de mujeres artistas visuales.
*Generar redes entre las mujeres artistas del entorno para el desarrollo de proyectos comunitarios.
*Cubrir necesidades formativas a través de cursos (orientación laboral para artistas visuales), jornadas, encuentros.
*Ofrecer servicio de consultoría.
*Velar por los intereses de este colectivo.

Name: Jonkers Rare Books
Description:
Jonkers Rare Books was founded in 1994 by Christiaan Jonkers, at the time an undergraduate at Oxford, as an extension of his own collection of twentieth century literature.  The principles which Christiaan had employed when buying for his personal collection: that of buying only the best copies available and that a fine copy of a book was better value that a compromised copy at half the price, influenced the advice and books he offered to friends and customers.  These principles remain at the heart of Jonkers' stock selection to this day.

Upon leaving Oxford, Christiaan set the company up as a going concern, issuing catalogues and exhibiting at occasional bookfairs.  

In 1998 Jonkers merged with Bromlea Books run by Sam Johnstone and her parents, operating briefly as Bromlea & Jonkers before reverting to Jonkers Rare Books when Sam Johnstone became Sam Jonkers.  Bromlea Books had specialised in children's and illustrated books, which perfectly complemented the Jonkers expertise in nineteenth and twentieth century literature.

It was also in 1998 that the shop in Henley on Thames was acquired, bringing the carefully selected stock of books to a wider audience.  

Since then Jonkers have been quietly (and sometimes not so quietly) rooting out rare and unique books, helping clients, including some of the foremost collectors and institutions in the world, to enhance their collection.  Although the size and scope of the business has increased significantly, the underlying principles of discerning selection, honest advice and meticulous research remain as true today as when the business started.

If you are looking to begin building a collection, would like help in expanding a current one, or are looking to sell books from single volumes to entire libraries, then we will be able to help.

Join us on our mission to bring more art and creativity into the world!

Name: De Rijswijkse Schouwburg
Description:
Uw evenement in de hoofdrol

Naast het gevarieerde theateraanbod dat de Rijswijkse Schouwburg biedt, kunt u deze schouwburg ook huren voor diverse evenementen. De sfeer in de Rijswijkse Schouwburg is vriendelijk en ongedwongen. De ruime foyers, de zalen en het theatercafé bieden een moderne, sfeervolle ambiance. Het ideale decor voor zakelijk evenementen als congressen, conferenties, vergaderingen, productpresentaties, bedrijfsdiners of bedrijfsfeesten. Bovendien zijn de verschillende ruimtes op verrassende manieren te combineren. 

Wat voor evenement u ook kiest, we kunnen u veel werk uit handen nemen. Vanaf de eerste kennismaking staat er altijd een vast contactpersoon tot uw beschikking. Onze medewerkers zijn professionals die staan voor hun vak. 

Ligging en bereikbaarheid
Het fraaie pand van de Rijswijkse Schouwburg dateert uit 1991 en is centraal gelegen, dichtbij belangrijke uitvalswegen A4, A12 en A13. Rondom het gebouw is voldoende gratis parkeer gelegenheid. Voor wie met het openbaar vervoer reist: bus, tram en trein bevinden zich op loopafstand.  

Onze schouwburg werd maar liefst twee keer op rij (2012 resp. 2013) genomineerd als beste theater.  Een prijs die jaarlijks wordt toegekend door de Vereniging van Vrije Theaterproducenten (VVTP).

Het zijn lastige tijden in de theaterwereld. Juist daarom is het van essentieel belang om niet alleen geslaagde producties te presenteren maar dat ook te doen in meer dan geslaagde theaters. Waar de rode loper zowel aan de voor – als achterdeur klaar ligt maar waar ook alle andere onderdelen van de bedrijfsvoering perfect in orde zijn. Van veiligheid tot techniek en van de koffie tot de publiciteitsafdeling.
Sindsdien heeft de schouwburg niet stil gezeten en is doorgegaan op dezelfde koers. Onverminderd is er geïnvesteerd in de schouwburg en in de publieksbinding.  

Na twee nominaties hopen we komend seizoen deze prestigieuze prijs voor het Beste Theater daadwerkelijk in de wacht te slepen.

Name: NZ Art Show
Description:
It’s New Zealand’s largest curated art sale featuring hundreds of New Zealand artists and thousands of New Zealand art works. It promotes a wide range of art with the aim of encouraging all New Zealanders to own original New Zealand art. Featuring around 3,000 artworks by about 300 artists, attendees are free to view and purchase art in a dynamic and stimulating environment. Over 10,000 people visit the show over the 3 day show period proving that art is for everyone.

Since it all began in 2004, The NZ Art Show is proud to be accessible, affordable, and reputable as a true representative of New Zealand’s diverse and unique artistic community. Artworks are priced between $50 and $5,000, unchanged since 2004, and the average price is $600. 

Over the past 10 years the NZ Art Show has grown in size, reputation and quality to become one of New Zealand’s leading arts and cultural events.  Nearly 7 million dollars has been returned to artists in art sales and around $60,000 in art prizes awarded, helping to support and maintain a thriving art community; nearly 14,000 artworks have been sold; and thousands of New Zealanders have been introduced to the joy of owning and collecting original art.  

The NZ Art Show is governed by the New Zealand Affordable Art Trust (NZAAT), a non-profit charitable organisation committed to celebrating New Zealand identity and culture through art and promoting New Zealand artists by providing opportunities to further their development. The Trust is a significant contributor to the arts community.

The NZ Art Show receives no government funding: all the costs of running the show are covered by sponsorship, grants, art sales, donations and ticket sales.

Name: Panter & Hall Gallery
Description:
We are a commercial fine art gallery in the West End of London founded in 2000 by Tiffany Panter & Matthew Hall. We represent a large stable of UK based and international artists who we promote at art fairs across the globe and through a regular program of exhibitions at the two floors of galleries situated in Pall Mall, near Trafalgar Square, London.

We are always happy to add your details to our circulation list to keep you up to date with events at the gallery and any art fairs we are participating in, jut drop me an email at matthew@panterandhall.com

Our philosophy is to offer an unintimidating and friendly environment for our clients, old and new, whether experienced collectors or novices, to enjoy the best standard of painting we can offer at fair market prices. 

As we believe in complete transparency, all prices are listed in full, inclusive of VAT, on our website. Shipping quotes to most global destinations are available from our staff.

Where logistically possible we encourage clients to try works in situ so that they can be completely comfortable with their purchasing decision.

Advice on building long term collections or help with purchasing works from auction is a gallery speciality.

www.panterandhall.com

Name: Sagot - Le Garrec | Galerie d'art | Estampes - Dessins - Photographies
Description:
La galerie Sagot - Le Garrec, fondée par Edmond Sagot en 1881, est spécialisée dans l’estampe et le dessin modernes ainsi que la photographie contemporaine. Située à Saint Germain des Prés, elle est aujourd’hui dirigée par Nicolas Romand, cinquième génération de marchands.

La galerie possède une importante documentation et est une des principales références dans l’histoire de l’estampe moderne.

Spécialités :
* estampes originales
* dessins
* photographies
* achat
* vente
* expertise

* La galerie Sagot - Le Garrec est membre de La Chambre Syndicale de l’Estampe, du Dessin et du Tableau (CSEDT)
* La galerie Sagot - Le Garrec est membre du Syndicat national de la Librairie Ancienne et Moderne (SLAM)

Name: AAKRITI ART GALLERY
Description:
Aakriti Art Gallery is one of the most vibrantly active venues of art in India. Its exhibits range from works of artists who are groundbreaking contemporary visionaries, young upcoming talents or historical masters. Founded in 2005, the Gallery has today more than 1000 works in its collection which are put on display by rotation. Its new wing adjoining the primary gallery space, now has a permanent gallery for showcasing sculptures exclusively.
One of the core activities of Aakriti, which is pursued at tandem with its regular program, is promotion of young and upcoming talents. Providing them a platform to launch their artistic careers, stock their works and even buy the work outright that shows promise and creative uniqueness motivates us as much as exhibiting for famous personalities from the art world.

Name: STUDIO CARON
Description:
Claire FUSARO was born on March 25, 1973 in Dijon.

Painter, she works under the pseudonym of CARON for STUDIO CARON.

From a very young age, she has developed her creativity through different disciplines.

Drawing, games and then reading and writing have allowed her to express her sensitivity and emotions. 
The illustrations of her childhood books, the charm of the cartoon characters and the unequalled colorimetry of DISNEY have greatly contributed to the development of her imagination.

Today, her activity is double.
She has a profession with a technical focus while devoting her free time to art.

Particularly influenced by a contemporary figurative style, she likes to represent characters, silhouettes or scenes by using vibrant and bright colors.
In the medium term, she would like to devote herself exclusively to her artistic work with the opening of her own studio.

Name: CCN / Centre culturel de Namur
Description: Le CCN / Centre culturel de Namur : carrefour d'inventions artistiques, culturelles et sociales ! Expos, stages, ateliers, workshops, résidences d'artistes, concerts, spectacles jeune public, conférences...

Name: Galatea
Description: Tendo a arte brasileira moderna e contemporânea como foco principal, a Galatea é uma galeria de arte que trabalha e comercializa tanto nomes já consagrados do cenário artístico nacional quanto novos talentos da arte contemporânea, além de promover o resgate de artistas históricos. Tal amplitude temporal reflete e articula os pilares conceituais do programa da galeria: ser um ponto de fomento e convergência entre culturas, temporalidades, estilos e gêneros distintos, gerando uma rica fricção entre o antigo e o novo, o canônico e o não-canônico, o erudito e o informal.

Name: Sculpture Placement Group
Description: We’re an active research organisation rooted in the visual arts. Our projects provide tools and create knowledge to help artists and creative practitioners tackle the climate emergency. This is achieved by challenging the commissioning process through innovative design, creating circular economy tools and testing new economic models.

Name: JH Academy - École de dessin
Description:
JH Academy est une école privée fièrement ancrée dans le paysage culturel béninois. Elle forme les talents  de demain en Bande dessinée & illustration, Peinture & Sculpture, Animations 2D & 3D, Webtoon, Dessin de mode tout en promouvant l’ouverture sur le monde grâce à des partenariats uniques avec des écoles européennes.

Pourquoi suivre une formation en dessin et illustration numérique ?
Pour permettre aux apprenants de repousser leurs limites créatives et de devenir une perle rare demandée dans le milieu professionnel et entrepreneurial.

Chez JH Academy, on prépare les talents au monde professionnel avec de nombreux projets encadrés par les meilleurs dessinateurs et illustrateurs du moment. Ces projets qu’on crée leur permettent de découvrir les réalités du monde du travail et de les préparer à leur insertion professionnelle dans les structures comme les studios de film ou d’animation, les agences de communication et de publicité, les maisons d’édition de livre et de BD, les groupes de presse et journaux, les usines de fabrication, les cabinets d’architecture...etc

A qui s’adressent les formations payantes en Dessin et Illustration Numérique ?
• Collègiens, bacheliers et particuliers 
• L’admission se fait sur dossier, entretien de motivation et présentation d’un dossier de travaux personnels (dessins, photos, vidéos ou portfolio)
• L’admission parallèle est possible sous certaines conditions (nous consulter). 

EYA EXCELLENCE DESSIN
Grâce au partenariat avec le centre communautaire EYA qui a pour vocation la promotion des talents juvéniles au Bénin, l’école de dessin JH Academy offre dans un cadre d’apprentissage sain et paisible, des formations gratuites en dessin aux enfants du primaire attirés par le dessin et les arts.

Durée des formations : Dessin de mode (1 an), Peinture& Sculpture (2 ans), Bande dessinée & illustrations (3 ans), Films d’Animations (3 ans).

Name: het resort
Description: Als kunstinitiatief onderzoekt het resort haar eigen gedraging en zoekt naar nieuwe wegen, bevraagt de oude en doet suggesties. Ze test hoe de kunsten zich staande houden in omgevingen waar deze (nog) geen vaste positie heeft en kiest zowel de monumentale architectuur als de rafelranden waarin de (voormalige) functie van de omgeving een belangrijke rol speelt. Het resort zoekt naar de wildcards: ongebruikelijke combinaties van kunstenaars en omgevingen waarbij de uitkomsten onzeker zijn. Met haar episodes wil het resort een ontsnapping bieden uit het dagelijkse bestaan en vertelt ze het verhaal van kunst, misvatting, voorspoed, ambiance en samenzijn. Het resort wil uitdragen dat kunst een onbevangen en verrijkende aanwezigheid kan zijn. Een stukje ruimte dat geen bezit hoeft te verworden, waar niets geconsumeerd hoeft te worden en waar geen verdienmodel achter hoeft te zitten. Open ruimte voor overdenkingen, uitingen en suggesties, reactief en ongefilterd. Het resort wil met haar episodes kunst aantrekkingskracht geven en een verhaal laten vertellen. Zij hoeft hierbij niet opgezocht te worden in instellingen of op privaat terrein maar komt naar jou toe om je te ontmoeten op het snijvlak van de publieke ruimte. Zij houdt hierbij geen curatoriële of ideologische agenda. Er wordt niet thematisch geprogrammeerd. Voor kunstenaars kan dat bevrijdend werken.

Name: Galerie Papillon
Description:
For more than 30 years, Galerie Papillon, located in Paris, has been known for its cutting-edge programming that brings together French and foreign artists - emerging, established or mid-career - who share a common sense of poetry and irony. The gallery offers them a vast playground in its main courtyard space of 250 m2, while its second space, on the second floor, is dedicated to collective hangings or specific invitations.
Marion and Claudine Papillon that's two generations who collaborate together while complementing each other and sharing the same values and the same unalterable vision that gives the gallery its identity.

Name: UNB School of Leadership Studies
Description:
Leadership that inspires positive change.

Imagine a degree where people are as important as programs, questions as important as answers; a place where students and faculty collaboratively reflect on and personally engage in issues in their community and around the world. 

Welcome to the School of Leadership Studies.

Name: Biennale d'art contemporain de Strasbourg
Description:
Du 15 décembre 2018 au 3 mars 2019, Strasbourg, en accueillant sa première Biennale, se positionnera comme une place internationale pour l’art contemporain et renforcera ainsi son rayonnement culturel et artistique.

L’objet de la Biennale de Strasbourg portée par la Galerie associative Impact, se concentrera sur la question centrale et contemporaine de l’Homme à l’ère du numérique.

La Biennale d’art contemporain de Strasbourg prend ses quartiers au cœur de la « Neustadt », dans un bâtiment exceptionnel, jamais ouvert au public : l’Hôtel des Postes.
Achevé en 1899, ce bâtiment protégé par l'UNESCO sera uniquement ouvert au public pendant 2 mois et demi ! Une opportunité exceptionnelle de visibilité pour les partenaires de la Biennale.

Devenir partenaire de la Biennale c'est : 
- exprimer et transmettre vos valeurs humaines et sociétales
- présenter votre expertise et vos réflexions lors de conférences
- donner à votre marque / Société une nouvelle visibilité
- soutenir la culture et la création contemporaine de manière pérenne et innovante
- soigner / animer votre réseau existant et trouver de nouveaux partenaires
- développer un volet culturel

Pour connaître les possibilités de partenariats et de mécénat, contactez-nous : contact@galerieimpact.org ou sur http://biennale-strasbourg.eu/

Name: Fine Art Photography
Description: Tim Fleming is an accomplished photographer, teacher, and web designer. His unique style imparts a sense of wonder and fascination with detail, pattern, and overall effect. His landscapes vibrate with color and light. To approach one of his prints is to become immersed in every elaborate facet and nuance of his subject. He is currently represented by The Konrad Gallery in Geyserville, California.

Name: Missouri Arts Council
Description: Missouri Arts Council is a state agency that supports the arts that strengthen the cultural, educational, and economic vitality of the state. We are located in St. Louis, MO.

Name: Gallery 9
Description:
Established in 2006, Gallery 9 is a contemporary art gallery based in Sydney's Darlinghurst. Gallery 9 presents a program of established and younger artists working in a range of mediums from painting and drawing to photomedia, installation and video works.

Gallery 9 is dedicated to a program of contemporary art, which is international in its outlook by artists working in Australia and New Zealand. Gallery 9 is committed to supporting the artistic development of our represented artists and nurturing their experimentations and investigations over the long term. 

Gallery 9 presents a dynamic range of exhibitions, showing both our represented artists and an exciting program of new artistic and curatorial voices.

Name: The Chicago Mosaic School
Description:
The Chicago Mosaic School is a 501c(3) non-profit organization dedicated to advancing the art of mosaic. We provide opportunities for comprehensive study with experts from around the world and professionally trained artists who elevate and rethink this ancient art form. 

CMS increases awareness and appreciation for this medium, and offers the community the chance to explore, learn and experience the wonders of mosaic. 

Established in 2005, CMS has grown into a thriving arts education community center. We are uniquely positioned to provide opportunities to individuals and organizations locally and around the world. In addition to the school, we are proud of our gallery, GoCM, The Gallery of Contemporary Mosaics, which highlights artists such as Verdiano Marzi, Pamela Irving, Karen Ami, and Toyoharu Kii as well as invitational and juried exhibitions throughout the year.

Name: Art Center Sarasota
Description:
Mission & Vision Statement 

Art Center Sarasota brings together creatives and the broader public to increase understanding of our human condition, support wellbeing, and build community connection through the universal language of art.

We envision a future where art and culture are increasingly essential to our community. The contributions of visual and performing arts will be valued equally as pillars of a thriving bay front historic district. Through this cultural hub and community outreach, people of all ages and backgrounds will have access to enjoy the many benefits of art.  Artists will have the encouragement and practical support needed to gain visibility and grow professionally. Art will stimulate discussion, enhance critical thinking, and elevate the community’s social consciousness.

Name: Academia Charlot
Description: La Academia Charlot es una institución de formación artística con 28 años de trayectoria en los campos escénicos y audiovisuales. Somos una entidad privada, con aprobación de la Secretaría de Educación. Por Nuestra trayectoria, además cuenta con alta experiencia en proyectos artísticos y culturales que incluyen entidades e instituciones estatales y privadas de carácter social y comercial.

Name: Agence BeYOU
Description:
At Agence Be YOU, we believe in the power of human connection, making it the cornerstone of our agency's ethos. Our journey is not just about art; it's about the remarkable individuals who breathe life into it—the artists and influencers who ignite our creativity and passion every single day. 

Our mantra: Be YOU! Be who you are!

Our mission: to support talented, passionate contemporary artists with a unique artistic signature, to make their art known throughout the world. 

Our job: We are artist managers.

Name: Living Arts
Description: Founded in 1999, Living Arts is a non-profit organization that engages Detroit youth, teachers and families in transformative experiences in the performing, visual, literary and media arts. Implementing arts education programs for over 3,200 early learners, elementary and secondary students annually, we increase youth’s academic achievement, develop their leadership and artistic skills, and strengthen our schools and communities. Living Arts’ Detroit Wolf Trap program is an affiliate of the national Wolf Trap Institute for Early Learning Through the Arts. Our Out-of-School Arts program brings year-round youth arts classes and community programs to the Ford Resource and Engagement Center at the Mexicantown Mercado.

Name: The Art Collective Gallery
Description: The Art Collective Gallery is a contemporary art gallery showcasing local, national, and international artists.

Name: Jen's Pet Portraits
Description:
Jenna Mulroney, Cheshire-based artist and businesswoman has combined her three passions; art, technology, and pets, to create her latest venture, Jen's Pet Portraits.
Jen's Pet Portraits offers a unique product and experience, which does away with the twee, costly, and elongated process of original art commissions.
Jen's bold, modern, and beautiful digital portraits are all unique and hand drawn. The difference? Rather than a paintbrush, she uses a digital stylus, and rather than a canvas, she uses a tablet and cutting-edge, professional software. 
This means that your commissioned portrait is created in much less time than traditional techniques would allow. Their prices are significantly lower, and the outcome is flexible to your unique requirements.
Your digital pet portrait can be created to be printed to A4, A3, A2, A1 or A0 and on high quality, premium artisan paper. 

Jen will work with you to understand your unique requirements and create your portrait with your vision in mind. 
About Jen
Jenna achieved the top grade in the UK for her Art A-Level in 2005. She turned down a place at Oxford University in favour of a place at The University of Arts, London, where she studied Fine Art, graduating with a first-class degree in 2009. 
Drawn to advertising, she put her paint brushes away, and for 10 years, she enjoyed a successful career as an advertising strategist in large ad agencies in London and New York.
In the last 5 years, Jenna has opened and run a high-end gallery in Cheshire, and now runs a Brand Strategy Consultancy with her dog Bailey on her knee.

Name: Fabi Arte
Description:
BENVENUTO NELLA NOSTRA PAGINA 

Soltanto grazie anni di lavoro ed esperienza siamo riusciti a creare il telaio FABI, considerato prodotto di qualità e di garanzia 

Da ciò nasce FABI ARTE, un punto d’incontro tra l’idea e la realizzazione,
tra l’artista e l'artigiano.

Telai a richiesta su misura 
Cornici di ogni sezione e forma
Casse per spedizioni adatte per la maggior parte dei Paesi

Inoltre collaboriamo con artisti partendo dalla consulenza, passando alla realizzazione e concludendo con la spedizione.

Name: Artchart
Description: ARTCHART is a leading platform for art market analysis focused on Iran and the MENA region. We deliver reliable data and insights on market trends, helping collectors, investors, and professionals make informed decisions and navigate the regional art economy.

Name: Allios Deite Eikona
Description:
Allios Deite Eikona offers wall decoration for your office or workspace. A large-format photo that gives a room atmosphere and appearance that suits your company. 
Up to 15 prints are available for each photo. Comes with certificate with print number.

Name: TVASTRA
Description:
Welcome to our Tvastra Art Studio, where we specialize in various art forms  like Mandalas, Resin art, Tanjore paintings, Knife painting, Canvas painting, Relief art , Texture and clay , Indian folk art. We also conduct Calligraphy and Handwriting improvement courses. We are also in to customised gifting and handmade products.

We specialize in enhancing creativity and artistic skills through various workshops and courses in Thane and across globe. We conduct both online / offline art workshops and courses for adults and children, which are aimed at fostering creativity and helping individuals explore their creative potential. We provide the tools and guidance you need to build your skills and create beautiful works of art.

Do visit us at our Studio to discover the joy of art and develop your creativity and  potential artistic skills !!

Name: Fondazione Massimo e Sonia Cirulli
Description:
La Fondazione Massimo e Sonia Cirulli è un’istituzione culturale attiva in ambito nazionale e internazionale che ha come obiettivo la valorizzazione dell’arte e della cultura visiva italiana del XX secolo e che oggi conta un’ampia e importante collezione. 
Proseguendo l’attività del Massimo and Sonia Cirulli Archive, importante archivio dedicato alla cultura italiana del XX secolo avviato a New York nel 1984, la Fondazione Cirulli organizza mostre dal taglio interdisciplinare presso la propria sede attingendo principalmente alla propria collezione, oltre a continuare ad offrire il proprio contributo alla realizzazione di progetti espositivi fuori sede attraverso collaborazioni con istituzioni museali e il prestito di opere.

Name: artnivo.com
Description:
a contemporary art digital platform to make it easy to discover and buy artworks from selected turkish contemporary artists. 

company aims to break the intimidation towards art by feeding information, interviews with artists, letting them aware of major events in Istanbul, supporting by art advisors in their way to be a collector.

aside online exhibitions, pop-up exhibitions in physical spaces have been organized along the year.

Name: Galerie C.O.A
Description: C.O.A Contemporary Art Gallery opened its doors in Montreal in May 2014. Although the gallery occasionally exhibits the work of a few sacred monsters, it is primarily dedicated to discovering new talents. The venue is home to a roster of both Canadian and international artists who play with established conventions and the perception they can bring to them. Their common tie: an unusual creation. Hence the name of the Gallery, “Créateurs d’Oeuvres Atypiques” (Creators of Atypical Works).

Name: Galleria Magenta
Description:
Con i suoi 40 anni di esperienza, Galleria Magenta offre al pubblico servizi diversificati nell'ambito dell'arte e della creatività.
Galleria Magenta è una galleria non convenzionale. È una realtà che fa dell’arte servizi di valore. Con la sua indole versatile, capace di dialogare con interlocutori diversi, dal Privato all'Azienda, offre una progettualità creativa alle loro aspirazioni.
Accanto alla proposta di artisti nazionali e internazionali del Novecento, GM ha sviluppato negli anni studio creativo specializzato in servizi integrati di Comunicazione di Marketing. L’ampio ventaglio di proposte dedicate al mondo Azienda si connotano per la forte personalità artistica e comprendono linee promozionali di edizione esclusiva, campagne pubblicitarie, studi di immagine, eventi d’autore, quali team working, exhibition, cultural show, entertainment.

ActionArt è brand di Galleria Magenta dal 1998, uno studio-agenzia che traduce l’Arte in comunicazione e in esperienza partecipata, allo scopo di fondere insieme i linguaggi artistici con le strategie del Marketing aziendale. Fondato per dare un’impronta originale fortemente creativa alla Brand Identity e agli Eventi M.I.C.E. (Meetings, Incentives, Conventions, Exhibitions), racchiude un’offerta completa in risposta a tutte le necessità promozionali e incentivanti. La comunicazione d'autore è un potente mezzo visivo di attrazione e di propaganda, che si concretizza in progetti e campagne di art advertising e in promotional gift di spiccata personalità, capaci di trasferire in modo più incisivo contenuti di valore e brand awareness.

Name: Artlyst
Description: ArtLyst is London's leading art information website. It was created to disseminate art news and reviews as well as up to date art events, exhibitions, fairs and auction listings. We focus on new and emerging art, including pop-up and temporary exhibitions. Our web2.0 Social Networking platform allows our members to post a professional profile and exhibit work in their own unique gallery. All galleries are curated, vetted and FREE. The ArtLyst publishing platform facilitates News, Reviews, Resources, Classifieds, and Articles. Publish yourself and contribute. Reach a wide audience. The ArtLyst iPhone App featured 'New and Noteworthy' on iTunes, has had over 40,000 downloads. It contains News, Reviews and a comprehensive Art Exhibitions Guide for people on the move - Download It Now - Free.

Name: Transcultures Media Arts Center
Description: Transcultures, Interdisciplinary Center for Sound and Electronic Cultures (Artistic Director: Philippe Franck) is an association born in 1996 in order to promote and develop crossings between contemporary artistic practices and arts/society/technology stakes; focusing in particular on sound art and digital creation. Since 2008, Transcultures is settled @ Bois-du-Luc (Belgium) and is working on production, mediation and reflection regarding electronic and sound projects.

Name: Cultuurbedrijf Noordoostpolder
Description:
Stichting Cultuurbedrijf Noordoostpolder heeft de culturele ANBI-status (Algemeen Nut Beogende Instelling).

Missie Cultuurbedrijf
Cultuurbedrijf Noordoostpolder is hét centrum voor kunst & cultuur binnen de gemeente en maakt op inspirerende en ondernemende wijze kunst & cultuur toegankelijk voor iedereen. Vanuit de overtuiging dat kunst & cultuur het leven verrijkt en bijdraagt aan een vitale en waardevolle samenleving

Visie Cultuurbedrijf
Het Cultuurbedrijf is de inspirator voor kunst, cultuur en erfgoed in de gemeente Noordoostpolder. Het biedt professionele podia, een erfgoedgoedcentrum, actieve en receptieve kunsteducatie, exposities en een kunstuitleen. Voorts faciliteert en inspireert het Cultuurbedrijf de amateurkunstverenigingen en is dé lokale leverancier van cultuureducatie voor het basis- en voortgezet onderwijs.

1. Cultuurbedrijf Noordoostpolder is het centrum voor de kunsten van de Noordoostpolder. Circa 1200 leerlingen volgen wekelijks lessen muziek, dans, drama en beeldend. Daarnaast verzorgt Cultuurbedrijf NOP een breed kunstaanbod voor het primair en voortgezet onderwijs in de regio.
 

2. Theater ’t Voorhuys (voorheen zelfstandige stichting) programmeert jaarlijks zo’n 80 professionele voorstellingen; een 20-tal amateurproducties en ongeveer 30 commerciële evenementen. Is een middengroot theater met een capaciteit van 520 zitplaatsen.  

3. Museum Schokland
In 1995 is het voormalig eiland Schokland met omgeving geplaatst op de prestigieuze werelderfgoedlijst van UNESCO. De vaste tentoonstelling geeft een beeld van de bewogen historie van het eiland Schokland én wat vooraf ging. Met regelmaat organiseert het museum exposities. Daarnaast organiseert het museum publieksevenementen zoals de Scandinaviëmarkt, Werelderfgoedweekend en klassieke concerten.
 

4. Kunstuitleen Emmeloord (voorheen onderdeel van de afdeling Culturele Zaken, gemeente Noordoostpolder) is gevestigd in het Cultuurbedrijf NOP en heeft een brede collectie kunst.

Name: Octopus
Description:
Octopus est une coopérative de travailleurs.ses dans le secteur des arts et de la culture. Elle vise à mettre en relation des structures culturelles et des travailleurs.ses qualifié.e.s pouvant répondre à leurs besoins ponctuels selon le modèle de l'économie circulaire, sociale et solidaire.
Son but est de permettre et de garantir des conditions d’emploi sécurisées et valorisantes autant pour les travailleur·euse·s spécialisé.e.s du monde de l’art que pour les structures culturelles. Sa mission est de développer une branche d’emploi d’excellence autour de métiers faisant appel à des savoir-faire uniques, propres à l’art et à la culture, tout en étant attentif aux conditions de production et au développement durable.
Octopus occupe un lieu hybride situé rue des Gravilliers dans le Marais, à la fois bureau, “point de rencontre” pour les travailleur·euse·s des arts et de la culture, et espace d’expérimentation artistique.
Faisant de ses espaces de travail, un lieu modulable où accueillir des expérimentations artistiques (performances, expositions,...), Octopus développe un véritable programme culturel, appelé “La Ventouse”, afin de sensibiliser autant les coopérateur·trice·s que le tout public aux figures, idées et débats qui irriguent l’art et plus largement la société.

Name: Millenn'Art
Description: Notre équipe s’engage à promouvoir les jeunes artistes auprès d’un jeune public pour lequel nous souhaitons développer une sensibilité artistique et une confiance dans le marché de l’art.

Name: MEL Publisher
Description: A l'initiative de Michel-Edouard Leclerc : un label culturel (éditions, photos, estampes...), un manifeste pour libérer, partager, réenchanter !

Name: RamyaSadasivams Art Gallery
Description: www.ramyasadasivam.Com She has been practising art for 12 years now, you can find her portrait drawing / painting courses and also her realistic paintings on her site.

Name: TODD STUART Pty Ltd
Description:
Large scale, contextual public sculptures for architects and developers, from vision through production to installation, minus risk

As a developer, architect or designer, imagine having a partner who could transform your vision of public sculpture into an international landmark.
The principles that guide our work — creativity, mastery, and engagement — inform our unique 10 step process for project management. We bridge the gap between idea and reality: inspiration translated into world-class, cost-effective public art.
Great sculpture is an inspired purchase, not a sale. We infuse your project with your contextual knowledge to give it community value far beyond its cost.
We understand both creative and production cycles. Focusing our 25 years’ project management experience means removing risks involving money, time, quality, and expectations.

What we do:
• Site and project assessment
• Commissioning and contracting appropriate artists
• Technical and engineering design
• Manufacture, production, and quality control
• Transportation, insurance, and customs clearance
• Installation
• Maintenance

If you would like to explore engaging our team for a project you can contact us here - toddstuart.com.au
