Name: Inéditad Gallery
Description: Vive y disfruta una experiencia a través del arte. Esto es lo que te propone Inéditad a través de un proyecto que promociona la obra de artistas emergentes construyendo puentes entre los amantes de lo diferente y los creadores de lo diverso. Rompe con el mito de que el arte es elitista, caro e inaccesible, tanto si eres coleccionista como si eres de los que les gustaría dejarse llevar por una proposición rompedora, alternativa e incluso indecente, Inéditad te acompañará en tus primeros pasos para satisfacer tus deseos. Sugerencias artísticas singulares para personas especiales.

Name: Galerie & Edition Stephan Witschi
Description:
Wir haben uns der zeitgenössischen Kunst verschrieben. Die Fotografie bildet darin einen Schwerpunkt unseres Programms, regelmässige Teilnahme an Fotomessen wie Paris Photo oder an einigen Ausgaben von Photo Shanghai, Unseen Amsterdam etc. sind Teil davon. Starke Positionen in Skulptur und Malerei sind uns ebenfalls wichtige Anliegen. Klare Haltungen, unverwechselbare Handschriften, feinsinnig-kritische Aussagen und hohe Qualität bilden den gemeinsamen Nenner der von uns vertretenen Künstler:innen. Viele von ihnen überschreiten forschend und experimentierend die Grenzen zwischen den Künsten.
Klare Haltungen, starke Aussagen und hohe Qualität bilden den gemeinsamen Nenner der von uns vertretenen Künstler/Innen, denen oftmals feinsinnig ein kritischer Geist innewohnt.


Kunstmessen (Auswahl): 
Photofairs Shanghai, Paris Photo, Unseen, Photofairs San Francisco und Drawing Now Art Fair Paris.

Name: Inversion Art
Description:
Inversion Art combines an investment accelerator program with an artist services agency to give artists the knowledge, connections, and operational support they need to focus on creating their greatest work.

We believe that artists who have control over their own careers are set free to define their own success.

By providing artists with access to world-class mentors, a talented peer group, a high quality network, financial investment, and business support, we give them the means and mindset to achieve their most ambitious goals.

Name: artsnb
Description: artsnb manages public funds and engages with a network of partners in support of a diverse, thriving, and sustainable arts ecosystem across New Brunswick. We encourage and celebrate the work of New Brunswick artists working in a broad range of disciplines, and empower them to share their work throughout the province and beyond. | artsnb gère des fonds publics et s’associe à un réseau de partenaires afin de soutenir un écosystème artistique diversifié et durable qui s’épanouit partout au Nouveau-Brunswick. Nous encourageons et célébrons le travail des artistes du Nouveau-Brunswick dans une grande variété de disciplines, et les encourageons à partager leur travail dans la province et partout ailleurs.

Name: Galerie Peter Kilchmann
Description: Galerie Peter Kilchmann is a gallery for contemporary art with two locations in Zurich and one in Paris. Founded in 1992 in Zurich, it has been one of thedriving galleries that advanced the contemporary art scene in Switzerland. The gallery represents a total of 35 international artists and organizes up to 15 exhibitions in its own gallery spaces per year. A conceptual approach to the creative process and to socio-political circumstances is what distinguishes the gallery's program with artists covering all fields of creative expression including painting, video, film, photography, installation and sculpture. The gallery participates yearly in up to six important art fairs worldwide, such as Art Basel in Basel and Miami; Paris+ par Art Basel, Paris; ARCO Madrid; artgeneve and Miart, Milan.

Name: Electric Coffin
Description: Artists

Name: ASOCIACION MEXICANA DE ILUSTRADORES
Description: AMDI es un grupo de ilustradoras e ilustradores mexicanos,  unidos para mejorar el panorama actual de nuestro quehacer profesional, conscientes de ser los únicos que podemos activar el cambio a condiciones de desempeño más justo y equitativo. No veremos quizá todo bajo la misma perspectiva, pero estamos seguros que en algo coincidiremos. La Asociación Mexicana de Ilustradores, no es de un sólo medio o género de ilustración específica, es de y para sus asociados, vengan de cualquier categoría de ilustración o compartan con otras disciplinas lucrativas o no lucrativas su quehacer creativo; nuestro protagonista:  la Ilustración en cualquiera de sus géneros y formas. Aquí todos trabajamos de igual a igual, unilateralmente,  pero procuramos estructura organizativa como aval para no desviarnos del camino y alcanzar nuestras metas. El proyecto es tan grande como nuestros sueños, es joven e inquieto, pero con firmes convicciones, los retos crecerán día a día, pero nos estamos preparando para hacerles frente; ganas e ideas sobran, los resultados vendrán con el tiempo, esfuerzo y perseverancia, en la medida en que participemos todos sus miembros.  Nuestro lema: Ser mejores profesionales para ser un gremio más fuerte, reforzar la acción colectiva para reforzar el crecimiento profesional individual.

Name: REDSEA Gallery Singapore
Description:
REDSEA Gallery is a leading contemporary art gallery representing an international collection of emerging and established artists.  
 
We offer a cross-cultural, multi-media platform and exhibition programme allowing regional Asian artists to gain international exposure and offering international artists’ opportunities within the burgeoning Asian market.
 
We promote and support a diverse range of artists working across many mediums including painting, sculpture, print, photography and video installations.  We nurture a strong and individual relationship with each of our artists enabling us to interpret and showcase their creativity and passion within our space. Developing this mutual respect and understanding further builds our reputation within the artistic community and keeps us ahead of new discoveries.
 
Founded in Singapore in 2001, REDSEA Gallery opened a second space in Brisbane, Australia in 2008.

Name: MUSEA
Description:
MUSEA: a radically new approach to collecting Art.  

For a nominal monthly fee, members can subscribe to pieces of original art to display in their own homes.  At any point, they can change the artwork for a difference piece from our online gallery, or they can purchase the piece to own, with all subscription fees to date discounted from the purchase price.  

Our company makes the process of acquiring art easy and accessible. No galleries, no large investments, no risk. Through MUSEA's website, young professionals can decorate their homes with interesting art while making investments and decisions at their own pace. We connect Artists and the future generation of art collectors at a much earlier stage in both their careers.

Name: LES INSIDERS
Description:
La France vient d'élire la première femme Présidente de la République, issue d'un parti écologiste.
Pour se venger de son ancien patron qui l’a licencié, un ambitieux lobbyiste, surdoué de la communication, devient le directeur de cabinet du ministre en charge d’un grand projet de lois, qui devient leur terrain de bataille.
Son système de pensée et d'actions va atteindre ses limites. A l'image de ce monde qui disparaît, il va devoir s'adapter pour survivre, et affronter ses démons intérieurs.
Les sentiments humains se mêlent aux intérêts de la nation, dans une lutte sans merci entre le gouvernement et les opposants aux lois.

Name: Lino Tagliapietra Inc.
Description: Lino Tagliapietra is a world-renowned Italian glassblower with over 70 years of experience. After a long history of glassblowing in Seattle, Lino opened his downtown studio to the public in 2017.

Name: Cairo Film Factory CFF
Description:
A meeting point for aspiring and established filmmakers to collaborate, share experiences, explore challenges and alternatives.
Founder and director Nahed Nasr 
كايرو فيلم فاكتوري، نقطة التقاء لصانعات وصناع الأفلام الجدد والمحترفين للتواصل والتعاون، وتبادل الخبرات والمهارات، والدعم، واستكشاف التحديات والبدائل في صناعة الأفلام.

Name: Voir et dessiner
Description: Ecole de dessin pour tous à Marseille et en ligne

Name: Diderot.Art
Description:
Diderot.Art es una nueva experiencia digital de compra de arte argentino y mexicano. Tiene en su staff más de 120 artistas y más de 1200 obras. Además una tienda de objetos de arte ideal es para regalos corporativos. 

Buenos Aires, 26 de abril de 2017 – Nace Diderot.Art (www.diderot.art), el primer e-commerce de arte contemporáneo argentino previamente seleccionado por una curadora. El público podrá acceder a la obra de argentinos emergentes, de carrera media y consagrados, desde la comodidad de una computadora, en cualquier momento y lugar, las 24 horas, los siete días de la semana. Además, el sitio ofrece opciones de financiación, diferentes medios de pago online, envíos a todo el país y asesoramiento gratuito, entre otros beneficios.
Location: Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Hollis Taggart
Description: Founded in 1979 with a gallery mission of presenting museum-quality works of art, maintaining an inventory and exhibition program motivated by scholarship, and offering personalized support in all aspects of art collecting. Over the past 39 years, the gallery has offered significant works in the American vernacular, from the Hudson River School to Impressionist, Modernist, Abstract Expressionist, Pop, Post-War, and Contemporary Art.

Name: Project Native Informant Limited
Description: PROJECT NATIVE INFORMANT LIMITED is a fine art company based out of Unit 1, 48 Three Colts Lane, London E2 6GQ, United Kingdom

Name: De Vrijstaat
Description:
De Vrijstaat is een van de zeven wijkcultuurhuizen in Utrecht en profileert zich als kunst- en cultuurhuis voor jong Utrecht. We zijn gevestigd in een monumentale boerderij in het nieuwe stadshart van Utrecht, Leidsche Rijn. Zoveel mogelijk kinderen en jongeren in aanraking brengen met de kracht van kunst en cultuur is onze missie. Kunst maken, ervaren en beleven is ons motto. De Vrijstaat is een huis waar jonge mensen zich thuis kunnen voelen, waar we openstaan voor elkaars verhalen en waar creativiteit de verbindende factor is. 

Cultuur kan een belangrijke rol spelen in het creëren van een verdraagzame samenleving die kan inspelen en reflecteren op de thema’s van onze tijd. Kunst leert kinderen en jongeren om buiten gebaande paden te treden en vergroot hun referentiekader. Door kennis te maken met nieuwe invalshoeken en door het ontwikkelen van hun talenten leren ze vorm te geven aan hun eigen wereld en die van anderen. We voelen de urgentie om daaraan bij te dragen en geven ruimte aan de meerstemmigheid die onze huidige wereld zo veelkleurig en dynamisch maakt.

 De Vrijstaat werkt vanuit diverse kunstdisciplines aan het ontwikkelen van ‘creatief vermogen’. Onze ambitie is om met onze projecten een bijdrage te leveren aan een creatief vermogende stad. De Vrijstaat is een plek waar kinderen en jongeren hun eerste kennismaking met kunst en cultuur dicht bij huis kunnen beleven, waarna ze hun talenten via verschillende trajecten verder kunnen verdiepen en ontwikkelen. Samen met kunstenaars, bewoners, scholen, organisaties en initiatieven geven we creatieve impulsen aan de ontwikkeling van de bezoekers en onze omgeving.

Name: Okker Art Gallery
Description:
In September 2014 Stephan Okker (1981) opened Okker Art Gallery. The light gallery, located in the hart of the Amsterdam Art Area near the Museum District, is specialized in photography, modern and contemporary art. Art lovers from all over the world, with different art backgrounds, can enjoy the great variation of artworks by artists such as Andy Warhol, Poren Huang, Ripollés, Bram Reijnders, Kees Salentijn, Joël Moens de Hase and Cole Morgan. Also work of the CoBrA group can be found at Okker Art Gallery. The gallery organizes exhibitions several times a year. The current program can be found on the gallery’s website.

https://www.instagram.com/okker_art_gallery/

Name: Selasar Sunaryo Art Space
Description:
elasar Sunaryo Art Space (SSAS) began as Selasar Seni Sunaryo, the realization of Sunaryo’s longstanding dream to contribute to, and support, the development of Fine Arts in Indonesia. Today, as an institution, SSAS has become a key player in the arts and cultural landscape of Indonesia.

Building of the not-for-profit Art Space commenced in 1994 and covers an area of approximately 5,000 square metres.The basic form of the buildings was inspired by the shape of “kuda lumping“, a traditional Indonesian cultural artifact. The word “Selasar” reflects the design concept: for an open space that connects one space with another, and acts as a bridge between buildings. The ultimate concept of “Selasar”, also reflects the aim of the space to connect artworks with audiences and to bring different cultures together.

Selasar is also an ‘open’ space in the sense that admission is free and the gallery welcomes the broadest possible cross-section of the community. SSAS prides itself on offering opportunities for all to enjoy the arts, and focuses on arts education. SSAS is also responsive to projects and initiatives proposed by others when suitable.

Selasar Seni Sunaryo officially opened in September, 1998 with a solo exhibition of Sunaryo’s works entitled Titik Nadir [the lowest point]. The exhibition reflected the artists concern with the Indonesian socio-political situation at the time. It was a time of chaos and hopelessness for many Indonesians: the Soeharto regime collapsed along with the economy and many people were suffering from starvation.

From its inauguration in 1998 to 2002 Selasar Sunaryo Art Space completed a number of renovations as well as developing and adding some additional facilities to support Fine Art Exhibitions. A number of large scale exhibitions and arts performances have been executed.

Name: Woordkunst platform Ik Spreek
Description: Ik Spreek wil een podium bieden aan woordkunstenaars in Den Haag en omgeving. Er zijn veel sprekers die niet de kans krijgen om hun verhaal te delen. Er zijn sprekers die zich niet gehoord voelen. Ik Spreek wil juist aan hen een podium bieden. Ik Spreek richt zich voornamelijk tot poëzie, spoken word, rap en zang.

Name: Inversie
Description:
Omkering van de gewone orde. 

Inversie is een Brabantse talenthub voor jonge, opkomende kunstenaars. Niet iedere praktijk verloopt volgens dezelfde richtlijnen en niet elke kunstvorm is verkoopbaar. Met behulp van mentoren, een groot netwerk en persoonlijke begeleiding zorgt Inversie voor een betere profilering van zes talenten die ondersteuning krijgen bij het opzetten van een zelfstandige beroepspraktijk.

Name: Interval
Description:
A champion and pioneer of art in digital media, Daata was founded in 2015 and is one of the longest-standing commissioning bodies in this field.

Daata exists to support artists in realising artworks that bridge digital and physical media. Beyond physical installations, Daata commissions extend online in the ‘Daataverse’. To date, Daata has commissioned over 400 artworks by over 100 artists and our library continues to grow. Daata commissions are free to view online and in our iOS app.

Daata has collaborated internationally with galleries, museums, collections, art fairs, festivals and other organisations including: NASA, Hammer Museum, Kiasma, Julia Stoschek Collection, The Bass, MOCAD, Art Basel, Frieze, EXPO CHICAGO, Phillips, Independent Art Fair, NADA, Art Fair Philippines, PHOTOFAIRS Shanghai, Hauser & Wirth, kurimanzutto, Marian Goodman, Simon Lee, Stephen Friedman, VSF and Thaddaeus Ropac.

Name: Art Rental
Description: W Art Rental wynajmujemy i sprzedajemy oryginalne dzieła sztuki. Budujemy prestiżowy wizerunek naszych klientów. Sprawiamy, że za sprawą sztuki wnętrza dają przyjemność pracy i przebywania w nich. Polegamy na doświadczeniu naszych kuratorów, którzy fachowo doradzają i pomagają łączyć klienta z dziełem artystycznym. Dzięki nim zaaranżujemy ekspozycję odpowiadającą Twoim indywidualnym potrzebom, począwszy od wyboru pracy, aż po jej instalację w Twoim wnętrzu. Wypożyczaj oryginalne dzieła sztuki od współczesnych artystów . Usługa wynajmu krótkoterminowego dzieł sztuki do biur za niską miesięczną opłatą. Bezpłatna konsultacja. Wypożycz, zamień, kup lub zwróć, gdy zmieni się gust.

Name: Annet Gelink Gallery
Description: Founded in 2000, Annet Gelink Gallery is now one of the leading Dutch contemporary art-galleries. Internationally, the gallery has earned acclaim as an early promoter of a generation of young artists.

Name: The Johnson Collection
Description:
Hailed by The Magazine Antiques with having staged a “quiet art historical revolution” and expanding “the meaning of regional” through its “exhibitions, loans, publications, and institutional partnerships,” the Johnson Collection seeks to illuminate the rich history and diverse cultures of the American South. With holdings that offer an extensive survey of artistic activity from the late eighteenth century to the present day, the collection works to advance interest in the dynamic role that the art of the South plays in the larger context of American art and to contribute to the canon of art historical literature. Founded in 2002 as a private collection for public good, the Johnson Collection is located in Spartanburg, South Carolina.

The Johnson Collection is part of The Johnson Group, a diverse family of companies that offer unmatched service and expertise in their respective industries. These individual enterprises share a set of guiding principles—integrity, partnership, humility, principled entrepreneurship, initiative, and fulfillment—that shape our practices and performance.

Name: Artpil
Description: Profiles of the Arts: With a focus in the modern + contemporary arts, ARTPIL showcases articles, event news, interviews, featuring profiles of artists of all disciplines, museums & galleries, agencies & organizations, both curated and from the public domain.

Name: the ART CLUB (Switzerland)
Description:
We give you the key to the art world.

Have you ever wanted to be part of the glamorous, intensive, inspiring art world? Travel to Venice Biennale in May, see the latest trends in art at Art Basel in June, breathe in the electrifying mood  of the London auctions in October and dine with artists and collectors at the beaches of Miami during Art Basel Miami Beach in December?  

Imagine a platform where members gain easy entrance, guidance and access to key events and key players in the artworld.

the ART CLUB takes you to all the exciting places where art is happening: Venice Biennale, Documenta, Art Weekend Amsterdam, Art Basel Miami Beach, Frieze Art Fair in London, Fall Auctions in New York, and many more.

You will be participate in dinner partys with prominent artists and curators and become part of special dinner performances hosted by artists: the ART CLUB gives you access to an extensive program of events in art capitals around the world. 

We show you behind the scenes of major galleries, visit the studio of renowned artists, talk to the director of leading museum and visit the home of private collectors.  We ask all the questions you always wanted to ask.

How do we value art? the ART CLUB tells you how to look at art and provides you with the necessary valuation  tools.  Experts of the leading auction houses and leading art dealers give you their latest insights into the art market.

Join the ART CLUB today!

Name: CalColor Academy
Description:
CalColor Academy is the largest Art School in the San Francisco Bay Area (Silicon Valley), with 6 locations at Fremont, Mountain View, Cupertino, Belmont, Newark, and San Jose, with over 4800 students from 4 to 18 years old.

Our programs are recognized for their unique approach to maintaining a fun learning process, encouraging kids' creativity while teaching them solid technical skills.

Our team is a group of young artists with a passion for teaching children art. All art teachers will have the opportunity to become full-time employees, branch managers, and school business partners.

At CalColor, we know that if we hire the right people, success tends to follow. If we’re surrounded by great people, it brings us all up a notch. We’ve put a lot of effort into creating a vibrant culture that attracts the right people: those with a passion for collaborating, learning, and making a great impact on our community. We do care about each employee's personal growth and we fully support our employees to achieve their goals.

Name: Daniela Martins - Fine Art
Description:

Feel free to say hi!

Name: Lion India
Description:
Pioneers in the art of framing, Lion India (Lion Picture and Framing India Limited) is a name synonymous with excellence, innovation, and heritage. From museums to masterpieces, our commitment to craftsmanship and cutting-edge technology ensures every frame tells a timeless story. Lion India brings precision, elegance, and unmatched support to every creative pursuit.
With a proud legacy and global affiliations, we bring world-class machines, framing materials, and artistic solutions to India. We have a strong network of corporate offices and manufacturing units in Kolkata, New Delhi, Mumbai and Bangalore. 

Our expertise spans across: 
 Museum, Conservation & Archival framing solutions
 High-precision mitre cutting & joining machines and allied picture framing machines
 Custom art framing & décor along with design consultancy
 Skill development with Guild Certified Framers (UK)
 World Class Solutions and Technology for Museums - Showcases, Vitrines, Storage Solutions and Archival Boxes, Lab Equipment, Hanging Systems

 Our Prestigious Projects Include:
 Rashtrapati Bhavan – New Delhi
 Indian Museum – Kolkata
 National Gallery of Modern Art – Delhi
 Victoria Memorial - Kolkata

Description: Meraki - The Fine Arts society of Maharaja Surajmal Institute is built on the pillars of soul , creativity and love. Every member of the society has its own creative identity in itself . The society is full of art enthusiasts and the ability to think creatively.

Name: Bark Frameworks
Description:
Established in 1969, Bark Frameworks pursues innovative design while following the highest standards of preservation framing practices. We specialize in framing Impressionist, modern, and contemporary art; and in designing custom mirror frames. Every Bark frame is designed and built at the company’s 27,000 square foot Long Island City facility, which houses a showroom, design and preservation studios, a wood shop, metal shop, and gilding studio. 

Bark Frameworks began in Jared Bark’s SoHo loft. We started out by framing works by our contemporaries, with the simple goal of serving the art being presented. Over time, our range grew to embrace the framing of Western works from Impressionism forward. Framing for photographs, textiles, and Asian works like scrolls have become specialties. We also design and build mirror frames, which add visual interest to any design scheme. 

As of January 2017, Bark Frameworks is proud to be 100% employee owned. This transition of ownership is favorable for both Bark's dedicated workforce and its clients, as it ensures the future availability of the high level of craftsmanship and care of artworks established by the company's founder. Each Bark staff member is dedicated to the company mission: to create frames of innovative design using materials of the highest archival quality, ensuring that your artwork is kept safe for years to come.

For more information, or to make an appointment with a Bark designer, call 718-752-1919, write to info@barkframeworks.com, or visit www.barkframeworks.com.

Name: Art Encounter
Description: At Art Encounter, we believe that there are many ways to see, and that art can be a powerful vehicle to better understand ourselves and the world around us. We are a 42 year-old non-profit organization located in Evanston, Illinois dedicated to educating and empowering people of all ages and backgrounds through interactive encounters with visual art in public and private settings. Our programming areas include: Art Tours and Travel Programs, Community Outreach Programs , and the Mural Arts Program. Our unique approach to connecting art to people, and people to art promotes the the powerful purpose of art in our society, and creates community among its viewers.

Name: C&V Studio di Archeologia S.r.l.
Description:
La società C&V - Studio di Archeologia S.r.l. nasce dalla consolidata esperienza dei suoi fondatori nell’ambito dei beni culturali, dell’archeologia e dell’architettura storica.
L’attenzione, la competenza e l’impegno che ci contraddistinguono in questi ambiti trova piena esplicazione in una cultura d’impresa per cui il rinvenimento, lo studio, la salvaguardia ed
il recupero di quei beni che costituiscono il patrimonio culturale di una comunità, non soltanto costituiscono i valori ed i principi ispiratori ma l’essenza stessa del lavoro quotidiano.
Lo sviluppo di tecniche innovative e competenze professionali specializzate nel settore dell’archeologia, strettamente connesso
all’apporto decisivo di innovazioni tecnologiche durante le fasi lavorative, reso possibile dalla specializzazione e dalla professionalità multidisciplinare del nostro team, consentono
di gestire mezzi e tecniche all’avanguardia nella ricerca scientifica.

Name: VIA Art Fund
Description:
VIA Art Fund is a non-profit organization where art patrons join forces as partners in a new model of philanthropy to support (V)isionary (I)nitiatives in (A)rt.

Emphasizing direct engagement with contemporary visual art, VIA Art Fund sponsors projects that exemplify our core values of artistic production, thought leadership, and public engagement, VIA– by way of– Art. Partnering directly with artists, curators, and cultural institutions around the world, VIA Art patrons support innovative artistic endeavors in various forms, from the production of new work for exhibition to large-scale public installations, from curatorial research and symposia to artist and industry publications.

VIA Art Fund stands apart in the landscape of contemporary arts funding as a collective, democratic initiative that connects art patrons with cultural producers.

We accept grant proposals from artists, curators, cultural organizations, and biennials for the production, exhibition, public dissemination and institutional acquisition of new works of art and ideas, with a particular emphasis on works mounted beyond traditional exhibition environments. Since its founding in 2012, VIA Art has awarded grants to a growing number of groundbreaking artists and leading cultural institutions, and has built a coalition of dedicated philanthropists from across the United States. 

viaartfund.org

Name: Mystique
Description:
“Mystique” – Sea Shell Art created with Passion, Sensibility, Innovation, Skillfulness giving a Strong message and also enhancing your life and lifestyle.

An art for Nature Lovers created by 100% recyclable, bio-degradable, ocean friendly material that not only energize your thoughts but the very fauna of each material used in it helps the surroundings to create a positive energy.

“Mystique” a unique form of art created by carefully collected selective Seashells to help enrich Beauty and Blessing of Nature. According to Feng Shui and Vaastu Seashells have its own aura and energy field that enhances positivity, inviting good vibes into our home or workplace, it is believed in Feng Shui, seas-shells come loaded with luck. Because of their association with the sea, which connects distant places, shells are supposed to enhance travel luck as well as strengthen relationships. Seashells also provide relief from stress and offer a protective shield. A symbol of good communication, positive and healthy relationships and prosperity.

Every piece of art is unique created from the Seashells derived from a divine number Seven (7) different Emirates. A prime integer for positivity, the number seven has greatly symbolic associations in religion, mythology and philosophy. Collected from the middle of Mother Earth – The Middle East. 

Each portrait also symbolized the Strength, Power and Beauty of unity in the United Arab Emirates 

Signifying the Love and Gratitude towards the Universe, Mystique - An Art beyond…!

Name: extravertie
Description:
L’installation extravertie est une expérience immersive qui invite à imaginer des futurs désirables. Par l’art et l’humour, un éclairage nouveau est apporté sur la situation socio-climatique pour la comprendre et se projeter dans des imaginaires réinventant notre rapport au monde.
C’est un cheminement intérieur qui prend forme concrètement dans un espace à parcourir pour mettre notre corps en action, ressentir des émotions, déconstruire nos certitudes et faire émerger d’autres possibles, sensibles, désirables et soutenables.

Name: Sandeep Ahirwar (Live Painting Artist)
Description: Sandeep Ahirwar is well known Artist in the World of Painting.

Name: Halle Verrière de Meisenthal
Description:
La verrerie de Meisenthal a rythmé la vie du petit bourg lorrain de 1711 à 1969. Ses deux siècles et demi d’histoire ouvrière auront été témoins de la collaboration entre Emile Gallé – l’un des pionniers de l’Art nouveau – et les verriers virtuoses de Meisenthal.

Deux des bâtiments qui constituent cet ancien site industriel sont réaménagés au début des années 90, l’un en Musée du Verre et du Cristal, l’autre en Centre International d’Art Verrier (CIAV). Le troisième bâtiment, l’ancienne unité de production, que l’on nomme aujourd’hui la Halle Verrière est devenue, grâce à une première tranche de travaux de mise en sécurité et de valorisation de la friche – réalisés entre 2004 et 2005 dans le respect de sa mémoire industrielle et ouvrière – un lieu de création et de diffusion culturelle pluridisciplinaire, fortement implanté dans son territoire, avec un rayonnement important auprès du public et des artistes.

Le Site Verrier de Meisenthal fait aujourd’hui l’objet d’un nouveau projet architectural de réaménagement et d’équipement dont la première tranche des travaux a été inaugurée le 19 octobre 2019. La salle de spectacle (de type Scène de Musiques Actuelles), d’une capacité de 340 places assises et 900places debout, permet d’accueillir dans des conditions de confort optimal les artistes, qu’ils soient musiciens, comédiens, circassiens, danseurs, etc. Cette « Boîte Noire » nouvelle génération, est notamment dotée de gradins rétractables et d’une scène biface modulable et mobile permettant d’augmenter la jauge jusqu’à 3000 places debout dans la configuration la plus grande. Pour répondre aux exigences des artistes et du public en matière de son et lumières, ce nouvel espace est un condensé d’innovations architecturales et techniques.

Name: The Untitled Space
Description:
The Untitled Space art gallery specializes in emerging and established contemporary artists exploring conceptual framework and boundary-pushing ideology through mediums of painting, sculpture, printmaking, photography, video and performance art. The Untitled Space is committing to exploring new ideas vis-à-vis traditional and new mediums and highlights a program of women in art as well as special events aligned with our creative vision.

Notable exhibitions include solo shows for artists Sarah Maple, Rebecca Leveille, Alison Jackson, Fahren Feingold, Miss Meatface, and Jeanette Hayes as well as group shows “IRL: Investigating Reality”, “EDEN” and “(HOTEL) XX” at SPRING/BREAK Art Show, "SHE INSPIRES," a group show of 60 artists exhibiting works honoring inspirational women, internationally-celebrated group shows “UPRISE/ANGRY WOMEN,” and “ONE YEAR OF RESISTANCE” responding to the political climate in America, as well as numerous other critically-acclaimed exhibitions. Special events include fundraisers "Project Literacy" and "Passion for Freedom" as well as events for SEE|ME and TEDx.

Visit us online for more information + updates on current exhibitions.
http://untitled-space.com

Name: TJ
Description:
Trained in photography (with proficiency in both digital and analog systems, including traditional and non-silver processes, color darkroom, studio lighting, digital capture, correction and printing; and knowledge in the history of photography, integrated media, contemporary practice and criticism), I am maintaining a multi-disciplinary arts practice that comprises sound, image and movement and results in animation, video, dance, and works on paper.

My work often incorporates collaboration with other artists and members of a participating community.  Participation is incredibly important to me, as is site-specification.  Some work requires activation by the viewer, and often work is created specifically in response to a site or a community.

MFA - Performance & Interactive Media Arts 
BROOKLYN COLLEGE

Name: Galería Ana Serratosa
Description:
Galería de Arte Contemporáneo ubicada en un luminoso ático en el centro de Valencia. Está regentada por Ana Serratosa, quien en su pasión por el arte ha creado un espacio donde disfrutar y entender el arte contemporáneo como este se merece, de una manera sosegada y guiada.

Durante sus múltiples presentación en directo son frecuentes las visitas del artista, el comisario e incluso un crítico con el fin de que el público disfrute y comprenda en la mayor medida el trabajo del artista, ofreciendo una experiencia más cercana.

Name: 29 ARTS IN PROGRESS gallery
Description:
29 ARTS IN PROGRESS is a dynamic entity in the world of fine art photography, specializing in organizing international exhibitions, providing art advisory services, and offering high-quality photographic works. We bring art everywhere, through pop-up exhibitions and a strong online presence, to offer collectors a unique and tailored experience.

Co-founders and directors Eugenio Calini and Luca Casulli lead 29 ARTS IN PROGRESS with the aim of meeting the highest standards in art photography collecting.

Name: Los Angeles Municipal Art Gallery
Description:
The Los Angeles Municipal Art Gallery’s mission is to be responsive to the human experience.

Established in 1954, the Los Angeles Municipal Art Gallery is the longest running institution in Los Angeles devoted solely to exhibiting art. The gallery focuses on artists from Los Angeles – in particular underrepresented artists whose work may not otherwise have found a platform. Our exhibitions, educational and public programs aim to inspire conversation about the contemporary issues and ideas that resonate most with the people of Los Angeles.

Many local artists who have exhibited at the gallery have gone on to become fixtures of the national and international art world, including Carlos Almaraz, Eleanor Antin, John Baldessari, Mark Bradford, Vija Celmins, Harry Gamboa Jr., David Hammons, Barbara Kruger, Kerry James Marshall, Senga Nengudi, Catherine Opie, Sandy Rodriguez, Ed Ruscha, and Bruce and Norman Yonemoto. Today, the gallery continues to build on this rich legacy, operating as a site of discovery for outstanding work by the city’s most exciting artists, from recent graduates to practitioners with years of experience.

Offering free admission and programs, the Los Angeles Municipal Art Gallery serves as a welcoming space for everyone, regardless of their of race, religion, national origin, ancestry, sex, sexual orientation, age, disability, domestic partner status, marital status or medical condition.

Name: Art Team Media
Description:
Art Team Media is a magazine whose brisk and sometimes provocative, but certainly stimulating editorial line, informs and entertains creative minds.
Because talking about art should always be a cheerful moment, our videos, our articles and our interviews cross in a hybrid editorial line around subjects as wide as art history, the discovery of vocations, techniques and little-known professions into art-world, or even the questioning of the conditions of contemporary creation.
Through funny and enlightening videos, and exclusive, outspoken and warm interviews, we explore all kinds of talents and share stories that spot a light on the many paths that lead to art.

Name: Art Muse Los Angeles
Description:
Art Muse Los Angeles is a company comprised of art historians, artists, and art educators who lead private and customized art tours for guests interested in exploring the Los Angeles art scene and beyond. Our venues include museums, galleries, alternative art spaces, artist studios, and private collections.

We are dedicated, enthusiastic scholars who enjoy sharing our knowledge of art with audiences of all levels of expertise, from the novice to connoisseur. Our tours draw on current research and a range of approaches to inspire curiosity, encourage close looking, and invite dialogue. 
 
In an increasingly virtual world, we promise an authentic, real-world encounter with works of art.

Name: Gaudifond
Description: Somos la tercera generación de una galería y colección de arte fundada en 1971 en presencia de Salvador Dalí para acercar el arte a las personas y las obras a los hogares.¿Quieres saber más?
