Name: Hachem - Arts
Description:
C'est en s'inspirant de l'atmosphère qui règne dans les studios d'artistes que Hachem a repensé ses magasins. Nous allons au-delà du simple fournisseur de matériel d'art; nous sommes la destination unique conduisant à une expérience exaltante digne des beaux-arts. Nous visons à recréer l'esprit et l'imagination trouvés dans les lieux où foisonne la créativité.

Parce que chez Hachem, nous croyons à un nouvel art de vivre.

Name: Scuola Internazionale di Comics Napoli
Description:
Napoli, città d’arte e cultura millenaria, ospita una delle prestigiose sedi dell’altrettanto storica Scuola Internazionale di Comics.

Il fermento artistico partenopeo ha permesso, oltre alla già ampia offerta formativa della Scuola Internazionale di Comics, l’apertura degli esclusivi corsi di Scultura, Fotografia e Pittura; discipline che avvicinano gli allievi a: Cinema, Effetti Speciali, Grafica, Foto-Moda, Videogames.

L’ampia Sala Cinema 4K, che ospita workshop e conferenze di ogni genere, l’Aula di Scultura, in cui si plasmano i talenti dei giovani professionisti, l’eccezionale Studio 8, che vanta l’unico limbo fotografico del centro storico e in cui cinema, fotografia, tecnologia si fondono all’avanguardia della tecnica, rappresentano il fiore all’occhiello della struttura.

L’intento è di soddisfare la richiesta di un mercato che pretende versatilità e competenza. Fumetti, Grafica, Illustrazione, Animazione e Intrattenimento Digitale rappresentano un unico filone creativo a cui interfacciarsi con un attento intreccio interdisciplinare. La nostra missione è costruire un background sufficientemente solido che faccia da trampolino di lancio per gli allievi/futuri professionisti.

 Situata nel cuore del Centro Storico, in un edificio del 1600, tra i più antichi e monumentali della città, la sede vanta una ampiezza di oltre 600 metri quadri ed è ben collegata a tutte le principali reti di trasporto urbano / extraurbano.
E' accreditata dalla Regione Campania (2016.083378722/12/2016) e certificata ISO-9001.

Name: LightHouse (LTHS) Studio
Description: LTHS Studio is an Art studio specializing in 3D animation and modeling, VFX, and rendering, with a focus on asset creation and video production for games and commercials. Incorporating AR/VR technology and innovative digital design we are pioneering in Web 3.0 and Metaverse projects. Renowned for our cutting-edge approach and consistent high-quality delivery. Trusted by brands like McDonalds, Starbucks, GAP, Papa John's etc.

Name: Rachmaninoff Conservatory Paris
Description: International Private School of Music, Singing, Dance, and Art for 100 years

Name: ISELP Brussels
Description: Inscrit dans le paysage bruxellois depuis cinquante ans en 2020/21, cet Institut dédié aux arts contemporains est une plateforme discursive, un centre d’art et de recherche dont l’objet est de penser et de donner à penser l’art contemporain émergent. Il se conçoit comme un espace alternatif et expérimental qui réunit en son sein et fait dialoguer une pluralité de voix, de langages et de médiums en les faisant cohabiter et échanger. Son programme est tout autant prospectif, discursif, qu’ouvert aux différents champs de la connaissance et formes artistiques : histoire de l’art, sciences humaines et sciences dures, littérature, photographies, peintures, sculptures, dessins, vidéos, films, installations, etc. Pour le réaliser, l’ISELP met en œuvre des formats et espaces multiples : centre de documentation, blogs, conférences performées, cycles d’initiations, tables rondes, débats, lectures, workshops, excursions, expositions, publications, résidences, ateliers, etc. Cette diversité d’approches et d’activités fait sa force et sa singularité pour tous ceux qui le traversent, le nourrissent et l’habitent : la scène artistique, les chercheurs, les étudiants et, non des moindres, LES PUBLICS, car ce sont pour eux et par eux que l’Institut s’anime et s’active.

Name: Berntson Bhattacharjee Gallery
Description:
Berntson Bhattacharjee Gallery is dedicated to celebrating inspiring emerging artists. Through curated pop-up exhibitions and a strong digital presence, we showcase the leading contemporary talent of this generation.

We provide an opportunity for collectors to support our diverse roster of highly talented artists at a pivotal moment in their careers. With roots in London and Stockholm, we aim to bridge the art scene between these leading cultural hubs and introduce local artists to explore new venues internationally.  

Founders Lovisa Berntson and India Bhattacharjee are both based in London. India is Swedish-Indian and has lived in London most of her life. Since graduating with a BA in History of Art she has worked in the London art world at leading institutions such as Pace London, Sotheby’s and The Cultivist. Lovisa is from Sweden and holds a BA in Business and an MA in Fine and Decorative Arts from Sotheby’s Institute in London. She has worked in Stockholm and London in business consulting as well as at a leading contemporary art gallery in New York.

Name: Bunya Designs
Description: Indigenous Australian Artist Contemporary and modern storytelling through hand painted and hand drawn digital art.. Sharing the love of my culture through art. Proud Mayi-Kulan (Mayi speaking tribes) and Kalkadoon woman from North-western Queensland. Sharing Indigenous & female empowerment through art. Indigenous Art Code: 5984

Name: mor charpentier
Description: Established in Paris since 2010, mor charpentier represents both emerging and well-established artists whose conceptual practices are anchored in the social realities, history and politics of contrasting geographic regions. By promoting engaged practices internationally, the gallery aims at broadening the knowledge about our time’s crucial debates.

Name: The Art Blend
Description:
At Art Blend, we are dedicated to transforming the way artists and clients interact, ensuring that the world of creativity is accessible to all without the barriers typically imposed by traditional platforms. Our brand was born from the desire to support both budding art students and seasoned painters, offering them a seamless way to connect with clients, display their talent, and ultimately build a stable career in the art world.

 In an industry where commissions and intermediaries often cut into an artist’s earnings, Art Blend stands out by promoting a zero-commission model. We firmly believe that artists should have full ownership of the value they create. At Art Blend, every painter, whether a student or a professional, can register, build a profile, and exhibit their work to potential clients without worrying about hidden fees or deductions. This ensures that the creative minds behind each piece are justly rewarded for their efforts, helping them to sustain and grow their practice. 

Our platform is designed with simplicity and functionality in mind, allowing artists to craft detailed profiles that showcase not only their artwork but also their unique journey. Each artist has the opportunity to present their personal story, philosophy, and inspiration behind their creations, giving clients a deeper understanding of the artist’s perspective. This holistic approach fosters meaningful connections between artists and clients, allowing them to go beyond mere transactions and form lasting relationships based on mutual appreciation for art.

Name: Empire Dance Kenya
Description:
Physical activity is critical for both physical and mental well being. Dancing is a good way to keeping the body while having fun. At Empire Dance Kenya, we believe that everyone can dance. The ChoreographerS take their time to show you the steps and ensure that you are having fun.

Dance classes happen every Monday, Wednesday and Friday at AV fitness, Mbaazi avenue Lavington from 7pm and on Saturdays at Arboretum from 11.30am. If you are not able to come for the dance class, the choreographers can come to you at your workplace or even your neighbourhood. You can come together as a group or book the choreographers for a private session.

If you are looking for a fun way to keep fit or if you want to enhance your team´s productivity through dance or you have a team building activity and you would like to have a dance session, Empire Dance Kenya is here for you.

To book a session, Call us on 0719 35 35 35

Name: ArtZone Global
Description:
Welcome to ArtZone – where creativity connects people.

We’re an art studio based in the heart of Lisbon, dedicated to delivering unique, hands-on experiences through our creative workshops and custom team-building events.

Whether you're a company looking to strengthen team dynamics, a group of friends celebrating a special occasion, or a curious individual eager to explore your artistic side, we design each session to inspire, engage, and connect.

What We Offer:
 Art Workshops – From painting to printmaking, explore your creativity in a relaxed, welcoming space.
 Tailored Team Building – Boost collaboration, creativity, and morale with customized artistic sessions.
 Local & International Clients – We work with companies, tourists, and community groups from Lisbon and beyond.
 In-Studio or On-Location – Host your session in our inspiring studio or let us bring the experience to you.

Let’s create something meaningful together.

 Get in touch to book your session or collaborate on something special.

Name: Artissimo
Description:
Artissimo est un hub de transformation humaine par la culture et la créativité.
Nous concevons des programmes innovants en nous appuyant sur la créativité, l’art, la culture et la connaissance afin de réaliser des projets à impact pour la société, l’économie et l’individu.`

Notre vision: Inscrire les arts dans toutes leur diversité et transversalité comme une valeur fondamentale à l’émergence d’une société tolérante et ouverte sur le monde

Nos valeurs: Diversité, Convivialité, Passion, Engagement, Créativité

Notre approche s'appuie sur 5 piliers:
1- Apprendre  
Élargir ses connaissances, développer des savoir-faire, expérimenter des pratiques artistiques et créatives
2- Développer  
Des projets pour accroître sa notoriété, élargir sa visibilité et impacter
3- Découvrir 
La culture et les arts dans toutes leur diversité pour s’inspirer, s’enrichir et débattre 
4- Entreprendre 
Lancer un projet, un produit, un service,  dans une démarche entrepreneuriale
5- Rayonner 
Élargir son réseau professionnel, son image de marque, échanger et partager des expériences avec des acteurs de tout bord.
Nouc créons un écosystème autour duquel gravitent:
Grandes entreprises de services et de produits
Institutions et administrations publiques
Organisations gouvernementales et non gouvernementales
Académies, universités, écoles
Artistes, créatifs, designers
Entrepreneurs culturels
Equipes pédagogiques: professeurs, coachs, mentors, experts
Acteurs des savoirs: philosophes, historiens, sociologues, scientifiques
Individus (adultes, seniors, ados, enfants).

Name: Personal Work
Description: Artis Website

Name: GECKELER MICHELS
Description:
GECKELER MICHELS explores product functionality around human habits, with a forecasting eye on ever evolving usages and ways of expression. The duo articulates innovative positions, deliberately embracing history of design, contemporary technologies and digital design methods. GECKELER MICHELS’ functionalist approach is typically complemented by an intriguing detail or logic, lending the product a thrilling and thus long-standing narrative.

David Geckeler and Frank Michels established their Berlin based design studio in 2013. Areas of work include furniture, lighting, products and spaces. The research-led practice focuses on autonomous in-house studies, as well as creative direction and product collections for their clients, whilst also producing editions and one-offs.

Name: Art in General
Description: Art in General is a nonprofit organization that produces and presents programs and exhibitions featuring new work by artists.  Founded by artists Martin Weinstein and Teresa Liszka in 1981, Art in General has a long history of supporting artists early in their careers. Since 1981, Art in General is proud to have shown over 2,000 emerging and mid-career artists who have gone onto greater success, including Dorothea Rockburne, Joan Jonas, Kay WalkingStick, Rirkrit Tiravanija, Glenn Ligon, Byron Kim, Elizabeth Peyton, Marina Abramovic, Gabriel Orozco, Paul Pfeiffer, William Pope.L, Pipilotti Rist, Francis Alys, Walid Raad, Sharon Hayes, Patty Chang, Allora & Calzadilla, Pierre Huyghe, among many others. Our roster of artists reflects our deep and long-standing commitment to diversity and equity in the arts. Art in General is often at the forefront of giving artists their first New York exhibitions.

Name: Pandora Art Services  | Education | Art On Yachts | Art Due Diligence | Art Preservation
Description:
Pandora Art Services is a training and education company designed to assist those with little or no knowledge about fine art who have the burden of handling priceless paintings, sculptures and artefacts. Our courses are by e-learning, online 1-1 and in the classroom.

We also provide business consultancy in the creative sector including:


Art portfolio support for

• Family Offices  
• Strategy & Development for the Cultural Sector  
* Art On Superyachts for Captains and Crew and Yacht Management
•  Due Diligence on Fine Art transactions  
•  Private Client & Gallery Logistics  
•  Training in artworld due diligence through the Art Due Diligence Group

We are now launching online classes enabling you to work at your own pace.

We are developing global outreach for licensing the Programme in other territories.  This enables art historians to use their expertise and train with us to teach and develop a business locally.  Message us for more information on how to add a new income stream to your business with full support from Pandora Art Education.  The programme enables our partners to benefit from brand alignment and to present the material developed over years to sectors locally.

Name: Thompson Landry Gallery
Description: Opened in March of 2006, the Thompson Landry Gallery is one of the landmark tenants of the arts community at the Historic Distillery District. Pioneering new ground for galleries in Toronto, the Thompson Landry Gallery showcases both the very best of the new generation of contemporary artists, as well as the great masters of Quebec. Housed in a beautiful 2700 square foot space in the Stone Distillery Building, it is the only gallery in Toronto specializing purely in Quebec artists and sculptors.

Name: ATELIER CARO MOSAIC
Description:
L'atelier de mosaïque vous accueille près d'Angers, à Saint Saturnin sur Loire, dans un cadre verdoyant, pour vous offrir une parenthèse au cours d'un atelier créatif. 
Les stages allient le maniement des tesselles, des couleurs, afin de réaliser une création personnelle décorative, pour adulte.
L'atelier propose des stages à thème, dans une ambiance conviviale.
La mosaïque utilise des matériaux bruts, la terre, et des sources d'inspiration, le spirituel,  et permet ainsi un alignement et un double ancrage. La mosaïque, c'est casser des matériaux pour obtenir des tesselles de mosaïque, afin de composer une nouvelle harmonie.  Une notion de recyclage, d'un réagencement, pour recomposer.
Envie de découvrir, de prendre du temps pour vous?
Renseignez-vous ci-dessous
Location: SAINT SATURNIN SUR LOIRE, BRISSAC LOIRE AUBANCE

Name: IN SITU art agency
Description: IN SITU art agency works to help build artist careers, encourage international exchange, and contextualize Armenian art within global discourse. Born in 2018 from the founders of HAYP Pop Up Gallery, Armenia's nomadic art space, IN SITU and HAYP work together as a consortium to seed the creative economy in Armenia. We function as a constellation of spaces that innovates the traditional gallery model through a flexible structure that mobilizes a network of art professionals, know-how, venues, and institutions. Through Exhibition, Education, Commissions & Consultancy, we provide a platform for artists on the margins to explore, expand and connect to global leaders and markets. Among our various prgrams are: PROJECT SPACE, an artist-residency program in Yerevan, Armenia; IN PRINT, a program that encourages innovative print practice ; and our HAYP exhibition program in the virtual and public space.

Name: Independent Curator
Description:
Since 1995 I have been an Independent curator in Boston, MA. 
I have organized nearly 100 exhibits at numerous venues in the Boston area.
My focus has been on working with emerging and student artists.
The exhibitions I curate cover a wide range of subjects and themes from traditional to current events, exhibits I have curated have focused on how art interacts with science and technology, politics, site specific installations and more.

Name: Women's Studio Workshop
Description:
Since 1974, Women's Studio Workshop (WSW) has been a thriving visual arts organization with specialized studios in printmaking, hand papermaking, silkscreen, ceramics, letterpress, photography, and book arts. 

Our mission is to operate and maintain an artists’ workspace that encourages the voice and vision of women and trans, intersex, nonbinary, and genderfluid artists. We provide professional opportunities for artists at various stages of their careers and promote programs designed to stimulate public involvement, awareness, and support for the visual arts.

WSW has substantially advanced the careers of more than 700 artists through this program. WSW also creates professional opportunities for young artists through its internship program; has the highest rated visual arts education program in New York State; hosts cultural tourists through 20+ Summer Art Institute workshops; runs year-round ceramics classes for the local community; and is the largest publisher of handmade artists’ books in North America, having published more than 240 limited-edition works.

Name: Traspigut.
Description: Traspigut est un studio d'illustration et d'animation qui saura répondre à vos besoins. Forte d'une grande adaptation, Traspigut est la solution à vos projets artistiques.

Name: LIGHTS ON ROMANIA
Description:
Lights On Romania is a private initiative meant to bring light artworks to a general audience.
Lights On is created by the Daisler Association. It started back in 2015 with an open contest for festive lighting solutions and the winner was in fact the city whose different areas were decorated during that Christmas season in a brand new way.

Name: SomoS Arts
Description:
Selected by Artslant Magazine as one of Berlin’s most interesting art project spaces, SomoS Arts provides space and resources for the presentation, reflection and production of the arts. 

Organizing an Artist-in-Residency program and an ambitious exhibition and event schedule, SomoS closely works with artists, organizers and curators to realize their projects. 

SomoS’ mission is to create an international open framework for innovative arts, exhibitions, education and creative cooperation.

Throughout the year, SomoS Art House hosts a residency program for international artists for a three-month period. Artists are assisted in the production of their in-house creative projects, leading finally to an exhibition revealing the result of their three-month residency.

Name: Mashup Cinémi.A
Description:
We distribute mashup films and AI films to the big screen!

Soutenu notamment par le CNC et la DRAC IdF, Mashup Cinémi.A distribue des films mashup et des films I.A pour des projections en salle sur grand écran tout au long de l'année. 

Déjà plus de 20 000 spectateurs dans plus de 120 lieux culturels à travers la France et à l'étranger.

Nous sélectionnons les films à travers un Appel sur Filmfreeway tous les quatre mois et concoctons des programmations thématiques.

Alors si vous voulez être au courant de nos Appels à films et de nos projections, suivez-nous :-)

Already more than 20,000 spectators in over 120 cultural venues across France and abroad. We select films through a Call for Films on Filmfreeway every four months and create thematic programs.

Name: Riofluo
Description:
RioFluo est une agence créative spécialisée dans la conception et l’organisation de projets de communication personnalisés à caractère artistiques.

Nous accompagnons les marques, les entreprises, les institutions et les collectivités dans leur désir d’échanger différemment avec leurs publics à travers des concepts, des expériences et des événements uniques et sur-mesure.

RioFluo valorise le message par la création artistique sous toutes ses formes et plus particulièrement
à travers la pratique de l’art urbain, levier de communication original et novateur.

Name: Afan
Description:
أفن هي مجموعة فنية شبابية تأسست في الأردن عام ٢٠٢٤، تسعى إلى توثيق الفن العربي بأسلوب معاصر، وخلق بيئة آمنة للإبداع وتبادل المعرفة، مع تعزيز الوعي بالفنون البصرية المنطلقة من هوية عربية خالصة.

نركز على نشر محتوى فني عبر منصات التواصل الاجتماعي، إضافة إلى تنظيم فعاليات وأنشطة وورشات نظرية وعملية تُمكّن الفنانين الشباب والجمهور العام من تطوير مهاراتهم الإبداعية وتعميق فهمهم للفن العربي.

رؤيتنا: أن نكون منصة رائدة للفن العربي المعاصر، تربط الفنانين بالمجتمع وتمنح الشباب مساحة للتعبير والإبداع.

Afan is a youth-driven art collective founded in Jordan in 2024. It aims to document Arab art in a contemporary way, creating a safe space for creativity and knowledge-sharing, while raising awareness of visual arts rooted in a genuine Arab identity.

We focus on producing and sharing art content across social media, in addition to organizing events, activities, and both theoretical and practical workshops that enable young artists and the wider community to develop their skills and deepen their understanding of Arab art.

Our Vision: To be a leading platform for contemporary Arab art, connecting artists with society and empowering youth with space for expression and creativity.

Name: ECRA Servicios Integrales de Arte
Description: ECRA SERVICIOS INTEGRALES DE ARTE es una empresa de restauración de obras de arte formada por un grupo de profesionales licenciados en Historia del arte y diplomados en Conservación y restauración de obras de arte y bienes culturales con una larga experiencia.

Name: Catharine Clark Gallery
Description: Catharine Clark Gallery is a contemporary art gallery representing an international group of artists who work in a wide array of media: painting, sculpture, photography, video and electronic media. The gallery has pioneered the presentation of new media art in San Francisco, and is the first commercial gallery in the area with a dedicated media room. Exhibitions are hosted on a six-week schedule, featuring work by one or two solo artist in addition to media room installations.  Additionally the gallery regularly participates in national and international art fairs.

Name: carlier | gebauer
Description: Founded in 1991 by Ulrich Gebauer and co-directed with Marie-Blanche Carlier since 1997, carlier | gebauer aims to promote international contemporary art. Its program reveals an affinity towards aesthetic and conceptual research in the fields of installation, performance and in the image, through film, video, photography and drawing.

Name: CREATE Portage County
Description:
Mission: Accelerating creativity, connection, and collaboration to advance vibrant and welcoming communities.

Vision: To nourish communities where creativity, the arts, and entrepreneurship intertwine, fostering transformative experiences that celebrate diverse voices, ignite economic prosperity, and cultivate a sense of belonging.

CREATE Portage County's journey from its origins as the Arts Alliance of Portage County is a story of innovation, growth, and community impact. Since its founding in 2004, the organization has championed arts and culture as vital components of local development. Early on, the Arts Alliance leveraged economic data and creative economy studies to drive arts-based growth. By 2015, the organization’s success in transforming local tourism through strategic marketing and creative initiatives led to the launch of CREATE Portage County, expanding its mission to support all forms of creativity.

Name: Galerie Forsblom
Description:
Galerie Forsblom is one of the leading contemporary art galleries in the Nordic region. Founded in 1977 by Kaj Forsblom, the gallery has played a key role in introducing internationally acclaimed artists to Finland while presenting both emerging and established Nordic artists to national and international audiences.

The gallery presents an ambitious exhibition programme of over 20 exhibitions annually in Helsinki, Finland, with a programme shaped by long-term collaborations and the introduction of new artistic positions. Galerie Forsblom maintains a strong international outlook through regular participation in major international art fairs.

Galerie Forsblom
Yrjönkatu 22
Helsinki, Finland
info@galerieforsblom.com

Name: The Stove Network
Description:
The Stove Network is Scotland's only arts-led development trust. With an arts venue and cafe in the centre of Dumfries, Southwest Scotland's largest town, we offer a diverse programme stretching across music and literature, visual and public art, film and theatre, to town planning, architecture and design.

We use arts and creativity to encourage, to gather, learn and view the arts not as something solely for an ‘arts audience’ but rather as a vital contribution to society on all fronts.

At the heart of everything we do is a love for our town and wider region. We work alongside our local authority, community organisations, local businesses and charities to create a vision for the future of Dumfries & Galloway. 
We’re aiming to create a place where culture, community and enterprise work hand-in-hand to support a new vision of Dumfries & Galloway.

We work hard to raise the profile of our creative community and our town through regular opportunities, workshops, events and projects.

We’re also a hub for the creative community of Dumfries. We’re a space for you to use. So if you have an idea, need some space or even advice on starting a project or want to partner with us – we’re here!

Name: Gozaar School
Description:
شما با موفقیت در مدار سیاره گذار قرار گرفته اید.
جایی برای کشف کردن خودمون

بزرگراه حقانی- نرسیده به چهارراه جهان کودک- پلاک ۲۷

Name: ExpressoNITP
Description:
Expresso: NIT Patna's Premier Art and Literary Hub

 About Us:

Dynamic Presence: Expresso stands as the most active and vibrant arts and literary club at NIT Patna, providing an enriching platform for creative minds to flourish.
 Our Offerings:

Intellectual Stimulation: Engage in thought-provoking debates, contributing to over 20 intellectually stimulating sessions annually.
Creative Writing Excellence: Showcase your literary prowess through our story writing competitions, with participation numbers exceeding 100 students per event.
Knowledge Triumphs: Over 15 engaging quizzes held, attracting an average participation of 80 students per quiz, making Expresso the go-to for knowledge enthusiasts.
 Artistic Exploration:

Canvas to Creation: Join our arts and crafts sessions, where over 50 unique artworks are crafted each semester, reflecting the diverse artistic talents within our community.
Digital Design Frontier: Dive into the intersection of art and technology with our digital design activities, contributing to the creation of over 30 digital masterpieces annually.
 Community Impact:

Active Membership: With a base of 50+ active members, Expresso is more than a club; it's a thriving community fostering friendships and creative collaborations.

Name: RENAISSANCE ART GALLERY
Description:
Engl
RENAISSANCE ART  GALLERY -is a contemporary art gallery located in Bucharest, Romania set up in 2017 by a former corporate and project financing banker, curentlly financial advisor and Title Insurance specialist, who wants that her gallery to be a place that means more than some ‘white walls’  where fine art is displayed! Oana Vișoiu wants to be a Manager for the Artist in her portofolio and also an art adviser for her well choosen clients and to be involved in several charity projects  as ‘giving’ is the ART of being a true member of a comunity. As a result of well thought exhibitions and strategy her gallery was accepted in the autumn of 2018, only a year and a half after its opening, as an Artsy Partner Gallery and now the art of her Artists is available to International collectors! 
Please follow Renaissance Art Gallery and her Artist on Artsy.net in order to be in time involved with the latest art available: www.artsy.net/renaissance-art-gallery
For future Exhibitions, current exhibitions and past exhibitions please check the Gallery website.

RO
Renaissance Art  Gallery isi propune sa un  ‘impresar/manager’ profesiinist al artistilor romani si straini din Romania pe care îi reprezinta contractual, expunand si promovand lucrarile artistilor din portofoliu prin organizarea de vernisaje tematice individuale si de grup atat la sediul Galeriei cat si in spatii alternative cat si in mediile on line!
Din toamna an 2018 Renaissance Art Gallery a fost acceptata ca Galerie Partenera a website American ( International) Artsy, putand astfel sa aiba o expunere internationala! 
Pentru a fi informati in timp real de ultimele lucrari disponibile ne puteti da Follow atât Galeriei cat si Artistilor reprezentati de Galerie pe Artsy: 
www.artsy.net/renaissance-art-gallery

sau puteti contacta la : oana@renaissance-artgallery.com 

De asemenea va invitam sa vizitati si website-ul nostru: www.renaissance-artgallery.com pentru a vedea Expozitiile viitoare, curente si trecute!

Name: OP ENHEIM
Description:
OP ENHEIM is a cultural institution with a mission to develop a vibrant network of cooperation between institutions in Wrocław, Berlin and other European countries. Here, in an old tenement house, a former Oppenheim Haus, in the middle of Wrocław heart, at Plac Solny 4, cultural meetings, workshops and concerts, including experimental music, are held.

The doors to the OP ENHEIM were first opened in 2018, after a 5-year long renovation process. The foundation was established a few days after the opening, on the 19-20 of October. The initial exhibition was fruitful cooperation between Andy Rottenberg, a respected art curator and Mirosław Bałka, sculptor of worldwide fame.

The gallery cooperated with over 65 artists in 2020 and hosted over 5000 visitors. Online numbers prove to us that artistic events are needed especially during the lockdown, we gathered over 16 000 attendees on our online happenings.

As of 2020, OP ENHEIM started specialising in a programme called OP YOUNG which is the latest project being carried out of a need to support the local arts community in the era of the COVID-19 pandemic. It is also a symbolic opening of our institution to young, progressive artists, whose development we want to actively support. As part of the open call for artistic productions, we received 65 applications and we picked out 4 which stood out to us when it came to the issues addressed by the artists and medium chose.

We also launched DIGITAL RESIDENCY with SENATSVERWALTUNG FUR KULTUR UND EUROPA to answer the artistic needs during the pandemic. The outcome was an internet platform available from the search engine and under the address http://www.digitalresidency.pl/.

In four years, OP ENHEIM evolved into a known, intimate space where artists, curators and connoisseurs of art can cooperate and share their passion for the art world.

Name: COMA
Description:
COMA aims to bring a dynamic and engaging focus to contemporary international art. In addition to an attentive curatorial approach it is characterised by a comprehensive understanding of artists exhibited and represented.

The gallery was designed to not only exhibit and promote emerging and established artists but to simultaneously concentrate on the conceptual aspects of their practice relating to these exhibitions, and foster an educational environment for the viewer. 

Through this formula COMA aspires to create a culture of quality for both the public and the exhibiting artists.

Name: EzelDotz
Description:
Selling Art ?
EzelDotz is a new force in the pre-owned art segment which is professional yet provides a simple, fast & affordable way to sell art with clear & transparent terms.  The website has been specifically created so that clients can use either their mobile phone or PC to upload images straight to our website. There has never been a more efficient method of selling pre-owned art.

Buying Art ?
EzelDotz is a trusted way & the most cost effective option to buy pre-loved artwork.  The price shown is the price you pay unlike more traditional auction houses that add significant costs to the ‘hammer price’ that are often opaque and not well understood.  EzelDotz will always have appraised any artworks for sale on our website and we are confident the prices set are better than you will be able to buy similar artwork elsewhere.

Name: The Analog Club
Description:
The Analog Club is a camera shop, gallery and community dedicated to celebrating the poetry of analog photography.

Whether it's giving a second life to vintage cameras, reviving the intimate experience of holding prints or cherishing the slow nature and craftmanship of analog processes, we deeply believe in the importance and relevance of this medium.

Not just as an art form but also as a philosophy.

We want to encourage more people to explore this world and support them along the way.

Name: NeuroBloom(not-for-profit)
Description:
Autistic Community Canvas is a not-for-profit that provides "Autistic Artistic Awakenings," Art Programme, for Communities, to enhance children’s & adult’s personal growth and community engagement, using fine art, through:

1)	Expression and Communication 
2)	Social Skills Development
3)	Emotional Regulation
4)	Creativity and Imagination
5)	Sense of Accomplishment
6)	Fine Motor Skills Improvement
7)	Cognitive Development
8)	Community Involvement
9)	Exploration of Interests 
10)	Cultural Awareness.

Our value - Empathy, Creatively, Development & Inclusion. Operating in USA, China, India, United Kingdom, Japan, Australia, Canada, Brazil, Germany & South Korea.

Message us if you would like, your local community, to be added on our interest list for the Autistic Art Programme. 

Alternatively, if you would like to participate on our online Autistic Art Programme, please complete the following form  – https://forms.gle/qpmeNB9XP98Bf81NA

Name: Morgan O'Driscoll Fine Art Auctioneers
Description: Established in 1994 Morgan O'Driscoll is a fine art auction house with offices in both  Dublin and West Cork, Ireland.  Specialising in Irish and International Fine Art, we hold regular Fine Art Auctions in Dublin and were also the first Irish Auction House to host online auctions.

Name: GALERIE TAMENAGA
Description:
Galerie Tamenaga celebrated its 50th anniversary in 2019. We opened our first flagship in Ginza in 1969, followed by flagship in Osaka, and Paris in 1971 as one of the first Japanese galleries in the centre of arts. To celebrate the 50th anniversary of the Paris flagship, we opened a new gallery in Kyoto in 2021.

The founder was one of the pioneers to establish the western art market in Japan through his relationship with artists such as Foujita Tsuguharu, Bernard Buffet, Oguiss Takanori, Paul Aizpiri, and some of the distinguished collectors. Today, we represent artists from four corners of the world and continuously provide the most exceptional artworks to the hands of collectors. 

Find us in Tokyo, Paris, Osaka, and Kyoto.

Name: Kunstlocatie Würth
Description:
Kunstlocatie Würth is gevestigd in het bedrijfspand van Würth Nederland B.V. in 's-Hertogenbosch. In Kunstlocatie Würth zijn tentoonstellingen te zien van eigentijdse beeldende kunst uit de Verzameling Würth. Toegang tot de Kunstlocatie is kosteloos.

Let op! Kunstlocatie Würth vanaf maandag 5 juli geopend!

Name: Agent & Artists
Description:
We are a Paris-based "boutique" illustration agency and represent 18 top illustrators mainly specialized in fashion, beauty and design. All artists have a background within fashion design or fine arts, and are used to work with worldwide clients on both commercial campaigns and artistic events.
 
Our illustrators have different but complementary styles, and most of their work is drawn by hand with only some final digital retouch. We work on both big and small scale and with print and digital support, e.g. advertising, packaging, wall-graphics, pattern design and animation.

We are very proud of our roster including artists from all over the world: Caroline Andrieu, Annabel Briens, Helen Bullock, Lovisa Burfitt, Cecilia Carlstedt, David Downton, Spiros Halaris, Amelie Hegardt, Stina Johnson, Laura Laine, Rosie McGuinness, Inés Maestre, Tippan Nordén, Piet Paris, Swindler & Swindler, Ayumi Togashi, Poppy Waddilove and Garance Wilkens.

Over the past 15 years we have had the pleasure to work with clients from all over the world: Absolut Vodka, AD Magazine, Chanel, Chloé, Galeries Lafayette, Gucci, H&M, Harrods, L'Oréal, LVMH, Maison Martin Margiela, Moët & Chandon, Penhaligon's, Printemps, Rocco Forte Hotels, Selfridges, Sephora, Viktor & Rolf, Vogue...

Name: Biennale de Paris
Description: The Biennale de Paris was founded in 1959 by the Ministry of Culture. It allows today to modify the art.

Name: PoMoArts
Description: Established in 1998, PoMoArts is a not-for-profit organization that creates art experiences to engage, challenge, and awaken opportunities for connection. We provide art education, exhibitions, and community art experiences in the City of the Arts with our partners and local artists.

Name: Mary Sullivan, Fantasy & Children's Book Illustrator
Description: Freelance Fantasy & Children's Book Illustrator who also does book design, fine art paintings, portraits, and other commission art. I also do accept mural commissions locally. My style is mostly whimsical, soft, warm, loving, dream, surreal, and realistic. Currently resides in Savannah, Georgia.

Name: Create
Description:
Create is the national development agency for collaborative arts. Our work initiates cross-sectoral national and international partnerships which support artists and communities to co-create work of depth, ambition and excellence.

Our mission is to lead the development of collaborative arts practice by enabling artists and communities to create exceptional art together.

As a resource organisation we offer supports for artists working in social and community contexts. These include professional development, mentoring, project development support, commissioning and project opportunities as well as research and training. We also manage the Artist in the Community Scheme for the Arts Council. In 2019 we were awarded the tender to lead the pilot Creative Places programme in Tuam (2020-2023) and in 2021 successfully tendered to be the Creative Places Programme, Network Services provider (2021 – 2024) for the Arts Council.

Create believes that by working together, artists and communities can purposefully explore how collaborative arts engage in distinct, relevant and powerful ways with the urgent social, cultural and political issues of our times.

Name: Clarissa Luk (Artist)
Description:
Clarissa Luk is an artist in Sydney, Australia. She practices art as a creative outlet while studying a double degree in Space Engineering and Law. After a permanent injury steered her away from her goals in elite sport, Clarissa began illustrating in 2017, taking an interest in the challenge of mastering a new skill. In the years since, she has enjoyed developing her painting skills, helping clients with commissions, and began showcasing her work publicly in late 2021. 

Clarissa is currently represented by Art Lovers Australia.

Name: Namas - "Digital Creation"
Description:
Namas est une entreprise proposant des services de création graphique 2D/3D et de production de contenu physiques et digitaux pour vos supports promotionnels.

Nos domaines de compétences :
-Communication visuelle 
-Création de logo et d'identité visuelle 
-Illustration et animation numérique 2D & 3D
-Infographie , vidéo mapping , motion design , ...

Milton Glaser a dit un jour : « Il y a trois réponses possibles à une pièce de design – oui, non, et WOW! Wow est la réaction que vous devez rechercher ». C'est dans ce but précis que nous mettons aujourd'hui nos services à votre disposition.

Pour plus d'information rendez-vous sur notre site web www.namas.fr

Name: ArtList
Description:
ArtList is an online marketplace where collectors can buy and sell fine art confidentially. We take a flat 10% commission on artworks sold and share it 50–50 with artists. 

Our mission is to make the global art market fast, secure and fair. 

We’re based in New York City.

Name: ArtsWorcester
Description: At ArtsWorcester, we believe that contemporary art—the art made here and now, of all kinds and traditions-- is fundamental to a vibrant, educated, and diverse city.

Name: ArtinMove
Description:
Leasing d’œuvres d'Art pour les entreprises et les les professions libérales.

Réponse de principe immédiate.

Name: AccessArt
Description: AccessArt is a UK registered charity (1104059) which aims to support, inspire and enable visual arts teaching, learning and practice. AccessArt was formed in 1999 by Paula Briggs and Sheila Ceccarelli, graduates of the RCA. Paula continues to manage and direct the organisation, which works in partnership with schools, cultural organisation and individuals across the Uk and overseas.

Name: EtarFanni.com
Description:
At Etarfanni we work on art from a community-based concept, we believe everyone has the right to learn, discuss and experience art regardless of their educational level. We try to achieve this by :- 

* creating Arabic content -in the simplest form possible- using trustworthy references about several topics, such as: research in art, art schools, art history, art and society.

* creating a safe space online to discuss art issues on our social media pages, where we all can participate and share our opinions and thoughts. 

* Creating opportunities for those who do not get the chance to learn art by holding workshops on villages in Jordan.

The previous points play a big role in enriching art in the Arab world and helping Arab arts and artists to take their main cultural role in their societies.

Name: proCollect
Description:
Bizonyára Ön is büszke gyűjteményére, amelynek folyamatos gyarapítása, megőrzése életmóddá vált. Amennyiben örökölte, felmerülhet Önben: hogyan tovább?

Különböző területekről jövő szakemberekként azzal az alapvető célkitűzéssel hoztuk létre a proCollect szolgáltatásaink rendszerét, hogy széles körű tanácsadással, ügyintézési és kezelési tevékenységgel az Ön gyűjteménye professzionális kezekben legyen.

Ha gyűjteménye fontos Önnek, de eddig nem volt ideje vagy kellő szakértelme arra, hogy annak kezelésével foglalkozzon, akkor a proCollect Önnek a legjobb megoldás. Célunk, hogy Ön azokat a szolgáltatásokat kapja meg, amelyeket a múzeumok, levéltárak, könyvtárak a közgyűjteményeknek garantálnak. Ha kéri, akkor gyűjteményét adatbázisba rendezzük, így azt mostantól könnyen kezelheti, kereshet benne, a szükséges adatokat átlátható rendszerben tanulmányozhatja. Gyűjteményének teljesen új oldalát ismerheti meg akár azzal, hogy áttekinti annak digitálizált, reprodukált verzióját, illetve ha kéri, kutatásainkat követően új információkkal és tudásanyaggal gazdagodhat.

Grafikusunk megtervezi gyűjteményének, kiállításának arculatát, nyomdai termékeit, belsőépítészünk pedig mindazt, ami a tároláshoz, bemutatáshoz szükséges: legyen az egy tárló, posztamens vagy egy egyedi képtartó.

Ha szükséges, restaurátoraink gondoskodnak gyűjteményének sérült darabjairól.

Ha pedig a gyűjteményével kapcsolatban jogi tanácsadási szolgáltatásra lenne szüksége, akkor a proCollect teljes körű jogi tanácsadást nyújt.

Természetesen szolgáltatásainkat teljes diszkréció és titoktartás mellett végezzük.

Name: KJS Brush & Canvass  Academy of Art
Description:
KJS Brush & Canvass 
Academy of Art

 Sydney’s No.1 Award-Winning Multicultural Art Academy

Welcome to KJS Brush & Canvass — a creative home to over 10,000 students across all age groups! Founded by internationally acclaimed artist and art therapist Kavitha Jeyakumar (KJS), our mission is to inspire, empower, and transform lives through art.

 Main Studio: Stanhope Gardens
 10+ Locations across Sydney | Online Global Classes
 Multi-Award-Winning Institution
 Art Therapy for ADHD, Autism, Dementia, Mental Health
 HSC Visual Arts Coaching | Duke of Edinburgh Support
 Certified Adult Art Business Programs (Especially for Women)
 Art Parties | Events | Outdoor & School Programs
 NSW Registered Active & Creative Kids Provider
 Inclusive | Multicultural | NDIS-Friendly

Programs include:
 Drawing, Painting, Sketching, Mixed Media
 Acrylic, Oil, Watercolour, Dot Art, Aboriginal Art
 Rangoli, Face Painting, Sculpture, Clay & Glazing

At KJS, everyone is an artist. Whether you’re 4 or 94, we’re here to guide your creative journey with love, skill, and inspiration.

Name: Stephan Welz & Co (Pty) Ltd
Description:
Founded in 1968, Stephan Welz & Co. has entrenched itself at the forefront of the South African auction industry for nearly 50 years. With two sale rooms in Johannesburg and Cape Town, we offer you the most convenient way to consign and auction your valuables.

We Alphen Houseare the most experienced auction house in Africa, making us the premium choice when looking to get the best offers on your valuables.

Specialising in fine arts, jewellery and classic cars, we have consigned nearly 325,000 items in over 700 auctions. Our wide range of categories also include watches, silver, clocks, furniture, carpets, ceramics, books, maps, stamps and gold coins. We have specialists nationwide to consign your items to our auctions.

We continue to uphold our integrity with our clients and assist them through the thrilling world of auctions.

Name: Touchstone Gallery
Description:
Founded in 1976, Touchstone Gallery is located in a custom-built street-level space at 901 New York Avenue NW, Washington, DC. Since the beginning, Touchstone’s mission has remained unaltered: to enrich the lives of the community through diverse contemporary art exhibitions; to promote a rich variety of art talent in the DC region; to showcase national and international artists whenever possible; and to foster continuing artistic and career growth of its 50 member artists through encouragement and support.
Touchstone Gallery was named "Best of DC" by Washington City Paper readers over several consecutive years and it received two letters of recognition for enriching its community through arts from D.C. Mayor Muriel Bowser. 
As a member owned and managed gallery, Touchstone artists enjoy the right to guide gallery policies and control their solo exhibitions. The support and camaraderie of the membership is an important benefit. From the start, Touchstone has been involved with the DC community and with philanthropic outreach in and beyond DC region. The gallery is part of local, national and international art scene, balancing its members’ shows with ongoing art outreach and support of its non-profit neighbors. 
In 2012 Touchstone formed the nonprofit Touchstone Foundation for the Arts to continue a long standing commitment to community involvement and art development.

Name: West End Gallery - Corning, NY
Description:
West End Gallery is a family owned and operated fine arts gallery celebrating 49 years in business on historic Market Street in Corning, NY.  Visit the Gallery in person and online to discover a small-town gallery with world-class talent.

Visitors will find a diverse selection of fine art created by more than 50 exceptional professional artists primarily residing in the Finger Lakes region!  The Gallery exhibits artwork in a variety of styles and subjects by emerging and nationally known artists.  Among them are Thomas S. Buechner, Richell Castellón, Trish Coonrod, Joseph Q. Daily, Tom Gardner, Brian M. Hart, Amy Hutto, Brian S. Keeler, Jennifer Miller, GC Myers, Gina Pfleegor, Martin A. Poole, Judy Soprano, Gary Weisman and Treacy Ziegler.  With eight exhibits scheduled per year, visitors will always see something new. Original art is available in a variety of mediums including oil, acrylic, watercolor, ceramics, wood, bronze, glass and more!  All glass is made locally.

Upon receiving a warm welcome from a friendly, knowledgeable staff, guests are invited to wander through two floors of gallery space at their leisure. The main exhibit is wheelchair accessible and family friendly.  Enjoy this small-town gallery featuring artists with world-class talent!

Name: Chase Contemporary
Description:
Chase Contemporary is a contemporary art gallery established in 2017 in the heart of Chelsea, New York City’s fine art district. The gallery's flagship store on 10th avenue presents rotating group and solo presentations by both gallery artists and artists of special projects. In 2018 the gallery expanded to a second location on 23rd street, allowing for more ambitious solo and group exhibitions. 

The gallery exhibits work across a variety of media including painting, photography, sculpture, and works on paper. Chase's core program is to exhibit both modern and contemporary blue chip art as well as work by emerging and mid-level career artists from different generations and backgrounds.  

The gallery has published prints for a number of gallery artists including Ole Aakjaer, as well as publishing catalogs and artist books, and regularly hosts artist talks, events, and benefit auctions. The gallery participates in major annual art fairs including Art Miami and Art New York.

Name: Fu Den Sani
Description: Fu Den Sani initiates and supports cultural projects for kids, youngsters and their social environment. To improve equal chances for all cultures and stimulate personal individual growth and social possibilities.

Name: ROUILLAC
Description: Philippe et Aymeric Rouillac sont commissaires-priseurs dans le Val de Loire. Ils organisent des ventes aux enchères, conférences, expositions et journées d'expertises gratuites. Les belles découvertes et belles enchères sont leur spécialités, multipliant les records toutes catégories confondues : pour le coffre de Mazarin (2013, 7,3 m€), un portrait de Washington (2002, 5.1 m€), une Vénus de Cranach (2001, 2,2 m€), la gourde de l'empereur de Chine (5.084.00 €, 2018), un portrait de Van Dongen (2012, 1,1 m€) ou des Frères Le Nain (3.064.000 €, 2018), la Valse de Claudel (2017, 1,4 m€), les falaise d'Étretat par Monnet (2003, 2,3 m€), un paysage de Vlamink (2000, 2,4 m€), les bateaux de Le Gray (2001, 917.000 €) ou le premier appareil de cinéma parlant (2015, 1,2 m€)...

Name: The Provenance Research Blog
Description: The Provenance Research Blog aims to bring readers curated content written by a group of international experts in the fields of Art, Art History and the Art Market. By drawing on the experience and knowledge of art historians, historians, academics, researchers, lawyers, collectors, artists and art advisors we will address a wide range of art-related issues that we hope will both inform and inspire our readers.

Name: OneTen Creative Services
Description: Oneten Creative Services is dedicated to delivering innovative solutions and creative strategies. While currently inactive, the company stands as a platform ready to bring ideas to life, focusing on adaptability, vision, and future opportunities in the creative sector.

Name: Guggenheim Foundation
Description: Guggenheim Foundation is a fine art company based out of 90 Park Ave # 33, New York, New York, United States.

Name: L'Axone Montbéliard
Description:
Les partenaires de l’Aire urbaine Belfort-Montbéliard-Héricourt-Delle ont confié à Pays de Montbéliard Agglomération l'édification de l'Axone, grand équipement culturel et sportif. L'exploitation de ce dernier a été confiée à la socièté S-PASS, société spécialisée dans la gestion d'équipements polyvalents sports-spectacles-événements de grande capacité, dans le cadre d'un contrat de Délégation de Service Public. 

L'Axone a été inauguré en Avril 2009. En 10 ans, la salle à vu plus de 1 300 000 visiteurs dont 600 000 lors de concerts. Au total plus de 1 000 événements.


L'Axone se situe à :
62 km de Mulhouse (68100)
78 km de Vesoul (70000)
80 km de Besançon (25000)
91 km de Colmar (68000)

Toutes les infos sur WWW.AXONE-MONTBELIARD.FR

Name: LJL Galleries
Description:
LJL Galleries is a fine art gallery dedicated to showcasing Fine Art, Fashion, and Jewelry by top contemporary artists, particularly emphasizing unique works and Palette Art. We offer a curated selection of fine art, from impactful original paintings and sculptures to exclusive jewelry, ensuring something that ignites the senses of every visitor. Our featured artists, including icons like Roy Leadbeater, Erté, Picasso, and Frank Chinea, represent a diverse blend of artistry and cultural resonance.

Beyond aesthetics, LJL Galleries is passionate about creating social, cultural, and environmental impact through dedicated projects that elevate art and community. Discover more at ljlgalleries.com and see how our unique offerings can enrich your collection.

Name: IACCCA
Description: IACCCA, short for International Association of Corporate Collections of Contemporary Art, is a non-profit organization uniting over 50 corporate collections globally. Together with our members we reflect upon the specific challenges and responsibilities of managing corporate collections in the world of today and of tomorrow.

Name: Sawtooth School For Visual Art
Description:
Sawtooth School for Visual Art is a non-profit community art and craft school in downtown Winston-Salem, NC. Sawtooth offers classes and workshops in eleven disciplines and fosters creativity through its community outreach programs, including Art + Wellness, serving patients, survivors, and caregivers. 

Since 1945, Sawtooth has been a creative hub for the region, offering high-quality and hands-on offerings for students of all ages, skill levels, and backgrounds. Sawtooth has recently expanded with two wood-fired kilns at the North Carolina Museum of Art, Winston-Salem (SECCA) and two studios at the Intergenerational Center for Arts and Wellness, a new 62,500-square-foot, state-of-the-art community center built in collaboration with 21 partners.

Sawtooth is "your space to create," with hands-on visual art experiences for students of all ages, backgrounds, and skill levels.

Name: GreenBox Art + Culture
Description:
At GreenBox Art and our family of brands, we link today’s working artists with people seeking artistic decor that mirrors their individuality, that may alter the mood of a room, or spark conversation.

Describing art is not easy, but if pressed, we would choose to label the art in our collections as contemporary - relevant for today. Our diverse selection of art pieces is fun, fresh, spirited and versatile. If you have a traditional environment, one of our stretched canvases can bring an interesting, sometimes needed twist. If you prefer modern interiors, a GreenBox canvas brings any space to life with a burst of color and hand-crafted layers to bring an instant warmth to your walls. If you are working to a particular theme already, we likely have an accent to compliment, from farmhouse, to coastal and so more.

In addition to GreenBox Art, our sister brands include: Oopsy Daisy, Fine Art for Kids and Wheatpaste Art for Teens. From children’s growth charts that feature artful designs, to mini framed art, plush decorative pillows, to unique gifts and accessories, all three of our lines provide an engaging art selection appropriate for any stage in life. 

Perfect for home, office, business, hotel and interior design projects. To find out more, please review our collections in Home Decor, Kitchen & Dining and Gifts for all ages. We hope that you will enjoy shopping our family of brands to find art that speaks to where you are now!

For artists interested in licensing your work with GreenBox Art + Culture, we look forward to the possibility of adding your design to our collections. Please feel free to submit your work for review directly on our website.

Name: PLAYDAY
Description:
Open seven days a week, PLAYDAY provides indoor and outdoor creative activities for children 6+ in a safe small group studio environment with highly educated and experienced instructors. 

At PLAYDAY, children engage in exploratory projects in an inclusive, diverse, respectful, and positive setting. We inspire children to make ART all while developing a variety of life-long cognitive and emotional skills such as hand-eye coordination, communication, critical thinking, self-awareness, patience, and most importantly self-confidence. 

𝗛𝗔𝗩𝗘 𝗙𝗨𝗡 | 𝗕𝗘 𝗔𝗪𝗘𝗦𝗢𝗠𝗘 𝗶𝘀 𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗺𝗼𝘁𝘁𝗼!

Founded in 2017 in response to the lack of innovation in creative education and hybrid learning in school, PLAYDAY offers daily drop-in | drop-off indoor and outdoor creative programming for children 6+:

HOURLY ART CLASSES
MORNING SESSIONS w/ REMOTE ASSIST
AFTER SCHOOL SESSIONS w/ PICK-UP
CREATIVE BIRTHDAY PARTIES w/ BOUNCY HOUSE
ALL DAY CAMPS
WEEKEND WORKSHOPS
OFF-SITE ART CLASSES

From Little Architects, where skyscrapers, cruise ships and, tree houses are designed and drafted, to Dream Weaver, where pattern, line, and texture are explored through hand-weaving and fiber arts, to Stencil Stories, where fantastic tales unfold through Banksy style stenciled narratives, all of our classes encourage kids to find their own unique voice and expressive qualities.

Name: Start-test di S. Schiavone & C sas
Description:
S.T.Art-Test sas esegue indagini diagnostiche di tipo non o micro invasivo, anche in situ tramite strumentazione portatile, finalizzate all’analisi, alla caratterizzazione e al monitoraggio dei beni culturali (singole opere di diversa tipologie materiche e edifici di interesse storico-artistico), degli ambienti in cui questi vengono esposti e/o conservati e del patrimonio architettonico e ambientale di interesse pubblico o privato. 
Le indagini scientifiche condotte dal nostro personale tecnico-scientifico, dopo un'attenta fase di acquisizione, elaborazione e interpretazione dei risultati diagnostici, anche tramite un approfondito confronto con la letteratura scientifica disponibile, forniscono dati e informazioni di supporto per: documentazione e valutazione di trattamenti e interventi di restauro, piani di conservazione, monitoraggi pre/post movimentazione, valutazione dello stato di conservazione, studi di datazione, provenienza e attribuzione, perizie di autenticità.
Servizi e le tecniche di indagine:
•	Riflettografia in Infrarosso a scansione e ad immagine
•	Acquisizione in luce visibile, a luce radente e microscopie (Vis e UV)
•	Riprese in fluorescenza nel visibile indotta da luce ultravioletta
•	VIL - visible induced luminescence
•	Infrarosso falsi colori (FCIR)
•	Tomografia computerizzata a raggi X
•	Radiografia (anche in situ tramite sistema digitale)
•	Indagini microclimatiche e monitoraggio della qualità dell’aria
•	Indagini termografiche
•	Endoscopia
•	Rilievo tramite pacometro
•	Rilievo tramite drone
•	Analisi tramite fluorescenza a raggi X (single shot e mapping)
•	Indagini georadar
•	Indagini ultrasoniche
•	Analisi di laboratorio su microcampione per la caratterizzazione di materiale organico ed inorganico e studio stratigrafico

Name: Artefactory.cl
Description: Nuestra Misión y Visión es que el arte tenga la libertad de desarrollarse en todas sus formas y pueda llegar a todas las personas y segmentos, de manera transversal y a un valor realmente accesible.

Name: SHANTI ART STUDIO
Description: It's all about Art | Original Art Works | Custom Art Projects | Portraits | Illustration and more

Name: Ava's Artistry Studio
Description:
A passionate acrylic paint artist who is teaching his children to develop the love and passion for acrylic arts and use this as a way to help other children attend school through purchases from pieces we create. So, we are here to share this journey with our pouring friends and fans, learn from others, and help those in need.

Our Commitment to Education through Arts 

We commit 50% of purchases of any of our artworks to sponsoring a child attain primary education in Ghana, Liberia, or Uganda through INDESEEM INCORPORATED a non-profit organization that operates in these countries with headquarter in the Commonwealth of Massachusetts. You may visit us at www.indeseem.org.

Name: Royal Society Of Portrait Painters
Description:
A charity founded in 1891, we offer a bespoke service to help those wishing to support this genre by commissioning a portrait. Commissioning a portrait is enjoyable and easy; our expert consultant will guide you from your initial thought through to completion. This can be accessed through our website or in person by appointment. 

Our Member Artists (over 50) are selected by their peers using a rigorous procedure to ensure our continuing reputation for excellence.

Each year we hold an exhibition of some 200 recent portraits at Mall Galleries, London. About half of the portraits are by our Members and a half from an open selection which is available to artists worldwide. Many prizes and awards are available through this exhibition to encourage and support artists. We also run demonstrations and talks to give further insight into visitors.

Name: Roberta d'Amore - Art Gallery
Description: Roberta d'Amore - Art Gallery is an online gallery that represents young art talents, guaranteeing the client 100% original certified art with high possibilities of escalating its value in the future. Help us promote the new cultural identity of the world. Join the #isupportyoungtalents movement.

Name: kunstRUIM
Description:
Platform vóór & dóór Amsterdamse kunstenaars
 Galerie • Jodenbreestraat 25
 Nieuw:  KUNST in de BUURT - divers cultureel programma

 weekendtips via link/agenda
www.kunstruim.amsterdam
kunstRUIM is een onafhankelijk Amsterdams digitaal platform voor kunst, kunstenaars en kunstliefhebbers. 

Via onze website, sociale media en door het organiseren van kleinschalige lokale evenementen en een pop-up galerie biedt kunstRUIM professionele beeldende kunstenaars een platform om hun werk te laten zien en kunstliefhebbers de gelegenheid om kennis te maken met hun kunst.
Onze kunstenaars en hun kunst zijn te vinden op www.kunstruim.amsterdam of op onze Facebook-, Twitter en Instagram-pagina (Facebook: @kunstRUIMAmsterdam, Twitter & Instagram: @kunstruim).

Wil je als kunstenaar of kunstliefhebber op de hoogte blijven van onze evenementen en ander nieuws? 
Meld je aan voor de nieuwsbrief: www.kunstruim.amsterdam

www.kunstRUIM.amsterdam
Instagram: kunstruim
Facebook: kunstRUIMAmsterdam

Name: Mawahib El-Founoun
Description:
MAWAHIB EL-FOUNOUN

Un espace dédié à l’enseignement et à l’apprentissage artistique.

Une mission: transmettre un savoir artistique et culturel à des apprenants, de tous âges, en les accompagnant dans leur progression.

Une présence: pour répondre aux besoins et aspirations de nos Mawahib à travers plusieurs ateliers: 

- ART SCÉNIQUE: Danse Orientale, Classique, Contemporaine et Moderne ( Hip hop, Break dance…), Chant, Chorégraphie, Théâtre.

- ART MUSICAL: Solfège, Instruments à cordes, à vent (Piano, Guitare…), Percussion.

- ART PLASTIQUE: Dessin, Peinture, Sculpture, Calligraphie, Décoration, Design… 

- ART DE CONFECTION DE BIJOUX: Traditionnel et Modernes.

- ART VISUEL: Photographie, Vidéo.

- CÉRAMIQUE : Modelage, Façonnage, Décoration, Cuisson.

Name: grain of salt magazine
Description:
grain of salt mag is an online publication for people that just want to blab their fucking mouths. 

in a culture defined by patriarchal standards, those brave enough to color outside the lines are ignored, belittled and scrutinized. grain of salt mag is a space to explore and reclaim your creativity freely. from young creatives of marginalized gender identities that have never been taken seriously, we approach topics about culture, lifestyle and current events through various forms of art and writing. using collaboration and feedback, we remove the pressure to have perfectly crafted ideas, or already be a practiced creative, in order to share your thoughts about the things that matter most.

all that we ask is that you come to this space as you are. be loud. be bold. be unashamed. it’s all taken with a grain of salt anyways.

Name: Tamarind Institute
Description:
Tamarind is a place where lithography lives. 
 
Tamarind is a renowned center for fine art lithography, advancing the craft since 1960 through a commitment to refined technique, exceptional materials, and collaborations with contemporary artists.
 
Tamarind is centered on a mission to sustain the art of lithography. Encompassing a workshop, gallery, library, and advanced trainjng program for artisan printers, Tamarind conducts research, trains professional printers, and collaborates with artists of all disciplines to produce and publish original works on paper. These three areas — research, education, and artist collaborations— are central to our unique program as an educational print center with a highly refined contemporary art focus.

Name: Museo Castagnino Macro
Description: Es un museo dedicado a cuidar y preservar su coleccion y a incentivar el arte contermporaneo internacional

Name: Sweetwater Center for the Arts
Description: SWCA is an art center focused on empowering our community by supporting excellence in the Arts. We offer classes (for all ages), workshops (for all ages), exhibitions, cultural programs and events.

Name: Mojo Gallery
Description:
Mojo Gallery is the home to an exquisite collection of African, Islamic and Middle Eastern fine art. Since 2010, we are known for featuring the work of highly acclaimed artists and designers, hosting world-class exhibitions, and providing unrivaled expertise and glamour that transcends borders.

Today, Mojo became a north star, uniting collectors, connoisseurs, art fanatics and sophisticated clients with the original works of art and design by 100+ artists including modern and contemporary works.  The works draw inspiration from the intersection of African and Arab cultural fusions, 5000 year old civilizations and 570+ ethnic groups. 

For inquiries about artworks, exhibitions or other information, please visit www.artalbab.ae or contact us at mojo.gallerysd@gmail.com

FB: www.facebook.com/mojogallerysd
IG: @mojogallery

Name: Galleri Nicolai Wallner
Description:
Galleri Nicolai Wallner opened in the fall of 1993 with the ambition of exhibiting challenging and innovative contemporary art. The inauguration of the gallery not only captured the spirit of that particular time, but set the pace and agenda for what we continue to do today. 

Accordingly, many of the artists in our current program have been with the gallery since its inception, and have had their first solo show with the gallery.

The gallery was primarily founded on the ideals of what it means to represent an artist throughout their career, and it is with this in mind that we have built our program and have incorporated new artists. Our representation of more seminal, established artists has provided us a way of contextualising the gallery’s vision, and has also allowed us to introduce the Danish art scene to some of the most important living artists. 

We see the responsibility of the gallery as wide reaching; a personal collaboration with each artist, helping with production and acting as their connection to international galleries and museums, also managing both a written and a visual archive for each artist, and not at least acting as an open public space that presents the highest level of contemporary art to the general public.

The current program is comprised of both Scandinavian and international artists. Working with varying techniques, media and practices, they are defined as a group not by a shared aesthetic, but rather by a common wish to express content, to tell a story, and to make an impression in an otherwise fluctuating world. 

2017 marked a year of transition and expansion, as the gallery moved into a newly designed building. Today, we continue to build our commitment and our interest in both our local Danish arts community, as well as the general arts community at large.

Name: Artlita
Description:
Artlita provides free art advisory services helping you to select art that represents your brand and helps accomplish your goals.  

Contemporary fine art, fine art photography and fine art prints can either be purchased for your corporate or medical facility's art collection or you can lease art and have a bi-annual refresh so your art never becomes stale and you're always inspired by your surroundings.

There is a real need for art in healthcare and corporate facilities.  Research shows that artwork contributes to an environment where patients feel safe -  reducing anxiety and contributing to improved health outcomes and patient satisfaction.  

In corporate facilities art can help recruit and retain top talent, which is more challenging than ever with today's historically low unemployment rates.  According to Forbes, displaying artwork in the workplace does more than make the office aesthetically pleasing; it can actually increase employee efficiency, productivity, and creativity.

Wall art for medical offices is equally important to physicians and staff.  Physician burnout is a significant problem with 30-55% of physicians being affected.  Thirty-four percent of physicians said spending too many hours at work contributed to this.  

The International Association of Professional Art Advisors conducted a survey that established a positive relationship between job productivity, stress, morale, creativity, and art in the workplace across industries.  They found that 82% of employees said art was important in the work environment, demonstrating that art can help lift your spirits and inspire you while it improves patients’ morale.

Name: Mai Khanh Pham To Art
Description: Drawn from natural or imaginary landscapes found in rocks, rivers and barks, the large abstract paintings are built as vibrant meditative journeys. Each piece is a labour of love and patience to let the oil painting slowly dry layers after layers, the sine qua non condition to achieve depth and vibrancy. In this work, Time is a necessity. Not only dictated by the constraint of the material but also by the search of a delicate balance between harmony & peace, flow & movement. The viewer is invited to freely loose oneself in the space of the canvas where intricate details are landscapes into the landscape.

Name: GARE - Escola de Arte
Description: Gare - um espaço além da escola! Cursos de arte, desenho e design, com espaço expositivo (Galeria Gare) para experimentações e práticas.

Name: Copper & Light
Description: Copper & Light wil een frisse, maar vooral broodnodige wind laten waaien doorheen de Belgische kunstwereld.

Name: Prism Specialties of Greater Kentucky
Description: Our team of experts provides quality and cost-effective “hands-on” art restoration services for insurance claims, contractors, museums, private collectors and homeowners require. We are familiar with the insurance industry and understand the need for urgency. We provide complete photographic inventory and full estimates in a timely manner. Call us and schedule your appointment today. Emergency services are available 24/7.

Name: Modern Art Conservation
Description: Modern Art Conservation (MAC), a leading professional studio located in Manhattan’s Chelsea gallery district, offers a specialized combination of craftsmanship, scientific and technical skills, understanding of the art market, and collection care services. The team focuses on treatment, technical research, educating future conservators, collaborating with living artists, and developing new conservation techniques. Located in two light-filled and well-equipped spaces in the landmark Starrett Lehigh, MAC has over 10,000 square feet to accommodate artworks of all sizes. The conservators’ specialties range from traditional easel paintings to artworks comprised of unusual contemporary materials. In addition to treatment, the team is expert in condition reporting for sale, loan, or collection management, having a large body of knowledge in technical art history.

Name: International Association of Astronomical Artists (IAAA)
Description:
The IAAA was founded in 1982 by a small group of artists who journeyed through the fascinating but seldom trod territory where science and art overlap.

From these pioneering astronomical artists a firm foundation of knowledge and research is the basis for each painting. Striving to accurately depict scenes which are at present beyond the range of human eyes, they communicate a binding dream of adventure and exploration as they focus on the final frontier—space.

Since its founding, the IAAA has grown to number over 130 members, representing twenty countries. Their work has also grown, to incorporate a number of styles and viewpoints. At times the art may step outside the bounds of scientific rendering, to address the broader implications that space poses for humanity. However, no matter which form of expression the artist chooses to take, the common inspirations held by all are astronomy and space exploration.

In addition to painting skills, the diverse allies of an astronomical artist include personal computers, NASA photographs, field geologists, space scientists, astronomers, astrophysicists, science writers, and travel agents... (of course, some artists may also hold positions as any of the above). They may find themselves in a training simulator at Johnson Space Center, exploring an active volcanic crater, such as in Iceland or Hawaii, studying the erosion patterns in Utah's Canyonlands, or talking to an Apollo astronaut about subtleties of color in lunar shadows. Workshops are held, at which knowledge and techniques are shared, friendships among many nationalities are forged, at the same time as new landscapes are explored for future use (literally).

The object of the IAAA, as a non-profit foundation, is to implement and participate in astronomical and space art projects, to promote education about astronomical art and to foster international cooperation in artistic work inspired by the exploration of the Universe.

Name: IBEX Collection
Description:
Genius doth not a masterpiece make. Besides aspiration, inspiration, and perspiration, we believe in conspiration: a meeting of minds where we as patrons truly support our painters by offering them generous, long-term stipends that allow them to concentrate on producing their long-brewing masterpieces.

The Ibex Collection supports 24 of the world’s greatest talents in super-realistic painting alive today.

Name: Nuits Blanches Studio
Description: Studio fondé par Camille Moragues et Samuel Bonnet. Basé à Toulouse.

Name: A.I.R. Gallery (Artists-In-Residence Gallery)
Description:
A.I.R. Gallery is a permanent exhibition space that supports an open exchange of ideas and risk–taking by women artists in order to provide support and visibility. As an artist-run organization, A.I.R. fosters involvement through multiple tiers of representation: New York, National, Adjunct, and Alumnae Artists. A self-directed governing body, the organization is alternative to mainstream institutions and thrives on the network of active participants. Collaborations and partnerships with outside organizations and individuals ensure a platform informed by a diverse community and representative of broad views.

A.I.R. maintains a gallery space in Brooklyn, NY and exhibits the work of hundreds of women artists each year. In addition to public open calls: Generations, the Biennial, Currents, and the Postcard Show, A.I.R. hosts many events, lectures and symposia on feminism, art and much more. Our programs engage an audience across a broad spectrum of experiences while creating a lively discourse among artists. A.I.R.’s Fellowship Program For Emerging and Underrepresented Women Artists provides a year-long career development intensive for six artists each year as well as life-long support and collaboration. Since 1972, when a group of visionary women artists opened the first gallery space at 97 Wooster Street in Soho, A.I.R. Gallery has been leading the way in championing women artists, increasing their visibility and the viability of their endeavors.

Name: Galerie Art-Z
Description: La Galerie Art-Z située dans le quartier de Bastille, met en lumière l'art contemporain africain depuis 20ans. Depuis sa création en 2002 par Olivier Sultan, la Galerie a contribué à l'émergence de nombreux artistes de la scène africaine contemporaine comme Bruce Clarke, Tchif, Evans Mbugua, Mabeye Deme, Mounou Désiré Koffi, Saidou Dicko, Nu Barreto, Fotolala King Massassy, Ndoye Douts et Soly Cissé.

Name: Catalogue ORG
Description: Catalogue is a non-profit organization set up as the first cross-disciplinary -archive to interact with visual, Audio & text materials in Tripoli, Libya. The organization adopts a cross-generational concept for digital archiving practices, which support past findings & current resources to protect it from harmful usage, manipulation, and damage.

Name: Guardian Fine Art Services
Description:
GUARDIAN preserves and protects the tangible assets of our clients.

Our services include collection management, installation, conservation, packing and crating, transportation, storage, and more.

Name: Delft Fringe Festival
Description: elk jaar op de laatste donderdag van mei verandert de historische binnenstad van Delft weer in één groot podium. Sinds 2011 vindt het Delft Fringe Festival plaats, en inmiddels is het uitgegroeid tot één van de belangrijkste en grootste theaterfestivals voor jonge makers. Podiumkunstenaars uit heel Nederland en ook internationale gezelschappen maken onderdeel uit van het programma. Maak kennis met het talent van morgen op bijzondere locaties in de historische stad Delft.

Name: Manuskriptskolen
Description: Fuldtidsuddannelsen på Manuskriptskolen for Børnefiktion er en kunstnerisk og praktisk orienteret uddannelse for dig der gerne vil skrive bøger, film, TV, teater, lydfortællinger, spil og alt det, der går på tværs. Manuskriptskolen for Børnefiktion uddanner forfattere, der kan skrive fiktion til forskellige medier og inden for forskellige kunstarter og med børn eller unge som de primære modtagere.

Name: Art on a Postcard
Description: Art on a Postcard is a not-for-profit raising proceeds for the Hepatitis C Trust. We sell original artworks by the leading and emerging contemporary artists through our auctions and our online store.

Description:
| Réseau de jeunes talents créatifs ambitieux
