Name: LetterIN
Description: Créateur d’œuvres d'art innovantes au service de l'architecture et du patrimoine par impression 3D. Un concept 100% Français et écoresponsable.

Name: Colors Festival Paris
Description:
Le Colors Festival, dont la première édition a eu lieu en 2021, est né d’une double envie des artistes : se retrouver entre eux et renouer avec leur public. Après un an de fermeture des musées, de festivals d’art pratiquement tous annulés, le besoin de se retrouver et voir de la nouveauté était débordant pour chacun.

Près de 50 artistes français et internationaux ont investi 600 m2 d’un immeuble en attente de travaux en plein cœur de Paris avec 15 jours seulement de préparation… Pendant 6 semaines, nous avons eu le plaisir de partager cette aventure avec plus de 30 000 visiteurs ! 

Notre volonté : rendre la culture accessible à tous, offrir des espaces d’expression et de création aux artistes et partager leur univers avec le public.

Name: Casey Droege Cultural Productions
Description: Casey Droege Cultural Productions is an artist-run/woman-owned business dedicated to building the Pittsburgh arts community by offering accessible, quality art experiences that connect the local and the global, encourage the growth of a local arts economy, and build a diverse arts audience. We support creatives and businesses through commercial ventures, public programming, and consulting services.

Name: Brun Fine Art
Description:
In 1993 Augusto Brun opened his first gallery in Milan, driven by his strong passion for art that has always been the basis of his success.
Later, after accumulating more than 20 years of experience in the sector, he decided, together with his brother Marco, to open two new galleries in Florence and in Milan, in Via Gesù.
Over time the gallery has grown, developing integrity and competence, leading its clients and all enthusiasts through the fascinating world of art and guiding them through the different eras, artists and historical events that have made art history great.
This is why today we specialise in antique furniture, bronzes, paintings, objects and also in oriental art and modern art works of absolute beauty and quality that we love to share with anyone who has the same passion, the love of art.
Thanks to the brilliant intuition of Pilar Pandini, we decided to open our own space in Florence, a showroom of over 400 square metres located in one of the most exclusive streets in the centre of Florence.
The office is in fact on the first floor of a magnificent 16th century palace in via de' Tornabuoni and receives by appointment clients, museum curators and interior designers, introducing them to our wonderful world of antique furniture and sculptures, works of art and Asian art objects.
We recently opened our second Milan branch, located in the heart of the city, in one of the most famous streets of the fashion quadrilateral.
Our gallery mainly organises curated exhibitions, intended to be appreciated especially by private Italian and international collectors.
The gallery is a member of the Associazione Antiquari d‘ Italia, the Federazione Italiana Mercanti d’ Arte and the French syndicat national des antiquaires and exhibits its works at the most prestigious international art fairs, including Tefaf, Biaf, Fab Paris, NOMAD and Arte e Collezionismo in Rome.

Name: ADA Contemporary
Description:
ADA contemporary is a platform dedicated to nurturing Africa’s art community and building meaningful connections with global audiences and institutions.

Services include strategic collaborations with institutions, brands, and cultural spaces; leading curatorial projects; advisory services; artistic engagement; and community outreach programs .
 
This new borderless model will continue to engage in global exhibitions, institutional consulting, cross-disciplinary partnerships, and creative-led initiatives—all anchored in ADA’s founding values of advocacy, mentorship, and cultural dialogue.

Name: Det Kongelige Teater Balletskolen Odense
Description:
Udover at være en af Det Kongelige Teaters balletskoler, er vi også en almindelig friskole med elever fra 0. - 9. klasse.
Vi tilbyder en skoledag hvor kreative fag, dans og bøger smelter sammen med 
kammeratskab og respekt for hinanden.

De små lærer af de store, og de store lærer at inkludere de små. 
Det, synes vi, er en god værdi at tage med sig, og det er en kæmpe 
fordel, når vi er ude at optræde sammen. 

Man skal selvfølgelig bevæge sig, når man går på vores skole. 
Men man behøver ikke at være verdensmester, når man starter. 
Der skal være plads til at vokse med opgaven, og vi kan godt vurdere, om potentialet er der.  

Vi bor lige midt i Odense, tæt på banegården, og der er altid en voksen 
til at følge vores mindste elever frem og tilbage.

Name: YourTurnDontFall Studio
Description: Neo-expressionist, post-graffiti fine art by Toronto-based artist, Louis Chapheau. Please send us a message for all purchase inquiries or to request a custom commission.

Name: Alexander Gray Associates
Description:
Alexander Gray Associates is a contemporary art gallery in New York City and Germantown NY. Through exhibitions, research, and artist representation, the Gallery spotlights artistic movements and artists who emerged in the mid- to late-Twentieth Century. Influential in cultural, social, and political spheres, these artists are notable for creating work that crosses geographic borders, generational contexts and artistic disciplines. Alexander Gray Associates is an organization committed to anti-racist and feminist principles.

Alexander Gray Associates is a member of the Art Dealers Association of America.

Name: METAWALLS
Description:
METAWALLS is an NFT/Web3 ecosystem for street art culture, where all participants artists, collectors, and art lovers - are fairly incentivized for their contribution and engagement.

METAWALLS wants to help reform the art market, and this means for us facilitating more equality, participation, and empowerment for artists and art buyers alike through our revolutionary CO-NFT (Collective-Ownership NFT) platform.

The unique design and features of CO-NFT will empower a global community of art lovers to support and engage directly with Berlin’s unique Street Art culture in ways not previously possible.

METAWALLS runs on Polygon, an energy-efficient ‘Proof of Stake’ blockchain. Polygon provides users with secure, low cost transactions 24/7.

CO-NFT BY METAWALLS
Collective-Ownership
A new way to connect!
The 'CO-NFT' embodies all that the Berlin METAWALLS team stands for, a collectively owned, fractional artwork NFT.

THE EMBASSY
The Metawalls headquarter
Adj. Voltaire Arts District, DCL

THE EMBASSY, a 48 meter virtual tower provides ample space for artists to experiment, allowing unique presentation of their work, and the opportunity to show within a rich, immersive multimedia environment. THE EMBASSY has been created to embody the spirit of Berlin Street Art Culture, where the METAWALLS team can share and support the works of artists we are passionate about.


THE SATELLITES
Our Walls
Built for Art

Additional to THE EMBASSY are a number of solitary walls – each between 800-1500sqm – representing
CO-NFT's of significant murals from Berlin, throughout Decentraland, presenting works to scale. Visitors to THE EMBASSY can teleport to the walls, and vice-versa. These satellites expand the reach of the main gallery, connecting to users across the DCL universe. The satellites can be used for artworks, streams, announcements, and multiple other functions in promotion of exhibited works and events.

Name: Accademia di Belle Arti di Bari
Description: A public institution for higher education in visual arts, committed to artistic research, interdisciplinary practice, and contemporary cultural production.

Name: Jackson Junge Gallery
Description:
The Jackson Junge Gallery adds to the growing arts community in Chicago's Wicker Park / Bucktown neighborhood. Co-owned by Chicago artist Laura Lee Junge and partner Chris Jackson, the gallery provides an exclusive local venue for Junge's paintings and other works by local artists. 

Located on a busy section of Milwaukee Ave. just north of Division St. and south of North Ave., the Jackson Junge Gallery attracts a diverse clientele. Everyone from the ardent art aficionado to the casual admirer, delight in the comfortable ambiance they find inside.

In an effort to make art widely accessible, superior giclee reproductions and prints are available for purchase alongside original pieces. Today's sophisticated technology allows for exceptional quality prints. All of Junge giclees are produced in-house at the Jackson Junge Gallery and are subject to the artists' personal inspection.

The Jackson Junge Gallery provides a full range of custom framing services on site. Under the guidance of skilled craftsman and gallery co-owner Chris Jackson, customers find the perfect mount, protection and frame for their art, photography and other treasures.

Name: Beautiful Distress Foundation
Description:
Beautiful Distress is a foundation that is committed to making psychological vulnerabilities visible and tangible through art. We want to encourage open dialogue on this subject, that is often still seen as taboo. Our foundation tries to create more compassion and understanding for people who suffer from mental illness, and thereby contribute to an inclusive society.

Since 2014, Beautiful Distress organizes international artist in residence programs on psychiatry wards. During these programs, professional artists live and work on location for three months, while they observe the world of psychiatry. They convert their visions and experiences into art.

Beautiful Distress has a beautiful exhibition and project space in Amsterdam North, next to the NDSM wharf: The Beautiful Distress House. There we create a participatory, inclusive and diverse environment where everyone feels at home and where ideas and experiences can be freely shared and discussed. There is room for exhibitions of the work of the artists from the residencies and other artists.

Name: Instituto Semiose
Description: O Instituto Semiose é a digital school da nova economia para alunos dispostos a estimular suas ideias e construir sua jornada criativa. Transforme suas ideias em realidade.

Name: COHLE GALLERY
Description: Galerie d'art contemporain basée à Paris et Minorque

Name: Scuola Superiore d'Arte Applicata del Castello Sforzesco
Description:
Una comunità di persone che condividono la passione per le arti applicate. 
Una scuola / laboratorio dove si insegnano e si imparano linguaggi visivi antichi e moderni. Codici espressivi che possono essere utilizzati per esprimersi, per comunicare, per lavorare. Non di rado anche per sognare. Un lavoro paziente che ha per fine il benessere. Un impegno inteso come esperienza umana collettiva. Una scuola aperta, organizzata attraverso laboratori e atelier tematici. Affresco, mosaico, vetrata, pittura, incisione, arazzo, illustrazione, fumetto, grafica: queste le discipline su cui si lavora. Mestieri e linguaggi tradizionali, senza aver paura di misurarsi con l’innovazione.

Un insegnamento senza teoria e lezioni frontali. I fondamenti concettuali delle diverse discipline si apprendono attraverso il lavoro manuale. Imparare facendo. Lavorare assieme, collaborare. Una rete di rapporti, nodi e connessioni. Gli studenti, i docenti, lo staff, gli ospiti. Un gruppo di persone affiatate, disponibili e attente. Una parola chiave è: “gentilezza”. Cura. Cura per il tempo necessario (per realizzare i diversi lavori) e attenta misura (a misura del singolo così come a misura della comunità). 

Una qualità che viene perseguita ponendo il fluire del tempo al centro del nostro lavoro. Una scuola che vive di sera, svincolata dalla frenesia delle ore diurne. Tempo che si dilata e si comprime a seconda dei nostri vincoli e delle nostre necessità. Sera dopo sera, con metodo, con pazienza, imparando a ragionare sui tempi lunghi e lunghissimi.

Genealogie importanti e spesso sorprendenti. Studenti che diventano insegnanti, trasmettere e tramandare i saperi artigianali di generazione in generazione. Una comunità impegnata in un lungo viaggio iniziato con un Regio Decreto, il 2 luglio 1882. Qualche nome passato di qui? Carlo Carrà e Adolfo Wildt. Giuseppe Palanti, Pino Tovaglia e Piero Fornasetti. Senza dimenticarci di Sergio Toppi fino a Paolo D’Altan, le sorelle Durante, Stefano Turconi.

Name: Kunstwerkt vzw
Description: Kunstwerkt is here for everyone who practices visual arts. We inspire you during studio visits, festivals or workshops, encourage you with open calls, and help you on your way with information and exhibition materials. And every day you can show your own work on the online platform BEELD.

Name: Delhiartworkshop
Description: We take printmaking workshops at our own studio and  various different studios in and around Delhi.

Name: MayinArt
Description: Original exclusive artwork at affordable prices.

Name: Kalakriti Fine Arts
Description: Art speaks where words are unable to explain.

Name: Indian Ocean Craft Triennial Inc.
Description:
The Indian Ocean Craft Triennial (IOTA) is Western Australia's leading international contemporary craft festival. A significant celebration of the region's most exciting craft artists, designer-makers and artisans, the 2nd IOTA took place in 2024 and planning is in progress for IOTA27. The festival centres around an international exhibition, a statewide satellite program of complementary exhibitions, plus an international conference and public program of talks and workshops. 
IOTA is presented thanks to the support of the Western Australian government and Creative Australia alongside founding partner Curtin University, Lotterywest, our donor group the IOTA Ambassadors, and a multitude of project partners.

Name: Newport Gallery Organization
Description:
The Newport Gallery Organization is an organization of galleries and museums in Newport, RI that is promoting the art community and fine arts in Newport, RI.  Newport Gallery Organization’s goal is to make the art community and fine arts more accessible and visible to area residents and visitors.The group hosts Newport Gallery Night, a monthly evening art tour on the second Thursday of the month from February through December, from 5:00 pm until 8:00 pm including 23 participating art galleries & the Newport Art Museum, Rough Point & The Redwood Library open to the public, free parking at the Gateway Center and the Newport Art Museum, and a dining discount coupon for many area restaurants.

The mission is to make the art community and the fine arts more accessible and visible to both area residents and out-of-town visitors. Our goals are simple: we want to heighten awareness and have the general public come and view art, to become more educated about the history of art, to become more aware that art is currently being created, and aware that there are nationally recognized and emerging artists working in their midst. Newport’s many fine galleries showcase a wide variety of art expressions--marine art, art glass, avant-garde, cutting edge, contemporary, wearable, folk art, decorative and antique art.

Name: Maison Contemporain.
Description:
Maison Contemporain is the ideal platform for contemporary art collectors who want to discover and purchase exceptional works of art while supporting artists from around the world. With over 6,000 pieces available online, including paintings, photographs, editions and works on paper, sculptures, mixed media works, and much more, the collection is impressive and diverse. The platform represents over 700 emerging and established artists from 49 different nationalities, offering a variety of unique artistic perspectives. The online gallery provides an immersive visual experience to navigate through the works and a user-friendly interface to facilitate online art purchasing. With Maison Contemporain, you can not only acquire high-quality works of art but also invest in the future of art and support talented artists from around the world.

---

Collectionnez de l'art et soutenez les artistes et la scène artistique contemporaine. Maison Contemporain est la plateforme idéale pour les collectionneurs d'art contemporain qui souhaitent découvrir et acheter des œuvres d'art exceptionnelles tout en soutenant des artistes du monde entier. Avec plus de 6 000 pièces disponibles en ligne, comprenant des peintures, des photographies, des éditions et des œuvres sur papier, des sculptures, des œuvres mixtes et bien plus encore, la sélection Maison Contemporain est impressionnante et diversifiée. La plateforme représente plus de 700 artistes émergents et confirmés de 49 nationalités différentes, offrant une variété de perspectives artistiques uniques. Avec Maison Contemporain, vous pouvez non seulement acquérir des œuvres d'art de qualité supérieure, mais également investir dans l'avenir de l'art et soutenir des artistes talentueux du monde entier.

Name: VEKTOR Athens
Description:
VEKTOR acts as a platform for local and international artists, curators and researchers exploring phenomena of the digital condition. VEKTOR organises and produces exhibitions, implements research projects and events with a focus on digital culture, media arts, and music.

VEKTOR aims at creating networks with local and international art organisations to reinforce the discussion around technology and the arts and their future development. With no permanent space and a roaming personality, it aims to promote critical and cultural discourse; showcase art forms that challenge our digital ecosystem and engage with diverse audiences. 

VEKTOR is a non-profit arts organisation founded by Katerina Gkoutziouli and Voltnoi Brege in 2020. Based in Athens, Greece.

Name: aManolab
Description:

We have 7 years of experience in teaching craft techniques to different populations. We design courses and craft products according to the needs of each of our clients.

Description:
TAC is a place for talent development, art and design. We are situated in the dynamic center of Eindhoven, in a former Philips building and swarming on different locations throughout the city. We are proud to offer studio space to about 200 starting professional artists. 

We have a rich cultural program with exhibitions, readings, workshops and music. We would like to invite you to our wonderful courtyard, café and restaurant to relax, dance, be sociable, have a drink or enjoy a Korean meal.

[Cover photo: Tommy Köhlbrugge]

Name: MOPA
Description: MoPA introduces artwork from contemporary artists in an intimate and personal way. The Museum displays works of art created to fit inside a wallet, business-card-sized. MoPA shows at the opening of other art exhibits, or “leaches” the reception. At the reception, a MoPA representative approaches people individually and asks if he or she would like to visit the works on display. Currently MoPA hosts four shows a year.

Name: Clube Rastro
Description:
Clube Rastro: Vendemos diretamente a melhor arte nacional ao melhor preço do mercado! Permitimos o pagamento fracionado das obras, sem qualquer custo acrescido para si! E oferecemos o seguro e o transporte das obras até sua casa.
O Clube Rastro também é um clube de colecionismo de arte: facilmente, com pequenas transferências mensais, você pode transformar-se num colecionador da melhor arte nacional!

Name: Temple Bar Gallery + Studios
Description:
Temple Bar Gallery + Studios is a leading artists’ studio complex and contemporary art gallery in Dublin City Centre.

A centre for creativity in the capital, we provide a place for artists to thrive and ways for you to experience contemporary art. For free. For everybody. Founded in 1983 - by artists, for artists.

Studios
Thirty high-quality and affordable studios at Temple Bar Gallery + Studios provide professional artists, at all stages of their careers, from recent graduates to internationally recognised artists with a vital place to work in Dublin City Centre. The work made in the studios goes on to be exhibited in Ireland and throughout the world.

Gallery
Our exhibitions identify Irish artists of talent at pivotal points in their practice, and introduces international artists to Irish audiences. The gallery programme presents five exhibitions per year, with a strong emphasis on solo exhibitions. We are home to Dublin Art Book Fair - Ireland’s only art book fair.

Learning + Public Engagement
Our free public events connect people to art and artists. Our programme of public events allows people to meet artists, get inside the studios, ask questions, make their own art and learn something new through workshops, talks, screenings and tours.

Name: L'Antipode
Description: A contemporary art agency with a simple idea : to represent art students with a physical and virtual exposure.

Name: Pracownia Intuicyjna
Description:
Nie planowałam zakładać marki. Po prostu dostałam w prezencie sztalugę.

To była zwykła – a może właśnie niezwykła – chwila urodzinowa. 
Podarunek, który wyglądał niepozornie, a tak naprawdę otworzył drzwi do czegoś znacznie większego.  

Od lat nosiłam w sobie tęsknotę za malowaniem. 
To była pasja z dzieciństwa, która gdzieś po drodze zniknęła pod warstwami codzienności, obowiązków i dorosłości. 
Ale kiedy znów poczułam pędzel w dłoni, coś się we mnie przebudziło.

I tak ponownie zaczęłam malować jako 39 latka, z potrzeby serca, bez planu, dla siebie.
Aż pewnego dnia usłyszałam od znajomej, która zobaczyła jeden z moich obrazów: „Powinnaś to pokazać światu.”
I… założyła mi stronę na Facebooku. 

Tak powstała Pracownia Intuicyjna – przestrzeń, która dziś żyje swoim rytmem i zaprasza do zatrzymania się.
To nie firma, to moja osobista ścieżka. Przestrzeń, w której sztuka spotyka się z uważnością, naturą i emocją.

Tworzę obrazy, które przypominają, że piękno może być ciche, delikatne, uzdrawiające.

Zapraszam do kontemplacji, refleksji i głębokiego docenienia natury, w podróż ku wewnętrznej ciszy. 
Tworzę wg tradycyjnego malarstwa japońskiego, opartego na naturalnych pigmentach, tuszu i papierze washi. 

Szukam współprac z galeriami, kuratorami oraz markami bliskimi sztuce Wschodu, duchowości i estetyce slow life. 
Jeśli czujesz, że to o Tobie – rozgość się.

Name: Wheyham
Description:
Discover the captivating world of the Nok Culture, a fascinating and mysterious civilization that thrived over two thousand years ago in what is now Jaba Local Government, Kaduna State, Nigeria. 

 Join us on this enlightening adventure as we celebrate the Nok Civilization and its significance. Let the Wheyham Documentary inspire and captivate you, fueling your curiosity and expanding your understanding of our shared human history.

Name: VIA Art Fund
Description:
VIA Art Fund is a non-profit organization where art patrons join forces as partners in a new model of philanthropy to support (V)isionary (I)nitiatives in (A)rt.

Emphasizing direct engagement with contemporary visual art, VIA Art Fund sponsors projects that exemplify our core values of artistic production, thought leadership, and public engagement, VIA– by way of– Art. Partnering directly with artists, curators, and cultural institutions around the world, VIA Art patrons support innovative artistic endeavors in various forms, from the production of new work for exhibition to large-scale public installations, from curatorial research and symposia to artist and industry publications.

VIA Art Fund stands apart in the landscape of contemporary arts funding as a collective, democratic initiative that connects art patrons with cultural producers.

We accept grant proposals from artists, curators, cultural organizations, and biennials for the production, exhibition, public dissemination and institutional acquisition of new works of art and ideas, with a particular emphasis on works mounted beyond traditional exhibition environments. Since its founding in 2012, VIA Art has awarded grants to a growing number of groundbreaking artists and leading cultural institutions, and has built a coalition of dedicated philanthropists from across the United States. 

viaartfund.org

Name: PenArt
Description:
PenArt is a nonprofit arts education and exhibition center in the heart Door County, Wisconsin. Founded in 1965 by visionary Chicago filmmaker and artist, Madeline Tripp Tourtelot, PenArt has been operating as an independent 501(c)3 nonprofit organization since 1992. It has supported the creative growth of novice to advanced artists from across the country, made a tremendous impact on the creative health of the Door County community, and supported the careers of many established local, regional, and nationally known visual artists. Over the years PenArt has grown from a small local arts center into a staple and beloved destination for thousands of visitors and students, and hundreds of working artists on an annual basis.

PenArt’s goal is to foster a creative, inclusive, art-making community, providing access to quality education, and professionally equipped studios, as well as high-caliber exhibitions and engaging events for everyone. It promotes the joy and transformative power of art and actively supports individual creative growth and arts appreciation. PenArt looks to serve as the premier resource for visual art education and artistic development, widely known and celebrated for its high-quality programs, accessibility, and inclusivity.

Name: Estimarte.com
Description:
Somos la primer base de datos online sobre el mercado de Arte Latinoamericano. 

Estimarte.com es una herramienta indispensable para artistas, galeristas, aficionados, coleccionistas, inversores y marchands de arte, brindando información genuina sobre las ventas de obras en los principales remates de Buenos Aires, Montevideo, San Pablo, Río de Janeiro, Nueva York, entre otras ciudades.

A la hora de invertir o vender una obra de arte es necesario conocer muy bien el mercado ya que éste refleja, en gran medida, el valor efectivo de un artista. Esto lo puede conseguir en nuestro portal accediendo a nuestras distintas secciones:

- Biografías de artistas
- Proximas subastas de artistas
- Ventas pasadas de artistas
- Indicadores gráficos sobre la evolucion en el mercado
- Alertas de artistas favoritos

Name: Centre International de TÉHIMA
Description: La TÉHIMA est un ensemble de 22 chorégraphies permettant d’étirer chaque partie du corps liée à la symbolique anatomique de la lettre. Le corps devient la plume du calligraphe. La puissance de ce tracé chorégraphié libère les tensions physiques et émotionnelles.

Name: Malagacha Gallery
Description: Urban & contemporary gallery based in Strasbourg  & Lausanne

Name: Kirby Cannon Studio
Description:
Kirby Cannon Studio is the creative home of D. Kirk Buchanan: An American contemporary post-impressionism artist celebrating the natural beauty of the southwest.  

Kirk Buchanan is a professional artist known for his vibrant and expressive paintings, primarily focusing on the landscapes of the American Southwest.  

Inspired by boundless wilderness treks and a deep respect for nature, his work often features stunning depictions of the iconic vistas of Northern New Mexico, Southern Colorado, and West Texas, including the Sangre de Cristo Mountains, the Rio Grande Valley, the Llano Estacado, and the ancient & historic adobe architecture of Taos and Santa Fe.

Key characteristics of Kirk's style include:
*  Bold Colors: He employs a rich palette of colors to evoke the intense light and vibrant hues of the Southwestern landscape.
* Post-Impressionistic Technique: His brushwork is loose and expressive, creating a sense of movement and energy in his paintings.
* Focus on Light and Shadow: Buchanan masterfully captures the interplay of light and shadow, adding depth and dimension to his work.
* Emotional Connection: With a purposeful exaggeration of color and light, his paintings often convey a strong emotional connection to the land, inspiring a sense of awe and wonder.

For the curious and thoughtful, a philosophical and allegorical meaning can be found in each of his works, though often very subtle.  This reflection and subsequent expression by the artist allows the interpretation to remain open to the viewer.

He is represented by Art Mozaik Fine Art Gallery on Canyon Road in Santa Fe, Taos Artist Collective in Taos, NM, Vantage Point Art Gallery in Gainesville, TX, and regularly shows at numerous galleries and museums throughout the country. His works have been shipped to collectors all over the world: England, Scotland, Ireland, France, Spain and Taiwan, just to name a few.

Name: Avant Gallery
Description:
Founded in Miami Beach, Avant Gallery offers an evolving collection of critically acclaimed contemporary art and design pieces curated with limited availability and unlimited personality. Avant Gallery represents, promotes, and showcases world-renowned, mid-career, as well as emerging talent from the disciplines of art, design, and passionate manufacturing. The gallery offerings include street art, fine art, photography, objets d'art, lighting, sculpture, and other unique collectibles. Avant Gallery's mission is to inspire their clients, to electrify their spirits, and to let their personalities illuminate through forward-thinking art and cutting-edge design.

Avant Gallery has locations in Brickell Miami at the Epic Hotel and in New York City. Please visit our website for more information!

Name: albert contemporary
Description:
Albert Contemporary er Odenses galleri for samtidskunst. Vi præsenterer kunstnere og værker fra Danmark og udlandet for det fynske publikum, og repræsenterer fynske kunstnere på- og uden for Fyn.

Galleriet er placeret i Odenses kreative kvarter og kulturcenter, Brandts Klædefabrik, som bl.a.  huser Kunstmuseum Brandts og OFF Odense International Film Festivals.
Vi er et ungt galleri, og vores mission er at understøtte bølgen af unge samtidskunstnere fra vores lokaler i Brandt Passage 34.

Velkommen til.

Name: Nouvelle Association Village Notre Dame
Description:
Créé en 1982, dans les locaux d’une ancienne imprimerie, le Village Notre Dame est la première galerie d'art et d’antiquités d’Aquitaine.

Au cœur de l’historique quartier des « Chartrons » mondialement connu pour son traditionnel négoce des vins de Bordeaux et aujourd’hui pour ses commerces d’antiquités, le Village Notre Dame regroupe plusieurs stands d’art et d’antiquités répartis sur une surface totale de 1000 mètres carrés.

Une référence depuis 35 ans

Le Village Notre Dame, est devenu une référence dans le domaine des antiquités allant du XVIIème au XXème siècle et dans des spécialités aussi variées que le mobilier, les tableaux, le design du XXème siècle, les objets d’Art, les tapis, l’Art Contemporain, les bijoux, l’argenterie et les luminaires. Un accueil permanent est assuré par des courtiers qui sont à votre disposition pour vous donner toutes les informations possibles sur les meubles & objets présentés.

Location et liste de mariage

Le Village Notre Dame vous propose de composer votre liste de mariage parmi notre large choix d’objets et de mobilier unique. Cette formule répondra à toutes vos envies. Simple et efficace, elle fera de votre mariage un moment historique pour tous les budgets. Le Village Notre Dame est à votre disposition pour satisfaire toutes vos exigences.

Art contemporain

La Galerie Wilhelm Blais, vous offre une sélection d’artistes contemporains. Le choix des artistes nait d’une rencontre et d’une envie commune de valoriser leur sensibilité artistique. La collaboration entre la Galerie Wilhelm Blais et les artistes se concrétise par un partage autant sur le plan professionnel que sur le plan émotionnel.

Name: DE SARTHE
Description: DE SARTHE is a pioneering platform for boundary-pushing contemporary art from Asia striving to exhibit works that reflect the complexities of the 21st century. With a growing roster of emerging artists, the gallery continuously seeks to represent creative practices that investigate present-day social narratives conceived under the effects of new technology. The gallery also maintains an influential international presence in 20th century Modern and Post-war art and has been building museum quality art collections since its establishment in 1977.

Name: Altered Esthetics
Description:
Altered Esthetics is a nonprofit community gallery and arts advocacy organization that works to sustain the role of artists as a voice society. We do this through group exhibitions, workshops, programs, and services. 

We are located in the Q'arma Building in the Arts District of Northeast Minneapolis.

Name: PERSE
Description:
Perse is a private gallery devoted to contemporary art and the cultivation of dialogue between artists and collectors. Through its House Visit Series, an appointment-only programme hosted in a Mayfair setting, Perse offers an intimate context for viewing and discussion. Showcasing the work of emerging and mid-career artists, Perse encourages considered engagement with new ideas and practices shaping the contemporary moment.
Formerly known as Daa Art, Perse reflects a continued commitment to thoughtful curation, meaningful conversation, and the quiet appreciation of contemporary art.

Name: Arcades Digital
Description: Arcades Digital is a leading full-service NFT Studio and Metaverse Agency specializing in the design, creation, marketing, custody, and striking display of digital Fine Art non-fungible tokens. AD creates company presences and concepts in the Metaverse, as a one-stop service from idea to implementation in the Metaverse of your choice. The Geneva-based company custom creates Metaverse experiences and NFTs for each client individually. The NFT-minted license agreements and contracts are perfectly tailored to the goals of the individual project. Uniquely, Arcades Digital’s NFTs and Assets are fully enforceable contracts under recently changed Swiss legislation, which makes the company a market leader in custom, high-value tokens. The firm has a highly motivated, interdisciplinary team of expert lawyers, developers, art professionals, FinTech partners and specialists in digital preservation, archives, and data visualization. Arcades Digital has recently added representatives in Spain and New York.

Name: Gabriel Fine Arts
Description: GABRIEL FINE ARTS LTD is an online Art Gallery and London- based Art Consultancy.

Name: Pachyderm Tales
Description:
From its inception we have helped around 1,00,000 youths from villages around India, Nigeria, Nepal, Bhutan, Indonesia, Malaysia, Argentina and other developing countries to pursue their passion in creative writing and arts as a profession. 
We are
A Story Company |  Work with Artists | Promotes Art and Literature | Curates Concept Events | Publishing, Editing and Proofreading Services | Art Exhibitions | Literary Fest | Organises Conferences, Seminar, Workshops and Panel Discussions

Name: Kuotes Art
Description:
Kuotes Art is een merk dat zich richt op motivational artwork met de hoogste kwaliteit producten. Het is daarnaast een community waar hoogst getalenteerde artists en designers uit heel Nederland hun werk aanbieden met als doel jou een verrijking van je woning aan te bieden.

Bij Kuotes Art geloven we in de kracht van inspiratie. Met onze exclusieve designs willen jou een dagelijkse boost aanbieden. Doormiddel van een boodschap of visie die op een door jouw unieke wijze geïnterpreteerd wordt en jou motiveert om iedere dag weer dat stapje extra voor jezelf te zetten. Zo begint en eindigt jouw dag positief.

Vanuit een passie voor persoonlijke ontwikkeling is onze missie ontstaan om op grote schaal een bijdrage te leveren aan de groei van anderen. Met onze unieke designs hopen wij die passie ook bij jou aan te wakkeren. Want er is veel mogelijk in het leven. Zeker wanneer je leeft met positieve gedachten die bijdragen aan positieve uitkomsten.

Met ons team van kunstenaars en creatievelingen streven wij ernaar voor iedereen wat wils te creëren. Een kunstwerk dat naast een verrijking van jouw woonkamer ook nog van betekenis kan zijn om het beste uit jezelf te halen.

Team Kuotes Art

Name: Wassaic Project
Description: The Wassaic Project, a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, uses art and arts education to foster positive social change. We nurture connections between our artists and our neighbors facilitating a mutual broadening of perspectives and respect across economic and cultural boundaries.

Name: Accademia del Disegno
Description: Un'Accademia di Belle Arti completamente online per seguire corsi live con insegnanti oppure in streaming da guardare dove e quando vuoi.

Name: Theatergroep Boktor
Description:
Theatergroep Boktor
Boktor is een theatergroep die voorstellingen maakt waarbij amateurspelers gekoppeld worden aan een jonge maker. 
Kwaliteit, onderzoek en experiment staan hierbij voorop.

Boktor is inmiddels een begrip in Goirle en omstreken. Boktor wil voorloper en ook het voorbeeld zijn in Brabant van amateurtoneel in ontwikkeling. Toneel wat schuurt, verwondert, afstoot, confronteert, inspireert en vooral een maatschappelijk kritisch maat blijft slaan.

Name: Kulturstiftung des Freistaates Sachsen
Description: Die Kulturstiftung des Freistaates Sachsen fördert seit 1993 Kunst- und Kulturprojekte, vergibt Stipendien und kauft zeitgenössische Kunst an. Ihre Arbeit dient der freien Entfaltung von Kunst und Kultur im Freistaat Sachsen. Sie unterstützt die Entwicklung neuer künstlerischer Ausdrucksformen und fördert den künstlerischen Nachwuchs. Sie engagiert sich für die nachhaltige Vermittlung von Kunst und Kultur, die Pflege des kulturellen Erbes und die grenzüberschreitende kulturelle Zusammenarbeit. #DamitKulturWachsenKann

Name: ADA \ contemporary art gallery
Description:
ADA \ contemporary art gallery is a new commercial art space opening in 2020 in Accra, Ghana. 

Our mission is to partner with and present the most noteworthy emerging artists of African descent working on the continent and globally.

Name: Harfun Studio
Description: Founded in 2020, Harfun Studio emerges as a haven for emerging artists, conceived and nurtured by creatives with a shared passion for fostering artistic expression within the community. Within the confines of our studio, we extend an invitation to individuals seeking respite from the monotony of everyday existence, encouraging them to unearth the latent wellsprings of childlike creativity. Through immersive encounters with diverse artistic mediums, participants are empowered to craft their own unique artworks, thereby embarking on a journey of self-discovery and creative rejuvenation.

Name: EB-Artwork & Coaching
Description:
Ik ben Elisabeth Baron: creatief-systemisch coach en beeldend kunstenaar.  
Het inspireert mij enorm hoe de mens en de systemen waarin hij zich bevindt elkaar beïnvloeden. En hoe ik als coach jou weer in je waarde kan laten zijn en je weer op jouw eigen plek binnen een systeem kan laten staan, zodat je levensenergie weer kan gaan stromen. Dit werk is helend voor je ziel en het geeft mij enorm veel voldoening om dat te begeleiden. De coaching kan nog versterkt worden door creatief aan de slag te gaan. 
In mijn atelier-praktijkruimte geef ik de coaching, maar je kunt er ook terecht voor een creatieve workshop of een Atelier-dag.
Verder ben ik organisator en begeleider van Creatieve Retraites op mooie landelijke locaties vlakbij Deventer. Ik gun jou de tijd en ruimte om stil te staan bij waar je op dit moment in het leven staat. Op een prachtige locatie, verwend worden met heerlijk eten en tijd voor wandelingen, goede gesprekken en creatieve en meditatieve opdrachten. Het is een voorrecht om dit te doen en ook hier kan ik met systemische coaching nog meer verdieping geven. Wil je nog meer? 
Ik denk in oplossingen en mogelijkheden, kan goed plannen en organiseren, houd van samenwerken, zelfstandig werken en afwisseling, bovendien ben ik nuchter en praktisch.
Mijn creativiteit en systemisch coachen zet ik graag enthousiast in voor jou, jouw team of bedrijf!

Name: Daa Art Gallery
Description:
Daa Art Gallery, launched in 2022, emerged out of our shared vision to create a platform for recent graduates, emerging artists and UK based international artists, and aspires to promote critical conversations and creative exchanges between contemporary artists who will shape the future of the contemporary art world. 
Our aim is to foster meaningful dialogue between artists from the Middle East and those from the Western world. Our goal is to create a platform where diverse voices can intersect, sparking critical conversations and cultural exchange. By showcasing the works of Middle Eastern artists alongside Western counterparts, we seek to highlight the rich tapestry of artistic expression while exploring themes of identity, tradition, and innovation. Through this juxtaposition of styles, forms, and trends, we invite visitors to explore the interconnectedness of global art movements and to appreciate the depth and diversity of artistic expression across borders.
At Daa Art, we take pride in showcasing the diverse talents of our artists through a series of exhibitions. Among these, we regularly hold several online exhibitions, private viewings, as well as two pop-up exhibitions per year.
Through our exhibitions, we aim to foster a dynamic and vibrant environment that not only promotes the art itself but also supports the artists in their journey. We believe that by facilitating these connections between artists and their audience, we can help both the creators and the appreciators of art to engage in meaningful, inspiring interactions.

Name: Kinzelman Art Consulting
Description:
Kinzelman Art Consulting has earned an unprecedented reputation in the art industry for developing and managing private and corporate collections since our inception in 2000. The staff of Kinzelman Art brings a wealth of specialized experience in the arts, and excels in providing uncomplicated strategies for assisting clients in today’s fluctuating market.

Our extensive knowledge and individual expertise has enabled us to assemble and maintain a vast network of resources within the global art communities. As a result, Kinzelman Art is uniquely poised to provide highly specialized art management services for collectors just starting out or collectors with more sophisticated needs. We approach each project thoughtfully and as a collaborative partnership with our clients.

Name: JS Koori Designs
Description: JS Koori Designs aims to guide individuals and companies to discover their connection and tell their unique stories through creativity.

Name: artfairmag
Description: Artfairmag is a database tracking around 400 regional and international fairs around the world, including information on timing, location, date and type of art sold. Artfairmag was founded by Pauline Loeb-Obrenan in 2019, who prior to starting the database worked at Galerie Kugel in Paris for eight years. Artfairmag.com also provides insights from interviews with art fair directors and gallerists about their events and exhibitions.

Name: Galerie Barbara Thumm
Description: Galerie Barbara Thumm is a contemporary fine art company based out of 68 Markgrafenstraße, Berlin, Germany.

Name: Alarcón Criado Gallery
Description:
La galería está especializada en arte contemporáneo europeo y latinoamericano. Sus acciones se enfocan en la promoción de los artistas a los que representa mediante el desarrollo de un programa anual de exposiciones y la asistencia regular a ferias internacionales en Europa, EEUU y América Latina.

Las propuestas de Alarcón Criado abarcan un amplio espectro de soportes de la producción artística contemporánea (escultura, pintura, fotografía, vídeo, instalaciones site-specific, performance, acciones colectivas).

La galería genera una actividad expositiva que otorga prioridad a proyectos curatoriales y a propuestas artísticas de carácter innovador y experimental. La galería se ofrece como una plataforma que favorece la colaboración con los actores implicados en las artes y el impulso de estrategias que enriquezcan las relaciones entre cultura y sociedad.

Name: Myriad Art Group
Description:
Four distinct brands. Extensive in-house capabilities. Commitment to art and design.

Myriad Art Group is a collection of art consulting and publishing brands serving the design community, specializing in art solutions for the hospitality, corporate, healthcare, senior living, and residential markets.

We are artists, art consultants, printers, and framers. Our team collaborates with a community of thousands of independent artists worldwide.

When you partner with us, you leverage our company-owned North American network of printing, stretching, fabricating and framing facilities – built to realize your design objectives – striving to honor the standards, legacy, and heritage of our four unique brands.

Our mission is to create inspirational spaces.

Name: Vasim Circus Space
Description: We bouwen in Nijmegen een circusruimte waar iedereen een plek kan vinden om te spelen, maken en delen.

Name: Chemould Prescott Road
Description: Established by Kekoo and Khorshed Gandhy in Mumbai in 1963, Chemould is one of the first exhibition spaces in India focusing on modern and contemporary art, that presents works by the country’s most prominent artists across interdisciplinary and experimental mediums. Through its online viewing rooms, artist projects and significant presence in global art fairs and programs, Chemould is also at the forefront of international art platforms.

Name: Sweet Magnoliaa
Description:
Welcome to Sweet Magnoliaa Home — your sanctuary for interior design inspiration. I'm Bhawana, your curator and guide through a world where aesthetics meet personal essence. Whether you're looking to mirror your personality in your home or eager to experiment with new styles, you've come to the right place. #interiordesign #interiordesigntips #homedecorideas #aiart

Name: Dastan
Description:
Dastan Gallery features an extensive and multi-dimensional program, focusing on the full spectrum of Iranian contemporary and modern art. Dastan's program includes Dastan's Basement, Dastan+2 and Dastan:Outside. In addition to hosting exhibitions, Dastan publishes artist books as well as monographs on Iranian art, features film screenings, performance projects and other events.
 
Dastan Gallery’s original space, Dastan’s Basement, was established in 2012 in Tehran, Iran. The Basement is dedicated to exhibiting emerging and experimental Iranian art. In October 2015, Dastan opened its first "standard" space, Dastan+2, within walking distance of the Basement to showcase works by established Iranian artists and masters.
 
Since the opening of its primary space, Dastan’s Basement, in 2012, Dastan has continuously hosted pop-up curated exhibitions around the city of Tehran under the title Dastan:Outside, including shows at Sam Art (in Sam Center Mall), V-Gallery, and Shirin Confectionary's building. The program, aimed to extend the gallery’s program outside of its regular venues, features exhibitions that are usually site-specific and mostly involve experimental and non-traditional formats of exhibiting art.
 
Dastan:Outside's newest temporary space, Electric Room, which was opened in June 2017 in downtown Tehran right across Faculty of Fine Arts and Architecture (Azad University, Tehran), focuses on showcasing short-term experimental projects, research-based presentations, smaller-scale events, and occasional single-piece exhibits.

Name: Gallery van Dun
Description:
Gallery van Dun is gevestigd in een prachtig monumentaal pand in hartje Oisterwijk. In deze galerie is een groot aanbod aan internationale moderne hedendaagse kunst te bewonderen. Gallery van Dun onderscheidt zichzelf met het kunstaanbod, dat is gecreëerd door nationaal en internationaal talent. 

De vaste collectie bestaat uit dertig kunstenaars die hun nieuwste werken exposeren in de galerie. Er is dus altijd wat nieuws te ontdekken. De galerie specialiseert zich daarnaast in hoogwaarde sculpturen. In 2015 werd Gallery van Dun kwart finalist in de wedstrijd om de titel Beste galerie van Nederland.   

Gallery van Dun is een laagdrempelige kunstgalerie waar kunstliefhebbers, kunstkenners, kunstenaars en bezoekers met of zonder kunstkennis samenkomen. De bar middenin de galerie is de perfecte plek om na het bekijken van de vele kunstwerken een kopje koffie of een drankje te drinken. Deze gemoedelijke ambiance is typerend voor de kunstgalerie. 

De bijzondere beeldentuin fungeert als expositieruimte van een grote selectie bronzen en marmeren sculpturen van nationaal en internationaal bekende beeldhouwers. Dit maakt Gallery van Dun een uitstekende locatie om te genieten van ongekende schoonheid, ongeacht het weer. 

Het monumentale pand dat de kunstwerken omlijst, heeft twee grote voordelen. Ten eerste laat het zien dat klassiek en modern uitstekend samengaan. De open en lichte ruimtes in het pand werken als het ware als een extra verflaag: het brengt de kunstwerken naar een hoger niveau, zonder dat de aandacht wordt afgeleid. Daarnaast heeft het pand veel verschillende ruimtes waardoor wij constant een zeer gevarieerd aanbod kunnen tentoonstellen van de disciplines waarin wij actief zijn.

In 2013 tilde Jerome van Dun zijn voorliefde voor kunst naar een hoger niveau met het opzetten van Gallery van Dun. Zijn uitgebreide kennis en netwerk over en in de kunstwereld is terug te zien in de galerie.

Name: Ceruleum - School of Visual Arts
Description: Ceruleum is an Art school founded in 1980 in Lausanne. we propose a foundation class, two bachelors ( one in Illustration and Comics, the other one in traditional character animation ) and a Master in animation. We also propose a lot of different workshops in painting, drawing, etching and more...

Name: Javier Montesol
Description:
Oil paintings. Oil on canvas. Impressionist paintings. Barcelona artist painter. Neo-impressionist artworks. Representative of culture and traditions of Spain worldwide. Spanish art Ambassador. Spain Brand Validation worldwide. Internationally known. Exclusivity in galleries located in Madrid, Barcelona and Paris. His artworks are exhibited on the internet in select galleries such as Saatchi Gallery, Artsper, Artsy. His first paintings are already being auctioned. Recognized and established painter.
---------------------Short biography--------------------------- 
- Javier Montesol was born in Barcelona in 1952 and belongs to the generation that fostered the cultural transition in Spain resulting from the change in the dictatorship regime to a Democratic country that took place in the mid-70s.
- He played a leading role in the Underground Comic movement that was initiated in the early 70s, being the founder of emblematic spanish magazines such as Star and Cairo.
- In his early days as an artist He was perceived as a cultural agitator and throughout his career, having to go on exile to Ibiza in the year 74.
Interested in representing the culture and traditions of his country, relying entirely on the validity of the Spanish Brand.
- To date, Montesol´s Artworks are present around the world being exhibited in the famous "El Prado Museum", "MNAC" of Barcelona and "The Museo Taurino de Las ventas", also in prestigious Online Galleries suchs as Artsper, Saatchi and Artsy. Finally, in street Galleries located in Paris and Barcelona, being well known among specialised echelons in Europe and the United States."

Name: AGENCE NEUVILLE Paris - Bordeaux - Genève
Description:
AGENCE NEUVILLE is a prestige agency dedicated to the Art of Living. It was born in Bordeaux. It specialises in the creation of unique events, authentic architectural interior design, brand and corporate communication design, and upscale vacations for guests willing to experience a unique stay in the French city of Bordeaux.

Agence NEUVILLE was created on an original idea of its eponymous founder. It combines the pluridisciplinary and complementary fields of architecture, heritage, culture, communication, artistic creation and event planning to a passion for travelling, at the service of an authentic Bordelais Art of Living.

The international outreach of the Agency is placed under the sign of an intense economic and cultural French-Swiss partnership within the Swiss capital Geneva, a city at the heart of the European continent.

Agence NEUVILLE is accompanied by more than 400 partners everyday, each of them being the perfect illustration of the craftsmanship of their core business. With them, and their remarkable French « savoir-faire », we will carry your projects as they unfold.

Agence Neuville revolves around three great missions: #EVENT #DESIGN #TRAVEL

Excellence and authenticity are the values we ensure when accompanying you in – the creation of your brand from its genesis – the scenography of your event for an evening – the architecture of your living space for a column – the organisation of your stay in Bordeaux.

Name: The First Chord
Description: Unleash creativity at The First Chord Music and Art School! Discover your artistic potential with expert guidance in music and art. Explore diverse mediums, develop skills, and ignite your passion. Join our vibrant community and embark on a journey of self-expression. Unleash your inner artist today!

Name: Halcyon Artistry
Description:
Halcyon is a Toronto-based visual artist and project coordinator. She holds a BA (Hons), TEFL, and MEd, and currently coordinates mental health and addiction projects for Youth Employment Services and the University of Toronto. 

Her niche shifted from pencil crayon drawings to gouache portraits during the pandemic, and she recently started experimenting with scenic paintings, public art, and murals. If she isn't embedding elements of fantasy into her subjects, her love for animals and nature is inspiring her creative work. 

Halcyon’s work has been exhibited by Scarborough Arts, the University of Toronto, and the Art Gallery of Ontario on numerous occasions, and has supported various mental health advocacy and environmental conservation efforts across Canada and the United States.

Halcyon is always eager to collaborate with peer artists and contribute to community-based projects.

Name: Marleen me myself and ART
Description:
Dit avontuur kwam naar voren toen ik in een periode van stilte op zoek was naar manieren om mijzelf uit te drukken. Tijdens deze zoektocht merkte ik dat ik al schrijvend en tekenend mijn overvloed aan gedachtes/sensaties, die door mij heen gingen, een plek wilde geven. De plek van het niet denken, die ik nu magisch noem. Daar waar alles stil wordt, met name in mijn hoofd. Als ik daar ben, voel ik even geen pijn en denk ik niet aan mijn chronische ziekte Sarcoïdose. Op die plek ben ik één met de ruimte, het doek of papier. Daar vind ik geluk, creativiteit maar bovenal mijzelf.
Ik heb terug gevonden wat ik kwijt was. Dat is wat kunst, in welke vorm dan ook met mij doet.
Graag wil ik jullie via deze weg mijn ervaring meegeven. De waarde van kunst ook in wat moeilijker tijden. Het geeft rust, werkt therapeutisch en maakt blij. Stukje bij beetje wil ik jullie meenemen naar die magische plek. Mijn wereld, waar als mijn verstand zwijgt, hele mooie dingen ontstaan..... Bewonder en geniet. Op mijn site zie je enkele grote doeken en tekeningen van mij. Van een aantal kunstwerken heb ik ook posters en ansichtkaarten laten drukken. Hoe leuk is dat! Mooi om op te hangen, naar te kijken, voor jezelf of als cadeautje voor iemand anders die je lief hebt.
Je kunt ook diverse workshops bij mij volgen.... 
en verder kun je mijn persoonlijke blogs lezen die ik schrijf voor de Sarcoïdose Belangenvereniging Nederland.

Name: MEME PAS PEUR.ART
Description:
MEME PAS PEUR .ART une passerelle entre l’art contemporain et l’entreprise.
Ce qui nous anime depuis 4 ans : la conviction que l’art contemporain a toute sa place auprès des entrepreneurs et des dirigeants.

Une œuvre bien choisie ne se contente pas d’être un bel objet et de décorer un bureau. Elle raconte quelque chose de vous, de vos valeurs, de votre audace. Elle inspire vos collaborateurs, vos clients, vos partenaires. Elle nourrit une culture d’entreprise forte, attractive et vivante.

Et au delà de l’impact symbolique, l’art offre de véritables avantages patrimoniaux et fiscaux souvent méconnus.

POUR VOUS OFFRIR DES EMOTIONS NOUVELLES
Même Pas Peur .Art est à votre écoute pour comprendre et vous proposer des œuvres qui vont vous toucher, vous émouvoir...

POUR VOUS PROPOSER DES PERSPECTIVES INATTENDUES
Une œuvre d’art transforme un bureau, une salle d’attente, un hall d’accueil en lieux vivants. Elle permet de se démarquer, elle interpelle et retient l’attention des visiteurs, partenaires et clients.

POUR VOUS PRESENTER DES ŒUVRES D’ART EXIGEANTES
Nous suivons et soutenons de nombreux artistes depuis près de vingt ans. Même Pas Peur .Art vous permet d’acquérir des œuvres d’artistes émergents et d’artistes reconnus dans le monde de l’art contemporain.

POUR VOUS CONSEILLER DES INVESTISSEMENTS PERTINENTS
L’acquisition d’une œuvre d’art en France s’effectue dans un cadre privilégié, avantageux pour les entreprises.
De nombreux dispositifs soutiennent l’art contemporain et permettent dans un cadre précis de défiscaliser une partie importante de votre investissement.
Même Pas Peur .Art s’entoure d’experts – avocat fiscaliste et partenaire bancaire – pour vous aider à choisir l’option la plus adaptée : acquisition déductible, location avec ou sans option d’achat, fondation d’entreprise...

Name: Hortensia Organisation
Description:
PRESENTATION

Hortensia organization is a cultural, artistic and humanitarian structure which aims to be a space for initiation, creation and promotion of talents for peace and peaceful coexistence through art and volunteering.

HORTENSIA what?

Etymologically the word HORTENSIA comes from the Latin "hortensius" which means "garden". By extension, hydrangea means garden plant to garden flower. Hydrangea is arguably one of the most beautiful flowering shrubs made of large, brightly colored balls or inflorescences, lacy plants.

Why HORTENSIA?

This nomenclature comes from the fact that the structure constitutes a space of cultural expression for young and younger (nursery) that is to say that it is supposed to be a garden where thousands of talents for peace flourish.

Name: The Melbourne Map
Description:
The Melbourne Map is an iconic illustration of this magnificent city. 
Intricately researched and hand-drawn over three years the artwork is a popular addition to the walls of Melbournians and Melbourne lovers.

Magnificent limited editions and art prints are now in homes, offices and schools here and abroad.  The award-winning map is now Australia's favourite 1,000 piece jigsaw puzzle and together with a brilliantly designed "Can You Find?" Calendar (with 400 things to find!) they’ve become popular corporate and staff gifts https://www.themelbournemap.com.au/maps/ .

Our creative team of researchers and artists are continuing with map-making adventures, and have recently completed The Bellarine Map with others now on the drawing board.

Melinda Clarke (founder) has loved illustrated maps since first collecting them while travelling through Europe and the USA in the mid-'80s. Discovering that Melbourne hadn’t been drawn in detail since 1880 https://www.themelbournemap.com.au/product/melbourne-1880-samuel-calvert-etching/, led her to create the first iconic Melbourne Map https://www.themelbournemap.com.au/product/1991-colour-poster-melbourne-map/ in 1990.

A decision to honour Melbourne with another map came in 2017, and Lewis Brownlie (chief illustrator) spent 2.5 years at the easel documenting every little detail of Melbourne's architecture, parklands, streetscapes and the quirky things discovered during our research.

Deborah Young (artist of the 1990 map) contributed her character illustrations, and in late 2018 we published The Melbourne Map black & white edition.  https://www.themelbournemap.com.au/product/black-white-map/ Following this Sean Rodwell (digital colourist) wove his magic on the iMac and brought 

The Melbourne Map colour version https://www.themelbournemap.com.au/product/colour-map/ to life.

Name: Almasi Art Agency
Description: Almasi is the Swahili word for diamond, synonymous with immense beauty! Almasi Art Agency was founded in 2019 with the aim of sourcing, promoting and selling of fine art pieces, with emphasis placed on the growth of each artist represented and client satisfaction. Currently working with 70 artists from 19 different nationalities, the agency boasts a multi-talented pool of painters, sculptors, photographers, mixed media practitioners among others. Most of these artists have worked on fine African art and subjects, with a good number having exhibited abroad and a few younger ones rising in prominence.

Name: VALETTE STUDIO
Description:
A firm believer in the evergreen coolness of sharply-cut tailoring, carefully selected fabrics, and impeccable finishes, Pierre-François Valette founded Valette Studio in 2020.
 In three seasons, this graduate of the Chambre Syndicale, who also trained with Isabel Marant and the house of Saint Laurent, has come up with an idiosyncratic "casual couture" aesthetic for men and women, peppered with quirky touches, in sync with a new generation constantly migrating between formality and streetwear. At Valette Studio, suits have the comfort of tracksuits, vivid colors and patterns appear unexpectedly, and inventive layerings shed a new light on tailoring. 

Each collection explores numerous art and literature references, from Andy Warhol through Albert Camus and David Bowie, legends whose renegade mindset jibes with the spirit of the brand. And although Valette Studio offers ready-to-wear, it functions in a modern "maison de couture" spirit, hence the fastidious crafting of the clothes and  its insistence on promoting collective work, symbolized by its inclusive brand name.

Name: Artoday
Description:
#PEOPLE

Artoday is a project founded by the two young curators Federico Montagna and Alessia Romano in 2017 from the need to bring the world of contemporary art closer to the digital one and widen the audience of art.
In 4 years we have built a community of artists, gallerists, art-lovers, collectors, curators and art professionals, as well as collaborated online with over 300 artists around the world who are now part of our network. 
We further develop these relationships into an ADVISORY service activity.

#PLACES 
Our aim has always been to evolve virtual interactions into real relationships. That's why in we met many artists in their studios, we confronted each other, we deepened their practice and shared visions, thoughts and hopes that stimulated and inspired us in our work as well. 
We collaborate with artists for exhibitions, projects and events, also creating a bridge between the world of art and that of companies.
To live new experiences, online & offline.

#STORIES 
We are the first Digital Curators team in Italy, made of young professionals with heterogeneous skills who carries out an activity of selection, sharing and telling stories of the best emerging talents of the international art scene thanks to a great expertise in digital communication and new technologies. 
We look at new ways of expression and interaction for artists, such as AR and VR technologies. 
To tell and support the art of today in the world of today.

Name: eion.io
Description: eion, a new platform exclusively dedicated to art, culture and creators. www.eion.io

Name: Pangolin London
Description:
Located in a purpose-built gallery near the main entrance to Kings Place, Pangolin London is affiliated with Europe's leading sculpture foundry, Pangolin Editions.

Pangolin London is one of the city’s few galleries dedicated to exhibiting sculpture and since opening in 2008, continues to deliver a rotating exhibition programme of the highest quality. In addition to the exhibitions in the gallery, Pangolin London also curates a changing exhibition of large scale sculpture throughout the public spaces and canal-side at Kings Place as well as holding a series of talks and lectures to coincide with exhibitions.

The exhibition programme includes work by a range of established and emerging sculptors including Lynn Chadwick, William Tucker, Ralph Brown, Jon Buck, Terence Coventry, Abigail Fallis, Peter Randall-Page and Ann Christopher, as well as organising mixed exhibitions featuring a number of well known contemporary names.

Name: BAODT Art
Description:
BAODT´s mission – to make art accessible to everyone by creating new and fun concepts of art events through Pop Up Galleries and Pop Up Auctions for urban and contemporary art. 

Are you interested in art? But are not sure how and where to start looking? Well, that’s BAODT to change!

By distributing original art pieces and creating social events where artists and buyers can meet, dive into conversations and learn about one another BAODT is increasing market value for the artists and opening up new investment opportunities, especially for the younger generation. 

BAODT is approaching young buyers by creating fun and exciting Pop Up experiences where everyone feels comfortable exploring a new version of the conventional way of buying art.

BAODT also offers a free Art Advisory Service. Whether you are a newbie and want to invest your hard-earned bucks into your first art piece or have already stepped foot in the scene we will personally accompany you at every stage of the acquisition process. BAODT’s goal is to understand your style, wishes and expectations and advise accordingly. 

It’s time to buy art or die trying!

Name: EMERGE — Cultural Association
Description:
EN. EMERGE is a non-profit cultural association founded in 2016 in Torres Vedras, whose main objective is to promote contemporary art produced by emerging artists. This promotion is carried out through the various projects developed in partnership with public and private institutions, curators, artists, galleries, among others, addressing nowadays’s subjects of contemporary art.

PT. A EMERGE é uma associação cultural sem fins lucrativos, fundada em 2016 em Torres Vedras, que tem como principal objetivo promover arte contemporânea produzida por artistas emergentes. Esta promoção é levada a cabo através dos vários projetos desenvolvidos em parceria com instituições públicas e privadas, curadores, artistas, galerias, entre outros, abordando temas prementes da arte contemporânea.

Name: C L E A R I N G
Description:
C L E A R I N G is a contemporary art gallery based in New York and Brussels. The gallery was founded in 2011, with the focus of showing emerging art. It now represents 17 living artists, providing many of them - such as Harold Ancart, Korakrit Arunanondchai, Calvin Marcus and Marina Pinsky - with their first gallery exhibition. The gallery also represents the estates of Eduardo Paolozzi, Bruno Gironcoli and René Heyvaert.
C L E A R I N G supports its artists by producing works, exhibitions and books, as well as working closely with public and private institutions.

Name: Beirut Art Residency
Description:
Beirut Art Residency is a nonprofit, artist-run interdisciplinary space opening in September 2015. Our artist-in-residence program aims to stimulate creativity through interaction with the local environment, artists and cultural institutions, and seeks to foster cross-cultural relations between participants and the local artistic community in Beirut. Tucked away in the side streets of central Beirut's Gemmayze district lies a building with inspiring views overlooking the shipping port. This area along with Mar Mikhael, is the center of Beirut's bohemian quarter. Since the end of the Lebanese civil war in 1990 the neighborhood has been undergoing gentrification. Today it is well known for its emerging art scene with the appearance of several galleries in the past few years.   

The art residency includes 3 large bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a large shared working area along with 1 private working area. The six-week program can hosts up to 5 multidisciplinary artists at a time. A group exhibition will culminate the residency. 

Beyond the core Residency program, Beirut Art Residency develops its own projects, organizes screenings, workshops, discussions and performances by collaborating with art professionals from the Middle East and around the world.

Name: Art'East
Description:
Art'East c'est la galerie d'art en ligne qui saura vous faire découvrir nos artistes locaux encore étudiant.
Mais c'est encore plus que ça, c'est une envie de leur apporter des opportunités professionnelles, un réseau solide et la visibilité qu'ils méritent.

Name: Lisa Elley ART
Description:
Lisa is an award-winning palette knife artist, working from her studio in the San Francisco Bay. Her artistic vision is to share a journey of joy and connection with her happy paintings. She aims to tell her multilayered story with an energetic passion, which is anchored in her love of the landscape. Her signature deep impasto oil painting technique utilizes palette knives to create texture, dimension, and movement. 
Art often reflects personality, and her certainty and playful abandon are apparent in her colorful, uplifting paintings. Overall, her purpose with her art is to evoke an emotion with her collectors and followers, to inspire, and to provide a deeper connection to the world around us.

Description: Art Dealer and Advisor

Description: Photographer, Designer & Artist.

Name: Maison / Atelier Gallery Pierre
Description: The "IMPRESSIONISM" colors life and reveals a world of light color; The real feeling of the light itself, abstraction of color. Goethe, in the development of his color theory, frequently made use of the insights of painters who expressed how they experienced the colors (psychologically). "Perception of color is an inner phenomenon, at least for people who do not suppress their feelings"

Name: FITUT - Festival International du Théâtre Universitaire de Tanger
Description:
Le Festival International du Théâtre Universitaire de Tanger (FITUT) est un événement artistique et culturel de référence, organisé chaque année dans la ville de Tanger. Depuis 2007, il réunit des troupes universitaires du Maroc et du monde entier autour de l’Art Vivant, dans une dynamique d’échange, de formation et de création.

Porté par une équipe passionnée, le FITUT a pour vocation de :
	•	Promouvoir le théâtre universitaire et les jeunes talents
	•	Encourager le dialogue interculturel et l’ouverture sur le monde
	•	Offrir une plateforme d’expression à la jeunesse artistique
	•	Participer activement à la vie culturelle et sociale de la ville de Tanger

Chaque édition propose une programmation riche : représentations, ateliers, conférences, carnaval, expositions et soirées culturelles. Le festival bénéficie également d’une large couverture médiatique et d’une forte présence sur les réseaux sociaux.

Avec ses 17 éditions consécutives, le FITUT s’est imposé comme un rendez-vous culturel incontournable à l’échelle nationale et internationale.

#FITUT #ThéâtreUniversitaire #Culture #Tanger #Jeunesse #ArtVivant

Name: The Collective Makers
Description: We support emerging artists

Name: Tel Aviv Museum's American Friends, Inc.
Description:
Tel Aviv Museum of Art American Friends (TAMAF) is a not-for-profit 501(c)(3) organization, founded in 2014, that raises funds and awareness in the United States for the Tel Aviv Museum of Art.
TAMAF members are passionate about promoting the Museum as an epicenter for both Israeli and international contemporary visual culture and are committed to expanding the American Friends community throughout the United States.

Through a dynamic events program, TAMAF members participate in private collection visits, artist studio and gallery tours and international art fairs that celebrate contemporary Israeli art and highlight parallels between exhibitions and programming in Tel Aviv and the United States.

Tel Aviv Museum of Art, Israel’s foremost modern and contemporary art museum, welcomes close to 650,000 visitors annually. Established in 1932 by Tel Aviv’s first mayor, the Museum mounts over thirty exhibitions annually and is recognized for its renowned collection and world-class exhibitions featuring international and Israeli artists.

Name: Círculo Fusión
Description: Círculo Fusión is the first digital project created around innovation and the avant-garde in art, music, and gastronomy. Looking for a common thread in the three subjects, we came to the conclusion that their bases have strong links in common, and we present it in an incredibly easy and convenient format! Through voice and images, we will make a unique journey, with the most important professionals national and international. You just have to relax, press Play and enjoy it.

Name: Eras - Daily Art
Description: a socially anxious artist & writer, whom has traversed a tumultuous journey through life, marked by numerous losses, moments of profound self-reflection, and overwhelming grief. These experiences have shaped their perspective, leaving them perplexed by the intricate workings of society and its often bewildering norms. Yet, amidst the chaos, Maii harbours a burning desire to express their enigmatic and distinctive nature through their art and personality. As the seasons change, Maii finds themselves grappling with the weight of seasonal depression, which casts a somber hue over their world. The gloomy atmosphere becomes a constant companion, seeping into their thoughts and coloring their artistic creations. Through their writing and art, they seek to unravel the enigma of existence, inviting viewers to delve into the depths of their own emotions and introspection.

Name: FATart
Description:
Femme Artist Table (FATart) ist ein Schweizer Kunstverein, der sich seit 2016 für eine gleichberechtigte und zeitgemässe Inklusion von Frauen und FLINTA in der Kunstwelt einsetzt.

FATart entwickelt und realisiert das ganze Jahr über Aktivitäten und Ausstellungen. Dabei ist einerseits das Ziel Frauen* in der Kunst mehr Raum und eine kräftigere Stimme zu geben. Andererseits soll über die Grenzen der Kunstszene hinweg Sichtbarkeit, Gehör, Beachtung und Akzeptanz geschaffen werden.

FATart engagiert sich mit Initiativen, Projekten und Veranstaltungen für die Anliegen von Künstlerinnen*, Kuratorinnen*, Kunstberaterinnen*, Galeristinnen* sowie Kunst-Startup-Gründerinnen* und mischt so seit einigen Jahren erfolgreich den Schweizer Kunstmarkt auf. 

Die anhaltende Diskriminierung von FLINTA in der Kunstwelt endlich verändern – let’s get FAT!


Mit Frauen* meint FATart alle Menschen, die sich als Frauen definieren.

FLINTA ist eine Abkürzung, die für folgendes steht: Frauen, Lesben, Inter Menschen, Nichtbinäre Menschen und Trans Menschen. FLINTA Personen sind alle diejenigen, welche das Patriarchat unterdrückt.

Name: Raja Ravi Varma College of Fine Arts, Mavelikkara
Description: Raja Ravi Varma College of Fine Arts, Mavelikkara is a higher education company based out of Mavelikara.P.O, Mavelikara, Kerala, India.

Name: PrivateLot.com
Description:
PrivateLot.com is a marketplace in art & antiques launched in January 2012.
Thanks to its customers, the turnover increased by 600% between 2013 and 2014 and the platform reach more than 100,000 visits per month and 30,000 registered buyers.

Every month, you can discover more than 3,000 items from auction houses.
PrivateLot.com works with more than 70 European auction houses to offer you high quality items.

Through 30 categories, you will find many objects that have all been valued and estimated by experts.
You can buy with trust on the website works of art from famous artists in a few clicks.
Your private account will give you access to your private sales with exclusive items.

Name: Fondation Guido Molinari
Description: La Fondation Guido Molinari résulte d’un geste généreux de l’artiste, et est destinée à valoriser et à pérenniser son travail de création par l’installation, dans son dernier studio situé dans une ancienne banque du quartier Hochelaga-Maisonneuve, d’un centre d’exposition, de documentation, de conférence, d’éducation et de création. L’organisme a pour mandat de tenir un musée de référence pour l’œuvre de Molinari et de favoriser la présentation d’autres artistes contemporain.es et actuel.le.s dans un rapport de résonance avec les enjeux que son œuvre soulève. La Fondation souhaite ainsi s’impliquer dans les débats théoriques, valoriser les dialogues transhistoriques et offrir la chance aux artistes et aux commissaires de revisiter des corpus d’histoire de l’art avec un regard actuel.

Name: KP Singh Designs
Description: KP’s passion and advocacy for preservation of Indiana’ s historic architecture through his pen and ink drawings form the heart of his business, KP Singh Designs, established in 1972.  KP saw his art as a way to create appreciation for historic buildings and surviving landmarks as a resource for cultural and artistic heritage of earlier generations. KP’s finely executed drawings introduce us to the beauty of magnificent architecture, advocating for its relevance to our times and heritage.

Name: Blossing Art
Description:
Blossing (Hilde Aalbers) schildert in opdracht. Dit zijn altijd unieke en exclusieve schilderijen op maat waar persoonlijke onderwerpen in zijn verwerkt. De schilderijen die door Hilde zijn gemaakt worden gekenmerkt door de gelaagdheid en diverse stijlen die in ieder kunstwerk terug te zien zijn.  

Alles kan! Zoveel mensen, zoveel wensen en daarom is ieder schilderij uniek. Jij  geeft je wensen aan met betrekking tot kleur, stijl en de onderwerpen en Hilde maakt er een prachtig kunstwerk van. De opdrachten die Hilde krijgt zijn heel verschillend en hebben diverse aanleidingen maar één ding hebben ze gemeen; het zijn altijd exclusieve schilderijen waar veel in gebeurt en waar je naar kan blijven kijken.
