Name: ATNSC: Center for Healing and Creative Leadership
Description:
ATNSC is a socially engaged artist-led, urban retreat, residency, research and exhibition space for BIPOC artists and change catalysts in the historic Buckeye-Shaker neighborhood of Cleveland, Ohio.

We work at the intersections of contemporary art, healing, equity leadership, systems thinking and change. 

On site we have a woodshop, digital lab and archive of the founder of the Gestalt OSD Center, The John D. Carter Resource Library For Consciousness and Change.

Name: Anthony Meier
Description:
Anthony Meier was established in 1984 as a private dealer in the secondary market. Working with both public and private collections, Anthony Meier built a highly regarded international reputation specializing in post-World War II contemporary masters. In 1996 Anthony Meier opened a public gallery space in the Pacific Heights neighborhood of San Francisco. In 2023 the gallery opened a new location in Mill Valley, California in a historic building downtown.

As a public forum, Anthony Meier mounts five or more exhibitions per year dedicated to emerging, mid-career and established artists. The work shown in the gallery is consistent with the quality and visual aesthetic on which the business was founded.

Anthony Meier is active both locally and globally, with membership in the Art Dealers Association of America and the San Francisco Art Dealers Association. Past and present participation in the major art fairs of the world has helped to merge our primary and secondary programs and present the gallery program as a cohesive progression, from post-war masterworks to contemporary artists working today. With our range and quality of work, the gallery inventory maintains a current and well-articulated profile in the art world at large.

Description:
Let's paint with I AM An Artist Drawing and Painting classes in an art studio.

Our Classes is for all age groups and levels including Adult, Kids, Teens, Elementary and Intermediate, Drawing and Painting workshops, Art courses, oil paintings, acrylic on canvas, charcoal painting and more.

We have a range of courses designed with beginners to Advance level 

The aura, atmosphere of I AM AN Artist studio itself gives our students a positive approach in their journey of exploring the beautiful side of the artwork. 2112 is a Copenhagen based hybrid gallery embracing art advisory, artist representation, international collaborations, and more. Founded in 2016 by art historian Caroline Bøge.

ART ADVISORY:
Our art advisory is undertaken by Caroline Bøge personally. She assists private as well as corporate clients. Caroline works with a curatorial approach and use her knowledge base, network and expertise to find just the right art works for her clients across both domestic and international galleries, artists and dealers. 

Caroline has strong experience with creating corporate art strategies and collections that support company brand identity and values. 
Corporate clients include: Bruun & Hjejle, PwC, Copenhagen Infrastructure Partners, Bech Bruun a.o.

ARTIST REPRESENTATION:
2112 has the pleasure of representing a select group of contemporary artists:
Ruth Campau, Lars Christensen, Sophie Dupont, Jeannette Ehlers, Gun Gordillo, Lea Guldditte Hestelund, Malene Landgreen, Kirstine Roepstorff, Dan Stockholm and Carla Zaccagnini. 
Works by the artists can be viewed in the gallery in Holbergsgade 20.

COLLABORATIONS:

2112 regularly presents exhibitions made in collaboration with external stakeholders, such as international galleries, artists, collectors etc.

Name: Pakje Kunst
Description:
Pakje Kunst gebruikt oude mechanische sigarettenautomaten die als cultureel erfgoed ingezet worden om lokale kunstenaars laagdrempelig onder de aandacht te brengen aan mensen woonachtig in de eigen regio en daarbuiten.
 
Uit een automaat trek je een Pakje Kunst met daarin een uniek kunstwerk en een bijlage met informatie over de kunstenaar. Zo krijgt de koper toegang tot het kunstaanbod in de regio/stad.

Name: 1m83
Description: The Collective 1m83 participates to the constant transformation of cities by creating open-air exhibition spaces that bring culture and creativity into city dwellers’ everyday lives. Each project is inspired by the site’s architecture and setting in order to unite, for the duration of a renovation project, a building and an artwork. The collective’s approach aims to give artists an opportunity to express themselves in large formats on building wraps, and at the same time to promote the construction trades and the architectural heritage.

Name: Art Pascal Furlan
Description:
Vous cherchez un tableau qui apporte une vraie présence à votre intérieur ?
Quelque chose qui vous ressemble, ou peut-être un portrait à offrir, chargé d’émotion et fait pour durer ?

Je suis Pascal Furlan, peintre depuis plus de quinze ans. J’ai commencé un peu par hasard, mais la peinture a vite pris toute la place. L’acrylique est devenue mon langage. Elle me permet d’aller droit à l’essentiel : la lumière, les nuances, l’énergie d’un instant.

Chaque toile naît lentement dans mon atelier, à Sainte-Livrade-sur-Lot. Rien n’est automatisé : je peins à la main, sur des toiles de qualité, jusqu’à trouver l’équilibre entre la couleur et ce que je veux faire ressentir.
Toutes mes œuvres sont cotées Akoun et référencées sur Artmajeur. Certaines vivent aujourd’hui chez des particuliers, en France comme à l’étranger, et d’autres continuent de voyager dans mes expositions.

Je propose aussi des tableaux sur commande. Parfois, c’est un souvenir, un lieu, une photo, une idée qu’on m’apporte. J’aime ces échanges, car ils donnent naissance à des œuvres vraiment personnelles, ancrées dans la vie de ceux qui les commandent.

Le Lot-et-Garonne reste ma source d’inspiration. Ses lumières, ses saisons, ses silences nourrissent ma peinture.
J’expose régulièrement en France et en Belgique. En 2024, j’ai eu la chance de recevoir le prix du jury “artiste étranger” au salon L’Art d’Ici et d’Ailleurs de Huy – une belle reconnaissance et surtout beaucoup de rencontres.

Mon site pascalfurlan.fr
 présente mes tableaux, mes actualités et les commandes en cours.
Si vous aimez les œuvres qui racontent sans trop en dire, je serai heureux de vous faire découvrir mon travail.

Name: Skowhegan School of Painting & Sculpture
Description: Founded in 1946 by artists for artists, Skowhegan is one of the country’s foremost programs for emerging artists. The intensive nine-week summer session, held on a 350-acre campus in Maine, provides a collaborative and rigorous environment for artistic creation, risk-taking, and mentorship by creating a flexible pedagogical framework that is informed by the School’s history and is responsive to the needs of individual artists. Skowhegan summers have had a lasting impact on the practices of thousands of artists, and play an integral role in ensuring the vitality of contemporary artmaking. Since 2014, Skowhegan has hosted public and alumni programs at its space in New York City that carry forward the spirit and character of the campus.

Name: Art&Emotions
Description:
I am Ewa. Creative graphic designer and feminine artistic soul.

As creative designer I have high art background and practice on senior level experience. On a daily basis I co-run Rebels Studio. We enjoy designing brand identities and product packaging for the beauty industry.

As feminine artistic soul my love is art, design, modern oil painting, minimalism and abstraction. 

Here, on this LI page, you are invited to take a journey into my world of art and emotions.

I expose my sensitivity in original, modern oil paintings. I transfer lot of emotions onto my canvases. My heroines are full of expression and multi-dimensionality. My inspirations and motifs are dominated by people, their lives and relationships. I capture fleeting moments, feelings and memories.

In painting, I seek to break stereotypes, moving smoothly among minimalist abstraction, portraiture and nudes. My unique works are winning acclaim for their modernity, femininity and gently simple, atmospheric charm.

I you would ask me about my love to oil paints, I will replie: "Oils allow the canvas to come alive with an unlimited palette of colours. The technique of working with colour is responsible for the uniqueness of the painting. And it decides the effect and the impressions of the viewer."

I work to strongly stimulate the imagination of viewers. I re-create a world of emotions and human values. A mixture of experiences and scenes that everyone can easily find in their own memories.

Watch. Think. Feel. React.
This is how emotions work - it the message od my creative manifesto.

I exhibit my paintings in galleries and private collections.

Name: Programa Aprendiz Musical
Description:
O Programa Aprendiz Musical é o maior programa de musicalização em escolas públicas do país, ensinando música desde 2001 em Niterói - RJ.

Tem como premissa a ideia de que a Educação Musical é um caminho para a transformação, o exercício da cidadania e a realização de sonhos. Seus valores incluem a transformação, o compromisso, a afetividade, a integração e a qualidade.

O Aprendiz Musical está presente em 100% das escolas de nível fundamental da Rede Municipal de Ensino, onde cerca de 10 mil alunos têm aulas de musicalização, instrumentos de sopros e cordas ou canto coral, e ampliam a vivência cultural de variadas formas.

Além das unidades de ensino, o Aprendiz Musical funciona na Casa Aprendiz e no Conservatório de Música de Niterói - CMN, promovendo o ensino de música para crianças, adolescentes e jovens até 24 anos de idade, e oferecendo variadas atividades complementares que auxiliam no desenvolvimento dos alunos.

O Programa Aprendiz Musical é mantido pela Prefeitura de Niterói, através da Secretaria de Economia Criativa e Ações Estratégicas (SECAE) em parceria com a Secretaria Municipal de Educação.

Name: Gallery Jean-Francois Cazeau
Description:
Jean-François Cazeau
an expert, a collector, an art enthusiast.

After working for almost twenty years with his uncle Philippe Cazeau, one of the greatest impressionist and modern art dealers of his generation, Jean-François Cazeau opened in September 2009 his own gallery in the heart of the Marais, nearby the  Picasso Museum, rue Sainte-Anastase in Paris.

The gallery permanently presents works by impressionist and modern masters (Pablo Picasso, Alberto and Diego Giacometti, Juan Miro, Andre Masson, Henri Matisse, Modigliani Amedeo, Max Ernst, Fernand Léger ...) with the ambition to encourage collectors to mix style and time, by recreating the eclecticism of an enlightened amateur office.

We give our customers more than 25 years of experience in the international art market, at the highest level of requirement, that of museum quality.
The collector can count on our contractual commitment to select works from the best collections, as soon as possible.

#art #paris #gallery

Name: Taglialatella Galleries International
Description: Taglialatella Galleries is a fine art gallery that was established in New York in 1978 and has since grown to four locations world wide in Paris, Palm Beach, and Toronto. The gallery specializes in modern and contemporary Pop and Street art, exhibiting the highest quality works from blue chip artists on the secondary market to renowned international living artists.

Name: Palo Gallery
Description:
Palo Gallery was established in 2018 in New York City by third-generation art collector Paul Henkel with a focus on academic and historically contextualized contemporary art. Scholarship and art historical canon are at the forefront in the consideration of each exhibition as their program’s curatorial focus aims to frame contemporary art within the context of art and social history.

Originating as a pop-up, the gallery opened its first brick and mortar on Bond Street in NoHo in September 2022, offering 3,400 square feet of exhibition space, giving artists the opportunity to work on a large scale. In June 2024, Palo’s second location in New York City opened in the East Village, serving as a more intimate space for emerging artists and experimental exhibitions to have their own spotlight. In September 2025, during their seventh year, Palo Gallery decided to phase out of their location on Bond Street as they dive deeper into focusing on their program, artist mentorship and client relationships. Today, Palo remains committed to offering artists unique opportunities to explore pivotal, intersecting cultural and historical topics through thought-provoking exhibitions.

Artists: Lorenzo Amos, Xanthe Burdett, Tancredi di Carcaci, Ronan Day-Lewis, Auudi Dorsey, Kim Faler, Joana Galego, Charlie Gosling, Lewinale Havette, Jane Hilton, Henry Hudson, Asher Liftin, Roberto Maria Lino, Manoela Medeiros, Orejarena & Stein, Fa Razavi, Charlie Roberts, India Sachi, Sagarika Sundaram, Leda Tsoutreli, Sandy Williams IV, Rachel Wolf, Deanio X, among others

Name: Maggio Art Consultancy

Diverse Approach

ARTISTS | Maggio manages a portfolio of outstanding contemporary artists, curates exhibitions and installations. We nurture and mentor artists, looking for alternative avenues & fresh angles, and offer alternative platforms, for sales into mid to high-end markets.

PRIVATES | Maggio advises private clients on art acquisition and investment, offering expert and detailed knowledge of the contemporary art world to deliver high-quality advice.

PROPERTY MANAGERS | Lastly, we advise property professionals, adopting an entirely bespoke approach to every property that we curate. We work with commercial property owners, developers, managers and agents to convert their spaces into dynamic environments in which to live, work or play.

Name: Michael Rosenfeld Gallery
Description:
Michael Rosenfeld Gallery champions artists who have made invaluable contributions to the canons of twentieth and twenty-first century American art.
 
Michael Rosenfeld Gallery was founded by Michael Rosenfeld in 1989; partner halley k harrisburg joined the gallery in 1992. Located on West 57th Street, the gallery moved to its current Chelsea home on West 19th Street in 2012. The gallery’s state-of-the-art, 6,500-square-foot space was designed by Richard Gluckman of Gluckman Tang Architects and occupies the ground floor of a Jean Nouvel-designed residential tower. 
 
Over the decades, the gallery has organized over 230 exhibitions featuring a diverse roster of modern and contemporary artists belonging to a variety of movements including abstract expressionism, surrealism, social realism, figurative expressionism, and geometric abstraction. Consistent participation in art fairs including The Armory Show, The Art Show (ADAA), Art Basel Miami Beach, Art Basel Paris, FOG Design+Art, Frieze Los Angeles, Frieze Masters, Frieze New York, and the Seattle Art Fair have expanded the gallery’s international audience. Landmark exhibitions at Michael Rosenfeld Gallery include African American Art: 20th Century Masterworks (a series for ten consecutive years from 1994–2003), uncommon threads (2008), Romare Bearden: A Centennial Celebration (2011), Nancy Grossman: Constructions from the 1960s (2014), Alma Thomas: Moving Heaven & Earth (2015), Alfonso Ossorio: Congregations (2016), Norman Lewis: Looking East (2018), Benny Andrews: Portraits, A Real Person Before the Eyes (2020), and Be Your Wonderful Self: The Portraits of Beauford Delaney (2021).
 
A member of the Art Dealers Association of America (ADAA) since 2000, Michael Rosenfeld Gallery has been instrumental to shaping a wide range of private and public collections across the United States and abroad.

Name: Cross Comix Rotterdam
Description: Cross Comix weet een breed publiek te overtuigen van het beeldverhaal als volwassen kunstvorm. Verrassende en eigenzinnige kruisbestuivingen worden mogelijk gemaakt door beeldverhalen te koppelen aan andere kunstdisciplines en de actualiteit. Cross Comix signaleert en verbindt talent, deelt kennis en biedt een podium aan beeldmakers waarmee het een significante bijdrage levert aan de zichtbaarheid van beeldverhalen in Nederland.

Name: Iconic International School
Description:
A Montessori school established to aid your child's academic performance and to train your ward. We are located in Ghana, Dodowa, behind the Forestry Hotel.

Our classrooms are peaceful, happy places designed to meet the developmental needs of each child in every stage of life. All items in the environment are scaled to the child’s size, including furniture, shelves, utensils, dishware, cleaning implements and the Montessori materials themselves. There is no focal centre to the classroom; this reflects that the teacher is not the focus of the children’s attention, but that they are all one community together. Bright and attractive colours, natural materials, fascinating cultural objects and interesting pictures on the wall all offer the children complex sensory and intellectual experiences. When children first enter our environment, there is an immediate and touching moment when they realize that this place is for them.

In our classrooms, children are taught how to regulate their own social interactions. Through fun role-playing activities and appropriate modelling, the teacher demonstrates the best way to respond to arguments or new situations, giving the child the ability to act confidently and pro-socially when the actual problem arises. The result is a self-regulating classroom, in which natural social tensions are resolved mostly by the children themselves.

Children move freely throughout the environment, choosing activities that interest them, or working with the teacher, individually, or in small groups. Their movement is unrestricted by the teacher unless it endangers themselves, other people, or their surroundings. Outdoor environments are important in Montessori schools, and offer opportunities to engage with the natural world.

Name: Pictorum Art Group
Description: Our vision has been to create a group of complementary art companies that seamlessly intertwine, allowing for clearer processes and further autonomy within our key market sectors. Our focus on creating an iconic name within the contemporary art market will be achieved through our innovation, transforming our audience’s user experience and art itself as we know it.

Name: SUP de SUB Mark Hubbard
Description:
L’action-école Sup de Sub / Mark Hubbard est établie la première fois à Aix-Marseille-Provence en 2012, pour 20 jeunes adultes de la cité du Bois de l’Aune, par LFKs - La Fabriks - groupe international d'artistes, de chercheur·euse·s et ingénieur·e·s rassemblé·e·s depuis 1990 autour d’un usage de la création artistique de haut niveau en tant qu’instrument d’actions à visée sociale directes et concrètes.
En 2018, remarqué pour ses innovations et ses résultats en la matière, LFKs est encouragé à proposer Sup de Sub / Mark Hubbard au ministère du Travail dans le cadre de l’appel à projets 100% Inclusion lancé par le ministère et son Haut commissariat aux compétences.
2019. Lauréat en mai, Sup de Sub / Mark Hubbard passe alors à l’action à l’échelle nationale en septembre, développée et augmentée, orientée vers un public jeune en grande difficulté, dans un cadre expérimental de 3 années défini avec la DGEFP et la Caisse des dépôts et consignations.
Sup de Sub / Mark Hubbard est aujourd’hui (2022-2023) un programme évolutif de 35h/semaine durant 10 mois pour des jeunes adultes (17-25 ans) qui partent de loin – grande pauvreté, QPV, SDF, sans soutien parental, foyer… et de très loin – vie à la rue, isolement, délinquance… ou avec un handicap – addictions et dépendances, maladies mentales, traumatismes complexes, maladies dégénératives, handicaps physiques, et pour quelques-un·e·s, simplement un décrochage et une grande démobilisation.
10 mois d’art à haute dose pour se réinventer, apprendre à échanger, à œuvrer collectivement, augmenter ses capacités pour un libre choix, dessiner un projet professionnel quel qu’il soit, comprendre sa responsabilité individuelle et l’engager, savoir en somme faire sa vie, comme une œuvre.

Name: ARTVIA | Valuation-Investment-Advisory
Description:
Te asesoramos para conseguir las mejores obras disponibles en el mercado del arte con el compromiso de asegurar el valor de tu adquisición

Nuestra sólida trayectoria dentro del mercado internacional del arte y una extensa red de contactos nos ha permitido trabajar con las galerías de mayor prestigio internacional, coleccionistas, curadores, fondos de inversión y casas de subasta, teniendo acceso a obras de primer nivel para nuestros clientes.

Entre nuestros servicios destacan:

 -Valuación por análisis de mercado: Analizamos el mercado de un artista de interés de acuerdo a la oferta y demanda de sus obras, el crecimiento de su valor y obras disponibles para su adquisición.  Llegamos al precio actual y más justo de una obra de interés


 -Inversión en arte: Diseñamos estrategias inteligentes de adquisición y venta de las obras de arte que gestionamos, con el objetivo de proteger las inversiones de nuestros clientes

 -Asesoría en arte: Brindamos un servicio integral de asesoría, a quienes desean compra o vender una obra en particular como a los que quieren comenzar una colección o enriquecer un acervo ya existente. Contamos con expertos para autenticar y determinar el estado de conservación de las obras.

Nos especializamos en: Arte Moderno, Arte Contemporáneo y de Postguerra, Surrealismo y el Arte Latinoamericano de los grandes maestros del siglo XX. 

Trabajamos en LATAM, EEUU y Europa.

Description: Depuis l’ouverture de la galerie, en 1986, Michèle Aittouarès et Odile Aittouarès-Inzerillo font les choix qu’elles feraient pour leurs collections personnelles.Ne jamais s'enfermer dans un système et savoir succomber au coup de foudre. Name: Papel · Graphic art & Paper crafts
Description: PAPEL wants to expand the possibilities of contemporary art market by connecting your needs and interests with the production of qualified artists. We strongly believe in handicraft value and in the idea that art should be part of our daily life. We work with different types of paper artworks; we focus on printing and graphic techniques, creative papercraft and wallpaper. We supply original and certified products and art pieces from international artists. PAPEL has its office and shop in central Rome. We conceive our space as a lab for expositions, constant promotion of emerging artists and art consultancy for people interested in experiencing the power of art.

Name: Suomen Taiteilijaseura | The Artists' Association of Finland
Description:
The Artists' Association of Finland (Suomen Taiteilijaseura – Konstnärsgillet i Finland) is the umbrella organisation of visual artists in Finland. Through our member organisations – the Artist Association MUU, the Association of Finnish Sculptors, the Association of Finnish Printmakers, Finnish Painters' Union and the Union of Artist Photographers – we represent more than 3 000 professional artists.

The mission of the Artists' Association of Finland is to advance and support favorable working conditions of visual artists, such as funding, social security and work opportunities. We work to secure policy and legislative change to encourage the growth and development of the sector. We also provide services to our members, including training courses and legal advice on, for example, contracts, social security and taxation.

The association also works to increase the general public’s interest in visual art. We offer up-to-date information on the visual arts field to decision-makers, journalists as well the general public. Our partners include key players in visual art and professional organisations in other fields. Through projects we focus on topical issues such as public art and making a living as a self-employed artist. Biannually the association produces the Young Artists exhibition, a showcase of new Finnish contemporary art.

We also run an online publication called Taiteilija (Artist) at taiteilijalehti.fi

The Artists’ Association of Finland is a member of the International Association of Art (IAA).

Name: David Drebin
Description:
A graduate of Parsons School of Design in NYC, David Drebin is a multidisciplinary artist working in various art forms producing limited edition works including Photographs, Lightboxes, Neon Light Installations, Diamond Dust works and more.

Following his first solo exhibition at Camera Work in Berlin in 2005 and the release of his first comprehensive illustrated book “Love and Other Stories” in 2007, Drebin experienced a stream of representation by some of the most prestigious galleries around the globe.

Drebin's artworks also known as “Drebins” are unique and instantly recognizable as his own. His artistic style is often described as epic, dramatic and, above all, cinematic. Drebin has released eight books with teNeues publishing including "The Morning After", "Beautiful Disasters", "Chasing Paradise", "Dreamscapes", "Love and Lights", "Before They Were Famous", "Collectors Edition" an oversized limited edition monograph and the most recently released "Flirting With Danger". 
Drebin's books are distributed through the finest bookstores around the world.
His work combines voyeuristic and psychological viewpoints in a unique manner, offering the viewer a dramatic insight into emotions and experiences which many of us have doubtlessly felt at some point in our lives.

Name: The Art Gallery LLC
Description:
A contemporary cultural retailer, The Art Gallery (TAG) is abundant with sumptuous artwork and beautifully crafted gifts – all of which reflect the fascinating Middle East region. Pattern, calligraphy and a myriad of regional design influences are portrayed in products which have been crafted by carefully selected Artists and Designers.

 

Founded by highly respected Syrian Artists and Designers Ghiath Lahham and Helen Abbas in 2020, The Art Gallery is an online feast of fabulous creativity. Based in Dubai, TAG is built on Ghiath’s and Helen’s renowned artistic skills and their 20 years successfully creating Artwork for discerning customers around the globe.

 

Curated by these highly experienced creative partners, The Art Gallery is a source of unique artworks. Designed for stylish homes and modern offices, the Artworks are available in open and limited editions. Artwork techniques combine giclée printing with many artworks using hand applied gold leaf embellishment and textural finishes to make bold artistic statements – always at accessible prices.

 

Every month, new artworks and innovative products are added to the TAG website. The Founders are busy working with creative partners from throughout the region to bring you innovative products which will adorn your walls for years to come. Buy directly from the TAG website and you can be confident that you will be delighted with your purchases. TAG delivers to homes and offices throughout the region and across the world and uses robust packaging to ensure Artworks are delivered securely.

 

The Art Gallery is based on a simple philosophy: “Creating unique art, we will provide our customers with great things for walls. We will guarantee the highest product integrity and support every purchase with exceptional service. Finally, we take art seriously, but not so seriously that it intimidates – we are passionate about our Art but we will remain collaborative, accessible and joyful in all we do.”

Name: Collectif Synergie
Description: Nous créons un réseau artistique pluridisciplinaire via un site de référencement et nous organisons des événements culturels mêlant tous les arts (scènes ouvertes, festival Les jardins culturels, salon littéraire À livres ouverts...).

Name: KVHS
Description: A high school

Name: mu-zee-um vzw
Description: Kunst en cultuureducatie

Name: CorsiArte Antiquaria, Moderna, Contemporanea - Scuola per Periti in Pittura e Arti decorative
Description:
CorsiArte è una scuola privata di Milano che da più di vent’anni organizza corsi di Formazione Antiquariale e Specializzazione Peritale nelle arti antiche moderne e contemporanee. I diplomi sono patrocinati dal Collegio Lombardo Periti Esperti Consulenti, a cui i nostri allievi afferiscono dopo il loro conseguimento. Rilasciamo diplomi di Consulente in Arti Antiche Applicate, Consulente in Arti Decorative Contemporanee, Consulente in Pittura Italiana e Consulente Tecnico in Specialità.  

APERTA A TUTTI SENZA LIMITI D’ETÀ
E' nata per sopperire a una grave lacuna del sistema istituzionale didattico italiano che non prevede percorsi di studio inerenti la STORIA DELLE ARTI ANTICHE APPLICATE (Mobili, Ceramiche, Vetri, Argenti, Gioielli, Tappeti, Arazzi…). Accanto alle arti antiche applicate, abbiamo istituito percorsi di studio inerenti le ARTI DECORATIVE CONTEMPORANEE (Fotografia, Design, Arte contemporanea, Gioielli e Ceramica del 900...)
Ci occupiamo inoltre dell’insegnamento della STORIA DELLA PITTURA in modo molto approfondito, fornendo gli strumenti tecnici e pratici che vanno a completare la preparazione teorica, come spesso ci viene richiesto non solo dagli operatori del settore ma anche dagli studenti universitari che necessitano di un approccio più completo e scientifico alla materia. Infatti il nostro METODO DIDATTICO costituisce un importante elemento di novità poiché è orientato a connettere l'analisi storico-stilistica con l'approccio scientifico della diagnostica e delle tecniche artistiche, per acquisire un metodo di indagine ancora più solido, nell’ottica di riunire all’interno della stessa figura professionale sia competenze storico-artistiche sia abilità sotto il profilo tecnico-diagnostico.
A integrazione della didattica in aula sono  previste LEZIONI PER FAVORIRE L’OSSERVAZIONE DIRETTA DELLE OPERE nei luoghi di maggior interesse. Sempre presente è la dimensione del mercato di cui si cerca di proporre una analisi e una lettura critica.

Name: Galería Isolina Arbulu
Description: Galería de Arte en Marbella

Name: The A-Line Magazine
Description: We are an online fashion and lifestyle magazine run by students at Texas A&M University. Our core mission is to enkindle the human spirit through self-expression and embolden all to excel beyond social norms.

Name: Fine Arts Society, St. Xavier's College (Autonomous), Kolkata
Description: The Fine Arts Society, one of the oldest societies in the 152-year-old institution, is an active interdepartmental society of the college. The society is committed to nurturing and promoting fine and performing arts among Xaverians and students of other educational institutes in the city to provide a platform to showcase their talent, experience new avenues, pursue passions and carve their niche in Xavier's rich cultural history. The society has been successfully organising and initiating inter-college events in the city since its conception.

Name: Collectif Créatif Tunis
Description:
L’Association Collectif Créatif travaille depuis 2016 sur le développement des métiers créatifs émergents, notamment les métiers du design, des arts visuels et numériques, dans une démarche à la fois écologique, de cohésion sociale, de mixité dans la communauté locale et d’expérience de la diversité. 

Les valeurs qu’elle portes sont axées autour de :
- L’inclusion sociale et l’émancipation de la communauté locale à travers les pratiques créatives.
- Le développement de la scène créative émergente à travers des événements artistiques et des espaces de pratique et de rencontre.
 - L’amélioration de la qualité de vie, de l’appropriation de l’espace public et du vivre ensemble avec le développement de solutions créatives et écologiques. 

À travers la pratique de ses différentes initiatives et des expertises individuelles, le Collectif Créatif permet la mise en commun de ressources, de savoir-faire, et de connaissances qui contribuent à l’existence d’un espace organique d’expérimentation permanente qui s’étend aujourd’hui au-delà des portes de la Médina.

Name: OTHONIEL STUDIO
Description: OTHONIEL STUDIO est le studio de Jean-Michel Othoniel

Name: Daata
Description:
A champion and pioneer of art in digital media, Daata was founded in 2015 and is one of the longest-standing commissioning bodies in this field.

Daata exists to support artists in realising artworks that bridge digital and physical media. Beyond physical installations, Daata commissions extend online in the ‘Daataverse’. To date, Daata has commissioned over 400 artworks by over 100 artists and our library continues to grow. Daata commissions are free to view online and in our iOS app.

Daata has collaborated internationally with galleries, museums, collections, art fairs, festivals and other organisations including: NASA, Hammer Museum, Kiasma, Julia Stoschek Collection, The Bass, MOCAD, Art Basel, Frieze, EXPO CHICAGO, Phillips, Independent Art Fair, NADA, Art Fair Philippines, PHOTOFAIRS Shanghai, Hauser & Wirth, kurimanzutto, Marian Goodman, Simon Lee, Stephen Friedman, VSF and Thaddaeus Ropac.

Name: THE BLANC
Description: theBLANC Art Space is dedicated to promoting and advancing visual, performing, and creative art through a series of exhibitions, performances, presentations, panels, and outreach programs. Through the power of art, we contribute to our great city's diversity, creativity, and pioneering spirit. We are also committed to forging an innovative and inspiring art exchange platform to help young artists start their incredible art journey.

Name: Joyce Yahouda —— Art Curator
Description: Joyce Yahouda Gallery is dedicated to presenting multidisciplinary and contemporary art. For over 30 years, Joyce Yahouda, gallery owner and curator, has been promoting the works of emerging artists as well as established ones. Joyce Yahouda Gallery is renowned as a space for artistic convergence that enables a dialogue between artists, curators, collectors and art critics. Numerous events such as round tables and conferences are organized each year. On a national and international level, Joyce Yahouda Gallery participates in exchanges with various galleries and organizations within Canada and abroad. The Gallery also takes part in Canadian and international art fairs.

Name: Brew House Arts
Description:
Brew House Arts produces and presents fine art exhibitions in our 2,780 sq/ft gallery, offers an emerging artist residency program, and provides professional development and growth opportunities to independent curators.

We offer space rentals to artists or creative businesses looking for studios and host events ranging from corporate cocktail hours or holiday parties to full wedding ceremonies and receptions.

Name: BOOMRANG LYON
Description: Nouveau tiers-lieu culturel et centre d'aide pour les jeunes entrepreneurs dans la culture et les médias.

Name: The Colonist Institute of Digital Games
Description:
The Colonist Institute of Digital Games specializes in training students to join AAA studios.

Dedicated to brilliance in teaching, learning, research, and to developing innovators who make a difference globally.

Name: Pample Paper Studio
Description: Je m'appelle Marine, je suis Paper artist freelance et créatrice du Pample Paper Studio. Après avoir travaillé plusieurs années à créer du contenu de marque en agences de communication à New York puis à Paris ; j'ai aujourd'hui créé le Pamper Paper Studio. Un laboratoire créatif où le papier est source d'inspiration : illustrations tous supports, édition, set design, visual merchandising, vitrines, événementiel ou stop motion... les possibilités sont infinies !

Name: ENGAGEMENT ARTS NL
Description: ENGAGEMENT ARTS NL is an artist-led organization addressing gender-based violence, sexism, discrimination and abuse of power in the Dutch arts and design field. The NGO was founded out of the urgency to establish a safe space and support individuals and communities facing transgressive behavior, discrimination and/or unfair practices in the Dutch art field. We actively engage with institutions, communities, policymakers, law firms and similar organizations to create safer and more inclusive working environments through research contribution, training and proposals on policy development. The Stichting has ANBI status, and it is a member of Kunst 92.

Name: Scene-Stealers Collective
Description:
The 'Scene-Stealers Collective'

We are a group of emerging artists based in South London that make original Artist/Illustrative interpretation’s. Our Inspiration is taken from scenes from iconic Films & TV shows.

The images produced are not meant to be alternate Film Poster’s. We do not use text or title, but rather let our imagery convey narrative. The aim is to produce Original art for Films fans. We make our image’s with great pleasure as it’s a combination of our passions, Films, Art and Print.

Name: Galerie Eva Vautier
Description:
Depuis son ouverture en 2013, la galerie Eva Vautier tisse des liens entre des générations qui ont marqué l'histoire de l’art contemporain, partant de l'École de Nice et du mouvement Fluxus jusqu'à nos jours. Elle représente avec la même intensité artistes émergents et de réputation internationale. La galerie porte une importance particulière au soutien et à la promotion des femmes.

Ses artistes développent des thématiques liées au rapport à la nature, la matière, l’humain et le quotidien. C'est ainsi que la galerie propose une vision de l'art contemporain innovante et contribue à dynamiser la scène artistique française. Son lien privilégié avec Ben Vautier lui permet un ton libre et expérimental reconnu par les institutions.

Exposant aussi bien dessins, peintures, sculptures, photographies, que vidéos et installations, la galerie propose également des rétrospectives historiques de mouvements artistiques tels que Fluxus, Supports/Surfaces et la Figuration Libre. Son espace est divisé en un lieu d’exposition temporaire et un showroom proposant, entre autres, les publications et multiples d’artistes qu’elle édite.

Name: School Of Makeup Effects
Description: School Of Makeup Effects is an education center  based out of Totowa, New Jersey.

Name: Servidor Local
Description: Servidor Local es un punto de vinculación, un foro en donde sucede el diálogo; es, en esencia, un refugio de ideas, de diversidad, de intercambios. Como plataforma, da impulso a proyectos culturales, de arte y diseño que abanderan discursos con impacto en la sociedad buscando beneficiar el entorno más cercano y puedan dispersarse a lo largo del camino de los visitantes.

Name: Avila Fine Arts
Description: For over four decades, Avila Fine Arts has helped clients transform their spaces with world-class art. We offer turnkey solutions—curation, installation, and management—for every setting, including multi-national companies, innovative start-ups, small businesses and private residences. We deliver collections that perfectly align with your vision, values and aesthetics.

Name: LA Modern Auctions
Description: Founded in 1992 by Peter Loughrey, Los Angeles Modern Auctions (LAMA) is the first auction house to specialize in selling 20th century Modern Art & Design.

Name: AZURE- Fine Arts Society of IIT Delhi
Description:
AZURE is a team of dedicated artists from various year at IIT Delhi. The team has this common vision of " Creating an impact that will last forever", well that's again a dream of many artists we live with! 
The team was formed in July,2015 and have organised plethora of Fine Arts events.

Name: Biennale nationale de sculpture contemporaine
Description: La BNSC fournit une plate-forme de réflexion, de discussion et d’échanges autour des questions issues de la pratique et des tendances actuelles de la sculpture. Avec un champ d’action élargi, elle favorise la recherche et la production d’œuvres inédites. Son mandat est d'organiser, de diffuser et de promouvoir des expositions, des événements, des conférences et des ateliers de sensibilisation provenant du domaine éclaté de la pratique de la sculpture au Québec, au Canada et à l’étranger. La BNSC participe depuis plus de trente ans à la vie culturelle et contribue à sensibiliser et à faire accroître l'intérêt du public à l'égard de l'art contemporain.

Name: Cultivate
Description: Cultivate is an arts organization based in Grand Rapids, Michigan.  Serving the local, regional, and national arts community with a contemporary art gallery, arts education for ages 3-adult, and artist resource center.  The mission of all of our work is to cultivate community, growth, and creativity with art.

Name: Art Company
Description: "Een eerste indruk maakt u maar één keer. Zo is het ook met uw bedrijfspand. Het moet uw visitekaartje zijn. Daarom besteedt u aandacht aan de inrichting en uitstraling ervan. Dat kan heel goed met beeldende kunst. Maar waarmee wilt u indruk maken? En wat past het beste bij u? Bij die keuzes helpt Art Company graag. Art Company is gevestigd aan de rand van Eindhoven. In ons pand, een voormalige textielfabriek, richten we jaarlijks vier grote exposities in. Alle kunstenaars zijn, ieder met hun eigen stijl, toonaangevend voor de ontwikkeling van de hedendaagse kunst in Nederland en België. Zoekt u kunst voor uw bedrijfspand? Dan staat Art Company u bij met deskundig advies."

Name: Orange Rouge
Description:
Depuis 18 ans, Orange Rouge provoque la rencontre insolite entre des adolescents en situation de handicap et des artistes contemporains reconnus. 
Au cours de chaque édition, les binômes échangent autour d'ateliers artistiques et de sorties dans des lieux culturels variés au cours desquels ils co-créent une oeuvre présentée collectivement dans un lieu majeur de l'art contemporain. 

En parallèle des projets, Orange Rouge dessine les contours de sa collection d'œuvres d'art, constituée au fil des années par les dons des artistes participants aux projets. 
L'association développe également un cycle de publications à l'occasion de ses expositions, extension théorique et artistique des projets menés au sein des collèges. 

Ancrée dans l'artistique, le pédagogique et le social, Orange Rouge se démarque par une approche plurielle, singulière et innovante. 




Reconnue d’intérêt général, agréée Jeunesse et Éducation Populaire, Orange Rouge a reçu en 2011 le Prix Spécial du Jury de la Ville de Paris pour son action «Handicap & Créations».

Name: The Current
Description:
The Current is a non-profit contemporary art organization. We offer progressive and thematic exhibitions featuring internationally and nationally recognized artists. 

We offer art classes for youth and adults. By offering scholarships we ensure that all artists have access to the visual arts. We educate by offering docent led tours of our exhibitions through school bus scholarships. All our education efforts are made possible by our member, donors and sponsors.

We create original special events that connect our visitors with creativity.

Vacationing in Stowe, Vermont? Visit us, we will stimulate your senses and engage your mind.

Name: Irfan Ajvazi Fine Arts
Description:
Irfan Ajvazi (born 2001) is a Kosovan painter he received a Diploma in Graphic Design from Great Learning Academy in 2022.

Ajvazi is, a figurative painter, crafts tender scenes that expose the intricate subtleties of life. Through his skillful compositions, he conjures a realm filled with unspoken narratives, intimate moments, and romantic 
gestures.

He is interested in creating work that frame the moments of our life in which this idea reveals itself to ourselves. 

Ajvazi is best known for his interior and exterior scenes, Ajvazi also paints still lifes, landscapes, figures and interior scenes. 

Alongside painting, Ajvazi makes incredibly detailed colored pencil drawings, in an all-consuming process of mark making. Unlike his paintings which transform throughout the making, the challenging medium calls for the compositions to be decided beforehand. 
Ajvazi puts a modern spin on figurative painting traditions. As an autodidact, he draws inspiration mainly from the Dutch Old Masters, who have proven to be his most consistent teachers. Ajvazi’s distinctive style began to take shape as he spent more and more time in front of the canvas.

Ajvazi draws from personal photographs, film stills, and references to art history.

Ajvazi has also worked in collage and drawing, often using colouring pencils.

Ajvazi has presented work in solo and group exhibitions internationally.

Irfan Ajvazi’s artworks can be found in major international collections, including the Fundacion Maceta, PiecePiece, Apricus Art Collection, The New Rebellion Art, Public Art Exhibit, Edelina Gallery, Tree Art Gallery.

He has participated in more than 10 group exhibitions and some solo exhibitions worldwide since 2020, including at VB Contemporary, Circular Art Space, The Holy Art Gallery, Dodomu Gallery, V-Art Union, Pearview Gallery, V-Art Union, Sfumato Art Gallery, PiecePiece, Omnibus Gallery, Make Art Gallery, Apricus Art Collection.

Name: Pinã Projetos
Bromley & Co
Description:
Bromley & Co is a creative powerhouse born out of a shared passion and focused obsession for all things art, design, gardens, fashion, interiors and architecture between co-founders, David and Yuge Bromley. 

Spanning over 3 decades, David’s art practice encompasses anything from his instantly recognisable themes in painting, through to sculpture and interiors.  Coupled with Yuge’s legal background and passion for good business, the creative duo along with their team have built an expansive portfolio embedded in bringing art and design to a wider audience.

Our broader Bromley Group also sees projects  come to fruition seeped in art, interior and landscape design within hospitality venues, hotels, commercial and residential precincts and luxury homes. 

Passion in our own spaces, such as the Bromley Collection Museum housed within the heritage listed Old Castlemaine Gaol, all strive to break the third wall between our audience and a life led and fuelled by art.

Established in 2012, Bromley & Co continues to grow as a hub of creative studios, galleries and design incubators across Australia and internationally that seamlessly brings together the concept that ‘art is business and business is art’. With the constant pursuit to build a world around us where the everyday transforms into the other-worldly.

Name: Cowan's Auctions
Description:
A full-service auction house, Cowan's Auctions reaches buyers around the globe and takes pride in its reputation for integrity, customer service, and great results. With offices in Cincinnati, Cleveland, and Denver, Cowan’s holds over 40 auctions each year both online and live in our Cincinnati and Cleveland showrooms. 

As a leader in the industry, Cowan's has disrupted the marketplace from the start and was among the earliest auction houses to launch a website and sell online. In 2014, Cowan’s, along with five competitors, launched Bidsquare.com, an online bidding platform where auction houses are vetted to ensure honesty and quality.

Founded in 1995, Cowan's started in founder and owner Wes Cowan's garage where he held mail-in and phone auctions. Wes quickly built a reputation as an expert who brought a new level of scholarship and honesty to the arena. Over the next few years the business grew rapidly as Cowan’s added experts in the fields of American Indian Art, Furniture, Paintings and Decorative Art, Jewelry, Antique Firearms, and 20th century Modern Ceramics.

Name: Sky Art Classes
Description:
Sky Art Classes is the best place to find all your answers related how to get into painting & drawing. We provide Beginner’s to advance painting classes. We have our art centers around Bangalore.

n our classes we focus on all aspects. Our focus is not only on drawing, sketching & paintings but also the fun or interesting way to let them engaged in the entire process of art learning.

Drawing and painting, the art or technique of producing images on a surface, usually done on paper using pencil or Pen, We believe that drawing education is an opportunity to nurture children to find truth through imagination, effort, collaboration,and cultural literacy. Drawing and painting also influence the social aspects of students’ lives, it has a broader scope in drawing education. Above all, it extends the boundaries of academic learning and into community-based values.

Name: Galerie Vincent TIERCIN PARIS
Description:
Contemporary art gallery founded by Vincent TIERCIN in 2014 -Paris-
Vincent TIERCIN expose et partage son amour de l’art contemporain.C’est un réel besoin pour lui de présenter et mettre en valeur le travail des artistes internationaux qui le touchent. 

La galerie vincent Tiercin accompagne les collectionneurs et les entreprises dans leurs acquisitions ( défiscalisation, leasing d’œuvres D’art).
Nous soutenons et créons aux côtés de nos artistes leurs projets de réalisation artistiques pour la construction urbaines ( muralisme, sculptures in situ, installations..)

Retrouvez nous au 103 Rue du Chevaleret 75013 PARIS ainsi que sur Facebook, Instagram et Twitter.

Pour toutes questions sur un projet n’hésitez pas à nous contacter par mail @ 
Galerievincenttiercin@gmail.com

A très vite.

Name: WAOLab
Description:
WAOLab is agency specialized in 3D digitizing for Art Works and offers services that responds to the concerns of the moment :  Innovate without losing the essence and origin of "art works" to continue to capture a clientele more and more informed and demanding.

We create a specific workflow to propose 3D scanning and creating interactive 3D catalog with a mobile application to view at 360 degree object with security and personalized consultation service. Your art works collection is searchable directly to your website and / or with a 360 ° virtual tour of your gallery. Customized app’s for smartphones and tablets with premium access. Relocated "virtually" some of your pieces on international sales using a large screen touch and / or a 3D display without glasses.

for more informations visit http://www.waolab.com

Name: The Heatherley School of Fine Art
Description: Founded in 1845 The Heatherley School of Fine Art is one of the oldest independent art colleges in Britain and is among the few art schools in the UK that focus purely on portraiture, figurative painting, sculpture and printmaking. The college offers both vocational and part-time courses to students aged 18 years and over.

Name: Yocum Institute for Arts Education
Description:
Established in 1934 by Chester Wittell as the Wyomissing Institute of Fine Arts, the Institute opened its doors with 3 music students. Under Lila Lerch, the first managing director, the Institute grew to over 300 students and expanded its offerings to include music, dance, theater, and visual art instruction. An arts-based preschool and kindergarten were added and the Institute became licensed by the state. It is also home to the Yocum Gallery, a venue for exhibits and performances, the Berks Art Alliance, and Art Goes to School.

Over the years, the Institute has forged partnerships with schools and other non-profit organizations to increase access to the arts for both arts and non-arts outcomes. In 2005, in response to a challenge grant, the Institute launched the “Learning Through the Arts” campaign. Funds from the campaign were used to research and develop Primary Stages, the Institute’s signature theater program for children’s productions and arts education.

In May of 2018, The Yocum Institute’s Dance Department merged with the Academy of Movement (AOM), formerly located in Sinking Spring, to develop a level of dance programming unlike any other.  The combination of dance programs will provide opportunities to dance students of all ages and levels of experience from toddlers to adults. Every genre of dance is represented. Students can opt to take one day masterclasses, camps, and workshops to semester long classes that will culminate with a recital.

Name: VooDoo Gallery
Description: Take a closer look ... this art will speak to you! Enrich your personal or business space with the unique art that VooDoo Gallery hand selects from around the world.

Name: School of Art and Design, East Carolina University
Description:
The School of Art and Design at East Carolina is a community, where ideas, creativity, and innovation collide. The School has been continuously accredited by the National Association of Schools of Art and Design since 1962. 

We over 40 full-time faculty and more than 600 students, the School offers two undergraduate degrees and to master's degrees — the BFA in Art Education / BFA in Art with concentrations in animation/interactive design, ceramics, film and video production, graphic design, illustration, metal design, painting and drawing, printmaking, photography, sculpture, and textile design / MAEd in Art Education / MFA in Art with concentrations in ceramics, graphic design, painting and drawing, printmaking, photography, sculpture, and textile design.

Name: ArtyFacts By Reena
Description: As the quote goes, finding your passion isn’t just about a career or money, it’s about finding your authentic self. For me this calling happened in 10th grade, I discovered my love for art and painting and since then I have never looked back. I continued to learn from different teachers the various creative art forms and techniques. Despite not having any professional art degree, I continued to evolve by learning and at later stage by teaching. After teaching a few students out of my home, I decided why not take this step further. Thus ArtyFacts was formed. ArtyFacts was created to help others find a way to express their love for art. It’s a place where everyone can have fun, learn new things and experiment with new techniques to create everything that they visualise. At ArtyFacts along with teaching, I also undertake commissioned work. It’s a perfect place for the art connoisseurs to get their ideas flow and thoughts created. To see what kind of work is produced and get more information regarding upcoming workshops, please refer to the website.

Name: La Chambre
Description:
Installée au coeur de Strasbourg depuis 2010, La Chambre, espace d’exposition et de formation à l’image accompagne les évolutions du medium photographique et s’intéresse à ses interactions avec les autres champs artistiques. Par le biais de six expositions annuelles dans son espace, ainsi que de nombreuses expositions hors les murs, La Chambre promeut des artistes français et étrangers, émergents ou confirmés. Grâce au soutien apporté à des projets personnalisés (production d’oeuvres, diffusion, accueil en résidence, commandes…), La Chambre participe à un accompagnement de la création artistique contemporaine.
Les actions de médiation mises en oeuvre par le service des publics de La Chambre associent technique photographique et découverte du monde de l’image. Ces interventions, à destination de différents publics (scolaires, personnes en situation de handicap ou en insertion, séniors, etc.) sont conçues dans un souci d’originalité, d’interactivité et de pédagogie. La Chambre propose et réalise des projets spécifiques, jouant un rôle de « passeur » entre les publics et les artistes (à découvrir sur www.la-chambre.org).
La formation, troisième pôle d’activité de La Chambre, propose à des photographes - débutants ou expérimentés - des ateliers, workshops, cours et stages abordant la question de l’image et du médium photographique. En traitant divers aspects de la photographie, de la théorie à la technique en passant par l’histoire de l’image, les participants acquièrent un socle de connaissances leur permettant d’approfondir leur pratique ou de développer un projet personnel. Des formations à destination des photographes professionnels sont également développées durant la saison 2016-2017.

Name: The Scenic Space
Description: Passionate artists that care about each project and clients visons. The Scenic Space is a small but mighty team building large-scale, show-stopping pieces for some of the biggest names in the entertainment industry, from Theme Parks to theaters, businesses to live events. At the heart of what we do is a passion for creating an enjoyable, supportive environment where artists can thrive. Because every project we build is more than just a job; we're building the dream.

Name: Galerie Maria Lund
Description:
Since 1999, the GALERIE MARIA LUND (Paris, le Marais) has been supporting forms of contemporary art that combine conceptual depth and visual relevance. This positioning involves the promotion of powerful works that suggest a meaning rather than imposing one, raising existential questions in a contemporary way. The work of the 23 represented artists encompasses a great diversity of media: installations, sculptures, paintings, drawings, photography, performance, videos, textiles and poetry. In addition to organising exhibitions in its gallery space and taking part in various French and international fairs (KIAF Seoul, Drawing Now, Asia Now, Art Paris, Enter Art Fair (Copenhagen), Luxembourg Art Week), the gallery also works to promote its artists’ visibility outside its walls, by means of relationships with institutions and private establishments, playing an advisory role for commissioned works, publishing books and hosting events from other artistic fields (theatre, music, literature). 
The GALERIE MARIA LUND is a member of the French galleries’ association, CPGA (Comité Professionnel des Galeries d’Art) – and of the pgmap – paris gallery map.

Name: Petzel
Description:
Founded by Friedrich Petzel in 1994, Petzel is a contemporary art gallery with locations in New York City’s Chelsea and Upper East Side neighborhoods. Representing over 40 distinguished international artists working across a diverse range of media, genre and artistic style, Petzel also operates the joint exhibition space Capitain Petzel in Berlin in collaboration with Cologne’s Galerie Gisela Capitain.

Petzel’s program is centered around an eclectic group of international contemporary artists, all of whom are critically acclaimed for their distinct creative processes: Yael Bartana, Walead Beshty, Ross Bleckner, Cosima von Bonin, Troy Brauntuch, Hanne Darboven, Simon Denny, Keith Edmier, Thomas Eggerer, Derek Fordjour, Nikita Gale, Robert Heinecken, Stefanie Heinze, Georg Herold, Charline von Heyl, Dana Hoey, Christian Jankowski, Asger Jorn, Sean Landers, Rezi van Lankveld, Maria Lassnig, James Little, Allan McCollum, Rodney McMillian, Malcolm Morley, Sarah Morris, Jorge Pardo, Joyce Pensato, Seth Price, Stephen Prina, Jon Pylypchuk, Willem de Rooij, Pieter Schoolwerth, Dirk Skreber, Emily Mae Smith, John Stezaker, Hiroki Tsukuda, Nicola Tyson, Corinne Wasmuht, Xie Nanxing, Samson Young, and Heimo Zobernig. Each artist has exhibited widely in both museums and galleries throughout the world and are regularly included in international exhibitions such as Documenta, the Whitney Biennial, The Carnegie International, and the São Paulo and Venice Biennals. Petzel also deals in outstanding artworks from the last thirty years. Books by Petzel artists are available via the gallery’s publishing division, Petzel Publications.

Name: Bartha_contemporary
Description: Bartha_contemporary was founded in 2000, incorporated in 2011 by Daniela and Niklas von Bartha. The gallery relocated to its current space in Notting Hill in 2021. The program has a strong emphasis on non-figurative and conceptual contemporary art.

Name: Aal Ghyoum
Description:
Welcome to Aal Ghyoum – where creativity knows no bounds! We're more than just a studio; we're your go-to spot for unleashing your inner artist and connecting with fellow creatives in a fun and supportive atmosphere.

Here's what makes us special:
- Artistic Workshops: Our workshops cater to all ages, blending creativity with a dash of happiness and well-being.

- Connect & Create: Meet like-minded souls, swap ideas, and spark new collaborations in our welcoming community.

- Chill Workspace: Our cozy studio offers a relaxed space to let your imagination run wild.

- On the go: Catch us on the move as we spread artistic joy through events and outreach programs.

- Empowering Artists: We're not just about art; we're about empowering small businesses and local artists. Step into our concept store and discover handmade products and art.

Ready to take a stroll #BiGheirAalam? We are waiting for you #AalGhyoum!

Name: Résonances
Description: À travers des ouvrages, des entretiens et des rencontres, Résonances est un espace dans lequel les artistes dialoguent avec l'époque pour mieux la comprendre, la ressentir et la faire bifurquer.

Name: Copenhagen Photo Festival
Description: Copenhagen Photo Festival is an annual event that takes place in June. For eleven days, photography is put on the agenda with exhibitions, workshops, seminars, photo tours, portfolio reviews and more.

Name: Ink and Movement
Description:
Ink and Movement is a management and representation agency specialising in the care and management of artistic talent within the different disciplines of contemporary art.

Artists:
Okuda San Miguel
Misterpiro
Spok Brillor
Sabek
TQM.XOXO

Name: Vroom & Varossieau
Description:
Vroom &Varossieau Gallery Amsterdam
In 2010 Isabelle Vroom and Olivier Varossieau founded Vroom &Varossieau Contemporary Art. Focussing on emerging contemporary and street art movements and aiming to excite and inspire. 

Vroom &Varossieau is not afraid to question the status quo and stir things up. Working with internationally diverse artists ranging from emerging young talent to big and bold names in the field. 
We organise exhibitions in our gallery space in Zaandam, establish mural commissions and play a forward thinking and leading role in a host of other international urban art related projects. 
Vroom &Varossieau also specialises in private art sales. Encouraging our clients and advising them accordingly to not only collect art from artists we represent but also from the strong
secondary market of the fresh and ever-evolving contemporary genre.

Our gallery doors are always open for anyone looking to get to know us better, buy art, brainstorm, work with us or just to enjoy a good cup of coffee and get inspired!

Vroom &Varossieau Urban Contemporary Art
Draaibank 10
Gebouw 415 Hembrug 
1505RN Zaandam 
www.vroomandvarossieau.com
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/vroom...
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vroo...
Open on appointment

Sell your art (collection)
We are always looking for 80's grafitti, post grafitti, calligrafitti, street art etc.
We are specifically looking for artists like Banksy, Blade, Dondi White, Futura, Rammellzee, Richard Hambleton, Os Gemeos, Kaws, Cranio, The London Police, Andy Warhol, Keith Haring, Jean-Michel Basquiat, Retna, Kenny Scharf, and can advise you on how to sell them best.

Museums
If you need help with curating a show about Street Art, the history of grafitti and street art don't hesitate to contact us. We've lend works and work together with museums all over the world for example La Condition Publique Roubaix, Amsterdam Museum, Art & Science Museum Singapore, HAM Helsinki

Name: Brevard Music Center
Description:
The Brevard Music Center, a summer institute and festival, teaches gifted young musicians to prepare and perform great musical works at a high artistic level.

The Music Center is situated on a wooded 180-acre campus in the beautiful Blue Ridge Mountains of western North Carolina. Founded in 1936, the Music Center has matured into one of this country's premier summer training programs and festivals. More than 600 gifted students, ages 14 through post-college, come to the Music Center to study with members of a distinguished artist faculty and with renowned guest artists. For seven weeks, students participate in a vigorous program of instruction that includes ensembles, private lessons, and chamber music.

Brevard's hallmark is the powerful sense of community that re-emerges every June, as faculty and students work together to present more than 80 concerts to the public. The total audience each summer numbers more than 40,000.

For decades the Brevard Music Center has inspired devotion not only among its students and faculty but also among its listeners and among a vast corps of volunteers. That hundreds of persons have purchased homes in western North Carolina expressly to be near the Brevard Music Center gives some measure of the Center's significance to its community.

Name: The Drum Camp
Description: We are a niche drum education studio & store based in Dubai, offering drum lessons for all age groups & levels, online or in studio. Whatever your aspiration, our teaching approach is focused on helping you find your true potential as a drummer and musician.

Name: La chambre symphonique
Description:
Un orchestre symphonique de 70 musiciens.
L'émotion et la passion au cœur de la musique

Name: Accessible Art Fair (ACAF)
Description:
Accessible Art Fair (ACAF)  is a contemporary art event bringing together artists and the public. Founded in 2006, the mission of the Accessible Art Fair  remains unchanged: forging a bond between the artist and the buyer. This 4-day event offers a platform for artists to exhibit their work in a cultural and prestigious space. We strive to make quality artists accessible to the public and the public accessible to the artists.

We offer the opportunity to purchase quality works of art and design and meet the creators behind the work. The art works are carefully selected and hand-picked by a panel of experts and we guarantee the quality of the art presented. Purchasing a work of art might seem daunting to some. At the Accessible Art Fair we strive to make this experience as pleasant as possible by removing the barriers between the buyer and the artist.

The Accessible Art Fair 2018  took place at BOZAR in Brussels, 4-7 October where 60 artists were be present.

Name: ARCHIVART
Description:
Archivart est une galerie d’art contemporain et une plateforme indépendante basée en Tunisie, engagée dans la valorisation des pratiques artistiques issues d’Afrique et du Moyen-Orient.
 Fondée sur la recherche, le commissariat d’exposition et l’archivage, Archivart s’attache à documenter, analyser et amplifier des démarches artistiques qui contribuent à redéfinir les narrations de l’art contemporain.
 En favorisant les échanges entre artistes, chercheur·e·s et publics, Archivart développe un espace de réflexion et de production critique inscrit dans des dynamiques locales et internationales.

Name: Towner Eastbourne
Description:
Collecting and exhibiting contemporary art for nearly 100 years, Towner Eastbourne presents an ambitious and high quality programme of historic, modern and contemporary art through temporary and collection based exhibitions, talks, events and creative activities for as many as 160,000 visitors each year. Founded in 1923 as a result of a bequest by Alderman John Chisholm Towner to create ‘an art gallery for the people’, this founding ethos remains at the heart of Towner’s mission.

Towner’s Collection is best known for its modern British art, including the largest and most significant body of work by Eric Ravilious (1903–1942), and a growing collection of international contemporary art including works by Dineo Seshee Bopape, John Akomfrah, Lawrence Abu Hamdan, Tacita Dean, Grayson Perry and Wolfgang Tillmans. Visitors can experience Collection highlights, from painting and works on paper to sculpture and moving image works, in Gallery 1 and the Ravilious Gallery, and through behind the scenes tours in the Art Store every other Sunday.

Towner is a free and welcoming community space providing places for study and relaxation including a Sensory Room, a new Collection Library and a cinema screening a regular programme of films including new releases, documentaries, classics, family film and more. The Art School programme offers creative activities for everyone, children and young people to adults, including drawing, making, designing and film making. A professional development programme for artists of all levels offers artist residencies, mentoring and opportunities for collaboration and showcasing.

The award-winning gallery designed by Rick Mather Architects sits in the Eastbourne’s cultural centre, the Devonshire Quarter. The building, which opened in April 2009, is the largest purpose built gallery in the South East.

Towner Eastbourne is led by Joe Hill, Director.

Name: Jaumesse
Description:
For more than a decade, Jaumesse has been on an intense journey of transformation seeking to realize his greatest passions and to live a full life that can foster the same in others. Through his pursuit, Jaumesse has experienced and collected a treasure trove of positive tools, solutions, and creations that he hopes to harness and share to cultivate understanding and connectedness among people from every walk of life.   

His writings are the first steps to accomplishing this higher aim whether in the form of rap lyrics,  poetry, or prose. Jaumesse started in his twenties writing constantly and during those early years created over 100 songs. He has since recorded several of his songs, directed music videos, and had the opportunity to collaborate with artists from different countries and cultures to bring his message of the value of the human being and the importance of multiculturality to as many people as possible.  

In addition, the blog “Full-Time Life Lovers”, created by Jaumesse to provide a means to share information on special activities and events in his everyday life, has now become a movement inspiring global citizens from every corner to live their best lives wherever they find themselves. Currently, he is working on his book that will be a collection of practical ways and simple concepts that can powerfully move a person from the darkness of loneliness and isolation to the light of hope and community.

Jaumesse sees the world as a big puzzle with gaps and pieces missing. He believes most people see this as permanent and unchangeable to which he counters that we can fill those gaps and bring wholeness to the masses through positive ideas and each one moving outside of their comfort zone.  He plans to work towards this end in as many ways and through as many projects as possible throughout his lifetime on this earth.

Name: ENSAD ALUMNI PARIS
Description:
L'association des anciens élèves de l’école, Ensad Alumni souhaite développer les liens entre les anciens élèves et l’école, renforcer les solidarités professionnelles, valoriser les diplômés de l’Ensad et contribuer au rayonnement de l’école autant en France qu’à l’étranger à travers ses anciens devenus aujourd’hui des professionnels.
L’association, reconnue par l'école, a le projet de mettre en place des activités de service et d’information destinées aux anciens élèves sous la forme de rencontres entre différentes générations et profils professionnels, la création d’un annuaire des anciens élèves, la réalisation d’une lettre d’information, la diffusion d’offres d’emploi, la tenue d’événements fédérateurs tant sur le plan amical que professionnel.
Ensad Alumni Paris invite tous les anciens élèves de l’Ensad à la rejoindre et est ouverte à toute proposition d'actions.
 
Ensad Alumni Paris est partenaire de l'ENSAD et collabore avec celle-ci. Différents projets sont en cours autant avec la direction de l'école qu'avec son BDE.

EAP est aussi membre PSL Alumni

* École nationale supérieure des Arts décoratifs, 31 rue d'Ulm 75005 Paris
http://www.ensad.fr/lecole/communaute-arts-deco/actualites-anciens
https://ensadalumniparis.com/
Nouvelle adresse mail:
Pour information l’Ensad nous a créé une adresse mail en tant qu’association des anciens EAP.
Vous pouvez aussi nous écrire à alumni@ensad.fr, nous gardons l’ancienne aussi ensad.alumni.paris@gmail.com
Cordialement
Votre association EAP

Name: ZETTAI
Description:
ZETTAI is a contemporary art advisory with a global focus, based in Tokyo, Japan. Featuring a team of established international art experts, ZETTAI focuses on leading and mid-career artists, and original artworks. ZETTAI’s mission is to promote cross-cultural exchange between Japan and the world while bringing depth, knowledge and expertise.  

How do we assist art collectors?

ZETTAI streamlines all aspects of building a fine art collection, from initial education and acquisition to installation and collections management. We have a unique understanding of every aspect of the art world while taking great pride in making these processes transparent for the clients. 

No matter what stage in an art collection journey a collector is in, we meet each client's unique needs with utmost discretion and expertise. Through our services, collectors can acquire significant works of art from both leading and emerging artists. Our clients will be given guidance on purchasing from galleries, directly through artist's studios, private collections, and at auction. ZETTAI also provides the opportunity for participating in private tours of artists' studios and exclusive events. ZETTAI provides all of these services domestically and overseas.

How do we assist artists, galleries, not-for-profits, museums and art fairs? 

Our role extends beyond guiding art collectors through the intricate landscape of forming connections with artists and gallery venues. We also collaborate directly with artists, galleries, non-profit organizations, museums, and art fairs to engage in curatorial endeavors and unique projects. Apart from our curatorial contributions, we extend editorial services that encompass diverse forms – be it crafting articles, critical art reviews, or securing features in prominent art magazines. Thanks to our expansive network of editors and writers, we have the ability to facilitate the generation or establishment of connections with the leading industry professionals.

Name: MISTAKER MAKER
Description:
We make art happen.
In the process mistakes are made.
We try again.
We make mistakes again.
And then, art happens.


MISTAKER MAKER | Platform for Artistic Intervention, based on arts and cultural nature, our mission and main objectives are: promote actively and creatively the production and promotion of exercises of contemporary art in all its (new) forms of expression; stimulate informally, by exploring new paths in the production of content, integration of heterogeneous public, seeking strengthening of critical mass and the creation, not only of new artistic products, as well as the growing of economic, social and cultural value.

For the daily implementation of all the above actions, MISTAKER MAKER:
- provides CONSULTING, CURATOR, communication and project MANAGEMENT SERVICES;
- establish and promotes PARTNERSHIPS, networks and intersections between different creative sectors and entities;
- Informs and INVOLVES the general community, by creating and supporting WORKSHOPS, residencies, EXHIBITIONS and/or performances, in different creative and cultural areas;
- Promotes and SUPPORTS STUDIES and research, raise funds and resources for projects related to art and culture in general;
- Promotes and ensures the VISIBILITY of the creative industries sector in the city, the region, the country and the world.

artists - 276

foreign artists - 81
nationalities - 21
