(until january 2026)

Name: FACE B
Description:
FACE B is a creative agency that creates and supports artistic projects. Throughout the years, we have developed solid skills on artistic direction and general production. We also gained a specific know-how on cultural mediation and the participation of varied public in cultural activities. Our activities are divided into 3 sections: 

𒇹 PROJECTS 
We carry out artistic projects that are directly imagined by our teams. 

𒇹 MISSIONS 
We regularly work for public or private clients to develop their projects. 

𒇹 TRAININGS
We regularly accompany individual or collective trainings for people in the creative sector. By mixing theoretical concepts to field experience, we want to share practical tools which can help you realise your ambitions by exchanging practices and studying real cases.

Need a hand to develop your project? Contact us at hello@face-b.org

Name: STUK – House for Dance, Image & Sound
Description:
STUK is het Leuvense kunstencentrum.

STUK ziet het als zijn kerntaak om een publieke ontmoetingsplaats rond kunst te organiseren. Een plek waar diverse blikken op de wereld kunnen getoetst worden. Een plek die fundamenteel gedacht wordt vanuit de kunst en de kunstenaars. Een plek waar genoeg ruimte is om risico's te nemen. Een plek met een uitgebreid programma van dynamische, tijdelijke activiteiten maar ook met ruimte voor langere trajecten. Een plek met oog voor de evoluties binnen de disciplines en over de disciplines heen, maar tevens met een blijvende erkenning en/of een herpositionering van een ‘verleden'.

Name: The Professional Organization of Women in the Arts
Description: POWarts, the Professional Organization of Women in the Arts, was founded in 2008 to champion the professional lives of women in the art world. By offering an active calendar of events, panel discussions, and mentoring opportunities, POWarts helps women learn, connect, and build their careers. POWarts believes that generosity and leadership can, and should, go hand in hand. Our programming stems from the knowledge that art and business are not separate; rather, understanding business is vital to creating spaces for art, and women, to thrive. POWarts is a 501C3 nonprofit organization run by a volunteer steering committee. Membership is open to women and allies of all genders who are committed to the advancement of professional women across the arts.

Name: Collectif Minuit 12
Description: Minuit 12 est un collectif de création et de recherche destiné aux artistes qui explorent les thématiques écologiques. Fondé en 2021 par les artistes et danseuses Pauline Lida, Jade Verda et Justine Sène, le corps est notre matière première de création.

Name: Emerging Artist Platform
Description: ‘EMERGING ARTIST PLATFORM'. An Online Gallery Connecting Art Lovers To Emerging Artists Around The Globe. Search For Original Pieces of Art That Fit Any Budget! Hand-Picked By Our Team of Specialist Curators and Appraisal Experts.

Name: ActionSpace
Description: ActionSpace is a visual arts organisation that supports learning disabled artists across London. We seek out and unlock talent, create opportunities and enable learning disabled artists to realise their potential.

Name: PARSFORTE Internazionale d'arte
Description:
Today, one of the best and easiest ways to show your abilities to the world is to publish them in a visible space.
PARSFORTE International Magazine is the first and only non-Iranian magazine that introduces and displays the works of Persian artists in the form of printed books as well as introducing artists in websites, museums, galleries and international spaces.

Name: Färgfabriken
Description:
Färgfabriken has, since its founding in 1995, served as a platform for contemporary cultural expressions, with an emphasis on art, architecture and urban planning. In many of our projects and exhibitions, both in Sweden and abroad, we have developed methods with the purpose of exploring and trying to understand the complexities of our constantly changing world. Färgfabriken is driven by a desire to reflect upon the heterogeneous and multicultural world we live in. We want to test the limits of what an art space is, and could become.

It is important to create conditions for free and creative thinking. In this context, art is central. It acts as a catalyst for innovation in the meeting with the rest of society, as well as with individuals. Färgfabriken’s projects and exhibitions have a wide audience, including active decision makers, creators, artists and scientists – those who can make a difference today. Everyone is welcome to Färgfabriken.

Our approach creates space for exhibitions and projects that might not find its natural place elsewhere. Färgfabriken wants to make the invisible visible.

The globally increasing migration to cities is creating new forms of urbanity and cultural patterns. Therefore Färgfabriken is interested in working with the city as a phenomenon. Satellite and collaborative projects with institutions and activists around the world gives us inspiration and experience. It is essential to carry out comprehensive and relevant exhibitions in Stockholm. We want to bring the world to Stockholm, and Färgfabriken to the world.

Welcome to Färgfabriken!

Name: Agence Sensible
Description:
L’Agence Sensible est une association animée par l’envie d’explorer, d’inventer et de fédérer autour d’idées originales, réunit autour des valeurs de collaboration, d’expérimentation et de créativité.

L'Agence Sensible articule son activité autour de deux pôles :
> la conception de projets artistiques participatifs ;
> le développement de dispositifs d’intelligence collective pour les organisations qui souhaitent interroger leurs modes d'implication et leurs projets.

Name: Floating Point Gallery
Description: Floating Point Gallery is a Canadian meta gallery that lives in virtual reality and exhibits across digital worlds. Our mission is to cultivate progressive ideas and untapped potential in the Canadian arts into exceptional and innovative exhibitions across various metaverses.

Name: ETHIO-FA ART
Description: This group is an artworks and architectural design can be worked similarly share ideas, experiences and  free for discussion .

Name: Futureforms
Description:
FUTUREFORMS is an award-winning art and design studio based in the San Francisco, California. Since 2005, founders Jason Kelly Johnson and Nataly Gattegno have collaborated on a range of projects exploring the intersections of art and design with public space, performance, advanced fabrication technologies, robotics, and responsive building systems. Recent projects have included fine art objects, furniture and lighting fixtures, art pavilions and sculptural shade canopies, as well as large scale urban art installations.  

From 2002-2018 the studio was called Future Cities Lab.

Name: Kontundente
Description:
KONTUNDENTE – Gestión Integral del Arte – es una empresa consultora de carácter curatorial e interdisciplinar comprometida con la sostenibilidad del artista y del sector cultural.  

Ofrece asesorías, mentorías, proyectos, eventos e investigación para la innovación del mercado del arte, la gestión de la cultura, la gerencia de la industria cultural y de la economía creativa. 

Y en su línea de especialidad para el circuito de las Artes Visuales, ofrece un programa curatorial donde la exposición se convierte en una exploración para la integración del artista con el ecosistema creativo.

Kontundente abre puertas entre el mundo del arte y otros espacios, interconecta formas de pensar, experimenta entre regiones del mundo y acompaña el crecimiento de las ideas de proyecto y de las organizaciones culturales.

Name: National Association of Women Artists
Description:
NAWA - The National Association of Women Artists
Established in 1889 by five women artists in a NYC studio, NAWA is the first women’s art organization in America. NAWA provides exhibition opportunities throughout the year and throughout the country for its members and collectors.
• NAWA fosters public awareness & interest in the visual fine arts created by women across the United States.
• Promotes culture through exhibitions, education, scholarships & awards.
• The NAWA Catalog is archived in over 10 high-profile institutions, including the Metropolitan Museum of Art, Museum of Modern Art, The Library of Congress, and more.
• The Jane Voorhees Zimmerli Art Museum Rutgers University in New Brunswick, New Jersey holds a permanent collection of NAWA art .
• NAWA has been empowering women artists since 1889.
• Learn more about NAWA by visiting our website: theNAWA.org

Name: Futureforms
Description:
FUTUREFORMS is an award-winning art and design studio based in the San Francisco, California. Since 2005, founders Jason Kelly Johnson and Nataly Gattegno have collaborated on a range of projects exploring the intersections of art and design with public space, performance, advanced fabrication technologies, robotics, and responsive building systems. Recent projects have included fine art objects, furniture and lighting fixtures, art pavilions and sculptural shade canopies, as well as large scale urban art installations.  

From 2002-2018 the studio was called Future Cities Lab.

Name: Experimenta
Description:
Experimenta is Australia’s leading organisation dedicated to commissioning, exhibiting and touring contemporary art driven by technology.

We commission some of the world’s most adventurous contemporary artists working with technology in unexpected and unconventional ways. We champion new ideas about technology, explore the creative possibilities and unearth emerging artforms.

Experimenta’s programs are quite unlike anything else and redefine what art can be, including bio art, creative coding, robotics, data-driven works, virtual and augmented reality. We work with established and emerging artists and provide a vital platform for them to collaborate with experts in other fields (scientists, researchers, engineers, architects and technologists), to realise ambitious, daring and complex projects. We are not bound by traditional artforms and we bring very different people into arts practice.

Since its inception in 1986, Experimenta has developed a worldwide reputation for fostering creativity that extends the aesthetic, conceptual and experiential potential of new art forms. As an organisation that continues to support new and emerging forms of contemporary practice, Experimenta is recognised as a leading hub of experimental art in Australia.

Name: ARCHIVART
Description:
Archivart offers an online gallery that showcases contemporary visual artists through interviews, portraits, videos, and podcasts.
Archivart provides a marketplace for selling art online to a vibrant community of art lovers.

Name: Artsicle
Description: Artsicle is a company with a mission - to make art happen. We intend to break down the barriers that are restricting innovation and growth in the art market. We intend to support today's artists as they grow their careers. We intend to open the doors for everyone to become a collector of original, contemporary art. Join us.

Name: BEYOND THE STREETS LLC
Description: BEYOND THE STREETS was founded by Roger Gastman, producer of the 2010 Academy Award-nominated film, Exit Through the Gift Shop, co-curator of Art in the Streets (2011) at the MoCA in Los Angeles, and director of the SHOWTIME documentary Rolling Like Thunder (2021), a plunge into the underground world of freight train graffiti culture. BEYOND THE STREETS is an art-driven cultural and educational worldwide movement celebrating mark makers and rule breakers, agitators and instigators. Its curation showcases the best of contemporary and emerging artists, with a focus on graffiti and street art creators. Boasting over 100 artist collaborators per show, BEYOND THE STREETS is known for its massive-scale exhibitions, immersive educational experiences, and engaging pop-up events, which have played host to over half a million unique visitors between its shows in Los Angeles, New York, The Hamptons and digital showcases with NTWRK. BEYOND THE STREETS exhibitions have produced over 2.5B media impressions through global art publications, business journals and culture magazines, with new show openings coming to Shanghai and London in 2023. BEYOND THE STREETS is widely recognized for its innovative brand partnerships and premium publications, which include over 75 published and authored book titles, including works for the likes of Martha Cooper, Felipe Pantone, POSE, Paul Insect, DABSMYLA and Beastie Boys, amongst others. BEYOND THE STREETS pushes the very idea of art beyond any preconceived boundary.

Name: Salem Art Association
Description:
The Salem Art Association is a 501c3 non-profit organization serving the mid-Willamette Valley since 1919.

Our mission is to actively engage the community in the appreciation of the arts through contemporary art exhibitions and events, arts education for youth and adults, and the preservation and interpretation of our shared cultural heritage.

Name: Ce Que Mes Yeux Ont Vu
Description: Ce Que Mes Yeux Ont Vu a pour vocation de transformer la société en créant du lien social grâce à l’art et à la culture. Nous sommes un studio d’ingénierie de projets solidaires. Nous concevons et produisons des ateliers basés sur les arts visuels, avec des artistes et qui permettent à des personnes qu’à priori tout oppose de se rencontrer. Ces expériences artistiques transformantes changent l’image que les participants – salariés et personnes en grande précarité - portent sur eux-mêmes, sur leur posture sociale et professionnelle.

Name: Melody Makers Music & Fine Arts Centre
Description:
“Perfection is our goal, Excellence will be tolerated” with this objective in mind Melody Makers Music and Fine Arts Centre was established in 1997. Since inception, Melody Makers have been providing best quality training in instrumental & vocal music, art & craft, drama & communication, creative writing and various forms of dances in a professional and friendly atmosphere for young and adults to nurture their hidden talents.

In case of certain programs, students are prepared for the certification examinations conducted by some of the internationally acclaimed boards like the Trinity College London. However, the students can also learn these programs without appearing for the formal certification examinations in their pursuit to excellence in these programs as their passion or hobby.

Melody Makers have not only achieved excellence in the field of teaching music dance and fine arts but also actively participate in community service by way of organizing fund raising shows for some of well known charity organizations in this region a demonstration of our commitment to the society that we all belong to.

Name: Institut Seni Indonesia Surakarta
Description: Institut Seni Indonesia Surakarta - Indonesia Institute of the Arts, Surakarta, Central Java, Indonesia

Name: Pratt Fine Arts Center
Description: Founded in 1976, Pratt Fine Art Center is an eclectic, hands-on learning and working environment serving students, hobbyists, and professional artists throughout the Seattle area. A unique multidisciplinary visual arts resource, Pratt provides education and instruction, community programs and professionally equipped art making facilities.

Name: ADC, Art Design Consultants
Description:
At Art Design Consultants our #1 mission is to create beautiful environments.

We are a multifaceted company located in a breathtaking 13,000 square foot gallery on the edge of downtown Cincinnati. With over 20 years of experience, we help our clients–corporate, residential & healthcare–choose the right artwork for their space. We nurture our clients through the art selection process from beginning to end. We offer original works of fine art as well as prints, prints on canvas, & giclees. We pride ourselves in our large selection of artwork, and variety of styles to accommodate a broad range in tastes.

Name: AIR-INK
Description: AIR-INK are the first inks and paints made out of air pollution.   AIR-INK is made out of air pollution particulate matter––namely the unburned carbon soot you see coming out of the exhaust pipe of cars, chimneys, generators, and more.

Name: Cadde Sanat Merkezi
Description:
Müzik Dersleri: Piyano, Gitar, Keman, Bateri, Flüt, Perküsyon, Saksafon, Şan...

Name: Richard Saltoun Gallery
Description:
Founded in 2012, Richard Saltoun Gallery is based in Mayfair, London and Via Margutta, Rome. The gallery specialises in post war and contemporary art, with a specialism on Feminist, Conceptual and Performance artists from the 1960s onwards. It is guided by a strong focus on rediscovering the work of important yet under-recognised artists through presentations at its central locations, a comprehensive series of online exhibitions, and participation in art fairs around the world.

Since its inception, Richard Saltoun Gallery has been driven by an interest in social responsibility and is now widely recognised for its critically and socially-engaged programme. In 2019, the gallery launched a year-long initiative titled 100% Women that aimed to address gender inequality in the art world and encourage wider industry action through debate, dialogue and collaboration. It is now a leader in its representation of female artists, from avant-garde pioneers of the 1960s and ‘70s, such as Eleanor ANTIN, Renate BERTLMANN, Helen CHADWICK and Jo SPENCE, to a younger generation of female artists including Silvia GIAMBRONE and Marinella SENATORE. It continues to support female artists through extensive research, partnerships and solo presentations at the galleries and online.

Description:
Osaro regroupe à la fois des artistes, des directeurs artistiques et des techniciens. Notre activité est axée sur les arts visuels issus des arts urbains (Street-art et Graffiti). Nous proposons aux collectivités publiques et aux particuliers des évènements sur mesure, des créations originales, des ateliers de sensibilisation, du team building, des expositions... 
Notre démarche est résolument tournée vers l’ouverture d’esprit à travers la découverte culturelle; un chemin qui passe par la rencontre avec des artistes talentueux et la découverte de techniques et concepts novateurs.

Name: Finnacena escritório de arte
Description:
A FINNACENA, produtora cultural em artes visuais, emprega tempo para criar ideias com foco na excelência em gestão, consultoria, conteúdo e produção de projetos. 
Os nossos serviços são: Gestão de projetos em editais culturais, produção de exposições e eventos culturais, consultoria na elaboração de projetos culturais e elaboração de projetos 3D para Exposições, todos, na área de Artes Visuais. Atendimento personalizado com horário agendado no ateliê do artista ou espaço criativo.

Name: Atthowe Fine Art Services
Description: Atthowe Fine Art Services is an employee-owned cooperative dedicated to the safe handling and conscientious stewardship of fine art and cultural objects. Our services include transportation, freight-forwarding, packing, crating, installation, framing, storage, specialized rigging, project management, and large construction projects. Our commitment is rooted in professionalism, exceptional service, good citizenship, ethical practices, meaningful work, and a dedication to environmental responsibility. Our facilities in Oakland, California include 80,000 square feet of fine art storage.

Name: Zone Critique
Description:
Notre ambition est la même depuis 2012 : partager notre enthousiasme pour la littérature, le cinéma et la culture contemporaine, questionner les grands enjeux de notre époque à travers les œuvres de notre temps.
En proposant à nos abonnés des textes de fiction inédits écrits par les nouveaux visages de la création contemporaine, nous souhaitons interroger notre époque grâce à la littérature et redonner le goût de lire au plus large public.

En effet, nous, membres et fondateurs de Zone Critique, croyons profondément qu’un texte de fiction permet d’interroger le réel avec plus d’acuité, de légitimité et de profondeur que n’importe quel autre média.

D’où notre nom : Zone Critique est à la fois un espace de réflexion et un point de bascule qui annonce des bouleversements, place le lecteur ou le spectateur dans une position d’inconfort tout en laissant espérer un souffle nouveau.

#litterature #edition #culture #media #creation #cinema #critique

Name: Dallas Art Fair
Description:
Located at the Fashion Industry Gallery – adjacent to the Dallas Museum of Art in the revitalized downtown Arts District – the 2013 Dallas Art Fair featured over 80 prominent national and international art dealers and galleries exhibiting painting, sculpture, works on paper, photography, video, and installation by modern and contemporary artists.

EVENT DATES

The 2013 Dallas Art Fair was held Friday, April 12 through Sunday, April 14. Preview Gala, April 11.

PREVIEW GALA BENEFIT

The 2013 Preview Gala marked the launch of the fifth annual Dallas Art Fair on Thursday, April 11, 2013. The Preview Gala will benefit the Dallas Museum of Art, the Dallas Contemporary, and the Nasher Sculpture Center, and offer art patrons and Dallas’ top collectors the opportunity to preview and purchase exhibited works prior to the public opening of the fair.

Name: MaMA
Description:
MaMA is in 1997 opgericht met het uitgesproken doel bruggen te slaan, tussen de straat en het culturele veld, de (kunst)academie en een professionele loopbaan. Vanaf MaMA’s eerste adem speelt de invloed van jeugd- en subculturen op de hedendaagse kunstpraktijk een grote rol. Jongerencultuur is een van de voornaamste aanjagende krachten van het maatschappelijk debat. Dankzij de subculturele en creatieve activiteit die aan de rand van de mainstream plaatsvindt wordt het begrip van wie er onderdeel van de samenleving uitmaakt en daarbinnen gehoord wordt continu opgerekt. Dit is het terrein waar jongeren hun eigen leefwijzen verbeelden en de regie nemen over hun toekomst.

MaMA is sinds haar oprichting pionier geweest in het ontwikkelen van nieuwe werkmethodes die het talent van de jongste generatie naar een hoger niveau tillen. MaMA is een plek waar we samen, met generositeit en durf als kernwaarden, ondernemerschap ontwikkelen en de zeggenschap van jongeren
vergroten.

Name: Fondazione Adolfo Pini
Description:

Nelle stanze, che furono dimora e studio del pittore, sono esposte in collezione permanente le sue opere, insieme agli arredi d’epoca. Impegnata nella promozione dell’arte e della cultura, produce mostre temporanee e incontri. Sostiene giovani artisti attivi nel settore della pittura, dell’attività artistica e letteraria, attraverso premi e borse di studio.

#FondazionePini

Name: Marignana Arte
Description:

The gallery is located in the district of Dorsoduro, a key area for art exhibitions and considered the hub of contemporary art in Venice. It sits conveniently among the Peggy Guggenheim Collection, the Pinault Collection and the Vedova Foundation.
The gallery’s program explores many expressions of contemporary art research, focusing both on new generations of artists and on those already internationally acclaimed. Marignana Arte is also active in international collaborations that foresee the development of projects with private and public institutions.

Name: Yubtra
Description:

YUBTRA thrives to create a global platform for artists to showcase and sell their works by interacting and collaborating with art buyers directly, YUBTRA plays the role of a catalyst to bring the the two together. Over the years, YUBTRA has created a global art community and promoted a very positive art environment art industry bridging the gap between artists and art lovers, art buyers and art collectors. It has surpassed the cliche’ that art belongs to a certain class in the society. It has opened the market to all segments of the society globally. Through this execise, YUBTRA means to bring together art and artists across various cultures and countries to Celebrate art on a very unique platform. 
One can view exquisite art at the click of a button sitting in the comfort of your home, office and even browse on the go on your phone, tablet or any other compatible gadget, that is how simple it is. 
On YUBTRA, you can directly connect with the artist, if a particular art piece interests you, further you can advance to commissioned works if the artist is interested. Thus providing a platform for both to work conducively on large projects, should the need be. 
YUBTRA provides an environment where artists share their creations without the fear of being typecasted, overruled, building confidence in the new gen artists. 
Greater openings for established artists. 
This environement only grows healthier with passing time. 
YUBTRA is a global platform both for artists across the globe and art connoisseurs world over.   
An artists, of any genre  can showcase works online and sell at their convenience without a third party being involved.

Name: The Society of Women Artists
Description:
The society holds various exhibitions throughout the year, culminating in the annual exhibition at the Mall Galleries in London. The exhibition consists of works by members and non-members, which are selected by a panel from an open call for entries. This exhibition promotes members,  non-members and encourage new artists to show their work at their annual exhibition.  The exhibition offers awards to selected artists and aims to highlight the wide range and diversity of fine art created by women.

The SWA has a membership composed of a maximum of 150 members.  

The first step towards becoming a member is to submit six works regularly (although a maximum of four will be hung) for the Annual Open Exhibition. These are considered by a selection committee, and if judged exceptional, the artist is elected to become an associate member (ASWA), subject to space within the society. Associate members become eligible for election to full membership in the following year.

Name: Art Zagreb
Description: Art Zagreb is an annual international contemporary art fair. A great meeting place for artists, collectors, gallerists, curators and art lovers in general. The leading art fair in Croatia since the first edition in 2018 and the one–stop shop for Croatian contemporary art. Aside from two dozen stands, a four–day event hosts exhibitions, lectures, panels, movie screenings and parties.

Name: Nous Art Gallery
Description:
ART EVOKES THE DEEPEST HUMAN INSTINCTS

Commonly translated as ‘mind’ or ‘intellect’, the Greek word Nous is a key term in the philosophies of Plato, Aristotle and Plotinus. What gives Nous its special significance there is not primarily its dictionary meaning – other nouns in Greek can also signify the mind – but the value attributed to its activity and to the metaphysical status of things that are ‘noetic’ (intelligible and incorporeal), as distinct from being perceptible and corporeal.

In Plato’s later dialogues, and more systematically in Aristotle and Plotinus, Nous is not only the highest activity of the human soul, but also the divine and transcendent principle of cosmic order.

We think of art as a useful tool for social integration and self-integrity, and according to oriental philosophy, the wiseman’s mind should be wide enough to embrace contradiction and paradox, conflict and incompatibility, polarity and ambiguity.

We believe that contemporary art is a continuous search, not merely decorative. We search for an inner depth because everything stems from a profound human reason, and for us it is important to strengthen the creative process.

Our task is to support artists and their creations, to communicate them and give them an ideal context where we can evoke an inner harmony and find new ways of expressing the balance of the continuum of the existence.  

“The intuitive mind is a sacred gift and the rational mind is a faithful servant. We have created a society that honours the servant and has forgotten the gift.”

-Albert Einstein

W październiku 2020r. Artur Krajewski wraz z malarką i projektantką mody Agnieszką Komornicką oraz Magdą Werewką-specjalistką PR,  powołali Fundację Sztuki Współczesnej Niespokojna. Założeniem zespołu Fundacji i działającej równolegle galerii jest nawiązywanie pozytywnego dialogu między światem artystycznym i biznesowym w Polsce. Połączenie  obu tych obszarów, z uważnością na potrzeby każdego z nich, jest kluczem do wzbogacenia świata biznesu o piękno sztuki najwyższej klasy, jednocześnie umożliwiając twórcom odnalezienie nowych przestrzeni do prezentacji dzieł.

Name: Pearl Lam Galleries
Description:
Pearl Lam Galleries is a driving force within Asia’s contemporary art scene. Founded in 2005, the Gallery plays a vital role in stimulating international dialogue and cross-cultural exchange between East and West.

Following a rigorous programme, Pearl Lam Galleries presents museum-quality exhibitions that re-evaluate and challenge perceptions of cultural practice in Asia. With a thoughtfully balanced roster of Chinese and international artists, the Gallery is strategic in its curation, positioning itself as an educator.

The Gallery’s flagship space is located in the historic Pedder Building in Hong Kong, whilst the Shanghai space lies in the heart of the Bund district.

With a team of international staff, Pearl Lam Galleries’ reach is global, having presentations at major international art fairs including The Armory Show, Art Cologne, Art Basel Hong Kong, Frieze Masters, and West Bund Art and Design.

Name: ArtReach
Description:
ArtReach San Diego ignites youth creativity through visual arts expression and community connection. We believe that every person, regardless of zip code, background, or ability, deserves access to the joy, confidence, and growth that come from making art.

Founded in 2007, ArtReach exists to increase access to visual arts education by connecting people with professional artists through programs that inspire creative thinking and creative doing. What began as a small initiative to fill the arts gap in local schools has grown into a countywide movement reaching more than 12,000 youth and families each year.

Our In-School Programs bring artist-led residencies to K–12 schools across San Diego County, focusing on Title I and high-need sites where arts education is limited or nonexistent. Through sequential, standards-based lessons, students explore visual arts techniques, art history, and self-expression while developing social-emotional skills that support their overall well-being.

At our Hillcrest Community Arts Center, we host free and low-cost studio programs that welcome all ages. Early childhood classes link literacy and art, after-school programs encourage creative growth, and family workshops, sensory art experiences, and intergenerational events strengthen connection through creativity.

ArtReach also leads mural projects that transform spaces and amplify community voice. From youth-designed murals at schools to collaborative public artworks and professional commercial commissions that support our nonprofit mission, our murals celebrate identity and pride across San Diego.

Across every program, we center inclusion, collaboration, and access. Our team of local teaching artists creates safe, welcoming spaces where creativity thrives and community bonds are built. Whether in a classroom, at our studio, or on a city wall, ArtReach ensures that art is accessible, empowering, and truly for everyone.

Name: Ottawa School of Art
Description:
The Ottawa School of Art (OSA) is Ottawa’s hub for creativity and learning. For over 140 years, OSA has provided high-quality art education for students of all ages and skill levels.

With campuses downtown and in Orléans, OSA offers:
• Fine Arts Diploma and Arts Fundamentals Certificate programs
• Adult general interest courses and workshops
• Children’s and teen programs
• Summer and March Break art camps
• Online courses and flexible learning opportunities
• Community outreach initiatives
• Professional exhibitions in our galleries

As a non-profit organization, OSA is more than a school—it’s a creative community. Where practicing artists teach and inspire the next generation in the studio.

Learn more about our programs and join our community: artottawa.ca

Name: EBA Educadores
Description:
O EBA Educadores, abreviação de Esportistas, Brincantes e Artistas Educadores, é uma empresa que tem por objetivo levar para escolas outras possibilidades de se desenvolver a relação de ensino e aprendizagem, das quais o ensino formal muitas vezes não consegue abraçar.
Desta forma, investimos cada vez mais em espalhar práticas metodológicas para que os aprendizes possam ampliar seu conhecimento e suas maneiras plurais de se perceber o mundo, sua cultura e sua comunidade e, a partir disso construir tantos quantos universos forem necessários e possíveis para a formação de cidadãos melhores!

Sobre a metodologia EBA
É importante salientar que nossas práticas educativas envolvem a construção da brincadeira. Os participantes, junto dos educadores irão apresentar a desenvolver a construção da brincadeira, estimulando sua criatividade e cognição, além de outros aspectos que são relevantes para esse processo de aprendizado, como por exemplo, a socialização.

Name: MOVART
Description: MOVART has served as an interlocutor and promoter for contemporary art in Angola since 2014. The gallery initially operated as a ‘pop-up’ concept, producing mobile exhibitions of Luanda-based artists in iconic locations across the city, and abroad. In early 2017, having conceived 16 exhibitions in this format, MOVART Gallery opened a permanent space in Luanda, and now programs exhibitions of works by African contemporary artists on a monthly basis. The gallery’s mission centers around destabilizing stereotypes by showing a side of Angolan culture that is little-known beyond the continent. Since 2019 is stablished in Lisbon City by a POP-UP concept.

Name: Discovery Art Fair
Description:
With the objective to present young, fresh art, our fairs aim to excite new target groups for contemporary art by transcending the elitist art fairs and their speculative, often exclusive, pricing policies. With a distinct focus on contemporary art production, the Discovery Art Fairs provide a direct insight into new trends and new positions of the art world, frequently introducing new faces to the visitors. 

With an open, spontaneous atmosphere, the fairs place a special value on the multilateral discussion and exchange happening between visitors, artists, and gallerists. As a result, the Discovery Art Fairs provide a diversified and unique art experience to the visitors, outside of the conventional museum and gallery scene.

Every year, around 100 international exhibitors take part in each fair, showcasing their program to around 10,000 art lovers and collectors. Their road of art discovery is marked by a special inclusive feature, as artists, galleries and project spaces exhibit next to each other, requiring an equal amount of attention. In such a welcoming, multiform environment, each visitor is inspired to embark on a quest and actually discover a new favorite piece of art at a moderate price.

Name: Steve Hartman Art
Description:
Steve Hartman Art creates fine art pieces for commercial and residential spaces. Steve works in the mediums oil paints, watercolors, aerosols (spray paints) and fine art photography. Works are regularly being created, but commissioned paintings are also available upon request. 

Steve Hartman is a 30 year veteran Creative Director with experience in design and strategy for clients in Healthcare, Finance, Law, Hospitality, Senior Care, Logistics, Energy and Manufacturing. His C-Suite expertise, paired with brand strategy and design-thinking allow him to quickly understand the needs of corporate art collections and interior spaces. 

Art has the power to energize, captivate, heal, delight, calm. Art can transform any space to improve the lives of those who use the space. 

Steve's work has been exhibited in galleries, art centers and alternative spaces across the country. HIs paintings are in homes and offices from San Diego to Menlo Park; Wyoming to Arkansas; And up and down the East Coast.

Steve Hartman Art specializes in creating new and unique artwork for corporate and hospitality FF&E programs. With a keen eye for detail and a commitment to creativity, Steve Hartman offers custom art commissions tailored to elevate the aesthetic of corporate spaces and luxury hospitality interiors. From executive art commissions to licensing art collections for your art consultancy, Steve Hartman Art is dedicated to delivering unparalleled quality and sophistication in every aspect of our work. Steve Hartman has decades of collaborative design experience and understands art consultant and interior designer needs in providing creative works of art for their client’s spaces. 

Steve has worked with companies such as ARCH Design, Curate Art Group, Great American Art (GAA), Indiewalls, Louer Facility Planning, Saatchi Art, Sweeney Co. Art Advisors, TOC Artwork and Wendover Art Group.

Name: Centre des arts visuels | Visual Arts Centre
Description:
Avec son école d’art, la plus grande école d’art bilingue, indépendante et sans but lucratif au Canada et sa galerie, la Galerie McClure, un lieu d’exposition dynamique, le Centre des arts visuels vous offre une communauté bien vivante d’artistes, de professeur.e.s et d'étudiant.e.s. Nous faisons partie de la fibre artistique montréalaise depuis 1946. Nos cours sont ouverts à tous ceux et celles qui ont le désir d’apprendre et ils s’adressent à tous les niveaux. Nous avons des classes pour tous les âges et ce, toute l'année. Nous vous invitons à vous joindre à nous pour un cours, un atelier, une exposition, une ruche d'art ou un évènement !
.
.
.
With our School of Art—Canada’s largest bilingual independent art school—and our McClure Gallery—an exciting exhibition venue—the Visual Arts Centre offers you a thriving community of artists, teachers and students. We’ve been part of Montreal’s artistic fabric since 1946. Our courses are open to anyone with a desire to learn. We teach all levels, all ages, all year round. Take a course or workshop, attend a gallery exhibition, seminar or artists talk.

Name: Musée du Niel
Description:
Naissance d'un nouveau lieu d'art privé sur la Presqu'île de Giens dans le Var à Hyères (83).
En surplomb de la mer, sur le port du Niel, le Musée du Niel a ouvert ses portes le 3 juin 2023. Ce bâtiment de 1962 entièrement rénové et agrémenté d’un jardin paysagé, abrite la collection de peintures de Jean-Noël Drouin dédiée à la non figuration du XXème siècle. Après une exposition inaugurale sur les Chemins de l'Abstraction, le Musée du Niel présentera au grand public de nouvelles avant-gardes dès mai prochain.
Au bord de l'eau, dans un cadre naturel privilégié face aux îles du Parc de Port Cros, le Musée du Niel est une invitation à respirer, s'inspirer, sur les traces d’une aventure artistique singulière, celle d’une abstraction dont la vitalité du geste et de la couleur irrigue la création contemporaine.

Name: Speak Up, Listen Down by David Howell
Description: I was motivated to write about my experiences in the police, what led me there and how I’ve used my acquired knowledge since, because I felt I’d had an interesting and, to some extent, a unique career path. I thought my insights might be useful to people within the police and in other walks of life. But, on a personal level, I was also motivated to share the good times and the bad times experienced during my 30 years of policing as a written legacy for my three daughters: Abby, Elsie and Izzy.

Name: Anozero - Bienal de Coimbra
Description:
Anozero - Bienal de Arte Contemporânea de Coimbra é uma iniciativa proposta pelo Círculo de Artes Plásticas de Coimbra, organizada em parceria com a Câmara Municipal de Coimbra e a Universidade de Coimbra, que assume como objectivo primordial promover uma reflexão sobre a classificação da Universidade de Coimbra, Alta e Sofia como Património Mundial da Humanidade pela UNESCO.
 
A Bienal, que teve a sua primeira edição em 2015, propõe um confronto entre arte contemporânea e património, explorando riscos e múltiplas possibilidades. 

Entre bienais, o Anozero produz uma exposição monográfica de um artista de reconhecimento internacional. Em 2023,o Mosteiro de Santa Clara-a-Nova receberá uma exposição monográfica do islandês Ragnar Kjartansson.

Name: Le Magasin, Centre national d'art contemporain (CNAC)
Description: Inaugurated in 1986, Le Magasin, National Center for Contemporary Art (CNAC) is dedicated to supporting, producing, and promoting contemporary visual arts for all audiences. Located in Grenoble in a 3000m2 Eiffel Hall built in 1900, the CNAC organises exhibitions, events, and outreach programs that showcase the richness and diversity of regional, national, and international contemporary creation and encourage encounters between artists, audiences, and works of art.

Name: RynekiSztuka.pl
Description: Rynekisztuka.pl to niezależne zaplecze analityczne i edukacyjne rynku sztuki w Polsce. Od 2011 roku pracujemy na styku redakcji, edukacji i doradztwa, wspierając artystów, kolekcjonerów oraz instytucje w podejmowaniu świadomych decyzji. Tworzymy programy edukacyjne, pakiety rozwojowe i konsultacje strategiczne oparte na wieloletniej obserwacji rynku w Polsce i Europie. Nasze działania koncentrują się na zrozumieniu mechanizmów obiegu sztuki, odpowiedzialnym kolekcjonowaniu i długofalowym budowaniu pozycji zawodowej. Założycielką i redaktorką naczelną Rynekisztuka.pl jest Anna Niemczycka-Gottfried.

Name: PRAGUE ART WEEK
Description:
Čtvrtý ročník festivalu vizuálního umění Prague Art Week začne 25. září výstavou HAC#2 – Havrlant Art Collection 10th anniversary ve Výstavní síni Mánes. Výstava nabídne kurátorský výběr klíčových děl za posledních 10 let, z nichž mnohá budou v Praze k vidění poprvé. Program dále zahrnuje například výstavu Bod nula ve zcela novém prostoru Kodl Contemporary, nebo skupinovou výstavu Young Selection 02 v uměleckém hubu The House. Festival nabídne ve vybraných dnech a časech zdarma přístupný program ve 40 galeriích a dalších místech po celé Praze.
/
The fourth edition of the Prague Art Week visual arts festival will begin on September 25 with the exhibition HAC#2 – Havrlant Art Collection 10th Anniversary at the Mánes Exhibition Hall. The exhibition will present a curated selection of key works from the past 10 years, many of which will be on view in Prague for the first time. The program also includes the Point Zero exhibition at the brand-new Kodl Contemporary space and the Young Selection 02 group exhibition at the art hub The House. On selected days and times, the festival will offer free admission to events at 40 galleries and other venues  across  Prague .

Name: A2AC (Ann Arbor Art Center)
Description: The Ann Arbor Art Center is a 501(c)3 Non-Profit visual arts center serving the community of Ann Arbor Michigan since 1909. Its historic buildings host art exhibitions, classes and are unique venues for selling local artwork and hosting private events. Open to the public 6 days a week and serving artists throughout Southeast Michigan.

Name: Festival International du Film de La Roche-sur-Yon
Description:
Le Festival International du Film de La Roche-sur-Yon est l'un des rares festivals de cinéma généraliste en France. Populaire et exigeant, il se distingue par une programmation éclectique de premières françaises de films de toutes durées, genres et nationalités, ainsi que des rencontres avec des figures emblématiques du cinéma contemporain. 

Le festival complète l'expérience avec des expositions et des concerts en lien avec la programmation, ainsi que de nombreuses actions culturelles et à destination du jeune public. Les tarifs accessibles permettent à un large public de profiter pleinement de l'événement. En 2024, le festival a attiré plus de 30 000 spectateurs.

Elevating Hospitality & Commercial Interiors with Custom Art & Design

Name: Vermont Studio Center
Description: The Vermont Studio Center is the largest international residency program in the US, hosting more than 500 visual artists and writers each year from across the country and around the world.

Name: Stichting Beelden in beweging
Description: Stichting Beelden in Beweging – Verbinder tussen Kunst, Archeologie, Erfgoed & Innovatie. Olivier van Wijk begeleidt namens stichting Beelden in beweging gemeenten bij de realisatie van grote landmarks in de openbare ruimte. We brengen kunst tot leven door het organiseren van kunstgerelateerde evenementen en sociaal-maatschappelijke projecten. Wij brengen de connectie van kunst met economie, toerisme, archeologie, erfgoed en sport, met als doel een breed publiek te betrekken en de belangstelling voor cultuur en innovatie te vergroten. Vanaf de oprichting in 2005 presenteerden we nationale en internationale hedendaagse beeldende kunst, met een sterke focus op innovatieve glaskunst. Dit vanuit het historisch perspectief van Joep Nicolas, pionier in de vlakglaskunst. We werken onder meer samen met de 170 jaar oude kunstwerkplaats op de Wilhelminasingel 67 in Roermond. Onze landmarks en tentoonstellingen trekken een breed publiek en dragen bij aan de culturele, economische en toeristische ontwikkeling van de regio. Daarnaast organiseren we educatieve activiteiten, zoals masterclasses en exposities op bijzondere locaties, waaronder de Kruisgang van het voormalig Kartuizerklooster in Roermond en Glasstec Düsseldorf. Zo creëren we inspirerende omgevingen waarin kunstenaars, studenten en bezoekers kunst kunnen ervaren en verdiepen. Samen maken we kunst toegankelijker en verbinden we archeologie en erfgoed met de toekomst.

With our headquarters based in Amsterdam, we regularly host exhibitions at our space, located in the Nieuwe Herengracht 123, Amsterdam Centrum. Our gallery display features our represented artists as well as newly-found artists found through our pop-ups overseas.

Name: Niet Normaal
Description:
Since the impactful Niet Normaal exhibition in 2009/2010 the organisation Niet Normaal has realised no less than eight large-scale, high-profile exhibitions. Still with the objective of making impactful arts festivals about people, society and technology. 

Successors of ROBOT LOVE, FAKE ME HARD and COME ALIVE are already in the works. In addition, we have collected the insights gained to share our experience and knowledge in other ways. With the general public, but also adapted to questions on diversity and inclusion from companies, education and governments. Niet Normaal Institute for Inclusive Innovation offers a variety of coaching programs, hackathons and impact workshops for CEO's and investors who respond to the changing world, and for culture makers, funds and artists for whom diversity and inclusion are at the core of what they do.

Sinds de eerste Niet Normaal tentoonstelling in 2009/2010 heeft Niet Normaal INT maar liefst acht grote, spraakmakende tentoonstellingen gerealiseerd. Nog steeds met als belangrijkste doelstelling om impactvolle kunstenfestivals te maken over de mens, samenleving en technologie.

Opvolgers van ROBOT LOVE, FAKE ME HARD en COME ALIVE staan alweer in de steigers. Daarnaast hebben we de opgedane inzichten verzameld om onze ervaring en kennis op andere manieren te delen. Met het brede publiek, maar ook aangepast op diversiteit- en inclusievragen van bedrijven, onderwijs en overheden. Niet Normaal, Institute for Inclusive Innovation biedt een variatie aan coachingstrajecten, hackathons en impact-workshops voor CEO’s en investeerders die inspelen op de veranderende wereld, en voor cultuurmakers, fondsen en kunstenaars voor wie diversiteit en inclusie aan de basis ligt van alles wat ze doen.

Name: Platform China Contemporary Art Institute
Description:
Platform China Contemporary Art Institute is a multi-functional art gallery whose activities are recognized for supporting emerging Chinese and international artists  established in Beijing in 2005 and Hong Kong in 2012. 

Occupying a total of 1,500 sq. in Caochangdi Artist Village, Beijing, Platform China includes exhibition and project spaces as well as international residency studios, and regularly exhibits a variety of experimental and avant-garde projects, ranging from visual arts to performance, video installation, music and architecture. 

In May 2012, Platform China launched a second branch in Hong Kong whose activities evolve around the format of an art salon/project space in order to present and promote an alternative way of exhibiting art and further develop a platform for international dialogue and cultural exchange. Platform China is a bridge between art and audience that discovers, creates and encourages new and unique forms of communication. 

As one of the few pioneering art spaces in China that focuses primarily on young and promising artists, Platform China has participated in many significant international art exhibitions and art fairs among which The Thirteen: Chinese Video Now presented in collaboration with PS1 Contemporary Arts Center in 2006, Frieze Art Fair, Liste The Young Art Fair, Art Basel Hong Kong, Art Dubai, Art Taipei, and the Armory Show.

Name: De Structura
Description:
De Structura (DS) is a contemporary art platform founded in 2021 with a two-fold mission.

First, DS aims to strengthen emerging art professionals by providing the necessary knowledge, connections and frameworks to realise their ideas.

Second, De Structura aims to build cross-sectoral collaboration structures between the arts and other sectors.

De Structura primarily focuses on four key areas of work: collaborative art projects, network facilitation, advocacy, and capacity-building. The organisation has a special emphasis on empowering emerging art professionals, individuals aged 20 to 35, engaged in diverse roles within the art and culture as well as other sector.

Name: KUB'ART GALLERY
Description: KUB'ART GALLERY est une galerie digitale et physique qui met en avant la créativité contemporaine africaine,  et expose le travail d'artistes africains et afro-diasporique.

Name: The Curator's Eye
Description:
Marketing Resources for the 21st Century Art Dealer

Watch our Video for An Introduction

 We are not just a website or portal. Nor are we ecommerce. The Curators Eye solves the problems high end art dealers have with ecommerce, which prevent dealers from forming long term relationships with clients. It also solves the problems with ineffective websites, which educate buyers but do not educate the sellers (i.e. you).

The Power of The Auction Majors is Our Inspiration - How do Christie's and Sotheby's enhance their marketing efforts in a way that helps provide the best sale results? Marketing experts and Art experts working in partnership with one another. This specialization is part of their strength, because those with deep knowledge of the art, have less knowledge about marketing, and vice versa. The marketing and client development departments vet clients in a way that the specialists cannot. The specialists have knowledge of the artworks that the marketing department could never possess. This specialization allows each to focus on what they do best.

The Power of The Curators Eye is Its Simplicity - The partnership between dealers and Curator's Eye mimics the specialization of the Auction Majors. Art knowledge is your strength. Advanced marketing and client analytics are ours. The Curator's Eye's marketing technology combined with dealers' specialized art knowledge approaches the marketing power of the auction houses. The Curator's Eye prospects for and vets clients. The dealer closes the sale with their art expertise and relationships. Do you want to spend huge amounts of your time in the alphabet soup of technology? Probably not, and that is why we focus on delivering clients directly to you, without requiring you to know about the details of the technology.

Name: Galeria sztuki SZOKART
Description:
O nas
Główną ideą Galerii Sztuki SZOKART jest promowanie współczesnych artystów – malarzy, rzeźbiarzy i fotografów. Są wśród nich wybitne nazwiska, znane i rozpoznawalne w Polsce i na świecie, oraz twórcy, którzy stoją na początku swojej drogi artystycznej.

Chcemy być miejscem, w którym spotkanie ze sztuką jest dostępne dla każdego. Zachęcamy do współpracy kolekcjonerów, inwestorów, ale także osoby, które pragną rozpocząć swoją przygodę i chcą skorzystać z naszej pomocy w odkrywaniu prawdziwej wartości artystycznej.

Rynek sztuki pozwala na połączenie wymiaru estetycznego z inwestowaniem majątku w dynamicznie rozwijającą się dziedzinę. Dzieła sztuki są obecnie uznawane za jedno z najpewniejszych źródeł lokaty kapitału.

Pragniemy zachęcać coraz szersze grono osób do odważnego otwierania drzwi do świata sztuki.

Zapraszamy!
