Name: Restauraciones Buendía
Description:
Restauraciones Buendía es una empresa de servicios de restauración y conservación de muebles, obras de arte y antigüedades. Ofrecemos un asesoramiento completo, con un trato personal directo, estudiando las necesidades específicas para cada pieza.
En Restauraciones Buendía establecemos dos líneas de servicios:

RESTAURACIÓN Y CONSERVACIÓN
Garantía de resultado en todo tipo de intervenciones sobre mobiliario, antigüedades y obras de arte.

Tenemos el especialista adecuado para el trabajo requerido en todas las áreas: pintura, escultura, cerámica, obra gráfica, libros, documentos, fotografías, relojes, abanicos, elementos ornamentales y constructivos (balaustres, columnas, artesonados, retablos, escudos). Acompañando a cada trabajo, entregamos un informe final, detallando las actuaciones realizadas y los materiales empleados, incluyendo fotografías descriptivas del proceso.

LIMPIEZA Y ALMACENAJE
Una oferta innovadora en el sector de la restauración, que da respuesta a la necesidad de desalojar espacios para la realización de reformas en viviendas, oficinas y comercios.

Asociamos el transporte y almacenaje de elementos de mobiliario con la limpieza y encerado, añadiéndole el valor de la conservación. Las piezas se devuelven en el momento solicitado, listas para ser reubicadas.

Name: Hall Conservation Ltd
Description: Hall Conservation is one of the country’s leading restoration and conservation companies.  Based near the River Thames in the Royal Borough of Greenwich, their specialities include providing the highest quality professional conservation and restoration services across a range of disciplines including sculpture, decorative arts, architectural, domestic, and industrial.

Name: SPRING - Agence d'art contemporain
Description:
SPRING est une agence de conseil en art qui accompagne ses clients dans la réalisation de projets artistiques à impact (commande d'oeuvres, curation d'exposition, appel à projets, programmation)

NOTRE MANIFESTE

L’art contemporain éclaire sur l’état du monde. Les artistes sont les témoins de l’époque et les explorateurs du futur ; ils sont des pionniers, des innovateurs, des passeurs.

Pour faire face aux grands défis de notre temps - écologiques, sociaux, technologiques -, nous avons besoin de repères, de récits nouveaux, d’imaginaires et d'utopies.

Chez SPRING, nous voulons œuvrer pour un monde plus durable, plus juste et plus inclusif. En augmentant la place de l’art dans la société nous voulons contribuer à éveiller les consciences et à faire jaillir des solutions. 

Inspirer grâce à l’art, c’est notre vocation d’agence d’art contemporain. 

C’est pour cela que nous réalisons des projets artistiques à impact au service des organisations et de l’ensemble de leurs parties prenantes ; 

C’est pour cela que nous collaborons avec les artistes les plus prospectifs et passionnants de la scène contemporaine ;

C’est pour cela que nous avons à coeur que chaque projet soit accessible et compréhensible pour le plus grand nombre, en dehors des circuits traditionnels du monde de l’art ; 

Pour que l’art favorise la transformation individuelle et collective,

Pour que la vision des artistes rayonne plus largement, dans nos entreprises, nos médias, les rues de nos villes,

Pour que l’art soit au coeur de la vie de nos sociétés.

Name: Académie de l'Asie
Description: Espace culturel dédié à l'Asie qui propose des expositions, des ateliers, des rencontres avec des artistes internationaux et des conférences.

Name: The Contemporary Art Modern Project
Description: The Contemporary Art Modern Project Gallery specializes in art advisory and contemporary art with a focus on emerging and mid-career artists working in: installation, painting, photography, sculpture, textiles, and video art with a specific direction of both self and worldly reflection. Looking at art, as a whole, through a reactionary and interdisciplinary approach, the gallery covers the ever-populating notion of society and life in general through art and curation, offering a creative space both in the gallery and out—where creativity and reality co-exist.

Name: EXMURO art public
Description:
Au-delà des murs, avec la volonté de surprendre et de déranger, EXMURO est un organisme à but non lucratif qui conçoit, produit et diffuse des œuvres d’art public au Québec et à l’international. 

EXMURO rend l’art accessible dans des lieux publics à ciel ouvert et aux portes toujours grandes ouvertes. Ici et là, dans la ville, s’installent des œuvres qui surprennent et qui font réfléchir.

Name: Flux Projects
Description:
Since 2010, Flux Projects has connected community through ambitious, one-of-a-kind public art installations and events, free for all to experience.
 
From compelling video and immersive performances to innovative multimedia and experimental sound art, Flux Projects presents works by exceptional artists and curators that engage Atlanta’s shared public spaces.  Placing projects in parks, neighborhoods, historic buildings, and other surprising places, Flux Projects inspires wonder and imagination, transforming the experience of contemporary art for thousands of people each year.  Flux Projects gives art the space to transform. 

In addition to commissioning site responsive works, we present a series of supporting programs to extend audience engagement and provide professional opportunities for artists.  These include a Visiting Curator Series, a Flux Exchange incubator series, The Extension podcast, and Flux Films.

Flux Projects is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization that relies on contributions from individuals, corporations, and foundations to support the development and presentation of our public projects and programming.

Name: SPOLIARIUM—Global art-tech & service platform for fine art.
Description:
*Spoliarium makes the fine art marketplace approachable, accessible, anxiety-free, and globally inclusive for diverse local artists and patrons, especially younger generations.
3 Key Mission Statements:
 We highlight great artists worldwide, giving them recognition and exposure both locally and internationally.
 We aim to make the fine art market and exhibits accessible, inclusive, and diverse for all generations.
 We strive to spread joy, wisdom, and wellness through the power of fine art, especially to the global workforce and executive leaders.

Name: LA CITE DE LA MUSIQUE - PHILHARMONIE DE PARIS
Münchner Volkssänger-Bühne e.V.
Description:
Die Münchner Volkssänger-Bühne e. V. (kurz: MVB) ist ein Theater in München. 
Es spielt hauptsächlich neu inszenierte Klassiker in bairischer Mundart und fühlt sich der Erhaltung der Tradition der Münchner Volkssänger verpflichtet.

Name: Focsi
Description:
Bringing you art, love, & beauty from within. Focsi by Any Means Necessary. It's not just art, its a Revolution! 

Focsi is dedicated to creating alternative images of women of color in a more positive and empowering light. We create one-of-a-kind artwork and wearable art, as well as custom requests for "focsi-fied" art, apparel, and corporate branding (i.e. logo design, stationary, business cards, flyers/e-flyers, etc).


*Coming in 2011 Focsi will partner with other companies to host various art-centric events in the DMV! Stay tuned.

Name: Galerie Kornfeld Auktionen AG
Description: Maison de vente, enchères, galerie, maison d'édition

Name: Dansk Talentakademi
Description:
Dansk Talentakademi er et unikt tilbud til unge i alderen 16 - 25 år indenfor kunstnerisk talentudvikling. 

Vi tilbyder grundkurser indenfor flere kunstarter, har et unikt tværfagligt miljø og et godt og trygt socialt sammenhold og fællesskab på tværs af linjerne med mulighed for at flytte ind i vores boenheder i Campus eller i dele-lejligheder centralt i Holstebro.

Vi har seks linjer:
- Dans
- Film
- Forfatter
- Kunst & Design
- Musical & Teater
- Musik / MGK (Musikalsk grundkursus)

På hver linje bliver elevholdene undervist af professionelle og engagerede undervisere, hvilket er med til at skabe vores høje niveau. Udover undervisningen får man som elev tilbud om at arbejde projektbaseret og deltage i sociale arrangementer.

Vi udfordrer eleverne til at udfolde deres kunstneriske udtryk, vi styrker deres netværk og deres muligheder for at etablere sig med og udvikle egen kunstneriske praksis.

Dansk Talentakademi griber ud i verden og sætter sit præg på omverden; både som en form for kunstnerisk magnet i Holstebro, der tiltrækker kunstnere og professionelle fagfolk fra hele Danmark og udlandet – og gennem de løbende udadvendte projekter, vi deltager i.

Name: ArtRio - International Fair of Contemporary Art of Rio de Janeiro
Description: A Feira Internacional de Arte Contemporânea do Rio de Janeiro será o acontecimento mais importante de arte do calendário da cidade. ArtRio combinará uma intensa programação de atividades culturais, exposições, festas e eventos multidisciplinares de música, cinema, arquitetura e design. A feria  acontecerá nos Armazéns 2 e 3 do Pier Mauá, fascinante zona portuária da cidade, próximo ao Centro, onde concentra-se a maioria dos museus e  instituições culturais. Será promovida uma exclusiva seleção de galerias líderes no mundo, provenientes da América Latina, América do Norte, África e Ásia com obras dos séculos XX e XXI.

Name: Galerie Lelong & Co., New York
Description:
Galerie Lelong opened in New York in 1985, and in 2001 moved to its present (ground-floor) location in Chelsea. The gallery’s focus is in international contemporary art, representing artists and estates from the United States, South America, Europe, and the Asia-Pacific Region.

The gallery has a long history of working closely with museums and public institutions from around the world to support the placement of permanent commissions and the creation of monographic exhibitions and publications on its artists. It has been a proponent of contemporary Latin American art and has presented exhibitions by some of its most vital figures for over two decades. The gallery has also actively engaged in the continued cross-generational representation and support of women artists. This wide array represents a uniquely diverse selection working in all media.

Galerie Lelong New York is a member of the Art Dealers’ Association of America, the most prestigious organization of art galleries in the United States. It is affiliated with Galerie Lelong Paris, one of Europe’s most distinguished galleries of modern and contemporary art.

Name: Digit'all ART
Description:
Du nouveau ! Digit'all Art n'est plus une agence événementielle mais est aujourd’hui la communauté artistique autour de l’art digital aux côtés des acteurs de l’art et des technologies, de tous les passionnés et curieux. Nous partageons sur nos réseaux réseaux des contenus autour des artistes, des nouvelles tendances et bons plans au cœur de l’art digital dans l’objectif de vous faire découvrir cet art de tous les possibles.

Notre ambition ? Créer du lien, repenser les rapports humains, susciter curiosité, empathie et émerveillement, en invitant les artistes digitaux à nous faire découvrir leurs univers, leurs  histoires, tout simplement leur art.

Sa créatrice ayant pour objectif de s’installer au Canada très prochainement, elle vous partage quelques publications mais continuera de manière plus régulière au Canada  Laissez lui le temps de s'y installer et continuez à nous suivre…

L’art digital ? À la croisée des chemins entre art et technologie, l’art digital vous offre une plongée immersive, instantanée et immédiate au sein d’un univers. Il crée de la surprise, de l’émotion, du bien-être, et redonne du sens aux lieux, comme aux individus. Il incarne ce en quoi nous croyons plus que tout, une technologie au service de l’humain et de ce qui fait son identité.

|| Pour en savoir plus, contactez Digit’all Art : contact@digitallart.fr - +33 6 17 52 89 48

Suivez-nous sur la toile : #digitallart
- Instagram : http://bit.ly/DAA-I
- Facebook : http://bit.ly/DAA-F
- Twitter : http://bit.ly/DAA-T
- LinkedIn : http://bit.ly/DAA-L
- YouTube : http://bit.ly/DAA-Y

Site : www.digitallart.fr (en cours de création)

Name: Colour One
Description: Colour One is an independent art advisory with more than a decade of experience advising our clients across modern and contemporary art.

Name: SPAO: Photographic Arts Centre
Description: School of the Photographic Arts: Ottawa is an independent, not-for-profit photographic visual arts school. We house the only two-year photographic arts college diploma in Canada. Our mandate is to provide an intensive and collaborative learning experience and to enrich the photographic and visual arts culture of Ottawa and beyond.

Name: Artefakt Gallery
Description:
Agence artistique et évènementielle
Galerie d'art en ligne
Réalisation de fresques
Organisation d'exposition dans les entreprises

Name: Gaijin Gallery
Description: Gaijin Gallery

Name: Entrevues - Festival International du Film de Belfort
Description: Created in 1986, EntreVues Belfort is the international festival of both young contemporary creation and authors of cinema history. The international competition is dedicated to first, second and third films, fiction and documentary, features and short films. Many prizes are awarded.

Name: Shanghai Institute of Visual Art
Description: Shanghai Institute of Visual Art is a fine art company based out of United Kingdom.

Name: Neubad Luzern
Description: Das Neubad ist die Umnutzung des ehemaligen Hallenbads Luzern in einen Raum für Kultur, Kunst, Kreativwirtschaft, Wissensarbeit, Gemeinsinn und Soziokultur. Das Neubad wird für Veranstaltungen, Gastronomie, als Arbeits- und Wirkungsraum sowie als Galerie und Quartiergarten genutzt. Als Gesamtbild wurde ein lebendiger und kraftvoller Ort des interdisziplinären Austausches und der gegenseitigen Inspiration geschaffen.

Name: RASALAYA SCHOOL OF FASHION STUDIES
Description: Rasalaya film and art institute is dedicated to foustering creativity, talent and passion in the fields of film and arts. Established with a vision to create vibrant space for aspiring film makers, artists and creative professionals. our institute offers a platform where ideas are nurtured, talents are horned and creativity thrives at Rasalaya, we believe in a hands-on, immersive approach to learning. Our state-of-the-art facilities and expert faculty members, who are industry leaders in their respective fields, ensure that students receive world-class training in the nuances of film production, visual arts, and other creative disciplines.

Name: VIVA LA VIDA LA CHORALE
Description:
Chanter à VIVA LA VIDA, c’est tenir un engagement fort, celui de se faire plaisir mais surtout de se faire plaisir « ensemble ». 
Les choristes ont tous fait le choix d’être là, pour porter haut et fort (mais toujours juste) les valeurs de VIVA LA VIDA. 

C’est un défi que nous nous lançons, chaque année et pour chacun de nos spectacles.

Name: Oklahoma Arts Institute at Quartz Mountain
Description:
The Oklahoma Arts Institute at Quartz Mountain is a private, non-profit organization with a mission to provide exceptional multidisciplinary arts experiences that develop individual talent and inspire a lifelong passion for the arts. Since 1977, the Oklahoma Arts Institute has recruited nationally renowned artists to teach a fine arts program for talented Oklahoma youth and a series of continuing education workshops for adults. All programs are held at the Quartz Mountain Arts and Conference Center in Lone Wolf, Oklahoma.

The Oklahoma Summer Arts Institute is an intensive, two-week academy in the literary, visual, and performing arts for Oklahoma’s most artistically advanced high school students. Students are selected through a statewide competitive audition process, and all accepted students automatically receive a full scholarship to the program, worth over $4,200.

The Oklahoma Fall Arts Institute is a series of four-day weekend workshops for educators and adult artists of all ability levels, including true beginners. Instruction is offered in the literary, visual, and performing arts, including workshops tailored to educators, who can receive full scholarships to the program. Over 50,000 Oklahoma public school children are reached each year through their teachers’ attendance at the Fall Institute.

The Oklahoma Arts Institute at Quartz Mountain is funded through a unique public/private partnership. Major funding is provided by private donors secured by the Oklahoma Arts Institute, with matching funds from the Oklahoma State Department of Education and additional support from the Oklahoma Arts Council and the Oklahoma Tourism and Recreation Department.

Name: Galerie BS - ART & ENVIRONNEMENT
Description:
FAIRE DIALOGUER ART & ENVIRONNEMENT 
Depuis 2008, la galerie BS présente des artistes contemporains aux profils variés. Depuis ses débuts la galerie est sensible au sujet environnemental. Face à l’ampleur du défi écologique de notre société chacun doit agir. Grace à leur créativité, les artistes s’emparent d’une manière unique et émotionelle des notions d'empreinte écologique, d'économie circulaire, de réemploi ou d'upcycling ...  
Pour s’exprimer, certains utilisent des techniques traditionnelles quand d’autres s’astreignent à créer à partir de gisements de déchets (électroniques, plastiques, industriels...). Les oeuvres réalisées deviennent des Totem témoignant d’un engagement en faveur de l’environnement. Aujourd’hui, la galerie est nomade et collabore avec les entreprises. Elle propose des prestations "sur mesure" telles que l'acquisition d'œuvres, la création d'exposition dans l'entreprise, de live painting, le réalisation d'oeuvres collaboratives ...
Alors pourquoi ne pas transformer votre ancien parc informatique en sculpture ? Arborer des tableaux engagés ? Ou recevoir sur une table de réunion réalisée avec des déchets plastiques ? 

BRINGING ART AND THE ENVIRONMENT TOGETHER 
Since 2008, Galerie BS has been showcasing contemporary artists from a wide range of backgrounds. From the outset, the gallery has been sensitive to environmental issues. Faced with the scale of the ecological challenge facing our society, we all need to take action. Using their creativity, the artists take on the concepts of the ecological footprint, the circular economy, reuse and upcycling in a unique and emotional way.  
To express themselves, some use traditional techniques, while others create from sources of waste (electronic, plastic, industrial, etc.). The works they create become Totem poles, demonstrating their commitment to the environment. Today, the gallery is mobile and works with companies. It offers ‘made-to-measure’ services such as the acquisition of works,...

Name: Vapaa Taidekoulu | Fria Konstskolan | Free Art School
Description: Vapaa Taidekoulu on vuonna 1935 perustettu taidekoulu, joka sijaitsee Helsingin Kaapelitehtaalla. Koulussa voi opiskella ammattiin valmistavissa opinnoissa, joiden suorittaminen kestää neljä vuotta. Koulu järjestää myös kaikille avoimia piirustus- ja maalauskursseja.

Name: BAMM vzw
Description:
BAMM maakt het recht van kinderen en jongeren op cultuurparticipatie iedere dag opnieuw waar.
BAMM is een krachtige motor voor kunst- en erfgoededucatie met en door kinderen, jongeren en hun begeleiders. Wij zwengelen zoveel mogelijk kunst- en erfgoededucatie aan, omdat we geloven in het belang van inspirerende ontmoetingen met kunst en erfgoed voor de ontwikkeling van jonge geesten.

BAMM onderschrijft het recht op cultuurparticipatie van alle kinderen en jongeren. Bijgevolg werken we inclusief en zijn we op verschillende vlakken actief. Onze vier merken, Bazart, AmuseeVous, Mooss en Mastiek, ontwikkelen een grote diversiteit aan activiteiten met en door kinderen en jongeren in verschillende disciplines. We werken samen met uiteenlopende partners in diverse sectoren. En we versterken de stem van kinderen en jongeren in het maatschappelijk debat over kunst, erfgoed en educatie. 

BAMM is een kunst/erfgoededucatieve organisatie met meer dan 40 jaar ervaring op het terrein en met een zeer divers bereik in Vlaanderen en daarbuiten. Onze belangrijkste troeven zijn onze onderbouwde methodiek, onze gedrevenheid en ons constante streven naar kwaliteit.

Name: Arsoluta
Description:
Arsoluta, la prima start-up dedicata all’arte contemporanea che consente di scoprire, dialogare e collaborare con artisti di tutto il mondo, esponendo, comprando e vendendo opere d’arte, senza vincoli di esclusività e con commissioni minime.  Si tratta di una piattaforma digitale dedicata inizialmente ad artisti visivi non digitali (pittori, incisori e scultori) da una parte strumento di autogestione per gli artisti, dall’altra ingresso libero e autonomo per tutti al mondo dell’arte contemporanea. In breve: un ibrido tra una piattaforma di networking come LinkedIn, una piattaforma di eCommerce come Amazon e una galleria online.

Il suo scopo è rimuovere i limiti e barriere che impediscono il pieno e libero sviluppo delle arti visive contemporanee, esplicitato anche nel suo nome: ars soluta in latino significa, infatti, arte senza vincoli, indipendente, libera. 

L'idea è nata dalla constatazione dell’inesistenza di una piattaforma che, come sound cloud per i musicisti o YouTube per i content creator, offrisse uno spazio dove poter essere conosciuti in base esclusivamente alle proprie capacità. Così il progetto ha cominciato a prendere forma, e parlandone con persone dell’ambito, da artisti a curatori, da galleristi a collezionisti, nonché con coloro che sarebbero poi divenuti membri del team; Arsoluta si è modellata, in modo da poter rispondere alle vere esigenze dei suoi futuri utenti.

Name: Vitrales by Margarita Llort
Description:
Somos una empresa Centroamericana de artistas que a través de 40 años de constante experimentación e innovación desarrollamos técnicas especializadas de arte en vidrio consolidando un portafolio de productos en 5 categorías:

- Piezas de arte únicas 
- Piezas decorativas personalizables
- Premios, reconocimientos y regalos corporativos personalizados
- Somos además líderes en la región en vitrales y detalles arquitectónicos con vidrio artístico

Nuestro trabajo está soportado por un equipo gerencial, infraestructura y calidad que garantiza una excelencia operativa en los procesos de producción a mano.

Name: MOVIES – Moving Images Arts
Description: Iuav University of Venice postgraduate specialisation course on the moving image as an expressive medium in contemporary art and as a means to activate relational spaces for the arts. It offers an interdisciplinary approach with a programme that intersects visual and performing arts, graphics, architecture and curatorial studies.

Name: 18frames
Description:
18 Frames er en 3-årig uafhængig og alternativ filmuddannelse med base på Fyn. Uddannelsen består af 18 medlemmer pr. årgang fordelt på seks faglinjer: instruktør, producer, manuskriptforfatter, fotograf, klipper og tonemester.

18 Frames er en forening med en flad struktur uden topstyring, hvilket vil sige, at medlemmerne selv leder og former deres egen uddannelse. 18 Frames er altså både en filmuddannelse og en forening. 

For at være uafhængig modtages der ikke penge af Uddannelsesministeriet, hvorfor skolen i stedet er finansieret gennem støtte fra samarbejdspartnere, herunder særligt Nordisk Film Fonden, Det Danske Filminstitut, FilmFyn og Producent Rettigheder Danmark, og via medlemmernes egenbetaling.

Name: blackdot
Description:
Blackdot is forging a new frontier in tattooing. We’re scientists and artists using new technology to introduce A New Way to Tattoo, advancing the medium, and making it more accessible to artists and collectors everywhere.

Find our flagship Studio in Austin, Texas.

Name: Furtherfield
Description:
Furtherfield is the UK’s longest-running centre for art and technology. For over 25 years, through nearly 70 exhibitions, and over 125 national/international partnerships, we have developed alternative systems of co-creation and co-organisation across digital and physical networks.

2025 sees us relocate from our long-standing gallery in Finsbury Park in North London to Felixstowe on Suffolk’s East coast. We take with us 30 years of critical imagination of art, technology, and networked cultures. Our next chapter, led by Felixstowe’s young people and community, will explore the town’s future through immersive storytelling and eco-social Live Action Role-Playing (LARP).

Furtherfield continues to be dedicated to creative collaborations that bridge digital and physical spaces, exploring local and global issues that matter to diverse communities and places. 

We envision a world where diverse communities act together creatively to imagine and build more equitable and resilient alternatives together.

With an international network of tens of thousands of contributors, we believe a global focus on the financial value of art and technology has led to significant social, economic, and environmental harms and inequalities. This impacts everyone and all living beings-though unevenly and unpredictably—with marginalised communities and the young the most affected.  Therefore we work with art and technology for eco-social change—systemic transformation, integrating social justice and ecology—to create fairer, more resilient futures for all. 

Imagining the possible futures of the places we care about is the first step to forging the futures we want.

Name: Art Below
Description:
Art Below is a London based public art enterprise, founded in 2006 by brothers Ben and Simon Moore. With a wide range of international artists and its various campaigns in cities worldwide, the organization has an important position within the movement of contemporary art in public space.

Art Below uses billboard space in underground stations to display artworks in London and overseas. The group has nurtured an international community of artistic talent and has displayed the works of over 3,000 artists in London, Tokyo, Berlin, New Orleans and Los Angeles, with future shows planned in Istanbul, Miami and Paris. 

Our mission: To enrich the everyday life of the traveling public by giving fresh insight into the very latest in contemporary art whilst at the same time providing a platform for emerging and established talent.

We play host to a rich and diverse portfolio of talent including Banksy, Damien Hirst, David Bailey, Mr.Brainwash, Jake and Dinos Chapman, D*Face, Yinka Shonibare, Alison Jackson, Mat Collishaw, Polly Morgan, Antony Micallef, Charming Baker, Billy Childish, and Ben Eine.

Art Below run an ongoing artist membership program where benefits include being able to choose exactly what station you would like to have your work displayed in. Our underground exhibitions run hand in hand with gallery group shows.  Previous exhibitions have been held at The Saatchi Gallery, The V&A, The Candid Arts Trust, The Hospital Club and Somerset House.

Name: Gallery Rodeo
Description:
Gallery Rodeo is a premiere destination for fine art in North America. Combined with Parke-Bernet and Galerie Vollard the group has one of the largest art galleries on the West Coast. Vin Lee, CEO of Grand Metropolitan, acquired the gallery in 2010 with a commitment to furthering the education and fulfillment of fine art in America.

Art is constantly evolving to reflect culturally diverse subject matters, artist backgrounds, and the contemporary political and social climates.  Gallery Rodeo strives to bring these new expressions of art to everyone in our communities, not just fine art connoisseurs.  By showcasing culturally significant works, Gallery Rodeo elevates our clientele to fine art aficionados.  Throughout the century our named artists have continued to break through societal norms.  This creates extraordinary freedom of expression and creativity.  Without constraint and restriction, without limits, anything can happen.
After almost a decade, we are proud to continue showcasing the most famous and astute artists to ever exist.  The aesthetic and conceptual quality of work shown at Gallery Rodeo has earned us an important role in the fine art world.


Named for its origin on Beverly Hills famed Rodeo Drive in the middle of the Platinum Triangle of Los Angeles, the collection is for discerning and elite art enthusiasts.

Name: Galerie Durst
Description:
Contemporary Art Gallery // For art advisory services tailored to hospitality professionals, visit Durst Art Consultancy



Depuis plus de 40 ans, la Galerie Durst défend une ligne artistique singulière, abstraite et poétique.Installée à Paris, la galerie représente des artistes dont le travail explore la matière, le geste, la lumière et le silence. Chaque exposition est pensée comme une expérience sensible, exigeante et ouverte au dialogue.
Nous collaborons avec collectionneurs, amateurs, institutions et lieux culturels pour promouvoir une création contemporaine à la fois intemporelle et profondément incarnée.

 Pour les projets professionnels BtoB dans les secteurs de l’hôtellerie, de l’architecture ou du design (direction artistique, curation, production sur mesure), merci de vous référer à notre entité dédiée :
 Durst Art Consultancy : www.durstartconsultancy.com
 Retrouvez-nous également sur la page LinkedIn : Durst Art Consultancy


Abstract Contemporary Art — Paris

For over 40 years, Galerie Durst has promoted a distinctive, abstract, and poetic artistic line.
Based in Paris, the gallery represents artists whose work explores materiality, gesture, light, and silence. Each exhibition is curated as a refined and immersive experience, rooted in dialogue and sensibility.

We collaborate with collectors, institutions, and cultural spaces to promote a form of contemporary art that is both timeless and deeply embodied.

 For BtoB projects in the fields of hospitality, architecture, or design (art direction, curation, bespoke production), please refer to our dedicated entity:
 Durst Art Consultancy: www.durstartconsultancy.com
 Also follow our LinkedIn page: Durst Art Consultancy

Name: CPS - Centro Português de Serigrafia
Description:
Criado em 1985 por António Prates, o Centro Português de Serigrafia, tem como missão facilitar o acesso a obras de arte de grande valor, editando, promovendo e divulgando a Obra Gráfica Original de artistas contemporâneos, portugueses e estrangeiros.

Dos grandes mestres portugueses do século XX aos jovens artistas emergentes, passando, no plano internacional, por movimentos emblemáticos com o Informalismo, a Arte Pop, a Figuração Narrativa ou a mais atual Bio Arte, o CPS tem vindo a criar uma coleção ímpar de mais de 3.600 obras de cerca de 700 artistas, representando um verdadeiro documento da arte e da cultura dos nossos dias.

Pautando-se por critérios de qualidade, rigor e autenticidade, o CPS proporciona aos artistas excecionais condições para que possam desenvolver as suas criações no premiado Atelier CPS, disponibilizando variadas técnicas: Serigrafia, Gravura, Litografia, Fotografia e Digital Print. Os Sócios CPS são quem mais beneficia, representando a quota de Sócio um modelo inédito e vantajoso de acesso à arte contemporânea, com ecletismo de escolha nos estilos, gerações e diversidade de opções.

Name: Smith & Singer
Description:
Smith and Singer is regarded as the most prominent and renowned auction house in Australia

Regularly conducting specialty auctions in Fine Art and Jewellery, Smith & Singer caters to an unrivalled cosmopolitan clientele.

Having previously operated under the name of Sotheby's Australia, the company has consistently sets international records, and conducts individual auctions that garner millions for the superlative collections offered. Recent notable sales include a platinum, gold, emerald and diamond ring by Van Cleef & Arpels, circa 1974 which sold for $231,800 and set an Australian auction record for an internationally-signed, single emerald jewel, a yellow diamond, diamond, and ruby dragon Buccellati brooch, for $91,500; a Huanghuali round-cornered tapering cabinet of the Late Qing Dynasty, for $109,800 (nearly four times its top estimate); Le Corbusier’s 'Traces de Pas Dans la Nuit', for $134,200 (over twice its estimate); an aquamarine, diamond, and sapphire pendant necklace/brooch, by Tiffany & Co., for $158,600; the Te Pahi Silver Medal, presented in 1806 by Governor King of New South Wales to Te Pahi (Tippahee), a Chief of New Zealand, for $366,000; Jeffrey Smart’s 'The Red Warehouse' (2003), for $878,400 ($200,000 above its estimate); Brett Whiteley’s 'Washing the Salt Off II' (1984), for $976,000; and 'Miss Minna Simpson' (1886) by Tom Roberts, for $976,000 (over two times its high estimate).

Name: Art Backers
Description:
Art Backers is the first European online platform of support for artists to produce, in privileged limited editions, great works of art accessible to all people.

Art Backers cooperates with the artists in order to create true masterpieces, signed, numbered, authenticated, planned for evaluators and established connoisseurs of limited editions at affordable prices.

Art Backers supports the most renowned European artists, even rising talents, ranging from Contemporary Art, Modern Art, Pop Art, Graphic Design, Street Art, Graffiti, Prints and Photographs.

Art Backers designates a part of the profits to support creativity and the elevation of its artists by organising art installations, graffiti, murals, social events and exhibitions.

Become an Art Backer it means supporting art and artists, not as customers, but as real promoter that share, enhance, collect and live art.

Art Backers offers to Art Backers and to all demanding brands, a service of Art Consultant for the creation and the management of collections, selection and dealing with the artists, expertise, special events, co-marketing and celebrations.

Art Backers believes in the accessible and affordable art !

Name: LeStudio - Club arty
Description:
Depuis 2017, LeStudio est le premier Social Club dédié aux pratiques artistiques.
En plein cœur du IXe arrondissement, LeStudio est un lieu de création, d'inspiration, de rencontres où se côtoient les arts et se mêlent amateurs et professionnels.

Lieu de vie pluridisciplinaire, LeStudio propose à ses membres : 
• des studios de répétition de musique, 
• des cours de danse et de yoga, 
• un espace d’exposition dédié à la jeune création contemporaine, 
• une programmation artistique 
• des événements culturels et festifs.

LeStudio associe les entreprises à son développement. 
Elles viennent y réunir leurs collaborateurs et rencontrer leurs clients, co-constuire des projets événementiels avec nos équipes ou encore faire profiter leurs salariés de nos offres loisirs dédiées aux comités d'entreprises.

Nos espaces
• 300m2 répartis sur 3 niveaux 
• 1 bar - living room
• un espace événementiel de 160m2
• 4 studio de musique entièrement équipés,
• 1 studio de danse.

Name: De Buck Gallery
Description:
De Buck Gallery has long stood as a dynamic and influential presence in the contemporary art world. Established with spaces in New York, Saint-Paul-de-Vence, France, and Antwerp, Belgium, the gallery has curated a vibrant program highlighting figurative painting, innovative fiber art, abstract painting, and sculpture by both established and emerging artists. Over the years, the gallery has organized significant exhibitions by artists such as Devan Shimoyama, Zak Ove, Tahnee Lonsdale, Jeffrey Gibson, and Juan Garaizabal, earning recognition in prestigious publications like The New York Times, Wall Street Journal, Financial Times, and Artforum. This legacy of artistic excellence and cultural engagement has positioned De Buck Gallery as a respected voice in the art world.

In 2024, De Buck Gallery is transitioning to a project-based advisory model, allowing for a more focused and collaborative approach to supporting artists and art collectors alike. In this new phase, the gallery will engage with its roster of artists, consulting directly with them and their estates, while also offering specialized art advisory services to individual collectors, private foundations, and museums. The gallery’s advisory division assists clients with strategic acquisitions in both the primary and secondary markets and provides organizational support for exhibitions in partnership with private institutions. By expanding its services and operating as a global art advisory, De Buck continues its commitment to excellence, providing a holistic approach that meets the evolving needs of artists and art collectors worldwide. 

De Buck’s expertise also extends to advising clients at the intersection of art and technology, art and finance, as well as art and real estate. The advisory team has successfully supported various notable platforms across these industries.

Name: Escuela Nacional Superior Autónoma de Bellas Artes
4Life
Description: 4life

Name: Kunstkerk
Description:
Verbeelding is de drijfveer achter ontwikkeling en innovatie. Kunstenaars en artiesten verrijken het dagelijks leven met schoonheid en betekenis. Kunstkerk omarmt het vakmanschap van toonaangevende en veelbelovende artiesten, cultuurmakers en kunstenaars met verschillende achtergronden. Wij geven hen de vrijheid nieuw werk te ontwikkelen en tentoonstellingen samen te stellen. Van videokunst tot fotografie, van ruimtelijke installaties tot soundscapes en tech-art; Kunstkerk presenteert kunst en cultuur niet als eindproduct maar als ontwikkeling. Omdat wij kunstenaars en artiesten stimuleren nieuw werk te creëren, kan Kunstkerk naast expositieruimte, vooral worden gezien als productiehuis en ontmoetingsplaats. Het is een platform waar culturele en economische waarde elkaar ontmoeten. Een plek die interactie, beleving, vermaak, dynamiek, ontmoeting, inspiratie en verdieping teweeg brengt.

Kunstkerk is een bijzonder pand aan de historische Museumstraat in Dordrecht. Het is de verbinding tussen meerdere culturele instellingen, zoals Dordrechts Museum, The Movies en het Hof van Holland.
Kunstkerk kreeg haar naam pas in 2008, voor die tijd functioneerde Kunstkerk als kerk. Een thuis voor verschillende geloofsstromingen. Jaren later werd de kerk gekocht door de Kerk van Nazarener en werd de locatie verhuurd voor o.a. bruiloften. Nu, heel wat jaren later, kan Kunstkerk weer ingezet worden voor bruiloften, het afscheid nemen van een geliefde of functioneren als dé ideale locatie voor uw (bedrijfs)event.
Het pand is in 2021 volledig gerenoveerd, waarbij de buitenkant is ontworpen door Studio Job. Ook van binnen is de kerk levendig, maar toch rustig én flexibel zodat de ruimte kan worden ingezet voor een diversiteit aan tentoonstellingen en evenementen.

Name: BACKLIT Gallery
Description:
BACKLIT is an independent public gallery and cultural organisation based in Nottingham, founded in 2008 by local graduates.

 Looking for a space to hire? Our gallery is available for exhibitions, pop-up shows, photoshoots, and workshops. Learn more here: backlit.org.uk/hiring

We support artists at all stages of their careers through exhibitions, affordable studios, professional development, and public programmes. Our three-storey gallery is housed in a historic Victorian building and home to over 120 artists, collectives, and associate members.

Over the past 14 years, we’ve delivered more than 100 national and international exhibitions and built a reputation for bold, inclusive, and socially engaged programming. Our free year-round events include workshops, talks, screenings, and original artist commissions.

As a female-led and LGBTQ+ organisation, we prioritise equity, inclusion, mental health, environmental awareness, and being a safe space for all.

BACKLIT is a registered charity (No. 1167258) and an Arts Council England National Portfolio Organisation.

Name: Atelier FAS
Description:
Atelier Fine Art Services is a full-service fine art services company with locations in Philadelphia, New York and Delaware. Atelier’s clients include major art museums and cultural institutions, prominent private collections as well as national and international commercial fine art galleries.

Founded in 1987 Atelier has undergone extraordinary growth over the last 32 years. From a handful of employees, a single truck and one location in Philadelphia, the company currently operates out of four locations, owns a fleet of customized trucks and vehicles, and employs over 100 staff. Departments include client services, transportation logistics, operations, art
handling and installation, collection management, crate and exhibition furniture fabrication, fine art storage, and security.

Name: Place des Arts
Description: Place des Arts is an established non-profit arts centre and music school in Coquitlam, BC. We offer classes and lessons in the visual and performing arts for all ages. We strive to make the arts accessible and to inspire the artist in everyone. We're always looking for great volunteers, staff and donors to support our mission.

Name: Hanzz conservation & restoration
Description:
HANZZ Conservation and Restoration is dedicated to the conservation and restoration of cultural heritage. 

Due to his journey and experience, there is a special dedication to the conservation and restoration of archaeological heritage, on land, with interventions of excavation, extraction and consolidation in archaeological sites as well as in the underwater environment, carrying out appropriate restoration and conservation treatments for each object depending on its nature. 

In addition, at HANZZ we also work with demonstrable experience in the restoration and conservation of other technical areas such as the restoration of mural painting, sculpture, architectural elements, easel painting and textiles.

Name: Weartskep
Description:
Galerie d’art immersive • Nous utilisons le streaming vidéo pour promouvoir les artistes • Acheter des œuvres d’art contemporain en ligne. 

Immersive Art Gallery • We use video streaming to promote artists • Buy contemporary art works online.

Name: Goya Subastas
Description:
En Subastas Goya estamos especializados en pintura, Muebles y artes decorativas.

 Admitimos obra
 
1. Tasaciones gratuitas 
2.Tasaciones para seguro
3.Reparto de bienes 
4.Testamentarias

Puedes encontrarnos en C/ Montesa, 31 (28006) en Madrid

Name: Plataforma IMPROV
Description: Na Plataforma IMPROV somos dedicados à arte do improviso teatral e interdisciplinar. Formações, espetáculos, partilha e uma comunidade criativa pronta para jogar contigo.

Name: Gachi Prieto Arte Latinoamericano Contemporáneo
Description:
Gachi Prieto es una plataforma de producción, investigación y reflexión en el campo del arte contemporáneo latinoamericano. Desde Buenos Aires, trabaja con el compromiso pleno de promover proyectos y artistas que formen parte de este complejo sistema, buscando constantemente nuevos significados y enfocando su trabajo en la experimentación y el respeto a los procesos creativos.
Ubicada en Palermo, con un espacio de 200m2 la galería apunta a la posibilidad de jerarquizar la exhibición de los formatos de obra más contemporáneos y se constituye como un lugar abierto de interacción, encuentros y experiencias compartidas entre el público y los artistas, diseñadas para fomentar la discusión y expandir el campo de creación, producción, circulación y comercialización de arte.
Actualmente, Gachi Prieto representa a 20 artistas latinoamericanos con una destacada carrera local e internacional. El programa de 8 exhibiciones por año fomenta cruces interdisciplinarios, conceptuales y espaciales en una variedad de medios incluyendo la escultura, el video, el sonido, la pintura, la fotografía y la performance. La galería es reconocida por revelar y consolidar la carrera de sus artistas y por apoyarlos en presentar expos1c1ones de escala institucional, conquistando una posición crecientemente notoria en la escena artística internacional.
Location: Palermo, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Green Wallscapes
Description: Bringing no-maintenance moss walls and logos to your home, office, retail, and restaurant space.

Name: Collecteurs
Description:
Art is hidden in storage spaces and freeports.
Social media platforms censor and erase.
Culture is fading due to oppressive funding.

What if a platform did the opposite?

Collecteurs is a slow social media built on The Museum of Private Collections to accession, amplify, and fund those shaping our cultural future.

Name: Collectief Koppig
Description:
Wij zijn een verzameling van kunstenaars, sociaal werkers, studenten en educatoren.
Zelforganisatie, experiment, ontwikkeling en een meerstemmig geluid staan centraal in ons collectief.

Wij bieden een platform voor verschillende kunsten in de vorm van tentoonstellingen, evenementen en educatie in de vorm van non-formeel leren. Makers en deelnemers kunnen naast en met elkaar hun talenten ontwikkelen in onze (zeefdruk)werkplaats en de ateliers.

Studenten/stagiaires werken bij ons onder de noemer Vak Apart. Ze ontdekken de brug tussen sociaal en artistiek. Er vind uitwisseling plaats met docenten en studenten van uiteenlopende opleidingen van kunstacademie tot speciaal onderwijs. Wij vinden het belangrijk om educatie aan te bieden buiten het klaslokaal en in de wijk, maar komen ook naar scholen toe.

Daarnaast doen we vooral veel samen met en DWARS door elkaar heen: van randprogrammering op je festival, interactief decor op je feestje tot het helpen organiseren van je lievelingsbuurtfeest. 

Dit doen wij meestal vanuit Presikhaaf waar wij sinds januari 2023 in een nieuw pand zijn neergestreken. Ons hoofdwartier huisvest een aantal vaste werkplekken, een expo- /projectkelder, een werkplaats, een gedeeld atelier en een zeefdrukkerij.

Name: Studio Humble | Galerie d'art | Contemporary Art Digital
Description:
La Galerie Humble est un nouveau concept qui met à l’honneur les techniques d’art digital, elle est spécialisée dans les illustrations en Digigraphie Fine Art.

Ces œuvres sont disponibles en série exclusive et c’est Claire Giraudeau, la fondatrice, qui assure les tirages dans l’atelier de la galerie située  à La Flotte sur l’île de Ré.

Les tirages sont réalisés sur du papier FineArt 300g d’une qualité exceptionnelle, en série limité et numéroté à 15 exemplaires.

Name: DOVA Collective
Description:
DOVA Collective is the creative vision of Perth-based team Sherylle Dovaston (Artist and Creative Director) and Glenn Dovaston (Marketing and Operations). Our aim is to create opportunities to share, showcase, and sell artworks in collaboration with other WA emerging artists. 

Separately, Sherylle and Glenn have diverse skills forged through successful careers in community engagement, business planning, and the resources sector. Together, they combine these skills with their passion for art and extraordinary objects to form DOVA Collective. Through a collective model, they hope to prise open new and creative opportunities within Perth’s art scene for emerging artists to work together to showcase their art. 

DOVA Collective has recently partnered with BlueSky Co.Lab in a unique arrangement to showcase Sherylle Dovaston’s original artworks, while fostering support for local artists through a series of short-term exhibitions and other feature events in Co.Lab’s stunning CBD location. 

If you’d like to know more about installing artworks by local and emerging artists in your workplace, contact us to discuss your needs.

Name: iGavel Auctions
Description: iGavel is an online Auction site dedicated solely to the sale of fine arts, antiques and collectibles offered by a network of independently owned auction houses, dealers, appraisers and other arts professionals. Sales are held in a traditional auction-catalog format entirely online, with each lot accompanied by a number of images, with clear professional descriptions, complete condition reports, and starting bids that are the reserves. While bidding takes place online, most sales on iGavel offer “live” exhibitions in New York City & New Braunfels, TX so buyers can examine and handle property first-hand.

Name: Gilden's Art Gallery
Description:
Gilden’s Arts was founded in 1981 and is a family-run business with representatives in the United Kingdom, Israel and the United States of America. In June 2006, we opened our new gallery in Hampstead village, North London. 

We specialize and deal in 20th Century Modern Art

Name: Loods6
Description:
Stichting Kunstwerk Loods6 (KL6) exploiteert en beheert vier panden met ruim 28.000m2 aan ateliers, creatieve bedrijfs-, winkel- en evenementenruimtes. Onder de huurders bevinden zich kunstenaars, ambachtslieden en ondernemers die werkzaam zijn in design, communicatie, multimedia, mode, kunst & cultuur en horeca.

De werkzaamheden van Stichting KL6 bestaan uit het verhuren, beheren en het verzorgen van betaalbare creatieve werkruimtes in de regio Amsterdam. Daarnaast initieert de stichting KL6 culturele evenementen in en rond haar gebouwen.

Loods6 aan de KNSM-Laan is onze grootste locatie. De loods huisvest een paar honderd kunstenaars, creatieve ondernemers en verder horeca en winkels. Daarnaast heeft Loods6 meerdere evenementruimtes.

Het Quarantaine Gebouw ligt op loopafstand van Loods6 aan het Rietlandpark. Deze broedplaats is eigendom van Stadsherstel. In het gebouw zijn 12 ateliers, 2 muziekstudio’s en een café-restaurant gerealiseerd.

De Bonte Zwaan in de Houthavens is een broedplaats met 27 ateliers en 8 commerciële ruimtes en een evenementruimte genaamd Dek West. De Bonte Zwaan is eigendom n Stichting Buurtcentra Amsterdam.

De Genieloods Fort aan den Ham in Uitgeest is eigendom van Stadsherstel. Deze loods is gerenoveerd tot 6 ate

Name: FOACAL Artesanía CyL
Description:
La Federación de Organizaciones Artesanas de Castilla y León, (FOACAL) nació en 1987 con el objetivo de impulsar, promocionar y defender la artesanía (no alimentaria) de Castilla y León. 

Es una organización sin ánimo de lucro de ámbito regional que aglutina a las asociaciones de artesanos y profesionales. 

Ofrece formación permanente de oficios artísticos en CEARCAL, su sede en Valladolid.

Name: Carré Culture
Description: Carré Culture vous apporte les solutions sur mesure pour faire exister et pérenniser vos projets artistiques et culturels, aux Antilles-Guyane et en France hexagonale. Grâce à une équipe aux expertises complémentaires, nous vous portons vers la réalisation de vos objectifs et vous guidons dans toutes les étapes de votre développement, que vous soyez en phase de création, d’accélération ou d’optimisation.

Name: DSC Gallery
Description:
DSC Gallery is a leading contemporary art gallery with a vibrant exhibition programme featuring established and emerging local and international artists. The gallery actively operates on both the primary and secondary art markets, representing artists with long-term dedication and offering collectors access to exceptional works by globally recognized names.

Founded in 2008 by gallerist Olga Trčková and art collector Petr Šec, DSC Gallery has built an extensive portfolio of leading Czech and international artists. Locally, the gallery represents David Černý, Jiří Georg Dokoupil, Jakub Matuška aka Masker, Lubomír Typlt, and Josef Bolf. Internationally, it collaborates with acclaimed artists such as Martin Eder, Dennis Scholl, Bosco Sodi, and Jorinde Voigt.

Through its dynamic exhibition programme DSC Gallery continues to strengthen its position as a bridge between the Czech and global art scenes.

Name: Quirinal
Description:
Quirinal est un cabinet de conseil en art. Nous accompagnons les particuliers désireux de diversifier leur patrimoine et de développer leur sensibilité artistique.
Nos services couvrent l'essentiel du champ d'activité du collectionneur :
• Conseil à l’acquisition
• Conseil à la cession
• Accompagnement quotidien du collectionneur

Name: Thierry VAUDEIN
Description: Peinture

Name: MTSU Art and Design Department
Description:
About the Department of Art and Design

Chaired by Associate Professor Michael Baggarly, the Department of Art and Design offers a BS degree in art education, a BA degree in art history, and BFA degrees in graphic design and studio art. More than 300 art majors and 1,000 non-majors enroll each semester in our classes taught by twenty permanent faculty members. Our Department is proud of its many opportunities for Art and Design students to use technology. With state-of-the-art computer labs and over ten master classrooms, every teaching area has technology at their fingertips.

Name: CampusEmo
Description:
CampusEmo is personal brand by Ankush Bhardwaj.
We bring you Music, Travel videos and Art.

Name: Platform BK
Description:
Platform BK researches the role of art in society and takes action for a better art policy. Become a member via platformbk.nl/lid
www.platformbk.nl/lid

Name: Belger Arts
Description:
Belger Arts encourages viewers to explore, question, create and deepen their understanding of art and the world around them.  
Belger Arts has 3 Kansas City locations:
Since 2000, Belger Arts Center (2100 Walnut St., KCMO 64108) has staged over 70 large-scale contemporary art exhibitions, drawing upon the extensive John and Maxine Belger Family Foundation Collection, as well as a rich variety of local, national, and international artists. 
Belger Crane Yard Studios (2011 Tracy Ave., KCMO 64108), an arts complex dedicated to providing studio and exhibition space for artist, opened in 2013. A range of programming in ceramics education, in addition to the Red Star Residency program and Crane Yard Clay ceramics supply store, has made Belger a center for contemporary art.  
The Belger Glass Annex (1219 E. 19th St., KCMO 64108) opened in 2021 and is the first public glassblowing studio in Kansas City of its scale and scope.  With state of the art glassblowing equipment and tools, a furnace that holds 300 pounds of molten glass, and three work stations, it’s an ideal location for teaching classes and hosting visiting artists.  The Belger Glass Annex is primed to be a Midwest hub for glass art, education and appreciation, strengthening Kansas City’s reputation as an arts destination.

Name: Art Business Consulting
Description:
Art Business Consulting (ABC), a boutique management consultancy firm focused on serving the art world, including established commercial art organizations, start-ups, and artists. The new business, which is the first of its kind, brings more than six decades of art world experience and will operate in New York, Philadelphia, London, and Geneva.

ABC is the first stop for those seeking advice and insight on business and management-related matters in the art world-including strategic planning, growth & expansion, revenue generation, organizational development, and interim management solutions. The team at ABC have an unparalleled breadth of related expertise and experience and have a deep network among a wide range of industry experts.

Name: Artspace Warehouse
Description: Artspace Warehouse is one of the world's leading galleries for savvy contemporary art collectors. With galleries in Zurich and Los Angeles, Artspace Warehouse specializes in affordable international urban, pop, graffiti and abstract art. The gallery is unintimidating and gives a new meaning to shopping for museum quality art within one's budget.

Name: Glen Echo Park Partnership for Arts and Culture, Inc.
Description: Glen Echo Park Partnership for Arts and Culture is the management entity for Glen Echo Park,which offers children's theater, puppetry, social dance, exhibitions and arts education programs in historic former amusement park buildings owned by the National Park Service

Name: Copenhagen Photo Festival
Description: Copenhagen Photo Festivals mission is to create an international platform for contemporary photography in Denmark, by establish an environment for photographic research in all its various aspects: A platform for theoretical debate as well as presentation of new commissions, a platform for the national and international art world, where the professional photo world and upcoming photo talents, as well as everyday photography enthusiasts can meet and explore photography of today.

Name: Hattas Studios
Description:
Custom-designed hand-painted murals, hand-carved sculpture and hand-built immersive themed environments. We start with your story to create one-of-a-kind experiences.

• interior and exterior murals
• sculpture
• themed environments
• custom portraits
• live painting for parties, trade shows or business meetings
• painting for tv and video
• faux finishing 
• business signage
• painting on furniture
• floors, ceilings and even glass and metal
• donor walls with painted naming options
• memorial art

Name: Alfa Art Gallery
Description:
The Alfa Art Gallery believes that Visual Art is the ultimate form of communication and is therefore universal in its expression.

Our mission is to support emerging and well established artists and to give their work exposure and a critical following within the art community.

The goal of Alfa Art Gallery is to conduct local, national and international art exhibitions including: oil color, water color, mixed media, sculptures, photography, crafts and glass works.

Alfa Art gallery also works as an open art studio – gallery. The exhibiting artists can demonstrate their creative process in the gallery and collectors and gallery visitors can follow and learn about their technique, style and motivation.

Alfa Art gallery plays a vital role among visual-arts organizations locally, nationally and internationally by exhibiting, initiating, supporting, presenting, and preserving artists’ work, and by serving as a locus for interdisciplinary art and criticism.

Alfa Art gallery provides professional criticism and guidance to exhibiting artists by seasoned art curators.

Alfa Art gallery specializes in working with first-time art buyers as well as seasoned collectors interested in enhancing their art collection by acquiring the work of new and market-proven artists.

We help collectors and visitors to identify a style of artwork that expresses their personal or company image and purpose while also complimenting the existing home or office aesthetic.

Alfa Art gallery creates a hub for New Jersey’s fine art painters, sculptors, book authors, musicians and actors and helps them get exposed to art collectors and visitors.

The Gallery is open to making new contacts with local and international artists and cultural institutions.

Name: Elmarsa Gallery
Description: One of the most established galleries in the region, Elmarsa has been operating in Tunis since 1994 and opened their Dubai gallery in Alserkal Avenue in 2015. The gallery’s mission has always been to generate interest in Arab art from North Africa, specializing in both modern and contemporary practice. They have participated in every edition of Art Dubai since 2007 as well as a number of other prominent international art fairs and frequently publish monographs on their artists.

Name: L'ahah
Description: Créée en 2017 par Pascaline Mulliez et Marine Veilleux, L’ahah, association loi 1901, propose aux artistes plasticien-ne-s un accompagnement personnalisé, et sur le long terme. À travers la mise en place d’outils spécifiques adaptés à leurs pratiques et démarches respectives (expositions, publications, collaborations, rencontres, évènements transdisciplinaires etc.), l’association s’attache à accentuer leur rayonnement et, ce faisant, participe au soutien de la création contemporaine.

Name: Chicago Art Source
Description:
Chicago Art Source is a comprehensive art firm specializing in corporate, hospitality, residential, commercial, retail, institutional, and healthcare projects. 

CAS Art Consultants work with architects, interior designers, project managers, and purchasers with a goal of capturing the spirit and uniqueness of their client's spaces. 

CAS sources from a vast network of artists worldwide and provides a broad range of artwork including posters, limited edition prints, original paintings, photography, and sculpture.

Offering a fresh perspective and creative and cost effective art solutions- CAS creates inspiring environments that communicate a message and unify a space.

Name: Starving Artists Opportunities
Description:
Welcome to Starving Artists – the UK’s ultimate hub for art opportunities, designed to free up your creative time. We search the internet for every commission, award, grant, residency, and more, so you can focus on creating rather than endlessly browsing. With hundreds of opportunities tailored to help you gain recognition, support your artistic journey, and keep your career moving forward, we’re here to make forging your path as an artist easier.

Our mission is simple: help artists build sustainable, fulfilling careers. At Starving Artists, you’ll have access to a world of opportunities at your fingertips, all updated daily by a team of artists who understand the struggle. We’re passionate about making the search for art-related opportunities simpler, faster, and more effective for artists at all stages of their careers.

With over 350 live art opportunities available at any one time, and 50-80 new listings added each week, there’s always something new to discover. Our filtering tools allow you to tailor your search results to fit your creative practice, whether you're looking for your first award, a residency, public art commissions, or community workshops. We’ve got opportunities designed to take your practice to the next level.

For three years, our all-artist team has been dedicated to finding the best opportunities, not just for ourselves, but for you, too! We also put together a weekly newsletter featuring our handpicked highlights, ensuring you never miss a great opportunity. With our real-world experience, we know how to spot the best opportunities and weed out the rubbish!

Whether you’re just starting out or looking to take your art career further, Starving Artists is here to help you navigate the world of art opportunities with ease. Our platform supports artists in building careers that are not only successful but also sustainable and fulfilling. Join our community and start accessing the opportunities that can take your art to the next level.

Name: Available for new opportunities
Description: Created to help to find a new job

Name: Great Debaters EHTP
Description:
Great Debaters EHTP est un club de débat, de prise de parole en public et de diplomatie, fondé par un groupe d’élèves ingénieurs EHTPistes. 

Notre mission est de permettre aux élèves-ingénieurs de développer et de démontrer leurs compétences en communication, argumentation et conviction, tout en combattant les stéréotypes qui limitent l’ingénieur à ses compétences techniques. Nous croyons en des ingénieurs polyvalents, capables de prendre la parole, de débattre et de défendre leurs idées.

Chaque année, nous organisons La Valse des Esprits Éclairés, une compétition nationale de débat réunissant plus de 18 établissements d’enseignement supérieur et plus de 162 participants. Cette compétition est une opportunité unique pour les étudiants de représenter leur établissement à l’échelle nationale, et de confronter leurs idées.

Name: Best Art Awards
Description:
BEST ART AWARDS
Welcome artists, dreamers and innovators! Are you ready to showcase your talents and get a chance to win amazing prizes? We are pleased to invite you to join us in this exciting competition. This is your opportunity to showcase your creativity and show the world your unique vision. Do you prefer to draw with a pencil or paints, pens or charcoal? We are open to all mediums. What about the awards? With our generous prizes, you can take your art to the next level. These prizes will give you the freedom to experiment and express yourself with new materials, and of course you will get the satisfaction of being recognized for your work. So don’t miss this opportunity – it could be your big step forward! Get inspired, brush up on your skills and make sure your competition entries showcase your best work. We want to see what you have, so don’t be afraid to show off your talent. We are also confident that our competition will be a great opportunity for you to showcase your talent to collectors, curators, gallery owners and other art industry professionals. It’s time to show us what you can do. Good luck!

Name: Fine Art Collectors Association
Description:
We advocate and deliver tools for fine art collectors during their activities while building, displaying, storing, and preserving legacy collections.

The fine art world is a dynamic and interconnected community comprising a spectrum of individuals with varying levels of expertise and involvement. Each role plays a crucial part in shaping the trajectory of the art world, from nurturing emerging talent to preserving the legacy of artistic achievements. 

Whether you're a connoisseur, patron, aficionado, devotee, or collector, your interest in fine art contributes to the enduring beauty and cultural significance of the art realm.

We encourage each collector to do their part, stabilizing their local or regional artists' community - a local, responsive art collector is to everyone's benefit.

Eventually, the Fine Art Collectors Association will sponsor a project that delivers an 'artist community center' template.

We seek observations, commentary, and reviews on specific topics from real people doing real work in their art communities, worldwide.

Every aspect of fine art collecting is of interest in our support of the responsible collector. If some of the complexity and uncertainty of collecting can be removed, so much the better for us all.

Note: We are expressly not involved in art transactions except as a supporting advocate of good practice for collectors.

Also: https://fineartcollectorsassociation.substack.com/

Name: Mindauger Art
Description:
My most successful method for drawing is to put my mind on autopilot, with minimal or no intention toward the outcome. The contents of my consciousness take over—patterns, forms, connections, and so on. I’ve noticed that the environment around me often influences my artwork in various ways (figural, metaphorical, etc.), whether I’m watching television or listening to a podcast.

The digital hybridizations emerge from states of flow—streams of consciousness guided by intuition that draw on my reservoir of images and experiences. Structures take shape spontaneously, embodying familiar impressions and intuitions.

I am deeply interested in the interpretations of others and how they engage with my work. Their perspectives frequently reveal insights that expand my own understanding. My hope is that viewers find a personal sense of connection and meaning within each piece. I often create works from multiple orientations, and I find that others also enjoy exploring the shifting perspectives.

Name: BodhiTree School of Music
Description:
BodhiTree School of Music

World's best music courses right at your doorsteps.

Name: OnFire Animation
Description:
Desde 2010, a OnFire anima sonhos e forma a próxima geração de animadores 3D, preparando profissionais para brilhar no mercado nacional e internacional. Mais do que ensinar técnica, cultivamos uma paixão pela arte de animar, garantindo que cada aluno encontre sua voz criativa e alcance a excelência.

Em 2020, demos mais um passo com a criação da nossa frente de consultoria e supervisão de animação. Aqui, colaboramos com estúdios e projetos, elevando a qualidade da animação brasileira e trazendo um toque de maestria a cada produção.

Com uma equipe apaixonada e antenada nas últimas tendências, transformamos ideias em arte que se move, sempre com um olhar humano em cada frame. Na OnFire, acreditamos que a animação não é apenas técnica — é poesia em movimento, é paixão em cada frame, arte em cada passo.
Com uma equipe experiente e conectada às mais recentes tecnologias e tendências do setor, a OnFire Animation se orgulha em transformar ideias criativas em realidade, mantendo a essência artística humana em cada frame.

Name: Saudi Arabian Society for Culture and Arts - SASCA
Description:
صدر قرار إنشاء الجمعية العربية السعودية للثقافة والفنون  عام 1393هـ

كمؤسسة مجتمع مدني بميزانية مستقلة لتكون الراعي الأول لكل ما يخص النشاطات الثقافية والفنية في المملكة العربية السعودية.

اعتمد المقر الرئيسي ومقر مجلس الإدراة في مدينة الرياض وتم إنشاء 16 فرعاً موزعة في أنحاء المملكة العربية السعودية وتشرف وزارة لثقافة والإعلام عليها.

الرؤية

تنمية حضارة الثقافة والفنون ودمجها في النسيج المجتمعي، مما يعزّز مستوى الابتكار والتذوّق

الفني لدى أجيال اليوم والغد ويرفع مكانة المملكة على خارطة الإبداع العالمية.

الرسالة

أن تكون الجمعية المرجع الأول في الثقافة والفنون لكل مواطن من خلال رفع الوعي الثقافي والفني وتمكين الشباب من تطوير مهاراتهم ومواهبهم

تهدف الجمعية إلى

تمثيل المملكة في كل ما من شأنه الارتقاء بالثقافة والفنون على المستويين العربي والعالمي, لمتابعة حركتيهما والتنسيق معهما.

تبني المواهب الشابة وإتاحة الفرص أمامها لإبراز تفوقها ونبوغها في ظل الإشراف والتوجيه لتصبح حصيلتها داخل إطار ملتزم بالقيم والأصالة.

رعاية الأدباء والفنانين السعوديين والعمل على رفع مستواهم الثقافي, والفني, والاجتماعي, وتأمين مستقبلهم, وتوجيههم لما يخدم مجتمعهم.

الارتقاء بمستوى الثقافة والفنون بالمملكة.

Name: Adam's Auctioneers
Description:
Over the last century Adam's has developed its expertise in many fields and currently offers specialist sales ranging from Important Irish Art, Fine Period Furniture, Mid-Century Furniture, Fine Jewellery & Watches, Silver & Object's Of Vertu, Contemporary & Modern Art, Militaria & Memorabilia as well as Vintage Wine Sales and we are adept at the appraisal and sale of private collections. 
We also offer a comprehensive valuation service for the purposes of insurance, probate, family division etc. 
Adam's is proud of its relationship with its clientele and as a privately held company, can offer flexible and competitive terms. 
Numerous world records have been achieved in these salerooms, particularly in the sale of Irish art. 
Today, James Adam & Sons, is one of the fastest growing companies in its field, offering a service of distinction as Ireland's principal auction house

Name: Kilomètre25
Description:
KILOMÈTRE25, LIEU DE VIE DES CULTURES PÉRIPHÉRIQUES.
Lieu de vie de 2 200 m2 sous le périphérique du 19ème arrondissement, le Kilomètre25 accompagne et valorise les expressions artistiques émergentes et les porteurs de projets engagés. La nuit, cet open air devient un espace de libre expression pour les musiques électroniques. 

Ouverture :

Juin : Jeudi / Vendredi / Samedi / Dimanche / Veille de jours fériés

Octobre : Vendredi / Samedi / Veille de jours fériés

Ven. Sam. Veille Jours fériés 00:00 - 07:00
