Name: Travailleuse indépendante
Description: Portfolio

Name: Drawing Now Paris
Description:
Drawing Now Paris est la première foire d’art contemporain exclusivement dédiée au dessin en Europe, créée en 2007 par Christine Phal, présidente et fondatrice.

Chaque année au mois de mars, cette foire de référence sur la scène mondiale accueille près de 70 galeries internationales sélectionnées par un comité indépendant, composé de professionnels du monde l’art. 
Ces galeries présentent plus de 400 artistes et près de 2’000 œuvres, représentatives de la diversité du dessin de ces 50 dernières années à aujourd’hui. Collectionneurs et amateurs d’art sont invités à découvrir les œuvres d’artistes émergents et plus établis.

L’équipe de la foire, pilotée par Carine Tissot, directrice, et accompagnée par Joana P. R. Neves, directrice artistique, prépare tout au long de l’année un printemps du dessin avec une programmation riche et variée, pour partager avec le plus grand nombre son engagement pour ce médium.

  RENDEZ-VOUS DU 26 AU 29 MARS 2026 POUR LA 19E ÉDITION !
 Carreau du Temple Paris 3e

Name: payneshurvell gallery
Description:
PayneShurvell opened in June 2010 and is run by James Payne and Joanne Shurvell.  James Payne, a Fine Art graduate of Central St Martins, is a curator and the film editor of Garageland magazine.  Joanne Shurvell, a former Communications Director at the Institute of Contemporary Arts, London, is a freelance arts writer and arts marketing consultant. 
PayneShurvell represents a group of international artists and encourages an inter-generational dialogue, with established artists like Margaret Harrison who has several paintings in the Tate collection, alongside young and emerging artists.

Name: Barbie The Welder
Description:
After training for five years to learn the art of welding & fabrication, & earning her Journeyman in sheet metal & iron plate, Barbie quit her job September 1, 2014 to pursue her greatest passion, metal sculpture. Although Barbie had extensive training from fellow welders & fabricators at the company she worked for, her art is completely self-taught. With her unparalleled sculpture design & artistry Barbie has quickly become a world-renowned metal sculptor & has created sculptures for major corporations like Miller Welders, Carolina Shoe Company, Weiler Abrasives, & Harley Davidson, small businesses, & exclusive clients in fourteen different countries.

Her YouTube channel, Barbie The Welder, which is viewed by subscribers in 53 countries, is a wealth of information for artists & entrepreneurs alike. In Barbie's easy-going style she shares step by step videos on how to create a wide variety of metal sculptures & sound entrepreneur advice. 

Barbie teaches metal art creation through her also written three books on the subject. 

In her 1st book Horseshoe Crafts, Barbie takes you through 30 welding projects using horseshoes with easy to follow instructions & pictures showing each step.

Barbie's 2nd book, How To Weld Silverware Animals, she teaches you step by step how to create 30 animals from land, sea, & air.

In Barbie's 3rd book, How To Weld Scrap Metal Art, she walks you through 30 easy projects using common scrap metal.
In her 4th book, The Inspiration Blueprint, she shares how she went from welfare to a world renowned metal sculptor by creating a picture of her perfect life, a blueprint, & how you too can design and create a life that you love as you follow her step by step plan to making your own blueprint.
Barbie lives in Erin, NY where she continues to pursue her greatest passion, pouring her heart & soul into the metal that she sculpts into one of a kind sculptures for her clients all over the world.

Name: DTR Modern Galleries
Description: Placing 20th Century Masters within the reach of art lovers of all levels, DTR Modern Galleries works to build collections of corporate and private collectors ranging from new enthusiasts to serious connoisseurs. We offer the most significant privately-held collection of works by artists such as Picasso, Chagall, Miro, Matisse and Warhol, as well as elite contemporary artists. Among our well established services are in-home consultations, private exhibition previews, space rental for corporate and charity events and a corporate art loan program. Check out our gallery press, testimonials from clients & photos from some of our clients’ homes, and logos of companies with whom we partner.

Name: Galerie Amelie du Chalard
Description:
Founded by Amélie du Chalard in 2015, its a new generation gallery that is challenging the traditional codes of the art world.

The gallery combines both a digital offering and exceptional physical spaces dedicated to the contemporary artists she represents. 

We showcase both established artists as well as emerging talents in order to create a meaningful universe and ecosystem highlighting various technics:  painting, sculpture, works on paper, photography, monumental installations, etc.

In order to best support our artists, and to increase market visibility and enhance public profile, the gallery represents their work in sales to private collectors, but also curates for professionals (institutions, offices, name brands, etc.).  In addition, we work closely with renowned art historians and critics when preparing exhibitions and descriptive texts.

We hope to enable a new generation of artists emerge.  Whether young and upcoming, or well established, their point of commonality is significant talent recognized by our expert panel, and they fully deserve a spot at the forefront of the art scene.

Our mission is to guide them in their artistic evolution, increase visibility, raise public profile, and enhance market value.

Name: Master Projets culturels dans l'espace public - Paris 1
Description:
Le Master 2 professionnel Projets Culturels dans l’Espace Public est la première formation universitaire en Europe dédiée à la conception, la production et le développement de projets artistiques et culturels en espace public et à l’urbanisme culturel. 

Créé en 2005 au sein de l’université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne, École des arts de la Sorbonne, le Master forme chaque année 20 étudiants. 

QUEL EST L’OBJET DU MASTER ? 
 
L’art urbain ou dans la nature, souvent in situ ou contextuel, dans le domaine des arts vivants, des arts visuels, de la performance, de l'urbanisme culturel ou de l’architecture éphémère. Ce sont parfois des projets participatifs, collaboratifs, avec des perspectives d’«empowerment», ou dans un esprit «artiviste». Ils sont fréquemment articulés à des politiques de développement territorial, social ou touristique, et, de plus en plus, liés à des programmes d’aménagement urbain. Un fil rouge les relie : tous situés hors de la boite noire des théâtres ou hors du white cube des centres d’art, ils sont en relation avec leur environnement, humain ou paysager, qu’ils viennent révéler, décaler, perturber, transformer, discrètement ou de manière spectaculaire, fugitivement ou durablement. Ces projets nourrissent de manière substantielle ce que nous appelons la "culture expérientielle", celle qui nous invite à vivre des expériences — relationnelles, urbaines, culturelles, poétiques... 

L'objectif du Master : former des professionnels de la conception, de la production et du développement de projets culturels, ouverts à la diversité de la création contemporaine, engagés dans une réflexion sur les relations entre arts, cultures, populations et territoires, en France et dans le monde. 

La suite > http://masterpcep.over-blog.com/article-1162144.html

Name: RITCS School of Arts
Description:
RITCS - Royal Institute for Theatre, Cinema & Sound. 
School of Arts in Brussel met een focus op de audiovisuele kunsten, theater, podiumtechnieken en educatieve opleidingen.

Name: Art Gate
Description: Art Gate is the leading platform for immersive art events and exhibitions that connect galleries, artists, students, collectors, and audiences worldwide. Our virtual technology removes the barriers of location, cost, and accessibility, enabling anyone, anywhere to experience and showcase art like never before. Whether you’re an artist seeking global exposure or an institution reimagining how art is shared, Art Gate empowers you to create meaningful connections and unforgettable exhibitions in the digital realm.

Name: Royal Hibernian Academy of Arts
Description:
The Royal Hibernian Academy of Arts is Ireland’s powerhouse of the Arts, steered by an artist-run Academy of our time. Our spirit is unyielding and vital, dedicated to unleashing the creative energy of the Arts. We are an integral part of the artistic life of this country.

The RHA is dedicated to developing, affirming and challenging the public’s appreciation of traditional and innovative approaches to the visual arts. The Academy achieves its objectives through its exhibition, education and collection programmes.

The Academy is funded by the Arts Council/An Chomhairle Ealaíon, through fundraising initiatives, through the earned revenue from its Annual Exhibition and by the Benefactors, Patrons and Friends of the Academy.

Name: Florence Biennale - International Exhibition of Contemporary Art and Design
Description:
The Florence Biennale is the major contemporary art exhibition in Florence (Italy), where it is regarded as an outstanding showcase of the international contemporary art production. Every two years the Florence Biennale enlivens the Medicean city with a programme of collateral events such as conferences, displays, performances, workshops and lectures.

Unveiling this year in a dedicated space at the Fortezza da Basso, in the Spadolini pavilion, is the Design exhibition to be held within the framework of the XIIth Florence Biennale, scheduled from 18 to 27 October 2019, and as usual showcasing works by contemporary artists from around the world. The forthcoming edition, themed ‘ARS ET INGENIUM. Toward Leonardo da Vinci’s legacy of Similitude and Invention’, will thus shed light on art and design as two separate yet conjoining spheres of creativity. 

The outstanding personalities receiving the Lorenzo il Magnifico lifetime achievement awards for the arts, namely Franco Zeffirelli, the sculptor Gustavo Aceves, and the media artist Refik Anadol have already been disclosed, along with the recipients of the special lifetime achievement awards from the President, Anthony Howe and Mice Jankulovski.
 
At this stage, the Florence Biennale steering committee is delighted to announce that the Leonardo da Vinci Lifetime Achievement Awards for Design will be bestowed to two internationally acclaimed talents who have excelled outstandingly in the design domains. One of them is Paula Scher, principal of the Pentagram studio in New York specialising in communication and graphic design. The other is Elsa Peretti, fashion and jewellery designer with Tiffany & Co. Furthermore, the Leonardo da Vinci Award for Design will be bestowed to Wanda and Salvatore Ferragamo in memoriam.

Name: Musée Soulages Rodez
Description: Le musée Soulages présente depuis 2014, la plus grande collection d’œuvres de Pierre Soulages.

Name: Stoned Santa
Description: Stoned Santa is a gifting platform where Artists and Creators come together to create Personalised Gifting experiences.

Name: Collectrium
Description:
Collectrium was founded in 2009 primarily as a collection management platform for fine art and luxury collectibles such as cars, watches, jewelry and wine. Collectrium was designed specifically for collectors, by a technology expert, and has earned the trust of thousands of clients worldwide. Leading the industry in innovation through agile development and partnering with best-in-class art service providers,  Collectrium integrated its collection management tools with the database of auction results to enable users to benchmark the value of their collections and assess markets in one single experience. The company was acquired by Christie’s in 2015 but continues to operate independently, with offices and clients in the Americas, Europe and Asia.

Learn more about Collectrium at http://www.collectrium.com

Subscribe at http://www.collectrium.com/pricing/

Follow us:
- http://twitter.com/collectrium
- http://facebook.com/collectrium

Name: Syn Studio : École d'art - Art School
Description:
At Cestar Collège - Syn Studio, we specialize in teaching concept art and illustration for the entertainment industry. We believe that strong fundamentals in figurative drawing, painting and sculpture are the foundations of high-level digital artistry. This belief is shared by all of our teachers, friends and advisers which include top art directors, producers, lead and senior artists in Montreal, Los Angeles and San Francisco’s games, film and animation industries.

For over five years, we have been helping industry professionals as well as young and amateur artists take their art to the next level. Our alumni include art directors and lead artists as well as rising stars in concept art, illustration and matte painting in games, film and animation companies such as Ubisoft, Electronic Arts, Eidos, Gameloft, Cartoon Network, Mokko Studio and many more. Our most successful students are incredibly passionate about art and learning, intensely curious and open-minded, humble and eager for critique, share and work well with others and possess a very strong work ethic. If this sounds like you and you want to see yourself learn and grow with us, then whatever your current level, we would love to take your hand and guide you on the journey to artistic mastery.

Name: Curatorial Exhibitions
Description:
Curatorial Assistance Traveling Exhibitions (CATE) is a nonprofit organization dedicated to creating opportunity for access, outreach, and education in the visual arts by providing museums and other cultural venues with affordable, high-quality exhibitions that educate, engage, and inspire.

Since 2000 CATE has collaborated on more than 400 traveling exhibitions with over 850 art venues worldwide.

Name: ART ASIA Fair
Description:
ART ASIA Miami is a highly selective showcase for galleries from around the world whose specialty is the best of established and emerging contemporary artists from throughout Asia.

Established in 2008, ART ASIA has hosted fairs in Miami and Basel. The fair has positioned itself as the forum for international galleries, curators, artists, collectors, and educators to exchange ideas and enable new audiences to see fresh and exciting works from the complete Asian Diaspora. 

ART ASIA 2012 will return to Miami for our 5th edition on December 5-9, 2012, with a Vernissage on December 2012.

For more information on exhibiting at ART ASIA please contact info@artasiafair.com.
Also please, visit us online at www.artasiafair.com, on Facebook at www.facebook.com/ARTASIAfairs, and on Twitter at www.twitter.com/artasia.

Name: Villa Saint-Louis Ndar
Description:
Située dans le paisible quartier nord de l’île de Saint- Louis, sur le site de l’Institut français du Sénégal, la Villa Saint-Louis Ndar est un espace pluridisciplinaire de réflexion, de création et de mise en pratique qui s’adresse aux professionnel.le.s (artistes, chercheur. se.s, penseur.e.s) émergent.e.s ou confirmé.e.s. Elle a ouvert au printemps 2019 avec pour mission de favoriser la création contemporaine en Afrique ou en dialogue avec le continent. Elle est portée par l’Institut français du Sénégal et s’inscrit ainsi dans le prestigieux réseau des Villas françaises dans le monde. Son fonctionnement s’appuie sur de solides partenariats internationaux privés et publics.
La Villa dispose d’une capacité d’accueil de trois résident.e.s en simultané pour une durée allant d’un à trois mois.
L’ambition de la Villa est de soutenir les initiatives qui promeuvent de nouveaux lieux d’expression de l’Afrique actuelle et des collaborations équilibrées entre le continent et le reste du monde. Elle est soucieuse de cette dynamique intellectuelle et créative qui fait l’histoire de l’Afrique et de la contribution du continent aux grands défis de l’Humanité.
Les actions de la Villa font de cet espace un incubateur, un stimulant de la recherche et des idées, doublé d’un laboratoire de la création artistique, qu’elle contribue à amplifier et à faire résonner.
Le programme de résidences Villa Saint-Louis Ndar a reçu le soutien de l’Institut Français dans le cadre du programme La Fabrique des résidences.

Name: Dauphine Culture
Description:
Dauphine Culture est l’association regroupant les ancien·nes et actuel·les étudiant·es du Master 2 Management des organisations culturelles (ex DESS 234 Gestion des institutions culturelles) de l’Université Paris Dauphine - PSL. Elle s’adresse aux étudiant·es et diplômé·es de la formation initiale et continue, à Paris et Tunis.

L'association organise chaque année des évènements réguliers destinés au réseau du Master (visites de lieux culturels, rencontres professionnelles, apéros...) ainsi que des débats sur le management culturel ouverts à tous les professionnels du secteur. 

Elle organise également les Journées du Management Culturel, manifestation ouverte à tou·tes créée en 2012 afin d’échanger, réfléchir et partager sur les métiers de managers culturel.

Cette page a pour but de vous informer de nos évènements ouverts à tou·tes.

Pour plus d'informations sur l'association, rendez-vous sur le site internet : www.dauphineculture.fr

Name: Marianne Boesky Gallery
Description: Since its inception in 1996, Marianne Boesky Gallery’s mission has been to represent and support the work of contemporary international artists of all media. The gallery expanded its flagship location in 2016 to the adjacent space on West 24th Street. This space more than doubles the gallery's footprint in Chelsea, allowing for ever more ambitious solo and group shows that highlight dynamic narratives and parallels across artist, media, and theme. In 2017, the gallery opened a location in Aspen, CO, presenting rotating exhibitions by both gallery artists and artists invited to present special projects. Marianne Boesky Gallery currently represents over 30 esteemed artists of different generations and backgrounds. These recent expansions highlight the gallery's ongoing experimentations with space and architecture as well as its continued commitment to the needs and interests of its dynamic roster of artists from around the globe.

Name: Barcelona Academy of Art
Description:
The Barcelona Academy of Art opened in September 2013 and aims at teaching drawing, painting, sculpture and digital art using a full curriculum and teaching methods derived from classical-realist tradition. Its methodology originated in the Renaissance and was revived by the major academic Ateliers of the late XIX (especially by great painters such as Jean-Léon Gérôme, Léon Bonnat and Carolus-Duran).

In the Barcelona Academy of Art we consider the classic academic approach not as an end but as a tool that students can use to build their own personality and artistic language.

The training program at the Barcelona Academy of Art offers regular courses in drawing, painting and sculpture, which are complemented by workshops, seminars and intensive courses (Easter and Summer). These provide students with an intensive learning of methods, procedures and techniques from the best professional artists.

Name: Sedition Art
Description:
Sedition is where contemporary art meets the future. A platform designed for the modern collector, we make it effortless to enjoy, collect, trade, and display digital masterpieces by the world’s leading contemporary artists. These works aren’t bound by frames or walls - they’re made to live on screens, breathing new life into how we experience and share art.

We believe art collecting should be instant, accessible, and joyful. Gone are the barriers of traditional art ownership - now, anyone can become a collector. Just like limited editions in the physical world, our curated digital artworks are available in exclusive runs. Once sold out, they can be resold through our upcoming marketplace, opening new doors for art lovers everywhere.

At Sedition, we’re not just selling art - we’re shaping a new era of digital collecting. Ready to join the revolution?

Name: RUM Kunst
Description:
Vores vision er at formidle god og relevant kunst, der udfordrer sanserne og skaber grobund for debat, nytænkning og kommunikation mellem mennesker.

Vi er en platform, der arbejder som kunstfaglige rådgivere og kunstformidlere med fokus på skandinavisk og international samtidskunst. 

Det æstetiske greb bliver vægtet højt i vores valg af kunst - vi insisterer på at kvalitet er mere interessant end det modsatte.

I samarbejde med vores kunder lægger vi virksomhedens kunstneriske strategi. 
Som kunstfaglige rådgivere leder vi processen fra præsentation af udsmykningsforslag, gennem tilblivelsen, til kunstværkets endelige placering. Ved at integrere kunst og design, omformer vi de eksisterende rum, udfordrer virksomhedskulturen og skaber rum for nye måder at tænke og handle på. 

For os er kunst og kultur en vigtig, folkelig funderet ressource med et samfundsforandrende og -udviklende potentiale.                                                                                                     I vores arbejde er vi bevidste omkring FN’s 17 globale verdensmål for en mere fair og bæredygtig verden. Vi ønsker at støtte op omkring et inkluderende, kreativt og innovativt samfund, hvor forskelle hilses velkommen og deltagelse er værdsat.

English version: www.rum1.dk/what-we-do

Name: Gage Academy of Art
Description: Gage believes artists are made, not born.

Name: Kaliber
Description:
Kaliber is een van de grootste aanbieders in cultuureducatie in Nederland. Voor alles op het gebied van muziek, dans, theater en beeldende kunst moet je bij ons zijn. Het hele jaar door kan jong en oud, beginner of gevorderde, zich creatief uiten. 

We zijn en blijven een maatschappelijke instelling zonder winstoogmerk die opereert op de schaal van de regio Twente, met een focus op de gemeenten: Almelo, Enschede, Hellendoorn, Oldenzaal, Tubbergen en Wierden. We bieden een breed aanbod voor particulieren, scholen en bedrijven en adviseren overheid en onderwijs met betrekking tot educatiebeleid.

Name: ARTSHINE - ARTS4ALL
Description:
At Artshine, we’re driven by the belief that creativity can change lives.

Founded by artist and entrepreneur Paul Field, Artshine’s mission is to bring the joy and transformative power of art to every corner of Canada and beyond.
Through our innovative mobile art school, after-school programs, and art-in-a-box subscriptions, we’ve reached over 350+ schools…

And inspired over 216000+ students.
Children, adults, and educators alike.

Paul’s Vision: Art as a Lifeline

A brief look at Paul Field’s journey to founding Artshine and Arts4All:
Paul’s journey began in the field of social work…
Where he saw firsthand how art could be a lifeline for those struggling with life’s challenges.

Paul used art to create safe spaces for healing and growth.

However, he quickly realized that consistent funding for art programs was always in short supply.
That’s why Paul founded Artshine—to create a sustainable model that would keep these essential programs alive; Arts4All.

Paul’s Vision: Expanding Access to Creativity Through Arts4All:
Arts4All, Artshine’s nonprofit initiative, brings free art programs to underprivileged communities across Ontario and Québec. Our social enterprise model has provided over $1 million in free and subsidized art programs since our start.

Our impact:
- 216000+ students inspired in 350+ schools
- 32,400+ children and youth given free scholarships
- Programs in English and French

Why it matters:
- Art provides healing, growth, and self-expression
- Builds critical life skills and self-confidence
- Creates safe spaces for connection and empowerment

Join us in making creativity accessible to all, transforming lives one brushstroke at a time.

Name: CADAF
Description: CADAF, a cutting edge art fair showcasing curated selections of fine crypto and digital art via virtual and in person events.

Name: Associação Brasileira de Gestão Cultural - ABGC
Description:
A ASSOCIAÇÃO BRASILEIRA DE GESTÃO CULTURAL – ABGC

É uma ONG que atua desde 2005 na formação profissional e de conhecimento acadêmico junto aos setores de Produção e Gestão Cultural, Social e Ambiental, através da realização de ações voltadas à qualificação profissional e à divulgação das profissões afins junto ao mercado de trabalho, mediante parcerias e convênios com instituições públicas e privadas.
A ABGC tem como prerrogativa reunir pesquisadores, professores e profissionais das áreas da produção de bens culturais e do gerenciamento em cultura, museus e meio ambiente, propondo-se a realizar cursos de capacitação em formatos diversos – corporativos, de extensão e de pós-graduação, além de pesquisas e publicações.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: VOLTA Art Fair
Description:
VOLTA is a globally recognized contemporary art fair that invites art enthusiasts and collectors to discover the Art of Now, hosted in Basel and New York annually. 
Each gallery at VOLTA showcases work that mirrors the evolving world we live in, encouraging us to embrace fresh perspectives.

VOLTA is committed to curating an intimate and engaging space where collectors can connect with compelling narratives from around the world. 

We actively support enterprising galleries in participating within the art market's major cities, with VOLTA galleries consistently charting an upward trajectory in the market.

Name: OSMOART
Description:
The name of the company is composed of two words: "OSMO" and "ART".

The first part of the name "OSMO" is inspired by the Greek words "Osmé" (smell, perfume, scent) and "Osmos" (thrust, impulse, reciprocal influence).

While "ART" comes from the Latin word "Ars" and "Artis", it is a phenomenon of society that fulfills three essential functions:

•	Art carries a message, an expression of its own ideal.
•	It can be associated with a simple play activity.
•	Art assumes a symbolic function by which society structures its collective imagina-tion, shapes its vision of the world, expresses its aspirations and contradictions.

The apophtegma "perfumes, colors & sounds" expresses the idea of an interactive sen-sorality.

It is inspired by the poetry of Charles Baudelaire and the sonnet "Correspondances", from his work "The Flowers of Evil".

OSMOART is a French niche perfumery company founded in 2003 by creative perfumer and raw material expert Pierre Bénard.

Passionate about fragrances, colors and sounds, OSMOART is an innovator of multi-sensory  and synesthesic experiences centered on culture, creative expertise, education and research and development.

In close collaboration with global markets and perfume companies, OSMOART relies on discovery, innovation and creativity.

OSMOART provides services in the following areas:

•	EDUCATION
•	NATURAL
•	CREATION
•	AIR DESIGN

Name: Adam Green Art Advisory
Description: Adam Green Art Advisory is a full-service art advisory that provides a range of services to new and experienced collectors including art acquisitions and collection strategies.

Name: Woodtique
Description:
WOODTIQUE maakt handgemaakte design houtwerken, geïnspireerd op de schoonheid van de natuur en gemaakt van resthout uit de houtbewerkingsindustrie. Deze industrie voert jaarlijks tonnen aan reststroom af, terwijl er precies niet mis mee is. Woodtique laat het niet verloren gaan en maakt er unieke items van zodat we het hout weer waarderen als iets bijzonders.

Als je vorm geeft aan de wereld, ben je verantwoordelijk voor de vorm die je eraan geeft.

Name: Kaliber Kunstenschool
Description:
Kaliber Kunstenschool is een van de grootste aanbieders in kunstonderwijs in Nederland. Voor alles op het gebied van muziek, dans, theater en beeldende kunst moet je bij ons zijn. Het hele jaar door kan jong en oud, beginner of gevorderde, zich creatief uiten. 

We zijn en blijven een maatschappelijke instelling zonder winstoogmerk die opereert op de schaal van de regio Twente, met een focus op de gemeenten: Almelo, Enschede, Hellendoorn, Oldenzaal, Tubbergen en Wierden. We bieden een breed aanbod voor particulieren, scholen en bedrijven en adviseren overheid en onderwijs met betrekking tot educatiebeleid.

Name: artch
Description:
Founded in 2018, Artch's mission is to develop a contemporary art market in Montreal's downtown while bringing together amateurs, visual art professionals and the wider public.

This year, 23 new artists emerging in the Montreal art scene were selected and offered a 3,000$ grant as well as a training in entrepreneurship in art that will eventually lead to a 8-day exhibition in Montreal’s downtown.  

All the artists selected are Montrealers under thirty-five years old venturing into the art market. Their training is organized in collaboration with Carrefour Jeunesse Emploi Montreal.

JACK MARKETING oversees the visual identity and the communication side of the project. The company is also in charge of public relations and sponsorships for Artch. This flourishing creative agency is based in Montreal and the team “Good JACK” offers services in marketing, communication, brand narrative and development such as design, online presence, and events for companies.

CJE MONTREAL CENTRE-VILLE coordinates the entrepreneurship training for the artists selected. The organization helps young artists achieve their career goals in multiple fields. Located downtown, they are at the heart of cultural activities and arts which is an asset in helping artists launch their career.

Name: Art & Design Montreal
Description:
Art & Design Montreal ( A&D Montreal ) is a creator of occasions where creatives and clients gather. by virtue of their expositions and publications, A&D will contribute to the rise of Montreal design as much on the local scene as the international.

A&D is a triad of exhibition spaces: on the web, in print, and the physical space. From photography, illustration and graphic design through fashion and industrial design, A&D concentrates on four points of view: personal work, commercial work, the relationship to the client and the creative dimension 

WHO IS ART & DESIGN MONTRéAL?
Jimmi Francoeur (Deux Huit Huit) is a print producer and photographer. Shortly after his immer- sion into the photo world, he became a monthly contributor to the magazines Nightlife and ur- bania. He works with many Montreal agencies and in 2008 started up the design collective Deux Huit Huit.

Patrick John-Lord Joseph (formerly of Toxa) is a communications and marketing professional. This graduate of the Hautes étude Commerciales made his debut as Artistic Director to the Que- bec Counsel of Art Trades followed by a contribution to the break- through of the magazine Night- life, and building the notoriety of urbania magazine. Today, he holds the post Execu- tive Producer at Moskito Films, and works on development of the creative creators collective, Swamp.

Jean-Aymeri de Magistris (Montreal State Of Mind) is an independent interior designer, who has worked for many Montreal agencies. In 2008 he cofounded the blog Montreal State Of Mind and the shop Mtldesigners.com, in an effort to promote, expose and export Montreal creatives.

Name: Artam Antik A.S.
Description:
1981 yılında Nurcan & Turgay Artam çifti tarafından Ankara’da kurulan Antik A.Ş., ülkemizde ilk defa profesyonel anlamda müzayedeciliği başlatarak, kataloglu ve bayraklı profesyonel sisteme dönüştürdü. Şirket olarak zaman içinde yaşanan tecrübeler ile oluşturulan müzayede özel şartları, daha sonra yapılan müzayedelerin temelini oluşturdu. 1986 yılından itibaren İstanbul’da müzayedeler düzenleyen Antik A.Ş., müzayedeciliği kurumsal bir boyuta taşıyarak, popüler ve sosyal hayatın ayrılmaz bir parçası haline getirdi. 90’lı yılların başında kaliteli müzayede katalogları, tanıtım kokteylleri ve saray salonlarında düzenlenen ihtişamlı müzayedelerle alanında rakipsiz bir liderlik kazandı.
-
Antik A.S. established in 1981 by Nurcan & Turgay Artam couple in Ankara. Antik A.S. is the very first professional auction house in terms of preparing auction catalogues and flagging system. Antik A.S. is holding auctions in İstanbul since 1986. Antik Inc. releases two magazines: AntikDekor and Artam Global Art. Antik Dekor is a distinguished bimonthly magazine covering articles on antiques, art and decoration since 1988. The magazine is a publication of Antik A.Ş., Turkey’s most popular Auction House which holds 80% of the total performance of the antiques trade in Turkey. Antik Dekor is a prestigious magazine with a high profile readership. It is our aim to provide our readers the latest trends, give them new ideas and introduce creative designers from all over the world.

Name: SMAC Gallery
Description:
SMAC Gallery is a leading South African contemporary art gallery representing established and emerging artists from South Africa, Africa, and further afield. SMAC was established in Cape Town in 2011, with spaces in Johannesburg and Stellenbosch.

With a programme focused on presenting the work of contemporary African artists, SMAC Gallery was established in Cape Town in 2011, with spaces in Johannesburg and Stellenbosch.

The gallery manages a dynamic programme of exhibitions and curatorial projects that focus on contemporary artistic discourses, while facilitating collaborative projects with local and international institutions and artists. In addition, SMAC maintains an active publishing initiative.

SMAC Gallery’s art fair participation includes Art Basel Miami Beach, The Armory Show, Art Brussels, Artissima.

Name: Florence Design Academy
Description: International Interior, Industrial and Graphic Design school

Name: RiNo Art District
Description:
Located just north of downtown Denver, RiNo (River North) Art District is a nonprofit membership organization that celebrates creativity, culture, and community.

The district includes the historic neighborhoods of Globeville, Elyria-Swansea, Five Points, and Cole, each with a rich cultural legacy that continues to shape RiNo’s identity today.

Known for its vibrant mix of art, industry, and innovation, RiNo supports local artists, small businesses, and residents through advocacy, infrastructure investment, and cultural programming. Our work spans public art, affordable creative space, community partnerships, and education for all ages.

Through the RiNo BID, GID, and nonprofit arm Keep RiNo Wild, we’re advancing a vision for equitable, artist-driven development that reflects the unique spirit of this evolving district.

Name: Fabienne Colas Foundation
Description:
The Fabienne Colas Foundation is a non-profit organisation located in Quebec, which was created by Réal Barnabé, Fabienne Colas and Emile Castonguay.

The Fabienne Colas Foundation is a unique foundation which supports and promotes arts and culture through a variety of events and programs. Ever since its founding in 2006, the foundation has promoted arts in all their forms and has highlighted a diversity of artists from all over the world. The goal of this foundation is to stimulate young generation, as well as to reduce social inequalities and discrimination. 

Over the past few years, the foundation created several Festivals in Montreal, Toronto and Port-au-Prince :

-The Montreal International Black Film Festival
-The Toronto Black Film Festival
- Haiti en Folie Festival
- The Quebec film festival in Haiti

Through its philanthropic actions the Foundation is willing to build bridges through the arts.

The foundation is actively looking for interns, volunteers, and employees. All year around, we invite you to send us your résumé and cover letter. We will be pleased to welcome you in our team. For more information visit the website of the foundation and check out our social medias.

Name: Black History Arts
Description:
L’idée de l’entreprise Black History Arts est née du projet déjà initié par Frank Noël Makosso à travers l’association Slam Master : le Festival Black History Arts. Fort de son succès et de ses cinq éditions réalisées, cette initiative a mis en lumière les besoins concrets du secteur culturel et artistique gabonais, notamment en matière de professionnalisation, d’accompagnement des artistes, de production événementielle et de mise à disposition de matériel adapté, entre autres.

C’est pour répondre à ces enjeux structurels que l’entreprise Black History Arts a vu le jour, avec l’ambition de proposer des solutions durables, accessibles et ancrées dans la réalité du terrain.

Ainsi, Black History Arts est une entreprise culturelle qui conçoit, produit et valorise des projets artistiques et éducatifs mettant en particulier en lumière les cultures africaines, et celle du monde en général. Elle œuvre à la promotion de la créativité, à la transmission des identités culturelles, et au développement des industries culturelles et créatives (ICC) en Afrique, notamment au Gabon.

Objectifs :
1- Créer des expériences culturelles novatrices et authentiques qui transcendent les frontières, en mettant en lumière la richesse diversifiée de la culture gabonaise
2- Stimuler la créativité pour tisser des liens authentiques et approfondir les connexions entre les communautés
3- Etre un acteur de la professionnalisation des métiers culturels et artistiques
4- Stimuler les économies culturelles et créatives locales


Services proposés :
Booking et management d’artistes
Création de contenu et média
Prestation technique
Atelier et formation
Evénementiel et production culturelle

Philosophy
Nayzak Animation School educational philosophy draws on both the creative and the factual concepts of animation to prepare students for the unlimited possibilities of art.
 
 
Curriculum
Our carefully-designed curriculum spans a wide variety of topics including drawing and animating in 2D and 3D, concepts of character design, animation, lighting, drawing for comics, etc.
 
 
Staff
Our instructors are experienced professional artists, animators and film-makers who are passing on the knowledge they gained from years of experience and study in the field.
See all our instructors here
 
 
Vision
Our Vision is to create a community of professional artists and animators able lift the Egyptian animation industry standards to no less than world-class levels!

Name: DognyAuction
Description:
Dognyauction.ch is a Swiss Auction House set in the heart of Lausanne. 
Active since 1975, DA provides expertise and advice to Swiss and international clients. Each year, thousands of items are offered in regular sales, specialty, and fine art auctions. Responding to the ever evolving needs of its clients, DA also provides flexible and consultative services in all aspects of the art collection.

Name: Coinllectibles
Description: Coinllectibles is a modern technology company in the collectibles industry focusing on rare memorabilia, numismatic areas, sports, limited edition toys, limited edition fashion wear and sneakers, watches and artworks that exist and have intrinsic value in the real world, whether tangible or intangible in nature. Coinllectibles applies blockchain, metaverse and NFT technologies as tools to support strategies that disrupt and enhance the real world collectibles industry. NFT is merely the acronym for "non fungible token" and is not, in our view, an end product in itself. We use an NFT solely as a tool to act as a digital ownership title (DOT) to a tangible or intangible collectible. Coinllectibles does not intend to sell or trade or operate a market place for virtual assets as a business.

Name: Perspectives Studio
Description:
Perspectives est une maison d'édition et galerie d'Art indépendante. La sélection d’artistes internationaux, les modèles d'édition et la démarche Respons’Art en font un concept unique en Europe.

Vente en ligne, showrooms, distribution & partenariats, leasing en entreprise, location d’expositions…

Nous proposons des oeuvres d’artistes contemporains qui contribuent à faire rayonner l’Art et la photographie dans nos maisons, entreprises et institutions.

=> Pour les particuliers : Découvrez notre galerie en ligne sur www.perspectives-studio.com
=> Pour les architectes d'intérieur et designers : www.perspectives-studio.com/vous-etes-un-professionnel
=> Pour les entreprises et institutions : www.perspectives-studio.pro

Description: Le Prix Dauphine pour l'Art Contemporain est une initiative étudiante créée en 2014 afin de promouvoir le travail créatif des étudiant·e·s en école d’art et des artistes de moins de trente ans.

Name: Kortmann Art Packers & Shippers B.V.
Description: Kortmann Art Packers & Shippers B.V. is an art logistics company located in Hoofddorp specialised in the transportation, packing, crating and customs clearance of art. Kortmann APS is a memeber of ARTIM, the worldwide network of art transporters and of the  hasenkamp Group.

Name: CRA Conservación y Restauración de Arte
Description:
C.R.A es una empresa formada por profesionales altamente cualificados y con una larga experiencia en conservación y restauración de bienes culturales. Desde 1991 ha colaborado estrechamente en importantes proyectos con el Instituto Andaluz del Patrimonio Histórico, como el del estudio y conservación de la colección de pintura flamenca de la Capilla Real de Granada o la restauración del retablo mayor de la misma. Paralelamente ha realizado numerosas intervenciones de gran relevancia para el Arzobispado de Granada, así como para diferentes administraciones públicas, instituciones, museos y colecciones privadas. La metodología de trabajo en C.R.A. se centra en una sistemática investigación histórico-artística, científica y tecnológica a través del conocimiento previo tanto de la técnica de ejecución como de los fenómenos y causas de deterioro de cada obra en particular. Todas las intervenciones que se llevan a cabo en los talleres de C.R.A. se realizan con un riguroso control de calidad en todos los procesos respetando los criterios de intervención aprobados internacionalmente. 
El objetivo de las intervenciones de conservación-restauración no es transformar el bien cultural en un objeto nuevo, sino garantizar, siempre desde el máximo respeto a la obra y conservando la huella del paso del tiempo, su conservación para futuras generaciones.

Name: BBB centre d'art
Description: À la fois centre d'art contemporain et plateforme ressource en arts plastiques depuis bientôt 30 ans à Toulouse, le BBB centre d'art développe un programme artistique contemporain et des actions culturelles ouvertes à tou·tes tout en proposant des services spécifiques aux artistes professionnels des arts visuels.

Name: American Women Artists
Description: American Women Artists is dedicated to the inspiration, celebration, and encouragement of women in the visual Fine Arts.

Name: Paliwal Arts
Description:
Paliwal Arts is a complete ART & Design solution serving to its clients and die heart art lovers since 2008.
a highly motivated team of experienced artist which work with full zeal & zest to brings emotions of our clients into a piece of art.

Name: LouiseM
Description:
LouiseM est un atelier français qui réalise des créations artistiques personnalisées pour les entreprises, les boutiques et les particuliers. Les décors sont créés à partir de dessins et de peintures réalisés par l’artiste. Son essence réside dans sa diversité et sa créativité. 

Souhaitant allier sa passion pour la peinture et son expérience professionnelle, LouiseM a dans un premier temps proposé aux sociétés désireuses de motiver et fédérer leurs collaborateurs d’animer en teambuilding des ateliers de co-création artistique. 

Plus récemment, elle a évolué vers un nouvel univers, celui de la décoration d’intérieur de maisons et de boutiques : des crédences de cuisine aux panneaux décoratifs de concepts stores en passant par les coussins, elle peint et crée des décors entièrement sur mesure. 

Forte de cette nouvelle expérience, elle propose ainsi désormais aux entreprises de personnaliser leurs espaces en accord avec leur identité visuelle. Halls d’accueil, cafétérias, espaces de coworking… autant de lieux qui prennent vie grâce à des créations uniques et fortes de sens et dans lesquels les collaborateurs se sentent bien! 
Et au-delà de l'aménagement d'espaces, nombreux sont les moments dans la vie d'une entreprise qui méritent une attention particulière : un anniversaire d'entreprise, une acquisition, un déménagement,  l'inauguration de nouveaux bâtiments, les cartes de voeux... 

Que ce soit dans la sphère privée ou professionnelle, les créations LouiseM racontent une histoire, donnent du sens et créent du lien.

Name: McColl Center
Description: Artist residency + hub for creativity.

Name: Zeit Contemporary Art
Description:
Founded in 2016, Zeit Contemporary Art specializes in modern, post-war and contemporary art with a focus on Europe and the Americas. Our mission is deeply committed to the understanding of art as a complex cultural object that defines the time and space where it is created.

ZCA organizes four carefully curated exhibitions a year both on contemporary artists and historically focused projects. Some previous exhibitions and online viewing rooms include critically acclaimed projects such as 'Minimal Means: Concrete Inventions in the US, Brazil and Spain' (2019), 'Andy Warhol: The Last Decade' (2020), 'Painting Abstraction: 197X – Today' (2021), and 'Lilt, Joy and Clarity: The Prints of Ellsworth Kelly' (2022).

We also actively participate in prominent international art fairs, represent pioneering artists, and offer private sales of museum-quality works with rigorous discretion. We are passionate about helping collectors—whether established or new—navigate the art world and discover artworks by both established and emerging artists.

Name: Karlos Academy
Description: we in Karlos Academy provide comprehensive training across multiple disciplines, including realistic drawing, sculpture, oil painting, watercolor, pastel, ink, and ceramics ،Founded by artist and educator Karlos Kayyal, the academy offers workshops, online courses, and in-person programs, supported by a vibrant community platform where students connect, share, and grow together. Our mission is to empower individuals to master their craft, discover their creative identity, and be part of a global movement that celebrates art and culturethan , WE HAVE 8,000 students all over the world,

Name: IXIART GALLERY
Description:
IXIart Gallery est un concept autour du Nouvel Art.

Actuellement, pousser la porte d'une galerie n'est pas un acte simple...Son fondateur Jérôme GARCIA veut révolutionner ce concept en rendant l’art accessible à tous, quelle que soit sa classe sociale, son éducation, sa sensibilité. 

IXIart Gallery propose une sélection d'artistes Pop Art et Street Art, mais pas seulement,elle fonctionne au coup de cœur, à l'émotion, avec un large panel d’artistes rencontrés personnellement.

De cette expérience sans cesse renouvelée, elle vous offre le travail de ces créateurs passionnés et passionnants, de styles variés et colorés pour tous les budgets. Elle se veut festive et créative autour d’une multitude d’évènements.

Name: Bauman Rare Books
Description: Bauman Rare Books offers an extraordinary selection of rare, antiquarian, first editions, signed and inscribed books ranging from the 15th through the 20th centuries. We have helped to build some of the finest rare book collections as well as providing expert gift services. Visit our galleries in New York, Las Vegas or Philadelphia

Name: Piguet Hôtel des Ventes | Genève
Description:
Piguet Auction House has been founded and established in Geneva in 1978. Since its takeover in 2006 by Bernard Piguet, a specialist in the art market for over 20 years, the auction house has become a fixture on the Swiss market and foreign markets as well. Bernard Piguet transformed the traditional auction house into a decidedly modern business using the latest management methods and professionalizing the services offered to buyers and sellers.

Today, Piguet Auction House sells nearly 15,000 works of art and objets valued at 300 to one million Swiss francs annually. Its strategic location in the heart of Geneva, the international city of the art market and finance, its tight organization, and the quality of its sales have catapulted our auction house to the forefront of the international scene in numerous specializations. It attracts buyers from all over the world and guarantees maximum results to its sellers.

With its solid team of over 25 professionals, Piguet Auction House offers you the experience and dynamism of its specialists and outside consultants. All of our specialists work discretely and thoroughly in their specific area of specialization. They will listen to your needs, answer your questions, and advise you on the sale of your items in order to provide you with personalized, top-quality service. 

Piguet Auction House has developed several other services for its clients. In particular, the Inventory Department which assesses and appraises your items at no obligation to sell. We can provide illustrated lists with prices for insurance reassessments, an inheritance or if you are relocating. For inheritances, our auction house supports heirs with sound advice and very rapid, complete solutions adapted to your situation in order to make all the necessary procedures easier.

Name: Amis des Beaux-Arts de Paris
Description: Les Amis des Beaux-Arts de Paris contribuent depuis 2007 au rayonnement de l’une des plus anciennes institutions parisiennes : les Beaux-Arts de Paris. Fondée et présidée par agnès b., l’association soutient la jeune création représentée par ses étudiants et anciens élèves au travers de prix, de bourses et d’aides diverses. Elle s’engage également à mieux faire connaître le patrimoine architectural et les richesses des collections de l’Ecole (environ 500 000 œuvres).

Name: Baletowa Częstochowa

Name: Public Arts Trust of India
Description:
The Public Arts Trust of India works to democratise arts and culture for all. 

In India, where philanthropy, patronage and state support for the arts is limited, Sana Rezwan founded PATI in 2022 to recentre the country’s current market-led scene and create a more balanced arts ecology.  

Based in the Indian state of Rajasthan (between Jaipur and Jodhpur), PATI’s initiatives foster a more holistic growth of arts and culture through artist residencies, commissioning, curating, education and professional development programmes and community exchange, reinforcing creativity as an important part of everyday life regardless of a person’s association or generation. 

This work is achieved through innovative collaborations with like-minded local and global luxury brands, non-profit institutions, galleries and individuals who share PATI’s ambitions. To date, this has included the department of Tourism, Archaeological Survey of India, Jawahar Kala Kendra, Jaipur Rugs, Frozen Music, Institut Français, Prameya Art Foundation and more. 

All PATI’s programmes provide free access to the arts, including the Jaipur and Jodhpur Art Weeks which maintain a multi-layered approach to give the same gravatas to the work of non-artists and emerging contemporary artists as it does to those of an international standing. 

Currently operating on a peripatetic structure, PATI will ground its work by establishing two new art centres in Jaipur and Jodhpur in 2024. These spaces will create a positive impact through art connecting local, national and international visitors with each city’s unique cultural context to create a deeper impact on the lives of those it works with.
