Filmmaking course

Name: Malarstwo Spokoju - Krzysiek Grabara
Description:
Artist statement: Spokój to dla mnie stan bezcenny, posiada dla mnie nieopisaną wartość. Przez ponad trzydzieści lat mojego trzydziestosześcioletniego życia, żyłem w ciągłym stresie i napięciu doświadczając różnych dewastujących zjawisk, takich jak przemoc psychiczna, przemoc fizyczna, uprzedmiotowienie i innych. Malarstwo jak i procesy z tym związane dają mi spokój, coś czego nie miałem potrzeby szukać przez lata odnalazłem przy sztaludze. Efekt aktu tworzenia daje mi też wgląd w moje emocje, potrafię je czytać, nazwać i poznawać lepiej siebie. Daje też możliwość opowiadania, zwrócenia uwagi na interesujące mnie zjawiska lub po prostu wykrzyczenia się. Mogę porozmawiać z sobą samym. Malowanie daje mi wolność, wyzwala z ograniczeń czego każdemu życzę.

Bio: Krzysiek Grabara urodził się w 1985r. w Kościanie. Zajmuje się malarstwem artystycznym w różnych technikach, a także fotografią uliczną, prowadzi też warsztaty i konsultacje z zakresu fotografii. W 2018 roku w związku z poniżaniem i dehumanizacją zrezygnował z pracy w policji by zająć się tworzeniem. Po roku zajmowania się malarstwem został wyróżniony przez Polish Masters of Art w kategorii #youngmasters za obraz namalowany techniką akrylu, a także w roku kolejnym dwukrotnie za prace wykonane techniką pasteli olejnej. W 2020 roku wziął udział w Targach Sztuki Dostępnej. Swoje prace sprzedaje też na aukcjach w Desa Unicum ( Surrealizm i realizm Magiczny) oraz aukcjach sztuki Współczesnej. Zajmuje się też fotografią, ale aktualnie większość czasu poświęca na auto ekspresję za pomocą malarstwa i rysunku.

Jego prace stają się obiektem tezauryzacji i znajdują się w kolekcjach prywatnych w Polsce, Austrii, Finlandii, Wielkiej Brytanii, Irlandii, Włoszech i Francji oraz Chinach, a ich ilość jakie znalazły swój kawałek ściany w tak krótkim okresie to ponad dwieście i liczba ta stale rośnie.

Name: Aminone Studio
Description: Aminone Studio is a creative and design studio which focuses on the use of digital solutions and technologies to create unique experiential art installations.

Name: Art Intelligence Global
Description: Founded by art market forces Amy Cappellazzo and Yuki Terase, Art Intelligence Global is a dual-headquartered New York and Hong Kong based advisory service that offers an unrivaled breadth of expertise and a holistic understanding of every corner of the art market. With a combined 50 years of art market and financial expertise, Art Intelligence Global is uniquely situated to offer in-house bespoke services that meet the needs of all facets of the art world. We offer a holistic, 360-degree approach: from market intelligence, transactional and appraisal services, marketing savvy and world-class research and advisory expertise to strategic planning and tax guidance, art-related financial services and project execution.

Name: Limelight
Description:
Limelight is a digital media company offering turnkey solutions for light art installations at any scale, all around the world.

Accessible, inclusive, original; three of the guiding principles to Limelight’s work. Limelight’s roots are in creating large public artworks, free and accessible to all. Even though the work has expanded to new mediums and platforms over the years, Limelight still prioritizes projects in partnership with light festivals and municipalities that are available for everyone to enjoy in public spaces.

Inclusitivty requires representation. Through the Masterclass, Limelight is helping train the next generation of artists so that more voices can be heard through this artist's medium. In addition to a diverse International group, we strive to have more gender diversity in each class. Celebrating individuality encourages originality. We aren’t happy just pioneering the mapping industry; we want to constantly reinvent it.

Name: Mijn naam is haas
Description:
Mijn naam is haas houdt haar oren gespitst, de blik open en spoort vanuit radicale verbeelding aan om de werkelijkheid te ervaren zoals deze ook kan zijn. Zodat onbetwiste, ondenkbare, onzegbare werelden ontdekt en bevraagd kunnen worden.

Een poëtische beeldtaal weeft zich als een rode draad door het werk. Grillig in haar vorm, precies als het leven zelf.

Name: Nma Art Gallery
Description:
As an independent online art gallery, Nma Art Gallery offers a curated collection of original artworks, affordable art prints, and unique customized products. Our mission is to inspire through art, promote positive social change, and make art accessible to everyone.

What we offer:

Original Artworks: Experience the beauty and creativity of our artist's original pieces.
Affordable Art Prints: Bring the magic of art into your home with high-quality prints.
Customized Products: Personalize your space with unique items featuring our art.

Our Commitment:

Inspiring Art: Create and curate art that evokes emotion and transforms spaces.
Social Impact: Use art as a force for positive change in society.
Accessibility: Make art accessible and affordable through our products.
Brand Leadership: Become a leading brand for customized products.

Join us on our journey to inspire through art and empower lives.

Name: Manzi Personal Property Appraisers & Restoration
Description:
Manzi Appraisers & Restoration is a one-of-a-kind business in the art appraisal and restoration industry.  Since its launch in 2021,  the company has quickly expanded to offer a full range of services, including high-end appraisals and restoration services primarily in Boston and New England.  A leading innovator, through its online valuation program, Manzi reaches its clients across the United States and globally, including the United Kingdom, Brazil, Canada, Israel, France, and New Zealand.
 
With over 100 years of combined experience among its staff, Manzi sets itself apart by offering a full range of restoration services including woodwork, painting and artwork restoration, framing, upholstery, and decorative object/collectible restoration. We also offer art handling, transportation, and storage services through our Manzi Premier Interiors division, with expanded services to include window treatments, wallpaper, rugs, carpeting, painting, and cabinet installation.  Manzi has established a reputation for providing unparalleled customer service and recognized expertise. Our ability to serve a diverse customer base with their extensive range of services has made us a go-to source for collectors, art dealers, museums, and private individuals who value quality and expertise.

Manzi Personal Property Appraisers & Restoration, LLC is a fully insured, veteran-owned small business.

Name: KG Talents Management
Description: Creative Talents Agency based in Paris // Photography, Illustration, Event & Motion Solutions

Name: Ecole Pivaut Nantes-Rennes-Montréal
Description:
Fondée à Nantes en 1985, l’École Pivaut est une école Supérieure Technique Privée spécialisée  en Arts appliqués et Dessin narratif. 
Son implantation géographique attire des étudiants de la France entière, et elle se place en région au rang des établissements d'enseignements supérieurs indépendants, en arts appliqués et en dessin narratif, les plus importants en termes d'effectif.
Elle compte actuellement plus de 750 étudiants répartis en 6 filières de formations professionnelles, encadrés par une équipe pédagogique de 80 enseignants et intervenants professionnels de renom. 
Nos formations :

ARTS APPLIQUES :
- Motion Design Graphique
- Illustration 
- Décoration peinte

DESSIN NARRATIF :
- Bande Dessinée 
- Cinéma d'Animation 2D
- Concept art

L' École Pivaut propose également aux futurs étudiants d'intégrer une année préparatoire de mise à niveau, facultative, soit en arts appliqués soit en dessin narratif, à Nantes ou Rennes.

Enfin, depuis septembre 2017, l'École Pivaut a ouvert un second établissement à Montréal : la Campus Pivaut. Spécialisé dans le Cinéma d'animation 2D et le Concept art, le Campus Pivaut propose des formations accessibles dans le but de préparer les professionnels de demain.

Name: Art Leasing & Invest AG
Description:
ART LEASING & INVEST AG – DAMIT IHR KUNSTINVESTMENT ZUM ERFOLGSERLEBNIS WIRD.

Im Zentrum der Geschäftstätigkeiten der Art Leasing & Invest AG stehen professionelle Dienstleistungen im Zusammenhang mit hochwertiger Kunst. Seit 2006 bietet unser Unternehmen vom individuellen Kunstkonzept bis hin zur Möglichkeit des Kunstleasings (nicht Miete!) eine breite Palette von modularen Dienstleistungen für institutionelle Kunden und vermögende Privatkunden an. Unsere erfahrenen Spezialisten und Partner gewährleisten eine umfassende und kompetente Betreuung in den Bereichen 
- Art Analysis & Reporting,
- Art Management & Inventory,
- Art Leasing & Finance,
- Art Tax & Legal.

Art Leasing & Invest AG sorgt dafür, dass Ihr Kunstinvestment zum Erfolgserlebnis wird!

Name: SIANA,  vers de nouveaux imaginaires
Description:
SIANA est un laboratoire artistique et centre de ressources des cultures numériques et hybrides dans le sud francilien.

SIANA agit sur le territoire en proposant un accompagnement artistique et éducatif aux publics du sud francilien. Laboratoire artistique, il accueille des artistes en résidence et ose l’expérimentation transdisciplinaire avec des laboratoires de recherche, des universités.

Centre de ressources, SIANA est au plus près de tous les publics, scolaires, étudiant.es, habitant.es.

Une biennale SIANA se déploie sur le territoire les années impaires afin de permettre à tou.tes d’appréhender de manière ludique et surprenante les arts numériques et hybrides.

Name: Baldwin
Description: London-based specialists in classic Modern, Post War and Contemporary works of art.

Name: Art of the World Gallery
Description:
With more than 20 years of experience in the field, Art of the World Gallery is the leading modern and contemporary art gallery in Houston, Texas, representing some of the most influential living artists and masters of the 20th and 21st Centuries from around the globe.

Art of the World Gallery is known for developing dedicated relationships with renowned artists, acquiring the majority of inventory directly from them or their estates. Featuring a rich modern, post-war and contemporary art collection comprised of works by masters including Marc Chagall, Pablo Picasso, Robert Indiana, Wifredo Lam, Rufino Tamayo, Fernando Botero, Oswaldo Guayasamín, Oswaldo Vigas, as well as, acclaimed and cutting- edge artists like, Cristóbal Toral, Carole A. Feuerman, Manolo Valdés, Julio Larraz, Sophia Vari, Javier Marín, Chun Kwang Young, Lita Cabellut, and Mr. Brainwash, amongst others.

Alongside the blue-chip and primary market focus, the gallery is a full-service art advisory firm, collaborating directly with museums, auction houses, art collectors, architects, interior designers, and other corporations to develop customized visual solutions for residential, corporate, commercial, and public spaces. The gallery believes in always creating positive impacts through art for any space or community.

Based on integrity and transparency the gallery mission is to provide visitors and collectors with quality artworks and detailed information when building a world-class collection, touring an exhibition, or making a financial investment. Our goal is to facilitate the art acquisition process and to offer a personalized, enriching, and accessible experience for everyone.

Name: Art Elixir
Description: Art Elixir is an art academy based in Ahmedabad, offering courses designed in-house in painting, drawing, sketching and creative as well as utility crafts for kids and adults alike.

Name: metgal Art + Advisory
Description: We exist to make your life easier. It’s as simple as that. Through tasteful curation, we provide expert art advisory, seamless project management, and innovative designs. We harmonize the creative and the analytical so you can focus on the big picture. We’re a full-service, non-fee-based art consulting firm. No matter the budget, we help clients realize their visions and stories through art.

Name: Galerie AB
Description:
G A L E R I E A B 
Fine Art

• 5, rue Jacques Callot - 75006 Paris 

Fondée en 1989 par Agnès Aittouares, la Galerie AB est située au cœur de Saint-Germain-des-Prés, au 5 rue Jacques Callot à Paris. Elle propose une sélection unique d’œuvres d’art, couvrant une période allant de 1890 à nos jours.

Experte auprès de la FNEPSA (Fédération Nationale d’Experts Professionnels Spécialisés en Art), Agnès Aittouares a créé en 2020 un cabinet d’expertise dédié à l’art moderne et contemporain, renforçant ainsi la légitimité et l’influence de la galerie sur le marché de l’art.

Lieu incontournable pour les amateurs et professionnels, la Galerie AB réunit experts, conservateurs de musées, collectionneurs et marchands d’art du monde entier. Son engagement et son exigence en font une référence en matière d’art moderne.

Active sur la scène internationale, la galerie participe à des foires majeures telles que Fine Arts La Biennale (Paris), le Salon du Dessin (Paris), Art Paris Art Fair (Paris) et la BRAFA Art Fair (Bruxelles). Elle organise également des expositions monographiques accompagnées de publications, notamment Bonnard Vuillard. Une amitié (2022), Pablo Picasso. La force du trait (2023) et Joan Miró. Œuvres sur papier (2024). À cela s’ajoutent des expositions collectives explorant des thématiques transversales, comme De Picasso à Matta. Une influence hispanique à Paris (2022) et Dessins de 1880 à nos jours (2025).

La Galerie AB collabore étroitement avec de prestigieux musées, parmi lesquels le Musée d’Art Moderne de Paris, le Musée de Montmartre, l’Hôtel de Caumont à Aix-en-Provence et le Musée Bonnard au Cannet.

Visitez notre site internet :
https://www.galerie-ab.com/
galerieab@gmail.com

Name: Cadogan Gallery
Description: Cadogan Gallery is an independent art gallery based in South Kensington, London. Founded in 1980, the gallery has worked closely with generations of collectors and established and critically acclaimed artists for forty years.

Name: Chaire Organisations & Territoires des Arts, de la Culture et de la Création
Description:
“Co-construire un écosystème inclusif des acteur-rice-s de la filière d’activités artistiques, culturelles et créatives pour favoriser les transitions sociétales”

La Chaire OTACC est un laboratoire pour penser, expérimenter et diffuser des dispositifs inclusifs de management de projets artistiques, culturels et créatifs.

Elle est née du constat que les projets artistiques, culturels et créatifs sont une réponse à de nombreux enjeux sociétaux actuels (transition environnementale, transition digitale, luttes contre les discriminations…).

Ces projets permettent d'expérimenter des dispositifs de gouvernance démocratique. Ils s’intègrent dans des stratégies de co-construction permettant l’émergence d’espaces, de pratiques et d’outils d’inclusion. Ils génèrent des dynamiques d’innovation intégrant tous les acteurs et tous les secteurs d’activités.

La Chaire OTACC a pour objectif de soutenir l’entrepreneuriat culturel et créatif, social et solidaire. Elle accompagne l’éclosion et le développement de projets par le biais de recherches participatives : nous partons de vos problématiques pour chercher ensemble (académiques, professionnel-le-s et étudiant-e-s) des solutions.

Name: Art Galleries
Description:
An art museum or art gallery is a building or space for the display of art, usually from the museum's own collection. It might be in public or private ownership and may be accessible to all or have restrictions in place. Although primarily concerned with visual art, art galleries are often used as a venue for other cultural exchanges and artistic activities, such as performance arts, music concerts, or poetry readings. Art museums also frequently host themed temporary exhibitions which often include items on loan from other collections.

In distinction to a commercial art gallery, run by an art dealer, the primary purpose of an art museum is not the sale of the items on show.

Name: Wilo & Grove
Description:
Wilo & Grove est une galerie d’art contemporain nouvelle génération proposant des œuvres uniques ou en édition en limitée entre 50 et 5000 €.  Installée au cœur du Sentier avec 180m2 d’exposition, elle offre une sélection variée – tableaux, œuvres sur papier, gravures, sculptures, céramiques, photographies – de plus de 50 artistes, le tout aménagé comme dans un appartement. 

L’objectif : Révolutionner la galerie d’art ! Désacraliser l’univers (...parfois impitoyable) de l’art, faire émerger de nouveaux talents et ajouter à tous les intérieurs, une part d’unique, d’exclusif, à prix abordable.

Retrouvez-nous à l'Oasis de Wilo & Grove, 40 rue des Petits Carreaux (Paris 2e) du mardi au samedi de 11h30 à 19h30 et le lundi sur rendez-vous ainsi que sur notre site www.wilo-grove.com 

Instagram : @wiloandgrove 
Facebook: Wilo & Grove 
www.wilo-grove.com

Name: TRAS-Transversale des Réseaux Arts Sciences
Description:
:: L’approche arts-sciences-société, une clé pour appréhender le monde contemporain et changer les imaginaires collectifs ::

TRAS, Transversale des réseaux arts-sciences, est une association créée en 2017 comme un réseau national pour fédérer des structures engagées (dans la production, la diffusion et la valorisation) dans des projets arts-sciences. 

TRAS compte aujourd’hui une trentaine de membres, dont la diversité montre la richesse : collectifs artistiques, scènes de spectacle vivant, institutions culturelles, universitaires et de recherche. Leur point commun : la transdisciplinarité et le croisement des disciplines. 

Réseau national, ancrage territorial : 34 membres pour des collaborations hybrides sur tout le territoire, autour de l’écologique/du vivant, des questions technologiques et de la transmission (transmission des savoirs, médiation, pédagogie).

:: Une triple mission pour le réseau TRAS : plateforme-ressources, plaidoyer, valorisation-diffusion :: 

1. ESPACE-RESSOURCES : accompagnement des structures et veille thématique (mutualisation des pratiques, espace de réflexion, mises en relation, documents ressources...)

2. PLAIDOYER pour une meilleure connaissance et reconnaissance de la spécificité des projets arts-sciences-société afin de disposer de soutien ad hoc (argumentaires de sensibilisation et valorisation des actions des membres)

3. VALORISATION-DIFFUSION : information sur les productions et projets des membres, les appels à projets / appels à candidature de la communauté, la participation des publics

Name: Galerie Cécile Fakhoury
Description:
Galerie Cecile Fakhoury opened its doors in Abidjan, Ivory Coast in September 2012. In May 2018, the gallery inaugurated its second space in Dakar, Senegal and a showroom in Paris, France. Shortly after, in March 2020, a new project space dedicated to emerging artists from Africa opened in Abidjan. In October 2021, Galerie Cecile Fakhoury inaugurated its third gallery, opening in the 8th arrondissement of Paris on Avenue Matignon.
 
The gallery promotes contemporary art from Africa and the Diaspora by providing visibility to the artistic diversity and creative spirit from the continent. Through its programming of solo and group exhibitions, participation in international art fairs, biennales, and collaboration with international galleries, Cecile Fakhoury is a leading force putting contemporary African art on the global map. 
 
The artists represented by the gallery are distinguished by their cultural identities and stories, they create a new language that crosses geographical boundaries and familiarities. They are observers of the world they live in, critics of society, and committed to their positions living within complex histories. In turn, they ask us to reconsider our own relation to the world.

Name: Dans ma bulle, le podcast !
Description:
Dans ma bulle est un podcast de passionné.es de BD venus du site aVoir aLire ! Notre envie : parler de la BD sous toutes ses formes par le biais de nos interviews, de nos chroniques et de rubriques ! 
Le podcast est disponible sur toutes les plateformes.

Name: Kala Art Institute
Description:
Kala Art Institute's mission is to help artists sustain their creative efforts over time through its Artists-in-Residence and Fellowship Programs, and to increase appreciation of this work through exhibitions, public programming and educational efforts.

For 37 years, Kala Art Institute has provided professional working facilities to artists in printmaking, photography, digital media, and book arts. The Institute provides emerging and established artists with opportunities to develop and exhibit new artwork and serves as a meeting ground where artists from many parts of the world can work and
exchange ideas. By offering access to a wide array of traditional and state-of-the-art image-making equipment, the organization encourages artists to explore the untapped possibilities of combining old and new techniques. Kala’s artists possess backgrounds in many visual art disciplines, as well as performance, film and dance. Kala serves over 25,000 individuals yearly; our constituents range from 5 to 95 years old. 

Kala gives artists numerous professional opportunities including exhibitions, teaching, technical consulting, and art sales. With a major facility expansion completed in 2009, Kala is better able to serve artists and the general public. The 15,200 sq. ft. Kala facility houses a vast collection of printmaking and photographic equipment, an Electronic Media Center, gallery, photography studio, dark room, three artist project rooms, and extensive print
archive.

Name: Bocconi Business & Arts
Description:
Founded in 2016, Business & Arts is Bocconi’s first student association that acts as an incubator for innovation, creativity and collaboration, by bringing together international students with a shared passion for art & design. Over the past year, Business&Arts has become a central actor in championing the University’s creative sphere as well as cultivating a lifestyle of aesthetic appreciation, creative exploration and cultural engagement. Through our interaction with the student body of Bocconi, we aspire to create a community that not only understands the value of design-thinking in a corporate context, but also pushes students to see their pursuits in an alternative, creative light. 

Through our events, we aim to engage students in a productive dialogue and offer nuanced commentary on important matters. By bringing together people from different academic and career paths, we’re able to provide insight on the art industry’s inner workings and analyse its advantages, its mistakes and its potential for improvement through different perspectives. You can find an archive of our past events here . 

Through our articles, we strive to encompass the best of Art, Design, Cinema, Photography and Style as well as create Weekly reads, Features and Interviews with the aim of inspiring our readers and urging them to become design conscious, culturally informed and innovative.

Name: Acme
Description:
Acme provides permanent and long-term studio space for fine artists who are unable to afford to rent workspace on the open market. We currently support over 800 individual artists across 15 buildings in Greater London.

Acme’s artist support
Acme’s work is designed to have a transformational impact. Our affordable studio provision helps artists sustain their practices, while our additional support looks to help artists make career-changing breakthroughs at pivotal moments in their careers.

Working with a range of international and UK-based partners and donors, Acme supports professional development for artists at all stages of their careers through artist residencies, bursaries, mentoring and exhibition opportunities.

Name: L'Agence Colette
Description: s'inspirer du réel & inspirer le réel

Name: Galería Rita Castellote
Description: Galería de Arte

Name: kaufmann repetto
Description:
Established in 2000, kaufmann repetto is a gallery with venues in Milan and New York. 

Since its inception in 2000, the gallery has been dedicating its international program to the investigation of social and political themes within the field of artistic production, with a special focus on research of the feminine.  

Embracing a multitude of media and artistic approaches, the gallery has continuously promoted ambitious and site- specific installations and projects, fostering the dialogue between artists and the space that hosts them. After ten years in its historical location, the gallery expanded its spaces in 2010 in Milan’s central Brera district, adding also a courtyard for outdoor installations. In 2013, the gallery opened a second venue in Chelsea in New York, relocated in 2019 to 55 Walker Street, contributing to the flourishing of Tribeca’s vivid art community.  

kaufmann repetto is run in partnership between Francesca Kaufmann and Chiara Repetto.

Name: Street Art Cities
Description:
Huge, overwhelming paintings on buildings get our blood pumpin'! It’s a gust of fresh air in cities dominated by concrete, glass, and corporate ads. Some murals demand us to just stop and gaze... To let it all sink in. Recognize this feeling? Does that make you question what you have just witnessed?

You are not alone. And that’s why we succeeded in connecting passionate street art hunters all over the world to document art in every city. We want the world to know where to find these gems and the stories behind them.

We make this happen by building the most advanced, easy to use and comprehensive street art collection in every city on this magnificent planet.

We connect all stakeholders in the street art scene and help organisations, municipalities, festivals and others understand the real value of this art form.
Check our website to see what we can do for your city.

Name: Cristea Roberts Gallery
Description:
Cristea Roberts Gallery is a leading international contemporary art gallery with a particular focus on original prints and works on paper.  Since its inception, the gallery has commissioned a significant number of editions by a wide range of artists, whilst also representing others for their unique works. The underlying ethos of the gallery has always been artist-led. It was originally founded in 1995 as the Alan Cristea Gallery and changed its name in September 2019 to Cristea Roberts Gallery. Acknowledged as one of the leading galleries in its field of speciality, the gallery's programme is dedicated to publishing, cataloguing, exhibiting and dealing in original prints and drawings by its roster of over 30 important international artists and Estates.

It participates in all the major international art fairs and has a dynamic programme of exhibitions hosted in its bespoke space in Pall Mall, London. The gallery works closely with international museums on acquisitions and loans, and examples of its editions are held in major public collections around the world including Tate, London; Metropolitan Museum of Art, New York; and Museum of Modern Art, New York.

Name: Conservatoire de Lyon
Description:
Le Conservatoire de Lyon est né en 1872. Géré depuis 1993 par un syndicat mixte associant Ville et Métropole de Lyon il est classé Conservatoire à Rayonnement Régional. 

À ce titre, les trois principaux domaines du spectacle vivant y sont enseignés : musique, danse et théâtre, proposant chacune, diverses disciplines et esthétiques.

En 150 ans le Conservatoire de Lyon est devenu une véritable institution structurante de la vie culturelle lyonnaise. Un lieu de transmission, de création et de diffusion, mais également un terrain de jeu où se rencontrent l’école de la tradition et l’innovation pédagogique. 

Le Conservatoire dispose d’une équipe constituée de 268 personnes aux talents complémentaires. Nombre de métiers constituent l’ensemble des équipes administratives, techniques et pédagogiques pour penser, inventer et organiser les différents parcours et modules pédagogiques proposés aux 2 500 élèves et étudiants et aux 12 000 élèves des écoles primaires lyonnaises.

Name: Art by Rikke Darling - Paintings & Murals
Description:
Visual artist in Copenhagen Danmark.
Paintings I Murals I Architectural Art I Sculptures 

My art entails a confidence in the power of abstraction, the complex and the subtle, where something inarticulated in us is met with an inspiring energy. With my art, in a visual narrative, I wish to move the observer with my outlook on the nature in man – and the man in nature. It is a narrative of how man is nature and part of a complex universal pattern, where surroundings, on an energy level, merge with sensation, emotions and thoughts.

We are in the Science Art (SciArt) category, where I examine and express something about the world. I reduce a scientific or an aesthetic concept down to fewer or simpler elements with the purpose of closer examination. I use this reductionistic approach in my art in regards to both shape and colors, where I examine the individual components in order to reveal a more complex phenomenon. I seek to evoke a sensual and emotional realization in the observer.

In my art I use the flow of nature, where large amounts of water make shapes floating and alive. I use the laws of nature to create movement and cracks. Branches shoot forward like new beginnings and follow the universal pattern of fractal budding. Cells are the building blocks of nature and the foundation of life. Everything alive consists of cells. The human body is in constant change from the first cell formation, where stem cells are the foundation of our complex organism.
I view the world holistically with a focus on the whole. Humans and everything in the world are inextricably linked. I am fascinated by nature’s patterns and by micro and macrocosm relations. Patterns in nature occur in fractal geometry, where they are embedded in each other and recur in things large and small. The fractal patterns apply to both nature’s simple organisms and the more complex ones, and thus, they apply to us humans as well.

Name: Sworders Fine Art Auctioneers
Description:
Founded in 1782, Sworders have firmly established a reputation as one of the UK's leading regional auctioneers, selling fine and decorative arts, Asian art, wine, prints, jewellery and other precious objects in our specialist sales.

Based in our eco-friendly auction rooms just a short distance out of London, Sworders also hold bi-weekly Homes & Interiors Sales which offer a range of high quality, unique, modern and antique furnishings for the home and garden at affordable prices. 

Pre-sale viewings are held before every sale and are free for the public.

For more information please visit our website www.sworder.co.uk

Name: Anim'Finder
Description:
ANIM’FINDER vous met en relation avec les meilleurs artistes, conférenciers et prestataires d'animations pour votre événement !

Vous désirez profiter d’une performance live, d’une animation inédite pour marquer les esprits de vos convives ? Anim’finder est fait  pour vous !

Name: Label des CREATIFS
Description:
Le label des créatifs est né de la volonté d’un passionné de l’image et du design graphique voulant promouvoir celles-ci via un label indépendant, promulguant les arts graphiques, la photographie, le motion design, les métiers du Web etc. 

Un cadre qui formes des jeunes à l’éducation et à la discipline artistique sous forme de mentoring. 
Qui consiste à partager des aptitudes à des personnes moins expérimentées. 
(Accompagner, conseiller, soutenir, et à aider le mentoré a se développer puis s’imposer de façon professionnel).

Name: Black History Arts
Description:
Le Festival Black History Arts vise à donner une place à la valeur de l'art en établissant un lien historique pour la préservation de la culture noire.
C'est une initiative inédite pour la valorisation de notre patrimoine culturelle et artistique.

La Black History Arts est le fruit d'une collaboration bénévole de l'association Slam Master avec une pléthore d'artistes (écrivains, chanteurs, rappeurs, slameurs, peintres, dessinateurs, infographes, animateurs, stylistes ) noirs, particulièrement au Gabon. 

Mais surtout, au-delà de présenter le travail des artistes gabonais, le Festival se veut une voie d'apprentissage et de transmission à la jeunesse noire, particulièrement à la jeunesse gabonaise.

Name: Urban Signature
Description:
Urban Signature est une agence artistique et une galerie d'art accompagnant ses clients particuliers et professionnels sur les thématiques suivantes : 

- Organisation d’expositions temporaires
- Gestion d’évènements clients sur-mesure (festivals, fresques intérieures et extérieures, 1% artistique, ateliers d’initiation, animations, médiations, ventes aux enchères, etc...)
- Conseil en gestion de patrimoine artistique
- Acquisition / LOA d’œuvres d’art urbain pour les entreprises

Pour plus d'information : 
Site internet : www.urban-signature.com
Instagram : www.instagram.com/urban_signature/
Facebook : www.facebook.com/UrbanSignatureParis/

Name: Riggs Art Consultants
Description: Riggs Art Consultants is a full-service art consulting and strategic planning firm. We partner with companies, developers, and creatives to curate and deliver distinctive art programs, on time and on budget.

Name: ActionSpace
Description: ActionSpace is a visual arts organisation that supports learning disabled artists across London. We seek out and unlock talent, create opportunities and enable learning disabled artists to realise their potential.

Name: BE CULTURE
Description:
BE CULTURE, founded in 1999, is a communications agency specialized in the cultural and artistic sector.
The mission of BE CULTURE is to transmit, spread, and share culture in all its forms: exhibitions, concerts, festivals, musical or literary releases, cultural institutions and museums, new venues, heritage restoration, and more.

BE CULTURE has always been fortunate to work on projects that inspire and in which the agency truly believes. Every collaboration is unique and requires a tailor-made communication strategy. A personal approach is central to this, as the agency believes in the power of dialogue and human connection. Its sincere engagement within the sector continuously motivates BE CULTURE to innovate and to fulfill its mission of sharing and transmission in the best possible way.
To achieve this, BE CULTURE uses a wide range of tools: press relations, digital communication, content creation (photos, videos, and/or texts and articles), promotion, influencer marketing, event organization, training, and media coaching… A wide range of levers to give each project the best possible visibility among a broad and diverse audience.

BE CULTURE has five international partners: Paris, Berlin, London, Amsterdam, and Milan.

Name: Robilant+Voena
Description:
Robilant+Voena is a partnership of art dealers Edmondo di Robilant and Marco Voena. They launched Robilant+Voena in London in 2004. Further gallery spaces were opened in Milan in 2009, St Moritz in 2014, and Paris and New York in 2020. Robilant+Voena has distinguished itself as one of the leading international art dealers in Old Master paintings, as well as 20th-century Italian art. 

The gallery has sold paintings to many important private and royal collectors and museums including the Brooklyn Museum of Art, the Frick Collection, the Gallerie dell'Accademia Venice, the Louvre Abu Dhabi, the Metropolitan Museum of Art, the National Gallery London, the National Gallery of Stockholm, the Museum of Western Art Tokyo, and the Pinacoteca di Brera Milan.

Robilant+Voena is represented at the most prestigious fine art fairs in the world, and is committed to its active exhibitions program and the publication of books and scholarly catalogues.

Name: IDEA for u
Description:
Business Specialties: Custom e-Learning Programs, Mobile and Web Applications, Web Design, Video Productions, Interactive Multimedia Development, Internet Branding,	Custom Application, Content 
Management Tools, Interactive Product Catalogs, Marketing & Sales Promotions, Interactive Sales Tools, Kiosks, Website Management,  Promotions/Incentives

Artist Specialities: Watercolor, Acrylic, Markers, Pencil and Pastels

Name: Coro e Orquestra do Colégio Estadual Rui Barbosa
Description: Projeto educacional de inclusão sociocultural, através do coro e da orquestra do Colégio Estadual Rui Barbosa.

Name: Coordinación Nacional de Teatro / INBA
Description:
El Instituto Nacional de Bellas Artes creó la Coordinación Nacional de Teatro para atender de manera concentrada todos los aspectos relacionados específicamente con el hecho teatral; para escuchar las necesidades y propuestas de la comunidad artística y ofrecer a la sociedad una diversa y rica programación en los espacios escénicos que tiene a su cargo, como punto de partida y hacia los estados de la federación.

La Coordinación tiene la convicción de que el teatro es un bien social, un derecho de la población y un encuentro lúdico entre las personas que permite la reflexión; bajo esta premisa la figura del espectador se convierte en una parte vital para el hecho escénico y la confrontación de los procesos creativos. Todo esto nos lleva a consolidar, a través de la programación, una oferta teatral que cumpla satisfactoriamente con sus necesidades y expectativas.

Parte de las responsabilidades que tenemos como Coordinación es proponer líneas conceptuales para el quehacer artístico, generadas del conocimiento y seguimiento del desarrollo teatral en el país, que provoquen la experimentación y la consolidación de los distintos lenguajes emergentes y la conservación teatral mexicana.

Name: ART SPOT
Description:
ART SPOT is bringing back the personal touch to the art world by helping to initiate and guide the conversation between creators and connoisseurs.

For connoisseurs, Art Spot is a great place to discover new curated creators. For creators, Art Spot is a wonderful way to expose your art to a broader public outside the galleries.

Connoisseurs want to reach out to creators that speak to them and speak with them about a piece for them. We get together, have a lovely conversation with a glass and a goodie, inspiring the creative process for bespoke art pieces.

Name: Art Salvage & Art Conservation NL
Description:
Art Salvage & Art Conservation NL are specialized in conservation, research and restoration of modern and contemporary art, paintings, paper, sculptures, ceramics and archaeology. We provide specialized primary care to, among others, museums, galleries, art dealers, antique dealers and collectors, governments, art market professionals, heritage institutions, archives, libraries and private individuals.

We offer various services and products to prevent or minimize the possible risks inherent in the management of a collection. You can think of security systems for art or heritage objects, art transport and installation, preventive conservation that secures future preservation, asbestos, IPM, soot penetration and mold analyses, but also 24/7 emergency services (in the event of water, fire or storm damage), providing advice and drawing up collection emergency plans and risk analyses.
In addition, we provide tailor-made training courses on location and offer training courses that can be followed by the individual professional or, for example, by a team of museum employees.

Thanks to our many years of experience, we can also develop tailor-made projects that are suitable for every budget!

Feel free to contact us at info@artsalvage.nl
You can also follow us on social media:
Twitter: @artsalvage_nl
Instagram: @artsalvage_nl & @artconservation_nl

Name: Art Innovation srl
Description:
We offer a platform to companies, brands, artists and creatives, crossing geographic boundaries and offering a canvas that spans the globe. 

Art Innovation is a groundbreaking company that provides an unprecedented opportunity for digital companies and creatives to showcase their brands on the world's most technologically advanced mega Digital Billboards. Rather than confining creativity to the confines of four walls, Art Innovation leverages the power of cutting-edge technology and global exposure.

Name: ZK Leadership
Description: Zana is a strong leader, creator, and consultant with a knack for inspiring those she oversees with her positive and infectious attitude and speech. Now, she is determined to help more people and reach a larger group with her poetry and writings.

Name: Oasis Art + Play Studio
Description: Oasis Art + Play Studio is a unique creative space & art store which offers art + sensory play classes and workshops for kids and adults.

Name: ACRE. Asociación Profesional de Conservadores-Restauradores de España
Description: ACRE es una agrupación de profesionales con titulación oficial en conservación restauración que proporciona cobertura estratégica a sus asociados prestándoles asesoramiento. Su misión principal es la de regularizar la profesión para dignificarla, difundirla y exigir las competencias que por ley nos deben pertenecer para que a través de nuestro trabajo pueda llegar a facilitar del disfrute de la cultura y la adecuada conservación de los bienes culturales a las generaciones futuras

Name: Independent Art Fair
Description:
Independent is foremost an art fair designed by and for gallerists. With a founding mission to constantly innovate and expand how visual art can be presented in a temporary public space on a global scale, we are committed to
updating and challenging the art fair format with key stakeholders and talent across all cultures, forms and disciplines.

Through our tight curatorial focus that prioritizes conversation, collaboration, and shared conceptual arrangements, Independent incentivizes the creation of ambitious projects by encouraging artists and galleries to take risks. Independent is now viewed as the launching point for galleries to introduce challenging and visionary projects to the market.

Independent now has two annual editions in New York and Brussels. Independent is positioned to expand dynamically to include new cities and an integrated daily presence in the cultural landscape.

Name: Famous, Art Books & Collectibles
Description:
In our store and online, Famous sells art, books, multiples and collectibles made by world-class artists like Takashi Murakami, Nobuyoshi Araki, Jeff Koons, Maurizio Cattelan, and David LaChapelle. 

Famous is also an exclusive seller of “Andy Warhol x Flavor Paper” wallpaper. Granted access to much of Warhol’s work (with the exception of his wallpaper designs), Flavor Paper has utilized a wide berth of amazing imagery, ranging from rare to iconic paintings, silkscreen prints and film stills as inspiration for the collection.  This a very artistic and high quality wallpaper and we would be very happy to advise on the possibilities for your project.

We are located at Weteringschans 83, right next to the Rijksmuseum and in the heart of Amsterdam’s art district.

If if you have any questions we’re always ready to answer them. Visit us at the store, just send us a message at info@famous.nl or give us a call at +31 20 423 54 23.

Name: La Fenêtre
Description:
La Fenêtre est un centre d’art associatif fondé en 2010 qui, sous diverses formes (expositions, ateliers, rencontres, coproductions, résidences, éditions…), promeut et entend porter à la connaissance du plus grand nombre des champs de la création inscrits dans le quotidien. Elle défend une approche transversale, un continuum entre art, design, image, architecture, ville, urbanité et citoyenneté.

La Fenêtre parle d’espace public, de communs, d’écologie et de transition urbaine, de sémiologie, d’expertise et de responsabilité au regard de la création et de la diffusion de messages et d’images…
Elle se range volontiers sous les bannières des arts appliqués et des droits culturels, mais se garde de hiérarchiser les pratiques.

La Fenêtre, notamment, coproduit depuis 2022 GraphiMs, un festival dédié au design graphique, avec le Réseau de lecture publique de la métropole de Montpellier et déploie en milieu scolaire un programme de sensibilisation à la « Fabrique de la ville ».

Name: Artistics Online Art Gallery
Description:
Founded in 2013, Artistics is a Paris-based online art gallery with a focus on emerging and mid-career European contemporary artists working in painting, sculpture, photography and drawing. Since its inception Artistics prides itself on an innovative approach facilitating the art experience and the contact with the artists: videos of the different artist’s workshops, High Definition visualisation of the artwork and in 360° (for sculptures), visits to the artists workshops on demand, premium customer service.

Browse our gallery, place your order with just a few clicks and have the artwork delivered to your doorstep anywhere in the world.

Buy art with confidence, join a new generation of art collectors.

Name: Dumonteil gallery
Description:
DUMONTEIL is an International Contemporary Art Gallery with locations in Paris I Shanghai focusing on Contemporary Art and limited edition Contemporary Design.

Its activity is based around two distinct entities, DUMONTEIL Contemporary and DUMONTEIL Design, which share two exhibition spaces. One is in Paris, 38 rue de l'Université, 75007, and one in Shanghai, at 199 Hengshan Road. 

The gallery organises over ten solo exhibitions a year. The gallery's aim is to support artists and Estates d'Artiste in the development of their most ambitious projects and to promote them on the national and international scene. This is done in the gallery's various exhibition spaces, outside the walls in collaboration with public and private institutions, and at fairs such as WestBund Art & Design, Art 021, Art Paris, Asia Now, etc.

Going beyond its commercial ambitions, Galerie Dumonteil has always extended its influence by becoming involved in a variety of cultural sectors, providing its collectors with the best possible advice on building up their collections, lending works to museum exhibitions and contributing to leading publications.

The gallery was created by Dothi and Pierre DUMONTEIL, and Dorian DUMONTEIL has been responsible for its future since 2021.

Galerie Dumonteil is also a member of the Professional Committee of the CPGA Art Galleries and of the Compagnie Nationale des Experts CNE

Name: VR-All-Art
Description: VR ALL ART is a platform and a marketplace for artists, galleries, museums and the general public to exhibit, explore and acquire art in virtual reality, augmented reality and mixed reality.

Name: DANAE.IO
Description:
Merging art and digital technology, DANAE.IO explores new forms of expression in contemporary art. We accompany unique creations that combine rarity with artistic innovation and curation within the Web3 universe.
As the experience of art continues to evolve, so will the way it is acquired and appreciated. Inspired by the Wall Drawings by conceptual artist Sol LeWitt, DANAE is spearheading a new model of valuation and copyright management to protect and promote digital art. As this new market emerges, DANAE is setting new standards that will prioritize the reputation of digital artists, the means of their works’ transmission, and of course its value.

Name: Art to Be Gallery
Description:
La galerie est fondée en 2012 par deux passionnés et collectionneurs d'art contemporain, qui seront vite rejoints par leurs enfants. 
Ensemble, ils exposent les oeuvres d'artistes français et internationaux aux différentes influences : mouvements figuratifs des années 60-80, art urbain/street art, art singulier/outsiders.

Name: Rosalind Arts
Description: Rosalind Arts is the Art gallery by Rosalind Panda, the global fine Art Artist

Name: Rosalind Arts
Description: Rosalind Arts is the Art gallery by Rosalind Panda, the global fine Art Artist

Name: la malterie arts visuels
Description:
︎ Ateliers d'artistes - Résidences - Concerts - Expositions
Pôle d'Information Ressource Arts Visuels

la malterie est une structure de soutien à la recherche et à l'expérimentation artistique dans les domaines des arts visuels et des musiques actuelles.

Lieu d'expérimentation de l'art, centré sur la présence de l'artiste au cœur des projets, des expériences et du territoire, la malterie est ouverte à de multiples propositions artistiques, et permet les rencontres : entre les artistes, entre les disciplines, avec les publics (passionnés, curieux ou non-initiés), entre l'artiste en phase de création et son espace physique et social, entre les professionnels du secteur et les formes émergentes.
Installée dans un ancien bâtiment industriel lillois, elle développe des outils, des services et des formes d’accompagnement répondant aux besoins concrets des artistes ayant une volonté de professionnalisation de leurs démarches et de leur pratique.

Name: Skel Art
Description: “SKEL” is the alias for Artist Jason Skeldon, originally from Las Vegas. The artist has resided most of his life in Tampa, Fl. Jason has work hanging all over the united states including Los Angeles, New York, Miami, etc. His art style is influenced by pop culture and current events used with spray paints, acrylic, watercolors, stencils, and resins. Jason’s work can be seen in his gallery at HARD ROCK CASINO TAMPA, Crown n Bull, opes health, international mall, Aloft Hotel Orlando, Fl. Some notable clients are Kevin Hart(comedian),Taylor Swift(singer), Akon(singer),Rashad Evans(MMA), Hulk Hogan, Phil Heath, Ian Somerhalder(vampire diaries),Wade Boggs(Baseball),Jameis Winston(football). Jason never went to art school and created his own style of art through trial and error with multiple mediums. Influencers are Banksy(artist), Walt Disney, and Warren Buffet. Notable collabs with Mcm, Bulliet Bourbon, Nike, Neiman Marcus, Lamborghini, and much more.

Name: Sir J J School of Art
Description: Sir J.J. School of Art is one of the pioneering institutes of fine art education in India, since its establishment in 1878 in the current Campus, with generous donation of Jamshetji Jijibhoy, under the British administration. The School today stands in the heritage building with departments of drawing and painting, sculpture and modelling, mural, portraiture, print making, arts and crafts including ceramics, interior decoration, metal work and textiles; and teachers training with art teachers’ diploma, Art Masters and Diploma in Painting Education. The college has undergraduate and post graduate programs with BFA and MFA degrees conferred to the students.

Name: School of Athens
Description: We inspire and educate aspiring artists, offering comprehensive programs in painting, drawing and more. Join our vibrant community of artists, learn from accomplished faculty, and unleash your creativity in our state-of-the-art facilities. Start your artistic journey with us today!

Name: Quardin
Description:
Quardin is een platform dat zich richt op talentontwikkeling van jonge mensen tussen de 15-35 jaar. Wij organiseren en geven verschillende masterclasses, waarbij we werken vanuit de intrinsieke motivatie van de deelnemer aan de slag gaan. Hierbij richten wij op thema’s zoals ondernemerschap, persoonlijke ontwikkeling en mentale gezondheid. 
Wij focussen op persoonlijke en zakelijke groei van onze coaches, creatives en community.

Name: Massinart.ma
Description: Première boutique de vente de tableaux décoratifs en ligne, stickers muraux, paravents et autres accessoires de décoration intérieure.

Name: Jules Ernest PAUL, the Haitian Master
Description: Hatian Art Gallery est une plateforme de vente de toiles de Maîtres dédiée aux collectionneurs et amateurs d'arts.

Name: Le Macchine Effimere Srl
Description:
La mostra di successo è quella di cui si sente ancora parlare dopo anni, quando quella meravigliosa macchina non esiste già da molto, eppure vive ancora nella memoria di chi ha assistito al suo incredibile manifestarsi e nei racconti di chi conserva quella memorabilia tra i propri ricordi migliori. 

Scegliere di fare una mostra con Le Macchine Effimere vuol dire fare una scelta prima di tutto etica. È etica infatti la volontà di fare un lavoro bene, con onestà intellettuale, con cura e attenzione, senza trascurare importanti dettagli e soprattutto dando valore alle persone con cui lavoriamo: fornitori, professionisti, aziende e artigiani. Le Macchine Effimere si fondano su tre capisaldi: l’onestà, la serietà, il rispetto. 

Noi siamo pronte a fare la differenza. E voi?

Cosa facciamo:
Registrar & Coordinamento mostre: expertise in movimentazione di opere d'arte, ufficio prestiti, gestione di collezioni, organizzazione mostre

Eventi culturali: Ideazione, gestione e vendita di mostre, festival, eventi culturali e fiere

Servizi editoriali: ideazione, progettazione e realizzazione di pubblicazioni d’arte e cataloghi, revisione testi e consulenza redazionale

Formazione: organizzazione di convegni e congressi, conferenze e dibattiti, corsi, seminari, incontri culturali

Name: UVNT ART
Description:
UVNT Art Fair, formerly Urvanity, has become an essential event during Madrid's art week to showcase the latest art and reflect artistic trends with the freshness and innovation that have been part of its DNA since its inception.

The fair, whose first edition was held in 2017, has matured and evolved year after year and today seeks to explore the freshest languages, integrate other aesthetic codes and seek new trends in the art world. And it does so with a consistent and contemporary proposal, which dares new languages that do not understand labels. 

More than thirty national and international galleries gather every year under the roof of UVNT Art Fair to show the work of emerging artists to follow the track, other mid-career and some of the most talked-about names in the contemporary scene. 

However, UVNT also wants to explore and imagine possible future scenarios for this New Contemporary Art, thanks to the complicity with other initiatives and with the different cultural agents of the city. In order to support the production and dissemination of ideas, as well as to facilitate the access of a wide audience to these contemporary creative practices that outline a vast cultural and urban landscape.


Urvanity Projects is presented as that indispensable nexus to articulate and connect the impulse of brands and cultural agents, creating projects that allow them to move forward together, that are highly beneficial for both parties, and therefore, that help them to achieve further goals.

Urvanity Projects works as an active and articulated mechanism necessary to unite, in a coordinated way, the mutual impulse of two dynamizing agents of our society: culture and brands.

In a scenario like the current one, where the importance of a brand is not measured by its size, but by its contribution to society, and where its position in the market is not as relevant as its position within people, being able to rely on cultural initiatives is almost essential.

Name: Cesare Catania ART
Description:
ART GALLERY
INGENUITY WORKS - PAINTINGS - SCULPTURES

Italian artist who likes painting and working with different materials and who has polyhedric and eclectic style (sometimes abstract, sometimes informal, other times surrealistic) dense of symbolism.

Portfolio at www.cesarecatania.eu

Name: Arte Restauración
Description:
Somos restauradores de pintura, escultura y documentos gráfico. Restauración de cuadros, tallas y libros. Conservación y restauración de obras de arte.
Restauración de pintura Restauración de arte Restauración de cuadros Restauración de antigüedades 
Limpieza de cuadros, marcos y objetos artísticos. Pintura mural.

Name: Towner Eastbourne
Description:
Collecting and exhibiting contemporary art for nearly 100 years, Towner Eastbourne presents an ambitious and high quality programme of historic, modern and contemporary art through temporary and collection based exhibitions, talks, events and creative activities for as many as 160,000 visitors each year. Founded in 1923 as a result of a bequest by Alderman John Chisholm Towner to create ‘an art gallery for the people’, this founding ethos remains at the heart of Towner’s mission.

Towner’s Collection is best known for its modern British art, including the largest and most significant body of work by Eric Ravilious (1903–1942), and a growing collection of international contemporary art including works by Dineo Seshee Bopape, John Akomfrah, Lawrence Abu Hamdan, Tacita Dean, Grayson Perry and Wolfgang Tillmans. Visitors can experience Collection highlights, from painting and works on paper to sculpture and moving image works, in Gallery 1 and the Ravilious Gallery, and through behind the scenes tours in the Art Store every other Sunday.

Towner is a free and welcoming community space providing places for study and relaxation including a Sensory Room, a new Collection Library and a cinema screening a regular programme of films including new releases, documentaries, classics, family film and more. The Art School programme offers creative activities for everyone, children and young people to adults, including drawing, making, designing and film making. A professional development programme for artists of all levels offers artist residencies, mentoring and opportunities for collaboration and showcasing.

The award-winning gallery designed by Rick Mather Architects sits in the Eastbourne’s cultural centre, the Devonshire Quarter. The building, which opened in April 2009, is the largest purpose built gallery in the South East.

Towner Eastbourne is led by Joe Hill, Director.

Name: Sutton Art Consulting Pt Ltd
Description:
Sutton Art Consulting is a full-service art consultancy well versed in overseeing all aspects of art selection, commissioning, customised framing and installation. We are based in Singapore, with capabilities to operate in the region. 

With a database of hundreds of local and foreign, established and emerging artists, we are well positioned to find the perfect art for your project. After an in-depth consultation, we craft a bespoke solution to your art needs.

We offer a wide variety of genres in different mediums including paintings, sculpture, photography and installations. We understand local sensibilities while also bringing an international flavour to projects.

We are always grateful to work with creative and talented members of the design community. Get in touch with us today for a consultation.

Subscribe to our newsletter here: http://eepurl.com/hdAaHj

Name: ZABRAVE, Awards winner, Style & Apparel Awards UK 2023, Global Awards UK 2024
Description:
Zabrave brand is an online store established to sell fine art and clothing and it was established by Herman, to provide opportunities to artists and fashion designers entering the global art and clothing market. He founded the store on the principle that all artists and fashion designers benefit from having their artwork, clothing designs promoted by a professional store.The store is patronised by designers and art lovers looking to find and buy original clothing, artwork, and online market in South Africa and worldwide. Our Pricing structure is clear and conventional forward with the mainstream of the earnings from a sale being turned to the designer and artist who created the work. Our pricing is very economical leaving no room to incentivise buyers with reductions. When you buy products from us you are supporting upcoming African artists.

Zabrave art offers an extensive range of contemporary and modern art from Africa and South Africa in a variety of mediums, painting, fine art photography, batik, sculptures and printmaking globally.

Name: Plogix
Description: Plogix is an online art platform connecting talented artists with art buyers by showcasing them on its online gallery, social media channels and digital screens at prime locations. The platform gives talented modern artists a chance to not only expose their work to a wider audience; but also, a chance to collaborate with other like minded artists. Plogix also owns a number of art sharing accounts on social networks where it has a combined follower count of over half a million art enthusiasts. It uses these accounts to consistently share the works of its members. In addition, it hosts a variety of outdoor campaigns showcasing its artists on large digital screens at iconic locations worldwide.

Name: MESSUMS ORG
Description: MESSUMS ORG is a collaborative space for artists, collectors and thinkers. It is a virtual and physical network for the presentation and engagement with creative expression across artistic genre.

Name: ICS - Escola de Arte e 3D
Description:
INNOVATION CREATIVE SPACE :

Cada empresa é uma ideia que assume a forma de ser, as virtudes e a essência das pessoas que a constituem. 

Somos artistas compartilhando inspirações, técnicas e visão profissional. Somos pessoas que promovem boas virtudes e visam ressaltar o protagonismo necessário para próprio desenvolvimento do ser.
A ICS é uma idéia, uma semente em crescimento. Queremos dar bons frutos. Por isso, nada permanece estático por aqui. Estamos sempre em movimento para expressar a nossa própria singularidade.
Devemos muito a cada artista, estudante, amigo e colaborador que deixou um pouco de si para contribuir com o nosso desenvolvimento.

Conheça mais sobre nós, em: icsart.com.br
E em nossas redes sociais: https://www.instagram.com/icsartbr/

Name: Jeff Koons LLC
Description: JEFF KOONS, LLC is a fine art studio based out of 601 W 29TH ST, New York, New York, United States.

Name: ZCCE Zurich Centre for Creative Economies
Description: We aim to anchor the creative economies as an impulse-giving topic and field of action at the interfaces between culture, economics, education, politics and society. Value creation and new approaches to creation, production and commercialisation play just as much a role as national and global dynamics.

Name: October Gallery
Description:
Located in a former Victorian School in Bloomsbury, October Gallery, London exhibits the Transvangarde or cross-culture avant garde.
Leading artists:  
El Anatsui
Romuald Hazoume
Rachid Koraichi
Kenji Yoshida
Aubrey Williams
Laila Shawa
Wijdan
Ira Cohen 
Brion Gysin

Name: dot-art
Description:
dot-art is an art consultancy based in Liverpool city centre, specialising in affordable, high quality, locally sourced art, on a sale, commission and rental basis, as well as offering a range of complementary services including; art consultancy, exhibition planning and implementation, bespoke framing, art valuation and restoration and artist sourcing.

dot-art works with over 100 artists to provide an unrivaled choice of affordable, high quality, locally sourced art work for home or business, both through our city centre showroom, external exhibitions and comprehensive website. In addition we source and supply artists for a wide range of other projects, including workshops, training and community participation events.

We offer a comprehensive, flexible and affordable service to our corporate clients, from consultancy and sourcing to framing and hanging. Work can be acquired on a purchase, commission or rental basis, and can be built into wider marketing, branding or CSR objectives using a variety of bespoke approaches, including exhibitions, artist talks, promotional launches or events and staff workshops.

All our work supports our social enterprise arm, dot-art Services CIC, a not-for-profit organisation which exists to support North-West based visual artists, both emerging and established, through a range of services and activities designed to help them develop their careers and gain exposure and promotion for their work.

Since 2011, dot-art Services has also delivered a program of art classes at Liverpool's creative hub the Bluecoat (see: http://www.dot-art.co.uk/art-classes.php); as well as dot-art Schools, our innovative inter school art competition, launched in 2012 (see: http://schools.dot-art.com).

Name: fotofever
Description:
fotofever is the first art fair dedicated to discovering and collecting contemporary photography in Paris.

Every year since its creation in 2011, fotofever offers amateurs, collectors, artists, gallery owners and other art professionals the best of emerging contemporary photography from around the world. 

To bring an ever larger audience to collect photography, fotofever created - and continues to reinforce year after year, the START TO COLLECT initiation programme. 

The 7th edition of fotofever paris will be held at the Carrousel du Louvre on 08-11 Nov 2018, with 100 international exhibitors presenting over 200 artists.

Name: YALLAA ART LAB
Description:
Revolutionizing children's artistic and scientific education! 

At YALLAA ART LAB, we firmly believe that every child is a creator at heart. Our mission? To combine art and science to awaken the creativity and ingenuity of children aged 5 to 16.  Our unique workshops provide an environment where exploration, curiosity, and innovation are at the core of learning. Whether it’s painting, robotics, or color chemistry, we stimulate an inventive and critical mindset, essential for tackling the challenges of the future.

 Small groups: Only 10 children per session, ensuring personalized attention and tailored support for each child.

Why choose YALLAA ART LAB?

- Interdisciplinary Methodology:Integrating art and science for a comprehensive learning approach.
- Structured Program: Clear objectives for each activity, ensuring balanced development.
- Innovation and Creativity: Preparing children to think creatively and solve complex problems.

We are much more than just a workshop. We are a laboratory of ideas and an incubator of talents, where every child can become a future innovator.

Join us and give your children the opportunity to fully develop their creative potential. Together, let's shape the leaders of tomorrow!

Name: Association Skin
Description:
Depuis sa création en 2012 à Paris, notre association Skin se distingue par sa méthode unique, proposant l'art ou le sport, pour aider les femmes, les hommes, ainsi que de leurs proches à se reconstruire après le cancer. 

Notre approche vise à retisser du lien social, à encourager le dépassement de soi et à offrir une nouvelle perspective de vie à ces personnes à travers la création de binômes patient(e)-artiste ou patient(e)-sportif(ve).

Depuis sa création, SKIN c’est :
+ de 300 femmes et hommes qui ont créé un binôme
+ de 180 partenariats
+ de 100 artistes ou sportifs professionnels

Name: Tender Claws
Description: Tender Claws is an award-winning art and games studio based in Los Angeles. We are known for innovations in emerging media, a critically playful eye, and a strong foundation in storytelling. Our projects include the hybrid novel Pry, narrative VR games Virtual Virtual Reality and Virtual Virtual Reality 2, a sport played with tumbleweeds and leaf blowers Tumball, mobile AR virtual pet Tendar, immersive theatrical adventures The Under Presents and Tempest. Checkout our latest release Stranger Things VR.

Name: Récurrence photo
Description:
Récurrence photo à pour mission de faciliter l'accès à l'art et à la culture au moyen d'expositions de photographies implantées en Entreprise et renouvelées régulièrement. 

Notre But ? Créer des espaces de travail inspirants, chics et modernes en vous proposant une parenthèse visuelle quotidienne. 

Pour aller plus loin ? Nous organisons des événements pour vous apprendre à mieux voir et mieux comprendre la Photographie : vernissages, visites commentées par l'artiste, lunch breack conférence, team bulding arty... nous vous donnons des clés de lecture pour mieux comprendre les images qui vous entourent.

Name: UVNT ART
Description:
UVNT Art Fair, formerly Urvanity, has become an essential event during Madrid's art week to showcase the latest art and reflect artistic trends with the freshness and innovation that have been part of its DNA since its inception.

The fair, whose first edition was held in 2017, has matured and evolved year after year and today seeks to explore the freshest languages, integrate other aesthetic codes and seek new trends in the art world. And it does so with a consistent and contemporary proposal, which dares new languages that do not understand labels. 

More than thirty national and international galleries gather every year under the roof of UVNT Art Fair to show the work of emerging artists to follow the track, other mid-career and some of the most talked-about names in the contemporary scene. 

However, UVNT also wants to explore and imagine possible future scenarios for this New Contemporary Art, thanks to the complicity with other initiatives and with the different cultural agents of the city. In order to support the production and dissemination of ideas, as well as to facilitate the access of a wide audience to these contemporary creative practices that outline a vast cultural and urban landscape.


Urvanity Projects is presented as that indispensable nexus to articulate and connect the impulse of brands and cultural agents, creating projects that allow them to move forward together, that are highly beneficial for both parties, and therefore, that help them to achieve further goals.

Urvanity Projects works as an active and articulated mechanism necessary to unite, in a coordinated way, the mutual impulse of two dynamizing agents of our society: culture and brands.

In a scenario like the current one, where the importance of a brand is not measured by its size, but by its contribution to society, and where its position in the market is not as relevant as its position within people, being able to rely on cultural initiatives is almost essential.

Name: Auteursbond
Description: De Auteursbond is de Nederlandse beroeps- en belangenvereniging van schrijvers en vertalers: prozaschrijvers, dichters, jeugdboekenschrijvers, scenarioschrijvers, toneelschrijvers, literair vertalers, boekvertalers, educatieve auteurs, non-fictie auteurs, misdaadauteurs en ondertitelaars.

Name: ABA UD Accademia di Belle Arti G.B. Tiepolo Udine
Description:
L’Accademia di Belle Arti GB Tiepolo nasce a Udine con lo scopo di offrire alla nostra regione una nuova opportunità culturale: avere la prima Accademia di Belle Arti in Friuli Venezia Giulia. 

La nuova proposta, accolta con favore dalla Provincia e dal Comune di Udine oltre che dalle maggiori associazioni di categoria, ha ottenuto il decreto di approvazione dell’ANVUR (Agenzia Nazionale di Valutazione del Sistema Universitario e della Ricerca del Ministero dell’Istruzione) nell’aprile del 2015 ed il Decreto Ministeriale di Riconoscimento firmato dal Ministro della Pubblica Istruzione Stefania Giannini nel maggio del 2016.

Description: San Diego based Oopsy Daisy, Fine Art for Kids began in 1999 to provide art for children that would engage and inspire young minds. We work directly with artists to create unique collections of nursery room décor, kids room décor, growth charts, night lights, fabric & vinyl placemats, ceramic ornaments and more! Many pieces in our collection can be personalized as well.

Description: Under the direction of Márcia Fortes, Alessandra D’Aloia and Alexandre Gabriel, Fortes D’Aloia & Gabriel (formerly Galeria Fortes Vilaça) presents a dynamic program in which Brazilian and foreign artists, young and established, create ambitious exhibitions.
