Name: ART'MURS Association
Description:
L’association ART’MURS a été créée en septembre 2018 par des passionnés de street-art.
Nous nous sommes choisi pour mission de promouvoir l’art urbain sous toutes ses formes, en tant que vecteur de partage et d’échange entre les artistes, la ville et ses habitants.
Nous aspirons à soutenir les artistes issus du mouvement de l’art urbain, quelque soient leurs techniques, ainsi qu’à créer la rencontre entre le public et les artistes, et le public et leurs œuvres.
Souhaitant rendre la culture accessible à tous, nous sommes convaincus que l’art urbain peut participer à la valorisation d’un territoire, qu’il peut inciter chacun à se réapproprier l’espace public et contribuer à un meilleur vivre ensemble.
Notre équipe de bénévoles très actifs développe différentes propositions, comme l'organisation de murs, festivals, expositions, balades street art guidées, ateliers, conférences... toujours en prenant soin de notre accueil, sincère et chaleureux.


Crédit : en bandeau, détail d'une œuvre de Wire

Name: Beursschouwburg
Description:
Apart from a pile of attractively stacked bricks in the heart of Brussels, Beursschouwburg is, for the time being, principally an inspiring platform for between-the-arts. Here, artists reflect, show, scrap and start again in an ongoing dialogue with thinking and creative Brusselèèrs. Beursschouwburg is a melting-pot and a thorn in the side, where art is served while it’s still hot. Where, now and again, artists rattle the programming. Where there’s more to life than art. Where performance, celebration, encounter and craziness all join in a merry dance.

Beursschouwburg makes this happen by:
- making an exacting choice for younger artists (active in Brussels and far beyond)
- an integrated multi-disciplinary approach
- offering a three-speed programme instead of seasons
- providing an inescapable view of the city
- exploiting its central location as an open meeting-place
- sparking genuine and complementary (international) collaboration

Name: Brevard Music Center
Description:
The Brevard Music Center, a summer institute and festival, teaches gifted young musicians to prepare and perform great musical works at a high artistic level.

The Music Center is situated on a wooded 180-acre campus in the beautiful Blue Ridge Mountains of western North Carolina. Founded in 1936, the Music Center has matured into one of this country's premier summer training programs and festivals. More than 600 gifted students, ages 14 through post-college, come to the Music Center to study with members of a distinguished artist faculty and with renowned guest artists. For seven weeks, students participate in a vigorous program of instruction that includes ensembles, private lessons, and chamber music.

Brevard's hallmark is the powerful sense of community that re-emerges every June, as faculty and students work together to present more than 80 concerts to the public. The total audience each summer numbers more than 40,000.

For decades the Brevard Music Center has inspired devotion not only among its students and faculty but also among its listeners and among a vast corps of volunteers. That hundreds of persons have purchased homes in western North Carolina expressly to be near the Brevard Music Center gives some measure of the Center's significance to its community.

Name: Sorrel Sky Gallery
Description: Sorrel Sky Gallery offers inspiring fine art and unique jewelry. We proudly represent David Yarrow, Ben Nighthorse, Kevin Red Star, Star Liana York and more. Through personalized client services, and a progressive business model, our knowledgeable staff establishes a meaningful connection between the artists we represent and the clients we serve. This has led Sorrel Sky Gallery to be recognized as a leader in the arts since 2002.

Name: Gallery Espace
Description:
Gallery Espace was established in New Delhi (India), in 1989 by Renu Modi with an exhibition of autobiographical works of MF Husain, Modern India’s most celebrated artist and one of the founder members of the path-breaking Progressive Artists Group. 

Espace’s program is oriented to reach unchartered territories of anticipating trends, spotting latent talent and showcasing diverse practices. Recently, Espace has hosted an interesting roster of exhibitions which include solos of represented artists Rina Banerjee, Nilima Sheikh, Tejal Shah, Ravi Agarwal, Chintan Upadhyay and a curated exhibition of Indian and international artists commemorating 20 years of the Gallery’s existence in December 2009 titled Marvelous Reality. Each of these was supported by a catalogue or monograph in compliance with Espace’s belief in thorough project documentation. Recent participations in art fairs include Asian Contemporary Art Fair, New York (Nov.07); Art Dubai (Mar.07, 08); ShContemporary (Sep.08), ARCO-Madrid (Feb.09) and India Art Summit (Aug 08, Aug.09). The gallery is also committed to present a balanced infusion of art education and interactive art experiences through outreach programs like Video Wednesdays @ Gallery Espace involving public screening of videos on the last Wednesday of every month and special projects like Conscious- Subconscious where artist Manjunath Kamath treats the gallery space as a studio, open to the public for 2 hours every evening.

Espace strives to sustain a dialogue with the viewers at the level of artistic perception & aesthetic debate while also bridging the gap between the art world and the art market.

Name: Little Artists Art Studio Pte Ltd
Description: Little Artists Art Studio is an art studio committed to nurturing creativity in children and adults since 1997. For twenty years we have brought out the best of children’s individual abilities by closely guiding and exposing them to various styles. We have a cosmopolitan environment with children and art professionals from around the world. We have been awarded for high quality art education to children (2.5yrs to 17yrs) and our students are regularly selected for prestigious Art /Design/Architecture programs at the top Schools, Colleges and Universities around the world. All our teachers are highly qualified, holding diplomas and degrees from reputed institutions in more than 10 countries. We offer a warm team environment, long-term full-time and part-time positions, career advancement and raises, excellent training, support and motivation to help you succeed. A career with Little Artists in arts education is one filled with creativity, fun, joy, recognition, honor, satisfaction, and rewarding compensation and professional growth. Little Artists is an award winning Fine Arts school leading the curve in young and mature emerging artists, and we are always looking to expand our team thoughtfully. See our website for more details on who we are and what we do: www.little-artists.com

Name: Paint Creek Center for the Arts
Description:
Since 1982, Paint Creek Center for the Arts has been dedicated to promoting the arts and artistic excellence through a full range of cultural programs including exhibitions, studio art classes, outreach programs, community involvement projects, our Art Market, and the Art & Apples Festival.

Paint Creek Center for the Arts’ (PCCA) mission is to build on our rich heritage of leading creativity in our community by providing opportunities for all to learn, create, experience and appreciate the arts.

Name: Barcelona Gallery Weekend
Description:
Barcelona Gallery Weekend is an annual event promoted by the association Art Barcelona open to all the galleries of the city and its outskirts. It gathers a general programme of exhibitions in art galleries and a parallel programme of guided visits by the gallerists, artists and curators, performances, talks, presentations and other special activities around contemporary and avant-garde art.

From 15th to 18th September 2022 it will celebrate its 8th edition.

Barcelona Gallery Weekend seeks to reinforce and make visible the rich and varied artistic scene of Barcelona, promote art collecting and highlight the work of the galleries, as culture generating spaces open to citizens, and the artists they represent.

Name: Snark.art
Description:
We are a blockchain laboratory exploring creative and commercial possibilities in art. We use the power of blockchain to change the way art is made and collected. 

Snark.art offers: 
- A platform for established artists to experiment with the new medium of cryptoart, blockchain art, and cryptocollectibles.
- A marketplace for collectors and investors to discover and invest in a new form of art and asset. 

We work with artists to create blockchain-based crypto art: it’s their vision, with an assist from our technology and community marketing. 

These one-of-a-kind digital art works are then offered to the public via our auction and sales platform. It’s the chance to graduate from Cryptokitties into an entirely new type of art based on blockchain ideals of decentralized interaction.

Name: Galerie ARCTURUS
Description:
Conseil pour transformer votre quotidien grâce à l'art contemporain.

Située rue de Seine, en plein cœur de Saint Germain des Prés, la Galerie Arcturus a ouvert en 1999, portée par la passion pour l’art contemporain d’Anne de la Roussière. 

Toujours animée par cette même énergie, la Galerie soutient et promeut une sélection pluridisciplinaire cohérente d’artistes européens dont l’orientation artistique est volontairement diversifiée; les œuvres proposées - peintures, photographies, et sculptures - reflètent un héritage culturel propre à chaque artiste. Leurs qualités techniques et picturales se répondent et proposent au collectionneur un choix dynamique et éclairé.

De plus, la Galerie ARCTURUS conseille les entreprises et les professions libérales souhaitant initier ou compléter l’acquisition d’œuvres d’art qui incarnent leurs valeurs, leur culture interne, leur ADN, en cohérence avec leur image et leur notoriété.  Dans ce cadre, la recherche d’œuvres se fait en lien avec les décideurs auprès d’une large sélection d’artistes.

Après 25 ans au 65 rue de Seine, la galerie Arcturus se transforme pour une nouvelle ère !
Nous entamons un chapitre passionnant de notre histoire en continuant à représenter nos artistes sur internet, avec possibilité de voir les œuvres sur rendez-vous, et en organisant des expositions éphémères, vous offrant ainsi une expérience dynamique, agile et renouvelée.

Name: Quanta Academia de Artes
Description: Bem-vindo à Quanta! Nossa escola é dedicada, há mais de quinze anos, ao ensino do artes gráficas de maneira ampla, e ligada a esse universo, como Desenho, Pintura, Ilustração, Histórias em quadrinhos e Arte digital, entre tantas outras.

Name: ]performance s p a c e [
Description:
]performance s p a c e[ is the UK’s leading performance art specific organisation. Our mission: to facilitate the prime conditions for performance art(ists) in the UK and abroad. We are committed to supporting challenging and difficult practices that embrace performance art as an ever-evolving medium. 

Founded in 2011, ]ps[ remains an artist-led initiative drawing on anti-institutional lineages and DIY working practices. In 2022 ]ps[ became mobile, shedding permanent physical space for the first time in our history.  

We imagine ]ps[ as a conceptual space - mirroring the ephemerality and fluidity of our field. The mobile ]ps[ structure is a framework which best holds our programming, producing and network building activities. Our organisation continues to cultivate time-based work that critically pushes the boundaries of body, time and space - while championing artists and practices that make the established genres and methodologies of the field more porous. 

We seek to be in community with those with whom we may create new commons, outside of mainstream art education and commercial structures. ]ps[ is committed to internationalism and the mobility of people and practices. We initiate and participate in local, national and international networks, co-created with myriad communities of artists, producers, curators, researchers and audiences. 

Our programmes and projects take place in spaces and sites across London and elsewhere. We have close working relationships with organisations including the Live Art Development Agency, Live Art UK, Ugly Duck, and Venice International Performance Art Week. ]performance s p a c e[ is housed at VSSL studio in Deptford, London.

Name: Studio Kassita
Description:
Kassita: Where Memory Takes Form
Kassita is a visionary concept brought to life by Moroccan artist Youness Miloudi, where forgotten media—audio cassettes and VHS tapes—are reimagined as bold, vibrant artworks. Merging Moroccan folk traditions with international music, Kassita breathes new life into discarded tapes, transforming nostalgia into contemporary artistic expressions.

Through his innovative techniques and the use of recycled cassettes as canvases, Miloudi explores the delicate balance between past and present. His work captures the essence of living heritage, reflecting on the fading nature of analog memories while preserving their spirit in a modern form.

More than an art project, Kassita is a dialogue between tradition and modernity, a celebration of culture that resurrects forgotten moments and immortalizes them in vivid color and form.
Experience the rebirth of memory. Discover the art of Kassita.

Name: Studio Izzo Ltd.
Description:
Studio Izzo is a professional art conservation practice based in Tāmaki Makaurau Auckland. Established in 2008 by Italian conservator Carolina Izzo, the studio offers a wide range of remedial art conservation treatments to private, gallery, and museum collections across Aotearoa New Zealand.

The heritage team specialises in the project management of restoration and conservation procedures on heritage buildings, as well as supporting architects and designers in creating new heritage for the future. The studio also provides professional consultation and advisory services in art conservation and collection management.

In addition to conservation services, Studio Izzo delivers international and national workshops, collection management advice, and disaster procedure planning. Its mission is not only to preserve the past but also to work with the community to highlight the importance of conserving art and heritage.

Believing that every artwork is unique and deserving of the highest level of care, Studio Izzo is committed to using the latest techniques and equipment to ensure that all taonga are treated with the utmost respect and professionalism.

Name: Quinn's Auction Galleries
Description:
Quinn's Auction Galleries is a full service auction and estate services company with a range of specialties, from fine art & antiques, to rare books & maps, militaria and wine & spirits. Located in the center of Falls Church, VA just six miles outside Washington, DC. Quinns works with families in transition offering solutions, from full estate clean-outs to online estate sales, as well as, consignment for our weekly, specialty and catalog auctions. Consignments are accepted by appointment only. To get started please email photos to  info@quinnsauction.com, and we will be happy to walk you through the process.
http://www.quinnsauction.com
Email: info@quinnsauction.com

Name: LAND (Los Angeles Nomadic Division)
Description: LAND (Los Angeles Nomadic Division) is a non-profit art organization founded in 2009 as a public art initiative committed to curating site- and situation-specific contemporary art projects, in Los Angeles and beyond. LAND believes that everyone deserves the opportunity to experience innovative contemporary art in their day to day experience in order to develop new ideas and ways of thinking about their world. In turn, artists deserve the opportunity to realize projects, otherwise unsupported, in the public realm to present their unique ideas.

Name: Territorio Gestión Cultural
Description:
En Territorio nos dedicamos a desarrollar e implementar todo tipo de proyectos culturales que van desde la creación de nuevas ideas de formación, producción y difusión pasando por la gestión de equipamientos y otras tareas relacionadas con la puesta en marcha de cualquier tipo de proyecto cultural.

Desde mediados de 2011 hemos conseguido "dar rienda a la cultura" desde el medio rural en una docena de proyectos, colaborando con diferentes entidades tanto públicas como privadas.

Name: Hoffmann Art Management
Description:
Hoffmann Art Management est une société spécialisée dans la conservation-restauration d'oeuvres-d'art. Par notre formation spécialisée et universitaire, notre équipe met au service du patrimoine culturel ses compétences et expériences professionnelles dans le domaine de l’histoire de l’art, de la conservation et restauration d’œuvres d’art, de la peinture murale et des boiseries peintes.
Nos ateliers se situent au Port Franc de Genève, avec l’atelier principal sur territoire suisse et une annexe en secteur sous-douane. 
Hoffmann Art Management travaille pour des collectionneurs, galeristes, musées et institutions, maisons de ventes et Family Offices ainsi que pour d’autres acteurs du monde de l’art, comme les artistes, les photographes et encadreurs, au niveau national et international.
Depuis 2022, Andrea Hoffmann est chargée de cours à la Haute école de gestion de Genève dans le cadre du CAS (Certificate of advanced studies) en Gestion des collections d'art.

Name: CARFAC Alberta
Description:
CARFAC Alberta is a non-profit provincial cultural organization serving the visual arts sector in Alberta. As a provincial arts service organization (PASO) we inform and promote artists, provide professional development opportunities for both members and the general public, and advocate on behalf of members.  As the provincial affiliate for Canadian Artists’ Representation/Le Front des Artistes Canadiens (CARFAC) in the province of Alberta, CARFAC Alberta advocates, educates and innovates. We work to improve the socio-economic conditions of all artists. CARFAC believes that artists, like professionals in other fields, should be paid for their work and share equitably in profits from their work. CARFAC defends artists’ economic and legal rights, and educates the public on fair dealings with artists, providing a vitally important perspective on issues affecting the making of art, artist’s rights, intellectual property rights, and the status of the artist within our society.

CARFAC Alberta’s goals are to advocate:

By improving socio-economic conditions for artists
By raising the status of professional artists
By promoting new and emerging practices for artists
CARFAC Alberta’s goals are to educate:

By informing artists, the general public, and government
By explaining the role and profession of artists
By promoting art-making as a profession

CARFAC Alberta’s goals are to innovate:

By using a cooperative model with province-wide scope
By actively seeking opportunities for under-represented voices
By responding to the changing needs of visual artists

Name: Gallery Dejavu
Description:
Gallery Dejavu was established, passionate about teaching arts to children, young people, and adults..

Gallery Dejavu a living and working in the world of art, working with art collectors and corporate entities owning fine art pieces. Dejavu launched corporate platform in 2023 to build a vehicle to support fine art in the new world of the innovation of technology, the internet, and the growth of international art fairs, in attempt for demystifying this wonderful and creative world and introducing its many players, including artists, museums, cultural institutions, media, curators, fairs, auction houses, and of course, art galleries.

Name: École Supérieure des Beaux Arts de Casablanca
Description: L'École Supérieure des Beaux Arts de Casablanca ou ESBAC est un établissement d’enseignement supérieur, dont le but est d’assurer une formation artistique et théorique dans les domaines touchant aux arts visuels notamment dans les disciplines : Arts plastiques, Design d’intérieur, Design publicitaire.

Name: Lectures Plurielles - Festival du premier roman de Chambéry
Description: Lectures Plurielles est une association, un réseau international de lecteurs, une saison littéraire et un festival unique en France, le Festival du premier roman de Chambéry.

Name: LM Company
Description:
LMcompany est une association artistique.
Elle s’inscrit dans les valeurs de l’Economie Sociale et Culturelle agréée Jeunesse Education Populaire depuis 1992. Axée sur le métissage culturel et social, son objectif est avant tout l’échange et la rencontre entre les différents acteurs culturels.
L’association a pour objectif le rassemblement culturel autour d’une équipe jeune et réactive, l’organisation d’événements artistiques, le soutient à la production et à la diffusion d’œuvres musicales, ainsi que l’accompagnement d’artistes dans leurs projets.
Au fil des années, La Métisse est devenue progressivement productrice de spectacles (Festival International du vidéo-clip, Festival Plein Sud, Festival Première scène), productrice audiovisuelle (tournages de concert Live, émission TV...) et Bureau d’Accompagnement Artistique ''BAA''.
Aujourd’ hui, La Métisse gère aussi un espace, dans le 20ème arrondissement de Paris, qui regroupe de nombreuses activités culturelles.

Name: Carré d'Art Outre Mer
Description:
Être à l’avant garde !
Introduire l’art contemporain dans son entreprise est en passe de devenir
un must du management dans le monde entrepreneurial : valorisation
de son image, de celle de ses employés, clients et partenaires, mais aussi
un puissant outil de développement par la fierté d’appartenance que l’on crée,
par l’instauration d’un nouveau dialogue, par la dynamisation de la créativité
dans l’entreprise...
L’art en entreprise vous apporte tout ça et plus encore.

Name: Flor Minor
Description:
Flor Minor (Queretaro 1961). Estudia en la Escuela Nacional de Pintura , Escultura y Grabado “La Esmeralda” (1978-1980). Inicia una investigación acerca de la utilización de materiales y soportes no convencionales en la creación plástica en el Centro de Investigación y Experimentación Plástica del Instituto Nacional de Bellas Artes, siendo miembro fundador del Taller de Neográfica conducido por el maestro Oliverio Hinojosa.
Premios y Distinciones: XV Concurso Nacional para Estudiantes de Artes Plásticas. Primer Premio de Gráfica, Casa de la Cultura de Aguascalientes, Ags. (1980). II Encuentro Nacional de Arte Joven, Segundo Premio Nacional de Dibujo, Casa de la Cultura de Aguascalientes, Ags. (1981). XI Bienal Iberoamericana de Arte, Medalla de Plata Goya, Instituto Cultural Domecq, A.C. INBA, CONACULTA, S.R.E. (1998). I Bienal de las Amércias Rafael Cauduro, tercer permio Tijuana, México (2006).

Flor Minor (Queretaro 1961). She studied at the National School of Painting, Sculpture and Engraving "La Esmeralda" (1978-1980). Start an investigation about the use of non-conventional materials and supports in plastic creation at the Plastic Research and Experimentation Center of the National Institute of Fine Arts, being a founding member of the Neographic Workshop led by teacher Oliverio Hinojosa.

Prizes and Distinctions: XV National Contest for Students of Plastic Arts. First Prize for Graphics, House of Culture of Aguascalientes, Ags. (1980). 11 National Meeting of Young Art, Second National Prize for Drawing, House of Culture of Aguascalientes, Ags. (1981). XI Ibero-American Art Biennial, Goya Silver Medal, Domecq Cultural Institute, A.C. INBA, CONACULTA, S.R.E. (1998). I Biennial of the Americas Rafael Cauduro, third award Tijuana, Mexico (2006).

Name: Rang De Bharat Foundation
Description:
FineArts education redefined! 
Managed by Fine Artists with the guidance of India’s Veteran Artists #ConnectingYourFineArtsDots

Name: DJARFOGO INTER. FILM FESTIVAL
Description:
The DjarFogo International Film Festival was founded in 2019 by award-winning filmmaker and film and visual media professor Guenny K. Pires and Txan Film Productions & Visual Arts members, which brings hundreds of films and filmmakers to Cape Verde annually. It is a seven-day film and culture celebration event held on the island of Santiago and Fogo, Cape Verde, from November 6 to 12, 2023. It incorporates an International Film Festival, Visual Media Education, and Academic and Cultural Exchange to improve the historical and cultural relationship between the archipelago of Cape Verde, Africa, and the Diaspora, including Europe, C.P.L.P., Canada, the United States, and Global South.

DIFF has its headquarters in Los Angeles and Cape Verde Islands. Our five-year plan is to create the first Cape Verdean International Film School to educate disadvantaged young Africans in visual arts and Cinema, thus contributing to reducing poverty, appreciating African culture, and promoting tourism in the country.

DIFF is a nonprofit exempt from federal income tax under Internal Revenue Code (IRC) Section 501(c)(3). Donors can deduct contributions they make to you under IRC Section 170. DIFF qualifies to receive tax-deductible bequests, devises, transfers, or gifts under Section 2055. 2106, or 2522. The Employer ID number IS AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST.

DIFF's mission works tirelessly toward developing, exposing, and celebrating Cape Verdean culture and the entire Africa and Diaspora.

DIFF aims to educate, entertain, encourage, and inspire disadvantaged youth to join in African Cinema, visual arts, and world cinema, thus reducing poverty, appreciating African culture, and promoting visual storytelling.
DIFF offers free visual arts and filmmaking education programs for all ages, with learning opportunities available to filmmakers, aspiring filmmakers, and festival attendees.

DIFF seeks to showcase independent Film and culture, contributing to a better global understanding and f

Name: DD Props
Description: DD props is a company specialised in sculpture, woodworking, metalworking, and finishings.  We are a team of enthusiastic artists and designers that love doing projects together out of our workshop in South London.  We have a combined experience of over three decades worth in our fields and still excited about learning something new with every challenge.  We are a dedicated team that will put a wholehearted effort into our work.

Name: kalabindu
Description:
OUR MISSION & VISION
Our Mission at Kalabindu is helping artists irrespective of their field, to achieve their fullest creative potential, career and financial goals. We serve talent across the globe , from beginners to professionals with distinct styles under different categories (Painting/Handicrafts/Sculptures/Digital Art).

On our platform you can also experience our Career Counseling Services .

As your career consultant and coach, with in-depth knowledge of the art business, we know how to evaluate your strengths and unique attributes. We offer to use our experience to guide you to achieve your goals and success through our Platform.

Name: Libero professionista Fashion and Design
Description:
I was born in Sicily, Italy May 21 1980. After major traveling throughout the world, I decided to reside in Milan, European capital of art and fashion. In Milan I attended the institute of decoration in the prestigeous ‘Accademia di belle Arti di Brera’ where I graduated. During the university time frame I had the unique opportunity to meet with great international fugures and personalities, and experiment new technics, but, thanks to Matilde Trapassi I was able grow artistically.

I target my study over and above the traditional intense paint journeying throughout a vast and diverse materials as radeography, photography, paper retail, plexiglass, wax, wood. The objects are used more to bring out the history rather than to represent  themselves or their form. My works bring out the living time and experience, it can be described as “art of the memory’ so close to Wunderkammer, much closer than the relic Camera. Highlight of my works are my miner-clean-linear detailed art.

I can’t define myself any other way than an extremely active and multifaceted person: I work as a designer for big events, I am a committed interior designer for private homes and trendy venues, and am the Italian Agent for some of the greatest talents of contemporary photography. I have worked with numerous large brands including: La Perla, Ikea, Campari, Kinder and Ferrero, Sony Music, and many others.

Name: Ashop Productions
Description: Founded in 2009, ASHOP is a street art talent agency and production company in Montreal. Having painted over 100 000 square feet of walls in 6 different countries, they have quickly become a reference in the street art world. Trusted by over 250 clients, they are leaders in the market and have set important standards within their industry. ASHOP manages its own artist collective as well as creative studios and workshop facilities. The tight-knit family atmosphere cultivated by the team manifests itself in the love and dedication that they put into each other one of their projects.

Name: Shiftworks Community + Public Arts
Description:
Shiftworks Community + Public Arts envisions a region in which the creative practices of artists are fully engaged to collaboratively shape the pubic realm and catalyze community-led change. Shiftworks builds capacity for this work through civically engaged public art, artist resources, public programming, and technical assistance. 

Our Guiding Principles are:
Artists are agents of social, civic, and cultural change. We support them to work with communities.
Community members are highly valued collaborators with expertise in their neighborhoods. We build capacity for them to engage with artists. 
Equity and social justice are the foundation of our work. We center equitable and just practices through staff commitments as well as in our programs, partnerships, and collaborations. 
A successful public art landscape depends upon a thriving network of public art practitioners. We build tools and systems to support the public art ecosystem in the region.

Name: RLL Art Services, LLC
Description: We tailor our approach for each partner, whether you are an arts organization looking for new revenue streams or a collector looking to expand your collection, we find the right strategies that capitalize on each organization’s strengths and address its needs.

Name: Lynda Ellis Fine Art

Portrait, Landscape and Abstract painter with an impressionist flair working in oil, acrylics, pastel and graphite.Commissions welcomed!

 cover illustrations Paintings - full color

Name: NoArtist
Description:
Fondé en 2018, NoArtist est un collectif de trois amis de l’Ecole Polytechnique spécialisés en science des données, réunis par une même passion pour l’art. L’idée étonne : créer des œuvres d’art à l’aide d’algorithmes, et les diffuser en imprimant ces œuvres numériques sur différents supports, en séries limitées.

En utilisant les mathématiques et l’informatique, nous créons des algorithmes d’intelligence artificielle (IA) qui s’inspirent de milliers d’oeuvres existantes pour générer des créations artistiques originales. L’algorithme modélise un équilibre entre la nouveauté et le déjà-vu, entre innovation et structure codifiée. Nous établissons ainsi un parallèle entre son fonctionnement et les mécanismes cérébraux de la créativité, mis en lumière par de récentes recherches en neurosciences.

Name: Urban Cotton
Description: limited edition Tapestries, wall decoration, paintings and photography with a certificate of authenticity

Name: Artkhein
Description: La vocation d’ARTKHEIN est de permettre à ses clients, entreprises ou particuliers, d’accéder plus simplement et librement à l’art contemporain (photographie, sculpture, œuvres monumentales…)

Name: Neilson Park Creative Centre
Description:
Neilson Park Creative Centre is a community centre focused on the arts.

Established in 1992 in central Etobicoke to provide a permanent home for the community arts groups who continue working there today, Neilson Park Creative Centre also offers a variety of classes and workshops to the community and provides an excellent gallery space available for rental.

NPCC is a purpose-built creative arts facility operated by a non-profit corporation and managed by its Board of Directors. The Board of Directors includes representatives from its Resident Groups and the community.

The building is leased from the City of Toronto who support the organization through the provision of services that keep the facility operating smoothly.

The six Resident Groups who operate their programs at NPCC are:

Etobicoke Handweavers and Spinners
Etobicoke Quilters Guild
Etobicoke Rugcrafters
Humber Valley Art Club
The Etobicoke Art Group
Calligraphic Arts Guild of Toronto 

This fully accessible facility has four studios, 2 gallery spaces, administrative offices and support spaces.

Name: PurePhoto
Description:
PurePhoto is the premier direct-to-trade photography supplier to the world's leading design and hospitality firms.  For 15+ years, our specialty has been serving interior designers, art consultants, and architects with customized solutions.

A carefully selected photograph makes a bold statement that elevates any interior design.  Pick art that evokes a mood, that inspires, and that adds value to your design work. 

Our highly curated portfolio represents a handpicked roster of the most internationally acclaimed photographers in the world.  Their work can be found in the world’s top hotels and restaurants, the homes of countless celebrities and tastemakers, and the galleries of esteemed collectors worldwide.

We honor their art by using only the highest quality museum-grade archival printing and hand-made framing available.  From our huge catalog, our team of curators can assemble a custom collection for you or your clients to review, and we thrive on providing custom solutions like large format, high volume, special commissions, and more.

No matter where you are in the world, or how big or small your project is, PurePhoto can help bring your space to life with amazing photographic artwork.

Name: Monte Azul Center for the Arts
Description:
Nestled between mountainous rainforest and the Río Chirripó Pacífico in a private nature reserve, and a short distance from Chirripó National Park, Monte Azul offers artists an inspirational environment in which to explore and create. 

The residency at Monte Azul Center for the Arts is a customizable experience, giving you permission to play and find inspiration – in the environment as well as within – to rediscover what’s most important to you.

...when you’re ready...

Please visit our website for more information.

Name: Testudo
Description:
Testudo is a platform built to create the next great community of artists, collectors, and enthusiasts.

Our model offers artists a higher percentage of sales, giving them more freedom to create. By purchasing artworks on Testudo, collectors directly support these artists. 

While we hope a work always remains with the initial collector, if the need arises, collectors have the ability to resell a work to a new loving home. When that work sells, the original artist receives a portion of that sale through a royalty. Our closed ecosystem offers collectors a way to resell work and ensures artists remain engaged in that process.

With a heightened focus on inclusivity, transparency, and security, we’re on a mission to establish a more equitable and accessible art market for all.

Name: Arsu Okulları
Description:
Arsu Güzel Sanatlar Akademisi
Arsu Akademi, İTÜ Müzik İleri Araştırmaları Merkezi’nde yüksek lisans eğitimleri sırasında tanışıp hayatlarını birleştiren müzisyen çift Ani ve Çağlar Arsu tarafından 2009 yılında kuruldu. Çift, ortak hayalleri ve idealleri doğrultusunda, öğrencilerini ilgi duydukları alanda kariyer ve meslek edinebilecek bir donanıma eriştirmeyi; sanatın, toplumun her kesimiyle buluştuğu ve arzuya dayalı bir hobiden öte, gelişim ve ilerlemenin anahtarı olduğunu göstermeyi amaç edinen bir vizyonla önemli ilklere imza attılar. Arsu Akademi’de sanat eğitimi programları, her yaş grubunu kapsayacak biçimde, özel olarak yapılandırılan birebir dersler ve grup dersleriyle sürmektedir. Ayrıca pek çok farklı branşta ve başlıkta kurumsal eğitimler, workshoplar ve atölyeler de Arsu Akademi bünyesinde devam etmektedir.

Arsu Güzel Sanatlar Anaokulu
Arsu Güzel Sanatlar Anaokulu, alternatif eğitim modellerinden Waldorf Pedagojisini benimseyen; tüm çocukların sevgi ve şefkatle geliştiği, saygıyla karşılandığı ve sanatla yoğrulduğu bir vizyonu sahipleniyor. Arsu Anaokulu’nun eğitim anlayışının temelinde; öğrenmenin bir zorunluluk değil, zevk olduğunu aşılamak yatıyor. Bu nedenle Arsu'da, çocuklarımız devamlı olarak bilginin kaynağı olarak gördüğümüz doğayla temas ederek ediyorlar.

Arsu Sahne
Ataşehir'in en keyifli noktalarından birinde yer alan Arsu Sahne, genç yetenekler ve büyük üstatların sesi müziğe dönüştüren yorumlarının keşfedildiği, ufuk açan samimi sohbetlerin dillendiği, sanatseverin sanata ve sanatçıya temas edebildiği butik konser salonu ile sanatın kalbinin attığı sımsıcak bir mekân.

Arsu Sahne, sanatseverlere sadece bir konser zevki değil, sanatçıyla temas kurup, sohbet edip, bambaşka bir pencereden dünyaya bakabildikleri farklı bir konser deneyimi sunuyor.

Name: Collectio
Description: Conectamos a quienes quieren descubrir, adquirir y coleccionar obras con lo mejor de la escena de arte actual a través de una plataforma digital y un espacio físico con exposiciones itinerantes.

Name: Crypto Art Island
Description:
Crypto Art Island is Europe's first NFT Art Fair. We provide an NFT platform where world renowned artist sell a selection of exclusive crypto art with our VIP NFT investors.

Crypto Art Island, Xapo Bank, One Grand Casemates Square, Gibraltar, GX11 1AA.

Name: Value your Items
Description:
In difficult and upsetting times make one thing a little easier.  The valuation fully researched and sent by pdf within a few days of the visit.
We can then arrange a full house clearance if necessary. 
Also offering a purchase service for chattels of higher value including Jewellery, Silver, Medals, Books, Wine and so much more.
We even buy vehicles from deceased estates.

Name: Io Amo Fatto a Mano
Description:
Hallo and welcome in my page! I'm Valeria, and the thing I love the most is to create! I am the heart and mind behind Io Amo Fatto a Mano since 2013, but being creative is in my DNA since... well... forever!
I'm enjoying the process of writing the first of a series of books for the Happy Mood Project: it will focus on facilitating and enjoying well being and self-care through colours, emotions and crochet.

For you as a professional busy with your work and caring for your inner self, this Happy Mood Project book will guide you through the discovery and recognition of your emotions without judging them. It will bring your hand in action to create a unique object that will fix your memories in a colorful way. I love to call it practical wellness!

* If you miss some quality me-time, 
* if you want to get in touch with your feelings and emotions and learn how to let them flow, 
* if you love to be practical and get in action more than meditation or counceling

then I invite you to follow my page here on LI or get in contact personally with me (my profile is under my name: Valeria Olivati) to be informed about the developing of the Happy Mood Project and to learn more about creativity and well being through colors and yarns.

Plan is to publish the first book before end 2022, so get in touch and stay tuned!

Name: Prairiebrooke Arts
Description:
This 25 year old Kansas City company started as a passion to provide custom art services to corporate clients.  It has expanded to include an award winning fine art gallery in Historic Downtown Overland Park, Johnson County, Kansas. Prairiebrooke carries work by local/regional, national and international artists.  

The corporate division of Prairiebrooke concentrates on branding the image of facilities in banking, health care, hospitality, government, etc.  Professional art sales consultants are available in the gallery to assist customers with the purchase of fine art for their residential needs.  Prairiebrooke also specializes in custom framing.  With a full service frame shop in the gallery, Prairiebrooke takes pride in the master craftsmanship and archival materials utilized to complete projects designed by industry professionals.  For more information about our company please watch this video and check out our website: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8YlfQJAvhZ4 

Prairiebrooke's sister company, Artsy (www.artsyarts.com) launched in 2010 as a custom art resource for interior designers, facility managers and architects.

Name: Warsaw Association of Artists
Description:
The Warsaw Visual Artists' Association is a living organism which had its birth in the second half of the 1950s.

The formal date of its birth was preceded by the formation of the vision of having its own organisation and creating conditions for education in the art of painting, learning and perfecting the artistic technique among people with artistic interests and talents.

In 1956, a group of people attending art classes at Stołeczny Dom Kultury at 12 Elektoralna Street in Warsaw, run by visual artists Lucjan Jagodziński and Jerzy Baurski, were driven by this idea and formed the Founding Committee of the Amateur Visual Artists' Club.

May 3, 1958 was the formal date of establishment of the Amateur Visual Artists' Club, the first General Meeting, the adoption of the Statute and the election of statutory bodies with the President of the Club, Mrs. Domicela Spejchert.

We invite you to contact us.

Currently the President of the Association is Adam Piotr Rutkowski.

The Salvador Dali Gallery

Name: Cultuurregio 025
Description: 025 is de cultuurregio Arnhem, Nijmegen en de omliggende gemeenten. Het 025 netwerk heeft het doel om uitwisseling en samenwerking te stimuleren tussen culturele instellingen, kunstenaars, makers, de creatieve sector en maatschappelijke organisaties. Beginnend bij de steden Arnhem en Nijmegen, de provincie Gelderland en 22 leden van CNA en CNN is er een stevig fundament gelegd voor de ontwikkeling van 025. Met ingang van 2021 verbreden we de horizon van onze ambities en betrekken we culturele organisaties en overheden uit de regio. Dit betreft instellingen en overheden van de volgende gemeenten: Arnhem, Berg en Dal, Beuningen, Doesburg, Druten, Duiven, Heumen, Lingewaard, Montferland, Mook en Middelaar, Nijmegen, Overbetuwe, Renkum, Rheden, Rozendaal, Westervoort, Wijchen en Zevenaar.

Name: Artemis Gallery
Description:
Selling antiquities, ancient and ethnographic art online since 1993, Artemis Gallery specializes in Classical Antiquities (Egyptian, Greek, Roman, Near Eastern), Asian, Pre-Columbian, African / Tribal / Oceanographic art. Our extensive inventory includes pottery, stone, metal, wood, glass and textile objects from South America, Central America and Mexico, as well as artifacts from Greece, Italy, Rome, Egypt, the Middle East, China, India, Japan and the South Pacific. All works of art offered for sale are unconditionally guaranteed to be authentic and as described, or your money back.

Whether you're a brand-new customer looking to start collecting, a seasoned buyer looking for that one special piece or a fellow dealer looking for something special for one of your own clients, Artemis Gallery can help find exactly what you're looking for. To browse our current catalog of authentic ancient art, please visit the gallery to view items by specific culture, or search by keyword. To receive notices about weekly new product additions and upcoming private sales, please join our email list.

Artemis Gallery Ancient Art also provides evaluation / appraisal services, Thermoluminescence / TL Testing, as well as professional restoration / repair, mounting and framing services, and custom stands.

Looking to sell your ancient art? Artemis Gallery is always looking to buy or consign high quality antiquities from cultures worldwide. Please email us pictures and details, and we'll be happy to get back to you.

Name: WildCraft Studio School
Description: Since 2013, WildCraft has offered exceptional creative programming to adult learners (18 yrs & up) in the fields of Craft,Textiles, Studio Art, Native Art and Nature.  We host over 400 public workshops a year from our SE and N Portland Studios, and deliver a range of private workshops to companies across the NW.

Name: cssJPG
Description:
Initié par Jenfi Guschu en 2012, cssJPG est un projet artistique participatif, qui questionne notre relation à l'environnement et auquel chacun est invité à prendre part.

cssJPG. La rue, notre atelier.

Name: ATSA, Quand l’Art passe à l’Action
Description:
ATSA, Quand l’Art passe à l’Action crée des événements transdisciplinaires sous forme d’interventions, d’installations, de performances ou de mises en scène motivées par le désir d’interpeller la population envers des causes sociales, environnementales et patrimoniales cruciales et préoccupantes.

Les actions de ATSA visent à ce que le propos esthétique et symbolique de l’art soit aussi un outil d’interaction et d’éducation populaire, nous confrontant à  nos responsabilités individuelles et collectives en redonnant à la place publique sa dimension d’espace ouvert à la rencontre et à la réflexion. La dimension participative et le fait d'interpeller le public dans sa citoyenneté est au coeur de la démarche.

L’ATSA s’engage dans un mouvement créatif, pacifiste et responsable, faisant la promotion d’un développement durable et respectueux des droits fondamentaux de l’homme et de la nature.

Name: Fine Art Magazine
Description:
Fine Art Magazine covers a wide variety of art with an eye for works of up and coming as well as established artists from the U.S.A and all over the world.

“Art changes the way we perceive and imagine. Art is a doorway to change. Through artistic vision, cultures and societies realize their dream. Together we share the potential for creative expression. Art equals social change.” -Jamie Ellin Forbes

Name: No 20 Arts
Description:
No 20 Arts is a centre for contemporary arts that hosts a programme of exhibitions, performances and events that support emerging and established artists working across all media.

Located on Cross Street, Islington, the gallery extends for over 3,000 sf. The exhibition space has a flexible format and presents a new inclusive and welcoming model for engaging with the art world which encourages the contemplation of artworks in a relaxed, open and accessible environment.

Name: Business of Art Society
Description:
Founded in 2005 by students at The Courtauld Institute of Art, the Business of Art Society's mission is to offer members insight into all the various business aspects of the art world. The Business of Art Society not only organises talks, tours and events but is, in itself, a business organisation. We are self-funded and offer our members the opportunity to develop skills essential for success in the competitive art and business world.


Illustration for the Business of Art Society by Beatrix Calow 2015.

Name: ContraLuz
Description:
Entre a Cordilheira dos Andes e a floresta amazônica, entre o mar Caribe e a região do Chaco, a América Latina é um território rico e diverso nas suas paisagens, culturas e histórias. Com o desejo de refletir sobre esse território, surgiu ContraLuz, uma plataforma de estudo e ensino focada na discussão de arte e imagem. Queremos entender as contradições do lugar onde habitamos, de onde viemos e suas complexidades a partir das práticas artísticas. As lutas políticas, as violências cíclicas, os golpes de Estado, as obras de arte, as revoluções… tudo isso é parte do que chamamos América Latina. 

ContraLuz quer, portanto, romper as fronteiras nacionais e os desafios da língua para ser um espaço virtual de encontros, discussões e troca de conhecimento.

Fique de olho na nossa programação!

Name: Ateliers éphemères
Description:
Ateliers et formations d'art et d'artisanat.
Événements artistiques - Corporate Évents - expositions artisanales et artistiques

Name: Liza Pruitt Art
Description: Everyone sees things with their own unique vision, and my greatest joy is matchmaking art with art lovers. I specialize in helping people find art of all price points that will be a legacy for their family and friends in the years to come. I can handle custom framing, low budgets, large commissioned pieces, and everything in between. I’d love to work with you and help be a part of making your life more beautiful.

Name: Dire Fare Cambiare
Description: L’Associazione nasce per volontà di un gruppo di donne che condividono impegno, creatività e una grande esperienza sia nella produzione culturale che nella progettazione sociale. Insieme abbiamo deciso di fondare l’Associazione Chiave di Svolta con l’obiettivo di promuovere una cultura della sostenibilità. Cultura deriva dal verbo latino colere, coltivare. La cultura è un bene comune e anche un diritto, uno strumento per il rilancio dell’economia e del Paese. Quale rilancio è possibile per il nostro Paese senza parità di genere, senza sviluppo sostenibile, senza inclusione, senza accesso alla Bellezza? Cambiare cultura significa prendersi cura di ciò che accade, creare un mondo all’altezza di tutti e tutte, significa creare consapevolezza e proporre una nuova narrazione del nostro settore. I nostri valori di riferimento sono espressi nella nostra Costituzione e nell’Agenda 2030 delle Nazioni Unite. Un modello culturale sostenibile è un modello utile al presente e conveniente per il futuro. Lavoriamo per diffondere la cultura della sostenibilità, fornendo strumenti, sostegno e risorse, per favorire processi sostenibili a livello civico, istituzionale e aziendale. I valori in cui ci riconosciamo: etica, innovazione, inclusione, network, sostenibilità, consapevolezza.

Name: Muralkings
Description:
We are an organisation that brings big art projects to life.
professional artists with years of experience in mega art projects and event organisation. All artists bring high quality and have an huge passion for their arts and crafts. Do you want you wall or company transformed into a bespoke and orginal artwork that will make jaws drop? Contact us and we will make you an eyecatcher!

Team Mural Kings

Name: Art & Pictures Gallery
Description:
Art & Pictures Gallery is een online platform met een expositieruimte in Amsterdam.

De unieke samenstelling van de collectie is wat Art & Pictures Gallery onderscheidend maakt. We werken samen met een zeer uiteenlopende groep kunstenaars en fotografen. Zowel gevestigde namen als opkomend talent, uit binnen- en buitenland en in de leeftijd van 26 tot 76! Dit maakt onze collectie aangenaam veelzijdig, ook qua prijzen.

Er is keuze uit zowel originele kunstwerken en schilderijen als fotografie en fine art prints in limited editions. Zoek je iets kleins en persoonlijks of juist een groot 'statement piece', het team van Art & Pictures Gallery kan je helpen en adviseren om de juiste keuze te maken voor thuis of op kantoor. Wij hanteren scherpe prijzen, diverse afwerkingsvormen en oplossingen op maat.

Name: Artists Inside e.V.
Description: The Artists Inside Fellowship is a multidisciplinary and democratic fellowship programme. Artists Inside supports emerging talents under the age of 35 who are based in Berlin. The annual program consists of several weeks of intensive coaching sessions with established artists and market experts, a budget, and a final exhibition.

Name: Mount Dora Center for the Arts
Description:
The Mount Dora Center for the Arts is a charitable, non-profit collaborative leader, which plays an integral role in the community, by demonstrating the passion and commitment to the development of the arts through progressive and diverse educational programs, dynamic exhibits and an annual arts festival which is the foundation of artistic expression within the community.

In 1975, a group of art-loving citizens held the first Mount Dora Arts Festival. It was a small event, but it was a big success. They decided to have an Arts Festival every year.
In 1984, many of these same citizens of Mount Dora banded together to form the Mount Dora Cultural Council. It was their goal to celebrate the arts in Mount Dora, as well as further promote and improve the quality of the Arts Festival. Staffed by volunteers and funded through membership dues and private contributions, the Cultural Council began to grow. In 1985, The Cultural Council moved into 138 East 5th Avenue. More people joined the Cultural Council, and in 1986, the Board of Trustees resolved to change the name to Mount Dora Center for the Arts. The Mount Dora Center for the Arts has provided quality art experiences in the Lake County region of Central Florida ever since.
The Center maintains a year-round calendar of arts-related events and activities and serves the community by providing changing exhibits of original art, arts education programs, classes, seminars and lectures.
In 1989, the Board of Trustees hired the first full-time, degree director to oversee operations and expand the Arts Festival. In 1995, with a 30% down payment and owner financed mortgage, the MDCA Board of Trustees purchased the building 20 years ago, where the Art Center is still located today.

The Arts Festival, MDCA's signature event, hosts 285 artists and draws in 285,000 people from all over.
The historical downtown, Mount Dora is only 35 mins Northwest of Orlando, surrounded by boutiques and along Lake Dora.

Name: KAZ A NOU
Description:
Créé en 2017, KAZ A NOU rend l'art accessible à tous : enfants à partir de 4 ans, adultes débutants ou confirmés, familles et professionnels.

KAZ A NOU, c'est aussi un atelier qui accueille les entreprises pour des team building artistiques permettant plus de cohésion et d'échanges en équipe.
Pour vos événements professionnels, innovez auprès de vos clients et partenaires grâce à nos soirées privées ARTPERO. Le concept : notre artiste peintre réalise une toile sous vos yeux, inspirée du concert de Nicole Dambreville accompagnée de ses musiciens autour d'un apéro convivial.

Pour les enfants et ADO, KAZ A NOU, c'est un atelier de loisirs créatifs et de dessins manga chaque mercredi et pendant les vacances.

Pour les adultes débutants ou confirmés, des ateliers de peinture et dessin sont proposés le mardi, jeudi, vendredi et samedi.

Et pour votre shopping artistique, notre boutique propose tout le matériel adapté à vos envies : peinture acrylique, huile, aquarelle, toiles cotons ou lins, feutres alcools, marqueurs Posca, carnets, blocs dessins, crayon, etc.

Et pour mettre en valeur votre œuvre, notre artisan réalise pour vous des encadrements sur-mesure !

Name: Kemet Foundation
Description:
Kemet Foundation operates in the fields of creativity, innovation, development, sustainability, and empowerment. The foundation has implemented numerous major projects and events in collaboration with governmental, private, and international institutions, as well as several consulates.

We design and deliver creative projects, mentoring programs, training courses, events, awareness-raising initiatives, and advocacy efforts aimed at enhancing the capacity and effectiveness of young people. Our work spans across creative and cultural industries, cultural heritage preservation, education, capacity building and training activities, festivals, creative economy forums, tourism, folklore performances, environmental innovation, sustainable development, and entrepreneurship support for startups.

To date, we have served more than 8,000 beneficiaries, including women, youth, students, children, creative and cultural makers, entrepreneurs, and cultural heritage leaders.

Our key projects and events include:
ALForum 2025 (Albania), Mediterranean International Summit of Creative Economy (MISCE 2024), International Tourism Day 2023, International Museum Day 2023, Tablia Food Festival, Kemet Art Symposium, Alexandria International Folklore Forum, Kemet Incubator for Arts and Creative Industries, Anamel Handcrafts Exhibition, Mobile Cinema Show, and Hypatia Art Week.

Through all these initiatives, Kemet Foundation strives to support and empower creative makers and cultural leaders, fostering innovation, inclusion, and sustainable cultural development.

Name: ART|FORM Art Consultancy
Description:
Founded in 2001, Artform is a vibrantly creative consultancy that offers an end-to-end service for clients who are passionate about their art and investments. We advise those interested in art – with newly started or already established collections – purchasing, managing and cataloging their works. We act in all stages, from advising on the acquisition of works and negotiation to transportation, assembly, storage, and insurance policies. Our team is totally dedicated to hiring, running and curating projects and art installations.

Our mission is to deliver innovative ideas and expert advice for architects, interior designers, art collectors and image – conscious businesses worldwide. Through our know-how, we understand the inner workings of the market, looking for the best opportunities, according to resources and objectives in the medium and long term of each collector, and each art project on a bespoke basis. Assertive acquisitions and heritage preservation will always be a concrete objective of our team. At Artform we are constantly monitoring and analyzing movements in the primary and secondary markets, as well as auction results.

Over the last twenty years we have established a significant internacional network of relationships for our clients with curators, gallery owners, museum directors as well as contemporary artists.

Name: ZINC contemporary
Description: ZINC contemporary, founded and curated by Laura Zeck, represents a roster of artists recognized for their love of color, concept, and visual storytelling. ZINC presents its mission to make more women in the art world visible and successful while inspiring the collection of art as an essential part of everyday life. ZINC passionately believes that art inspires curiosity, discovery, innovation, and fuels positive change in our world.

Name: Museum Bredius
Description: De collectie van Museum Bredius is de privé collectie van Abraham Bredius en omvat o.m. schilderijen van Rembrandt, Jan Steen, van Neer, ‘d Hoendecoeter en Hobbema. Daarnaast zijn er verschillende zilverwerken en tekeningen te aanschouwen. Tevens bestaat de collectie uit porselein en meubelen. De gehele collectie is ondergebracht in een prachtig herenhuis uit de 18e eeuw, gelegen aan de Haagse Hofvijver in het centrum van Den Haag. Hierdoor wordt een bezoek aan ons museum, een bijzondere ervaring.

Name: Julian Art
Description:
My name is Iulian Florescu, and this is my art account. Ever since I was a little boy, I was passionate about drawing and painting. My wish was to pursue a career in arts, but  when the time has come, I made a turn to study finances, a decision that lead me to complete an over 18 years of working  in banking industry. But it seems that when we hit maturity, the luckiest of us tend to restart valuing the passions we once had, and this is exactly why I felt the need to go back and repaint my destiny and to use my free time to develop my passion for painting. It took a while until I discovered my style, it was plenty of inside research, but for now, I could say this is it. For now…
I invite you to discover my art...

Name: Greatjoy Art Studios
Description:
Greatjoy Art Studios is dedicated to nurturing creativity through curated exhibitions, art exchange programs, and collaborations. We collaborate with contemporary visual artists, including fine artists, sculptors, photographers, printmakers, filmmakers, and digital artists. In addition to traditional media, we actively engage with emerging fields like web3 projects, digital art, and NFTs, recognizing the transformative potential of these technologies in the art world.

Our studio fosters creative collaborations across a range of artistic disciplines, including creative writing and performance arts. By breaking down traditional barriers between artistic mediums and embracing innovative technologies, we cultivate a dynamic ecosystem that enhances creative opportunities for our artists. This approach allows creators to amplify their artistic expression through cross-disciplinary connections and new digital platforms, offering them fresh avenues for growth and visibility.

Name: Restoration Division, LLC - Fine Art Conservators
Description:
Restoration Division, LLC has been providing fine art conservation services to the professional community since 2004. Our clients include museums, galleries, insurance companies, appraisers, and prominent collections. We are happy to extend our services to anyone with art related needs.

We specialize in the conservation of both traditional and contemporary paintings, works on paper (including photographs and valuable documents), as well as Asian screens and scrolls, sculptures, objects, antique frames, and textiles. 

Our services also include complimentary pick-up and delivery throughout the Chicagoland area, nationwide pick-up and delivery, and expert installation. We offer complimentary examinations and detailed treatment proposals. 

Professional photography, as well as examination using microscopy, UV, near-infrared, and X-ray imaging is available. Our average turnaround time is 10 business days.

Our memberships include the American Institute for Conservation, the Chicago Area Conservation Group, the Chicago Art Deco Society, and the Victorian Society in America.

Challenging projects are welcome.

Please contact us for an appointment, or to schedule a pick-up.
773-754-6080 main line
773-383-2401 after hours
info@restorationdivision.com
www.restorationdivision.com

Name: Orchestre Symphonique de Longueuil
Description: Orchestre Symphonique ayant pour mandat de faire rayonner la musique en Montérégie et de promouvoir l'excellence musicale. L'Orchestre veut rapprocher la musique classique des gens. En outre il a mis sur pied en collaboration avec 3 commissions scolaires un important programme pour les jeunes. Dans le cadre de ces concerts des jeunes ont la possibilité d'avoir une expérience de scène avec les musiciens professionnels.

Name: MPCulture
Description: Connexion audacieuse de l’art et de la culture, du tourisme et de l’économie, MPCulture est une association loi 1901 et mouvement collectif inédit porté par des structures culturelles, entreprises et collectivités locales du territoire Marseille Provence. Structure organisatrice de deux événements uniques et emblématiques du territoire : MP2013 capitale européenne de la culture et MP2018 Quel Amour !

Name: Collection Care - Art Management
Description: Collection Care is a company of registrars and collections specialists, that provide administrative and logistical services for the care and safeguarding of cultural heritage. We work with museums, galleries, artists, collectors and institutions across Europe, with the utmost discretion and confidentiality, while maintaining high museum standards and best practices.

Name: Bureau Pees
Description: Bureau Pees produceert avontuurlijk theater, bij voorkeur over maatschappelijke thematiek; podiumkunst in direct contact met de biotoop van het publiek, vaak met de lokale uitvoerder als fysieke koppeling.

Name: NeoArtcade
Description: NeoArtcade is a digital gallery which brings together homegrown traditional art galleries to the forefront of technology through the listing of NFTs. At NeoArtcade, we aim to give both individuals and businesses an opportunity to grow their portfolio of collectible assets and explore their passion within the NFT marketplace.

Name: Contemporary Art Partners
Description: Contemporary Art Partners is a fine art company based out of New York, USA

Name: Hamilton Artists Inc.
Description: Hamilton Artists Inc. (The Inc.) is committed to the presentation of contemporary art and related cultural practices. The Inc. facilitates a national dialogue surrounding issues in contemporary art through exhibitions, publications, performances, education and outreach projects. The Inc. actively engages in community arts programming and educational initiatives that represent the cultural life in our city and beyond.

Name: Vrije Academie Maastricht
Description:
De Vrije Academie Maastricht is er voor jouw wens om creatief te zijn, nieuwe dingen te bedenken en geïnspireerd te raken.

Canvas, keramiek of camera. Graffiti muurschildering of interieurdesign. Iedereen vindt bij ons wel een cursus om zich beeldend uit te drukken of te verdiepen in boeiende kunsttheorie.

Onze ervaren en gediplomeerde docenten ondersteunen je graag en geven richting aan jouw creatieve proces.

Name: O Mestre BarberShop - Seja membro do Clube e renove seu visual quando quiser
Description:
O MESTRE Barbershop chegou em Curitiba com a proposta de trazer aos bairros produtos e serviços de alta qualidade, como os encontrados nos grandes shoppings e centros.
Localizado em um ponto de fácil acesso - esquina das ruas Alagoas e Santa Catarina - A Barbearia conta com atendimento bilíngue. Ótima oportunidade para aqueles que desejam praticar um pouco mais de seu segundo idioma, durante sua permanência no salão, seja ele inglês, francês ou espanhol.
Após 1 ano de atendimento e relacionamento com clientes e porque não dizer amigos, reestruturamos nosso espaço para melhor adequar as exigências e expectativas do nosso público: agora somos O MESTRE BarberShop.  O nome surgiu de uma brincadeira entre clientes e o profissional Felipe Simões, sócio-proprietário do estabelecimento.

Sejam todos bem vindos e sintam-se em casa!

Name: Compagnie Artefakt
Description:
La Compagnie Artefakt propose des actions sur le cinéma (ateliers, projections, exposition...) et le livre (lectures, ateliers). 
Elle a utilisé un bus transformé en espace culturel itinérant pour des projections, des spectacles et des expositions.
Tous les ans, elle vous donne rendez-vous à la Karavane, festival itinérant de cinéma en plein-air.
#cinéma #Bretagne #Jeunesse #Liguedel’enseignement #Ille-et-Vilaine #servicecivique #Contes #Enfance #culture #Courts-métrage
Aujourd’hui, le conten’ eur - lieu culturel pour tous sur l’oralité et l’imaginaire - prends vie à Lanhélin - Mesnil Roc’h

Name: GRAFFMATT
Description: GRAFFMATT est un artiste peintre basé à Chambéry. Son univers urbain s'étend de la toile au mur. Naviguant entre travaux personnels et commandes artistiques, GRAFFMATT développe des techniques larges en explorant plusieurs supports sans perdre sa personnalité.

Name: Galería Espacio Continuo
Description:
Espacio Continuo takes as reference the concerns that motivated plastic explorations in Latin American modern art, finding conjunctures with contemporary practices.
Being aware of the legacy of modern art, we intend to explore its continuity and its direct or indirect behavior in current artistic practices.

Finding exercises that juxtapose cross-cutting questions, we invite the viewer to find conductive threads about artistic research that have common starting points.
We want to become a moderating space for these explorations that strengthen encounters, creating dialogues between past and present.

From a previous program (La Central) that gave visibility to young local artists at fairs such as Basel Miami and Frieze London, Espacio Continuo now addresses the diffusion of local artists of medium and long history.

Espacio Continuo has a venue exhibiting represented artists as well as curated entities and the private collection. It is located in Quinta Camacho a neighborhood known by his classical architecture, in a house from 1960 where art and architecture cohabit in the same space.

Name: Les Lumières de la Ville
Description: Pour la création pour tous, partout, dans toutes ses composantes avec comme objectifs : des actions éducatives et pédagogiques; l'épanouissement des citoyens; la promotion des valeurs de la République; la lutte contre les discriminations et une contribution à la vie culturelle des  Cités et des Régions.

Name: Studenten Toneelvereniging Amsterdam (STA!)
Description:
Studenten Toneelvereniging Amsterdam, ofwel STA!, is de grootste studententoneelvereniging van Nederland. Ruim 250 studenten uit verschillende studierichtingen kiezen ieder jaar vanuit hun passie voor theater voor een toneelproductie bij STA!. Daarbij heeft STA! ook ieder jaar zo'n 100 algemene leden, wat het totale ledenaantal brengt op ruim 300.

Ieder jaar zet STA! 14 toneelproducties op de planken van verschillende theaters, onder meer in het Compagnietheater, Podium Mozaïek en in de Stadsschouwburg in samenwerking met Toneelgroep Amsterdam. STA! werkt samen met professionele regisseurs en theatermakers die een opleiding hebben gevolgd aan één van de Nederlandse toneelscholen. 

STA! staat altijd open voor creatieve en nieuwe samenwerkingen. Ook is het mogelijk om bij onze leden, of onze bezoekers, te adverteren. Interesse? Bezoek onze website!

Website: www.sta-toneel.nl 
E-mail: info@sta-toneel.nl

Name: Centre culturel Georges-Vanier
Description: Le Centre culturel Georges-Vanier (CCGV) est un organisme à but non lucratif dédié à promouvoir les pratiques artistiques et culturelles et les rendre accessibles à tou.te.s. Le CCGV est un lieu de diffusion, de rencontre et d’échange multidisciplinaire, interculturel et intergénérationnel qui favorise le vivre ensemble et l’animation de la vie communautaire grâce à la démocratisation des arts et de la culture. Les activités du CCGV s’articulent autour de trois volets principaux : cours et ateliers, expositions et événements culturels.

Name: made in Art Gallery
Description:
We are
An Italian art gallery and art consultancy company specializing in curatorial projects, exhibitions, and art consultancy was founded in 2015 by the artist and  curator Enas Elkorashy , working with a highly qualified team of art experts to have a significant impact on the contemporary art scene in Europe  and Middle East.

Our team
We are passionate about art, luxury, and exclusivity, and we believe in establishing a strong art consultancy company on an international level that can assist a wide range of clients, such as private collectors, cooperators, designers, and strategic collaborations, while working with a highly qualified team of art experts in Italy and Saudi Arabia.

Our vision 
We aim to exhibit different facets of identities, culture, humanity,… through Art, as well as cinematography and fashion.
We believe that art is more than just a physical asset that can grow in value; art also plays a significant role in the development of culture.

Our mission
We aim to exhibit different facets of identities, culture, humanity,… through Art, as well as cinematography and fashion.
We believe that art is more than just a physical asset that can grow in value; art also plays a significant role in the development of culture.

Name: Art Heritage (New Delhi)
Description: Founded in 1977, Art Heritage is committed to promoting an awareness and appreciation of Indian art. The gallery has held over 600 exhibitions, including 20 retrospectives, and published more than 450 books and catalogues celebrating the work of both distinguished artists like M F Husain, Tyeb Mehta, Francis Newton Souza, Akbar Padamsee, Somnath Hore, K G Subramanyan and Sudhir Patwardhan, as well as new and emerging talent from India and abroad.

Name: KLOMPCHING GALLERY
Description:
The Klompching Gallery was established in Dumbo, Brooklyn in September 2007. Owned and operated by Debra Klomp Ching and Darren Ching, the gallery quickly established itself as a gallery with an extraordinary roster of artists from which to purchase some of the best examples of contemporary photography—with exhibition reviews in publications such as The New Yorker, Art Review, Modern Painters, New York magazine and the Wall Street Journal, as well as numerous notable cultural websites.

Since its inception, the gallery has earned a solid reputation for providing informed guidance on the acquisition of contemporary fine art photography.

Name: CELLOTAPE MAGAZINE
Description: WELCOME TO CELLOTAPE MAGAZINE, A BORDERLESS FASHION, ART, LIFESTYLE AND BEAUTY PLATFORM. WE HOPE YOU ENJOY OUR LIMITLESS CULTURAL EXPERIENCE.

Name: La Chapelle Art Gallery
Description:
L'Acid Gallery est une galerie d'art contemporain qui s'appuie sur la recherche d'artistes émergents. Elle vise à mettre en lumière la création contemporaine actuelle dans l'espoir de servir de tremplins pour de jeunes artistes. 

La ligne artistique de la galerie se veut rock, passionné, assez sombre et provocatrice.

Name: Joëlle Talpin Créations Mosaïques
Description:
Dans mon atelier dans le Béarn, je crée des mosaïques uniques intemporelles où se côtoient et se rencontrent de multiples matières, dans des univers poétiques, oniriques ou modernes.

J’aime expérimenter et jouer avec les couleurs et les formes, les textures, les effets de transparences et les jeux de lumière, à la recherche d’harmonie et d’une joyeuse liberté. 

Fortement inspirée par la Nature, je me laisse également guider par la richesse infinie des interactions des matériaux et l’utilisation surprenante de matières « upcyclées » et naturelles.

Le verre joue avec la lumière, la pierre entre en jeu, les émaux répondent et du métal ou des écorces de bois se posent ici et là… 

A travers ses petits bouts qui se rassemblent, une histoire se compose, petit à petit, dans une cohérence globale.
Je vous propose des créations originales, personnalisables et sur-mesure sur commande, telles que :

-	Décorations de sol ou murales intérieurs ou d’extérieurs
-	Enseigne, n° ou plaque de maison
-	Plateau de table ou de guéridon
-	Incrustation dans la faïence d’une salle de bain
-	Miroir
-	Crédence
-	Objets décoratifs d’intérieurs ou d’extérieurs …

Je suis à votre entière disposition pour co-créer avec vous votre projet.

Name: Viscontea Casa d'Aste
Description: Fondata nel 2004 a Milano da Maurizio Quacquaro, Viscontea Casa d’Aste nasce da una forte e genuina passione per l’arte. Con l’obiettivo di rendere omaggio alla città di Milano e ai Visconti, a cui si ispira nel nome e nel simbolo, Viscontea è sede di aste che vedono protagonista l’arte in tutte le sue forme: antiquariato, design, arte orientale, argenti, arte moderna e contemporanea, tappeti, fotografie, vini e distillati. Eterogenea nella sua proposta, Viscontea si appoggia a un’equipe di fidati esperti e si propone di aiutare tutti gli appassionati nella vendita e nell’acquisto di oggetti d’arte.

Name: MATxZEKKY
Description:
MAT x ZEKKY (1981 et 1984) forment un duo dont l’œuvre explore les forces invisibles qui régissent notre monde. Leur travail a pris un tournant décisif lors du premier confinement, face à une émotion partagée et universelle : la sidération face au délitement de l'ordre établi. À travers des créations dominées par la pierre, le béton et les failles numériques (glitch), elles bâtissent un Ordre Imaginaire qui ne cherche pas à nier la fragilité de l’existence, mais à en célébrer l’éclat éphémère. 
En 2024, leur travail est sélectionné pour rejoindre l'exposition "WE ARE HERE" au MUSÉE DU PETIT PALAISà Paris, lors de la première exposition collective internationale d'art urbain en partenariat avec la Galerie Itinérrance et la Galerie Taglialatella.



En 2022, sous leur impulsion, l'association

Le Mur de Reims est créée et rejoint le réseau des Murs France - Belgique - Luxembourg initiés en 2003 par le Mur Oberkampf.

Name: ArtVilla Academy
Description:
ArtVilla Academy is leading Art class of India a platform where you can find your self. to live freely and have a creative life.
its a place where you can learn painting ,craft pottery, miniature pottery, sculpture.
Our institute has no age limit because we believe that there is no age to learn.

Name: DoReMiRD
Description:
DoReMi es un centro de educación artística con la misión de fomentar el desarrollo de sus estudiantes mediante la implementación de programas educativos de calidad, atreves de una formación artística Completa. 

Incrementando la individualidad, la creatividad y la independencia, así como el desarrollo del lenguaje, del pensamiento lógico matemático, la disciplina, la coordinación, el sentido rítmico y el buen uso de instrumentos musicales

Name: dragon ball
Description: Being a leader has nothing to do with your job title — and everything to do with your humanity.

Name: Gallery North
Description:
Gallery North in Setauket NY is a non-profit organization that is known for showing local artists' work in 10-12 shows a year. Gallery North is active in promoting education in the arts and holds many classes and workshops for adults and children. Classes are taught by professional artists using various mediums including oil,watercolor, printmaking,pastels and more. Yearly events include The Joe Reboli Wet Paint Festival in June and the Outdoor Art Show in September.
The Gallery Shop is a place in which one can find unique gifts from  jewelry and American pottery to Fair Trade products and sustainable bags,clothing and crafts.

Name: The Kumo Collective
Description:
KUMO is an independent artist collective that prides itself on the international scope of its members. We are a multimedia platform built by, and created for, young artists. Our goal is creating an artistic hub that celebrates expression in its
myriad forms, all united under one domain.

Name: Austin Auction Gallery
Description:
The Finest in Traditional Live Auctions

Austin Auction Gallery is your premier venue for rare, collectible and unique items. Since 1983 we have conducted over 3000 auction offering an incredible range of merchandise making each auction an adventure unto itself.  Whether you are buying or selling antiques, mid-century modern, art, silver, firearms, jewelry, collectibles or anything of value, Austin Auction Gallery's knowledgeable staff is here to insure a satisfying auction experience.

Name: Farshchian Art
Description:
Mahmoud Farshchian is a master of Persian painting. He was born in the city of Isfahan in Iran, a place famed for its art and artists, and it was here where he started to learn art, painting and sculpting.

Now you can enjoy the brilliance of Master Mahmoud Farshchian's artwork in your home. Authentic Mahmoud Farshchian open edition prints are available only on FarshchianArt.com. These high-quality, beautifully produced prints capture the essence of the Master's most inspiring works of art. Colors and fine details are richly reproduced and offered on a variety of mediums and sizes to best suit your personal tastes and décor. Choose fine art prints, framed prints, metal stand out prints, and canvas gallery wrapped prints. Prints available include: Compassion, The Last Breath of the Phoenix, Peace on Earth, Perfume of Love, Quo Vadis?, and Self Haven.

Limited Edition Prints are also available - hand picked and quality controlled by the artist himself.

These Limited Edition prints are created with state-of-the-art lithography technology. Because so much attention is paid to details in master Farshchian's work, the prints are of the highest resolution. The dynamic color range is like serigraphy.
