Colors and fine details are duplicated so precisely that it is almost impossible to tell them apart from the originals. These limited editions of only 300 each have been signed by the artist, and are accompanied by a letter of authenticity. Available limited edition prints include: Growth, Morning Blossom, Morning Star, Injustice, Gaze, and Enchanted Melody.

Name: Genius Music Center
Description:
Notre établissement offre de
multiples formations musicales professionnelles
avec l'introduction de divers
instruments et des services
d'apprentissage modernes

Name: Alexa Global
Description:
Alexa Global solves the complex puzzles of authenticity and innovations.
Our work is transparent and inclusive, elegant into simplicity.

Name: ArtDaGio
Description: Geniesse Deine Ferien bei uns in der Surselva, im schönen Graubünden.  Lebe Deine Kreativität in unseren Workshops aus oder stöbere in unseren Kunstwerken.

Name: Opera Spanga
Description:
Opera Spanga presents Pagliacci & Il Tabarro this summer: 2019. 
This double-bill of Leoncavallo’s Pagliacci and Puccini’s Il Tabarro both have an unfaithfull wife in common. The protagonist Nedda (Pagliacci) and Giorgetta (Il Tabarro) are not driven by lust but by the urgent need to reinvent themself

PAGLIACCI & IL TABARRO
2019 premiere: juli 25
performances: 
July: 27 & 30 
August:  1, 3, 6, 8 & 10 augustus 
TIME: 20:30 uur 
LOCATION:  Spangahoekweg 47 Spanga (gemeente Weststellingwerf) 
Tickets: https://www.operaspangatickets.nl/

Name: Honest Art
Description:
Honest Art empowers children of all ages in their own creative growth to maximize happiness and development. We provide an engaging experience for all ages and skill levels. It's not about coloring within the lines, but the opposite! That's Honest Art!

Honest Art was founded by Liza Cruz, one of New York's Finest Artist’s. Liza received her formal training at the School of Visual Arts in New York City and has worked for many years designing some of the world's top selling children's clothes, and working on award winning websites and marketing companies as a video animator. Now, she pursues her lifelong passion for painting (www.lizacruz.com) and devotes her time to teaching and sharing art with the world around her.

For more information about Honest Art, please visit our website at www.honestart.com and/or email us at info@honestartstudio.com.

Name: HorozArt
Description:
Çağdaş sanat, koleksiyoner, sanatsever ve bilginin buluştuğu sanat platformu.
An online art platform gathering contemporary art & art collectors.

Name: INSIGHT ARTSPACE
Description:
InSight Artspace is an interactive gallery that integrates artists' own personal journey, passion and story in order to create a more meaningful exchange between artists, collectors and patrons. Our founding goal is to stimulate intercultural exchanges through cross-disciplinary art interventions that will allow for a more intimate appreciation. Through pop up shows, art fairs, and a variety of alternative venues, InSight Artspace promotes and explores art as an essential component of life. 

Founder, INSIGHT ARTSPACE

Catherine Testorf was the co-founder of Sohotel Artspace Gallery in New York City. The gallery introduced international artists to the NYC art scene and offered a platform to create exchanges through different art expressions such as music, fashion, and dance. Today,  breaking with the traditional format and “white box” gallery, Catherine Testorf aims to make art more accessible in a variety of intimate settings and to integrate art in atypical venues such as restaurants, spas, offices and more.  It is her belief that visualizing art as part of a broader life experience inspires an emotional and intellectual connection.

Name: Centro Cultural Facultad  de Artes UdeA
Description:
Somos un espacio para el arte y la cultura ubicado en el barrio Carlos E. Restrepo de la ciudad de Medellín. Nuestro propósito es ser un puente entre el arte y la comunidad.

Nuestros espacios están abiertos para la creación y proyección de proyectos artísticos. También ofrecemos talleres y cursos del Centro de Extensión de la Facultad de Artes.

Name: Trupe Ortaética de Teatro Comunitário
Description: A Trupe Ortaética de Teatro Comunitário é um coletivo cultural guarulhense com 21 anos ininterruptos de atividades em pesquisas artísticas e socioculturais, pautado pelos direitos humanos. Com um elenco inclusivo, o coletivo tem relevante representatividade e característica intergeracional.

Name: Winkler Arts and Culture
Description: Winkler Arts and Culture, Inc. is a volunteer organization whose mission is focused on providing opportunities to share art in its various forms while celebrating the culture that brings art alive. Winkler Arts and Culture is dedicated to providing opportunities to teach, share and celebrate artistic and cultural expression, through education, programs and a community space.

Name: Shannon's Fine Art Auctioneers
Description:
Shannon's opened in 1997 as Connecticut's Premier Fine Art Auction house. Specializing in American and European 19th and early 20th century paintings, Shannon's holds their auctions twice annually. The auctions, held in Milford, Connecticut, are composed of paintings, watercolors, drawings, bronzes and fine prints. In recent years our sales have expanded to include modern and contemporary works as market favor changes. All works of art are authenticated and guaranteed. Gene Shannon, owner of the company, has been an antique art dealer in for over 25 years, as Shannon Fine Arts, Inc. Gene has attained an international reputation for his integrity and knowledge of fine art.

In 1997, after many years of dealing with other auction houses, he and his wife and partner, Mary Anne Shannon opened Shannon's Fine Art Auctioneers with offices and galleries in Milford, Connecticut. In 1998, their daughter Sandra Germain, with her extensive art, business and marketing background, joined the firm.

Shannon's philosophy and marketing strategy are founded on their own experiences as buyers and sellers in the auction market. The company prides itself on offering personalized service to its clients. Extra care is given to helping educate new collectors and consignors.

Name: AP Contemporary
Description:
We provide a platform for contemporary artists from all corners of the world with a particular focus on our carefully selected roster of emerging South East Asian artists.

Established in 2011, AP Contemporary has since shown its collection in major international art fairs (Art Asia Miami, Art Tokyo, Art Stage Singapore etc.), as well as shown a number of fabulous exhibitions in its own space in Hong Kong.
We are proud to have worked with major international artists, some of whom had their first solo shows in Hong Kong with us.

Currently we concentrate on bringing worldwide recognition to our young talents, and we promise to offer more interesting names in the near future.
Location: Hong Kong, Hong Kong SAR, China

Name: Hugues LOKOSSA, Auteur, Ecrivain, Artiste
Description: Auteur

Name: JSO Art Associates
Description: Art consulting, art curation, fine art, framing, art installation,  art inventory, artist representation, local artists

Name: Haute Culture
Description:
Haute Culture est une association non lucrative à vocation humanitaire née de la
volonté d'un groupe de jeunes femmes désirant allier leurs centres
d’intérêts, la mode, la musique et l’art, à leurs valeurs de partage.


Les volontés de Haute Culture se déclinent sous trois aspects :

. Le partage de la culture dans le but de rassembler et de fédérer la communauté locale autour de diverses disciplines du milieu artistique.

. Le partage et la promotion de talents, auprès d’amateurs et de professionnels, permettant la création de réseaux, l’évolution professionnelle et les échanges humains.

. Enfin, le partage solidaire via notre collaboration avec la Fondation Rambourg favorisant l'accès à la culture.

Name: YKLM Auctions
Description:
YKLM Auctions is an independently owned auction house located in Richmond, BC, Canada. 

Since being founded in China in 2015, YKLM quickly evolved into an established  and recognizable institution, acknowledged by international art collectors for its growing collection of high-quality fine art, antiques, jewellery and collectable items.

In 2019, YKLM Auctions (Canada) will offer access to live auctions on its online platform and mobile App to allow art collectors from any location to easily view and bid on its large collection of exclusive works.

YKLM Auctions is the sister company of Lipont Art Centre, a 21,000-square-foot facility in Richmond that hosts live auctions, performances and exhibitions, and also provides studio space for contemporary artists.

Name: Max Estrella Gallery
Description: MAX ESTRELLA was founded in Madrid in 1994 with the aim of promoting young emerging artists, as well as consolidated authors that had an innovative language clearly of their own. In 1998, the Gallery moved to a new space of 350 square meters located in the art gallery circuit of Madrid. This new exhibition space provided a great leap in the Gallery’s project of developing of a wider program focusing on young contemporary international artists that have made a significant contribution to the challenges of aesthetics in the beginning of the new millennium.

Name: Hypergallery Ltd
Description:
Hypergallery has been publishing and dealing in limited edition album cover art prints for over 15 years. We are album art enthusiasts, record cover lovers, well-connected collectors, and premium print publishers devoted to working with the greatest artists associated with this unique genre.

Founded in 2005 by father-daughter team Rob and Emily Smeaton, Hypergallery launched with a huge collection of prints by Rob’s former publishing business, which in turn had been born out of a conversation with album art design legend Storm Thorgerson. In the early Noughties, Storm was looking for a partner in his ambitious desire to publish work from his own incredible archive of Hipgnosis album cover art, beginning with Pink Floyd and Led Zeppelin. As a former designer and LP collector Rob leaped at the chance.

This encounter set Hypergallery off on a journey of discovery, meeting little gems and mega stars of design and music from the 1950s right up to the present day. And here we are now, proudly celebrating seven decades of fantastic sleeve design and delighting in the growing renown for album cover art.

Name: La Fonderie D'Art D'Inverness
Description:
Bienvenue à la Fonderie d'Art d'Inverness, fonderie de bronze située en plein coeur du Québec.
Depuis la fondation en 1987, nous sommes spécialisés dans le moulage,
le coulage et la finition de sculptures et de monuments en bronze et en aluminium.
www.fonderieart.com

Name: Escola São Paulo de Cinematografia
Description:
Método
A Escola São Paulo de Cinematografia adota o Método Alziro Barbosa, ABC, que tem como objetivo aprofundar o entendimento da imagem cinematográfica de forma clara e objetiva. Através do domínio de técnicas, equipamentos e conceitos, sempre focando na construção da imagem narrativa. O método reflete a formação e experiência de Alziro Barbosa, que tem graduação e mestrado em direção de fotografia pelo renomado Instituto Estatal de Cinema Russo, a escola de cinema mais antiga do mundo.

Com mais de 100 filmes no currículo, entre longas-metragens, séries, publicidades, documentários  e animações stop-motion, Alziro oferece um conhecimento prático sólido. Esse método foi desenvolvido ao longo de 29 anos como professor, palestrante e consultor, sendo adaptado para atender às diferentes realidades do mercado cinematográfico e audiovisual brasileiro.

Name: Donald Heald Rare Books
Description: Donald Heald Rare Books is a fine art company based out of 124 E 74th St, New York, New York, United States.

Name: My Little Caravan
Description:
We are a creative education partner that brings structured, hands-on Art & Craft programs directly into schools.

Our mission is clear — to nurture creativity, focus, and confidence in every child through engaging, skill-building artistic experiences. Every session follows a STEAM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Art and math)-integrated approach, blending logic, observation, and hands-on exploration with creative expression — making learning more meaningful and multidimensional.

Name: Arteincampo
Description: Arteincampo è un’associazione culturale senza scopo di lucro nata nel 2009, che promuove attività legate alla produzione ed alla conoscenza artistica. Offre diversi corsi in varie discipline artistiche legate al disegno, all'insegnamento delle tecniche pittoriche e alla figura disegnata.

Name: Firstdraft
Description:
Firstdraft is a national Artist-Run-Initiative (ARI) hub that supports the development of emerging and experimental artistic practice through diverse and innovative programs. 

Firstdraft champions emerging and experimental arts by supporting innovative artists, curators and writers through four interconnected areas; exhibition, creative and professional development, community engagement and sustainability.

Name: Patterson Creative
Description: Online freelance business and store set on providing the best writing and design services for all businesses - big, small, and in-between. In addition, customers can purchase any of the art- and design-based merchandise at the same time.

Name: Gallery Charly
Description:
Inauguré le 19 décembre 2018 à Cotonou (République du Bénin), Gallery Charly est un espace de réception, et de diffusion de la création contemporaine africaine. Elle est une initiative du plasticien contemporain béninois Charly d’Almeida. 

Collectionnées en Europe, admirées en Amériques, scrutées en Afrique, les œuvres de Charly d’Almeida interpellent les amateurs d’art à travers le monde. Après plus de trente (30) années de production marquées par des expositions sur les cinq (05) continent, il décida d’ouvrir dans son pays de naissance, la République du Bénin, une galerie d’art devant montrer une vue panoramique de la créativité plastique contemporaine béninoise.

 « J’ai eu l’idée d’ouvrir un petit espace, que j’ai dénommé Gallery Charly afin de permettre au public, aux jeunes artistes, aux néophytes de l’art, et aux acheteurs de passer contempler mes œuvres. Cet espace est aussi ouvert aux étudiants, aux élèves, aux écoliers, qui ont des prédispositions pour l’art, et qui souhaiteraient côtoyer les artistes », confie-t-il.

Construite suivant un design particulièrement soigné, et contemporain, Gallery Charly abrite deux espaces d’exposition : une salle d’exposition in, et une salle d’exposition out (une terrasse). Outre ce dessein de réception, et de diffusion de l'art africain contemporain, cette galerie accueille également des rencontres-discussions autour de problématiques ayant trait à la production contemporaine africaine. 

Lieu de rencontre et de diffusion de la création contemporaine africaine, elle se veut aussi un espace dédié à la lecture. Aussi, à la mini-bibliothèque de Gallery Charly, pourriez-vous consulter des ouvrages touchant à l'art africain contemporain; des catalogues d'exposition; ainsi que des essais de théorisation de la production plastique africaine.

Name: Dante Art School
Description: The educational program is based on modern approaches. The purpose of the school is to educate both intellectually and aesthetically of teenagers and to form their taste correctly. The school's team of professionals constantly develops innovative approaches, which are as much as possible focused on the interests of children and their parents, as well as young people and people of any age, and the quality of teaching. Age of listeners: unlimited (from 4 years old)

Name: Ars Magna
Description:
Boas vindas à Ars Magna, uma livraria especializada em ficção científica e fantasia nacional. Nós somos apaixonados por histórias incríveis que desafiam a imaginação e levam o leitor a mundos desconhecidos e emocionantes.

Nosso objetivo é promover e incentivar a leitura de autores brasileiros de ficção científica e fantasia, oferecendo uma ampla seleção de livros e um ambiente acolhedor e amigável para os amantes desses gêneros. Na Ars Magna, você encontrará desde os clássicos da literatura fantástica até as mais recentes publicações de autores independentes.

Aqui você também tem a oportunidade de participar de eventos e encontros conhecendo e conversando com os criadores de suas histórias favoritas.

Na Ars Magna, acreditamos que a ficção científica e a fantasia são mais do que meros entretenimentos; elas são instrumentos poderosos para explorar ideias e questões importantes que nos ajudam a compreender melhor o mundo em que vivemos. Por isso, convidamos você a explorar as nossas prateleiras e descobrir novas histórias e mundos maravilhosos.

Venha fazer parte da nossa comunidade de leitores apaixonados por ficção científica e fantasia nacional!

Name: BLKHAPPY
Description:
BLKHAPPY is a creative network with the potential to support and jumpstart artists careers, spark creativity and bring back the creative "destination". 

We connect creatives, whilst making pathways for artists to be paid and heard on their own terms.

 In addition to creating opportunities for artists to collaborate, share resources, and host events, we also support programing that involves folks just starting out in the creative scene looking to get involved. 

 We are an active and interactive community.

Name: Onne van der Wal Photography Gallery
Description:
Onne van der Wal's award winning nautical photography is world renowned for its unique composition, brilliant colors, tack sharp details and his attention to the technicalities of digital photography. From his Newport, RI based studio and retail gallery, Onne and his staff manage his extensive collection of stock and fine art photography of more than one million photographs. Onne's library holds images from around the globe and features the most beautiful classic yachts, the sleekest racing machines, quiet harbors and secluded beaches, icebergs, and wildlife.

First known as a professional sailor who raced in the Whitbread Around the World Race, Onne's keen eye for composition is steeped in his love for the ocean and boats, and the serene beauty they offer when photographed. Often the first choice for commercial assignments, Onne's name is synonymous with getting the job done with brilliant results. His images make an ad campaign rise above the competition and his fine art prints bring his creativity home to your walls or office. Stop into the Newport Gallery to see his amazing fine art photographs and see for yourself why his work is simply the best.

Name: Art House Atelier - Art School Prague
Description:
Prague art school, Art House Atelier offers great drawing and painting courses for kids and adults, beginners, and advanced artists. Join us and start living your dream! 

You will meet new friends, relax, and drink coffee or a glass of wine. Art House Atelier has a great team of professional and friendly lecturers. We will provide you with all art material. Don't hesitate and sign up for your free trial lesson!

Name: John Noott Galleries
Description:
Established in 1972, John Noott Galleries exhibits a diverse collection of art at two stunning locations in Broadway, The Cotswolds.
Over the past 30 years, John Noott has established a reputation as one of the country's leading fine art dealers with a vast knowledge of 19th and 20th Century paintings. His expert services are often required on vetting committees at major art fairs around the country and he has an excellent relationship with the premier Auction Houses. 
Over the past 15 years, his daughter Amanda has developed the contemporary side of the business and the galleries are proud to exhibit some of the finest artists painting today. 
John Noott Galleries at Cotswold Court display a regularly changing selection of original paintings in oils, watercolour and pastel, together with a fabulous range of limited edition giclée prints by our leading 'gallery artists' which are exclusive to us. 
John Noott Galleries at Broadway Modern specialises in British art, sculpture, ceramics, furniture and glass with a 'modern' feel - not necessarily abstract but definitely 21st century. Our six beautifully presented showrooms hold a diverse and eclectic range of work, from well-established British artists whose work is collected worldwide to recent graduates who we feel have a very promising future. 
Our stock is constantly changing, with many solo and group exhibitions held throughout the year at our galleries, on what is possibly the prettiest High Street in England.

Name: Gallerie Ltd
Description:
Gallerie Ltd - Tauranga Fine Art Gallery.

Open from 8th July 2014 - Tauranga's newest Fine Art Gallery. 
Exhibiting work from some of the most exciting visual artists from NZ and around the world including Don Overbeay, Bruce McLachlan & Rambo Estrada.

Name: Urban Makers
Description:
Découvrez Urban Makers, votre partenaire privilégié pour des expériences artistiques urbaines uniques ! Spécialistes en animations et activités autour de l’art urbain, nous proposons des programmes sur mesure pour les entreprises, les particuliers et les établissements scolaires. 

Faites de votre prochain événement un moment inoubliable en explorant la créativité urbaine avec Urban Makers.

Name: KÉPESVAGY
Description:
Cégek számára kreatív csapatépítő festéseket, és olyan konzultációkat tartunk, mellyel a cég ideális jövőképét alkotjuk meg képként.

Magánszemélyek részére személyes és online élményfestéseket, rajz és festőtanfolyamokat tartunk.
Több, mint 10000 résztvevőnk visszajelzése alapján bátran jelenthetjük ki, hogy a legnagyobb eredmény, amit a festéssel elérünk, az nem csak magának a képességeknek a visszaszerzése, de a festés elsősorban rendkívül feltöltő, és kikapcsolja az ember agyát, eltávolít a mindennapi gondoktól. Ezáltal kerül az ember magasabb érzelmi állapotba, és lesz képes cselekvőbb lenni az életében.

Képenként viszünk közelebb az önbizalommal teli, tudatos, boldog élet megteremtéséhez!

Name: Renaissance Museum & Art
Description:
Renaissance is a privately-run organization partnered with prominent museums worldwide. As exclusive licensees for nearly a decade to New York City's prestigious Metropolitan Museum of Art, we led the Indian market of museum artwork reproduction, and set the Indian standard for worldwide affordable art sales. I founded Renaissance in connection with my family's longstanding involvement and association with both Indian art and the arts of six world continents, and I have been proud to take the next step and bring the arts of the world straight to your front door. My vision for Renaissance has been a collaboration with very dedicated individuals who appreciate World Art, adore Culture, revere History, and honour the Museum as the foremost institution of sharing humanity's finest works with the public. In only our first years of business, we were able to establish ourselves as one of the premier distributors of fine art reproductions in all of Asia.

Our longstanding personal bond with the world’s principal art historians, designers, master craftspeople, and many different museums gives Renaissance the opportunity to make a wide array of fine art merchandise available to everyone. Based on original masterpieces from the vaults of the finest museums in the world, these elegant items have been painstakingly researched and conceived by our art history associates in collaboration with our expert designers. Our items are accompanied by a descriptive card providing information on their origin, history, and importance.

Our fair-trade initiatives have been launched in support of our sister organizations, furthering our educational mission of widening global public awareness and appreciation of art. In the process, we hope to leverage our longstanding sales networks for the revival and promotion of traditional Indian art and crafts.

Name: L'ARTE Restauro & Belle Arti
Description:
Negozio specializzato nella vendita di prodotti per Belle Arti e Restauro, 
le più importanti marche di prodotti sia per hobbisti che professionisti
servizio di cornici su misura nuove e d'epoca. Rivenditore prodotti per Bioedilizia.
Laboratorio di restauro

Name: ANG ARTS
Description:
AnG Arts creates and markets fine art, creative team building workshops and motivational keynote presentations globally. Ang Arts promotes Gregory Burns’ authentic, interactive corporate painting workshops and inspiring keynote presentations which are fueled by his gold medal performances achieved while swimming during three Paralympic Games and his entrepreneurial journey as an internationally acclaimed painter, staging exhibitions globally since 1980. Gregory inspires audiences to be and achieve more physically, mentally and emotionally.
Ang Arts also promotes photographer Angie Tan Burns. Since 1996, Angie has distilled the essence of her subjects through the camera lens. Approaching architectural and landscape photography with the eye of an Impressionist, resulting in painterly abstracted compositions, blurring the lines between photography and painting. Angie’s love of nature and sports further stimulated her to embrace photography as a means of referencing landscapes and seascapes as well as the energy exposed by individuals while engaged in dynamic physical pursuits. Often scuba-diving along coral reefs or perched high above the ground, Angie revels in finding the optimum angle that will synthesize and crystalize the unique spirit of the people, places and creatures who’s portraits she crafts.
Contact angie@angarts.com to learn more.

Name: How-Tos
Description:
How-To is a new publication seeking writers.

Why Start a New Publication?
How-To is a new publication that was started for one reason.

I want to provide opportunities for new writers to share their How-To’s

What Topics Should You Write About?
The following list is not complete, but it will give you an idea of possible topics.

How-To Cook XY
How-To earn …
How-To create Software XY
How-To build …
How-To play …
How-To gain Followers …
How-To …
So long as your story is ANY How-To that shares something valuable that you have learned or experienced - that’s what we are looking for.

Your story can be as long or short as you want to make it in this publication.

Name: Bhairavi Design & Skill Academy
Description:
At Bhairavi Design & Skill Academy, we bridge the gap between Institutions and Industries through creative, skill-based education. Founded by Bhairavi Siva, an industry expert with international experience across Singapore, Malaysia, and India, the academy focuses on Product Design, Tool & Die Design, and Product Development training.

We specialize in coaching aspirants for India’s top design entrance exams — NID, NIFT, IIT-CEED, AIFD, NATA, and Fine Arts — with students now pursuing successful design careers across the world.

Our learning approach blends art, engineering, and innovation, nurturing young minds to become design thinkers, innovators, and creators. We believe in education that connects imagination with practical innovation, empowering every learner to design with purpose and impact.

Name: Carbone 14 Association d'art contemporain
Description: Association du master 1 histoire de l'art pcs conservation, gestion, diffusion des oeuvres d'art des XXe et XXIe siècles de l'Université Paul-Valéry Montpellier 3, Carbone 14 a pour projet chaque année de monter une exposition ou un évènement à caractère culturel dans le cadre de la formation des étudiants.

Name: Tinney Contemporary
Description:
Tinney Contemporary is a Nashville-based art gallery specializing in the selection of collectible contemporary art for use in both commercial and residential spaces. A series of curated exhibitions are presented throughout the year. 

In addition to presenting exhibitions, we provide professional art services to individual collectors, banks, law firms, hotels, restaurants, hospitals, and other businesses. We assist our clients with every aspect of the process of selecting, purchasing, framing, and installing artwork. The depth of our experience is evidenced by the projects we have successfully implemented. Our clients can be confident that their projects will be successfully carried out from inception to installation. We know how to wisely and creatively work within a budget to achieve our clients goals and objectives.

Specialties: Original art, art consulting, art acquisition, custom framing, installation and project management.

Name: David Barnett Gallery
Description: Art Gallery Milwaukee, Since 1966 the David Barnett Gallery in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, has been offering clients some of the finest artworks in the world. Our services include, framing, appraisals,art consultation, restoration and conservation, digital fine art reproductions and more. We are Milwaukee's premier art gallery.

Name: Connection Arts Space
Description:
Connection Arts Space Inc. is a non-for-profit arts organisation based in the City of Greater Dandenong. We’re run by a diverse group of passionate volunteers that believe in our vision, ‘Art for a better world’. We recognise that art can challenge traditional ways of thinking whilst also allowing for opportunities to connect and collaborate. Through workshops, art exhibitions and events we seek to make the arts accessible, relevant and sustainable.

OUR HISTORY
When our founding member, Mehdi Jaghuri (MJ), moved from Afghanistan to Australia at age 14,  art was a tool to gain confidence, connect with others and share his experience of seeking refuge.

MJ had the idea to start a gallery that could provide the community with greater access to art. This was made a reality when C.A.S opened in November 2015 with the help of fellow artists and friends: Andrew Duong, Genevieve Townsend, Michelle Clarke, Mo Chamas, Tahlia Megele, Daniel Kerrison, Shariff Muidul and many others.

Since our first busy year, the C.A.S team have worked tirelessly to improve our strategic direction. We’re excited to be strengthening our volunteer teams and building our artistic program for the future ahead.

Name: Kate Owen Gallery
Description:
Discover the very best of contemporary Indigenous Australian art at Kate Owen Gallery, where a vibrant tapestry of creativity unfolds. Our gallery proudly presents an extensive and ethically sourced collection, showcasing the diverse styles of Indigenous art from across the nation.

Kate Owen Gallery is proud to have showcased Aboriginal art and culture to the world since 2007. Our journey to becoming one of the largest Australian Aboriginal art galleries flourished out of a passion to create a space where ancient narratives meet contemporary expression.

Representing around 250 artists, our gallery spans three levels and houses over 2000 artworks, ranging from affordable paintings to large investment pieces. The Gallery is a proud member of The Aboriginal Art Association of Australia (AAAA), an Association that binds members to a strict code of conduct, so visitors can be assured that artists are dealt with fairly, transparently and with respect.

Name: Lubba | Arte, Design & Cultura Visual
Description: Oficina de Aprendizagem em Artes Visuais e Design Gráfico. Canal de Informação, Inspiração e Cultura Visual. Espaço criativo para ensino e pesquisa. Rico acervo em livros e materiais efêmeros sobre o tema. Localizado na Zona Norte de São Paulo. Idealizado pelo designer Carlos Andre Inacio.

Name: Onset • Where creation begins
Description: Onset is a free web application which matches artists, technicians and projects/creators in the audiovisual, performing arts and photography. Artists and technicians : Get artistic job offers and castings that match your profile. Creators and project leaders: Build your team online and post your offers easily.

Name: The Living Walls
Description:
The Living Walls (TLW) is the one stop solution for all your art needs, paintings & wall décor services.
* We create and sell beautiful customized paintings, original handmade paintings, commissioned artworks, portraits, landscapes, palette knife paintings, modern art, abstracts art works etc. at very affordable prices.
* We also provide all types of paintings/ artworks on rental basis for homes, offices, hotels, resorts and hospitals at a very economical prices
* We are specialized palette knife paintings, Pop Art, minimalistic art, canvas paintings, water color, Acrylic paintings, Oil paintings, Pencil & charcoal sketching etc.
Art patrons and Art lovers - Please Contact us at Mobile: 9108337700, contact@thelivingwalls.com,

Name: Lux Models - Produtora de Modelos
Description: Preparamos modelos para iniciar na carreira da moda, mercado artístico, publicidade, TV & Cinema.

Name: The CabsEverywhere Creative Production House
Description: The CabsEverywhere Production House: engaging delightful teams of craft, music, engineering, performance, writing, and technologic professionals (kinda like the Pretenders, if Jd Michaels was Chrissie Hynde, which would be awesome). Savvy. Always innovative. Black Owned Since Always.

Name: White Ship, Inc.
Description:
White Ship's mission is to harness the power of art to create a world of human flourishing.  We create experiences for people from all walks of life to discover the dynamic wonder of art, nurture their unique creative gifts and experience the power of diversity.

One of the core pillars of our work is the EGAKU Program - an art program which emerged from artist Kunihiko Yazawa’s enquiry into the question, “Why do we paint pictures?”   Initially started for children in 2002, we launched EGAKU for business professionals in 2004.  To date we have had over 20,000 program participants from children to CEOs, and more than 200 companies including major Japanese companies and multinationals have deployed the program.  EGAKU has been deployed in companies and educational institutions to foster 21st century skills such as self-awareness, embracing diversity and creativity.


Art Programs for Corporates - Collaboration Programs:

At White Ship, besides our proprietary art programs for corporates based around our core EGAKU Program, we also offer programs in partnership with experts from other fields. 

・Will Lab × EGAKU:  A program designed to empower women to unleash their leadership potential
Partner:Will Lab, Inc. 

・KOERU -Change Leader Lab-: A program to develop and empower change leaders to create their own vision, and translate ideas into action
Partner: SIGMAXYZ, Inc.

Name: Peters Valley School of Craft
Description: Peters Valley School of Craft is a nonprofit, tax-exempt organization located in the beautiful Delaware Water Gap National Recreation Area of New Jersey. Founded in 1970, the school offers immersion learning workshops for adults and youth in blacksmithing, ceramics, fibers, fine metals, photography, woodworking, printmaking, and special topics. In addition, Peters Valley supports artist residencies, outreach programs, public lectures, and gallery exhibitions, and continues to be a national thought leader in the field.

Name: Centre international d'art contemporain de Montréal (CIAC MTL)
Description:
The CIAC – Centre international d’art contemporain de Montréal is a non-profit organisation administered by a board of directors and managed by personnel with an expertise in artistic production, communications and arts administration.

The mandate of the CIAC is to disseminate contemporary art from Québec, Canada and abroad.

Initially identified with the visual arts, the CIAC also showcases the creative practices of artists working in design, graphic art, art film and video, architecture and urbanism, and landscape architecture. 

The CIAC’s aim is to make its activities accessible to the greatest possible number of visitors. It employs various strategies to achieve this, including exhibitions, conferences, discussions between artists and the public and educational activities for a variety of target groups.

Name: WSS Fine Art
Description: Supreme is a visionary who's character traits and vibrant personality stand out just as much as his signature art form of eye-catching and immaculate geometric abstract paintings, coined “Perfectionism”. Supremes' work tells a detailed story through color & shape. His objectives are to apply his designs to a variety of logical products and places to promote creativity, energy, and positivity in others.

Name: Franz Mayer of Munich, Inc.
Description: Franz Mayer of Munich is a fine art fabricator studio producing high profile, public work/projects created in collaboration with architects, contemporary artists and designers worldwide in both architectural art and mosaics. Our business has been thriving for over 160 years and we specialize in both cutting-edge, contemporary along with traditional architectural glass as well as specialized artistic mosaics. Founded in 1847, we are to this day, one of the leading international studios in these fields.

Name: The Silenced Words
Description:
"Not all words fit to their meanings. Sometimes what is said is not what is meant, and what is meant is left unsaid."

Words are all that we are left with, and often we fumble there as well. So, here we are, left with some precious words which can break or mend any relationship.

"The Silenced Words" is the writer's personal chronicle which goes for a rollercoaster ride, plunging in the murkiness of emotions and grappling with positivity through words.

This Page is solely for entertaining LinkedIn people with some creative, thoughtful and heartwarming words which often we miss out in reality.

The melee of words with the right amount of storytelling will create the perfect anecdote for you to take back home after a hectic day.

Wander off to an unknown world of musings and thoughts with us which will surely take you for a joyride.

We also encourage other creative writers to collaborate with "The Silenced Words" to share their stories, thoughts, and creative write-ups with the readers. As long as we are spreading a warm message, the purpose of this Page is fulfilled effortlessly.

You can also follow the sister Page of "The Silenced Words" on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/mysterioussreoshi/

Sit back. Relax your mind. And let go of your inhibitions.

Name: Escola Música Essencial
Description: Para quem gosta de música e deseja que ela faça parte de sua vida, aqui é o lugar certo. Aulas individuais ou em grupo em uma estrutura com salas acústicas, formação de bandas e produção artística dos alunos.

Name: WhatSpirit
Description:
What Spirit est une association créée en 2004 pour répondre aux demandes de projets collaboratifs et créatifs plurimedia auprès des institutions comme l'Education nationale.

 Très tôt engagée dans la création numérique par ses compétences technologiques et ses valeurs humaines, écologiques et sociales, elle conjugue différentes disciplines artistiques, soutient des projets et des artistes à travers des collaborations, des créations collectives et des réalisations .
Elle propose des ateliers d'initiation à la création artistique, aux pratiques plastiques et  multimedia et aux expressions corporelles par  des processus créatifs originaux et innovants.

Elle crée autour du thème du corps, de la nature , des images  et des technologies.

 Elle accompagne et réalise des oeuvres sélectionnées lors d'évènements publics et thématiques, de festivals et de concours.

Name: Be My Space
Description: Be my Space propose des lieux désirables à des salariés pour travailler en dehors des murs de leur entreprise.

Name: Mueen Saheed
Description:
Mueen Saheed is an abstract narrative expressionist and a renowned award-winning jewelry designer. He is the winner of the prestigious Jewellers of America Jewel Award (1996) and the Golden Apple Award for Innovation. He has painted over 500 paintings, employing inspiration from his travels and passion for tackling social issues through art. Although most of his work is on canvas using acrylics, he also creates sculptures and installations using upcycling principles.
 
The style of the art he uses takes the audience on a journey of discovery, where new revelations are discerned over time. Each painting tells a unique story and captures a rich history. Mueen has painted pieces to raise awareness of gender equality, climate change, and mental health. He has participated in and hosted many exhibitions from the Langkawi Geopark Art Exhibition to his own exhibitions at his art gallery, Billari. He uses his art as a platform to promote social responsibility.

Name: STATUES.Com
Description: For over 20 years Statues.com has brought to life in sculpture the vision of our clients all over the world through custom sculpting, mold building, and statue casting.

Name: Antony Cribb Ltd
Description: Antony Cribb Ltd is a specialist auction house valuing and selling antique Arms and Armour. We are based in Berkshire in the UK, but sell internationally.

Name: Den Kreative Skole Silkeborg
Description: På Den Kreative Skole i Silkeborg brænder vi for, at børn, unge og voksne må møde de kreative fag. Vi ved nemlig, at det er et springbræt for både livsenergi og menneskelig udvikling at få mulighed for at lukke op for kreativitet og musiske udtryk! Derfor har vi et stort udbud af forskellige fag inden for kunstarterne musik, dans, billedkunst og teater.

Name: PACIFIC COAST CONSERVATION
Description: Pacific Coast Conservation, based in Los Angeles and Denver, offers a wide range of art and artifact care, including preservation, conservation, survey, and assessment. PCC was formed to provide the highest possible quality of care for your art and collection, and with that in mind, bring together a team of conservators, technicians, and collections specialists, to produce professional and museum quality results. All projects are carried out according to the Code of Ethics and Guidelines for Practice of the American Institute for the Conservation of Historic and Artistic Works (AIC) and the Secretary of the Interior's Standards for the Treatment of Historic Properties.

Name: BLANK SPACE Art Gallery
Description: BLANK SPACE provides a platform where art and fashion converge.  We focus on showcasing emerging visual artists and fashion designers to promote contemporary visual culture.  By encouraging innovative art practices through exhibition and events, Blank Space fosters the development of experimental art forms.

Name: Rebeca Nigrinis Art Studio
Description: Art Studio and gallery located in Muscat, Oman featuring a permanent collection of work from Colombian artist Rebeca Nigrinis

Name: Drivers' Cult
Description: Your supplier in high quality racetrack- and automotive prints for the perfect decoration of your office or workshop.

Name: suzzz
Description:
Suz es mi alias. También me llaman Suzen. Aunque mi nombre oficial es Bertran Escolà, y soy diseñador gráfico freelance. Actualmente trabajo como ilustrador, diseñador (web, editorial y gráfico) y animador freelance. También estoy especializado en videos corporativos, desarrollo de música y gráfica para interactivos, videojuegos, páginas web, animaciones 2D y 3D, presentaciones audiovisuales…

He trabajado con el estudio Escletxa y la agencia BUM, como animador de cortinillas corporativas del canal infantil de televisión K3 (Televisió de Catalunya). He colaborado con Estudio Maravillas, diseñando para Nestlé y la zapatería Casas. También desarrollo proyectos regularmente para el Círculo de Lectores.

Además, como profesor de diseño y animación web, he dado clases y seminarios en diversos centros de formación, como en el Fòrum Nord de les Tecnologies de Barcelona.

Empecé pintando graffitis en 1990 y desde 1997 también utilizo la tecnología como herramienta de trabajo. En 1999 terminé el graduado en Arte y Diseño por l’Escola Massana de Barcelona, donde fundé junto con Albert Bertolín el grupo glaznost, con el que he actuado en eventos de carácter audiovisual, tales como artFutura y Sónar, en el OFFF (Universitat Pompeu Fabra), en el Museo DA2 de Salamanca, AstroParty en Ginebra, Visioni del gusto en Nine Hotel de Monza, y en presentaciones de la revista-rojo (Sesiones de cine en directo en La Casa Encendida, en el Centre d’Art Santa Mònica de Barcelona, en el Festival Visionaria de Siena, Italia).

Con glaznost también conseguí una mención especial de estética en el Premio de creación de Videojuegos Playstation/artFutura 2002, con el videojuego “La fuga de Miguelito”. He sido galardonado con el primer premio del concurso de trailers 2009 convocado por el Círculo de Lectores.

Name: b&d graphic
Description:
B&D graphic est une agence de graphisme spécialisée dans la création d'identité visuelle et marque pour les entreprise.

Nos services:

Name: Richard Green
Description: Richard Green is an international family business with two galleries in Bond Street, Mayfair, at the heart of the London art world.  For four generations we have been dealing in paintings of the highest quality, dating from the 17th to the 21st century.

Name: Rooster Studios Tattoo
Description:
After the loss of a close Army buddy, I turned to what truly drove me to become a better person and fulfilled my spiritual needs: ART. Over the years, my artistic journey has evolved, taking me from oil painting and acrylics on canvas to crafting custom alpaca rugs and needle-felting figurines. Friends and supporters have fueled my passion by buying my pieces, inspiring me to create even more.

This artistic exploration eventually led me back to something I started many years ago: tattooing. I never imagined it would take off the way it has. Leaving the corporate world behind, I chose to focus on individual people, one person at a time, changing lives through ink therapy. 

Rooster Studios Tattoo is just the beginning of this incredible journey, and I'd love for you to join me on this adventure. If you're ready to transform your life through art, give me a call and schedule your session today.

Stand out. Be bold. Let's shake things up together.

Name: FERRARA SHOWMAN GALLERY
Description: JONATHAN FERRARA GALLERY is a collective environment of creative visions featuring monthly exhibitions of (inter)national, emerging to established, contemporary artists. A commercial gallery with a public conscience; artist, activist, and entrepreneur Jonathan Ferrara founded the gallery in 1998 to give artists a voice. Since its inception, the gallery has focused on forward thinking artists with a sense of purpose, mission, and message. The gallery is known for its stimulating and provocative exhibitions in a wide variety of media, having been featured in The New York Times, Art In America, The Art Newspaper, The Associated Press, ArtNews, NPR and many other international publications.  The gallery regularly exhibits at art fairs in the US and Europe and works with museum and institutions to present its artists’ works.

Name: Passion Art Gallery for Teaching & Selling Fine Art
Description:
Passion Art Gallery, founded by sisters Bayan and Mariam AlQassab, is where creativity meets collaboration.

We specialize in providing corporates with unique experiences that bring teams closer, inspire innovation, and create lasting connections. Through the power of art, we help organizations strengthen employee relationships, support CSR and ESG initiatives, and foster a culture of creativity and wellbeing.

Our Services include:
Corporate Events & Team-Building – interactive art sessions designed to enhance collaboration and communication
CSR & ESG Initiatives – creative projects that align with corporate values and community engagement
Customized Art Experiences – tailored workshops and private sessions that fit your team’s needs
Fine Art & Commissions by Mariam AlQassab – exclusive artworks that add meaning and character to corporate spaces

At Passion, we believe art is a powerful tool for connection, and we partner with top-tier corporates in Bahrain to make every project impactful and memorable.

Name: L'imprimerie, centre d'artistes
Description:
L’art commence au moment où il se fait. 

L’imprimerie, centre d’artistes est un espace de production voué aux pratiques de l’imprimé et du photographique. Issu de l’intégration de l’Atelier Graff et du Cabinet, espace de production photographique, le centre offre à ses membres des espaces de travail, des ressources et des expertises spécialisées, dans une approche personnalisée favorisant le développement professionnel. Située dans le quartier Hochelaga-Maisonneuve à Montréal, L’imprimerie s’adresse aux artistes et aux créateurs de tous milieux. Elle soutient les pratiques actuelles, professionnelles, hybrides, évolutives, parallèles, indisciplinées, collaboratives, populaires et responsables. L’imprimerie est inclusive, libre et engagée.

Name: Helarea
Description: Helarea es una plataforma online de venta de un amplio catálogo de obras de arte, de calidad y a precio asequible con el fin de dar a conocer a artistas de gran talento y cuya obra pueda transformarse en una inversión de la cual los compradores podrán hacer seguimiento a través de la plataforma. Por otro lado, Helarea busca ofrecer a los decoradores una herramienta de trabajo adicional donde encontrar un proveedor de obras de arte que les permita optimizar sus tiempos de búsqueda.

Name: RD Creative
Description: Savannah based artist, Rachel Davies creates landscape scenes that give the rich colors of the low country their spotlight. Original paintings, commission work, stationery design and fine art prints are all a part of the growing RD Creative collection.

Name: 2018Eindhoven|Brabant - kandidaat Culturele Hoofdstad van Europa
Description:
In 2018 levert Nederland, net als Malta, de Culturele Hoofdstad van Europa. De stad die de titel krijgt, verzorgt een jaar lang een cultureel programma voor bezoekers uit heel Europa. 

Eindhoven is in de race om in 2018 Culturele Hoofdstad van Europa te worden en werkt hiervoor samen met Breda, Helmond, ’s-Hertogenbosch, Tilburg en de Provincie Noord-Brabant. Onder het motto Imagination designs Europe werkt 2018Eindhoven|Brabant aan nieuwe inzichten voor Europa met de verbeeldingskracht van kunst en cultuur. 

2018Eindhoven|Brabant maakt een spannend en innovatief cultureel programmavoorstel, met Proeftuin als vernieuwende methode. In deze kandidatuur staan de rijkdom, verscheidenheid en gemeenschappelijke waarden van de Europese cultuur centraal. 

De titel Culturele Hoofdstad van Europa wordt toegekend aan een stad met groeipotentie op het gebied van kunst en cultuur. Met de kandidatuur en nominatie plaatsen Eindhoven en Brabant zich internationaal in de schijnwerpers. Dit stimuleert de economie en maakt de regio extra aantrekkelijk om in te wonen, werken en ondernemen.

Name: Suzanne Randolph Fine Arts
Description:
Suzanne Randolph Fine Arts (SRFA) is a certified WMBE art advisory and creative consultancy firm with over 25 years of experience supporting the diverse goals of corporations, real estate developers, private collectors, municipal agencies and not-for-profit organizations.
Our services include commissioning signature works of art within architectural contexts and urban environments, curating exhibitions of contemporary and historical focus, and providing comprehensive guidance in collections management. We provide appraisal services compliant with Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice (USPAP) standards.
SRFA is committed to actively listening to each client’s needs with the goal of establishing clear programmatic parameters to be realized according to the highest standards of professionalism and expertise. 
Suzanne Randolph Fine Arts draws from extensive resources across disciplines, media, styles and global regions to develop signature concepts and experiences for our clients that achieve a broader creative vision.

Name: LIFE Arts Gallery
Description:
Galerie d'art photographique, vente en ligne de tirages Fine Arts de collection en édition limitée, numéroté et signé par l'artiste.
Vente d'objets de collection des peuple autochtones.
Concepteur et créateur de décoration visuel d'intérieur.

PROMOUVOIR LA PHOTOGRAPHIE D'ART,
LES JEUNES TALENTS, LES ARTISTES, LES PHOTOGRAPHES RECONNUS.

Name: Ikonen Mautner
Description:
Admirable and rare original Russian icons can be bought in this wonderful and unique store in the city centre of Vienna.

The founder of the company, Mr. Erich Mautner, received export approvals for antique icons in the early 1960s from the Russian government. During the following years Mr. Mautner developed an extensive worldwide icon trade.  Collectors and traders from all over the world came flocking by, to acquire some copies of these rare treasures. Every piece of these splendid icons is to this day examined by the icon expert of the Vienna Dorotheum and is provided with a certificate of authenticity.

The expert describes what is shown and when the icon was painted and with his signature, he confirmed the genuineness. We offer icons of different themes from the 17th, 18th and 19th century including: The Mother of God, Saint Michael, Saint Nicholas, Saint George, Saint Panteleimon, Christ Pantocrator, Easter and the Festivities as well as bronze icons and orthodox crosses.

Furthermore, we offer icons from famous painting schools such as Palekh, Suzdal, and Vladimir, where masters and pupils together painted the most splendid icons of high artistic quality.

Beyond Russia a bigger number of valuable icons is extremely seldom seen, with the exception of some museums and galleries. In our shop, however a big number of select icons are on exhibition and can be bought.

We also specialised in shipping the icons worldwide with all necessary documentations. We also buy antique icons, take care of restorations and appraise icons together with experts.

Name: ADAGP
Description:
ADAGP is the French collective rights management society in the field of the visual arts (painting, sculpture, photography, multimedia, etc.). It represents almost 80,000 authors.
We currently:
Collect and distribute the copyright royalties accruing to its members for the use of their works.
Defend its members' rights against any third party,
including in the courts.
Defend and improve Authors' Rights (Intellectual Property Law).

Name: MINUS ART
Description: Minus Art is a great place to buy and explore new, original, and premium quality artwork emerging artists around the world. Minus Art offers carefully curated selection of art prints, photographs, framed/unframed wall art decor. All products are made from high-quality materials and shipped to 37 countries.

Name: Ilustrasee
Description:
JADILAH ILUSTRATOR PROFESIONAL!
Kembangkan hobi menggambarmu menjadi karir yang menghasilkan lewat sekolah ilustrasi dan koneksi komunitas ilustrator.

Name: ArtValais
Description:
Le plus vaste musée d’Art Urbain à ciel ouvert.

En 1578 et pour la première fois en Suisse, la vie du héros helvétique, Guillaume Tell, est représentée sur la façade d’une auberge à Ernen (Haut-Valais). Tout comme les peintures du château de Vaas (Lens) ou la maison peinte d’Ayent, cette peinture nous rappelle que les fresques murales font partie intégrante du patrimoine historique valaisan et suisse.

Aujourd’hui, le projet Art Valais poursuit cette tradition à travers le mouvement de l’Art Urbain pour valoriser le patrimoine et aborder les enjeux de notre temps. Engagé dans un premier parcours basé sur le thème de l’eau, Art Valais amène l’art des grandes métropoles à s’inviter au cœur des Alpes pour questionner et sensibiliser le grand public à la valeur de nos ressources naturelles et culturelles.

Cette exposition vivante, gratuite et visible toute l’année, s’étend sur plus de 50 régions valaisannes et un territoire alpin de 5224 km² représentant près de 50 fois la superficie de la ville de Paris. Les artistes suisses et internationaux de renom y sont rassemblés pour créer des œuvres engagées et inspirées du contexte culturel et géographique local.

Plus qu’un musée à ciel ouvert, Art Valais c’est une histoire à vivre et découvrir en temps réel.

Ce projet, fondé par l’artiste Jasm One (Issam Rezgui), est mené par l’association Art Valais Wallis (AVW), en collaboration avec les Communes, l’Etat du Valais, un groupe de suivi et un jury international.

Name: Zaquarella Design Studio
Description:
Zaquarella creates unique beautiful, luxury greeting cards, distinguishing them from their competitors, though access to Fine Artists and innovation in design.

Launched in 2013, award winning Zaquarella, now offer over twenty uniquely themed art collections. 

Zaquarella supplies local traders, independent stores, gift shops, garden centres and manor houses.

 Zaquarella believes passionately in the importance of putting money back into the British economy and all products are manufactured Kent in the UK. 

Despite their success and global outlook, Zaquarella have managed to maintain a local heart and remain proudly British taking immense pride in their commitment to the environment, ensuring they supply products that are eco-friendly and sustainable.

Name: Pinaki Palette
Description:
Art is powerful. A painting can take you to different places and can make you feel strong.
I am a Passionate artist specializing in landscape and seascape paintings.  Transforming emotions into vibrant art.  Available for commissions and delighted to share my artistic journey with you. Explore the beauty of nature through my Art.

Name: York Art Association, Inc.
Description:
York Art Association is a 501(c)(3) non-profit corporation that supports excellence and education in the visual arts. Pursuing its mission to encourage and promote interest in all forms of the visual arts, YAA provides support to artists of all ages and skill levels through classroom instruction, workshops, lectures, publications, promotions and exhibitions. It provides access to members and non-members alike, including opportunities to display and sell work in roughly 2 dozen exhibitions annually.  YAA runs three galleries, and coordinates displays with many outside venues, bringing art to over 4,000 people in the past year.

YAA draws membership and support from south-central Pennsylvania and northern Maryland.  Although largely self-sustaining, YAA receives supportive funding from the Cultural Alliance of York County, as one of its eight partner organizations.  This has lead to effective, ongoing, collaborations with other local artistic, cultural, historical, educational, and nature organizations.

Founded in 1905, York Art Association demonstrates its enduring stability through our 450+ members, ownership of a formal arts facility, and engagement of professional instructors and staff.  Notable in 2015 is the opening of an on-site sculpture garden, an exhibition of work by local youth, funding of an annual scholarship with York College of Pennsylvania, and arts outreach programs to local schools and libraries.  Our hugely popular Wild & Wooly exhibition, staged in collaboration with Richard M. Nixon County Park & Nature Center, promises to be the first of many community based arts projects. 

YAA maintains an active online presence through our website (link below) and social media (Facebook and Twitter). Discover Us, Discover Yourself!

Name: Micro-Folie Apt
Description:
La Micro-Folie est un dispositif national de politique culturelle mené par le Ministère de la Culture et coordonné par La Villette afin de dynamiser le paysage culturel dans les territoires pour y  développer des projets culturels divers et ludiques en lien avec les nouvelles technologies.

Musée numérique : réunissant des centaines de chefs-d’œuvre de 12 institutions et musées nationaux à découvrir sous forme numérique,
cette galerie d’art virtuelle mêlant arts plastiques, spectacle vivant, design, architectures, etc, est une offre
culturelle unique et ludique.
À visiter seul, en famille, ou entre amis, le Musée numérique vous donnera accès à une multitude de trésors.

FabLab : vous êtes designers, artistes, étudiants, bricoleurs ou simplement curieux ? Cet espace est fait pour vous !
Le FabLab de la Micro-Folie d’Apt est un espace de création doté d’une imprimante 3D, d'une découpeuse vinyle, d’ordinateurs équipés de logiciels de montage et de divers outils numériques et équipements pour la réalisation de vos projets.

La Chapelle: cette salle majestueuse accueille des expositions de plus grandes envergures, d'artistes locaux et nationaux.

VR : Un espace de Réalité Virtuelle est mis à disposition. Arte, partenaire de la Micro-Folie, a fourni près de 20 contenus VR à 360° (contenus éducatifs sur l’art, la science, la nature, documentaires et spectacles…). Il est encadré par la médiatrice et ouvert à tous à partir de 10 ans.

Forum : Espace ludique et convivial mis à disposition de tous: de nombreuses activités sont proposées (sous un aspect récréatif et pédagogique) aux publics de tout âge (livres, jeux, gaming). 
Cet espace idéal pour est accessible et ouvert à tous sur le temps du midi et en soirée!

Name: Institute for Creative Exchange
Description:
The Institute for Creative Exchange - Americas (ICE) is a non-profit organization that brings together artists, writers, academics, and cultural practitioners in an interdisciplinary international exchange that allows untapped stories and artistic practices to unfold.
ICE cultivates and fosters the imagination of artists in Canada, and across the Americas, by creating a space where artists can freely explore diverse cultural creative processes and multi-disciplinary artistic expressions.
As our world becomes increasingly polarized, artists require new tools to discuss forms of resistance and to explore different cultural expressions that move beyond Canada’s geographical borders and language. Our goal is to support artists expand their views and explore modes of communication that lie outside of their current realm.
ICE offers five lines of services to fulfill its mission: a) we provide high-end immersion workshops with acclaimed artists and theorists from around the world; b) ICE offers artist residencies in partnership with important institutions in the Americas; c) ICE Reactor is a unique creative industries accelerator in Toronto; d) ICE provides training and creative courses to institutions and individuals interested in expanding their creative skills; and, e) ICE produces artistic content and events.

Name: Escuela de Grabado y Diseño Gráfico
Description: La Escuela de Grabado y Diseño Gráfico es una institución educativa que proporciona una educación pública, personalizada y de calidad en los ámbitos del Grabado Artístico y el Diseño Gráfico, especialmente en aquellos campos relacionados con la actividad de la Fábrica Nacional de Moneda y Timbre - Real Casa de la Moneda (FNMT-RCM).

Name: Sahar K. Boluki Fine Art Gallery
Description: Sahar K. Boluki Gallery located in Toronto's charming Yorkville Village, brings variety of authentic contemporary fine art from Internationally acclaimed artists.

Name: ARTZ ID
Description: An online social network for the visual arts community, lauched in response to the fragmentation, lack of collaboration and accesibility within the Maltese artistic community. A centralised space for artists, professionals and industry leaders to connect, engage and reach new opportunities. Born in a time where one must re-imagine new ways of connectivity, dialogue and collaboration.

Name: Fort Point Arts Community
Description:
Fort Point is home to over 300 artists who produce work in a wide array of media. It is recognized as one of New England’s largest artists’ communities. The historic warehouse buildings of Fort Point house painters, photographers, sculptors, designers, ceramicists, performance artists, jewelers, book artists, digital media artists, and more.

The Fort Point Arts Community (FPAC) builds cultural vibrancy in Boston by cultivating an empowered community of artists, organizations, and supporters. FPAC promotes the work of our artists to a broad and diverse audience, advocates for art opportunities, develops permanent, affordable live-work studio space and ensures that art is an essential part of the life of a creative city.

Name: Earth Gallery
Description:
Earth Neighborhood Gallery is part of the Earth Neighborhood Center in Long Beach, California.
The Earth Galley features earth-friendly and human-friendly artists and is the on-site bookstore for The Message Books- a series of four books that tell what happen we people decide to clean up our Planet.
Earth Neighborhood.com is the official website for the Earth Neighborhood Center and the Earth Gallery.
The gallery is open by appointment only and can be contacted by phone at 562- 590-3739. We feature such Long Beach artists, Paul Hogue, Jospehine Marie Designs- jewelry, Ken Estes, Ramudo Gardea, Eddie Jillinet and other Southern California artists.

Name: UTHOPIA Arte Contemporáneo
Description:
UTHOPIA es una plataforma de venta y renta de Arte contemporáneo que fomenta la producción y conocimiento de arte producido en nuestro país. 

Nuestra prioridad es que el Arte en México se convierta en una opción de vida sustentable, para quién lo produce, lo visibiliza y difunde.

Name: Gallery 90220
Description: At Gallery 90220, we strive to provide an accessible platform for emerging and underrepresented artists who reflect our roots and our journey coming from Black and Brown communities. By hosting think tanks, podcasts and promoting collaboration with like-minded trailblazers, we build the foundation to serve as a creative hub, melting pot, and artistic focal point in Los Angeles. Our mission is to be the premier art gallery and community safe haven for creatives of color to freely voice their unique expressions to our city and beyond.

Name: "Come... meet Jesus" by Rich Timmons
Description: Come... meet Jesus by Rich Timmons is a coffee table book and a digital Flip book, with 154 pages and 67 full color paintings telling the story of Jesus of Nazareth from portions of Scripture in  Matthew, Mark, Luke and John by some of the worlds greatest artists. The story and paintings naturally flow from the announcement of his upcoming birth and early childhood years, His ministry and miracles, the Passion week, His resurrection and His glorious return.

Name: Sara Elizabeth Centre
Description:
At the Sara Elizabeth Centre (SEC)we provide inclusive art-based programming for young adults with special needs that highlight the unique talents of all our participants in a welcoming, friendly and safe environment.

We offer a variety of fun, creative, inclusive, and interactive art-based programs that focus on everyone’s abilities… not their disabilities. All our programs are designed to minimize barriers, increase awareness within the community, celebrate individual success and promote the overall well-being for each participant.

At SEC, we help to assure the families that they are not alone in this journey of raising a child with special needs.  We work together with our parents and collaborate with SEC support personnel to design individualized educational arts-based programs for the young adults who cannot attend post-secondary programs or access employment opportunities.

Name: Synch.Live
Description: Synch.Live is a global project to foster human connection. It is a radical new form of participatory art: a tech-enabled, movement-based game that transforms groups into living systems. It offers something rare and urgently needed: a chance to feel human together in a world that pulls us apart. Developed in collaboration with neuroscientists, Synch.Live is also an open research framework for the study of human collective behavior.

Name: Mona Loves Gustav, Inc.
Description:
Mona Loves Gustav offers unique solutions to comprehending and matching art aesthetics, including enhancing the engagement of art online. We scientifically demand-side taste, supply-side artworks, and solve the attention problem for search, match, and sale in a manner specific to each market segment and participant. We bring a new level of art market intelligence and art enthusiast engagement.

We’re experts at connecting people with art.

Name: Barkso
Description: Looking for pixel artists. Send us your portfolio at barkso.ltd@gmail.com

Name: Southern & Partners
Description: Working with contemporary artists and artist estates we use our many years of experience and strong institutional and commercial relationships to help artists navigate an increasingly complex landscape. We take a tailored approach to each artist's needs and work in close consultation to create opportunities and advance long term goals.

Name: Jiser Reflexions Mediterrànies
Description: Jiser Reflexions Mediterrànies es una organización sin ánimo de lucro creada en 2005 por un grupo de jóvenes españoles y tunecinos que comparten unos ideales y valores comunes y que pretenden ayudar a transformar sus realidades sociales a través del arte y la investigación. La asociación tiene como objetivo promover la movilidad, el diálogo y la producción cultural y su difusión en el Mediterráneo.

Name: LIKHANG BATA CREATIVITY CENTER
Description:
Established in 2010, LIKHANG BATA started as an independent summer art workshop curriculum organized by Art Teacher and homeschooling mother of four, Teacher Dindi Besinga-Manlapaz. 
Likhang Bata eventually evolved into a Creativity Center that provides a year-round art appreciation curriculum for toddlers to pre-teens. At present, we also organize Art events with various family-oriented business establishments and educational institutions and coordinate charity-oriented projects dedicated to Visual Arts.

Name: Artísticamente Art Academy
Description: Artisticamente Art Academy es una academia de artes plásticas para adultos y niños a partir de 4 años, situada en el barrio de Sevilla Este. Aprendemos las técnicas más relevantes, impartimos cursos especializados, talleres familiares y damos rienda suelta a la creatividad. Artistas del pasado y del presente servirán de inspiración y aprendizaje. Sean ustedes bienvenidos!

Name: AtelierMCL
Description:
Découvrez l’Atelier MCL !

Votre partenaire pour transformer vos espaces de vie en véritables œuvres d’art ! Dès maintenant, l’atelier propose un service à domicile de création de fresques murales sur mesure, afin de rendre vos espaces uniques et inspirants. Spécialisé dans les fresques murales personnalisées et le conseil en architecture d’intérieur, l’Atelier vous accompagne pour concevoir des intérieurs qui vous ressemblent. Fusionnons art et design pour donner vie à vos idées. Contactez-nous dès aujourd’hui pour concrétiser vos projets d’aménagement !

Name: Parker Fine Art Auctions
Description:
Co-founded by directors Buffy Parker and Henny Smith in July 2020, Parker Fine Art Auctions holds monthly sales of Fine Art and Frames. 

They are the only auction house in the UK to specialise exclusively in pictures and their vendor's charge is just £10 per lot.

Name: Thomas Bringold - Artist
Description:
Thomas Bringold is a multimedia artist
who uses bright colors and dynamism to create an array of abstract and contemporary pieces.

Name: Sementeira - histórias em transformação
Description:
A Sementeira é uma iniciativa social que cria espaços intencionais para pessoas contarem - e aprenderem a contar - histórias. Pra isso criamos e oferecemos experiências artísticas e pedagógicas ao redor das histórias e ao fazer isso oferecemos a possibilidade de que pessoas, comunidades e empresas:

- se conectem e se encantem com suas próprias histórias de passado, presente e de futuro.
- se comuniquem com mais clareza, assertividade e criatividade.
- se sintam confiantes e inspirem confiança.
- escutem com atenção e profundidade
- percebam vieses (os seus e de outres)
- criem e comuniquem visões inspiradoras para conduzir mudanças.
- colaborem e lidem melhor com conflitos.
- fomentem a diversidade e a inclusão.
- façam boas perguntas.
- se percebam interconectadas com tudo que há e por isso, cuidam de si, das pessoas à sua volta e do planeta.

Name: FORWART e.V.
Description:
We are an artist agency and cultural consultancy and help artists from the HMTM to organize new venues and advise organizers and companies interested in culture. 
We are looking forward to your messages! More information on our website: forwart-muenchen.de

Name: Galery
Description: Découvrir de jeunes talents, investir sur eux.

Name: ROY G BIV Gallery for Emerging Artists
Description: ROY G BIV Gallery is an independent, nonprofit art gallery that gives emerging artists their first big break. To support artists at the beginnings of their careers, ROY provides exhibition opportunities, mentorship, promotional services, networking, and educational programming.

Name: Gallery 32 Fine Arts
Description:
32 Fine Arts is a gallery located in New York City, founded in 2002. It specializes in European works between 1890 to today contemporary artists influenced by French Impressionism, photography, and contemporary art with an emphasis on figurative artists.Works from the 19th Century are acquired from private collections and auctions throughout Europe with a special emphasis on France. 

Brigitte Saint-Ouen, founder, director, and curator of 32 Fine Arts conducts exhaustive research on the authenticity and provenance of each painting and also obtains as much information as possible about the artists and their works. Each work of art is accompanied with a signed Certificate of Authenticity.

32 Fine Arts has been proud to present a visual paradise to those looking for French Post-Impressionistic works and the finest contemporary artists. 32 Fine Arts aims to break down the barrier that exists between French traditional art and today's generation of artists. 

32 Fine Arts pride itself in maintaining a close relationship with our clients as their collections develop and expand. Working to build on acquisitions for a coherent collection, 32 Fine Arts has worked with collectors, corporations and designers. Please visit www.32finearts.com and follow this page to stay informed of new developments. Your questions and comments are appreciated. Whether you are a new or a veteran collector or simply an art lover, you will always be welcome at 32 Fine Arts.

Description: Pucker Gallery was established on Newbury street, Boston in 1967. The Gallery exhibits an eclectic and sophisticated collection of works by over fifty artists, including ceramics, paintings, photographs, mobiles, works on paper, and sculptures.
