Name: Studio Calligraphique
Description:
Calligraphe professionnelle, amoureuse du papier et de la belle écriture, je propose des prestations de calligraphie pour les entreprises et les particuliers.

 Atelier / Live Calligraphy : proposez une animation en live ou un atelier autour de la calligraphie
 Papeterie / Scénographie : apportez une touche de personnalisation calligraphiée à vos événements
 Éditorial : créez du contenu calligraphié pour la communication de votre entreprise


• MON MÉTIER •
Que ce soit à la plume, au feutre ou bien via la gravure, mon métier est d'apporter une personnalisation unique, créative et originale à vos projets et événements.
Calligraphe professionnelle à mon compte depuis 5 ans, j'accompagne les entreprises de tous les secteurs dans la calligraphie de leur papeterie, la création d'animation unique pour leurs événements, la calligraphie de supports originaux...

• MES SERVICES •

Animation / Personnalisation :
Que ce soit pour un salon, le lancement d’un produit, un team building, une animation en boutique… proposez à vos invités (salariés, influenceurs, clients…) une animation originale et unique : un « live calligraphy » ou un atelier collaboratif autour de la calligraphie et du brush lettering.

- Personnalisation en live d’un élément pour les participants via de la calligraphie à la plume, au feutre ou de la gravure
- Animation d’ateliers créatifs collaboratifs proposant une initiation à la technique & la personnalisation d'objets (affiche, carte, mug, totebag, bougie…)

Papeterie / Décoration : 
- Adressage de vos enveloppes/invitations
- Marque-place, menu, plan de table personnalisé pour vos événements
- Lettre calligraphiée
- Cadeau personnalisé

Création de contenu éditorial : 
- Design calligraphié pour vos produits (textile, papeterie…)
- Messages personnalisés pour vos clients/influenceurs via le création de contenu éditorial pour internet et les réseaux sociaux

• ILS M'ONT FAIT CONFIANCE •
Le Ritz Paris, Hermès, Chanel, Lancôme, & Other Stories...

Name: Kalakriti NIET
Description:
Kalakriti is the official fine arts and paint club at NIET that provides a platform for students to explore their creativity and artistic talents. The club offers a variety of activities and events, including art exhibitions, workshops, competitions, and cultural performances. Kalakriti is open to all students, regardless of their artistic experience or skill level. 

 Our objectives are:
• To encourage and promote fine arts among the students of NIET.
• To provide opportunities for students to learn and develop their artistic skills.
• To organize and conduct various art events and activities.
• To create a platform for students to showcase their artistic talents.

 Kalakriti organizes a variety of events and activities throughout the year, including:
• Art exhibitions
• Workshops
• Competitions
• Art walks

 How to Join
To join Kalakriti Club, simply contact the club president or any of the executive members. You can find their contact information on the club's social media pages.

Let's Unleash our inner artist together

Name: Museum Kunst der Westküste
Description:
Das Museum Kunst der Westküste erforscht und vermittelt Kunst, die sich mit den Themen Meer und Küste auseinandersetzt. Ausgehend von der Gemäldesammlung des Museumsstifters Prof. h.c. Frederik Paulsen, welche die Faszination des Maritimen in einem von Bergen in Holland bis Bergen in Südnorwegen reichenden Motivpanorama für den Zeitraum des 19. und beginnenden 20. Jahrhunderts eindrucksvoll widerspiegelt, werden Ausstellungen in Kooperation mit nationalen wie internationalen Partnern realisiert. Dabei treten die Werke der historisch orientierten Sammlung sowohl mit bedeutenden Positionen der europäischen Kunstgeschichte als auch mit zeitgenössischer Kunst in einen fruchtbaren Dialog.

Begleitet werden die wechselnden Sonderausstellungen von einem umfangreichen Veranstaltungsprogramm und speziellen Angeboten für Kinder und Jugendliche.

Name: Scala, centrum voor de Kunsten
Description: Scala Centrum voor de Kunsten verzorgt lessen in muziek, dans, theater, beeldend, media en urban arts

Name: Por & Para
Description:
Por & Para se dedica a la asesoría y la formación integrales por y para las artes visuales y la cultura. www.porypara.es

Nuestra visión: 

Tenemos un sueño: que los profesionales de las artes visuales y la cultura de habla hispana tengan todas las herramientas y reciban la formación necesaria para poder desarrollar, promocionar y hacer avanzar su carrera profesional. 

Sabemos que nuestros profesionales están llenos de talento, ilusión y sueños, y que a veces la falta de formación en los aspectos relativos a la gestión profesional de su carrera les hace encontrarse con obstáculos que les desaniman para continuar con sus sueños. Por & Para está aquí para que no los abandones, para que sigas con ellos.

Nuestra misión es prestar ayuda a los profesionales de la creación y las artes vistuales, asesorándoles y formándoles sobre todos los temas necesarios para el desarrollo de su profesión. 

Nuestra misión es acompañarte para que no estés solo ante los problemas que se te presenten y proporcionarte las herramientas que necesitas, explicadas de forma clara y sencilla. Queremos que te dediques a lo que te apasiona. Cuenta con Por & Para.

Name: L'esprit des bois
Description:

Name: By 2 sisters workshops
Description:
Samen Creatief aan de Slag: Workshops van Lianne & Carola

naai workshops, workshops schilderen op canvas en workshops kaarsen beschilderen.

Wij zijn Lianne en Carola, twee zussen met een passie voor creativiteit en het delen van onze kennis. Samen organiseren wij een reeks inspirerende workshops, waar jij je creativiteit kunt ontdekken, ontwikkelen en tot leven kunt brengen!

Of je nu een beginner bent of al ervaring hebt, onze workshops zijn voor iedereen die graag wil leren en experimenteren in een gezellige, ondersteunende omgeving. Van schilderen en naaien tot andere creatieve projecten: wij bieden een gevarieerd aanbod waarin je je kunt laten inspireren en uitdagen.

Wat kun je verwachten?

Leer van de experts: Wij delen onze jarenlange ervaring en geven je praktische tools en technieken.

Gezelligheid en persoonlijke aandacht: Omdat we in kleinere groepen werken, krijg je de kans om vragen te stellen en direct feedback te ontvangen.

Creatieve vrijheid: Ontdek je eigen stijl en durf buiten de gebaande paden te denken.

Plezier: Onze workshops zijn niet alleen leerzaam, maar ook ontzettend leuk!

We kijken er naar uit om samen met jou aan de slag te gaan. Schrijf je snel in voor een van onze workshops en laat jouw creativiteit stromen!



Aan het eind van de workshop neem jij jouw kunstwerk fijn mee naar huis!
Heb je al een plekje op de muur uitgezocht?

Name: Frank Willems
Description:
Visual artist Frank Willems was born and raised in the city of ’s-Hertogenbosch, The Netherlands. After a 6-month trip through Australia and Asia, he moved to Sweden, where he started studying Shoe Design. At this point, Frank discovered his interest in art and started experimenting himself with, amongst others, drawing and painting. Today, he lives in his hometown again.

Frank uses acrylic, watercolour markers, spray paint and crayons for his work. He prefers to reuse old and used materials (e.g. wood, doors, shoeboxes, packages), often forming the base of his creations. Frank’s work is characterized by the contrast between the used look of the materials and the bright colours he uses. In this way, he wants to show that through colour, old and used objects can be given a ‘new life’. Additionally, he finds it fascinating to think about new and different uses for everyday objects.

Frank gets his inspiration from personal experiences, societal– and political subjects. By translating these issues in a childlike and humorous way, he aims for his works to be thought-provoking amongst his audience. Artist like Jean-Michel Basquiat, Wayne White, Keith Haring and Henri Matisse are great sources of inspiration to him.

Name: Postmasters Gallery / PostmastersROMA
Description:
Postmasters Gallery was founded by Magda Sawon and Tamas Banovich in New York's East Village in December 1984.
In 1989, the gallery moved to Soho and relocated again to Chelsea in September 1998. In October 2013, the gallery opened its new spectacular 6,500 square-foot space on 54 Franklin Street in Tribeca. In 2019 the gallery expanded to Rome, Italy, creating PostmastersROMA, led by Paulina Bebecka. 

During its 36 years, Postmasters has represented and exhibited young and established artists who work across a range of mediums including painting, sculpture, video, digital, installation, photography and NFTs. Postmasters actively seeks new forms of creative expression and exhibits them in the context of traditional and nontraditional formats alike. The artworks are largely content oriented, conceptually based and, most importantly, reflective of our time.

"Leave it to two twentysomethings from Eastern Europe to found what would become one of the most forward-looking American galleries of the past 36 years. Passion for identifying what's next is what keeps Postmasters at the forefront of culture today." artnet news, 2020

Extensive archives of all exhibitions since 1999 are available online www.postmastersart.com

Name: Fondazione Amedeo Modigliani
Description: La Fondazione di ricerca scientifica Amedeo Modigliani nasce con l’intento di promuovere, divulgare e tutelare l’opera e la vita di Amedeo Modigliani, con un approccio nuovo, interrogandosi su quali siano gli intenti e la rilevanza dell’impegno culturale di oggi. Si intende contrastare l’attività di falsificazione e di danno all’immagine di Amedeo Modigliani e della sua opera, attraverso una serie di progetti in continua evoluzione: salvaguardia degli archivi legali Amedeo Modigliani, Master scientifico ricerca e tutela, format multimediale Modigliani Opera.

Name: Monaco
Description:
Established in 2017, Monaco is an artist-owned cooperative that operates as an alternative to the traditional gallery model. Referencing one of the wealthiest states in the world—notorious as a “freeport” for art and other luxury items—the name suggests a sovereign micro-state, emphasizing the autonomy of the project, and hints at ideas of commerciality in the contemporary art world.

Monaco provides opportunities for critical inquiry and commercial potential, and supports it’s members by forging new connections and fostering community. Members include both emerging and mid-career artists, and collaborative entities as well as individuals. Its exhibits range from solo shows to curated group exhibitions. 

Monaco is an independent project directed by its members and was initiated by The Luminary as a part of its mission to support new artist-centric spaces. Founding Members: Amanda Bowles; Bruce Burton; Sage Dawson; Kristin Fleischmann Brewer; José Garza; Meghan Grubb; LAB:D (Lyndon Barrois Jr. + Addoley Dzegede); Allison Lacher; Gregg Louis; Cole Lu; Tim Portlock ; US English

Proche de l’univers surréaliste et fantastique, avec des artistes tels que Stanislao Lepri et Roberto Matta, la galerie Minsky a réalisé d’importantes expositions monographiques autour des œuvres de Yuri Kuper, Henri-Jean Closon, Edouardo Arroyo ou Corneille.

La galerie s’attache également à présenter des artistes d'aujourd'hui tels que Win Knowlton, Patrick Rimoux, Edouard Sacaillan, Park Dong Soo, Dongfang Tuqin, Pietro Pietromarchi, Geneviève Hugon, Anna-Maria Tsakali, Karen Swami...

Description:

Name: Pro Art Academy
Description:
Pro Art Academy: Nurturing Young Creative Minds with Visual Arts Services

Pro Art Academy is a dynamic art school dedicated to fostering creativity and artistic growth for all ages. Our mission is to provide professional drawing courses and a rich artistic experience that goes beyond the canvas.

The academy provides visual arts services, encompassing a wide range of art forms, such as realism, surrealism, impressionism, modernism, and abstract art. Our curriculum is thoughtfully designed to provide a well-rounded education in the arts, allowing students to explore various styles and techniques.

In addition to hands-on drawing and painting techniques, we offer academic instruction covering different types of painting, art techniques, and insights into renowned artists and their biographies. This comprehensive approach ensures that our students not only create beautiful artwork but also gain a deep appreciation for the world of art.

We understand the transformative power of art in fostering focus, meditation, and self-expression. To enhance the creative journey, we accompany our sessions with soothing music, which helps increase concentration and allows our young artists to dive into their work. Our professional instructors provide step-by-step guidance, ensuring that each art piece is a testament to their growing skills and boundless imagination.

At Pro Art Academy, we aim to create a positive and nurturing environment where children can unleash their creativity, develop their artistic talents, and build essential life skills. Join us on this exciting journey of artistic exploration and growth.

Unlocking Potential, One Stroke at a Time.

Name: ACP Palazzo Franchetti
Description:
ACP specializes in management, administration and production of high profile business and exhibition projects in the art field, in various manners: devising and realizing public exhibitions of considerable cultural interest and building and promoting specific art collections both private and public in the medium/long term.

ACP - PALAZZO FRANCHETTI

Palazzo Franchetti, with an historical facade and a unique garden on the Canal Grande in Venice,  is close to Ponte dell'Accademia and it is the preferred exhibition's venue of ACP.

Built in the second half of the XV Century by a historical venetian family, Palazzo Franchetti is one of the most prestigious examples of gothic architecture in Venice.

Palazzo Franchetti is located in the heart of the area where many of the most important venetian cultural organizations are.

The main floor of Palazzo Franchetti hosts temporary exhibitions. Its restoration has maintained the original layout of the rooms using Rubelli fireproof silks, reminiscent of the tapestries used in the ancient noble residences of Venice. Each room is lighted up with Murano chandeliers, with some impressive ones: the chandeliers in the rooms viewing Canal Grande are the most important.

Palazzo Franchetti's garden was created around 1860 by the architect Giambattista Meduna. Its original unique feature is its great extent from Canal Grande to Campo Santo Stefano - occupying more than 1500 square meters - which Meduna was able to get buying all the buildings in the surroundings. The 2004 renovation reorganized the existing floor plans and made the garden the key passage to diversify the fruition of the different areas.

Description: Основная деятельность нашей галереи это организация и проведение выставок,а также презентаций и проведения учебно- показательных мастер классов. Продажа и поиск интересующих вас картин. К нам за помощью обращается большое число заказчиков, которые хотят приобрести ту или иную работу.

Name: Brush and Sketch, LLC
Description: Brush and Sketch is an art studio that not only produces commissioned and gallery works, but also provides art opportunities for all skill levels.  We offer classes and workshops for children and adults.  Our staff are professional artists who are passionate about creating art and sharing their artistic and creative skill.

Name: Plan X
Description:
Plan X Gallery, a trailblazer in the contemporary art market, not only establishes itself as a platform for showcasing artists from around the globe but also takes on the responsibility of delving deeper into the realms of artistic production. With an unwavering commitment to research, support, and representation, Plan X Gallery sets out on a transformative journey to shape the future of contemporary art.
At the core of Plan X Gallery's ethos lies an insatiable appetite for curatorial, aesthetic, and conceptual studies. The gallery goes beyond the traditional role of a curator and becomes an incubator of ideas, constantly exploring new avenues of artistic expression. By fostering an environment that encourages artistic experimentation, Plan X Gallery serves as a catalyst for pushing boundaries and challenging conventional norms.
In its endeavor to enhance artistic production, Plan X Gallery actively collaborates with artists from diverse backgrounds, cultures, and disciplines. By embracing this inclusivity, the gallery seeks to create a rich tapestry of perspectives that sparks dialogue, fosters understanding, and celebrates the multitude of human experiences. Through these collaborations, artists are given the opportunity to expand their creative horizons, explore innovative techniques, and develop their unique artistic voices.

Name: DE LOUNGE  城藝休廳
Description:
De Lounge, an independent arts and cultural unit in Hong Kong, serves as a sanctuary for young local artists and creators to reconnect with their inner peace and reflect on the pace of life. Amid the city's abundance of arts and cultural organizations, including art groups, organisations, galleries, and foundations, there are opportunities to encounter like-minded individuals and present their works to the public.

As Hong Kong is an international city, the psychological pressure of daily life on citizens has increased. As one of citizens, we seldom pause within the urban landscape to listen, to create stories behind, and to explore the beauty of our city. 

De Lounge established in mid-2022, driven by the concepts of art, craftsmanship, and design, seeks to uncover artists' stories and insights within the urban context, creating and perpetuating spaces that belong to the city's inhabitants, allowing them to appreciate the details of urban life during their leisure time. De Lounge curate irregular & opusculum exhibitions, and independent publications. 

Let the “idea” flow, the stories/texts/designs belong will become an exclusive breathing space in between.

De Lounge(城藝休廳)是以城市為主軸，讓香港一眾年青藝術工作者及創作人，回歸心靈寧靜、漫步回思生活步調的獨立藝文單位。

本地藝文單位眾多，不論藝團、藝廊、公營機構等，均讓藝術家們有一地之遇，為作品尋求有緣人。而香港為國際矚目中心，城市人的心理壓力俱增，我們作為使用者，稀少為社區與都市停留，聆聽故事、創造故事 —— 發掘她的美。休廳始於2022年中，以藝術、工藝及設計概念為主要推動。尋找藝術家在都市中故事與感悟，創造與延續屬於城中人的空間，一同在休閑中欣賞城市點滴。休廳不定期舉辦小型展覽與文章分享，甚至獨立刊物出版。

生活匆忙，休廳渴望在繁市之中，閱讀過去與現在；以文字與藝術，轉化成意念中的休憩空間。

Name: Study Association KNUS
Description: Study Association KNUS is the study association of the studies Algemene Cultuurwetenschappen (ACW) and Arts & Culture Studies (ACS) at the Radboud University Nijmegen. Since its establishment in 2003 Study Association KNUS provides a wide arrange of formal and informal activities for its members. Think of symposiums, study trips, talks, but also pub lectures, film quizzes and open podiums. KNUS currently has 155 members, of which the most part actively engages in our activities. Especially the study-related activities are frequently visited by our members. These activities offer a deeper insight into the courses offered in the ACW and ACS programme. Within this programme we deal with all kinds of social issues, which we try to explain through the arts. For example, we organised a symposium in April 2013, which attempted to explain Scandinavia's popularity in the art world. In addition, socio-economic issues, such as male-female relations and cutbacks in the cultural sector, are central to the courses. As a result, students are very involved in historical but especially contemporary developments in the fields of art, politics and society. After studying ACW and ACS, students often end up in the cultural field, but students are also popular in the business world, because of their broad view of developments and problems. ACW and ACS students, and especially the members of our association, are encouraged to approach these developments with an open mind. This means that our association is open to new initiatives, which we want to offer in order to increase their visibility. Study Association KNUS is a continuously growing association, which has a relatively large number of active members, which makes us a thriving and living association!

Name: FUNDARTIS - Fundación Artis Juvens para la educación y desarrollo de las artes
Description: Organización sin fines de lucro cuyas actividades están orientadas principalmente al desarrollo, gestión y promoción de actividades que fomenten la educación artística y su importancia para el sano desarrollo del individuo.

Name: KEVOE
Description:
Bonjour et bienvenue 

Nous sommes Kevin et Chloé, fondateurs de KEVOE.

Amoureux depuis toujours des vieux objets et des matières délaissées, nous avons eu envie de les mettre en lumière... Et comme il nous arrive d'être très 1er degré, nous avons fait le choix de créer des luminaires 

Plus sérieusement, la lumière a été une véritable révélation
Nous avons eu un coup de coeur pour sa capacité à faire vibrer la matière, à en révéler à la fois la beauté et la face cachée. Chaque réalisation est une nouvelle occasion de se faire surprendre et envoûter par des ombres portées, des éclats insoupçonnés, des silhouettes inattendues...

C'est donc tout naturellement que nous nous laissons porter par notre instinct, notre humeur, nos émotions, pour donner vie à des pièces uniques et originales.
En alliant le bois massif, l'acier et des objets anciens, notre imagination nous mène souvent hors des sentiers battus. 
Chaque création a ainsi sa propre énergie, sa propre histoire, vous offrant le plaisir de trouver celle qui vous fera écho.

Pour aller encore plus loin dans cette idée, nous proposons des réalisations sur-mesure, uniques et personnalisées... hors du commun.
Professionnel ou les particulier, nous imaginons et réalisons des luminaires à votre image et adaptés à votre besoin. Bien que notre démarche soit avant tout artistique, nous ne négligeons pas pour autant l'importance de l'éclairage et mettons aussi à votre disposition nos compétences dans ce domaine. La lumière à elle seule est vectrice de bonne humeur, de sérénité, de confort et est souvent bien sous-estimée.

Passionnés et fourmillants d'idées, nous avons soif de nouveaux challenges.
N'hésitez pas à nous contacter et à nous faire part de vos projets.
A très vite!

Kevin et Chloé.

Name: Gallery Bell’Arte at the Kurhaus
Description:
Do what your heart tells you. That is (very freely translated) the message that Peter Augustus de Génestet (1829 - 1861) gave the readers of his poem "Voice of the Heart" (from 1848). For Doret Huibers, the credo of the Dutch poet and theologian is still current. More than 25 years ago she started her Gallery Bell’Arte, which has been established in the Kurhaus since April 2015.

Follow your heart. For Doret Huibers, this meant that she exchanged her work in health care in 1993 for that of gallery owner. Despite the uncertain times in which she took that step, she experienced a flying start with Gallery Bell’Arte. With Paulus Reinhard, Fons Bemelmans and Emile Cornelis, Nic Jonk was one of the first exhibitors. His successful exhibition in Maastricht not only contributed to the name recognition of the gallery, but also proved to Doret that she was on the right track with her original specialization (she initially only exhibited sculpture).

"Everyone said I was crazy," the gallery owner remembers. “But the gallery ran very well from the first exhibition. I still follow my heart when I select an artist. We have had wonderful years in Maastricht.” Doret moved her life's work Gallery Bell’Arte, which was built up in Maastricht, from the deep south to the Kurhaus. “The relocation to Scheveningen is based on, among other things, practical considerations. The Kurhaus is right next to Museum Beelden aan Zee. This results in a special synergy and offers good opportunities for various forms of cooperation. I am thinking of a sculpture boulevard between both top locations. The hotels of the Amrâth Group are often located in monumental buildings with great cultural-historical value. "

In the lines from the last stanza of "Voice of the Heart", De Génestet touches the core of creation, which also applies to the works of art that Doret Huibers prefers to exhibits in her Bell’Arte gallery. They all seem to be touched by a divine hand or kissed by an angel.

Name: PETER GALLERY
Description:
La Storia
Le Gallerie d'Arte Peter Gallery, con sedi a Desenzano del Garda e Ponte di Legno (Bs), rappresentano l'odierna realtà che scaturisce da un lungo percorso professionale iniziato dal loro fondatore, il Sig.Luciano Peterlongo nel 1967.

Nel solco della continuità,a riprova della garanzia e della correttezza da sempre dimostrate alla stimata clientela,oggi a condurre l'attività è il figlio Marco, depositario e prosecutore dei medesimi valori e principi ispiratori.

La passione per l'Arte nelle sue varie manifestazioni, grafiche, pittoriche, scultoree costituisce il vero valore aggiunto del Sig.Marco Peterlongo, passione condivisa con i propri clienti in nome di una sensibilità artistica insostituibile, fulcro del tutto. 

Peter Gallery vanta oltre 40 anni di esperienza nel campo dell'arte moderna, contemporanea e d'epoca, con dipinti e sculture dei più grandi maestri Italiani ed Internazionali

Ora la pluriennale esperienza della Peter Gallery approda alla vendita di quadri con l’innovativa formula delle aste online, realizzandone un significativo punto di riferimento.
Quindi rende così accessibile alla selezionata clientela e all’utenza più attenta, la propria moltitudine di opportunità artistiche ( dipinti, grafiche, sculture, fotografie), con la modalità del reperimento di opere d’arte online.
La Peter Gallery nel corso dello svolgimento dell’asta rende possibile visionare le opere nelle proprie sedi partecipando fattivamente alla gara d’asta multimediale, previa registrazione mediante inserimento dei dati richiesti

Name: HUB Amarelo
Description: HUB de arte para artistas independentes.

Name: Arts Club of Washington
Description: The oldest non-profit arts organization in Washington, DC, the Arts Club of Washington brings into association and cooperation persons devoted to the arts – architecture, cinematography, dance, drama, literature, music, painting, photography and sculpture – and promotes the appreciation of historic preservation through study, restoration, and preservation of the James Monroe House. Don’t mess out on our incredible Club events: https://artsclubofwashington.org/events/.

Name: Council.art
Description:
Council believes in the transformative potential of the arts and works towards extending their influence across other domains. Our curatorial programme is based on long-term ‘inquiries’ that assemble people and knowledge from the arts, sciences and civil society, in order to foster better understandings of societal issues. Within these inquiries, we curate exhibitions and public programmes, and commission new work by artists, researchers and activists. 

Our fellowship programme, AFIELD, supports artists and cultural producers who instigate sustainable social initiatives worldwide.Through specific granting schemes, AFIELD aims to build an international network of inspiring individuals while promoting their role as engaged citizens. 

Founded in Paris in 2013, Council is an art organisation that operates internationally, gathering a diversity of audiences and collaborators around each project.

Name: The Redfern Gallery
Description: The Redfern Gallery is one of London s longest established commercial galleries. Founded in 1923 as an artists co-operative, the gallery soon evolved to become a leading innovator in the field of modern and contemporary art, forging connections with a broad spectrum of contemporary artists all of whom represented the very best of the avant garde. One of the inaugural Redfern exhibitions in 1924 included drawings and carvings by Henry Moore and Barbara Hepworth. In 1929 the Redfern held the first exhibition of British colour linocuts of the Grosvenor School and continued to represent Cyril Power and Sybil Andrews during both of their lifetimes.

Name: Les Maîtres du Monde
Description: Idéalement située entre Genève et Lausanne, les Maîtres du Monde, école de Motion Design, Effets spéciaux et Mondes Virtuels est la première école Suisse d’arts numériques qui propose des formations dans ces trois domaines de pointe. Parrainée par John Howe, le directeur artistique du Seigneur des anneaux, les Maîtres du Monde ouvre les portes des nouvelles technologies à une future génération d’artistes numériques. Basés sur une pratique intensive, les cours, donnés par des professionnels ayant entre autre collaboré à des grosses productions telles que Call of Duty, The Hobbit ou Harry Potter sont à la pointe de l’industrie vidéo-ludique actuelle.

Name: Creative Arts Workshop
Description: Creative Arts Workshop is a nonprofit regional center for creativity that has served the Greater New Haven area since 1961. As an anchor institution located in the heart of the award-winning Audubon Arts District, CAW offers a wide range of visual arts classes and engagement in creativity in its own three-story building with fully-equipped studios in eight disciplines, and an active exhibition and public programming schedule. More than 1,800 adults and young people enroll annually in the more than 400 courses offered by Creative Arts Workshop, while over 1000 visitors enjoy the free exhibitions and public programs in its destination galleries throughout the year. CAW’s classes are open to students and professionals of all ages and levels of experience.

Name: Harmona Vocal
Description:
O Harmona Vocal é muito mais do que um centro de educação musical; é um espaço onde a paixão pela música se transforma em uma jornada de descoberta, aprendizado e inclusão. Fundado por Malu Ribeiro, uma renomada professora de música e canto, o Harmona Vocal surgiu da necessidade de simplificar o ensino musical, tornando-o acessível e inovador para todos que buscam se capacitar musicalmente. 

Atualmente, oferecemos cursos de formação de arranjadores vocais, cursos de canto com atendimento fonoaudiológico conjunto e cursos de teoria musical.

Name: Rosenfeld Gallery
Description: Located in Philadelphia, PA, the gallery was the first to open in Old City and has served the area for 35 years. The gallery is proud of its inclusive aesthetic representing diverse approaches, styles and media.

Name: ARTFIND
Description:
ARTFIND is a London-based art consultancy. It provides solutions for Chinese art projects.
 
We are creative and pragmatic. We believe a good project is not just about ideas - planning and execution drives results. We have an excellent track record developing best practice in the Chinese and the UK art world.
 
As a young and vibrant company, we have successfully delivered various projects to institutional and private clients. Our experience includes delivering the largest Chinese contemporary art exhibition in the UK, working on different projects for global public galleries and auction houses, addressing panels, and organising academic conferences. We are also skillful at designing art tours with relevancy to China and arranging for acquisition of works by HNWI individuals.
 
We utilise our cross-cultural awareness to smooth over difficulties that arise in communications between two cultures. Based in London, we frequently travel to China and work internationally.

Name: American Art Marketing
Description:
American Art Marketing is a marketing and event production company dedicated to advancing the livelihood of artists and artisans. We produce five trademark exhibitions per year in cities along the East Coast of the U.S. and match artists with thousands of collectors year-round at our affiliate company, An American Craftsman Galleries, in New York City and Stockbridge, Mass.

Founded in 1980 by Directors Richard and Joanna Rothbard, American Art Marketing produces fine art and fine craft events that offer design excellence, affordability, and variety in prestigious locations across the eastern U.S.

The Rothbards have over 30 years of experience marketing fine art and crafts. They have established themselves not only as innovative show promoters, but as owners of An American Craftsman Galleries, one of the most important contemporary high end craft showcases in the country, with locations at the Times Square Manhattan Hotel and on 55th street in New York City as well as in Stockbridge, MA.   Richard is also an artist who is well known for his intricate wood puzzle boxes which have become his trademark: "Boxology."

Name: Art of Words
Description:
Mission Statement
Finding great gifts is hard. We create breathtaking word art illustrations of legendary sports, music, and historic moments sure to delight even the most difficult person to buy for.



About Art of Words
Art of Words is the creation of Philadelphia word artist Daniel Duffy. Duffy recreates images of iconic places and moments in history by meticulously handwriting relevant words. He sells 16x20 prints on his website www.artofwords.com - with the goal of providing an affordable, unique gift that stirs up sentiment and emotion within the recipient. Between skylines, sports, history and musicians - there's a piece for everyone! 

Dan has previously worked with TED Talks, Footlocker, the University of Maryland, NBC Sports, the Philadelphia Flyers and more!

Additionally, Dan's work has been featured by ESPN, NY Daily News, USA Today, the Today Show & more!

Name: ART IN MOTION - Art & Motion graphic design
Description:
ART IN MOTION conçoit des projets animés, et du contenu visuel sur-mesure, à destination de la communication artistique et culturelle.
Créant une passerelle entre les œuvres, le lieu et le public, la spécificité d’ART IN MOTION est de :


1 > Accompagner les acteurs du milieu artistique & culturel dans la définition de leurs besoins et dans la conception de leurs contenus.
2 > Créer tous types de supports et nouveaux formats, adaptés à leur communication.
3 > Mettre en avant les oeuvres d’art, les artistes et tous types de projets artistiques, au service de leur communication 360.

Name: Palak StudioInk
Description:
Palak StudioInk is my professional paint classes studio that teaches art and customizes pieces, located in Calgary, Canada. Here, I teach sketching, drawing, and painting to kids and adults. I provide several workshops and virtual instructed classes designed to teach various kinds of art including canvas painting, pencil colors, sketching, acrylic/watercolors - I teach it all! 

I love to make beautiful art pieces for customers; and at the same time, show my students how to create truly unique art spaces that they can be comfortable in.

Name: Art Monday
Description:
Jakob Hindhede created Art Monday, an art, apparel and publisher brand in 2015. 
Dedicated to manifest the underground and up-coming artists to layman Art Monday is build on creativity, authentic to ourselves and the creators we work with. 

we are unpretentious, set out to inspire and make people happy. 

In 2019 we launched Monday Studio, our creative hub; a store, a gallery & an atelier.

Name: Art Time Studio Garner NC
Description:
Welcome to Art Time Studio! Our art studio offers high-quality acrylic painting and drawing classes, watercolor workshops, and paint parties. Our sessions are 2-hours long, allowing you to immerse yourself in your art and achieve your creative goals. Bring a friend or come solo and join our community of art lovers! Our mission is to inspire and empower you to create your masterpieces, even if you are a complete beginner.

At Art Time Studio, we know how to have fun! Our studio is all about creativity and excitement, where you can express your ideas and let your imagination run wild. We offer a wide variety of events that are sure to get your creative juices flowing. Come join the party and see what all the fun is about.

Name: Silvertone International
Description:
Fine art photographic printing company. 
Digital inkjet light- and conventional darkrooms
Specializes in exhibitions, books and proofing

Name: Mon Absolu
Description:
Mon Absolu is an innovative company in the brazilian fragrance market, leaded by the creative perfumer creator Fanny Moreau.  Our fuel is a powerfull passion to the incredible realm of scent and our aim is to develop the leading fine fragrances of tomorrow through our know-how and services provided to our clients.
Each individual is a unique being and as such deserver unique scents, that is why Mon Absolu is absolutely unique

Name: Authentic Transport Fine Art Services
Description:
With more than 25 years combined work experience, and backed by an intensely vetted team, Authentic Transport has worked countless national and international art fairs, antique expos, auctions, gallery and interior design installations.
From townhouses to large commercial buildings, the crew uses creativity and tenacity to achieve perfection for their clients. They guarantee the best service available to ensure that all valuables are packed, delivered and installed with the utmost care and a winning attitude.
Handlers by trade, artists by design, their team is composed of highly educated art handlers, art specialists, carpenters, CDL drivers and reliable movers who work together to customize each job, making it unique and authentic. Essentially, the art handling and trucking worlds have joined together to generate the most efficient and straightforward service in the industry.

Today, that service is called Authentic Transport.

Name: Galerie Robillard
Description:
Derrière chaque livre illustré se cachent des œuvres originales. Des images magnifiques. Le travail d’artistes talentueux. C’est ce que la Galerie Robillard tient à montrer, à partager. Elle représente une quarantaine d'illustrateurs qu'elle vous invite à découvrir : à travers des oeuvres que vous pouvez acquérir, mais aussi des expositions clés en main conçues pour des médiathèques, des centres d'art, des musées... partout dans le monde.
La Galerie Robillard contribue ainsi depuis plus de 10 ans à faire reconnaître l’illustration comme un art.

Name: Creamik
Description: Ceramics and pottery school offering professional training as well as online classes in French and English.

Name: VLAM21
Description:
VLAM21 is een verbinder en belangenbehartiger voor vernieuwende literaire organisaties in Nederland. Wij zorgen ervoor dat het literaire veld met elkaar in contact blijft, van elkaar leert en samen verder ontwikkelt. Dit zorgt voor structurele versterking van de literaire infrastructuur.

VLAM21 staat voor het bundelen van krachten binnen de literaire sector

Name: Greater Des Moines Public Art Foundation
Description:
MISSION
Greater Des Moines Public Art Foundation places art in public spaces in the community through public and private collaborations.

VISION
Greater Des Moines Public Art Foundation  engages, inspires, and enriches the lives of citizens and visitors in our community. The Foundation increases cultural awareness by establishing a world class destination for public art.

DESCRIPTION
Greater Des Moines Public Art Foundation (PAF) is a tax exempt 501(c)(3) organization which, as a public charity, funds and administers a program to advance public art throughout Greater Des Moines.

PAF is the “go to” resource, the lead organization and advocate for “advancing public art” in Greater Des Moines. It is dedicated to envisioning, developing, advancing and promoting public art projects in the community. PAF recognizes that art belongs in streetscapes, parks, buildings and infrastructures of a thriving community, not just in galleries and museums. Thus, it actively seeks opportunities for art integration throughout the community with the goal of establishing a world-class destination for public art.

Name: SIN SIN | atelier • fine art • villa
Description:
Sin Sin Man is the sole creative force behind SIN SIN | atelier • Fine Art • Villa. A free spirited soul who dares to explore and to follow her own path, she has created a truly unique and distinctive brand through her creative works and brilliant taste as evidenced in her Atelier and Fine Art gallery in Hong Kong and in her Villas in Bali.

The seeds of her journey began in 1984, when she started designing various kinds of bags and then branching out to accessories and jewellery. By 1999, she has achieved great success in designing, promoting and developing products for many famous multinational corporations and international top brands which includes Disney, Paramount, MGM, Fox, Star TV, MTV and Warner Brothers in the movie industry to Perry Ellis, Max Factor, Nexxus and Sebastian in the cosmetics industry to fashion industry such as Mexx, Guess, Fossil, Stussy, billabong, Quicksilver, MGM and Back to School Series.
Location: Western & Central District, Hong Kong SAR

Name: Taste Contemporary
Description:
Taste Contemporary showcases established artists whose work is internationally recognized and acquired by major public and private collections and museums. However, the gallery is also committed to finding new voices and rising stars, and to identifying mid and late career artists whose work remains on the margins of critical acclaim. 

Many exciting opportunities are available to collectors and patrons who wish to engage with this segment of the contemporary art market. It takes time and dedication to develop a collection. Monique Deul advises both private and institutional collectors on starting and building collections.

Taste Contemporary presents an annual exhibition programme at its Geneva based gallery, and at other select venues that have included Musée Ariana, Geneva; Maison Louis Carré, Bazoches-sur-Guyonne near Paris and Cromwell Place, London. In addition, the gallery participates regularly at international art fairs.  While maintaining curatorial direction at Taste Contemporary, Monique Deul continues to collaborate with leading international curators.

Name: Fayoum Art Center
Description: Founded in 2006 by the renowned Egyptian Artist, Mohamed Abla, Fayoum Art Center connects local artists with the regional and international art scene through various annual programs like the annual Winter Academy. Located in Tunis Village, the Fayoum Art Center has numerous facilities including large studio spaces, an art library, living areas, and a communal dining space that offer artists the space to create works in an inspiring atmosphere.

Name: Contemporary by Angela Li
Description: Established in 2008, Contemporary by Angela Li is one of Hong Kong's most exciting art galleries showcasing and promoting contemporary art primarily from Hong Kong and greater China. Regular curated exhibitions are held for emerging and established artists and the gallery is committed to bringing quality shows and works to the local and international art scene.

Name: Salisbury University Art Department
Description: At Salisbury University’s Art Department, you’ll join a rapidly expanding community where small-class, studio-intensive learning is at the heart of everything, giving you direct access to dedicated professional faculty and exceptional hands-on facilities. From the only on-campus hot-glass studio in Maryland to a full suite of sculpture labs with foundry, 3-D scanning and digital fabrication, the program blends traditional craft, contemporary media and design in a uniquely integrated way. With 12 focus tracks—from graphic design and new media to ceramics and photography—students pursue depth in their discipline while also engaging broadly across fields, preparing for professional internships, gallery-level work, and global study experiences.

Name: Galleria d'arte Il Vicolo
Description:
Il Vicolo, fondata  a Genova nel 1967 dall’artista futurista Alf Gaudenzi e sua moglie Piera, apre una sede a Milano nel 2014.

Si rivolge  principalmente all’arte contemporanea e affianca allo spazio dedicato alle mostre un art store specializzato in opere grafiche, multipli, oggetti d’arte di artisti che collaborano con la galleria.

Il Vicolo è editore e realizza tirature limitate in serigrafia, incisione e multipli d’artista con le Edizioni d’arte Il Vicolo.

Name: Princeton Academy of Art
Description:
Our mission is to bring exceptional quality instruction to artists working in the classical disciplines of drawing, painting and sculpture.

Our curriculum connects students to a living artistic tradition rooted in Russian, Italian and French classical Academies. Our students are linked to an unbroken chain of training that began hundreds of years ago and has been passed on from teacher to student for generations. Continuing in this passage of knowledge, our institution brings rigorous training and research of the old master’s techniques together with the contemporary vision of personal expression.

We are not reinventing the tradition, simply continuing one that our instructors inherited by studying at the Russian Academy of Art in St. Petersburg. Just as the Russian Academies preserved the French and Italian Schools, we extend that preservation a generation further.

We provide a dynamic, collaborative, learning environment and seek to prepare emerging representational artists to become leaders in today’s increasingly complex and rapidly changing art market.

Name: Well-Read Women of Omaha
Description: Well-Read Women of Omaha ensures to support literacy, create programming, and empower Black women and children in the Greater Omaha community.

Name: Galerie Sept
Description:
Galerie Sept is a contemporary art gallery based in Brussels and Knokke-Heist, with a third space opening soon in Amsterdam.

Founded with the ambition to present distinctive voices from the global contemporary scene, the gallery bridges European refinement with a curatorial openness to new geographies, materials and ideas.

Representing a diverse roster of artists from Europe and Asia — including Lee Hyun Joung, Sebastiaan Knot, Johann Alexis, Zheng Lu, Enrico Bach, Timm Blandin, Hans Schule, Joana Schneider, and Kwang Bum Jang — Galerie Sept focuses on the dialogue between materiality, abstraction and emotion. Each exhibition aims to create an encounter rather than a display: where the artwork, the viewer and the space resonate together.

The gallery is also committed to building long-term relationships with collectors, architects and cultural institutions, and has been featured in several press and media collaborations highlighting its innovative curatorial approach and the new generation of art professionals shaping Brussels’ art scene.

Over the past years, Galerie Sept has taken part in major international art fairs such as Enter Art Fair (Copenhagen), Art on Paper (Brussels), with upcoming participations planned for 2026 across Europe.

Behind each project stands a passionate team combining sales expertise, curatorial vision and creative direction — constantly working to bring art closer to those who believe it can still move, connect and inspire.

Name: Unit Seni Rupa UGM
Description: Unit Seni Rupa (USER) UGM adalah UKM yang bergerak di bidang seni dan menjadi tempat bagi para perupa di Universitas Gadjah Mada. USER dibentuk untuk mengembangkan seni rupa di wilayah Kampus UGM, serta menjalankan program kerja kolaboratif dengan komunitas seni di luar kampus.

Name: Art Métro Sierre
Description: Cette galerie comporte 12 belles vitrines en alu et représente 25 mètres linéaires d'exposition. Elle se situe au centre ville de Sierre et comptabilise le passage de centaines de personnes tous les jours. Art Métro fonctionne grâce au bénévolat d'un petit comité.

Name: Arizona Consortium for the Arts
Description:
Arizona Consortium for the Arts, Inc. is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit, charitable organization. 

We are eager to unite, advance, collaborate, partner, and support individuals and organizations in all aspects of arts, performing arts, literary arts and cultures in Arizona. 

Our vision is to establish a multicultural, multidisciplinary arts center with an open door policy! We are seeking an existing building or will build a new facility for a theater, gallery, art studios, classroom space and a cafe. The Gallery will host art exhibits by Arizona artists. The art studios will have working spaces for individual artists. There will be rooms dedicated to state-of-the-art painting and life drawing, ceramics, photography darkroom, sculpting, printmaking, recording studio, dance studio and jewelry design. The Center will have space for writers and poets to read their work. The theater will have a schedule for community theaters, musicians and performance groups to have a place to rehearse and perform. We will offer classes by the finest regional professional teachers and artists. 
 One of the best known and most prominent projects is the highly acclaimed The Blue Guitar Magazine, noted for both its quality and its range. In the Summer of 2012, we launched the inaugural issue of Unstrung, a magazine of, for and about poetry. Rebecca Dyer, the co-founder and Editor-in- Chief of the Blue Guitar Magazine was one of the nominees for the 2012 Governor’s Arts Awards.  www.artizona.org

Name: Tomstone Animation Art Gallery & Studios
Description: We sell the original animation art of the late Tom Ray, who entered the animation industry in 1937 at Leon Schlesinger Studios in Hollywood, California.  We sell vintage and contemporary animation art of the major motion picture studios, and are preferred Walt Disney & Warner Bros. Animation Art Dealer.  Come visit our gallery in the Virginia Beach, Virginia area, or enjoy visiting our website at www.tomstoneanimation.com.

Name: FC Art
Description:
We are a family-owned B2B art supply wholesaler based out of Montreal since 1985. We specialize in designing, curating, and selling at a competitive price all types of artist materials locally to shops across Canada and North America with the goal of empowering artists to create.
Our Nobel brand is distinguished for its reliability, tradition and quality at an accessible price range! We carry over 1000 products sourced from a network of manufacturers across Asia and Europe for all kinds of artists, practices, ages, and levels.
If you are a business based in Canada looking to stock your shop with art products at a competitive wholesale price, we can open an account for you!

Visit our website to see our full range of products! Reach us at: fcart@fcart.ca or open an account with us at: https://www.fcart.ca/contact

Name: Galerie Thomas Crämer
Description:
Galerie Thomas Crämer was founded in April 2010 by Thomas Crämer, M.A. The gallery represents an international roster of young and contemporary artists who contribute to the dialogue between the traditional techniques of sculpture, video, photography, painting, drawing and ideas being conceptual and innovative. Besides exhibtions the gallery also takes part in international art fairs.

We offer two showrooms in Berlin/D and Helmond/NL.

In Berlin the gallery is located in Heidestrasse 52. The showroom in Helmond/NL is made avaiable for the artists of Galerie Thomas Crämer through a cooperation with DPL Europe. Via a bridge the visitor enters the, in an architectional perspective, floating room. Main motives of the exhibtions are on the one hand the dialogue between the work of the artist with the architectional conception of the showrrom and on the other hand the use of light as an artistic medium.

In addition to the showrooms the gallery also exhibits in other locations to reflect its emerging character and ensure its portfolio artists always get the perfect surrounding for their works.

Name: Animaux-en-resine.ch
Description:
Animaux-en-Résine Switzerland, your creative partner specializing in the fabrication of promotional items, decorative objects, artistic sculptures, and reproductions of fictitious objects.

Our commitment is to bring your ideas to life through our expertise in research, creation, realization, and the production of customized models, whether in series or individually.

 Unlimited Customization
We understand that every detail matters. That's why we offer exceptional customization, allowing you to bring your ideas to life in a unique way. With over 3000 figurines and sculptures to choose from, you have the freedom to customize every detail, from colors and design to the placement of your logo. Whether to strengthen your brand identity through customized promotional items or to integrate specific elements into your decor, we are here to transform your vision into reality and breathe life into unique pieces that will leave a lasting impression.

 Our Limitless Creativity
We believe in the power of innovation and creativity. Each project is a blank canvas that we turn into a unique masterpiece. Whether you're looking for impactful promotional items or original decorative pieces, our team is ready to take on all creative challenges.

 Quality and Innovation
We stand out through our commitment to quality and innovation, guaranteeing exceptional results.

 Custom Manufacturing
We offer tailor-made solutions to meet your specific needs. Whether you want a series of promotional figurines or a unique artistic piece, our experienced team is ready to turn your vision into reality.

 Sculpture Rental for Unique Events
Whether it's a memorable corporate evening, a lively trade fair, or a seasonal celebration, our sculptures will create an unforgettable atmosphere.

Contact us to discuss your projects and explore the endless possibilities of creative collaboration.

Name: The Bonfoey Gallery
Description: "Embracing a legacy of 130 years, our art gallery stands as a beacon of creativity, representing a diverse spectrum of talent ranging from emerging artists to seasoned masters. Rooted in a commitment to excellence, we offer bespoke framing services and unparalleled customer care, ensuring each visitor receives personalized attention. With a keen eye for curation, we transform spaces with art that seamlessly integrates into any environment. At our gallery, art is not just displayed—it's an experience crafted with passion and expertise."

Name: Omenka Gallery
Description: Lagos-based Omenka is a leading art gallery exhibiting and representing a fine selection of emerging and established artists working in diverse media, whose output resonates strongly with the African continent and her related diaspora. With a focus on ensuring sustainable global presence for contemporary art from Africa, Omenka participates regularly in key art events like; The Armory Show, New York; Docks Art Fair, Lyon; Art Dubai; the Joburg Art Fair; Cape Town Art Fair; Cologne Paper Art; LOOP, Barcelona; Art14 and 1:54 Contemporary African Art Fair, both in London. Additionally, Omenka encourages a cross fertilisation of ideas by collaborating with other prestigious galleries and organisations across the world to bring for the first time to Nigeria, the work of many international artists. In association with Revilo, Omenka has an active publications programme and produces exquisite catalogues with informed, scholarly texts to accompany its schedule of solo, group and large themed exhibitions, through which it stimulates critical thought and discourse centred on contemporary art developments in Nigeria and Africa. Also produced in association with Revilo, is a magazine of the same name, Omenka, widely recognised as Africa’s premium art, business and luxury-lifestyle publication. Omenka also offers a broad range of advisory services including appraisals, collections management, training, art finance, as well as industry reports and due diligence. Our clients include major corporate bodies, auction houses and museums.

Name: Aspire Auctions, Inc.
Description:
Aspire Auctions, Inc. is the largest fine art and antiques auction house in Northern Ohio, predicated on sales results. Headquartered in Cleveland Ohio, Aspire has a second gallery in Pittsburgh Pennsylvania, and representation in Atlanta Georgia. Aspire provides certified appraisals, adhering to USPAP standards, and offer free auction estimates daily, either in person at home, in the gallery or via email. The auction gallery is located in the Historic Bloch Building, listed on the National Registry, in a renovated salon with large viewing rooms with natural light. All factions of the business including shipping, website, software, photography, et al, are directly handled by Aspire Staff without any third party involvement. We currently work with museums, individuals, banks, attorneys and trustees to realize the full potential of property through our auction venue.
Contact;
Cynthia Maciejewski
Aspire Auctions, Inc.
P: 216-231-5515 ext. 3
cynthia@aspireauctions.com

Name: F.T. STUDIO srl
Description:
La società archeologica F.T. STUDIO S.R.L. ex soc. coop. C.I.R.T. a.r.l. (anno di costituzione 1981), è nata nel 1992 con l’obiettivo di proporsi presso Soprintendenze, Enti pubblici e Imprese private per l’esecuzione di scavi archeologici programmati in contesti di emergenza.

E' iscritta nell'elenco ministeriale dei soggetti idonei alla redazione del documento di valutazione preventiva del rischio archeologico: n°1488

I suoi Soci operano nel settore da oltre trenta anni. 
L’utilizzo e l’interazione, in ambito archeologico, di molteplici tecnologie e professionalità contraddistinguono da sempre l’attività di F.T. Studio s.r.l.. I soci fondatori hanno maturato, infatti, prima della costituzione della Società, differenti ma complementari esperienze.

 

F.T. Studio s.r.l., sotto la  supervisione delle  Soprintendenze Archeologiche di varie regioni d’Italia, ha acquisito, nel corso dei decenni, una provata esperienza nell’ambito di  cantieri archeologici complessi, pluristratificati sia in area urbana che extraurbana, molti dei quali correlati a progetti di restauro, recupero e valorizzazione di complessi monumentali e comprendenti la realizzazione di percorsi archeologici. La consuetudine all’esecuzione di incarichi affidati da Soprintendenze, Enti pubblici e privati in contesti archeologici anche di rilevante complessità archeologica e logistica, costituisce una solida base di esperienza e di qualifica  per il nostro personale. Attualmente la Società vanta nel proprio organico archeologi specializzati  di provata esperienza, antropologi e architetti rilevatori;  possiede in dotazione strumentazione tecnologicamente avanzata (n. 2 stazioni  totali, laser scanner, droni per riprese fotogrammetriche e documentazione fotografica  aerea, camere metriche, software per fotogrammetria e modellazione tridimensionale, videocamera e fotocamere professionali di ultima generazione, ecc..) che utilizza abitualmente sui propri scavi archeologici

Name: Crow's Shadow Institute of the Arts
Description:
MISSION STATEMENT:
Crow's Shadow Institute of the Arts provides a creative conduit for educational, social, and economic opportunities for Native Americans through artistic development.

ABOUT US:
Crow’s Shadow Institute of the Arts (CSIA)  is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization aimed at providing opportunities for Native Americans through artistic development. With an emphasis on contemporary, fine-art printmaking, we also function as a venue to practice traditional Native American art practices — weaving, bead working and regalia making — of the Plateau region.

CSIA brings in emerging and established artists to produce monotypes, monoprints and editions — including lithographs, linocuts, woodcuts and more. Our ever-growing portfolio of prints encompasses the work of many outstanding artists of diverse backgrounds and media.

Recognizing art as an intrinsic and essential element of Native American culture, we are committed to helping people, young and old, develop their artistic gifts and skills. Through a variety of professional and educational services, we look to give dedicated artists a strong voice while also providing a conduit to the mainstream art world.

Our studio is housed within the historic St. Andrews mission schoolhouse, itself situated at the base of the Blue Mountain foothills on the Umatilla Indian Reservation. By many accounts, it is a peaceful and inspiring place to come and create art.

header image: detail from "Land of Origin" by James Lavadour, suite of four three-color lithographs, individual paper size 22 x 30 inches (grid size 44 x 60 inches), edition of 18.

Name: Galo Art Gallery
Description: The Galo Art Gallery in Torino, Italy, is a unique exhibition space, focusing on contemporary art from post graffiti to pop art, encompassing a wide range of visual media. Since opening our doors back in 2010, the gallery celebrates established artists and promotes up and coming talent, primarily in the field of street art.

Description: The Akron Black Artist Guild is a community of Black artists advocating for, cultivating, and amplifying the work of Black artists, makers, and designers in and from Akron, OH.

Name: Artspace at Untitled
Description: [Artspace] at Untitled is a contemporary art center and print studio located in the heart of Oklahoma City.

Description: Animal portrait specialist. 100% hand-painted portraits.

Name: Kayne Griffin
Description:
Kayne Griffin is a Los Angeles based art gallery representing established and emerging contemporary artists with a focus on the aesthetics, theories, and practices that have defined the Southern California art scene from the postwar era to the present. 

Founded in 2011 by partners Maggie Kayne, Bill Griffin and James Corcoran, the gallery was designed by internationally acclaimed artist James Turrell and features a site-specific sky-space and outdoor courtyard.

Notable exhibitions include career surveys of Mary Corse, James Turrell and Beverly Pepper as well as group exhibitions such as Surrogates: Huguette Caland, Kiki Kogelnik and Lynn Hershman Leeson and At The Edge of Things: Jo Baer, Mary Corse and Agnes Martin. The gallery has also held important historical exhibitions of John Mason and Ken Price amongst others. Our upcoming schedule includes solo exhibitions by Robert Irwin, Sarah Crowner, Sam Moyer and Mary Obering.

Name: All Star Press Chicago
Description:
All Star Press is an all-in-one Chicago art gallery, retail space, and print studio based out of the Logan Square neighborhood. We focus on limited edition artist prints from all over the world, with an emphasis on sports, Chicago culture, film, and concert posters. We value the relationship that we share with our local and international artists along with our surrounding community, believing that creativity and the expansion of art is something everyone should have the opportunity to experience.

Our mission is to broaden the relationship and conversation that we share with sports fans and artists extensively throughout Chicago allowing our space to not only be culturally significant but influential in the Chicago art scene.

In addition to our cultural presence, through our curated work, we are a three-in-one gallery, screenprint studio, and design company. Over the past 10 years, we have been curating shows in Chicago, bringing together illustrators, artists, street art, sports fans, and designers to create a unique all-inclusive atmosphere like no other in the city. As we continue to grow as a cultural hub in Logan Square, we are always looking to further collaborate with others to continue to share our love and desire for printed material throughout the city and beyond.

Name: Line Up Gallery
Description:
Lancée par Lucas Jacazio en 2020, Line Up Gallery offre aux amateurs et passionnés d’art une sélection d’artistes triés sur le volet pour leur talent, leur style et disposant déjà d'une certaine notoriété.
L’exclusivité sur Line Up Gallery est forcément de mise pour offrir à l’acheteur la meilleure expérience d’achat. Jusqu’à présent, Line Up Gallery met en avant 5 artistes déjà confirmés et reconnus par leurs pairs et plus d'une quarantaine d'œuvres de mouvements différents et variés. 

Line Up Gallery, c’est une aventure humaine faite de passions, d’émotions 
 et de convictions en plus d'être une réelle  expérience artistique.
 
Rejoignez Line Up Gallery dès aujourd’hui !

Name: Art & Design Foundation
Description:
Art & Design is a modern, dynamic Foundation, a space in which to create, develop and share new trends and knowledge. It seeks to rationalise the ‘Haute Maison-Couture’ and blend each component part in with its environment, doing this through creativity, innovation, science and design.

Art & Design Foundation is an international organisation dedicated to bringing fashion and art into your home. Art & Design Foundation helps to incorporate the most revolutionary and cutting-edge ideas into each item for the home, taking them from designers, photographers, illustrators and architects with lengthy history and know-how in the household sector, renowned fashion brand names and artistic educational organisations. This is a redefinition from the ground up of the artistic consideration of colours, lines, shapes, prints, materials and textures. This means there must be strategic thought involved that goes beyond the merely visual qualities of objects to offer exclusive pieces that arise out of the imaginations of the artists from the various disciplines and are created according to the highest quality standards. 
Art & Design Foundation aims to develop and apply new concepts and trends in the home, both in decoration and in how all the component parts of which it is comprised are used: all part of our everyday work.

Name: Regard Sud
Description:
Inaugurée en 2000 et située idéalement dans le quartier historique de la Croix-Rousse à Lyon, la galerie Regard Sud expose des artistes issus du pourtour méditerranéen et d’ailleurs, s’inscrivant avant tout dans une logique de passerelles vers les pays du Maghreb et du Moyen-Orient.

Au fil des années, Regard Sud s’est progressivement implantée en tant que galerie d'art de référence en matière d’ouverture internationale,  exposant à la fois des personnalités reconnues mais aussi émergentes.

Description: Permettre la rencontre de deux mondes à travers des animations à visée culturelle, artistique et éducative !

Description: A SHIP IN THE WOODS is a 501(c)3 nonprofit art foundation and incubator for elevated dialogues in art, science and culture based in Southern California.  Through it's artist residency, collaborations and diverse programming A SHIP IN THE WOODS has become a thriving community of innovative thinkers and supporters, acting as "a vessel for cultural capital".

Name: MaxArt Foundation
Description:
The MaxArt Foundation for the Support and Development of Contemporary Art was founded in 2021. Fund's main programs: art residences and grants for Russian artists, organization of group site-specific exhibitions with the participation of artists of different generations, working with different genres and media. Such projects are focused on a non-standard place of exposure and allow you to go beyond the space of the white cube, which gives rise to a completely different experience of the viewer's interaction with art. MaxArt is a young cultural institution that offers an individual approach to working with artists and collectors. MaxArt is a concentration of creative energy, multiplied by the expertise and professionalism of the foundation team.

Фонд поддержки и развития современного искусства MaxArt основан в 2021 году. Основные программы фонда: арт-резиденции и гранты для российских художников, организация групповых site-specific выставок с участием художников разных генераций, работающих с различными жанрами и медиа. Подобные проекты ориентированы под нестандартное место экспонирования и позволяют выйти за пределы пространства белого куба, что рождает совершенно иной опыт взаимодействия зрителя с искусством. MaxArt — молодая культурная институция, которая предлагает индивидуальный подход к работе с художниками и коллекционерами. MaxArt — это концентрация творческой энергии, умноженная на экспертизу и профессионализм команды фонда.

Name: Space One Eleven
Description:
Space One Eleven is a visual arts nonprofit founded in Birmingham, Alabama in 1986. Our mission is to provide professional opportunities for artists, create a forum for public understanding of contemporary art, and offer arts education to area youth. 

Key to the philosophic foundation of Space One Eleven is the belief that art is where you find it, whether from a Birmingham artist, a nationally recognized artist or a creative youth in a local Birmingham neighborhood. Art is informed by place, time, and experience. Run by artists, formed by place, and celebrating cutting-edge art that stretches the imagination, SOE incorporates these principles into all of our programs as we deal with art, community and public discourse.

Name: 101 Projekt Galeria Sztuki Współczesnej i Dom Aukcyjny
Description:
101 Projekt Galeria Sztuki Współczesnej i Dom Aukcyjny w swojej ofercie prezentuje współczesne malarstwo, rzeźbę, a także fotografię. Od początku swojej działalności współpracuje zarówno z młodymi, obiecującymi artystami, jak i twórcami o ugruntowanej pozycji, takimi jak: Sylwester Ambroziak, Eugeniusz Gerlach, Grzegorz Gwiazda, Bartek Jarmoliński, Agata Krutul, Magdalena Laskowska, Krzysztof Ostrzeszewicz, Krzysztof Pająk czy Marcin Rząsa. W swojej ofercie posiadamy prace wybitnych profesorów ASP, a także prace ich uczniów.

Galeria promując twórczość artystów, z którymi współpracuje, organizuje wystawy indywidualne, prowadzi również comiesięczne Aukcje Sztuki.

Name: Craig Krull Gallery
Description: A founding gallery at the Bergamot Station Arts Center, Craig Krull Gallery is recognized for California painting, drawing, sculpture, and photography, focusing on local movements and lineages including Light and Space, Chicanx Art, and California Clay. The gallery presents sixteen to twenty exhibitions per year, with educational programs, artist talks, and performances.

Name: Children's Art Classes St. Pete/Seminole Florida
Description: Children’s Art Classes offers nine-month programs of study that include painting, drawing, design, printmaking, sculpture, ceramics, and much more. Students ages 3 and up will experience over 40 different areas of art to feed their passion and enhance their skills.

Name: Arts Letters & Numbers
Description:
Artists. Musicians. Composers. Thinkers. Writers. Makers. Scientists. Architects. Dreamers.

A NY Residency made for individual and collaborative work.
It’s all about the linkages. Arts Letters & Numbers is about new ideas, new ways of thinking, of making, doing, expressing, acting, contributing. This is what happens when you give people the freedom to create, to collaborate, to influence and make change possible.

An interdisciplinary artist residency in rural upstate New York, ALN crosses boundaries – creating ideas and solutions bigger than any one person. A space to focus on creating, both individually and collectively, ALN facilitates an ongoing script through solo exhibitions, group performances, film creations, music collaborations and spontaneous conversations.

Arts Letters & Numbers is a place of creative urgency and intensity of purpose. It is what happens when worlds collide.
To find out more, or to apply, please visit artslettersandnumbers.com

Name: Enjoy Contemporary Art Space
Description:
Established in June 2000, Enjoy Contemporary Art Space is a leading independent contemporary art space located in Te Whanganui-a-Tara Wellington.  Enjoy generates and facilitates contemporary art projects to support the development of new work and promote critical discourse around contemporary practice in Aotearoa.

This kaupapa is carried out through exhibitions, an annual residency, an open call for proposals, offsite projects, public programmes and publications. Enjoy provides both emerging and established practitioners with opportunities to develop new and innovative work.

Governed by a board of trustees, in a Tia Tuarua Co-Chair model, Enjoy strives to honour Te Tiriti o Waitangi through our strategic leadership and work with artists. We acknowledge Te Āti Awa/Taranaki ki Te Upoko o Te Ika and the neighbouring Ngāti Toa iwi as the mana whenua of this region and rightful custodians of the land upon which we stand.

Enjoy delivers our programme with investment of our primary funders Creative New Zealand Arts Council Toi Aotearoa, and additional support from Wellington City Council, community funding and fundraising initiatives.

Name: BASTIANA FILMS
Description: Bastiana Films es una empresa argentina productora de largometrajes de ficción y documentales, fundada en el año 2005. Ha producido programas de televisión, seis largometrajes documentales, cinco cortometrajes, dos telefilms y está preproduciendo un largometraje de ficción.

Name: Authentic Contemporary Art
Description:
Authentic Contemporary Art  was founded in 2005 and now serves as an alternative source for emerging and contemporary art. Based in the Metropolitan Washington, DC area, Authentic Contemporary Art (ACA) creates opportunities for art collectors and emerging contemporary artists to connect through exhibitions and through a juried online art gallery. We have recently been contracted to manage the exhibitions and curatorial services at The Center for Green Urbanism in Washington, DC.  

ACA also provides opportunities for individuals who are interested in visual art to learn more about collecting and conserving art through workshops, gallery visits and special events. ACA partners with a variety of art and interior design professionals and organizations to present contemporary art that is accessible and affordable to the novice collector and attractive to established art connoisseurs.

Mission

The mission of Authentic Contemporary Art is:

•To provide affordable and accessible original art for the public
•To provide unique opportunities for talented emerging artists to show their work
•To assist new art collectors in appreciating the value and beauty of original art in their homes and offices
•To provide an opportunity to give back to humanity through art sales generated by exhibitions and

Name: MIL111.studio
Description:
We are a multidisciplinary creative studio specialized in the design of experiences and digital content.
We design and produce videos, photographs, projections, live visuals and AV installations from the perspective of the Art of the New Media.
We are a small team of thinkers and a large network of collaborators. Visual artists, photographers, videographers, art directors, graphic designers, set designers, lighting designers, interior designers, 3d artists and musicians working together from idea to execution.

Name: We Art 51
Description:
Pour que tout le monde puisse avoir la chance de s'offrir une œuvre originale d'un artiste contemporain, j'ai imaginé We Art 51 sur une idée simple :

1) Réaliser à partir d'une œuvre originale, 50 reproductions, numérotées et signées de la main d'un artiste contemporain.

2) Les proposer à l'achat sur un site dédié
aux 50 premières personnes intéressées,

3) Une fois les 50 exemplaires vendus, un tirage au sort parmi l'ensemble des acheteurs permettra à l'un d'eux de gagner l'œuvre originale ... pour le prix d'une reproduction.

Mais ce n'est pas tout !

En plus de l'aspect économique des choses, j'ai souhaité apporter au projet We Art 51, une dimension sociale, en réalisant quelques exemplaires supplémentaires qui seront offerts à tel hôpital, telle association, telle maison de quartier, tel musée ... pour diffuser l'œuvre au plus grand nombre.

Description: The Curator Gallery is a fine art gallery located on 23rd Street in Chelsea which collaborates with notable guest curators for each exhibition.  Founded and underwritten by Ann S. Moore, the retired Chairman and CEO of Time Inc., the gallery's mission is to bring exposure to hardworking artists, as well as to educate and expand the pool of engaged, serious collectors.
