Name: Be.Freer Original Works
Description:
Inspired by the journey to freedom. 

Using the skills I've learnt in my adulthood to revisit the passion from my childhood. 

I've always had a strong connection with creativity but like most, I've found myself distracted with growing up. 

It took me a while to recognise that I found myself at a young age and I should have stopped looking there. So now, I'm on a journey to reconnect with myself, my passion and the things that make me feel free whilst hoping I can inspire others to do the same.

I create original works which call on the techniques I learnt when I was younger and my more recent influences. I am always learning and keen to explore new ideas.

I currently focus on abstract realism paintings and find my style lends itself to larger scale. 

Website coming soon.

Name: Hang Tough Contemporary
Description: Hang Tough Contemporary is a sleekly designed, purpose-fitted exhibition space in the heart of Dublin’s city centre. With large, arresting windows giving passers-by the opportunity to catch a glimpse of our vibrant collections, the gallery benefits from it’s excellent central location and high footfall. Since launching in September 2021, Hang Tough Contemporary has quickly become a new cultural destination for both locals and tourists, offering visitors an exciting cross-section of Ireland’s rich art’s scene.

Name: Lafayette College Art Galleries
Description: The Lafayette College Art Galleries present works of art ranging from today's most exciting artists and creative practitioners to historically significant collection pieces.

Name: 境 Sakai - Emerging Japanese Art in Italy
Description:
境 Sakai - Emerging Japanese Art in Italy is a project created and directed by the Japanologist Arianna Bianciardi which aims at the diffusion and the promotion of emerging Japanese artists in Italy through art exhibitions across Italy.
The idea comes from the desire to combine the fascination for Japanese art, encouraging its diffusion, with the will to stay in Italy and create something new, holding out against the crisis which, during the last years, led young people to leave for abroad looking for a job.
The purpose is to offer a chance to Japanese artists to find a little showcase in Italy, providing assistance services in Japanese, support for arranging  exhibitions, promotion and advertising, ensuring at the same time a mutual benefit for Japanese and Italian people.

Name: Times Art Center Berlin
Description: Founded by the Guangdong Times Museum in 2018, Times Art Center Berlin (TACB) is the first parallel institution to have been set up overseas by an Asian art museum. TACB operates as an autonomous non-profit organization, which dedicates itself to exploring and experimenting with new models of Asian institutions of contemporary art through various forms of art production, such as exhibitions, commissions, publications, lectures, public programs, and institutional collaborations.

Name: the medela school
Description: The Medela School is a UK based visual arts platform that delivers art classes and workshops to help people improve their emotional and mental well-being,  nurture creativity and promote expression. Our services include paint parties, art & well-being workshops and art tutoring for children, young people and adults.

Name: Digital Street Art
Description:
Creapolis est une application collaborative de géolocalisation d'oeuvres d'art urbain à l'échelle mondiale. Nous la concevons comme un outil de {re}découverte, d'animation et de valorisation du territoire à travers l'art urbain.

Le projet mobilise une équipe transdisciplinaire : histoire de l'art, ingénierie de projets culturels, médiation culturelle, science politique, urbanisme et aménagement, numérique, design, marketing...

Creapolis est un projet de l'association Digital Street Art.

Name: Art Classes Group

Name: Gill Storr Art

Name: Galerie Cultural Speech
Description:
Wij presenteren alle kunst dat het verhaal vertelt over de overleving of uitroeiing van de mensheid.

Zo zullen onze tentoonstellingen onderwerpen onderzoeken die gaan oer de nature, het absurdisme, de abstractie en de erotische aspecten van het leven.

Name: Thomas j Gallery
Description:
Thomas J. Gallery ART offers a unique collection of works of art, signed by emerging contemporary artists who have agreed to an exclusive collaboration to explore a new mode of expression and different materials and shapes, to exhibit in our American and French galleries.

Thomas J. Gallery DESIGN offers collections of limited editions, individually-numbered sculptures signed Thomas J. 
The artworks are conceived and created in our fiberglass and resin molding atelier.

Thomas J. Gallery is a space dedicated to artistic expression and to lovers of fine art and design. Our galleries are retail stores but also provide a relaxed space and exchange center, providing a cultural crossroad where all art lovers can congregate and make artistic, creative and cultural discoveries.

Name: Guarisco Gallery
Description: Guarisco Gallery is a fine art company based out of 2828 Pennsylvania Avenue NW, Washington, D.C., United States.

Name: De Muzen Veenendaal
Description:
Muziek, dans of theater. Wat je ook wilt doen: De beste opleiding in amateurkunst krijg je bij De Muzen.

Onze lessen zijn voor iedere leeftijd en van elk niveau en worden altijd gegeven door gediplomeerde docenten. Of je net begint, of al jaren speelt. Bij De Muzen ontdek je de kunst in jezelf
Daarom heeft de instelling zich dan ook in de loop der jaren ontwikkeld van een muziekschool tot een multidisciplinair instituut waar muziek, dans en toneel beoefend wordt. 

Er wordt cultuureducatie geboden aan verschillende scholen en buitenschoolse opvanglocaties.
Voor organisaties worden er workshops georganiseerd met uiteenlopende doelen zoals teambuilding.
Daarnaast worden de Amateurkunst en popmuziek ondersteund en worden evenementen, festivals en kunstprojecten georganiseerd.

Name: El Teatro Tunis
Description:
El Teatro est le 1er espace d'art et de création en Tunisie, fondé en octobre 1987 par Taoufik Jebali.

Avec son esprit avant-gardiste, l'espace El Teatro est connu et reconnu sur la scène culturelle tunisienne comme un promoteur de toute expression artistique contemporaine, à travers non seulement les arts de la scène mais aussi les arts plastiques.

L'espace est composé : salle de spectacle, lieu de représentation théâtrale et autres événements culturels (projections, conférences, débats, rencontres...).

El Teatro se donne pour objectif d'impulser et d'entretenir une réflexion continue sur l'Art, l'Artiste et leur rôle au sein de la Cité.

Il encourage l'émergence de jeunes talents en leur assurant une production et/ou une visibilité médiatique.

Il offre une plateforme de rencontres pour les artistes tunisiens, arabes, méditerranéens et Nord/Sud pour une dynamique artistique à dimension humaine.

Il est aujourd'hui l'un des lieux incontournables de la culture en Tunisie et une véritable référence dans le monde arabe.

Name: FedeMorgana Atelier & Academy
Description:
Da oltre 10 anni ci occupiamo di Sartoria Artistica ed organizziamo corsi di formazione individuali e di gruppo sia in presenza che online
Abbiamo sviluppato (e registrato) un metodo di taglio che permette di realizzare cartamodelli su misura in maniera semplice ed intuitiva mediante una tavola di modellistica e correlata dispensa.
Creiamo un percorso personalizzato in base al livello di partenza ed agli obbiettivi che ogni alunno vuole raggiungere.
Abbiamo strutturato dei pacchetti lezioni da 1 ora, 6 ore, 10 ore o il pacchetto completo da 48 ore da calendarizzare in base alle esigenze ed alle disponibilità.
Creiamo cartamodelli e kit sartoriali disponibili per velocizzare il lavoro dei sarti ed hobbisti.
Organizziamo corsi intensivi in gruppo, focalizzati su argomenti specifici come ad esempio il corso intensivo sulla Corsetteria 1700.
Per maggiori informazioni e dettagli, contattaci al 3383730334 o sul sito fedemorgana.com

Name: Spanda, Dubai - Classes for Bharatanatyam, Carnatic Music, Kerala Mural Painting & Indian Arts
Description:
Spanda is one of the leading and fastest-growing fine arts company in Dubai that offers true-to-the-roots Indian arts and culture experiences through Bharatanatyam, Carnatic Music, and unique Indian art styles, including clay modelling.


A forerunner committed to sharing authentic Indian fine arts experiences in Dubai, all creative programs abounding in tradition and technique are customised to suit beginners to advanced level art enthusiasts, seekers, and practitioners of all ages and cultural backgrounds.


All programs and workshops run throughout the week at Spanda's centres in Al Nahda and Al Quoz. Art experiences and artwork are commissionable for special occasions

Name: Ballet Academy of South Texas
Description: The Ballet Academy of South Texas is the premier source of dance training in the Golden Crescent, offering classes in ballet and other dance disciplines for students of all ages. An inspiring and highly qualified faculty share their knowledge and love for the art of dance in a positive and nurturing environment. Academy students experience a structured and age-appropriate curriculum where, through the study of dance, they learn discipline, artistry, problem solving, goal setting, cooperation and creative thinking. Developing these skills benefit students wherever their lives take them.

Name: HHJ TRADING LTD
Description:
UK Manufacturers of Framed Art , Mirrors and Photo Frames. We also offer a be spoke framing service. Our main customers are Retail outlets and interior designers.
Our entire range can be found on our fantastic web site at www.hhj-trading.co.uk.
Or just speak to me and I am sure we canb help.

Name: Wine Society Lausanne
Description: Wine Society Lausanne est le club étudiant de dégustation de l'EPFL, d'HEC Lausanne et de l'Université de Lausanne. Son but est promouvoir le vin et de le faire découvrir aux étudiants, alumnis, chefs d'entreprise et professeurs. Elle organise notamment des dégustations, des rassemblements entre étudiants et chefs d'entreprise mais aussi participe à différentes compétions internationales de dégustation étudiante.

Name: SEA Foundation Tilburg
Description:
SEA Foundation (SEA) is a private, non-profit, artist-run initiative that initiates and coordinates events, residencies and exhibitions. SEA provides on-going space for production, presentation and research, including a residency studio/space and a presentation gallery.
In all their activities the organization is fueled by visual arts. Transgressing the boundaries between cultures and disciplines, SEA Foundation always puts context and the idea before the medium. By working in different cultural contexts worldwide, the foundation generates discussion by exposing and intervening within, as well as being part of, cultural processes that concentrate on current (emerging) social, political and ecological issues. SEA supports these processes in becoming more productive, visible and solid.

Name: FOR ALL GALLERY
Description:
Naszym celem jest wspieranie i prezentowanie artystów oraz ich twórczości. Pragniemy zachęcać i ośmielać wszystkich do otaczania się sztuką, zarówno w domu, jaki i w biurze. 
Nasi artyści są starannie dobierani, a ich dzieła są niepowtarzalne i wyjątkowe. Mamy nadzieję, że miłośnicy sztuki i kolekcjonerzy będą mogli odkrywać nowych utalentowanych artystów razem z FOR ALL GALLERY.

Our mission is to support and showcase artists and their artwork. We intend to encourage and inspire people to surround themselves with art, both at home and in the office.
Our artists are carefully selected and their work of art is unique. We hope to allow art lovers and collectors to discover new talented artists together with FOR ALL GALLERY.

Name: Actions Culture & Developpement
Description:
We think we need to tap into the past to enlighten the present and invent a better future.
We act for education and the transmission of traditional knowledge, including a gender approach.
To reach the goal, we carry out cultural actions on the African cultural heritage, we give our support to vulnerable populations to help them get their economic autonomy, and intervene before international organizations.

Name: Atelier Saramello
Description:
O Atelier Saramello é um espaço criativo voltado para o ensino e a prática das artes visuais. Oferecemos cursos e oficinas de desenho e pintura para todas as idades.
Através da ilustração e do design gráfico, também desenvolvemos projetos criativos para Arquitetura de Interiores, Muralismo, Publicidade, Cenografia, Editorial, Moda e Animação de forma autêntica, lúdica e original. Nosso trabalho é feito minuciosa e manualmente através das ferramentas tradicionais e também digitais de desenho e pintura.
Vem com a gente causar a transformação através da arte!
Materializamos ideias, damos vida a sonhos.

https://www.saramello.com
https://www.instagram.com/saramello/
ateliersaramello@gmail.com

Name: Instituto Arlequim
Description:
Através do "Trilhas de Cultura", fortalecemos ideias culturais que já existem em projetos viáveis para editais. Nosso objetivo é democratizar o acesso ao fomento, aumentando a diversidade entre os proponentes e garantindo que territórios historicamente excluídos tenham maior participação.

Conecte-se à nossa visão para um mercado cultural em São Paulo mais diverso, acessível e sustentável.

Name: GLITCH - Virtual Academy
Description: GLITCH, an online training workshop for young international artists and filmmakers aged between 20 and 40. The project was created with the purpose of supporting the participants in the creation of an original augmented reality work and in the insertion in the artistic field. In order to respond to the needs dictated by the pandemic and to continue designing in times of health emergency, the first version of Glitch is held online, thus reaching a wider pool of users at a lower cost of participation. This edition is dedicated to augmented reality as a means of escape and stimulation in a time of limitations. The chosen theme is therefore "The re-appropriation of sociality and its spaces through Augmented Reality". The workshop is structured in such a way as to provide participants with the tools to deepen their artistic and technical knowledge of new media, to bring technological innovation and the creative dimension into dialogue, and to expand a network of contacts and access to the professional world.

Name: Guilhem Ribart - ARTETIC
Description:
Quelle notion complexe que le bonheur. Ceux qui ont tout pour l’être sont tristes, ceux qui n'ont rien semblent heureux… Voilà le constat de ce qui allait devenir le fil rouge de ma démarche introspective à travers la photographie et les rencontres. Habitant sur Paris, la ville des lumières, je n’ai pourtant jamais vu de ma vie tant de gens tristes et malheureux, m’amenant à m'interroger. Puis vint la découverte de l’appareil photographique, le temps de mes premiers voyages en Afrique, la confrontation au dénuement parfois total de certains et pourtant … pourtant… des sourires, de la fraternité, de l’entraide, de la joie, du respect et de la curiosité. Nous possédons tout et nous nous sentons vides de l’intérieur. Ils n’ont rien et pourtant ils possèdent tout ce qu’il nous manque…
Voilà qui devait marquer le début de mon aventure photographique.

Name: quand les fleurs nous sauvent
Description: quand les fleurs nous sauvent est une galerie d'art qui crée et met en scène des évènements et expériences artistiques uniques sur le thème des fleurs et du végétal.

Name: Zebregs&Röell Fine Art and Antiques
Description: Dealers in Colonial and Cross-cultural Art and Antiques, Natural History, Victorian Taxidermy and Kunstkammer Works of Art.

Name: POÉTISTHME
Description:
Le Collectif POÉTISTHME cherche à faire vivre des lieux – réels et textuels – dédiés à l’épanouissement de l’être par l’expérimentation, l’apprentissage et la compréhension partagés.

Nous proposons d’élaborer un chantier créatif et éducatif pluridisciplinaire qui croise expériences théoriques et pratiques pour aborder ensemble la complexité de la réalité. Les recherches poursuivies ont une double vocation : servir le présent et créer une mémoire collective – par et pour tous – que nous pouvons léguer, non comme un héritage autoritaire mais comme un testament où est inscrit le chemin parcouru, avec ses grandeurs et ses vices, pour envisager ce qui l’à-venir.

Le Collectif POÉTISTHME s’engage pour une conception renouvelée du sens et du sentiment, des usages et des manières de vivre ou pour le dire autrement, de partager le sensible. Parce que nous concevons la littérature comme ouverture, nous entendons en faire le prisme de la réinvention de notre agir au monde, de notre façon d’accueillir – de lire et de créer.


La poésie doit être humaine. Si elle n’est pas humaine, ce n’est pas de la poésie.

– Vicente Aleixandre

Name: POROSITY
Description:
POROSITY favorise l’échange des savoirs et des savoir-faire entre scientifiques, ingénieurs et artistes, en croisant les compétences et les champs de recherches et de réflexion de chacun·e.

POROSITY invite à décloisonner les pratiques et à créer une porosité entre celles-ci, afin d’ouvrir un nouveau champ des possibles.

POROSITY, c’est avant tout un outil et un service proposés aux artistes, aux scientifiques et aux ingénieurs, afin de se connecter autour de la création.

Aller plus loin, ensemble.
Repousser les limites de la recherche, de la réflexion
et de la création.
Encourager la cohabitation, la cohésion et le partage.
Créer du lien sociétal et professionnel.

--

// UNE PLATEFORME NUMERIQUE POUR SE CONNECTER //

*POROSITY répertorie les initiatives scientifiques et technologiques (laboratoires, unités de recherches, entreprises de nouvelles technologies…) qui souhaitent accompagner et collaborer avec des artistes sur la production d’une œuvre spécifique et sur le développement d’une pratique contemporaine.

**POROSITY dédie également une section aux « appels à artistes » émanant du corps scientifique ou ingénieur, ou des entreprises de nouvelles technologies, et qui recherchent des artistes pour développer un concept, illustrer ou démocratiser des recherches, …

***POROSITY propose également aux artistes, scientifiques et ingénieurs qui le souhaitent, de les accompagner de manière plus personnalisée dans leurs collaborations. Langages et vocabulaires différents, distance géographique, manque de temps, complexité du projet ou tout simplement besoin de médiation… POROSITY offre la possibilité de bénéficier d’un suivi de production assuré par des professionnels de l’art contemporain expérimentés.

Description: The Literature Society of BVCOE, New Delhi

Name: Power of Paint Art Academy & Management
Description: Power of Paint Art Academy & Management is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit supporting children and families in honoring their autonomy, creativity and voice through art while implementing therapeutic approaches.

Name: Darren Baker Gallery
Description:
Darren Baker Gallery is a contemporary art space located in the heart of London’s Fitzrovia. Opened in Summer 2014, the gallery serves as a creative platform for both established and emerging young artists working across a wide range of media. Consisting of a spacious gallery space above an in-house studio, the gallery aims to break down the barrier between artist and collector by providing a service that is both accessible and transparent.

Resident contemporary artist Darren Baker has spent the past two decades perfecting his hyperrealist technique. As part of the gallery’s commitment to support young talent, Darren’s work is shown alongside that of emerging artists. The gallery maintains a busy exhibition calendar, which includes shows developed in collaboration with charitable organisations such as The Prince’s Trust, Macmillan and Debra. 

With a centrally located show space and comprehensive online store, Darren Baker Gallery brings fresh artistic talent to the contemporary market.

Name: Stichting De Cultuurmakerij
Description: De Cultuurmakerij is dé nieuwe culturele broedplaats in Oosterhout. De hangars aan het Wilhelminakanaal vormen de plek waar cultuur in de breedste zin huisvest, maar vooral ook samenbrengt.

Name: Rosenstiels
Description:
Felix Rosenstiel’s Widow and Son is one of the world’s leading Fine Art Publishers for the Wall Décor Market.
 
Founded in London in 1880, Rosenstiel’s is a family owned and led company with each successive generation committed to quality, service and customer satisfaction.

We sell exclusively to the trade and serve a very wide and diverse spectrum of customers ranging from retail, frame manufactures, interior design, hospitality and healthcare, to art galleries, corporate agents and private investors.

Our image range includes prints and posters, Limited Editions, Print on Demand programme (Giclée), non-wall décor Licensing, and our proprietary print system Gouttelette that allows us to produce reproductions of the very highest quality and fidelity to the original.

We understand the needs and requirements of our industry and by our individual approach and superior customer service we can proudly say that we are able to fulfil any bespoke order. We deliver anywhere in the world within 3 working days.

For more information visit our website or contact us at sales@rosenstiels.com.

Name: The Artists Business Lounge
Description:
I help visual artists streamline the business of art, and facilitate strategies for creative success.
As a practising artist, with 20+ years of business experience and with coaching experience, I have a range of knowledge and skills to support artists to take their careers further.
Through group coaching programs, individual coaching, online courses and workshops I cover the things you don’t learn at art school. My model of Mindset/Skillset/Toolset helps to identify the best course of action for each artist.

From strategy, exhibiting, marketing, websites, and tech to save you time, to pricing, revenue planning, working with galleries, to dealing with overwhelm and resistance. Whatever you need, I am here for you. Together we can craft your path to more success.

Name: Affordable Art Fair Paris - Brussels
Description: A network of affordable art fairs created 10 years ago in London

Name: Instituto Emunah | Projeto Social | Rio de Janeiro
Description:
O Instituto Emunah foi fundado em Outubro de 2018, quando  Silvana, CEO do Instituto, se deparou com todos os obstáculos que uma mãe solo, moradora de comunidade, enfrenta em relação criação de seus filhos. 

Além das dificuldades de não se ter acesso a uma educação de qualidade e de não ter com quem deixar as crianças para trabalhar fora, a falta de acesso à saúde e serviços públicos em geral, foram os  incentivos que contribuíram para a criação do Instituto.

Baseado no que ela viveu, e ouvindo relatos de outras mães na comunidade, foi que nasceu o desejo de criar um espaço para acolher crianças que estavam passando por essa mesma situação.

O Emunah, atende atualmente mais de 205  crianças e adolescentes com atividades como: Jiu-jitsu, Teatro, Apoio Escolar, Escrita Criativa,  Dança, Programa Sócio emocional e Libras. 

O Instituto também conta  com a parceria da Escola de Música da Rocinha, onde são ministradas aulas de Canto, Coral, Musicalização, Flauta, Violão e Violino após o turno escolar. 

Reconhecemos em nossas atividades um grande potencial educativo capaz de contribuir com a formação da cidadania, combate a violência, respeito aos direitos humanos, e inclusão social. 

Venha fazer parte você também. Juntos somos mais fortes!
Location: Vargem Grande, RJ, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Elise Frankie Art
Description:
Being an artist from Maine, my inspiration is derived from the beauty in nature surrounding me. I love finding the craziness in the worlds’ elements. Living in the city of Boston, I compare the hectic Boston traffic and lively city-goers to the rushing streams and wind thrashing leaves. I am not an artist that is defined by one category, my artwork has a diverse range of styles depending which artistic hat I put on.
          	My artwork includes bright, eclectic contemporary art styles as well as whimsical watercolors, Boston cityscapes and New England landscapes and scenery. I see beauty in all things, depending on what I paint, I associate a different artistic style with what surrounds me and what I’m inspired by. Looking at my pieces, the viewer gets a glimpse of how I see the world, a colorful, lively, beautiful place. I hope my works of art spark a memory, a place of happiness or a creative journey in each viewer.

Name: Next Level Fairs
Description:
Since 1990, the David and Lee Ann Lester have organized more than 110 major international fairs in Miami, Palm Beach, Naples, Hong Kong, New York, Los Angeles, Chicago, Dallas, and Greenwich.

Many of their fairs have been acquired by major media companies. Art Miami was purchased in 1998 by Advanstar Communications and the Palm Beach International Art & Antique Fair, ArtPalmBeach, Palm Beach Town and Country, and the Texas International Fine Art Fair were purchased in 2001 by DMG World Media. IFAE later reacquired ArtPalmBeach and the Palm Beach International Art & Antique Fair.

Long known as innovators in the fair industry, the Lesters established their most ambitious art fair venture, SeaFair - The Megayacht Venue, in 2007. Expoships’ $40M specially designed and constructed art exhibition vessel, offers art dealers and luxury lifestyle purveyors access to many affluent communities along the US East Coast in a unique, smaller, club-like fair format.

The Lesters will continue Art Concept November 30 - December 4, 2016 at Bayfront Park during Miami Art Week, Art Palm Beach January 18 - 22, 2017 and Art Boca Raton March 15-19, 2017.

Name: Moving Gallery Utrecht
Description: Moving Gallery is an underground art gallery. The Moving Gallery focusses on artists that have not yet been discovered by the institutional galleries and are in need of a platform to showcase their work. The Moving Gallery uses temporary locations to stage its shows. No white cube. The Moving Gallery advises architects, designers, corporates and institutions with choosing artworks for offices and institutions and establishing collections. Also valuations and secondary market advise.

Name: Art Number 23
Description:
Art Number 23 is a London-based organisation, mainly responsible for curating art exhibitions inside the U.K. and overseas. The aim is to create opportunities in order to encourage and support artists from all over the world to exhibit and promote their work. 

Art Number 23 was founded in 2016, by the artist and curator Constantine Anjulatos, and is being supported by several artists with a common mission: to create a global network of artists, curators, galleries and art enthusiasts, and organise art-related events where the participants can socialise, practise their skills, share their knowledge and exchange ideas.

Previous projects of Art Number 23 include exhibitions in NYC and Philadelphia (USA), Moscow (Russia), Berlin (Germany) and Athens (Greece).

Name: Sicily Artist Retreats
Description:
Sicily Artist Retreats is an international art school in Western Sicily, dedicated to world-class instruction in oil painting, sculpture, charcoal, graphite drawing, watercolor, and other media.  

Founded in 2021, Sicily Artist Retreats offers workshops at our studio, with students staying at a nearby boutique resort hotel, Baglio Custera. All workshops include organized excursions, either to paint en plein air along Marsala’s stunning coastline or to visit local museums. 

Our faculty has included luminaries like Dionisio Cimarelli, Steven Assael, Dan Thompson, and Patrick Byrnes, to name a few, as well as up-and-coming instructors like M. Tobias Hall, Ritchie Carter, and Samantha Stover. All participants get equal, personal attention from our instructors.


An average day might begin with a demo that leads into a work period, a break for lunch, resume individual work in the afternoon, and conclude with a glass of wine by the Baglio Custera pool. Every workshop has its own focus, but the Sicily Artist Retreats studio is equipped to accommodate all media, from oils to watercolors and clay. Students work with professional life models and they can bring their own materials or rent what they need, as they need. 

The studio sits in sight of the Mediterranean, with a view of the celebrated sunsets over the Egadian Islands. We take enormous pride in our mostly plant-based lunches we prepare in the kitchen on-site, too, and students are welcome to enjoy our library and gallery between sessions as they please.

Sicily Artist Retreats also works with local artisans and archaeologists to expose students to the dense artistic history of our region: Greek and Roman sculpture from the 5th century BC, civic architecture from the Gothic Middle Ages and the Spanish Golden Age, and local crafts like ceramic ware.

But more than a school, Sicily Artist Retreats is a family, and we are always delighted to see an alumnus sign up for a new course — as they frequently do.

Name: Logotamp, S.L.
Description:
Somos una empresa con un equipo creativo, profesional y cualificado, con mas de 29 años de experiencia en el sector y disponemos de los mejores medios para ofrecerte excelentes estampados, una respuesta ágil y la mejor calidad-precio del mercado.

Estamos situados en Castellar del Vallès a 25 Km. de Barcelona y desde ahí damos servicios a toda España.

Desarrollamos técnicas y acabados para pronto-moda, para colecciones de souvenir y promociones publicitarias, tanto en tiradas grandes como cortas.

Nos gusta nuestro trabajo y el objetivo es hacerlo bien, es importante que el cliente reciba lo que espera de nosotros, y nos distinguimos por nuestra calidad de estampado realizado exclusivamente con tintas PLASTISOL de alta calidad, lo cual nos permite imprimir cuatricromías sobre fondos claros y separaciones de color (falsa cuatricromía tramada) sobre fondos oscuros y por la rapidez en el servicio de entrega a nuestros clientes, gracias a nuestro personal altamente cualificado.

En LOGOTAMP, S.L., agrupamos todos los procesos que integran la técnica de la estampación textil, desde la fotomecánica (fotolitos), pasando por la confección y grabación de pantallas, para llegar al proceso de estampación sobre diferentes prendas textiles con maquinas automáticas M&R de hasta 12 colores. Ofrecemos asimismo, los servicios auxiliares de doblado y embolsado individual de camisetas y ropa de trabajo, para aquellos clientes que lo requieran, así como todo el proceso logístico de envíos. Cabe destacar que nuestra preocupación por el medio ambiente, nos obliga a cumplir con todas las normativas de reciclaje de residuos requeridas por la autoridad.

Name: Galeria Sztuki Współczesnej BWA
Description:
Galeria Sztuki Współczesnej BWA należy do najważniejszych, największych instytucji w Polsce, zajmujących się sztuką najnowszą i  pokrewnymi jej dziedzinami. Jest niezależna artystycznie, finansowana ze środków budżetowych miasta Katowice. Otwarta jest na wszystkie zjawiska w sztuce wizualnej. Prezentuje w swoich salach zarówno artystów uznanych, jak i młodych twórców. Pokazuje sztukę polską i zagraniczną w  szerokich kontekstach kulturowych. Istotną częścią działalności galerii są spotkania z artystami, pokazy filmów, performance, dyskusje, sesje, wykłady, warsztaty plastyczne i inne działania edukacyjne.

Galeria BWA prowadzi również działalność wydawniczą, której owocem są zarówno albumy i katalogi wystaw, jak i istotne merytorycznie prace wybitnych krytyków, historyków i teoretyków sztuki, niezbędne dla wszystkich zainteresowanych najnowszą kulturą.

Przestrzeń wystawiennicza galerii należy do największych w kraju. Duża sala ekspozycyjna (800 m kw.) daje możliwość modelowania wnętrza zależnie od potrzeb ekspozycji.


The BWA Contemporary Art Gallery in Katowice is one of the biggest and most important institutions in Poland, which deal with the newest art and related branches. It is artistically independent and financed with the municipal funds of the city of Katowice.

Name: Shyamala School of Art
Description: Shyamala School of Art is a leading institution based in Colombo, Sri Lanka that focuses on education in the arts for children and adults. The school specializes in teaching interdisciplinary art to children between the ages of 3-15 yrs, Pearson-Edexcel IGCSE and GCE Art & Design students, adults, and children with special needs. As a result, the SSA prioritizes creating an environment that nurtures mindsets, encourages creative expression, celebrates diversity and facilitates the growth of well-rounded individuals. The SSA is committed to providing exceptional service, warmth and care to all our students to create a remarkable experience in the field of arts education.

Name: The Art Partners
Description:
The Art Partners is an art office for a new generation of international collectors based in Central London and operating in Paris, Geneva, New York and Los Angeles. We focus on three key areas: collection management, personal advisory and bespoke art experience. Our mission is to build bridges, to create a dialogue between different cultures and to actively participate in the dynamic and transnational contemporary art world. 

We give high individual care to each of our clients, providing them with tailored solutions to their needs. Our aim is to bring you an inspiring journey that engages with the contemporary art world and serves to develop mutually valued and long-lasting relationships. 

We are also supporting artists in the middle stages of their careers by giving them an opportunity to stay and work at one of our Untapped Artist Residencies, in Rapallo, Italy and Limassol, Cyprus. We are certain that our residencies located in the most tranquil, beautiful and historic places are providing artists with a source of inspiration and time for contemplation, which is increasingly difficult to find in a busy, materialistic and secular world. Our Untapped Artist Residencies have welcomed numerous international artists including Dairo Vargas, Antonis Donef, Marianna Gioka and Laura Gannon.

Name: Draw Art Fair London
Description:
Draw Art Fair will be the first fair in the UK dedicated to modern
and contemporary drawing. It aims to present all facets of drawing 
as a fundamental practice and to create a platform where rare works
by modern masters and recent exciting developments from 
the 21st will stand side by side. It will provide an unrivalled opportunity
for visitors to discover the new, and to rediscover established artists.

Draw Art Fair will be launched in London from 15–19 May 2019 
(opening to the public from 17–19 May). It will take place over three 
floors at the Saatchi Gallery and include up to fifty galleries, which will  
be invited to curate individual exhibitions of artists’ drawings, or groups  
of drawings in a museum-style context.

To demonstrate the scope and range of modern and contemporary  
drawing, exhibitors will also be able to juxtapose drawings with related  
paintings, sculptures and videos in a ratio of approximately 70% to 30%,  
using drawing as the core concept for a broader perspective on artistic  
creation and production.

Name: University Museum of Contemporary Art
Description:
The University Museum of Contemporary Art - the teaching museum of the University Massachusetts Amherst – is a multidisciplinary, international laboratory for the exploration and advancement of contemporary art.

Through exhibitions, a permanent collection, educational programming, and a visiting artists program, the University Museum of Contemporary Art acts as a forum where renowned and emerging artists can test ideas and where diverse audiences can participate in cultural experiences that enhance understanding of the art of our time.

In its programming, the UMCA balances a commitment to experimentation with a mandate to serve as a dynamic teaching and learning resource, affirming the University’s dedication to education, research, and community service.

Name: Follow the Muse
Description:
Follow the Muse is both the business name and philosophical principle underlying the lives and the art of Marc Clements and K. Daphnae Koop. The Voice of the Muse is often elusive; the art of following is the essential focus of our work. Visit our website at www.followthemuse.com. 

The gallery is located on the first floor, #166, just off the main entrance of the Northrup King Building located in Northeast Minneapolis.

Name: Override Films
Description:
Override Films is a group of passionately driven artists with a desire to help others create through the means of cutting edge aerial cinematography and digital cinema.

We excel in all aspects of digital cinema: conception, production, and post; but what we are renown for is our expertise in the realm of aerial cinematography. We utilize a variety of HD and 4k video platforms to capture any shot, in virtually any condition, in any walk of life. We strive to create films with our collaborators that will be beautiful, moving, touching, exciting, fun and timeless; films to be proud of.

We specialize in luxury real estate, tourism, events, action-sports, corporate, and cinema. 

Services:
AERIAL CINEMATOGRAPHY: Over 4 years experience in aerial cinematography built on an additional 7 years of R&D in the field of aerial imagery. We have a wide variety of rc aircraft that have camera payload capabilities varying from the GoPro to the RED Epic. We also offer aerial footage from full-size helicopters with various camera rig options such as Tyler mounts, brushless gimbals, and even CineFlex Elite and CineFlex HD systems. 

PRODUCTION: Over 14 years experience in video production. We utilize our vast experience with jibs, dollies, motion-control, lighting, and more as a foundation for us to continue to push the limits of creative and beautiful cinematography and photography.

TIME-LAPSE PHOTOGRAPHY: Our newest obsession! Utilizing the latest Motion-control time lapse systems we love warping the perspective of time and movement. 

POST-PRODUCTION: As long as we’ve been filming, we’ve been editing! We believe that editing that footage together is just as much an art form as is the filming. We take great pride in the fine details of organized media storage and management, creative assembly, and timely delivery.

Substantial library of stock footage from across the state and country is also available.

Name: The Gallery at Ice
Description:
The Gallery at Ice is located in Windsor High Street, just a two minute walk from the Castle and is based in a stunning Georgian building. We represent renowned and emerging British and International artists and we are a pioneering company with an ethos to deliver accessible, high quality original art. Our art consultants work directly with our artists, promoting them through our programme of exhibitions and commissioning them through projects and strategic partnerships.

We specialise in contemporary fine art; paintings, photography, sculpture and collectable Modern British original prints.  Our diverse portfolio of artists brings together an inspiring, creative, exciting collection of thought provoking art and we endeavour to bring our clients the very best in British talent today.

Gallery 1: this space is dedicated to a revolving exhibition programme showing established and emerging young artists and we exhibit a variety of mediums including paintings, sculpture, photography and mixed media installations.
Gallery 2: this room showcases collectable Modern British original prints by artists including;

Name: Verbier 3-D Foundation
Description:
Situated in the heart of the Swiss Alps, the Verbier 3-D Foundation is a non-profit cultural organization dedicated to promoting contemporary art, environmentalism and education through its Artist Residency and Sculpture Park.

Founded in 2010 by New York-based artist Madeleine Paternot and Verbier-based artist Kiki Thompson, the pioneering organization creates an experimental and educational Artist Residency and Sculpture Park at an altitude of 2,300 meters, inspired by the stunning Alpine landscape of Verbier, Switzerland.

For the past 10 years, the Foundation has supported over 32 Swiss and International artists by offering a research-led residency that pushes artists out of their comfort zones, fostering development and new work that might not be possible in the studio space. The idea is to get out of the studio, into nature, research, collaborate, think, act, create and communicate.

The research-led residency and programming is curated by Alexa Jeanne Kusber.

Name: Bea Aparicio

Me dedico a la ilustración con un enfoque feminista.
Siempre he estado muy ligada a la Docencia tanto del Dibujo, el Color y la Creatividad, impartiendo Talleres en el Museo de Reproducciones de Bilbao, la Universidad de Deusto o la Agrupación Vasca de Acuarelistas entre otros.

Desde hace un año me dedico en cuerpo y alma a mi trabajo con Femgarabat, donde soy la mitad de un colectivo especializado en el Relato Gráfico Feminista (RGF) como herramienta de Difusión y de Reflexión de las ideas. También formo parte de Lempicka y Asociadas, asociación que se dedica a la Enseñanza y a la Mediación en Arte y Feminismo.

Name: 1975 Media Projects
Description:
1975 is a gallery in Rochester, NY focused on new contemporary, street art, tattoo art, graffiti, skateboarding, and related disciplines. All mediums are welcome. We are dedicated to exposing talented artists to a community that might otherwise overlook them and facilitating the would-be collector.

We began as a gallery living in a semi-permanent space within SURFACE salon in the South Wedge in Rochester, NY and after three and a half years settled into our new home in Rochester's downtown in the former Little Bakery. 1975 is about to celebrate its sixth year in October 2014.

Description:

Name: Regroupement arts et culture Rosemont - Petite-Patrie (RACRPP)
Description: La mission du RACRPP est de regrouper des personnes et des organismes œuvrant professionnellement dans le domaine des arts et de la culture dans Rosemont – Petite-Patrie afin de participer au développement de la vie culturelle de cet arrondissement. Cela passe par la mise en œuvre d’actions visant à améliorer la pratique artistique professionnelle et la vie culturelle dans l’arrondissement soit : en créant des liens avec les autorités politiques et administratives, en développant des initiatives favorisant le réseautage, et en facilitant l’échange entre les artistes et la communauté, tout en faisant rayonner la grande diversité artistique du quartier Rosemont – Petite-Patrie.

Name: Loo & Lou Gallery
Description:
Engagée aux côtés de jeunes talents et d’artistes reconnus, la Loo & Lou Gallery a inauguré ses deux espaces en juin 2015. L’un dans le Haut Marais, 20 rue Notre-Dame-de-Nazareth, l’autre près des Champs Elysées, 45 avenue George V. Ses deux espaces lui offrent la liberté dont elle rêvait pour confronter des points de vues, proposer des approches distinctes d’une œuvre et initier des dialogues entre les artistes. Ils lui donnent également une plus grande latitude pour développer une conversation entre publics, plasticiens et commissaires, ouverte à l’expression d’autres disciplines.
À l’évidence de la rencontre humaine et artistique comme l’un des fils conducteurs de sa conception et de sa programmation, répond celle d’accompagner les artistes et leur public hors ses murs, à travers des collaborations avec d’autres galeries et avec des institutions.

Committed both aside young talents and acknowledged artists, the Loo & Lou Gallery opened for the first time in June 2015. with two exhibition spaces : 20 rue Notre-Dame-de-Nazareth and 45 avenue Georges V, near the Champs Elysées, Paris. These two spaces give Loo & Loo the perfect playground to confront different visions.
We offer a space for new approaches and the possibility of a dialogue between differents artists. Furthermore we aspire to accompany our artists and their public outside of these wall through colaboration with other galeries and institutions. Creating interaction around art at its essence. The Loo &
His love for contemporary art and his will to work with artists, lead him towards artistic direction and curating.

Name: Fundacja Obraz w pigułce
Description: Obraz w pigułce to projekt artystyczno-charytatywny, działający od 4 lat. Istotą tego projektu jest dawanie uśmiechu dzieciom w chorobie oraz wspólne tworzenie. Dzieci przebywające w szpitalu projektują rzeźby z plasteliny na ustalony temat, a wolontariusze i artyści na podstawie tych prac malują obrazy dla szpitali dziecięcych. Efektem wspólnych działań jest stworzenie wielkoformatowego obrazu, przy udziale małych pacjentów szpitala oraz wolontariuszy, pod czujnym okiem artysty Marcina Kowalika. Ukończony obraz zostaje oficjalnie przekazany na wernisażu dla szpitala. Dzieci zyskują okazję do zobaczenia efektów swojej pracy, a szpital wzbogaca się o nowy bezcenny obraz, wykonany rękami swoich podopiecznych.

Name: CAP & Winn Devon
Description:
Canadian Art Prints and Winn Devon Art Group Inc. is a publisher of open edition posters, limited edition prints, and original works of art across two distinct brands: Canadian Art Prints and Winn Devon. 

Our collections showcase an eclectic mix of incomparable imagery by more than 200 international artists. From home to office, traditional to cutting edge, our unique collection offers something for every taste and application.

We are a business to business provider. Our customers include galleries, retail framers, art consultants, home decor boutiques, hospitality designers, and decorators.

Breng sfeer op de werkvloer
Kale wanden. De gemiddelde werknemer houdt er niet van. Sfeer en beleving of een persoonlijk tintje, dat is wat men aan de wand wil. Een motiverend beeld, een landschap of gewoon een mooie foto daar worden mensen blij van en blije mensen presenteren beter. Als deze beelden dan ook nog op hoogwaardige materialen gedrukt worden zoals plexiglas, dibond en aluminium geeft dit absoluut een toegevoegde waarde. Arte Niveau zorgt hiervoor. Middels een groot aantal foto’s van professionele fotografen maakt Arte Niveau het mogelijk om in vele ruimtes de kale wanden te vullen met prachtige kunstwerken.

Keuze uit diverse pakketten.
Kunst met abonnement. Arte Niveau werkt met een aantal pakketten bestaande uit verschillende aantallen en formaten. Met een kleine investering per maand zijn de kale wanden binnen uw bedrijf gevuld. Halfjaarlijks of jaarlijks is het mogelijk de kunstwerken te vervangen door een nieuwe serie inspirerende kunst.

Kunst inspireert, stimuleert creativiteit en brengt positiviteit op de werkvloer. Zorg daarom voor kunst op de werkvloer.!

Voor meer informatie neem gerust contact met ons op of neem een kijkje op onze website www.arteniveau.nl.

Name: Taller Matriz
Description: It is a meeting space for national and foreign artists, who wish to work on their own projects or request their edition as a professional service. Taller Matriz offers workshops, courses, mentoring, portfolio production and didactic information through its different digital platforms. Its fundamental activities are understood as the theoretical-practical study of the art of engraving as well as the dissemination of this discipline and related arts, with the aim of developing a permanent work of education and culture.

Name: Petley Jones Gallery Ltd
Description:
Petley Jones Gallery is a Fine Art Gallery located just off Granville Street at 1554 6th Avenue in Vancouver. 

Our art gallery specializes in Contemporary and Historical, 19th and 20th century, Canadian, European, and American paintings, drawings, sculptures collections, and original prints.

Established in 1986 by Matt Petley-Jones, nephew of the late Canadian Impressionist, Llewellyn Petley-Jones. Petley Jones Gallery is proud to represent many talented contemporary artists. Inspiring group and feature shows are held at our art gallery year-round interspersed with a rotating selection of our gallery’s holdings.

ART SERVICES
Petley Jones Gallery offers a range of fine art services, including museum-quality custom framing, restoration and appraisals.  All framing is done in-house by our own experienced framer.

TV/FILM ART RENTALS
Petley Jones Gallery has a long history of dealing with Set Decorators for Film and Television. We have a large collection of watercolour, oil, acrylic, print and sculpture works available for rental and are happy to work with you in the selection of artwork  based on required dimensions, frame colour, content etc. 

Please join our email list for updates or follow us to stay apprised of updates on our rotating exhibitions, gallery acquisitions, and artists.

Name: Storybored Creative Club
Description: #Storybored is a Multidisciplinary Creative Community Management for Artists that mean business.

Name: Han Collection
Description:
Han Collection was founded in London in 2006 with the aim of bringing exceptional Korean contemporary art and antiques to an international audience.

Under the direction and curation of Jinsoo Park, founder and Director, Han Collection regularly holds exhibitions at its gallery space in 33 Museum Street and takes part in prestigious art fairs such as the Olympia Art & Antiques Fair, Collect Art Fair, London Craft Week, Busan Annual Market of Art and more. 

The gallery also sources important institutions for the likes of the British Museum, the Victoria and Albert Museum in London, and the Fitzwilliam Museum in Cambridge, UK.

Through our commitment and expertise, we present exceptional Korean art and antiques that express an authentic vision, superb craftsmanship, and intellectual engagement with a global audience.
