Name: LTL Studio
Description:
LTL Studio a pour but de conceptualiser, créer et commercialiser des séries de sculptures en résine de polyester Biosourcé. 

Nous espérons qu’elles plairont aux esthètes, par ses formes inspirées de l’océan et de sa capacité à s’intégrer parfaitement dans les plus beaux intérieurs autour du globe. LTL Studio est situé à Paris et exporte dans le monde entier.


Cette structure est née après des années de réflexions et d’études sur la place de l’art, du design et des formes dans les intérieurs décoratifs. LTL Studio et ses sculptures ont vocation à venir réinventer la façon de concevoir des sculptures durables et écologiques tout en restant des œuvres d’art à part entière. 

Les sculptures de cette première série, fortement inspirée des dents de Narval, mesurent plus de deux mètres et sont entièrement peintes en bleu outre-mer.

Name: Instec - Instituto de Tributação, Economia e Contabilidade
Festival Escultural Lattice
Description: El Festival Escultural Lattice.  FEEL MX, te invita a formar parte del evento que es mucho más que un festival; es una plataforma para artistas mexicanos contemporáneos que transforman espacios públicos y privados en galerías de arte vivas. Los asistentes tendrán la oportunidad de presenciar el proceso creativo en tiempo real, sumergiéndose en una experiencia inolvidable.

Name: Art Privée
Description:
Art Privee  is an online database of the world’s finest private art museums and collections.

Its mission is to enable art enthusiasts to easily locate and uncover essential information on contemporary art collections and exhibitions worldwide. This premier directory lists contact information for a continually expanding network of contemporary private museums and foundations in the United States, Europe, South America, Asia and beyond. Created in response to the recent shift in the way collectors are wanting to control their art collections in their own creative way, Art Privee offers a single destination for conveniently locating private art museums and foundations which are often difficult to identify. The listings include the name of the foundation, the location, hours and days that it is opened to the public and website.

Name: European Art Museum
Description:
An authentic art museum for all forms of visual art created within a period of 25 years from 2000 to 2025.

European Art Museum is the place that celebrates diversity, with respect for nations' different characteristics. 

It is this complex background, the subtle interactions that influence and brings together Europe's culture. 

The goal is to assemble a collection from all European countries because we are all affected by each other.

Policy assimilate and regulates. Art is like the weather - there is no national boundaries.

Name: Thoughts On Canvas
Description:
Thoughts on Canvas is a school for art with a vision to develop curiosity in art and design for young learners. "Early Design" is the school motto.
The school is based on Virtual and class-room based teaching of Art and Design by professionals.

Welcome to Thoughts on Canvas School Of Art!
Fine art classes including:
1. Basic  Sketching e.g. Nature, Figures, Still Life, “Live” drawing
2. Concept drawing e.g. theme based posters like save earth,child labour,save tigers
3. Colour Techniques e.g. acrylic/ oil on canvas, graphite, charcoal,pencil shading,water coloring.
4. Ethnic art e.g. Madhubani, Warli,mirror paintings,stone art,3D cone paintings
5. Advanced craft  e.g. “best of waste” models, Quilling,Punch craft,Clay modelling,Flower making,Papermache,Paper craft,Bread craft,Lamasa 

Courses by experienced NIFT Delhi alumni,

Morning classes for homemakers, 10:30 AM - 12:30 AM on all weekdays

Evening classes for working professionals and children, 4PM - 6PM & 7:30 - 8:30 PM on all weekdays

Name: Outsiders Gallery
Description:
Outsiders Gallery is an independent gallery founded by Mexican artist Salvador Herrera and UK Music producer Child. With space in both the virtual and physical realities, our mission is to showcase pioneering artists across the globe who push outsider, surrealist, abstract and psychedelic art to new realms. In particular we aim to promote artists exploring new mediums or who use old mediums in new ways. 

We are at the forefront of the exploration into combining human needs and desires with our ever increasing existence in new dimensions of space and time. 

Send us a message to arrange a private viewing or to discover more about the gallery.

Name: Guy Pieters Gallery
Description: Modern and contemporary art

Name: Fredric Snitzer Gallery
Description:
Fredric Snitzer Gallery’s current space includes a 1,400 square foot indoor exhibition space, divided into two galleries, and a 2,600 square foot outdoor sculpture garden. 
The gallery is committed to presenting work across all media including painting, drawing, sculpture, installation, photography, and performance from a diverse range of contemporary artists, the gallery has maintained a rigorous exhibition schedule that features at least eight rotating exhibitions by its artists each year.

Name: ECN ART GALLERY
Description: Ecn Art Gallery

Name: ANTIGÜEDADES LINARES SL
Description: Antigüedades Linares es el decano de los anticuarios de España. La familia Linares tras décadas en el negocio del arte, fundó en Granada su primera galería en 1883 en el recinto de la Alambra. Hoy en día el negocio es gestionado por la quinta generación familiar y permanece como galería independiente. Estamos especializados en pintura antigua, escultura y mueble de los siglos XIV a XVIII con especial énfasis en la escuela española. La idea de negocio se ha adaptado a las tendencias actuales del mercado, la asistencia a ferias internacionales de arte, las exposiciones monográficas, el acercamiento a la decoración y arquitectura actual son los caminos del negocio hoy en día. Actualmente la galería está ubicada en el corazón del arte en Madrid con un espacio moderno y equipado donde se puede visitar una importante colección de piezas de manera cómoda y con discreción.

Name: Conde Contemporary
Description:
Conde Contemporary is a fine art gallery established in 2013 and located in Natchez, Mississippi. 
We specialize in representational works, with a concentration on narrative realism, photorealistic portraiture, and surrealism.
Additionally, COCO provides art consulting services for private collectors, public collections as well as commercial and residential projects.
From procurement to shipping and installation Conde Contemporary and our partners are able to accommodate all your needs.

Name: CRITERION AUCTIONEERS AND VALUERS
Description:
A lively auction house with two auction rooms in central London, one in Wandsworth and one in Islington. 

We hold 2 auctions every Monday (12pm in Wandsworth and 3pm in Islington) which can sell anything from rugs, silverware, decorative items, oriental items, fine art and paintings, jewellery, garden items, collectibles and furniture. 

We offer probate services, valuations of any kind and consign items 7 days a week for our auctions. Please get in touch if you have any questions. 

Opening hours:
7 days a week 10:00 - 18:00 (19:00 on Fridays)

Name: LeVisual
Description:
Our vision is to turn every workplace into an oasis of beauty and creativity. That's why we make it easier to enjoy original modern artworks from local artists in your own office space. 

Rent original artwork for your work space. Delight your employees and impress your customers with original contemporary art that makes your office stand out.  

Join the movement, be part of our community. Register today on www.levisual.ch

Name: Arts Council of Lake Oswego
Description:
The Arts Council of Lake Oswego, a 501(c)3 non-profit organization, was created in 1999 to ensure the arts will continue to be an integral part of life in our community. The Arts Council was initiated by members of The Lake Oswego Arts Commission, a City Commission, to promote philanthropic support of the arts in the City. Organizational goals include:

Develop philanthropic funding and methods of distribution that will benefit locals arts programs, expand civic arts acquisitions, and further community arts exhibitions.

Advance arts education as a means to promote lifelong enjoyment of the arts for all citizens of Lake Oswego.

Work to raise the level of appreciation and understanding of all arts forms by people of all ages.

Increase opportunities for participation in the performing, visual and literary arts.

Promote the placement and preservation of public art in Lake Oswego.

Convoke advocates of the many arts and support their endeavors.

Name: Doodles And Murals
Description:
At D&M Studio small teams of artists, designers who are painting for passion and enjoying their hard-work, we believe we are the pioneers to introduced custom hand painted shoes in Pakistan. 

Each pair of shoes we promises to create unique, and fully customized canvas sneakers for girls, boys as well as kids. 

If you want something customized, we've got you covered... just reach out to us any time!

Name: Forum SALAM des arts contemporains
Description: Forum SALAM

Name: KITE educatie
Description:
De wereld van KITE
Met onze projecten stimuleren we kinderen en jongeren zelf de wereld te onderzoeken en te bevragen. We geven handvatten om hier op een creatieve en kritische manier vervolgens vorm aan te geven. We verbreden de horizon van kinderen en jongeren ten opzichte van kunst en cultuur en dragen bij aan de 21ste-eeuwse vaardigheden. 

Verwondering is binnen dit leerproces een belangrijk doel. Ergens in een les moet een magie moment zitten, iets nieuws wat je leert en aanzet om verder te gaan.

In onze wereld wordt deze magie ingebracht door middel van techniek of technologie. Een magneet die ook kan afstoten, een LED die brandt, of een zelfgemaakt schilderij dat geprogrammeerd is om muziek te maken bij aanraking. Alle lessen en projecten roepen op tot verwondering en daarmee de vraag: hoe werkt dit? Het is een open benadering, waarbij het eindresultaat vaak onbekend is en vooral aan de kinderen zelf.

Name: Light Mosaics
Description:
Mosaici Leggeri:
Tecnica artistico-artigianale contemporanea basata sull’utilizzo di frammenti di testo (parole, numeri, segni, ritagli tipografici) come tessere di mosaico. I frammenti vengono sottoposti a processi di tonalizzazione (riscaldamento controllato, pigmentazione, patinature) e organizzati su supporti leggeri come tela o legno mediante adesivi o resine a bassa densità.
La costruzione segue la metodologia del mosaico tradizionale — studio del soggetto, definizione della palette, posa a ritmo costante — ma reinterpreta completamente il materiale base e il valore semantico dell’opera. Il risultato è una superficie a lettura differenziata, dove la microstruttura verbale genera una macro-immagine visiva.

English – Technical Definition

Light Mosaics:
A contemporary artistic–craft technique based on the use of text fragments (words, numbers, symbols, typographic cut-outs) as mosaic tesserae. The fragments are processed through toning methods (controlled heating, pigmentation, patination) and arranged on lightweight supports such as canvas or wood using low-density adhesives or resins.
The construction follows the methodological structure of traditional mosaic — subject analysis, palette definition, systematic placement — while completely reinterpreting both the base material and the semantic value of the artwork. The result is a dual-level surface where the verbal microstructure generates a visual macro-image.

Name: Galeria AFA
Description: Galeria AFA reabre sus puertas en el centro cívico e histórico de la ciudad de Santiago. A pasos de la Plaza de Armas, AFA, amplía su interés del campo de la fotografía a la experimentación, difusión, creación, producción y comercialización de proyectos relacionados con la visualidad contemporánea. Esta extensión, se consolida a través de la continua gestión interna de proyectos editoriales como AFA editions o AFA Necessaire, la calendarización de proyectos en redes nacionales como internacionales, siempre apuntando a la descentralización de los lenguajes y circuitos contemporáneos del arte y, por consiguiente, estrechando los vínculos y profesionalización con su staff de artistas

Name: Escuela de Artes y Creación de La Sergio
Description:
La Escuela de Artes y Creación es la unidad académica y proyección social de La Sergio que acoge las artes y cultura. Cuenta con una historia de más de 40 años en el sector en Colombia, esto debido a que su Programa de Música nació en el Centro de Formación Musical Mauricio Cristancho, entidad que se integró a La Sergio en el 2007.

La oferta de formación actual de la Escuela incluye dos programas profesionales: música (con énfasis en producción musical, interpretación, composición/arreglos y canto popular) y teatro musical; a nivel de posgrado, una Maestría y Especialización en gestión cultural y creativa. En el 2026 abriremos una maestría en música con líneas en interpretación, educación musical y música colombiana.
Igualmente, la Escuela también ofrece cursos y certificados dentro de su propuesta de educación continua en diferentes áreas. La Escuela, liderada por el maestro Julián Montaña, es también una unidad de producción artística y ha gestado diferentes festivales y encuentros en las áreas artísticas y creativas.

Name: Business of Art Society
Description: Founded in 2005 by students at The Courtauld Institute of Art, the Business of Art Society's mission is to offer members insight into various business aspects of the art world. The Business of Art Society not only organises talks, tours and events, allowing members to network with professionals working at the heart of the art business world, but is, in itself, a business organisation. We are self-funded and offer our members the opportunity to develop fantastic skills in journalism, finance, marketing, event organisation & public relations – essential for success in the competitive art and business world.

Name: Black Girls Who Paint (BGWP) Inc
Description: BLACK GIRLS WHO PAINT (BGWP) is a global movement and brand magnifying Black women and girl artists to increase visibility and investment of Black women in the global arts market. Black Girls Who Paint Inc, the 501(c)(3) nonprofit entity of the movement, is our community cultivating change with three goals in mind – (1) to show actual Black girls who paint that the arts is a viable career path, (2) to empower the next generation of talented artists with resources and support, and (3) to archive our story into tangible works while building legacy for generations to come. Both movement and nonprofit work in tandem to diversify the arts industry towards more representation on both sides of the brush, ultimately normalizing Black women in the arts as a whole.

Name: River Art Works
Description:
River Art Works began in August 2018 with a bold vision of establishing a comprehensive art and creative technology retreat/campus, complemented by education in the business aspects of art. Our own research backs up the need to build a hub, a campus, that supports artists and art organizations alike. 

Self-sustainability will be in the form of tourism. Opening the galleries, gardens, sleeping quarters, performance areas, and commissary to the public for income is the goal.

We continuously work toward accomplishing this goal.

Acknowledging the significance of investing in future generations,  in 2020 we directed our efforts towards establishing connections with youth, recognizing them as the future artists and leaders. We developed ArtTEK for TEENS, a high school level program that centers on creative tecchnology education:

3D Print, Drone and Video editing, Holograms

Established Westmoreland Arts Coalition

2023 exposed a dire need to quickly begin strengthening the arts community as a whole. After the “hub” was abandoned, Westmoreland and surrounding areas lost 30% of art organizations with two more on the verge of extinction. Our artists are not keeping up with international trends. Colleges that teach the arts are not requiring any business classes. Yet, 34% of artist are entrepreneurs. This needs to reverse.

That is the goal of River Art Works.

Name: Warlock Association
Description:
Warlock est une association loi 1901 à but non-lucratif, dont le siège social est situé au 2 Rue Robert d’Arbrissel, 35065 Rennes, dans les locaux de Rennes School of Business.

Warlock est une association audiovisuelle et multimédias de Rennes School of Business. Warlock suit tous les événements de l’École. Elle assure la couverture médiatique de tous les événements associatifs et promeut également la culture cinématographique, notamment durant son festival de courts-métrages « Warlock fait son cinéma ». Elle réalise enfin le yearbook de l'école afin de garder un souvenir de chaque promotion. 

L'association est composée à ce jour de 26 membres et de 5 pôles différents : développement commercial, communication, logistique, média et enfin le pôle production.

Name: LMCollage
Description:
cut, organize, paste, ..paper, magazines, recycled objets..scissors and glue 
Memory lane or just fun juxtaposition,..no limits ...

Name: Treasure Investments
Description: Treasure Investments Corporation provides high-end limited-edition bronze sculptures for charity fundraising events. Apart from their philanthropic endeavors, Treasure Investments Corporation creates and distributes their world-class images to fine art galleries in the United States. Founder & Chairman, Mark Russo, has amassed an incredible master mold collection of famous and world-renowned sculptures from which he produces these high-end, beautiful works of art. The subject matter of these pieces ranges from wildlife themes to historical, cultural, western, and biblical and each embodies the life of its given subject.

Name: ALTEZZA STUDIO
Description:
Altezza Studio es un estudio de arte avalado por Lita Cabellut. Nuestro trato directo con la artista hace que nuestras ediciones tengan una gran coherencia y una especial fuerza. Cada colección se convierte en un apasionado proceso creativo de la mano de Lita, donde surgen piezas únicas y exclusivas.

Todas nuestras ediciones son limitadas y están realizadas mediante procesos artesanales. Nuestras obras están intervenidas por la artista en su taller, conviertiéndose cada una en una obra única e irrepetible.

Este año tenemos el honor de presentar esta increíble edición de Obra Gráfica de Lita Cabellut, con obras de gran formato y de un alto impacto visual.

Name: Efeito Parallax
Description: Apaixonados por inovação, solução de problemas e storytelling, Carlos Zardo e Rafael Yamaga desenvolveram a teoria do Efeito Parallax | Como Decisões [Aparentemente] Geniais Afetam Negativamente as Empresas durante seu tempo no podcast GuitarHomeCast. Esta teoria surgiu da observação das decisões empresariais e do background nerd dos dois, inspirada nos Lanternas Verdes da DC Comics. O Efeito Parallax ilustra como decisões aparentemente oriundas de Ideias Geniais podem ter consequências desastrosas devido à forte presença da Impureza Amarela, que as transforma em Ideias de Jerico, destacando a importância de uma visão crítica e estratégica nos negócios.

Name: Artem clava
Description:
At Artem Clava, we transform plain walls into captivating stories. Our team of professional artists creates custom hand-painted murals that bring emotion, identity, and luxury to every space — from homes and cafés to corporate interiors and public art installations.

Each mural is designed with artistic precision and tailored to your theme, architecture, and ambiance. Whether you want modern elegance, cultural heritage, or abstract creativity, Artem Clava delivers art that elevates your walls and enhances your brand’s personality.

Name: PCMMO - Panorama des cinémas du Maghreb et du Moyen-Orient
Description:
Créé en 2006 à Saint-Denis (93), le PCMMO-Panorama des cinémas du Maghreb et du Moyen-Orient est un festival cinématographique international ancré dans le paysage culturel d’Île-de-France.

Le festival a lieu au printemps et se situe hors des vacances scolaires de printemps et avant le festival de Cannes : les dates varient donc entre le mois d’avril et le mois de mai suivant les années. Le PCMMO dure une quinzaine de jours : lancement festif au cinéma l’Écran de Saint-Denis, berceau de la manifestation et cœur du festival puis séances dans divers lieux de Paris et de Seine-Saint-Denis.

Plusieurs rendez-vous culturels sont organisés pendant la durée du festival : avant-premières évènement, séances spéciales avec des jeunes ou les femmes des quartiers, rencontres littéraires, tables rondes professionnelles, concerts, ateliers ciné-philo… Le PCMMO se distingue par la variété de ses lieux de diffusion. Outre les salles de cinéma : projections dans les quartiers, dans les écoles, à l’université, dans les médiathèques, etc…

De nombreux rendez-vous sont également organisés tout au long de l’année : avant-premières de films soutenus, soirées « Coup de coeur du PCMMO » etc, avec de nombreux partenaires culturels. Le Panorama met également en place des séances de ciné-club à destination d’un public mixte de lycéens, groupes de femmes et d’associations locales.

Name: Traject Blikopener
Description:
Ben je op zoek naar inspiratie, verdieping en vooral bezieling van je beeldende werk?
Heb je zin in een nieuw avontuur om je motor weer aan te zwengelen?
Maak je veel werk, maar lijk je je eigen identiteit maar niet te ontdekken?
Sudder je al te lang op hetzelfde pitje?

Dan is Traject Blikopener wat voor jou. Bekijk de website voor meer informatie.

Name: Fundación Zuloaga
Description:
Además de su labor investigadora y divulgativa sobre la vida y obra de Los Zuloaga, la Fundación emprende proyectos expositivos a través de su programa "Arte para todos". Este pone a disposición de las zonas económicamente vulnerables y/o en riesgo de despoblación de España muestras de del fascinante arte de los Zuloaga y los artistas de su contexto.

Por otro lado, la Fundación también ofrece unos servicios como son los estudios de autentificación de obras, estudios de valoración o tasación de obras, así como estudios de investigación y visitas al Archivo Fundación Zuloaga ubicado en Zumaya, Guipúzcoa, (País Vasco, España).

Parte del Grupo másFascinante.

Name: AnkhLave Arts Alliance, Inc.
Description:
AnkhLave Arts Alliance, Inc. is a nonprofit, 501(c)(3) organization and a growing initiative to diversify the contemporary art conversation.  We are a volunteer run Not for Profit agency based in New York City but work with both emerging and established artists from around the world in order to help them achieve notoriety through our art exhibits, artist talks, online artist registry and magazine. We provide this at no cost to the artists.

We are in dynamic times when people are speaking up for the rights of people of color and the underrepresented in various forms of media. This has been noted in the music, television, and movie industries.  Similarly, many are left out of the contemporary art conversation due to low visibility of artists like them in the art world.  It is AnkhLave Art Alliance's duty to act as a creative enclave for underserved and under-recognized artists around the world.  These not only include artists of African Diaspora, Oceania, Latin America, and Southeast Asia, but we also embrace artists of all backgrounds who create work in line with AnkhLave's vision.  As a curatorial brand we provide a platform to showcase visual artists of various disciplines, media, and perspectives, giving voice to them in the art conversation of today.

Name: Charles Ede
Description:
Established in 1971, Charles Ede is recognised as one of the world’s leading dealerships for works of ancient art from Egypt, Greece and the Roman Empire, as well as early European art prior to c.1000 AD.

The Gallery exhibits at major international art fairs, has published more than 300 catalogues and sold more than 30,000 objects. Our clients include some of the world’s most important collectors as well as major museums and institutions across the UK, USA, Europe and Australia.

Name: H19 Centrum voor de kunsten
Description: H19 Centrum voor de Kunsten in Oosterhout Noord-Brabant

Name: Papua
Description: At Papua, we value emphatic design, relationship, collaboration and integrity. We believe that design and creative production should be a result of heartfelt discussions. Papua is a production house comprised of small businesses, working hand in hand to produce one final product.

Name: UNISPHÈRES
Description:
UNISPHERES est un projet pluridisciplinaire de Médiation Artistique, Culturelle et Sociale 
> Situé à la croisée des arts, des cultures et du numérique

C’est un Pôle de ressources, mobiles 
Dédié à l’information, au soutien et à la professionnalisation des associations et artistes 
Un espace de projets entre acteurs et publics, professionnels et amateurs 
Qui  s’inscrit dans le champ de « l’Economie Sociale et Solidaire », en lien avec la «Déclaration de Fribourg » sur les Droits Culturels 
UNISPHERES s’articule autour de 5 Pôles : « Pratiques », « Action culturelle », « Accompagnement », « Formation » et « Évènements » 
Et se déploie par la mise en place d’un réseau collaboratif et d’une pépinière d’artistes 
Piloté par un CA, une équipe administrative, un panel d’enseignants/artistes 
En coopération avec différentes sphères, des structures et des partenaires 
Implantée sur la métropole Bordelaise, dans une optique d’ouverture multi-territoriale, à l’échelle de la région Aquitaine
Pour contribuer à la présence artistique durable sur les territoires

Name: Shropshire Tropicalia
Description: Paintings for sale and art workshops for creatives at all levels

Name: Wit Art
Description:
Wit Art est un service de gestion, de numérisation et de valorisation de collections privées. Wit Art s’appuie sur un logiciel SaaS (Software as a Service) spécifiquement conçu pour simplifier la gestion patrimoniale des collectionneurs d’art. 
Wit Art leur permet de mieux connaître leur collection, de maîtriser leur patrimoine financier et de contribuer à la vie culturelle par la valorisation de la collection au travers de prêts. 

Le logiciel développé par Wit Art se compose de deux volets : une première partie qui vous permet de consulter et de gérer le pan administratif de votre collection. Une seconde partie vous permet de montrer les œuvres d’art de votre collection, tout en ayant la possibilité de masquer tout ou partie de votre inventaire. Il peut être utilisé non seulement pour la gestion et la description, mais aussi pour la présentation d’objets de votre collection. Le logiciel est un système complexe offrant des possibilités illimités en termes de développement ultérieur.

L’inventaire et le catalogage servent de stockage numérique pour tous les objets saisis et permet leur configuration flexible selon les besoins de votre collection. 

Pour chaque œuvre, l’outil numérique réunit en un seul lieu l’identification, les dispositions administratives, la gestion financière et les informations logistiques. Wit Art vous offre un contrôle total sur votre base de données et la possibilité de créer des connexions internes entre les objets. En même temps, vous pouvez également administrer l’ensemble de votre collection de manière simple et intuitive.

Name: A Bela do Dia
Description:
Somos uma empresa que vende e entrega flores por meio de bicicleta em São Paulo. 

Funcionamos de uma forma diferente: Você escolhe o tamanho e deixa a composição do arranjo conosco. Trabalhamos com apenas algumas opções de flor por dia, o que nos permite fornecer arranjos a um preço acessível e evitar o desperdício. Nossas flores são sempre as estação, de produtores locais, aquelas que estão mais frescas.

Name: Scholastika
Description:
Formujeme kreativní osobnosti v komunitním prostředí. Díky profesně aktivním vyučujícím získává studentstvo přímý vstup do praxe i cenné profesní vazby.

 Co je Scholastika? 
Kreativní vzdělávací centrum, které nabízí výuku výtvarného a užitého umění široké veřejnosti. Vysokou úroveň výuky a přímý vstup do praxe zajišťují aktivní profesionálové*ky z oboru s vazbami na českou i mezinárodní kreativní scénu. Studentstvo má k dispozici adekvátně vybavené prostory v centru Prahy, které slouží jako tvůrčí i komunitní prostředí vhodné pro formování kreativní osobnosti.

 Historie Scholastiky 
Scholastika zahájila svou činnost v roce 2012 prezenčními kurzy pro veřejnost. Zakladatelé Ondřej Brody a Evžen Šimera usilovali o vytvoření kompaktního vzdělávacího prostoru s důrazem na praktickou výuku i osobní přístup. Po třech letech své existence získala Scholastika akreditaci jako soukromá Vyšší odborná škola vizuální komunikace, která tuto vizi dále rozvíjí.

 Vyšší odborná škola 
Scholastika poskytuje od roku 2015 akreditované tříleté pomaturitní studium s denní formou v oborech Grafického, Motion a Game designu. Důležitou součástí výuky je spolupráce s kreativními průmysly a možnost absolvovat profesní stáže v ČR i zahraničí. Po úspěšném dokončení a složení státní závěrečné zkoušky získávají absolventi*ky titul DiS spolu s Europassem, který slouží jako dodatek k diplomu pro uplatnění v evropském prostředí.

 Kurzy pro veřejnost 
Centrum celoživotního vzdělávání Scholastika pořádá tvůrčí kurzy v oblastech výtvarného a užitého umění, digitálních nástrojů a teoretické přednášky zaměřené na historii umění, designu a architektury. Přestože výuka od počátku probíhá formou odpoledních kurzů, její kvalitu dlouhodobě zajišťují renomovaní tvůrci*kyně a teoretici*čky. Absolventi*ky mohou na vyžádání obdržet certifikát o úspěšném dokončení kurzu.

Name: Diamond Dog
Description:
Our story: 
Diamond Dog provides professional coaching services and public speaking training for artists.

The vision of Diamond Dog is that artists fall in love with public speaking as an art form through which they can present themselves authentically and fearlessly.

Conceived by artist, educator and coach Cian Donnelly, Diamond Dog works closely with artists to coach and train a radical and rich approach to public speaking.

The services provided by Diamond Dog draw both on Cian’s distinctive practice as a performance artist, coupled with his extensive experience coaching and training in public speaking, presentation skills, and effective communication.

Our training:
We have designed our coaching and training to empower artists by deepening their knowledge, practice, and love of public speaking skills.

The training is supportive, practical, and tailored to the unique demands of presenting yourself publically within the art world.

We offer one-day workshops  and one-to-one training, delivered virtually or in person.

The training covers many aspects of public speaking, from dealing with nerves and anxiety, to managing pace, pause, emphasis, delivery, to shaping content, improvising, to speaking instinctively and fearlessly.

Our clients:
We have founded Diamond Dog for artists, gallerists, curators, and educators, who are motivated to improve their public speaking skills.

We have provided training for artists presenting artist talks, curators and gallerists delivering presentations to the public, and educators speaking at seminars and conferences.

Diamond Dog also designs specialised coaching for individual artists working with spoken word, vocal performance, and writing for voice.

Name: the pink cube.
Description:
the pink cube. is founded by a queer art historian. That is, an art historian who is queer and a historian of queer art. In the short amount of time they have been active in the art world they have been confronted with resistance towards the subject of queer art, either by those who hide behind claims of ‘positive discrimination’, or those who found it too difficult to acquire ‘museum-worthy’ objects and artefacts and therefore dismissed the subject entirely. The latter is no surprise. The history of the LGBTQ+ community and queer culture remain largely in the shadows. We know the stories of pain, violence and oppression but are less familiar with those of love, beauty, power, resilience and productivity. Large portions of queer history are intangible. They are purposefully omitted from the canon by those in power, or even destroyed by force. Additionally, under the threat of such oppression queer people turn to immaterial and therefore indestructible manifestations of their culture. Fashion, dance, language, humor, art and community. Queerness is carried with us on our bodies and in our minds. If you want to destroy our culture, you’ll have to destroy us first. The result however is that we now exist on a plane of our own, outside the canon and outside the history books.

In light of this, it is now time to bring our culture to the surface. A 100 years from now, a historian looking to immerse themselves in queer history can not turn to anti-trans legislation, news reports about violence perpetuated against queer people, or online communities dedicated to the destruction of our culture. We have to prevent this. It is time our stories are told by us, and no one else.

Name: Maison des Arts de Châtillon
Description:
Située en plein centre-ville, la Maison des Arts de Châtillon est aujourd’hui un lieu incontournable de diffusion de l’art contemporain. L’association occupe depuis 1993 une maison de maître, remaniée au XIXème siècle par son propriétaire l'éditeur Louis Hachette, dont les cinq salles en enfilade et le vaste jardin clos se prêtent à l’exposition de nombreuses œuvres.
Outre son cadre atypique, la Maison des Arts puise sa richesse dans une programmation éclectique : la jeune création y côtoie des artistes de renom, toutes pratiques confondues.

     A travers sa politique des publics, la Maison des Arts s’efforce d’être un lieu accessible à tous. Ses différents dispositifs de médiation s’adaptent à toutes les typologies de publics. L’éducation artistique étant au cœur de nos préoccupations, de nombreux projets menés avec les différentes structures du territoire permettent de créer des parcours pédagogiques de sensibilisation à l’art.

   Désormais, la notoriété de la Maison des Arts de Châtillon dépasse largement les frontières de sa ville. En 2011, elle figurait déjà au classement de la cinquantaine de lieux d’exposition d’art contemporain qui comptent en France (Miroir de l’Art, été 2011).

Name: The Art Fair Company, Inc
Description: TAFC is the leading provider of specialized walls and lights to the US most prestigious art and antique fairs In New York, Miami, Chicago, San Francisco, Los Angeles and other US cities. We focus on quality, ease of build and service to ensure that the fair operators can be confident that the fair can be built quickly and efficiently, and that their exhibiting galleries can present their art in the best possible light.

Name: Gravis Art Galerie
Description:
Original art for you
Meeting point for artists and art lovers in the old town of Nice, France.
Take a look at our online gallery.

Name: ArtVala

ArtVala: Helps you Unleash your inner Creative & Creatipreneur.

Learn/Grow your Creative Skills with Expert Creativity Coaches
Build your successful career as an Artist & Creative Genius

Trusted By: 12000+ Workshop Students
Beloved By: 1000+ Rising Artists

Name: Fantasia Arts
Description:
At Fantasia Arts, we believe that creativity knows no age limits. Our dance and arts school is a vibrant hub where individuals of all ages, from children to adults, embark on a transformative journey of self-discovery through the arts.
Our diverse curriculum encompasses a rich tapestry of dance styles, visual arts, music, and more. Whether you’re a curious child exploring the world of movement, a teenager refining your artistic voice, or an adult rediscovering the joy of self-expression, our experienced instructors tailor each lesson to suit your unique journey.

We foster a supportive community where creativity flourishes. Our classes not only teach technique but also instill confidence, discipline, and a lifelong appreciation for the arts. From lively dance routines to stirring musical performances and captivating visual arts projects, Fantasia Arts is a place where passion meets skill, and where individuals of all ages can flourish as artists and embrace the joy of lifelong learning.

Name: Mélozik Entertainment
Daire Sanat
Description: Daire Sanat, is a  non-profit contemporary art platform founded in 2008 that hosts project based and curatorial exhibitions in cooperation with a diverse range of art and artists' initiatives. Starting in November 2019 Daire Sanat will run an Open Artists Studio Programme.

Name: Fine Art Valuation Ltd
Description:
Our great passion is to work with collectors to create the most wonderful collections of art. We are here to guide and advise you through the art world whether it be purely for the love of art or for investment. It is such a great honour to work with our collectors and watch their collections become admired.

We are a young, energetic and talented team of qualified fine art valuers with a passion for collecting, sharing our knowledge and curiously open to learning more. We work tirelessly to aggressively source whatever our clients desire. Our approach is different. We work for a variety of clients from all different backgrounds and appreciate that anyone can have the eye, enthusiasm and passion to make a great collector.

Our valuations cover individual pieces or entire collections. We can advise on the best method of sale and use our extensive network of sources to organise private treaty sales. Our team offers a wealth of collection management solutions from investing advice, dispersal, cataloguing, research, arranging insurance, storage and transportation, restoration and loans.

Name: Custom Woodworking and Cabinet Maker
Description: Showcasing the collection of furniture, illustrations, house portraits and limited edition prints at trade shows, crafts fairs and community events.

Name: pencilartcraft
Description: We are a team of passionate artists specializing in portrait sketches, canvas creations, and custom designs. Our mission is to turn your ideas into captivating visual stories. With a focus on precision and personalization, we bring art to life, making it a part of your world. Join us in celebrating creativity, imagination, and the power of unique expression. Explore our portfolio and let's create something extraordinary together.

Name: Bruno David Gallery
Description: Bruno David Gallery has been committed to the advancement of contemporary art and alternative visual culture in St. Louis, offering a comprehensive program of exhibitions and projects. The Gallery is always open online and to the public Tue-Sat 11-5 pm.

Description: HFA was founded in 1985 and supplies the Canadian hospitality and interior design community with artwork and mirrors.

RESEARCH AND ANALYTICS - visualizingartnetworks.com
Exhibitions are since many decades the most important media to show artwork to the public.
Our cross-linked exhibition records provide new insight into how artists are connected among each other, with curators, or exhibition places.
www.visualizingartnetworks.com is identifying, helping to explore and to develop the valuable connections.

UPDATE YOUR EXHIBITION HISTORY
Documenting exhibition-history information with artist-info.com has become an important resource to identify and reference an artist’s, curator's, and exhibition venue’s profile.

ARTWORK OFFERS / ARTWORK REQUEST
Your Artwork OFFERS or Artwork REQUESTS on artist-info.com are advertisements to sell artwork you own or to search artwork of a specific artist and to get in direct touch with possible buyers.

ARTIST PORTFOLIO SERVICE
Artist Portfolios add with text, images and embedded YouTube or vimeo videos additional information to artist- info artist pages.

MORE SERVICES
- Newsletter Service: Reach out to our worldwide audience by using our Newsletter Service and artist- info mailing list.
- Advertising: Contact us for Banner Advertisement rates.
- User Backend: Register for free, manage your services, connect to other users with 'What's on Your Mind'

Name: Tokyo Art Office
Description:
TOKYO ART OFFICE (TAO) is an art advisory and liaison firm based in Tokyo and London. From building private collections to fundraising for creative projects, we work with a range of industries that seek to enhance their appreciation of art and culture.

TAO offers services in

・Consulting and coordination of art purchasing and selling
・Curation of spaces and exhibitions
・Direction and coordination for projects involving artist collaboration
・Writing about art, artist and collector interviews
・Translation on site and for marketing materials
・PR and marketing for art events, new platforms, and corporation
・VIP relations
・Liaison and advisory

Name: Theaterfirma LINEA REKTA
Description:
Theaterfirma LINEA REKTA maakt actueel theater met de nieuwe generatie. Onze voorstellingen gaan over problemen en vraagstukken van nu. We maken muziektheaterproducties met jonge mensen op de vloer en een nieuwe generatie theatermakers achter de schermen. 

Wij geloven dat we met theater de wereld kunnen veranderen. Verandering begint bij een idee, een nieuw perspectief, een voorstelbare gedachte. We tonen met onze voorstellingen de wereld zoals deze is en de verandering die we nastreven.

Name: Mitre Galeria
Description: A Mitre Galeria, fundada em 2023 por Rodrigo Mitre, surge com o compromisso de contribuir para um imaginário social diversificado e efervescente no Brasil, e com a firme crença na prática artística como um motor chave para a transformação positiva do indivíduo e da sociedade. A galeria vem articulando propostas que ativam o cenário das artes contemporâneas em Minas Gerais, no Brasil e além, com um grupo de artistas de diferentes gerações, formações e práticas. Com um programa baseado em invenções estéticas que mudam perspectivas, provocando um reexame do passado e da imaginação do futuro, ao mesmo tempo que nos ancoram nas questões do presente, Mitre reafirma a sua busca por iniciar ações instigantes que nos conduzam ao desconhecido, abraçando o mistério como uma força vital. O ano de 2023 consolida a projeção global da galeria com a participação em importantes feiras e exposições. Entre elas, a exposição individual de Marcos Siqueira na Frieze, em Nova York, e a presença de destaque das artistas Luana Vitra na 35a Bienal de São Paulo e Isa do Rosário na Bienal de Liverpool. Em 2024, a galeria participou pelo segundo ano consecutivo da Frieze NY com um estande solo do artista davi de jesus do nascimento, e em 2025 abre seu segundo espaço em São Paulo, no bairro Jardins, ao mesmo tempo em que expande suas atividades pelo mundo.

Name: UNIVERSE ART FOUNDATION
Description:
Universe Art Foundation was started in honour of “Aadar Kalai Arasu”, “Nruthya Samrat” Sri Karukuruchi Venkatanarayanan (aged 85 years), who is a prolific Carnatic composer (having composed more than 600 songs and dance dramas) and a Bharatanatyam teacher in Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu, to serve artists involved in the performance or composition of all traditional Indian art forms (music, dance, acting, painting etc.). Many artists today do not have the financial ability to support themselves or their families after their prime due to the unattractive pay in these fields. Also, many young and talented individuals do not pursue Indian art forms professionally due to financial considerations. Many even lack the financial ability to obtain good training.
In this light, the primary aims of Universe Art Foundation are:
1. To ensure that Indian artists do not live in poverty after having dedicated their entire lives to Indian art forms,
2. To provide medical facilities to the artists and their families, in cases where they cannot afford them,
3. To provide education opportunities and funding for the children of Indian artists to pursue careers of their choice unfazed by financial circumstances,
4. To encourage young Indians to take up traditional Indian art forms as a career, by providing talented individuals necessary grants and funding to get excellent training by instituting art fellowships, and
5. To provide a platform for young artists to launch their career.

Name: New York Fine Art Appraisers
Description:
Founded in 1980 by Jason L. Rahm, AAA, New York Fine Art Appraisers is among the leading independent appraisal and advisory firms of the fine and decorative arts in the country. With offices in New York, Los Angeles, Palm Beach, Boston and Washington DC, we provide a full range of professional valuation, consulting and collection management services tailored to meet the needs of both private and corporate collectors and non-profit institutions in the United States and abroad.

Our exclusive team of highly qualified and accredited senior appraisers and advisers are expert in over 30 categories, including paintings, drawings and sculpture, antique furniture and decorations, modern and contemporary art and design, jewelry, and personal property. We are highly respected and recommended by top industry professionals.

NYFAA constantly strives to meet the expectations of our clientele, providing prompt, strictly confidential, personalized service and reports produced to our high standards of excellence. It is this quality of service which has earned us the impeccable reputation we have enjoyed for over 35 years.

Associació de Galeries

Name: Imagier Vagabond
Description:
L’Imagier Vagabond propose aux professionnels des expositions clés en main d’illustrations originales à louer.

Ces expositions itinérantes promeuvent le travail artistique des illustrateurs de l’édition jeunesse, et permettent de créer un évènement autour du livre. Elles s’intègrent ainsi à vos animations culturelles et littéraires.

Name: Dumas+Limbach | Fine Art
Description:
Specializing in modern, post-war and contemporary art, the Dumas+Limbach galleries have taken over two emblematic spaces on the French art scene: the famous Avenue Matignon in Paris, and the illustrious village of Saint-Tropez, at 50 Boulevard Louis Blanc. 
But beyond their locations, Dumas+Limbach galleries are above all embodied by their essence. Much more than a gallery, Dumas+Limbach is above all the story of a family, passionate about Art and Design, combining tradition and innovation, audacity and expertise, all under the prism of unrivalled conviviality.

Our collections are built around the great names of blue-ship and established artists. These include Hans Hartung, Andy Warhol, Jean Hélion, Jean-Michel Atlan, César and Philippe Hiquily. 
Post-war design figures such as Charlotte Perriand, Le Corbusier and Jean Prouvé complete the collection. 
Our unprecedented exhibitions retrace the major artistic upheavals of the 20th century. From Nouvelle Figuration to Art Brut, Abstract Art, Op art, Figuration Narrative and Figuration Libre, Dumas+Limbach Fine art is also committed to representing movements that are intrinsically linked to artists such as Robert Comas and CoBra, or Support/Surface with Claude Viallat. The galleries work in close collaboration with the artists' families, foundations and other institutions, as well as numerous private collectors and museums, so as to be able to offer you works that are authentic and extremely rare.

Name: Ineichen Zürich
Description:
Ineichen Auctioneers have been selling watches and jewellery ever since its founding in 1973, delighting collectors and experts alike with exquisite and delicate objects from all eras of watchmaking and goldsmithery. 
Ineichen offers competent advice on all watches imaginable, as well as professional expertise and estimation for private and business clients. 
While auctions take place in the facilities on Stadthausquai every May and November, topical art exhibitions adorn the sales room and offer an exciting addition to the presented watches and pieces of jewellery all year round.

Name: ArtAssure Ltd.
Description:
ArtAssure Ltd. provides financial and advisory services for both sellers and purchasers of fine art. Through its long-standing relationships with the leading international auction houses, collectors, dealers, curators, and financiers, ArtAssure helps its clients negotiate all arrangements, both financial and contractual, to assure their art is placed to achieve maximum value, at minimum expense, and with appropriate marketing effort.

ArtAssure's services include art analysis and appraisal, non-recourse art lending, interim financing for buyers and sellers who wish to obtain liquidity, and price guarantees for both collections and individual works of art to be sold privately or at auction.

Name: Culture in Pictures
Description:
O Culture in Pictures é uma página de entretenimento no Instagram e TikTok com o intuito de mostrar fotos e vídeos nunca vistos pelos seguidores. 

Postamos conteúdo sobre cinema, música e cultura pop de modo geral, fazendo nossos seguidores a se interessarem mais pela cultura.

Name: Living Artists Emporium
Description:
Corporate and Investment Art - Contact +27 82 5733 488 / info@laejhb.co.za

Original art communicates the energy and look of the workplace and reflects the corporate persona. 

Living Artists Emporium provides a service to enable companies to select a variety of art that best represents their corporate image, message, culture and budget.

We specialise in emerging contemporary art and have a wide selection of artworks available at the LAE Gallery. 

Our artists can be commissioned to create a single piece, unique series or a site-specific work and this is an opportunity to invest in the early stages of their careers.   

Living Artists Emporium also source art from a wide network of upcoming and established artists to satisfy all corporate art requirements.

We collaborate with the art- and interior industries that include renowned interior architects, designers, decorators and art collectors.

Included in our offering is art rentals and high quality original contemporary art to new property developments, hotels, lodges, clinics and various other institutions.

Our services include on-site art consulting, strategy, planning, procurement and installations

Name: Texarkana Regional Arts and Humanities Council, Inc.
Description:
Texarkana Regional Arts & Humanities Council, Inc. (TRAHC) was first chartered in Texas, June 1978, in response to a community needs evaluation by the local Junior League.

TRAHC's initial mission was "to enrich the human experience in the region by increasing public awareness of, exposure to, and participation in the arts and humanities in their many diverse forms." In 1980, TRAHC was contracted by the City of Texarkana, TX to program & manage the newly renovated Perot Theatre as the premier venue for live performance art within a 100 mile radius. The Perot Theatre has since hosted over 2800 events and 1.6 million people.

TRAHC renovated the 1910 Federal, & then, Bowie County Courthouse. It reopened in 1992 as the Regional Arts Center with free national & local gallery exhibitions.

Education has & continues to be the foundation of TRAHC. Since 1982, TRAHC has placed artists in local schools and brought live theatre for children to the Perot Theatre. The official title, ArtsSmart Institute, began in 1989 as TRAHC's educational department, teaching local & regional teachers how to integrate arts into education and connect with the various learning styles ever present in a classroom. ArtsSmart has been affiliated with Kennedy Center Partners in Education since 2010 bringing KCP's vast resources and artists into the Four States region.

In 2001, TRAHC began its formal outreach to the African American Community through TRAHC's African American Committee. TAAC provides community-wide representation of the area's African American population and artistic interests. In addition, TAAC develops performing arts programs, visual art exhibits, special performances and information-gathering sessions.

In 2002, TRAHC's growing community outreach inspired a revision that is now the current mission statement, "Growing people and community through the arts!"

Arts on Main (AOM) at Stewart Title is TRAHC's newest addition for teaching a variety of art forms to all ages.

Name: spazioarte.de
Description: "the gallery spazioarte is located on the first floor of a former factory building from the end of the 19th century in munich's isarvorstadt. spazioarte is a physical place and a virtual platform for interdisciplinary viewing and discussion of works and projects of art, architecture and design. artists and designers are invited to present their works."

Name: finelineartacademy
Description: Fine Line Art Academy (FLAA) educates and train undergraduate and graduate students. You'll have an opportunity to learn what's currently happening in your chosen field. In all of our programs, technology and media help you to realize your vision.

Name: Art&fact
Description: Nous sommes l'association des historiens de l'art de l'université de Liège, nous proposons des voyages et des activités culturelles de qualité pour les amateurs d'art et de patrimoine.

Name: ARAK COLLECTION
Description: ARAK Collection is an independent, Qatari-based initiative collecting Contemporary Sub-Saharan African Art.

Name: Rart Design
Description:
Har jeres virksomhed brug for noget nyt, kreativt og smukt kunst på væggene? Så kontakt os og få et uforpligtende udkast til et unikt billede med dybde. Vores unikke 3D kunst er inspirerende og fanger ens opmærksomhed med det samme.

Alle vores værker er specialdesignet, og I kan i virksomheden have så meget indflydelse på designet, som det passer jer. I kan være med til at afgøre alt fra specifikke specialmål og ramme til farver og motiver.

Name: In Bocca al Lupo
Description:
In Bocca al Lupo est une série de spectacles poétiques sous forme d’installations physiques créées pour l’espace public dont la raison d’être est d’inciter l’interaction entre les passants pour notamment resserrer le tissu social. 

Installées dans des lieux de passage achalandés, elles captent le regard des passants, incitent à l’engagement et invitent à porter un regard neuf sur l’espace public en augmentant le sentiment d’appartenance et de fierté envers sa ville. 

Anne Lagacé et Mirari collaborent sur de nombreux projets depuis plusieurs années. Les deux compagnies basées à Montréal rallient leurs talents et créativité pour développer ce projet de tournées originales.

Name: Galerie ROCCIA
Description:
Fondée par Hélène Bélanger-Martin, la Galerie ROCCIA a ouvert ses portes le 24 septembre 2009. D’abord située dans l’enceinte du complexe eXcentris ainsi que dans le restaurant Méliès, la galerie a pris un nouveau tournant en avril 2010. En plus d’emménager dans un vaste espace ayant pignon sur rue, la galerie est officiellement devenue le lieu permanent d’exposition de l’artiste peintre sculpteur montréalais André Desjardins.

Masterpiece Publishing, une firme prestigieuse de représentation d’artistes basée en Californie, s’est associée à la Galerie ROCCIA pour en faire son seul point de vente au Canada. Cette association fait de la Galerie ROCCIA un lieu unique, où plus d’une cinquantaine de sculptures de bronze ainsi qu’un inventaire impressionnant de tableaux sont exposés en permanence.

La galerie fait aussi une place à la relève: un espace est réservé aux artistes invités. De cette façon, nous prenons constamment le pouls de ce qui se passe dans le monde des arts visuels montréalais et nous partageons avec notre clientèle nos coups de cœur et nos découvertes. 

Événements privés, vernissages, programmation diversifiée et surprenante, la Galerie ROCCIA souhaite s’inscrire comme un incontournable dans le milieu des arts visuels montréalais, québécois et canadiens.

Name: NOUVELLE ETUDE
Description:
NOUVELLE ETUDE est une maison de ventes aux enchères publiques fondée par Pierre Missika et Morgane Thelliez.

Commissaires-priseurs judiciaires, les associés vous accompagnent dans l'inventaire, l'expertise et la vente des vos objets d'art, tableaux, meubles, bijoux...

NOUVELLE ETUDE intervient également auprès des tribunaux de commerce de Paris et Nanterre dans le cadre des procédures collectives (entreprises en difficulté).

Name: The Curator's Pick
Description: The Curator's Pick is a collective of young curators of color invested in diverse art histories. We use our platform to uplift and support the work of talented young curators across the country.

Name: Academy of Fine Art Germany GmbH
Description: Die Academy of Fine Art Germany hat es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht, das Kunsthandwerk im Bereich des realistischen Zeichnens und Malens sowie dem Modellieren mit Ton intensiv zu schulen. Hierbei geht sie nach Vorbild der klassischen europäischen Kunstakademien des 19. Jahrhundert vor und vermittelt traditionellen Techniken und Methoden und ergänzt sie durch zeitgenössisch relevante Themen. Die Academy of Fine Art Germany ist die erste Kunstakademie in Deutschland, welche die Ausbildung des realistischen Kunstmalers wieder aufgreift.

Name: Roberts Projects
Description:
Roberts Projects represents mid-career and established artists of international recognition as well as emerging artists. The gallery’s focus is to present a diverse and ambitious program emphasizing museum-quality, installation-based exhibitions. Roberts Projects showcases as well as commissions projects with artists who work using a variety of mediums including but not limited to drawing, painting, sculpture, photography, film and performance. By exhibiting artists across multiple generations and continents, the gallery establishes a discursive critical voice in addressing diverse perspectives of art within a broader context of contemporary artistic practices. In keeping with its priority of championing the contributions of established artists and the potential of young artists alike, the gallery periodically mounts expansive survey shows of historical note.

The gallery’s publication division produces books and catalogues focusing on exhibition surveys, contemporary artists and art historical monographs.

Roberts Projects currently occupies a historic former coffee-roasting factory in the Culver City arts district of Los Angeles. The renovations were realized by the architecture firm of Johnston Marklee.

Roberts Projects was founded as Roberts & Tilton in Los Angeles in 1999 by partners Bennett Roberts, Julie Roberts and Jack Tilton. Following the passing of Jack Tilton (1951- 2017), Roberts & Tilton changed its name to Roberts Projects on January 1, 2018.

Roberts Projects is as a member of the Art Dealers Association of America (ADAA), a nonprofit organization of the nation’s leading galleries in the fine arts. ADAA seeks to promote the highest standards of connoisseurship, scholarship and ethical practice within the profession since its inauguration in 1962. Members have extensive expertise across primary and secondary markets and established reputations for upholding the best practices in the field. For additional information, please visit artdealers.org

Name: Punk Angels Nft
Description:
Welcome to #PUNKANGELS  ,

Be the change, fly the metaverse 

Punk Angels is an NFT, Web3 Incubator, and movement for social change from internationally renowned artist PunkMeTender. 

The Punk Angels embody freedom, inclusivity and empowerment, introducing art, fashion and social change to the Metaverse.


The NFT Collection

Choose your own reality.

The Punk Angels NFT Collection includes over 8,000 unique Punk Angels, all created in 3D by PunkMeTender and featuring with the artist’s signature butterfly wings and over 380 unique hand-drawn traits.

Punk Angels are stored as ERC-721 tokens on the Ethereum blockchain and hosted on IPFS.


The Punk Angels Club

Discover the talent of tomorrow. 

The Punk Angels Club (PAC) is a Web3 talent incubator where Punk Angels NFT holders vote to promote artists and designers from the farthest reaches of the Metaverse. PAC members are eligible for royalties, dividends and other select opportunities from the PAC talent incubator.


The Movement For Social Change

We’re giving back. 

The Punk Angels NFT Collection aims to empower women by advocating for diversity in the Metaverse. A percentage of sales from the collection (up to $100,000) will be donated to organizations working to support women and fight inequality. Donation recipients will be decided by vote by PAC members.


The Artist

PunkMeTender is a Los Angeles-based artist from Paris whose work sits at the intersection of street and fine art. Known for his murals and fine art installations, PunkMeTender’s work is featured in the collections of high-profile clients including Khloe Kardashian, Kylie Jenner, Mariah Carey and Dave Navarro.

PunkMeTender’s earlist works appeared on billboards and walls after he was introduced grafitti by famed street artist Thierry Guetta (also known as Mr. Brainwash), who was his close collaborator for over fifteen years.

Name: rubyart.net
Description: Rubyart is a social platform that connects art lovers, artists, collectors and young curators. Connect at events, curate your own shows. Signup for a beta membership. Join the conversation.

Name: Art4U.com
Description: Art4U.com’s mission is to make great art accessible to everyone. It is home to thousands of works of art covering wide range of art disciplines and genres. We do this by offering Prints and Canvas for purchase. Art4u.com’s artwork is curated by a renowned team to ensure that everything you see is of elite quality. Work can be easily found and viewed with the varied search functions, filters and Directories. We work hard to discover incredibly talented artists and make their work available to our customers. As a result, we are the largest limited edition fine art publisher, printmaker, and artisan framer in India. We proudly do all our printing and framing in our own facility with environmentally friendly materials.

Name: Barker Animation Art Galleries
Description:
Welcome to Barker Animation Art Gallery - your premier destination for the finest animation and commercial artwork. We specialize in offering rare and collectible pieces from animation, including original cels, drawings, and limited edition prints. 

In addition, we also feature a stunning collection of commercial art pieces, including vintage advertising posters, comic book art, and more.

Our gallery is home to an impressive collection of artwork from some of the most beloved animation studios and commercial brands. 

We are passionate about preserving the legacy of animation and commercial art, and we take great pride in offering the highest quality pieces to collectors, art enthusiasts, and fans alike.

At Barker Animation Art Gallery, we are committed to providing exceptional customer service and a seamless buying experience. Whether you're a seasoned collector or new to animation and commercial art, our knowledgeable staff is here to assist you every step of the way.

Please browse our online gallery or visit us in person at Cheshire, CT,  and Tanger Outlets in Foxwood to discover the magic of animation and commercial art.

Name: Minerva Academie voor Popcultuur
Description:
Minerva Academie voor Popcultuur is een onderdeel van Academie Minerva (Hanzehogeschool Groningen) en bevindt zich in Leeuwarden. 
De academie kende tot 2015 twee opleidingen; één gericht op beeldende vormgeving en één op muziek, sinds 2015 zijn deze twee opleidingen samengevoegd tot Bachelor Popular Culture. Deze nieuwe opleiding is de eerste ter wereld. De studie omvat confrontaties met meerdere kunstdisciplines zoals muziek, vormgeving, theatrale werkvormen en literatuur.

Name: WERKSTATT
Description: WERKSTATT Akademi, Kadıköy Yeldeğirmeni'nde tarihi okul yerleşkesinde sahne sanatları eğitim ve etkinlikleri, workshop ve atölye çalışmalarıyla hizmet vermektedir.

Name: Max Art Productions
Description: From the earliest days of printing, printmakers have worked to enhance the images that they reproduce. Through pride and precision, they used the latest technologies and processes to recreate perfection in printing. That tradition lives on at Max Art Pro. We produce the highest quality prints, delivering on the artist’s vision and ability each and every time. However, our goal isn’t just to provide perfect prints, but to provide a perfect experience. An experience built around preserving a perfect moment in time and art.

Name: Pierre Brault Studio
Description:
Pierre Brault mène des recherches sur la lumière et sur le processus dynamique de la couleur. Il conçoit et réalise des installations et des oeuvres d'art en plexiglas recyclé sur des thématiques environnementales. 
L'art, le design et la mode font partie de l'ADN du Studio Pierre Brault. 
Notre équipe répond à vos besoins en matière de projets artistiques, art public, design d'objets, scénographie, décoration intérieure. 
Nous vous accompagnons également dans la stratégie de marque et de communication de votre entreprise. 
Depuis 2016, nous collaborons avec des marques et entreprises dans le secteur du luxe, de l'hôtellerie et des industries créatives.

Name: Kujjana Art School
Description:
At Kujjana Art School, we are proud to offer a fully online learning environment that promotes creativity and artistic expression. Our classes are conducted through Zoom, providing flexibility and accessibility for students of all ages.

Workplace:

1. Virtual Learning: Our classes are held online, allowing students to learn from the comfort of their homes. This setup facilitates a balanced learning experience, accommodating diverse schedules.

2. Experienced Faculty: Our tutors are BFA and MFA Fine Arts graduates with extensive experience in their fields. They bring a wealth of knowledge and passion, ensuring high-quality education and mentorship for every student.

3. Diverse Age Groups: We cater to a wide range of students, offering programs for kids, juniors, and seniors. This inclusive approach helps foster a supportive community where everyone can thrive.

4. Variety of Art Services: We offer a range of art classes, including pencil drawing, watercolor, acrylic, and digital paintings. This diversity enables students to explore different mediums and discover their unique artistic voice.

Benefits of Our Online Structure:

1. Flexibility: Students can attend classes from anywhere, allowing them to balance their studies with other commitments.

2. Personalized Learning: Small class sizes facilitate personalized attention, ensuring that each student receives guidance tailored to their needs.

3. Accessibility: Our online format makes art education accessible to a broader audience, breaking geographical barriers.

At Kujjana Art School, we are dedicated to inspiring creativity and helping our students achieve their artistic goals in a supportive and engaging online environment.

Name: Pétronille Découverte & Patrimoine
Description:
L’association Pétronille s’emploie à valoriser le patrimoine, elle en vise la découverte à travers une médiation originale. Son périmètre d’intervention est principalement girondin depuis la Métropole bordelaise jusqu’aux territoires ruraux les plus enclavés. Pétronille milite pour une culture élargie et citoyenne.

Pétronille a été fondée en 1999 par de jeunes chercheurs et universitaires engagés dans des disciplines telles que l’histoire, l’histoire de l’art, l’architecture et l’esthétique, souhaitant partager leur connaissance avec le plus grand nombre.
Ses actions culturelles sont marquées par l’ouverture de l’histoire de l’art aux disciplines et aux pratiques comme la littérature, la géographie, l’ornithologie, les arts vivants. Bien loin d’une lecture patrimoniale convenue, ses expérimentations aspirent à (ré)enchanter le quotidien.
Dans cette démarche stimulante, elle s’attache particulièrement à réunir les formes artistiques anciennes et contemporaines.
Pétronille est une association loi 1901. Ses buts sont non-lucratifs, sa gouvernance est démocratique et ses actions sont portées pour une part importante par l’engagement bénévole. Au-delà de sa volonté de transmettre, elle aspire à jouer pleinement son rôle social pour faire du lien entre les personnes et les cultures.

Name: Holubník studio
Description:
Jsme kreativní a výtvarné studio Holubník v Brně. Organizujeme výtvarně-vzdělávací kurzy pro pedagogy a dospělou veřejnost, firemní teambuildingy na míru a kreativní soukromé akce.

Jedinečné prostory v centru Brna na Novobranské poskytují našemu ateliéru přirozené světlo, pohodlnou dostupnost a přátelské prostředí pro tvoření. Ať už hledáte nápaditý teambuilding nebo inspirativní místo pro firemní setkání, Holubník je místem, které se přizpůsobí vašim potřebám.

Name: Center for the Visual Arts
Description: The Center for the Visual Arts is a 501(c)3 not-for-profit visual arts organization working to engage people in the visual arts and add to the livability of the Wausau regional community. We do this through our free exhibits in four professional gallery spaces, offering art classes for children and adults through the CVA School of Art, selling original artist work in our gift shop, and collaborating with other local organizations and businesses to enrich the community.

Name: 60Seconds Festival
Description:
Experience Urban Art at 60Seconds Short Film Festival

Welcome to the unique world of 60Seconds Short Film Festival, where we celebrate the art of silent, 60-second films set against the backdrop of urban spaces in and around Copenhagen.

About the Festival:

    60Seconds is the only festival of its kind, where silent 60-second films and their projection in an urban setting are integral to the festival's concept.
    We invite all artists and video creators to submit their 60-second videos with no sound, exploring the interaction of art within an urban context.

Selected Films:

    The festival will showcase the top 10 films, carefully selected for their creativity and vision.
    These films will be projected at urban locations in Copenhagen, Frederiksberg, Køge, and Helsingør during the festival week.

Submission Guidelines:

    Create a one-minute original film with no sound.
    Omit opening and closing credits.
    The theme is open-ended, allowing you to explore your creative vision.
    Format: MP4 with a 4x3 aspect ratio.

Join us in celebrating urban art and the power of concise storytelling. Submit your one-minute silent film today and be part of this distinctive cinematic experience.

Name: Spiva Center for the Arts
Description: Welcome to Spiva Center for the Arts! Our mission is to celebrate the creative experience. Our vision is to be a community catalyst, joining culture, community, education, business, and the arts as one, endeavoring to be a model for art centers across the nation!

Name: Art Advisory Services
Description:
Art Advisory Services provides expertise and comprehensive advice on the acquisition of artworks for private and corporate clients. We work with Contemporary American, Latin American, European and Middle Eastern art. We also tailor our services to individual specifications and provide artworks at fair market value. 

The company is based in New York and Madrid, and operates worldwide.

Art Advisory Services advises all who are passionate about the arts, ranging from first-time buyers gradually building their collection, to more experienced aficionados. 

Every client is unique and different, so we advise and manage work of national and international fresh, consecrated and master artists, according to the client's profile, budget and needs. We select, within the range of different artistic techniques those that best match the tastes, needs, budgets and projects of our clients.

We are completely independent and our counsel is always objective. Our relationship with our clients is based on discretion and trust.

Name: IncuArts Gallery
Description:
We are dedicated to amplifying the voices of those who have been silenced, overlooked and pushed aside. With a focus on social justice, equality, and inclusion we hope to help level the playing field for underrepresented artists and communities. Our exhibitions focus on issues relating to gender, race, sexuality, systems of oppression, and the unseen forces driving our lives. Each show is intended to be a starting point for open dialogues- posing a question, asking you to think and react.

We do not sell artwork; instead, we believe that artists should get 100% of the sales money from their work. Links to artist's websites are attached to their names . We encourage our audience to contact artists individually, and to purchase work directly from artists. Buying directly from artists helps put more money in their pockets, allowing them to continue to make art, and helps to alleviate economic disparities.

Name: Romain Froquet
Description: Ma quête principale réside dans une recherche d’équilibre au travers d’une gestuelle minutieuse et rythmée, centrée sur les lignes. Mon travail se concentre sur le lien entre les cultures, les flux et les échanges.

Name: White Horse Gallery
Description:
A diverse collection for every art lover

Immerse yourself in the world of art with our extensive collection, featuring a variety of styles and subjects. From mesmerising portraits to breathtaking landscapes, there is something for every art enthusiast.

An intimate experience in person or online.

Visit our gallery in person and witness the beauty of artwork up close. Or, explore our virtual gallery from the comfort of your own home, where you can browse through our collection and experience the magic of incredible art.

Name: Stichting Beelden in Leiden
Description: Beelden in Leiden ondersteunt al vanaf 2011 jonge kunstenaars door hen opdracht te verlenen nieuw werk te maken. Dit werk wordt jaarlijks op de Hooglandse Kerkgracht getoond. Steeds vaker verleent Beelden in Leiden opdracht ook voor presentatie elders in de stad, samen met andere partners en begeleidt het particulieren bij opdrachtverlening aan kunstenaars.

Name: A Bela do Dia
Description:
Somos uma empresa que vende e entrega flores por meio de bicicleta em São Paulo. 

Funcionamos de uma forma diferente: Você escolhe o tamanho e deixa a composição do arranjo conosco. Trabalhamos com apenas algumas opções de flor por dia, o que nos permite fornecer arranjos a um preço acessível e evitar o desperdício. Nossas flores são sempre as estação, de produtores locais, aquelas que estão mais frescas.

Description:
Platform for collective learning and appreciation of arts.
Download the app.

Name: DNA by DIETL
Description: Based in Clifton, NJ, DNA specializes in fine art storage, transportation, crating and installation. The makers of EARTHCRATE, environmentally friendly 1-way shipping crate.

Name: Studio Sonnenberg
Description: Print & Canvas Collage Art.

Name: IMPULSE GALLERY
Description:
Impulse Gallery is a contemporary art gallery located in the heart of Lucerne in Switzerland. Founded in 2020 by Claudia Limacher and Tim Zhuang, the gallery represents both emerging and established (inter)national artists in its historical modern space of over 450 square meters.

With its curatorial expertise and a diverse range of exhibitions each year, the gallery supports the careers of its artists from all over the world including the US, the Netherlands, China, Italy, Belgium, and Switzerland amongst others.
 
Based on the core values of diversity and creativity, Impulse Gallery closely works with its artists and features a multitude of artistic disciplines. The gallery operates on an international level in its mission as a leading gallery of the city of Lucerne: to share the works of its acclaimed artists with both aspiring and seasoned collectors from all walks of life.

Name: GSAA
Description: GSAA is a private boutique specialising in blue chip and established contemporary art.
