Description: we are an advertsing agency where creativity is tool while market reaesrch is our weapon.

Name: european centre for creative economy (ecce)
Description:
Das european centre for creative economy (ecce) hat seinen Ursprung in der Kulturhauptstadt RUHR.2010. Kultur- und Kreativwirtschaft umfasst elf kreative und künstlerische Branchen: von Kunst über Musik, Literatur, Film, Medien, Design, Architektur bis zur Games-Entwicklung. Im Ruhrgebiet steht die Kreativwirtschaft für ca. 86.000 Erwerbstätige und über 10.000 Betriebe – sie ist aber nicht nur Wirtschaftsfaktor, sondern berührt Kultur, Stadtentwicklung und Bildung gleichermaßen.

Um den Kreativ- und Zukunftsstandort Ruhrgebiet zu stärken und diesen überregional und europaweit sichtbar zu machen, führt ecce landesgeförderte Förderprogramme (Individuelle KünstlerInnenförderung, Kreativ.Quartiere Ruhr, #heimatruhr) durch und veranstaltet Workshop-, Netzwerk- und Konferenzformate (z.B. Creative Industries Dialog, N.I.C.E. Award und Kreativcampus.Ruhr).

Name: Traderspace
Description:
Traderspace is a community platform for peer-to-peer buying and selling. 

We're currently working to support the Artists and Creatives to build a presence online, be found and make successful Art sales.

Name: PICTO New York
Description:
Picto has specialized in fine art printing for over 60 years. Now sharing our expertise with photographers and advertisers, we offer a carefully selected collection of fine art and photo papers to choose from, while also providing museum quality prints.

Our advanced technology allows us to assure quality as well as accelerate the printing process. We pride ourselves on our personalized service by working closely with photographers to ensure the best print results from their files and based on the purpose of the prints. Because of this, if you need a paper that is not on our immediate list, we will provide it for you.

Name: Visual Art Institute
Description:
Our mission is to foster and nurture creative, artistic development and personal growth through high quality art instruction for all ages, abilities, and backgrounds along the Wasatch front. 
We offer art education for ages 5+.

Name: Dragonfly Creations
Description: Digital & Traditional art. Logo & brand design.

Name: Dédale
Description: Siam & renaud, deux habitant·es du quartier Briand à Mulhouse, artistes et militant·es d’éducation populaire animent la dynamique dédale afin que les citoyens se rencontrent, se parlent et s’occupent ensemble du quartier.

Name: Threewalls NFP
Description: Threewalls, an ever-evolving Blk art space, fosters contemporary art practices that respond to lived experiences, encouraging connections beyond art. Founded in 2003, the organization continues its purpose to support artists often marginalized because of their non-commercial and experimental practices. Over the past 6 years, Threewalls evolved to further fill a gap for Chicago-based ALAANA-identified artists, who have been historically excluded from financial, curatorial, and programmatic support. Our work, developed within a Blk-feminist and Diasporic traditions, is exclusively centered on and for ALAANA artists, decentralizes where art and art programming happen, and serves as a bridge between artists and Chicago community members.

Name: Dimmitt Contemporary Art
Description:
Dimmitt Contemporary Art is a contemporary art gallery with locations in Houston’s River Oaks neighborhood and Austin’s Clarksville Historic District. Representing a skilled roster of national and international artists working in various mediums, the gallery's primary focus is showcasing their diverse work through rotating exhibitions. The gallery is dedicated to fostering relationships with collectors, deepening their understanding and appreciation of collecting contemporary art.

Name: Metal Light Maker
Description:
Avec des savoir-faire précieux d’artisans et une créativité débordante d’artistes, les membres de Metal Light Maker déploient à l’international des créations de métal, de lumière et de feu.

Au cœur de fêtes de lumières, parcs et jardins, événements privés ou professionnels, ils mettent en scène des univers immersifs qui invitent à la rêverie. Le lieu est sublimé et la magie opère.

Name: GALERIE GABEL
Description: GALERIE GABEL is a retail company based out of 27 RUE SAINT SEBASTIEN, BIOT, France.

Name: Dimouzika Club
Description:
Dimouzika Club est un conservatoire de musique situé à Nabeul. 
Créé en octobre 2016 par Amine DIMASSI, ce club est le premier de son genre. 
Dimouzika offre des cours des différents instruments (violon, guitare, piano, kanun, oud, batterie, percussions, chant arabe, chant occidental, théorie musicale, éveil musical, saxophone).

Name: Oblique
Description: Faire émerger la parole des jeunesses par l’art : Fondé en 2022, Oblique Festival est aujourd’hui associé au Théâtre de la Ville de Paris, à l’Academie du Climat et regroupe, au sein de son équipe, une trentaine de passionnés. Oblique est pensé comme un laboratoire artistique, à travers les arts visuels, vivants et cinématographiques. Très concrètement, cet espace se matérialise par la programmation d’une vingtaine d’artistes par an.

Name: Sala de Cultura
Description:
Auxiliando empresas a promover arte, cultura e educação para impacto positivo.
Vamos juntos?

Name: Galerie SAS et Art Souterrain
Description: La galerie [sas] souhaite souligner la diversité des Arts visuels à travers de multiples collaborations avec des artistes de la relève et à mi-carrière. La considération dont bénéficie la galerie [sas] permet la diffusion des artistes auprès d'un auditoire varié (critiques, commissaires, collectionneurs, enseignants, milieu des affaires, artistes et étudiants). Par ailleurs, la grande visibilité de la galerie [sas] lui permet de jouer un rôle éducatif auprès du grand public.

Name: Trabajadores de Arte Contemporáneo
Description:
Trabajadores de Arte Contemporáneo es una iniciativa colaborativa para el establecimiento de buenas prácticas laborales tendientes a consolidar y profesionalizar a las escenas locales de América Latina.

Iniciada en noviembre de 2012 con la redacción del Acuerdo de Trabajadores de Arte para Argentina y Chile, ha realizado consultas públicas para la actualización de los montos mínimos referenciales para Acuerdos de 7 países en América Latina.

Name: MEALY'S
Description: Mealy's is one of Ireland's oldest, largest and busiest auction houses based in Castlecomer, Co Kilkenny, Ireland.  We offer auction, agency, and advisory services relating to the sale, disposal, donation, valuation, restoration and shipping of of art & antiques. This third generation family business was established by the late Mr. George Mealy in 1934, whose name and legacy now lives over 80 years later. Mealy's have conducted historical Irish sales such as Abbeyleix House for the Viscount DeVesci; Dunbrody Park for Lord Donegall; and Luggala, the home of the Right Honourable Garech Browne on the instructions of Barbican International Corporation. Mealy's have also conducted the sale of world famous collections, including the collection of renowned antiques dealer and collector Ronald McDonnell, the sale of the Murnaghan collection (in association with Christies), the sale of the Goldberg collection on the premises at Ben Truda in Cork, and most recently in July 2012, the sale of the superb Mount Congreve Collection, which yielded in excess of €6m (in association with Christie's) across the two sales, namely The London Sale & The House Sale.

Name: 3A The Excellence of Art - Contemporary Art Gallery in Mauritius
Description: '3A The Excellence of Art’ is a contemporary art gallery on the island of Mauritius, providing local and international fine art for private collectors and organisations. We are also proud to have the largest collection of Joseph Klibanky’s work in the world.

Name: Wise & Shine
Description:
A community of creative thinkers striving to better understand ourselves and the world we live in.  

Our Why: Wise & Shine creates community so that people can grow as artists and people.

Name: Hallway Gallery
Description:
Hallway Gallery is the exclusive Eastside destination for fine art. Our roster includes acclaimed international, national and regional artists who have shown a capacity for comprehensive and focused bodies of work. It is Hallway Gallery's mission to help cultivate the careers of these artists and to assist new clients and collectors in acquiring works of art that are as distinguished as they are beautiful.

Hallway Gallery began in 1999 as the company name for artist Erik Hall. In 2002 the gallery moved into the space at 10429 NE 2nd Street in downtown Bellevue, WA. The 5,000 square foot underground space served exclusively as a work studio for Hall until 2006 when, along with Amy Spassov, the space was renovated into a full retail gallery. 

The gallery has grown to include a complete and accomplished artist roster with a full menu of services that include art consulting and curating as well as corporate and private design and placement. 

In 2009 the decision was made to move the gallery “streetside”. Today the gallery is located on Bellevue Way.

Name: Rover Art Gallery
Description:
Empresa de fabricación y comercialización de cuadros 100% reciclados. 

Nuestra fábrica se encuentra en Alicante, España. Todos nuestros cuadros son fabricados a mano de forma personalizada. Nuestras telas 100% recicladas y tintas premium, proporcionan al cuadro un diseño único y excepcional.

Acércate a ver nuestros cuadros.

Name: Mayberry Fine Art
Description: Mayberry Fine Art has been helping clients build valuable collections of Canadian art for over 45 years. We specialize in artworks by the Canadian Group of Seven, Canada's post-war artists and leading contemporary artists from across the country. With two locations in Winnipeg and Toronto, our approachable and knowledgeable staff can assist you with your fine art needs, whether it is building an art collection, shipping or custom framing your valuable works of art.

Name: Abigail Ogilvy Gallery
Description:
Los Angeles based art gallery dealing in contemporary art. 

Abigail Ogilvy Gallery is a contemporary art gallery located in Los Angeles. We exhibit contemporary art with a heavy emphasis on concept-driven artwork by emerging to mid-career artists located across the country and internationally. Owner Abigail Ogilvy Ryan founded the gallery in Boston in 2015, where the program ran for nine years. In the Fall of 2023 the gallery expanded to Los Angeles under Director Kaylee Hennessey. 

Abigail Ogilvy Gallery LA provides a platform for new perspectives and education through independent curation and artist partnerships. The collaborative approach upends the traditional gallery model and aims to enhance the careers of artists, curators, collectors, and other art world professionals, both emerging and established. The gallery program features guest curators in order to share diverse perspectives and voices with the Los Angeles area, while also showing solo and group exhibitions from the gallery roster.

Name: Monza Arte Contemporanea  M.Ar.Co.
Description:
Who is M.Ar.Co.
> a non  profit cultural association
> a privately managed place for the public. It will be opened to everyone who would like to enjoy.
> an in progress project thanks to his constant searching of new growing  experiences.
> born in Monza, a city that is living one of his most important cultural  moments ever thanks to the reopening  of the Villa Reale and Musei Civici.
> a reality ready to collaborate with public institutions with a particular sight to the social tissue of his birth city.
> a project entirely built on mixing specialistic knowledge in contemporary art sector.

Social mission
M.Ar. Co. 's aim is to spread contemporary art on the extended territory of Monza e Brianza, with particular attention to the fundamental role of breaking down cultural barriers and let people be opened on what is new and often considered as different. 
Therefore the association wants to include itself  in the social context and tries to develop a contemporary conscience with the analysis of  what the modern is, creating a dialogue and being a reference point for all who love art and those who don't.
We are also in a strict relationship with Comune di Monza and Villa Reale.
M.Ar.Co. besides organizing expositive events, follows at the same time didactic and workshop projects, employing the expertise of professors from Fine Arts and Architecture academies, in addition of its know-how.

Name: ART SOCIAL NETWORK www.art-on-google.com
Description:
FREE, 
We recommend everyone to sign up and open a page on the social-network restricted to visual artists and art professionals, with over 13.500 members : 
http://art-on-google.com
The page has more visibility than is normally obtainable from your website.
Membership is free and you can publish events, posts, videos, albums and photos, make friends and conversations with other members.

Name: Kadran, caricatures et illustrations
Description:
Un caricaturiste pour animer vos événements

Une animation tout en humour, et un cadeau pour vos invités(ées) ?
Pourquoi ne pas inviter un caricaturiste pour animer votre événement ?

Demeurant sur Allonnes (Sarthe 72), je fournis des prestations animations caricatures pour mariages, entreprises, CE, anniversaires... ou tout autre événement festif !

Les visiteurs viennent à ma table pour se faire caricaturer, et repartent avec l’œuvre. Une photo sur place est également prise et est ensuite disponible sur mon site. Les photos sont partagées sur les réseaux sociaux, avec autorisation préalable.

La prestation est à partir de 3h minimum, jusqu'au nombre d'heures souhaitées. Sur plusieurs jours également possible. Possibilité également d'une animation sur tablette numérique avec diffusion sur écran en direct.

N'hésitez pas si vous avez plus de questions. N'hésitez pas à réserver votre date dès maintenant pour être sur de ma disponibilité.

Je vous souhaite le meilleur dans l'organisation de votre événement.

Également disponible pour réaliser vos caricatures, illustrations, communication...

Name: DOMINIQUE
Description:
Moluccan Artist DOMINIQUE (1980) currently resides in Deventer, The Netherlands after living a decade in Amsterdam and New York City.
 
His Alifuru roots (Indigenous people of the Moluccan Islands), importance him to keep his culture alive to share with the world. The Alifuru are strongly connected with nature and the spiritual world, where symbols are an important element. Ancient, indigenous signs tell stories like a compass. DOMINIQUE’s art mesmerizes the audience to decipher these stories and how to apply them in the Now. 
 
Educated in Graphic Design, DOMINIQUE has left his footprints at Nike, Patagonia and other global brands. But his feels to express his emotions and on a deeper level, continues to develop. 
 
From his studio, creating paintings, jewelry and garments, he stretched the murals from Amsterdam to Curacao to Bali. Attending European Street Art Festival, Stockholm, he recently participated In the Presence of Absence at Stedelijk Museum - Amsterdam (2020) to become an ambassador for the Moluccan Future Foundation.

Name: Edge On The Square 藝在棱角
Description:
Edge on the Square, a project of CMAC, produces artistic programs with civic engagement to shape the cultural, social, and historical fabric of our lives. We believe in the emancipatory power of art and its ability to catalyze community-building, cross-cultural solidarity and collective arising. 

Our aim is to widen the aperture of the global diaspora and cross-cultural narratives, experiences and intergenerational histories. We engage with art and storytelling as instruments to expand our capacity to convey humanity as is and to ignite our imaginative vision of what could be. Affirming the power and continuum of art and the way it permeates the everyday, Edge on the Square is dedicated to reach across demographic boundaries through spotlighting diverse perspectives, practicing collaboration, and opening possibilities for new worlds. We are committed to amplifying underrepresented voices by offering a platform to express, create, and actively participate in the shaping of a more equitable, just and joyful world for all.

Name: ÉPATÉ
Description:
ÉPATÉ a pour vocation de promouvoir les créations d’artistes émergents urbains et d’accompagner ces derniers dans leurs parcours. Cette structure est née d’une initiative de Hacène Bouazoune, artiste peintre illustrateur autodidacte qui a toujours eu à coeur de valoriser les talents émergents et en devenir. 

Nous mettons au coeur de notre projet la volonté de répondre au mieux aux attentes de nos clients, tout en valorisant le travail de nos artistes partenaires. Notre activité se structure autour de prestations personnalisées adaptées aux budgets de nos clients et aux besoins de nos partenaires. Nos domaines d’interventions sont multiples et nous permettent d’intervenir sur de nombreuses réalisations. Nous sommes des partenaires privilégiés pour apporter des solutions artistiques et culturelles concrètes. 

Depuis Novembre 2016, notre start-up est incubée par l’incubateur HEC Paris à Station F. Cette opportunité nous permet de développer notre activité aux côtés d’experts et d’être accompagné par des partenaires prestigieux et montants tels que Emmaus, Opievoy, la Fédération Française de Judo, Hôpital Trousseau, Mc Donald’s, Quick, …) . De nombreux talents nous rejoignent quotidiennement pour participer à notre aventure.  

Enfin, nous militons en faveur d’une reconnaissance des talents d’artistes urbains émergents et utilisons l’Art comme vecteur de vivre ensemble. Nous sommes convaincus que l’Art et la Culture sont de puissants outils de mobilisation et d’engagement citoyen.

Name: BluBra Art Gallery
Description:
Quando acquistiamo un opera d’arte non è solo un investimento materiale sicuro, ma anche un investimento emozionale, perchè in realtà ci riportiamo a CASA , un pezzo di noi stessi e delle nostre emozioni che L’ Artista ha riprodotto egregiamente per noi.
Opere d'Arte Moderna e Contemporanea per  collezionisti , per dare un tocco di originalità e unicità  ai vostri Uffici, alle vostre Case , un ottimo e prezioso  regalo per i vostri cari e conoscenti.

Name: Peoria Art Guild
Description: Founded in 1878, the Peoria Art Guild presents a diverse array of fine and contemporary art. We strive to inspire and educate all levels of art enthusiasts through the Fine Art Fair, exhibitions, outreach and collaborative art initiatives.

Name: Sequential Artists Workshop
Description:
A non-profit organization dedicated to the prosperity and promotion of comic art and artists, offering comprehensive instruction in comic art, graphic novels and visual storytelling. In luscious Gainesville, Florida. 

Mission Statement

The Sequential Artists Workshop (SAW)'s mission is to nurture and educate tomorrow's generation of visual storytellers, to support creative investigation, exploration and excellence in cartooning and comic art, and to promote literacy in sequential and comic art in today’s culture.

Through its school(s), SAW's goal is to provide quality education to students dedicated to challenging themselves and learning interdisciplinary visual storytelling. Where its school(s) are located, SAW aims to educate and promote comics literacy in our local community(s).

In addition, we aim to provide work spaces, teaching residencies and distribution/publishing resources for practicing sequential artists.

Finally, through its national outreach program dedicated to publishing and promoting curious, intelligent, and visionary works we aim to integrate sequential art and artists into the broader cultural landscape.

Name: THE POOL NYC
Description:
THE POOL NYC was founded in New York in 2009 to promote avant-garde artists through a network of international exhibitions.

Without an official gallery space, yet based in New York City, THE POOL NYC has been everywhere and nowhere at the same time.
The necessity to be in one place and then quickly in another is a dominating influence in this century, and THE POOL NYC embraces that peripatetic nature.

Since October 2017 THE POOL NYC has chosen Milano as main base for a permanent exhibition space.

We will continue to operate around the world, organizing itinerant exhibitions.

The ease and speed by which information and humans travel around the globe allow for our constant changes in venue as well as the opportunity to place the artists in dynamic surroundings.

Our itinerant nature facilitates the ideal presentation our artists as we seek out the most interesting and provocative spaces in which to present their work.

THE POOL NYC brings emerging contemporary artists to an international audience by acting as an itinerant gallery  one which constantly changes venue in order to expose its artists to an increasingly globalized art market.

Convinced of the efficacy of introducing its artists to the international art circuit, THE POOL NYC has hosted solo exhibitions and attended art fairs in cities including Venice, Bologna, Rome, London, New York, Mexico City and Hong Kong.

Within six years, THE POOL NYC has presented a series of solo exhibitions of artists chosen for the quality and originality of their work. Hailing from cultures as disparate as those in Europe and the Americas, each artist pursues very different practices – yet each shares a dedication to craftsmanship and conceptual rigour that is highly relevant to the contemporary art discourse.

For Every Biennale di Venezia we organize an exhibition at our space at Palazzo Cesari-Marchesi, in Campo Santa Maria del Giglio.

Name: Tivoli
Description: Fine art and sculpture

Name: Demiurge LLC
Description: Sculpture fabrication studio collaborating with artists world-wide to fabricate and install large-scale artworks.

Name: Polymorf
Description:
Crossmedia groep Polymorf bedient zich niet van een centraal medium, podium of doelgroep, maar zoekt naar nieuwe vormen en verbindingen op de grensgebieden waar verschillende kunstvormen, doelgroepen en technologie elkaar raken. De projecten die Polymorf aangaat zijn ervaringsgericht en geengageerd.

Polymorf is Marcel van Brakel en Peter Boonstra. Beiden waren eerder werkzaam binnen filmcollectief FlimFilm. Boonstra is zelfstandig filmmaker en editor, voor oa reclame en communicatiebureau KesselsKramer. Van Brakel is film- en theatermaker en was lid van de artistieke kern van Het Witte Vuur. Deze multimediagroep won verschillende theaterprijzen, was opgenomen in het kunstenplan van OC&W van 2000 t/m 2004 en geldt als pionier in het combineren van theater met Dance parties.

International art fair, related cultural events

Name: Galerie Fontana
Description:
Galerie Fontana organizes exhibitions of Dutch and international artists. 

Each season we present a solo exhibition and several thematic art events are organized throughout the course of the year. 

Gallery is open Wed - Sat from 13.00 hours till 18.00 hours.

Name: K12 Gallery/TEJAS
Description:
K12 Gallery/TEJAS is a regional center for artists and community members to connect through art experiences, education, public outreach, collaborative projects and gallery exhibitions for children youth and adults.  We strive to connect individuals with their creative selves through the visual arts.  Our spacious 6,000 square foot studio and gallery space is located in the Cannery Building in the heart of downtown Dayton, OH.

K12 Gallery offers children's programming for youth PreK 6th grade and TEJAS offers teens and adult programs.

Name: شرکت ماکت سازی مهرگان طرح |Mehregan Tarh|
Description: مهرگان طرح مجهز به آخرین تکنولوژی های روز ماکت سازی و نمونه سازی اعم ازدستگاه های برش لیزری، سی ان سی و پرینترهای سه بعدی و با تکیه بر نیروهای کارآمد،مجرب و خلاق در خدمت شماست تا یاریگر شما در ارائه  ایده ها و دستاوردهایتان باشد.

Name: SEEZART
Description:
Une oeuvre d'art est bien plus qu'une simple création esthétique. Seezart protège l'ADN de vos oeuvres en inscrivant leur histoire dans des certificats d'authenticité uniques, infalsifiables et digitaux. Grâce à Seezart, les acteurs du monde de l'art peuvent certifier et tracer tous les événement survenant sur leurs oeuvres en quelques clics (création, vente, prêts, leg, restauration, vol etc.), établir une provenance parfaite et prendre pleinement le contrôle de leur collection.

Seezart est une startup française au carrefour de l'art et du digital. Elle emploie l'une des technologies les plus sûres à ce jour : la Blockchain.

---------------------

A work of art is much more than an aesthetic creation. Seezart protects the DNA of your artworks by inscribing their history in unique, tamperproof and digital certificates of authenticity. Thanks to Seezart, the actors of the art world can certify and trace all the events occurring on their artworks in a few clicks (creation, sale, loans, legs, restoration, theft, etc.), to establish a perfect provenance and take fully control of their collection.

Seezart is a French startup lying at the crossroads of arts and techs. It employs one of the safest technologies to date: the Blockchain

* Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/seezart_/
* Youtube : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SbItCD6TZ7s
* Blog : http://seezart.com/blog/

Dossier de presse (FR) : https://issuu.com/seezart/docs/dp_seezart_20dec2016

Press Kit (EN) : 
http://issuu.com/seezart/docs/dp_general_seezart_en2

Name: Les Chroniques du patrimoine
Description: Les Chroniques du Patrimoine est un projet qui a vu le jour en avril 2022, c'est un journal numérique sur les médias sociaux qui publie des chroniques liées aux musées, au patrimoine culturel et aux arts sous la forme de chroniques.Notre mission est de rendre l'art, le patrimoine et l'actualité des musées plus accessibles. Nous clarifions les concepts du patrimoine culturel, simplifions l'art et l'histoire, et informons sur les carrières qui y sont liées. Grâce à ces efforts, nous visons à enrichir la compréhension et l'appréciation de la culture pour tous.

Name: Galeri Bu
Description: Galeri Bu, was established by artist Umut Yalım in February 2012. The heading aim of Galeri Bu is to exhibit artists from Turkey and worldwide to larger audiences through a universal art perspective. Through an extensive art view, Galeri Bu opens its doors to artists from any branch while the gallery also gives importance to exhibit the works of young artists. As of 2018, Galeri Bu continues to exhibit in an additional project space under the name of Galeri Bu Pavilion.

Name: Shin Gallery
Description: Shin Gallery is a contemporary art gallery with an international agenda located in Manhattan's Lower East Side art district. Founded in 2013 by gallerist Hong Gyu Shin, Shin Gallery is devoted to exhibiting a variety of pioneering modern artwork for the enjoyment of art collectors and viewers. Visit us at www.shin-gallery.com or find us on Instagram @shin_gallery.

Name: Fundacja Nova Ars Poloniae
Description:
Celem Fundacji jest promocja polskiej sztuki współczesnej i rodzimych artystów specjalizujących się w dziedzinach malarstwa, rzeźby, fotografii oraz sztuk audiowizualnych w Polsce i poza jej granicami.

Poprzez współpracę pomiędzy artystami oraz publicznymi i prywatnymi instytucjami kultury i sztuki lub innymi podmiotami, których celem jest wspieranie rozwoju polskiej sztuki współczesnej, Fundacja będzie zmierzała do popularyzacji twórców i ich prac, a także do zakorzenienia pośród odbiorców krajowych i zagranicznych znajomości polskiego dorobku artystycznego.

Powyższe inicjatywy umożliwią poznanie wkładu wniesionego przez polskich artystów w fundamenty współczesnej warstwy kulturowej Europy. Sztuka współczesna powinna być świadectwem prawdziwej i różnorodnej natury Rzeczypospolitej Polskiej jako państwa świadomego wielowiekowej tradycji i jednocześnie otwartego, czerpiącego z nowoczesnych trendów.

Name: Art School LLC
Description: Art School is founded with the goal of bringing contemporary studio art classes to you. Taught by leading contemporary artists in the Bay Area, our courses offer the flexibility of learning traditional techniques in drawing, painting, sculpture, photography, and printmaking to your company.

Name: CAEM Centre d'Art d'Època Moderna
Description:
Somos un grupo de profesores e investigadores de la Universidad de Lleida que trabaja en el Gabinete Analítico de Obras de Arte mejor dotado de las universidades españolas.

Para afrontar con las máximas garantías de éxito el estudio de obras de arte inéditas, poco estudiadas o prácticamente desconocidas, el CAEM cuenta con un Well-trained Scientific Staff, es decir, con un grupo de investigadores muy preparados para analizar obras de arte en directo. 

Además, el CAEM cuenta con la colaboración de un extenso Consejo de Asesores nacionales e internacionales, seguramente el más completo y transversal del mundo. Se trata de especialistas no sólo en diversas parcelas del saber histórico y artístico, sino también en otras ramas del conocimiento que resultan complementarias y enriquecedoras para emprender, con rigor y en su globalidad, el estudio de la obra de arte.

Name: Compáz
Description: Compáz is an incubator of ideas that seeks to create, produce and promote projects that will assist social progress. Compáz has at its disposal strategic and operational competencies that allow for feasibility studies to execution /creation.

Name: DIBUJO TU MASCOTA
Description:
Realizo retratos a lápiz, de mascotas: perros, gatos, caballos, etc...

Parto de una foto, para sacar los mejores detalles y expresiones de la mascota. Sígueme en Instagram: @dibujo_tumascota

Name: Arts Collab
Description: Arts Collab is Birmingham's arts education nexus. We exist to ensure every student has equitable arts education opportunities in Birmingham by harnessing the momentum of hundreds of arts education partners, catalyzing creative opportunities for Birmingham learners, and sparking the next generation of creative educators. A proud part of Amp Up Arts, a collective impact initiative of the Alabama State Council on the Arts, we are one of several arts education resource centers throughout our state. Our mission is to empower our community to increase student access to quality arts education. The Arts Collab is a nonprofit, 501(c)(3) organization.

Name: ARTOGRAPHYSTUDIO
Description:
Artography Studio  is a fine art institute for education in arts, nurturing the talent of emerging and established artists and promoting art to create a more creative world.  

There are several forms of Visual art like Painting, photography, Print Making (digital art) . Artography is a combination of all three.

Art+Photography+Digital Art. 

Our vision is to create a fusion between traditional and digital art at one place.

Here we are creating Art and eager to share our knowledge with everyone. 

Art has no boundaries. It has no limits and it is always open for exploration. The field of art has been developing at a fast pace. We act as an integral part or one can say a catalyst to spread the productivity and offer a specialization in fine arts. We help in unleashing the creative spirit and having the artistic capability of a student. We provide holistic development in the field of art so as to give wings to the passion of our students.

We have been in this field since many years. Our dedication faculty members are acquainted with the minute  peculiarities of fine arts and are always at the helm of teaching with the right aptitude.

We are committed to push the artistic abilities and leverage the talent to deliver the best out of the best. Our unshaken support and always encouraging attitude shall be the future of the students foundation. Enrolled with us. We warmly invite you to take the much needed steps and gift yourself a colorful careers.

Name: SALOON Network
Description: The SALOON Network fosters a community within the art world that exchanges ideas, experiences and expertise and encourages the creation of collaborations and projects. Our members are women-identifying and non-binary who are curators, artists, journalists, gallerists and other professionals in the arts. Our activities include monthly meetings between the members as well as public events, ranging from studio or exhibition visits, portfolio reviews, exhibitions, or panel discussions. We actively collaborate with other communities to foster inclusion, exchange, understanding and trust between diverse networks of art professionals and aim at creating more visibility and equal opportunities for women in our communities. We are committed to intersectional, de-colonial and anti-racist feminist work. We especially encourage BIPOC, cis, trans women as well as non-binary people to apply for a SALOON membership. Therefore, the SALOON Network is dedicated to dismantling boundaries for every woman and becoming a network that truly represents the diverse members of our society. Additionally, we regularly connect members of each SALOON city by organizing international exchange programs, members’ exhibitions, or online SALOON meetings. In 2012, the first SALOON was founded by independent curator Tina Sauerlaender in Berlin. You can watch the speech about her vision for the SALOON here. Please contact us if you want to join the network or suggest a collaboration.

Name: ArtWave
Description:
Welcome to ArtWave!
Our mission is to foster a sense of community through the exploration of creativity.

ArtWave was established in Johannesburg, South Africa, by young designers Tariro Kandawasvika and Jolene Forlee. Both of us come from a formal background in Architecture. It gave us the skills to explore and execute fearlessly anything we wanted. Our collective history and experiences slowly transitioned from traditional to digital art, graphic design, fashion design, photography, and 3D game asset design. 

This itch for creativity and our sudden transitions into exploring more digital creative mediums led us to start ArtWave. We believe that art-making is the foundation for building our creativity, personal growth, and self-expression. What better way to do it than as a community with us?

We currently provide art workshops, and hosting private art events. We welcome both beginners and experienced artists. It can boost a sense of community, and they can experience how freeing art-making can be.

We're excited to share our love of art with you and invite you to join us at ArtWave. Let's create something beautiful together!

Name: NFT Boutique
Description: NFT Boutique owned by Unlockable Content Agency is an NFT gallery and boutique that showcases the world's most innovative NFT collections. We are bridging the digital and IRL world and unlocking magical experiences for collection members. We are home to the Guardians of Nature NFT collective, Cosmic Cats 420, House of Panther, and PetgasNFT.

Name: ASTØRY
Description: Building a dream and making it come true. Everything ASTØRY does, revolves around this matter. Together we pursue something that we believe in. The ‘what’, ‘when’, ‘where’ and ‘how’, is what drives us each day and pushes us to create something even better every time. ASTØRY is no individual, but instead we create a collective mind consisting of creative professionals, who all work together on the project. It maximizes the unique capabilities of each individual. It provides us with key insight and experience on every field. From idea to final product, from start to finish: ASTØRY is like no other.

Name: Sierra Arts Foundation
Description: Our goal since 1971 is to be the region’s premier arts organization with an emphasis on teaching, nurturing and supporting the arts in our community.

Name: Thomas Vero
Description:
Freelance, créateur éclectique :

Photos / Vidéos / Designs / CM / OAV / Prints / Consulting marketing, commerce et communication

Name: Propac Images
Description:
YOUR CHOICE FOR AFFORDABLE WALL DECOR!

Propac Images was incorporated in July 1990. We had our beginnings as a way of recycling drop-out materials from our sister company Paragon. Propac stands for PROmotional PrePACked images; promotional posters were the first prints framed by Propac Images and were sold in packs of 12. The business quickly grew and so did the assortments and designs. They have constantly evolved with consumer demands offering variety, quality and dependability at affordable prices.

Today, Propac employs over 40 people and occupies a 50,000 square foot manufacturing and office facility in Albertville, AL. The sales staff consists of 100 manufacturer representatives serving customers in every state and also internationally.

Propac has five permanent gift and furniture accessory showrooms across the country, including our corporate showrooms in Atlanta, High Point and Las Vegas.

We have succeeded on the premise that if you treat everyone with fairness then they will return to you for continued business and form long-lasting relationships. Propac wants to be YOUR CHOICE FOR AFFORDABLE WALL DECOR!

Name: artvorm: advisory
Description:
Artvorm is a boutique art educational consultancy and advisory platform based in Bangkok, Thailand. Founded and directed by Thanarat Asvasirayothin, it aims to offer a comprehensive art consulting service to artists, art students, art schools, and collectors. Services are tailored to meet each client's specific needs, including education, art academic tutoring, art career counseling, digital marketing, artist liaison & management, and art sales.

In turn, artists, art students, and art practitioners will find ArtVorm a resourceful way of keeping pace with this evolving environment while equipping themselves with a solid foundation in the arts through our trusted services and community beyond traditional tutoring schools and educational institutions.

Name: D Contemporary
Description:
D-Contemporary creates and delivers art exhibitions at 23 Grafton Street for the Strategy International Group, with a strong focus on showcasing contemporary art from vibrant and growing countries. Strategy International operates two well-established UK and international membership-based business networks comprising over 200 companies and institutions employing some 6 million.

Amidst a shortage of similar W1 gallery opportunities, emerging artists gain access to an excellent Mayfair location and an established ecosystem of clients to showcase their work. The running of an exhibition at D-Contemporary is a one month show Monday to Saturday inclusive, with (alongside general viewing) a catered evening launch event with professional video and photography. The artists are encouraged to invite their own lists alongside the active participation of Strategy Internationals' clients and what is a very broad Strategy International eco-system of friends and supporters.

Name: Urban Art Company
Description:
Urban Art Company (UAC) is an all–encompassing art advisory group dedicated to creating, consulting, and developing the delivery of custom art projects. Through collaboration with renowned global brands and design firms, we produce exceptional and enlightening art programs. 

Founded in 2010, UAC specializes in the production and design of custom artwork and custom framing for hospitality, healthcare, corporate, government, education, restaurant, and contract spaces. 

Its unique showroom experience paired with its seasoned art consultants and skilled craftsmen not only consolidates, but simplifies, the process of creating custom artwork and mirror designs to provide service for: 
High-Volume Custom Framing
Art Consulting
Product Research & Development
Custom Developed Artwork
Printing
Spatial Branding
Curating & Sourcing
Interactive Art Installation

From conception to specification, from design to installation, we can promise this- we are the experts in everything art.

Name: Rèunion Freetown
Description:
We are a registered art organization based in Freetown, Sierra Leone, and  part of a global network of independent artist-run spaces. 

We promote self-reliant and financially independent youths in the visual arts sector by identifying local artists, profiling, branding, and commercializing their crafts, whilst promoting the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) through arts.

Name: Majcaka - Online Art Gallery
Description:
Majcaka has been set up a year back by Mahesh Bolle and Abhishek Maharaju. Art has been a common interest for both - Mahesh is an artist himself, whereas Abhishek has been an art enthusiast. The word 'Majcaka' is derived from the Sanskrit language, which means Gallery or Platform. Our main aim is to source quality artworks, from the artists and the gallery shows across all the states of India, to the art enthusiasts.

Sourcing great art requires good curation. Hence, Majcaka, onboards the artists and galleries only on an invitation basis, after reviewing the artworks and artists' profiles thoroughly. Further, our Art Advisory team makes it easy for the art buyers to acquire the art which interests them. Also, ensure that the collectors are well informed of the art they are buying, and the transaction is smooth.

Name: Les Boutographies
Description: Les Boutographies est un festival dédié à la nouvelle photographie européenne. Reconnu sur la scène régionale, nationale et internationale, elles présentent chaque année une cinquantaine de 50 travaux photographiques au travers d'expositions et de projections à l'attention d'un large public de passionnés et de professionnels, invités sur le festival.

Name: Ladislav Sutnar Faculty of Design and Art, University of West Bohemia, Pilsen
Description:
The Ladislav Sutnar Faculty of Design and Art is part of the University of West Bohemia in Pilsen.
We are a creative and academic community where art meets design, theory meets practice, and tradition meets innovation.

Named after visionary designer Ladislav Sutnar, we build on his legacy with courage, openness, and a strong focus on relevance and impact.

We offer degree programs in 21 art and design studios and support interdisciplinary, international, and research-driven collaboration.

Name: Georgetown Frame Shoppe Inc
Description:
Established in 1989, Georgetown Frame Shoppe is a full service art gallery and custom framing shop. We are open seven days a week in the heart of the historic Georgetown neighborhood of Washington, D.C.
With over 35 years of experience, Georgetown Frame Shoppe is a long-standing buyer and seller of fine art. We specialize in original works on paper by contemporary and modern artists such as Andy Warhol, Roy Lichtenstein, Keith Haring, Jean-Michel Basquiat, Alex Katz, Pablo Picasso, Henri Matisse, Joan Miro, Marc Chagall, and many others. All works purchased through our gallery come with a certificate guaranteeing authenticity for life, so you can rest assured that your art is genuine.
We also offer museum-quality custom framing, certified art appraisals, restoration and conservation solutions, and professional art installation services in the DC metro area.
Whether you are an experienced collector or a first time buyer, we are always excited to welcome you in to browse our collection, get something framed, or receive a consultation for any of our other services.

Name: ThicoTattoo
Description: Tattoo Studio

Name: Cabinet Magazine
Description: Founded as a non-profit in 2000, Cabinet is an award-winning quarterly magazine of art and culture based in New York that confounds expectations of what is typically meant by the words “art,” “culture,” and sometimes even “magazine.”

Name: Art Prise, Place à la culture de demain!
Description:
« Art Prise, Place a la culture de demain ! » est une association à but non lucratif a destination des artistes professionnels. Véritable réseau social, la communauté se réunit aussi lors d’évènements mensuels organisés par l’association tout au long
de l’année.

Name: Fridman Gallery
Description:
Fridman Gallery, 169 Bowery, New York, NY 10002

Founded in 2013 and located in New York, NY and Beacon, NY, Fridman Gallery represents artists working across disciplines, from painting and sculpture to video and sound art. We host performances, publish artist books, and release vinyl records. Our Beacon location is home to an international artist residency, and the NYC gallery invites a curator-in-residence each year.
 
To be invited to gallery events, please sign up for emails at info@fridmangallery.com.

Name: Bureau des Arts Sciences Po Bordeaux
Description:
Le Bureau des Arts de Sciences Po Bordeaux est une association loi 1901 née en 2008 qui a su, au fil des ans, gagner en importance et mettre en avant la transversalité entre les arts.

Le développement de la culture au sein de l’IEP constitue la pierre angulaire de cette association devenue en 7 ans la plus importante en termes d’effectifs comme de dynamisme événementiel. L’objectif du Bureau des Arts est double: d’abord, le BdA vise à révéler et développer les talents artistiques des étudiants, favoriser leur implication au sein de la vie de Sciences Po Bordeaux et encourager tous types de pratiques culturelles. Ensuite, le BdA développe des partenariats avec plusieurs institutions de l’agglomération bordelaise afin d’ouvrir les étudiants à la vie culturelle active de Bordeaux.

Le Bureau des Arts ouvre les étudiants au monde de la culture de façon plurielle, à travers seize ateliers : théâtre, cinéma, cuisine, improvisation, musique, chant, chorale, danse, écriture et lecture, musique électronique, photographie, arts plastiques, commissariat d’exposition, couture, éloquence et culture (im)populaire.

Le travail des ateliers donne lieu à différents événements tout au long de l’année: soirée de rentrée culturelle, participation annuelle à la remise des diplômes, Apéro Concert, Festival de courts métrages, vernissages, représentations théâtrales, expositions, concours d’éloquence, matchs d’improvisation ainsi que le Festival de la Création qui regroupe l’ensemble des ateliers.

Name: Association Les Aliennes
Description:
Les Aliennes est une association féministe à but non-lucratif, portée par des bénévoles optimistes et infatigables, ouverte à tous·tes, sans distinction, aux conditions précisées à l’article 8 de ses statuts.

Notre Mission : 
Agir pour changer les représentations des femmes dans la société grâce à la culture.

Name: Galerie Virginie Baro
Description:
Mon entreprise est composée de deux activités : la sélection et vente d’œuvres d’art via un e-Store (virginiebaro.com) et des expositions-ventes éphémères d’un côté ; l’accompagnement professionnel de carrières de plasticiens et de projets culturels de l’autre. Dans les deux cas il s’agit de favoriser la diffusion de formes artistiques tout en générant une économie. 
J’interviens auprès d’artistes pour tout ce qui est satellite à la création : montage de dossier d’appel à projet, accompagnement de projet (comme ceux menés par La prairie des possibles), analyse de recherche plastique, rédactionnel, direction artistique... Je collabore également avec des opérateurs culturels (Marché Céramique Pays Basque), des Institutions Publiques (Communauté de Communes Haut-Béarn), ainsi qu'auprès du secteur privé. J’ai récemment été prestataire pour l’événement Influence › Biennale du textile contemporain (Communauté de Communes Haut Béarn). 
Ma formation de plasticienne (Master 2 recherche en arts plastique), mon expérience dans le montage de projets culturels (expositions) et l’accompagnement professionnel de plasticiens pendant 7 ans au sein d’une structure culturelle, me permettent aujourd’hui d’apporter une réponse complète aux artistes, opérateurs culturels publics et privés.

Name: Institute Atelje Art Murn International
Description:
Institute Atelje Art Murn International was established by Slovenian artist and businessman Miha Murn in 2015, with the aim to help the various artists that represent the art market. It offers them space for exhibiting, promoting and selling their works.

An integral part of our work is to raise awareness and educate the general public about the arts. Our spaces are assembled from several thousand square meters of exhibition space, located in the Crystal Palace, and at several locations in BTC City Ljubljana, in the building Rotonda, Maxi, Cubo Hotel, Quadrio center, mansion Selo and in Mostec... In 2017 we opened our branch Institute in Prague, where we weave the same platform concept as in Slovenia.

Our services also offer graphic design, web design, photography, printing, appraisals and sales of art works, selling antiques, consulting in the purchase of art works, renting of spaces for events, presentation and advertising derivation events, interior design... Each story comes from our minds but every vision arises only from ambition.

Our vision is to become the leading organization for the development and systematization of art and culture in Europe. We are confident that the company can implement strong changes and improvements to the development of art and culture.

Name: Escola de Artes do Spanta
Description:
Espaço sociocultural com o propósito de promover, por meio da arte, novos caminhos à cidadania para crianças e adolescentes da Favela Santa Marta. Criada em 2009, a Escola de Artes do Spanta oferece aulas de música, expressão corporal e artes cênicas, além de atividades complementares e socioeducativas como rodas de conversas, acompanhamento psicossocial e orientação vocacional.

O projeto, que já atendeu mais de 700 crianças e adolescentes, realiza, anualmente, campanhas de solidariedade como Spantando o Frio, que entregou agasalhos, meias e vestuário em geral a moradores da comunidade; e Spantando o Corona, que vem distribuindo cestas básicas a famílias do Santa Marta, além de materiais de limpeza e de higiene pessoal.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Meraki-Fine Arts Club,ICT Mumbai
Description:
The Fine Arts Club of ICT Mumbai is open to all individuals, regardless of their skill level or background in the arts. Whether you are a seasoned artist or just starting your artistic journey, our club provides a welcoming and nurturing space for you to explore your passion for the arts.
IIf you have a love for creativity and a desire to be part of a dynamic artistic community, we invite you to join the Fine Arts Club. Together, let's celebrate the transformative power of art and unleash our imagination to create something truly extraordinary.

Name: Jharald
Description: With a background in social development and with a upbringing in the countryside of one of the poorest area of Denmark. Jharald has alway worked with the believe that everybody should have equal rights to make a good life. The key factor in all of JHarald work is seeing the potential. The potential in yourself and your surroundings.

Name: Hillary Whitaker Gallery + Consultancy
Description:
Hillary Whitaker Gallery and Consultancy (HWG) is a full-service firm known for our creative, personalized approach. At HWG we utilize effective visual strategies to enhance each space by expressing our client’s objectives, values, and vision through diverse artistic concepts and mediums. Our process is truly collaborative—working closely with clients to ensure the art not only complements the design of the space but also serves a meaningful purpose".

We use art to provide joy, uplift, offer a distraction, motivate, and inspire patients, families, visitors, and staff alike. From high volume multi-floor new construction projects to unit level renovations, our approach to curation is the same; hand selecting and customizing artwork to fit your needs and allowing you to choose the pieces that speak to the heart (and budget) of the organization.

At HWG, we love the feeling of being captured by a piece of art. Moreover, we love being apart of helping others experience that same special feeling. We are profoundly honored to play a role in the transformative power of art.

Name: MomArte
Description:
MomArte è un progetto dedicato a chi fa Arte.

Uno shop online completo di tutti i prodotti per la pittura e il disegno.
Un blog creativo con articoli, guide ed approndimenti.
Una community di persone appassionate, che cresce giorno dopo giorno.

Name: WARP Technopolis
Description:
WARP Technopolis is a breeding ground for creative technology, digital avant-garde art and electronic dance culture. WARP is housed in the dark grey building next to Stationsplein in Enschede. It is a place where it is not only possible to enjoy music and a drink, but where young creatives meet and innovative ideas and initiatives are created and realized.

WARP Technopolis delivers a powerful contribution to the development of art and culture in the city of Enschede, with an emphasis on innovation, creative technology and electronic music. The over 3000 square meters are filled by the SPACEBAR, PLANETART, The Museum of the Future, Creative Studios, BlackBrick Basement, Sickhouse and several expo spaces.

In WARP you’ll be amazed; staying home means staying behind!

Name: Sinapses Conseils
Description:
Depuis 2005, SINAPSES CONSEILS accompagne les institutions culturelles dans leur stratégie et leurs développements numériques.
www.sinapsesconseils.com

Name: Moulin Michel de Gentilly
Description:
Le Moulin Michel est un site historique exceptionnel datant de 1774. C'est l'un des rares moulins à farine encore en fonction. Le Moulin Michel conserve sa vocation d'origine et représente un témoignage vivant de notre histoire.

 Niché dans le secteur Gentilly de la Ville de Bécancour, à 30 min de Trois-Rivières, 20 min de Nicolet, le Moulin Michel offre un cadre naturel paisible qui garantit une expérience unique. 

 En tant qu'espace culturel et citoyen, le Moulin Michel contribue à l'enrichissement culturel et au développement local. Le lieu rayonne grâce à sa programmation variée et ses événements uniques.

 Au Moulin Michel, vous trouverez aussi des produits du terroir et de l'artisanat local. En été, assistez au spectacle fascinant de nos mécanismes hydrauliques moudre le grain sur des meules de pierre de manière ancestrale.

 Nous proposons également des espaces pour des événements privés et corporatifs, offrant des services clé en main pour les évènements privés, des réunions d'affaires, des formations et bien plus encore.

 Venez nous rendre visite et plongez dans 250 ans d'histoire ! Découvrez la beauté du métier de meunier et profitez des espaces pour programmé un repas en plein air ou de la célébration d'un événement pour votre entreprise.

 L'équipe du Moulin Michel a hâte de vous accueillir pour une expérience inoubliable !

Name: 100 Etablissement Culturel Solidaire
Description:
Un plateau de 500 m2 mutualisé dédié à la création en Arts Plastiques.
4 plateaux de 70 à 40 m2 sont réservés aux répétitions en art vivant.
Un lieu d'échanges, de connaissances et d'apprentissage
Une programmation motivée par des problématiques sociétales et philosophiques,
nourrissant une réflexion commune dans  une rencontre inédite
entre les arts plastiques et visuels et les arts vivants

Name: St Germain des Arts
Description:
École d'arts tous niveaux et tous âges au cœur du quartier St Germain des Prés à Paris. Stages enfants et ados pendant les vacances scolaires.

Cours à l'année, à la carte et stages thématiques (modèle vivant, expression créative, dessin numérique, BD...).

Possibilité de privatiser l'atelier pour vos évènements (particuliers et entreprises).

Name: BOTTAZZI GUILLAUME
Description: GuillaumeBottazzi is a French visual artist internationally renowned for his monumental, site-specific creations that reimagine the relationship between art, space, and human perception. He has been working for more than 33 years, particularly in Europe, Asia, and the United States. Recognized as a pioneer of the neuroaesthetics applied movement, he has signed more than 180 permanent artworks for public spaces. He has received private and public commissions from museums such as the Mori Art Museum, the Miyanomori International Art Museum, the Suntory Museum of Art, the Tokyo National Art Center and the Tokyo Metropolitan Foundation of History and Culture; from cities and public institutions, such as Tokyo, the Tokyo Metropolitan Government, Paris La Défense, Nice and Brussels; from ministries such as the Ministry of Culture, of Education, and of Health; from investors such as Sofitel, Mori Building Co. Ltd, BNP Paribas, Société Générale, Nexity… He also collaborates with renowned architects, such as Valode & Pistre, Kanji Ueki, ORY.architecture, Leclercq associés, Tom Sheehan, Coldefy, Antony Béchu, Valero Gadan, Badia Berger… Since 2004, Guillaume Bottazzi has been represented by Itsutsuji Gallery. This major Japanese gallery represents artists such as Yves Klein, Simon Hantaï, Pierre Soulages, Yayoi Kusama, but also introduced movement such as Support-Surfaces. In 2016 he was a guest in Hong Kong for a solo show in a 565m² space supported by the Consulate General of France in Hong Kong in partnership with the government of Hong Kong. This exhibition got 1,7 million visitors. In 2024, he created a 150 m² polyptych in Paris La Défense, labeled for the Cultural Olympiad. Guillaume Bottazzi has set up in Brussels his own House of Creation. The designer collaborates with teams of craftsmen, glassmakers and technicians... His heritage works, indoor or outdoor are sold to CAC 40 companies. Guillaume Bottazzi has an approach that links art, perception and well-being.

Name: Edmond Fine Arts
Description:
Edmond’s nonprofit community arts organization offering educational enrichment in visual and performing arts for adults and children.

EFA provides quality arts experiences that educates, raises cultural awareness, makes art accessible and exciting, offers entertainment, cultivates stable resources, and advocates in the community so everyone can discover their talents and expand their appreciation of the arts.

Name: Times Square Art Square Foundation || Art Square
Description:
Times Square Art Square (TSAS) Foundation is the nonprofit organization behind Art Square, a public art project committed to transforming Times Square from the world's largest advertising space into the world's largest, open-air gallery. TSAS was established in 2009 in support of certain ideals, including that: art should be more accessible; art and commercialism can not merely coexist, but actually advance one another; and public space should reflect and advance the public within it. 

Art Square will scale each year to involve more billboards, installations, pop-up galleries, performances and time. Hrag Vartanian has been appointed curator for the inaugural exhibition. Rafaël Rozendaal was named the first artist.

Twitter: @artsquare
Instagram: @timessquareartsquare
Facebook: facebook.com/TSAS
Tumblr: artsquare.tumblr.com

Name: Galeria H2O
Description:
Water, origin of life and universal formula.

Formula adopted by Joaquim Ruiz Millet and Ana Planella in 1989 to adapt a place where the flux of creative energy in Barcelona converge for almost three decades.

Gallery H2O opened its doors with a drawing exhibition of Ben van Berkel’s architectural projects. 

In 1991 the gallery started the edition of historical design objects and rediscovered the furniture designed in 1955 by the architect F.J. Barba Corsini for “La Pedrera” by Gaudí. The collection was soon extended with new objects absolutely linked to the gallery activity. Among them, the “H2O” chair, the “Flamp” lamp or the children’s game “Autoband” by Martí Guixé.

In 1995 the gallery started a publishing project for literary texts with “Les Idiotes” collection.

Gallery H2O organizes architecture, design, photography and contemporary art exhibitions.

Name: Centre d'Art Ygrec-ENSAPC
Description:
Ygrec est le centre d’art de l’École Nationale Supérieure d’Arts de Paris-Cergy. Après vingt ans d’existence à Paris, Ygrec ENSAPC a ouvert ses nouveaux espaces à Aubervilliers. 

En 2000, l’École nationale supérieure d’arts de Paris-Cergy se dote d’un lieu d’exposition intitulé « La Vitrine » situé à Paris, dans le 11ème arrondissement, rue Moret. Le projet élit ensuite domicile rue Louise Weiss dans le 13ème arrondissement où il prend le nom de Ygrec (soit « Cergy » à l’envers). A l’été 2016, Ygrec s’installe au cœur du laboratoire urbain et social des Grands Voisins, projet d’occupation temporaire du site de l’ancien hôpital Saint-Vincent-de-Paul, avant d’inaugurer, début 2020, un nouvel espace d’exposition à Aubervilliers. L’action du centre d’art se déploie également à l’occasion de projets hors-les-murs, en partenariat avec de nombreuses structures et événements.

Ygrec accueille les formes actuelles de la création contemporaine. Sa programmation s’articule d’une part autour de propositions artistiques développées en collaboration avec les enseignant.e.s, les étudiant.e.s et les diplômé.e.s de l’ENSAPC et d’autre part d’expositions et d’évènements élaborés à partir d’invitations adressées à des artistes et commissaires d’exposition venu.e.s de tous les continents.

Name: Juniper Print Shop
Description: Juniper Print Shop is a fast-growing e-commerce retailer that sells one-of-a-kind, large format art prints licensed from over 40 independent artists and curated by interior designer Jenny Komenda. Juniper seeks to create products and share ideas that empower our community to find joy and meaning through a storied, personal connection to space. Juniper’s core values are putting people first, being scrappy and demonstrating care. Juniper is headquartered in Mesa, Arizona.

Name: Ohio Northern University Art & Design
Description:
Ohio Northern has a rich history of academic excellence. The art & design program offers the Bachelor of Arts and Bachelor of Fine Arts degrees with several major programs of study including graphic design, art education, studio arts, and pre-art therapy. ONU students gain practical experiences through internships, exhibitions, student teaching, study abroad, workshops, conferences, and practicums that provide hands-on learning.

The art and design program also offers students engagement in a number of student organizations, including pre-professional groups, domestic study opportunities, outreach events, gallery exhibits, and portfolio reviews. Students and alumni have won the AICUO Excellence in the Visual Arts Award, the NACU Student Excellence Award, AIGA [Re]Design Award, American Graphic Design and Advertising awards, the American Advertising Federation ADDY awards, a Bluetooth Breakthrough Award finalist, Art Teacher of the Year awards, Kappa Pi scholarship winners, numerous juried show awards, and Twice Ten awards.

The Unisa Art Gallery hosts a range of exciting exhibitions each year, focusing on diverse and relevant aspects in the arts relevant globally, continentally, and moreover with a specific emphasis on South Africa.

Name: Galerie Michael Janssen
Description:
After a twelve year gallery career in Cologne that included over eighty exhibitions, Michael Janssen
relocated to Berlin in the spring of 2007. In September 2012, it opened a second branch in the
Gillman Barracks - an up-and-coming center for contemporary art in Singapore. In Berlin the
gallery is located in the Potsdamer Strasse; the neighborhood of the Neue Nationalgalerie as well
as several other prominent art galleries.

The gallery hosts a contemporary program that features North American, European as well as Asian
artists. In addition to the longtime collaboration with artists such as Thomas Grünfeld and Peter
Zimmermann, the gallery strives to constantly introduce upcoming artists such as Aiko Tezuka, Joris
Van de Moortel and Assaf Gruber. The gallery also focused on rediscovering established artists
such as Lynda Benglis, Lili Dujourie and Gianfranco Baruchello. In Singapore the gallery exhibited
young south east asian artists, such as Eddy Susanto, Ho Tzu Nyen and Jeremy Sharma, but also
staged exhibitions with Ai Wei Wei, Meg Cranston & John Baldessari and Peter Zimmermann.

Name: Alexia Werrie Gallery I Art in a House
Description:
ALEXIA WERRIE GALLERY I ART IN A HOUSE 

With ALEXIA WERRIE GALLERY Alexia invites you to discover her selection of contemporary international art in her gallery house. ART IN A HOUSE.

ALEXIA WERRIE GALLERY is neither a conventional mansion nor a traditional gallery but a selection of works in a LIVING space. Alexia welcomes you to her home and invites you to discover her favourite artistic heart staged in her personal interior, so that amateurs and collectors can better project the works in their homes. Through its confrontations, Alexia invites to travel, to escape, to authenticity.

In her confrontations and exhibitions, Alexia shares the discoveries she made during her travels in Africa and the Middle East. She travels the world to discover new artists and proposes contemporary works without restriction of technique, from drawing to installation through painting. The gallery owner selects complete, accomplished and recognized artists. Alexia pays particular attention to the message, the story they are dealing with, the research associated with the subject, the technical virtuosity. The pieces proposed are unique or very limited in edition.

Name: Barakat Contemporary

Barakat Contemporary focuses on in-depth research and planning into the important topics in international society and contemporary art, presenting to the domestic and international audience artists who show a humanities-based perspective on the present era. The gallery supports the long-term growth of unique artists from various cultures, including Africa, America, Asia, the Middle East, and Europe, and offers audiences an uncommon opportunity to explore the contemporary issues arising from the points of contact between each society and culture.

Name: basmeeuws.com photography
Description:
To really see Bas Meeuws’ flowers, you have to take your time. If you are too hasty, you will just see a vase of flowers, but if you look more closely, you will see that each and every flower has an incredible beauty. There is the reflection of the light from a leaf, the elegant arch of a stem. Your gaze explores petals, insects and leaf veins, roams the landscape behind the flowers and lingers on the vase, with its distinct shape and decoration. You now start to notice that there is a friction: the proportions between the flowers are strange, the play of light and shadow has something enigmatic. 

Looking properly is for the eye what tasting a refined dish is for the tongue. Bas Meeuws’ work seduces you into employing the power of sight for pure sensory pleasure. 

Our gaze follows that of the artist. Meeuws has a sharp eye for the richness of the shapes, colours and textures of flowers, insects and birds. He observes them intensely, whether they are in his own back garden, a municipal park, the Muiderslot gardens, the Hortus Botanicus in Leiden or the magnificent national parks of Taiwan. Camera, software and printing techniques are extensions of his unparalleled human eye. He uses technology to give us, the spectators, what he has seen. “See how beautiful it is” is what his flower still lifes are silently saying. A feast for the eye. 



Anneke van Wolfswinkel (The Netherlands)

Writer and art critic

Name: Kunst in Perspectief I Doina Kocsis
Description: Je staat op het punt om samen met mij op ontdekkingsreis te gaan! Waar, wanneer en zo vaak als jij wilt. Online colleges volgen op jouw moment. Prachtige kunst en cultuur dichterbij brengen: see, feel, think and wonder! Kunst plaatsen in een breder perspectief. Samen kijken, is méér zien. Daar wil ik voor staan. Dus ik ga je uitdagen: om met méér aandacht te kijken, maar ook te kijken vanuit een ander perspectief. Daarmee gaat kunst haar eigen verhaal vertellen, een verhaal dat gehoord moet worden en nooit verveeld! Ik wens je in ieder geval veel plezier en vooral veel verwondering toe!

Name: Oflines
Description:
Working for the last 10 years as a digital designer in the Netherlands, Boudewijn Mijnlieff has merged his love for abstract typography and the urge to create physical things.

So much happens online nowadays that Boudewijn wanted to work more in the offline world. Creating physical things that you can hold in your hands or hang on your wall. From this, Oflines was born.

In his work he explores the boundaries between readable and unreadable typography. Through doing that he developed an abstract style that he applies to walls, paintings, prints and ceramics.

Name: ArtQuake Gallery
Description:
ArtQuake Gallery es una firme apuesta por un modelo cada vez más al alza en el mundo del mercado del arte. La ambición de este proyecto pasa por el equilibrio entre la inmediatez y el alcance global que ofrece el mundo digital, con la genuina cercanía, visual y humana, del espacio físico.

El pilar fundamental de ArtQuake Gallery se halla en la representación y promoción de una serie de artistas emergentes, poniendo su arte al alcance tanto del coleccionista experimentado, como de aquel que desee iniciarse en este apasionante mundo. La relación entre los artistas y ArtQuake Gallery se basa en una constante sintonía tanto profesional como personal, que da como resultado un crecimiento conjunto.

Name: Art At A Time Like This
Description:
Art at a Time Like This supports artists and curators in the 21st century, presenting art in direct response to current events. 

Founded on March 17th, 2020 by independent curators Barbara Pollack and Anne Verhallen, this non-profit, digital first, arts organization presents art in public spaces --online and offline--as a direct response to social and political events.

Our mission is to show that art can make a difference and that artists and curators can be thought-leaders, envisioning alternative futures for humanity.

Name: Mimsanat Akademisi

Through exhibitions, community projects, and educational workshops, we connect artists, children, and communities to the transformative power of art. Our work spans across painting, mixed media, craft, and digital exhibitions, with a special focus on integrating art into conversations around education, health, and social change.

We also run the De Art and Craft Therapy Initiative (De A.C.T Initiative) — an outreach program that uses creativity as a tool for healing, confidence-building, and community development.

 Our Vision: To be a leading platform where art becomes a catalyst for social impact and global dialogue.
 Our Mission: To advance creativity, empower communities, and support artists through innovative, accessible, and meaningful artistic experiences.

Name: Alberto Giacometti-Stiftung
Description:
Die Alberto Giacometti-Stiftung verfügt über die bedeutendste museale Sammlung von Werken des Schweizer Plastikers, Malers und Zeichners Alberto Giacometti (1901–1966). Der Bestand ist inzwischen auf rund 800 Objekte angewachsen, davon sind 135 Werke ausgestellt. Er umfasst das Lebenswerk Alberto Giacomettis von seinen frühesten bis zu den letzten Werken in allen wesentlichen Aspekten und zahlreichen, überraschenden Facetten. Die Sammlung der Alberto Giacometti-Stiftung wird zum grossen Teil im Kunsthaus Zürich aufbewahrt und laufend in repräsentativen Auswahlen ausgestellt. Ein Viertel des ursprünglichen Bestandes befindet sich im Kunstmuseum Basel, ein Zehntel im Kunst Museum Winterthur.

-
The Alberto Giacometti-Stiftung has the world’s leading museum collection of works by the Swiss sculptor, painter and graphic artist Alberto Giacometti (1901–1966). The Foundation’s collection has now grown to around 800 objects, 135 of which are on display. It encompasses Alberto Giacometti's life's work from his earliest to his last works in all its essential aspects and numerous, surprising facets.Most of the Foundation’s collection is kept in the Kunsthaus Zürich, where representative selections are exhibited on an ongoing basis. A quarter of the original collection is housed in the Kunstmuseum Basel, another tenth, in the Kunst Museum Winterthur.

Name: Hôtel des ventes Bordeaux Quinconces
Description:
L'Hôtel des Ventes Bordeaux Quinconces est une salle des ventes bordelaise proposant aux particuliers et professionnels  des biens à vendre et à acheter aux enchères.  L'Etude travaille main dans la main avec plusieurs experts de la France entière afin d'offrir un travail de qualité ainsi que des biens de prestige. 
La force de l'Etude réside dans sa proposition de valeurs. Des ventes aux enchères spécialisées articulées autour de thématiques spécifiques : ventes de vin, de design, d'art classique et des ventes de montres d'exceptions et de bijoux en collaboration avec deux experts de renom : Jean-Christophe GUYON - expert CEA en Horlogerie  / Alexandre Leger- expert CEA en Joaillerie. Notre monde change et nous sommes amenés à modifier nos  habitudes de consommation et à innover perpétuellement. 
C'est pourquoi le marché de la seconde main permet de donner un nouveau souffle et de valoriser des biens, parfois oubliés dans nos tiroirs. Acheter des biens de seconde main permet avant tout d'éviter une surconsommation et de réduire son impact écologique. Les salles des ventes sont un lieu propice pour dénicher des objets rares et d'exception, chargé d'histoire. 

Collectionneurs, adeptes des ventes aux enchères, acheteurs réguliers, curieux ou bien premiers acheteurs trouveront leur bonheur au sein de notre Hôtel des ventes, de part la multitude et la diversité de biens que nous proposons à la vente.

Name: Dhi Artspace Gallery

Besides the regular art exhibitions, Dhi Artspace also hosts workshops, camps, art lectures & talks to bring awareness about contemporary art.

In addition to having one of the largest and the finest art display facilty, Dhi Artspace also have a dedicated Printmaking Studio and an art library open to the practitioners and art enthusiasts.

Dhi Artspace endeavour to introduce the best emerging talents from across the country and make available for the enthusiastic art collectors, the rarest and finest collection of contemporary Indian art.

Name: FOLUKE CULTURAL ARTS CENTER INC
Description:
FOLUKE CULTURAL ARTS CENTER INC is a community based organization based in Cleveland Ohio, whose focus is to strengthen and support underprivileged communities by providing access to performing arts, visual arts, and arts education. Our focus is at-risk Children, Youth, and Teens, and older adults.
The GOAL is to provide positive alternatives to negative behaviors by instilling discipline, self-pride and boosting self-confidence through self-expression and self-discovery, in addition to promoting academic achievements, socio-economic development, and community enhancement.
VISION: To provide multi-generational arts education services to the Greater Cleveland Area with a special commitment to the Cedar-Central 'Promise' Neighborhood.  To implement arts and culture activities that will develop positive community 'norms' through the belief that it takes a village to raise a child, and that the older people are keepers of the culture and must remain dynamic members of society to provide younger generations positive role models.

Patrimonio Cultural y Sociedad

Este Patrimonio Cultural apela a lo que actualmente somos y nos configura, con nuestras tradiciones y costumbres, y nuestra identidad como sociedad, ya sea occidental y oriental.
