Name: Quidley & Company Fine Art
Description:
When visiting the galleries of Quidley & Company you will find exceptional paintings by today’s finest contemporary and traditional artists.  Committed to building collections of distinction, Quidley & Company works with integrity, transparency, and discretion to fulfill clients’ needs and visions, and offers a full range of art-related services.  We are a full service gallery with three locations, satisfying every imaginable need arising from building and maintaining a fine art collection.  

 

Chris Quidley, the Director and co-founder, has been representing fine art for over 30 years.  With a top contemporary painter as his father, and framer mother, Chris literally grew up in the art business.  Chris previously worked for Christie's in London, managed several galleries on the East coast, and supports a large number of corporate and private clients who rely on his expertise when acquiring fine art. 

 

The gallery was first established on Main Street in Nantucket in 2006.  It was an instant success built upon strong relationships with clients and artists, and a commitment to exceptional service that compliments the fabulous offering of fine art. Quidley & Company had a second gallery on Boston’s Newbury Street from 2008-2018, and has opened additional galleries in the Art Block in Naples, FL and along the Saugatuck River in Westport, CT in 2016 to better serve our growing base of collectors, while enriching our roster of artists.

Name: Vanity Projects
Description:
Vanity Projects is a luxury concept that merges a high-end nail art atelier with video art programming. Our vision is to re-shape the way patrons perceive and expense video art by placing it in an engaging environment.

Founded by independent curator, Rita de Alencar Pinto in 2009, Vanity Projects first began as a pop-up, organizing itself in the homes and studios of visual artists, friends, and art aficionados. Vanity Projects quickly received offers to present at art fairs, fashion events, museums, and cultural institutions. In January 2013, MoMA PS1 invited Vanity Projects to do a three-month pop-up within the Confettisystems installation, held in the museum’s duplex.

It was at this time that Pinto developed the concept of the artist-in-residence program. Offering nail artists the chance to exhibit their talents in a new environment, the program coincided with the salon’s brick and mortar debut in Manhattan’s Lower East Side in July 2013. Since then Vanity Projects has hosted over twenty-five international nail artists from London to Miami, and presented video programs featuring top contemporary video artists and international curators. 
Since opening Vanity Projects has appeared in over 50 publications, including being named ‘Best of New York’ by both Allure and New York Magazines. In addition to editorial spreads, our artists have assisted and lead runways shows at Mercedes Benz Fashion Week in New York and Miami Swim. Vanity Projects has been invited to participate in pop-ups at the Pulizer Foundation in St. Louis, The Brooklyn Museum, The Aldrich Museum, Los Angeles Contemporary Art Fair, NADA Miami Beach, Sculpture Center and the Aspen Art Museum.

In May 2015, Vanity Projects opened its second location in Miami, Florida.

Name: CISTA ARTS
Description:
CISTA ARTS is an Award-Winning art-tech company based in the UK. ČISTĀ is the Avestan derivative of the verb Cit, ‘to notice, to understand’, and denotes ‘intuition’ and ‘idea’. Avestan is the ancient Persian (Farsi) language used in the Zoroastrian scripture. 
Founded in 2018 by artist and curator Fatemeh Takht Keshian (P.h.D in Art Lancaster University/ LICA), CISTA ARTS aims to bring together artists who work trans-nationally across geographic borders from the Middle East, Europe, Asia, and diaspora. We work with artists who are exploring global issues and contemporary society. Cista Arts is an interdisciplinary and transcultural organization, working with fine artists, writers, architects, scientists, anthropologists, choreographers, and practitioners from many more disciplines and cultures. And to exhibit, program, publishing and organise events that help bring the general public closer to the wonderful world of art; as well as, introduce young artists to society. 

CISTA ARTS offers the following services to artists, designers, buyers, collectors, and publishers: 
- Providing an online platform for artists to market their works.
- Offering exhibition space for artists to display their artworks.
- Presenting artists’ works at art festivals, art fairs, and auctions. 
- Acting as publishers in creating books of art, catalogues, and booklets.
- Providing a platform for clients interested in acquiring Middle-Eastern artworks. 
- Locating and purchasing Middle-Eastern artworks of interest to clients. 
- Advising interior designers on the selection of artworks and prints for commercial and private premises.  
- Providing landscape designers and architects advice on suitable sculptures and site-specific artworks. 
- Providing Creative workshops that can be delivered in school/ college/ community organisations, and online.

Name: Locks Gallery
Description:
Founded in 1968, Locks Gallery represents an international group of critically respected contemporary artists working in a wide variety of disciplines. The gallery exhibition program presents new works by mid-career artists while introducing the work of emerging artists. Survey and thematic exhibitions of work by essential artists of the 20th-century including Louise Bourgeois, Robert Motherwell, Louise Nevelson and George Segal, are regular highlights of the gallery exhibition program. 

The gallery has continually guided individuals and museums with collecting and offers expertise with the resale of important works of art. A longtime member of the ADAA (Art Dealers Association of America) and subscribing to the highest measure of connoisseurship, scholarship, and curatorial practice in its presentation of contemporary art, Locks Gallery maintains a standard of professional and artistic excellence. Exhibitions are accompanied by full-color catalogues featuring scholarly essays by leading critics and art historians.

Name: William Bunch Auctions
Description:
William H. Bunch, the owner of the auction house and appraisal business bearing his name, had a passion for auctioning spanning thirty years. After growing up in Northern Delaware and attending the University of Delaware he found himself living in a charming Cecil County, MD farmhouse and attending local auctions looking for appropriate furnishings. Soon after, he began planning a future in the auction business. Becoming certified as an auctioneer by attending The Reisch College in Mason, Iowa was the beginning of his formal training as an auctioneer and appraiser. Bill has built a nationally respected antique and fine art estate auction and appraisal business based in the Chadds Ford area in Pennsylvania.
 
In addition to his professional staff, respected specialists assist him in the business today, drawing from, but not limited to, Boston, New York and Philadelphia. As a member of the National Auctioneers Association (NAA), the International Society of Appraisers (ISA) and graduate of The Certified Auctioneers Institute, Bill is infinitely qualified, well connected and respected nationally and internationally in this business. His membership in and generous support of numerous local, regional and national civic organizations attest to his commitment to the community at-large.

We strive to provide turnkey solutions for estates, individuals, and industry professionals. Our auction house offers product and market experience for those considering the sale & disposition of all types of antiques, decorative & fine art, and other appreciable residential contents.

Name: Columbia Art Market Society
Description: The Columbia Art Market Society aims to encourage an interest in the intersection of art and business and educate our members on the happenings within the industry. We host biweekly events and curate art business news in our weekly newsletter. We want to make art business accessible to all Columbia students and create a space on campus where they can learn more and engage with the complexities of the art world.

Name: Fareeha Artwork
Description: A place where you learn the actual purpose of the impact of your art to the world

Name: Lewin Prod
Description:
Avec Lewin Prod : vous pensez, nous agissons !
Entre modernité et sensibilité je m'attarderai à suivre vos envies et figer vos idées !

Name: Aubert Jansem Genève
Description:
Installée aux Ports Francs de Genève et spécialisée en Art du XXe siècle, Aubert Jansem fournit des évaluations et expertises d’oeuvres d’art en toute confidentialité, indépendance et impartialité.

Société indépendante, Aubert Jansem dispose de 50 ans d'expérience dans le marché de l'art international sous tous ses axes, des ventes aux enchères à la galerie, en passant par l’enseignement et les institutions publiques. 

Ce cumul unique de compétences est dédié à nos clients pour l'expertise, l’évaluation, le conseil, la gestion de collection et la galerie.

Name: SVA Artist Residency Programs
Description:
SVA's Artist Residencies in New York City offer emerging and mid-career artists time, space and a supportive community in which to develop ideas and focus on their artistic direction.

In addition to our time-honored studio residencies, a variety of innovative professional immersion programs provide opportunities for artists to explore new areas of social and technological practice.

A unique combination of creative and professional resources provides a rich environment for growth and opportunity in the current vibrant art scene.

Affordable housing is available, as are opportunities to display work.

Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. Early application is highly recommended. Please see individual program listings for application due dates.

For further information or questions regarding SVA's Artist Residency Programs please email residency@sva.edu.

Name: Galerie AM PARK
Description:
Galerie AM PARK is an art gallery based in Frankfurt, Germany. 
The gallery's program includes carefully chosen modern and contemporary works of art by international artists.

The gallery focuses its activities mainly on Mexican and Spanish art. Prominent artists such as David Alfaro Siqueiros and Diego Rivera are featured in the gallery. 

We are constantly involved in the search for and promotion of young, aspiring artists. We also offer art consultation, equipment of buildings and premises as well as the organization of exhibitions. 

Five or six exhibitions are presented annually at the gallery. We also organize exhibitions at various private and public venues, e.g. in museums, foundations, banks, lawyers' chambers and hotels.

Galerie AM PARK is a member of the Federal Association of German Galleries and Editions (BVDG) and a member of Galleries in Hesse and Rhineland-Pfalz regd. assoc.

Name: Burgess Modern + Contemporary
Description: Burgess Modern & Contemporary provides curatorial expertise and presents specialized art projects to assist discerning individuals, corporations, and public institutions seeking to develop high quality, uniquely tailored art programs.  Founded by Lisa Burgess, a gallerist and private dealer with over 21 years of experience, BMC advises its private clients on primary and secondary market acquisitions and collaborates on specially curated projects from leading Modern & Contemporary artists.

Name: Mission: Renaissance Fine Art Classes
Description:
We teach the basics of drawing and painting to children, teens, and adults in a fun & safe art studio environment. Using The Gluck Method, a step-by-step, results driven art training program.  Students attend weekly drawing and painting classes where they can acquire all of the skills needed to become a proficient fine artist.

With over 45 years as the world’s leader in fine art instruction we provide the best in fine art education. With 14 fine art studio locations in California and Texas, and students attending virtual classes from around the world, Mission: Renaissance currently teaches thousands of students each week.

We are dedicated to helping you attain your goals as an artist.

Name: Surya Kids
Description: Play School Chain - India

Name: Clevedon Salerooms Ltd
Description:
Established in 1860, Clevedon Salerooms is a leading destination in the South West of England for antiques and fine art. We specialise in valuing and selling a wide range of rare and unique objects including jewellery, watches, silver, collectables, furniture, paintings, and clocks. 
Our comprehensive services encompass valuation days, online assessments, and complimentary home visits for larger collections. With a commitment to integrity and professionalism, we provide expert guidance on Probate and Family Division matters. 
Our experienced team is supported by a network of trusted partners, including reputable removers, house clearance operatives, and charitable organisations. Together, we provide an inclusive solution tailored to your individual needs, ensuring a seamless process during challenging times.
Our prestigious specialist sales attract international interest. These notable events receive national exposure through publications such as the Antiques Trade Gazette and Country Life.
For expert assistance in buying or selling, visit our website. Bid conveniently online at www.clevedonsalerooms.com

Name: B.Art
Description: B.Art est un service de recherche d'oeuvres d'art et de création d'événements artistiques qui ambitionne de faire naître de nouvelles relations à l'art afin d’avoir un impact positif sur nos vies, sur nos comportements individuels et sur le collectif. L'art au service de l'être.

Name: Arthill Gallery
Description:
Located in a converted church in West Kensington, London, Arthill Gallery exhibits contemporary artwork from established as well as emerging artists throughout Asia and Europe.

Through its programme, the gallery aims to create and encourage an artistic dialogue between countries and cultures, offering lectures, artist talks and events. Arthill Gallery’s strives to identify and represent unique, talented and authentic artists working today.

'We want to develop our connection with institutions and the next generation of collectors in Asia and Europe; maintaining our global relationships with well-regarded artists, collectors, museums and art dealers.'

Arthill Gallery in London is part of Artcity Group China. Artcity group was founded in 1996 and since then has established exhibition spaces in London, Beijing and Shandong. The group has plans to expand its activities into America and Australia in the near future.

Name: Jackson Hole Art Auction
Description: Since 2007, the Jackson Hole Art Auction has been recognized as one of the premier art events in the country, defined by the high standard of works offered in a variety of genres including wildlife, sporting, figurative, landscape and Western art by both renowned past masters and contemporary artists. The JHAA is a signature event of Jackson Hole’s annual Fall Arts Festival and attracts collectors from across the country as well as abroad. With locations in Scottsdale, AZ, Jackson Hole, WY, Santa Fe, NM and New York, the auction principals, Trailside Galleries and Gerald Peters Gallery, bring over 100 years of combined experience and expertise to the event.

Name: Artofthings101
Description:
Art of Things 101 is an online platform for the young, upcoming artists. We are all about helping the undiscovered artists that are struggling to find the limelight today. We help you gain the exposure you deserve, showcase your works on our online platform, help you connect with potential people, and sell your works. 

We also educate on art, review shows, share insightful information on art forms, art movements, and promote local artists.  

Get in touch with us if you would like -
To have your works featured on our page
To collaborate with us on an art exhibit
To buy original artworks from local artists
To discuss trends, news in art and art history. 

---
Instagram - @artofthings101
Email - artofthings101@gmail.com

Name: Artfreaks
Description: Artfreaks is the official art club of IIT (ISM) Dhanbad. We are a creative group of people who leave no stone unturned to develop and enhance the aesthetic sense of artists through various events, workshops, and competitions. From organizing fun events to giving the campus a whole new look during fests, we enjoy and work together as a family.

Name: Animact Studio Escola
Description: Aqui na Animact Studio e Escola, "atuar" é a nossa essência, por isso o nosso mascote é um Mímico. Para nós ele representa com maestria a arte de atuar e transmitir idéias atravez da linguagem corporal.

Name: Gallery of Contemporary Mosaics
Description: The Gallery of Contemporary Mosaics (GoCM) exhibits internationally renowned masters, emerging and established contemporary mosaic artists. GoCM promotes artists employing exemplary conceptual and technical excellence through a multitude of approaches and materials. In the US, contemporary mosaics are relatively unrecognized as a fine art; GoCM provides a space for highly coveted artists to exhibit in our state of the art facility. GoCM is affiliated with The Chicago Mosaic School (CMS), the preeminent center for mosaic arts education in the Americas. The Gallery of Contemporary Mosaics will profoundly reshape how one may experience mosaics  within and outside our walls.

Name: Malatya Büyükşehir Belediyesi Sanat ve Eğitim Merkezleri
Description: Kurum Yaz Aylarında Çocuklara Yönelik Kurslar Açılmaktadır. 2010 Yılında 5 Farklı Branşta Eğitim Vermeye Başlayan Malatya Büyükşehir Belediyesi Sanat Ve Eğitim Merkezleri Otuzdan Farklı Branşta Yıl Boyunca Malatya İlinin Dört Bir Yanına Yayılmış Kurs Merkezlerinde Kurslar Açmaktadır.

Description: We make tattoos last longer than love

Name: G.ART Gallery
Description: G.ART Gallery is an online platform for contemporary art from 23 Eastern European countries. It makes art from this region accessible to a global audience.

Name: Hush Gallery/Artist Residency
Description:
Hush Gallery is an independent art gallery and a meeting ground for ideas. In this living space many cultures intersect and communicate. Visitors can spot or participate in various exhibitions and have the opportunity to showcase their work inside an environment that attracts people from all over the world. 

We support a programme of Turkish Contemporary Art as well as promoting international emerging and established artists exploring new ideas in all media. This includes but is not limited to painting, prints, photography, sculpture, installation, drawing, new media and conceptual art.

Name: Sønderjyllands Kunstskole
Description: Sønderjyllands Kunstskole er en kunstskole beliggende i Sønderborg.

Name: David Castillo
Description: David Castillo Gallery is a fine art company based out of United States.

Name: Concrete Canvas
Description: Concrete Canvas verfraait de stad met street art kunstwerken. De missie van de organisatie is om de identiteit van wijken buiten het prachtige historische centrum vast te leggen in muurschilderingen in de openbare ruimte. Net zo belangrijk vindt de organisatie de stimulering van artistieke ontwikkeling van de street art kunstenaars. Om deze reden kijkt Concrete Canvas zorgvuldig naar de opdracht en omgeving en kiest zo voor indrukwekkende, onverwachte en inspirerende kunstenaars.

Name: Éditions Paablo
Description:
Les Éditions Paablo sont dédiées à l'art contemporain, avec la volonté de faciliter son accessibilité.
Nous éditons régulièrement l'Artbox Paablo, un coffret sur un jeune artiste contemporain au talent reconnu. 

L'Artbox Paablo comprend : 
- Une reproduction numérotée et signée à la main par l'artiste
- Une ou plusieurs reproductions simples
- Un livret sur papier Fedrigoni, réalisé dans notre atelier, qui explique la démarche de l'artiste et présente le reste de son travail. 

Le Studio Paablo proposent également des prestations destinées aux professionnels :
- Réalisation d'Art box sur mesure : Elle peut être utilisée par les artistes ou galeristes pour être vendue lors d'expositions, mais aussi par des fondations ou entreprises qui souhaitent présenter leurs acquisitions auprès de clients ou salariés comme cadeau d'entreprise. 
- Réalisation d'édition sur mesure & prestations diverses de graphisme : lithographie, livre ou catalogue d'exposition, affiches...
- Solution d'automatisation de communautés ciblées sur instagram : Accompagnement des entités culturelles (galeries, festivals, musées, artistes) sur Instagram, réseau social artistique de référence
- Réalisation de sites sous WordPress avec formation.

Paablo réalise l'entière conception de ses éditions (maquette graphique, assemblage et façonnage à la main) ce qui permet de proposer des prix très attractifs. Pour l'impression, nous travaillons avec différents imprimeurs spécialisés en fonction des besoins (impression fine art, tirage photographique, sérigraphie etc...)

Name: New Apostle Gallery
Description: New Apostle Gallery was conceived by artist David Hollier in 2013 initially to do Aqua Art Fair in Miami. Now based in New York, the gallery continues to do art fairs and pop-up exhibitions, and represents a selection of internationally established and emerging artists. The gallery aims to help promote artists’ work through sales and shows.

Name: Red Gate Gallery
Description: Since 1991 Red Gate Gallery has been exhibiting work by outstanding contemporary Chinese artists. With 22 artists represented, the diverse media reflects the artists' awareness and interest in China's changing society. As records of their observations on daily life, artists are exploring issues such as gender, population, and the environment, all highly relevant in our global society. Through traditional Chinese painting, collage, lithographs and oil painting Red Gate's artists are supplying a social commentary on the political, economical and cultural transformations within contemporary Chinese society.

Name: Latela Curatorial
Description:
Latela Curatorial is an art advisory studio that specializes in weaving together conceptual art projects and artist placement. Our holistic approach includes traditional and nontraditional exhibition curation, cultural placemaking, large-scale procurement, and community workshops.

Through intuitive arts leadership, our core mission is to continuously question how “support” is defined in the artworld and advocate on behalf of the artist and arts workers. Our attitude is to nurture with a matriarchal approach: creating generative (rather than solely transactional) opportunities for artists, collectors and communities alike.

Name: Anchor Project Management
Description: Anchor Project Management is here to support authors, editors, creatives, and more as they are launching new books and products. From pre-launch to post-release, we’re here to work with you and support you. We will be your “anchor” throughout this sometimes chaotic and stormy time.

Name: Henna & Mehndi Hand Art
Description:
My name is Pariti and I am a mehndi/henna artist that resides in southern New Jersey. I love designing, especially hand art and traditional south Asian mehndi designs. You can find my work on my social media:
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/pariti.hand.art/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/pariti.hand.art
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@pariti.hand.art

Name: Scotty Art
Description:
The great thing about humanity is our ability to each see the world so differently. Through my original works of art, I offer just one unique perspective on my view of my world and my community around me here in New Orleans. I bring imagination to life thru paint and offer you a glimpse into my perspective. Through color, texture, and composition, each painting brings you a sense of joy and wonder, a sense of community and belonging.

By using my unique style, I also cultivate even more personal one of a kind commissioned works of art for collectors that request a painting meaningful to them. I absolutely love watching their faces light up during the reveal!

There's no limit to where our imagination can bring us.

Name: Austin Creative Art Center
Description:
AUSTIN CREATIVE ART CENTER
The mission of Austin Creative Art Center is to provide inspiring instruction that guides individuals through creative processes that enhance understanding of art and design and reveal personal and cultural connections.

CORE VALUES
+ Passion - do what you love
+ Creativity - develop works of art that resonate 
+ Mastery - enhance your technical knowledge and skills

Name: Mirage Festival
Description:
First event dedicated to digital cultures in Lyon, Mirage Festival has been investigating the links between artistic creation and technologies for more than six years. In order to showcase the richness and diversity of this contemporary creation nourished by technologies, the festival offers a unique format built around three interrelated building blocks : an exhibition, a series of performances and a reflective lab, the Mirage Creative+ 


The Mirage Creative+ is a space for meetings, exchanges and networking. Open to all, this program brings together a host of professionals, artists, studios, students and creative minds to share their experiences and perspectives on the latest trends related to the cultural and creative industries sector. A transmedia program focused on virtual reality and new forms of digital contents is also presented within the lab. 


Mirage Festival provides sessions of experimentation and transmission of knowledge. Collaborative formats (hackathons, workshops, open-camp etc.) are proposed in order to stimulate creativity and foster the emergence of new ideas and practices.

Name: Kongstad Studio
Description:
Kongstad Studio is a creative duo working in various media including painting, mural, illustration, installation and sculpture.

Cecilie studied design and communication while Tobias studied sourcing and innovation, their work often revolves around nature and characters, symbiosis versus detachment. Their studio is full of color, being it is proven to have a positive effect on human psyche, and accompanies humoursome thoughtfulness, often driven by a site-specific mood. Inspired by innovation, they often work with intriguing materials such as air purifying paint, always seeking new ideas to support their art’s underlying theme. 

As the first artist in the world (as far as they know), their studio is a Certified B Corporation which means that they have been independently reviewed and verified as a studio that meets high standards of social and environmental performance, transparency, and accountability.

They have worked with a foundation supporting children with cancer, vegetable pioneers fighting food waste, a non-profit housing association and more. Being able to contribute to causes, people and businesses of this nature is their mission.

Name: Galerie Hurtebize
Description: La Galerie Hurtebize, établie à Cannes depuis 1992, propose une sélection d'œuvres de peintres post-impressionistes et modernes à des collectionneurs internationaux.

Description:
French Sculptor Artist

Name: Julie Désert - Écrivain public
Description:
Depuis Janvier 2022, je suis auto-entrepreneure en tant qu'écrivain public. Je suis à votre disposition pour animer des ateliers d'écriture, tenir des permanences d'écrivain public, coordonner des ouvrages, pratiquer l'aide à la rédaction et à la correction, rédiger des discours, courriers, CV, lettres de motivation etc. 

Je suis également doctorante en anthropologie à l'Université de Picardie Jules Verne, membre du laboratoire de recherche Habiter le Monde UR4287. 

Écrire est ma passion et mon métier. Je souhaite partager les possibilités d'écrire, rendre accessible et simple l'usage des mots, apprendre à écouter l'autre et ainsi valoriser le travail effectué. 

N'hésitez pas à me contacter ! 
E-mail : juliedsrt@gmail.com

Name: Durham Region International Film Festival (DRIFF)
Description: DRIFF is a not-for-profit film festival rooted in the communities of Durham. In addition to growing our annual festival of local and international films, DRIFF will continue to expand educational opportunities to develop local creativity, storytelling, and experimentation through moving images. DRIFF will engage a diverse network of audiences, filmmakers, and collaborators to promote film as a form of creative expression and a catalyst for community building. DRIFF brings the film festival experience to diverse audiences in Durham Region and beyond, nurturing community connections, learning, and the development of local talent through a shared love of film.

Name: Académie des Lumières
Description: La presse internationale réunie à Paris pour élire les meilleurs films français

Name: Brumhaus
Description:
Brumhaus is the creation of artist Alexander Edwards. 

His work explores architecture and modernism, using geometric forms and patterns to produce a hard-edged graphic style. With influences from artists Picasso and Klee, and from Cubism to Bauhaus his work floats between the recognisable and the abstract, trying to find a unique view or sense of a place. Most of his work portrays cityscapes views and landmarks of Birmingham and the Midlands.

He explains, "I take my inspiration from the built environment. My work focusses on cityscapes and landmarks. Most of my work is of places in the Midlands. Working as a designer for 20 years gave me a unique approach to my process, with unique results. What starts out as a pencil sketch, of either a real view or a montage of individiual elements brought together, is finally developed as a digital artwork. The final piece is a giclée art print."

Alex's early career was in the Design Industry as an Environmental Graphic Designer. He now uses those design skills for creating art. His first artwork as 'Brumhaus' was a an abstract depiction of Birmingham Central Library. Since then he has continued to draw other key buildings, cityscapes, suburbs, parks and landmarks in Brum. He has also expanded his range of prints to include London, Coventry and Leamington Spa. 

Visit www.brumhaus.uk
Socials: @brumhaus

Name: ICM UK
Description:
ICM UK (Integrated Contamination Management UK Ltd - formerly Thermo Lignum UK Ltd) is part of leading conservation and restoration company; IPARC (International Platform for Art Research and Conservation). 
 
The humidity regulated warm air treatment used by ICM is a 100% effective and eco-friendly method for treating a wide variety of materials which have been attacked by insect pests. All life-cycle stages of insects that inhabit any organic material will die when exposed to warm temperatures over a defined period of time during our ICM humidity regulated treatment.
 
During the ICM treatment, the humidity is controlled – and so there are no risks of harm to the objects.  Because there are no chemicals or noxious gases involved in the treatment, there is no risk to your health or the environment. The machinery and materials have been developed to require a low energy intake for each treatment. The carbon footprint of the technology is therefore very low.

The warm air treatment of moveable heritage and art works is perfectly suitable for objects in paper, textiles, leather, fur, ethnographic pieces, furniture, musical instruments, polychromatic sculptures and paintings. 

The treatment can be used in the fight against heritage eating insects, including clothes moths (Tineola bisselliella, Tinea pellionella), varied carpet beetles (Anthrenus verbasci), silverfish (Lepisma saccharina), the grey silverfish or so called ‘paperfish’ (Ctenolepisma longicaudata), common woodworm (Anobium punctatum), powder post beetle (Lyctus brunneus) and biscuit beetle (Stegobium paniceum) among many others.

Our services can be offered at our service centre in London or in-situ with our mobile chamber for large scale projects. Chamber leases are also offered for owners of large collections.

ICM also have service centres in Brussels and Berlin.

Site visits and reporting are also available to advise clients in IPM.
