Description: Open art museum is a company dedicated to working with and promoting street-art/artists. Our projects vary from mural creation to exhibitions, workshops and limited edition prints.

Name: My Art Gallery
Description:
My Art Gallery prend le pari de remettre l'art contemporain au goût du jour. Nous travaillons avec de jeunes artistes issus des meilleures écoles d'art de France. Nous offrons la possibilité à tout un chacun, d'acquérir une œuvre d'art unique à un prix réellement accessible.
My Art Gallery, c’est la volonté d'offrir un tremplin à de jeunes artistes contemporains en plein développement en exposant sur notre e-galerie. Nous avons tous dans notre entourage au moins une personne naturellement douée et passionnée qui produit chaque année des œuvres par dizaines, pour finalement les voir s'entasser dans une remise faute de moyen pour les présenter. Voilà concrètement d'où nous est venue l’idée de créer My Art Gallery. Simplement donner un coup de pouce à des amis, des amis d'amis de pouvoir avoir la chance de vous montrez au moins une fois de quoi ils sont réellement capable!

Name: ARAN Extended Reality Art
Description:
ARAN (Augmented Reality Art Network) connects art and technology through the selection and production of cultural content in Virtual and Augmented Reality. Our clients are companies, institutions, museums, galleries and artists.

ARAN was born in 2017 co-founded by Maite Coloma and José Delgado Periñán and with the collaboration of Oarsis.

Name: Warin Lab Contemporary
Description:
AN ART SPACE WITH PURPOSE!

We are honored to establish our art space in this beautiful 100 year old former residence of a legendary Dr. Boonsong Lekagul (1907 – 1992). He was a man who singled handedly launched Thailand’s wildlife conservation movement.

Our art space engages audience with prevailing social issues through non-conforming art practices.

To achieve the goal of engaging the audience at a profound level, the space devotes its focus to only one social issue per year. In 2021 and 2022, the theme is “Environment.” During the course of the year, the art space houses art exhibitions by different artists who explore environmental and sustainable issues through their own perspectives and approaches.

Name: Associated Artists of Pittsburgh
Description:
The Associated Artists of Pittsburgh enhances the region's cultural vitality and promotes visual arts excellence by showcasing artists' work through contemporary exhibitions, providing community-based education programs, and facilitating a broad dialogue to engage artists with one another and the community.

AAP is the oldest, continuously-exhibiting, visual arts organization in the country. Founded in 1910, AAP is a driving force in Pittsburgh’s dynamic cultural life. Its mission is to provide a vital and challenging environment for artists to exhibit new work in the widest possible range of media.

Name: BIG Wall Décor
Description:
Large wall art has several benefits, aside from being aesthetically pleasing to the eye. Oversized wall art can accentuate small living spaces. If you currently live in a studio apartment, investing in oversized wall art is an excellent way to improve your humble abode’s look.

Maybe you like to style your home in a more minimalist approach. Large wall art will complement your style! In fact, large artwork is considered to be a more modern style in terms of home décor.

Many men and women admire and appreciate large artwork, but they can be skeptical about purchasing their own large pieces. This is due to two very common concerns regarding purchasing oversized wall art: it is not affordable, and it is too hard to transport.

BIG Wall Décor is proud to bring customers solutions to both of these concerns. Our wall art is unbelievably affordable for everyone, no matter what your budget may be. We believe everyone deserves gorgeous large artwork from today’s top trending artists in their home or office, no matter their financial situation. So even if you are a young professional building your first art collection, our wall art is going to be affordable for you and the perfect addition to any room.

All of BIG Wall Décor’s large wall art is easily transportable. Our wall art prints are very portable and can be broken down and quickly moved, so you never have to worry about your large art being challenging to transport in or out of your building. If you ever get tired of your current art print, you can simply purchase a new one and easily change out the prints. Versatile, stylish, affordable, and mobile. Large wall art is the best choice when it comes to adding a new piece of art to your home.

Name: Maison des arts Georges et Claude Pompidou
Description: Située à 140 kms au Nord de Toulouse dans un environnement rural et touristique la MAGCP, Maison des Arts Georges et Claude Pompidou, combine les missions d’un centre d’art contemporain à Cajarc et celles de résidences internationales d’artistes, les Maisons Daura, à Saint-Cirq Lapopie. Pour cela, elle a obtenu le label Centre d’art contemporain d’intérêt National, depuis décembre 2018.

Name: The Spiritual Arts Foundation
Description: The Spiritual Arts Foundation is dedicated to promoting arts related projects that specifically demonstrate a vision of spirituality at their core. We represent all positive and life-affirming spiritual and religious beliefs.

Name: Artur Ramon Art
Description: Founded in 1911 as an antique dealer, Artur Ramon Art is one of the oldest art galleries in Barcelona. Painting and drawing, from the ancient to the contemporary, are the main fields in which Artur Ramon works, without renouncing the decorative arts. Various disciplines define them as experts in ancient art: sculpture, ceramics, engraving, furniture, glass and silver. The challenge of the fourth generation of antique dealers, formed by Artur and Mónica Ramon Navarro, with the support of Artur Ramon Picas, is to present its antiquities from a contemporary perspective. Specialization and internationalization are the two axes of Artur Ramon Art. The search for unpublished pieces and the recovery of lost identities through the best specialists in each subject, whose research is published in catalogues. This art gallery is also a centre for the study and management of museum quality works of art. The gallery offers advice to collectors for the appraisal of artworks. Artur Ramon Art has a regular presence in the main fairs of the world dedicated to antiques, drawing and ancient and modern painting. The gallery takes part in TEFAF Maastricht and the Salon du Dessin in Paris, and also exhibits at other international fairs, including Master Drawings in New York and Gabinete Art Fair in Madrid.

Name: Cosmic Spark Designs
Description: Mixed Media Art • Digital Illustration • Graphic Design • Creative Art Experiences • Hand Painted Home Decor

Name: Gogi Studios
Description:
Gogi Studios is an art studio, which gives innovative visual approaches to projects. Gogi studios was started in a modest manner by Nigar Nazar in the seventies. She initiated comic strips for the press. It was the first ever comic strip in the Pakistani setting. The comic strips featured Pakistani culture and problems in a humorous way. With decades of cartoons featuring the central character of Gogi, the comics gained popularity among women who related to this female character. It became a household name. People are receptive to message advocated by Gogi and this is used to launch many social advocacy campaigns.
Gogi studios has successfully completed many commissioned projects dedicated to the issues of human rights. Gogi Studios has worked on various campaigns using different mediums to raise awareness on issue of children rights, environment and sexual harassment.
Nigar Nazar is the first woman cartoonist of Pakistan and of the Muslim world .Her character, Gogi has not only appeared in different newspapers and magazines but four children’s hospitals in Islamabad and Rawalpindi have been decorated with Gogi cartoons and health messages. Nigar has also authored and illustrated 27 books for children. . She was nominated by BBC for “100 Global women who have made a difference in 2014” NHK ,largest TV channel of Japan has produced a 28 minute documentary which was aired on February 19 and 20,2015.Recently the President of Pakistan launched her book on Corruption.

Name: Écrivain-E
Description: Accompagne les femmes qui ont de l'ambition littéraire à prendre confiance en leur rêves et en leur écriture!

Name: Kourt
Description: Kourt is a contemporary aboriginal art and design online store that is proudly owned and operated by a young indigenous woman, Cortney Glass. Our mission is to celebrate the Australian Aboriginal culture through the lens of young Aboriginal Artists. Our designer is a Dagoman, Wardaman and Gurindji woman, raised in Katherine in the Northern Territory, currently residing on the land of Gadigal people of the Eroa Nation. The designs and canvas prints are inspired by her passion for her family and Aboriginal heritage.

Name: Atelier Michelle Moysés
Description:
Michelle Moysés tem 30 anos de experiência no mercado de produção, design de peças e, principalmente, aulas. Ingressamos no mercado de cursos online há 5 anos e hoje somos o maior atelier de aulas de pintura em porcelana vidros do mundo. 
Perfil da artista no Instagram com mais de 390K seguidores reais e engajados.
Média de alcance de 1M de visualizadores diferentes a cada 30 dias.

Name: Watson Gallery
Description: Watson Gallery is a fine art gallery based in Edinburgh, Scotland.

Name: Raconte ta blague !
Description:
Raconte ta blague est un site dédié aux enfants, dont l'unique objectif est de répandre bonne humeur et jeux de mots.

« Parce qu'une blague est bien meilleure quand elle est racontée ! »

Name: CGR MONTAUBAN ESPACE BtoB
Description: Vous recherchez un lieu d’exception capable de répondre à vos attentes en terme de confort, d’accueil, d’originalité et d’adaptabilité : INVESTISSEZ le multiplex CGR de Montauban. Nous mettons à disposition nos 10 salles de cinéma pouvant convenir à des capacités d’accueil de 94 à 430 places ainsi qu’un hall spacieux et un espace cocktail pour les restaurations en petit comité. Le cinéma est situé en périphérie à proximité de la rocade, sortie 60. D'accès facile et rapide, vous disposez de 600 places de stationnement gratuites et de trois restaurants implantés sur le site. Dans notre espace Hall, un traiteur assure les cocktails, les cafés d'accueil, les goûters des Arbres de Noël... Il est également possible d'y installer des stands pour valoriser votre entreprise à travers l’exposition de vos produits ou de votre savoir-faire. Chacune de nos salles propose des équipements techniques et vidéo adaptés. Pour vos séminaires, colloques, assemblées générales et  réunions diverses nous pouvons projeter vos présentations sur grand écran pour un rendu optimal.

Name: Street Art Home
Description:
Partageons le Street Art !
Chez Street Art Home, vous pouvez emprunter des oeuvres de Street Art pour décorer votre bureau ou votre domicile.
Les oeuvres sont toutes originales, encadrées par des professionnels avec une haute exigence de qualité (verre musée, encadrement double verre, cadre bois). 
Nous proposons dans nos collections des oeuvres allant des artistes les plus reconnus sur le marché mondial (Jonone, Shepard Fairey, Mr Chat, Jef Aérosol, L'Atlas) aux meilleurs talents de la région des Hauts de France (Mr Voul, Jigé, Freaks the Fab, ScFreeArt) et en passant par les coups de coeurs de l'association (L'insecte, Nasty, Gee Vaucher).
L'adhésion annuelle pour les entreprises est de 250€. La durée de prêt est de 3 à 4 mois ce qui permet de changer 3 à 4 fois d'oeuvre sur une année.
Notre collection s’agrandit et se renouvelle régulièrement. 
Les services de l'association sont proposés uniquement sur la métropole lilloise.
Consultez nos collections sur notre site internet www.streetarthome.org

Name: Foundation For Cultural Diplomacy UART
Description:
UART is a non-profit organization, created to help art cross borders. In doing so we hope to strengthen the cultural exchange between countries and promote international communication through the language of images, sounds, and forms. The events we organize (such as art exhibitions, installations, conferences, etc) are a proactive way to interaction in the global community with the talents of its contemporary artists and rich traditional past.

We have held "art-events" and galas in Ukraine, France, Belgium, and Italy. To see our work check out the products tab or our page!

Name: Illinois Art Station
Description: Our mission is to provide all children, youth, and their families with transformative learning through hands-on experiences in the visual arts.

Name: European Conservation Center
Description: European Conservation Center (ECC) verzorgt bewaring van erfgoedobjecten in duurzame en hoogwaardige depots. Wij zorgen voor een zo optimaal mogelijke bewaaromgeving voor het behoud van uw objecten. Dit behelst onder meer braak- en brandpreventie, klimaatbeheersing en monitoring, standplaatsbeheer, conditiecontroles en pestmanagement.

Name: American Tapestry Alliance
Description:
The American Tapestry Alliance (ATA) is engaged in a wide range of educational, exhibition, outreach and promotional programs. Our programs serve the goals of our Mission Statement:
 - to promote an awareness of and appreciation for woven tapestries designed and woven by individual artists
 - to encourage and recognize superior quality tapestries
 - to encourage educational opportunities in the field of tapestry
 - to sponsor exhibitions of tapestries
 - to establish a network for tapestry weavers throughout the world
 - to educate the public about the history and techniques involved in tapestry making

Name: Eco Art Gallery
Description:
EcoArt Gallery, as the first joint art gallery of these ten countries " Turkey, Azerbaijan, Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan, Kyrgyzstan,Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, Afghanistan, Pakistan and Iran "
is about to gather all these shattered pieces together  and present the whole picture of the art and cultural commonalities of these historical countries as a big mirror collects and displays a complete mirror and with this cultural method smooths the path of peace and friendship.
Eco Art Gallery has now opened its first branch in Ferdowsi World Trade Center in Tehran and plans to establish other branches in the near future, first in the capitals of ECO member countries and then in some other countries with the goal of focusing on the art of this historical land.

Name: Vanessa Beecroft LLC
Description: Performance Art

Name: Rory Dobner Limited
Description:
A well travelled, international artist who has worked and exhibited in the UK, USA, Australia, Haiti, Hong Kong, and New Zealand before returning to the UK in 2005 and setting up his studio in Hampstead, London. 
Using many different mediums, with a current focus on utilizing brushed stainless steel for paintings, to produce a wide range of original work, he has fulfilled a variety of impressive commissions and completed interior design projects.

Name: Fluidensity
Description:
For artists and art collectors, we offer an online platform to convert the ownership of art into digital tokens. Via these tokens, we introduce a totally new way to collect, trade, and expose art. 

Artists benefit from an increasing potential of collectors. Also, from all future trades, artists get royalties automatically. Collectors benefit from low transaction fees because there is no need for intermediaries. 

By using blockchain technology, we make collecting and trading art secure, transparent, and inclusive.

We are Fluidensity.
In Art We Trust

Name: Dormi Arts
Description:
Dormi Arts: Where Art Meets Solutions

Dormi Arts is your one-stop shop for artistic expression and social impact. We create, promote, and celebrate art in all its forms, using its power to tackle society's challenges and inspire positive change. Join us as we turn art into essential solutions for a better tomorrow. #arts #socialimpact #innovation

Name: Andrea Cobb Art
Description:
Andrea Cobb's artwork is nationally known for its distinct approach to line and color. Her career spans over a decade illustrating for print, digital & web media including packaging, animation, books, corporate & institutional, and advertising. Andrea collaborates closely with clients starting from their inspirations and visions for the project to preliminaries and then final art. 

 Andrea’s fine art work is vector drawings and paintings of portraits, landscapes, flora & fauna. Her prints and products are sold online and directly through her. Commissions are welcome! Andrea is inspired by Vincent van Gogh, Paul Klee, Andy Goldsworthy, metaphysics, anthropology, the 5th dimension, and all things up close & personal.

Andrea is also a citizen scientist, trail runner and advocate.

Name: HUB EXCLUSIVE
Description:
Hub Exclusive is a New York and London based art and design company with a focus on creating new perspectives for the projects; hospitality, corporate, commercial spaces or galleries.

Our international team consists of art and design consultants, artists, curators, designers and architects. All the team has valuable experiences in their fields and mostly international success stories.

Hub Exclusive operates in art centers such as New York and London with an international customer portfolio. We love to create unique experiences for our clients which reflects their back stories to their customers. 


OUR EXPERTISE

Art Consultation
Artisitic Concept Development
Art Creation 
Art Demo Presentations
Artwork Installation

Name: AMcE Creative Arts
Description:
Established in June 2021, AMcE Creative Arts presents fine art exhibitions and cultural programs designed to foster community engagement and inspiration through unique exchanges with contemporary visual artists and makers.

With an emphasis on creating a welcoming and inclusive atmosphere, AMcE’s programming offers rotating art exhibitions, art workshops for adults, kids and families, talks with artists and arts educators, and partnerships with area nonprofit and art organizations.

Name: Quent Cordair Fine Art
Description:
Quent Cordair Fine Art is the world's leading purveyor of the finest Romantic Realist paintings and sculptures serving corporate and private collectors around the world. Images that celebrate life and human achievement are among the gallery's popular collection. Major companies commission the gallery's artists to create art for them that concretizes their values and  tells their story. These images are often used as covers for annual reports as well as in-house communications. The Importance of Art n the Workplace is an interview with one of the gallery's owners, Linda Cordair. http://tinyurl.com/ax9y36u 

Pieces featured in the gallery such as "Self-Made Man" and "Generator" can be found on desks and in offices of successful business people around the world. www.cordair.com

Name: The Stress Less Pencil
Description: Creative prompts for happiness - your weekly guide to using art and creativity to manage the stress and emotional ups and downs of life.  A bit like yoga or meditation, but with crayons

Name: Link Management SARL
Description:
Art Wealth Management - advising private collectors and family offices, and transacting in multi-million works of art (private sales).

LINK Management has set-up, with the banking group Reyl & Cie, Griffin Art Partners, a proprietary securitization fund that provides non-recourse, art-backed loans.

Name: Art Days - Napoli Campania
Description: Art Days - Napoli Campania is the new event that brings together galleries, institutions, independent spaces and players in the contemporary art system to write the present and the future of art. 51 events, 25 galleries, 13 independent spaces, 3 museums, 4 foundations as well as artists associations, curators and collectors in a dialogue of four days spread throughout the region.

Name: KAI LIN ART
Description:
THE GALLERY
KAI LIN ART is a contemporary art gallery cultivating creativity, connection, and conversation through art. Founded in 2008 by Yu-Kai Lin, our gallery is dedicated to promoting emerging and established artists in the Southeast and beyond. The gallery maintains an accelerated exhibition program with new exhibits every six to eight weeks.

Kai Lin Art has been recognized by regional, national, and international publications for being on the cutting edge of art in America. The gallery has been selected as a Top 50 Cultural Destination in Atlanta by internationally renowned Wallpaper*Magazine and voted Best Gallery by Creative Loafing, Jezebel Magazine, Fenuxe Magazine, Georgia Voice, and Haute Living.

Kai Lin Art is located in the booming Westside Arts District of Midtown Atlanta.

For more information, please visit www.kailinart.com / 404 408 4248 / info@kailinart.com

Name: Dirección Musical de Sonido/ISA-Cuba
Description:
El Departamento de Dirección Musical de Sonido de la Facultad de Música de la Universidad de las Artes, ISA, fue fundado en el año 1990 con el propósito de formar a los profesionales del sonido del país. Importantes figuras de este ámbito profesional han formado parte del claustro, el que, a lo largo de los años se ha nutrido de egresados con destacada trayectoria. 
Desde su fundación, la carrera se ha concebido bajo el principio de que el sonido es un arte y su hacedor es un co-creador del producto artístico, sea fonograma, sonido en vivo, restauración; quien participa como miembro del equipo en las decisiones técnico-artísticas que dan sentido y coherencia al concepto estético y artístico de la obra.
Como parte del concepto de formación se articulan saberes artístico-musicales y humanísticos que sirven de soporte culturológico, con otros que son más específicos del ejercicio profesional, tales como el dominio y comprensión de equipamiento, recursos y soportes para el desarrollo de los diferentes procesos, entendiendo que el dominio técnico es un recurso expresivo en manos del artista de esta especialidad.  Se estimula el desarrollo de habilidades de investigación para la creación que busque asentar como estilo de trabajo la actualización permanente de la tecnología disponible para ejercer la profesión, el estudio de referentes sonoros y musicales, la exploración y experimentación en función de la búsqueda de la sonoridad deseada.
Todo esto se articula en la práctica a partir de la búsqueda permanente de la relación teoría-práctica, desde la vinculación de los estudiantes a los proyectos artísticos que desarrollan sus maestros y desde la realización de trabajos de clase en los que apliquen y sistematicen las habilidades profesionales que se persiguen.
A lo largo de estos años  se han formado alrededor de 70 profesionales del sonido, muchos de los cuales han tenido carreras muy destacadas y reconocidas en los más importantes espacios profesionales de Cuba y el mundo

Name: Escuela de Arte Dionisio Ortiz EADO
Description:
Centro público dependiente de la Junta de Andalucía donde se imparte formación en Ciclos Formativos de Grado Medio y Superior de Serigrafía, Encuadernación, Orfebrería, Platería, Cómic, Cerámica, Moldes y Reproducciones, Escultura y Ebanistería. 
Además, contamos con un Bachillerato especializado en Artes.

Name: Corvin Rajziskola
Description: A Corvin Rajziskola 1994 őszétől organikusan fejlődő, az aktuális piaci igényekhez, szakmai elvárásokhoz igazodó, képzőművészet és design oktatásán alapuló művészeti bázis, ahol mindenki megtalálhatja a saját érdeklődésének megfelelő képzést vagy kurzust. Az iskola fő profilja a vizuális művészetek oktatása. A diákok itt lehetőséget kapnak arra, hogy kibővítsék művészi készségeiket és megértsék a design világát. Az iskolában dolgozó oktatók és művészek magas szintű szakértelemmel rendelkeznek, és segítik a diákokat a kreativitásuk kibontakoztatásában. Az iskola szoros kapcsolatot tart a művészeti közösséggel és gyakran szervez kiállításokat és más eseményeket, amelyeken a diákok bemutathatják munkáikat és kapcsolatokat építhetnek a piaci szereplőkkel. A Corvin Rajziskola híres az itt tanuló diákok sikereiről - a végzett hallgatók gyakran válnak elismert alkotókká, sokan vesznek részt nemzetközi projektekben is.

Name: Patrick Heide Contemporary Art
Description:
Patrick Heide Contemporary Art fosters an international range of emerging and mid-career artists as well as a selection of graduates and young artists listed in its so-called “Breeder” section of the website.

Though reaching out into areas such as conceptual and digital art, the core program of the gallery dedicates much of its attention to drawing and works on paper, a medium the founder Patrick Heide has been passionate about since the beginning.
The gallery program is partly evaluating modernist or post-war movements in that medium but is always taking it to new and challenging levels. The range goes from the systematic drawing series by Isabel Albrecht and the process based experimental drawings of Thomas Mueller to the alienating Photocopy Drawings of Alex Hamilton and the movement based light installations and objects by Hans Kotter.

In an attempt to reveal the underlying patterns of human society, the gallery program hopes to reveal artistic patterns and present art that provides a sensually and intellectually challenging, socially relevant, technically accomplished and spiritually charged rather timeless alternative to an art world that is often aimlessly theoretical, introspective and addicted to money, marketing and fashion.

Patrick Heide Contemporary Art hopes to give prominence to artistic statements concerned about the condition of the mind, nature and human nature, its urbanisation, history and transformation.

Name: Galeria Miejska Arsenał
Description:
Galeria Miejska Arsenał jest samorządową instytucją kultury, której organizatorem jest Urząd Miasta Poznania. Organizujemy wystawy, wydarzenia, prowadzimy działalność wydawniczą, rozwijamy program edukacyjny oraz kontynuujemy zakupy do kolekcji galerii. Jako instytucja publiczna interesujemy się kontekstami politycznymi, społecznymi i ekologicznymi, w których jesteśmy usytuowani.

Naszym celem jest tworzenie miejsca, w którym możliwa jest debata na każdy temat. Używając sztuki jako argumentu, zabieramy głos w aktualnych dyskursach oraz wskazujemy na nowe, jeszcze niewyartykułowane sposoby uczestnictwa w świecie — świecie, który współkształtujemy i za który bierzemy odpowiedzialność.

Galeria jest miejscem wspólnym. To razem z odbiorcami wypracowywany jest charakter instytucji, która pragnie być nie tyle krytyczną, co afektywną, wrażliwą na głosy i impulsy płynące spoza jej własnego uniwersum, otwartą na to, co wymyka się logice antropocenu.

Name: Cultural Institute CircoLar
Description:
The Institute promotes the exchange of knowledge and skills, valuing the individuality and artistic potential of each participant, while encouraging the training of new artists and the continuous development of professional artists.

Our activities include professional training in circus arts, as well as recreational options and the production of circus events for the general public.

CIC (Cultural Institute CircoLar) is a non-profit organization committed to arts, education and social action, generating employment opportunities and facilitating significant sociocultural projects in the community.

Name: Zurhy
Description: Perfectly complements an office, living room, bedroom, bathroom, or dining room environment. The art prints are designed for bringing a fresh and peaceful look to your place.

Name: Genesis NITK
Description:
We're a team of individuals passionate about all forms of dance. The styles we portray are - Hip-Hop, Contemporary, Classical like Bharatnatyam and Kathak and Bollywood.
Check out our Instagram page to view our routines.
DM for collaborations!

Name: Pandora Escola de Arte
Description:
Cursos de Desenho e artes visuais. Do Básico ao Avançado.
Mais de 25 anos de tradição, método exclusivo, os melhores professores e uma estrutura sem igual na Região!

Name: A. Aardewerk Dutch Silver and Antique Jewels
Description:
A. Aardewerk Antiquair Juwelier is a family-owned company specializing in superb quality antique Dutch silver dating from the sixteenth century onwards. The firm also deals in fine antique and period jewellery.

With its traditions firmly rooted in the city of The Hague, the firm’s history goes back to the turn of the twentieth century when Abraham’s grandfather started his own antiques shop on the Paviljoensgracht. Abraham’s parents later established their firm in the Lange Poten. In November 1970 Abraham Aardewerk and his wife Magdie opened the current showrooms in Jan van Nassaustraat in The Hague. 
Emiel and Esther, who were raised with antiques, joined their father in the business in 1995. They are the fourth generation of antiques experts in the family. 

Emiel Aardewerk and Esther Aardewerk are the directors of the company. They are both experts in the Dutch television programme Tussen Kunst & Kitsch. 

A. Aardewerk exhibits at TEFAF Maastricht and PAN Amsterdam. The company is a member of The Royal Association of Fine Art Dealers in the Netherlands (Koninklijke Vereeniging van Handelaren in Oude Kunst) and of CINOA (Confédération Internationale des Négociants en Oeuvres d’Art)..

Name: A Casa de Oficinas
Description: Escola de oficinas e cursos livres em BH

Name: Atelier Sarah AlSenaani
Description: Home for Elegant Minds

Name: RICHARD WINTERTON AUCTIONEERS LIMITED
Description:
The Winterton family name has been synonymous with auctioneering in Staffordshire for seven generations since 1864.
From our early beginnings in the Smithfield livestock market in Lichfield, we have evolved and expanded whilst staying true to our family-run ethos.
Today, the company is run by Richard and Janet Winterton from The Lichfield Auction Centre and handles regular general, specialist and fine art auctions together with bespoke house clearance, probate and valuation services.
Our meticulously-catalogued sales deal in anything from jewellery, watches and furniture to specialist items such as coins, medals, vintage toys, rare whisky and vehicles.
More than 3,000 bidders from all over the world took part in our first online-only Fine Arts Sale and subsequent auctions have achieved record-breaking selling rates.
Our comprehensive, bespoke clearance service for entire estates of all types and sizes is managed equally meticulously.
Whether you are an executor clearing a deceased estate, investigating downsizing options, administering probate, emigrating or just tired of clutter, our reliable and sympathetic team can help.
We are also delighted to be The National Association of Jewellers’ newest approved member for all auction requirements.

Name: Liss Gallery
Description:
Established in 1983, Liss Gallery is located in the heart of Toronto and is a leader in the promotion of Canadian and International art. The gallery features contemporary fine art including original paintings, photography, sculptures and limited edition prints.

We represent renowned artists and photographers such as Todd White, Bernie Taupin, Ronnie Wood, Bob Gruen, Harry Benson, Billy Dee Williams as well as local and up and coming artists such as Sim Posen, Johnathan Ball and many more.

The Liss Gallery is equipped with a custom frame shop offering a large selection of the highest quality frames as well as expert Residential, Hospitality and Corporate design consulting. We have packed and shipped fine art to cities across the world including; Dallas, Manhattan, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, and Havana to name a few. Included with our local delivery service is expert art installation to ensure complete satisfaction for all your art needs.

Name: The Sculpture Park
Description:
The Sculpture Park is the world’s largest all year sculpture exhibition 
with 300 sculptors showcasing 650 sculptures.
Almost everything is for sale and as a result the exhibits are forever changing so there is always something new to discover.

Name: Kline Academy of Fine Art
Description: Teaching artists the art of historical foundation painting.

Name: KOSHUMAS TRAINING INSTITUTE
Description: Koshumas Training Institute (KTI) is a pioneering music education brand committed to raising musical talents from an early age. With multiple successful branches across Tanzania, Zambia and Rwanda, KTI blends professional instruction with character development, using music as a tool for empowerment, creativity, and social change.

Name: Eden Mohila College - ইডেন মহিলা কলেজ
Description:
Eden Girls' College originated from a school for Brahmo girls established by Shubha Sadhini Sabha (a philanthropic society) in Dhaka in 1873. Initially, the classes of the school were conducted in a private house at Farashganj. In 1878, the school was merged with another private girls' school to form Dhaka Female School. The same year the school administration took the initiative to bring it under government management and proposed it be called Eden Girls' School after the Lieutenant Governor Sir Ashley Eden. Given its new status, it started functioning at a new location at Laxmibazar.

Eden was the first government girls' school in Bengal. In 1896-97, it had 130 students. It was recognized by the government as an 'excellent high school' of the provinces of Eastern Bengal and Assam. When the school building was damaged in the earthquake of 1897, it was temporarily shifted to a private house. Sometime later, it was again shifted to one of the big business houses of Portuguese merchants at sadarghat. Intermediate classes (grades 11 and 12) were introduced in the school in 1926. Since then it got the name of Eden Girls' High School and Intermediate College. A.K. Fazlul Huq (Sher-e-Bangla) in his capacity as the Education Minister shifted the school to a new building on Abdul Ghani Road, later known as Eden Building. In 1947, the government decided to establish its Provincial Secretariat in this building and the college got a new temporary address in a part of Curzon Hall. Frequent shifting put the college into an uncertain situation and with an intention to merge with Quamrunnesa School and College, it shifted to the premises of the latter. In 1958, the college sections of these two institutions merged and formed Eden Girls' College. The new college was located at Bakshibazar. The school sections of the two colleges were merged to form Quamrunnesa School at Tikatuli. Campus and Facility The current campus of Eden College were developed in 1962.

Name: ifa gallery
Description:
ifa gallery exhibits contemporary art from China and Beyond, regardless of artists origin. We represent both established artists such as Dai Guangyu, a leading figure of China’s avant-garde, the Gao Brothers and Wu Junyong; as well as emerging artists, including recent graduates of the fine arts schools in Beijing and Hangzhou such as Fan Jiupeng and Li Rui, or foreigners based in China, such as Zane Mellupe from Latvia or Christophe Demaître from Belgium. ifa features work in a wide range of media formats, from painting to photography, video, installation and performance.

ifa gallery has been established in 2006 in Shanghai (M50, then Jing'An district) exhibiting some emerging and established artists in China.
In fall 2013, ifa gallery opens in Brussels.

Name: School of Miniature Painting
Description: An educational platform to voice and launch ideas, study material, research and courses on miniature painting and arts of the book.

Name: gallery neptune & brown
Description:
gallery neptune & brown is Washington DC’s premier gallery for modern & contemporary art. In addition to a full schedule of exhibitions, Chris Neptune and Robert Brown offer a wide range of curatorial and consulting services based upon years of experience and long professional relationships with artists, auction houses, galleries, private collectors, and museum staff. 

gallery neptune & brown opened in Logan Circle in July 2015, bringing together the expertise of longtime gallerists Christine Neptune and Robert Brown. Robert Brown opened Robert Brown Gallery in 1978 in New York City and moved to Washington, D.C. in 1981. The gallery's exhibition program has included local and national, but primarily international artists. Most of these artists carry extensive biographies and can be found in private and public collections worldwide. Robert Brown is a member of the International Fine Print Dealers Association and the Appraisers Association of America.

Christine Neptune founded Neptune Fine Art in New York City in 2000 after twenty years of experience in auction houses, museums, fine art publishing, and galleries to exhibit Modern and contemporary works as well as publish new editions. To date, Neptune Fine Art has collaborated with established artists including Jennifer Bartlett, Vija Celmins, Wolf Kahn, Stone Roberts, James Siena, David Row, Mickalene Thomas and Jenny Holzer. Neptune Fine Art has placed editions in The National Gallery of Art, Washington, DC; The Smithsonian’s National Portrait Gallery, The Museum of Fine Arts, Boston, The Baltimore Museum of Art, The Haggerty Museum, and The Sheldon Museum of Art, among others. She has lectured on collecting works on paper, hosted print-making demonstrations, supported printmaking institutions, and is a valued member of the IFPDA.

Name: Tutela Capital
Description:
Tutela Capital is a company dedicated to producing analytical tools and investment strategies in the art market for its clients by deploying unique mathematical and statistical methods.

We serve art professionals and financial companies from all over the world. From developing mathematical models to deploying winning investment strategies, Tutela Capital assists and protects its clients. In every business relationships.

 Tutela Capital can be trusted. We lead innovation in alternative assets management.

We do it for our business, for our clients, for the future of the art market.

Name: Organisation WECAN
Description:
WECAN est un organisme à but non lucratif qui se veut un lieu d’échange et de créativité pour faire croître ces membres afrodescendant à travers l’art, la culture, l’entrepreneuriat et le brassage d’idées qui sortent des sentiers battus.

Sa mission principale est de créer des leviers de développement inclusif et efficace aux retombées sociales puissantes et durables au sein de la communauté des affaires et artistiques.

WECAN voit la diversité des individus comme une richesse. L'organisme se différencie par son approche humaine afin de susciter la créativité et l’épanouissement des entrepreneurs et des artistes afrodescendants. WECAN veut concrétiser le plus de projets possible selon la vision souhaitée des entrepreneurs et artistes. L’organisme promeut un accès équitable et durable à tous les leviers de la société afin de contrer les enjeux actuels et briser les barrières systémiques.

Name: Baton Rouge Music Studios
Description: Since 2006, we have positively impacted thousands of students. We continue to be at the forefront of using music education as a medium through which to build community, increase confidence and self-esteem in individuals, and provide an empowering creative space for people from all walks of life.

Name: Crated
Description:
Welcome to Crated!

Crated is the place to sell, discover and buy amazing artwork. 

For an artist or photographer looking for a place to sell their photographs and digital artwork to millions of art lovers, sign up now to be notified when we officially launch.

Name: Proyecto Médula
Description:
Proyecto Médula es una productora que nuclea a artistas visuales, curadores, realizadores audiovisuales y gestores culturales. Nos especializamos en muralismo y en el diseño integral de proyectos site-specific. 

Nuestras obras de arte ponen en valor el patrimonio cultural interviniendo y transformando espacios clave, a la vez que consolidan el sentimiento de identidad y pertenencia de cada comunidad. De esta manera, no solo conseguimos atraer y renovar al público, sino que, además, contribuimos con la comunicación y el branding de nuestros clientes, ya sean empresas privadas u organismos gubernamentales, y los activamos comercialmente.

Como actores del campo cultural, entendemos la importancia de resignificar el espacio público y apostamos a la descentralización del arte. Es por esto que, apoyados en lenguajes contemporáneos, nuestra propuesta está pensada de forma integral para potenciar la producción artística de forma democrática y federal en todo el territorio nacional. 

Nuestros servicios cubren un espectro que va desde la intervención artística de sitios específicos hasta el dictado de seminarios de capacitación para artistas locales, además de brindar asesoramiento a gestores regionales.

Name: Galleria d'arte l'Incontro
Description:
La Galleria d'arte moderna e contemporanea L'incontro viene inaugurata nel 1974 come espressione della forte passione artistica che accomuna Antonietta Bettini e la figlia Erminia Colossi.

La scelta del nome della Galleria non è un caso; al contrario essa allude all'obbiettivo principe: favorire un reciproco scambio tra artisti e collezionisti attraverso l'organizzazione di prestigiose mostre personali con la presenza dei maggiori Maestri del tempo.


Nel 1997, in seguito al ritiro della madre, Erminia Colossi assume formalmente il ruolo di Direttrice, anche se già da molti anni le scelte artistiche e non solo erano di sua competenza.

Per festeggiare il trentesimo anniversario della Galleria, nel 2004 vede la luce un nuovo spazio espositivo, più ampio e più prestigioso, situato a pochi metri dalla vecchia sede al piano terra di un elegante palazzo del primo Novecento.

L'intraprendenza della Direttrice porta, in seguito, all'acquisto di un appartamento all'ultimo piano del medesimo edificio e alla trasformazione dello stesso in una Home-Gallery. Come suggerisce il nome in tale luogo è possibile ammirare le opere più pregiate nella loro collocazione ideale: l'ambiente domestico. La particolarità della Home-Gallery è di poter dare ospitalità ai collezionisti e agli artisti in cerca d'ispirazione, dal momento che conserva i comforts di una vera abitazione.

Vanto riconosciuto della Galleria è quello di offrire non solo opere d'arte di livello internazionale uniche nel loro genere, ma anche un sicuro investimento per il futuro.

Name: Himpunan Mahasiswa Seni Rupa UPI
Description: HIMASRA, Himpunan mahasiswa seni rupa, merupakan Organisasi berkecimpung di lingkungan senirupa yang bertempatan di Kampus Universitas Pendidikan Seni Rupa Indonesia Bandung. Dengan harapan menciptakan generasi baru lalu kelestarian senirupa indonesia, Himasra memiliki ambil adil lebih dalam meningkatkan kemampuan dan kualitas berkarya para mahasiswanya. didirikan pada tahun 1961 berbarengan dengan diciptapkannya Prodi Pendidikan Seni Rupa Upi. Memiliki Motto yaitu Salam Himasra !! Himasra ! Himasra !! Himasra !!!

Name: ARTelier C
Description:
Artelier C, an initiative of Belgian lighting specialist Claeys Verlichting, is a unique concept globally, offering a platform for talented artists seeking to turn their hand to decorative lighting. A brand born for artists who put their heart and soul into creating unique, hand-made lighting fixtures in all possible shapes, sizes and materials. 

Belgian artist SEBASTIAAN VANDEPUTTE is the Big Bang pioneer of the Artelier C platform. We provide the ideal environment for these creatives and giving them the freedom to focus on their craft. 

CEO, TOM CLAEYS who has more than thirty years of experience in exclusive lighting invites you to visit our website to imagine, desire and dream with us the perfect chandelier. You dream it, we create it. 

WELCOME! 

Artelier C 
Tom Claeys 

Avelgem - Belgium

Name: Riba Rocks - creative eco-residency
Description:
At Riba Rocks, we believe in the richness of cultural exchange and artistic exploration.

Our residencies/placements provide a unique opportunity for students, graduates and artists to immerse themselves in a world of resourceful creativity, sustainability, and community. 

We offer a multidisciplinary journey into the world of art, culture, and sustainability with a focus on resillience and low-impact creative practice. 

You’ll have the chance to work with artists including Sarah Misselbrook and Roser Gay, to experience new sustainable techniques and processes, and to create your own artwork with time dedicated to your creative practice. 

Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture of Riba-roja d’Ebre. You’ll join us to celebrate local traditions and fiestas, interact with the community, and explore heritage sites including Flix Castle, the 'marvellous' caves of Benifallet and the Poble Vell (Old Town) of Cobera d'Ebre. 

Experience the beauty of the natural world - our programme includes a visit to the Sebes Nature Reserve in Flix as well as volunteering activities with the Grup de Natura Freixe association which includes bat shelter construction, tree planting and lagoon clearing. All this plus hikes in the mountains and opportunities to engage deeply with the local natural environment.

Sustainability is at the heart of our residencies. You'll learn more about low water consumption, low impact living and art practice, zero waste, and other eco-conscious practices as you create art inspired by the environment. 

You can also work towards creating photography, murals, sculptures and other artworks that could become part of the vibrant street art scene in the local village of Riba-roja d’Ebre.

Name: Pinta Art London
Description:
Pinta, Showcasing the best Modern and Contemporary Art from Latin America, Spain and Portugal.

Pinta London is the only art event dedicated to Latin American Art providing a unique platform in Europe to exhibit and promote Latin American artists. Pinta also includes artists from Spain and Portugal reflecting these countries' undeniable influence in the formation of the Latin American identity.

4-7 JUNE | 2013
London, United Kingdom

Name: arts + business partners LLC
Description:
Founded in 1999 Arts + Business Partners (ABP) is an advising boutique specializing in two areas: fine art photography and corporate sponsorship.

Backed by Zimet’s nearly 40-years’ experience in both fields, ABP offers unique workshops and 1-2-1 advising for collectors, photographers, corporate sponsors and non-profits. ABP provides object-based, interactive learning — ranging from behind-the-scene visits, assignments when visiting a gallery or asking photographers to present an ‘elevator speech’ in front of their peers.
    
Roughly 1,000 collectors, photographers, museum trustees (and their children), members of museum acquisition and exhibition committees, gallery owners, private art advisors and art appraisers have cycled through our workshops and/or engaged our advising services.

ABP works with well-known businesses to start-ups, form the world’s most prominent cultural institutions to those just beginning. Our reach spans 14 countries, 30 U.S. cities and 15 American Embassies.

Name: Liwan Art Gallery
Description: Liwan Gallery is considered the only art gallery in Egypt that specializes in oriental artwork. The gallery was founded in 2018 by Mostafa Ezz El-Din, an art dealer who started his journey as an art collector back in the 80s. Regardless of his specialization in the orientalists’ era and artwork, Ezz El-Din wanted the gallery to be a platform for a variety of genres; from contemporary all the way to oriental. The gallery’s mission is to shed light on some of the most important artists and artworks found locally and internationally through holding exhibitions that have a different and refreshing feel. That diverse blend of the past and present has allowed Liwan Gallery to hold exhibitions for both pioneering and renowned artists from older eras as well as our present time through using different creative concepts. The gallery also presents consulting and painting-display services to art lovers who are seeking to buy unique pieces for their homes.

Name: Les écrits du lundi
Description:
Si vous songez à vos heures perdues, à (re)prendre la plume et laisser couler votre imaginaire sur le papier blanc, cet atelier sera peut-être l’occasion de passer à l’action.

"Les écrits du lundi" est un rendez-vous créatif et récréatif autour des mots, tout au long de l’année. En y participant, vous forgerez peu à peu votre style, explorerez votre sensibilité artistique et apprendrez à dompter les consignes les plus improbables...
Sans y prendre garde et sans enjeu, vous affûterez votre plume et progresserez en expression écrite.

Au programme : de l’encre (beaucoup), de la sueur (un peu) et des larmes (de rire surtout) !

Cet atelier se tient en visioconférence. Vous écrirez donc depuis chez vous (il faudra trouver un petit coin tranquille).

Si cette activité est susceptible de vous intéresser, parlons-en par messagerie

Name: Le Tamanoir asbl, CEC
Description: Le Tamanoir asbl a pour objectif le développement de la médiation culturelle, de la créativité et de l'imaginaire à un public le plus large possible dans le but de penser et créer une société en transition. Pour ce faire, nous organisons des ateliers, des stages, des ateliers scolaires, des visites guidées, des parascolaires, des conférences et toutes activités qui permettent de développer notre objet social.

Name: MT ART Services
Description: MT ART Services is a Luxembourgish fine art shipping company based at the airport of Luxembourg since 2001. We provide a range of airport services dedicated to all your fine art and antique shipments by air, through Luxembourg. Throughout the years and thanks to the excellent relationship with the major airlines, international fine art agents, local and worldwide Museums, collectors and art institutions, MT ART Services became a major player in the world of international fine art shipping. Our aim for professionalism, our flexibility, our careful staff as well as the good relations with our partners allowed us to maintain our high level of quality, well appreciated by our clients.

Name: Carré d'artistes México
Description:
EL CONCEPTO FRANCÉS que transforma las reglas internacionales de venta de arte contemporáneo, ahora en México.
,El arte no puede ser reservado para las personas privilegiadas, el privilegia a todos..." Andy Warhol
Porque el arte contemporáneo no puede ser reservado para una elite. Carré d’artistes constituye una alternativa real sobre el mercado del arte. Para Carré d’artistes hacer accesible el arte es ofrecer obras de calidad a precios asequibles. Comprar una obra de arte en las galerías de Carré d’artistes es participar en el proyecto de democratización del arte contemporáneo.
Una formato - Un precio, desde $3,200 pesos  hasta $99,700 pesos obras unicas y originales.
Porque el arte es una fuente de emoción, las galerías Carré d'artistes hacen de cada visita una experiencia memorable. La renovación periódica de exposiciones y eventos artísticos a la espera de ser descubierto. Carré Artistes elimina cualquier intermediario entre el aficionado y la obra de arte.
Carré d'artistes apoya los artistas y la creación 
Carré d’artistes exhibe de forma permanente 600 pintores de todo el mundo (Francia, EE.UU., España, Países Bajos, Italia, China, Reino Unido, Mexico, Cuba, Argentina, Chile ...). Las 40 galerías de arte internacionales Carré artistes  y la galería de arte en línea, también ofrecen una exposición de artistas contemporáneos de todo el mundo. Todas las obras de arte que se ofrecen son únicas, auténticas y certificadas.
Carré d’artistes mantiene una relación estrecha y de largo plazo con los artistas. De todos los sectores, los artistas son considerados sin discriminación de estilo o técnica y reflejan la diversidad de la creación contemporánea. Nuevos artistas incorporan cada mes las galerías Carré d’artistes.

Name: Yaqona Koneksen Sunset
Description:
Creer en 2015 l'association Yaqona Koneksen Sunset est un espace de dialogue et d'échange librement inspiré des façons de dialogué dans le Pacifique. Chacune de nos sessions de discussion se caractérise par un thème et un invité ou " spécial guest". Depuis 2015 il existe un protocole de discussion afin de favoriser le dialogue de tous.
Voici les principaux temps fort:
1. Bula : acceuil de l'invité par le Président
2. Levu openning: Ouverture de la session
3. Nyi TREPEN: cadrage de la soirée et présentation des participants
4. Wantok : temps de parole du special guest
5. Soli: contribution financiere libre des participants
6. Pun : cloture de la session

Name: Galería Coronel Arroyo
Description:
Somos una Galería de arte que nació en el año 2015.
Siendo nietos de Pedro Coronel, buscamos asesorar y crear una grata experiencia con nuestros clientes al momento de adquirir una obra de arte.

Name: StreetArt.com
Description: Selection of finest productions influenced by street art & graffiti writing aesthetics. Dealing with art galleries, luxury brands it distributes and produces collectibles in the fields of fashion, contemporary art, interior, public and product design.

Name: Conservatorio Profesional de Música de Ávila
Description:
El Conservatorio Profesional de Música "Tomás Luis de Victoria" de Ávila es un centro educativo situado en la capital de la provincia homónima que imparte Enseñanzas Elementales y Enseñanzas Profesionales de Música. 

El germen del actual Centro fue la Fundación Municipal que se constituyó en 1975 como Conservatorio Elemental. En 1985 pasó a depender del Ministerio de Educación. Su denominación actual y categoría de Conservatorio Profesional le fue otorgada en el Real Decreto 559/1999 de 26 de Marzo (BOE de 9 de Abril de 1999). En el año 2000, en virtud de la transferencia de las competencias educativas a la Comunidad de Castilla y León, pasó a depender definitivamente de la Consejería de Educación de la Junta de Castilla y León. 

Desde su fundación ha estado ubicado en tres edificios de la capital. Actualmente, y desde Enero de 2009, el Conservatorio está situado en las nuevas instalaciones que el arquitecto vallisoletano Primitivo González ha ideado para él. Un edificio amplio, luminoso, moderno y funcional, totalmente accesible, con un cuidado estudio acústico de los espacios y dotado de los más avanzados sistemas informáticos y de gestión, lo que le convierten en un centro destacado dentro del panorama educativo musical español.

Name: FC_BioIllustration
Description:
Desenvolvimento de conteúdos na area da biologia, artes e design

A Natureza materializada em cor  e risco  pela arte e saber dos ilustradores. Do sonho e técnica surgem obras únicas que fascinam e encantam

Name: Mikael B Inc.
Description:
For all inquires please email dc@Mikael-b.com

A Scandinavian heritage and unorthodox approach defines the abstract work of Mikael B. In his eyes, everything is possible, and looking at his art – we couldn’t agree more. LA-based artist Mikael B manages to transform impressions and experiences into an abstract design language that exudes energy and joy as he creates his conceptual works of art with spray and acrylic. As an urban contemporary artist, Mikael B has developed his own identity and special signature deeply rooted in his early years as a graffiti artist and graphic designer.

From the start, Mikael sought to depart from the traditional ways; he has his own, unmistakable style, which he is eager to share with the outside world. His life unfolds on the basis of awareness, being present, and living in the now.

His works are attractive and open to interpretation. It is art that we step into and experience with our entire body. A universe where everything can happen - a mindset that also permeates Mikael B’s life. He juxtaposes and challenges art historical references from Baroque to Cubism and Abstract Expressionism, expressed in utterly contemporary fashion with spray paint and acrylic.

Mikael rapidly made a name for himself when he created his abstract interpretation of a world map that went viral. It was followed by three extensive sold-out solo shows. He recently blew the Danish
art scene away with his 11,000 sqft solo show “Never Tomorrow”. With more than 8,000 guests Mikael broke records and created what’s considered to be the biggest solo show in Danish history.

His renowned work has been on view around the world, including LA, New York, Miami, Germany, Spain – and of course his home country Denmark.

Through his explosive climb to fame, international brands such as Mercedes Benz, Chase, LinkedIn, Google, Nike, and American Express have been lining up to take part in his visual universe.

Name: Gallery133
Description:
Gallery 133 has been operating since 1991 and is an expansive 5,00 square foot gallery dedicated to exhibiting the works of Canadian and International Artists in a welcoming environment allowing visitors to fully engage in the Gallery experience.
The Gallery showcases an eclectic group of artists featuring works on canvas, original works on paper, photography, sculpture, and glass. Artists range from emerging to established, who are held in both private and public collections. The constant rotation of work within the Gallery renews every visit and brings vitality to the space that is unique to Gallery 133.

Name: RAZ Land
Description:
RAZ Land is an innovative cultural arts program dedicated to empowering children and families through hands-on creativity, storytelling, and global cultural exploration. We believe that art is a universal language - and when paired with narrative and cultural connection, it becomes a powerful tool for education, empathy, and personal transformation.

Our programs are designed to nurture creativity, build confidence, and inspire a deeper understanding of the world. Through our proprietary RAZ Method, we integrate storytelling with visual arts in a way that’s developmentally meaningful, emotionally enriching, and accessible to all learners. From seasonal camps and after-school programs to open studio sessions and community workshops, we offer immersive experiences that spark imagination and build real-world skills.

Key Offerings:

- Art & storytelling-based camps (summer, winter, spring, single-day)
- After-school classes and weekend workshops
- Open Studio access for independent creative exploration
- Custom-themed birthday events and celebrations
- School & community partnerships
- Original books, media, and cultural content

RAZ Land stands apart by placing cultural wisdom and creativity at the center of education. Our approach helps participants turn vulnerabilities into strengths, build emotional intelligence, and become active contributors to a more compassionate and connected world.

We don’t just teach art - we foster creators, thinkers, and change makers.

Name: Josh Hailey Studio
Description: Art is a joyful process for us, and we want to spread that joy with everything we do. So we always share our work in ways that are as inviting and accessible to as many people as possible, because we believe that art has the power to generate positivity in everyone who experiences it.

Name: Jane Lombard Gallery
Description:
Since its founding in 1995, Jane Lombard Gallery has established itself as a distinguished venue for contemporary art in New York City. Originally launched as Lombard Freid Projects in SoHo, the gallery quickly became known for its forward-thinking approach, showcasing artists whose work resonates with the pressing cultural, social, and political issues of our time.

Over nearly three decades, Jane Lombard Gallery has cultivated a reputation for its rigorous, scholarly approach to curating a diverse and international roster of artists. These artists, working across a wide array of media—including painting, sculpture, photography, installation, and film—are united by their commitment to challenging and expanding the boundaries of artistic and socio-political discourse. The gallery’s program is defined by its global perspective, consistently foregrounding work that speaks to the complexities and nuances of contemporary life across cultures.

Throughout its history, the gallery has played a pivotal role in the international art scene, forging collaborations with leading museums, institutions, and biennials worldwide. These partnerships have resulted in groundbreaking exhibitions and projects that have both broadened and deepened the gallery's influence on the global stage. Highlights include landmark exhibitions such as Lee Kit Hold your breath, dance slowly at The Walker Art Center (2016); a survey show of works by Michael Rakowitz which traveled from Whitechapel Gallery to Castello di Rivoli Museo d’Arte Contemporanea (2019); Dan Perjovschi’s installation at Documenta 15 (2022); LuYang’s presentation at the 59th Venice Biennale (2022); and Lee Mingwei Rituals of Care at the De Young Museum (2024) among others, which have solidified the gallery's position as a leader in contemporary art.

Name: Artok Gallery
Description: Artok Gallery was born in 2012 with the intention to understand the art, culture, and identity of Latin American artists. We are a team of art lovers dedicated to the promotion of multiple ways of thinking, customs, traditions, and values of the cultures that our artists represent. After establishing ourselves in Colombia, Mexico, and Spain, we’ve expanded to The Netherlands in 2018, where we aim to contribute to the cultural and artistic development of Europe. Our goal is to empower and include artistic diversity in our work while recognizing the expectations of artists and collectors. The team of Artok Gallery wants to strengthen the cultural scene of the cities and create a network with different entities, companies, and groups that allow boosting the talent of the Dutch artists. Our vision to 2025 is to be integrated to the artistic community of the main cities of The Netherlands, Belgium, and Germany, in order to be one of the main cultural forces of Latin America and Europe.

Name: Metalwerx Studio & School
Description:
Metalwerx is an innovative school and community studio for jewelry making and metal arts, located in Waltham, Massachusetts. We are dedicated to providing a welcoming, creative, and well equipped environment where outstanding instructors, inquisitive students, and dedicated practitioners can inspire each other in the pursuit of jewelry and metalworking skills.

Our classes and workshops are cutting edge and varied, with offerings tailored to every skill level. We offer onsite and virtual classes, workshops, and events year-round. 

Metalwerx is also home to twenty-two full and part time Studiomates - a group of passionate amateurs, bench jewelers, and professionals - who form a vibrant and active community. Members of the Metalwerx community work as teacher’s assistants and school ambassadors, ensuring that every experience is productive and memorable.

Name: Veillons jusqu'à l'Aube
Description:
NOTRE AMBITION

Créer, éditer et promouvoir des œuvres culturelles (BD, jeux) et des événements originaux, dans un cadre solidaire et éthique, et à destination des lecteurs, des joueurs, et des entreprises désireuses de vivre des aventures sans limite ! 

NOS ACTIVITÉS 

Le besoin de s’évader, de rêver, ensemble, de créer ou recréer du lien entre les individus, au sein des entreprises comme des familles, nous anime, et nous a amené à développer 5 branches : 
 - Prestations en entreprise,
 - édition,
 - boutique de produits dérivés, 
 - salle de jeu, 
 - médiation culturelle.

Le développement d’univers et leur exploitation au travers de ses branches constitue l’innovation qui nous permettra de remplir la principale mission sociale que nous nous sommes fixées : améliorer la reconnaissance et la rémunération des artistes-auteurs.

Name: BAM Art Advisory
Description: Contemporary art advisory business

Name: ART & PICTURES DESIGN
Description:

Name: UITSTALLING Art Gallery
Description: ‘Uitstalling Art Gallery’ is a leading art gallery dealing in a distinctive combination of painting, drawing and sculpture art. We are specialised in (South)-African contemporary art in combination with local Belgian artists. The location for ‘Uitstalling’ was chosen carefully on the site of a previous coal mine with an extension to a private Victorian style house. A perfect spot to experience contemporary art in combination with an intriguing environment. We want people to experience quality above all and in all we do.

Name: Latin American Psychoanalytic Hub (LAPH)
Description: The Latin American Psychoanalytic Hub (LAPH) sprang to life from the minds and hearts of two friends, one from Brazil and the other from Chile, who met on UK soil. It was here, amidst the shared memories and a mutual longing for our homeland, that the idea for LAPH was born. Astonished by the realization that little was known on the other side of the Atlantic about the vibrant intellectual and cultural contributions from Latin America, we felt compelled to act. Our aim with LAPH is to bridge this gap, to bring over, share, and translate the rich psychoanalytic traditions, the innovative thinking, and the creative expressions of Latin American analysts, writers, poets, and musicians. This project is, for us, a way to keep alive the traditions, innovations, and contributions of our homeland, and perhaps, a step towards de-colonization. Being Latin American, in our view, encompasses yearning, feeling deeply, and sharing that passion with others. LAPH is our channel to distribute, share, and bring to life the vibrant contributions of Latin American psychoanalysts to the UK. We recognize psychoanalysis in Latin America as more than a therapeutic approach; it has become a lens through which life itself is understood, blending with the rich textures of Latin American culture, from the spices and flavors to the vibrant life of our barrios and communities. This blend has fostered innovative and creative ways of being, and unique interpretations of the political world around us. LAPH is our heartfelt attempt to weave the rich tapestry of Latin American psychoanalytic thought into the broader fabric of global understanding. It's about much more than translating words; it's about conveying the essence of a culture that thrives on deep emotional connections, innovative thought, and a passionate engagement with life.

Name: Applaus Creators

Estamos aqui para ajudar você a alcançar seus objetivos e maximizar seu impacto no mundo digital.

Nossa missão: Promover cultura e conteúdos que agreguem para o desenvolvimento humano e de uma sociedade mais positiva.

Valores: Humanismo, Honestidade, Ética, Educação, Liberdade, Lealdade e Responsabilidade.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande Do Sul

La Galleria d'Arte Portofino presenta un'esposizione permanente dei più importanti pittori e scultori italiani e internazionali. Name: Davis Cohen Art, Consulting & Appraisal
Description: Davis Cohen Art (DCA) is an experienced art consulting and appraisal firm with expertise across many categories of fine and decorative art. DCA’s market-led approach is objective and tailored to the collector’s needs. DCA prides itself in up-to‐date, nuanced, global expertise, and our neutrality allows clients to get sound advice that distinguishes us from partial players in the art market. DCA manages private, corporate, healthcare and academic clients in a myriad of services, including: research and analysis; visioning and strategic documents; appraisal; collection management; collection cataloguing; community engagement; art acquisition and divestment strategies; installation services and framing; exhibition planning services; and corporate archival services.  DCA currently manages several large-scale, multi year, $1B+ construction budget art programs, a testament to our excellence in the field.

Description:

* Restoration of the illuminations of calligraphic panels or manuscripts.

Description: LB consulting aims to provide short-term advising and long-term solutions for those who navigate within the contemporary art market. We are currently collaborating in Canada and France alongside galleries and art business experts. Our expertise in collection management, client advisory, and collection estimate will guide you, according to your goal.

Name: Psychedelic Zen
Description: Rebecca Wang is a traditional artist who works primarily with acrylic paints, pastels, and colored pencils to create vibrant and energetic animal portraits. She is most well known for her colorful animal paintings and colorful and expressive pet portraits. Her portfolio includes dog art, wolves, tigers, birds, and reptiles, in addition to mythological creatures dragons and phoenix birds. She uses bright rainbow colors and bold brush strokes to create energy and movement in her artwork.

Name: GALERIE DES TUILIERS
Description:
Créée en 2000, la Galerie des Tuiliers est située à Lyon, où elle expose en permanence une vingtaine d’artistes de la peinture contemporaine.
Sa ligne artistique est celle d’une recherche constante de nouveaux talents à défendre, comme récemment la jeune prodige Flore Sigrist ou Soly Cissé ou Amélie Ducommun. Elle présente également des artistes confirmés et historiques de la scène internationale : Albert Bitran, Yasse Tabuchi, Wang Yan Cheng.
La Galerie est engagée dans un travail de promotion constant de ses artistes au travers d’expositions in-situ ou lors de salons d’art contemporain en France, à l’étranger et de foires ou encore par la réalisations de nombreux catalogues.
La Galerie des Tuiliers est Membre du Comité Professionnel des Galeries d’Art.

Name: KAIROS GALLERY
Description: KAIROS was founded by Ezgi Yıldız and Cihan Kurt in Istanbul as a contemporary art gallery in 2022. Dissimilarly to the known and practiced gallery traditions, KAIROS is artist and production oriented, it adopts the principle of bringing a breath of fresh air to the needs of today's audience and artists instead of the conventional methods in exhibition making, event organization and art management, and brings together its represented artists who work across a wide range of mediums with the audience. With the aim to change the traditional power dynamics between the gallerist and the artist, KAIROS opens up space for constructive dialogues and collective work in behalf of accessibility. KAIROS establishes close contact with the represented artists within its structure, imagines and realizes with them. According to KAIROS, being involved in the artist's production process and the mentoring relationship established with the artist is a meaningful way to build a bridge between the audience and the creator.

Name: VAST
Description:
We are a team of master photographers, engineers, artists, and computer scientists creating the highest resolution fine art photographs ever made.

VAST photos are exceptionally high quality images with more than a hundred times the resolution of traditional fine art photographs. This affords them a stunning level of clarity unmatched by any other media. Every VAST photo display is a window to a moment in time, vibrant with life and ready to be explored.

Name: SAINT LOUIS STORY STITCHERS ARTISTS COLLECTIVE
Description: SAINT LOUIS STORY STITCHERS ARTISTS COLLECTIVE is 501(c)(3) charity based out of The Center, 3701 Grandel Sq, #1A, Saint Louis, Missouri, 63108 United States.

Name: FORUM ARTE BRAGA
Description:
O Forum Arte Braga é uma galeria de caráter institucional, comissariada pela InvestBraga e o Forum Braga, fundada em 2018, com o intuito de exibir artistas portugueses e internacionais num contexto favorável ao diálogo crítico e à polinização cruzada. O eixo central da programação da galeria é uma preocupação com diferenças regionais e individuais, ao mesmo tempo que promove o cosmopolitismo e a colaboração. Inspirado pela crença de que a prática artística é capaz de ampliar o escopo da atuação humana e tem o poder de tocar e transformar o mundo. O Fórum Arte, sob a Direcção Artística de Duarte Sequeira e Guilherme Braga da Cruz, cultiva um programa cujas principais premissas são o conceptualismo, o rigor intelectual e a preocupação com o futuro.

Fórum Arte Braga is a public art gallery comissioned by InvesteBraga and Forum Braga, founded in 2018 with the intent to exhibit portuguese and international artists in a context conducive to critical dialogue and cross-pollination. Central to the gallery’s programme is a concern for regional and individual differences while fostering cosmopolitanism and collaboration. Inspired by a belief that artistic practices broaden the scope of human agency and have the power to both touch and change the world. Forum Arte, under the artistic direction of Duarte Sequeira and Guilherme Braga da Cruz, cultivates a programme premised on conceptualism, intellectual rigour and future practices.

Name: Atlanta North Art Gallery

Name: Brian White Art
Description: Brian has worked in art, design, and communication arts for 20 years. He loves to try new styles and techniques in both painting and printmaking. He is constantly pushing the boundaries of what he can accomplish with both oil and acrylic paint. He likes to work in a variety of styles and sizes. He is known for his pointillism abstract work and landscapes. Brian also works in block prints and relief prints. Brian lives with his wife Jenni (also an artist) and three kids in Lawrence, Kansas where their studios reside.

Name: The Arch

Subscribers receive the work in their inbox every 7 days, having the first chance to inquire. After seven days, the work will be replaced, whether is has been sold or not. 

The works are curated, aiming on a wide representation of the art world. The Arch works as a filter, offering only the most interesting pieces.

From the first preview to the final installation, we support clients in discovering and purchasing pieces that speak to their individual tastes and create an inspired space. We believe in transparency, approachability, and detail-oriented service. Born in Brooklyn, our team is positioned to work with clients and designers on projects across North America with offices in New York, Minneapolis, and Toronto.

Name: Künstlerische Interventionen in der Kulturellen Bildung
Description:
Qualifizierung für Künstler:innen an der Schnittstelle von künstlerischer Arbeit, Kultureller Bildung und Kulturmanagement – das ermöglicht der Zertifikatskurs „Künstlerische Interventionen in der Kulturellen Bildung“. Interdisziplinärer Austausch, didaktische Weiterbildung und die eigene künstlerische und kulturelle Erfahrung und Professionalität stehen im Vordergrund des spartenübergreifenden Angebots. 

Der von der Stiftung Mercator ins Leben gerufene Kurs wurde am Institut für Kulturpolitik der Universität Hildesheim durch Prof. Dr. Birgit Mandel und Prof. Dr. Mona Marijke Jas entwickelt. Entstehen soll ein interdisziplinäres Netzwerk von Künstler:innen, Schulen und anderen kulturellen Bildungseinrichtungen.  

Sie fördern Projekte im Bereich Kulturelle Bildung? Sie haben Interesse daran, die Kursinhalte kostenlos an Ihrer Hochschule oder Bildungseinrichtung zu integrieren? Sie sind Künstler:in und haben Interesse an der Teilnahme? Informieren Sie sich hier: https://kuenstlerische-interventionen.de/

Name: ComprArt / Buy argentine art
Description:

ComprArt, based in Buenos Aires, joins the e-portals came up in recent years, which offer the work of emerging painters from all over the country.
The website is available both in English and Spanish at the link https://comprart.com.

As a peculiarity, ComprArt offers to buy online the works of the great masters of Argentine art, such as Benito Quinquela Martín, Antonio Berni, Raúl Soldi, Fernando Fader and Juan Carlos Castagnino, among others.

In addition, it incorporates contemporary painters from a large variety of schools and artistic trends, such as folk art, landscaping, portraits, abstract, urban, social and political art.

The platform is an open window for local art galleries, which look forward to develop online sales associated with ComprArt, and for contemporary painters with recognized careers. 

All the paints are delivered with Certificate of Authenticity (extended by the artist or the Gallery), by the options of Pick Up in Buenos Aires or specialized international shipments, and it offers different payment methods.
