Name: Studio Alberto Garutti
Description:
Alberto Garutti, artista e docente, insegna presso lo IUAV di Venezia, Facoltà di Design e Arti ed insegna presso la facoltà di Architettura del Politecnico di Milano. Dal 1990 al 2013 è stato titolare della Cattedra di Pittura all’Accademia di Brera di Milano. Invitato a grandi manifestazioni internazionali, come la Biennale di Venezia nel 1990, la Biennale di Istanbul del 2001 e la Memory Marathon presso la Serpentine Gallery di Londra nel 2012, è spesso chiamato a realizzare opere pubbliche per città e musei: a Gand in Belgio per il Museo S.M.A.K. in occasione della mostra “Over the Edges” (2000), a Herford per il MARTa Museum (2003), nel 2002 a Kanazawa, in Giappone, in collaborazione con il 21st Century Museum of Contemporary Art e a Mosca nel 2011 per il Moscow Museum of Modern Art nel contesto della mostra “Impossible Community”.
Ha realizzato opere permanenti in grado d’innescare relazioni e connessioni tra istituzioni pubbliche, private e il tessuto sociale della città. Esemplari in questo senso i casi di Bergamo e Bolzano (in collaborazione con Museion), così come Trivero con l’opera pensata per la Fondazione Zegna (2009) e Cagliari per la sede Tiscali nel 2003. Protagonista di varie personali in spazi privati, Garutti ha esposto in molte gallerie in Italia e all’estero tra le quali Galleria Paul Maenz a Colonia, Galleria Minini a Brescia, Magazzino d’Arte Moderna a Roma, Studio Guenzani e Galleria Marconi a Milano. Numerose le collettive negli spazi pubblici nelle quali Alberto Garutti ha esplorato la relazione tra arte, città e paesaggio: significativi in questo senso i casi di “Arte all’Arte” edizioni 2000 e 2005 e “Luna Park” a Villa Manin, Codroipo (2005)... http://www.albertogarutti.it/

Name: Wicked Queer
Description: Wicked Queer is Boston’s LGBTQ+ Film Festival. Founded in 1984 by film programmer George Mansour, Wicked Queer is the 4th longest running LGBTQ+ Film Festival in North America and is an all volunteer organization. Our mission is to build community and to celebrate Queer storytelling and filmmaking through the uplifting of voices and stories not yet heard and to present and preserve the vibrancy of our histories.

Name: Culture Scholar Corporation
Description:
Culture Scholar Corporation: Empowering communities through arts and music education"

Location: San Francisco Bay Area

Website: www.culturescholar.org

Overview:
Culture Scholar Corporation is an organization dedicated to providing therapeutic  fine arts education to underserved and disabled individuals. We believe in the healing power of cultural education and socializing, utilizing the arts as a means to combat depression, loneliness, promote social justice, and support those in reentry to society. Through private and group lessons in music and the arts, we empower our students with valuable skills while fostering a sense of community and personal growth.

Services:
At Culture Scholar Corporation, we offer a diverse range of programs and courses designed to unlock the creative potential of our students. Our curriculum focuses on cultural and historical creative concepts, enabling individuals to explore their artistic passions in a supportive and enriching environment. Our services include:

Music and Art History: Comprehensive study of the historical and cultural significance of music and art, providing students with a deeper understanding of their artistic roots.

Instrumental and Vocal Lessons: Expert instruction in a variety of instruments, including violin, viola, fiddle, guitar, and singing. Both private and group lessons are available, tailored to the unique needs and aspirations of each student.

Music Theory and Humanities: Engaging courses that delve into the theoretical aspects of music, enhancing students' musical comprehension and critical thinking skills.

Music and Art Appreciation: Immersive experiences that expose students to diverse genres, styles, and forms of artistic expression, fostering a lifelong appreciation for the arts.

Performance Classes: Opportunities to showcase talent and build confidence through regular performance classes, encouraging self-expression and artistic development.

Social Impact & Community Involvement

Name: PRIOR COLLECTIONS
Description:
PRIOR ART SPACE is a next generation art collector's space based in Berlin and Barcelona founded by Oliver Elst and Laura del Arco.

After collecting for years, they realized that art collectors have a responsibility to not only collect  works of art if not to support proactively and widely the artists in the collection, as well as the importance of loaning works to institutions and the value of exhibiting the collections publicly.

Their drive is to inspire next young generations of collectors and to support artists towards a more unestablished democratized  art world, based in the collaborative support and building long lasting  close relationships with galleries, artists, curators and collectors for a mutual and common benefit, to share the passion for Art.

The aim of our space is to give voice to international artists, who due to social and / or gender conditions have been excluded from the traditional discourse of art history: as women artists; people who are part of the LGTBIQ + group; people from different backgrounds and origins who have not historically had the support and representation in the art world, such as people of Asian, African, African-American or Latin American origin, among others; or artists who deal with controversial issues and taboos that concern today’s society.

From aspiring to established, we display a variety of artists across a multitude of mediums. By evoking inspiration, connection, and understanding, our works remain rooted in a shared sensibility and authenticity. Our mission is to blur the lines between the unconventional and mainstream by expanding the definition of art and what it means to be a creator.

Name: Art World Insights
Description:
Art has become a serious asset class as the market is growing by 17%p.a. surpassing the $60bn mark. 

But how do you know if an artwork is worth $500 or $5,000 or $50,000? 

Auction results are the predominant way to value art, however auctions are infrequent and only for long established artists – excluding 84% of the global market.

Art World Insights has assembled a world class team of data scientists, art experts and finance professionals with more than 40 years of experience and degrees from institutions like Oxford, Cambridge, Princeton, INSEAD and Stanford to build the “Standard & Poor’s” of the art market and provide objective, data based valuations.

Name: Bologna International Opera Academy Cyprus
Description: BIOA Cyprus is a boutique-style training and career development program that offers the following: daily master classes; one-on-one coaching from world-renowned opera singers, voice teachers, opera directors and coaches; and the opportunity to be immersed in the surroundings of Paphos. BIOA’s curriculum is carefully designed to build the proficiency and discipline that will facilitate success for those seeking a professional singing career, as well as exposing participants to professional-level opera auditions early in their careers.

Name: Ruiz-Healy Art
Description:
Ruiz-Healy Art was incorporated in 2004, and after working for several years strictly by appointment, the gallery opened their public space in September 2013 at their current location, 210-A East Olmos Drive.  RHA's opened a New York City location in 2019. 

The Gallery deals in Post-War and contemporary works of art: painting, sculpture, photography and works on paper. Ruiz-Healy art represents an international roster of artists and places emphasis on a Latinx, Latin American, borderland, and Texas discourse. In addition, we are the exclusive representatives of the Estate of Chuck Ramirez.

Ruiz-Healy Art is a member of the International Fine Print Dealers Association (IFPDA) demonstrating a high level of expertise and adhering to a strict code of conduct with professional integrity as a member dealer. We are one of only two members in the state of Texas.

The gallery has an active Art Fair participation, including past involvement in Volta NYC, the IFPDA Print Fair New York, Ink Art Fair Miami, Dallas Art Fair, San Francisco Print Fair and Houston Art Fair. RHA has mounted numerous exhibitions and publishes many catalogues.

Name: Sxedio Sxedio
Description:
Προετοιμασία για Αρχιτεκτονική | Ελεύθερο & Γραμμικό Σχέδιο | Δημιουργούμε τις βάσεις για το μέλλον.

Με τρία φροντιστήρια στην Θεσσαλονίκη και ένα στην Λάρισα

Με πάνω από 23 χρόνια εμπειρίας, το φροντιστήριό μας εξειδικεύεται στο ελεύθερο και γραμμικό σχέδιο, προετοιμάζοντας με συνέπεια και αγάπη εκατοντάδες επιτυχόντες για τις αρχιτεκτονικές σχολές. 

Με γνώση των απαιτήσεων των εξετάσεων και πολυετή εμπειρία στον χώρο, στηρίζουμε κάθε μαθητή να αναπτύξει τεχνικές δεξιότητες, να καλλιεργήσει την αισθητική του αντίληψη και να εκφράσει την προσωπική του ματιά μέσα από το σχέδιο.

Κάθε χρόνο, βλέπουμε τους κόπους των μαθητών μας να ανταμείβονται με επιτυχίες και εισαγωγές στις σχολές των ονείρων τους κι αυτό είναι η μεγαλύτερη μας επιβράβευση.

Name: Nextstreet Gallery
Description:
Over the past two decades, NextStreet Gallery has established its worldwide reputation with its selection of both emerging and acclaimed contemporary and street artists. 

The audacious art programming allows the gallery to be mentioned in many publications, as well as take part in various international fairs, which secures and ensures the growth of its artists. 

The gallery is at the forefront of this field with international artists such as Mr. Brainwash, Huang Yulong, Invader, Shepard Fairey, and Banksy. NextStreet also displays established French artists like Gully, Pimax, Alben, and Kurar as well as upcoming ones like Seny. 

These artists and their works are complemented by the great international names of contemporary art such as Andy Warhol, Picasso, César, Tom Wesselmann, Niki de Saint Phalle, Ben Vautier, Arman, Keith Haring, and Damien Hirst to name but a few. 

This diversity makes it possible for art lovers and collectors to acquire unique artwork, and also to make reliable investments. 

The NextStreet Gallery team, constituted of art, law and financial investment specialists, is available at its historical site at 23 Place des Vosges to answer all your needs and guide you to find your favorite artwork.

Name: Bloomers Publishing
Description: Bloomers is an Irish Arts Council funded arts organisation and publishing collective.

Name: Tong Xin Zhai Art Gallery
Description:
Established in Shanghai, China, in 1988, the Tong Xin Zhai Art Gallery collects contemporary works of art that feature originality, artistry and appreciation of culture.  It also publishes books on its collections, commissions art works, and sponsors exhibitions and tours.  The gallery has the largest collection of the paintings of the Chinese master Chai Zu Shun.
        From 2007 to 2009, Tong Xin Zhai hosted a show of Chai's ink-watercolor paintings--an event that attracted dozens of domestic news media, including China Central Television and the People’s Daily national newspaper.  Chai is honored as one of China’s top 10 artists, and in 2012 was included among 500 world painters honored at the Olympic Fine Arts Exhibition in London, England.
       With support from the Shanghai Artists’ Association, the gallery began preparations in 2011 for an “International Tour Exhibition of Mental Imagery Paintings by Chai Zu Shun.”  The tour opened in Shanghai in September 2013 and continued on to Hong Kong and Macao.
       Other countries and regions planned for the tour include Taiwan, Singapore, New York, Paris, London, Frankfurt, Belgium, the U.N. General Headquarters and the European Union Headquarters.

Name: Koetser Gallery
Description:

David started his career in 1964 when he joined his father Leonard Koetser in the London Gallery. In 1982 David and his wife Ruth were invited to join the Zurich based Gallery of his Uncle, the renowned David M. Koetser at its present location on Talstrasse, near Paradeplatz and the well known Hotel Baur au Lac.

The Gallery can be visited by appointment.

Name: 235 Studio HK
Description:
Overlooking Victoria Harbour, our light-filled space is where art meets inspiration, wellness, and play. Whether you’re here for Art Jamming with friends, a mindful workshop, or a curated creative event, we make art accessible, relaxing, and joyfully personal.

Dive into guided painting, themed workshops, or simply create freely with the sea as your view. Here, art is not about perfection – it’s about reconnecting with yourself, finding calm, and celebrating creativity in the moment.

Come breathe, create, and find your own art moment with us.

Name: les prémices
Description:
Les prémices est un laboratoire d'explorations créatives.

Notre laboratoire est un lieu dans lequel on expérimente, on teste, on découvre, on réussit mais également dans lequel on échoue. Il est une sorte de melting-pot dans lequel des activités, des savoir-faire ainsi que des compétences transversales vivent. 

Les prémices sont nés de l’envie de communiquer et de créer autrement : vrai, authentique et libre.

Les prémices ce sont des passionnés, des artistes, des explorateurs, des créatifs, des audacieux. Ce sont tous ceux qui sont prêts à venir à notre rencontre, ceux qui sont prêts à explorer avec nous. L’exploration est la raison d’être même des prémices. Chaque projet est une aventure. 

Alors, prêts à explorer avec nous ?

Nicht zuletzt möchten wir auch Menschen, die bisher nur wenig Berührung mit Kunst haben, ansprechen.

Unser Ziel ist es, Museen, Kunstvereinen, Galerien und Künstlern eine weitere Möglichkeit der medialen und digitalen Präsenz und Verbreitung zu geben.

Name: Art at the Edge
Description:
Sculpture and Sport a celebration for 2012
We have invited 29 established British sculptors to each create a 1:5 scale sculptural interpretation of an Olympic or Paralympic sport, to be cast into bronze. The sculptors have been chosen on the basis of curating a collection representing a cross-section of British sculpture in the 21st Century.


The sculptors are given the opportunity to liaise with a representative of their chosen sport’s national governing body to gain insight into its character and dynamics.

A 30th sculpture will be chosen from a nationwide sculpture competition launching in Sept 2010. The competition will be open to all.

All 30 sculptures are being cast by Europe’s pre-eminent art bronze foundry; Pangolin Editions in Gloucestershire.

The collection will be available to support private functions in 2011 and will go on public display at a number of venues across the UK in 2012. For example it will be part of a public art event in Bath in the summer of 2012 and will be exhibited at the Oxo Tower Gallery on London’s Southbank during the Games.

Scale-up to life size or larger
We are looking for buyers and collectors interested to commission larger versions of the sculptures and we will also be approaching potential corporate sponsors and launching a number of fundraising initiatives. Life sized versions of the sculptures will attract significant public attention and we are hoping to link them in a UK-wide sculpture trail or to locate them at Olympic Venues.

A public art festival for Bath
The bronze maquettes will form the core exhibition of a sport-themed public art festival in the world heritage city of Bath, summer 2012.
In addition to the bronzes, Guest Artists working across a range of artistic disciplines will be invited to contribute artworks for display in the city. These will be selected to complement and broaden the event’s creative appeal.

Name: Scuola Internazionale di Comics Padova
Description:
La Scuola Internazionale di Comics di Padova nasce nel 2008 e dal 2016 è stata ampliata con una nuova area interamente dedicata ai videogame!
L'edificio in cui si trova, è una vecchia fabbrica del 1919 perfettamente ristrutturata: tetti alti, travi a vista, il tutto in contrasto con una tecnologia sempre aggiornata.
Dalla sua apertura ad oggi la scuola ha continuato a crescere e a migliorare le proprie proposte didattiche, grazie all’inserimento di corsi innovativi e all’impegno e alla professionalità dei propri docenti che trasmettono le loro competenze artistiche sul modello delle botteghe artigiane, mirando a sviluppare l'aspetto creativo dei suoi studenti attraverso un lavoro di ricerca espressiva e di sperimentazione tecnica.
Il risultato è una padronanza di strumenti e di metodi che permetta agli allievi di esprimere al meglio il loro talento e che faccia da trampolino di lancio per il loro futuro professionale.
La scuola dispone di 10 aule moderne e luminose, 7 delle quali attrezzate con Mac e Pc di ultima generazione, complete di tavolette grafiche Wacom e di connessione internet per i corsi legati alle arti digitali/videogame, e le altre utilizzate per le arti figurative dotate di ampie postazioni per lavorare al meglio, di monitor collegati ai Visual Presenter per seguire passo dopo passo le dimostrazioni pratiche dei docenti.
Inoltre tutti gli studenti possono utilizzare, in relazione al corso frequentato, lavagne luminose, scanner e tavolette grafiche.

Name: Artworks Foundry
Description:
In 1976, Italian builder Piero Mussi completed his rigorous apprenticeships with his country’s preeminent metallurgic masters and moved to Berkeley, CA to establish Artworks Foundry. 

40 years later, Artworks Foundry has grown into one the nation's leading foundries for the production and restoration of bronze sculptures, reliefs and monuments. Recently, Artworks foundry has nearly doubled its size with the addition of a state-of-the-art fabrication facility.

Artworks Foundry serves over 2000 artists in projects ranging from the miniature to the monumental. Sculptors choose Artworks Foundry not simply for their unrivaled expertise, but for the sense of community they foster by ceaselessly giving clients their undivided attention. Clients are like family.

While Artworks Foundry has its roots deep in the ancient traditions of bronze casting, it also reached out to the future, ever-driven to innovate and refine it’s methods. Partnering with community and resources in Silicon Valley provides its clients with the combined power of cutting edge tools with old-world craft to tackle the most ambitious projects.

Name: ArtMatters
Description:
ArtMatters is a full-service art consulting firm creating exceptional spaces through art. We specialize in creating customized art solutions, from the initial art concept development through the design, selection, project management, and fulfillment process, for corporate, hospitality and healthcare spaces throughout the greater Washington, DC area.

ArtMatters represents hundreds of local and national artists in a wide variety of mediums. Our focus and strength is finding artwork whose color, imagery and scale are appropriate for commercial spaces; creating an attractive and inspiring work environment for our clients.

The ArtMatters team brings a critical eye, a keen sense of style and design, and years of experience to every project. ArtMatters’ objective and the key to its success, is selecting artwork that both humanizes and energizes a space while reflecting the client’s core values, culture, and brand.

Our studio and gallery, located near Bethesda in Glen Echo, Maryland, is minutes from D.C. and northern Virginia and offers clients immediate access to a large inventory of original paintings, limited edition prints, photography, mixed media, and sculpture.

In the architectural and design community, ArtMatters is recognized as the source for high-quality corporate art.

We believe that expressions of a Disabled cultural identity can transform society from awareness to understanding to belonging, creating a community that enjoys the full and equitable participation of all Disabled people.

Name: Fondazione Lungarotti Onlus - MUVIT Museo del Vino e MOO Museo dell'Olivo e dell'Olio
Description:
The Lungarotti Foundation onlus dates back to 1987. Its tasks concern the management of the two museums, MUVIT and MOO, and the enhancement of the culture of vine and wine, as well as olive and oil in the Mediterrane- an and Umbrian areas. The activity is carried out through research, exhibitions, conferences, publications and contacts with other public and private institutions, both Italian and foreign. The wealth of the collections on display in the two Museums, the archival documentation and the substantial library make the Foundation one of the main actors in the cultural scene to increase and complete the knowledge of the two key products of Italian agriculture. Education to conscious drinking is an integral part of its aims. With attention to childhood, workshops, represen- tations and cognitive paths through mythology and history are dedicated to them. The Foundation is directed by Maria Grazia Marchetti Lungarotti.

Name: ART LDGR
Description:
ART LDGR is an art proposition and online gallery exploring the use of blockchain smart contract technology to automate royalty payments to visual artists on the resale value of their work on the secondary market.

This technology is radically transforming the way that art is sold and traded around the world, with major international auction houses such as Christie’s and Sotheby’s operationalising blockchain smart contract art sales in the past year.

ART LDGR has the administrative infrastructure to deploy blockchain smart contracts and will be working with a select number of artists, art agents, collectors and art organisations to help them do the same.

If you are interested in learning more, subscribe to our newsletter or drop us a line on our contact page: https://artldgr.art/

Juntos, decolamos.

Name: Keramiek Studio Edith Tergau
Description: Keramiek Studio Edith Tergau is gevestigd in de voormalige Pastorie en gemeentehuis in het oude centrum van Beegden (gemeente Maasgouw). De voormalige kluis van het gemeentehuis doet tegenwoordig dienst als keramiek atelier/studio. Hier maak ik mijn handgevormd keramiek. In de burgemeesterskamer, nu galerie/toonkamer, kunt u de werkstukken bekijken, voelen en aankopen.

Name: 303 Gallery
Description: 303 Gallery organizes art gallery exhibitions.

Name: De Zwolse Draak
Description:
“Waardevolle verhalen delen en verbonden zijn in een enorm kunstwerk schept een band onder de deelnemers. Ik kan niet wachten tot dit effect zich voltrekt op de schaal van een stad, en met de intensiteit van mooiste herinneringen. Ik heb al kippenvel als ik er aan denk!” aldus beeldend kunstenaar Dennie Boxem.

Een kunstwerk waarin honderden mooiste herinneringen van Zwollenaren worden vereeuwigd in hartje Zwolle. Nergens ter wereld werden op deze wijze mooiste herinneringen verenigt in een kunstwerk. Onze richtlijn is deelname van 1% van heel Zwolle.

Op de watertrap aan het Rodetorenplein willen wij een kunstwerk realiseren om het verhaal van Sint Michael compleet te maken. Onze beschermheilige staat er alleen. Omdat elk góed verhaal bestaat uit licht én duisternis, goed én kwaad, willen wij dit evenwicht herstellen; aan de hoge kant bij de Sint Michaelskerk de glazen engel; aan de lage kant vanuit het Zwarte water de Draak. De spanning en verbinding tussen deze twee iconen aan weerszijden van de Melkmarkt willen wij weer voelbaar maken.

In de legende breekt de Draak door de Hemelwand waar hij door Michael wordt verslagen. Het grondvlak van de watertrap zal dienstdoen als Hemelwand. Boxem wil dit uitbeelden met een blauwwit mozaïek waarop mooiste herinneringen van Zwollenaren staan. Voornemens zal dus het grondvlak, dat in de verhaallijn van Sint Michael en De Draak dienstdoet als Hemelwand, gaan bestaan uit honderden mooiste herinneringen van Zwollenaren.

Op deze wijze worden oude en nieuwe persoonlijke Zwolse verhalen vereeuwigd in hartje centrum; Zwollenaren die delen, laten zich kennen, maken kennis; dit kunstwerk kan de start zijn van een nieuwe norm voor openheid.

U kunt ons bereiken via: stichting.krz@gmail.com

Vriendelijke groet, 
Stichting KRZ

Peter van Zwieten, 
Ton Timmerman,
Anton voor 't Hekke,
Jos van Leussen.

Name: Mamush Gallery
Description: Mamush gallery, with a private collection of five hundred works and a cast of blue chip artists like Andy Warhol, Roy Lichtenstein, Keith Haring, Alexander Calder, as well as internationally established artists like Takis, Pavlos, Gaitis, Vassiliki, and others, is located at the Benakeio Commercial Center of Kifissia, in Athens.

Name: Noravision Gallery
Description: NORAVISION, is a decentralized ecosystem through which an eclectic pool of artists, collectors, investors, and galleries gather in efforts to raise awareness of the world’s most talented artists through liquidable digital-asset investments, an AI-powered digital boutique, and blockchain-driven authenticity & tracking protocols.

Name: Produzentengalerie Wien
Description:
Die Produzentengalerie Wien ist eine von 10 KünstlerInnen selbst geführte Kunstgalerie. Die Künstler gestalten die Präsentation ihrer Projekte selbst. Der Schwerpunkt liegt bei der kritischen Diskussion zur gegenwärtigen Kunst. Jeden ersten Dienstag im Monat findet die Vernissage statt, jeden dritten Dienstag im Monat findet eine inhaltliche Auseinandersetzung mit dem Projekt in Form eines für diese Ausstellung eigens gestalteten Events statt.

Die Produzentengalerie Wien hat zum Ziel künstlerisch interessante Projekte zu zeigen und die Diskussion über diese Projekte voranzutreiben. Während in der Aufbau-Phase der Entwicklung seit 2015 Ausstellung und Verkauf einer feststehenden Künstlergemeinschaft das Hauptziel war, ist nunmehr in der zweiten Entwicklungsphase das Bestreben insofern erweitert, als dass die Dimension der eigenen Arbeiten im Verhältnis zur Gegenwartskunst insgesamt größere Bedeutung findet. Es werden nicht einzelne Kunstwerke gezeigt, sondern künstlerische Projekte und Konzepte.

Name: Canyon Cinema Foundation
Description: Canyon Cinema Foundation, a 501(c)3 nonprofit, is dedicated to educating the public about independent, non-commercial, experimental, avant-garde and artist-made moving images. We manifest this commitment by nurturing scholarship and awareness with public programming at universities and nonprofit cultural organizations worldwide.

Name: Departamento de Artes Visuales U. de Chile
Serendipia gestión cultural
Description:
El arte desde otro punto de vista. Nuestra constante vital: la dinamización, la inclusión y la creatividad.
Comisariado de exposiciones con personalidad y creación y gestión de proyectos culturales únicos para revitalizar espacios.

¿Te atreves a descubrir el arte con nosotrxs?

Name: Choral and Company
Description: CEO, DRH, Directeurs la communication, vous souhaitez recréer de la cohésion au sein de vos équipes et renforcer le bien-être au travail ? Comme chef de chœur, je vous propose de faire profiter à votre entreprise de tous les bienfaits du chant choral : teambuilding, chorales d'entreprise, chorales inter-entreprises. Parlons-en lors d'une session diagnostic pour définir ce qui vous convient le mieux !

Name: Vechel Fantasy
Description:
Vechel Fantasy zijn mijn activiteiten op het gebied van spel en schrijven. Zo heb ik het Avonturen Handboek en de Adventure Clubs ter promotie van lezen en schrijven door middel van een spel.
Maar ook, zeker voor tieners en ouders, worden ook spellen zoals Dungeons & Dragons gebruikt.

De avonturen en sessies vanuit Vechel Fantasy kunnen ook gebruikt worden in zorg, welzijn en het onderwijs. Verschillende 21st Century Skills maar ook het verbeteren van verbeeldingskracht en verschillende sociale vaardigheden (introvertie/extravertie, leiderschap, groepsdynamica, pestgedrag).

Nieuwsgierig geworden? Voor vragen of een kop koffie/thee, neem gerust contact op.
Wil je altijd op de hoogte zijn van ontwikkelingen, waaronder nieuwe avonturen en activiteiten? Schrijf je dan in voor de nieuwsbrief op http://www.VechelFantasy.com.

Name: Zeno Fine Art
Description: Sign Up For A Trade Account To Access Our Wholesale Stock

Name: Heritage Lighting Matters
Description:
Heritage Lighting Matters was set up to meet the very specialist High CRI LED lighting requirements within the Heritage Sector (Castles, Palaces, Ecclesiastical Buildings and Stately Homes), Fine Residences, Museums, Art Galleries and Properties of Historical and National importance (both inside & out).

Our Carefully Selected Product Ranges offer the highest standards of Lighting available to achieve complete Client Satisfaction:
• Fine Art Lighting
• Fibre Optic Lighting
• Framing Projectors
• Remote Spotlighting
• Tapestry Illumination
• Heritage IoT Solutions
• Historic Street Lighting
• Lighting Survey & Review
• Decorative Light Fittings
• LED Flickering Flame Lamps
• Artefact & Cabinet Lighting
• Emergency Lighting Solutions
• Conservational Standard Lighting
• Building & Architectural Illumination

Name: Galería Rodrigo Rivero Lake
Description: La Galería Rodrigo Rivero Lake es una firma cuyo fin es estudiar las facetas escondidas de la historia. Nuestra labor es descubrir y localizar piezas perdidas o mal estudiadas para rescatarlas del abandono o la destrucción e integrarlas a museos o colecciones privadas.

Name: TOKYO BLUE
Description:
Tokyo Blue har eksisteret siden 2011 og består af 4 medlemmer med vforskellig baggrund inden for kunst, teknik og humanisme.
Fascinationen af farver og deres evne til at skabe sanselige oplevelser er vores fælles og grundlæggende omdrejningspunkt.
Vi arbejder og eksperimenterer med farvers kompleksitet og er særligt optagede af samspillet mellem farve, lys, flade, materialer og rum.
Vores installationer tager ofte udgangspunkt i eksisterende rum og arkitektur. Lys og farve væves sammen med de fortællinger, associationer eller historiske lag, der knytter sig til stedet, og de hverdagslige rum omdannes til fiktive rum, hvor sanserne pirres og hjernen udfordres.

Name: Maggymage
Yamaha Music School Rivas
Description:
Yamaha Music School Rivas es un centro oficial de enseñanza musical avalado por Yamaha, ubicado en Rivas-Vaciamadrid. Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer una educación musical de alta calidad, adaptada a todas las edades y niveles, desde los primeros pasos musicales en la infancia hasta la formación instrumental avanzada para jóvenes y adultos.

 Formamos parte de una red internacional de escuelas con presencia en más de 40 países, y seguimos una metodología propia que combina creatividad, práctica en grupo y desarrollo auditivo, cultivando no solo habilidades técnicas, sino también la expresión artística y el disfrute por la música.

 Nuestro equipo está conformado por profesores titulados y apasionados por la enseñanza, que utilizan tecnología moderna y recursos didácticos exclusivos de Yamaha para asegurar un aprendizaje dinámico, progresivo y motivador.

 En nuestras instalaciones, los estudiantes pueden aprender piano, teclado, guitarra, batería, violín, canto, producción musical y mucho más, en un entorno profesional y cercano, donde cada alumno es protagonista de su propio camino musical.

 Descubre el poder de la música con nosotros en Yamaha Music School Rivas!
#YamahaMusicSchool #EducaciónMusical #MúsicaParaTodos #RivasVaciamadrid

Name: FORM.XYZ
Description:
Form specializes in advancing the process of making sculptures. We are a dedicated group of artists and engineers pairing the newest advancements of technology with traditional studio methodologies.

We set the standard for aesthetic quality, optimal efficiency and cost effectiveness.

We customize our expertise to integrate seamlessly to the artist’s process with the right combination of solutions for every artist’s unique project.

Name: Escuela de Artes Plásticas Arturo Michelena
Description: La Escuela de Artes Plásticas Arturo Michelena fue creada a instancias del Maestro Braulio Salazar en el año 1948, y desde entonces, ha servido de plataforma para destacados artistas del ámbito regional y nacional. Tiene como objetivo fundamental brindar herramientas necesarias para que el estudiante realice su propuesta artística sobre una base técnica y consolide un estilo propio. En su Plan regular de adultos posee un plan de estudios de cuatro años de formación basado en Gaceta Oficial del Ministerio de Educación para estudios de Artes Plásticas mención Arte puro; al que se han incorporado materias como: investigación, pensamiento Gráfico, Arte Digital, fotografía, entre otras. Además cuenta con el Taller Infantil y Juvenil de Artes Plásticas combinando así la lectura y la plástica de manera creativa.

Name: Red Door
Description: Gallery and bookshop in Copenhagen. Red Door is also the base of operations for various cultural projects such as the Poetic Phonotheque, Red Door Magazine, Tremella Radio, the Red Transmissions Podcast, and all the cultural activities under the hat of Madam Neverstop. Visit RED DOOR at Møllegade 23a kld, Nørrebro KBH.

Name: Linou
Description:
Linou is best known for her digital augmented reality works and interactive video devices.
Linou est surtout connue pour ses œuvres numériques en réalité augmentée et ses dispositifs vidéo interactifs.

Name: Murmur-intérieur
Description:
L' aventure MURMUR INTERIEUR est le projet d'Hélène Segura, artiste peintre et graphiste.
Il est né de l'envie d'être à l'atelier tous les jours : créer est la première des nécessités.
Il est question de proposer des pièces réalisées à la main, de collaborer avec d'autres artistes et artisans, d' inventer des objets qui ravissent le quotidien.
Murmur à pour dessein de faire parler les murs : luminaires, patères, équerres, consoles, papiers-peints,  tout ou presque à vocation de verticalité. 

3 Rue Jaubert, 13005 Marseille

Name: id-iom
Description:
In a nutshell 

 

Artist duo using spray paint, stencils, paper and pretty much anything else we can lay our hands on to make contemporary art with a street and pop edge. We paint walls, and stuff to hang on them too. 

 

Who are we? 

 

We are self taught brothers - Sholto and Hugo - originally from the Isle of Man, now living and working in London. We’ve always loved urban and comic book art and began in clothing and apparel, before moving onto murals, paintings and prints. 


What’s the deal? 

 

We are multi-media artists, constantly entertained by the world around us. We take ideas from pop culture, music, books and stuff that makes us laugh to create work that makes people smile. Our style combines spray and stencil or paint and paper with other techniques, including digital, lino cuts and photography. We will never stop experimenting. 

 

Artist duo using spray paint, stencils, paper and pretty much anything else we can lay our hands on to make contemporary art with a street and pop edge. We paint walls, and stuff to hang on them too. 

 

Who are we? 

 

We are self taught brothers - Sholto and Hugo - originally from the Isle of Man, now living and working in London. We’ve always loved urban and comic book art and began in clothing and apparel, before moving onto murals, paintings and prints. 


What’s the deal? 

 

We are multi-media artists, constantly entertained by the world around us. We take ideas from pop culture, music, books and stuff that makes us laugh to create work that makes people smile. Our style combines spray and stencil or paint and paper with other techniques, including digital, lino cuts and photography. We will never stop experimenting. 

 

We believe everyone has a tale to tell, and as you can probably guess from our name, we love playing with language. So, you’ll find words and quotes mixing with portraits and people to create our distinctive visual style - all tied together with an imaginative little story for each piece.

Name: Bigli Art Broker srl
Description:
Intermediazione di opere d'arte di proprietà privata.
Bigli Art Broker nasce nel 1997 su iniziativa di Luigi Buttazzoni e Roeland Kollewijn. Studio di consulenza per conoscitori, collezionisti e neofiti, vende opere d'arte appartenenti a privati, a collezionisti e istituzioni (banche, fondazioni, musei).

Name: Carat Ondernemer & Cultuur - Helmond
Description:
Kunst, cultuur en de Helmondse gemeenschap. De combinatie van deze drie aspecten vormt het hart van Carat. Opgericht in 1991, zet Carat zich in om de cultuurparticipatie en cultuurbeleving van de inwoners én bezoekers van Helmond te stimuleren. Dat gebeurt door het initiëren van projecten die zich kenmerken door hun diversiteit, kwaliteit en duurzaamheid.

Carat bestaat uit ruim veertig, voornamelijk uit Helmond afkomstige ondernemingen, die elk gerepresenteerd worden door maximaal twee vertegenwoordigers. Gezamenlijk ontwikkelen, realiseren én financieren zij een keur aan culturele projecten, die bestemd zijn voor de Helmondse gemeenschap. Ondernemen en cultuur in Helmond: Carat zorgt voor de verbinding.

Name: The Emotionalists
Description: The Emotionalists reclaim the emotional, the personal, and the deeply human in an AI-dominated world.

Name: HLK Art Group
Description: HLK Art Group provides art management services for corporations, private collectors and art institutions. Specializing in Post-War, Contemporary and Modern art, our trusted art expertise, international art market savvy and exclusive access to the world's finest works of art give clients an advantage in building and caring for their art collections. Core services include: collection management, art acquisitions, exhibition planning, curation, estate liquidations, commissions and art appraisals for wills and estates, insurance, charitable donation, and resale.

Name: Artsy Bugsy Studio
Description:
Artsy Bugsy is a leading boutique art studio for children in Singapore.

Our programs are designed to help students develop their imagination and explore their creativity.

Art can help develop your child's confidence. Through our art classes, we will work with each child and their ability to express their inner creative worlds.

By seeing their own progression from one week to the next, students will thus develop a solid confidence in themselves and their art.

We offers classes for kids, workshops for adults, and we're also an AWESOME partner for private parties and events. We can host your event in our beautiful studio or head out to a venue of your choice.

Name: La cuisine, centre d'art et de design
Description:
La cuisine est un centre d’art et de design dédié à la création contemporaine, né en 2014 et développé par la ville de Nègrepelisse. Son ouverture aux thématiques liées à l’alimentation et au design, en fait un lieu unique en Europe.
Le centre d’art est conçu comme un laboratoire qui invite artistes plasticiens, designers, graphistes, architectes, etc., à développer des projets in situ. Expositions, résidences et workshops permettent d’impliquer le territoire et ses habitants dans le processus de création. 

La commune de Nègrepelisse devient un espace d’étude et d’expérimentation de production artistique en circuits cours à ciel ouvert. Elle abrite plusieurs œuvres de design et d’architecture qui sont disposées dans l’espace public et dans la cour du centre d’art :

-Chérie, j’ai oublié la nappe ! /  5.5 designers

-Le bois de Sharewood / Matali Crasset.

-Aux Arbres ! La forêt nourricière, garde-manger de La cuisine // Le Nouveau Ministère de l’Agriculture 

-Maxidreams / Florence Doléac

-Canopée / Collaboration Blouses Brothers & ConstructLab

-Tables pour un repas normal en temps de COVID / Atelier de Joanne Pouzenc de L’ENSA Toulouse

Tous ces questionnements résonnent dans les Fourneaux du centre d’art, une cuisine expérimentale à la fois outil de création et de médiation. Espace vivant, le centre propose une programmation d’évènements toute l’année : visites, ateliers, conférences, performances, lectures, concerts

Name: Kunst in de Zorg
Description:
Stichting Kunst in de Zorg gelooft in de kracht van kunst om nieuwe ontmoetingen te realiseren met de kwetsbaren in onze samenleving. 

Stichting Kunst in de Zorg wil culturele interventies en kunst in de zorg vermeerderen. Met haar projecten realiseert zij nieuwe kunstprojecten voor zorgvragers. Tegelijkertijd boort zij een nog openliggend werkterrein voor kunstenaars en creatieven aan. 

Met haar projecten opereert Stichting Kunst in de Zorg in meer dan vijftig zorginstellingen, symposia en congressen en exposeert zij in musea. Zij betreedt beleidsterreinen zoals kunst, community art, cultuurparticipatie, zorg en welzijn, vrijwilligerswerk en beeldvorming over kwetsbare ouderen. 

Stichting Kunst in de Zorg is actief op nationaal en internationaal niveau.

Name: AGENCE BACKUP
Description:
AGENCE BACKUP est spécialisée dans l'organisation d'événements grands formats. Nous accompagnons des organisateurs d'événements dans le déploiement opérationnel de leurs événements (Accueil du public, suivi de leurs clients, gestion des fournisseurs, coordination logistique). Nous opérons notamment dans le domaine du salon B2B, mais également sur des opérations d'activation street marketing, et dans le domaine culturel.

Notre structure à taille humaine se distingue par sa flexibilité et sa recherche de solutions parfaitement adaptées aux besoins de ses clients.

Name: LeBasse Projects
Description:
LeBasse Projects is an international art and culture consulting firm, partnering with artists and clients to develop and execute engaging public art, cultural programming, and experiential installations.

With expertise in murals, sculptures, indoor and outdoor installations, functional art, festivals, performances, and experiential activations, LeBasse Projects designs, develops, and enacts public art programming that is engaging and culturally resonant.

We specialize in utilizing public art programming to enhance projects and communities through cultural placemaking, placekeeping, and urban design. Working with an international roster of artists, designers, and fabricators, we have the ability to manage projects of nearly any scale, on any continent, for any client.

With a holistic approach, we consider micro and macro levels of each project. Delivering an exceptional project curated for a specific context always comes first, and we view all projects as an opportunity to shape, highlight, and honor the cultural landscape.

For more information about our projects or services, email mail@lebasseprojects.com.

Name: The Bows
Description: The Bows is an artist-run centre in Mohkínstsis (Calgary, Alberta), Treaty 7 Territory. Our core goals are: to support the development, creation, and presentation of new work by early-career artists; to provide affordable studio space for local artists; and to broaden the reach and scope of contemporary art in this city, with the ultimate, if ambitious, aim to expose this city to artistic work that explores pressing contemporary issues. We work toward these goals with an artist-centric approach that prioritizes the wholesale support of artists; creative and radical uses of spaces outside of the gallery; and a curatorial focus on projects and practices that dovetail with the specific socio-political, cultural, colonial, economic, and Indigenous histories and contexts of this province. Ultimately, The Bows strives to empower and support artists to imagine radical futures, and to invite those inside and outside of our community to be co-conspirators in realizing such futures.

Name: Avenue Road Arts School
Description:
The Avenue Road Arts School has been inspiring creativity since 1993. The school has become a leader in arts education. Since its opening, ARAS has become a recognized and trusted school in providing high quality art classes. Whether in person or virtually, students know that they will receive the best in art training, with a warm and supportive approach. There is a large roster of classes for children and adults, novice to experienced and those looking to exercise their creativity. Programs are offered year-round (fall, winter, spring, summer) and we offer popular programs for March break, summer camps, parties and specialty school workshops.

All programs are taught by professional artist/educators, who have a passion for their art practice, as well as plenty of teaching experience. Small class sizes allow for plenty of individual attention.

Name: Akademi Trabzon
Description:
Un , su, ateş aynıdır; ancak her ekmek bir değildir değil mi? Ustanın hiç mi katkısı yoktur eşsiz Trabzon Ekmeğinde?

Küçük bir örnekle başlayalım. 7 yıl keman eğitimi alan bir öğrencimiz, artık konservatuara ciddi bir hazırlık için Akademi Trabzon’a gelir. Velisi , çocuğunun 7 yıldır keman eğitimi aldığını söyler. Ancak Yardımcı Doçent olan hocamız, genç öğrencimizi dinlediğinde gerçeği üzülerek söyler. Yalnızca 1 yıl keman eğitimi almış bir öğrencinin seviyesindedir.
Eğitmek kolay iş olsa, kutsal meslek olur muydu öğretmenlik? Bir işi çok iyi bilmek, onu çok iyi öğretebilmek anlamına gelmez ki. Bu yüzden Akademik eğitim önemlidir. Öğretmeyi bilmek bu nokta öne çıkıyor. Akademi Trabzon’un amacı, Trabzon’da bu eksikliği kapatmaktır.
Yardımcı Doçentler, Araştırma Görevlileri, Devlet Tiyatro Sanatçıları gibi işin ehli insanlardan, şehrimiz insanının faydalanması için bir fırsat sunuyoruz Trabzon’a.
Modern teknolojinin sunduğu bütün imkanlarla , Akademi Trabzon’da en sağlıklı şekilde öğrencilerimizi eğitiyoruz.

Name: Reynolds Gallery, Inc.
Description:
Reynolds Gallery is a contemporary gallery in Richmond, Virginia. It is our mission to exhibit significant and challenging art by regional and nationally-known artists.

Over the past 40 years, Reynolds Gallery has brought art made by some of the most important artists to Richmond including Sally Mann, Ellsworth Kelly, Jasper Johns and Nell Blaine. In addition, we have worked to develop opportunities for local artists to expand their careers outside of Richmond. These artists include Tara Donovan, Robert Stuart, Philip Geiger, Heide Trepanier and Kendall Buster. During these years, Bev Reynolds has developed a strong working relationship with nationally recognized Virginia Commonwealth University’s School of the Arts and numerous New York City art galleries and dealers.

Several years ago, in an important step to promote new and innovative art by emerging artists, Reynolds doubled the size of the gallery to 4,400 square feet. The gallery currently mounts approximately 15 exhibitions and installations a year. Bev develops support for artists within the community through exhibitions, gallery talks, events, and partnerships with art educators and institutions.

Name: Association nationale des Potimarrants
Description:
L'Association Nationale des Potimarrants regroupent 150 jeunes qui souhaitent participer à une aventure théâtrale. 

Ce qui les anime ??? Leur envie de se dépasser, d'apprendre à se connaître, d'évoluer en groupe, ... et tout cela au sein de l'univers magique du Théâtre !

 Chaque année, les Potimarrants explorent les trésors du patrimoine théâtral français en revisitant les grands auteurs comiques (Tristan Bernard, George Feydeau, Eugène Labiche, Nikolaï Gogol) pour des représentations théâtrales, musicales  et dansantes  de qualité, dont les bénéfices sont reversés à une cause qui leur tient à cœur !

- Création : en 2011 à Nantes
- Fondateurs : Jean de Reboul et Jean-Baptiste Darantière.
- 5 Troupes : Nantes, Lyon, Marseille, Paris (x2) 
- Nos Parrains : Roland Giraud et Julien Pestel. Leur rôle est de guider artistiquement l'association pour toujours plus de professionnalisme  !!

En 2018, les Potisolidaires sont créés. Leur mission: Adapter des scènes et des textes pour les présenter à des personnes qui n'y ont pas accès.

Name: MADD art consulting
Description:
Independent consultancy agency offering different services in favor of the art, design, architecture and hospitality industries:

• Advisory
• Project management 
• Consulting for artists

References: Design to Society, Jane Puylagarde, Grégoire Scalabre, Morgane Baroghel-Crucq, Laurentine Périlhou, Pascal Oudet

Original acylic paintings and fine art prints are availabe for sale, and he also accepts limited commissions.

Description:
We are Alia Gallery, an Art Gallery owned by the well known Omani artist  Alia Al Farsi located in the Sultanate of Oman. Alia’s paintings are inspired by her love for Sufism and the Omani culture. She has experience of integrating diverse materials into her paints such as French poetry, ancient Cambodian textiles, and Omani artifacts and coins. The art gallery has more than 200 paintings painted by Alia, and are available for purchase, The average price of the painting in the Gallery is 15,000 USD. The gallery also provides professional services to other artists in running art shows and exhibitions.  

Artist Resume:

Omani Cultural Week Berlin 2008

Name: Annan Gallery
Description:
The Annan Gallery, Glasgow is one of the country's leading contemporary art galleries, having promoted in turn each of the major Scottish Art movements and their predominant artists. A tradition that carries on today.

Along with its sister gallery, The Strathearn Gallery in Crieff, both galleries feature regularly changing exhibitions showcasing the finest artists working in the country today.  We also show glass, ceramic and sculpture ensuring there’s always something for everyone.  

Located in the West End of Glasgow, we’re easy to find with lots of parking nearby. Be assured of a friendly welcome and informative, helpful service whether you call in to the Gallery or reach us through our website.

Name: LOST DOG Art & Frame Co.
Description:
We are an omnichannel art business creating in-house art and design sold framed or as prints. We sell wholesale to hundreds of customers around the United States and meet our customers primarily through industry trade shows. We sell directly to consumers through our website www.ilostmydog.com as well as our retail store and gallery. Our custom framing division serves the needs of local interior designers and general contractors doing custom installations as well as local customers needing their art and items framed. You can also find us at many pop-up markets and art fairs around the tri-state area where we also sell our designs and ready-made frames direct to consumers.
Our taste in modern design and graphics that pop has been capturing audiences since 2009 and continues to grow. Our client list includes the likes of the small indie-owned town gift shops, middle-sized companies like LL Bean and Ron Jon Surf Shop, as well as larger stores like Bed Bath & Beyond and Home Goods. 
Our missoin is to continue to lead in the home decor category by making compelling art that is original, fun, and appeals to a broad category of consumers.

The School of Performing and Visual Arts houses undergraduate programs in art, graphic design, painting and drawing, sculpture, dance performance and choreography, dance education, theatre, theatre performance, and theatre design and technology. Graduate program are offered in theatre performance, theatre design and technology, and directing. The school produces exhibitions and performances throughout the year, and students are highly engaged in practice in the arts.

The University of Southern Mississippi is an accredited institutional member of the National Association of Schools of Art  & Design, the National Association of Schools of Dance, and the National Association of Schools of Theatre.

Name: FIRST ART FAIR
Description:
Lovers of contemporary art can indulge themselves during the FIRST ART FAIR. From 19 to 22 January 2023, the Passenger Terminal Amsterdam will be transformed for the third time into a sparkling fair for contemporary art.

During the FIRST ART FAIR both galleries and independent artists present themselves. A refreshing combination of many different disciplines in a wide spectrum of styles in which love for and inspiration through art is central. FIRST ART FAIR invites for the first time, and as the only fair in the Netherlands, these artists to exhibit their own work and each to show a surprising addition of pure craftsmanship. The artist's story is central to this. The connection between gallery and individual artist is what makes the FIRST ART FAIR so unique.

Description:
Art has always been close to my heart, and I always get excited whenever I think how much it represents the images of brands and communicates their message across. With this at heart, I design custom pattern collections and matching placement prints from my hand-painted and nature-inspired watercolour motifs and art using mainly Adobe Illustrator. It gives me great pleasure to be able to offer unique and distinctive custom pattern designs for markets like fabric, wall paper, rugs and stationaries. 

My designs are presented in multiple colourways and according to the printing and other requirements of clients. I'm very much open to having dialogues and providing customizable and workable documents.

Name: Jordan Sprigg Sculptures
Description:
Based in country Western Australia, Sprigg uses recycled metals found from retired machinery, scrap heaps and clearance sales. Some of the pieces found dating over 100 years old and used by the earliest settlers of Western Australia. The objects he produces range from dragonflies, owls and seahorses, to larger scale sharks, eagles and even horses.

The scrap iron sculptures are purposely left in their rusted state to highlight the age of the metal and the history of each piece.  From springs, gears, bearings and nuts to bolts, shovels, pliers and saws, the list is endless as to what the artist makes use of in his work.  Understanding and appreciation of these timeworn parts of a past life allows space for creation of a new life in their current composition.

Longest established & best known name in South Africa in our field. Family business started in Johannesburg in 1936 when Henri Lidchi, original founder, moved from his galleries in Paris, France. In 1935, during his travels he met Sir Ernest Oppenheimer who persuaded him to exhibit at the 1936 Empire Exhibition in Johannesburg.

Name: Lydgalleriet
Description:
Lydgalleriet is a non-profit exhibition platform for sound-based and sound-related art in Bergen, Norway. Our purpose is to promote sonic art expressions through dissemination, stimulation for new production, live events, collaboration and community building. Since 2005, Lydgalleriet has regularly produced artistic projects from most fields within sound art, – from kinetic sculptures to multi-channel installations, concerts, workshops, performance and archival exhibitions.

Lydgalleriet is Norway's only permanent exhibition platform for sound art and sonic practices, offering a varied artistic program throughout the year in our venue in Strandgaten in Bergen. We work closely with artists who display a criticality on sonic, spatial and technological media, contributing to professional discourse and public conversation. Lydgalleriet regularly collaborates with other local, regional and international partners. We are supported by Bergen City Council, Vestland County Council and Arts and Culture Norway.

Name: Drawings by Trent
Description:
The mission of Drawings by Trent is to influence, educate, and inspire others through the sharing of Trent's artistic talent, Trent's online store, and sharing of our experiences on social media and also through our podcast titled "Used Up Pens". 
Trent was diagnosed with level 3 or severe autism at two years old. At about two and a half, Trent picked up a pen and started drawing. It was incredible from the start! At about four years old Trent began to display violent bouts of aggression related to his inability to verbally communicate. During those difficult years, Trent continued to draw but the aggression, changing schools several times, therapies, and his siblings activities made it difficult to do much else. In 2016 Trent's first drawing video went viral. With the help of his school, Heartspring in Wichita, KS, we developed his first coloring book, then shirts, and other items followed. In 2021, Trent's TikTok account took off and we realized Drawings by Trent could provide for Trent's future, teach him valuable job skills, and bring joy to millions of people all over the world!
Please visit Trent's store and read more about our lives and the business at drawingsbytrent.com!

Name: Académie de la Grande Chaumière
Description:
Une histoire dans l’Histoire...

C’est en 1904 que Martha Stettler (1870-1945), artiste peintre suisse, crée l’Académie de la Grande Chaumière, atelier dédié à la peinture et à la sculpture d'après modèle vivant pour les femmes artistes dans le quartier de Montparnasse. (biographie complète ici)

À l’époque, ce dernier sort de terre : la vie commence, les logements sont abordables. Il y a de la place pour s’installer.  Depuis quelques siècles déjà, la jeunesse aime à se délasser dans ce qui est un village à la campagne avec ses nombreux bals et jardins. Dans leur sillage, des gens de milieu modeste y viennent aussi parce qu’ils trouvent à s’employer dans de nombreuses petites fabriques.

L’Académie de la Grande Chaumière, indissociable dès lors de Montparnasse,  est la seule institution qui, au début du XXème siècle, ouvre la voie à l’Art Indépendant, laissant s’exprimer toutes les formes ou techniques, libérant ses visiteurs et ses artistes des tendances académiques contraignantes artistiquement, mais aussi intellectuellement. Elle sera, en quelque sorte, un lieu de résistance et de création pure.
