Name: The Gray Circle
Description:
For nearly 20 years, London based The Gray Circle has pioneered "Lightscapes": site-specific art that incorporates light, colour and moving image and are individually designed to transform a particular space and create an evolving interactive experience for the viewer. Projects can be video installations, free-standing light sculptures, projections, video mapping or LED installations.

 The sheer artistry and versatility – thanks to this variety of formats and individual approach - have won commissions world-wide from architectural, corporate and theatrical clients (from Lord of the Rings on-stage to international projects with Zaha Hadid Architects). 

Lightscapes were a natural development from founder and creative director Thomas D Gray’s background in 2D and 3D Design and Film: The Gray Circle's signature stamp combines a multi-dimensional quality, truly beautiful layering of filmed images, and a sensory experience. In many, a dynamic light source or moving images project onto or through materials such as glass, steel, fabric and water.

Projects include: 
- An art documentary film of Chicago that transforms the interior of a fabric ‘pod’ building designed specifically by Zaha Hadid Architects to house the project in Millennium Park.
- For the London Hippodrome Casino, 57 screens surrounding the viewer over several floors of the historic atrium, blend seamless images of London sights and Vegas lights.

Name: Christophe JORON-DEREM
Description: Commissaire-priseur volontaire et judiciaire

Name: Mary Martin Gallery
Description: Mary Martin Gallery is a fine art company based out of United States.

Name: RTalwar Compliance
Description:
We offer independent compliance consultancy for art & luxury businesses. 

Founded by Rakhi Talwar in 2019, RTalwar Compliance aims to help businesses succeed at ‘doing the right thing’. We are passionate about developing compliance programmes which not only protect your business, but also enhance your reputation and commercial opportunities.   

If you would like to find out more, please visit our website: www.rtalwar.com or get in touch: rt@rtalwar.com

Name: Insit'Arts
Description:
InSit'Arts est une agence de street art, valorisant le travail des artistes et graffeurs par la réalisation de fresques murales inspirées du graffiti et du street art, à destination des particuliers, collectivités, bailleurs ou locaux privés. 
L'agence  sélectionne des artistes et graffeurs professionnels, locaux et internationaux, spécialisés dans la réalisation de fresques murales, et met un point d'honneur à proposer une réelle diversité artistique, en plus de la parité au sein de l'agence.

InSit'Arts se positionne également comme acteur culturel de la ville de Montpellier, en s'associant à différentes structures associatives pour la mise en place de projets artistiques. 

Nous accompagnons les artistes et street artistes, confirmés ou émergents, dans leurs actions de démarchage et développement.

Name: Fay Gold Art Advisory
Description:
Fay Gold Art Advisory meets the needs of both residential and corporate clients. Whether you are looking to purchase a single artwork, or if you are trying to accommodate a corporate space, we can provide assistance for you. Below is a list of the many services we offer:
 
-Establishing personal relationships with clients, dealers, and artists

-Powerpoint presentations with digitized files for online accommodations as well as in person

-Taking clients shopping for artwork at galleries and major art fairs  (Art Basel Miami, The Armory Show New York, Pulse, and Scope)

-Knowledgable interpretation of floor plans

-Multi-level budget options

-Providing a range of artwork from photography, paintings, prints, and sculpture to commissioned work

-Transportation and delivery of artwork

-Professional installation and security hangers

-Appraisal services

-Evaluating existing collections and emphasizing premium works to retain

-Obtaining authentication of works

-Representing clients in auctions and private negotiations

-Acquiring and selling specific works of art

-Researching and locating distinct requests for collectors

-Closely evaluating and assessing potential purchases

-Custom framing at all budget levels, including reframing to refresh a collection

-Artwork relocation programs

-Artwork leasing programs

-Curatorial services available

Name: La Botica Paris
Description:
La Botica est un espace vivant, modulable et évolutif, qui présente et soutien les créations de jeunes stylistes et artistes.
Ce nouveau lieu est un «Air-du-Temps», un laboratoire, une galerie-store, un show room, un pop up créateurs, un atelier, un lieu de découvertes culinaires et un mur extérieur dédié au Street Art. La Botica est également une adresse pour des évènements ponctuels, réguliers et privatisable, autour de tendances émanant de multiples univers créatifs et autres.

Name: Yeryüzü Sahnesi
Description: Yeryüzü Sahnesi, çocukları sanat ve sürdürülebilirlik ile buluşturan yenilikçi bir platform olarak dikkat çekiyor. Doğanın bir parçası olduğumuzu hatırlatan tiyatro oyunları, atölyeler ve interaktif etkinliklerle çocuklara eğlenceli ve öğretici bir deneyim sunmayı hedefleyen bu oluşum, geleceğin liderleri olan çocukları çevre bilinci yüksek, sorumluluk sahibi ve doğa dostu bireyler olarak yetiştirmeyi amaçlıyor.

Name: Galerie Sophia Vonier
Description: After several years of experience in the art world, Sophia Vonier opened her gallery space in the heart of Salzburg in Spring 2019. Focussing on Austrian and international contemporary art, Galerie Sophia Vonier hosts exhibitions of emerging and mid-career artists, wishing to ideally implement a sustainable structure as well as comprehensive support, especially for female artists. The gallery's program aims at addressing a heterogeneous, though preferable also a young audience of art enthusiasts and collectors through stimulating exhibitions and a variety of accompanying events.

Name: Groupe APARIS
Description:
AParis est un groupe d'édition online qui offre à chaque auteur l'expérience de publication qui leur correspond.

Le Groupe Aparis compte plusieurs maisons d'édition : Edilivre, Publibook, la Société des Écrivains, Connaissances et savoirs et enfin, Mon Petit Éditeur.

Name: Coucool
Description: Coucool est un rassemblement artistique et bienveillant, mis en fête par Éros Sélavy

Name: Royal University of Fine Arts
Description:
The Royal University of Fine Arts (RUFAs the leading public university specialized in culture and fine arts. It has five faculties and a research center. All five faculties are: Faculty of Archaeology, Faculty of Architecture and Urbanization, Faculty of Choreographic Arts, Faculty of Fine Arts Arts and the Faculty of Music.

The Faculty of Fine Arts has main 5 majors: Interior Design, Graphic Design, Painting and Sculpture. The Faculty of Choreographic Arts has 2 main majors: Directing and Writing.

Name: Almach Art
Description:
Almach Art is an art gallery that aims to promote artists and events dedicated to art.

The spirit that animates us has led us to create an environment where artists, collectors and simple enthusiasts can exchange opinions, to better understand each art and bring back to life that "sparkling air" that was breathed in the golden age of the international art movement.

We believe that, today more than ever, art must recover its role as a stimulus and contribution to the "well-being" and "development" of the human being. We want to restore the pleasure of living art, both on the part of those who create it and those who enjoy it through the viewing or possession of works of art.

The Art we are dealing with wants to be universal and without geographical or temporal boundaries. Therefore, in the years to come, as in the past, you will be able to participate in events dedicated to modern art with the revaluation of important artists, contemporary art with established masters and young promises, up to the 1800's and ancient art, which still today boast many admirers. Special attention will also be given to sculpture, which deserves greater visibility than is sometimes reserved for it.

To do this, we have taken particular care of our spaces, using non-toxic paints, without formaldehyde and able to absorb and neutralize more than 90% of the pollutants present in the air. The flooring is in oil-treated oak. The lighting is completely LED, for an energy saving around 80%, but with a colour rendering of the main lighting fixtures higher than CRI98.

We want the stay during the visit to be a pleasant experience as well.

Name: Everest Film Academy
Description: Everest Film Academy offers a one-year intensive filmmaking course led by industry professionals and experienced academicians. The curriculum blends theory with practical exercises to ensure students master the craft and enter the industry prepared. Faculty members are accomplished graduates from renowned institutions worldwide, supplemented by workshops with international professors and industry experts. EFA provides specializations in Acting, Direction, Cinematography, Visual Editing, and VFX, making it an ideal destination for art enthusiasts seeking specialized skills. With Nepal's film industry flourishing and reaching global audiences, joining EFA offers a timely opportunity to contribute to this thriving sector. The academy emphasizes reality-based knowledge and fosters creativity through a project-based curriculum.

Name: Det Fynske Kunstakademi
Description:
Det Fynske Kunstakademi uddanner billedkunstnere på højeste niveau og arbejder engageret for at udbrede kendskabet til samtidskunsten. Vi er et anerkendt kunstakademi i Nordeuropa med stærke rødder i Odense og et aktivt bidrag til det lokale og nationale kulturliv.

Vores vision er at tilbyde en ambitiøs, nærværende og internationalt orienteret kunstuddannelse, hvor faglighed, refleksion og kreativ udvikling går hånd i hånd. Vi tror på værdien i at være et lille akademi med plads til forskellighed og nære relationer – et sted, hvor man kan vokse som kunstner og menneske.

Siden vores etablering i 1944 har vi været i konstant udvikling. Med vores placering i den tidligere museumsbygning i hjertet af Odense har vi fået en markant ramme om vores kunstneriske virke. Herfra arbejder vi målrettet med at styrke undervisningen, dyrke et åbent og kritisk læringsmiljø og skabe forbindelser til både lokale og internationale samarbejdspartnere.

Vi ønsker at uddanne kunstnere til et meningsfuldt arbejdsliv og være en synlig, aktiv institution i byens kulturliv. Gennem udstillinger, arrangementer og samarbejder inviterer vi offentligheden ind og viser, hvad vi kan – og hvem vi er.

Kernen i vores identitet er den høje faglighed, de store ambitioner og et tæt fællesskab. Det er dette, der former sjælen i Det Fynske Kunstakademi – og det, vi ønsker at blive kendt for.

Name: Biennale Hors Normes
Description:
En 2004, l’association « La Sauce Singulière » est née d’une utopie portée par 3 plasticiens. Agitateurs de motivations, en 2005 ils suscitent suffisamment le désir des institutions et du public… pour lancer la Biennale Hors Normes. Du foyer de vie au musée, de la MJC à l’université, leur but est d’aller où le public se trouve, et non de l’amener dans un lieu. De nombreux partenaires s’investirent dans l’aventure et permirent ainsi d’installer les œuvres d’artistes contemporains, singuliers, bruts,… aux quatre coins de Lyon et de la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes.

Pour sa 10ème édition, la Biennale Hors Normes vous donne rendez-vous en septembre-octobre 2023 dans de nombreux lieux de la métropole lyonnaise pour des expositions, des ateliers, des conférences, des performances, des spectacles, autour du thème "Le Temps est venu".

Name: HANDFUL Ceramics
Description:
HANDFUL stands for creativity, tactility and a conscious process with clay. We help people feel more inspired, focussed and alive. We offer online workshops, clay meditations as well as clay kits for your company. Connect your team members with their creative potential. Let the hands do the thinking. 

#employerbranding #culture #growth #inspiration #tactility #mindfulness #teambuilding #creativeprocess

Name: HBH-Art
Description:
HBH-Art er et enkeltmands-firma, hvor der skabes og sælges kunst direkte fra atelier.
Jeg arbejder mest i olie på lærred og bronze, men også i akvarel
Farverne fremstiller jeg selv af rene pigmenter og linolie eller akvarelbinder, og lærrederne spænder jeg op på kraftige blindrammer.

Jeg laver gerne bestillingsarbejder med ønskede motiver og portrætter - både af dyr og mennesker.
Min styrke som kunstner er en god koloristisk farvesans og gode tegneevner.

Name: Galería Aina Nowack/AAC
Description:
Aina Nowack comenzó su carrera trabajando para Sotheby´s Buenos Aires en los años 90.
Su pasión por el arte le llevó a visitar talleres  de artistas tanto en España, su país natal, como en Argentina, donde vivió 17 años. Así fue incorporando nuevas obras a su colección privada y forjando amistad con los artistas.

En el año 2006 inaugura su primera exposición en Madrid, con idea de dar a conocer en Europa el arte argentino contemporáneo. Más tarde, y con el crecimiento de la galería se fueron incorporando algunos artistas norteamericanos y europeos.

AINA NOWACK / AAC  se concentra en un grupo reducido de artistas a los que representa de una manera muy personalizada, exponiendo en forma individual y colectiva en su espacio.
Basada en el concepto de “Galería de Arte Boutique”, Aina Nowack / ACC genera una relación personal entre los artistas y los clientes, visitando los talleres, los espacios donde serán ubicadas las obras y asesorando a los clientes en cuanto a sus adquisiciones.

El trato personal con el cliente y artistas requiere cita previa.

Name: 511 Gallery
Description: 511 GALLERY and 511 PROJECTS is a salon-style gallery (but open to the public) of contemporary art operating out of The Chelsea Mercantile Building on Seventh Avenue. 511 Gallery represents ten artists, international as well as American, who work in the media of painting, photography, sculpture, and site-specific art. 511 Projects has two distinct practices: a secondary market, or “backroom” practice in the deaccessioning and acquisition of American and European art of the nineteenth through twenty-first centuries – with particular expertise in the genres of American Impressionism, American Modernism, Hudson River School, and Photography – on behalf of public and private collections; and a curatorial practice in which we organize exhibitions for museums, art centers, and corporate venues. The primary mission of both 511 Gallery and 511 Projects is to place fine artworks in public institutions.

Name: Espace 251 Nord - art contemporain
Kunstencentrum Waalwijk
Description: Het Kunstencentrum Waalwijk biedt een scala aan cursussen aan op het gebied van theater, musical, dans, muziek en beeldende kunst. Voor alle leeftijden!

Name: THE ELECTRIC SUNSHINE PROJECT COMMUNITY INTEREST COMPANY
Description: THE ELECTRIC SUNSHINE PROJECT COMMUNITY INTEREST COMPANY is a community theatre company who are the lead organisation at Blackpool's newest venue; The Old Electric.

Name: BDA Audencia 2022
Description:
Le Bureau des Arts d'Audencia a pour mission d'organiser la vie artistique du campus mais également de promouvoir la culture au sein et en dehors de l'école. 

L'association a une réelle volonté d'innover dans ses fonctions et le désir de rendre la culture plus accessible et attrayante pour les étudiants à travers l'organisation de divers événements regroupant musique, chant, danse, théâtre, photographie, mode et bien d'autres. 

Le BDA est à l'initiative de nombreux projets tels que la Comédie musicale (Comu), les scènes ouvertes ou le concours artistique (Oméga) organisé en collaboration avec Centrale Nantes et l'ENSA.

Name: Flipkick of New York Limited Liability Company
Description:
Flipkick of New York Limited Liability Company offers an exclusive, full-service experience for established and up-and-coming artists, celebrities, and holders of valuable art who wish to monetize their work with Physical NFTs.

As the premier agency and technology partner creating Physical NFTs, we have devised a process to cryptographically authenticate physical works of art such as sculptures and paintings.

We offer experience and professionalism to enable successful creators to effortlessly add new revenue streams.

Our services are not available to the general public.

Name: Sarah Gontard Artwork
Description: Je pratique le dessin au crayon & à l’encre ainsi que la tampographie ou gravure sur supports doux. Mes inspirations proviennent de divers univers, notamment de l’art divin, des artistes de l’art nouveau qui utilisaient beaucoup les “codes” spirituels, scientifiques, magiques pour raconter une histoire en une seule image.

Name: Charlotte George Artist
Description:
A Florida based artist with a background in fashion design originally born & raised in New Zealand. These factors have heavily influenced the style of work I create and has given me a great appreciation and love of the natural world.

I'm inspired by color, nature and its formations especially the contrast of land and sea with all its quirks and raw beauty. I’m constantly exploring and experimenting with new techniques and color inspiration.

I predominately create abstract landscapes and are considered to be a multidimensional abstract artist. I use a variety of mediums but love to work with acrylic inks because of their spontaneity and the unexpected detail it creates. I’m known to use collage and when creating prefer to work fluidly, following the lead of the artwork itself.

@artistcgeorge #artistcgeorge

Name: Galerie Anna25
Description:
Die Galerie Anna25 wurde 2012 von Anna Franek in München als innovatives Ausstellungsprojekt ins Leben gerufen. Ursprünglich organisierte sie alle drei Monate am 25. eines Monats eine 25-stündige Ausstellung an wechselnden Orten. Noch im selben Jahr eröffnete sie feste Galerieräume in Berlin-Kreuzberg. Seit 2024 gibt es eine zweite Fläche in München.

Der Fokus der Galerie liegt auf zeitgenössischer Landschaft, unkonventioneller Fotografie und künstlerischen Positionen dazwischen. Das Spektrum reicht von Malerei, Fotografie und Skulptur über Videoarbeiten bis hin zu Installationen und Performances. Mit insgesamt neun Ausstellungen pro Jahr an beiden Standorten sowie regelmäßigen Messebeteiligungen arbeitet die Galerie sowohl mit aufstrebenden als auch etablierten Künstler*innen – darunter feste Galeriekünstler*innen und wechselnde Gastkünstler*innen.

Name: Day Dreamer
Description: Day Dreamer is an app that lets local creatives connect and collaborate. Artists are be able to filter through portfolios and find their ideal collaboration. Whether the project needs a photographer, a composer, or a makeup artists, Day Dreamer will allow you to catalyze your vision by providing direct access to like-minded creatives in your local area.

Name: GERT JUNES GALLERY
Description:
Gert Junes Gallery is a project-driven contemporary art space in Antwerp.

Founded by curator and art consultant Gert Junes, the gallery presents exhibitions by mid-career and established artists, often exploring the dialogue between image, object and memory.

Name: TMDS AFRICA FOUNDATION
Description:
The idea to give to our youth through art, craft,
design and leadership started in 2018 at
Varsity by Themba Mantshiyo. TMDS AFRICA
FOUNDATION was registered in 2022, our
programs started operating since 2018. We
have trained people from the ages of 12-46
years. Our mission is to focus more on the
youth from 18-35 years of age.
Social Creative Education, entrepreneurship &
Leadership Project, a TMDS AFRICA
FOUNDATION project with the aim to create
future leaders through art, craft, design,
entrepreneurship and leadership. The future
of Africa is on the youth, it is important to
invest in youth. This is a holistic program that
helps young people to learn more about
themselves, to respect other people and the
environment. Through this Initiative we are
able to identify, recruit and train talented
individuals.
Through this different projects we aim to
create opportunities for young people in the
creative industry, such as jewelry, furniture,
fashion, fine art, music, dance, graphic design,
photography but not limited to. As a creative
foundation we believe that art has the
potential to transform lives. Therefore we have
made it our mission to change people’s lives
through the arts.

Name: Wine and Art Experience
Description:
We do Private Events and Team Building, Unique, Original and tailored, Fluor Paint while you drink Wine.
If you are looking to unite and motivate the members of your company, we offer you a unique Fluor Event for the senses. Our artists will guide you to bring out the artist in you, we will propose fun activities to encourage collaboration and communication in your team. In addition, we will give free rein to your creativity to make a Brain Storming with Fluor paint.

Write to us so that we can organize your customized private event, and offer your team an experience they will never forget.

  Contact us for more information!

Name: Postma Fine Art
Description:
About Us

Postma Fine Art is a Private Fine Art Dealer with headquarters in Calgary, Alberta, Canada, specializing in the acquisition, sale, appraisal and celebration of notable indigenous, modern & contemporary Canadian Fine Art.

Name: De Ploegh - Landelijk Kunstenaarsgenootschap & Galerie
Description: De Ploegh is een Landelijk Kunstenaars Genootschap dat in 1934 ontstond in Amersfoort. Na een geschiedenis waarin professionele kwaliteitsheren-beeldhouwers zich verstonden met progressieve autodidacten is De Ploegh vandaag een genootschap dat haar kunsten deelt met de (lokale) gemeenschap en verbeelding een onmiskenbare plek geeft in het (culturele) leven. Onze kunstenaars en hun werk zijn de motor om dit te bereiken. Je kunt de meeste artistieke disciplines vinden in onze strakke, lichte galerie aan de Concinckstraat, waar niet alleen expo's worden gehouden, maar ook lezingen, manifestaties, maakdemonstraties plaatsvinden en kunst op passende wijze gevierd wordt!. Ruimte voor rumoer. Wees welkom!

Name: MY Art Studio SS2 & TTDI
Description:
MY Art Studio SS2 provides an interesting art and craft space for your children. Our classes are being conducted in such a way to allow artistic freedom of expression and choice. While the direction is carefully given on specific themes and topics, children find inspiration mostly from their own experiences and things they like.

The cosy ambience in MY Art Studio SS2 ensures conducive learning environment for your children. MY Art Studio offers various interesting art courses such as the Children Creativity Development Course (CCDC) (for children aged 3-7 years) and Children Graphic Course (CGC) (for children aged 8-12 years) & Children Fine Arts (CFA) (for children aged 10-15 years)

The courses mentioned above are carefully designed to provide children with the proper platform to express themselves through art. Our fun “Holiday Programs”, art events and competitions also make MY Art Studio SS2 the ideal expressive learning centre for your children.

Name: newplatform.art
Description: newplatform.art is a not-for-profit which supports artists at an early stage of their career by providing opportunities to display their work, develop their skills to enable them to sustain their careers as professional artists by participation in our professional development programme.

Name: Bureau Des Arts -  ESTP Dijon
Description:
Bureau Des Arts ESTP DIJON 
Promotion de la culture sur le campus dijonnais de l'ESTP.

Name: LKFF Arts Projects - Contemporary Art Gallery
Description:
LKFF Art Projects deals with contemporary sculpture.

The gallery represents several international artists - Armen Agop, Hanneke Beaumont, Les Deux Garçons, Sean Henry, Velasco Vitali, Xavier le Normand,, Yves Dana - who have acquired a solid reputation throughout years of presence on the art scene, alongside promising new names - Marten Ceulemans, Alice Pilastre, Jeroen Beirens, Markus Hofer... - in contemporary art.

The town house of Beersel (15 minutes from Brussels) offers the gallery a beautiful exhibition space.

In addition to exhibiting works for direct purchase, LKFF presents ideas, projects and bozzetti (maquettes) for large-scale installations that go beyond gallery walls. The gallery offers counsel to collectors and institutions on the selection of monumental site-specific sculpture.

Name: Pinot's Palette St. Matthews
Description: Welcome to Pinot's Palette, the premier destination where brushes, palettes, and the finest of beverages converge to offer you an exquisite evening of artistic creation and relaxation.

Name: Nicola Anthony Studios
Description:
The studio & team behind British Anglo-Indian sculptor Nicola Anthony, who's artwork seeks out powerful stories & human narratives around the world.

Running large projects to deliver Nicola’s vision requires a whole team. Over the years our bigger projects have encompassed creating public sculptures in USA, UK, Ireland, Myanmar, and Singapore.  

Nicola Anthony Studios has an ethos of collaboration & engaging communities. We create deep meaning, experiences & memories through artworks. We pride ourselves on producing world-class, iconic sculptures which engage diverse audiences. Our work is sustainably produced, courageous & full of creativity. 



Artist, Director, Vision leader: Nicola Anthony

In 17 years of sculpting Nicola has developed her ability to deliver high quality sustainable artwork, regularly managing a large budget & a team. Nicola has created public sculptures all over the world and worked with a diverse range of clients and communities. She has been shortlisted for the Sovereign Art Prize and the ING Art Prize, won the accolade of the New Voices of Ireland Award, and features in influential public and private art collections around the world.

Her experience in the arts internationally, and her  work as a board member of Royal Society of Sculptors also means Nicola brings a vast network of advisors, mentors, and consultants into projects.

Name: RESCUBIKA Creations
Description:
Spécialisé dans les Arts visuels.
Représentations techniques en Architecture et Urbanisme & Performances artistiques.

Name: Le Coquelicot Revue
Description: Le Coquelicot est une revue internationale d'art et de poésie basée à Lyon. Depuis 2018, la revue partage la poésie sous toutes ses formes. Elle crée des passerelles entre les expressions artistiques, sans frontière à la créativité. Les styles se mélangent sans contraintes littéraires ou plastiques, générationnelles ou géographiques, défendant l'idée d'un échange cosmopolite. La tête renversée ou la revue de travers, Le Coquelicot donne à lire et à voir une diversité de contenus artistiques et poétiques.

Name: Shabahang Rug Gallery - Waukesha
Description: Enrich your home with an exquisite and masterfully made Oriental rug from Shabahang Rug Gallery - Waukesha. The Shabahang family has been in the carpet industry for over one hundred years. For more than 135 years, the Shabahangs have cultivated a reputation for excellence, based on their dedication to both their artisan vendors and their loyal clients. Shabahang Rug Gallery has thousands of rugs on display, each of which has been hand selected by Bruce Shabahang who personally looks at hundreds of rugs for each one that they ultimately choose for the company.

Name: Fondazione Vignato per l'Arte
Description:
La Fondazione Vignato per l’Arte, ente no-profit riconosciuto dal Ministero per i Beni e le Attività Culturali, è nata a Vicenza nel 2005 dall’iniziativa dei fratelli Giuseppe e Costantino Vignato, due professionisti che operano nel campo dell’odontoiatria.
In questi anni di attività la Fondazione ha costruito un rapporto di contaminazione reciproca con il territorio, ha promosso eventi e progetti per sposare le forme contemporanee della creatività con i luoghi e gli spazi di una città intrisa di storia e cultura millenarie come Vicenza.

Name: LEXINGTON ARTS AND CRAFTS SOCIETY INC
Description: LexArt is a non-profit organization of artists with nine guilds having their own specialized work area and equipment thus enabling members to work in a community of artisans with similar interests, sharing ideas and expertise. We also hold exhibits in our Gallery providing an opportunity to exhibit or sell work free of charge to the public. LexArt also offers classes in various disciplines to the public.

Name: Revista Cinefilia
Description: Para nosotros no es sólo imagen lo que surge de la pantalla, sino magia. A través de esta publicación te permitiremos conocer a los creadores de esa magia y a sus fascinantes creaciones. Encontrarás notas, reportajes, historia, comentarios de Dvd y de Soundtrack, tanto del cine extranjero como nuestro amado cine made in Chile.

Name: Ryan Lee Gallery
Description: Established in 2013 in Chelsea, RYAN LEE is expanding and growing our gallery team. We are home to a dynamic roster of international artists and estates working in a diverse array of media. The gallery has a strong interest and history in artists and estates whose work deals with  social and cultural issues of different generations. The gallery works with collectors, leading museums and scholars to further promote and expand the visibility for its artists and estates through gallery and museum exhibitions, biennials and art fairs.

Name: Heipuaiti
Description:
Artiste
 Papiers, Cutter & Aquarelle
 Couleurs & Fleurs
 Du soleil dans vos maisons
 Metz #heipuaiti

Name: ESPAI CULTURAL JACOMART
Description: Hem creat un punt d'encontre cultural al cor del barri de Torrefiel a València. Es diu Pintor Jacomart i es troba al carrer del mateix nom al núm. 28. La nostra intenció és realitzar un co-working artístic i fer exposicions, presentacions literàries i al voltant del món de l'Art.

Name: Grande Masse des Beaux-Arts
Description:
La Grande Masse des Beaux-Arts est l’association des élèves et anciens élèves des écoles nationales supérieures des Beaux-Arts, d’Architecture et d’Art.

Créée en 1926, l’association a pour objectifs d’établir et d’entretenir des 
échanges et de la solidarité entre ses membres.

Ces principes nous ont valu d’être reconnus d’utilité publique en 1932 et animent notre énergie et volonté d’aider les élèves, jeunes diplômés et professionnels du monde de l’art et de l’architecture.

L’enjeu est de réaffirmer au public l’utilité de ces métiers, les défendre et montrer la valeur ajoutée qu’ils apportent au quotidien. Les activités de l’association permettent de nouer le contact entre ces professions et le plus grand nombre.

Name: Pachi Benavente
Description:
Creo para ti diseños hechos a mano, para que tus colecciones tengan un lugar en el mercado.

Empecé a dibujar hace muchos años como hobby, porque me relajaba y ayudaba a concentrarme mejor; sin embargo, estos dibujos estaban aislados, en libretas, junto a notas y apuntes tanto del colegio, instituto y universidad, hasta que un día me animaron a hacer estos dibujos en una sola hoja. Y así lo hice.

Desde hace tiempo me he sentido atraído por el arte moderno y el arte abstracto y, especialmente, por los pintores suprematistas y los neoplasticistas. De esta manera, estas dos corrientes artísticas han ido conformando parte de mis trazos, las formas geométricas básicas y la abstracción de las formas, con un lenguaje inicial unánimemente azul y blanco que ha ido evolucionando a expresiones coloristas aunque el azul sigue siendo mi lenguaje original.

Creo un lenguaje único nacido de la mezcla de dos realidades distintas: una, mi realidad social y laboral, donde el uso de gráficos y vectores es una constante y, de ahí, el uso casi compulsivo de estos recursos. Y otra, mi inspiración andaluza. El resultado, son imágenes formadas a través la repetición de líneas y curvas; imágenes que no tienen que ser figurativas, ni tienen que remitir a elementos reconocibles, sino a objetos y conceptos abstractos, geométricos, rompiendo la necesidad de la simetría y con un alma árabe.

Para expresar mis ideas y mi mundo, recurro como herramientas y materiales a la inmediatez del bolígrafo y a la cotidianeidad de la cartulina. Las características de este lenguaje y de mis formas hacen que no solo pueda realizar dibujos propiamente dichos, sino que estos trazos puedan ser fácilmente adaptados a muchos tipos de objetos decorativos en la industria de la cerámica, los azulejos y empresas dedicadas al diseño de interiores. Así devuelvo parte de esa inspiración con conceptos más modernos y novedosos, creando espacios y objetos únicos.

Mi enfoque empieza por ti… después, me inspiro.

Name: Louise Cutler Studio
Description:
Louise Cutler Fine Art Studio
Louise Cutler is a Fort Collins based Creationist, artist, vocalist, writer and sculptor. Her work is motivated by her desire to create beauty that cultivates truth, peace and tranquility for your home or office. 
She considers one’s art an extension of one’s life. Her work, whether painting, drawing, writing, gardening, or performing is a visual or written translation of life, feelings, and people she have encountered, places she have been, and things she have seen.
Ms. Cutler’s paintings combine her love of gardening, people and the great outdoors.
Drawing has always come naturally for her; as a child, she drew continually. In grade school, her desk was filled with pencil and crayon drawings. Her imagination was her way of escaping some of the harsh realities of life while growing up in urban America.  
Her desire for peace and harmony is echoed throughout her work, something that was hard to achieve growing up in a family of nine. She believes the purpose of her paintings is to bring peace and serenity into a world where chaos has become the norm.

Name: Skertzò
Description:
Montreurs de rêves:

Dans la nuit des villes comme dans l'espace clos de la scène, Skertzò est le scénographe de territoires fantasmagoriques où ombres noires et lumières révèlent des réalités imaginaires. Skertzò aime les images. Dans une société surmédiatisée, les images sont omniprésentes, désincarnées, banalisées, leur fonction messagère et pervertie par la profusion. Skertzò choisit de les mettre en scène, de les rendre rares, mystérieuses et sensibles. Arpenteur de mythes, metteur en scène des mémoires collectives et des réminiscences, écrivain des espaces, révélateur de sens, Skertzò conçoit, produit et réalise des moments d'exception.

Maîtres de l’illusion et du trompe-l’œil, leurs créations métamorphosent les sites et théâtralisent l’espace urbain.
Leur démarche esthétique aboutit à des formes de narration sans le récit. À la recherche obstinée de formes nouvelles de mise en espace, ils renouvellent en permanence les moyens d'expression du spectacle total.
Atypiques, non conventionnelles, leurs créations sont toujours un mélange unique d’imagination, de poésie et de haute technologie.

Spectacles, performances, installations urbaines, scénographies, expositions, c’est toujours s’adresser à un spectateur en singulier ; parier sur l’intelligence et la sensibilité du public. Susciter la curiosité, raconter des histoires, renouveler le regard, partager l'émerveillement, faire naître le désir...

Name: Dova, Inc./Doug Varone and Dancers
Description:
Founded in 1986 and incorporated in 1995 as DOVA, Inc., a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit corporation, Doug Varone and Dancers was established to explore and advance Varone’s choreographic vision of capturing the nuances of human interaction through movement.  The creation, performance and touring of new dance works are the primary activities of the Company; our education and outreach activities reach professional and pre-professional dancers and seek to improve dance literacy in the general public.

Doug Varone’s choreography is recognized both for its sheer physicality and for its profound emotional insight.  Prized for their muscularity, dexterity and pathos, Doug Varone and Dancers creates kinetically thrilling dances that mine the range of human expression.  “Varone’s ability to convey depths of emotion through highly charged, physically exciting choreography has made him a rarity among his generation,” says the New York Times.

Core to the Company’s mission is sharing its work with a diverse public through performance and outreach.  Since 1986, Doug Varone and Dancers has toured to more than 100 cities throughout North and South America, Europe and Asia, and received major commissions from the American Dance Festival, the Bard SummerScape Festival, Wolf Trap, Jacob’s Pillow and many others.  Varone has directed and choreographed for opera and theatre, including new productions at the Metropolitan Opera, McCarter Theatre Center, Opera Colorado and more.  The outstanding quality of our outreach residencies has made the Company among the most sought-after ambassadors in the dance field, offering residency activities while on tour in addition to intensive workshops for professional and pre-professional dancers.  Participants in our annual workshops and intensives give high praise, such as “life-changing,” and “what I have taken from this experience will continue to help me grow as an artist.”

Name: SOFIA DIAS Artiste Peintre | Painter
Description:
Un trialogue spirituel entre Mouvement, Couleur et Lumière... « Mes peintures sont un arrêt du temps et une porte sur l’infini. A chacun d’y trouver son sens, sa propre résonance » S. Dias

L’artiste est en mouvement permanent, il avance
L’artiste ne s’apprend pas, il s’invente à chaque œuvre

C’est ce que Sofia peint qui lui dit ce qu’elle a voulu peindre. Sofia se connecte à son âme, ressent les couleurs et se laisse porter et emporter par elles. Tout est couleur, croissance et mouvement au travers de ses œuvres, il n’y a pas d’achèvement mais un parachèvement constant.  Son harmonie des couleurs repose uniquement sur l’entrée en contact avec son âme au moment de peindre.

Ses créations sont extrêmement dynamiques par le mouvement du cercle, les différentes textures et l’utilisation des couleurs. L’abstraction tend indéniablement vers l’unité.

Name: Katherine Ara Ltd.
Description:
Katherine Ara Ltd. was established in 1997 and undertakes both restoration and preventive conservation work on all types of easel painting, working mainly on Italian and Netherlandish Old Masters, as well as 18th century British painters, Modern Masters and contemporary paintings. The Studio takes a sensitive and critical approach to paintings conservation and restoration, practicing minimal intervention to restore the balance and integrity of each painting. Our clients are largely private collectors, whilst we also carry out work for auction houses, galleries, and museums.

We are able to carry out a full range of treatments and where it is outside our area of expertise such as lining, panel work and frame conservation, work is subcontracted to expert practitioners in those fields with whom the studio has a longstanding relationship. The Studio practices a wide range of painting conservation and restoration processes, including cleaning, paint consolidation, structural work on canvases and panels, filling paint losses, retouching and varnishing. All such treatments are carried out with minimal intervention and are reversible. The work of the Studio is informed by current academic discussion and the ethical codes laid out by various professional associations of which Katherine is a member.

Condition reports are provided at the outset of the work and full written and photographic documentation of the treatment process is provided for each painting. Technical analysis and art-historical research is carried out as required in order to inform the treatment, drawing on a broad network of expertise for dendrochronology, technical imaging, scientific analysis, and art historical investigation. The Studio also provides condition reports and advice prior to acquisition. Arrangements can be made for painting analysis, framing, art handling and shipping/transportation.

Name: Oficina de Arteiros
Description:
Bem- vindo à OFICINA DE ARTEIROS, uma escola de teatro e dança que estimula o potencial de crianças e adolescentes de uma forma divertida, despertando capacidades naturais do ser humano, como expressão oral, a criatividade, consciência corporal, a autoestima e a inteligência emocional.

 Surgiu com o sonho de duas pessoas em mudar o mundo, ou pelo menos começar pela base: crianças e adolescentes, o nosso futuro! Jéssica e Greg resolveram, então, se aventurar neste desafio: inaugurar uma escola de teatro onde o seu maior objetivo é formar indivíduos melhores e preparados para a vida! Unir a formação acadêmica em psicologia com a vivência no teatro, na televisão e a vontade de transmitir todos estes conhecimentos, seria perfeito. Nasce então a OFICINA DE ARTEIROS, uma escola de teatro que desperta capacidades naturais de crianças e adolescentes, coloca os alunos em contato com os diferentes tipos de expressões artísticas que, hoje em dia, dificilmente são exploradas como deveriam. Estimula o potencial da criança de uma forma divertida, devolvendo à elas, o direito de brincar e aprender ao mesmo tempo. A escola nasceu, cresceu e hoje com mais de 300 alunos, seus idealizadores percebem que podem sim mudar o mundo. Basta começar!

Name: Flamenco with Maika
Description:
Flamenco, Sevillanas and Spanish Dance Classes. 
Group classes, private lessons, and workshops for schools, events, and companies. 

Founded by Maika Jiménez Blanco. 
Maika is a flamenco and Spanish dance teacher with more than 17 years of experience, teaching adults and children in Spain, the United States of America, Mexico, Canada, and the UK. She also led flamenco classes at Rey Juan Carlos University from 2013 to 2018.

Born and raised in Madrid (Spain), she began studying ballet and Spanish dance at the tender age of nine.

Maika studied at Karen Taft Dance Academy and Flamenco Centre “Amor de Dios”, majoring in Spanish Dance at the Conservatory of Dance in Madrid. In 2003, she was awarded a certificate in Teaching Methodology Applied to Spanish Dance and then focused her career on dance education. Maika has continued her professional training alongside teachers including Antonio Canales, La Lupi, Alfonso Losa, María Juncal, and Rojas y Rodriguez.

Maika co-founded the company Spanish Flamenco Tour, based in Miami (USA), a business dedicated to promoting flamenco and Spanish culture, to a local audience.  Adding more strings to her bow, Maika embarked on a Master´s Degree in Leadership and Management of Cultural Projects at the Institute of Dance “Alicia Alonso”, Rey Juan Carlos University. Her final master’s project was based on the promotion of Spanish dance, and receiving a First-Class Degree.

The Choir School pursues rigorous academic curricula in the humanities, mathematics and sciences, and the arts.

Name: Bernard Chauveau Éditions
Description:
Since 2002, Bernard Chauveau’s publishing house develops an editorial activity that gravitates around international contemporary creation. It proposes publications dedicated to fine arts and contemporary decorative arts, and it tackles themes such as architecture, visual arts, design, photography and fashion. 

Bernard Chauveau also develops a gallery activity oriented towards the limited edition of etchings, multiples, original creations and jewellery with contemporary international artists and designers whether young or well-established. Each art work Galerie 8 + 4 publishes is the result of an encounter, a dialogue and a long thinking process, thus paving the way for new correlations to be made between different practices and mediums.

In particular, some of the artists who were published the past few years are: Pierrette Bloch, Antoine Catala, Philippe Favier, Fabrice Hyber, Alex Katz, Claude Lévêque, Vera Molnar, Roman Opalka, Giuseppe Penone, Françoise Pétrovitch, Anne et Patrick Poirier, Claire Trotignon, Bernar Venet, Tomas Vu, Lawrence Weiner… And the designers : Atelier BL 119, François Azambourg, Pierre Charpin, Odile Decq, David Dubois, Régis Mayot, Nestor Perkal, Cédric Ragot…

In 2014, Bernard Chauveau also set up an Art Advisor activity. Strengthened by a network of over a hundred artists, creators and art workshops whose talents and skills intersect, Bernard Chauveau offers a business-oriented tailor-made activity, that puts Art at the center of its concerns in order to prepare and accompany them by giving the encounter with an Artist a prime position.

Name: àcentmètresducentredumonde (ACMCM)
Description:
Created in 2004 by Vicent Madramany, the Contemporary Art Center offers : 
-Contemporary art exhibitions
-Permanent Collection
-School visits
-Room rental for events

Name: The Art Dome
Description:
At The Art Dome, we’re reshaping how art lives in the world — and in the workplace.

 For emerging artists, we offer mentorship, international visibility, and real opportunities — from pop-up exhibitions in Miami and Bogotá to long-term residencies.

 For forward-thinking companies, we create bespoke Dome Collections — curated art that reflects brand values, sparks creativity, and elevates corporate environments.

Your offices tell a story. With Dome Collections, we curate art that:

 Reinforces brand identity

 Inspires teams and clients

 Connects your brand to global artistic talent

Our process is seamless:

Consultancy – Align your brand values with visual storytelling

Curation – Select impactful works by emerging talent

Installation – Integrate art into your space with care and precision

 Founded by Eduardo Ojeda (who sold more Boteros than any gallery), The Art Dome has supported artists across 15+ countries.

 Let’s bring your walls to life — and turn art into strategy.
 Apply as an artist: theartdome.com/i-am-an-artist
 Explore corporate art: store.theartdome.com

Name: FineArtsSociety - NIT Jalandhar
Description: Welcome to Fine Arts Society, where creativity meets community. We are a collective of passionate artists, curators, and enthusiasts dedicated to nurturing the arts in all its forms. Our society is a vibrant hub for collaboration, inspiration, and growth, offering members the opportunity to explore diverse artistic disciplines, showcase their work, and connect with like-minded individuals. Whether you're an established artist or just beginning your creative journey, Fine Arts Society is your space to innovate, inspire, and be inspired. Join us in shaping the future of art together.

Name: CEA Cooperativa de Ensino Artístico
Description: Privately own, non-profit organization devoted to teaching fine and performing arts - Visual Arts, Drama and Theatre, Music and Dancing.

Name: Xpress
Description:
Xpress, Circle of Talent Uden
Kunst is investeren in de toekomst. Kinderen en jongeren moeten geïnspireerd en gestimuleerd worden om hun talent te ontdekken en te ontwikkelen. Het op een vroege leeftijd kennis maken met kunst en cultuur en het stimuleren en inspireren van talent resulteert in jonge, creatieve, nieuwe denkers en makers die aansluiten bij de nieuwe, snel veranderende maatschappij, het bedrijfsleven en het onderwijs. De Circle of Talent gebruikt de sportwereld als inspiratie. Daar kunnen kinderen zich vanaf de breedtesport, via selecties, doorontwikkelen naar de topsport. In de Circle of Talent kunnen kinderen en jongeren door middel van structureel kunstonderwijs, verzorgd door een kunstprofessional, hun talenten ontdekken en ontwikkelen in de breedtekunst (het primair en voortgezet onderwijs). Vervolgens gaat hun ontwikkeling verder van talentklassen in de vrije tijd naar de topkunst (kunstvakopleidingen) en geven zij als volwassene op hun beurt hun kennis, ervaring en passie door aan nieuwe generaties, terug aan de gemeenschap. Natuurlijk hoeft niet elk kind een kunstprofessional te worden. Wel staan we bij de Circle of Talent voor het ontdekken van je talenten: met kunst leer je jezelf kennen, ontwikkel je je creativiteit en krijg je meer zelfvertrouwen!  
 
Xpress, samenwerking onderwijs, overheid en bedrijfsleven 
Met Xpress gaan Kunst & Co en De Pul de Circle of Talent in Uden en omgeving opzetten. Dit willen we samen doen met partners uit het (kunst)onderwijs, (gemeentelijke) overheid en bedrijfsleven. In Beter Bed hebben we reeds een enthousiaste en betrokken partner gevonden die Xpress verder met ons uit gaat bouwen. Xpress wil een open en toegankelijk netwerk vormen waarbij we talent in Uden willen verbinden. 
We nodigen het culturele veld en het bedrijfsleven uit zich bij ons aan te sluiten!

Name: The Art Plug
Description:
The Art Plug is a Miami based creative art agency & cohesive brand founded by Marcel Katz providing bespoke solutions for all art related needs.  From curated brand activations and murals, to artist development and consulting, we offer a wide range of services for our clients around the world. For our tightly woven team, art isn’t just a passion – it’s an integrated lifestyle. 

Together with the gallery and art dealership Marcel Katz Art and The Art Plug Power House, an adaptive cultural & art experience, The Art Plug forms a conglomerate of art-based companies. All three entities provide a range of international services and experiences related to the art-industry. The company has worked with brands (Lyft, Virgin, Stoli, Heineken, Champs Sports, Buzzfeed), leaders of music and entertainment (Universal Music Group, Atlantic Records, Island Records, First Access Entertainment) and non-profits (Best Buddies, The Caliber Foundation, FACCI).

Name: Malaysian Indian Horseback Archery Alliance
Description:
Rubentheran is the Founder of Malaysian Indian Horseback Archery Alliance (MIHAA) which established since year 2019.

Rubentheran is the First Indian Horseback Archer and a national athlete under the Malaysian Horseback Archery team.

MIHAA aims to provide assistance and training to the young talents in horseback archery field.

MIHAA compromise of a team of experienced trainers involving training of horseback riding, archery and horseback archery.

Name: 3LD Art& Technology
Description:
3-Legged Dog exists to produce new, original works in theater, performance, media and hybrid forms.  Working out of a strong literary tradition, our mission is to explore the new narrative possibilities created by digital technology, and to provide an environment for our artists to create new tools and modes of expression so that they can excel across a range of disciplines. 

Fostering Cutting Edge Artwork since 2006:

3LD Art & Technology Center is a community-oriented and artist-run production development studio for emerging and established artists and organizations that create large-scale experimental artworks of all kinds.
Since opening in 2006, we have hosted more than 700 artists a year through our 3LD Residency Program, offering artists a unique experience with 24/7 access to specialized equipment, flexible space and expert knowledge, as well as the desperately needed time to fully realize their visions (6 to 16 week residencies). If New York City is to remain at the forefront of  artistic innovation and experimentation, then its artists must have the means to create cutting-edge work.

Name: San Diego Fine Art Society
Bel Art Du Monde
Description:
Bel Art Du Monde is a young startup founded by two students.

We want to expand the art market by making it more accessible. We offer you works of art at lower prices than what the art market can offer you. But before anything else,  we are here to mix talented artists and art lovers.

Join us on Instagram to follow our future post and if interested, make your first sales or purchases!

Be yourself, be our “graine d’artiste”.

Lina & Louise

Name: Art Fabrications
Description: Art Fabrications is a specialist fabricator and installer of metal sculpture and artwork

Name: Significação: Revista de Cultura Audiovisual
Description:
A Significação - Revista de Cultura Audiovisual publica artigos e resenhas voltados ao estudo dos meios e processos audiovisuais e dos sistemas digitais. Com periodicidade semestral, aceita trabalhos originais e inéditos de doutores e doutorandos em sistema de fluxo contínuo.
O periódico é dedicado à comunidade acadêmica interessada nas diferentes formas de expressão da cultura audiovisual, pensada em sua dimensão histórica e de maneira interdisciplinar.

Name: LoudPen Cultural Center
Description:
LoudPen Cultural Centre is a creative community space in Ahmedabad where art, music, language, and culture come alive.

We host hands-on workshops, monthly programs, and spontaneous jam sessions across disciplines—from painting and sculpting to drumming and storytelling. Whether you're looking to learn something new, take a creative pause, or just meet like-minded people, LoudPen is your cultural home.

Built around the idea of slowing down and reconnecting—with yourself and with others—we're all about cozy vibes, bold expression, and joyful learning.

 Art.  Music.  Language.  Expression.  Community.
Step into the creative side of life.

Name: CKV Almere
Description: Coöperatie Kunstzinnige Vorming Almere voor een volledig kwalitatief en hoogwaardig cursusaanbod muziek, dans, theater en beeldende kunst door gediplomeerde en ervaren docenten. Ontstaan uit de opheffing van De Kunstlinie Almere en volledig ongesubsidieerd.

Name: Six Foot Gallery
Description:
Six Foot Gallery is an alternative art and design space, run by artists for artists. The gallery is situated throughout the ground floor of Glasgow’s Pentagon Centre, a business hub with high levels of footfall and public diversity, and provides a platform for exhibitions and events within a non-traditional gallery setting.

Founded in 2010, Six Foot Gallery is operated by a revolving team of interns from a range of specialisms and backgrounds in the arts, all with a collective concern for the promotion of emerging creative practitioners. The gallery invites artists and designers to respond to the space, its physicality, and its populace, through open calls and opportunities for solo and collaborative shows. Our key mission is to support artists and engage with the contemporary art scene in Glasgow and beyond.

Name: Heritage Art Galleries
Description:
Custom Framing & Fine Art Specialists 

With over three decades in the fine art & custom framing industry, Heritage Art Galleries is your one-stop-shop for museum quality custom framing, fine art restoration, needlework stretching and blocking, and the buying and selling of fine art. 
 
Whether you are an art gallery, designer, decorator, artist, or simply looking for that perfect piece for your private collection Heritage Art Galleries is the place for you.
 
Come visit our South Florida gallery minutes from Fort Lauderdale, to see our extensive inventory of original oil paintings & acrylics, limited edition giclees, lithographs, and serigraphs.

Name: Galerie Emmanuelle Rousse
Description:
La création de la galerie Emmanuelle Rousse est l'aboutissement du parcours artistique et personnel de sa fondatrice. 
Axée sur une forte médiation, la galerie facilite la rencontre et l'échange avec le public, les amateurs d'art et les collectionneurs. Le dialogue se crée à travers l'espace d'exposition à Saint-Savin près de Poitiers, des expositions itinérantes dans toute la France et à l'étranger, et le médias internet. 
Sous différentes formes d'expressions artistiques (peinture, dessin, photographie, collage, gravure, sculpture, vidéo...), les artistes de la galerie se réunissent autour de la figure humaine. Ils s'interrogent sur l'identité, individuelle ou collective dans notre société contemporaine.

Name: Gnar Beige
Description: Arts and Entertainment community. We produce and sell fine art, custom designs and offer services.

Name: BLUMA GALERIA DE ARTE
Description:
Galería de arte Bluma surge en 2014 producto del renovado movimiento cultural y artístico que se viene gestando en la ciudad de Córdoba. El proyecto consiste en una galería de arte ubicada en el centro de la Ciudad de Córdoba; en un piso 13 con amplios ventanales y vista a las sierras de Córdoba. Es un espacio capaz de albergar desde obras de pequeño formato hasta grandes instalaciones, buscando como característica la divergencia.

Con foco en la innovación artística con proyección, Bluma se presenta en el mundo del arte, brindando la posibilidad de contacto entre el artista y el espectador. Es también intención de la galería asesorar a nuevos coleccionistas y acompañar a artistas emergentes

Buscamos la promoción del arte local a nivel internacional y pensamos que la mejor forma de lograrlo es a través de un mutuo acompañamiento con los artistas.

Es nuestro objetivo ser parte del movimiento de nuevos galeristas conceptuados como “facilitadores”  de arte dejando de lado las antiguas practicas del modelo clásico del galerista de mostrador.

Queremos apoyar la carrera de artistas contemporáneos y dar a conocer y fomentar el trabajo de los más jóvenes.

Nos caracteriza nuestra forma de trabajo responsable, ordenado, cercano y cálidos tanto al artista como al espectador, esto no es un objetivo sino un fin en si mismo

Name: Galerie d'art 3838
Description: Contemporary Art Gallery. Primary market. Organize travelling art exhibitions in Pays de la Loire, France.

Name: The Lonely Clowns
Description:
From now on, I make clowns each day until such time as crypto is understood and its users are standing by its values. 

Now more than ever in the crypto community, we are all clowns in the way we support each other, in the way we disrespect each other, in the way we do not act as a community. 

This leads to a massive misrepresentation of crypto by the global forces, especially politics and medias, paving the way for a self-destructing path of what should be a technological breakthrough created in the interests of humanity.

Until we are better to each other, I will make clowns. 

Until politics and medias understand why crypto exists and is inevitable, I will make clowns.

If you're into crypto, that is because you value trust, confidence and mutual-respect. 

If you're not yet into crypto, please learn about crypto before talking about crypto.

Art is done on iOS (MacBook Pro + iPad) with AI NightCafe + Starryai, Blender, Verctonator, Procreate, ColorSync and Fotor.

Name: Permana Ink
Description: Tattoo studio

Name: Barigoule
Description:
Tous les cadres et miroirs sont rénovés par mes soins avant d’être personnalisés.


Formé auprès d’un ébéniste je garde au maximum les matériaux d’origine afin de prolonger le charme des miroirs d’époque.


Tous les visuels sont incrustés à l’intérieur des glaces et non pas en surface ce qui rendra les oeuvres immuables.

Name: Roberto Cimetta Fund
Description: Le Fonds Roberto Cimetta est une association internationale, sans but lucratif, créée en 1999 pour répondre rapidement et directement aux artistes et opérateurs culturels individuels désirant voyager à travers la région géographique euro-arabe et au delà dans le but de développer des projets d’échanges artistiques et culturels, individuels ou collectifs, dans le domaine des arts d'aujourd'hui. Depuis 2014, le FRC propose également des bourses de soutien à la structuration pour renforcer les initiatives d'artistes et d'opérateurs culturels arabes à l'origine de projets de territoire (lieux, réseaux, plates-formes) dans la région géographique arabe.

Name: Galerie Orion
Description:
Galerie d'art contemporain avec expositions à thème, renouvelée tous les deux mois avec peintures, photos, dessins, estampes, sculptures et design.
Située sur la plage de Pourville, à proximité de Dieppe et Varengeville sur Mer, haut lieu de l'histoire de l'art au XIXe et XXe siècle.

Name: Rocio Diestra Studio
Description: Estudio de ilustración y diseño especializado en storytelling e ilustración comercial.

Name: Walljar.com
Description: We are a Dutch team of designer located in the heart of Rotterdam, and offer unique wall decoration for every interior! It is our mission to make people as enthusiastic for wall decoration as we are. We have a big and diverse range of wall materials such as glass paintings, canvasses, posters and frames designed by our own team. This is what makes all our designs unique!

Name: ArtProject.io
Description: ArtProject.io is a community of artists, designers, programmers, and people keen to the ethos of decentralization. Born after the necessity to interact with people from different fields to explore the convergence between art and blockchain, #ArtProject enables unexpected connections that result in prosperous collaborations.

Name: Skye Gallery Aspen
Description:
Skye Gallery Aspen is a contemporary art gallery based in New York City and Aspen, Colorado. Founded in 2016 by Skye Weinglass—an Aspen, Colorado native and artist—the gallery represents a diverse collective of artists ranging from emerging to established, local to global.

Female forward and artist-centered, Skye Gallery offers a unique experience with a personalized touch. Our mission is to promote underground talent while also supporting the larger community through a wide array of artistic expressions and offerings.

508 W 28th St
New York, NY 10001
Inside the High Line Nine through July 2024
info@skyegalleryaspen.com

Contact us to explore the vibrant world of contemporary art, as we continue to nurture and showcase the creative forces that shape our culture.

Name: Collectors Editions
Description: Officially Licensed Publishers of Disney Fine Art

Name: Yay Mal-ရေးမယ်
Description:
Yay Mal is a creative storytelling agency that helps organizations of all sizes communicate better with the bottom of the pyramid. We specialize in creating engaging and informative content that drives social impact.

Our team of experienced writers and designers can help you with everything from developing your brand message to creating and executing your marketing campaigns. We also offer a variety of services to help social enterprises and NGOs communicate more effectively with their target audiences.

Whether you're looking to raise awareness about a social issue, promote a new product or service, or simply connect with your customers on a deeper level, Yay Mal can help you achieve your goals.

Name: Kris's Illustrations
Description: Kris's Illustrations maakt unieke illustraties voor geboortekaartjes, portretten en op maat gemaakte illustraties voor zowel particulieren als bedrijven, met als missie om meer persoonlijkheid en karakter te creëren in huis en op het werk.

Name: GUS | Original Gus Giordano Dance School
Description:
GUS, founded by jazz dance legend, Gus Giordano. Gus Giordano Dance School (GUS) established in 1953 is a destination for dancers from all over the U.S. and abroad. “I am honored to continue my father, Gus, and mother Peg’s legacy of not only providing the best dance education, but also teaching skills that will carry into all facets of life,” says daughter and owner Amy P Giordano.

GUS provides high quality year-round classes to dancers age 2 to professional in ballet, Gus Giordano jazz, contemporary, hip hop, commercial jazz, modern, musical theater, tap & more. Summer Intensives for pre-professional dancers include Ballet Intensive, College & Professional Intensive, Contemporary Intensive, Hip Hop Intensive, Leaps & Turns Intensive, Musical Theater Intensive, Pre-Professional Intensive, Tricks & Turns Intensive, and the only ALL Jazz Intensive.  Summer programs for children starting at age 2 include GUS Camps and Tiny Tots. GUS loves training dancers of all ages & levels.

Name: Cill Rialaig Arts Centre
Description:
As the best place in Kerry for contemporary art, fine craft, and great food, the Cill Rialaig Arts Centre features a wide range of exhibitions, programs and workshops year round.

In 1991, The Cill Rialaig Project began the rescue and restoration of a small pre-famine village on Bolus Head at the very end of the Iveragh Peninsula, thus creating an artists retreat that has attracted over the years more than 3000 artists from Ireland and the world.

For over 20 years, professional artists, writers, poets and composers from Ireland and around the world have lived and worked at the Cill Rialaig Retreat, making it an important centre for creativity.
The Cill Rialaig Arts Centre was built in 1995 in the Gaeltacht village of Dun Geagan, Ballinskelligs off the N70 between Waterville and Cahersiveen.

The Cill Rialaig Arts Centre is located in one of the great, untouched rural landscapes of Southwest Kerry. It offers the local community and general public the opportunity to view the work of the many artists past and present who have had the opportunity to reside at the remote and protected Cill Rialaig Retreat.

Name: PURE EVIL GALLERY LIMITED
Description: PURE EVIL GALLERY LIMITED is a Street Art Gallery based on Leonard Street in Shoreditch, London..

Name: Arts in Action Visual Art Program
Description:
Arts in Action Visual Art Program is a 501c3 non-profit organization that provides a fine art education to children of all ages regardless of economic status. AIAVAP teaches a sequentially structured curriculum that is fun to learn!

The underlying premise of Arts in Action VAP is that all children are artists. Our process-oriented curriculum demystifies drawing, painting, and sculpting in a logical and analytical way, empowering children to create with confidence.

Name: Exhibition A
Description:
Exhibition A is a members-only website that sells exclusive editions of artwork by top contemporary artists. We're committed to working with exceptional artists--artists whose work is exhibited at well-respected galleries and sought after by serious collectors--to create editions of their work at prices you can afford.

Exhibition A was founded in 2010 by designer Cynthia Rowley, Half Gallery owner Bill Powers, and Laura Martin.

Name: Northern Makes Gallery
Description:
Northern Makes Gallery is a independent Art Gallery selling British contemporary artworks from emerging and award winning artists. We're experts in painting and ceramics showing many world class creatives in their Cheshire gallery.

Positioned in the stunning town of Bollington, Cheshire, overlooking the canal in an old silk mill, the back drop is beautiful to show an array of styles from over twenty rolling artists and multiple shows from new artists annually.

Name: Mehrazi Fashion School
Description: Mehrazi Fashion and Design Academy, which offers courses in fashion and clothing design. Mehrazi has trained more than 10,000 students and organized more than 1,500 training courses and workshops

Name: 2P Contemporary Art Gallery
Description:
2P Contemporary Art Gallery is a newly established Hong Kong-based contemporary art gallery, founded by Pui Pui To. The missions of 2P are to promote an international, transcultural and intergenerational dialogue in the sphere of contemporary art by promoting national artists abroad and international artists in Hong Kong.

The curatorial focus is on developing an exciting and varied programme of Hong Kong and international artists who possess a strong conceptual approach to their art practice. 2P values mixed media, emerging and established artists, risk taking or experimental work, meta curatorial strategies, discussions, collaboration, and international exchanges.

2P Gallery is dedicated to the presentation, interpretation, documentation, promotion, and enrichment of the arts and culturally diverse artists from all nations.

Name: TALLER DE ESCULTURA
Description: TALLER DE ESCULTURA is a company based out of Spain.

Name: Mont8
Description:
Empowering Artists & People of the Creative Nation to profit from the sales of their work while doing what they love the most; Creating Artwork.

As Arabs born, living and working in the Middle East, we strive to make art accessible to all. We seek to empower all of the exceptional talents to showcase and sell their works with us without giving up their rights. To us, this means catering to all customers by providing an easy approach to the finding and purchase of artwork in the Middle East.

Name: DES BAINS ltd
Description:
DES BAINS is a private art gallery in North East London. The gallery collaborates with artists, theorists, writers and musicians whose practices exist at the intersection of both personal and collective experiences that give into the complex conditions we live in. Based on a collaborative research methodology we aim to construct new realities instead of just naming them - something that culture is unfortunately all too good at doing.  

DES BAINS aims to develop collaborations in both the public and the private, the experimental and the commercial.

Name: Primo Marella Gallery
Description: Contemporary art gallery based in Milan (Italy) and Lugano (Switerland), founded in 1992.

Name: SIANOJA
Description:
Desde el 2001, SIANOJA es un simposio que reúne anualmente a artistas plásticos contemporáneos, nacionales e internacionales, en un espacio de convivencia y creación durante diez días (por el actual estado de alarma lo hemos reducido a una semana). Los invitados disfrutan de alojamiento a pensión completa, así como de los materiales necesarios para la creación. A modo de agradecimiento, estos se comprometen a crear y donar al menos una obra de arte que pasa a formar parte de la colección gestionada por la Asociación Amigos de SIANOJA.

Por SIANOJA han pasado más de doscientos cincuenta artistas, noveles y de reconocida trayectoria, procedentes de más de cuarenta y cuatro países: España, Inglaterra, China, EE. UU., Suiza, México, Alemania, Japón, Brasil… creando obras de arte que enriquecen el valor patrimonial no solo de la región, sino de toda la humanidad, sumando un total de quinientas cuarenta y cinco obras de arte creadas y donadas hasta la anterior edición SIANOJA 2020.

Name: Studio Baxendal Productions
Description:
Studio d'enregistrement et de post-production son audiovisuelle situé dans le 10ème arrondissement de Paris.
Nos domaines d'activité : Pub - TV - Cinéma - Web - Documentaire - Film institutionnel - Multimédia - Film d’animation - Livre lu - Musique

Name: m'ARTchissy sàrl
Description: Votre nouveau centre culturel au cœur de la Côte et au pied du Jura vous propose une école d'art et de peinture, une galerie d'art, une bibliothèque et papeterie centrée sur l'art et la région, une agence postale, un espace de co-working, etc.

Name: Festival Filministes
Description:
Depuis 2015, le Festival Filministes organise à Montréal des discussions sur des enjeux féministes contemporains par le biais de la projection d'œuvres cinématographiques. Le projet se consacre à la diffusion de documentaires, courts-métrages et films de fiction récents. Les discussions réunissent des invité.e.s de divers milieux qui proposent un regard féministe et critique sur ces enjeux.

Le projet a pour mission de faire connaître des films et des réalisatrices d'ici et d'ailleurs tout en créant des espaces de discussions et de réflexions destinés à un public de tout acabit. La spécificité du festival tient au rapprochement entre les féminismes et le cinéma.

Dès sa première édition en 2018, le festival connait un grand succès. La deuxième édition du Festival Filministes, qui s'est tenue du 8 au 11 mars 2019, a suscité un réel engouement. Ayant fait salle comble à toutes ses représentations, le festival a su s'imposer comme un évènement féministe incontournable par la qualité de ses propositions et la diversité et de ses invitées.

Name: AnaKhora
Description: Our mission: Bring color, joy, and magic to the world. Convey the true passion within us, and inspire others to embrace who they truly are, unapologetically.

Name: Les Films de la butte
Description: Créée en 2006, Les films de la butte est une société de production indépendante implantée à Paris – Montmartre, produisant à la fois des fictions et des documentaires pour la télévision et le cinéma.

Name: Desenhe - Escola de Arte
Description:
Fundado em 1988, bem localizado e com ampla área, abre espaço para oficinas, exposições, cursos relacionados à arte, palestras, encontros e debates.
Os principais cursos da escola são o Desenho Artístico, Cômico, Mangá, História em Quadrinhos, Figura Humana e Retrato, ilustração digital, Maquete e Preparatório para prévias.
A escola também oferece assessorias e consultorias de desenho.

Name: Bem-estar com Arte
Description:
Oficinas de Bem-Estar e Criatividade Corporativa | Bem-estar com Arte

Em um cenário corporativo cada vez mais dinâmico, investir no bem-estar dos colaboradores é fundamental para a saúde organizacional e a produtividade. 
A Bem-estar com Arte oferece workshops de artes manuais customizados para empresas, projetados para promover um ambiente de trabalho mais saudável, criativo e colaborativo.

Nossas sessões são uma pausa revigorante na rotina, utilizando atividades como pintura, desenho e outras artes manuais para:

Reduzir o estresse e a ansiedade:
Através da concentração e do foco nas atividades artísticas.
Estimular a criatividade e a inovação: 
Despertando o potencial criativo individual e coletivo.
Promover a integração e o team building: 
Criando um espaço leve para a interação e o desenvolvimento de novas habilidades.
Melhorar a saúde mental: 
Oferecendo uma ferramenta de expressão e relaxamento.
Os workshops da Bem-estar com Arte são adaptáveis às necessidades e objetivos de cada empresa, proporcionando uma experiência única e memorável que contribui diretamente para o bem-estar geral da equipe.

Invista no capital humano da sua empresa!

Entre em contato para saber como podemos levar mais bem-estar e arte para o seu ambiente de trabalho.

Name: E3D LLC
Description:
