Name: NYX Visual
Description:
«NYX» is a Fresh and French Visual Label specialized in motion design & scenography.
Founded in 2010, the label aims to promote and distribute artists in relation with digital art. 
The label is composed of graphic designers, stage developers and light engineers specialized in space layout and 3D content creation. Large-scale installations, exclusive structures, mapping, visual design and live VJ performance all lie at the heart of our activity.

Name: Advert Artists, réseau social des artistes
Description:
AdvertArtists, c'est LE réseau social innovant et unique qui met en relation les ARTISTES de tous genres avec les entreprises et les fans d'art. 

Enfin, voilà une plateforme pour exposer tout le potentiel de la créativité des artistes.

Name: Wonderland Tattoo
Description:
Since Wonderland Tattoo opened for business in 1989, we've gained a reputation as "THE" place to get unique, artistic body art in Metro Detroit. We have a wealth of experience in a vast variety of tattoos and body piercing that will play an important role in your tattoo experience. You'll be proud of our work for years to come. So if you're looking to get the exact tattoo that you want - look no further. 

Hygiene and your safety are #1 when we create all tattoos in our shop. All of our tattoo artists have blood born pathogen as well as infection control, first aid and CRP training. Yearly medical checkups are also done for the artists, as is monthly third party spore testing of our autoclave, and all of our equipment is single use only, so you can rest assured that you are getting all the best care and safety that's available from tattoo studios in Metro Detroit.

View our artists profiles to see examples of our work or to get tattoo ideas.

We're conveniently open 7 days a week, 1pm to 9 pm, so come on by and consult with one of our tattoo professionals. Here's where our tattoo shop is located on a map. We'll be glad to see you and honored that you considered us.

Schedule a tattoo appointment or consultation with one of our artists today.

WONDERLAND TATTOO 
23531 Little Mack 
St. Clair Shores, Michigan 48080 

586-774-8288

Name: CONSIGLIO ARALDICO ITALIANO - ISTITUTO M.SE VITTORIO SPRETI
Description: ISTITUTO CULTURALE PER LA RICERCA E LA TUTELA DEI VALORI STORICI, NOBILIARI, BORGHESI E CAVALLERESCHI ET DI PRETENSIONE SOVRANA.

Name: Hagelstam & Co
Description:
Hagelstam & Co is Finland's oldest art auctioneering house with a reputation as the chosen and appreciated one.  Over four decades Hagelstam & Co has brought together a collection of exceptional items, iconic artists and designers and pieces of important history. We have opened up a world from a hobby of the selected few to the interest of the general public. 
We are focusing on fine art and modern design, and accept the heritage as well as being innovative of the future of the collecting. Our aim has been to commit to the customer experience, as well as forwarding meaningful objects. 
Hagelstam & Co consists of top experts in the field and is located in Helsinki, Finland. Auctions are organized on a monthly level with varying themes.

Name: National Council of Arts Administrators
Description:
The National Council of Arts Administrators is an organization whose primary purpose is to provide a forum for the exchange of ideas, the identification of problems, and the generation of shared solutions to the multitude of issues that confront arts administrators in higher education today.

This exchange is focused to address the following:

1. Create a safe space for complex conversationsfor arts administrators in higher education.
2. Support advocacy for impactful art leadership.
3. Mentor leaders in the field.

Name: WYCHWOOD ART
Description:
Wychwood Art is a contemporary online art gallery selling affordable British art online and through their gallery in Oxfordshire Deddington in the Cotswolds and art fairs.  Founded by ex-Christie's Director Deborah Allan who has 15 years international art experience. 

Wychwood Art represent some of the UK's most exceptional contemporary artists. Phil Greenwood, Kate Boxer, Colin Moore, Nicky Chubb, Scott Naismith and we have numerous Royal Academy of Art Summer exhibition artists.

Deborah carefully selects every artist that can sell with Wychwood Art and each work of art. She visits degree shows, art fairs and exhibitions finding new artists so you can be assured you are being offered the very best artworks available.

Wychwood Art also offer an art advisory service with the artists they represent helping you choose the right artists for your home or office.

Name: Grupo Nasa
Description:
GRUPO NASA es una empresa constructora con más de 25 años de experiencia en el ámbito de la construcción y la ingeniería. Desarrollamos todas las fases del proyecto, desde el diseño, estudio y elaboración de la documentación técnica hasta la finalización de la obra.
Durante este tiempo,
GRUPO NASA se ha consolidado como una empresa con solvencia técnica y económica para llevar a cabo todo tipo de trabajos de edificación y obra industrial.
El equipo humano de
GRUPO NASA está formado por un grupo experimentado y altamente cualificado de técnicos y profesionales capaz proporcionar un enfoque global y soluciones integrales a cada proyecto.
GRUPO NASA cuenta con un equipo humano, unos medios materiales y una estructura organizativa óptima que trabaja con la convicción de que la calidad final de una obra depende en gran medida del servicio prestado.
GRUPO NASA es una empresa autorizada e inscrita en el Registro Oficial de Empresas Acreditadas en el sector de la construcción.

Name: blank projects
Description: Having operated as an independent project space for six years, blank projects transitioned into a commercial gallery in 2012. Founded by Jonathan Garnham, blank's programme highlights new positions by young artists from South Africa and, increasingly, artists from other countries in the region. Its commitment to showcasing notionally difficult work has gained the gallery widespread recognition, both in South Africa and internationally.

Name: Veïna ·  Art Contemporani de Proximitat
Description: Veïna col·loca a la ciutadania com a coproductora legítima de coneixement i cultura, utilitzant estratègies de participació. Per a això teixim vincles entre institucions, veïnes, veïns, mediadores i artistes per a la creació d'espais on pensar juntes projectes d'art contemporani que aborden reptes socials propis de cada comunitat. Ho fem potenciant relacions de proximitat des del territori, fent valdre el patrimoni, la història i la memòria.

Name: Parque Cultural Casa do Governador
Description:
Localizado na Residência Oficial do Governo do Estado, o Parque Cultural Casa do Governador foi inaugurado em maio de 2022, com o propósito de valorizar a produção cultural local. Hoje, é reconhecido como a maior galeria de arte a céu aberto do Espírito Santo, abrigando 32 obras de arte, entre permanentes e temporárias, incluindo esculturas, instalações e obras site-specific. 

Com uma área de 93 mil metros quadrados, o parque conta com uma infraestrutura gerida em conjunto pela Secretaria de Estado da Cultura (Secult) e pela Secretaria do Governo (SEG). O espaço, de visitação gratuita, promove uma interação única entre arte contemporânea e natureza, organizada em três eixos temáticos: ambiental, histórico e artístico.

Name: Cortona Fine Art
Description:
In the early 1970's Enrico Cortona established the Cortona Gallery in Milan. An enthusiastic collector and connoisseur of Old Master drawings and etchings, he started his business with the same verve that all true art lovers share.

His passion drove him to start producing his first catalogues for exhibitions that centred on unusual and very particular themes. Soon afterwards, Enrico expanded his interests beyond Old Master drawings and prints into the field of antique paintings and sculpture.
-
La Galleria Cortona nasce a Milano nei primissimi anni Settanta per volontà del suo fondatore Enrico: egli, appassionato collezionista ed intenditore di stampe e disegni, avviò l'attività con entusiasmo tipico del vero amatore d'arte.

La passione del proprietario condusse la galleria ben presto a stampare i primi cataloghi ragionati ed effettuare interessanti mostre a tema. La capacità di espandere gli interessi è un'altra caratteristica della galleria che, oltre ai disegni e alle stampe antiche, orienta gli acquisti nell'area della pittura e della scultura antica.

Name: New Song School of the Arts
Description:
Founded in 1999 by Todd and Heather Parks, New Song School of the Arts (NSSOTA) is based in Argyle, Texas, and has grown from its humble beginnings into a thriving institution serving much of North Texas. Our reach extends from Argyle to students in communities such as Gainesville, Rockwall, Dallas, and Ft. Worth. As a trusted name in these communities, NSSOTA is renowned for providing exceptional customer service and offering instruction from experienced, degree-holding, and professional instructors. Our vision is that people everywhere may experience the beauty of the arts, and we are committed to nurturing creativity, talent, and excellence.

NSSOTA is home to three specialized schools: the School of Music, the School of Theater, and the School of Visual Arts. Our mission is to equip, enrich, and inspire our staff, faculty, families, and students of all ages to develop their God-given gifts in these disciplines. With a 25-year legacy of providing outstanding fine arts education, NSSOTA has become a cornerstone in the North Texas community, enhancing the lives of our students and their families.

Name: Soundwaves Art Foundation
Description: Soundwaves is a philanthropic foundation that creates unique pieces of art from the sound waves of songs, gets the musicians behind those songs to autograph each piece, and donates all profits of the art sales. We've donated over $7.5M to charities by working with 600+ musicians including Billie Eilish, Coldplay, Dolly Parton, Outkast, Lil Nas X, the Avett Brothers, The Cure, and P!nk.

Name: modopod
Description:
بارها طرحی از یک هنرمند خوش ذوق  دیدین و آرزو کردین  کالای محبوبتون رو با همون طراحی داشته باشین .
الان مدوپد رو براتون تعریف کردیم .ما همون فاصله رویای شما ٫ تصویر طراحی شده و کالایی که پست میاره براتون هستیم.

Name: Association Atmosphères 53
Description:
Association d'éducation populaire, Atmosphères 53 s'est constituée à Mayenne en 1989. Elle a pour raison d’être la promotion du cinéma « d’auteur », fiction et documentaire. Intervenant dans l'ensemble du département de la Mayenne, elle a son siège central à Mayenne. Elle compte 420 adhérents.
Elle s’est dotée depuis 1996-1997, en accord avec le Conseil général, d’un projet départemental.
Ses principales interventions sont :

- L'organisation chaque année du festival départemental les "Reflets du Cinéma".
- Programmation hebdomadaire de films "Art & Essai" à Laval, Mayenne et Château Gontier.
- Programmation de séances à thème (film + débat), souvent en partenariat avec d'autres structures ou associations.
- Organisation de Ciné Enfants et participation aux dispositifs Collège au cinéma et Lycéens au cinéma.
- Initiatives en direction du milieu scolaire : programmations supplémentaires, rencontres et stages de formation, classes-festival, partenariat avec la section cinéma audiovisuel du lycée Lavoisier de Mayenne...
- Mise en place du programme "Cinéma plein air" : séances de cinéma en plein air dans différents lieux en Mayenne.
- Mise en place depuis 2005 d'un "plan de diffusion numérique en Haute Mayenne". Atmosphères 53 y voit une opportunité de développement pour ses actions d'éducation au cinéma comme pour la dynamique du territoire de la Haute Mayenne.
- Soutien aux projets de jeunes mayennais, en matière de réalisation comme de diffusion de films.

Name: Satellite Shelters
Description: Satellite Shelters is a fine art company based out of 267 Harvestore Dr, Dekalb, Illinois, United States.

Name: Phoenix Arts Europe
Description:
Mr. William Chen fundó Phoenix Arts Materials en 1995 en Wuxi (China), convirtiendo su proyecto en una empresa referente en el sector de las Bellas Artes, especializándose en lienzos y colores de calidad para el mercado internacional.

En 2013, nace PHOENIX ARTS EUROPE, fruto de la unión entre Phoenix Arts Materials y Bonfil, empresa con más de 30 años de experiencia en el mercado de las Bellas Artes y las Manualidades.

En Phoenix Arts Europe estamos comprometidos con el Arte y la Creatividad, nuestro objetivo es dar respuesta a las necesidades de artistas y creativos, ya sean profesionales de la pintura o escultura, aficionados al arte, amantes de las manualidades o creativos del mundo handmade.

Creemos que expresar nuestra capacidad creativa es un principio vital que nos lleva a la plenitud y la felicidad. Por ello nos comprometemos apasionadamente con nuestros materiales, ofreciendo más de un centenar de productos con los que podrás desarrollar todo tu potencial artístico, fabricados de forma responsable con el medio ambiente.

Os invitamos a seguir nuestro espacio en LinkedIn!

#PhoenixWhereCreativityIs

Name: Opus Art Projects
Description:
OPUS ART PROJECTS

OAP is a women-founded and led, Toronto-based art consultancy, creating contemporary, elevated art collections for discerning clients. 

Our goal is to provide you the best collaborative experience while delivering high-quality service with integrity. We are resourceful and proactive, tailoring artwork and framing to your specific requirements. Every project is different and we are up for the challenges! Drawing on our considerable experience in customizing solutions, your project will receive our full care and attention, including; easy to read, recommended art location plans, beautiful and detailed proposed artwork briefs, clear itemized budgets, and installation guidance and supervision. We specialize in artwork so you can focus on your priorities and know the art program will exceed your expectations.

We would love to hear from you to see if we are the right art team for your project.

Name: The Neighbors
Description: The Neighbors was founded in Chicago in February 2020 by four friends who started out as neighbors. After many iterations of the project, this effort has grown, morphed, and changed and now resides on the East and West Coasts of the United States and Greater London Area. Throughout this journey, we have remained dedicated to building a platform for artists around the world. We believe in honoring the individual in order to empower the collective. Our mission is to put a microphone to stories that have been historically unheard. Tales that have yet to be told. Encouraging these music notes to form in unison catalyzing a cacophonous symphony.

Name: Clubul ARTIST
Description:
Cursuri de canto, pian, chitară, vioară, tobe, actorie, ateliere creative 
 CVT - Tehnică Vocală Completă

Name: Com Verso: Psicanálise e Poesia
Description: Com Verso: Psicanálise e Poesia nasceu da vontade de divulgar um processo de investigação em curso com os temas que a nomeiam. Além disso, trabalha por uma transmissão clínica psicanalítica envolvida com os temas da cultura (e o mal estar) de nosso tempo.

Name: ARTELIER Sabancı University Fine Arts Club
Description: Artelier is a student club that maintains ceramics, marbling, and drawing courses at Sabancı University. Additionally, different variety of workshops are organized.

Name: MyTemplAr
Description:
Innovativo strumento digitale di catalogazione, tutela e condivisione in cloud per l'arte.

MyTemplArt è un aggregatore di servizi rivolto a tutta la filiera dell'arte studiato per agevolare:

>> Catalogazione scientifica e digitalizzazione
di ogni tipologia di opera e/o documento attraverso una piattaforma cloud che permette di lavorare, visualizzare e modificare il materiale da qualsiasi luogo.

>> Condivisione di informazioni
tra player secondo i filtri e le modalità stabilite dall’utente garantendo sicurezza e privacy.

>> Certificazione dell’autentica
semplificandone i processi di rilascio e ottenimento, combattendo la contraffazione a tutela del patrimonio.

Sono in fase di sviluppo ulteriori add on che amplieranno la gamma dei servizi al fine di agevolare la crescita del network, la semplificazione dei processi e l'update del settore artistico-culturale. 

MyTemplArt è anche un Magazine. 

-

New digital tool for cataloguing, safeguarding and sharing in cloud for arts

MyTemplArt is a services aggregator for the whole art industry. It designs to simplify: 

>> Scientific cataloguing and digitalization any sort of artwork and/or document through a cloud platform.

>> Information sharing within players of sector, according to the filters and conditions set by the users ensuring security and privacy.

>> Validation of certification facilitating issuance and attainment processes, by safeguarding and fighting counterfeiting.

Coming soon new add-ons that will expand the services range to facilitate network development, simplification process and arts and culture update.

MyTemplArt is also a magazine.

Name: Hisleri Harika
Description: Sanatın terapötik gücüne, oyunun ve anlatının büyüsüne, farklı öğrenme yöntemlerine, çocuğun açık kalp gözüne tutkuyla inanır.

Name: Galerie Zadra
Description:
GALERIE ZADRA is an Australian specialist dealer and advisory service with a base in Luxembourg. We assist public and private collectors internationally to acquire contemporary US, European, and Australian Aboriginal fine art of outstanding provenance.

We have had art works acquired by the British Museum, National Gallery of Australia, National Museum of Australia, Australian War Memorial, Parliament House of Australia, National Gallery of Victoria, Art Gallery of South Australia, Queensland Art Gallery & Gallery of Modern Art, Art Gallery of Western Australia, Artbank, as well as Australian and American university museums.

In addition, art works that have been acquired from us have been gifted to national and international museums and collections.

Galerie Zadra works with emerging and established artists whose practice contributes to our understanding of the human condition. The majority of works are paintings, drawings and prints.

Director, Karen Zadra, is a specialist in Aboriginal art and culture with over 35 years' experience, and she's an Approved Valuer under the Australian Government's Cultural Gifts Program, for Indigenous art post 1970.

Services
Acquisitions and advice, private sales, appraisals and valuations, collections management.

Name: Galerie Nicolas Robert
Description: Galerie fondée à Montréal en 2011 et dédiée à la promotion d'artistes contemporains canadiens émergents et reconnus. Notre deuxième espace à Toronto ouvrira en 2021. La galerie représente les artistes Ghazaleh Avarzamani, Lorna Bauer, Philippe Caron Lefebvre, Caroline Cloutier, Maude Corriveau, David Elliott, James Gardner, Andréanne Godin, Magali Guérin, Pierre Julien, Tristram Lansdowne, Mitch Mitchell, Jérôme Nadeau, Emmanuel Osahor, Laurence Pilon, Carl Trahan et Jim Verburg.

Name: alphalight
Description:
NEXT GEN TOOLS FOR THE ART WORLD.
REINVENTING THE WAY WE DISPLAY, PROMOTE AND TRADE ART.

Name: Kiechel Fine Art
Description: Kiechel Fine Art specializes in 20th century Regionalist art including work by John Steuart Curry, Thomas Hart Benton, Dale Nichols and Grant Wood. KFA is proud to represent the John Steuart Curry Estate and work with the Thomas Hart Benton Trust. Our contemporary collection focuses on area masters in drawing, painting and sculpture. We offer consultation for individual and corporate collectors as well as museums and are certified by the International Society of Appraisers for fine art.

Name: JLB Art
Description:
Jessica is an artist who primarily works with acrylics and watercolours. Her style is mostly abstract often featuring energetic brush strokes and splatters. 

Originally from Shropshire her favourite subject to paint is wildlife although her work also includes the female form, abstracts, champagne bottles, skulls, angel wings and her most recent private commission the moon!

Name: Sierra Metro
Description:
Sierra Metro is a creative space and gallery based in Leith. A place to gather, work and connect with exhibitions, coffee, workspaces and spaces to hire, everyone is welcome. Within the Gallery we are committed to artist-centred practice and our intention is to showcase and support visual artists. We aim to engender a climate of flexibility and experimentation for everyone who exhibits in the space, and offer broad public access to contemporary art experiences and discussions. Sierra Metro reopened in 2022 after a pause on activity and is run by Janine & Allan Matheson.

Sierra Metro was founded in 2008 by Janine Matheson and Martin Minton / after Martin left in 2009, the curatorial collaboration continued with Janine Matheson, Rosalie Doubal & Matt Carter until 2012. 

Current Exhibition: 
SALVE
New works by David James Grinly
22 February - 3 April 2022 
Open daily 10am-2pm or by appointment

Name: Lincoln Glenn Gallery
Description:
Lincoln Glenn, LLC was founded in 2021, with a mission to present American art from the 19th century to the contemporary period. The gallery exhibits works from artists of the Hudson River School, American Impressionism, Ashcan School, and American Modernism, with a particular focus on Abstract Expressionism and Color Field painting. Lincoln Glenn wishes to revive the legacies and explore the careers of artists working between the 1950s and 1970s who made significant contributions to art history, but whose names may have been forgotten by time.

Lincoln Glenn is proud to open its doors at 542 West 24th Street in Chelsea and at 17 East 67th Street on the Upper East Side of Manhattan. The two spaces allow the gallery to host multiple exhibitions each year dedicated to introducing select primary and secondary market paintings, works on paper, and sculptures to the public. Lincoln Glenn is honored to represent Sherron Francis and Diana Kurz, as well as the estates of Gene Hedge, Calvert Coggeshall, Edward Zutrau, and Aaron Bohrod.

Lincoln Glenn also works in an advisory capacity on acquisitions to private collectors, art advisors, interior designers, and museums. The gallery welcomes all inquiries from collectors who wish to sell or consign works of art or estates.

Name: K.Olin Tribu
Description:
In 2009, Matthieu Dutheil, a passionate collector of Art Toys, decided to provide an alternative to the production of sculpture and founded the K.Olin Tribu company.

The figurines issued by K.Olin Tribu are made and decorated in Limoges, and therefore they benefit from the official label Porcelaine de Limoges, France.

Name: Federica Schiavo Gallery
Description:
Founded in 2009 and located in Rome, over the years the gallery's program has been focused on researching, developing and promoting the work of emerging international artists.

Represented artists:

Tuesday - Saturday 12 - 7 pm

+39 06 69 300 800 or info@federicaschiavo.com

Name: Circuito Gran Cine
Description: Asociación civil privada, sin fines de lucro, creada el 13 de junio de 1996. Esta organización está dedicada a promover la formación del público venezolano a través de la difusión del cine de alta factura artística y cultural. Cuenta con profesionales de más de 20 años de experiencia en la programación de cine; goza del reconocimiento del sector público y privado. Igualmente, tiene el reconocimiento y apoyo de las Embajadas y cuerpos diplomáticos acreditados en el país.

Name: Compagnie Yeraz
Description:
Héritière d'une tradition populaire et rurale, la danse est une composante indissociable de la culture arménienne. Elle appartient au génie artistique ancestral des Arméniens dont la transmission s'est effectuée à travers les siècles pour s'épanouir aujourd'hui, hors des frontières de l'Arménie.

Pour préserver ce riche patrimoine, des chorégraphes de renom ont entrepris en Arménie, depuis les années 70, un minutieux travail de recueil des pas et des thèmes selon les régions. Par la suite, ces danses ont été chorégraphiées et présentées sur scène par les différents Ensembles d'Etat d'Arménie. La Compagnie de danse YERAZ, créée en 2000 à Alfortville (France), a pour directrice artistique la chorégraphe Christina Galstian- Agoudjian.

La démarche artistique de la Compagnie est fondée sur une double exigence : préserver et transmettre le riche répertoire de la danse arménienne, tout en laissant une large place à la création originale. Le répertoire de YERAZ est composé de chorégraphies largement inspirées des thèmes puisés dans les traditions, légendes et Histoire arméniennes.

Son originalité réside dans une approche scénique d'inspiration parfois contemporaine, délivrée des modèles classiques préexistants, pour s'ouvrir à des choix artistiques novateurs intégrant tradition et modernité. La danse arménienne est ici réappropriée, réinventée, perpétuant ainsi l'héritage d'un art toujours vivant.

Name: The Ravestijn Gallery
Description:
The Ravestijn Gallery was founded in Amsterdam in 2012 by Jasper Bode and Narda Van ‘t Veer with a focus on inquisitive and provocative approaches to contemporary photography. 

Bode and Van ‘t Veer respectively bring together several decades of experience curating photography exhibitions and representing a diverse group of photographic talents in the Netherlands and abroad.

The gallery showcases several exhibitions a year aimed at exploring new perspectives for photography in all its forms and showing ambitious international works. 

In addition to its exhibition program and participation in international photography fairs, the gallery holds an expansive collection of photography on site and gathers pictures from the twentieth century and other contemporary photographs.

Name: International Association of Female Artists
Description:
The International Association of Female Artists (IAFA) is the world’s leading international organization for women artists. Its membership includes visual artists, filmmakers, photographers, actresses, performance artists, folk artists, musicians, and creative writers.

The mission of the International Association of Female Artists is to establish a platform and create a community for helping Women Artists (including transgender women artists) worldwide.

Name: Samuel Owen
Description:
Samuel Owen Gallery is a contemporary art gallery located on Greenwich Avenue in Greenwich, CT.  The gallery is committed to exhibiting the work of emerging to mid-career artists, as well as a variety of strong secondary market works.  Since opening in 2004, owners Lee and Cindy Milazzo continue to build a connection between New York City’s vibrant art scene and the local community. In 2015, Samuel Owen Gallery took up summer residence in the historic Seven Seas building on Nantucket Island, once home to Captain George Pollard of The Essex, the sinking of which was the inspiration for Melville's Moby Dick.
 
First started as an expansion of Pacific Street Framing, Samuel Owen is the gallery of choice for many notable interior designers throughout Fairfield and Westchester counties. Samuel Owen Gallery offers an array of hand crafted frames imported from around the world.  Our boutique framing gallery offers an impressive collection of original frames with variety ranging from hand painted, hand carved, leather and gold leafed mouldings to modern selections such as lucite and aluminum frames. We are committed to helping each customer tastefully match a custom frame to the work of art it will hold and to the environment where it will hang.

Name: DOUBLERAVEN STUDIOS, LLC
Description: DOUBLERAVEN STUDIOS, LLC is a fine art company based out of 2793 Lawrence Mill Run, MARIETTA, Georgia, United States.

Name: a gang of three
Description:
By design, A Gang of Three is a multidisciplinary arts and arts planning practice that operates within an ever-evolving gradient of public art, architecture, landscape architecture, installation, urban planning and advocacy. 

We leverage our unique perspectives and strengths to allow us opportunities to tackle such critical issues as climate change, resiliency, social justice, human rights, data, and migration, among others. Our work has been recognized with various national and international awards from Google, The Architect’s Newspaper, the American Planning Association, the American Institute of Architects, and the Institute for Public Art, among others. We are currently shortlisted for the International Award for Public Art.

Name: Musée Adolf Michaelis
Description: Le Musée Adolf Michaelis, anciennement connu sous le nom de Gypsothèque de l'Université de Strasbourg, se situe aux rez-de-jardin du Palais Universitaire. C'est un musée qui expose les collections de l'Institut d'Archéologie Classique de l'UNISTRA : des moulages principalement, mais également des photographies anciennes et pourquoi pas, un jour, des oeuvres originales.

Name: Buvette
Description: Spectacular view from the terrace over the mures valey and a side of the Targu Mures city.

Description:

Name: Hot Glass Fiji
Description:
Hot Glass Fiji is Fiji's one and only glassblowing studio. Located in Korotogo on the Coral Coast of Viti Levu, Fiji's main Island, the studio looks out over the Pacific Ocean. Established in 2013 by professional glassblower Alice Hill and her husband Alex, the studio was planned to help fill a gap in the market for high quality Fijian made art for gifts & souvenirs. Originally aimed at Fiji's burgeoning tourist market, the studio has found that the local market, both private and corporate has become equally if not more important.
As well as artistic pieces, Hot Glass also create awards, medals, jewellery and a range of other products. They also offer glassblowing experiences and short courses which are very popular.
Hot Glass Fiji's work aims to reflect the nature and culture of the country, and have become widely collected, both locally and internationally.

Name: pal project
Description:
Créé par Pierre et Alexandre Lorquin (PAL), pal project est une galerie d’art émergent située au 39 rue de Grenelle dans le paisible 7e arrondissement de Paris.

Volontairement libre et expérimentale, la programmation de la galerie propose des projets forts et ambitieux accompagnés d’un travail d’édition soigné afin de prolonger et de pérenniser le propos développé.

Name: Chali-Rosso Art Gallery
Description: Chali-Rosso Art Gallery was established at it’s current location in 2005. The gallery specializes in original graphic works, limited editions by Chagall, Dali, Miro, Picasso, Matisse, Renoir, Degas, Cezanne, Rembrandt from private collections in Europe.

Name: Christopher Grimes Projects
Description:
Christopher Grimes Projects develops site-specific works for architectural environments.  We engage artists who use conceptual strategies to create unusual and innovative installations.

Through the development and realization of architecturally driven, large-scale projects, our focus is on facilitating creative experimentation across all mediums and investigate an expanded terrain of the collaborative potential between art, architecture, the spaces where they intersect and the unique forms of creative expression born of them. Through establishing a relationship between architects and artists early in the design process we hope to better merge their artistic perspectives into the integrity of the finished structure.

These projects reach a widened audience outside of the conventional arena of art fairs and gallery spaces. This interest emerged from decades of working with artists whose shared interests in architecture created a common denominator of architecturally based exploration.

Name: Crazy Over ART on tour
Description: We are a mobile art van that travels to communities and creates art to all types of individuals.

Name: JAZZ ART STUDIO
Description:
Jasvinder Singh Saini is the sole proprietor of Jazz Art Studio. A graphic designer, video and photo editor, working as a freelancer in the city of Bradford, United Kingdom. 
He is skilled in a variety of artistic mediums, including portraits, canvas painting, and wall designing.

Name: Atelier Alexander Olch
Description:
Alexander Olch creates across a unique range of artforms — Filmmaking, Fashion & Textile Design, Conceptual Art,  Interior & Architectural Design — conceiving artworks, films, brands, and projects.

His works are held in the permanent collection of The Museum Of Modern Art, have premiered at Lincoln Center and on HBO, have been stocked at stores such as Bergdorf Goodman, colette Paris, and Isetan Japan. He is a the founder of Metrograph and Alexander Olch New York.

Name: Casa de Arte e Cultura Luiz Januário
Description:
A Casa de Arte e Cultura Luiz Januário é um equipamento cultural localizado na Tijuca, zona norte da cidade do Rio de Janeiro, que tem como objetivo promover o acesso, o ensino e o consumo dos diversos segmentos artísticos, se tornando mais um pólo cultural carioca.

Nossa missão é oferecer as mais variadas linguagens artísticas em um só local, para que dessa maneira a Casa se torne um ambiente autossustentável, onde você encontra tudo o que deseja ou precisa artisticamente, reunido no mesmo espaço.

Para além de uma instituição de aprendizado, com aulas, oficinas, cursos, workshops e palestras, a Casa está aberta para o público geral com uma programação completa, passando por contações de histórias, apresentações musicais e teatrais, exposições, performances, rodas de debates dos mais diferentes temas, etc.

A Casa de Arte e Cultura Luiz Januário conta com a parceria da Oficina de Desenho Daniel Azulay, unidade Tijuca, a qual, após 6 anos de funcionamento na praça Saens Peña, agora funciona dentro do espaço, sendo a responsável por todas as modalidades de curso do segmento artístico “desenho e pintura”.

Ambas instituições estão sob a direção de Vânia Januário e gestão de Bruno Januário, seu filho.

Venha nos visitar e conhecer um pouco mais da nossa proposta!
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Klaus Steinmetz Contemporary Art
Description:
Klaus Steinmetz Contemporary Art was founded in December of  the year 2000. Since then we have been home to dozens of openings with many leading Latin American artists such as Luis Gonzalez Palma, Javier Marin and Jose Bedia. Our collection includes Botero, Julio Larraz and Adriana Varejao.

However, it's in the international field where we have been more active, participating in fairs such as  Buenos Aires, Rio de Janeiro, Sao Paulo, Lima, Bogota, Caracas, Miami, Monaco, Madrid and Basel. 

We have also been part of exhibitions in collaboration with museums and galleries in more than twenty countries. In May of 2013, the gallery took down the most important display in its history: Peter Halley. This first class New York artist shows only in the best galleries, as he did in 2013 in Waddington, London and Mary Boone, New York.

Name: Schaduwfoto
Description:
Op jouw foto’s ontbreekt er altijd iemand, de leegte is voelbaar én zichtbaar!  Laat jouw gezinsfoto of familieportret compleet maken met een Schaduw op maat.
Niet zomaar een Schaduw maar 100% handwerk, liefdevol aangepast aan jouw wensen. Denk het golfende haar van papa of jouw lange benen eens in, geen detail wordt overgeslagen. Ook de kleding wordt helemaal aangepast op het karakter van jouw zoon of dochter.

Laat je inspireren door mooie beelden en vind antwoord op al je vragen.

Name: Factor IJ
Description: Wij zijn Factor IJ; kunstuitleen, designshop én culturele ontmoetingsplek in één. Ons platform nodigt je uit om kunst onderdeel te maken van je dagelijks leven. Onze unieke hedendaagse kunst- en designcollectie met ruim 2.500 kunstwerken van voornamelijk Amsterdamse kunstenaars biedt volop inspiratie. Factor IJ maakt het mogelijk onderscheidende kunst en design te ervaren, te beleven en mee te nemen naar je eigen huis. Je huurt of koopt simpel en betaalbaar je favoriete kunstwerk en creëert hiermee je eigen persoonlijke sfeer in je woonomgeving of op kantoor.

Name: AIH Studios
Description: AIH Studios is a collaboration between Tony Calzetta and Gabrielle de Montmollin, 2 artists living and working together in Welland, Ontario, Canada.

Name: TJ Boulting
Description: TJ Boulting is the gallery of Trolley since it moved premises from Redchurch Street, Shoreditch to Riding House Street, W1 at the end of 2011. It is named after the arts and crafts building it now inhabits. TJ Boulting is a contemporary art gallery representing emerging artists and those who have not shown in London before, as well as showing the work of more international and established artists.

Name: Marsa Enchères
Description:
Marsa Enchères est la première maison de vente aux enchères d’oeuvres d’art en Tunisie.  Elle est le vis à vis de tout particulier, institution, désirant estimer gratuitement, expertiser, et vendre ses œuvres d'art, aux enchères, en toute transparence et au meilleur prix.
C'est un lieu d'échange permanent où les collectionneurs et amateurs, auront un réservoir inépuisable d'œuvres d'art, exposées à la Galerie Roubtzoff à La Marsa et en parallèle sur notre site https://www.marsa-encheres.com
Par le mécanisme des enchères, les valeurs des œuvres seront définies par les enchérisseurs anonymes eux-mêmes. Grâce à la fréquentation d'un grand nombre de passionnés réunis par un même goût de la découverte, Marsa Enchères assurera le meilleur prix des œuvres proposées.

Name: Kayt Cultural Hub
Description:
Kayt Cultural Hub was founded in 2014, though the team has come across the Armenian traditional culture even before. The ideology of Kayt Cultural Hub is based on the provision of this circulation of traditional culture, creating an appropriate environment for its development, presentation, and implementation in everyday life. As a result, people will be as familiar with their culture as they are with their native language.
We strive for a better future, where every Armenian is the bearer of traditional culture, passes it to generations, and ensures its natural reproduction. We are trying to make the traditional culture available and acceptable for everyone.

Name: Compagnie GF'Arts
Description:
GF’Arts est une agence de production audiovisuelle et de projets culturels. 

Résultat d’un métissage d’ADN artistiques et professionnels, nous sommes engagés dans deux domaines distincts, chacun avec sa propre spécificité.

Name: The Frame Shop on Buffalo Street
Description:
Celebrating over 65 years of business, The Frame Shop is Tompkins County's choice for quality picture framing.  A truly woman owned business, proprietor, Emily Russell, along with her staff of five, not only handle all of your framing projects but provide free estimates, rush service, and will work within your budget.

The draw of a family business brought Emily to work with her mother, Nancy in 2004.  Her customer service background from years of working at The Ritz-Carlton Hotel in Philadelphia and her work experience in the development offices for both Cornell University and Ithaca College have translated well to handling the day to day operation of a growing business that demands high customer interaction and a willingness to please. 

The Russell’s and their friendly staff welcome you to stop by The Frame Shop at 414 West Buffalo Street, Ithaca and see the difference that service and quality make.

Name: Maison d'Art Monaco
Description:
Founded in 1997 in the Principality of Monaco, the Art Gallery Maison d’Art operates in the Modern and Contemporary Art field, with a strong background in Old Masters from the 13th to the 18th century.
 
Besides Modern and Contemporary art exhibitions held at the Gallery, Maison d’Art takes enthusiastically part in major art fairs, such as TEFAF Maastricht, London Masterpiece, the Biennales d’Antiquaires in Paris and Florence, the Moscow World Fine Art Fair and many others.
 
With an outstanding collection of artworks, Maison d’Art organizes many thematic exhibitions in Monaco, in order to introduce very promising contemporary artists to Monegasque collectors.

Name: Holika
Description:
Holika transporte votre enfant dans des univers thématiques minutieusement préparés. Votre enfant y vivra un moment d'amusement et d'émerveillement.

A travers ses ateliers créatifs, Holika offre à votre enfant un espace de création où chacun a sa place et reçoit l'occasion de laisser libre cours à son imagination.

Holika est l'activité fun et amusante pour votre enfant dans l'univers des ateliers créatifs à Mons.

Holika, ce n'est pas que pour les enfants ! Découvrez "les Ateliers Création" dédiés aux adultes.

Envie de laisser libre cours à votre créativité ?
Holika réveille l'artiste qui sommeille en vous et vous donne toute l'inspiration nécessaire grâce à une foule de conseils pratiques et d'astuces sympas. Venez partager un moment de convivialité et vivez pleinement une parenthèse de création. 

Intéressé(e) ?
Sur notre site www.holika.be vous découvrirez toutes nos formules, leur module d'inscription et notre contact.
Vous ne trouvez pas ce que vous cherchez ? Une question? Une info? N'hésitez pas à nous contacter
Au plaisir de vous accueillir et de vous faire découvrir mon univers de création,

Name: DNH Artful Living
Description: De kunst van kleur laten beleven. Hartstocht voor kunst en kleur met anderen delen. Dit doen we door onze kunst in verschillende vormen aan te bieden. Denk aan een kunstwerk in opdracht, een origineel werk of een reproductie van topstukken uit onze uitgebreide collectie.

Name: Semente Cultural
Description:
A Semente Cultural se dedica a promover o crescimento e a sustentabilidade do setor cultural, conectando artistas, empresas e instituições em prol do fortalecimento da produção cultural brasileira e global. 
Com um olhar atento às tendências e necessidades do mercado, buscamos sempre soluções criativas e eficazes para nossos parceiros e clientes.

Name: UNDEREXPOSED ARTS
Description: UNDEREXPOSED ARTS is a registered charity, celebrating black British, dual heritage African/Caribbean and culturally diverse talent and promoting aspiration through national arts-led initiatives. We are a Black-led arts organisation with creativity, equality and inclusion at its centre.

Name: Premium Art Gallery
Description:
Galeria de Arte Latinoamericano, grandes maestros del Arte, Artistas de carrera media y emergentes.
Latin American Art Gallery, masters, middle career & emerging Artists

Name: Helloartuk
Description:
HelloArt is a comprehensive bilingual art platform dedicated to supporting artists, showcasing original artworks, and offering exciting art workshops, markets and exhibitions. Our mission is to foster a thriving community of artists and art lovers, encouraging the exploration of creativity as a journey of self-discovery.

Follow our social media to stay updated!

Name: Jim Gambaro Photography
Description: Original, affordable, archival fine art photography on a human scale for your home or office. Images from scenics close to my home in New England or exotic locales as far as  Antarctica, Svalbard, New Mexico and Costa Rica. From sunsets and backyard butterflies to imaginative abstracts. Purchase directly online at jimgambarophotography.zenfolio.com or contact me for a quote.

Name: United Interiors
Description:
Since launching our online art gallery in 2012, we have worked extensively with designers and property owners seeking contemporary wall art solutions that are not only design driven, but easy on the budget too.

This has seen us carve a significant niche in a growing market that demands better value across a range of interior furnishings. To that end, we have now answered the call with a new range of art inspired cushions and wall panels.

For art inspired decorating in both domestic and commercial applications, United Artworks is a great one stop, online shop.

Name: Let’s Be Artsy!
Description:
Art for Fun!  Step by step art and crafts for the fun of it! Bring your friends, family, wine and snacks! All your art and craft supplies are provided!

We offer space for birthday parties, bachelorette parties, Team Building events, and more!

Want a private lesson on how to paint with oils, acrylics, watercolors and more...call us!

We have an Artsy Kids division! We hold daily classes for after school kids, and homeschool kids!  Get your child/children set up to create with our art educator!

We are a full learning center!

Name: Studio Rousseau
Description:
Embracing a personalized sense of the natural world with twists of imbued color wrapped into abstract forms, Rousseau's art explores. 

Creating in a multitude of media, including oils, acrylics, water color, ink, digital photography and print, Rousseau makes room for play, discovery and new ways to connect. 

CR Rousseau exhibits primarily in Sausalito, Carmel-by-the-Sea, Santa Barbara, California and Seattle, Edmonds and Bainbridge Island, Washington, and in 2023, in Italy. Her work can also be found in private collections internationally.

Name: LightRider
Description:
Élèves ingénieurs de l’Institut d’Optique et artistes, nous créons 
des œuvres d'art immersives mettant en scène des concepts scientifiques.

Name: sothu
Description: sothu is an acronym for space of the universe and sets its sights to invoke new devotion in people that are looking at art. In subtracting  or adding specific colored aspects in the gallery environment it appeals to a deeper psychological level of understanding the exhibited art work.

Name: Les Fioretti
Description:
Les Fioretti, c’est ton blog dédié au dessin d’illustration botanique !   Mais encore ?

Une fenêtre ouverte sur la nature, qui viendra progressivement enrichir ta pratique tout en renforçant ton lien avec le vivant.

Où nous suivre ?
 Abonne-toi à la Lettre Botanique, que je t’envoie chaque trimestre ! Tu y découvriras les nouveautés, et tu recevras un lien direct pour ta prochaine leçon.
 Tu peux aussi me retrouver sur mon site internet, dans la section Blog, où je partage un regard, un exercice ou un geste créatif pour nourrir ta passion.

Mais qu’est-ce que Les Fioretti ?
 « Les Petites Fleurs » : ce sont ces petites histoires et anecdotes qui racontent la vie et les enseignements de Saint François d’Assise, célèbre pour son amour inconditionnel de la nature et de toutes les créatures vivantes. 

Rejoins-moi pour cette aventure artistique à travers le prisme de ces leçons ! 

 contact@stephanieschouvey.com

Name: Charleston Gallery Association
Description: Charleston Gallery Association with more than 40 art galleries in the greater Charleston area continues to gain recognition as a Global Art Destination.  Collectively, the galleries represent local, regional and nationally known  artists' work including painting, sculpture, photography, jewelry, glass and fine crafts in both the modern and realist traditions.

Name: Kaws Corp
Description: Kaws Corp is a fine art company based out of 713 N 24th Ave W, Duluth, Minnesota, United States.

Name: Lezarts Ludiques
Description:
Je vous propose des fugues créatives vers d'autres possibles, grâce à mes ateliers d'expression créative.

Toujours avec bienveillance et sans jugement !

Name: Watercolor Art Society Houston
Description: Watercolor Art Society of Houston is a nonprofit, tax exempt organization of approximately 500 members whose purpose is to further the interest in, and understanding of, watercolor art through programs, exhibitions, demonstrations and teaching.

Name: Art2Gether
Description:
Onze stichting heeft als doel het initiëren van bijzondere culturele projecten waarbij we verschillende kunstvormen samenbrengen. Kunst in al zijn vormen, samen met velen en voor velen. 

We brengen vele mensen samen door deze culturele projecten, waarbij jong en oud,  van elkaar leert en elkaar  inspireert. 

De Stichting Art2gether beoogt door middel van het werven van fondsen en donaties deze activiteiten te financieren.

Tevens beheert de stichting de geldmiddelen en andere baten, voor zover en zolang deze nog niet zijn besteed in het kader van de doelstelling van de stichting.

Name: Petrolsen.Art
Description: Online Gallery, website and studio for the artistic practise of Pernille S. R. Olsen

Name: Galerie De Stoker
Description: Ateliers and Gallery De Stoker is an association of four artists who work in their own ateliers: Bastiaan Meijer, Maroesja Lacunes, Jeannette van Brummelen and Saskia Lensink. Toghether they manage the gallery where they expose their own work and that of other artists.

Name: Borough Road Gallery
Description: Borough Road Gallery is a new gallery that opened in London South Bank University’s Borough Road building in June 2012. The gallery was financed by a grant from the Heritage Lottery Fund to renovate part of the Borough Road building, and to devise a two-year programme of exhibitions and events that explore A David Bomberg Legacy – The Sarah Rose Collection.

Name: Azure Art Academy
Description: Azure Art Academy is an art school founded and led by local artist Liam Kelleher. Azure offers a variety of different art events including 10 week courses, wine & paint evenings, 1-day workshops and more. We cater to all abilities and a wide range of ages.

Name: Aakarshan
Description: passion , patience and perseverance

Name: Galex
Description:
Somos una marca que fusiona el arte con la repostería, a través de las diferentes formas de expresión, tales como: pintura, teatro, danza, música, entre otras. Creando así una nueva forma de sentir el arte. 

Creamos productos gastronómicos innovadores conectados con el arte.

Galex es la experiencia de expresarse y sentir con todos los sentidos. Únete a nuestra movida de Arte-Gastronómico y saborea la esencia del arte.

Name: Happinest - بيت السعادة
Description: Happinest is a non-profit creative hub, offering programs in performance & visual arts, functioning as a support structure for aspiring artists and individuals seeking artistic outlets for healing and recreational purposes.

Name: International Poster Gallery
Description: International Poster Gallery is located on Boston's famed Newbury Street and features over 10,000 vintage posters - one of the largest collections in the world.  Specialties include Italian, Swiss, and Soviet posters, as well as many styles including Art Deco, Mid-Century Modern, Travel, and War & Propaganda.

Name: Ziegelei Akademie
Description: Mehr dazu in Kuerze...

Name: Inch Arts CIO
Description: We aim to build a Creative Incubator Space generating  a vibrant community who can get involved in the Arts in many ways including through workshops and projects in the community.  Cross-linking between different ages, diversity and abilities sparks the imagination in everyone.

Name: retratos y pinturas
Description:
Web dedicada a la realización de retratos por encargo. Todas las medidas y técnicas pictóricas(óleo, acuarela, pastel, carboncillo, etc) puedes también encargar todo tipo de cuadros, como marinas, paisajes, bodegones, figura...
Hay a disposición del cliente una galería virtual con pinturas de diferentes tematicas.

Name: UDEMD 31
Description: UDEMD 31 - l'union départementale des écoles de musique et de danse

Name: Hekel et Jekel Artistes événementiels
Description: Dessinateurs et peintres Professionnels. Hekel et Jekel vous accompagnent dans l'animation de vos soirées festives. Animation caricature portrait, dessins en direct. Réalisations de silhouettes. Animation picturales originales. Team bulding, séminaires d'entreprises, anniversaire inauguration toutes vos soirées diverses et variées avec des des animations artistiques diverses et vairiées. Depuis plus de 30 ans nous animons vos colloques, soirées d'entreprises ou privées en dessinant les participants, en découpant leurs profils et en réalisant des peintures constructives ou sous formes de livre d'or. N'hésitez pas à faire appel à notre savoir faire pour égayer et animer de façon ludique et joyeuse tous vos événements.

Name: Chalk Custom Board Project
Description:
Chalk Custom Board Project was founded in 2014 with the ambition to set up an open organization focusing on board customization. Skateboard, surfboard, snowboard, longboard….any type of board you can think of.
We are a passionate multidisciplinary team contributing to the development of board art, always pushing visual, artistic and technical boundaries.
Driven by the idea of creating unique handmade designs with love, our talented artists come from various horizons: graffiti, illustration, graphic design, painting, wood sculpting, engraving, fashion and much more… 
After years developing our art across Europe, we are now setting up innovative concepts to promote board art in all possible forms. 
Over the past 5 years, our chalkers have customized more than 150 boards. Some of them required more than 100 hours of work. We always go further.

"Focusing on art, concept and innovation, we aim to become one of the most internationally recognized board art collectives".

Name: ArtPlace
Description:
Creative team of “Art Place” company presents to visitors` attention unique art projects. Using up-to-date and out of common solutions, we bring the boldest and the most imprudent creative ideas to life. 
General conception of “Art Place” exhibition activity is a kind of experiment, as we are using the most outstanding themes combined with new ways of material representing and unusual exhibition space arrangement. Another distinctive feature of “ArtPlace” exhibitions is the accentuate on the interactive actions. It was always more interesting to the visitor to take a part in  art action and  to apply  to pieces of  art directly than to be mare spectators. Using  its outstanding  exhibition concepts “ArtPlace”makes  this tendency really unforgettable and unique both for participants and visitors. In its exhibition activity “ArtPlace” successfully combines contrasts, breathes in time with contemporary art,  creates new and original concepts.

Name: THE INTERGENERATIONAL LGBT ARTIST RESIDENCY
Description:
The INTERGENERATIONAL LGBT ARTIST RESIDENCY is the first intergenerational artist-in-residency program for LGBTQ2 visual artists in Canada.

The residency offers studio space, travel support and free room and board to juried applicants for the duration of the two-week residency. Residents also receive mentoring and studio visits from critically acclaimed artists and curators.
The INTERGENERATIONAL LGBT ARTIST RESIDENCY takes place on Toronto Island at Gibraltar Point.

The land on which the residency is held is the traditional territory of the Haudenosaunee, and most recently, the territory of the Mississaugas of the New Credit First Nation. The territory was the subject of the Dish With One Spoon Wampum Belt Covenant, an agreement between the Iroquois Confederacy and the Ojibwe and allied nations to peaceably share and care for the resources around the Great Lakes.This territory is also covered by the Upper Canada Treaties. Today, the meeting place of Toronto (from the Haudenosaunee word Tkaronto) is still the home to many Indigenous people from across Turtle Island and we are grateful to have the opportunity to work in the community, on this territory.

Name: Kinfolk House
Description:
Kinfolk House is a collaborative project space that inhabits a 100-year-old historic home, where community and art converge in the predominantly Black and Latina/e/o neighborhood of Polytechnic in Fort Worth, Texas. Our goal is to uplift the beauty, talent, and culture in Polytechnic and feed its creativity by offering collaborative exhibitions, events, and educational opportunities of various disciplines. Through partnerships with community-minded creatives and project-based artists, we will build outside the preconceived ideas of “what art is,” exploring the intersections of life, cultural pursuits, and artistry.

Sedrick and Letitia Huckaby opened the doors of this historic space reimagined on the cornerstone of the creative power of Sedrick’s grandmother and original homeowner, Hallie Beatrice Carpenter, known to her friends and neighbors as, “Big Momma.” Her legacy inspires our understanding that creative pursuits exist beyond high art and academia.

Name: i-Scream arts
Description:
ART is the key to opening children’s creative imagination, and ART BONBON is the new paradigm of digital art education.

There are 4 fundamentals to describe ART BONBON
1. The world's first real-time online art education platform.
2. AI and multimodal data processing technologies are at the heart of the ART BONBON.
3. In 3D art-verse, a global art gallery will serve as a portal for talents.
4. Digital therapeutics program for children’s well-being

Name: Chalkwell Auctions Ltd
Description:
WELCOME TO CHALKWELL AUCTIONS
 
Our motto is that “we are here to help not to "hinder" which has stood us in very good stead and brought us a worldwide following through our internet based sales.
Regular customers from Southend to Singapore, Canvey to Calgary and Basildon to Beijing attest to the quality of our service, so take a look at the rest of our website and let’s see if we can help you?
 
CHALKWELL AUCTIONS has been established in the Southend area for almost 25 years and as a result of our re-location in 2010 has grown to be an important saleroom in the South of England.
 
All our sales are now live on-line via the-saleroom.com with recent catalogues being viewed by an amazing 66,000 people, over 3,500 of whom were only viewing our sale. We have gained an excellent reputation for the quality of our service both from sellers and buyers.

Name: Creative Reign - Artwork by Rachel Lancaster
Description:
From Winnipeg Manitoba Canada, Creative Reign specializes in custom creations ranging from original canvas art pieces, to murals, furniture, ornaments and so much more!

With clients ranging from large banks like Scotia Bank, local companies such as Allmar, Rudy's Eat and Drink, Morris Financial, and The Legion to small local venues including ice cream parlours, community centres, seniors homes, day cares and even into private residences. Also working with Celebrations Dinner Theatre during their set change, hired on as a freelance artist to paint the set murals. Creative Reign is a trusted, hard working Artist across the Province of Manitoba with a credible reputation. 

Creative Reign paints and repairs murals in many venues across the city of Winnipeg; creating original pieces or designing the clients vision. 

Check out more of Creative Reigns art on online:

www.facebook.com/rachellancasterart
https://www.instagram.com/rachel_lancaster_artist/

Name: Robin Resch Studio
Description: Robin Resch is an accomplished photographer, architect and artist who works throughout the greater NYC metropolitan area.  After receiving her Masters in Architecture from Princeton University in 2003, she opened her own studio in the heart of downtown Princeton.    Innovative and highly regarded, her studio provides photography, fine-art and design services.

Name: B21 - Ateliers Bauhaus21
Description:
B21 est un organisme de recherche et développement en art social et centre son action autour de trois piliers porteurs de sa mission :

Son premier pilier est celui de la recherche et développement dans le domaine de l’art social. Bauhaus21 étudie et analyse les différents impacts de l’art social sur son environnement. Systématiquement, l’entreprise documente sous forme de bilan les projets auxquels elle participe. Les résultats tirés de ces bilans serviront à alimenter les publications de Bauhaus21 sur l’art social. 

Son deuxième pilier est celui de l’accompagnement de projet. Bauhaus21 offre ses services à titre de consultants ou de coordonateur-mandataire aux entreprises souhaitant initier des projets d’art social. L’organisme produit des études de marché et des études d’impact, anime des ateliers, met en place des partenariats, administre, gère et anime des activités. Tous les aspects de la création de projet en art social, de l’idéation à jusqu’à la reddition de compte en passant par la mise en œuvre sont pris en charge par Bauhaus21. 

Son troisième pilier est celui du rayonnement de l’art social. Par ses publications tout comme par les projets qu’elle accompagne, l’entreprise vise la promotion de l’art social. Nous désirons sensibiliser le public, les artistes et les décideurs à au profond impact que l’art peut avoir dans sa société.

Name: Histoires d'atelier
Description:
Histoires d’atelier est un atelier angevin, attaché à l’artisanat, au savoir-faire et au Made in France. La création, l’impression et le façonnage se font depuis Angers, avec l’intention de réduire notre empreinte carbone et de produire de façon plus responsable. 

Nous sommes spécialisés dans :

 La 𝒅𝒆́𝒄𝒐𝒓𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏 𝒆́𝒗𝒆́𝒏𝒆𝒎𝒆𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒆𝒍𝒍𝒆 : Nos compétences en stylisme nous permettent d'avoir une approche globale de votre décoration et d'en travailler chaque aspect, pour donner vie à vos projets. Que ce soit pour un événement privé ou professionnel, nous serons à l'écoute de vos envies !

 Le 𝒔𝒆𝒕 𝒅𝒆𝒔𝒊𝒈𝒏 : Nous créons une histoire autour du produit que vous souhaitez présenter pour le mettre en valeur et pour permettre à vos clients de se projeter dans votre univers. Nous faisons ressortir l'identité de votre entreprise et vos valeurs à travers les éléments de décor que nous sélectionnons et que nous mettons en scène.

 La 𝒑𝒂𝒑𝒆𝒕𝒆𝒓𝒊𝒆 : C’est l’élément incontournable pour communiquer sur votre événement et pour inviter vos contacts de façon qualitative. Nous vous conseillons sur le choix du papier, de la typographie ou de la couleur, de façon à ce que vos invitations reflètent les valeurs que vous souhaitez transmettre. La papeterie décorative suit les mêmes codes graphiques et s'intègre dans la décoration lors de votre événement (menu, marque-place…)

Name: Praxis at California State University Dominguez Hills
Description:
PRAXIS is California State University Dominguez Hills (CSUDH) extracurricular, cross-disciplinary art engagement program. The primary goals of Praxis are to activate public space, enhance local culture and create expanded dialogue about art, and design in the local South Los Angeles communities.  Praxis brings artists, designers, students, and community members together to explore the history, social conditions, neighborhoods, and storylines of South Los Angeles.

This project has made possible through the generous support from the California Arts Council (Creative California Communities), Big City Forum, Shared_Studios, Pasadena Arts Alliance, Los Angeles Unified School District, and Cerritos College.

Name: The Art Detectives
Description:
Founded in 2016 in upstate NY by artist & educator Adam Kritzer, the Art Detectives develop & implement personalized art & arts integration programming for student-artists of all ages & abilities.  

But what is arts integration? Arts integration is a way of utilizing the artmaking process in service of academic, social & emotional learning (SEL).  Some people want to pursue a career in the arts, but others just want to enjoy making art while working towards complimentary goals in their lives.  We have classes for both the aspiring professional & the hobbyist.

We facilitate singular creative opportunities for individuals to become better artists while developing SEL skills such as teamwork, motivation, goal-setting, optimism & communication.  We are flexible in terms of curriculum, scheduling & delivery of service to meet the specific needs of each & every artist & family.  

Each artist has unique interests, needs & goals.  We believe in emergent, student-centered programming that sprouts naturally & evolves from the artist's blossoming curiosities. We think learning should be challenging & fun. We treat our artists seriously & with respect. We are co-learners & collaborators.  

Some Art Detectives are painters.  Others are yoga enthusiasts.  Some are interested in working with cameras or learning a musical instrument. Others are experimenting with screenwriting & digital art.  Some artists focus on one artform & others work with several.  If you can dream it, we can do it!  

Classes are offered virtually across the US and Canada. Please reach out today to learn more about our programming and philosophy or to sign up for a free brainstorming session.

Our vision?

Our mission?

Name: Fidelis Art Prints

Description:
L’associazione culturale nasce dall’ iniziativa di un team di professionisti.
Archeologi, storici dell’arte, restauratori, architetti, geologi, che con la loro personale e consolidata esperienza nel settore, offrono nei luoghi dell’arte un servizio altamente qualificato con percorsi di arricchimento culturale e interiore.
Ciascuno con la propria personalissima esperienza contribuisce alla realizzazione di progetti tesi alla rivalutazione del patrimonio naturalistico e storico-archeologico di Napoli.

Name: Arts and Crafts Society of Central New York
Description:
Since 1980 Dalton’s has established itself as an unparalleled resource for original Arts and Crafts furnishings and decorative accessories. Under the direction of Dalton’s founder David Rudd, carefully selected examples of original condition furniture, pottery, art and metalwork are offered for both beginning and experienced collectors. Dalton’s clients benefit from a unique combination of decades of experience, knowledge of superior forms, discerning judgment and the finest selection available.

Gustav Stickley, L&JG Stickley, Roycroft, Limbert, Rohlfs and other Arts and Crafts producers of mission oak furniture have been a focus of this extraordinary shop since its founding. Dalton’s has been dedicated to offering the finest examples of 20th century decorative arts, especially items from the American Arts and Crafts Movement including Grueby, Newcomb, Marblehead, Rookwood, Roycroft, Dirk Van Erp and others.

David Rudd and Debbie Goldwein are the principals of Dalton’s and equally share the responsibilities of operating this unique gallery. David has acted as a private consultant to several major east coast auction houses, is currently a regular contributor to American Bungalow magazine, past president of the Central New York Arts and Crafts Society and sits on the Advisory Board of The Stickley Museum at Craftsman Farms in Morris Plains, NJ. More recently Dave Rudd has become the President of the board at the Gustav Stickley House Foundation.

Debbie Goldwein is on the Board of Trustees of the Stickley Museum at Craftsman Farms in Morris Plains, NJ.

Dave Rudd is also available for buying, selling and appraising single items to entire collections.

In her role as CFO, Debbie ensures stable operation of the gallery on a daily basis and contributes to Dalton’s esteemed position as the most trusted and experienced source for Arts and Crafts objects in America.

Name: PAVED Arts
Description:
PAVED Arts is a non-profit, artist run centre for production, presentation, research and dissemination of contemporary media arts. The word PAVED is an acronym signifying the integration of media artforms addressed by our mandate: photographic, audio, video, electronic, digital. PAVED Arts exists to support artists who work in these media.

Our mandate is to support local, regional and national artists working in the ‘PAVED’ arts by operating an access and production centre for media and new media creation, while simultaneously operating a presentation centre that exhibits and disseminates contemporary visual, media and new media art in time-based, gallery, and off-site modes. 

PAVED Arts
424 20th Street West
Saskatoon, SK  S7M OX4
Tel. 652-5502
http://www.pavedarts.ca

Name: FLUX: School of Arts
Description:
FLUX stands for a state of constant change. In 2019, FLUX came into existence to fill a gap in the art ecosystem in Bangalore – as a space that operates out of compassion, collaboration and accessibility.

FLUX offers a range of unique and consciously curated programs to help you reconnect with your body, mind and spirit. X-sense is the flagship contemporary dance program along with Aerial Yoga, Theater, Natural Fitness, Bollywood Dance, Kids Club, Retreats, Women’s Circle, Healing and performances.

X-Sense, the flagship professional contemporary dance course at FLUX is a regular course and new batches always keep starting as soon as the previous ones are over. Admissions are always open.

Bollywood dance classes at FLUX are to learn all the rhythmic and energetic steps of Bollywood. It immerses us all in the expression of love and life.

Acting classes at FLUX are not run of the mill traditional acting classes. We emphasize as much on the movement training as we do on the voice training.

FLUX offers awesome regular yoga and aerial yoga classes. In fact, we have been the pioneers in introducing aerial yoga aka anti-gravity yoga in Bangalore.

Professional photography course at FLUX is a regular course and new batches always keep starting as soon as the previous ones are over. Admissions are always open.

Creative Writing Course at FLUX has been designed to challenge writers with sophisticated literary references and writing tasks that push their expression.

Inside Out, a therapeutic wellness program, offers insightful dance movement therapy (DMT) dealing with psychological trauma.

Women Circles at FLUX fully empower women where they share their experiences to arrive at an existential resolution. 

Kids Club at FLUX offers yearlong kids activities in Bangalore. It is a question of developing real intelligence for our kids into what they learn in school. We also keep organizing Summer Camps for kids every year.

Name: Isenberg & Associates
Description: Isenberg & Associates is a private art advisory firm with expertise in modern and contemporary art. Clients include developers creating large-scale public art spaces and private collectors with a passion for the arts. Our greatest effort-and of foremost importance- is to acquire works of substance and depth. A work of art asks us to pause. A great work of art asks us to pause and contemplate continually through the years.

Name: Apex Philatelics Ltd
Description:
APEX PHILATELICS LTD are the stamp division of A. H. Baldwin and Sons Ltd, an auction house specialising in coins.

Apex conducts an average eight auctions a year. Each Postal Auction regularly lists an average of 6000 lots with a catalogue mailing in excess of 5000 international bidders, from Argentina to the UK. The three Public Auctions a year are conducted at Lingfield Park, Surrey and are attended throughout the day by at least 150 bidders.

Our dedicated team of specialists have over 165 years of combined experience.  Apex prides itself on its personable staff, rapid turnaround and conscientious attention to detail. We handle pieces which range in value from 10p to £100,000 and our pricing has always been affordable when compared to the open market. Above all Apex our existing bidders enjoy dealing with a reputable auction house which will go out of its way to provide flexibility. As a result Apex has risen to become one the trusted market leaders in stamps.

Whether you are buying or selling stamps look no further: Consignments for future sales welcome (minimum consignment £500 at open market value).  Alternatively, we buy stamps too, if you'd prefer cash. We guarantee immediate payment in full, always.  Excellent prices currently being obtained for early GB and Commonwealth, especially EDVII and GV top values from BE. 

http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EwU-ZZutpKY&feature=youtu.be

Name: Galleria d'Arte Enrico Paoli
Description:
La Galleria d’Arte Enrico Paoli nasce nel Dicembre del 1999 a Prato e nel Giugno del 2000 apre la sua seconda sede nel suggestivo panorama di Pietrasanta.
Dal 2001 comincia a vendere e pubblicizzarsi anche su internet tramite il proprio sito.
L’amore per l’arte e il gusto del bello hanno caratterizzato da sempre il tratto qualificante dei due poli espositivi, proponendo una accurata e selezionata scelta di opere di arte moderna. 
La galleria propone una variegata serie di pitture e sculture di emergenti artisti contemporanei, che si confrontano nel genere e nello stile agli altri artisti più storicizzati. 
Enrico, il fondatore, nel tempo ha allestito numerose mostre ed esposto alle principali fiere, fra cui Bologna, Padova e Bari per far conoscere e promuovere i propri artisti.
Dal 2008 anche il figlio Diego è entrato nel mondo dell’arte affiancando il lavoro del padre.

Name: BRIZOLA
Description:
BRIZOLA is a Contemporary Art Office promoting  preeminent mid-career  and emerging Brazilian artists.

It was built by a family that has been living surrounded by art for generations and shared the same mission of providing the best platform for bringing value to Minas Gerais and Brazilian art and overcoming barriers by taking it to the most diverse spaces.
 
Founded by Cida Brizola in 2000, the gallery has consistently fomented curatorial practice while upholding the utmost quality in art production. Today, together with his daughter Maria, the gallery has been repositioned as an art office. 

It came from the desire to create more than an exhibition space but rather a hub for articulating meetings and connections between actors in the art ecosystem - curators, collectors, interested, passionate people, managers of public collections and institutions, museums, artists, patrons, sponsors, art fairs and galleries.

Name: PACIFIC TRIMMING
Description:
Pacific Trimming has served the needs of our customers for over 30 years since its establishment in 1982, in the thriving heart of the Manhattan Fashion District.

We are the largest fashion trimming supplier in the Manhattan Fashion District, providing our customers from both a wholesaler and retailer role. Furthermore, we are the only authorized dealer of Swiss RiRi zippers in New York!

In our 10,000 square foot show room, we carry over 30,000 different items to meet the needs of our professional fashion designers, the wholesale buyers, frequent fashion school students and many more!  

We carry a wide variety of items for our customers, ranging from hardware, buttons, trimmings, and zippers to Swarovski crystals with our inventory constantly updating. Currently we offer over 10,000 items on our website, and we plan to offer even more to our loyal online-clients by continually updating our site!   

We also provide services of snaps, eyelets, customizing zippers and sharpening scissors.

Name: Access Arts School of Service
Description:
School of Service began in 1971 and has grown steadily since, evolving into the thriving Access Arts program of today. Our mission is to provide creative learning experiences for everyone. We offer instruction in a variety of art media, with an emphasis on serving those who are underserved. From the beginner to the advanced artist, all are welcome in our studios.

We pursue this mission in various ways, in order to reach as many as possible.  Some of these ways include:
• More than 200 classes scheduled weekly throughout the year in a range of media, including clay, fibers, painting, drawing, sculpture, photography and jewelry-making
• Programs for people of all ages, financial circumstances, ability levels, and backgrounds
• Scholarships or fee subsidies for those otherwise unable to attend classes due to financial hardship
• Multiple workshops offered throughout the year, at our facilities and other locations throughout the community
• Free art demonstrations at area events and local art festivals
• Summer Camp and School’s Out Programs for school-age children
• Accessible studios and specialized equipment for those with special needs

Name: Make Studio Modesto

Name: Syne App
Description:
Bonjour à tous, 
dans le cadre de notre école de commerce (l’EDHEC) et du parcours Start-up Challenge , Théo, Victoire et moi sommes ravis de vous présenter notre nouvelle application : Syne.
Syne, quel drôle de nom nous diriez-vous… Cet étrange mot vient du nom de Mnémosyne, déesse de la mémoire qui aurait inventé les mots et le langage sur terre. Ainsi, tous les trois, nous avons à cœur de développer le partage de la culture et faciliter l’accès aux lieux culturels près de chez vous. 
Quel est notre projet ? 
Le partage de la culture, gratuitement, par les jeunes et pour les jeunes. 
Grâce à Syne, vous pourrez échanger avec vos amis à propos du dernier livre que vous avez lu, des séries et des films que vous avez apprécié (ou pas). Vous pourrez également en découvrir plus à propos des sorties culturelles près de chez vous. 
N’hésitez plus, devenez syneur. 
Syneusement, Emma, Victoire et Théo

We maken illustraties, animaties, game designs, videoclips en meer. En als opdrachtgever wordt je altijd meegenomen in het proces.

Name: Art Talks
Description:
Art Talks est un podcast qui vous fait parcourir de manière non chronologique, mais divertissante, les grandes tendances et phénomènes de l’histoire de l’art.

L’Art est le vaste reflet de notre culture. Bienvenue au pays de l’amour, de l’absurde, du sexe, de la nature, des inégalités, des success stories, des injustices, de la science et de la religion.

Quelle différence entre sexualité et érotisme ? Comment expliquer que de la merde d’artiste se vende 200.000€ ? Comment sommes nous passé de la Chapelle Sixtine à des tableaux blancs ? Les femmes doivent elles être nues pour entrer au musée ? Quels regards les artistes ont-ils portés sur la nature ?

Autant de questions artistiques, sociétales et philosophiques auxquelles Art Talks répond sans tabous, sans chichis, avec plein de références pop’culture d’aujourd’hui.

Name: Fount Gallery

We are Fount Gallery.

A new kind of gallery where art, technology, and community come together. Driven by curiosity and intention, we help demystify new models of art and commerce.

We support our artists in realizing their potential and achieving their goals. We’re committed to building a Web3 gallery model with deep roots in the art community and an eye on what’s coming next. Helping artists and collectors navigate emerging opportunities and shape their audiences into communities.

Because we see inherent value in a unique vision — for artists, collectors, for art itself.

Name: Collective WEBS
Description:
WEBS stands for Weaving Educational Biomimetic Systems. Our work recycles from species that, long before humans, practised sustainability to safeguard their future. Through biomimetics, our collective seeks to re-know and re-embody practices of change to challenge hegemonic narratives and unsustainable global structures of exploitation. 

Convinced by the power of education and micropolitics, WEBS promotes horizontal spaces to share, grow and engage in political reflections. We view this journey as a communal process of spiritual and collective healing that enables us to learn and unlearn, unshape and reshape our belief systems and relationships while expanding our ways of feeling, thinking and knowing together. 

Our educational and artistic projects integrate diverse and plural perspectives, including decolonial and horizontal methodologies. Along them, we wish to contribute to imagining shared futures for all, composed of healthier relationships with others and the world.
