Description: The LCA is a non-profit organization dedicated to nurturing and supporting area artists, emerging arts organizations and existing arts organizations through funding, administrative support. The LCA owns and operates the MUSE GALLERY in the heart of downtown Longmont.

Name: Brookline Music School
Description: Brookline Music School, a private, nonprofit community school for the arts, is Brookline's oldest and largest cultural institution. Founded in 1924 by the Public Schools of Brookline, the School became a private organization in the 1940s and was incorporated as a private, nonprofit school in 1967. In 1994, following a successful capital campaign, the School moved into its permanent home in the Kennard House. Brookline Music School's original purpose was to enhance the Public Schools of Brookline orchestras by providing music lessons to the children of Brookline after hours on school premises. Brookline Music School’s mission is to awaken and nurture the joy of learning, playing, and listening to music and to create a welcoming musical community for all ages, abilities, and interests.

Name: Ara Lucia
Description:
From childhood, I expressed identity through clothing. I was often criticized for being “too much”, my style and personality being louder than my family or community felt was appropriate. I was labled as “weird” for my affinity for gender-bending outfits or to show my style with a trash bag skirt paired with an angora sweater. Despite my enthusiasm for my personal expression this did leave me feeling alone sometimes.

When I first heard the word bisexual my spiritual identity came into focus, and the way I expressed myself (as a femme/tomboy) suddenly made sense. I was no longer the black sheep - I was bisexual, a member of the LGBTQ+ community. 

As an adult I’ve expanded my interest in personal fashion to my fascination with historical garments. I observed there was gender-bending throughout the ages, such as with Victorian dresses which had womanly skirts and curves while the bodices were tailored like menswear. 

Along with a profound desire to be understood, which constantly impacts how I move through the world, my sexual identity and its expression have galvanized into an authentic self. From here, I’m able to make work that I hope speaks to other queer women, and beyond.

Ara Lucia’s work explores the longing of a bisexual woman (Ara) in relationship with another woman (Her) who exists in another dimension. Through visual storytelling, Ara explores their struggles to locate one another across the universes and remain connected.

Together, they experience a profound sense of intimacy, acceptance and grace. These explorations then connect Ara to a wider community of queer women, which has been profoundly healing.

Illustrating this narrative through mixed media (ink, charcoal, oil pastel, pen and pencil), some materials can be blown away, signifying motion and fluctuation.  Together, this fluidity and lack of control over materials depicts the fleeting control the women feel over their ability to find one another, or maintain meaningful connection.

The gallery strives to create a unique experiential learning laboratory in which engaged students have formative experiences while participating in the management and operation of the gallery as they prepare to become viable artists and/or professionals aspiring to leadership roles in art galleries. The gallery will be a place to enjoy, learn, and discover. It will also be a workplace of inclusion and respect, with a main focus on the development of creativity and ideas.

Name: Agence culturelle Bambin'Art
Description:
Intervenant principalement en milieu scolaire, l'Agence culturelle Bambin'Art cherche à éveiller la curiosité et à former le regard des plus jeunes en les initiant à l'art. 
Travaillant main dans la main avec les professeurs (de la petite section à la 5ème), nos séances d'initiation à l'histoire des arts sont imaginées de manière à être participatives et collaboratives. En mêlant présentation contée et activité plastique, nous encourageons les élèves à développer leur créativité et contribuons à l'enrichissement de leur culture. 
Offrez donc à vos élèves ce véritable voyage dans le temps et l'espace qui complète de manière adaptée et cohérente le programme scolaire. N'hésitez pas à prendre contact avec nous pour toute question, nous nous ferons un plaisir d'y répondre !

Name: Jason Jacques Gallery
Description: Jason Jacques Gallery is the preeminent purveyor of late 19th and early 20th century European ceramics, and a driver of important design and ceramic art. Gallery principal Jason Jacques and his team mount exhibitions throughout the year at the 73rd Street and Madison Avenue gallery, in addition to participating in design fairs in Miami, San Francisco, Dallas, Maastricht, and New York. The gallery’s touted publications include Exotica, a compendium of essays by leading scholars on French master ceramists. Works sold by Jason Jacques Gallery are owned by art museums throughout the country, including the Wadsworth Atheneum Museum of Art, Saint Louis Art Museum, Carnegie Museum of Art, Detroit Institute of Arts, and Museum of Fine Arts, Houston.

Name: SO Fine Art Editions
Description: SO Fine Art Editions is an impressive new contemporary art gallery opened in September, 2013. It is situated at Number 10 South Anne St., in the heart of Dublin just off Grafton St., and close to the National Gallery, St. Stephen’s Green, and Trinity College. We stock an extensive range of works, specialising in original fine art prints such as etchings, lithographs, woodcuts and mono prints, ceramics, sculpture and photography by well established and emerging contemporary Irish and international artists. We ship worldwide and offer advice on all aspects of collecting, purchasing, storage, transport, hanging, framing, and tax efficiency in the acquisition of art.

Name: Arte Alto
Description: Colombian Art gallery, specialized in modern and contemporary art. you can buy the best of Colombian art.

Name: Dasic Fernández.
Description: Artista con 20 años de experiencia en el mundo del arte urbano. Hoy, considerado como un muralista de nombre internacional, Dasic Fernández desarrolla proyectos de gran magnitud e impacto, mezclando arquitectura y arte para brindar una experiencia sin precedentes, se trata de muralismo y pintura de suelo con una paleta saturada de colores y llena de patrones geométricos, realismo, arte figurativo, y más.

Name: Limu's creative canvas
Description:
Welcome to Limu's creative canvas, 
This is not only my page rather this is my dream.
If you are looking for authentic handmade painting and calligraphy painting, You are at the right place. You will also get any kind of name calligraphy, I can also  landscape, Islamic painting turned into 100% authentic and unique handmade drawings in acrylic or watercolor.We are very conscious about our art work and painting quality. We believe,one day,Limu's creative will be best calligraphy art and painting page in Bangladesh.

"Your satisfaction is always my priority."
Don't hesitate to take an order.

Name: ArtMuze
Description: A non-profit organization that wants to integrate music in all its aspects into the total package of rehabilitation for children.

Name: Fallen Heroes Tattoo
Description: There is no aspect of your visit that we haven’t taken into consideration. Fallen Heroes has re-imagined an industry to give you a warm, comfortable, and unforgettable client experience. You’re telling a story with artwork that will be on display for a lifetime, and we’re honored to be part of it.

Name: Taidekoulu Maa
Description:
Vuonna 1986 perustettu Taidekoulu Maa on kannatusyhdistyksen ylläpitämä yksityinen taideoppilaitos. Taidekoulu Maassa voi opiskella kolmivuotisella nykytaiteilijan ammattiin valmentavalla päivälinjalla sekä avoimilla kursseilla. Opiskelijoita koulussa on vuosittain päivä- ja iltalinjalla yhteensä noin 90. Päivälinjalle haetaan valintakokeen kautta.

Maan nykytaidepainotteiseen opetusohjelmaan haetaan aktiivisia nykytaiteesta ja sen sisällöstä kiinnostuneita luovia, kriittisiä ja tiedonjanoisia opiskelijoita.
Projektikeskeinen koulutusohjelma valmentaa opiskelijoita toimimaan nykytaitelijan ammatissa. Projektitöidensä kautta opiskelijat ovat vuoropuhelussa ympäröivän yhteiskunnan kanssa ottaen kantaa, kritisoiden ja esittäen utopioita käyttäen taiteen eri metodeja. Menestyvä opiskelija on aktiivinen osallistuja ja käyttää työssään tarvittaessa nykytaiteen monia eri muotoja. Taidekoulu Maassa opiskelu sopii hyvin myös esim. sosiaalitieteitä, psykologiaa ja filosofiaa opiskeleville.

Taiteen uusien yhteiskunnallisten odotusten edessä Taidekoulu Maa pyrkii etsimään uusia koulutusnäkökulmia muutostilassa olevan perinteisen taidekoulutuksen rinnalle. Valmentava opetus koostuu sisällöllisesti hyvin erilaisista kurssikokonaisuuksista, joihin on opettajiksi kutsuttu Suomessa toimivia aktiivisia ja kansainvälisesti kokeneita nykytaiteilijoita. Opetuksen rungon muodostaa monipuolisen teorian ja käytännön harjoitusten jatkuva vuoropuhelu.

Koulun opetustilat sijaitsevat Suomenlinnan uniikissa miljöössä. Taidekoulu Maan opettajat edustavat monipuolisesti taiteen ammattilaisia ja koululla on elävät kontaktit ajankohtaiseen kansainväliseen ja paikalliseen nykytaiteen kenttään. Maan taustalla päätösvaltaa käyttää Taidekoulu Maan kannatusyhdistys ry:n vuosikokouksen valitsema johtokunta, joka päättää koulun opetussuunnitelmasta, lukuvuosisuunnitelmasta, määrärahojen käytöstä ja henkilökunnan nimeämisestä.

Name: MuzArt East Coast
Description:
MuzArt East Coast was founded in 2018 with the aim of spreading the love for art in the community. Our philosophy is simple. Live in the moment and promote creativity & fun through art. 

At MuzArt, students are taught using heuristic method to develop their artistic potential, with the curriculum specially designed for children between the ages of 3 & 12.

MuzArt Art Classes will cater to your child's intellectual growth based on their age. Every phase of a child introduces a new type of skill they learn. Our art classes aim to fuel the development of both the left and right sides of their brains.  In our art programme, we only encourage our young artists. Though we may guide and assist them in illustrating proportions and techniques, the young creative minds of our students will always be in charge of the direction and emotion of their art. Art is an activity that increases the elasticity of an individual's creativity. The exploration of the mind's limitations.

We also provide corporate & casual workshops for all ages. From resin/jesmonite coasters and trays to scenic terrariums, our workshops are fun for all.  We also conduct Art Jamming sessions, which are free and easy, where you can come in and create your very own artwork  (all materials provided).  Play the music of your choice as you create your masterpiece. We provide a range of packages for workshops and art jamming.

Name: Más Arte Más Acción
Description:
Más Arte Más Acción es una fundación sin ánimo de lucro que genera pensamiento crítico a través del arte. La Base Chocó en el Pacífico colombiano es la fuente de inspiración tanto para artistas visuales, como profesionales de otras disciplinas, que exploran temas sociales y del medio ambiente.

Los proyectos realizados entre el 2012 y 2016 formaron parte de NUEVATOPIAS, programa concebido para marcar los 500 años de la creación del término Utopía de Tomás Moro. Las contribuciones de los participantes fueron recopilados en tres libros:  Ningún Lugar,  Mejor Que y Este Lugar (Nowhere better than this place).

A partir del 2017 MaMa seguirá enfocado en las relaciones del ser humano con el medio ambiente.

Name: Storyopolis Art
Description:
Storyopolis Art which encompasses its contemporary and illustrated art galleries is the creation of Matthew Abramowitz. Over the past 15 years he has earned a reputation among artists and collectors for being among the most respected and finest dealers of editorial and illustrated art. Storyopolis has hosted over 80 exhibitions. 
 Ultimately, The Storyopolis Art Gallery feeds one’s mind and soul through these imaginative artists and more. It is sure to tantalize and impress the minds of the beginning and experienced art collector.

Name: Cutout Collage Festival
Gérard Seiwert GALLERY
Description:
Galeriste de puis 40 ans à Metz, Nancy, Strasbourg et Luxembourg. Gérard Seiwert Gallery se digitalise et vous permet de réaliser vos acquisitions en ligne. 
Nous continuons à dénicher des pépites en France et à travers le monde, de jeunes artistes, des œuvres méconnues mais néanmoins prometteuses, principalement dans l'Art Contemporain, le Pop et Street Art.

Name: Carlson & Co.
Description: Carlson & Co. specializes in providing design development, engineering, and custom fabrication services to creative professionals and organizations.  The majority of clients are high-profile, internationally recognized contemporary artists.  Projects often involve the use of advanced high-volume manufacturing methods applied to extremely low-volume production.  The company employs approximately 100 people and is located 20 miles north of downtown Los Angeles in the San Fernando Valley.

Name: POP ART STUDIO
Description:
Pop.Art.Studio is a hybrid between an art-studio and an exhibition space that can accomodate small art-events and art-meetings.
Founded in March 2009 by the Siberian’s artist Ludmilla Radchenko, Pop.Art.Studio grows step by step through varoius professional collaborations, working in different ways such as design, technology, fashion. Since 2012 the fashion projects obtain more importance in the work of this art-factory: the project ART TO WEAR obtain a great success in the audience passionate in art and fashion.
Currently, we are able to offer our customers a wide range of services: realization of works in series; works on commission; portraits; customized projects for companies and caspule collection signed by the artist; customization of spaces and design elements; vernissage and artistic events.

Name: Children's Art Classes of Cary
Description:
We offer studio-based art education programs that include painting, drawing, design, printmaking, sculpture, ceramics, and much more. Students ages 3 and up will experience over 40 different areas of art to feed their passion and enhance their skills. Our programs are available for homeschooling and co-op education, track-out and summer camps, birthday parties, and weekly classes for all ages and skill levels. Our classes are designed to grow with your child.

Tapping into a child’s natural creativity and imagination can give them various benefits that can help them throughout their lives. At Children’s Art Classes in Cary, serving Cary, Durham, Morrisville, Apex, Raleigh, Holly Springs, and surrounding areas, we’re committed to helping parents discover classes that instill a sense of creativity in their children and help them find a passion for art. Our classes explore various types of art to enrich children’s lives and introduce them to creative outlets they can turn to as they go through life.

Name: Art Studio by Mona Shah
Description:
Mona Shah
Art teacher by profession
Graphic designing n Digital marketing expert
Taking orders for Paintings,Decorations,Art works,Craft,Calligraphy,Languages

Name: FESTY NAPPY SHOW
Description: Festy Nappy Show, Festival qui met l’accent sur la beauté naturelle de la femme africaine en particulier celle de la femme ivoirienne, ouvre les présélections de son Concours Miss Nappy Côte d’Ivoire.

Name: ART350
Description:
ART350 has opened a place for artlovers on the Bağdat Avenue in Erenköy. The gallery is on the most famous point of the asian side and was founded by Anna Laudel in 2012. At the beginning of 2013 the siblings Ferhat Yeter and Binnaz Gül Yeter started to direct the gallery.

ART350 is a gallery with constantly renewed exhibtions and the first show was called “Transfigurative” by Arzu Başaran and Ruth Biller. The gallery aimed to be a platform for artists from all over the world and one target is to present domestic artists also abroad, which share similar energies in terms of art, to exhibit their work and share ideas. ART350 is determined to exhibit young talents alongside renowned artists. In 2013 the gallery opened an exhibition named “Azarnegari” with the artist Ahad Saadi. While providing services to collectors and investors in art, the gallery is also aiming to promote art to wider audiences by organizing artists talks, workshops and readings. Because of the great feedbacks and demands ART350 opened in May 2013 together with the Elvira Bach exhibition the second gallery on the european side where it is placed in Akaretler, one of the most famous places in Istanbul. The gallery in Akaretler is representing the international art, the permanent collection and their artist in a two-storey location.

Name: Révolte-toi Nanterre
Description: Révolte-toi Nanterre forme les orateurs de demain en proposant un entrainement hebdomadaire à la prise de parole en public accessible à tous librement.

Name: Corden|Potts Gallery
Description:
Corden|Potts Gallery is located at 49 Geary Street, Suite 410, San Francisco, CA. 

The gallery is dedicated to exhibiting the work of outstanding contemporary photographers.  

We–Elizabeth Corden and Jan Potts, co-owners of Corden|Potts Gallery–are both active photographers who have exhibited our work in solo and group shows around the country.  We have also curated photographic exhibits since the late 1990s and have extensive business experience.  

We came to realize long ago that there are all too few galleries dedicated to showing the work of top-notch contemporary photographers and, of those galleries that existed back when we were starting out, a huge percentage have disappeared.  In response, we have now decided to put our experiences as photographers, businesspeople, and as curators into practice to help fill this void.

Name: Bureau des Arts de l'ENS Paris-Saclay
Description:
Le BDA, c'est l'association qui chapeaute la culture et les arts sur le campus de l'ENS Paris-Saclay !
https://wiki.crans.org/VieBda
https://www.instagram.com/bda_ensps/

Name: Ross's Auctioneers & Valuers
Description:
Ross’s Auctioneers – Northern Ireland’s Trusted Name in Auctioneering Since 1934.

At Ross’s Auctioneers & Valuers, we’ve spent over 90 years helping individuals, collectors, and estates realise the true value of art, antiques, jewellery, and fine goods.

Based in the heart of Belfast, we are proud to be one of Northern Ireland’s longest established and most respected auction houses, combining deep market expertise with modern online platforms to reach buyers around the world.

What we offer:

Specialist Auctions - Including fine art, contemporary art, antique furniture, rare books, silver, coins, watches, and estate jewellery.

Seamless Online Bidding - With accessible, user-friendly online auctions attracting global attention.

Professional Valuations - Trusted by private clients, solicitors, and institutions for probate, insurance, and asset valuation.

Heritage & Integrity - Our reputation is built on transparency, expert knowledge, and a genuine passion for the items we handle.

Whether you’re an experienced collector or a first-time bidder, Ross’s brings you closer to remarkable pieces with stories to tell.

Name: MAIN10ANCE PROJECT
Description: Il progetto Interreg MAIN10ANCE ha come obiettivo valorizzare il sapere costruttivo tradizionale e l’impiego di materiali e maestranze locali partendo dall’esperienza dei complessi monumentali dei Sacri Monti piemontesi. Intende inoltre proporre un metodo di lavoro per la conservazione e la valorizzazione del patrimonio culturale che sia sostenibile economicamente, replicabile, capace di responsabilizzare istituzioni, comunità, professionisti e possa così contribuire a rilanciare il territorio transfrontaliero (Italia-Svizzera).

Name: ILevel Inc.
Description:
ILevel is New York’s leading art placement and picture hanging service. With three decades of experience, we bring expertise and professionalism to the installation of all types of art. ILevel art handlers work with a wide range of clients, including corporations, retail, top designers, and private residences.

Our goal is simple: to provide the optimal placement solution, a secure installation and the best experience for our client — every time.

At ILevel, art installation is an exact science and a fine art. We offer comprehensive art placement and installation services:

Insightful Placement

Each member of our staff has a visual arts background. We bring design awareness and an ability to create arrangements of objects that complement other elements in an environment, such as furniture and lighting. We have experience with paintings, prints, Asian screens, mirrors, photographs, posters, drawings, sconces and family photo collections.

Meticulous Installation

Our installation techniques provide the highest level of stability and safety for valuable, and often fragile works. We have extensive experience securely hanging the most challenging installations.

Art Handling

We are experts in the safe handling of art. Our highly skilled installers set the industry standard for proper care of art and objects.

Call us for a free estimate.  212.477.4319

Name: Jerico Contemporary
Description:
Jerico Contemporary operates both as an art consultancy service as well as an innovative gallery platform showcasing contemporary art from both emerging and established artists. Curatorial projects include solo artist and group exhibitions which focus on pairing emerging artists with emerging collectors. 

Jerico Contemporary performs a comprehensive list of services which include advising on acquisitions, negotiating sales on behalf of clients, providing tailored advice on building a collection and complete collection management.

Name: Pépites d'Afrique
Description:
Pépites d’Afrique est né du souhait de promouvoir les créations d’artistes africains par la vente en ligne et des expositions éphémères. Ces pépites sont aussi bien des artistes établis, que ceux qui sont en devenir. Cela permet de leur offrir une visibilité et de développer un public de collectionneurs d’Art africain, novices ou chevronnés.

Passionnés par l’Art africain, les artistes et mon équipe voulons partager notre enthousiasme en faisant découvrir cet art au plus grand nombre, et en élargissant son champ géographique de rayonnement. Dans le projet de *Pépites d’Afrique*, chaque artiste reste exceptionnel.

Pépites d’Afrique est (et reste) en quête permanente du beau, en prospectant sur tout le continent africain les œuvres authentifiées d‘artistes qui ont fait de la création leur souffle de vie. Nous sélectionnons des œuvres d’artistes talentueux dans des styles artistiques très diversifiés.

Name: Cultuur Platform Woerden
Description: Stichting Cultuur Platform Woerden stimuleert, ondersteunt en verbindt cultuurmakers en cultuurbelevers in Woerden. Wij brengen beoefenaars van verschillende kunstvormen met elkaar in contact en bevorderen onderlinge samenwerking. Daarnaast ondersteunen we initiatiefnemers van culturele projecten en evenementen financieel via het Loket Culturele Zaken. Tijdens de coronapandemie hebben we onze rol sterk verruimd en nieuwe, innovatieve subsidieregelingen in het leven geroepen, waarmee de culturele (amateur)sector in Woerden een flinke impuls heeft gekregen. Het Cultuur Platform Woerden vertegenwoordigt dan ook een gigantische achterban. Op deze pagina vindt je actuele informatie die belangrijk kan zijn voor cultuurmakers en liefhebbers in Woerden.

Name: Arts and Culture, UBS
Description:
Vision- The primary objective of our club is to enrich the life of students by empowering them to become more confident, artistic and expressive individuals who can actively contribute to the community and identify their own forte!

Mission- To create a space for students to develop their creative selves in the form of fine arts and performing arts-i.e. dance, music. theatre, etc. We also aim to bring out managerial skills and professionalism into individuals through conducting a series of events and advancing their knowledge to identify their specialization of as management students.

Values:
- Promoting the diverse cultural values in our community
- A family you can rely on
- Problem-solving approach towards life
- Create meaning and depiction of emotions through art

Name: Fundación Il Posto
Description:
Il Posto es un espacio de arte dedicado a la conservación, estudio y difusión del arte contemporáneo chileno y latinoamericano.

Creemos que el arte y las discusiones en torno a él impulsan el desarrollo de un pensamiento crítico y abren nuevas perspectivas y reflexiones sobre nuestra contemporaneidad.

A través de exposiciones de artistas, investigaciones y contenidos producidos especialmente para estas, Il Posto promueve instancias colaborativas entre artistas, curadores, investigadores y coleccionistas de la región.

Il Posto cuenta con un acervo de más de 300 piezas de arte chileno y latinoamericano producidas desde la década del 70 a la actualidad.

Name: Lightheflame
Description: We curate art internationally with a focus on Africa to change life through the creativity of its makers

Name: Diva Art Group
Description:
Your gateway to fine art by your favorite artists - ON LINE SINCE 1995! 
Diva Art Group is a fine art brokerage firm founded in 1993, whose mission is to give art collectors the opportunity to acquire fine art at the best value. We can obtain ALMOST any artwork by ALMOST any artist.

Name: zeit für kunst
Description:
Zeit für Kunst | Kunstberatung beate heisterkamp
Kunst für Unternehmen und Privatpersonen. 
Individuelle Beratung - Kunstkonzept - Recherche - Atelierbesuch - Realisierung.
Kunst belebt, Kunst inspiriert und verleiht Ihren Räumen eine persönliche Note. Ich berate Sie gerne: Mit einem Bild, einer Skulptur oder einer ganz anderen Arbeit, die zu Ihnen passt. Gemeinsam setzen wir Ihre Räume in Szene. Zeit für Kunst.

Name: USwap NFT Marketplace
Description:
Welcome to USwap, one of the fastest growing projects on the TRON network & DeFi world. 

Uswap.me is a fully automated decentralized exchange that performs trading exchange operations without the participation of third parties. 

We have NFT auctions, comprising amazing art from artists across the world.

#NFT #cryptocurrency #TRON

Name: Arte en Movimiento Galeria
Description:
Arte en Movimiento Galería nace del amor al arte y la pasión de experimentar la vida en su totalidad. Como su nombre lo dice refleja un desarrollo constante en sus obras, llevándolas hacia nuevas tendencias rompiendo esquemas.
Los artistas que principalmente representan a la galería son  madre e hijo: 
Leticia Herrera
Miguel M. Herrera
Arte en Movimiento ha sido desde el año 2005 una galería líder en el mercado del arte nacional e internacional, ofreciendo obras originales de alta calidad que surge de las emociones e inspiración de los artistas que forman parte de ella. La galería ha ido creciendo a través de los años ampliando sus servicios y su mercado.
La obra de nuestra artista  Leticia Herrera se identifica por la creación
de obras de acuarela en  gran formato, la flores y la naturaleza  son parte de su
pasión,  asi como obras abstractas desarrolladas en tecnicas y soportes inovadores.
La obra deL artista Miguel M. Herrrera esta
enfocada al expresionismo abstracto en base a
paisajes subreales y algunas obras también tratan
de su pasión por los animales y la naturaleza.

Servicios:
• Obras originales
• Giclées
• Servicio de enmarcado
• Mobiliario con arte
• Accesorios con  arte
• Regalos personalizados

Name: Sarah C. Blanchette Studio
Description:
Sarah C. Blanchette is a photo and fiber based artist working out of the Detroit area. 

Through repetitive acts of hand/machine sewing and physical manipulations of the self portrait, she documents her coming of age in a digital world while embarking on a journey towards growth and autonomy in womanhood.

Since establishing her studio practice in 2015, Blanchette has exhibited nationally and online in galleries, museums, zines, blogs, and artist run spaces. She is currently an Artist in Residence and Studio Coordinator/Curator at BULK SPACE and Residency/Gallery Manager at Talking Dolls in Detroit. Blanchette also co-curates the Instagram page @feministartmuseum, which features artists creating work around identity, gender, race, and sexuality.

Blanchette holds a BA in Journalism and Studio Art Photography from Oakland University (‘15) and an MFA in Photography from Cranbrook Academy of Art (‘17). She is a Juried Artist Member of SAQA.

Name: Barbara Flynn Pty Ltd
Description:
Barbara Flynn Ltd specialises in complex public art projects and curating contemporary art. We advise private and public organisations – from governments and councils to large property developers and leading architectural firms – and manage the art commissioning and selection process so that artists and organisations can work together effectually to create works of art of meaning to people.

Barbara Flynn has over 35 years’ experience in curatorial and gallery roles, and her team brings an energy and dedication – along with extensive knowledge and wide-ranging connections with artists – to every project they oversee, no matter how complex or challenging.

Name: Maison Hanami
Description: Maison Hanami est une jeune marque de vêtements en collaboration avec des artistes d'aujourd'hui. Nous sommes 3 jeunes étudiants isséens et vanvéens, Ariana, Léo et Lucas. Pour cette première collection, nous avons décidé de lancer le projet sur Ulule, une plateforme de financement participatif qui permet aux jeunes projets comme le nôtre de démarrer grâce à un coup de pouce des autres.

Name: JC Fine Arts
Description: You most likely want to know just what makes me different from about a million other online stores. Well ist simple we are not just a online store, it's so much more. Albany Fine Arts has a dynamic collection of quality art for you home, office, or business. We offer online art classes and a collection of quality art print products.

Name: Paul Lock Art
Description:
Paul Lock Art
Originals - Commissions - Limited Edition Prints

Name: Atelier Arzilla
Description: Embarquez avec moi à la découverte de l'art de la poterie. Après des études aux Beaux-Arts, j'ai exploré les techniques traditionnelles en Corée du Sud avant de revenir à mes propres origines : la terre corse. Des pigments bleus des émaux méditerranéens aux argiles noires des falaises, je vous invite à retrouver l'authenticité et le raffinement du travail du colombin et du modelage.

Name: Art and Talk
Description:
Avete 10 minuti da dedicare all'arte? Mettete gli auricolari e ascoltate comodamente da qualsiasi luogo le nostre puntate dedicate agli artisti più affascinanti e importanti della storia dell'arte. Le nostre non sono lezioni accademiche, ma brevi e simpatiche conversazioni per darvi uno spunto e suscitare la vostra curiosità su un determinato argomento. 
Potete ascoltarci su Spreaker oppure su ITunes digitando Art and Talk nella sezione di ricerca.

Name: Polly Dutton Artist
Description:
I am a professional artist creating abstract and semi abstract paintings.  My work is held by collectors worldwide.  
I create ongoing bodies of work for sale through galleries or privately.
I also offer a commission service; working closely with clients, discussing individual needs and requirements.

Name: University of Kentucky Department of Theatre and Dance
Description:
The Department of Theatre and Dance offers well-rounded programs providing the flexibility to double major or minor in another discipline within a liberal arts education at a Research 1 institution. The department offers a vibrant variety of classes, techniques, performances on and off the stage, and a robust student produced season within an encouraging and nurturing environment. The faculty are accomplished working professionals including actors, dancers, directors, choreographers, designers, technicians, playwrights, and published scholars. Through the thoughtfully curated curriculum and faculty mentorship, students are prepared to have a successful transition from campus to professional life.

The University of Kentucky Department of Theatre and Dance is an accredited institutional member of the National Association of Schools of Theatre (NAST). Visit the NAST website for more information about accreditation.

Name: Artlette Art Studio
Description:
Art education provides students the opportunity to acquire new skills, discover their creativity and the freedom of self-expression. Studies demonstrate the importance of art succeeding in improved self-confidence, positive academic, social and emotional outcomes.

At Artlette specialised fine art studios, our curriculum and teachings balance techniques and creativity, offering the best quality programme, supplies and studio space for the students. During our classes, we nurture students into respectful, responsible and resilient individual.

Our studios offer kids, portfolio preparation, hobbyists classes, curated series of workshops, personalised private lessons, events and parties.

Follow us on Instagram & Facebook @artlettecolours for latest promotions and student works.

Name: La Station artist-run space
Description: La Station est le lieu d’exploitation de l’association Starter, dont le but est de défendre les arts dans leur forme la plus contemporaine. C’est dans une volonté de proposer un maillon supplémentaire reliant au plus près les artistes, les institutions, les centres d’art, les galeries et le public que La Station trouve sa pertinence, en tentant d’apporter une valeur ajoutée à un panorama culturel existant. Cette dynamique initiée en 1996 permet l’éclosion de recherches dans des conditions réelles et professionnelles d’exposition ou de production. La Station a pour principal objectif de soutenir et de diffuser la vie culturelle et artistique contemporaine à Nice par tous les moyens et dans toutes les formes que celle-ci revêt. De montrer ce qui se fait dans cette ville, et attirer d’ailleurs, de France et d’Europe, des pratiques très contemporaines de l’art. Elle a pour but notamment d’aider les artistes et de participer au développement, à la promotion et à la diffusion de leurs activités.

Name: The Leo Marchutz School of Painting & Drawing
Description:
The Leo Marchutz School of Painting & Drawing is a cultural and educational center in Aix-en-Provence, France that aims to preserve, nurture, and expand the legacy of the school and bring impactful programming opportunities to our international community.

Founded in 1972, the Leo Marchutz School has grown through several iterations. In its 50th year, we are now reimagining the school’s future with the goal of becoming a cultural and educational center in Aix-en-Provence that is a valuable resource in the larger world and a responsible member of the “patrimoine” of Aix-en-Provence that gives back to the local community of which it is a part. We plan to preserve and continue the legacy of Leo Marchutz’s educational philosophy and artistic movement through a combination of exhibitions, educational programming, workshops, residencies, research projects, and more.

We gather with renewed energy at a unique moment in our collective history and invite our community of artists, friends, and supporters to join us on this path forward for this beloved institution.

Name: Le Bureau - Firme Artistique
Description:
NOTRE MISSION
Nous avons pour mission de briser l’isolement et de partager les bienfaits de l’art en le sortant de ses lieux traditionnels par la création de projets qui permettent d’établir un lien privilégié entre le public et les créateurs d’ici.

NOTRE VISION
Nous voulons offrir des expériences artistiques de tous genres, en allant nous-mêmes à la rencontre de notre public. Notre but ultime est de voir nos projets donner lieu non pas à une représentation, mais à un véritable dialogue avec les gens qui nous ouvrent leur porte et leur cœur.

NOS VALEURS
Nous sommes créatifs, inclusifs et rassembleurs.

Nous sommes un organisme à but non lucratif à vocation multidisciplinaire.

Nous sommes fiers d’être un créateur d’emploi pour les artistes d’ici et de voir à ce qu’ils soient rémunérés à leur juste valeur.

Name: The Curators
Description: THE CURATION AND INSTALLATION OF SOUGHT AFTER PHOTOGRAPHY EXHIBITIONS FROM HIGHLY ACCLAIMED & BURGEONING ARTISTS, FOR DISPLAY AND SALE IN GALLERIES,  FESTIVALS, CORPORATE EVENTS, PUBLIC AND PRIVATE SPACES WORLDWIDE. Founded by Sharon Price and Peter Dench

Name: Atelier 40a
Description: Unser Verein besteht aus selbstständigen Restauratorinnen und Restauratoren mit unterschiedlichen Spezialisierungen.

Name: Kreëmart
Description:
Kreëmart exists at the intersection of art, consumption & multi-sensory experience. A pioneer in interactive cultural experiences for art audiences since 2009, Kreëmart has presented performance based art “Happenings” all over the world, giving audiences globally the chance to interact with artists and their artworks in a spontaneous, immersive and unexpected way. Kreëmart has now expanded in multi-media projects, collaborating with artists and brands to produce editorial and video-based content for digital platforms. 
These projects are presented world wide in the form of public art happenings. During these events, the audience spontaneously interacts with the artists and their artworks in a direct and immersive fashion. Kreëmart typically presents the public with a limited ingestible art edition so the public can decide whether the experience or the work itself has more value: to eat or not to eat.

Paralleling the happenings, the Kreëmart Salons challenge a range of various professionals contemporary to today’s art world to think about controversial art topics and openly discuss them in a fluent dialogue with the public.

Working as a New York City based art advisor for many years, Raphael Castoriano founded Kreëmart in 2009. Kreëmart has declared Art and dessert to be non-essential luxuries intended to bring pleasure to the audience. Over the last several years, Kreëmart has served as a public platform for artists.

Name: Isaksen Manuskript
Description: Synopsis, treatments, scener, dialoger, dramaturgi, utviklingsarbeid og fullt ferdige manus.

Name: The Little Biscuit Pottery Painting Studio
Description:
Pottery Painting Studio and Craft Station based in Morley, Leeds.
We provide family pottery painting sessions, adults-only evenings,  themed events,  seasonal workshops and school holiday sessions.

We also work with various schools, charities, and community groups. Our studio seats up to 20 people over 2 floors, or we can come to you.  

We can also provide take-out kits for you to host your own party,  team-building event or night in with family and friends.

Name: Maestro Music Professionals
Description: Maestro Music Professionals is a bootstrapped EdTech and professional services startup currently based in southern New England. The company was founded around one simple goal: to increase access to quality and equitable music education. We connect students and organizations with local fine-arts professionals to offer online and in-person classes for a wide variety of instruments.

Name: Santa Barbara Arts Fund
Description:
The history of The Arts Fund is rich with 30 years of multiple roles since its incorporation, supporting the arts and making them available to everyone through the Individual Artist Awards and exhibitions, a strong Teen Arts Mentorship program, and many divergent efforts. 

The development of Santa Barbara's "Funk Zone" into a vibrant arts center has surged in this past year, and The Arts Fund as a private non-profit 501(c)(3) organization situated there is committed to seeing this vision realized to its fullest potential.

Name: Christopher Cutts Gallery
Description:
The Christopher Cutts Gallery is a leading Toronto-based commercial fine art gallery dealing exclusively in critically acclaimed, important new and historical works of modern and contemporary art produced by high-caliber artists from Canada, the United States, Britain, Germany, the Czech Republic, and Denmark.

The Gallery’s program includes:

> Estates of historically significant Canadian artists, most notably many of the Painters 11 group who established Canada’s international reputation for modern abstraction

> Established senior artists working in a wide range of media whose works are prominent in private and public collections worldwide

> Recognized mid-career artists from Canada and Europe who are attaining significant critical and media attention

> Important emerging talents from around the world, particularly those exploring the boundaries of media, representation and interpretation in contemporary art making

The Gallery has been in continuous operation since 1986, and has been located in its current facilities for more than 15 years. Currently, the Gallery maintains an active roster of 45 artists, many of whose work is included in the world’s leading public and private collections.

Name: Observatorio Cultural Virtual OCV
Description: Observatorio virtual, cultura a tu casa.

Name: Kuverum
Description:
Sie möchten lernen, wie Sie anderen Menschen kulturelle Erfahrungen zugänglich machen. Sie arbeiten in einem sozialen oder pädagogischen Umfeld und möchten den Umgang mit Kultur in Ihre Arbeit einbeziehen. Der berufsbegleitende Lehrgang Kuverum befähigt Sie, Kultur und Vermittlung in Ihrer Tätigkeit professionell umzusetzen.

Am Freiwilligen-Projekt «TiM – Tandem im Museum» des Vereins Kuverum Services sind in der ganzen Schweiz über 120 Museen und mehr als 370 Freiwillige beteiligt. Zusammen ermöglichen wir jedes Jahr vielen Menschen einen niederschwelligen Zugang zu Kultur. TiM verbindet Menschen aus unterschiedlichen Generationen und Kulturkreisen miteinander und macht Museen zu Orten der Begegnung.

Name: Artistes d'Occitanie
Description: Artistes d'Occitanie, un magazine sur l'actualité des arts plastiques, mais surtout un regard journalistique sur les artistes importants d'Occitanie.

Name: Pia Sprong tekeningen troosten, kist, urn, muur, kaart, sjaal, shirt
Description:
Een uniek kunstwerk als grafkist is een blijvende herinnering.
U maakt de keus, 5 uit honderden tekeningen. Pia Sprong ontwerpt de kist in samenwerking met #StudioHemeltjelief #unieke uitvaartkist #kunstkist #grafkist #uitvaartkist

Name: Out of The Box art studio
Description: New Art workspace in Al mirqab Mall - SOON

Name: Bob van Orsouw Gallery, Zurich
Description: Gallery for contemporary art

Name: M Fine Arts Galerie
Description: M Fine Arts Galerie, owned by Mitch Plotkin and Madison Maushart, is one of the top art galleries in Boston. The gallery exhibits various artists, including sculpture by Beth Carter and paintings by Michel Delacroix. Additionally, it is the exclusive U.S. gallery for paintings by Philippe Charles Jacquet. M Fine Arts Galerie also collaborates with interior designers to provide artwork for their projects.

Name: VOYZX Fine Art Project
Casa da Escada Colorida
Description:
Centro cultural autônomo sediado no Rio de Janeiro, dedicado à arte, cultura e inovação social. Fundada em 2019, a Casa da Escada Colorida é um espaço de residências artísticas, exposições, oficinas e eventos que conectam artistas, comunidades e público em torno de práticas colaborativas e transformadoras.

Nossa missão é criar pontes entre a produção artística contemporânea e questões sociais urgentes, oferecendo um ambiente inclusivo que estimula a diversidade, a experimentação e o diálogo. Atuamos como plataforma de lançamento para novos talentos e como ponto de encontro para artistas de diferentes origens e áreas.

Já recebemos mais de 300 residentes, sendo ˜40% bolsistas, fortalecendo a cena cultural independente e gerando impacto social positivo e construindo público.

Name: Polymerclay
Description: Artesanato, arte e design em polymer clay cerâmica plástica

Name: Azerbaijan Rugs
Description:
"Azerbaijan rugs" is the only comprehensive source on the web which is dedicated particularly to Caucasian Azerbaijani rugs. Over 10 000 rugs and textiles are displayed in this website, also numerous informational and educational articles, essays, and illustrations to inspire you. Research is continuously being done and will be presented to you to bring out the most objective information about the Caucasian rugs which has been mostly misused and misunderstood in the history, intentionally or unintentionally by different sources.

We also specialize in all kind of - new, mid-20th century, old, semi-antique and antique Caucasian rugs and carpets, including pile rugs, kilims, sumaks, shadda, jajim, zili, verni (verneh), khurjun, heybe, also handmade embroideries and other ethnic Caucasian textiles.

Name: Minerva Arte s.n.c. di Sarti Emanuela e Serra Francesca
Description:
Attestazione SOA nella categoria OS2A.
Ditta specializzata nel restauro di affreschi e dipinti su intonaco, restauri di dipinti su tela, tavola, sculture e superfici architettoniche in marmo, terracotta e arenaria.

Name: EmbarcArte Galería Arte Online
Description:
Es un proyecto liderado por cuatro profesionales: dos empresarias valencianas con experiencia y formación  en el mundo del arte, una artista madrileña con una sólida formación académica y un experto en el mundo de Internet que comparten una misma pasión por el arte y el convencimiento de que los artistas emergentes deben tener una oportunidad de exponer su obra a nivel mundial.

Nuestro objetivo es  hacer que el arte contemporáneo sea accesible para todos y demostrar que no se tiene que ser experto en arte ni millonario para disfrutar y comprar arte.  

En www.EmbarcArte.es tenemos obra original desde 50 € 

Te ofrecemos una enorme variedad de pinturas, esculturas, fotografías, dibujos y grabados para satisfacer todos los gustos, tanto para quien está empezando a comprar arte como para el coleccionista experto. 
Queremos que EmbarcArte.es  se convierta en la plataforma líder de venta de arte original.
Periódicamente expondrán nuevos artistas, así que si no encuentras la pieza perfecta en tu primera visita siempre valdrá la pena regresar.

EDICIONES LIMITADAS X PRECIOS ASEQUIBLES + INTERNET = EmbarcArte.

Socios de EmbarcArte:
María Blanco-Cobaleda
Rocío Alvarez
María Fernández-Martos
Fernando de Piniés

Name: Northeastern Pennsylvania Philharmonic
Description: Fund development for the best regional orchestra in the country.

Name: Thessaloniki Queer Arts Festival
Description:
Thessaloniki Queer Arts Festival (TQAF) is a grassroots initiative that sets out to alter deeply entrenched misconceptions and prejudices toward the queer and LGBTQIA community through artistic and cultural practices. 

The festival was founded in 2018, and is led by a dedicated team of volunteers, including Tomas Diafas, Dominic Sylvia Lauren, Vassia Magoula, Evi Minou, Aristea Rellou, Annie Tsevdomaria and Magda Vaz, who endeavour to provide queer artists with a platform to investigate sociocultural phenomena relating to queer identities and experiences. TQAF has been formed through collaborations in which our team has collectively curated the festival programme.

The festival is driven by the belief that art has the power to open new avenues of communication as well as serve as a bridge between a diverse array of individuals and social groups. TQAF aims to foster dialogues and develop alternative methods for addressing social discrimination.

Name: Barbara Edwards Contemporary
Description:
Established in 2009, Barbara Edwards Contemporary is the vision of art dealer Barbara Edwards. We are pleased to present a selection of the best Canadian and international artists. For more information, please visit www.becontemporary.com.

1069 Bathurst Street
Toronto, ON
M5R 3G8
T: 647 348 5110

Name: National Sculptors' Guild
Description:
Specialists in public art placements since 1992. Owned and operated by the father/daughter team of John & Alyson Kinkade, we have placed over 550 significant art statements throughout the U.S. Shop online or contact us to commission something unique for your space.

Our purpose is to champion a community of artists and to serve as a bridge between these artists and the public. Our primary goal is to allow the artists to stick to their strength - creating great artwork. All aspects are approached as a team offering the client a wide variety of creative solutions to fulfill their unique needs. We also facilitate the many aspects involved in large-scale commissions; evident in hundreds of public art installations and a comparable number of residential and corporate placements since 1992.

Name: Great Masters Art Science & Engineering
Description: GMAA uses the latest automation, imaging and cloud computing technologies to disrupt how fine art is sold and valued, adding security to investors, and revolutionizing how the world explores art.

Name: Le Livre Art Publishing (LLAPNYC)
Description:
Le Livre Art Publishing is an art publishing company that produces editions of artworks in collaboration with acclaimed contemporary artists. The company was founded in 2011 by Adele Jancovici, in New York City.
The goal of Le Livre Art Publishing is to configure a method of encountering art that encompasses and exposes the trajectory of the creative process, from manual production to the ethereal experiencing of the artwork. 
By rendering its endeavours in the form of printed word, editions of artworks, and curation of shows, the entire scope of the artistic experience, both of artist and of viewer, is elucidated. Through this multi-medial and multi-sensory approach, the concatenation of concept, actualization and product is made manifest.

Name: Imago galleria d'arte
Description:
Imago porta nella città di Perugia un progetto significativo: una Galleria d’Arte contemporanea in pieno centro storico, affiancata dall’Art Shop di Collestrada, via della Valtiera 73/75.
Opere originali, grafica d’autore dei più celebri Maestri della contemporaneità,
ceramiche d’arte, oltre che eventi dedicati al mondo dell'arte: mostre temporanee dedicate ad artisti emergenti o già affermati e un fornitissimo campionario di cornici.

Name: Abir Charitable Trust
Description:
Abir is a canvas for artists and art connoisseurs in India, to come together and celebrate colours.
Abir literally means colours, Indian celebrate their festivals with. Abir here is a community initiative around celebrating art through people who make art and those who love them. Abir will handhold young artists, bridge the gaps and create synergy. Abir will expand the universe of art and enhance conversation around it .
Abir will especially work towards spotting sincere talent, mentoring them, help show casing their work by creating platforms on both virtual and real expositions

Name: The Kura MJC Gallery
Description: A gallery specializing exclusively in Post War and contemporary Japanese ceramics, with an emphasis on everything from the works of Living National Treasures to promising young artists.  Represented are (among others) the works of Hamada Shoji, Kawai Kanjiro and other members of the Mingei movement, Kumakura Junkichi and other members of Sodeisha as well as representatives from most of the major ceramic centers, including Mashiko, Kasama, Mino (Oribe, Shino, Seto and Iga), Shigaraki, Bizen, Tamba, Hagi, as well as the ceramics of Kyushu and Shikoku. In addition we work with artists in modern Glass, lacquer and other media.

Name: Art d'Histoire
Description:
Art d'Histoire launches LISA.
LISA aims at becoming the first portal on 19th century art history, 100% reliable, long-lasting and captive based on the combination of Art d'Histoire videos and its primary sources based and interactive encyclopedia. 
LISA is availabe in French and is now being tested in English.

Name: Clima
Description:
Clima is a contemporary art gallery based in Milan, Italy.
The gallery supports young worldwide artists in their career development.
The gallery is located in via Alessandro Stradella 5, Milan, in the Porta Venezia Art District, and it's a three rooms apartment gallery on the ground floor of an Historical building.

Name: CFM Gallery
Description:
In 1992, Neil Zukerman opened CFM Gallery's doors to Greene Street in SoHo for the first time.  At the end of 2009, CFM Gallery moved to our new location at 236 West 27th Street in Chelsea, NYC.

Exquisite technique coupled with artistic vision defines our user-friendly presentation of figurative fine art paintings, sculptures and original graphics. 

Contemporary symbolism at its apex in the traditions of Bosch, the Italian Renaissance, Art Deco, Art Nouveau, the Viennese and German Secession and the symbolist movements with an edge of surrealism.

CFM Gallery's artists include: Salvador Dali, Leonor Fini, Michael Parkes, Anne Bachelier, Frederick Hart, Aleksandra Nowak, Ailene Fields, Felicien Rops, Lucio Bubacco, Lisa Lichtenfels, Franz von Bayros and more.

Additionally, the gallery proudly offers self-published and rare books, as well as perfume factice, Lalique crystal, both estate and custom designed jewelery by Tom Shivers & Ailene Fields, and object art by Manfred Wild.

Become a fan on Facebook at:
http://www.facebook.com/pages/New-York-NY/CFM-Gallery/172433767679

Name: Antiques & Collectibles National Association
Description: A national association that provides many benefit programs to antique, collectible and fine art dealers as well as private collectors.

Name: Foley Gallery
Description:
FOLEY brings together fine line and obsessive precision in the disciplines of drawing, cut paper, painting, and photography.

Michael Foley opened Foley Gallery in the fall of 2004 after several years of working with notable photography galleries including Fraenkel Gallery, Howard Greenberg Gallery, and Yancey Richardson Gallery. He is on the faculty of the School of Visual Arts where he teaches and lectures on issues in contemporary photography.

Owner: Michael Foley
Associate Director: Sherri Littlefield

Name: ATKYA ART CONSULTANCY LTD
Description:
RE: THE SECRET ART OF FIRST IMPRESSIONS IN BUSINESS

Working for leaders of commerce, high net worth individuals, hoteliers, clients of exquisite taste and members of several royal families across the Gulf Region, we know not only what it takes to make a lasting first impression, but also that you have just moments to make it.

ATKYA is an elite art consultancy consisting of senior consultants, artists and art strategists, with offices and studios in London, Kuwait and Qatar. We work tirelessly to produce, procure and select artworks in a wide variety of mediums, creations that enable our clients to make a memorable first impression in their homes, official residences and places of work.

Whether you wish to install a single stand-out piece that draws the eye or a range of contemporary and Islamic art on canvas, sculptures, murals, ceramics, Gulf Arabian desert and Oriental heritage style pieces, objets d’art, or one-off wearable or display-only jewellery, a senior consultant will personally attend your venue to determine your curation, consultancy, spatial design, commissioning or supply needs to achieve the impact you wish to make.

We have been working with businesses and individuals for over 25 years and this experience, alongside the creative talent of some of the world’s finest current artists and a collection of hundreds of original works, will ensure that you leave a lasting impression on anyone who crosses your threshold.

To view our catalogue or to arrange an appointment with one of our consultants, please do contact us today on matisse@atkya.co.uk or info@atkya.co.uk

Name: The Lusher Gallery LLC
Description: The Lusher Gallery is a privately owned and operated boutique dealership based in New York, bringing forth over three decades worth of experience in the art market as it secures for its clients the highest quality, discretely individualized services and assistance in navigating the often byzantine world of deal-making (and as such operating by prior appointment only). The Gallery’s owner and director is Nicholas Lusher, considered by many to be one of the world’s foremost specialists in all genres of Bermuda-related Antiques and Fine Art, a field which he has embraced for his entire professional career of over thirty years. Mr. Lusher takes a passionate interest in trading historic and contemporary paintings, watercolors, and drawings (Bermuda-themed and otherwise), as well as vintage photographs, rare books (including signed and inscribed books), historic prints and antique maps, historic autographs and manuscripts, quality paper items, sculpture, coins, antique silver, and banknotes. Prior to his permanent move to New York City in January, 2011, he operated two "brick and mortar" galleries in Bermuda, and served as a trustee at both the Bermuda National Gallery (where he guest-curated and lectured) and at the Bermuda Society of the Arts, a non-profit institution dedicated to Contemporary Art. Besides its unique position as specialists in Bermuda-related Works of Art, the Lusher Gallery has recently expanded its interest and expertise to Caribbean and West Indian Fine Art as well. The Lusher Gallery prides itself on delivering a unique, deeply personalized, art-buying experience, backed by the trust and faith earned as the result of over three decades of unimpeachable integrity and concern for its clients’ best interests.

Name: Mondejar Gallery
Description:
Founded in 2008 by art patron and curator Minerva Mondejar Steiner, with the support of Swiss film director Michael Steiner, Mondejar Gallery is a global hub for contemporary art. Known for its innovative exhibitions, the gallery fosters cultural dialogue and creative exploration.

Within two years, Mondejar Gallery earned international acclaim, featured in the Louis Vuitton Art Guide and extensively covered by Swiss media, including Tages Anzeiger, NZZ, SRF, and arttv.ch. Each exhibition, curated by Minerva Mondejar Steiner, celebrates originality and meaningful artistic engagement.

The gallery’s Old Masters and Artefacts Collection showcases works from the European Renaissance to the 20th century, celebrating humanity’s artistic legacy. It also features artefacts and subfossils, linking history, nature, and art to inspire appreciation for heritage and creativity.

Under the JE Mondejar Computer College Association, a Swiss-based non-profit, Mondejar Gallery supports the JE Mondejar Computer College in Tacloban City, Philippines. Following super-typhoon Haiyan, Minerva Mondejar Steiner founded the M. Mondejar Steiner Foundation to rebuild the college, launch feeding programmes, and provide scholarships for underprivileged students.

Mondejar Gallery is committed to social responsibility, supporting initiatives such as The Salt of the Earth, led by Sophie Hunter and Benedict Cumberbatch, WellChild, under Prince Harry’s patronage, Planethon 365, an environmental advocacy group, The Waray Project, which publishes children’s books, and the Protect Our Planet Association, focused on environmental conservation.

As a supporter of the St. Moritz Art Film Festival, Mondejar Gallery organises cultural events, including a Film Benefit featuring Filipino director Brillante Mendoza and his Cannes-acclaimed film Ma’ Rosa. These efforts highlight the gallery’s commitment to global talent and cultural exchange.

Name: Stop third World war
Description: Writer looking for a better world

Name: Sangallo ART Station
Description:
Sangallo Art Station was born out of the experience of the Galleria Sangallo which was open for a ten year period from 1970 to 1980 in Viale Don Minzoni 48. Directed by Marcello Secci, the gallery proudly boasted exhibitions from the 20th Century masters, including Giorgio De Chirico, Roberto Crippa, Victor Vasarely, as well as contemporary artists like Mario Schifano, and young emerging artists like Luca Alinari and Giuliano Ghelli. 

Today, the young Eduardo Secci, along with his father Marcello Secci, have collaborated with renowned art dealer Fabio Fornaciai and the artistic manager Martina Corgnati to reopen a brand new space dedicated to the continuing support and interest of their popular artists as well as the perpetual search for undiscovered talent.

Name: La Boite d'Influence
Description: Aux talents qu’elle représente, elle propose une relation de proximité. Elle parle en leur nom, négocie leurs contrats, défend leurs intérêts et met à profit son réseau de contacts de manière à ce qu’ils puissent se dédier à 100% à ce qu’ils font de mieux, c’est-à-dire créer des contenus forts pour leurs abonnés et leurs clients.

Name: ARTantide.com
Description:
Il sistema di valori su cui ARTantide.com basa il proprio DNA aziendale sono i seguenti:

Fiducia (in se stessi, per avere saldezza, e negli altri, per poter lavorare in squadra)
Coraggio (per decidere di agire e non rimanere solo a contemplare)
Passione (per condurre le nostre azioni nella direzione che amiamo di più)
Creatività (per essere sempre unici e inimitabili)
Tenacia (perché se crediamo in quello che facciamo, dobbiamo non mai smettere di farlo)
Responsabilità (per agire sempre nel senso dell'utilità comune, per migliorare il pianeta)

Su questo sistema di valori è stata scritta la Mission che racconta come ARTantide.com li sente e li interpreta:

“credere nella capacità dell'essere umano di guardare oltre la superficie delle idee e delle cose per svelare il senso profondo che contengono,
sfidando i pensieri e le utopie che ne scaturiscono per renderle concrete, con responsabilità e tenacia, in sinergia con ogni squadra coinvolta,
al fine di suscitare l'attenzione ai valori e alle emozioni profonde che ci conducono verso il miglioramento continuo dell'umanità.”

Mantenendo fede ad una Mission che diventa la base solida da cui si parte per ogni progetto, ARTantide.com ha deciso chi vuole diventare e lo ha scritto nella Vision:

“diventare i migliori incubatori del genio artistico perché capaci di suscitare le idee per il cambiamento verso il miglioramento del pianeta.”

 La cultura aziendale è anche sintetizzata nel manifesto dell'arte etica l'arte può http://www.artantide.com/news_Articolo?idArticolo=1518

Name: moroccan fine art
Description:
Moroccan Fine art is an online gallery based in London dedicated to Contemporary Moroccan art.

We understand the emerging Moroccan art market and advise on the acquisition of certified art works. We welcome enquiries from museums, art consultants, interior designers, and private collectors.

Name: Explore with Marion
Description:
Designer & Artist, Marion journeys across Ireland with her trusty sketchbook in hand.

Along the way, she captures the enchanting beauty of scenic landscapes, charming towns, and picturesque moments. The textures, shades and vibrant colours of the Emerald Isle serve as her endless inspiration.

Back in her studio in County Kildare, Marion transforms her adventures into Art Prints, Travel Posters, Postcards and more. She also collaborates with shops and brands, bringing their artistic vision to life through exciting partnerships.

Meet Marion at Flea Markets or book a Sip & Paint workshop with her, for private or professional events.

Name: SAVADacademy
Description: The Savad Academy specializes in education and research in the fields of calligraphy, typography, type design and related arts. It organizes and manages classes & courses related to these topics. The academy focuses on the creation of decorative and functional calligraphic art and painting, as well as their sale.

Name: Jeyam's Art'OoSphere
Description:
We think. We question. We create. We design. We struggle. We collaborate. We try. We solve. We invent. We reflect. We learn. We TEACH.


Be it Dance, Drawing, Vocal Music, Musical instruments, Theatre or Personality development we will be the one-stop site for all your learning mandate!

Name: Tc Meb Özel Gala Güzel Sanatlar Kursu
Description: Tc Meb Özel Gala Güzel Sanatlar Kursu is a company based out of Yaşamkent Mahallesi 3066. Sokak No:17, Çayyolu, Ankara Province, Turkey.

Name: Team Sanskrithi
Description: Sanskrithi, founded in 2004, is the Indian Contemporary dance team of PES University. We draw inspiration from the traditional roots of southern India whilst throwing a splash of modern style to create magic. We stress on versatility and improvisation. We strongly believe in Originality, Innovation, Creativity and Interdisciplinarity. Our vision is to adapt to new discoveries and experiments in dance. We believe that dance has no boundaries. Through dance, we try to create harmony amidst apparent chaos.

Name: GALERIE HERVE COURTAIGNE
Description:
Nous vous accueillons au sein de la Galerie du mercredi au jeudi de 13h à 18h et les vendredi et samedi de 11h à 13h et de 14h à 18h. 
Au plaisir de vous retrouver !

Name: My Whole Project
Description:
Créateur de rencontres avec des leaders internationaux, nous travaillons sur nous pour réparer le monde.

MY WHOLE PROJECT est une start-up née de l’envie d’éveiller et d’agir en produisant des expériences « WHOLE ». À caractère humaniste et laïque, respectueuses des droits de l'homme et de la nature, sans discrimination ni contenu sectaire, elles ont comme moyen et pour objectif de rassembler tous les publics autour de sujets universels et porteurs de conscience.

Prix business à l'université de Cambridge dans le cadre du programme Ariane de Rothschild dédié aux entrepreneurs solidaires, visionnaires, innovants  et favorisant le dialogue interculturel.
Prix 2015 - Fondation Edmond de Rothschild.

Name: Espai d'Art Contemporani de Castelló
Description: Inaugurado en junio de 1999, el centro forma parte de Castelló Cultural el cual depende de de la Generalitat Valenciana. Dentro de la línea expositiva del EACC, de carácter arriesgado y experimental, destacan las exposiciones de tesis y las colectivas en torno al arte actual. Su labor como centro dinámico y divulgador, viene a llenar un importante hueco en el panorama artístico de Castellón, que prácticamente hasta su creación carecía de un gran espacio dedicado a la plástica contemporánea.

Name: Charlotte & Co
Description:
Je vous propose bien plus qu’un simple visuel graphique. Je vous offre une identité visuelle qui attire l’œil des personnes qui vous intéressent. Et pour en arriver là, je vous écoute et je prends note de vos objectifs que vous souhaitez atteindre. J’apprends à vous connaître et en parallèle, j’analyse votre cible pour trouver l’univers graphique qui les toucheront.

En tant que freelance graphiste, je crée vos éléments graphiques, mais c’est ensemble que nous imaginons votre univers ! 

Parce qu’avant de séduire, il est important que votre image s’harmonise à vos valeurs et vos goûts.

Name: Azgour Art Group
Description:
Azgour Art group provides a rich educational program of engaging live discussions, professionally edited video demonstrations, relevant content, flexible creative work, an interactive community space, and just the right amount of structure to help artists build and maintain a fruitful art-making practice and to create consistently strong paintings.

Designed for artists – regardless of medium, style, and experience level.

We dive deep into concept development and process twice a month during live Class Meetings on Zoom, using examples from art history and member posts to illustrate concepts of focus. 

The main focus of our group is our Creative Work – Projects, Assignments, Exercises, and Challenges. If you’re diving into a Project (a group of paintings), the seven-unit structure assists you in the process of reflecting on previous work, proposing a new project, taking pieces to completion, and evaluating results – all within your own scope and timeline. 

In the Forums spaces, members interact by sharing their creative work and exchanging feedback, resources, and ideas in a safe space. Every Project post receives instructor feedback and we often discuss member submissions during the Class Meetings. 

Critiques give members the opportunity to discuss their projects and receive instructor feedback.

Content, consisting of a growing library of articles, video demonstrations, and external resources, is available to all active members. 

We have a wonderful opportunity here. Through the versatile format of the web, we can interact in ways that would be impossible in the traditional studio classroom.

Michael Azgour, Founder and Instructor, draws upon his experience as a professional artist and university lecturer for fifteen years in creating Azgour Art Group -- a flexible learning platform and interactive community designed to help artists take their paintings to the next level.

Name: Al Ma'mal Foundation for Contemporary Art
Description:
Al Ma'mal is a non-profit organization, based in Jerusalem's Old City, that aims to promote, instigate, disseminate and facilitate the making of art. 

Founded in 1997, Al Ma'mal serves as an advocate for contemporary art and a catalyst for the realisation of art projects by organising exhibitions and events. Presentations and creative encounters in the form of film screenings, artists' talks, public readings and performances are central activities in one of the Foundation's missions to raise public awareness and understanding of contemporary art and creative practice. 

The artist-in-residence programme provides both local and international artists an opportunity to develop, produce and present new work, while generating cultural exchange and forging new creative links. 

Artists also lead art workshops with youth people in and around Jerusalem, to engage them in creative practice and fostering individual thinking. 

Al Ma'mal is determined to make Jerusalem a centre for contemporary art, while considering the situation on the ground and the enduring qualities of Jerusalem.

Name: ESEK
Description:
IWS is a theater company with people who are perfectly able to say Institute of Wisecrack Standards at a time and was established by Uğur Uludağ and Gökhan Semiz in 1990. 

IWS took the first professional step to show bussiness in 1995. They have created a great deal of fans through 13
different plays on stage, 2 TV series (The Singles and
The Third Kind) and a movie called "There is another Possibility".

In 2007, IWS broke theatrical ground in Turkey by bringing American actor ADRIAN SPARKS and the production of PAPA to Turkey for an extended tour, which included numerous Theaters, Universities, and a special engagement with the prestigious Mujdat Gezen Art Academy. In the capital city of Ankara, PAPA was invited to represent the United States in The 2007 Ankara International Theater Festival. Mr. Sparks participated in the United Nations Development Program Knowledge Fair, during which he conducted several acting workshops with University students from all over Turkey. IWS created a bridge between American and Turkish theater with the production of PAPA. 

http://www.papatonight.com

IWS is one of the two most popular theater companies of Turkey. They have produced the first science-fiction theater play in Turkey and the first sequal play in the world and have broken new ground by the first criminal- comedy play (Number 27) in Turkey. 

Through their radical and groundbreaking attitude and their infinite inspiration to entertain, they have acquired a very important place in the theater world.

Name: InSitu Art Consultants Ltd
Description:
Based in London and working internationally, InSitu is an independent art consultancy founded by Maggie O’Regan in 2011. InSitu implement bespoke art programmes that are engaging and allow clients to realise their ambitions, whatever their budget. With over 18 years of experience, Maggie has advised companies in both the private and public sectors, including Credit Suisse, Johnson & Johnson, Societe Generale, Lawrence Graham LLP, Queen Mary University of London, DEFRA, Janssen Cilag, The Institute of Civil Engineers, Zurich Global, Jones Lang LaSalle and Candy & Candy.
 Acting as mediators between clients, designers and artists, we realise projects through effective negotiation and coordination. Our aim is to enhance workplaces and spaces with art, facilitate creative exchange and sustain the benefits.

Name: Aria Residency
Description: Aria Residency is a not-for-profit space which provides artists, curators, writers and researchers the opportunity to live and create work in Tehran. By providing the accommodation and studio for Iranian and international residents, Aria aims to extend the mobility inside country and outside and engage the local artists with the non-Iranian ones for a specific period of time. This will create more cultural exchange and dialogue for both sides and will develop the Iranian contemporary art and culture. Aria offers a community in which the residents can participate and connect to the art scene, so they can get the most out of their stay.

Name: Studio Marie Cecile Thijs
Description:
Marie Cecile Thijs specializes in staged photography. Series she has made include White Collar, Food Portraits, Amazones, Flowers, Birds & Vases, Majestic and Human Angels, series to which she is still adding to this day. Also she made many portraits of writers, politicians, artists and actors. Originally a lawyer, she decided twenty years ago to follow her love for the camera.

Marie Cecile Thijs had her first retrospective at the Museum aan het Vrijthof in Maastricht in 2015. In 2016 she took part in two exhibitions, Dutch Identity at Museum De Fundatie Zwolle and BAL! at Soestdijk Palace. In 2017, works from the Majestic and White Collar series were shown at the exhibition Cat Love, nine lives in the arts at the Kunsthal Rotterdam. A year later, in September 2018, she opened her solo exhibition Between Heaven & Earth at Museum Jan Cunen in the Dutch town of Oss. Until June 30, 2019 her White Collar series are exhibited at Royal Delft (Year of the Golden Age). Her works have been exhibited at several artfairs, like Art New York, Photo London, Art Miami, Zona Maco Mexico, Art Elysées Paris, TEFAF Maastricht and PAN Amsterdam.

Her work is included in the collections of the Rijksmuseum Amsterdam, LAM Museum Lisse, Museum Rotterdam, the Museum of Photographic Arts San Diego (MOPA), the National Museum of History and Art in Luxembourg (Mnha), the Virginia Museum of Fine Arts in Richmond (VMFA) and many public and private art collections.

Name: Scrib Creative
Description:
About Don Dixon

A multidisciplinary artist blending fine art, animation, and storytelling to capture energy, emotion, and truth.

With over 20 years of experience in design and animation, Don infuses childhood wonder, cultural commentary, and imagination into gallery paintings, children’s books, animation, and more.

His works include major animated films like The Book of Life and Scoob!, as well as authoring children’s books such as Dandelion.

Don believes in art’s power to spark conversations, inspire change, promote healing, and encourage creative freedom.

Biography Highlights

Childhood influence: Don’s father was a pioneering Black engineer in robotics and toy design—building seven-foot robots and inspiring Don’s inventive spirit from a young age.

Education: Don earned a BFA in Animation & Digital Media from the College for Creative Studies in Detroit.

Notable Projects & Achievements

Feature Films:
Worked on The Book of Life, Scoob!, Free Birds, Rock Dog, Sherlock Gnomes, Ugly Dolls, and more.

Children’s Books:

    Dandelion – A heartfelt story about grief

    Darwin the Dreamer – A blind boy opens his imagination to new worlds

    Puppy Dreams

    Pain and Process – A personal art book

Solo Exhibition:
In September 2021, Don hosted his solo show “Pain & Process” at Event 1013 in historic Downtown Plano, Texas. The collection explored America’s racial and emotional landscape with raw, expressive power.

Please feel free to contact them with your requirements or choice of prints.

Artisti in formazione, illustratori, aspiranti disegnatori, pittori e scultori.

Started in 2008 by Linda Cunningham and Mitsu Hadeishi, BronxArtSpace is dedicated to exhibiting the highest quality artwork from the Bronx and around the world. Our mission is to foster dialogue around the contemporary local, national and global issues while advancing local arts education and opportunities.

BronxArtSpace is a sponsored project of Fractured Atlas, a non-profit arts service organization, and is generously supported by private donors and public funds from the NYC Department of Cultural Affairs in Partnership with City Council, the New York State Council on the Arts, and the New Yankees Stadium Community Benefits Fund.

Name: Leroy Brothers
Description:
The Leroy Brothers live and work in Shanghai, China and Ghent, Belgium

The Leroy Brothers started working together on a professional base in 1997. From then on, artistic tools for their art production evolved from painting to photography, animation, marketing, branding and finally Internet.
A constant theme in the work of the Leroy Brothers is the questioning of the position and the role of the artist. Artists are getting more and more corporate. They recruite specialized employees and easily make use of external services to produce work. The individuality of the artist stays vital, but is backed by a team of professionals and assistants. It isn’t enough to come up with a good idea. The realization of it and the follow-up is at least as important. Therefore, today’s artist needs entrepreneurship and leadership more than ever. Not only a creative mind…

Description:
Atelier is a unique art school that blends deep study of classical visual art traditions with a fresh, contemporary approach to creativity.

We offer small group classes with personal attention in a welcoming, fully equipped studio space. Our faculty is made up of accomplished artists, each bringing their own individual style and professional experience.

Right next to the school, you’ll find the Atelier Art Supply Store — a curated shop for high-quality, professional art materials. Whether you’re joining one of our courses or workshops, or working independently, you’ll find everything you need to support your creative journey.
