Name: Rashid White
Description: Rashid White is an Afro-Latino, Healer, Scholar, Actor, Motivational Speaker, Activist, Author, Poet, Educator, Artist, Dancer, Model, Photographer/Videographer/Content Director, and Visionary. Growing up in the streets of Richmond, VA; Rashid focuses on creating art that places reflective emphasis on overcoming obstacles by shedding light on his truths. Rashid is a Graduate of PerScholas and George Mason University where we received his BFA in Creative Writing, Graphic Design, and  AS in I.T. Since 2008 has impacted families and lives across the world. Rashid joined the Brave New Voices (BNV) network back in 2012 as a youth slam poet, that had the honor of placing 3rd in the world making him one of the top 16 international youth slam poets that year, and has had the privilege to serve with Future Corps (Alumni of the Festival) in 2014. Returning to BNV this year as one of the Committee members of festivals and programs later in 2020. Rashid is a co-founder and also now serves on the leadership committee of Black Greek Poets as their Art Director of Content & Marketing. Although Passionate about his endeavors, he still is constantly growing and looking for ways to better himself so he can further resonate with others. Rashid has furthered his craft in multiple platforms starting up several of his own businesses: Σheed Σtudios, Comfort Zone Café, and a literary magazine currently underway with several other projects on the horizon. Now as a veteran slam poet and educating artist, Rashid hopes to continue to empower the youth & young adults through the arts and to make a positive impact and change infused with love, truth, and resilience. Rashid Plans to continue his education in an MFA program in Creative Writing and Arts Management.

Name: ALLGORITHIM
Description: Founded in 2021 by Tyler Santangelo, ALLGORITHIM is a distinguished contemporary art gallery nestled in the heart of Los Angeles. The gallery is dedicated to bridging the gap between emerging and established artists, creating meaningful connections with collectors of all backgrounds and tastes. In its inaugural year, ALLGORITHIM hosted 11 thoughtfully curated exhibitions, showcasing a dynamic range of talent from painters and sculptors to established photographers. With a commitment to fostering the next generation of creative visionaries, the gallery serves as a vibrant platform that unites both youthful and seasoned admirers alike. Through an innovative and ever-evolving approach to presentation, ALLGORITHIM cultivates an inspiring and eminent space where observers, collectors, and artists converge, continually pushing the boundaries of art and engagement.

Name: Centre d'art de Préville!
Description:
Centre d’art de Préville est un organisme à but non lucratif axé sur la musique, l’art et l’éducation dans la communauté de la Rive-Sud de Montréal et au-delà. Préville offre une éducation musicale, artistique, scientifique et technologique, et culturelle pour enrichir la vie des familles et des apprenants de tous âges et de tous horizons dans un cadre bilingue. Nous nous engageons à offrir un enseignement de qualité, accessible et à un prix abordable.

Conformément à notre déclaration de mission, la bourse de bienfaisance Belva Thomas offre une aide financière aux étudiants qui n’auraient pas autrement les moyens financiers de fréquenter le Centre d’art de Préville. La bourse de bienfaisance Belva Thomas vise à donner aux enfants âgés de 5 à 16 ans qui ont des besoins financiers, la possibilité de découvrir, d’explorer, de créer et d’inspirer d’autres personnes dans les domaines de la musique et des arts, des sciences et de la technologie.

Name: Edelweiss Cardenas
Description: As a fine artist, I am motivated by the idea of empathy. By portraying first person reactions to real-world struggles such as poverty, disease, violence, and immigration, I create pieces that explore different ideas of identity, borders, and kinship to inspire wonder and social action. My themes and approach lend themselves to collaboration, and I am looking forward to working with other artists on dynamic, socially aware, creative projects.

Name: Persona Art Festival
Description:
4-8 May 2011

 

What is Persona Art Festival?

Persona Art Festival is a unique opportunity for innovative and emerging artists to exhibit their work in a major contemporary art show in London.

The project, directed by A Moving Exhibition curators Antria Pelekanou and Zia Fernandez, will run from 4 to 8 May 2011 in East London and bring together contemporary artists from around the world working in a range of different media – from painting and sculpture to audio and video.

Works will be selected by a judging panel consisting of three artist and lecturers and the two directors, with particular attention to artists not represented by a gallery and work produced in new or less frequently showcased media. The chosen entries will feature in a large exhibition at The Rag Factory, just off Brick Lane, while a series of talks and workshops will explore artistic practice and provide an opportunity for the public to enjoy hands-on activities. All events will be free.

Awards will be presented to the artists exhibiting the best work in each category as chosen by the judging panel, while the public will determine the winner of the People's Choice Award.

The initiative’s aim is to foster inspiration and creativity, provide a platform for ground-breaking independent artists and stimulate discussion between practitioners, students and the general public about contemporary art.

Come along and get involved!

Jeśli:
- szukasz nauczyciela, który w jasny i miły sposób przekaże Ci swoją wiedzę z zakresu nauki gry
na instrumencie?
- chcesz zacząć przygodę jako instrumentalista, ale nie wiesz od czego zacząć?
- potrzebujesz podszkolić nabyte umiejętności?
- brakuje Ci motywacji do poznawania nowych technik i stylów muzycznych?
- nie jesteś zadowolony ze swojego obecnego nauczyciela?
- chcesz rozpocząć naukę gry, a nie posiadasz instrumentu?

Doskonale trafiłaś/eś. Tu z pewnością znajdziesz to czego szukasz ;)

Name: Gallery on the Green
Description: Gallery on the Green represents contemporary artists whose works range from representational to abstract and include paintings, drawings, sculpture and mixed media. Gallery on the Green exhibits innovative artists who share a high standard of excellence and artistic judgment and is taking the lead in helping Eastern Dutchess County establish a major presence in the Tri-State arts scene.

Name: Romina Graziani
Description:
Romina Graziani specializes in drawing and acrylic painting. With those techniques,
she developed several works related to abstraction that, in strokes, are reminiscent of
naval scenes. She tries to work hand to hand with spontaneity in textures and
gestures, but with a solid basal structure supporting a well-defined style.
“Painter with a temper, but emotional and sensitive, Romina proposes us a journey
through her vast world of images, in which the freedom of texture and color are the
undisputed main characters, tracing a path in her energetic personal cosmos”

Specialization course in mixed techniques "inquiring into the image until
abstraction" - Taller de Arte Andeando - Roxana Diaz Hamwee, National
Profesor of Fine Arts - Buenos Aires, Argentina

Name: Jan Jensen Artists
Description: Locally Grown Creativity. . . Enriching Kansas City Lives. My mission is to make the works of local artists easily accessible to a wider base of Kansas City Residents. Contact me to find the perfect piece for home or office. . . . or the memorable gift for friends or family. Prices begin at $80.

Name: Strokes
Description: We are an amalgamation of students who are passionate about art and want to showcase their talent by presenting various art forms which includes contemporary, realistic, abstract & experimental art work. It's a platform for artists to showcase their talent and learn from each other. The society conducts workshops on various topics related to art and artistically inclined people can attend these workshops and learn new things.

Name: Musikhøjskolen, Frederiksberg Musik- og Kulturskole
Description:
Musikhøjskolen er landets ældste musikskole. Skolen er grundlagt i 1931 som musikskole og har siden tilføjet flere kulturretninger, så der nu er undervisning i musik, sang, dans, billedkunst og film.
Der er undervisning for børn, unge og voksne i alle aldre. Undervisningen foregår i egne lokaler på Frederiksberg og på alle kommunens folkeskoler.

Musikundervisning for børn og unge 0-25 år er under Musikloven, aftenskoleundervisning for voksne under Folkeoplysningsloven, samt undervisning under Musikalsk Grundkursus (MGK), der er 3-årigt og hvortil der er optagelsesprøve.

Name: i ov thee dragon
Description:
Website:
http://www.iovtheedragon.com

Social Media:
http://www.twitter.com/iovtheedragon
http://www.facebook.com/pages/i-ov-thee-dragon-tattoo-and-body-piercing

i ov thee dragon TATTOO and BODY PIERCING is located in the heart of the arts district at 614 6th street, in Downtown Racine, Wisconsin 53403. The studio has been voted Best of Racine County.

We are Racine's only full service TATTOO and BODY PIERCING studio, and the cities most respected BODY PIERCER. Thee location facilitates a sterile, relaxing environment, with a chilled out, art gallery type, atmosphere. We have an integrated sound system with flat panel televisions for your entertainment or distraction. Thee studio also has windows and skylights, which produce an abundance of natural light, and gallery space available for local artists to exhibit their work.

Our tattoo minimum is $50. All basic PIERCINGS start at $30, including ASTM or ISO standard surgical steel or titanium. P.T.F.E. implantation grade Teflon is also available for certain PIERCINGS. Micro-dermal anchors, genital PIERCINGS, tapering, cartilage and surface PIERCING projects prices will vary. We keep a large selection of body jewelry in stock for sale and special orders are available. Aftercare products are also available, including dead sea salt and H2OCEAN saline piercing spray and mouthwash for PIERCINGS, EMU oil for TATTOO and PIERCING aftercare. Body jewelry purchased from thee studio can be put into a healed PIERCING at no charge. There is no additional fee for single tapering. Jewelry items from other stores can be put in, for a small fee, as long as they are ov thee proper body jewelry type and material. Artists at I O T D are red cross First Aid, CPR and bloodborne pathogen certified. Hospital style sterilization techniques are used and documented. Monthly spore tests are conducted, recorded and then sent out to an independent testing laboratory to ensure autoclave sterilization assurance.

Name: Art Edge Center
Description: Art Edge is a center that brings artists together to offer developmental courses in the arts, while also providing a space where artists can enjoy and thrive.

Name: AMRM Gallery
Description:
Founded in 2019, the gallery currently represents Renelio Marin, Juan Lázaro Guttìerez, Michael Manning, Bernardo Navarro, Angela China, Stef Duffy, and the founder, Alysha Grace Marko. With artists from around the globe displayed in multiple locations on the Upper East Side and shows in Southampton, AMRM Gallery is committed to exhibiting the immense talent of a wide array of contemporary artists.

Located at 13 E 69th St. 5th Floor New York, NY 10021

Name: Centre Interculturel Leila Alaoui - CILA
Description:
La Fondation Leila Alaoui a été créée en mars 2016 pour assurer l’archivage, la conservation et la diffusion de l’œuvre de Leila Alaoui. 

Photographe et vidéaste engagée, Leila Alaoui explorait les thèmes de la migration, de la construction des identités et des diversités culturelles. Elle a œuvré à travers son travail à mettre en avant les oubliés de la société et leur redonner une part de leur dignité. 

Emportée par le terrorisme en janvier 2016 à Ouagadougou, son art et ses combats sont désormais portés par la Fondation Leila Alaoui.

Name: Taller de Arte Mauro
Description:
Taller de Arte Mauro, un espacio dedicado a la enseñanza de las Bellas Artes.
Desde el rigor del Dibujo Artístico en su vertiente más académica, hasta incontables estilos pictóricos y técnicas: Pintura al óleo, Acuarela, Acrílico,Modelado...
No solo nos centramos en la enseñanza, también realizamos obras por encargo incluida la Monumental,
sirva como ejemplo la estatua de "La Regenta" situada ante la catedral de Oviedo

Name: Tori Butler Art
Description: My goal with these paintings is to create a timeless memory of your furry family members. These oil paintings are fully customizable and I strive to bring out your pets unique personality in each original piece. I enjoy working step-by-step with you throughout the entirety of the creation process to ensure you love the final result. Guaranteed.

Name: Sounds of Color Studio
Description: For 30 years, Sounds of Color Studio has helped students explore their creativity and passion for the arts. Today, we offer the largest variety of music and creative arts classes in Orange County, California for all ages and experience levels. We are incredibly proud to be a family-owned small business committed to giving back to our community.

Name: ASKV Particolarte
Description:
De Amsterdamse Studenten Kunstvereniging

Particolarte is een studentenvereniging met ongeveer tachtig leden die zich richt op cultuur en kunst. Op tal van manieren kan je bij Particolarte je creativiteit uiten. Voor bijna elke kunstvorm is er een commissie, waar je je als lid bij kunt aansluiten. Zo kan er geschreven worden in de commissie van de IJskast, het maandblad van Particolarte, wordt er elk jaar een theaterstuk opgevoerd door de toneelcommissie en zijn er op de borrel regelmatig exposities te vinden van de fotocommissie. Dit zijn maar een paar voorbeelden.
Naast zelf met kunst bezig te zijn, bezoekt Particolarte ook veel culturele activiteiten in Amsterdam. Elke maand wordt door de agendacommissie een culturele agenda samengesteld met activiteiten waarop korting wordt gegeven door de vereniging. Bovendien krijg je als lid een strippenkaart ter waarde van achttien euro die je op stap met de agendacommissie kan uitgeven.

Drie keer per jaar wordt er door Particolarte in steeds een ander klein theater te Amsterdam een open podium, de PRoP, georganiseerd waar leden hun creatieve uitspattingen kunnen laten zien aan anderen. Naast de PRoP, Particolartes Rondreizend Podium, is er ook de PIS (zang) en de PAF (beeldende kunst), allemaal georganiseerd voor en door leden van Particolarte.

Naast het verblijf in Amsterdam gaat Particolarte ook wel eens weg. Elk jaar is er een introductieweekend begin oktober, waar leden en nieuwe leden elkaar beter kunnen leren kennen. Verder is er nog een februariweekend, een buitenlandweekend en een Oerol-weekend.

Tenslotte is Particolarte een studentenvereniging zonder hiërarchie of ontgroening. Er zijn geen verplichtingen en alle leden zijn gelijk. Interesse? Kom langs op de borrel of ga mee op een van de activiteiten in september!

Name: eyeroll
Description:
eyeroll is formally a publication that started as a kickstarter in 2019 but has grown into a universal community that shares a love for art and celebration.

Our mission statement:

“Most literally, an eye roll is a non-verbal form of communication that clearly represents disdain, disapproval, or boredom. An eye roll is a universal experience and the common ground on which eyeroll is built. Everyone is welcome here because the act of rolling one’s eyes conveys a sense of human likeness that is worth acknowledging and celebrating.

An eye roll leaves room for interpretation, depending on its tone. Our tone is all about leaning into and growing from experiences that make your eyes roll. We hope to create a community where we can talk and think about the wonders of life – from the beauty we all possess to the deeper, less celebrated parts of ourselves.”

As for its creators, we are a two-person team that has big dreams. We, Yukari and Addie, met as freshmen in college in an introductory art class. Since then we have been best friends and journeyed through the ups and downs of life and art-making together. We started this project because we wanted to do something big, and share it with the world. We conceptualize and execute the shoots together, with Yukari directing our models and Addie photographing. It is a true labor of love, but eyeroll is our baby.

Name: Contemporary Art Gallery of Eduard Anikonov
Description:
Contemporary Art Gallery of Eduard Anikonov was established in 2003 in Magnitogorsk, Russia. The gallery works both with corporate clients and private collectors. The gallery represents one of the most talented contemporary artists - Eduard Anikonov.

The gallery operates by appointment only.

Name: Josedelafuente
Description: JosédelaFuente es un espacio abierto a la experimentación creativa. Así, el espacio expositivo se concibe como un campo en el que reflexionar en torno a los nuevos lenguajes artísticos y explorar nuevas formas de aproximarse al arte contemporáneo. Nuestro interés se centra en dar forma a proyectos específicos, destinados tanto al desarrollo de exposiciones individuales, como de proyectos colectivos comisariados, que traigan a nuestro comunidad autónoma  las más avanzadas propuestas impulsando así la interacción entre los distintos agentes del arte contemporáneo, dentro y fuera de nuestras fronteras. De igual modo, afirmamos nuestra labor de apoyo y difusión con el desarrollo de proyectos editoriales, y la realización de eventos y acciones artísticas fuera del ámbito concreto y geográfico de la galeria, defendiendo la apuesta por la creación contemporánea.

Name: Nachtfalter Collectif
Description:
Music collective aimed at promoting novel artists and alternative forms of electronic music in Switzerland.

collectifnachtfalter@gmail.com

Name: VELESERO
Description:
This Northwest Arkansas gallery exclusively represents Fayetteville artist, Mark Jackson, and the artwork he created in the 2020’s and 2030’s. When you walk into the space, you will get a first-hand look into the work Mark has created and the designs he finds worthy to showcase. The gallery structure itself was designed by Mark, natural light shimmering off of each artwork.

Mark has been a photographer for 30 years and the gallery also doubles as his photography studio, CHROMA, where he shoots for amazing clients across the United States. His passion for creating and making beautiful things has lead him to design the pieces you will find on display. We hope you leave the gallery feeling inspired by the beauty in light, color, and the casual nature of the human figure.

Name: KreaFreiKunst by TLN
Description:
KreaFreiKunst by TLN is an authentic Upcycling company based in Bergisch Gladbach, Germany.

We help you in upcycle not only your surroundings, but also yourselve  Helping to transform the world into an envirnomental friendly and more transparent and authentic place to live. Because everyone is unique. Everyone matters.

****************************

KreaFreiKunst by TLN ist ein authentisches Upcycling-Unternehmen mit Sitz in Bergisch Gladbach, Deutschland.

Wir unterstützen dich dabei, nicht nur deine Umgebung, sondern auch dich selbst zu entfalten  Wir helfen die Welt in einen umweltfreundlicheren, transparenteren und authentischeren Ort zu verwandeln. Denn jeder ist einzigartig. Jeder ist wichtig.



"Kunst kann das im Innersten verborgene und vergessene wieder an die Oberfläche holen und Menschen daran erinnern, dass jeder ein einzigartiges Kunstwerk ist"
- Tania Laux Nienstedt

Name: Académie des Beaux-Arts de Kinshasa
Description: L’Académie des Beaux-Arts de Kinshasa est une émanation de l’Ecole Saint Luc de Gombe Matadi, créée en 1943 dans la province du Congo-centrale par le révérend Frère Marc Stanislas Wallenda, missionnaire belge de la congrégation des Frères des Ecoles Chrétiennes.

Name: Atelier de Brésoles
Description:
Founded in 2003, we provide intensive training in figurative art to students in the Montreal area. We also offer online classes to students from around the world.

Our program is based on the academic tradition. We begin with drawing methods that teach students to draw accurately from observation and achieve a realistic effect in their work. Once students have mastered the fundamentals of drawing, they have several options: drawing from the live model, painting in oil, artistic anatomy, or continued study of historical techniques of drawing or painting.

Our skilled instructors welcome students of all levels in a small-group setting. New students are welcome to begin anytime throughout the year.

Name: CAUSE (Association)
Description:
Cause est une agence de création constituée de membres collaborant à la réalisation de projets en tous genres.
Issus d’une grande diversité de domaines tels que l’architecture, le design, le cinéma, la communication, l’art, la gestion, la psychologie et l’enseignement, ils constituent ensemble un réseau complet de compétences organisées autour de l’axe d’une vision commune.

Ils croient en un potentiel d’épanouissement par la créativité et le partage, et affirment cette vision par une volonté mutuelle d’agir, de réagir et d’interagir.

Cette cohésion met Cause en mesure de proposer des solutions imaginatives et efficaces aux besoins spécifiques d’une large clientèle. Plus que tout, l’association est déterminée à mettre ses efforts conjugués au service de la transmission des passions qui l’animent.

Son but premier est ainsi de participer à des projets inspirés par des motifs tels que le soutien de la créativité, des valeurs du bien-être et des causes positives.

Name: Surmrit Gallery of Art and Design
Description: Surmrit Gallery of Art and Design is a modern and contemporary art gallery in New York active both in primary and secondary art market. Aligning with the dynamics of today’s world, the gallery has involved into a global network, currently maintaining its major clientele in USA and India. Aquario Group from New York has now acquired it.

Name: Festival du Film de l'Outaouais
Description: Le Festival du film de l’Outaouais présente durant 8 jours consécutifs une centaine de projections de long et courts-métrages de fiction, d’animation ou documentaire provenant d'une vingtaine pays.

Name: UrbeXSiteS
Description: Location de sites Urbex pour des projets artistiques divers (films, clips, photos de mode, etc).

Name: SANTINI GALLERY
Description:
ABOUT THE GALLERY 

Founded in 2013, SANTINI GALLERY is a contemporary art gallery in Ottawa, ON, specializing in original, local artwork. Dedicated to promoting accessibility in the arts, SANTINI GALLERY is focused on offering an inviting, transparent and affordable gallery experience for both artists and customers. 

SANTINI GALLERY represents 20+ local artists with a strong focus in abstract artwork and modern Canadian Landscape. We strive to offer a variety of unique work, while maintaining a quaint, local feel. We carry handmade artisan goods in our gift shop, featuring locally made home goods, jewellery and décor.

EXHIBITIONS 

SANTINI GALLERY hosts bi-weekly and monthly exhibitions. Exhibitions may feature a single artist or a group of artists connected by a common theme. Art is on constant rotation, always fresh and new for our customers to see and enjoy. 

ABOUT THE OWNER

Lauryn Santini is a graduate of Sotheby's Institute of Art, New York, NY, where she completed her Master's in Art Business. This specialized program focuses on practical experience within the art world, including the study of international art, art law, appraisals, and standard gallery practices. Prior to Sotheby's, Lauryn completed her Bachelor's Degree at The University of Western Ontario, with an Honors Specialization in Art History and Criticism.

SERVICES 

•	Custom Framing 
•	Art Installation 
•	Corporate and Residential Consulting 

CORPORATE SERVICES 

In addition to our retail gallery space, SANTINI GALLERY offers corporate consulting services, helping to guide clients on their purchases, manage their collections, and installing artwork. Contact us for your complimentary consultation and visit our website for client testimonials.

Name: Monart
Description:
Pure et inégalable vivez l'expérience qui va changer votre vision sur vous même.

Monart a pour but de vous découvrir en faisant ressortir tout ce qui vous est chère sur toile. Notre touche personnelle est basé sur la couleur et l'abstrait qui s'éveille en vous.

Qu'attendez vous pour vous voir à travers un tableau?

Name: National Art Society | National Art Gallery
Description: National Art Gallery is an unparalleled art resource. Conceived by a society of individuals formed by the interest of art appreciation, it bloomed into a modern platform for artists, collectors and enthusiasts. Crafted by visionaries with the passion for making art accessible to novices and aficionados through online galleries, visual look-books, and user portfolios.

Name: Galerie Quint-Essences & Art à la cARTe Association
Description: Gallery director, artist and poet.

Name: Espacio Cinco33 Galería
Description:
Espacio Cinco33 Galería fue fundada por la artista y gestora cultural Elsa Russi en el año 2016 con el ánimo de brindar un espacio para apreciar el arte moderno y contemporáneo, a través, de propuestas curatoriales de artistas consagrados y emergentes.

 
Espacio Cinco33 Galería se encontraba ubicada en el edificio La Localidad, en el corazón de Usaquén. El establecimiento contaba con una sala, en el primer piso de más de 200 mts² disponible para que los artistas pudieran exponer sus obras y el espectador pudieran disfrutar de ellas en su mayor expresión.

Actualmente Espacio Cinco33 se encuentra incursionando en un nuevo proyecto que consiste en transladar su arte a los medios digitales.

Name: Chao Pescao Wellness
Description:
CHAO PESCAO

Chao Pescao Wellness is a collective of Artists, Creatives and Survivors who have chosen Art as a form of Expression. Chao Pescao departs from the conventional and welcomes the ethereal to bridge a connection between universal beauty and the human experience. We believe that being exposed to Art that inspires calm, peace and balance through visual, sensorial and mental stimulation can alter our perception of safety and connection to the Universe. Our mission is to inspire a world of equanimity, wellness and beauty through Artistic Expression.

OUR CREEDO

We represent the unrepresented. The ones that believe yet have no voice or choice. We empower the world with passion for mindfulness and art. We give voice to the voiceless. We break barriers by transforming spaces into artistic universes, each with unique and authentic stories to tell the world. We believe expression through artistic creation and contemplation should be at the center of the human experience. We want you to transform your life into the ultimate art work. We exist to bridge that connection. 

MERGING ART & WELLNESS

The high-impact of today’s lifestyles can take a toll on our bodies and minds. It can leave us feeling disconnected, ashamed and afraid in our own space. Chao Pescao exists to bridge and illuminate that connection with mindfulness. We believe art has the power to connect us to a higher universal consciousness that allows us to see reality from a different perspective. We believe in mindfulness’s ability to soothe worries and calm the mind. We believe physical and emotional balance is the key to wellness. We believe Mindfulness is the result of small yet impactful choices. We believe people have the power to make those choices.

OUR PRODUCTS 

We sell innovative products to inspire wellness in people's lives. From casual yoga clothing, to fine art, wellness books and photography, we immerse ourselves into the Mindfulness world to give you that connection.

Name: CÓRDOBA CIUDAD DE LAS IDEAS
Description: Hacemos ciudad a través de la cultura. Impulsamos el pensamiento crítico. Programa internacional de residencias para creadores.

Name: Brentford Nudes L'Atelier
Description:
Team building art events and workshops in London 

 Curated 'Sip & Draw' costume life drawing events with whimsical art models. 
 Bespoke still life 'Sip & Paint' Events.

Instagram: @brentford.nudes

Hosted by artist Angela Chico and photographer Felice Gioia 

#art #events #teambuilding #fun #party #sipanddraw #sipandpaint

Name: Central Galleries
Description:
With 30 years experience in the art and framing business Central Galleries has become the leading dealer in the country for many of the artists represented. Art collectors come to us from all over the world to view our amazing collection of artwork. We carry original paintings, limited edition serigraphs, lithographs, 3-Dimensional constructions as well as sculpture by leading contemporary world renowned artists. We are a leading dealer of many fine artists, including Howard Behrens, Laurie Brussel, Jim Buckels, Amram Ebgi, Erte, 3-D artist Charles Fazzino, Thomas Mcknight, Robin Morris, S. Sam Park, Viktor Shvaiko, among others. We have many hard to find and sold out editions by these and other artists.

We invite you to come in as we are open 7 days a week, 10-6 Monday to Saturday, Wednesday 10-9, and Sunday 12-6 EST. We want you to experience first hand the experience of Central Galleries, and the fine assortment of art we have available. Unlike many of the fine art websites, we actually have the art that is listed in stock and ready to ship or view. Not just to view online, but in person. Of the few artists we represent we have the finest selection and best prices of any gallery and internet company anywhere. If you don't believe us come on down and see for yourself. We will try to accommodate you anyway we can. If you are coming from out of town, call ahead, make an appointment, and we will even overstaff the gallery the day that you come, to cut back on waiting time.

Whether it's an original painting, sculpture, or signed and numbered print, there's nothing like being able to view the artwork the way you would view it in your own home. That would be to walk up to it, look at it from different angles, and touch it. That is just a little bit of what we offer at Central Galleries. We also offer the finest quality custom framing available.

Name: Galerie Ni Vu Ni Cornu
Description: La Galerie Ni Vu Ni Cornu est vouée à la diffusion, la promotion et la vente des créations d’artistes professionnels en arts actuels du Québec pratiquant en arts visuels ou en métiers d’art. La galerie se démarque dans l’univers culturel de la grande région de Québec, en prônant dans ses activités l’originalité et le plaisir. Par ses démarches colorées, elle favorise des rapports conviviaux entre les artistes, les visiteurs et les clients. Ni Vu Ni Cornu soutient le travail de plus de 40 artistes québécois, dont plusieurs artistes émergents.

Name: The Odyssey Tales
Description: Welcome to The Odyssey Tales, a personal exploration of the human spirit through art. This project marks a new chapter in my creative journey, one born from a lifelong passion for fine art. After a fulfilling career spanning nearly four decades in the diverse world of visual design, culminating in a successful run as a creative director, I've stepped away from the corporate world to dedicate myself fully to this artistic pursuit. This collection of intimate studies, primarily drawings and sketches, captures the essence of individuals and their stories, often focusing on those whose voices and experiences might otherwise be overlooked. Join me as I delve into the heart of artistic expression, exploring both traditional and unconventional mediums, and sharing the stories I uncover along the way.

Name: The University of Arizona School of Music
Description: The University of Arizona School of Music is a premier university experience in an environment of musical excellence!

Name: Green Earth Terrarium
Description:
Cole Compton is a young entrepreneur who founded Green Earth Terrarium when he was a freshman in high school with a mission to create low maintenance, artfully designed centerpieces that could be enjoyed by anyone. 

Because of these values each environmentally friendly terrarium is hand designed using repurposed glass. It was important from the start that he designed a business model that created a product utilizing sustainable materials. It is also Compton’s intention to give back a portion of the proceeds to organizations that focus on helping youth.

This mission to bring Green Earth Terrarium to any home, office, dorm, or apartment is achieved by offering affordable priced terrariums that are visually stunning and low maintenance.

Compton is currently a scholar at Watson University in Boulder Colorado.  He is attending this prestigious institution to further his knowledge in business and Social Entrepreneurship.  Through the guidance of highly respected mentors and a hands on approach at Watson University, he has found new opportunities that have encouraged him to expand Green Earth Terrarium.

In addition to his main facility in Milwaukee, Cole has opened up a work space in Boulder, CO where he designs and produces his succulent plant terrariums. Compton handcrafts terrariums for his clients in addition to producing large quantities of individually designed terrariums for stores, art shows and farmers markets. 

Green Earth Terrarium has ambitious plans to partner with community 
business leaders, artists, store owners and like-minded people in Milwaukee, Wisconsin to expand its reach all around the nation.

Name: SILKNOW
Description:
Silknow is a research project funded from the EU - Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under grant agreement No 769504, that aims to improve the understanding, conservation and dissemination of European silk heritage from XVI to XIX centuries through digital catalogues, which will allow to produce a digital modelling of its weaving techniques (a “Virtual Loom”), through automatic visual recognition, advanced spatio-temporal visualization, multilingual and semantically enriched access to existing digital data. 

Join our community of professionals at www.silknow.eu

Name: Olympiade des Scheiterns
Description:
Die Olympiade des Scheiterns ist ein Handbuch aus Gedankenspielen, die in Form zehn verschiedener Disziplinen zum Scheitern animieren und dazu einladen, sich vom Leistungsdruck und Steigerungszwang zu befreien.
Du strebst danach, weniger schnell und stark zu sein und Dich selbst auch mal zu untertreffen? Dann bist Du für diese Spiele bestens qualifiziert.

Wir sehen das Ende von Wettbewerb und Wachstum als wichtigen Hebelpunkt für einen Wandel der Gesellschaft, die schonend mit Ressourcen umgeht – sowohl was die Natur als auch das menschliche Wohlbefinden betrifft. 
Mit Deiner Teilnahme an der Olympiade des Scheiterns bekommst Du deshalb die Gelegenheit, Dich im Entsagen von Wettbewerb, Leistungsdruck, Konkurrenz und Wachstum zu beweisen und Dich im Scheitern zu üben. Nicht, weil Scheitern der Schlüssel zum Erfolg ist, sondern weil im Scheitern die Chance liegt, sich mit anderen als Scheiternde verbunden zu fühlen und Neuanfänge zu wagen.

Nimm am Ende des Wettbewerbs teil und wähle aus den zehn verschiedenen Disziplinen eine oder mehrere aus. Teile deine Erfahrungen bzw. Erkenntnisse daraus in einem Beitrag auf LinkedIn, in dem du die Seite Olympiade des Scheiterns markierst. Gerne kannst du auch die Hashtags #lowerslowersofter und #olympiadedesscheiterns verwenden, um dein Netzwerk auf die Challenge aufmerksam zu machen.

Danke für Deine Teilnahme am Ende des Wettbewerbs. Gemeinsam ist es möglich.

#lowerslowersofter #olympiadedesscheiterns
olympiadedesscheiterns@mail.de

Name: Havan'Art - Candidature au Bureau des Arts 2018-2019 Neoma BS Rouen

Each image is then printed by a Fine Art Trade Guild printer onto archival paper and individually checked, signed and embossed by the artist. This ensures perfect quality fine art prints.

Name: Cynthia Nouhra Art Gallery
Description: Reality is an artistic composition in itself. As a viewer towards self and all that is manifested before me. I paint, I translate as a born artist my own colors and characteristics . The only aim is to be authentic to self by enabling those colors and abstract form to vibrate thru a 2 dimensional platform the story of the moment.

Name: Tchotchke Gallery LLC
Description:
tchotchke /ˈCHäCHkə/ collectible, conversational, storytelling, a sagacious environment to find, explore, and intrigue, building a dynamic community of engaged collectors and influential artists

Founded in 2020, Tchotchke is committed to showcasing promising and exciting artists through the gallery’s inviting platform, curated for novice and experienced collectors alike. Tchotchke aims to inspire collectors and artists through engaging collaborative and educational efforts.

Name: La Chrysomèle — galerie d'art
Description: La Chrysomèle est une galerie d'art dynamique localisée à Clermont-Ferrand, près de l'hôtel des ventes. Les œuvres de nos artistes sont éligibles à une défiscalisation à 100% du prix d'acquisition pour les entreprises. Nous pouvons également proposer un service de location ou de leasing d'œuvres d'art. Les artistes que nous exposons sont des artistes professionnels cotés.

Name: De Vlucht van het Aambeeld (Stefaan Schreel)
Description: Stefaan Schreel started creating exclusive furniture in limited edition, starting from his mastery as a sculptor and always with a preference for working with steel. By managing a new form-grammar through working with contrasts between wood and metal in his more recent pieces, a plastic journey of discovery is created that remains true to both technical and functional logic. The furniture radiates sobriety and honesty, both in terms of material, with respect for specific characteristics and for the legibility of the construction. What is most striking is the keen sense of detail and finish. In recent years, he has focused on projects that transcend the boundaries: total housing design, exhibition stand construction, shop fittings. And now you can witness the quality by visiting his own renovated home and showroom!

Name: Académie de Meuron
Description:
L'Académie de Meuron, école d'arts visuels à Neuchâtel, propose un cursus pluridisciplinaire sur deux ans aux personnes désireuses de se lancer dans le domaine des arts visuels et appliqués.

Sa formation de deux ans à plein temps permet d'acquérir des compétences solides dans les disciplines de la création visuelle (dessin, photographie, peinture, graphisme, etc.)
L'Académie prépare ses étudiant·e·s à aborder la suite de leur parcours de formation avec confiance et ambition en leur donnant les outils pour développer une démarche artistique cohérente et de qualité. 

Parallèlement, l'école offre un panel de cours ouvert à toutes et tous. Ces ateliers permettent aux enfants, ados et adultes d'ajouter une dimension créative à leur quotidien tout en développant un apprentissage technique dans la discipline choisie.

Name: Talis Protocol

Talis Protocol

Name: Elephant Art Limited
Description:
Established in 2010, Elephant celebrates creativity and contemporary culture in the visual arts. We cover the international art world, with a focus on emerging artists, designers and photographers. 

We publish daily stories online, as well as putting together a quarterly print magazine that is distributed internationally. Our audience is based all over the world, and we champion a diversity of voices in our commissioning. 

Elephant takes a non-hierarchical approach to contemporary art, bringing together pop culture, music, graphic design, illustration and memes in our coverage. We are an art magazine for modern life, exploring how politics, the internet and creativity collectively shape our world.

Name: AMIS DES ARTS ET DES MUSEES DE STRASBOURG
dorothy's gallery - American Center for the Arts
Description:
Créée en 2006, dorothy's gallery est une galerie parisienne du quartier de Bastille, située au 27 rue Keller, 75011, Paris. En 2011, la galerie a ouvert "American Center for the Arts" - centre culturel dédié aux rencontres artistiques entre la France et les Etats-Unis.

Avec plus de 8 expositions par an, accueillant des artistes internationaux et français de l'art contemporain, dorothy's gallery se propose de favoriser les rencontres culturelles de tout horizon. 

Des concerts, spectacles, conférences et ateliers sont proposés en accord avec le thème de chacune des expositions.

Pour plus de détails : www.dorothysgallery.com

Name: JoyRise Art, LLC
Description:
Founded in 2025 by Dr. Mai Chao Duddeck, EdD, JoyRise Art is a creative space where people connect and feel joy rising, because we believe art is medicine.
In a world that rarely slows down, it’s easy to feel exhausted, stressed, and disconnected. JoyRise Art offers a welcoming space for individuals and communities to reconnect, create, and rediscover joy through the arts.

Our Mission
To inspire joy, connection, and well-being for everyone through the arts.

Our Vision
For everyone to experience the joyful power of creativity.

What We Offer
1. JoyRise Art Boxes: Creative kits designed to inspire joy.
2. Weekly Art Classes: Learn new skills, explore themes, and connect through creativity.
3. Artful Gatherings & Conversations: Creative circles that nurture reflection and connection.
4. Artful Journaling & Poetry: Expressive writing to process emotions and spark insight.
5. Consulting: Support for professionals and organizations using the arts to promote engagement, belonging, and community well-being.

At JoyRise Art, we value creativity, belonging, and community wellness. We make the arts a joyful experience because art is more than expression; it’s medicine for the soul and community health.

Bogaty i międzynarodowy program działalności galerii wykracza poza ramy mediów i nurtów plasując się na granicy sztuki współczesnej i muzyki. Poprzez czerpiący z różnych dziedzin sztuki program oraz kompleksową opiekę kuratorską galeria LETO skutecznie promuje najciekawsze zjawiska sztuki współczesnej ugruntowując ich miejsce na międzynarodowej scenie artystycznej. 

Artyści galerii:

Marcin Dudek
Maurycy Gomulicki
