Name: DIL Appraisals
Description:
DIL Appraisals, provides personal property appraisals to International Society of Appraisers (ISA) standards and qualified appraisals according to the Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice (USPAP) for Fine Art, Antiques and Residential Contents for Estate Tax and Donation;  Equitable Distribution for Estate Planning, Dissolution of Marriage and Partnership; Insurance, Damage Claims, and Bankruptcy.

Personal property appraisals to ISA and USPAP Standards for Fine Art, Antiques and Residential Contents for Insurance, Estate, Donation, Equitable Distribution, Art Consultation.

DIL Appraisals serves the South Florida Area as well as Montana and the Rocky Mountain West.

Dorothy Long, Owner of DIL Appraisals, has been an ISA Appraiser since 2001 specializing in the areas of Antiques and Residential Contents and in 2009 earned an accreditation in Fine Art.

Prior to becoming an appraiser, she worked in the auction business, then gained experience in contemporary art as a gallery owner in the Wynwood Arts District in Miami where she represented both established and emerging artists. The gallery closed in 2010 and Dorothy has been solely appraising in Florida and Montana where she also maintains a residence.

Dorothy Long is an Accredited Member in Fine Art with The International Society of Appraisers (ISA), and is currently the Secretary of the International Society of Appraisers, South Florida.

For more information about how DIL Appraisals can meet your needs, visit: http://dilappraisals.com/services/

Name: Espace Khazna d'Art
Description: Espace Khazna d'Art est un centre culturel et artistique fondé en 2018 et situé à Khaznadar, Bardo, Tunis qui propose des cours et des ateliers d'arts plastiques, de théâtre, de musique, de danse et de méditation. De même, Espace Khazna d'Art organise des évènements culturels et artistiques.

Name: Langage Plus, centre d'art actuel
Tambaran Gallery
Description:
Tambaran is one of New York City’s most respected Tribal Art galleries specializing in exceptionally beautiful museum quality pieces. Founded in 1979 by Maureen Zarember, the gallery offers an unrivaled expertise in African, Oceanic and North-West Coast American art to private collectors and museums all over the world.

Zarember’s eye for authenticity, condition and aesthetic are well established in the tribal art market where she has been helping clients build collections for over thirty years. With a gallery open to the public, she also welcomes young collectors, first time buyers and students.

Tambaran’s objects have been exhibited and sold to the Metropolitan Museum of Art, the Museum of Modern Art, the Linden Museum in Stuttgart Germany, the Royal Academy of Arts London, the Royal Academy of Arts Berlin, the Museum of African Art, Smith College Museum of Art, the Heye Foundation of Art, the Minjie Museum in California, the Detroit Institute Museum of Art, the Museum of Fine Arts Houston, the Neuberger Museum of Art, the National Gallery in Canberra Australia, the Smithsonian National Museum of African Art and Le Museé du quai Branly.

Tambaran’s art has been featured in Vogue, Vanity Fair, Harper’s BAZAAR and the Estee Lauder “Primitive Worlds” Advertising Campaign.

Name: Editions Guy Saint-Jean
Description: Saint Jean publishes books covering novels, food, personal development, spirituality, and general culture topics.

Name: Rectangle
Description:
Rectangle is a new kind of art platform — one that spotlights exceptional artists and helps people discover and collect original work in the spaces where culture happens — hotels, restaurants, private clubs, and design-forward hospitality venues.

Our first product, the Rectangle, is a sleek, living digital art placard (U.S. Patent No. 11710176) that sits beside select artworks and adapts in real time.  Through its subtle use of light, color, and animation, each Rectangle draws attention to the artwork it’s adjacent to – signaling that the piece is special and meant to be explored. Unlike static wall cards, Rectangles dynamically update to launch auctions and print drops, show live availability and pricing, tell the story of the artwork, announce artist appearances and upcoming events, invite guests to inquire or purchase directly, and more.

Name: Cruce Arte y Pensamiento
Description:
CRUCE es una de las asociaciones culturales históricas de artistas, críticos y teóricos en el panorama independiente de Madrid. 

Nació 1993 del interés expreso por crear vínculos entre la práctica artística y la teoría.
En su historia, CRUCE no sólo ha dado voz a numerosos artistas de todos los campos (pintores, escultores, cineastas, performers o músico) sino también a intelectuales vinculados al mundo de arte (historiadores o teóricos) o a la filosofía. 
En sus locales han intervenido y apoyado el proyecto: Manolo Quejido, Luis Gordillo, Mitsuo Miura, Nacho Criado, Fernando Baena, Manuel Saiz, Ángel Gabilondo, José Luis Pardo, Pablo Llorca, Wade Matthews, Quico Rivas, Alicia Murría, José Luis Brea, Miguel Cereceda, Fernando Castro, Fernando Carbonell entre otros. Muchos de ellos continúan apoyando un proyecto al que se han sumado otros participantes como Angela Cuadra, Valeria Maculán, Ignacio Bautista (Mutiu), Daniel Martín Corona, Juan Carlos Bracho, Elisa Pardo, Jan Matthews, entre otros. 

Con 25 años de actividad a sus espaldas, CRUCE cuenta actualmente con 65 socios y amigos que conforman el entrecruzamiento de tres generaciones distintas de artistas, filósofos, músicos, críticos y poetas. La asociación desarrolla actualmente su actividad en un amplio abanico de prácticas contemporáneas sostenidas por sus socios y abiertas al debate filosófico, las artes visuales y escénicas, la música de improvisación y la poesía experimental.

CRUCE forma parte de los Agentes Artísticos Independientes de Madrid (AAIM) y en los últimos años ha llevado a cabo colaboraciones de muy distinta índole con proyectos, asociaciones e instituciones de distinta naturaleza (el Festiva In-Sonora o La Casa de Velázquez son ejemplos recientes).

Su programación puede seguirse en https://crucecontemporaneo.wordpress.com/

Name: Busby Auctioneers & Valuers
Description:
Busby is an independent auction house in Bridport offering specialist expertise and exceptional client service.
 
Overseen by our experienced in-house team, our sale calendar comprises quarterly Fine Art & Antiques Sales, monthly Interior & General Sales, and a curated selection of specialist auctions.
 
Alongside Busby’s outstanding reputation as an auction house, valuations are a core part of our business. From professional insurance and probate valuations to arranging house clearances, our team of valuers prioritise accuracy, speed and confidentiality.

Name: Carolina Bronze Sculpture Garden and Foundry
Description:
Carolina Bronze Sculpture is the premier fine arts bronze foundry serving clients throughout the world. We specialize in fine art bronze casting and fabrication, using both traditional techniques and in-house, state of the art digital tools.

Our services include 3D scanning and enlarging, CNC machining, rapid prototyping, 3D modeling and CAD. We offer molding services, lost wax and sand cast bronze and aluminum casting and digitally integrated metal and fabrication services for artists. We can provide engineering and installation for sculptures on bases of metal, concrete or stone. We have three artists on staff that can create any kind of sculpture you need.

We work as a team with sculptors and clients to sculpt, build, engineer, and install their work. Carolina Bronze Sculpture has been delivering large scale sculpture projects and installations to collectors and private and public institutions throughout the USA and internationally for over 25 years.

Name: Theater de Stoomfabriek
Description: Direct aan de rivier de Vecht, ligt het sfeervolle theater de Stoomfabriek. Hier kun je genieten van pop, cabaret, dans, film, klassiek, opera, theater en kindervoorstellingen. De zaal biedt een zitplaats voor 120 personen, wat kan worden uitgebreid tot 130. Bij grote concerten kunnen de stoelen verdwijnen en is er plek voor 200 personen.

Name: In Certain Places
Description: In Certain Places is a programme of public artworks and events, based at the University of Lancah

Name: NadaOne Design
Description:
NadaOne Design is a one of a kind company specialized in hi-level visuals and original concepts.

Swiss born, French and US citizen David “NadaOne“ Duvoisin has dedicated his life to creating artistic concepts that are both eye-catching and colorful by reproducing a wide and impressive variety of subjects. At any scale and on any surface, he brings his works to life and in doing so creates an attention-grabbing experience.

Known for his ability to create photorealistic imagery and unique concepts with spray cans at any scale, NadaOne has worked in the public realm since 1989 and therefore has the ability to understand your needs and imperatives by creating unique and original designs that are truly works of art.

By traveling the world and painting at innumerable festivals and events, NadaOne has collaborated with some of the biggest names and represents 3 of the main Graffiti crew: AM7 (USA) - Team ALOSTA (Europe) - MAC (France)

He has been commissioned to paint furniture for legendary designer Philippe Starck (Bubble Chair & Sofa), as well as murals for numerous customers, cities, national and international companies.

The only Graffiti artist to have exclusive permission to work and reproduce the characters from the last animation movies from Pixar (Finding Nemo), Disney (Robots), Dreamworks (Monsters Inc.) and Aardmann Studios (Chicken Run), Paramount Pictures (King Kong).

International recognized writer, swiss representative and reference around the globe.

Name: Thinkspace Gallery
Description: Founded in Los Angeles in 2005, Thinkspace was established with a commitment to the promotion and dissemination of young and emerging art. The gallery is a catalytic conduit for the emerging art scene, and is dedicated to the exposure of its tenets and its artists. This movement, straddled between street art, graphic art, design, and popular culture, is subject to steadily increasing global expansion, and is in need of institutional advocates. Thinkspace is positioned to create opportunities and a visible platform for its recognition and proliferation. The movement is young, but significant, and Thinkspace’s aim is to establish both a curatorial forum and a collector base for its output. As an institution, Thinkspace is committed to vision, risk, and the exceptional talents that wield it. From the streets, to the gallery, from the “margins”, to the white cube, Thinkspace is re-envisioning what it means to be “institutional”. As a haven for talent, and a venue founded in passion, conviction, and community, the gallery’s mandate is rooted in projections for its future longevity. We intend to be a vehicle for the talents we vet for year’s to come, and are passionate advocates for their vision and their dreams.

Name: Le prince et les Grenouilles
Description: Vente d'illustrations originales sous différents supports : autocollants, affiches ...

Name: West End Gallery
Description: Established in Edmonton in 1975, the West End Gallery is known for discovering and presenting the finest examples from a broad spectrum of Canadian painting and glass art. The gallery offers many services to their clientele - approval system, purchase plan, appraisal and evaluation, online exhibition mailing list, and worldwide shipping. The gallery is a founding member of the Edmonton Gallery Walk Association.

Name: Artbug
Description: Artbug is a multi-platform project in the heart of LA’s Arts District. Our aim is to host diverse voices, formats and pursuits by showcasing projects, exhibitions and events.

Name: Joanne Shu Official
Description:
Fashion and art brand famous for it's elegance and quality products.

Discover with us outfits, accessories and art decor to create your own, exquisite and unique style.

Joanne Shu represent classic towards contemporary style. Main focus of the brand is exquisite fitting, beautiful fabrics and femininity expressed through the art of clothing. Our designs are formal, yet feminine and show that formal doesn't have to mean boring in women's fashion.

You can wear clothes from our collection to the office, for the big evening event or simply match with more casual items to style.

Ultimately, the result is a chic urban look.

Our mission for our clients is our motto: "dress in confidence". Why? or how? you might ask. We believe that when you know you look impeccable, and you like what you see reflected back in the mirror, then the World will see that too. We all know how important first impression is. It places you in a winning position, position of strenght. For that reason, we take a pride and care in creating our designs for you to help reach your goals and achieve your ambitions.

Your success will feel like our success - when you win, we win.

Name: L.Arena - an Art Installation in Venice
Description:
L.Arena is a Ghent World Project: a mobile arena, a journey through the four seasons, leading to a Spring Festival in Ghent (March 21 - 25, 2022)  and an Autmn Festival in Venice (November 11 - 13, 2022). 

During the festival, Wim Wuyts unites his community from inspirational thinkers, artists, philosophers, entrepreneurs to academics from the most diverse domains. Leadership and the consequences of globalisation are central in the conversations.


From these events various  installations will emerge that visualise and document the conversations, dreams and ideas. 

For this project, he is working together with many friends including:
Tom Callebaut (Brugge) , Tom is an interior architect at TC Plus and a lecturer and researcher at the Faculty of Architecture of KU Leuven 
Tore Tom Denys (Vienna), Tore is an internationally acclaimed tenor and founder of the polyphone ensemble Dyonisos Now! He is also a much sought-after soloist by Philippe Herreweghe with Collegium Vocale Gent for the specific polyphony music.
Sophie Cocquyt (Gent) - PR & Communication at Collegium Vocale and L.Arena festival co-leader

Past events:
Nov 5, 2021: Guest lecture Estonian Academy of Arts (Tallinn)
Oct 17, 2021: Festival van de Architecture (Brugge)
Sep 18, 2021: Triënnale Brugge

Name: The Atelier Studio Program of Fine Arts
Description:
The Atelier Studio Program of Fine Arts focuses primarily on teaching fine draftsmanship and painting skills leading to the creation of well constructed artwork. The Atelier has passed on from teacher to student, a method of instruction which melds formal academic training with influence of the French Impressionists. American art students in the late nineteenth-century European art academies brought this combined education home to pass on to their own students.

The Atelier Studio Program of Fine Arts, lead by Director Cyd Wicker and Assistant Director Laura Tundel, closely follows these original precepts offering students the opportunity to master the fundamental principles in the classical discipline of realistic drawing and painting.

Upon completion of a four-year course of study, the student has a foundation of knowledge and experience to pursue a career as a professional painter.

A portion of The Atelier’s educational lineage is as follows:
Jaques-Louis David (1748-1825) 
Paul Delaroche (1797-1856) 
Jean-Léon Gérôme (1824-1904) 
William McGregor Paxton (1869-1941) 
R. H. Ives Gammell (1893-1981) 
Richard F. Lack (1928-2009) 

Dale Redpath, retired Director Emeritus and Head Instructor, served as Co-Director of The Atelier with Cyd Wicker from 1992 to 2017. Cyd Wicker continues as Director and Head Instructor at The Atelier with Laura Tundel as Assistant Director.

Name: Galerista
Description:
En Galerista generamos un espacio artístico digital fomentando el mercado de las artes visuales en Chile, con el propósito de conectar el mundo del arte con miles de usuarios, en donde cada uno logre encontrar su obra que lo identifica. 

A través de nuestra galería online damos a conocer el trasfondo y significado de las obras expuestas, además de la pasión y trayectoria de cada uno de sus creadores, con el fin de hacer la cultura del arte en chile, una cercana para las personas.

 Galerista apoya, facilita y hace factible este vinculo tan único.

Name: Marian Nixon Paintings
Description: One-person show over here! Well, with the help of my puggle puppy, Marvin. I design, paint, and/or digitally draw patterns and create products (wall art, home decor, garden and porch flags, floor/door mats, etc... from my art. Some is one-of-a-kind handmade art, and some of it is produced/ manufactured by productions partners. Looking for some bright and happy art? You've found it.

Name: Reachout With Arts In Mind
Description: Reachout is a member-led arts charity studio, based in Alloa, promoting wellbeing and good mental health via the arts.

Name: EdArte - Associazione culturale
Description:
Siamo nove giovani laureati con diversi background, ma tutti provenienti dall’ateneo genovese: Storia dell’Arte, Architettura, Archeologia, Lingue e Lettere moderne sono i nostri campi di studio. 
Dopo l’esperienza del Servizio Civile Nazionale nell’anno 2017/2018 presso le sedi museali genovesi di Palazzo Spinola di Pellicceria e Palazzo Reale abbiamo deciso di creare insieme l’Associazione di promozione sociale EdArte. 
Tramite la nostra associazione vogliamo promuovere e diffondere la cultura attraverso una partecipazione attiva e collettiva: la nostra mission è quella di ideare, organizzare e realizzare attività inerenti al campo storico – artistico- architettonico – demo-etnoantropologico e culturale tramite percorsi tematici, laboratori didattici per scuole e famiglie, mostre, eventi e incontri.  
Siamo aperti a collaborare con enti pubblici e privati, associazioni, archivi, musei, fondazioni, biblioteche, università e ogni soggetto che voglia, come noi e con noi, promuovere e diffondere la cultura.

Name: CN ARTSHOTS
Description:
Welcome to my #Colourful world! 
Small #Artist,Big #Dreams
Diverse Approach
Excited for Creative Shots?
Join me & let's #appreciate beauty together

Name: Quintal das Artes
Description:
#seulugarparacriar

O Quintal das Artes, é um ateliê de artes e ofícios que tem como principal foco a divulgação da prática artística.
Localizado na Rua do Horto, na Zona Norte da cidade de São Paulo, oferece ótimas condições de ensino, aliando teoria e prática com métodos sempre atualizados e um sistema de ensino que se adequa ao perfil de cada aluno.

Name: Kunsthandel A.H. Bies
Description:
Kunsthandel A.H. Bies was established in 1953 and specializes in important paintings of the 19th and early 20th century, with an emphasis on Dutch art. In the 65 years of its existence, the firm has build a strong reputation that stretches far beyond the Dutch border. Over time we have sold works to important collectors in The Netherlands, Europe, the USA, China and far beyond. 
Museums have also purchased works from us, including Noordbrabants Museum, Den Bosch, Museum Het Valkhof, Nijmegen, Frans Hals Museum, Haarlem, Dordrechts Museum, Scheepvaartmuseum, Amsterdam, Teylers Museum, Haarlem, Breda's Museum, Fondation Custodia, Paris, Rheinisches Landesmuseum, Bonn. Kunsthandel Bies regularly loans works to museums for exhibitions as well. 

An in-house exhibition has become an important annual tradition and is held each autumn. Kunsthandel Bies has a large collection of over 350 works in stock. In our exhibitions rooms (400 square meters), you will find over 150 works on view. Thus a visit to the gallery is highly recommended. 

Since the 70's Kunsthandel Bies has been participating in important art and antique fairs. You will find our gallery anually at PAN Amsterdam and TEFAF Maastricht.

The gallery also houses a second business: Hans Bies B.V. Restoration of Paintings. In a special studio paintings are cleaned, relined if needed and various restoration processes carried out. Here too, years of experience and expertise in restoring major paintings guarantee the highest standards of excellence.

Kunsthandel Bies is a member of KVHOK and CINOA


.

Name: COLORLINK
Description:
Colorlink est une application web qui permet de créer, de chercher et de gérer toutes vos harmonies couleurs. 
Que vous soyez designers, décorateurs ou particuliers, vous avez accès à des milliers d'harmonie classées par mots-clef. 
Vous avez crée une harmonie ? Colorlink vous propose des harmonies similaires.
Colorlink c'est aussi un centre de formation sur la couleur.

Name: Mooie Woorden
Description:
Mooie Woorden bestaat uit drie millennials met millennial-vragen, die literaire programma’s maken voor millennials uit Utrecht en omstreken. Thema’s: de aarde staat in de hens; we hebben burn-outs; het patriarchaat is nog steeds niet kapot getrapt; hoe de f*%* kies je de juiste wasmachine; we zijn queer maar nog niet helemaal here; systemisch racisme is real; we weten niet hoe we ooit een hypotheek kunnen betalen als we in de kunsten blijven werken. Op deze thema’s en vraagstukken komt ons publiek af. Thema’s waar je eerst om lacht om vervolgens in de foetushouding op de grond te gaan liggen. Waar het ons om gaat: échte shit bespreken. En we zijn er goed in. Onze zalen - kelders, loodsen, ateliers - zitten altijd vol.

We zijn programmamakers met vragen. We zijn interdisciplinair. We doen aan Fair Pay. Literatuur is onze baksteen: het gesproken woord, de fascinaties van auteurs. Video en sound vormen ons cement: dat bindt de boel bij elkaar. We zijn ambitieus, omdat we weten dat we iets toevoegen aan het literaire landschap in Utrecht.

Name: HONEVO
Description: BI-HEMISPHERIC ART

Name: Galeria Mascota
Description:
Galeria Mascota is a new project space providing a platform with a focus on the work of emerging foreign artists.

The space constitutes an important window into foreign work that is locally relevant and will help inform the practice and development of Mexico City's artistic landscape. 

Mascota is seeking to enhance a fertile environment by complimenting it with perspectives and information that may not have been previously evident.

Name: Alexis Caire - Artista Plástico
Description:
Alexis Caire, soy de México, en lo profesional estudié Comunicación y Relaciones Públicas con un Master en Dirección Comercial y Marketing, desde hace más de tres años me dedico al Marketing On-Line, compartiendo información dentro de este blog, así como en distintas redes sociales.

Soy consultor independiente de Social Media y Video Marketing.

Mi principal objetivo como consultor profesional es ayudar a las pequeñas y medianas empresas con su éxito en los distintos ámbitos del Marketing On-Line.

Name: Paolinoshka
Description:
Pauline Rochault aka. Paolinoshka est une Illustratrice et Directrice Artistique. Son univers mêle messages positifs, street culture et compositions florales pour un résultat plaisant aux petits comme aux grands enfants.
Après 5 ans d’étude en communication visuelle puis en design interactif, elle se lance en tant que directrice artistique en agence de communication digitale et illustratrice indépendante. C’est à la croisée de ces deux métiers qu’elle prend le plus de plaisir à créer.

Name: In Her Image Studio
Description: This page is for discussing both my art and my work as a curator of ARISE GALLERY in San Francisco, CA.

Name: Sociedad 0
Description: To think inside the permissible limits, a reflection that doesn’t catch on, that doesn’t objectify itself. We go into it. Sociedad 0, an encouraged tribe that wants to catch on, to leave his mark. Mind, body, (industrial unit)... Mind, body, industrial unit. We don’t do destruction, we create over what’s already existing. Past errors will generate new errors right now, that we will generate. Organization, limits, timings, we are a part of the society. But what are we in here? Criticism. Experimentation. What does to be critic means? When can we talk about revolution? Collaborative group. Ideals which try to go further, against. What does design mean? What is design for us? Experimentation with the individual. Upsets. New language. What’s the best medium to communicate or to influence nowadays? How do we disassociate with the traditional? Do we want to? with the personal - group research  through the design?

Name: Ann Connelly Fine Art
Description:
The Gallery has been a leading part of the regional artistic community, representing national and local emerging and mid-career professional artists. Artists associated with the gallery hold a range of academic and prestigious awards in painting, sculpture, mixed media and three-dimensional work. Ann Connelly Fine Art continues to focus on fine art placement in residential design, corporate consultancies, and specialized procurement services.

With over 30 years experience in fine art framing, the gallery specializes in custom  projects for residential, corporate and museum collections. The gallery also houses an extensive collection of unique molding from national and international sources with hand-applied finishes and custom detailing.

Name: Kentler International Drawing Space
Description: Kentler International Drawing Space, founded by two artists as a non-proft space in 1990, is dedicated to expanding the definition of drawing and work on paper through the support of new, experimental and innovative work by local, national and international emerging or under-recognized artists through the presentation of exhibitions with public programs.

Name: J.G. Eytzinger GmbH - Gold Leaf Manufacturer - Batidor de Oro - Batteur d'or - Goldschläger
Description:
J.G. Eytzinger GmbH - Producing gold leaf since 1867 in Germany. 

Eytzinger is recognized as a leader in the market for gold leaf, offering a professional selection of products to customers in over 80 countries worldwide. In over 155 years of Eytzinger’s existence, it has become known as one of the most innovative and creative companies making gold leaf products.

Name: Atelier Malesherbes Paris
Description:
Tiers lieu d'évènements, ateliers et retraites autour des Arts créatifs et notamment des arts du fils.
Cours et retraites créatives en petits groupes dans un bel atelier sous verrière dans le 9eme arrondissement de Paris, à 2 pas de la butte Montmartre et de son marché aux tissus. 
Accompagnement à la prise en main et mise à disposition d'une piqueuse plate et d'une Quilteuse. 
Matériel de couture, tapis de coupes et tables de coupes à disposition.
Privatisation possible.
Accompagnement pour se décomplexer dans sa pratique créative et s'offrir une pause bienfaisante.

Name: Cord & Brushes
Description: Art School

Name: Label Trap House
Description: Fondé en 2019 par la rappeuse Le Juiice, le label Trap House est une entreprise de production musicale et audiovisuelle.

Name: LAB 058
Description: LAB 058 is een creatieve ontmoetingsplek voor jongeren. Bij Jonge Helden ontdekken jongeren wie ze zijn en wat ze beweegt doormiddel van activiteiten rondom kunst en cultuur.

Name: Udaan School of Excellence
Description: At Udaan School of Excellence, we believe in transformative learning that goes beyond textbooks. Our dynamic curriculum is designed to inspire critical thinking, creativity, and a passion for lifelong learning. Join us to unlock your full potential and embark on a journey of personal and academic growth.

Name: T0M.ART
Description:
TOM.art is an urban artist from Lyon in full expansion.
Aged about twenty years his art is characterized by the diversity of styles he uses for his creations. He is particularly fond of bright colors and mixtures of atmospheres
Street Art and Pop Art are his watchwords.
His universe has already seduced many brands. The famous Paul Bocuse Institute devoted a whole week to him for a collaboration between gastronomy and urban art, an explosive cocktail.
Recognizable thanks to his signature "LOVE" as well as the "CHAT", a classic by Tom and Jerry that he has appropriated over time.

Name: Antique Silver Buyers
Description:
With over 30+ years of experience, Antique Silver Buyers is a trusted name in buying, selling, and brokering antique and sterling silver across Florida, California, Texas, New York, Massachusetts, and throughout the USA.

We specialize in purchasing antique silver in any condition, including:

Sterling silver flatware

Antique silver trays

Silver tea sets

Silver bowls

Estate, vintage, and unique silver items

In an era of online transactions, we believe true value lies in personal connections and expert evaluation. Our team carefully assesses each piece based on age, craftsmanship, purity, and historical significance, ensuring you receive a fair and honest price that reflects its real worth.

For our Florida clients, we offer personalized, door-to-door service, making the selling process simple, secure, and stress-free. Broken or damaged items are evaluated for restoration rather than scrap, preserving their heritage and value.

In addition to buying, we also offer a curated collection of authentic antique sterling silver pieces for collectors and enthusiasts—each selected for its craftsmanship, elegance, and uniqueness.

Whether you’re looking to sell, buy, or simply understand the value of your antique silver, Antique Silver Buyers is your knowledgeable, reliable, and transparent partner.

 Contact us for consultations or send photos to get started.

Name: Estudio Sete Cinco (75)
Description: photos and tips

Name: The Art Hive - Art Experience Centre
Description:
The Art Hive - A Platform for art and creativity.
Join us to learn, create and explore art !!!

A creativity retreat for all art lovers.
With exclusive toddler program based on art, sensory and interactive storytelling, The Art Hive is a one-of-a-kind art experience centre for kids with activities based on art, craft, clay modelling and much more.

Name: Old Masters New Generation
Description:
Old Masters New Generation eager to research the art market and trends in collecting Old Masters. Please join our community-- it is free- to discuss what is happening in the old masters market
We found that the millennial generation is buying and spending more on art than any other generation. However, their focus is on contemporary art for a variety of reasons, such as: ease of purchase online, perception as less intimidating, less art historical knowledge or connoisseurship required to be confident in purchases, and the ability to relate to and connect with contemporary artists through social media. 
Our goal is to introduce, inspire, and encourage young collectors to look at old masters in a new light. We share ideas and experiences between art market experts, experienced collectors, and aspiring collectors.

Name: Pook and Pook, Inc.
Description: Pook & Pook Inc. specializes in auctions and appraisals, offering a wide range of services including the sale of antiques, fine art, and collectibles. With a focus on Americana and international items, the company conducts various themed auctions throughout the year. Pook & Pook Inc. has a rich history, established by Ronald and Debra Pook in 1984, evolving from their antique business started in the 1970s. The company provides detailed catalogs for upcoming auctions and offers online bidding options, catering to a global audience of collectors and enthusiasts.

Name: MAC Fine Art
Description:
The 12,000 sq. ft. gallery in Fort Lauderdale houses the vast MAC collection in the largest exhibition space in South Florida. MAC maintains an in house Multimedia Department complete with a digital photography studio, Gicleé production facility, and a computer-graphic/prepress department. 

The Fort Lauderdale location welcomes both private collectors and art professionals and can satisfy virtually any fine art request, publishing project or installation specification. In addition, its proximity to South Florida’s most important Art Fairs including Art Basel & Art Miami make it a vital part of the South Florida art culture. 

MAC Fine art encourages you to explore our gallery and visit our website often as we are constantly updating our collections, exhibition schedule and artist’s news & events. If you are interested in collecting art we are here to help you understand the process, locate the artworks that you wish to own and provide the highest caliber of service available in the art industry today.

Name: Georges Mathieu Committee
Description: The intention of the Georges Mathieu Committee, is to deliver certificates of authenticity, prepare the catalogue raisonné, fight against fake and counterfeit works, promote the artist's work: conserving, digitising and enhancing the value of the artist's archives, staging exhibitions, initiating publication projects (websites, books) for the general public as well as art connoisseurs.

Name: White Porch Gallery
Description:
The art and installations of the White Porch Gallery in the Wynwood Miami Arts District and at our location in Cape Cod – Provincetown, MA provide a window into a contemporary world, captured through the works of artist from countries around the globe such as Germany, Australia, China, Singapore, Canada and the United States.
The concept is different than that of traditional galleries in that the goal is to make art accessible to patrons in a comfortable, relaxed, and living environment where art lovers can take in the art while on vacation, dinning, enjoying a drink, or listening to live music. To achieve this, the White Porch Gallery provides installations to and partners with boutique hotels, hip restaurants, and lounges thus integrating the art, dinning, vacation, and overall life experiences.

Name: Galleria Berga
Description:
Galleria Berga è una galleria d'arte moderna e contemporanea fondata a Vicenza nel 2008. 
E' situata in uno degli ingressi dell'antico Teatro Romano di Vicenza, eretto negli ultimi anni del I° secolo a.C., poi riformato e abbellito durante l’impero di Claudio (41-54 d.C.). Il toponimo Berga era l’antico nome della zona sud-est della citta di Vicenza e nome a cui si riferiva il Teatro: attualmente, la galleria è uno dei pochi luoghi in cui si possono vedere i suoi resti.
La Galleria Berga promuove specialmente artisti storici italiani ed europei, con particolare attenzione ai grandi maestri del '900, e organizza mostre ed eventi storico-artistici: le opere contemporanee creano un efficace contrasto con l'ambiente antico del Teatro Romano.

Name: Space Gallery St Barth
Description:
Contemporary art gallery born in St Barth. Visit us now in NYC.
For artwork inquiries: info@spacestbarth.com

Name: CYLAND MediaArtLab
Description:
Founded in 2007, CYLAND is a nonprofit organization dedicated to expanding the intersection of Art :: Tech through an annual international festival, visual exhibitions, sound art, video art, and educational programming. Over the years, CYLAND brings together artists, curators, engineers, educators and thinkers to create amazing projects around the world.

CYLAND’s activities:

– develop dialogue between artists and engineers
– connect emerging and established artists
– educate how to use creative technology
– attract artists, audiences, and attention to New Media
– foster innovation.

Name: MimiNation Arts and Crafts Collections Limited
Description:
Welcome to MimiNation Arts & Crafts Ltd., where creativity intertwines seamlessly with craftsmanship to redefine spaces through extraordinary artistry.

As an innovative arts and crafts entity, our specialization lies in curating bespoke art pieces designed to elevate any environment. From corporate offices to residential spaces, we meticulously craft each piece to harmonize with your unique aesthetic.

Our dedicated team of artisans harmonizes traditional techniques with contemporary sophistication, ensuring each creation narrates a story and embodies the essence of the space it adorns.

Join us on a transformative journey where art becomes an intrinsic part of your surroundings, infusing vibrancy, elegance, and a personalized touch to every space we embellish. Explore the transformative power of artistic expression with MimiNation Arts & Crafts Ltd.

Name: space and art
Description:
Space and Art is a creative studio based in Amman, Jordan, founded in 2023. We offer inspiring art workshops in painting, ceramics, and creative expression. 

Our team collaborates with artists and university professors to deliver tailored art experiences for individuals, schools, and companies — including art therapy sessions designed to promote healing, creativity, and connection.

We believe in the power of art to transform minds and uplift communities.

Name: Polline Art
Description:
Polline è un collettivo di professionisti con competenze trasversali che ricercano soluzioni innovative al fine di liberare le bellezze artistiche prodotte con i nuovi media sulla rete internet. 

Il primo output del progetto Polline parte dalla constatazione che diversi artisti, tra cui molti nativi digitali, evitano di pubblicare le loro opere sul web o lo fanno sporcando le opere con watermark troppo invadenti o condividendole a risoluzioni estremamente ridotte per timore di perderne la paternità. Questo fa si che la rete e le bacheche dei social, sono pieni di contenuti di scarsa qualità, dall’altra parte, gli artisti vengono penalizzati nella valutazione del proprio lavoro, specie in occasione di concorsi. 

La soluzione a questo problema è rappresentata da Polline Blockchain, servizio che ambisce a diventare la soluzione di riferimento per tutti i creativi del mondo che vogliono tutelare preventivamente i diritti d’autore pur mantenendo la facoltà di decidere se essere rappresentati o meno da una galleria o una collecting society o comunque lasciare liberamente le loro opere in Creative Commons pur riconoscendone sempre l’autore.

Name: Shanghai Beaux-arts Co., Ltd.
Description:
Shanghai Beaux-Arts is one of the leading exporters, manufacturers, and suppliers, created to distribute the finest quality Art Materials to Global Customers. 
Website: www.shbeaux-arts.com

Name: illustrator Renee van de Kerkhof
Description: Ik werk als illustrator voor reclame- en communicatiebureaus, voor bedrijven en particuliere opdrachtgevers.  Mijn werk bestaat uit illustraties voor volwassenen, voor kinderen, illustraties voor educatieve doeleinden, leesboeken, geboortekaartjes, schilderijen in opdracht en vrij werk. Sommige schilderijen zijn opgebouwd uit veel fragmenten en verrassende details waardoor ze voor veel kijkplezier blijven zorgen. De boekillustraties zijn vlotte aquarellen in heldere kleuren. De zwart-wit illustraties zijn expressief getekend en zijn zeer geschikt voor educatieve doeleinden.

Name: LA PALMERA ESTUDIO
Description: Palmera Estudio is an oasis inspired by tradition, Ancient Rome and Greece where painting, filmmaking and fashion merge everyday in an unique synergy.

Name: LOAS
Description:
Met creatieve en kwaliteitsvolle input brengt LOAS de visual branding van uw bedrijf naar het volgende niveau. 

Een brede waaier aan artiesten en stijlen zorgt elke keer weer voor een unieke invulling van uw wens.

Exact wat u nodig hebt om uw product op te doen vallen of het unieke karakter van uw werkplek uit te lichten dmv:
* Customized personeels- en klantengeschenken
* Raamtekeningen 
* Krijtborden 
* Geborduurd textiel 
* Gepersonaliseerde kantoorbenodigheden 
* Handgemaakte postkaarten 
* Print design: posters

Name: Fogue Studios & Gallery: Georgetown
Description: FOGUE MEMBERS meet like minded travelers that enrich their lives and offer vital connections to their peers and community. Empowering their voice and having a venue for emerging, established, and re-emerging older professional artists, fostering a supportive and enriching culturally-diverse artist community.

Name: Appomattox Tile Art
Description: Appomattox Tile Art is dedicated to producing high quality custom mosaics while providing unsurpassed customer service. Effective communications, fair pricing, and quick turn-around times are standard bearers. Our relationships are built on commitment to details, mutual livelihoods, and environemental concerns, while innovative production techniques are intertwined with the ancient practice of hand-laying individual mosaic tessarae.

Name: CHRONIC
Description: Moda com propósito

Name: Boekselen
Description:
Gebruik een uitgelezen boek als creatieve speeltuin. 

Loes Vork deelt haar creatieve ideeën op het gebied van boekselen, journalen, altered text, found poetry en stempels maken in de vorm van werkbladen, handgemaakte cadeautjes, lezingen, exposities & workshops. Creativiteit is voor haar een manier om jezelf te leren kennen en in verbinding te komen met anderen.

Verkoop bij conceptstore Kersvers te Gouda en bij Nu Doen Woerden (bij Bibliotheek Woerden).

Bedrijfsmatig vallen de activiteiten onder Vork Communicatie.

Name: Galerie Alwane by Odile Mazloum
Description:
Galerie Alwane, one of the oldest art galleries in Lebanon, was founded in 1964 by artist painter Odile Mazloum with the intent of providing a venue for both emerging and established artists who wish to pursue their dreams and increase their fame.
Alwane specializes in showcasing the finest and rarest collection of ancient works of art, contemporary paintings, sculptures and jewelry all created by new and well known artists like Chafic Abboud, Farid Aouad, Paul Guiragossian, Assadour, Odile Mazloum, Fatima Al Hajj etc.
As the gallery's journey continues, we aim to implant a taste for authentic beautiful things in the homes of our clients and above all create a space in which painters are always introduced and appreciated.

Name: Sherri Loomis Artwork
Description: Fine Art Mosaic installations for architectural or residential interiors/exteriors.

Name: Daleno Inc
Description: Daleno Art - Curated by Perrell Fine Art

Name: Acanthus
Description: El equipo de Acanthus trata de tener una visión de estudio a priori para detectar  las diferentes patologías presentes en la obra. Se basa principalmente en su respeto como pieza única. Tratamos de actuar con humildad y respeto hacia la obra. Somos conscientes de lo delicado que puede ser nuestro cometido en ciertas ocasiones donde nos enfrentamos con patologías de gran magnitud. Por eso, nos formamos de forma continua para no quedarnos obsoletos en nuestro desempeño como conservadores-restauradores, algo que es de suma importancia en cualquier disciplina, ya se trate de lienzo, escultura, orfebrería, mueble, etc…

Name: Underpaint Academy
Description:
Learn to be the best version of yourself 

Our goal at Underpaint Academy is to help you achieve your personal, sincere artistic voice. Not only is this the best strategy for professional success, but for personal fulfillment as well.

Our instructors share this philosophy: art education should not be about producing a standard, serviceable portfolio identical to a thousand others. It should be about letting your individual passions come through so that you feel connected to your work, and letting that passion and excitement be felt by those who see it.

Name: DSULUD Lazar Licenoski
Description:
State High School of Fine Arts and Design - Lazar Lichenoski
Where the following sections are studied: Painting Design, Sculpture Design, Graphic Design, Ceramic Design, Interior Design, Furniture & Industrial Products, Clothing & Textile Design and Multimedia Design.

Name: OLD MAPS & PRINTS of Bartele Gallery
Description: Bartele Santema is selling old MAPS and PRINTS online and ships these original antique pieces all over the world from his home base in the Netherlands. He also has a gallery in Jakarta, Indonesia from where he sell mostly Asian material.

Name: A Small Production Company
Description:
A Small Production Company consists of Charlotte Brand and Jikke de Gruijter.

We are living our dream making videos and photos.
This can be in the form of music videos, documentaries, promo videos, photography, or whatever shape you can think of.

With our powers combined we bring a broad range of skills such as conceptual thinking, technical knowledge, art-direction, cinematography, video- and sound montage; basically we can do everything from beginning to end.

If you want to work together on something fun, please let us know. We are also professional enough for the boring stuff.

Also, check out our facebook and instagram (both @asmallproductioncompany) to see what we are up to on a daily basis! 

Want to work together? Please send us an email at asmallproductioncompany@gmail.com or give us a cal at +31 (0) 6 133 93 647

Name: NEXT (New Media Exhibition Team)
Description: We are a collective of New Media students under the Creative School at Toronto Metropolitan University dedicated to providing opportunities for students to enrich their portfolios and refine their skill sets independently in the creation and curation of public-facing artworks. This is done through our facilitation of artist exhibitions, collaborative installations, community building, and networking events.

Name: Aldama Fabre
Description:
Contemporary Art Gallery based in Bilbao, Spain.

Aldama Fabre is a contemporary art gallery that focuses its research on emerging artists, both Spanish and from other countries.

Name: Crystalizations Systems Inc
Description:
The mission of Crystalizations Systems, Inc. is to provide solutions to collections of all sizes, designations and interests to preserve our heritage for the education and appreciation of future generations, as well as, secure solutions for the fine art collector.

With a start in art fabrication, for nearly 40 years, Crystalizations has designed and manufactured hundreds of storage systems throughout the United States and abroad. From the largest cultural institutions to the discerning private collection. Utilizing aerospace inspired engineered aluminum, CSI systems are lightweight and user friendly.

Name: Fugu Creation
Description: A Montreal company specializing in the design and manufacture of high quality collectible resin statues, hand painted and produced in limited series under official licenses.

Name: Fine Arts Conservation LLC
Description:
CONSERVATION AND RESTORATION OF SCULPTURE, OBJECTS, AND HISTORIC ARTIFACTS 

Fine Arts Conservation LLC is a sculpture and objects conservation studio in Los Angeles. We are dedicated to maintaining the highest possible standards of care for the art and artifacts we are entrusted with. Our philosophy favors respect for the integrity and artistic intent of each original work, and judicious intervention when called for. We can provide creative solutions for even the most complex preservation challenges.

Established in 1998.

Name: Daily Art SP
Description: DailyArtSP celebrates art and creativity in São Paulo, connecting artists, enthusiasts, and major brands. With a focus on trends, we value diverse forms of artistic expression, bringing art closer to everyday life.

Name: Leia Mulheres
Description:
Inspirada no projeto #readwomen2014 de Joanna Walsh, Juliana Gomes teve a ideia de criar o clube de leitura Leia Mulheres. Juliana Leuenroth e Michelle Henriques logo se juntaram a elas. 

O primeiro encontro aconteceu em março de 2015, em São Paulo. Nesses quase oito anos de existência, o clube foi se espalhando pelo Brasil e pelo exterior, com reuniões mensais para discutir livros escritos por mulheres. Atualmente somos mais de 400 mediadoras, em mais de 100 cidades. Caso queira criar o clube na sua cidade, basta nos mandar um e-mail que daremos mais informações. Lembrando que temos apenas um clube por cidade. 

O Leia Mulheres faz parceria com editoras, livrarias e centros culturais. Toda a comunicação deve ser feita com a coordenação, através do e-mail: contato@leiamulheres.com.br

Name: Laboratory of Image and Sound in Anthropology - FFLCH/USP
Description:
The Laboratory of Image and Sound in Anthropology (LISA) is an internationally recognized center for research, documentation and training in visual and sound anthropology. 
Linked to the Department of Anthropology of the Faculty of Philosophy, Letters and Human Sciences of the University of São Paulo, LISA has a collection of 1,954 films, 24,500 images, 700 hours of sound recordings, in addition to books, theses and catalogues.

Name: ARS 28
Description: ARS 28 is art gallery for international contemporary art and laboratory for #Conservation and #Restoration of art on #paper and #photography.

Name: Bellevue Fine Art Reproduction, LLC
Description:
Bellevue Fine Art Reproduction is the premier fine art scanning and printing  service in the Seattle area, serving a wide array of creative professionals for art reproduction services. We offer:

    Museum Quality Fine Art Scanning
    World Class Graphics Equipment and Expertise
    Archival Art Papers, Canvas and Inks
    Top Quality Fine Art Giclée Printing
    Limited Edition Prints with Certificate of Authenticity
    Worldwide Shipping

We have been in business since 2007 and soon became the premier fine art scanning service in the area, service artists, galleries, architectural firms, printers, museums and collectors.

Name: Almthba
Description:
Al-Mthba is a multidisciplinary studio focusing on research, tours, art, and education. Founded in 2013 by Moath Alofi in Medina, Saudi Arabia, Al-Mthba aims to incubate and expedite efforts made in the areas of culture, heritage, and art as a means of illumination and preservation.

Currently, Al-Mthba offers services in artistic mentorship, gallery management and curation consultation, as well as research consultation in matters of culture, heritage, and preservation in all matters related to the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

Al-Mthba also facilitates exclusive, in-depth tour guides within Saudi Arabia, by special request only, for researchers, artists, and other notable endeavors. Al-Mthba also extends its staff and services for filmmakers, narrative or documentary, seeking a fixer within the Kingdom.

Name: The Museum Of East Asian Art
Workshop SLC
Description:
Welcome to Workshop SLC, a vibrant and creative hub dedicated to nurturing artistic talent and fostering a passion for fine arts and ceramics. Founded in 2018, our studio has been a pillar of artistic excellence within the community, offering a diverse range of programs to students of all ages and skill levels.

Our mission is to provide a supportive and inspiring environment where artists can explore their creativity, expand their skills, and find their unique artistic voice. At Workshop SLC, we believe that art is a powerful medium for self-expression and personal growth, and we are committed to empowering our students to reach their full artistic potential.

Our studio boasts state-of-the-art facilities equipped with modern tools and materials, providing our employees and students with the best possible resources to unleash their creativity. With a team of dedicated and experienced instructors, we are proud to offer an exceptional learning experience that fosters artistic growth and achievement.

Name: Navillus Gallery
Description:
ABOUT THE NAVILLUS GALLERY
The Navillus Gallery was founded in 2011 by two passionate collectors who have been involved in the art world for over thirty years. In developing their own prolific collection, which includes masterworks from the Renaissance and Baroque periods, to Impressionist and Contemporary paintings, they have developed an expansive knowledge of both the art market and the qualities that make certain works powerful and enduring. They believe in the ability of magnificent artworks to energize a design space, enlighten the viewer and enrich the quality of life.
 
PHILOSOPHY
At Navillus Gallery we want to help people start their collections. Whether our clients begin with an affordable work on paper, a photograph or an outstanding canvas, we want our clients to find artwork suitable for their tastes and design needs. The owners recognize that art can be a presence in an environment as much as an investment, but one that can enrich a purchaser’s life while continuing to retain or increase significantly in value. Navillus represents emerging artists just beginning their careers but still affordable in price, as well as exhibiting the work of top-selling fresh paint artists from the centers of the contemporary art world: New York, London and Paris.

Name: The Art Conference
Description: The Art Conference brings together leaders in Technology, Art, and Culture, showcasing the inspirational and visionary minds of our generation.

Name: Monster Film
Description:
Monster Film est une entreprise de multimédia fondée en 2008 suivant une école de pensée axée sur la créativité et l'innovation tant artistique que technologique. La mission, créer du contenu pertinent, inspiré par les créations d'hier, en se servant de la technologie de demain.

The sky is *Way Below* the limit

Name: Projet Ose
Description:
Il a pour mission de mettre en œuvre et de promouvoir la création artistique tout en favorisant une démarche participative des citoyens et de la communauté. 

C’est au gré de ses rencontres avec des acteurs multiples tels que les artistes, les travailleurs culturels, les  travailleurs communautaires, les professeurs, les universitaires, les étudiants, les architectes, les urbanistes, les scientifiques, les institutionnels, les citoyens, que Projet Ose conçoit des projets de coopération transversaux. 

Il imagine et accompagne des actions artistiques et culturelles qui mêlent une multiplicité de connaissances et de savoir-faire. Ses interventions se construisent en interaction avec les citoyens, leur réalité et les enjeux sociaux du territoire. 

Ses projets stimulent la création, la diffusion d’œuvres et de concepts artistiques innovants, l’intégration linguistique et sociale, la promotion de la diversité culturelle ainsi que la sensibilisation et l’éducation des citoyens à diverses problématiques.

Projet Ose soutient que l’action artistique est un vecteur de transformation sociale qui favorise une meilleure répartition des ressources culturelles, éducatives et économiques. Il crée des passerelles entre le milieu artistique et la communauté, favorisant le réseautage, et visant à réfléchir et à agir collectivement sur des enjeux de société. Les projets mis en place contribuent ainsi à l’invention de nouveaux espaces d’échange et de réflexion sur le monde qui nous entoure.

Name: Weinberger Fine Art
Description:
Weinberger Fine Art is committed to showcasing diverse and high quality work from both emerging and established artists. We offer a wide range of services for the established collector and the first time buyer; from on-site curation and consultation, to digital installation previews and international sourcing.

Weinberger Fine Art’s location is in the heart of Kansas City’s Crossroads Arts district at 114 Southwest Blvd. The gallery, which is housed in a renovated historic industrial building, has almost 5,000 square feet of exhibition space.  Ample natural light, original architectural details, and a warm modern aesthetic make the space a unique and inviting art destination and event venue.

Name: Openarte.it
Description: Openarte.it è un portale internazionale che ospita più di 1000 opere d'arte come quadri, dipinti ,fotografie e altri prodotti artigianali, di artisti provenienti da tutto il mondo. Il portale è una vetrina nella quale è possibile ammirare tali opere e una piattaforma attraverso la quale interagire con gli artisti iscritti che ciclicamente, vengono coinvolti in numerosi eventi, gallerie, manifestazioni artistiche in giro per l'Italia.

Name: Associazione Culturale Fornace Pasquinucci
Description:
Gruppo culturale e centro espositivo ricavato da una ex fornace per la Ceramica. Ospita mostre di arte contemporanea, esposizioni fotografiche, ma anche serate culturali, presentazioni di libri, concerti ...

Capraia Fiorentina - Firenze

La Fornace Pasquinucci è una struttura storica e simbolica del territorio comunale di Capraia e Limite e della sua tradizione produttiva: un pezzo di archeologia industriale e un luogo di memoria, e oggi anche qualcosa di più. Grazie alla riconversione in senso culturale dell’ultimo decennio promossa dall'omonima ’associazione, la Fornace Pasquinucci rappresenta oggi un luogo interamente dedicato all’arte contemporanea, alla sua valorizzazione e promozione, "il fiore all’occhiello dell’offerta culturale del territorio”. 
La composizione variegata e multiforme dell’associazione, formata soprattutto da artisti e da appassionati d’arte in genere, e che soprattutto negli ultimi anni ha visto l’ingresso di molti giovani desiderosi di apportare nuove idee e nuove modalità operative e gestionali, è alla base della sua forza e della passione trainante che muove la volontà a raggiungere sempre più importanti obiettivi, a favore di tutta la comunità. Perché lo spirito che anima l’associazione è sempre stato, e per fortuna lo è ancora, uno spirito di condivisione e di amore per l’arte in quanto occasione di unione e di forte aggregazione sociale.
L’associazione, che non ha scopo di lucro, è infatti interessata a valorizzare tutti gli aspetti culturali dell’arte contemporanea, per poter essere indirizzati a semplici cittadini ma anche ad un pubblico competente.

Name: Detroit Metal Studio
Description:
We’d like to introduce the latest contribution to the development and new standard of Detroit. Detroit Metal Studio is ready to change the standard in contemporary and modern metal artworks for personal and commercial applications.

We noticed that the trend and standard in home designing is to feature a beautiful kitchen with nice cabinets, back splash and of course, stainless steel appliances that tie everything together and give a modern and clean look. But why stop at the kitchen? Why not incorporate metal throughout the house to give a clean and consistent design element?

That was the premise when we decided to introduce the world to Detroit Metal Studio. Not only do we have a plethora of different metal art applications for your home and office, but we’ve given the consumer creative freedom by giving them the ability to personalize their artwork. How does that work you ask?

You can pick any theme, monogram, logo, background or even your own personal artwork. Simply upload your artwork or give us a description of what you’re looking for and we will provide you a rendering of a unique and modern art piece that’s sure to be the topic of conversation when hosting guest. 

Detroit Metal Studio is housed in the industrial mecca that was responsible for providing automobiles to the world. We’ve taken that work ethic, metal fabrication and technology into the 21st Century with the most dynamic, sleek and modern artwork that will transform homes and corporations into a new genre of design. 

Okay, enough of that. It’s time for you to visit our gallery to see how we’ve transformed homes and businesses with the vision of the talented artist that makeup Detroit Metal Studio.

Name: Sunshine Coast Arts Foundation
Description: At Sunshine Coast Arts Foundation, we promote the development and prosperity of the arts on the Sunshine Coast through fundraising and philanthropic investment that facilitates artistic vibrancy and engages the public imagination.

Description: Classic art gallery located in the old Westerville Hotel in the heart of uptown Westerville.  Features the work of David and 30 regional artists ages 5-adult.  Specializing in private instruction, special projects, commissions and creative consulting.  Photography Services-portrait, event and artwork documentation.  Artwork shipped worldwide.  Appointment recommended.

Name: Playtime Project
Description: Playtime Project a pour objet de diffuser et promouvoir toutes formes d’expressions artistiques et culturelles. Entre art contemporain et musiques actuelles Playtime Project mise sur l’éclectisme de ses programmations en proposant des événements variés : expositions expérimentant tous types de médiums possibles (photographie, peinture, installation, vidéo….) ou concerts de musiques actuelles.

Name: Aeneas Bastian Limited
Description:
Aeneas Bastian Ltd is a London-based art advisory and dealership founded by Aeneas Bastian in 2017. We specialize in Modern and Contemporary Art, with a focus on significant works by French, German and American artists.

Aeneas Bastian, our founder and principal, has helped build important collections of 20th Century Art for private collectors as well as public institutions and museums. Aeneas has a Ph.D. in Comparative Literature from Sorbonne University in Paris and holds certificates from Harvard University. He is the director and owner of Galerie Bastian, a renowned Berlin-based gallery. Aeneas has curated acclaimed exhibitions and participated in international art fairs such as TEFAF Maastricht, TEFAF New York, and Frieze Masters.

Name: thecolourmaniac
Description: Hello! This is Anjali here, an Indian illustrator who is self taught, paving my way into the creative world one day at a time. thecolourmaniac is my brain child which came into existence when I rediscovered my love for making art. I Illustrate humans, floofs and cute inanimate things. I particularly love to doodle people while listening to their cute stories.

Name: Studi d'Arte Cave Michelangelo
Description:
Studi d’Arte Cave Michelangelo è il laboratorio di scultura nato a Carrara e affidato alla guida artistica di Luciano Massari. Al suo interno sono state progettate e realizzate le opere di alcuni degli artisti contemporanei più conosciuti come Jan Fabre o Maurizio Cattelan, anche grazie alla disponibilità di una materia prima di eccellenza assoluta come il marmo proveniente delle cave del bacino del Polvaccio.

Da 60 anni, Cave Michelangelo si occupa dell’estrazione e della lavorazione di marmi pregiati come il Bianco Statuario Michelangelo e a questa attività ha affiancato la creazione di un laboratorio per la produzione artistica, un atelier dedicato alla formazione di giovani scultori e attrezzato per la realizzazione di ogni tipo di opera lapidea.

All’interno del laboratorio è possibile trovare le seguenti lavorazioni: 

•	scultura, con riproduzione statuaria classica e contemporanea
•	architettura, con la realizzazione di portali, complementi architettonici e manufatti
•	restauro di opere in pietra attraverso soluzioni per il consolidamento e la pulizia.

Il personale altamente qualificato è specializzato nella realizzazione di sculture in marmo di modelli classici e moderni che vengono forniti da artisti e architetti e che consentono la creazione di opere monumentali e per interni.

Studi d’Arte Cave Michelangelo propone, inoltre, un puntuale servizio di consulenza per gli artisti già a partire dalla scelta del materiale, ma anche la realizzazione di modelli grafici in 3D da disegno o progetto. Molto richiesti sono anche la formatura in gesso a forma persa e i calchi nati a partire da sculture e bassorilievi esistenti.

I nostri artigiani si occupano di seguire sempre l’intero iter di realizzazione dell’opera fino alla sua installazione finale così da soddisfare le esigenze del committente in materia di qualità e attenzione per i dettagli.

Name: Maryland Art Education Association
Description:
Welcome to the Maryland Art Education Association!
We are your primary source for art education in the state of Maryland.

Our mission is to advocate for and advance art education in Maryland to fulfill human potential and promote global understanding. Art instruction is a vital component of every child’s core education. Visual arts experiences cultivate creative expression, innovative thinking, problem solving, and personal development. We hope you enjoy our site and consider joining us!

The purpose of MAEA is to encourage, to strengthen, and to promote the role of the visual arts in education by: promoting quality instruction in visual arts education conducted by certificated art teachers; encouraging study of art teaching; improving the conditions of art teaching; and encouraging and conducting research in art education.  To these ends the Association holds public discussions; sponsors institutes, conferences and programs; publishes articles, reports, and surveys; and works with other related organizations to provide advocacy for arts education throughout Maryland.

Name: McGREGOR WRIGHT SERVICES
Description:
McGregor Wright has been active as one of New Zealand's first dealer art galleries since 1879 - we have stood the test of time. McGregor Wright Services is a Venice-based team of arts professionals that offer a full range of exhibition support services to artists and participants of the Venice Biennale and the surrounding collateral events.

Name: The Saudi Students Association at SAIC
ImpArt Academy
Description:
Impart Art Coaching by professional artists for ADULTS & KIDz.

Impart art classes offers a rare opportunity for all those who are passionate about art and want to learn the same in an artistically enriched ambiance.

The very uniqueness of these classes lies in the fact that it offers to teach each student their choice of medium ranging from oil/dry pastels, drawing/ sketching, water colours to acrylic.

For each medium, Impart has chosen professional artists recognized at the national level, as teachers, who through their valuable guidance and knowledge would try to give their best to each student. 

To accommodate people from all walks of life, Impart conducts classes on all days from 11am till 7.30pm,each class being allotted 2 hours each. Each class is a batch of about 8 students only.

Art For De-Stress

Stress- one of the most commonly used words by people of the corporate sector. Life is a roller coaster ride filled with everyday challenges of being able to achieve and to sustain a certain standard of lifestyle. To prove yourself, to meet deadlines, to fulfil targets - all these are the underlying causes of a stressful life. These factors are in a way also responsible for the stress in personal lives. 

Within us, we have a point which exists at the core - a point of "perfect peace" - a point that is bereft of all tensions and fears. It is to make you aware of this point and help you discover it, we at Impart use paintings and help you to vent out your stress on canvas through colours.

Name: Arthur Roger Galllery
Description: The Arthur Roger Gallery is a leading contemporary art gallery located in New Orleans’ historic Warehouse District. Founded in 1978, it originally opened in the city’s Garden District and attracted a number of New Orleans’ most prominent artists. In 1988, the Arthur Roger Gallery moved to its current location, a carefully planned 5,100 square foot space designed by architect Wellington Reiter, and was described as “establishing a world class standard of excellence for new art galleries in New Orleans.” In November 2008, Arthur Roger@434 was opened as a new additional gallery adjacent to 432 Julia. The gallery maintains a balance between artists from New Orleans and artists of national repute, and is strongly committed to continuing to play a key role in the cultural vitalization of one of America's greatest cities.

Name: Rowles & Company  Ltd.
Description:
We are known as Alberta's Corporate Gift & Art Gallery, Rowles & Company represents the work of over 120 Canadian Artists, mostly from Alberta, and art suppliers. Specialists in custom employee recognition awards, safety awards, corporate gifts, office and residential beautification. Provided with the clients' choices and requirements, Rowles & Company develops professional Service Award Programs, specific to the client's employees and within allotted budgets. Corporations and businesses wishing to thank business partners who have aided in their achievements, come to us for unique gift choices that beautifully represent their industry, success and partnerships. 
Rowles & Company offers corporate collection services, commissions, certified appraisals and insurance evaluations. 

We have established a reputation of excellence in the successful completion of a wide variety of art related projects.  Rowles & Company is committed to providing our clients with the highest quality in artwork and services.

Complimentary boxing and gift wrapping for all gift items.

Name: Tinta Invisible
Description:
Tinta Invisible és una editorial d’obra gràfica que dóna sentit a un treball de creació. En el seu taller de Barcelona hi trobem activitats relacionades amb "les arts del llibre": el gravat calcogràfic, l’enquadernació artística, l'estampa digital giclée i el disseny gràfic.

En destaca la vessant editorial i els gravats de Josep Guinovart. A la sala d’exposicions de Tinta Invisible hi veiem una mostra d’obra gràfica i del darrer projecte que defensa el Taller.

El nostre horari és de dilluns a divendres de 9 a 14h i de 15 a 18h.

Name: Bangalore Lalit Kala Kshetra - An Arts School By Mridula Menon
Description: Around a decade ago, Mridula Menon founded this school. Bangalore Lalit Kala Kshetra (BLKK) aims at bringing people closer to art. As an art therapist, Mridula has been instrumental in changing the lives of many. It was during the  pandemic that Mridula helped corporates like SAP, Salesforce, and Copado see the value of art as a therapeutic way to de-stress their employees.

Name: Tactical Aesthetics
Description:
Tactical Aesthetics is a transregional research-based multimedia production initiative focused on human rights through the arts. TA is both a creative think tank and production company focused on the interplay between humanitarian aid and development and the role of arts and culture in conflict mediation and peace-building. Using socio-aesthetic interventions to truly impact the lives of people in relevant and transformative ways, we address the world's most pressing problems from a fresh perspective. 

TA is currently producing a series of documentaries: 

The Backway/The Maelstrom (in production) focuses on the tragic phenomenon of “backway” migration from West Africa to Europe. This film also includes the construction of a public Memorial for Africans Lost at Sea, which is being realized in collaboration with the Gambian government and families of missing and/or deceased migrants.

Kids In Crisis (in production) focuses on child protection services and art therapy for displaced people in Uganda and India, with a particular focus on abused children and victims of war. This film addresses processes of rehabilitation, reconciliation, and life after trauma. 

The Interventionists (in postproduction) is an ongoing series of interviews with interventionists who are actively on the global frontlines of pressing social challenges. The film includes artists, activists, educators, policy makers, scientists, and medical professionals who put their lives on the line to make this a better world for everyone. 

Partner and Collaborate: 

TA works on joint project bids and commissions with both grassroots and humanitarian and development agencies within the international development ecosystem, and with local businesses and governments. 

We also work with public artists and educators seeking to coordinate arts and culture and/or educational interventions in developing countries. We specialize in working in emerging economies and difficult to access locations, esp. across Africa

Name: Atelier Elle Pé
Description:
"It all started in a small bamboo forest in the country."

A dreamy romantic refuge as a counterpoint to the events of today, which brings us to a place that lets the misanthropic traits of our time be forgotten for a short time.



The products are coated with liquid gold or silver using a special technique, giving them an extreme value. Surface textures result from the manual processing, spontaneously during the process, similar to the creation of a sculpture. So to speak, every piece of jewelry is a work of art that can stand on its own. 

In order to get away from the fast paced life and towards decelerating the concept of the fashion industry, we have decided to develop collections that build on each other.

Local craftsmanship                

We grow all the raw materials in a garden that we go to to harvest the bamboo. Each bamboo is selected according to its own beauty and shape before it is then processed in the studio.                    

So for us, handmade really has the traditional meaning. The fact that we make bespoke products means that it is a very personal process that is due to its close proximity. Interaction with the customer is another basic value of our philosophy.     

Customers have fittings, see the raw materials and become part of the whole process. Through this involvement they can experience the passion and the time it takes to make such a piece.

Our goal is to give the wearer a quiet place that they can fill with their memories and personalities. something that underlines their uniqueness and makes them shine.

Slowing down and appreciating the creation process of something extraordinary is the reason why we decided to develop collections that build on each other and do not join the hunt for the next season of the fashion industry.

We try as much as possible, to live by our standards mentioned in the philosophy. Not just in the brand environment, but also in our private life.

Name: Coinworks
Description:
At Coinworks, we don't give financial advice. But we do give excellent rare coin and banknote advice.

We have nearly forty years of experience in buying and selling the very best Australian rare coins and notes.

We know what’s good. And we know what’s not. And it’s not just our experience.

Our advice always takes into account years of accumulated research and historical data and whether you are a collector or an investor that kind of expertise can be of exceptional value to you.

At Coinworks, we aim to seek out the rarest and best quality pieces available in the market to suit your budgetary constraints. Just as importantly we always work one-on-one with our clients. Every piece we sell comes with full details of its quality, rarity and historical significance. We do not believe rarities can be handled any other way.

Coinworks has the expertise, and the inventory, to make your experience in the Australian rare coin and banknote industry both enjoyable and financially rewarding.

Name: Onessimo Fine Art
Description:
Onessimo Fine Art is committed to providing you access to the best Fine Art, Sculpture, and Contemporary Glass available worldwide, ranging from old and modern masters to works by contemporary artists of established value.

Our knowledgeable and skillful art consultants select the optimum works for your home and/or develop your art portfolio.  All done while sensitively respecting your privacy.

We promise to address your needs from the aesthetic, emotional and art investment positions.

We will work within your timeline to ensure satisfaction with sophisticated and pleasing results, and provide Fine art design for all of the environments of your new or existing home or office.

We can also provide worldwide transport and custom archival framing.

Name: HOME by Ronan Mckenzie
Description:
A multifunctional creative space concept born out of the hunger for a more grounded art space with both a well curated presentation of exhibitions, and a wide programme of events. Being a modern hybrid of an art gallery and a community events space, at the heart of HOME is the aim to inspire, share and support. HOME takes ownership over cultivating our community and creating space for us to be, with a library and creative work space to be shared and enjoyed.

HOME is one of very few black owned art spaces within London, and one of the only to be artist led, with a leading focus on supporting Black and Indigenous People of Colour. HOME responds directly to the personal and communal need for a more honest and representative space, that cares deeply for the artists we present and the community of people that we welcome in to our space. HOME offers a considered curatorial and events programme which highlights our founding concept; to truly contextualise artists, and continually transform to support the community we are built for.

Name: Midland Junction Arts Centre
Description:
Situated in the heart of Midland, 18km north-east of the Perth CBD, Midland Junction Arts Centre (MJAC) is a vibrant visual and performing arts facility managed by Mundaring Arts Centre Inc. with the support of the City of Swan.  

Always acting as a convergent point for community education, the building was first opened as a small school in 1895. The space was then expanded to provide primary, secondary and even tertiary education when the technical college opened in 1904. In the time since, the arts centre acted as a home for Kalla Yeedip Arts in the 1990’s and Midland Opera Studio (2002 - 2008), before reopening under Mundaring Arts Centre Inc. Management in 2017. 

Following an active period of rejuvenation, Midland Junction Arts Centre has been transformed: now delivering a diverse arts education and cultural program to stimulate increased imagination, creativity, skills and knowledge. A curated exhibition program is complemented by regular workshops for all ages, an artist in residence program and a range of cultural events.

This historical venue is available for community hire and offers three galleries, a 142-seat theatre, ceramics and print studios, textiles and drawing rooms, classrooms, a function room as well as a range of work spaces for artists, workshops and meetings. 

We invite you to explore the iconic building, the Midland Junction Arts Centre program and actively engage with the arts.

Name: Northern Spark
Description:
On the second Saturday in June each summer, tens of thousands of people gather along the Minneapolis riverfront and throughout the city to explore giant video projections, play in temporary installations in the streets, and enjoy experimental performances in green spaces and under bridges. From dusk to dawn the city surprises you: friendly crowds, glowing groups of cyclists, an unexpected path through the urban landscape, the magic of sunrise after a night of amazing art and experiences. Northern Spark is the one-night arts event people talk about for the rest of the year. For more information, visit northernspark.org.

Northern Spark is presented by Northern Lights.mn, a non-profit arts organization whose mission is to transform our sense of what’s possible in public space. Northern Spark is one night, but Northern Lights.mn shines throughout the year with projects such as Creative City Challenge for the Minneapolis Convention Center, The Giant Sing-A-Long at the Minnesota State Fair, and permanent, interactive public art for Saint Paul’s Union Depot.
