Name: Naville Numismatics Ltd.
Description:
Naville Numismatics Ltd., is a newly established Coin Auction House, based in London, targeting Classical Numismatics and dedicated to great quality of service and strong know-how. We provide valuable grading coins at a reasonable price. We operate exclusively through electronic channels, offering monthly live auctions as well as e-shop. We provide selections of Greek, Roman, and Byzantine coins through an easy to use, secure and full functional website through which, among the other functions, you can:

- Create your own WishList and be notified, when specific items are available, without any kind of obligation
- Submit absentee bids before the auction day
- Create your own WatchList on a specific auction and track lots and bids
- Participate in live auctions from wherever you like, using a PC or a mobile device
- Keep a record of coins you purchased or bid on
- Settle your invoice easily and quickly, directly online

Naville Numismatics Ltd., founded by Andrea Lippi and Mattia Torre, is a partner of NAC, an auction house well reputed to be one of the world’s leading and most trusted firms for Classical Numismatics, which, over the years, has been honoured to sell countless important collections which form part of one of the most important series of sales ever to take place in the history of Numismatics. NAC's supervision and expertise guarantee a highly professional numismatic service and certifies an unlimited warranty of authenticity for the lots it sells.

Name: Kaezar Gallery

D’un savoir-faire artisanal à la passion pour l’Art, Kaezar Gallery vous accompagne à la découverte d’un concept d’Art révolutionnaire avec des tableaux aux finitions les plus haut de gamme et aux prix les plus abordables.

Adlan Kaezar révolutionne les codes de l'Art par son style et sa richesse de proposition. Il est l'unique signature du concept et il offre en peinture toutes les dernières tendances de l'Art de la mode et du design.

Name: Artinpocket
Description:
Artinpocket es una comunidad que vende arte accesible con un solo clic. Queremos transformar y renovar el canal de proyección tradicional del arte usando Artinpocket para apoyar una red social que fomente y estimule la compra de arte. 

Presentamos Art&Empresa, una acción vinculada al arte que te permite mejorar la comunicación y la imagen de la empresa.  

El Arte es un lenguaje universal que te permite transmitir y comunicar de una manera eficaz los valores y el mensaje de la empresa a la vez que te permite mejorar la percepción que tiene el mercado de la empresa, ya que el arte está relacionado con la sensibilidad , con la cultura, con la exclusividad.

Te ofrecemos vincular el mundo empresarial con el mundo del arte y por medio de un proceso de colaboración artista y empresa desarrollar un trabajo común de (co)-creación que finaliza con la creación de obras de arte que permiten innovar y dar valor a la imagen de la empresa y marcar la diferencia hacia los competidores. 

#Arte&Empresa de Artinpocket es sin duda una magnífica oportunidad para impulsar, rentabilizar y obtimizar las acciones e inversiones en comunicación, marketing y branding.

Sin necesidad de contratar personal, # Arte & Empresa es adaptado e implementado según las características y las necesidades de la empresa. Artinpocket ocupa de todo por medio de un proceso de validación y participación del equipo directivo.

Name: Jim Winter SAS
Description:
PHOTOGRAPHE ET VIDÉASTE PROFESSIONNEL, JIM WINTER EST UN JEUNE ARTISTE DE TALENT DONT LE REGARD SE POSE TEL UN RÉEL AMPLIFICATEUR D’ÉMOTIONS.

 CET AMOUREUX DE LA PHOTOGRAPHIE AU NATUREL IMMORTALISE LES MOMENTS LES PLUS IMPORTANTS D’UNE VIE AVEC SINCÉRITÉ, SUBLIME LA BEAUTÉ DES ÉLÉMENTS ET DES PERSONNES QUI PASSENT SOUS SON OBJECTIF, LEUR APPORTANT UNE PROFONDEUR CERTAINE. OUTRE LA MAITRISE DES TECHNIQUES PHOTOS ET VIDÉOS, SON TRAVAIL JOUIT D’UNE VÉRITABLE CRÉATIVITÉ ET D’UNE DIVERSITÉ TANT HUMAINE QUE CULTURELLE.

CELLE-CI EST LE REFLET D’UN PARCOURS POUR LE MOINS PARTICULIER. EN EFFET, CETTE PASSION – INDIRECTEMENT TRANSMISE PAR SON PÈRE – VOIT LE JOUR ASSEZ TÔT (IL N’A ALORS QUE 10 ANS) MAIS ELLE EST AUSSI VITE MISE AU PLACARD PAR LES ALÉAS DE LA VIE. IL RENOUE AVEC LA PHOTOGRAPHIE, PLUSIEURS ANNÉES PLUS TARD, LORS D’UN VOYAGE À BAMAKO. C’EST LÀ UNE RÉVÉLATION !

DÈS SON RETOUR, JIM WINTER S’AFFAIRE. IL INTÈGRE L’EFET ET EN RESSORT REMARQUABLEMENT DIPLÔMÉ AVEC LA VALIDATION DE 12 PROFESSIONNELS DU MILIEU DE L’IMAGE. EN PARALLÈLE DE SES ÉTUDES PHOTO, IL DÉMARCHE LES CLIENTS, SE CRÉANT AINSI UN IMPORTANT RÉSEAU, ET MET EN LIGNE SON SITE ET SON BOOK PHOTO. OUTILS EN MAIN, JIM WINTER ÉVOLUE SOUS L’AILE D’ALEX MAHIEU AVANT DE SE LANCER EN SOLO. IL SURFE AVEC BRIO SUR LA VAGUE DES RÉSEAUX SOCIAUX ET SE FAIT PEU À PEU UNE PLACE. LES PROJETS FUSENT.

EN AUTHENTIQUE PROFESSIONNEL, JIM WINTER NE SE POSE AUCUNE LIMITE : PHOTO PORTRAIT, ART STUDIO, REPORTAGES, MARIAGES OU ENCORE SHOOTING PRODUIT. AVEC AUTANT DE CORDES À SON ARC, IL N‘EST PAS ÉTONNANT DE VOIR DE GRANDS NOMS DE LA SCÈNE MUSICALE (BOOBA, WATI B, LORD KOSSITY) OU ENCORE DES GÉANTS DU PRÊT-À-PORTER SPORTIF (NIKE, ADIDAS, PEUGEOT, CITROËN) FAIRE APPEL À LUI.

Name: Walter Leblanc Foundation
Description:
The Walter Leblanc Foundation is a non-profit entity constituted by the late Nicole Leblanc, by virtue of her authenticated will in 2006. The Foundation aims to concretise her wish to promote her husband’s oeuvre at both the national and the international level.

Walter Leblanc’s artistic output places him among the most significant artists in kinetic and optical art. His contribution to this international movement is one of the most striking in Belgian art.

The foundation’s essential mission is to bring greater awareness of the oeuvre of Walter Leblanc and, as Jan Hoet wrote, "to do justice to an artist who deserves a place in the international pantheon of art".

Walter Leblanc’s artistic creation places him among the most representative artists of kinetic and optical art. His contribution to this international movement is one of the most striking ones of Belgian art. However, in spite of the quality of his work, it is still little known by the general public. The foundation’s essential mission is to ensure the influence of Walter Leblanc’s work and "to do justice to an artist who deserves a place in the international pantheon of art". Jan Hoet, Ghent, 2001

Name: LA Art Labs
Description:
LA Art Labs, located on Museum Row in the heart of Los Angeles’ Miracle Mile, was founded in 2017 by Kamila M. Korbela, who currently also works as a Project Conservator at the Los Angeles County Museum of Art (LACMA).

The studio employs scientific techniques and instrumentation in the planning and implementation of museum-quality conservation treatments, and carries out research into the methods and materials used by artists. It enshrines the highest attainable standard in compliance with the American Institute of Conservation code of ethics and guidelines for practice.  

Staff members and potential collaborators are long-standing members of the conservation community and draw from national and international collaborations with conservators, curators, and scientists in museums, conservation laboratories, and universities.

Name: IHC Academy
Description:
A IHC Academy é uma escola digital de cinema e criatividade.

Na IHC Academy, acreditamos no poder transformador do cinema e na capacidade de cada indivíduo de ser o herói da própria jornada cinematográfica. Nossa missão é desmistificar o processo de criação de filmes, oferecendo um ensino prático, direto e livre de enrolações. Com uma abordagem centrada no cinema independente, proporcionamos aos alunos a oportunidade única de aprender a arte cinematográfica como ela realmente é: desafiadora, gratificante e repleta de possibilidades.

Nosso lema é "cinema independente para mentes empreendedoras", pois reconhecemos que cada cineasta independente é, por natureza, um empreendedor. Na IHC Academy, você não apenas aprenderá a fazer cinema, mas também a navegar pela indústria cinematográfica brasileira.

Entendemos que o cinema independente vai além da técnica; é uma mentalidade. Por isso, na IHC Academy preparamos você para ser mais do que um cineasta: um empreendedor criativo, pronto para transformar desafios em oportunidades.
Location: Curitiba,  Al. Dom Pedro II, 155 - Batel

Description: The school of Ceramics has works in private and public sectors of formation and specialization. Name: Художественная студия АртНуво
Indus Art Conservation Services
Description:
Indus Art Conservation Services is a Bengaluru-based art conservation and restoration studio. Mrs Nalini Biluka who is passionate about heritage and its conservation founded this company in December 2023.

At Indus, we possess a combination of artistic skill and scientific precision, as well as the passion of someone who considers art restoration and conservation to be their purpose. Our expertise lies in the restoration and conservation of oil on canvas paintings, painted photographs, paper, textiles, polychrome wood sculpture, antiques, and other works of art, ranging from antique to contemporary styles to a museum-calibre standard.

We are also open to collaborating with museums, local authorities, art galleries, companies and private collectors.

Name: Festival de Martigues, Danses, Musiques et Voix du Monde
Description:
Le Festival de Martigues s'efforce, depuis sa création, de promouvoir les cultures traditionnelles.
Fort de plus de 400 bénévoles et accueillant chaque année quelques 500 artistes venus des cinq continents, hébergés en familles d'accueil sur Martigues et ses alentours, il ouvre une fenêtre sur le monde, de partage et de fraternité.

Name: VIDEO ART CHANNEL
Description:
VIDEO ART CHANNEL (VAC) is a new platform for exhibiting and distributing Video Art. VAC delivers contemporary video art & animation to hotels via guest room TVs, as customised site-specific art installations for lobby, restaurant, elevator or bar.
VIDEO ART CHANNEL was founded by Daniela Arriado, curator and expert for video art and digital media and art director Irene Kotnik who is responsible for the communication, marketing and business development.

Name: Lauren's Cows
Description:
Lauren’s Cows is an Art and Homeware retailer centred around the cows paintings of owner, Lauren Terry. Renowned for her characterful portraits of cattle Lauren’s Cows is dedicated to showcasing cattle of all breeds through art. 

Launched in 2012 as a mother-daughter partnership, Lauren’s Cows has taken a shift in path following Jude’s retirement. The once Cumbria/Yorkshire family business now makes its permanent home Lauren’s city centre art studio, York. From her top floor studio, Lauren paints and dispatches her art to cow lovers and collectors across the world. 

Lauren’s Cows takes great pride in creating beautiful products made in the U.K. to the highest quality. Each piece starts with a unique acrylic painting which then transform into Fine art giclee print, fine bone china mugs and jugs, placemats, textiles and greetings cards. 

Specialising in commissioned paintings, Lauren has mastered the balance of character and colour. Personality is everything to Lauren as it’s what draws her to paint cattle. She collaborates with farmers, herdsmen and show circuit members to capture their animals on canvas in a fresh way while still honouring the breeds characteristics. Please contact us if you are interested in commissioning a piece. 

Artwork and Homeware can be purchased from our e-commerce store, through events and at independent gift shops and galleries across the U.K. 

Lauren’s Cows is open to exhibition opportunities, holiday home and business fittings, commissions and retailers. Trade catalogue and price list available on request.

Name: stART GG
Description:
stART GG è un’associazione culturale che si occupa di arte contemporanea e in particolare di Street art dedicandosi alla promozione di eventi, all’organizzazione di mostre e alla realizzazione di grandi opere in contesti sia pubblici che privati. 

E' stata fondata da GianGuido Grassi nel giugno 2017 ed è composta da giovani tutti under 35 con competenze complementari. Ha all’attivo importanti rassegne internazionali come “Street art in cava” due edizioni del “Welcome to Pisa festival”, lo “stART festival –Lucca”, la mostra OZMO-Every wall in town tells a story presso la Cittadella di Pisa e la mostra Moneyless - L'alchimista geometrico dell'arte urbana presso il Palazzo delle Esposizioni della Fondazione Banca del Monte di Lucca.

L’associazione si avvale di importanti collaborazioni: ha partecipato alla Biennale internazionale di architettura e alla mostra dei lavori pubblici del comune di Pisa. 
stART opera seguendo cinque obiettivi principali: city beautification (arte come espressione pubblica di bellezza al servizio di tutti), riqualificazione urbana, partecipazione attiva della comunità, divulgazione e didattica (rivolta alle Università e alle Scuole di ogni ordine e grado) e attivazione di nuovi percorsi turistici all’interno delle città.

Grazie all’offerta di un servizio a tutto tondo che va dalle attività di comunicazione e ufficio stampa alla produzione video-fotografica, dalla realizzazione alla documentazione, catalogazione e restauro delle opere, dalla promozione di brand e aziende alla valorizzazione dei territori, l’associazione è in grado di allestire manifestazioni di portata internazionale, sviluppare progetti propri e collaborare alla realizzazione di quelli altrui coinvolgendo i più importanti artisti del panorama artistico urbano mondiale.

Name: Sarah and Hareld

Name: Somerville Manning Gallery
Description:
Located in historic Breck’s Mill adjacent to the Hagley Museum, Somerville Manning Gallery is unique among small city galleries. For over thirty years, Somerville Manning Gallery has introduced current art trends into an area already steeped in a rich art tradition, mounting exhibitions that relate to our cultural heritage both past and present. With respect to the Illustration School begun by Howard Pyle in 1894, the gallery has arranged shows such as Howard Pyle and His Students. Recognized as experts on N.C. Wyeth and his family, Somerville Manning Gallery created the exhibitions  N.C. Wyeth  and Andrew Wyeth Six Decades, as well as Wyeth Women: Henriette Wyeth Hurd, Carolyn Wyeth, and Ann Wyeth McCoy, paintings by the three daughters of N.C. Wyeth.

The annual American Masters show places the three generations of Wyeths, N.C., Andrew, and Jamie, in context with their times, showing artists from the late 19th to the 21st century such as Mary Cassatt, John Singer Sargent, Marsden Hartley, John Marin, Georgia O’Keeffe, Charles Burchfield, Milton Avery, Hans Hofmann and many others.

Somerville Manning Gallery represents and exhibits 21st century paintings and sculptures by American artists Peter Sculthorpe, Greg Mort, Robert Jackson and many others. Artists from the Pennsylvania Academy of the Fine Arts are a strong component of the gallery including Bo Bartlett, Alex Kanevsky, Jon Redmond, Christine Lafuente and more.

Name: VROLIJKE PHILIP
Description:
Een kunstenaar; en dat met een beperking! VROLIJKE PHILIP maakt met zijn talent en enthousiasme unieke tekeningen. Sinds 2020 is VROLIJKE PHILIP gestart met de verkoop van deze tekeningen op ansichtkaarten. Op die manier tovert Philip bij menig persoon een glimlach op het gezicht. Philip wordt ondersteund door zijn familie om zijn eigen bedrijf te blijven verwezenlijken. Een grote droom om zijn tekeningen te exposeren kwam zo uit!

Bent u een ondernemer of heeft u een bedrijf met interesse in een kaart of poster op maat? Stuur dan een bericht. Philip heeft al verschillende bedrijven voorzien van vrolijke kaarten, zoals een persoonlijke kerstkaart als toevoeging van een kerstpakket, een verhuiskaart bij de verhuizing van een bedrijf of een bedankt kaart als aanvulling op een cadeaupakket voor alle werknemers.

Kijk op: www.vrolijkephilip.nl

Description:
Theatergroep SubSub is hèt jongerengezelschap in Almere. Ontstaan vanuit Theatergroep Suburbia, is zij sinds 2017 een zelfstandige theatergroep en produceert zij meerdere voorstellingen per jaar.

SubSub is gefascineerd door het thema identiteit. Wie ben je? Waarom maak je bepaalde keuzes in je leven? En hoever ga je om te zijn wie je bent? Deze vragen stellen we onszelf, de acteurs en het publiek in de voorstellingen van SubSub.

De kern van SubSub bestaat uit Esther Bolte als artistiek leider en Sanne Priem als zakelijk leider. Voor elke voorstelling werven wij acteurs, vormgevers en overige crew.

Name: ArtsGalleria
Description:
Our online gallery of vintage fine art and collectibles features works from around the world lovingly collected by our family over more than five decades.
instagram.com/artsgalleria_etsy/

Each artwork has a soul - or story - created first by its artist and then nourished by its history. As we share the unique story behind each piece in our collection - how we found, acquired, and loved each piece - we too become a part of their story, and through them, a piece of us continues through time.
We at ArtsGalleria feel privileged to be the storytellers. Our hope is that each piece of art may find its way to its perfect new home where its history can continue to unfold - with you as the next storyteller.

We invite you to also visit our ArtsGalleria Facebook page. In addition to these available works of art, we welcome you to enjoy the many fine art pieces from our private collection. It is our hope that they inspire happiness, peace, joy, and excitement for you as they have for our family.
ArtsGalleria also offers collectibles such as Belleek Fine Porcelain, Hummels, Hudson Pewter, Curtis Jere Metal Sculptures, Rosenthal. Royal Dalton, Cybis, Waterford, Moretto, Duso, Colombo, William Bowie, Virginia Sloane Eagle Dancer Kachina Doll, Franklin Mint, Lladros, Meissen, and more.

Name: Avenue des Arts Ltd
Description:
Avenue des Arts has grown from a contemporary art space into a comprehensive art consultancy, actively advising various clients for their project design and specialising in sourcing top and emerging artists & designers worldwide.

Providing contemporary arts consultancy across the hospitality, property, leisure and corporate project design field in Asia, the agency accentuates the client's brand image through the sophisticated conceptualization and placement of art pieces.

Through a tailored consulting process, Avenue des Arts recommends and delivers original artworks suitable for each client project design and manages the entire project from concept development to production and installation.
French in its origin, the agency also represents international artists from US, Europe, New Zealand who work with various forms of media including paintings, sculptures and photos.

Name: Artitute
Description:
Established in 2010, ARTITUTE is an online platform that promotes Asia’s established and emerging art scene. ARTITUTE is also a stepping stone for aspiring visual artists to showcase their works.

Based in Singapore, ARTITUTE provides the latest updates, interviews, and coverage of the Contemporary Art Scene, contributed by writers worldwide.

We started Artitute.com in 2010 with a single purpose, to provide the most accurate art news and information for our readers with insights and perspectives written from the ground up. Artitute interviews prominently or underrepresented internationally artists and cover major global art events like the Art Basel or Shanghai Contemporary Art Fair.

Description: Projeto sociocultural que promove inclusão, cidadania e transformação social, por meio da música e da dança, beneficiando crianças e adolescentes da cidade de Cubatão e de toda a região.

Name: ZURICH FASHION SCHOOL
Description:
We are a contemporary fashion design school in Zurich’s unique Seefeld district, 150 meters from the historic Pavillion Le Combusier. We offer a 1 year Fashion Design course as well as short courses in 6 subjects. For course listings, please see our website to find the right course and level to start to follow your passion for fashion at Zurich Fashion School. 

The Zurich Fashion School provides a rare fusion of creative atelier and academia. Inspired by the Parisian ateliers of the worlds most renowned fashion designers, where the  founder and creative director worked, Zurich Fashion School is the perfect environment to a profound education and nurturing of new skills to pave the way for designers of the future.

Andrea Wolf-Simone is a fashion designer since 2002 working as artistic director in luxury fashion between France ( Balmain and Vanessa Bruno) and Brazil. A teacher of Fashion Design since 2017, stresses to her students the importance of maintaining a historical overview of crafting techniques and bringing to them a hybrid approach by combining them with new technologies. This approach of uniting these rarely-used, forgotten crafting techniques with groundbreaking, unfamiliar technologies is very stimulating for the students as they simultaneously acquire cultural knowledge, new skills, and crafting techniques. 

A Fashion designer since 2002, she learned her way into the fashion business through experiences at Balmain and Vanessa Bruno, in Paris. She graduated in 2007 with her first Masters degree in fashion and design in France at the Université Lumière Lyon II Université de la Mode, Lyon.
 
She pursued her second Masters of Arts in Design at the ZHdK, Zürich. Her curiosity to explore new fashion possibilities using smart materials to embody new perceptive and sensational interactions for the wearer, led her to open minded approaches, and experimental teaching formats.

Name: Starte
Description:
L’association Starte est l'association des étudian·te·s et ancien·ne·s du Master 2 Sciences et Techniques de l'Exposition de l'Université Paris 1 Panthéon-Sorbonne. Elle a pour objet la production, la création, la communication, la diffusion, la promotion, l’édition et le soutien financier des projets et évènements artistiques, culturels et pédagogiques à l’initiative des étudiant.e.s, anciens étudiant.e.s et/ou enseignant.e.s de ce Master.
Starte a pour volonté de :
- Valoriser les actions et projets à caractère professionnel.
- Initier et de favoriser la mise en réseau et les échanges entre les étudiant.e.s, les acteur.ice.s culturel.le.s, les professionnel.le.s et les publics.

Name: Hard Work Party
Description: HARD WORK PARTY creates experiences, artworks, and digital objects with complex inner lives. Our specialties are not limited to: strategy in practice, form following function, user experience design, motion design, custom software, custom lighting, custom sensing, novel display technologies, orthogonal thinking, data visualization, asking why, discovering why, judicious use of trendy ideas, beauty, drama, and sensitive application of force.

Name: Unge Kunstneres Samfund / Young Artists' Society
Description: UKS (Unge Kunstneres Samfund / Young Artists’ Society) is an Oslo-based institution for contemporary art and a Norwegian membership organization. Founded by artists for artists in 1921, it has since established itself as one of Norway’s core experimental venues for the arts; convening, exhibiting, and supporting critical voices of contemporary artists, with the objective of having both an artistic and political impact within and beyond its region.

Name: Infinite Series Arts LLC
Description: Infinite Series Arts began as an effort to reconnect with the discipline of making. By creating tangible representations of mathematics through simple yet striking pieces of stone sculpture this engineer honors the time spent in the skilled trades.

Name: Choral Phydellius
Description:
O Choral Phydellius foi fundado em 17 de Maio de 1957 e iniciou a sua atividade como Coro Masculino dedicando-se, nos primeiros tempos da sua existência, exclusivamente à interpretação de Música Sacra, até 1961, quando adota uma formação mista.

Em 1975, a Instituição passa a contar com uma Escola de Música, cuja oficialização, em 1993, foi concedida pelo Ministério da Educação; presentemente, está habilitada a ministrar Cursos Oficiais, Básicos e Secundários de vários Instrumentos. Por despacho do Senhor Diretor Regional de Educação, de 10.09.2002, foi homologada a denominação deste estabelecimento de ensino que passou a denominar-se Conservatório de Música do Choral Phydellius.

A par dos Cursos Oficiais, assegura, também, o ensino a Classes Infantis dos âmbitos etários e escolares correspondentes ao Pré-escolar e ao 1º. Ciclo do Ensino Básico, às quais são ministradas disciplinas de instrumentos, classes de turmas de Iniciação/expressão musical e classes de conjuntos corais e instrumentais.

No âmbito da Formação, o Choral Phydellius organizou, com alguma regularidade desde 1981, Cursos de Direção Coral para Diretores Corais, dirigidos por José Robert, com o apoio da Secretaria de Estado da Cultura, assim como workshops e masterclasses variados com pedagogos e instrumentistas conceituados.

Em Novembro de 1988, é criado o Coro Juvenil do Choral Phydellius, constituído apenas por elementos da sua Escola de Música. Hoje, para além de funcionar como classe de conjunto do Conservatório de Música, está também aberto à participação de elementos externos podendo, ou não, terem conhecimentos musicais. Pelas suas características, pelo repertório de nível elevado que executa e pela sua qualidade, o Coro Juvenil do Choral Phydellius é entidade representativa da Instituição e o garante da continuidade do Coro Misto.

Por despacho de Sua Ex.ª o Senhor Primeiro-ministro foi concedido ao Choral Phydellius em 5 Maio de 1989, o estatuto de Instituição de Utilidade Pública.

Name: Ruta De Galerías
Description:
The overarching goal of Ruta De Galerías, as a civil association, is to enrich Mexico's cultural scene.

With this in mind, we organized 2 significant annual events to promote and elevate Mexico's esteemed status as a millenary-cultural powerhouse on the global stage, thereby fostering and nurturing a genuine business hub.

Name: Retro Africa
Description:
Retro Africa is a contemporary art gallery based  in Abuja, Nigeria, that was created in 2015 as a community of art enthusiasts, curators and collectors, headed by founder and creative director Dolly Kola-Balogun. We provide a platform for emerging and established contemporary artists, with an emphasis on African art. Through a range of outlets such as exhibitions, art fairs, intercultural dialogues and our online media. Our ethos is centred around a desire to spread awareness and encourage a cycle of growth and learning within the African art scene.

Retro Africa equally  organises public outreach programs, workshops and residencies in collaboration with our partners in the industry, aimed at sensitising the younger generation to the merits of visual arts, their career options and potential global influence.

Name: Artalistic
Description:
Soon online ...
New web platform for the purchase and sale of Modern and Contemporary Art.
 
Presentation :
• Accessible to all (individuals, artists and professionals). Artalistic is determined to bring together all the operators of the Art Market and to create a community around a common passion : Art.
• Diversified and quality offer (painting, sculpture, limited edition, photography and drawing).
• Guarantees : a careful selection of the works, a free online publishing and a secure online payment.

Our DNA:
• Trustworthiness : careful study of pre-publication ads, HD photos and full description of works.
• Experience : a dynamic and international team, with different and complementary profiles from various professional backgrounds (auction house, gallery and valuation of Modern and Contemporary Art.
• Transparency : prices transparency of artworks and shipping costs.
• Community: rating system, comments and recommendations of sellers by buyers. Artalistic is also active on social networks.

Name: Art Mozaika
Description:
Společnost Art Mozaika, s. r. o. nabízí širokou škálu služeb v oblasti výtvarného umění a kultury obecně. Jednotlivé divize se specializují na klasické aukce výtvarného umění, umělecké fotografie a dalších sběratelských artefaktů. Organizuje výstavy, zabývá se nakladatelskou a vydavatelskou činností, provozuje vlastní DTP studio a ve své rámařské dílně provádí finalizaci uměleckých děl jak pro vlastní potřeby, tak i pro výtvarníky a milovníky umění. Společnost Art Mozaika je předním odborníkem v obchodu s uměleckou fotografií. Vyhledává talenty v řadách nastupujících uměleckých generací a zároveň znovuobjevuje zapomenuté autory, jejichž tvorba stojí neprávem mimo hlavní proud.

Specializuje se na investice v oblasti výtvarného umění. Spolupracuje s odborníky s dlouholetými zkušenostmi ve svém oboru, jak z České republiky, tak i s renomovanými zahraničními partnery. Rozvíjí bohatou spolupráci s mnoha zahraničními galeriemi a specializovanými institucemi. Prezentuje českou a slovenskou kulturu v Evropě i USA.

Součástí vydavatelského portfolia společnosti Art Mozaika je i umělecky zaměřený časopis MOZAIKA, který poskytuje informace o dění na české výtvarné scéně a zajímavosti z kultury obecně.

Name: Connoisseurs Clover Limited
Description:
Connoisseurs Clovers Ltd (CCL), as the name suggest, is a family of Connoisseurs of Art & Collectibles which aims to promote the opportunity, the Industry of Indian Art and collectibles entail. CCL provides finest of Indian Art to its clients and promote the rare, unseen and exclusive set of Collectibles forming the fundamentals of Indian History and Heritage, enabling collectors and novices alike to learn, view, collect and live with the pieces rarely seen before. CCL aims to make ‘Collecting’ an experience in itself and a journey towards learning and attaining connoisseurship in Art and collectibles through a series of knowledge sharing programs aimed to create awareness of the sector globally. 

‘Research’ is CCL’s core competence which it feels is the backbone of learning, creating a great collection and making use of the worthy opportunities the industry offers. We believe that managing a collection should be a mix of informed decisions backed by strong research and an emotional fulfillment of living with historically significant and aesthetically strong works enlightening one’s living. 

CCL procures and provides finest works of Indian Art & heritage by undertaking methodical study through research. CCL's guidance is based upon thorough research-backed analysis of market dynamics existent in the art world globally. CCL's research facilitates art connoisseurs and collectors with consistent and reliable updates.

Name: Siamak Pourzand Foundation
Description:
This foundation was launched in April 2013 in the memory of late Siamak Pourzand, an Iranian journalist and a former prisoner of conscience in Iran who took his own life under house arrest in 2011.

The Siamak Pourzand Foundation (SPF) promotes freedom of expression for artists, writers, journalists and creative minds in contexts where the censorship apparatus is hard at work. Further, it aims to provide a collaborative platform for creative minds struggling against censorship and repression.

An independent organization, with 501(c) (3) status and no political affiliation, SPF operates as a non-governmental and not-for-profit entity.

The Siamak Pourzand Foundation (SPF) aims to:

Provide a collaborative space for education, knowledge-sharing and dialogue about the concept and practices of freedom of expression

Promote freedom of expression, rule of law, civil and human rights

Defend the rights of creative professionals and amateurs in their struggles against censorship

Name: Kohta Taidehalli
Description:
Kohta is a privately initiated kunsthalle in Helsinki that presents uncompromising contemporary art in all its forms.

Kohta brings together contemporary artists from Finland and the rest of the world in solo and group exhibitions. Our mission is to feature artistic thinking in its many forms and showcase artists from different generations and media.

Kohta’s exhibition programme is designed by the Kohta Council. In addition to the exhibition programme we organise events, such as screenings and talks, with the aim to create fruitful dialogue around and about contemporary art and connect the dots between different art forms.

Kohta is located at Teurastamo in the rapidly developing neighbourhood of Kalasatama in Helsinki.

Name: FPT Arena Multimedia
Description: Design & Art College

Name: LaCroixBros
Description:
Bio of the LaCroix Bro behind the Paintings...

Gary Lacroix,
...who produced his first oil painting at the age of nine, creates visionary images that expose the mind to unknown worlds that somehow seem familiar. These images use energy, color and form in a way that challenges the viewer's ego/mind. The observer is asked to release its own mind constructions and experience something new. The unusual visuals often bring up emotions which are resisted by an ego/mind that thinks its own belief system is correct.
As I have journeyed inward through spiritual paths, the intellect, psychedelics and meditation, one thing is evident; science and spiritually are converging... realizing a holistic universe, holographic in nature. The concepts of reductionism, Newtonian physics and fundamental religions are being replaced by self-awareness and quantum physics. Heisenberg's uncertainty principle, Bell's thoughts on non-locality and Bohm's implicate order, prove that we are a creative cause in the development of not only our lives but also the universe. We are undoing the beliefs of conflict, competition and separation — we are part of a whole.
My paintings challenge the ego/mind to see the world differently. Look past your external projection and see inner space.

Name: ALEXANDER MILLAR FINE ART LTD
Description: ALEXANDER MILLAR FINE ART LTD is a fine art company with galleries exhibiting Alexander Millar’s work in Glasgow and Newcastle.

Name: sonotomia
Description:
SONOTOMIA is a European project that gathers two concepts in a very innovative way, the intangible and tangible cultural heritage.

Music, biodiversity and historical sites and buildings are connected with sound in different ways, as sound is a powerful tool to link and connect the past with future, just as cultural heritage does. The values and unique characteristics of shared cultural heritage can be captured and transmitted through shared sounds.

As sounds are widespread and accessible to anyone, promoting and disseminating cultural aspects through captured and modified sound elements will be the core of this project. The heritage can be preserved and promoted through sounds that can inspire future generations to value and cherish more the people and environment around them.

Name: Christian Ouwens Gallery
Description:
Christian Ouwens Galerie presenteert unieke publicaties, edities, tentoonstellingen en presentaties op het gebied van hedendaagse kunst, (Dutch) design en poëzie. De galerie ondersteunt onderzoek en experimenten met een programma dat openstaat voor samenwerking, met als doel het creëren van nieuwe synergieën tussen kunstenaars, verzamelaars, curatoren en het publiek.

Wij zijn gevestigd in het culturele hart van Rotterdam. Het nieuwe Depot en Museum Boijmans van Beuningen, de Kunsthal, Huis Sonneveld, Chabot Museum, Het Nieuwe Instituut en Witte de Withstraat grenzen aan de galerie binnen het Museumkwartier.

Name: Martin Roberts Studio Art
Description: Martin Roberts is a textile and mixed media artist based in the Blue Mountains to the west of Sydney.

Name: REC_Artistry
Description:
REC Artistry is a club for the budding artists of REC, where artists will hang out, communicate, network, learn, grow, teach, and whatnot. The club not only acts as a stage for talented artists but also for those who want to explore their hidden potential in different types of art ranging from sketching, crafts, portraits, mandala etc. 

Artistry members are a community of artists cum engineers united by a common desire to make the world more creative, members get an exclusive opportunity to showcase their talent, sharpen their skillset, innovate, have fun, and grow as a crew with us.

Name: Artduo Art Consultants
Description:
We believe art can inspire, engage and captivate people. 
It’s why we do what we do.

Our combined experience of 25 years in gallery and project management in the corporate and creative arena, enables us to work on large-scale projects in Australia and Asia.  We source and commission work across the entire spectrum of mediums; from original paintings, sculpture, photography, to works on paper and prints, providing creative solutions that reflect the clients’ tastes and meet their needs and desires.

 - Our passion is fuelled by the extraordinary talent of Australian artists and we delight in infusing each project with it’s own distinctive mark. 

 - Our belief is that art can reflect and accentuate the interior design of any space. Art differentiates the space it inhabits - a home, an office or a hotel in a unique and enthralling way.

 - Our knowledge and extensive network of emerging and established contemporary artists and artisans enables us to create visually stimulating and engaging spaces.

 - Our collaboration with some of the most talented interior designers and architects has presented exceptional opportunities for creative expression.

 - Our services are tailored to meet every aspect of the art procurement process, from the initial art selection, to framing, installation and professional management of the entire project. 

 - Our drive is the delivery of exceptional service, to achieve the highest quality creative solution, on budget and on time.

Name: Transform Exhibit
Description:
We are driving the future of the arts. We focus on sovereign voices, storytelling
straight from each creator.

Name: The Fleming Collection
Description:
The Fleming Collection furthers an understanding and awareness of Scottish art and creativity through exhibitions, events, publishing and education with an emphasis placed on initiatives outside Scotland. 

The collection, which is owned by The Fleming-Wyfold Art Foundation, is considered the finest collection of Scottish art outside public institutions comprising over 600 works from the seventeenth century to the present day.

Name: HNR ART & DESIGN STUDIO
Description:
HNR ART & DESIGN STUDIO 

Fine ART studio specialized in Design, Classic painting, Digital painting, illustration, typography, and everything related to ART! 

https://henriquenobrega.com/

SINCE 2013 and STILL -  WORLD WILD

Name: Ayeye Atyenhe Art
Description:
Create and share your personal history or business story/history.

Ayeye Atyenhe Art offers two types of artwork for sale:
TRADITIONAL ART - Aboriginal artists paint the stories of their land and their cultures.
PERSONALISED ART - Aboriginal artists paint your story, guided by you.

In the Arrernte language, Ayeye Atyenhe means ‘my story.’ 
Ayeye Atyenhe is pronounced 'A-year A-chin'.
We are proud and excited to offer a unique opportunity in which Aboriginal artists can paint your story, or the story of your family, business or organisation, using a mix of traditional and contemporary styles. 
The process is straightforward and the result is unique, personal and meaningful. It can even be customised to your preferred size and colours.

Name: neoartists
Description: Artist-Led Artist Studios with Printmaking, Sculpture and Photography Darkroom Facilities. We have a gallery with an exhibition programme proposed my our members and pop up project spaces available in Bolton thorough our Creative Partnership with Castlefield Gallery, Manchester.

Name: T Street Gallery
Description:
T Street Gallery.
Alternative Exhibiting Venue providing a platform for emerging artists in Birmingham.
Founded in Dec 2018 - Launched March 2019.

Name: Beartonline Ltd
Description:
BeArt is a crowdfunding platform created especially for the art world. A powerful new tool for artists, institutions and art professionals to raise funds and realise new ideas, BeArt connects the people producing art and culture with communities and businesses who want to support their work and offers exciting opportunities for engagement and participation.

With BeArt anyone can become involved in the art world and receive unique rewards in exchange for pledges.

Fundraising for art has never been so simple, appealing or transparent.

Name: Momento Café
Description:
Vanaf november 2024 zijn wij te vinden als pop-up keramiek café bij Brandpunt aan de Reigerstraat 16 in Breda. Bij ons draait het om ontspannen, even genieten van jouw ‘momento’. In twee uur tijd schilder je bij ons keramiek. Je hebt hierbij keuze uit een breed assortiment. Tijdens onze keramiek workshop geniet je van een drankje en eventueel iets lekkers, verzorgd door onze vrienden van Brandpunt. Via onze website kun je eenvoudig een reservering plaatsen voor onze keramiek workshops. Wij zijn geopend op zaterdag en zondag van 10:00 tot 16:00. Of op aanvraag voor groepen groter dan 10 personen. 

Bij Momento draait alles om het creëren van mooie herinneringen en het ontdekken van jouw creativiteit. Ben je op zoek naar een leuke activiteit voor een babyshower, verjaardagsfeestje of een teamuitje? Wacht dan niet langer en reserveer een ‘Momento’ via onze website.

Name: Victoria Villahoz Arte
Description: Victoria Villahoz arte es un atelier, pero también es una forma de pensar y sentir al arte de la pintura. Tenemos una Tienda online en la que podés adquirir obras e inspirarte, o anotarte para participar en los talleres de pintura grupales del mes (pintamos todos los meses una obra distinta y variamos la temática), o bien, adquirir talleres individuales a elección, una alternativa diferencial para pintar a tu propio ritmo. Todos los talleres, sean grupales o individuales, son iniciales, virtuales y con óleo, con el fin de iniciarte y/o mejorar tus técnicas y, como decimos en el cada encuentro, sacar el arte que tenés dentro y vivir una verdadera experiencia de transformación creativa. Te esperamos.

Name: Mơ Art Space
Description: Founded upon the mission to proliferate Vietnamese artistic and cultural scene, Mo Art Space seeks to bridge the gap between the art world and the audience. Based on the historical leading Apricot Gallery, Mo Art Space continues to carry on this legacy by introducing the best selection of artworks as well as evolving as a fresh and innovative art space in the old quarter of Hanoi. We corroborate this goal by conducting highly curated exhibitions featuring artworks of various mediums and themes juxtaposing between past and present, tradition and future, heritage and modernism. Mo Art is dedicated to the promotion of contemporary Vietnamese artists, accentuating their works, ideas, and philosophy to art collectors, local and international alike.

Name: Picture This framing & gallery
Description:
Picture This! framing & gallery have been helping people proudly display their life treasures and assisting them to discover the beauty of the world through fine art since 1981.
          This award winning picture framing company and fine art gallery has earned the loyalty and trust of thousands of clients through creative frame designs, superb quality workmanship and excellent service. In The Gallery at Picture This  you will find a diverse  selection of original paintings by local, national and international artists.

Check out  web: www.picturethisgallery.com

Blog: http://picturethisgalleryblog.com

Name: Theaterschool Aan de Slinger
Description:
Bij Theaterschool Aan de Slinger kun je kiezen uit een uitgebreid aanbod aan leuke, uitdagende en inspirerende theaterlessen voor jeugd én volwassenen. Leren samenwerken, improviseren, presenteren, emoties uiten, scènes maken en nog veel meer komt voorbij. En natuurlijk staat plezier voorop! De lessen vinden plaats in Aan de Slinger en we nemen daar natuurlijk ook een kijkje achter de schermen. 

De lessen vinden plaats van maandag t/m vrijdag. Onze reguliere theatercursussen voor jeugd zijn de Theaterklassen. Deze zijn ingedeeld op leeftijd.
De Productieklassen zijn ontwikkeld voor cursisten die al ruime ervaring hebben binnen de theaterschool. We bieden ook lessen aan voor volwassenen.

Name: Centrum Beeldende Kunst Emmen
Description:
Het Centrum Beeldende Kunst Emmen is al meer dan veertig jaar dé professionele aanbieder van beeldende kunst en vormgeving voor Emmen en de wijde omtrek. Sinds 2010 is het CBK Emmen gevestigd in De Fabriek, een prachtige, goed geoutilleerde locatie waar het tentoonstellingsprogramma gedurende het hele jaar een groot aantal bezoekers trekt. Het CBK Emmen staat garant voor een inspirerend en gevarieerd tentoonstellingsaanbod en is daarnaast uitgegroeid tot een laagdrempelige culturele organisatie, die met een hoogwaardig aanbod midden in de samenleving staat. 
  
Er zijn doorlopend twee expositieprogramma’s naast elkaar te zien. In de Grote Zaal en Kleine Zaal ligt het accent op professionele beeldende kunst en vormgeving. Op De Verdieping heeft het programma een breder cultureel karakter. Per jaar zijn zo’n tien tot twaalf verschillende tentoonstellingen te zien. Het CBK Emmen verzorgt bij de lopende tentoonstellingen een aantrekkelijk kunsteducatief aanbod voor zowel het basis- als het voortgezet onderwijs. Hierdoor bezoeken jaarlijks ruim tweeduizend leerlingen het CBK Emmen.

Om beeldende kunst voor meer publieksgroepen aantrekkelijk te maken organiseert het CBK bij verschillende exposities lezingen, rondleidingen of workshops, dit voor zowel volwassenen als voor kinderen.

Het CBK Emmen draagt zorg voor het beheer en behoud van de beeldende kunst van de gemeente Emmen in de openbare ruimte. 

Openingstijden
woensdag t/m zondag 
13:00 tot 17:00 uur 

Toegang is gratis

Name: Oblique Nuage
Description:
"Ce qui m'a poussée à créer l'atelier-galerie Oblique Nuage, c'est l'envie d'un lieu qui me ressemble pour développer mes idées, mes créations, mais pas seulement. Je l'ai pensé comme un lieu ouvert aux échanges avec d'autres artistes, et avec ce quartier de Belleville-Ménilmontant qui m'est cher.  Oblique Nuage, ouvert à l'été 2019, m'a permis de réaliser quelques uns de mes projets artistiques, d'en exposer certains, et d'accueillir plusieurs artistes ou collectifs lors d'expositions au travers de techniques telles que la photographie, la peinture, le graphisme, les installations. Oblique Nuage présente également du Design, orienté upcycling, sculptural, petites séries, objet unique. 
C'est au cours de mon chemin, de mes rencontres et de mes coups de cœur que se font les collaborations et naissent les envies d'expositions."

Pamela PINNA, Artiste-Designer & Fondatrice  

Pour plus d'information ou pour toute demande, contactez-moi par courriel : 
oblique.nuage@gmail.com 

Contact : Pamela PINNA

Adresse : 19 rue de la Mare, 75020 Paris

Name: Sorrel Park Theatrical
Description: Writers’ club

Name: Creative Color Art Studios (CCAS)
Description:
Creative Color Art Studios (CCAS) is a premier art education and event venue located in Scottsdale, Arizona. Since 2010, we have been dedicated to fostering creativity and providing exceptional art experiences for individuals, families, and organizations.

Our mission is to offer a welcoming environment where creativity thrives — whether through our specialized and structured art instruction, engaging adult workshops, or immersive team-building and corporate events. Programs are available for all skill levels, and our curriculum is designed to encourage both personal growth and artistic development.

Creative Color Art Studios has had the privilege of partnering with a diverse array of organizations, including American Express, Nordstrom, Gucci, Kering, Republic Services, Discover, GoDaddy, Henkel, McDonald's, Southwest Airlines, Fairmont Resorts, Vanguard, Perkins Coie, and many others. These collaborations have allowed us to curate unforgettable, art-centered experiences that bring colleagues together and foster team building, client engagement, and connection to something beyond the physical aspect of art.

Our studio offers a wide range of services, including:

• Private Parties: Customized painting parties for birthdays, anniversaries, and special occasions.
• Corporate Events: Team-building workshops, client appreciation events, and company celebrations.
• Art Classes: Weekly classes and private lessons for adults and children, covering various mediums and techniques.
• Summer Camps & School Break Programs: Engaging art camps for young artists during school holidays.
• Specialty Workshops: Themed events like "Paint Your Pet," "Van Gogh Vino," and more.

At Creative Color Art Studios, we take pride in our role as Scottsdale’s leading artistic hub in the community, where we are known not only for our educational offerings but also for our ability to curate and execute exceptional experiences that resonate with our clients and artists alike.

Name: Bad Dog Editions
Description:
Bad Dog Editions is a new breed of wholesale art supplier providing trending and popular artwork at accessible prices! Our approach to Program Art gives designers the flexibility to choose from an array of sizes, substrates, matting and framing options with the opportunity to even add texture.

What Bad Dog Editions Offers:

    Over 1400 unique images
    Fresh selections added regularly
    Sizes from 16” x 16” to 60” x 72”
    Canvas and paper options
    A wide variety of frame finishes and depths
    No Backorders
    All products produced domestically

The Art Revolution has begun!

Name: Galleri Ardenno
Description:
Vi är ett litet personligt galleri mitt i Skåne som arbetar med duktiga och väletablerade konstnärer. De flesta från Skåne men långt ifrån alla… Vi tycker att konst är en livsessens som ska avnjutas så ofta som möjligt. Vi vill förmedla konst som tilltalar ögat och som lockar till betraktelse och nyfikenhet! Den positiva upplevelsen och den spontana varma känslan som faktiskt dröjer sig kvar är definitionen av ”god konst”, tycker vi. Därför eftersträvar vi att hitta det där lilla extra i konsten och hoppas att ni som kunder också ska falla för vad vi har att erbjuda. En skön blandning av oljor, akvareller, originell glaskonst, blandteknik, fotografier, etsningar och mycket annat som kan locka till inspiration och njutning. 

Välkommen in på vår hemsida www.ardenno.se där du kan se ett litet urval av vad vi har att erbjuda och vilka konstnärer vi arbetar med. Med andra ord – bilda dig en uppfattning om vilken typ av konst vi brinner för.

Name: Mixed Greens
Description:
Mixed Greens represents US-based artists that specialize in conceptually driven and figurative work in a diversity of media. We currently represent nineteen artists who are at varying stages of their careers.

Mixed Greens was originally conceived during the late ‘90s to support emerging artists. By promoting them online and through other non-traditional means, such as experimental spaces in locations across the country, Mixed Greens built a reputation of approachability and inventiveness. The goal was to make contemporary artists accessible to the public and vice versa. Mixed Greens became known as a gallery where emerging artists are given their first solo shows in New York City. Now, the artists are vibrant and recognized members of the contemporary art dialogue. Due to the success of its artists and its recognition within the collecting and curating communities, Mixed Greens developed organically from its revolutionary inception into a traditional gallery. Today we continue in the same spirit as we did in 1999, and strive to show work that is not only of contemporary interest, but will be of lasting art historical significance.

Name: Mabe Handmade Hunting & Collector Knives
Description:
Hand made hunting and collector knives,
John has been making knives professionaly since 2005. 
He makes full tang and hidden tang knives.
He stabilizes his own exotic woods, antler and horn.
Railroad knives are a fun and unique addition to his inventory.
Every year he forges steel from chainsaw chain,motorcycle chain and other unique metals,
see his web site for detailed pictures.

Name: Franklin Parrasch Gallery, Inc.
Description: Exhibits post-war and emerging American art.

Name: CODAMADE
Description:
CODAMADE is home base for creative professionals, a space where our global network of public artists can connect with art collectors and art commissioners, as well as the larger NFT community. Here, you’ll find unique and curated collections of NFT art alongside valuable educational resources.

CODAMADE empowers artists and communities to create artworks that bridge the physical public art world with the digital art sphere. The goal is to launch a new creative economy and build an NFT ecosystem based on creativity, collaboration, and mutual support.

Name: Fine Art Global
Description: Fine Art Global have partnered with the finest galleries and contemporary artists around the world to provide a unique online marketplace where art collectors & investors are able to discover, view and purchase fine art. In an age where travel and international trade has become more difficult, we have combined our database of international resources with the latest in modern technology allowing you to preview artworks instantly in your own home before committing to a purchase.

Name: UNG Visual Arts Department
Description: The University of North Georgia’s Department of Visual Arts is a nationally accredited program offering a range of undergraduate degrees (including B.F.A., B.A., B.A.Ed., and more), minors, and a certificate, that combines traditional art training and digital practices to prepare students for creative careers and graduate studies.

Name: Wild City UK
Description:
A small family business with BIG ideas and a fresh approach.
We provide professional creative services and nature inspired community art projects.

"Wild City builds bridges between city folk and
nature, championing local creatives, promoting mental wellbeing,
and scattering seeds of imagination between the cracks in the concrete"

Name: Kimmel Harding Nelson Center for the Arts
Description:
The Kimmel Harding Nelson Center for the Arts (KHN) is an artist residency program located in historic Nebraska City, Nebraska. The program, established in 2001, supports established and emerging writers, visual artists and composers by providing working and living environments that allow uninterrupted time for work, reflection and creative growth. The KHN Center also presents and support arts-related programming that expands public awareness and appreciation of the arts through gallery exhibitions and education outreach.

The residence program hosts approximately 60 working artists annually based on a juried application process. Awards are given to visual artists, writers, composers, and interdisciplinary artists from across the country and around the world. The KHN Center accommodates up to five artists at a time for stays that vary from two to eight weeks. Application deadlines are March 1 and September 1 annually.

Six structured shows are mounted each year in the KHN Center’s gallery presenting the opportunity for area artists to display their work, affording visitors an opportunity to interact with regional talent. Regular open studio events with residents and receptions for exhibiting artists are held to which the community is invited. The Center also hosts several classes and hands-on workshops throughout the year in the classroom space and resident artists regularly present offsite lectures and workshops for organizations and schools.

Name: Townsend Atelier
Description:
Located in the heart of downtown Chattanooga, Tennessee, Townsend Atelier is a visual art school and supplier of specialized fine art materials.  The Atelier Method is a way of teaching fine art that is modeled after historic art studios in Europe where professional artists pass down their tremendous skill set to students through teaching classical techniques in painting, drawing, printmaking and sculpture. 

Our classes and workshops are for all ages and range from the professional working artist, to art teachers, to beginners who all seek to develop their artistic skills in a unique and welcoming atelier setting.  All of our programs are taught by professional local and visiting artists.

We also specialize in quality and sometimes hard to find art materials for mold making, casting, patinas, finishes and painting.

Name: Tinker Art Studio
Description:
Tinker is Boulder's inclusive community art studio where artists of all ages explore, create, and connect. Our classes, workshops, and camps use an arts-integrated approach led by skilled, passionate instructors who prioritize process, curiosity, and confidence alongside technique.

In addition to our primary studio, we are home to Clay Hub, a community ceramics studio offering pottery classes, workshops, and membership options. Clay Hub serves both beginners and experienced ceramicists, providing access to wheels, kilns, glazing, and a collaborative studio environment.

At the heart of everything we do is community. Our team works hard to teach, prepare materials, and maintain safe, welcoming spaces where creativity can thrive. We value inclusion, clear communication, collaboration, and care—for our students, our staff, and our shared studio environments.

Name: RHK STUDIO
Description: RHK STUDIO

Name: Banco de Arte
Description:
Especialistas em arte brasileira. Gent, Bélgica

Há mais de 50 anos no mercado das artes o Marchand Nagib André, colecionador e grande amante da cultura brasileira, consagrou a galeria Banco de Arte em São Paulo, em um trabalho conjunto com sua filha, a Marchande Mia Siufi em 8 de dezembro de 2002, no Shopping Jardim Sul.

Em 2005 expandiu para um espaço moderno e arrojado no Shopping D&D. Neste mesmo ano inaugurou uma sede fixa, localizada no bairro do Portal do Morumbi onde permaneceu até 2016. Até janeiro/2020 ocupava um charmoso e antigo prédio comercial, próximo à Avenida Paulista, no Paraíso. Atualmente estamos com atendimento em território Europeu, em Gent, Bélgica.
E assim expandimos a arte brasileira à uma variedade de novos clientes, colecionadores e apreciadores e seguimos com os que nos acompanham a longa data. Com um acervo composto por mais de 150 obras, integram a galeria artistas autênticos, que são autodidatas e acadêmicos de renome. 
Os estilos variam desde os acadêmicos aos clássicos, impressionistas, surrealistas, primitivistas, naïfs e abstratos. Nas paredes há um movimento constante das obras que proporcionam uma leitura e interação dinâmica. Um convite a desvendar as minúcias e nuances do processo criativo de cada artista, histórias relacionadas aos temas retratados, contextos e influências que se traduzem nas riquezas dessa pluralidade cultural que tem como missão disseminar.
O atendimento é feito de forma exclusiva e com hora marcada de forma online ou no escritório da Marchande na Bélgica. Agende seu horário!

Name: Atelier fuer Freie Malerei
Description:
„Der Frankfurter Künstler Horst Gutbrod malt  zeitgenössische Kunst, die keinem Modetrend unterliegt, augenfällig phantasievolle Bilder mit klarer Konzeption.
Seine Vielseitigkeit ist die Quelle seiner Kreativität und zeigt sich in den abwechslungsreichen Themen seiner Werke, die auch noch nach Jahren dem Betrachter Neues, Ungesehenes offenbaren.
Diese Gestaltungskraft, gepaart mit Innovation, Konstanz und konsequentem Weiterentwickeln seiner künstlerischen Ideen, führt zu der Eigenständigkeit seiner Bilder.
Die von ihm diffizil gemischten Farben setzt er in apart sensiblen Farbklängen zusammen, die zumeist elegant oder poetisch, aber auch zurückgenommen oder abenteuerlich wirken.
Viele seiner Gemälde haben die besondere Eigenart, auf den ersten Blick unfertig auszusehen; das Weglassen ist Teil seiner Kunst.“

Name: Artoure Contemporary Art
Description:
See exceptional contemporary art and inspired collectors in a new impassioned way.

Explore a unique curation of exciting, contemporary artists with bright futures, and join them for insight into their committed and thoughtful practices. 

Meet inspired collectors and see how they create meaningful, valuable collections.

Name: Venice art Crawl
Description: The Venice Art Crawl is a free monthly exploration of the Venice Beach area and the world famous Venice artist community and spirit. During the long history of the Venice Boardwalk area it has served as a home for artists, a haven of creativity, and the place to find many famous galleries. The Art Crawl is an event to help local artists show their art.

Name: Dean Loucks Fine Art
Description:
Dean Loucks Fine Art Collection is the creation of internationally recognized designer and painter of custom off-shore power boats, automobiles, and aircraft, Mr. Dean Loucks.  Dean has been painting his entire life and professionally for the last 25+  years.  Dean's work has been commissioned by middle eastern royalty and countless celebrities from around the world.

Dean uses the Dean Loucks Signature Series line of custom automotive paint from Sikkens/Akzo Nobel, an automotive spray gun, air brush, razor blade, and reduction chemicals to achieve the look of each piece.  

The Result:  Each painting is a true one-of-a-kind creation and is unique to the particular moment in time in which it was created.

Name: up & coming
Description:
up & coming ist der digitale Katalog der jungen Schweizer Kunst. Wir präsentieren junge und aufstrebende Künstler*innen, ihre Arbeiten und ihre Ausstellungen, gebündelt auf einer Plattform. Einige der Künstler*innen haben ihr Studium an der Kunsthochschule erst vor Kurzem abgeschlossen, andere haben bereits Auszeichnungen gewonnen oder werden von renommierten Galerien vertreten. Alle haben einen Bezug zur Schweiz.

Die seit 2013 stetig wachsende Plattform umfasst derzeit über 2'000 Arbeiten von rund 160 Künstler*innen, laufend aktualisierte Ausstellungen sowie Fokus-Artikel zu einzelnen Arbeiten. Die Website wird von Kunstliebhabern, Sammlern, Kuratoren, Stiftungen, Galeristen und Studenten genutzt, um junge Schweizer Kunst zu entdecken, zu verstehen und zu sammeln.

Unser übergreifendes Ziel ist es, die junge Schweizer Kunstszene breiter zugänglich zu machen und sie dadurch zu stärken. Wir möchten jungen Künstler*innen die Möglichkeit geben, ihre Arbeiten einem relevanten Publikum zeigen zu können, und gleichzeitig Kunstinteressierten einen Überblick bieten. Wenn wir es richtig machen, gewinnen alle: Künstler*innen eröffnen sich neue Chancen, und Besucher*innen entdecken den aus unserer Sicht spannendsten Teil der Kunst: Jener der Kunst von morgen.

Wir gehen proaktiv auf neue Künstler*innen zu. Während wir jede Portfolio-Einreichung prüfen, behalten wir uns das Recht vor, unsere eigene Auswahl auf der Grundlage verschiedener Kriterien zu treffen. Wir sind überzeugt, dass nur über Selektion eine übergreifende Qualität erreicht werden kann, welche up & coming für Kunstschaffende sowie Besucher*innen längerfristig interessant macht. Diese Kriterien erlauben uns, unseren Fokus auf aufstrebende Künstlerinnen und Künstler aufrechtzuerhalten und unseren eigenen Standards gerecht zu bleiben.

up & coming  agiert nicht als Galerie und verkauft keine Werke über die Plattform, noch verdienen wir anderweitig an den Künstler*innen.

Name: Lyme Academy of Fine Arts - Lyme, CT
Description: The mission of the Lyme Academy of Fine Arts is to teach the foundational skills of drawing, painting, and sculpture in the figurative tradition. By its commitment to training students in these skills and an engagement with contemporary discourse, the Academy will empower a new generation of artists. Through its programs, the Academy is committed to enriching the cultural life of the community.

Name: GLOBART Advisory
Description: GLOBART Advisory specialises in Post-war & Contemporary Art, with a primary focus on corporate collections and public art.

Name: Sukoon Studio Antwerp
Description: Sukoon Studio is a ceramic studio in Antwerp offering a tranquil environment for individuals and teams to explore their creativity.  Our workshops, ranging from introductory sessions to in-depth courses, provide a unique opportunity to unwind, connect, and craft beautiful pieces.

Name: Per Hillo Art
Description: Salg af kunst og idéudvikling.

Name: Jaai Creations
Description:
I am a professional artist love to create realistic and abstract paintings. I provide customized paintings and artwork. I provide portrait paintings and pencil sketches. I work in home decor products as well. 
Please connect with me for more details.

Name: Restauraciones Fernando Guajardo
Description:
Somos un taller familiar, liderado por su dueño Fernando Guajardo González , quien lleva más de 40 años en este oficio desarrollando una habilidad especial durante estos años que le permite distinguir cuándo una pieza es realmente una antigüedad valiosa y cuando no, aún si está dañado o cubierto con una gran capa de pintura. El ojo entrenado de un restaurador especialista puede ver el potencial de una pieza incluso cuando la apariencia exterior demuestre totalmente lo contrario.
Dedicado especialmente a la restauración, conservación de obras de arte, especialista en marcos y espejos antiguos. 
Además de la venta de distintos tipos de antigüedades

Name: Art Global
Description:
Art Global, an International Online Art Fair. In a world of rapid change in consumer behaviour, Art Global responds to the rising demand in online art buying. Therefore, a platform was founded which facilitates the interaction between art buyers and high profile art galleries. 

Art Global has the ambition to expand its reach beyond intercontinental borders and therewith changing the way art buyers and high profile art galleries do business.

Name: Docfilmdepot
Description:
Docfilmdepot is a submission platform dedicated to documentary cinema. It has been created in Lussas (France).
Docfilmdepot enables festivals to manage all steps from the call for submissions to films selection, as well as viewing films can be done from one unique tool, without using different links and passwords. 
Docfilmdepot offers a wide range of features and can be adjusted to festival’s specific request. It highly facilitates the viewing experience and programmers’ work. Moreover, the platform can be complementary to other more general software or services. 
Using Docfilmdepot does not take time; in fact, it is a real time saving. It also enables a better flow traffic of films within Europe but also internationally.

Name: Artist, Musician and Designer
Description:
I create work through both traditional and digital techniques.

This dual aspect is a constant throughout my work whether it is creating visual art through painting and digital graphics, or music, mixing orchestral sounds with contemporary electronica.

After a musical career throughout my twenties, which involved playing, writing and performing my own music in various bands and line up’s,  I started working with ‘emerging’ technologies in around 1999, using the early versions of Photoshop to create my first digital art.

In the following years I took part in artist led group shows, solo exhibitions and art fairs around the UK.

This led to a busy and successful career in web and graphic design, and I have worked with a wide range of clients gaining considerable skills in digital technologies.

In the past few years I have returned to traditional oil painting including abstract landscapes and portraiture.

I now balance these skills creating fine art commissions, experimental painting techniques, music composition and digital design.

Name: Edmond Fine Arts Institute
Description: The Edmond Fine Arts Institute is the place for creativity and excitement! Visual and performing arts classes are available daily and open to all ages and abilities.  Multiple partnerships are in place to provide art opportunities to the community year round. FAI is Edmond, OK's nonprofit community arts leader.

Name: The Sanat
Description:
Disiplinler ötesi sanat platformu
The Sanat, sanatı, sosyal yaşamın gözü olarak düşünür. Çünkü sanat, gösterilmeyeni görür, görünmeyeni gösterir.

Projelerini yaşamdan alır, daha iyi bir yaşam için geri verir. Tıpkı nefes gibi: Alır-verir, alır-verir…

Üç ana hedefi vardır: 1. Sanatları birleştirmek 2. Sanatçıları birleştirmek 3. Sanat ve sanatçıyı toplumla birleştirmek

Name: Nafasi Ventures
Description:
The information age has set a precedence for decolonization in all its forms.
At the center of it all, identity and repatriation and its intrinsic connection to African arts globally. There is a present reconciliation with the disconnection of our cultural and visual past, as seen with a resurgence and consumption of locally produced visual, musical and performance arts.
Nafasi as a platform aim to be at the forefront of changing narrative by presenting a dynamic roster of creatives with the opportunity to tell their own stories . Through collaboration, networking, partnering and sponsorship initiatives , working together  we can partake in the active shaping of a global cultural decolonizing exercise, and gain a better understanding and grounding of ourselves via the arts.

Our platform will lay a foundation for connectivity and cultural cohesiveness. We not only recruit, we retain and nurture creative talent, offering market accessibility to our roster of artists whilst curating tailor made experiences.
 Nafasi facilitates opportunities for brands, companies and organizations to engage with and grow their audience at the same time, creating memories through interactive positioning of products

Name: Atelier Thibault Barrère
Description:
Atelier Barrère is an international portrait studio led by French realist painter Thibault Barrère, dedicated to creating bespoke heritage portraits for distinguished families, cultural institutions, and private collectors around the world.

Working at the intersection of artistic mastery and legacy preservation, the studio produces museum-quality oil portraits that honour lineage, identity, and personal history. Each work is crafted with uncompromising attention to detail, using classical techniques rooted in the European figurative tradition.

Our collectors include high-net-worth families, private offices, interior designers, and institutions across Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, the United States, Switzerland, and Europe. Every commission is developed through a fully tailored process, ensuring aesthetic harmony with the client’s interior environment, cultural context, and vision.

Atelier Barrère specialises in:
• Heritage Portraiture — large-format portraits that celebrate lineage and family legacy
• Luxury Residential Commissions — artworks designed for prestige interiors
• Institutional & Leadership Portraits — for foundations, universities, and executive offices
• Private Events & Live Portrait Sessions — exclusive cultural activations for high-profile audiences

With a limited number of annual commissions, Atelier Barrère offers a discreet, white-glove experience from concept to installation. The studio collaborates closely with designers, architects, and cultural advisors to integrate each work seamlessly into exceptional environments.

Serving clients who value heritage, craftsmanship, and permanence.
Preserving legacy through portraiture of the highest calibre.

Exhibitions change frequently and feature original works by both international and local artists. Name: Everett Fine Art Ltd
Description:
Restorers and Conservers of Fine art  - Painting, watercolours, prints and their frames.

Tim Everett has been a  figure in the west country’s art world for over thirty years and his father before for a further 25 years. He has an unerring eye when analysing paintings.

Tim began working in the picture department of Sothebys and Bearnes in Torquay, followed by an apprenticeship specialising in the conservation of paintings. Over the last 20 years Tim has devoted much of his time in building upon his conservation knowledge and expanding the business to encompass expertise with frame and paper restoration. 

Everett FIne Art have specialised in the restoration of oil paintings for over fifty years and undertaken an extraordinary variety and complexity of work including:-

relining (conserving damaged and old canvases)
cleaning
retouching
panel transfers
over-sized canvases
collection hanging
This has enabled us to establish a team of highly skilled and accomplished restorers and conservators who work both at the new purpose built Studio and on site.

We work for large institutions and small family collections and will give our firm undertaking that for any painting we restore we will use the sympathy and attention for which we have established our reputation.

You are welcome to visit our Studio and we are delighted to visit you in your home without commitment.

Name: Bull.Miletic
Description:
Bull.Miletic have shown internationally at venues including California Biennial, Yerba Buena Center for the Arts, San Francisco, German Architecture Museum, Frankfurt, Künstlerhaus Bethanien, Berlin, Pasadena Museum of California Art, Victorian Arts Center, Melbourne, Pacific Film Archive, Berkeley, Ulrich Museum of Art, Wichita, Henie Onstad Art Center, Høvikodden, and Museum of Contemporary Art Belgrade. Their work has been reviewed in Artforum, Aftenposten, Billedkunst, Dagsavisen, Mousse Magazine and San Francisco Chronicle among others.

Bull.Miletic were the recipients of the Bay Area Video Coalition’s “Video Maker Award,” Oslo Screen Festival’s “Best Norwegian Video Award” and have received professional grants from the San Francisco Arts Commission, Arts Council Norway, Nordic Institute for Contemporary Art, Office for Contemporary Art Norway and CEC ArtsLink among others. They lectured in programs such as The Art, Technology, and Culture Colloquium, at the University of California Berkeley in 2011 and SCMS Annual Conference 2013 Chicago. Their work has been nominated for Rockefeller Media Art Award as well as SFMoMA’s SECA Art Award. They were artists in residence at the HCA (2003), at Künstlerhause Bethanien Berlin (2004), at NKD (2006), and at Cité des Arts Paris (2007).

Bull.Miletic are represented by Gallery Paule Anglim, San Francisco.

Name: Cecilia de Torres, Ltd.
Description:
Specializing in Latin American Constructivism and Geometric Abstraction

For twenty years the Cecilia de Torres gallery has promoted Constructivism and Geometric Abstraction from Latin America.  We have brought the work of Joaquin Torres-García, his disciples at the "School of the South" and new generations of contemporary abstractionists to international public awareness through exhibitions at the gallery, art fairs and museum shows.  
 
Cecilia de Torres opened the gallery in 1993 following her work as co-curator  of the successful exhibition, El Taller Torres-García-The School of The South and its Legacy, which was shown in five museums in Europe, the US and Mexico.  De Torres is the author of numerous writings on Torres-García and his associated artists, and is currently compiling the Torres-García Catalogue Raisonné.
 
In addition to its work surrounding the legacy of Torres Garcia, the gallery has also introduced other established Latin American artists to New York audiences: León Ferrari, María Freire, César Paternosto, Eduardo Costa, Gerd Leufert, Rogelio Polesello, among others.  Emerging gallery artists include: Gustavo Bonevardi, Lidya Buzio, Marta Chilindron, Elias Crespin, Gustavo Díaz, and Jesús Matheus.

Voor wie of waar ook ter wereld. Het vormt het ideale morele kompas voor ons denken en doen. Voor welke doel(en) maak jij je hard?

ARTIVIST stelt jou in staat jouw strijd letterlijk uit te dragen naar buiten. Denk aan prachtige wall-art of duurzame kleding en tassen. Elk design wordt gecombineerd met regelmatig geupdate content in het verlengde van de SDG. Door middel van Augmented Reality laten we de kunst tot leven komen in de digitale wereld. Het door jouw gekozen design vormt als het ware een portaal naar steeds vernieuwbare bron aan informatie omtrent het doel.

ARTIVIST’s designs nodigen mensen uit het gesprek aan te gaan. De gesprekken die we nodig hebben om de grote vraagstukken van vandaag én morgen op te lossen.

Door te kiezen voor het artwork van ARTIVIST draag je meteen bij aan de realisatie van een van de SDG doelen. Een deel van de opbrengsten gaan naar een organisatie die al bezig is om dit doel te realiseren.

Un’opportunità per divulgare cultura e far conoscere una delle figure professionali più importanti per il settore del turismo dell’Italia, il paese più ricco di storia e arte al mondo.

ItalyProGuide per le Guide
E’ una vetrina ed una risorsa per la Guida Turistica Autorizzata. Ogni guida può scrivere e pubblicare i propri articoli gratuitamente, avere la propria pagina dedicata e la disponibilità del modulo di contatto sempre in primo piano.

ItalyProGuide per il Pubblico
Finalmente un’unica risorsa che consente al pubblico di entrare in contatto con una Guida Turistica Autorizzata, lontani da improvvisate o equivoche prestazioni da Local Friends. L’utente può leggere gli articoli scritti dalle guide e allo stesso tempo contattarle per concordare visite e tour.

Name: Inciardi Prints
Description:
Anastasia Inciardi (she/her) is a food printmaker based in Portland Maine. She graduated from Kenyon College in 2019 majoring in Studio Art and Art History. Her primary printmaking medium is linocut, meaning that she uses carving tools to cut images in relief into blocks of linoleum. 
	Growing up Italian American, food was always central to Anastasia’s family—entire weeks were planned around meals and every outing or activity had to involve some sort of culinary reward. Carving prints of food connects Ana to her family and the experience of bonding with others over a good meal. She’s fortunate to be building her entire life around the celebration of food and eating—her partner is an organic vegetable farmer in Maine and brings a whole other angle to their shared obsession with food. In her free time Anastasia loves roller blading, eating cheese, talking to her grandmother on the phone, petting her cat, Coupon, and singing with her sister.
