Name: Children's Art Classes - Woodbridge, VA
Description: At Children's Art Classes (CAC) - Woodbridge, we offer a curriculum based art education for children ages 3-18. Our programs are available for homeschooling and co-op education, summer art workshops, birthdays and private events, and an after school and weekend art instruction. Our art classes are dedicated to providing children with engaging activities that keeps them busy and gives them a foundation in the arts. As a life long skill, art helps children adopt new hobbies while developing career skills, building confidence, social skills and an appreciation for nature. At CAC - Woodbridge, we offer painting, drawing, design, printmaking, sculpture, ceramics, and much more. Art is the first language and at CAC - Woodbridge, we enhance that language.

Name: Collage Art of Sean Phillips
Description: Sean Phillips is a collage artist and graphic designer who was born and raised in Corpus Christi, TX, but now resides in Bakersfield, CA. He received a Bachelor of Science degree in graphic design from The Art Institute of Pittsburgh. While he often works in graphic design, his true passion and artistic drive lies in the art of collage. To Sean, collage is playful and dramatic, even surreal and absurd. His focus is on creating works that are, often times, controversial but hold a sense of dark beauty with a vintage sense of design. Working with torn paper, scissors, and glue, he works to create art that speaks out to viewer, stirring emotions and thoughts to ideas that seem to take their place on the backburner of society.

Name: ART&ME Galeria
Description:
Kortárs képzőművészeti Galéria
Az ART&ME Galéria és Élménytér ötvözi egy társadalmi vállalkozás, egy közösségi galéria, egy képzőművészeti találkozóhely és egy webshop előnyeit. Galériánk küldetése, hogy bevigyük a képzőművészetet az otthonok és a munkahelyek falai közé, hidat építsünk a képzőművész és a vásárló között, közben fogyasztható élménnyé tegyük a mecénatúrát.

Name: Kamu İstanbul
Description:
In the light of these criticisms and acknowledgments, Kamu aims to be a dynamic area which enables sustainability by designing methods and mechanisms which question art area with daily lives of individuals, neighbourhood residents or different togetherness/meeting shapes such as interaction of people with shared areas, and artistic production process which will reinforce this relation could be followed, develops experimental areas which audiences can also involve the production, and enhance the art to contact with every segment of the community as a whole of creative activities.

Within the context of ‘Art Mediatorship’, Kamu aims to carry out execution areas of the art from behind closed doors to outside where there is no obstacle for the public to access and to public space where artist’s productive freedom approaches to the maximum. Rather than the ability of the public for meeting with art, Kamu is aimed to make regulations to enable the community to be in the centre of art production beyond being an audience to the art with this mission of bringing art to the public. 

Kamu aims to provide sustainable support to artists, especially young artists, in structuring an environment where they can meet financial necessities of life only with their creative activities and in establishing producing, introducing and presenting opportunities for unique and creative ideas. 

Kamu is an independent entity where art is shaped through individuals and institutions, and which is progressing critically against hierarchic power. Today, it has a hope for structural problems of this obstructed system which is now exposed and almost everyone is voluntary to confront and change to be selected and solved in a mutual consensus and it is based on this responsibility as a perspective. According to Kamu, the way of this passes through establishing democratic places where people can examine, try to understand and discuss what they can do.

Name: Gold Circle
Description:
In today’s intensely visual world, there is an ever-growing need for a quieter, more focused, path of discovering and celebrating art. In this digitally-driven visual landscape, craftmanship and materiality is making a strong comeback 
re-introducing art’s powerful ability to communicate visually complex meanings as much as to sooth, empower and nurture the soul. Gold Circle has been created to provide an online viewing space dedicated to celebrating unique works of art.
 
Gold Circle brings together a curated selection of artworks that are predominately photographic, without being limited to a single medium. Its aim is to research, showcase and promote visual culture in the UK and internationally. Alongside curated showcases, the Exhibitions page features selected photography and visual art shows from around the world.

We welcome artists’ portfolio submissions and article contributions from writers. If you are passionate about photography and the visual arts and want to create original content in Gold Circle, get in touch.

Name: AdvizArt
Description:
Fondée en janvier 2016, AdvizArt est une start-up de vente en ligne de tableaux et de photographies d’art. Elle révolutionne le marché de l'art international en proposant des œuvres d'art plus accessibles à une clientèle dans le monde entier. 

Le credo : « Vous avez un mur, nous trouvons le tableau" représente le but principal de la plateforme : connecter directement les artistes avec les acheteurs d'art.

Name: Frederico Sève Gallery / latincollector
Description:
Formerly, latincollector, we have changed our name to Frederico Sève Gallery in 2010.

Frederico Sève Gallery exhibits and promotes artists from Latin America and Spain in an international context. Our aim is to assist collectors, art professionals and academics to discover, view and purchase works that transcend territorial boundaries. In addition to our critically acclaimed exhibitions, Frederico Sève/latincollector has offered lectures and panel discussions, organized film screenings, and hosted the annual benefits for Studio in a School and Aid for AIDS. Since 2001 we have gained the recognition and respect of the local and international community as a trusted source of information on Latin American art.

Name: Studio H Fine Art
Description: Studio H Fine Art was founded by Iris Heffes, Orange County based artist who is committed to create an atmosphere that fosters imagination and nurtures creativity. Each student is recognized as a unique artist with unlimited potential, and each given profound respect in the studio. The relaxed, open and comfortable environment offered at Studio H Fine Art is the perfect place to grow and earn appreciation for art. A wide range of classes and workshops are offered here so that children, teens and adults may explore endless artistic possibilities. We offer: * Holiday/ weekend workshops   * After school classes for children * Morning and evening classes for adults * Birthday parties/events * Assistance in building an artistic portfolio / Online Art classes / Online Summer Art Csmp / Online Digital Media

Name: Renewing the Renaissance
Description:
My daughter, Naomi, was diagnosed with autism when she was 5 years old. She’s always loved art and she would keep busy sketching for hours on end until some harsh criticism stopped her from doing what she loves. I was heartbroken to see this love of hers squashed, so I decided to start Renewing the Renaissance as a way to support, both financially and spiritually, artists on the autistic spectrum.

Taking a cue from the patron-artist relationships that abounded in the era of the Renaissance, my aim is to be able to connect our wonderfully talented artists with patrons to allow them not only to be able to sell their work, but to make connections with people that show the artists they are supported and their work is meaningful. My dream with Renewing the Renaissance is to create an effective model focused on challenged adults’ individual strengths and to provide mentorship, helping them to flourish creatively. 

If you aren’t in the market for artwork, you can always donate. Every tax deductible donation gets us closer to being able to help another talented artist living with challenges. In addition to mentoring our artists, we also support them by keeping them in art supplies, so every donation, every sale helps the artists directly. We all thank you for your support. 

Learn more on our website at www.RenewingTheRenaissance.com

Name: FICA Oficina Criativa
Description:
A FICA é uma oficina criativa para criar à mão. Funciona como um espaço criativo onde vários ofícios têm lugar.

Oficinas Dentro da Oficina:
Dentro da oficina criativa, dedicamo-nos principalmente a três ofícios manuais: Cerâmica, Serigrafia e Marcenaria.
Os ofícios da casa, no mesmo espaço, lado a lado.

Feito Aqui:
Na FICA as produções são de pequena escala. Local e manual, à escala da mão.

Oficina de Pequena Escala:
As nossas produções assentam em processos de construção manual e de baixo impacto.
Tendemos a contrariar a velocidade da produção em série, respeitando o processo natural inerente a cada ofício e matéria prima.
Feito à mão, por nós e aqui.

Aprende na FICA:
A FICA é uma oficina para aprender a fazer. Nos nossos workshops pões as mãos na massa.

Aprender e fazer por ti, garantem o perpetuar do saber fazer. Abrimos o portão da oficina para ensinar os processos e técnicas de diversos ofícios.
Na oficina, para além dos workshops mensais de Cerâmica, Marcenaria e Serigrafia, podes aprender outros ofícios.
Na FICA também podes continuar a fazer por ti, no Ginásio de Ofícios.

Team Building:
Para além das formações agendadas, também fazemos workshops privados / team building com os nossos principais ofícios: Cerâmica, Serigrafia e Marcenaria.

Vais conhecer algumas das técnicas básicas, ferramentas manuais e/ou máquinas e metodologia de trabalho inerente ao ofício que escolheres. É adequado para quem não tem conhecimentos prévios e é ideal como primeiro contacto com a técnica.

Segunda a Sexta-feira em Laboral e Pós-Laboral: excepto terça-feira.

Name: katie holten
Description:
Katie Holten grew up in rural Ireland and studied Fine Art and History of Art at the NCAD, Dublin and the HdK, Berlin. 

In 2003 she represented Ireland at the 50th Venice Biennale. 

Katie lives in New York City after undertaking a Fulbright Scholarship at Cornell University from 2004 - 2006. 

She recently had a public artwork installed on the Grand Concourse in the Bronx, NY. The project was commissioned by the Bronx Museum of the Arts, Wave Hill and the NYC Parks Dept (2009-2010).  

In 2007 Katie had her first museum solo exhibition at the Contemporary Art Museum St Louis and other solo exhibitions include: Dublin City Gallery The Hugh Lane (2010); The Bronx Museum of the Arts, New York (2009); Nevada Museum of Art, Reno (2008); Villa Merkel, Germany (2008); Gasser & Grunert, New York (2008); VAN HORN, Dusseldorf (2010, 2007, 2005).

She has received commissions to make new works for museums and galleries worldwide including; Salina Art Center, Kansas (2011); FUTURA, Prague (2010); Storefront for Art and Architecture, New York (2010); Whitworth Art Gallery, UK (2009); Den Frie, Copenhagen (2009); Kunsthalle Düsseldorf (2009); Centro di Cultura Contemporanea Strozzina, Florence, Italy (2009); UBS Art Gallery, New York (2008); Fondation d’entreprise Ricard, Paris (2007); Institute of Contemporary Art, Philadelphia (2006); Wiener Secession, Vienna (2005); CREATIVE TIME, New York (2005).

At Dais we believe contemporary art can inspire individuals and transform the spaces we inhabit. We work with architects, designers, public and private bodies, alongside whom we help to shape environments that stimulate and support creativity.

Name: Studio Six Art Conservation LLC
Description:
Studio Six Art Conservation is an independently owned and operated art conservation studio located in Dallas Texas. We provide professional, personalized and ethical art conservation services to private collectors, small museums, historical societies and corporate collections throughout Texas. 

The primary focus of Studio Six Art Conservation is on the conservation of historic objects that are composed of wood or other organic materials such as clay, ivory, jade, lacquer, boulle, tortoise and mother of pearl. Objects include items such as small sculptures, furniture, frames, caddies, and items of a pre-Columbian or ethnographic nature.

Studio Six adheres to the American Institute of Conservation’s (AIC) strict code of ethics and standards of practice. Brad Ford Smith has been a Professional Associate of American Institute of Conservation since 1998.

Name: Bela Oficina

Sou Anabela Teixeira Marques, artista e formadora, e criei este projeto para partilhar saberes, inspirar criatividade e proporcionar momentos de descoberta e conexão com os materiais e as técnicas. Acredito na importância do tempo, do processo e do fazer manual como caminho para o crescimento pessoal e o bem-estar.

Mais do que ensinar, a Bela Oficina é um convite à experimentação livre, ao prazer de criar com as próprias mãos e à alegria de transformar ideias em algo único e autêntico.

Aberta a colaborações e projetos criativos!

Name: Nick Levitin Photography
Description:
I love to photograph urban and scenic landscapes and people engaged in living life in the United States, Europe, and the Middle East.  My window on the world when I was a kid, was Life Magazine, the premier photo magazine of its time. We didn't have a TV. It was the photographs, taken by many of the best photographers in the world at the time, that captured my imagination. I began using a camera seriously on a trip to Berlin in 1965 when my father bought me a Prakita camera with three lenses. I received my BFA from Boston University and went on to study at the Germain School of Photography in NY. Shortly thereafter, my camera and I became one. I began by documenting the mass gatherings in Central Park in the 1970s, eventually moved into portrait and theater production photography. During the last several years I have returned to documentary, as well as landscape work.  In addition, I have had several solo shows in Montclair, Livingston and Short Hills, NJ.

I’m drawn to quiet theatrical moments. My photographs attempt to tell a story, whether the focus is on people or nature. The subject can be a person in the street, or a boat on the beach. Even in nature photography, there is something that evokes an emotion or a memory –– a sense of participation or solitude. I am fascinated by what is in the frame of the photograph –– the relationship between people and the space they occupy.  I want to connect and think my photographs reflect that – whether the subject is people or nature, I seek engagement. Most of my  recent work is in black & white. For me there is something mysterious, sensual, and engaging about a black and white photograph. That is why, more often than not, I prefer it over color. Photographer Dominic Rouse, puts it well, “Color is everything, black and white is more.”

Name: L'École(s) du Sud

Il est constitué de huit écoles membres : 
- École des Beaux-Arts de Nîmes
- École nationale supérieure de photographie d’Arles
- École supérieure d’art d’Aix-en-Provence

Name: Dansk Teater 300 År
Description:
Vi fejrer dansk scenekunst gennem 300 år. 23. september 2022 er det 300 år siden, Ludvig Holberg åbnede sit teater i Lille Grønnegade med professionelle skuespillere, som for første gang spillede på dansk, og Danmark fik et professionelt teater uden for hoffet. 

Vi fejrer hele scenekunstfeltet og cementerer kunstarten som en vægtig medspiller i det moderne samfund – kulturelt som samfundsudviklende. Vi fejrer en branche, som med dybe rødder i den danske kulturarv, fortsat sætter politiske agendaer, tør underholde med kant, favner mangfoldighed og møder publikum, hvor de er – i landets teatersale, på plejehjem, bytorve, børnehaver, biblioteker og i nedlagte fabriksbygninger. 

Scenekunsten løfter fællesskabet i mødet med publikum live, i direkte kontakt og levende dialog. Denne helt unikke kunstart vil vi fejre sammen, når vi sætter spot på scenekunstens afgørende betydning for dansk sprog, samfund og identitet, før, nu og i fremtiden.

Name: Kunstgang Leiden
Description:
De Kunstgang is een commissie – bestaande uit studenten Kunstgeschiedenis – die de kunstgalerie in het Lipsius runt. In de zomer van 2014 heeft de LAKgalerie een doorstart gemaakt onder de vleugels van de faculteit Geesteswetenschappen van de Universiteit Leiden. In samenwerking met de studievereniging van de opleiding Kunstgeschiedenis, de Leidse Kunsthistorische Vereniging, is de commissie tot stand gekomen, maar staat op dit moment geheel los van de vereniging. De galerie is bedoeld om beginnend kunstenaars, die recent zijn afgestudeerd aan een kunstacademie, een podium te bieden en de universiteit te voorzien van mooi gevulde gangen. Daarnaast geeft de galerie de studenten Kunstgeschiedenis de gelegenheid hun tijdens de studie opgedane kennis direct in de praktijk te brengen. Het is voor kunsthistorici belangrijk om in aanraking te komen met kunstenaars en over kunst te praten. Het geeft nieuwe inzichten die je in de collegezalen vaak niet krijgt.

De Kunstgang – de naam zegt het al – is een gang, gelegen tussen de zalen 003, 005 en 028, de zalen waar wij als Kunstgeschiedenisstudenten de meeste colleges volgen. Daarnaast hebben we aan de andere kant van het Lipsius nog een kleinere gang waar plaats is voor kleiner werk van de desbetreffende kunstenaar. Vaak dient deze laatstgenoemde gang ter ondersteuning van de centrale gang. Alles wat aan de muur kan hangen is welkom: schilderijen, fotografie, drukkunst, et cetera. Elke twee maanden worden de muren gesierd door nieuwe kunstwerken.

Bij elke tentoonstelling hoort ook een officiële opening. Bij deze openingen, de vernissages, organiseert de Kunstgang naast de vaste borrel ook bijzondere activiteiten. Zo organiseren we onder andere interviews en lezingen van gastsprekers.

Name: Fondazione Il Bisonte
Description:
La Fondazione Il Bisonte è una realtà storica fiorentina fortemente radicata nel territorio e tra i maggiori protagonisti della scena artistica del Novecento a Firenze. Fondato nel 1959 da Maria Luigia Guaita, Carlo Ludovico Ragghianti e Enrico Vallecchi, Il Bisonte rappresenta un unicum nel campo della grafica d’arte a livello nazionale e un’eccellenza artistica riconosciuta in tutto il mondo. Soffici, Carrà, Severini, Maccari, Pomodoro, Scanavino, Carmassi furono tra i primi artisti invitati da Maria Luigia Guaita a realizzare le proprie opere in edizioni litografiche, a cui seguirono Moore, Calder, Arroyo, Matta, Picasso e molti altri.
La Fondazione si estende su una superficie di circa 700 mq distribuiti su tre edifici nel centro storico di Firenze e attualmente si articola in: una scuola internazionale dotata di 8 laboratori tecnici, una galleria d’arte, una biblioteca specializzata, l’archivio storico e l’archivio corrente delle donazioni.
La scuola internazionale, erede delle attrezzature, della tradizione e dello spirito della stamperia omonima, opera dal 1983 nel quartiere di San Niccolò formando allievi in grado non solo di applicare le tecniche e i processi incisori ma anche di insegnarli a loro volta e gestire un laboratorio di stampa.
Ad oggi la Fondazione Il Bisonte ha ampliato la sua offerta configurandosi a tutti gli effetti come un hub culturale e creativo, spazio generativo di formazione e produzione artistica in grado di coniugare l’arte del “saper fare” artistico con le istanze espressive più contemporanee.

Name: Felicity Hamilton
Description:
Moments of peace and calm in London are like tiny pieces of chocolate melting in your mouth. You can savour it for a few moments before continuing your day. I adore London for all the reasons you’re used to hearing - there’s always a new cocktail bar opening, a birthday party to go to, a constant hum of the city and lit up buildings to gaze upwards that fill you with energy.

 

As someone from the countryside, the scale and glamour of the city is never something that I forget as I walk through the quieter streets towards the Thames on Sundays. The magnolia blossom fills the air in Notting Hill and the palm trees shade the pavements - making you feel like you're on distant shores.  I savour these little neighbourhoods as my pockets of sanctuary.

 

I love watching people - collecting parcels, or sitting on a bench with a latte, or stumbling across a friendly cat who purrs as he pushes his face into your leg. It’s here I feel most myself and relaxed. The idea you can whisk yourself away from the background noise for a second, whilst still being in the arms of London is magical. This is the soul of my work.

Name: Samia's Gallery of Fine Arts
Description:
Samia's Gallery of Fine Arts is the official representatives of the French artist Jacques Bezdikian since 2012.

http://bezdikian.am/

Encouraged by Pablo Picasso himself to have his first exhibition in Paris during his early days. Bezdikian emerged since the sixties as one of the most pronounced artists in Europe and many other parts of the world, where his art has been seen and exhibited in Paris, Italy, Switzerland, Geneva, Mosco, Brussels, Amsterdam, Vienna, Beirut, Yerevan, and Istanbul; he exhibited in New York, Los Angeles and in several cities in South America, as well as Amman, Damascus and in parts of Eastern Europe. 

In his late 70's, the French Artist and philosopher of Armenian-Lebanese origin, Bezdikian,  has been awarded the Gold Medal of the city of Paris, and a Lifelong Honorable Membership of the Academy of Arts, Science, and Literature of Paris since 1967, to mention few throughout his journey. 

Bezdikian uses his mysterious technique in painting; using his unique blend of colors he makes himself, which is a well kept secret till now, mostly made of colored crystal sand.

Please visit his website, and learn more about his life, achievements and his great art at https://www.linkedin.com/redir/general-malware-page?url=www%2ebezdikian%2eco%2ecc

Contact us, send a message for any further information.

Or visit our page on fb @ Samia's Gallery of Fine Arts

Fondée en 2014, la Galerie Valeria Cetraro représente des artistes dont la pratique se situe souvent au croisement entre plusieurs médiums et plusieurs disciplines. Les axes de recherche définis par la galerie guident les choix d’une programmation ayant comme objectif de fédérer autour de thématiques précises les différents acteurs de l’actualité artistique et du marché de l’art.

Toujours dans cette même visée la galerie organise des conférences et réalise des publications explorant les problématiques culturelles, théoriques et linguistiques de notre époque. Les expositions individuelles et collectives sont fondées sur une recherche curatoriale et certaines se déploient sur plusieurs années (“Au-delà de l’image”, 2014, 2015, 2016, “Les images manquantes”, 2018).

La galerie participe régulièrement à des foires en France et à l’étranger, parmi lesquelles, Material Art Fair 2018 (Mexico City), Drawing Now 2018 (Paris) et Art Brussels 2017 et 2018, section DISCOVERY (Bruxelles).

Implantée depuis 2014 dans le quartier parisien du Marais, à partir du 30 mars 2019 la galerie investit un nouvel espace, situé au 16 rue Caffarelli, toujours dans le 3e arrondissement de Paris. La galerie Valeria Cetraro est membre du CPGA (Comité Porfessionnel des Galeries d’art).

Name: Catskill Art Space
Description: Catskill Art Space (CAS) is a nonprofit organization that brings contemporary art experiences to the Catskills and facilitates creative and professional development for established and emerging artists. Based in a newly expanded multi-arts center, our exhibitions are free, accessible, and open to the public.

Name: Fred Torres Collaborations
Description: Creative Artist Space located at 527 West 29th St. in Chelsea -

Name: Fox Audio Post-Production
Description:

Oh.. And we make high quality SFX for games, TV, movies, trailers, radio…

Name: Quagga Sculpture
Description:
Art and biology… my two passions!

Initially, it looked as if it would be really difficult to combine them, they just didn't come together.

Even as a small boy, I used to draw and make animal sculptures (nearly always horses). I used to love studying their shape and movement, and I just needed to understand their anatomy and the mechanics behind it all… I used to spend afternoons just watching them.

This interest led me to train as a biologist, and after finishing my degree, and seeing what was going on in some of the Natural History museums in Europe, I knew that was what I really wanted to do. It looked difficult to begin with because I didn't know where to begin, but I just knew that I had to make it work: I wanted to create those animal sculptures and models that I had seen. I had a lot to learn and a goal to pursue.

A few years have passed since then… Now, every commission is a new challenge; the documentation research stage, analysing the shape and movement, selecting the appropriate technique and materials, and the maximum dedication required to achieve high quality models, are the goals that drive me. 

Ramon López
Quagga Sculpture

Name: Association étudiante Verbat'EM

Civic Icon Arts was founded to  assist in fulfilling the creative vision of small and mid-sized communities  and to set the course for community pride, civic engagement, artist support, public health, and economic growth though Public Art and Creative Placemaking. Services include Public Art Project Administration, Public Art Planning, Creative Placemaking and Community Engagement, Collection Management, and Emerging Artist Practice.

Art classes involve not only unlocking the fundamental drawing skills of your child but also improving your child’s handwriting with drawing exercises, exploring the creativity and guiding the child to use his own imagination to create beautiful drawings

Name: Mastermind Vivir del Arte
Description:

¿ Te gustaría  compartir mi experiencia de más de 30 años en el mundo del Arte y la de los artistas integrantes del Mastermind? para conocer cómo funciona el mundo artístico, con información antes jamás revelada, que hace que unos estén en la cumbre y otros ni siquiera asoman la cabeza del pozo donde se encuentran, por favor ponte en contacto conmigo por aquí y muy gustoso te comento los detalles del Mastermind Vivir del Arte.
Te espero al otro lado
Francisco

Name: Galerie Art Valley
Description:
A Gallery made by and for artloving people
GALERIE ART VALLEY
Een gemoedelijke plek om kunst te komen ontdekken aan de rand van het Pajottenland.  Een glimlach, een warm onthaal, een gezellige babbel... waar de uitwisselingen de grootste rijkdommen zijn. 
Elke maand, stelt de galerie nieuwe artiesten tentoon en deelt haar "coups de coeur".   Zowel schilderijen, sculpturen, fotografie, of andere vormen van kunstwerken vinden er hun plaats. 
De galerie nodigt je eveneens uit in haar  beeldentuin waar je tijdens een verrassende ontdekkings-wandeling en dit van maart tot oktober beelden van  talrijke beeldhouwers zal kunnen bewonderen.  
Digitaal kan je een kijkje nemen op onze Galerie www.artvalley.be

Name: JJDAVIES GALLERIE
Description:
The gallery is a dealer of modern Russian oil paintings/etchings) representing renowned Moscow-based artists. We also specialise in Soviet art and have significant collection.

Commissioned requests for portraits, landscapes, custom orders and restoration of original icons are also accepted. 

The gallery additionally works with interior designers, architects and churches.

Name: Art Heads Commercial Art & Framing
Description: Art Heads, your neighborhood frame shop, serves clients throughout Portland with custom framing, picture frames, picture matting, and other picture framing services. Whether you're looking for diploma frames, wood frames, acrylic or aluminum frames, or you want a custom framed mirror, Art Heads is the only call you need to make.

Name: Chelsea Frames
Description:
Established in 1983 in New York's Chelsea neighborhood, Chelsea Frames soon distinguished itself with its unique approach to custom framing. This "neighborhood" framing company was hailed by Art Business News as being "a leading force in encouraging and supporting the art movement to Chelsea," New York's new Soho. 

Since then, Chelsea Frames has become a renowned framing studio and gallery quoted in New York Magazine as "well worth the drive into the city."

Chelsea Frames' client base includes many leading New York art galleries, movie production companies, architects and many of New York's, Los Angeles', and Miami's top interior designers. However, we continuously provide services to our loyal Chelsea clientele.

Name: Made By Lara
Description:
Made by Lara maakt abstracte schilderijen die gebruikt worden voor de bodypaint sessies en fotoshoots. 

Mijn liefde voor schilderen en fotografie hervond ik tijdens de lockdown. Het idee ontstond om het menselijke kunstwerk(lichaam) te verwerken in mijn kunstwerken. Voor mij is dit een unieke formule die mij de mogelijkheid geeft om mijn twee liefdes samen te brengen en om anderen te laten zien hoe mooi ze zijn.
 
Want hoe dankbaar mogen we zijn dat we een lichaam hebben, dat leven mogelijk maakt?!

Name: Fondation Mablé Agbodan
Description: La Fondation Mablé Agbodan a à coeur d’améliorer les conditions de vie socio-économique des jeunes et des femmes, voire la communauté à la base en générale, par la promotion des métiers des arts, du design et de l’artisanat.

Name: Austin Arts Academy
Description: We change Music, Art, and Dance lessons from rigid or boring to fun and engaging — an experience students will love! Private and group lessons are offered in Austin, TX, for a variety of instruments, art mediums, and dance styles.

Name: DanceHypha
Description: Hypha is a growing community web, mirroring the strength & decentralization found in mycelial networks. The potential of these networks is the foundation of our company; to establish connections in the dance world and form an eco-system which supports the dance artists who breathe life into it. DanceHypha supplies its members with unprecedented exposure and opportunities, while at the same time providing casting directors, producers and choreographers a tool that efficiently connects them to dancers around the world.

Name: Phillip Bowman Art
Description: Phillip Bowman’s work reflects his preferences for prominent color and for visual freedom over adhering to rigid technical skill. Throughout the last few decades, his approach to the canvas has ranged from classical to cartoon-like; earlier works are characterized by the use of dark colors and thicker lines, giving way to vibrant colors and minimized lines in later works.

Name: Academy of Realist Art Toronto
Description:
The Academy of Realist Art (ARA) is an ARC (Art Renewal Center) certified institution that offers a unique teaching environment where students learn classical drawing and painting skills based on 19th-century European atelier techniques. We have achieved international success in helping artists of all levels achieve their goals.

The ARA approach is designed to strengthen a student’s understanding of how the masters created their own works. These principles provide the academic foundation for the beginner and experienced artists alike to gain proficiency in any artistic pursuit of their choosing.

Students can join us for one of our workshops taught by our instructors. We offer individualized feedback to suit all skill levels. Students will further their insight into the areas of life drawing, portrait, cast, and still life. In addition, ARA hosts sessions with guest lecturers covering a variety of subject matter throughout the year.

We can address the needs of students with any amount of experience. No portfolio or previous experience is required.

Name: Art Academy Ireland
Description: Art classes in Rathmines and Ranelagh taught by artist Sheila Flaherty.

Name: Fondation Regards de Provence
Description:
La Fondation Regards de Provence organise des expositions temporaires d'arts plastiques au Palais des Arts, cours Julien, depuis 1998 à Marseille.
Sa mission est de valoriser et développer le patrimoine artistique de Marseille, la Provence et la Méditerranée du XVIII° siècle à nos jours.  Elle organise des concours de création artistique qui révèlent de nouveaux talents.
Son intention est de rendre la culture accessible à tout public et sa mission sociale est de regrouper des adolescents déficients et des adolescents valides pour leur offrir des visites commentées de ses expositions et des ateliers de création artistique en binome.
Elle présente à partir du 4 février 2011 sa 38° exposition sur Félix ZIEM.

Name: Mathaf Gallery Limited
Description: The Mathaf Gallery in London sepcialises in 19th Century paintings of Arabia. The gallery also represents contemporary artists, ‘the modern Orientalists’ who either live or travel in the Middle East. With a carefully selected stock of oils and watercolours, the Mathaf is the only gallery to specialise exclusively in this genre. After 40 years of specialization we have a wealth of knowledge for assisting with the purchase, sale and valuation of Orientalist paintings. Through its team of artists, the Mathaf will also undertake commissioned work in portraits, equestrian, falconry and historical reconstructions.

Name: ARTmeetsTECH
Description:
Musimy mierzyć się z niespotykaną dotychczas skalą zmian i wyzwań, których źródła tkwią zarówno w okolicznościach niezależnych od człowieka, jak i takich, które stworzyliśmy sami. W tym kontekście bardzo wiele mówi się o budowaniu kultury innowacji: w biznesie, organizacjach, przedsiębiorstwach.
A co z innowacjami w kulturze? 

Jak wygląda przyszłość sztuki w dobie ciągle rozwijających się technologii? Jakie nowoczesne środki wyrazu wykorzystają artyści? Czy publiczność jest już gotowa, by przyjmować sztukę w nowej formie? Jak do postępujących zmian odnoszą się instytucje kultury? Czy są już przygotowane do edukowania kolejnych pokoleń odbiorców kultury? Czym mogą zbudować zainteresowanie w świecie tak mocno już zakorzenionym w cyfryzacji? Czy kończy się epoka dzieł sztuki, które są fizycznymi obiektami? Czy tokenizacja i NFT jest otwarciem nowego rozdziału dla rynku sztuki? 

Głównym celem ARTmeetsTECH jest stworzenie społeczności osób zainteresowanych innowacjami w kulturze, w szczególności rynkiem sztuki NFT. Na organizowanej przez nas konferencji chcemy stworzyć przestrzeń wymiany poglądów, doświadczeń i wiedzy oraz kreatywnych dyskusji. Chcemy połączyć artystów, kuratorów, przedstawicieli rynku sztuki, biznesu i technologii, publicznych i prywatnych instytucji kultury, kolekcjonerów. Wszystkich tych, którym kultura i sztuka jest szczególnie bliska i z ciekawością patrzą, dokąd zmierza sztuka przyszłości.

Name: Art Underground
Description:
Art Underground (est. 2014) is a platform for contemporary visual art practice and projects, showcasing cutting-edge
programs expressed through painting, sculpture, installation, and new media. The gallery inspires ingenuity, curiosity, and
innovation, creating dialogs through the experience of contemporary art and its disciplines, which lead to regional, national,
and international impact.

Art Underground presents an opportunity to its roster of artists to showcase on a premier stage, locally and internationally,
through consistent participation in notable art fairs such as Art Fair Philippines, Art Fair Tokyo, Art Central Hong Kong,
Art Kaohsiung, and the KIAF (Korean International Art Fair) Art Seoul.

Focusing both on discovering and providing new opportunities for young and emerging artists, as well as promoting and
advancing established ones, the gallery aims at foregrounding the current commentaries in the field. Art Underground
celebrates the extraordinary creativity of artists whose works reflect the Filipino experience and its potential global
influence
Location: San Juan City, National Capital Region

Name: Henry On Pop Art
Description:
Buying art or becoming an art collector can be an intimidating experience and we will be here to guide you. Henry on Pop Art is the best source for Blue Chip Pop and Contemporary Art... having an experienced Art Dealer assist you is essential to being successful in buying collectible works of art that match your vision and your investment with intelligence and finesse.

Andy Warhol, Roy Lichtenstein, Keith Haring, Robert Longo, Jean-Michel Basquiat and other Pop Artist's limited edition prints. We ensure your art buying experience is conducted with absolute discretion, privacy and trust.

Name: Gliubich Casa d'Aste
Description: Dall'antiquariato all'arte contemporanea, la prima casa d'aste de L'Aquila.

Name: Club Japonais ENSIAS
Description: Les connaissances d’un futur ingénieur n’étant pas limitées aux compétences techniques et managériales, le club japonais de l’ENSIAS vise à créer pour ses membres un cadre adéquat pour l’enseignement de la langue japonaise et du rapprochement à la culture nippone. Le Japon étant un pays où les technologies de l’information prédominent et interfèrent avec la culture, l’intégration de son expansion culturelle dans une école d’ingénierie spécialisée en informatique ne peut qu’être bénéfique pour les membres du club.

Name: Boven's Auctioneers Gallery Veiling
Description: Bovens auctioneers holds 4 times a year sales of art and antiques. These sales come with illustrated catalogues that are downloadable from the website, www.bovens.biz. All auctions are internet based, live or timed. The sales are hosted by www.invaluable.com and one can register there for free. Apart from the auction side of the company I also act as an artdealer form the address Elandsgracht 109 A30 in Amsterdam. For insurance or inheritance purposes I do valuations which are commisioned by public notaries, insurance companies and banks.

Name: Theodore Psychoyos Studio
Description:
Born in Boston, MA, to Greek parents, Psychoyos grew up between Paris, Greece, and England. Known for his large-scale ink drawings and murals, he is an artist who is constantly exploring new means of expression, with his output including music, sculpture, and painting. The collection RAW is the artist’s first excursion into the world of functional objects, and as such it reveals a new aspect of his creative inquiry and sensibility.

He studied piano before attaining a law degree at Sorbonne University while concurrently studying sculpture at the National School of Fine Arts in Paris. His work has been hosted most notably by Romeo Gigli at Salon de Mobile Milan in 2001, at the Blackblock of Palais de Tokyo in 2010, at AMP, Athens 2010, Atopos, Benaki Museum, 2011, at “No Respect” Onassis Cultural Center Athens 2014, at « Boite Noire » Pacific Design Center LA, 2017, Molonglo with who Psychoyos was awarded the Australian Price for Art in Architecture 2011 for his 19 floors mural at New Acton , Canberra.

Name: L'art de faire
Description: L’art de faire est une exposition d’art en plein air organisée tous les étés, le premier week-end de juillet. L’exposition s’appuie sur un modèle fort qui consiste à sortir l’art et les savoir-faire des lieux d’expositions traditionnels pour aller à la rencontre du public.

Name: Galeria sztuki Vivid Gallery

Name: Love 4 Immigrants
Description: Love 4 Immigrants is a social space for immigrants’ support. It aims to connect immigrants to their communities, as respected, loved, and heard individuals by sharing their narrative through art and storytelling.

Name: Street Art Festival z.s.
Description:
Od graffiti ke street artu, ode zdi ke zdi.

Olomouc, Hradec Králové a okolí oživujeme street artem už od roku 2007. Za tu dobu jsme realizovali desítky velkoplošných maleb, přednášek a představili v akci mezinárodní hvězdy street artu jako jsou Mr. Dheo, ZZRock, Wild_Drawing, ParizOne nebo Chemise.
 
Jsme víc než festival.
 
Jsme umělci a jsme nezisková organizace. Podporujeme zdejší komunitu, mladé umělce, kulturu a turismus. Ocenili jste nás za největší přínos kultuře v Olomouckém kraji za rok 2018 a my vám za to děkujeme.

Name: John B. Aird Gallery
Description: A public, not for profit art gallery focusing on art works by emerging and professional contemporary artists.

Name: opheliecordier.art
Description: Mon art est au service de l'Océan

Name: CAR ART, INC.
Description:
CAR ART, INC. : The World's Finest Automotive Art.
CarArt.us the Internet's biggest automotive art gallery: a one-stop shop for 1,300 artworks by 75 of the world's greatest automotive artists.  Our range includes original paintings, signed, limited-edition prints, posters and sculptures. Over 500 models from 130 marques—European sports and racing to American muscle and classics—are portrayed in almost every year since 1897.

Name: Collide Public Art Initiative
Description:
Collide is a public art initiative at the intersection of art and architecture. We research, design and facilitate artworks in public places, which can include temporary works, residency-based research, exhibitions, events and even large-scale permanent works created in collaboration with governments, developers and architects. 
In this unique position, we are able to act as an intersection for artists and commissioners to collide, create and collaborate.

Name: Sahab for Art | سحاب للفنون
Description: Sahab is an NGO that founded by 5 talented people from different backgrounds related to the arts. We are developing our local community and supporting young artistic talents through workshops, exhibitions and other artistic activities in Libya. We also work to provide the supplies that young people need in order to make their art.

Name: Festival 7ème Lune
Description:
Depuis sa création en 2014, 7ème Lune, Festival International des jeunes cinéastes, n’a cessé de défendre et imposer sa ligne directrice : faire émerger de jeunes talents, le cinéma de demain en somme.

Impulsé par une équipe jeune et dynamique, le festival s’efforce à offrir une liberté d’expression artistique totale aux cinéastes avec une sélection exigeante et audacieuse.

Quelle que soit l’économie du film, son origine ou son genre, l’idée est de proposer nos sélections éclectiques et restreintes des meilleurs courts et longs métrages du monde entier de réalisateurs.ices agés.es de 30 ans maximum, parmi les plus de 5000 films reçus chaque année.

Nous offrons également la possibilité aux auteurs de présenter leurs œuvres à un jury toujours plus qualitatif et éclectique chaque année (Claire Denis, Alain Guiraudie, Arnaud Desplechin, Nabil Ayouch, Kim Chapiron, Rebecca Zlotowski, Cédric Klapisch, Guillaume Brac, Jérémie Elkaïm, Félix Moati, Anaïs Demoustier, Marie Gillain, Damien Manivel, …).

www.7emeLune.com

Name: Bureau des Arts et de la Culture de Polytech Sorbonne
Description:
Le Bureau des Arts et de la Culture (BDAC) est un club de l’école d’ingénieur Polytech Sorbonne à Paris dont la mission est d'apporter une dimension artistique et culturelle à la vie étudiante !

Le BDAC est composé de 8 pôles axés sur différentes activités artistiques :
- L’Atelier créatif encourage à la création manuelle sur des thèmes, techniques et supports différents,
- Le pôle Reportages immortalise les événements de l’école en images,
- Le pôle Courts-métrages réalise courts et moyens métrages partagés sur la chaîne YouTube du BDAC,
- Les Sorties culturelles sur Paris et ses alentours ont lieu dans des musées, théâtres et bien plus,
- Le pôle Concours fait se surpasser les étudiants sur l'écriture, le dessin, la photo mais aussi l'éloquence,
- L’Atelier oratoire organise justement des séances de préparation au concours d’éloquence,
- La Gazette traite de thèmes variés et des actualités de la vie associative de l’école,
- Le pôle Théâtre vous offrira des représentations durant toute l'année.
 
La rentrée 2020 sera riche en nouveautés ! Trois projets verront le jour :
- Le pôle Photographie vous proposera des séances photo dans Paris,
- L’Atelier littéraire vous permettra d’échanger, découvrir et jouer autour de la littérature,
- Le JTech, journal télévisé de l’école en partenariat avec In Vivo, vous rapportera toutes les actualités du moment.

Name: Myta Sayo Gallery
Description:
Myta Sayo Gallery (formerly reference: contemporary) is a Toronto-based gallery that champions artists focusing on abstract painting and sculpture. 
Founded by Maita Sayo in 2015, the gallery is dedicated to being an approachable place to start collecting art. Our online store offers accessibly-priced works by mid-career and emerging artists. Our consultancy arm provides advisory services for both new and seasoned collectors.

The gallery is dedicated to building an international presence for its artists and has participated in more than a dozen art fairs in New York and Miami.

Name: B Sinima
Description: Providing the finest film work regarding Directing, Cinematography, Lighting, ands Screenplay writing. Doubling as a Distribution hub and a Network for other creatives. B Sinima is your go-to for Films, Events, Collaborations, and all things in the storytelling medium.

Name: sundays in la
Description: We believe that incredible things happen when creatives from diverse thought backgrounds come together. Makers, artists, filmmakers, researchers, founders, unconventional thinkers movers, and shakers are dispersed throughout USC with few things tying them together. One thing they each share in common is that on Sundays, they're working on the things that excite them. We built a home for them to come together as a collective. To learn, grow, and pursue - together.

Name: Hamilton Craft Studios
Description: Hamilton Craft Studios is a company based out of 121 Princess Street 2nd & 3rd Floors, Hamilton, Ontario, Canada.

Name: MACTA
Description: MACTA is here to accompany our children on the journey of searching for the true meaning of life, through Creativity and Art

Name: Fritzell Guldsmide
Description: Ett smycke är ett konstverk som ska återspegla vem du är eller vem du vill vara just idag. Alla ska kunna vara precis så fina, vackra, fräcka eller coola som de önskar vara och som guldsmed är det inte bara mitt mål, utan även min dröm att kunna hjälpa dig att bli det genom att skapa ditt egna drömsmycke.

Name: Galerie SOON
Description: Die Galerie SOON wurde 2010 von Andrej Malogajski und Fabian Schmid gegründet. Inzwischen werden Galerieräume in Bern und Zürich betrieben. 2016 übernahm SOON die traditionsreiche Galerie Rigassi. Die Zusammenarbeit vom Malogajski, Schmid und Rigassi lässt vielversprechende Ausstellungen in Bern und Zürich entstehen. Die Ziele sind weiterhin das Entdecken und Präsentieren spannender KünstlerInnen mit Potenzial und der schrittweise Aufbau von neuen Künstlerkarrieren. Die optimale Betreuung von KundInnen wird mit einem eingespielten Team vollbracht und das grosse Netzwerk ermöglicht den Zugang zu Werken etablierter Kunstschaffender.

Name: Suraj Hemgude Art
Description:
We make the best artworks which will blow your mind. Get ready to see some of the best vector graphics and cartoons of yourself. We can turn you into a cartoon within 24 hours. Come and join us today. 

Our services :
Cartoon drawing 
Vector graphics

Description: Atelier School of Art and Design started its journey in 2018 and since then it has been successfully training students of different age groups in Fine Arts (Drawing, Painting, and Digital Art) and providing entry test preparation classes for different art schools in Pakistan and abroad.

Name: Quest Art School + Gallery
Description: Quest Art provides an inspiring and creative hub for all ages and skill levels in the community. As a community gallery and art school, our mission is to "Inspire, Create, Explore and Innovate" and to reach as many community members as possible. We are an open, friendly and a comfortable space for everyone from beginners to professional artists and are proud to offer the space and resources to enable all demographics to create at their own pace and comfort level.

Name: Atkinson Collection Gallery
Description: Established in 2014, the Atkinson Collection Gallery boasts an extensive collection of fine art from local, national and international professional artists.  Offering original fine art and sculptures at fair and honest prices.

Name: Oathfeed
Description: Oathfeed is Silvi Simberg's multidisciplinary atelier and small independent publisher.

Name: Aabru Art
Description:
Aabru Art is a London based firm focused on sourcing, marketing and distributing West African contemporary art to the international buyer. 

We work in partnership with artists, help build private and corporate collections and consult with curators and collectors all over the world.

We aim to raise awareness and understanding of West African contemporary art in the international market and educate investors and collectors of the potential investment opportunity that exists in that space

Name: Willstone Management Ltd
Description: Willstone Management is a boutique art investment firm, founded by Olyvia Kwok.  We offer bespoke advice and services to clients, whether they are seeking to build a collection or diversify their portfolio by investing in art.  Our in depth art market knowledge and extensive global network enable us to provide clients with expert perspectives to help them make decisions with confidence.

Name: Musical & Theaterschool La TalenTia - van 8 tot 21 jaar
Description: In mei 2009 zijn wij gestart met onze geheel eigentijdse Musical & Theaterschool in Deventer, gericht op kinderen in de leeftijdscategorie van 8 tot 18 jaar. Onder het motto "Lekker Los, Lekker anders" gaan wij er vanuit dat ieder kind een talent bezit en met behulp van onze vakdocenten proberen wij deze te laten ontwaken en verder uit te bouwen. Onze leerlingen krijgen ondersteuning in hun persoonlijke ontwikkeling. Het is heel belangrijk dat gaandeweg het lesseizoen het zelfbewustzijn en zelfvertrouwen van de leerling groeit. Wij bieden de leerlingen een veilige omgeving waardoor zij steeds meer durven en het dus ook aan durven om fouten te maken binnen het groepsproces.

Name: Gormleys Auctions
Description:

No set of events will be the same – meet artists from different industries at our interactive and educational sessions that will leave you with lasting connections. We are a team of art advisors with over 10 years of experience in the international arts sector with a serious desire to share our passion and knowledge of visual arts. Name: Neoprisme
Description:
À l’heure où les mondanités sociales et contemporaines ont remis l’achat du vinyle au centre des préoccupations conscientes des passionnés de musique en tous genres, l’équipe de Néoprisme se propose de considérer avec un regard innovant le statut de la pochette d’album, en lui redonnant la posture qu’elle mérite : celui d'une véritable œuvre d’art à étudier et à questionner en tant que tel. 

De la même manière que se construit une chronique classique d’album, l’équipe de Néoprisme, fort de son expérience dans les domaines du journalisme web, de la musique et dans celui de l’art, se propose de mettre sur pied la « chronique de pochette », et de télescoper ainsi dans une cacophonie logique l’étude de l’image et de la musique.

Name: Muzaïek
Description:
Wij organiseren een mozaïek aan activiteiten waarbij we kleuters, kinderen, jongeren en volwassenen met kunst en cultuur laten kennismaken. Alle muzische vaardigheden komen daarbij aan bod: muziek, beeld, beweging, drama, media en spel. Dit alles gebeurt telkens op een heel eenvoudige, speelse en creatieve manier om zo sfeer & plezier binnen de groep te bevorderen.

Bij elk initiatief stimuleren we de creativiteit van elk individu en zetten we aan tot mee creëren en ontwerpen. We vinden het daarbij belangrijk dat iedereen zijn eigen inbreng leert afstemmen op de groep en het grotere geheel. Daarom focussen we in onze activiteiten ook op het aanleren van sociale vaardigheden en leren samenwerken in groep.

Whether you have a small sampler, historic costume or a large tapestry, we can work with you to preserve your historic textile.

Name: A.P./Studio
Description:
Artist Proof Studio is a team of curators and creatives passionate about art and how it can tell a story for brands and businesses in our hybrid lives.

Collabs / Emerging technology & WEB3 / Storytelling / Art - architectural - integrations

_

As a creative partner we conceptualise, consult, curate and develop meaningful and innovative artistic projects for public spaces, architectural integrations, events, private organisations and brands. We bridge business and artistic objectives.

The studio is backed by a long history in artistic ventures and gallery expertise so we know the do’s, don’ts and the essential sensitivities best. 

We know how to relate to artists and their practice and we seek real and sustainable business objectives for our clients. 

A.P./Studio acts as an intermediaire between artists and commissioned projects to create the best results for both.

Building further on our creative scope we recently have set an extra focus on offering advice on the emerging possibilities of blockchain technology (NFTs) for creative practices and help artists and galleries advance their work and ideas in the space of web3.

The A.P./Studio evolved organically out of different projects over the past years. Now its independent growth is supported by the Art Venture ‘Sharing Art’ which also provides support to galleries like ‘Gallery Sofie Van de Velde’, ‘PLUS-ONE Gallery’, ’The Wunderwall’ and various partners within the artistic field.

Name: ErbK Gallery
Description: Située au cœur de Paris, dans le quartier historique de Saint-Germain-des-Prés, la galerie ErbK a pour vocation de soutenir la création urbaine sous toutes ses formes. Elle accompagne ainsi de nombreux artistes, émergents comme confirmés, avec un programme riche en expositions.

Name: NIFOR
Description: Nifor is a platform that enables artists give more value to their art by providing them with a space to create, document and showcase their work.

Name: Umpqua Valley Arts Association
Description:
Umpqua Valley Arts (UVA) is a cultural organization in the heart of the rural Umpqua Valley. Supporting regional art and artists, UVA provides the community with opportunities to receive quality education in lasting techniques and share their work with others. Our campus houses six gallery spaces, separate clay and multimedia studios, and a gift shop featuring local handcrafted items.

UVA is a community organization that operates with a mission to create and foster a climate that supports arts appreciation, participation, and education. The generous support of those it serves through annual membership, individual donations, business sponsorships, program fees, and public and private grants, is what keeps UVA’s vibrant program alive.

Name: Menulis, Artiste peintre Muraliste Marsas en Haute Gironde - St André de Cubzac
Description:
Artiste engagée au quotidien, j’interviens en tant que professeure d’aquarelle en Gironde, sur le secteur du Grand Cubzaguais. Je travail principalement avec les enfants lors d’ateliers créatifs donnés à domicile, en centre de loisirs mais aussi dans les écoles. De l’illustration éditoriale, en passant par le design graphique ainsi que les peintures murales artistiques, je te propose un monde doux et fantaisiste. N’attends plus pour ajouter de la couleur dans ta vie !

Grande optimiste, j’essaie de mettre du sens dans mon travail et de  préserver Mère nature. Tu trouveras, sur ma boutique en ligne, des illustrations à l’aquarelle ainsi que du digital. Le tout fabriqué artisanalement, dans mon petit atelier avec des matériaux responsables.

Le secret de mes créations ? Un peu de magie, beaucoup d'amour, une pincée de rêves, le tout saupoudré d'émotions…

Ma Mission
Ma principale mission est de diffuser et transmettre de l'amour et d'adoucir le quotidien tout en respectant la nature et le vivant. Par mes créations, je t'offre une fenêtre sur son monde imaginaire, un endroit doux, hors du temps, poétique et magique. Viens ressentir, t'envelopper de ses émotions !

Mes Services
Menulis t’accompagne dans chacun de tes projets créatifs en mettant son savoir-faire au service de ton idée.

- Illustration éditoriale, presse, publicité
- Fresque murale & peinture artistique
- Communication visuelle & graphisme
- Cours créatifs & Interventions

Pour qui ? Toutes les disciplines des arts de la scène.

Name: Naive Art Online
Description:
Naive Art Online sells paintings from the most talented naive artists from around the world.
Naive art presents the world through the purity of a child. It evokes appreciation and wonder of happiness, community, and beauty. The paintings help us reconnect with the simple joys and innocent love of the better angels of our nature.
We hope you love these works of art as much as we do.

Name: Léptica editorial
Description:
Léptica es una comunidad on-line que pretende ser una plataforma en la que todos podamos expresarnos libremente, por eso invitamos a participar a todos esos creadores que no encuentran soportes donde dar a conocer su obra. Queremos investigar, experimentar, crear y que los lectores lo hagan con nosotros, todo bajo el formato creative commons. La columna vertebral de todo esto es la obsesión (de crear, de sentir, de mirar…), para Léptica la obsesión es la “idea que con tenaz persistencia asalta la mente”, de este modo nos deshacemos de los significados negativos que conlleva esta palabra y le damos un significado más amplio, creando nuestra propia comunidad de obsesivos. Nuestra obsesión crecerá cada mes en torno a un tema, concepto o idea que exprimiremos desde las distintas secciones de la revista siempre con un punto de vista personal. 

 En definitiva para Léptica la cultura es todo aquello que fluye a nuestro alrededor , lo que propone es alejarse del asentimiento incondicional y profundizar en el porqué de las cosas y sus consecuencias. Queremos llegar a ser un referente en el que imperan el renacimiento creativo, el entusiasmo y la libertad de creación, todo ello aderezado con talento.

 La palabra “Léptica” surgió un poco por azar y otro poco por constancia, como casi todo, en una de nuestras reuniones para ver cómo gestábamos todo esto. Viene de organoléptico: “propiedad de un cuerpo que se percibe por los sentidos”. Nosotros lo vemos como un modo de filtrar y absorber todos los estímulos que recibimos del exterior, interpretándolos desde nuestros sentidos y creando a través de ellos.

Name: L.A. CLINE Fine Art
Description:
The unique versatility allows L.A. CLINE to  to explore many settings and render beautiful commissioned paintings for fine art collectors professional use nationwide. 

Pastel painting is a difficult medium to control and only the most refined, experienced professional fine artists are able to effectively manage this type of artwork and create life-like, realistic renderings for the art world. L.A. CLINE masterfully creates each pastel painting with much time and dedication. Each painting is backed with research and a story to fully recreate that special occurrence as a memory for a lifetime.

Name: Mandelli Arte
Description:
Mandelli Arte was founded in 2001 as a regular private gallery, based nearby beautiful Milan. Sergio and Thao have always been  known for their vocation to discover new talents and to promote established artists.
Against the sectoral ideas, over its ten years of life, Mandelli Arte has presented artists from a wide variety of artistic languages.

After ten-year commitment to the exhibition activity, Mandelli Arte realizes that the art market has changed dramatically and that Internet plays a dominant role in society. Mandelliarte thus decides to give life to a project with an international dimension, titled: “Pralines. Deliciousness from the World of Art” and to create an online art gallery, to reach a wider public.

Name: Pontificia Accademia dei Virtuosi al Pantheon
Description:
L’Accademia dei Virtuosi al Pantheon è stata fondata nel 1541 dal monaco cistercense Desiderio D’Adiutorio, con la volontà di dare vita ad «una confraternita di huominj excellentissimi tanto in Architettura, scoltura, et pittura, quanto in ogni altro exercitio degno di altri ingegni, parendoli conveniente, che come il Tempio detto (Pantheon) è mirabile al juditio di ogni savio, […], così vi fusse una Confraternita di huomini rarissimj et prestantissimi, quali appresso alla bellezza di detto Tempio, fussino in veneratione a tutti quelli, et Romani et forestieri, che venissino a vedere, et pigliarsi piacere di detto Tempio». L’eccezionalità del sodalizio consiste nell’essere il più artistico tra i sodalizi religiosi per la sua composizione e il più religioso fra quelli artistici.
Sin dagli esordi, la Congregazione ottiene in giuspatronato la cappella intitolata a San Giuseppe, la prima a sinistra all’interno del Pantheon, per dare una collocazione degna alle “venerande reliquie”, cioè alle porzioni di terra che Desiderio porta con sé da due viaggi a Gerusalemme. . Nel 1546 la Compagnia ottiene l’accesso ad un piccolo oratorio che diventa il luogo principale delle riunioni. Solo nel 1838, grazie ad un rescritto del Cardinale Agostino Rivarola, viene concesso l’utilizzo del cosiddetto attico del Pantheon, dove oggi si conserva la collezione.
La Congregazione diventa Pontificia nel 1861 e solo nel 1928 Pio XI, su proposta del cardinale Pietro Gasparri, la eleva al rango di Accademia, che passa a chiamarsi Pontificia Insigne Accademia Artistica dei Virtuosi. La denominazione attuale, Pontificia Insigne Accademia di Belle Arti e Lettere dei Virtuosi al Pantheon, deriva dalla riforma dell’ultimo statuto del 1995.

Name: Rising Voices Arts Community
Description:
MISSION
We are an inclusive and affirming arts community that welcomes all and intentionally empowers disenfranchised, underrepresented, marginalized, and underserved communities by teaching students to find and amplify their voices through theatre and the arts.  

VISION
We provide a self-sufficient and enduring community that prepares students to use their voices to navigate an unknown and challenging future. 

We address the challenging issues relevant to our students and communities, providing a space that allows respectful discourse through art, even when that discourse is difficult.

DIVERSITY STATEMENT
We believe there is strength in diversity; therefore, we reject discrimination of any kind. We actively affirm and include all people in our community. 

Diversity is represented throughout all areas of our organization, including our staff and board members. 

We do not engage in typecasting, including but not limited to sexual orientation, gender identity, and ethnicity.

We select plays written by and representing diverse perspectives.

We intentionally select plays that reflect our current student population.

Name: The Directed Art Modern
Description: The mission of The Directed Art Modern is to be a service to and for artists in all levels of their careers, this includes exhibitions, management, and opening doors to not only collectors, but to the public in general.  To facilitate this, The DAM is a melding of individuals from the art world – an artist, and a curator  bringing 27 years of art market experience and by combining these  aspects The DAM is able to cover a myriad of topics relating to the career of the artist.  With this combination  The DAM is able to not only encourage the artist but  is  also able to negotiate terms for the artist and navigate the labyrinth of today’s modern art market seeking the best opportunities for the artist to move forward in his/her career, thus leaving the artist to be concerned with nothing but his/her artistic vision.  With the ever increasing prices of exhibiting in the modern art market The DAM believes that the art market should be taken back from the vanity trend and returned to the realm of reward for one’s creativity – to do this  The DAM will explore not only traditional modes of exhibition, but also innovative locations. Lastly, The DAM’s entire modus operandi is to protect art, the artist, to keep them in the realm of their art and vision, to keep the artist away from the tag of being a money making entity – to keep art for art’s sake.

Name: Barrett Art Center / Dutchess County Art Association
Description: Working with curators from around the globe, Barrett Art Center brings exemplary contemporary art from international artists to its exhibitions in the Hudson Valley. Always free and open to the public, Barrett Art Center’s arts programming engages and supports our diverse community.

Name: Mirat
Description:
Founded in 2015 by Ricardo Mirat in Madrid, Mirat showcases modern, postwar and contemporary artists.

Occupying the space of a former cow barn in the Almagro neighbourhood in Madrid, the gallery is focused on the reflection on contemporary aesthetic in dialogue with its historical roots. The gallery program stands out for historical surveys connecting subjects, techniques and artists across time, and spotlight exhibitions on contemporary artists from all over the world, with a special interest in the deviations from the current canon.  

By proposing unexpected connections between artists across time the gallery aims to contribute to the global conversation on the nature of art, its past challenges and current questions.

Name: Peter Lewis Gallery
Description:
Fine Art Gallery located at 5 Church Hill in beautiful St. John's, Newfoundland. Located in a mid 19th century Historical Home it boasts three floors of beautifully displayed fine art. 
Contact Curator JJ Allwood at jjallwood@peterlewisgallery.com or call 709-722-6009 for more information. Please check out the art online at www.peterlewisgallery.com

Name: South Mississippi Art Association (SMAA)
Description: South Mississippi Art Association (SMAA) is a 501(c)(3) non-profit association of artists founded in 1964 in Hattiesburg, Mississippi, United States. We have ongoing adult sculpture, adult pottery and adult watercolor classes weekly. We accept adult artists of all skill levels from hobbyist to professional, but previous experience is recommended. In our classes, artists paint on their own at their own pace and instructors are available for questions. To become a member of SMAA, visit our website and click on the "Join" tab.

Name: artgogo 艺高高
Description: Artgogo is a dynamic art & communication institution in China with locations in Shanghai and Beijing. We are founded in 2014 by CT CAO (曹啓泰), and continue today in the endeavor to promote contemporary art in China and abroad

Name: Antieau Gallery
Description: Established in 2010, Antieau Gallery showcases the work of internationally recognized fabric-appliqué artist Chris Roberts-Antieau.

Name: Santa Monica Art Studios & ARENA 1 Gallery
Description:
Artist Studios, Gallery & Art Center. 

Santa Monica Art Studios is one of the largest private art centers in California, combining studios, lectures and galleries under one roof and has hosted 500 events to date. It consists of 36 artists studios, two Hangar Galleries and the Arena 1 Gallery.

Name: Castle Arts
Description:
At Castle Arts our mission is to inspire artistic growth and learning in our students. We prioritize the fundamental principles of art and encourage students to explore their imaginations and create unique, innovative works that reflect their personal narratives and connections to the world.



The classes offered by Castle Arts include group and mixed-level courses, taught by teachers who hold degrees in the arts and have extensive experience working with children of all ages. All of Castle Arts' teachers are currently practicing artists or current teachers in the Ontario School Board.



Our curriculum focuses on developing students' artistic techniques and nurturing their creativity through a variety of drawing and painting projects. Additionally, students have the opportunity to experiment with new mediums, such as sculpture and craft projects, during holiday art projects.



Alongside our standard classes, we provide art camps, workshops, and opportunities to exhibit artwork outside of the facility, creating a community-building environment.

Our ultimate goal is to help our students enhance their artistic techniques and foster their creative skills, ultimately leading to a confident and positive outlook towards visual arts!

Name: STV Cuculum
Description: Wij zijn de enige onafhankelijke studententoneelvereniging in Leiden. Dé vereniging in Leiden, waarin theater perfect met gezelligheid gecombineerd wordt! Bij ons dus ook geen ontgroeningen en onnodige verplichtingen, maar wel voor 100% het plezier van een studentenvereniging!

Name: Montreux Art Gallery
Description: Le Montreux Art Gallery, est le deuxième plus grand salon d'art contemporain en Suisse, regroupant plus de 50 Galeries et 60 Artistes. Il a lieu chaque année au mois de Novembre au 2m2c de Montreux. Cette année 2014 marque les 10 ans de cet événement riche en couleurs et en émotions

Name: Zona L Galeria
Description:
Zona L Galería es un espacio de carácter dinámico que nació desde el punto de vista de un artista plástico con el fin de promover diferentes actividades.

Zona L Galería pretende realizar enfoques curatoriales que sean punto de partida para amplificar el espectro cultural que abarque a toda la comunidad creativa [artistas plásticos, empíricos, dibujantes, ilustradores, diseñadores, arquitectos, escultores, artistas urbanos, etc].

ALQUILER DE ESPACIOS
Zona L Galería cuenta con un espacio de 110m2, para exhibir proyectos culturales, pedagógicos, de diseño y de arte, que se puede usar de forma única o en divisiones según la exigencia y se van programando de acuerdo a cronograma. Como atributos principales, Zona L Galería cuenta con sistema de riel, iluminación natural, iluminación en LED y sinfín fotográfico.

CONVOCATORIAS
Zona L Galería realiza convocatorias para artistas con el fin de exhibir exposiciones de arte, toda la información se publica en medios sociales, la entrega de portafolios y propuestas se debe hacer de forma personal o vía email y el grupo directivo es quién realiza la selección de expositores a través de un estudio.

CURSOS LIBRES
Zona L Galería invita a la comunidad a tomar cursos libres de pintura [acuarela, óleo, acrílico] y de dibujo [lápiz, carboncillo, sanguina]. Están dirigidos a personas de cualquier edad y nivel de formación, ya que el propósito es desarrollar y fortalecer el talento artístico en función de sus logros e intereses.

Name: Flowesie Agency
Description:
Une idée = une réalisation.

> Comprendre les usagers.
