> Déployer la solution.

Il suffit d’observer les idées innovantes qui ont séduit un public exponentiel :

le covoiturage blablacar, les Allo resto, les Wonderbox, qui se sont éparpillés et bien sûr ces idées répondent à un besoin qui correspond à l’économie, au développement durable et au plaisir.

Name: Arcadja Auction Results
Description: For over twenty years, Arcadja has been collecting and organizing auction results from auction houses around the world, offering a unique database for art professionals and art lovers.

Name: Govt. College Of Art & Design Aurangabad
Description:
The institute very soon grew into a full-fledged art College and today conducts specialized B.F.A. Degree Courses in Painting, Applied Art & Textile Design. Art Teachers Diploma & about 350 students are receiving art education under the able guidance of about 25 most efficient and expert art teachers. The College has its own adequate library along with the most up-to-date facilities in departments like the computer Lab, Animation Studio, Photography, Screen Printing, and Printmaking Department. The College has been affiliated with Dr.Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University, Aurangabad and Degree Courses in (1) painting and (2) Applied Art have been introduced since 1981 & Textile Design Degree Course has been introduced in 2011. Above all courses except Art Teachers Diploma Course are approved by All India Council for Technical Education, New Delhi. During the period of last 41 years number of students from this College have been awarded prizes and honored in many Exhibitions at State & National level. The staff members of the College are also very active in the field of art and have been participating and winning awards and honors in major art exhibitions at the state, National & International levels. Today the Art College is forging ahead with its short but prosperous background for its mission. This Institute is affiliated with Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University, Aurangabad.

Marathwada region has a very rich and glorious background of Art and literature since the golden age of Gupta Empire, Marathwada can very rightly be called the land of Art culture as it is the land which proudly possesses the World's famous monuments of Art like AJANTA and ELLORA. It was here that great saint like Dnyaneswar was inspired to write commentary of Bhagwat Geeta which is known as DNYANESHWARI. This was the land where great Empires came in existence and made history.

Name: Journal d'un anosmique
Description:
Association gathering an olfactive blog and an editing house.
- Original performances and olfactive experiences with artists. 
- Creation of books around the world of olfaction

Four people are part of the adventure: an editor, a fragrance evaluator, an artistic director and a grafts.
And many artists are joining the boat time to time for specific occasions or books.

Name: Miami House of Creative Arts LLC
Description:
Miami House of Creative Arts LLC (Miami HofCA) was founded in 2022 with the intent to design a musical education that feels the way home should feel like, no matter the location. 

We understand the music industry can be rather competitive. Our priority is to provide high quality instruction and equip students with the necessary tools to succeed, while also instilling a love for music that overcomes the boundaries we set on one another and on ourselves as human beings. We believe in our students and want them to not only grow professionally, but also to learn to believe in themselves. 

We offer music lessons and music therapy services in piano, guitar, voice, cello, percussion, trombone and trumpet, in the areas of South Miami, Coral Gables, Coconut Grove, and Pinecrest. Our teachers are hand picked by us and highly qualified with university degrees specializing in the field they lead.

We take a holistic approach to music education, looking at the whole individual rather than just their set of skills. Part of our approach when designing instruction is asset-based, focusing on what the student can do and building on those strengths so that they can feel confident and reach their full potential. We take a child-centered approach and encourage students to become agents of their own learning, while providing the guidance and professional support they need. 

Visit our website to learn more. We are open for registration and hiring!

Name: Trade Art Gallery
Description:
Trade Art Gallery is a contemporary art gallery based in Milan in Via Ramazzini 6. The aim of this gallery is to promote national and international artists. 
Trade Art Gallery focuses on passion for contemporary art, we listen to our client’s needs and desires working relentlessly to satisfy both, while maintaining the highest level of customer service.
Trade Art Gallery has access to different works of art including painting, sculpture and original prints.
Mauro, that is the director of this amazing gallery, prefers to work with emerging artists to have the possibility to deal with something original and exclusive.
We are present at national and international events, fairs and exhibition like Art Bahrain in 2015, Private charity event in 2016, World Art Dubai in 2017 and Art Bahrain in 2018.
Ph. +39 02 84965958

Name: Disorient
Description:
Disorient is a sound, visual and performance art collective. We create art projects and art installations with hardware including wood, scaffolding, palette rack, containers, recycled materials, your body, geodesic domes, inflatable structures, video, repurposed objects, black lights, vehicles and beyond. 

We develop software for our installations (DMX sequencing, MAX, Java, C, etc.). Our guiding principles are outlined in the Disorient Model and in the Political Economy of Disorient. 

Disorient is active in New York, Philadelphia, San Francisco, Los Angeles, Seattle, London and Dubai, with members all over the world.

Disorient is an open creative platform powered by love.

Name: Centre D'Art Contemporani i Sostenibilitat (CACiS) El Forn de la Calç
Description:
El Centre D’art Contemporani i Sostenibilitat (CACiS) El Forn de la Calç és  una iniciativa privada sense ànim de lucre fundada a l'any 2008, que rep el suport de l'Ajuntament de Calders i la Generalitat de Catalunya. Cacis és un espai dedicat a l'experimentació, investigació  i difusió de les pràctiques artístic culturals amb la voluntat d'estimular la discussió, crítica i reflexió necessària per cercar una nova visió de la realitat, fomentant la sostenibilitat com estratègia de reforma. 

This centre devotes itself to the research, the production and the exhibition of cultural projects, including all the conceptual sides and shapes of modern art, especially those ones related to ecology and environment. We have taken into account the speacial features of this centre: the old quarry, a well preserved environment, a good relationship between environment and human activity and the singularity of the lime kilns.

El centro se dedica a la investigación, producción y exhibición de proyectos de cultura y arte contemporáneo en todas sus vertientes conceptuales y formales, especialmente las relacionadas con la ecología y el medio natural; teniendo muy en cuenta las características físicas del lugar: la antigua cantera, un medio natural bien conservado, una buena relación entre medio natural y actividad humana, especialmente la singularidad de los hornos de cal: elementos característicos y específicos de este centro.

Name: Axárquica Espacio Creativo
Description:
Axárquica es un espacio creativo proyectado para la enseñanza, producción y divulgación cultural en y desde la Axarquía malagueña, con sede en Vélez-Málaga. 

Taller de producción artística especializado en técnicas de grabado y estampación artesanales y contemporáneas.

Nuestro espacio es inclusivo y accesible, diseñado para acoger a todas las personas, y potenciar su capacidad creativa y su sensibilidad cultural. 

Paula Salido Segovia, como promotora del proyecto, ha recibido una subvención de la Consejería de Empleo, Empresa y Trabajo Autónomo de la Junta de Andalucía, financiada por la Unión Europea con cargo al Programa FSE+ Andalucía 2021-2027, para el fomento del trabajo autónomo en Andalucía. Línea 2 de subvención para inicio de actividad económica o profesional, destinada a mujeres trabajadoras autónomas menores de 35 años. 

El proyecto Axárquica Espacio Creativo, dentro del Programa "Innovactiva", ha recibido la subvención a personas jóvenes andaluzas o residentes en Andalucía, para poner en funcionamiento proyectos empresariales en Andalucía, de la Consejería de Inclusión Social, Juventud, Familias e Igualdad de la Junta de Andalucía, a través del Instituto Andaluz de la Juventud.

Name: Black Fine Art Fair
Description: Black Fine Art Fair is a premier fine art show specializing in fine works of art by emerging, and master artists primarily of African descent.

Name: SOMA Pottery
Description:
SOMA es un espacio creativo y terapéutico en San Pedro Sula, Honduras que invita a pausar, reconectar y crear con las manos.

A través de talleres presenciales de cerámica y arteterapia, acompañamos a las personas en procesos de expresión, bienestar y encuentro interior. Creemos en el poder del barro como herramienta de presencia, y del arte como puente para socializar, sanar y crear comunidad.

En SOMA combinamos prácticas conscientes, experiencias sensoriales y momentos significativos para quienes buscan algo más que una clase: una experiencia profunda de reconexión.

Por ahora, ofrecemos talleres creativos y espacios para explorar desde la cerámica. Muy pronto lanzaremos clases regulares y nuevas experiencias grupales.

Whether you are a seasoned art connoisseur or an aspiring collector, Arcadja provides the tools and resources to enhance your understanding and appreciation of the art market.

Name: Art by Jannie Nyegaard
Description:
Jeg elsker at male og eksperimenterer meget med farver, teknikker og stilarter. Jeg er især kendt for mine farvestrålende uglemalerier - fyldt med farver, detaljer og skønne citater. 

Følg mig gerne på Facebook og Instagram under @artbyjannienyegaard 

Jeg kæmper for at få udbredt kendskabet til mine malerier og udstiller gerne, så hvis din virksomhed gerne vil have en udstilling, så sig endelig til. Jeg kommer forbi med det aftalte antal malerier og hænger op. Herefter kan medarbejderne nyde lidt smukt på væggen. -og selvfølgelig kan I købe malerierne også. 

Sig endelig til hvis du har spørgsmål, gerne vil se et maleri live eller købe et maleri. 

Se mere på min hjemmeside www.artbyjannienyegaard.dk

Name: Heesterveld Creative Community
Description: Stichting Heesterveld Creative Community is opgericht om creativiteit, samenwerking en cultureel ondernemerschap te stimuleren en te faciliteren in de Heesterveld buurt. Bestaande uit een groep creatieve bewoners vanuit allerlei disciplines richt de broedplaats zich op het leveren van een bijdrage aan de leefomgeving in de buurt en de stad, vanuit ieders eigen artistieke kracht. Het doel is om te inspireren en een klimaat van groei en schepping voort te brengen, om zo Heesterveld tot hét culturele epicentrum van de Bijlmermeer te maken. Dit wordt gedaan door alle leden van de community, aangestuurd en uitgevoerd in werkgroepen en vanuit een bestuur met bewoners en professionals uit het culturele veld. Wat de stichting binnen deze missie aanbiedt is woon- en werkruimte, financiële ondersteuning en gezamenlijke ruimte H75.

Name: Carleton McCambridge Fine Art
Description:
Carleton studied Economics and Art History at Arizona State and the University of Minnesota, graduating in 1974. His interest in Native American culture and his Scot-Irish ancestry is evident in his choice of subject matter for his paintings.

He is grateful to have had outstanding teachers like Frank Wetzel, Pat Jerde, Fred Dingler, Joe Paquet, Rick Kochenash and Marc Hanson.

"Learning to see like an artist has enriched my life. My hope is that my paintings will enrich the lives of others."

Name: Quorum - Online Art Store
Description:
Quorum is an online art store 100% Latin. The best of Latin American graphic arts. Art prints, drawing, painting, photography, engraving, silkscreen printing, original illustration, poster, in single copy or in limited series, we sell small-format works at low prices without ever compromising on quality. 

We are committed to offer art for all budgets, since 2015 in our store in Buenos Aires. And now, thanks to our online store, it is also just a click away in France. 

We are proud to introduce contemporary Latin American artists to tourists around the world. We work for an alternative, friendly and inexpensive art market. This is why our offer is accessible to as many people as possible: to art lovers, but also to anyone who wishes to decorate their home. 

With our low prices, we are positioning ourselves against the current elitism so much criticized in contemporary art.

Name: Spanierman Modern
Description:
Modern and Contemporary Art - In 2006 Spanierman Modern opened next door to our existing gallery, Spanierman Gallery, LLC. Its shows have featured artists from the early twentieth century to the present.

For more than a half century, Spanierman Gallery, LLC, has been dedicated to dealing in the finest American paintings and sculpture of the nineteenth and twentieth centuries.

Name: Carleigh Hyser - Creative Studio
Description: Carleigh Hyser is a multidisciplinary creative running her own studio, managing every facet of her business from photoshoots and design to contracts, bookings, and client strategy. She collaborates with musicians and artists to create visuals that feel authentic, striking, and unforgettable. Her primary mediums include photography, graphic design, illustration, and painting.

Name: Arlington Artists Alliance
Description:
Our mission is to create and promote local art in the Arlington, Virginia community.

Arlington Artists Alliance was formed in 2000 by working artists who wanted to make local art more accessible in our community, and gained non-profit 501(c)(3) status in 2007. Full membership is open to visual artists who live, work, have a studio or are represented by a gallery in Arlington and want to exhibit their work.  Supporting membership is available for art patrons and enthusiasts who value local art-making.

We encourage and support both established and emerging artists who work in all forms of 2D and 3D art, without partiality toward style or trend. We support those artists who find their creative process therapeutic. We treasure the support we receive from art lovers, local businesses and our community.

Our programs are found throughout Arlington County, Virginia, and our activity hub is located at Gallery Underground within Art Underground in Crystal City, VA.  Gallery Underground exhibits and promotes new member work with fresh shows each month and also other local and national artists in special monthly juried group and solo exhibitions. The gallery hosts a First Friday opening reception each month which is free to the public (5-7PM)

Our 200-plus members also exhibit year-round at a variety of Arlington community venues, including local government offices, community organizations, local businesses, restaurants and cafes. The Alliance hosts several community-wide annual exhibits, including spring and fall festivals at Fort C.F. Smith in Arlington. 

We are always seeking additional local venues at which to display our art and teach classes.

Name: SAMS - THE SLOVAK ART MEDAL SOCIETY
Description:
The establishment of the Slovak Art Medal Society, initiated
in 1990 by art historian Mária Polláková, curator of the Slovak
National Gallery collection of medals and several dedicated
sculptors, was a turning point, offering good prospects for a new
development.
It mainly included exhibitions of the Society, big shows of its
members organised every five years, symposia and displays
of contemporary work from the Visegrád Group countries, but
especially the participation in the international exhibitions of
the FIDEM. The Slovak Art Medal Society began cooperating
with the National Bank of Slovakia and the Museum of Coins
and Medals in Kremnica, with which it is closely associated
especially through exhibitions and the International Symposium
of Medals. The stimulating environment and the genius loci of
this famous European coin and medal centre with a tradition
established in the 14th century offers the participants many
benefits and gives them the opportunity to share experience
and specialist techniques. It particularly concerns the possibility
of creating individual designs of double-sided struck medals
in the Kremnica State Mint, and produce cast medals in the
local workshops. Moreover, Kremnica provides specialised
secondary vocational education as well as a unique technical
and personnel connection between medal and coin production.
The mint receives commissions for struck medals dedicated to
occasional events and commemorative and collector coins. They
are a convincing example of the level of culture and history of our
nation, showing their quality and spiritual legacy to a dedicated
circle of collectors and the general and international cultural
public.

Name: artiste peintre

Mes productions sont l’aboutissement de réflexions sur la vie qui nous entoure et d’émotions face aux activités que le quotidien nous apporte.

Name: Animation Connection
Description:
For more than 22 years Animation Connection has been an authorized gallery for Walt Disney, Warner Bros., Fox, and other major animation studios, serving animation art fans and collectors throughout the US, Canada, the UK, Western Europe, Australia and New Zealand.

Featured art includes Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Marvin the Martian and other Looney Tunes characters, Disney classics and contemporary favorites, The Simpsons, Family Guy, Peanuts, Batman, Hanna-Barbera, Pixar, the Grinch and more.

From rare original production cels and drawings to contemporary fine art lithographs, Animation Connection brings the memories and the beauty to your home and office like no other.

Name: Models Of The Mecca, Inc.
Description:
Founded on January 10, 2018 by Deja Davenport, Peyton Kinchen, and Deante’ Massenburg, Models of the Mecca is a modeling and creative organization on the campus of Howard University. We promote inclusivity in all aspects of fashion through creativity, community, and passion. We strive for excellence, diversity, integrity, and equality, not mediocrity, by having love for others and oneself.

We specialize in print and runway modeling as well as creative 'behind-the-runway' departments. A multitude of our members are signed & published models and creatives, including in Vogue, New York and DC Fashion Weeks, and numerous other publications. We are involved in the community, both on-and off-campus. In addition to our annual showcase welcoming our new members, we hold several creative events throughout the semester, such as walk clinics, fashion and beauty workshops, print photo opportunities, and community service projects.

Our primary focus is to offer a range of art classes, create commissioned art pieces, collaborate with restaurants for art workshops, partner with gift shops in Nepal and abroad, and organize engaging art exhibitions. By catering to working parents, art enthusiasts, collectors, and individuals/ businesses in need of commissioned art, we aim to become a go-to destination for artistic expression and personal growth.

Description: Based in the heart of Kahului, Moana Glass is Maui's premier source for hand-blown glass artistry.  Locally owned and operated, we offer the finest in distinct pieces with a unique and colorful aesthetic.  Choose from a variety of luxury sinks, lighting fixtures, chandeliers, and other beautifully hand-crafted pieces guaranteed to bring a tasteful and artistic look to any space.  Have a specific design in mind?  We have master glassblowers capable of turning any vision into a reality.

Name: SWAN Studios
Description:
Swan Studios has been a labor of love since 1996. High up in the foothills of the Capitan Mountains in rural New Mexico, Susan Weir-Ancker set her sights on opening a ceramic studio, not only for her own enduring love of creation through clay but also for her passion to teach others.

“The vessels I make are lyrical, sometimes whimsical, sometimes more serious, some more sculptural, holding a idea rather than a substance. They all sing a celebration of life.  I work abstractly as well as figuratively. Even though my work often deals with loss, impermanence, and death, it maintains a feeling of joy for life, and a freeing of the spirit.

Name: Iwanson International school of contemporary dance
Description:
The Iwanson International School of Contemporary Dance in Munich is one of the most internationally recognised academies for contemporary dance in Europe and trains contemporary dancers and dance teachers with excellent technical quality and an individual profile. 

We at Iwanson International are united through something fundamental: we are all dancers, through and through. 
This is what drives us, this is what inspires us, this is what we’ve wanted for ourselves throughout our lives. We view our role in this world as professional dancers, and we truly spend our days doing all things dance. 

From training to rehearsals to researching new techniques, we at Iwanson International embody a multicultural group of artists who have bonded together around a common passion: the craft of dance.

O Instituto Arte por toda Parte já realizou mais de 1000 oficinas artísticas em sua trajetória pelos Estados da Bahia, Rio Grande do Sul, Paraná, Santa Catarina, São Paulo, Goiás e Espírito Santo, alcançando mais de 21.000 crianças e adolescentes.

Our place is a huge open area with more than 200m2, personal desks with high speed internet connexion for people who want to be a Digital Nomad, a traveling Business man or just want to go out of home and work in a nice and cozy office.

Join us and enjoy great company, surrounded by salt water, great food, beautiful mountains (Picos de Europa) , and more!

Name: M Galleries
Description: M Galleries is a network of contemporary art galleries that feature monthly exhibitions, classes/workshops for all ages, special events, and much more. Please like and follow any/all of the below social media for up-to-date information for all the spaces.

Name: Colosseum Fine Arts, Inc.
Description:
The mission of Colosseum Fine Arts is the curation of exhibits that juxtapose deceased masters works with those of international emerging artists while discovering and fostering the needs of artists and collectors alike. With a firm dedication to the international community, Colosseum Fine Arts is committed to providing exhibitions with depth and relevance to the human experience. In particular, the goal is the fostering of a greater sense of the aesthetic, the visual arts and varied media while influencing growth in all aspects of the artist and collector. Colosseum Fine Arts hopes to better foster understanding of the art world and the people in it by the continued dissemination of information through exhibitions and educational events as well as an online resource for the discerning collector, artist and historian alike.

Colosseum Fine Arts operate a full service, high end, art gallery located in La Jolla, CA; an online e-commerce site as well as an artist agency and publishing division of the company to better meet these goals and provide a higher level of service to the artist, collector and community of man.

We work with a small studio of fine artists that we represent as well as with the national art production studios so no project is too small or too large.

Name: AfterWords Literary Festival
Description:
Where readers and writers meet. An annual festival for those who love books, stories, and ideas, in Kjipuktuk/Halifax.
Our annual programming offers a mix of readings, conversations, workshops, and celebratory events, with events for adults and kids, including programming for kids in English and French. 
AfterWords provides a venue for those who love writing, reading, and stories to come together. We believe in the power of story to change lives and that's what we celebrate at AfterWords.
Our festival is located in Mi'kma'ki, on the unceded and unsurrendered territory of the Mi'kmaq people. We take seriously our commitments as treaty people, and are endeavouring, always, to learn more, do better, and work towards both truth and reconciliation as we build a modern Mi'kma'ki together.

Name: ART CLASSE by Stéphane Ducret
Description:
ONLINE & LIVE PAINTING CLASSES FOR INDIVIDUALS, OR COMPANIES (TEAM BUILDING).

SWISS ARTIST STÉPHANE DUCRET GIVES EASY STEP-BY-STEP INSTRUCTIONS ON HOW TO PAINT LIKE POST-MODERN AND CONTEMPORARY MASTERS.

YOU WILL LEARN HOW TO PAINT AND BUILD A PERSONAL COLLECTION OF SOME OF TODAY'S MOST ICONIC ARTWORKS!

MAY YOU WANT TO EXPERIENCE WITH ART, LEARN MORE ABOUT ARTISTS AND THEIR TECHNIQUES, OR EVEN IF YOU ARE AN ARTIST WHO WANTS TO FIND DEEPER INSPIRATIONS AND DEVELOP YOUR SKILLS : THIS CLASS IS FOR YOU !

Learn how to paint like great postmodern and contemporary artists… even if you never held a paintbrush in your hands!

Hi, I'm Stéphane Ducret
And I am a Swiss professional visual artist with more than 30 years of experience and I come here with a unique and proven step-by-step painting teaching class.

I am a graduate with BFA & MFA at HEAD (Haute école d’art et de design), Geneva and I have been on the board of directors and teacher at ECAL (Ecole cantonale d’art de Lausanne), Lausanne. I also founded two art galleries in New York and Geneva and directed one Lausanne.

In 2016, I created ART CLASSE where hundreds of participants have each successfully painted numerous real « fake » paintings after fantastic famous masters.

Through my online courses, I now would like to give a wider access to my painting tricks and help you build your own collection of masterpieces by painting them yourself by just following my easy step-by-step instructions!

Description: A La Luz shares and promotes creative responses to climate change, guided by those we’re inspired by, and those whose paths we cross. This includes all art forms, from painting to architecture; and from theatre to literature.

Name: Anderson Smith Art
Description: When you're unique and not afraid to show it, people will come to you for what you do uniquely. I am a visual self-taught artist who is inspired by life and its many nuances. Art has been a part of me my entire life and is who I am. I seek to express my visions to those who appreciate my world. My art is not for me to interpret to you, but is how you interpret my art. Growing up on the South Side of Chicago currently residing in Atlanta Ga for the last 21 years, I took to art at a very young age. My dream was to be a cartoonist. The colors, the shapes and the fun were what I was attracted to. Currently, my art resides at collections at Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta Airport, Fellaship ATL as well as with Cam Newton and Clifford "T.I." Harris, to name a few. If I were to sum up who I am and my style it would be … Abstract expression conceptualizing the beauty and the chaos in life!

Name: Rockport Center For The Arts
Description: Rockport Center For The Arts is a fine art company based out of 401 S Austin St, Rockport, Texas, United States.

Name: Deekay Dance
Description:
DEEKAY propose une quinzaine de cours de danse par semaine pour tous les âges et tous les niveaux.
Sept styles de danse sont enseignés par une dizaine de professeur expérimentés qui travaillent autour du freestyle et/ou de la chorégraphie.  
Deekay offre aux élèves un espace dans lequel ils peuvent se challenger, expérimenter, évoluer et s’amuser. Leur mission est d’inspirer toutes générations en partageant les valeurs et principes de la culture urbaine.  


COMMENT ?

Tous nos cours permettent aux élèves de travailler, puis d’acquérir, des bases solides. Par la suite, le professeur présente des variantes à travers des routines et chorégraphies. Notre objectif est d’amener l’élève à maitriser ces variantes puis d’en développer seul afin de développer sa propre danse / son identité. Cette étape est un réel challenge qui permet à l’élève de se développer personnellement et de dépasser ses limites. En s’observant et en partageant avec les autres danseurs, l’élève apprend à être tolérant envers les autres mais aussi envers lui-même.
Nous essayons donc de développer un maximum la créativité des élèves, de leur apprendre à avoir confiance en eux mais aussi de partager avec l’autre et se respecter .


POURQUOI ?

Notre mission est d’inspirer toutes générations en partageant les valeurs et principes de la culture urbaine : Paix, Amour, Unité et plaisir. 

 “Peace, Love, Unity & having fun”  Afrika Bambaataa

STYLES DE DANSE

HIP-HOP.
WAACKING | HEELS.
AFRO.
BREAK DANCE.
HOUSE DANCE.
CHOREO | GIRLY.
DANCEHALL.

Creamos experiencias para transformar vidas de adentro hacia afuera, a través del #Arte

Description:
Punto 23 es más que una galería de arte, ubicada en el barrio de vanguardia Malasaña. 
Es un punto de encuentro sin fronteras para artistas, público y proyectos, un espacio de conversación, debates y eventos. 

Dedicamos nuestra energía al descubrimiento de nuevos valores artísticos y a la promoción de las artes visuales.

Visita nuestro blog : www.punto23.com/blog
y

Name: Galerie Walu
Description:
The family business Galerie Walu has been focusing on the fascinating cultures of West Africa. The gallery has been established by René & Denise David in 1957 and is now owned by Jean David.

Jean David has been dealing in African and Oceanic Art for over 30 years, during which time he has acquired an international reputation for quality and professionalism. He has been instrumental in the creation of numerous private collections formed in the last three decades as well as assisting museums in developing their holdings. This has involved trading for his own account but also providing general advice relating to purchasing, both privately and at auction, appraisal for both sale and insurance, conservation advice and assistance in the sale of Tribal works of art.

The extensive activity and experience of Galerie Walu in the markets of North America, Europe and the Far East give the company a unique perspective on international market conditions so enabling their clients to maximise their opportunities for both buying and selling Tribal Art.

Services
The gallery offers a wide range of services to its private and corporate clients including:
- Purchase and sale of tribal art objects and collections
- Appraisal/ Valuation
- Personalized consulting and advice on aspects of starting a collection, and acquiring, installing, conserving and appraising works of art


Galerie Walu
St. Jakobs-Strasse 59
4052 Basel

+41 44 280 20 00
info@walu.ch

https://www.facebook.com/Galerie.Walu

Name: VoiceBreak
Description:
VoiceBreak is not just for singers—it’s for you.

Whether you sign up for our training or not, you have a voice. You want it to work for you.

 Voice actors who want to spice up their read.

Name: Seven Tattoo

Name: Ayr Gallery
Description:
Ayr Gallery – “Art is in the Ayr” 

Ayr Gallery provides full-scale art consultation and advisory services to corporate and private collectors.  Our aim is to demystify the art market for our clients and engage them in the collecting experience.
It is our philosophy that art has the power to transform an environment and enhance the workplace. It can reflect a corporate profile while also serving as a sound financial investment. Ayr Gallery believes that a successful art collection defines and communicates the interests, image, and individuality of the collector.

Name: The Music Academy of North Carolina
Description: Lessons for life.

Name: ContemporaryIdentities International Online Magazine
Description:
ContemporaryIdentities is an independent quarterly international online magazine covering contemporary art from around the world. The focus of ContemporaryIdentities is to showcase and promote experimental and progressive contemporary art through short art reviews from international scholars, art writers and art critics who are invited regularly to contribute to this publication.  Alongside invited contributors, there will be selected artists interviews and open call for internationals artists, graphic designers and art critics. 

Artistic creation can offer life-saving restoration for creators and viewers alike. ContemporaryIdentities wishes to provide a platform to mitigate stress and pain, outlet for repressed thoughts and emotions caused by the current pandemic situation. 

Moreover, viewers can find belonging and representation in the works of others. We believe that art can help during times of crises. Our goal at ContemporaryIdentities is twofold: to remind you that you’re not alone in the current situation and to offer accessible ways to jumpstart your own path to move forward through engagement with the arts.

Due to its multicultural approach and dialogue between nations ContemporaryIdentities has been chosen to be part of the Arts and Society database that is in partnership with Conseil International de la Philosophie et des Sciences Humaines (CIPSH), UNESCO-MOST, The Global Chinese Art, Culture and Society (GCACS) & Mémoire de l’Avenir - Arts and Society (MDA).  

To find out more visit: https://arts-and-society.org/artists/contemporary-identities/

Name: Το Εργαστήρι Σχεδίου, Μπαλμπούζη-Λουλάκης
Description: “Το Εργαστήρι Σχεδίου” δημιουργήθηκε από τους Χρόνη Λουλάκη και Γρηγορία Μπαλμπούζη, με ενθουσιασμό και αγάπη  για την τέχνη των εικαστικών, της Ζωγραφικής, του Σχεδίου, της Φωτογραφίας, των εικαστικών δραστηριοτήτων για παιδιά κ.α. Σκοπός του εργαστηρίου  είναι να καθοδηγήσει με τον καλύτερο δυνατό τρόπο όλους εκείνους που θέλουν να αναπτύξουν ή να εξελίξουν τις εικαστικές τους δεξιότητες, από τη ζωγραφική, το αρχιτεκτονικό σχέδιο, την αρχιτεκτονική εσωτερικού χώρου ή το βιομηχανικό σχεδιασμό. Είναι δίπλα σε εκείνους που προετοιμάζονται για τις εισαγωγικές εξετάσεις στην ΑΣΚΤ, τις πανελλήνιες εξετάσεις για τα ειδικά μαθήματα του σχεδίου και τις κατατακτήριες εξετάσεις των Αρχιτεκτονικών σχολών. Σε ότι αφορά στα Πανεπιστήμια του εξωτερικού τόσο για τις προπτυχιακές σπουδές όσο και για τις μεταπτυχιακές, υπάρχει η ειδική κατάρτιση στους συνεργάτες μας που χρειάζεται για όλα τα στάδια της προετοιμασίας των ξένων πανεπιστημίων από την προετοιμασία Portfolio έως την εγγραφή στο Πανεπιστήμιο.

Name: Art Workshops for Animal and Nature Lovers
Description:
Art classes/workshops facilitated by a professional artist on a beautiful green and serene farm just outside of Gaborone, where rescued animals live in harmony. Ideal to relax and get in touch with your creativity and confidence, as well as for team building.  
Jelena is a professional artist trained in Europe and teaches observational drawing and painting. She is passionate about the power of art and creativity and she is able to help people to reconnect with their creativity and work on their self expression.
Beth's house and farm are a peace of art that she designed herself with a lot of  love. It is green and serene; you can see horses, donkeys, chicken, goats, cats, dogs, and all kind of other animals who live in harmony. This amazing ambiance provides ideal inspiration for drawing and painting.
It is ideal for people who need to create ME- time in their busy lives and for team building.

Name: Indochine House
Description:
Founded in 1997, Indochine House Gallery was founded in Hanoi, Vietnam as an antique space which focuses on offering oriental beauty by promoting Asian arts and Vietnamese artists. 

In 2021, Indochine House re-established with our mission to provide a trustworthy market for trading Vietnamese paintings from the Ecole des Beaux Arts d'Indochine (EBAI) to contemporary artists as well as antiques and high-end decoration that has been carefully appraised.
Location: An Phú, Ho Chi Minh City

Name: Fresco Decorative Painting
Description: Fresco Decorative Painting - 324 Lafayette Street New York, NY 10012 tel: 212-966-0676. Fresco Decorative Painting is a specialty finishing firm based in New York City. Its studio and showroom are located in the Noho neighborhood in lower Manhattan, and Fresco draws its energy and inspiration from the cutting edge of the city’s artistic community. But Fresco’s work is international in scope, and it has undertaken major projects for both residential and institutional clients around the globe. Its clients include leading architects and designers who have come to rely on Fresco’s professionalism, deep experience and commitment to both quality and value. Agnes Liptak, Fresco's founder and President, has more than two decades of experience in leading teams of artists and managers in delivering work of stunning quality to exacting specifications. Its artisans use traditional disciplines of Venetian plaster, gilding and glazing, and they build upon these methods in contemporary and innovative ways. Fresco’s depth and versatility allow it to provide full shop and field finishing options, and its commitment to the highest standards of professionalism ensures that its projects are completed on time and on budget. Among Fresco’s satisfied clients are retail establishments including leading department stores, consulates, opera houses and significant private residences.

Name: Michalopoulos Gallery
Description: The Michalopoulos Gallery New Orleans is two stories of famous artist James Michalopoulos original works that present a dream-like perspective on subjects from New Orleans architecture to French landscapes and livestock.

Name: Paintheads
Description:
Based out of Kemps Corner, Mumbai, Paintheads is a one-of-a-kind art studio co-founded by Rushil Sheth (art therapist & former corporate strategist) and Kunj Mehta (gold medalist applied artist) — with over 25 years of combined experience in the fields of art and strategy.

Our Mission is to make art accessible to all - breaking barriers of age, gender, profession or skill level - and to revolutionize how art is taught and perceived.

With a wide range of offerings from Corporate experiences and Art Therapy to Paint parties, weekly sessions for children and adults, masterclasses and custom workshops, we've got all your creative needs covered.

Corporate Experiences:
We believe in the power of playful learning — and unlearning. 
Not every meeting needs slides, and brainstorming sessions shouldn’t leave you drained. 
We offer a creative, energizing alternative designed to leave you fulfilled, inspired, and equipped with meaningful solutions - using art as the medium.

Signature Offerings:
1) Vision Boarding (A Strategy Mapping Experience)
2) Collab Canvas (Team Bonding through Art)
3) The Paint Play (Celebratory Art Experiences)
4) Colour Connection (Therapeutic Art)
5) Creative Cardio (Creative Problem Solving)

We love designing custom experiences aligned to your objectives, team size, and budget. Whether it’s for leaders, large teams, or intimate circles — we bring strategy, soul, and splashes of colour to your workplace.

Name: Annely Juda Fine Art Limited
Description: Annely Juda Fine Art is based in London and represents contemporary British, European and International artists. The gallery also exhibits masters of the 20th-century avant-garde, specialising in Russian Constructivism, Bauhaus and De Stijl.

Name: Art Manager Copenhagen
Description:
Art Manager er en manager virksomhed med en vision om at beskæftige så mange kreative ildsjæle som muligt. Vi er etableret i 2017 med et galleri på Frederiksberg og har allerede et bredt kunstnerkatalog. Vi har 30 udstillende kunstnere i galleriet og 50 på vores hjemmeside med et godt udvalg af moderne billedkunst såvel som skulpturer og kunsthåndværk.

Vi står for at arrangere ti store kunstudstillinger på Langelinie Pavillonen i 2019 med et eksklusivt udvalg af kunstnere og designere. Vi har en aftale med Boltens Gård om at assistere dem med at finde kunstnere til at udsmykke stedet i forbindelse med nyindretning.
  
Vi hjælper kunstforeninger og virksomheder med inspiration til udstillinger, udsmykning og indkøb af kunst. Skal din virksomhed indrettes og har I særlige ønsker til stil og farver, vil vi gøre vores bedste for at imødekomme dem. Vi tilbyder leje af kunst, hvis I ønsker løbende udskiftning af jeres udsmykning.

Andreas Cortsen 
andreas@artmanager.dk
Tlf.: 31 13 76 73

Alexander Tao

Name: Art Professionals of Texas
Description:
Founded in Dallas, Texas in 2011, Art Professionals of Texas (APT) is a statewide nonprofit organization.

Art Professionals of Texas is an elite group of artists for whom art is a way of life. We provide Texas artists with a membership-based non-profit organization that provides real tangible results for our members. 

We offer:

-Workshops with experts who can help polish your presentation
-Exposure through exhibitions at distinguished and respected galleries throughout the state
-Access to art professionals, dealers, designers and collectors in the industry
-Visual arts professionals that help you build on existing skills
-Assistance in finding collectors and patrons interested in purchasing fine art
-Skill building in the business of fine art and matters outside of the studio
-A network of artists and professionals to help you succeed at completing projects and building your portfolio

Membership is based on a portfolio review and is restricted to candidates chosen by a panel of jurors unaffiliated with APT.

APT is building a network of artist members, patrons and sponsors that is second to none.  Our distinguished jury is now accepting applicants in all stages of their fine art careers. The ability to inspire people is a rare gift in these times and we want to help get your artistic creations in front of an audience eager for such inspiration. We look forward to working with you.

info@artprotx.com
(214) 327-2436
www.artprotx.com

Name: RocioSantaCruz
Description:
La Galería RocioSantaCruz es un espacio dinámico para la creación y el pensamiento contemporáneo en todas sus manifestaciones. Situado en el centro neurálgico de Barcelona con más de 300m2 el espacio acoge proyectos tanto de artistas consolidados como talentos emergentes.

Fiel a su trayectoria desde 1994 en París, como editora de libros de artista, el planteamiento de RocioSantaCruz, es poner foco sobre archivos inéditos con el objetivo de generar un diálogo entre las vanguardias de la segunda mitad del siglo XX y las nuevas prácticas contemporáneas.

La galería se concibe como un lugar de experimentación, un punto de encuentro para la reflexión y un espacio para la difusión de nuevas prácticas con un especial interés en la fotografía, el cine experimental, el archivo y la edición de publicaciones de artista.

Entre los artistas representados por la galería están Miguel Rio Branco, Lluís Hortalà, Ouka Leele, Mar Arza, Gonzalo Elvira, Marcel Giró, Palmira Puig, Miquel Mont, Montserrat Soto y Andrés Galeano. RocioSantaCruz ha participado en ferias internacionales tales como Paris Photo, ARCO, Photo London, Untitled y SP-Arte.

Name: Kunst verandert je kijk
Description: Kunst verandert je kijk biedt workshops in musea en op locatie. Door samen te kijken en te praten over kunst, oefenen we aandacht, taal en perspectief. Voor teams en professionals in elke sector: van onderwijs en zorg tot overheid en bedrijfsleven. Toegankelijk, praktisch en altijd met een vleugje humor.

Name: Fine Arts Section, IIT Roorkee
Description:
Promoting the best of Artworks across IIT Roorkee.
• Follow us to keep your inner artist inspired.

Name: Flare Dance Ensemble
Description:
The University of Melbourne's Flare Dance Ensemble is a student-run dance group which aims to provide a platform of opportunities for university students to indulge themselves in the many expressions of dance. 

This includes the opportunity to learn, teach, choreograph and perform dance pieces of several styles. Urban, jazz, hip-hop, ballet, contemporary, and latin are the common styles that we use. However, we are always open to new horizons and are constantly striving to introduce new styles.

Every year, we perform at events around Melbourne. We also hold an annual production around October to showcase the talent of our members.

Name: JB FINE ART Advisor /Conservation & Restoration
Description: Art conservation services profesional. We do help art collectors, art galeries,art fairs, institutions, cultural departments and Museums. International and National. Art technical and expertise Conditional Reports on request for art investors.

Name: ItsAboutArtnCraft
Description:
Our platform is dedicated to nurturing creativity through engaging programs for kids and adults alike. Whether you’re a young artist exploring your imagination or an adult looking to refine your skills, we have something for everyone. We also host summer and winter camps, perfect for children looking to immerse themselves in art during school breaks. These camps provide a fantastic opportunity for kids to explore their passions, learn new skills, and connect with peers in a creative environment.

In addition to our regular classes, we also offer live events for businesses, establishments, and corporate events. These events are tailored to enhance team building, foster creativity, and provide a unique experience for your organization/businesses, establishments.

Name: The Art Department
Description:
The creative wing of @MetanoiseLLC (on Twitter) Curating unique NFT drops, designing merch, & helping artists and creators bring their vision to life. 
   DM for inquiries.

Name: Atelier Pyrite
Description:
L' Atelier Pyrite, c'est Aurélien et Jean. A première vue, ils n'ont pas
grand chose en commun ; l'un est grand, l'autre petit, l'un est Suisse,
l'autre Français, l'un est artisan, l'autre designer... Mais ils partagent
une même sensibilité pour l'art et la nature, ainsi qu'une forte
motivation et une implication de rêveur. Alors en 2015, c'est autour
d'un ours qu'ils se retrouvent, après leur travail, pour le plaisir, et
surtout cette envie commune de voir émerger les formes et prendre
vie l'acier. Doucement un bestiaire se compose, des idées émergent,
puis des commandes spéciales surviennent qui durant lesquelles, l'un
apprendra de l'autre et vice versa.

Name: Type & Forme ABA, PBFA, ILAB
Description:
Type & Forme, established by Mark James FLS and Anke Timmermann PhD (Cantab.), FLS, specialises in rare and antiquarian books and manuscripts relating to travel; natural history; science and medicine; food and drink; English and international literature; early printing; private press and artists' books; performing arts; and bibliography. We also advise on auctions and undertake commission bids, and assist with collection development and management.

Mark James was formerly an Associate Director in the Book Department at Christie's, Head of General Book Sales at Sotheby's, and Head of Travel Books at (successively) Henry Sotheran Ltd and Bernard Quaritch Ltd. 

Dr Anke Timmermann was the Munby Fellow in Bibliography at the University of Cambridge (2013-2014). She was previously Senior Historian and then Associate Director of the Beckman Center for the History of Chemistry (Chemical Heritage Foundation, Philadelphia, 2007-2009), and then co-editor of Glasgow University's edition of 'The Letters of Bess of Hardwick', and curator of the exhibition 'Unsealed: The Letters of Bess of Hardwick' (Hardwick Hall and The National Archives, 2011-2012). In 2014 she moved from academia into the rare book trade, and was an antiquarian bookseller at Bernard Quaritch Ltd until 2017. 

Correspondence in English and German.

Social media (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram) @TypeAndForme.

Name: Snoreloft
Description: Vi er et teater i bred forstand. Vi tilbyder teaterforestillinger, undervisning, kurser og konsulentarbejde til private og offentlige- og private virksomheder.

Name: Arte Fortunata - Modern & Contemporary Interior Art
Description:
Arte Fortunata

A gallery in which art, glass, design and interior objects are combined to form one total living concept.

At Arte Fortunata on Noordeinde 51 in The Hague, the Netherlands you will find besides extraordinary hanging lamps from Murano, rare furniture/lightobjects and unique pieces of glass/ceramic also modern and contemporary art, shown in such a way that you get an impression of our living concept, from which it will become clear that items can become stronger in combination with other artforms/expressions, without losing their individual strength.

The layout of the gallery is also perfect for having art exhibitions of which we will keep you informed via Artslant and our website.

See you soon in our gallery..... Per van der Horst and Jo-Ann Knop

For more information check our website www.artefortunata.com.

Name: LISA Project NYC
Description:
The mission for LISA Project NYC simply stated, is to bring a diverse group of artists and art based events to the neighborhoods of New York City. LISA encourages art fans and tourists from around the world to visit New York City to view and photograph the art work. Over the last 8 years LISA has grown into a premiere public arts program with both a national and international reach, with charitable and commercial projects around the world.

With millions of visitors and online views of the work from 2012-2019, 2020 is off to an amazing start! LISA has received both national and international critical acclaim, with coverage in Huff Po, WSJ, The New York Times and coverage on NBC, ABC, CBS, FOX and NY1. LISA is a proven leader in cultural contributions to our communities and people that make up this great city.  With that proven success, we expanded our vision with the Annual Lower Manhattan Arts Festival, branded the “LoMan Art Fest." A celebration of Art - Comedy - Music, the art forms that continues to make Downtown NYC the ground breaking creative mecca its known for.  

LISA Project NYC is a 501c3 non-profit, conceived and cofounded by Wayne Rada and Rey Rosa.

Name: LOCK'NGO Illustration
Description:
Au service de l'histoire des Armées et de la Mémoire:

Alors que nos anciens de la Grande Guerre ne sont plus que des noms sur les monuments aux morts de nos villages de France, témoins du sang versé pour la patrie.. Alors que nos anciens de la seconde guerre mondiale et derniers compagnons de la Libération disparaissent un par un emportant avec eux les témoignages de l'épopée de la France Libre.. Le dessin est ce moyen pour faire vivre la mémoire de ces hommes, femmes, militaires et civils, grands et petits qui ont fait notre histoire mondiale, nationale et familiale.

Les anciens Égyptiens avaient coutume de dire qu’on meurt deux fois: Quand l’âme quitte notre corps, et quand disparaît le dernier homme à prononcer notre nom.

Après une longue carrière dans l'hôtellerie de luxe, depuis Septembre 2020 j'ai rejoins le Diocèse aux armées. En parallèle, avec mon crayon et mes pinceaux, je me lance dans une nouvelle aventure au service de ma passion pour l'histoire: redonner vie à tous nos anciens et leurs histoires pour que leurs noms ne disparaissent jamais.

Name: Apotheosis Art
Description:
Contemporary Online Art Gallery focused on Emerging and Mid-Career artists

Apotheosis Art was born out of a desire to cultivate a digital artistic community focused on curiosity and eagerness. The gallery's founding concepts are rooted in encouraging and fostering young, talented artists, exploring new avenues to increase dialogue, and providing a platform to discover, engage, and educate people in art.

Name: Artizana Syria
Description:
Artizana Syria project was established in 2010 to shed light on the handicrafts which represent an important aspect of the economy and Syrian heritage through working with small workshops; i.e craftsmen, to make unique products and special for "Artizana". It also aims to introduce the cultural heritage of Syria in a modern attractive means. Inherited old art is not enough to stand alone, it should also convoy with the contemporary and modern trend in order to attract the buyer as the Syrian and European visitors.

Artizana Syria is specialized in designing and producing unique handmade gifts to match the expectations of our customers through merging the major elements of the Syrian oriental products as the followings: wooden boxes, brocade, pearl shells, mosaic, glass painting, brass … etc.

Name: Tropical Realism
Description:
Tropical Realism is an innovative artistic movement and lifestyle brand founded by Artist Sir Calvert Jones. It captures the vibrant essence of Caribbean life through multi-sensory experiences and bold expressive art. 

A Vincentian trademark, the brand focuses on community development and the rich cultural tapestry of Vincentian and Caribbean life. Tropical Realism is rapidly expanding its community offerings, business partnerships, charitable activities, and other initiatives centered around this.

Name: Racharco
Description: We provide high-quality art that creates lasting memories for our customers and partners.

Name: Galerie Berthéas
Description:
Fondée en 1989, la Galerie Berthéas est aujourd’hui présente à Saint-Étienne, Vichy et Paris. Dès le milieu des années 1980 elle défend la Figuration Libre et Narrative, et à partir de la fin des années 1990 les artistes issus de l’art urbain.

Dans cette perspective, la galerie a signé plusieurs contrats d’exclusivité aussi bien avec des artistes émergents que des figures majeures de la scène internationale. Afin de promouvoir ses artistes elle organise plusieurs expositions dans ses différents espaces et participe à d’importantes foires d’art moderne et contemporain telles que Art Up, ST-Art, Art Paris Art Fair et Urban Art Fair. 

Forte de son expérience acquise depuis de nombreuses années et de sa connaissance du marché de l’art moderne et contemporain, elle propose aux collectionneurs confirmés comme aux amateurs un accompagnement dans l’acquisition d’œuvres d’art et la constitution de collection sur mesure.

La Galerie Berthéas les Tournesols est membre du Comité Professionnel des Galeries d’Art.

Name: Multi media artist, owner of Ancient Future Gallery of Art
Description: A creative place/space to celebrate the creativity, wisdom and beauty of life. Many works of visual, tactile and audible art.

Name: Delia LaJeunesse Art Consulting
Description: I help people learn to live with art they love. So many people avoid the arts and are uncomfortable with the prospect of buying art for their home. I am an unpretentious art consultant establishing a new generation of art collectors who are collecting based on their personality, values, and what truly moves them in a piece of art.

Name: Union Gallery
Description: UNION GALLERY is a not-for-profit, student-centred public contemporary art gallery at Queen's University. UG is a space centred in community and conversation, driven by play, curiosity, curation and research-creation. We are the primary public gallery at Queen's dedicated to showcasing the range and excellence of students' artistic and curatorial practices. UG also supports local (based in Katarokwi-Kingston), regional and national professional artists to foster a diverse network of artistic production, presentation and interpretation. We’re committed to supporting creative growth through merging technical and critical understandings of the arts, as well as a deeper understanding of how art can reflect the most important issues of our time. UG is centrally located on the first floor of Stauffer Library on Queen's main campus. All are welcome and admission is always free.

Name: LE CORRID'ART/ THE LONG HAUL
Description: Le Corrid’art est un organisme à but non-lucratif, autogéré, dédié à faciliter la production d’art de ses membres en offrant des lieux de travail abordables et de qualité dans un environnement favorable. Les studios occupent 8000 pieds carrés d’un immeuble industriel dans le Parc Extension. Parmi les événements annuels du Corrid'art, il y a les expositions d’art, les collaborations avec d'autres organismes culturels et une exposition de groupe/levée de fonds à chaque printemps. Le Corrid’art forme une partie intégrante de la communauté artistique de Montréal depuis 2001.

Name: Glarify GmbH
Description:
glarify - Your global art map

Discover art online and experience it in real life.

On Glarify, you can discover interesting new artists, portfolios, opening receptions and exhibitions. And galleries and art lovers find you! Glarify is the melting pot for all kinds of people who create art, love art and show art - no matter what style. One day, our goal is to have every single artist and every single gallery represented on this platform. Are you an artist? Then place your first glare on our map! Maybe you know about some fascinating exhibitions and galleries we don't know yet? Then give them a bump and tell them about Glarify!

Glarify for gallery owners
Do you collect, curate and sell art? With Glarify you can promote your opening receptions and exhibitions to reach a broader audience. And you can discover new and emerging artists.

Glarify for artists
You want to show your art - online and also physically to look at, feel and experience. Tell us where we can find and buy your art - no matter if it is in a gallery, in the café next door, in your studio or your garage.

Glarify for institutions
In your museum, your academy or art school you are surrounded by art the world has to see? Here you can find art enthusiasts always seeking new talents and exhibitions.

Glarify for art-lovers
You love art and you are curious what your local art scene has to offer: exhibitions, opening receptions, studios, established museums and boutique galleries, etc. Glarify lets you dive deeper into your local art world.

Join Glarify and let your local art scene shine!

All the activity and processes are in line to the Managing Partners’ personal commitment to professional behavior, transparency and Social Corporate Responsibility.

Name: Kaminski Auctions
Description:
Kaminski Auctions, located on the North Shore of Boston, has been serving the New England antiques market for over 25 years as a full service auction house and appraisal service for fine art, antiques and estates.

Our state of the art auction gallery is located at 117 Elliott St. (Rt. 62), Beverly, Massachusetts. Kaminski Auctions hosts 25 auctions a year.

In today’s highly competitive market of fine art and antiques, Kaminski Auctions provides its customers with international exposure for their items on three live bidding platforms and bicoastal services with east coast offices in Beverly, Massachusetts and West Palm Beach, Florida and west coast offices in Beverly Hills and San Diego, California.

Kaminski Auctions offers specialty departments in 20th Century, Modern Design & Contemporary Art, Antique & Classic Cars, Antique Furniture, Antique Porcelain & Ceramics, Asian Art and Antiques, Autographs, Books, Ephemera, Photography, Decorative Arts, Fine Art, Glass & Lighting, Jewelry, Coins, Luxury Handbags, Accessories & Vintage Couture, Militaria, Oriental Rugs, Settling an Estate, Silver, Tribal Arts, and Wine & Spirits. We have highly trained and knowledgeable appraisers on staff that will help you determine the true value of your antiques, or entire collections. Free Appraisal days are offered every Tuesday from 10:00am-4:00pm at 117 Elliott St. (Rt. 62), in Beverly, Massachusetts & by appointment at our West Palm Beach, San Diego and Beverly Hills, California locations.  We welcome emailed photos of your items!   Contact us at consignments@kaminskiauctions.com.

Name: Nadine NACINOVIC - Artiste Peintre - Stage de Peinture
Description: « Je puise dans mes racines méditerranéennes force et vitalité.  Cette énergie  positive,  je  la  transpose  sur  mes toiles  par  des  gestes  amples  et  spontanés,  façonnant grâce  à  une  palette  de  couleurs  très  nuancée  des portraits sincères et vivants, et des  paysages bucoliques, invitant  à  la  rêverie.  J’ai  grandi  entre  les  champs  et  les bois  et  je  ressens  une  forte  attirance  pour  la nature qui me  nourrit  et ’enchante par  sa  force de  vie :  c’est  son mouvement toujours si fluide, ses harmonies colorées et sa  matière  changeante,  à  l’image  d’un  état  d’âme humain,  que  je  m’efforce  de  saisir  dans  ma  peinture. »

Name: Galleria Dalton Somaré
Description:
For over thirty years, Dalton Somaré has been a meeting place for Haute Epoque African tribal sculpture and ancient Indo-Buddhist art, offering the opportunity to explore their beauty and relevance within the context of 21st-century art.

An internationally recognized gallery based in central Milan—a cosmopolitan city and one of Europe’s style and art capitals—Dalton Somaré enables the experience of discovering new aesthetic languages. It caters to art lovers in search of works with significant historical and cultural depth, as well as to collectors who embrace a more contemporary approach.

The gallery’s dedication to finding the highest examples and most representative works, combined with its refined eclecticism, makes Dalton Somaré one of the most dynamic and captivating galleries on the international stage.

The Dalton Somaré Gallery was founded in 1993 by Leonardo Vigorelli and Grata Somaré, born out of their studies in anthropology, museum experience, and three decades of field research across the Himalayan range, India, Southeast Asia, and Africa.

Since 1999, Dalton Somaré has actively participated in premier international events dedicated to Primitive and Oriental Art, including the BRAFA Art Fair in Brussels, Bruneaf in Brussels, the Tribal and Textile Arts Show in San Francisco, the Arts of Pacific Asia Show in San Francisco, International Tribal Antiques in New York, the Arts of Pacific Asia Show in New York, Parcours des Mondes in Paris, Asia Week in New York, and Asian Art in London.

Since 2018, with Milan’s renewed international prominence, Dalton Somaré has also taken part in AMART, Milan’s esteemed antique art fair. The gallery has been under the direction of Tomaso and Gerolamo Vigorelli since 2017.

Name: Art For Every Home
Description:
Art For Every Home is a fine art and design company that deals in Fine Art, Art Prints and Art Design. We have been on the forefront of consulting individuals and hotel chains. Let us help you conceptualise and design the right art plan for you.
 

Art Prints

AFEH offer s a catalogue of art prints that are limited editions art prints. We work with artists from around the world to create a print series of their work. Our prime objective is to make art available at affordable prices which is why the quality of our products is top notch and the prices are as reasonable as they can be.

 

We use Archival Matte Canvas and Paper to produce our art works after which we frame them with handcrafted Italian wood which we import from Italy. These works have a certified life of more than 200 years without any fading or change.

 

Original Art (Oil/Acrylic)

With a wide network of artists AFEH hand picks paintings for your interiors and procures original works of art for you. We understand the body of work you like, colour themes in your home decor and then help you buy the right piece of art.

 

Art Consulting

Being from the art field, AFEH also consults individuals and organisations on the art best suited for their interiors. From designing the layout to placement of art, we hold your hand all the way.

 

Hospitality

AFEH has ventured into the hospitality space by conceptualising and producing pieces of art for hostels. Starting from space planning, understanding the theme of the hotel to installing the art work onsite, AFEH has been successfully decorating hotels spaces.

Name: Stichting Kunstroute Het Groene Lint
Description: Stichting Kunstroute Het Groene Lint zorgt voor de realisatie van een ongeveer 24 km lang kunstwandelpad van de Markt in Eersel naar Domusdela in Eindhoven. Langs het kunstwandelpad zal een kunstwerk van vlechtheggen worden aangeplant dat zorgt voor herstel van een oud ambacht en voor meer biodiversiteit in het landschap. Daarnaast zullen per gemeente minimaal 4 kunstwerken (bijvoorbeeld in de vorm van landart) langs of in de buurt van de route te vinden zijn. De aanleg is gestart in 2020.

Name: Cure Nailhouse
Description:
Cure Nailhouse is an experimental artist residency and studio that redefines nail technology as an artistic medium through education, craftsmanship, and an inclusive art, fashion, and beauty community. 

Nailhouse, our creative studio, aims to celebrate and uplift our nail artists in residence by providing material resources for ephemeral sculptures, interdisciplinary dialogue, and a hybrid exhibition space to elevate their practice. 

Craft, our educational platform, unites established artists from diverse mediums with emerging nail artists in an interdisciplinary exchange. Through learning, mentorship, licensing pathways, and masterclasses, participants refine their techniques and elevate their practice to position nail art as a recognized fine art form.

Name: Merakii Art House
Description:
Meraki Art House, as the word ‘Meraki’ means doing something with creativity, soul or love, is a one stop for all the art lovers – the ones who make art and the ones who adore art – under one roof. Art is a free spirit and can come to anyone but not every ‘anyone' gets the chance to showcase their potential of love for the artist that might be budding inside them. All that ‘anyone' needs is a chance and a little appreciation. This is the time when Meraki Art House comes into play.

Merakii Art House is not only an art exhibition, but an initiative to bring all the young and talented artists to showcase their amazing work to the world. Well, if you are not young but still have that young artist inside you, we’re for you too. All we care about is the budding artist inside you who needs to showcase their magic of colors on the canvas and make something amazing out of it. Art see no bar, and so do we. It doesn’t matter from which state you belong, what your age is, what qualifications you have, or what style of your art is. Art is secular and differentiates no one, then who we are to do so. Every person is unique and so is their art, be it paintings, sculptures, or photography.

So, if you are one of those who were looking for something like this, it’s your chance. It’s our privilege to acquaint with all the artists and provide a platform to you all.

Name: One Paved Court Ltd
Description:
One Paved Court is an artist-run contemporary art gallery in the heart of Richmond, London. We show work from internationally recognised, to local or emerging contemporary artists.
We offer visitors an exciting programme of serious and stimulating exhibitions. Our visitors have the opportunity to engage directly with artists working in a range of media, through evening openings, artist’s talks and workshops. 

INFO FOR ARTISTS
Run by artists for artists, we support artists wanting to create and participate in ambitious, challenging exhibitions and events.
We regularly hold open calls on social media inviting artists to submit proposals for independent artist-led shows. 
Open Wednesday to Sunday 12-5pm.

Name: Museum Replicas
Description: Unlike mechanized duplication services, Museum Replicas partners with artists around the globe to painstakingly replicate each masterpiece by hand, one piece at a time. "We employ methods and materials used by the original artists whenever possible,"

Name: Fine Arts Toronto Gallery
Description:
Founded in 2003 in Toronto-Canada, Fine Arts Toronto Gallery offers for sale historical and contemporary works of art of Canadian, European as well as other international artists. 

While the gallery continues to keep a strong focus on Canadian artwork, we recently noticed the strong valuation of the East European art in all major auction houses, hence our decision to introduce more of such european artists to our clients and the Canadian art market. 

However, at the end of the day, our basic principle states that no matter if you buy art for pleasure or investment, you should first and foremost enjoy the artwork you acquire as it will be part of your life for years to come.

For more information, please visit us at: www.fineartstoronto.com

Name: Kunstschule Berlin
Description: Die Kunstschule Berlin ist eine renommierte Bildungseinrichtung, die sich der Förderung künstlerischer Talente widmet. Gelegen im Herzen der pulsierenden Hauptstadt Deutschlands, bietet die Schule ein breites Spektrum an Ausbildungen, Weiterbildungen und Kursen in verschiedenen Kunstdisziplinen wie Malerei, Illustration,Tattoo-Design, Kunsttherapie und neu auch Theaterpädagogik und Multidisziplinäre Performance. Mit einem Team von erfahrenen Dozenten, die selbst aktive Künstler sind, legt die Kunstschule Berlin großen Wert auf praxisnahen Unterricht und individuelle Förderung. Die Schule ist bekannt für ihre inspirierende Lernumgebung, in der Kreativität und Innovation im Mittelpunkt stehen. Regelmäßige Ausstellungen und Projekte ermöglichen den Studierenden, ihre Werke einem breiten Publikum zu präsentieren und wertvolle Erfahrungen in der Kunstszene zu sammeln.

Name: Ort Gallery
Description:
Ort Gallery Ort Gallery | Bridging gaps with Art and Warmth

Ort Gallery is an artist-led organisation. We are on a social mission to challenge the traditional role of visual art spaces and spreading Warmth into the arts industry.

Name: Flying Horse Editions | UCF
Description:
Flying Horse Editions is a collaborative research studio for visual artists at the University of Central Florida. A non-profit publisher of limited-edition prints, artist books, and art objects by internationally renowned artists, FHE offers unique opportunities for artists, students, and the Central Florida community.

Flying Horse Editions offers visiting artists the opportunity to work with FHE technicians to push the boundaries of their work while providing a unique educational experience for UCF students.

Name: Mason Fine Art
Description: Mason Fine Art is a 21,000 sq ft gallery and special event space located near Midtown and Buckhead in Atlanta, Georgia, representing emerging and established artists from around the United States and the world.

Name: The PAC Foundation
Description:
Stichting PAC is in het leven geroepen ter bevordering en stimulering van diversiteit en samenwerking op cultureel, artistiek en kunstzinnig gebied. Denk hierbij aan kunstprojecten met kinderen en jongeren in diverse wijken van Den Haag, evenementen als de PAC kunst Award, workshops en cursussen op scholen en in bibliotheken en exposities waaronder in het Atrium Den Haag.
Kunstprojecten Kinderen en jongeren
Stichting PAC inspireert, motiveert en ontwikkelt, in samenwerking met onze partners en scholen, talenten van kinderen en  jongeren op het gebied van beeldende kunst om ze de mogelijkheid te bieden de beste versie van zichzelf te laten worden. Kortom Stichting PAC wilt iedereen die niet of beperkt deelneemt aan kunst- en cultuuractiviteiten de kans geven en stimuleren om zelf kennis te maken met verschillende kunststijlen waaronder Graffiti en Street-Art. Jarenlange ervaring en betrouwbaar
Al meer dan 15 jaar verzorgen wij een heel breed aanbod aan kunstprojecten, workshops en cursussen op maat op veel verschillende scholen en locaties in en rond Den Haag. Wij werken uitsluitend met ons leuke team van docenten en tevens kunstenaars die een passie hebben voor les geven.

PAC wil het culturele platform in Den Haag ondersteunen daar waar ondernemerschap, creatieve initiatieven, inclusie en ontplooiing worden gestimuleerd, gecreëerd en gefaciliteerd. De stichting wil alle lagen van de bevolking (jong, oud, arm en rijk etc.) stimuleren, laten samenwerken en de mogelijkheid bieden om hun creatieve ideeën vorm te geven en uit te kunnen voeren.

Doelen anno 2023
Stichting PAC werkt op dit moment aan meerdere projecten die allemaal een rol spelen in de culturele wereld van dit moment.

Projecten Kleurkunst in je Wijk! 
Peace Art Culture Award (PAC Award) 
YUTAA (Young Urban Talent Art Award)
Street-Art Murals
KinderKunstAward 2023

Name: Peace for Art Foundation
Description: The "Peace for Art" Foundation was created after the outbreak of the war in Ukraine to respond to the urgent need to help the people there and to act for the protection of existing and future cultural heritage.

Name: Hermanus Art
Description:
In de afgelopen 25 jaar ben ik als kunstenaar actief onder de naam Hermanus. Ik onderscheid mij door mijn diversiteit aan technieken. Materialen als koper, speksteen, keramiek, gouche, olieverf en 'gewoon' potlood en papier, ik gebruik ze bij het maken van portretten, erotisch en surrealistisch werk.

Ik adem taal en cultuur als columnist en tekenaar bij De Nuk (www.denuk.nl). Stoeien met gezichten en goochelen met taal zijn een tweede natuur voor me. 

Momenteel ben ik bezig met een serie portretten van Bijzondere Utrechters. Wit op zwart met soms wat kleur erbij, komen bekende en minder bekende Utrechters op papier. Een succesvolle serie, te zien via: https://denuk.nl/author/hermanus/

Name: Uhl Studios
Description:
Uhl Studios is a fine art gallery located in Golden, Colorado. Uhl Studios specializes in motorcycle and aviation art, and designer apparel. Uhl Studios fine art is officially licensed by Harley-Davidson. Uhl Studios was formed in 1997 when David Uhl’s fine art skills and Danial James’ illustration talents were fused together.

David Uhl is recognized for his unique style and vintage motorcycle paintings. His artwork is displayed throughout the world, and sought by prominent art collectors and celebrities alike, including Jay Leno, Steven Tyler, and U2. CBS Sunday Morning with Charles Osgood, referred to David as “The Norman Rockwell of Harley-Davidson artists”. Danial James creates award-winning visual solutions for a wide array of national and international clients, including Coca-Cola, IBM, FedEx, and Coors. Uhl Studios now offers an exciting line of designer apparel “Uhl Works”, individually created by David and Danial.

Uhl Studios takes part in various motorcycle runs and aviation shows across the country, and hosts special events at the gallery throughout the year. We are art, motorcycle, and aviation enthusiasts, and we want to share our passions with you.

Come visit us at the gallery or at one of our events… and Uhl feel the vibe.

Description: Double Elephant Print Workshop is a CIC based in the heart of Exeter, Devon. We offer open access printmaking to members, alongside courses and printmaking events and activities in the wider community.
