Name: Lauraine Diggins Fine Art, Gallery
Description:
Specialists in Australian Colonial, Impressionist, Modern, Contemporary and Indigenous Paintings, Sculpture and Decorative Arts. 

Founded and Directed by the late Lauraine Diggins OAM from 1974 to 2019, the Gallery continues the same operations in the Australian fine art market consulting throughout Australia and internationally with Lauraine’s husband Michael Blanche, as Director and long term Gallery Manager Ruth Lovell.

Lauraine Diggins Fine Art specialises in Australian artworks, offering our clientele a confidential service based on experience and integrity. We are also able to source quality European artworks. As well as curating quality exhibitions, our services include expert guidance on developing a collection for both individuals and corporations, art for investment, research and sourcing works.


畫廊很高興通過展示優質藝術品來延續 Lauraine Diggins 的遺產，畫廊提供了一個溫馨而獨立的空間，將藝術品、收藏家、藝術家和藝術愛好者聚集在一起。画廊專注於澳大利亞殖民地、印象派、現代、當代和本土繪畫、雕塑、紙上和裝飾藝術，並根據要求採購歐洲傑作。

Name: Tryon Arts & Crafts School
Description:
TACS is a year-round nonprofit craft school promoting both contemporary and heritage artmaking practices. The school offers education and public programs with established artists visiting from across the United States, as well as ongoing opportunities with a roster of regional instructors. 

The school's main facility is housed in a retrofitted public school building, with a regional artist shop, multiple exhibition spaces, and advanced technological studios in fiber arts, glass, lapidary, ceramics, jewelry, and wood. Separate facilities on TACS' campus house a welding and flame-work studio (new in 2019/2020) and a traditional blacksmithing forge.

Polk County Community Foundation provides grant support to TACS and community partners to provide educational outreach for youth and adults throughout Polk County, NC.

Name: OpenArtExchange
Description:
OpenArtExchange is an international art gallery that supports and connects Non-Western contemporary visual artists with the Western arts and culture world. We do this through international exchange programs where artists work in residency together with local artists on exhibitions and other art events, through participation in festivals and European art fairs and through our on-line network. 

We operate with a low cost structure and a low cost environment for our artists. In this way we aim to secure that all our artists, whether Non-Western or Western, get regular high end international exposure as well as the majority of the proceeds for their works. 

For collectors and art lovers we are a gallery where you can meet (inter)national artists and other art lovers, experience and buy a great variety of high quality contemporary art, which changes every 6-8 weeks. Through our thematic exhibitions and side events at our center, which do not shun cross-overs with other art disciplines like performing arts or poetry, you can explore 450 m2 of art from different cultures and disciplines, with an overweight in African art. By invitation you can get free access to and meet us at one of the European art fairs or make an appointment for personal viewings and/or advice with us at our office in Huizen, our center in Schiedam or another location of your choosing.

If you are interested to work with us, review or interview us or one of our artists, support us, make an appointment or to just be invited for our events, please contact us at info@openartexchange, or through our website www.openartexchange.com. 

You can also visit us at Hoogstraat 85 in the museum quarter of Schiedam during our regular opening hours: Wednesday-Saturday 10:00-18:00h or Sunday 13:00-18:00h.

Name: Vazieux | Art Gallery Paris
Description:
Specializing in the abstract post-war movement in the West, curator and gallery owner Sabine Vazieux has dedicated the past years exploring her passion for the aesthetic dialogue between Eastern and Western art.
Her travels to discover and research historical movements resulted in rich encounters with artists and numerous studio visits worldwide, bearing fruit in Sabine’s uncompromising choices. She currently works with Asian abstract artists, and works from her selection have also been exhibited in major collections and museums internationally.
Convinced that galleries and institutions share the common objective of exposing artists optimally to the public and to collectors, Sabine closely collaborates with museums.

Name: Art Fair 14C
Description:
Recognizing that Art Fairs are now 46% percent of the global art market, but that most small and medium sized galleries are shut out, ART FAIR 14C was created to address this imbalance and help strengthen careers in the visual arts.

Effective April 28, 2021, Art Fair 14C merged with Art House Productions to improve and expand the visual arts opportunities for the Jersey City community and beyond. The merger will allow both groups to better structure resources and to support each other in a more meaningful way. 

Founded in 2019 and 2001 respectively, Art Fair 14C and Art House Productions both serve artists and arts lovers throughout New Jersey with high quality arts programming.

Art Fair 14C Mission:
– Strengthen smaller art galleries
– Increase opportunities for artists
– Expand public access to fine art
– Enhance Jersey City’s reputation as a leading arts destination

With events supporting artists and galleries all year round, Art Fair 14C is #morethananartfair

Name: International Fashion Fusion Academy
Description:
At IFF, we’re dedicated to revolutionizing fashion education with a mission focused on enhancing lifestyles, creating job opportunities, and promoting self-dependence and confidence. Our innovative approach encourages learning and earning simultaneously, empowering individuals to create and explore new styles while building a sustainable career in fashion.

Explore our affordable and accessible short courses in styling and discover how IFF is redefining the future of fashion education for everyone.

Name: ARTE ENTRE PILARES
Description:
Arte Entre Pilares es un estudio-taller de creación artística, ubicado en Madrid y enfocado a la realización de todo tipo de proyectos de arte y  decoración para eventos, cine , T.V., teatro,agencias de publicidad y diseño, escaparates, locales de ocio o particulares, que buscan elementos especiales, llamativos y singulares , los cuales solo pueden ser  creados artesanalmente mediante criterio y manos de artistas y profesionales, no de máquinas...

Empleando materiales como poliestireno expandido (porexpán, poliespán, telgopor, estico, corcho blanco) fibra de vidrio, madera, tela, cartón, hierro etc... realizamos todo tipo de corpóreos, esculturas, maquetas, escenografías , decorados,rótulos, carrozas, stands, etc...Trabajos funcionales , con gran impacto visual, unas veces efímeros y otras permanentes, para exterior o interior y a todos los formatos...

Name: Studio Spruyt
Description:
Hedendaagse schilderijen en installaties van 'Studio Spruyt'.

De schilder sluit het handschrift quasi volledig uit. De transparantie van de werken laat de textuur van het canvas doorschemeren. Deze methode zorgt voor een fragiel en lichtogend resultaat. De specifieke vormen, volumes en opstellingen maken deel uit van het werk. De schilderijen staan nooit alleen maar kunnen enkel begrepen worden in het licht van de vele andere werken.

Name: Orpimento
Description: Orpimento est un atelier de restauration d'oeuvres d'art et de monuments historiques

Name: Visual Arts Academy and Studio
Description: Visual Arts Academy and Studio is a local Louisville KY business that aims to provide creative visual art classes to individuals of all ages and skill levels. Our studio will offer a wide range of art courses, including drawing, painting, cartooning, comics, still life drawing, and more. As well as providing weekly studio space for those who wish to create regularly without having the space to do so. We believe in fostering artistic expression, skill development, and a sense of community among our students and members. Additionally, we will showcase art created by our students/members and provide a limited selection of art supplies for purchase. Highly trained and skilled instructor lead courses will ensure that our students receive the highest quality art education and mentoring.

Name: Artex - Kunstenschool Texel
Description:
Met ruim 2700 cursisten en 32 personeelsleden staat Artex - Kunstenschool Texel midden in de Texelse samenleving. Leerlingen van alle leeftijden volgen hier wekelijks cursussen op het gebied van muziek, dans, theater, beeldend en andere kunstdisciplines. Onze docenten verzorgen op alle Texelse basisscholen muziek- en beeldende lessen.

Artex staat voor grote veranderingen: het centrum wil graag verhuizen naar een andere locatie en demografische verschuivingen bieden kansen om nieuwe markten aan te boren.

Name: KP Projects
Description:
KP Projects (formerly Merry Karnowsky Gallery) is home to several of the most significant artists working today. For nearly a decade, the gallery has been centrally focused on championing emerging and mid-career artists who push beyond the boundaries of formal definition. Devoted to exhibiting contemporary works of art that are challenging and innovative, the gallery is committed to fostering new directions in American Art, and consistently advises on private and corporate collections.

Articles about the gallery, and/or it’s artists have been featured in Juxtapoz, Swindle, Flaunt, Paper, Nylon, Variety, Art Week, Art Issues, Flash Art, Modern Painters, The New York Times, The Wall Street Journal, Time magazine, The LA Weekly, and The Los Angeles Times.

KP Projects artists have been included in group and solo museum exhibitions at the Grand Central Art Center, the Baltic Center for Contemporary Art, the Cincinnati Art Center, the Yerba Buena Center for the Arts, MoCA Miami, the San Jose Museum of Art, and the Los Angeles County Museum of Art.

Name: Moomsteatern
Description:
Moomsteatern gör scenkonst med normbrytande skådespelare. Här arbetar professionella skådespelare med och utan funktionsvariation, på lika villkor. Vi kallar det för inkludering. Vi menar att vi gör scenkonsten större, bättre och vackrare. Vi utmanar teaterkonsten, publiken och hela samhället. Med relevanta berättelser, som bara vi kan berätta. Med röster som du sällan hör. Vill du vara med? 

Moomsteatern in Malmö, Sweden, produce inclusive theatre with professional actors who are breaking the norms. Moomsteatern hire actors with and without learning-disabilities, on equal terms.  We claim that it makes our art bigger, better and more beautiful. We want to challenge the stage arts, our audience and society. We do that by telling relevant stories that only we can tell, with voices seldom heard. Do you want to join us?

Name: Champion Art Appraisals + Advising
Description: Champion Art Appraisals assists the seasoned to novice collector in beginning or building their art collections and in performing appraisals for insurance purposes, non-cash charitable donations, resale knowledge, damage/loss and much more. Contact us today for a complimentary consultation!

Name: XENAKI ceramic art&design
Description:
Welcome to XENAKI Ceramic Art & Design Studio!
We specialize in handmade ceramic lighting and decor that combines natural inspiration with modern aesthetics. Each piece is crafted to transform spaces into works of art, adding warmth and uniqueness to interiors.

Our work is perfect for:

Interior designers seeking custom ceramic solutions.

Architects looking for bespoke decor to enhance their projects.

Businesses aiming to elevate their spaces with unique artisan pieces.


Let's create something extraordinary together. Contact us to discuss your next project!"

Name: SKWAK STUDIO
Description: SKWAK is a French artist specialized in illustration, characters design and graphic design.

Name: Jansen Art Center
Description: The Jansen Art Center is a community-centered arts organization in Lynden, Washington, offering world-class facilities, expert instruction, and a welcoming environment where everyone belongs. We serve artists and learners of all ages and skill levels through professional studios in ceramics, textiles, jewelry, fine art, digital and film photography, music, and performance, alongside curated exhibitions and meetups. As a creative third space and regional arts destination, The J fosters personal growth, collaboration, and artistic excellence, supporting emerging and established artists and hobbyists as they evolve their work and find belonging within a vibrant creative community.

Name: Sociedad Española de Estética y Teoría de las Artes (SEyTA)
Description:
Sociedad Española de Estética y Teoría de las Artes

Asociación creada en 2014 para el fomento de la actividad productora, investigadora y difusora en estética y teoría del arte.

"SEyTA viene a sumarse al movimiento asociativo que está dinamizando el ámbito de la cultura y en concreto, de las artes, en los últimos años. Con vocación interdisciplinar, SEyTA se propone impulsar la dimensión universitaria y pública de la estética y de la teoría de las artes y el ejercicio del pensamiento libre en el marco de una sociedad igualitaria, plural y democrática en estos tiempos de banalización de la cultura".

Name: Honarbaan "هــنــربــــــان"
Description:
شرکت هنربان آپادانا، به عنوان  نخستين شرکت تخصصي خدمات فرهنگي و هنري بخش خصوصي، با هدف ارائه زنجيره کامل خدمات و مشارکت در ايجاد بستر منسجم ارائه آن در حوزه هاي مرتبط با فضاها، برنامه ها، آثار و اموال فرهنگي و هنري و حضور در برنامه هاي توسعه صنايع فرهنگي و هنري با تجميع صاحب نظران و کارشناسان زبده و مجرب تاسيس گرديد. 
برخی از حوزه های همکاری این شرکت  مبتنی بر نیازمندی های فرهنگی و هنری عبارت است از؛
•	(*) طراحی مفهومی، هویت بخشی، احیاء و باززنده سازی
•	(*) اجرای پروژه های زیربنایی فرهنگی هنری
•	(*) تحقیق و توسعه محصولات و خدمات نوین و فنآورانه در حوزه
•	(*) اصالت یابی و ارزش گذاری آثار هنری و اموال فرهنگی
•	(*) بیمه آثار و خدمات تخصصی بسته بندی و حمل و نقل
•	(*) حفاظت و مرمت اموال فرهنگی به عنوان ثروت ملی
•	(*) تامین محتوای تصویری و نمایشی، سیستم های هوشمند صوتی و نورپردازی
•	  (*) Animation, VR, CGI, DS, VFX, Simulation, HAS
• 	(*) Smart Systems for galleries and museums including smart lighting, smart showcases and ...

Name: Stichting Beeldende Kunst Voorburg
Description:
De Stichting Beeldende Kunst Voorburg wil kleur en creativiteit in het leven van mensen brengen! Sinds 1982 kan iedereen, in smalste pandje van Voorburg terecht om hier een kunstwerk te lenen en/ of te kopen.

Daarnaast organiseert de Stichting workshops, educatieve projecten en de kunstzinnige evenementen in Leidschendam-Voorburg.

Name: Gary Myatt Ltd
Description:
Gary Myatt is one of the UK’s leading muralists, specializing in original, hand-painted murals and trompe l’oeil artwork that complement a wide variety of decorative schemes.

Gary is trained in Fine Art to post-graduate level, and the many years spent studying and practicing Fine Art means that Gary’s accomplished painting skills render the quality of his murals, and stunningly realistic trompe l’oeil, capable of withstanding close scrutiny.

As well as many years of Fine Art training, Gary has 15 years professional experience, within which he has built up an extensive portfolio, including commissions for both commercial and residential projects. Gary has been commissioned to produce work for large shopping malls; hotels; private residences; restaurants; and the BBC.

Gary Myatt is a London-based artist who works internationally, having so far worked on projects throughout the UK, Europe and the MIddle East.

Name: La Lune en Parachute
Description:
La Lune en Parachute a été créée en 1991 par sept passionnés d’art contemporain. Reconnue organisme d’intérêt général (loi 1901), l’association s’inscrit dans une politique de démocratisation, en menant des actions qui tendent à favoriser la rencontre entre l’Art et la population vosgienne.

La Lune en Parachute programme cinq expositions par an à La Plomberie, un magnifique espace de 600m2. La programmation est tournée vers la scène émergente contemporaine, en faisant le pari de la diversité : peinture, sculpture, installation, photographie, etc.. Elle alterne expositions collectives et monographiques. L’association, a depuis 24 ans, acquis une renommée nationale grâce à la qualité de sa programmation.

Depuis neuf ans, La Lune en parachute, a également mis en place l’opération ART BUS, une salle d’exposition itinérante qui va à la rencontre des collégiens sur tout le territoire vosgien. L’Art Bus visite une vingtaine de collèges du département par an. Une enseignante d’Arts plastiques est chargée de mission pédagogique pour la réalisation d’un dossier pédagogique portant sur l’exposition dans le bus.

La Lune en Parachute accueille chaque année 6000 visiteurs à La Plomberie. Des actions de médiation adaptées à la diversité des publics sont menées : visites commentées d’expositions et ateliers de pratiques artistiques, pour les scolaires et tout public.

Du mercredi au samedi, 13h-18h
Dimanche, 14h-18h
Entrée Libre

Name: OROSHI
Description: Oroshi conçoit et accompagne des projets culturels au service d'une fabrique sensible du territoire.

Name: Kijiji Sanaa
Description: Community arts organization and artist residency

Name: Washington Studio School
Description:
Washington Studio School's (WSS) mission is to offer exceptional visual arts learning opportunities to District and Washington-area residents of all skill levels in a welcoming, inclusive and focused environment. We teach skills of observation, critical analysis, and material technique in the time-honored disciplines of drawing, painting, mixed media, and sculpture. WSS encourages the use of these skills and techniques by students and workshop attendees as a catalyst for producing work that is personal, relevant, and contemporary. 

The WSS vision is twofold: to be a recognized and accessible cultural center for studio-based programming and an incubator and contributor to the District's vibrant arts community. WSS makes available regular free participatory public programs, exhibits, and artist talks of local and nationally recognized artists; affordable drop-in figure drawing sessions; artist studios; and programs that engage, connect and enrich District residents and visitors.

Name: Mosaic Art Studio
Description: Art school with the believe to nurture children since young through art. Wants children seeing the world tru making arts.

Name: Aarlo u Viggo
Description:
Aarlo u Viggo est une galerie d'art Suisse qui représente une dizaine d'artistes contemporains :
katia de conti
jacques chessex
dahflo
barthélemy grossmann
kasia jackowska

jp kalonji

Name: Fundación Manolo Prieto
Description: Organización sin ánimo de lucro, que tiene como fines la conservación, estudio y difusión de la obra de Manolo Prieto. Este artista pionero del diseño gráfico en España (diseñador del famoso Toro de Osborne)  cosechó varios premios nacionales e internacionales como cartelista publicitario y escultor de medallas. Sus ilustraciones para la revista literaria Novelas y Cuentos constituyen un verdadero laboratorio que ponen de manifiesto su gran capacidad para la síntesis y su gran destreza como dibujante.

Name: Gemini Gel
Description: Gemini G.E.L. is an exhibition of fine-art prints and sculptures. The focus is on print revival, lithography, and training master printers. They also print silkscreen self-portraits and three-dimensional editions.

Name: La Tijera Colectiva
Description:
Iniciativa cultural y creativa colombiana que promueve la técnica del collage como una herramienta artística propicia para la introspección, la creación de comunidad, el fortalecimiento de la creatividad y el pensamiento crítico con enfoque de género. 

Promovemos y visibilizamos el trabajo de artistas del collage de distintas partes del mundo a través de la elaboración de retos creativos, procesos editoriales, pedagógicos y de construcción de comunidad
en torno a la técnica.

Name: Beautiful Art Prints LLC
Description:
Beautiful, contemporary art prints. Start building your art collection here. Free shipping in the USA. Sign up for a chance to win a free print each month. A portion of all sales supports the UN World Food program, winner of the 2020 Nobel Peace Prize.

We offer contemporary fine art prints for home, office, retail and institutional environments. Prints are available framed or unframed. You'll spend about as much for one of our prints as you will for a very nice dinner at a fashionable restaurant, but you'll keep your Beautiful Art Print for more than just an evening. You'll likely keep it for a lifetime. Here's why:

1. Our Artists. We work with a limited portfolio of artists whose work is both exceptional in quality and not widely distributed through mass-market platforms. Several of our prints are special limited editions of 500 or fewer prints and are hand-signed by the artists. When you order from Beautiful Art Prints, you're investing in a remarkable work of art from an excellent artist.

2. Our Printing. Not all art prints from all vendors are produced at the same level of quality. At Beautiful Art Prints, we use thick, premium, bright white museum-grade papers. And our inks are bold and colorful. Both papers and inks are made for long-term durability and UV light protection. At Beautiful Art Prints, we spend more on paper and printing than others because your long-term satisfaction is worth it to us.

3. Our Packaging and Shipping. We take extra steps and incur extra costs to ensure your print arrives in perfect condition.

4. Free Shipping. And of course, we ship free to anywhere in the continental United States. 

We work hard to deliver the finest quality of art to our customers. And we want you to be thrilled with the art print you purchase. Upon delivery, we think you'll be proud to hang your Beautiful Art Print in your home or office. It will give you immeasurable viewing pleasure for years to come.

Name: VICTORIA ACADEMY OF BALLET
Description:
Victoria Academy of Ballet (VAB), Western Canada's leading dance school, offers specialized dance instruction for young dancers through to professional level. Under the leadership and direction of Bleiddyn Del Villar Bellis, FCSC-CICB, the Academy established program areas for professional as well as recreational ballet and dance training.  Internationally acclaimed artistic faculty, administration, and musicians, support the continued commitment to EXCELLENCE while nurturing a supporting and engaging environment for students to learn, thrive and succeed.

VOCATIONAL DIVISION
VAB's Vocational Division offers training programs for students who wish to train in an intensive atmosphere. The Professional Training Program and Post-Secondary Bridge Program develop dancers who are prepared technically, artistically, and personally for a professional career. These dancers engage in various performance opportunities including group and solo work in domestic and international competitions and festivals and perform in VAB’s shows. The Bridge Program is a three-year diploma program designed for students who are not yet established in the professional field of dance but have graduated from their high school academic and dance training programs. The program holds Designation status with the BC Ministry of Post-Secondary Education and Future Skills, Private Training Institutions Branch as well as Education Quality Assurance (EQA) status, both under the umbrella of the BC Ministry of Education BC.

OPEN DIVION
This Division instills a love, joy, and passion for dance. Classes are offered for the full year, September to June, as well as in sessions running for 6 to 12 weeks long. Students ages 2 to adult are nurtured in a supportive, welcoming, and rewarding learning environment where they are inspired to reach their greatest potential. The full-year students participate in an annual year-end recital.

Name: A Moving Exhibition
Description:
A Moving Exhibition is a travelling exhibition of art which enables artists and students, to showcase their artwork and through doing so enhance the travel experience for London visitors, and build on London’s reputation as a cultural and creative capital.
A moving exhibition's aim is to reach and engage an extensive and diverse community in the course of daily life by "moving London through art".  A Moving Exhibition is expanding access to public of the innovative creative arts projects and initiatives that exist within London. 
As the artwork of A Moving Exhibition is open for public submission, both professional and novice artwork are published in the exhibition book.
The idea is to select eclectic artists to participate in an upcoming series of group shows that will take place in different venues in London.  The exhibitions and the artists participating will slightly change from one venue to another and by doing so the exhibition will progress and transform.  We have encouraged artists to use this as their theme in their submitting artwork although the theme was not strict.

Name: We Roam Freely Inc.
Description: We Roam Freely Inc. is a non-profit organization that works to uplift WOC and non-binary artists of color by prioritizing accessible showcasing, unrestrictive grants, immersive residencies, and intentional conversations. Founded in April 2019, WRF has organized two in-person art shows, a virtual showcase and panel discussion, and various community events and collaborations. Our events provide staffing opportunities for BIPOC communities as well as spotlight WOC and BIPOC artists without collecting a commission. Our focus in 2021 is to increase brand acquisition, develop new partnerships with like-minded individuals and organizations, meet our funding goals, and meaningfully impact the careers of BIPOC artists.

Name: Marion Cultural Alliance
Description: Supporting the Ocala/Marion County cultural community through advocacy, fundraising, and more. Offering MCA Cultural Grant Awards to cultural organizations.

Name: Portrait Artist
Description: Having received formal art training from Virginia Commonwealth University and Roanoke College, Jenni now works as a commissioned artist.

Name: Artstart
Description:
Artstart is an award-winning privately incorporated 501(c)3 non-profit educational arts organization serving all of Sonoma County.

Artstart is financed by public funds, grants, private donations, and commissions, and has made a significant impact in our community by creating over hundreds of public art benches, murals and installations. We work in a partnership with governmental agencies, nonprofit organizations, large corporations and small businesses. We provide inspiration to young artists and create a sense of ownership and pride in our community.

Name: Ars COCO
Description:
We offer collectors a direct and easy way to access the work of highly skilled contemporary artists, as well as foster the cross-national communication between them. We feel especially inclined toward a particular profile of art collector: one who is passionate and open-minded, not necessarily experienced yet eager to see, learn and play a vital role in today's art scene. We intend to assist you with everything you need to start or continue your own pathway as a collector. Commitment towards our artists shows not only in our exposure and circulation of their work, but also through their life-long incorporation into a thriving network of buyers, collectors and art enthusiasts. We provide support for the continuation of their activities and perform a close following of these, granting us with a deeper understanding of their practices at the time of introducing them to the newly interested.

Our ultimate goal is to become a wide-reaching cultural entity through the creation of a 'collective collection', in which both novel collectors as well as more experienced ones can come together in an art investment fund. With the investment of our our partners, our team intends to manage both the growth and diversification of the collection, as well as its display to an international public. We would perform this through periodic exibition programmes, both within and outside our organisation, as well as the leading of new acquisitions. In the longrun, COCO is motivated to become a lively archive of emerging tendencies in contemporary art, acting globally as a referent both institutional and academic, as well as serving as a launchpad for the beginners and the art lovers who would like to become part of the building of a collection.

Name: Daniel Blau Ltd
Description: Daniel Blau Ltd is an East London gallery specialising in vintage photography. Although our holdings are particularly strong in Nineteenth Century Photographs, we have a broad selection of Twentieth Century images available. We specialise in Nasa photographs, press pictures, war events, politics, atomic bomb testings, Civil Rights, among many other themes. Opening Hours: 11am - 6pm, Tuesday to Saturday.

Name: American Eagle Fine Art
Description:
Who We Are
We specialize in Early California, Early Hawaiian and American Regional Fine Art, (1870-1970).  We are major buyers of California, Hawaiian, Southwestern and American Fine Art. We are actively buying daily. Contact us today about selling whole estates or any paintings.
History
hill_vernalAmerican Eagle Fine Art was founded in 1999 by two avid collectors of 19th and 20th American and European Fine Art. We opened our first gallery on the East Coast in 2000. We have 30 years of corporate and entrepreneurial experience in many industries from high technology to motorsports, and now fine art.
Our Mission
We are committed to serving our clients with their fine art collection now and in the future. We strive to offer the best resources and collection of fine art available at the best prices of any gallery in the United States. Our clients are the most important reason we exist and we conduct our business with the utmost in professional services.
Terms and Conditions of Sale
Title to artwork or other products passes to the purchaser upon completion of payment in full. All sales are final. American Eagle Fine Art reserves the right to hold all merchandise until payment in full is received. All payments should be addressed to American Eagle Fine Art, and all merchandise F.O.B. Scottsdale, Arizona. We professionally pack all items according to fine art standards. We ship via Federal Express Air and Ground.

Name: Concept d'art et déco
Description:
La société Concept d’Art et Déco est le fruit de la fusion de diverses sociétés du bâtiment présente en Haute Normandie depuis 10 ans.

En plus de notre siège établit au Petit Quevilly, à la périphérie de Rouen, CAD est implanté dans 3 autres agences en Ile-de-France, aux Antilles et au Maroc.

Notre souci de la qualité et de la maîtrise des plannings nous a amenés à élaborer des concepts novateurs de réalisation et de finition. C’est ainsi que le Système Quadra a vu le jour, un procédé répondant aussi bien aux particuliers qu’aux professionnels.

Aujourd’hui, CAD est une entreprise moderne en plein développement employant sur nos 4 agences une équipe de 50 peintres et un staff administratif composé de conducteurs de travaux, directeurs d’agence, un directeur d’exploitation, une équipe commerciale et une direction financière.

CAD c’est aussi 1.000 m² de dépôt pour les approvisionnements chantier, une flotte de 28 véhicules, 10 pistolets Air-less, 1.000m² d’échafaudages ainsi que tous les moyens techniques nécessaires à la réalisation de vos projets.
Notre technologie et notre expérience nous permettent de répondre à tous types de projets, de la villa individuelle à un Hôpital de plus de 120 000 m² de surface.

Notre ambition ?… Vous surprendre par notre démarche d’entreprise de peinture jeune, respectueuse de ses engagements et satisfaire toutes vos attentes qualitatives et environnementales.

Sur ce dernier volet, CAD vient de fusionner avec une entreprise de nettoyage, nous permettant ainsi d’avoir nos propres techniciens de la propreté utilisant des produits exclusivement biologiques.

CAD, le Peintre différent !

Name: BRONK STUDIO
Description: I am an artist and offer paintings, illustrations, prints and apparel

Name: The Sketching Shop
Description: Plateforme web multi-vendeur dédiée à la vente et l'achat de croquis originaux dans les domaines de la bande dessinées, l'illustration, la mode, le design, etc..

Name: Ooze Studio - A Division of Humm Creative
Description:
Ooze Studio is a community-driven art studio oozing inspiration and contagious creativity. At Ooze we understand the fragility of creative expression. When strict parameters or emphasis on technical perfection is the focus, natural creativity can easily turn into conformity. We prefer to open minds and empower our Oozers to connect with themselves through their own artistic process, using their imaginations to lift their creativity to new heights and build humble confidence within.

We enjoy many different mediums of art and design through a variety of workshops for kids, teens, adults & seniors, special needs and neurodiverse communities, and organizations looking to build team culture. 

Ooze Studio was founded in January 2020 by Mia Temple, after she volunteered as the Head Art Docent at her children's elementary school for two years. The first year of Ooze was free to all via live zoom sessions during COVID-19's first shelter-in-place. Quickly after, Ooze moved to Monterey Peninsula, where Mia began working in-person at Santa Catalina, Tularcitos, remotely and in the studio. doing private sessions and summer camps. This next year will bring many new offerings!

Name: Artistically Connected
Description:
Who are we and what do we do?

Artistically Connected is based in Toronto, Ontario and our focus is building a network and global marketplace for artists and art buyers. We strive to provide you a sense of community and the highest level of customer service.

Originally founded as an art consulting company for corporate clients, Artistically Connected has evolved its business to cater to individual home owners and small businesses through this on-line store. To do this, Artistically Connected has established artist agreements and shipping contracts to ensure that anyone in any place has the ability to access original art at an affordable price point. Now you have more selection, better pricing and more convenience than going to local galleries or brick and mortar businesses for your art.

Selling and buying art can be very challenging and a time consuming task. Art is subjective and each person (artist and buyer) has specific styles and sizes they are looking for, which is why Artistically Connected developed this on-line marketplace with the highest level of security, customer service, quality control and wide range of art.

How does Artistically Connected benefit? Each member pays low monthly fees. These fees are allocated toward marketing and advertising initiatives, developing better customer service solutions and staffing needs.

Artistically Connected is completely transparent and there are never any unexpected surprises before or after a transaction has been made.

Name: SEA Strokes Studio
Description:
For the love of art, stories & connection. 

SEA Strokes Studio was born from a dream — to create a place where art isn’t just taught, but felt.  
This isn’t only about techniques and tools.
It’s about expression. Healing. Joy.
It’s about building a vibrant community where every creative soul feels at home.

Whether you’re picking up a brush for the first time or finding your way back to it —
 You’re welcome here.
 You’re enough.
 You belong.

Let’s create magic together.

Name: Harvard Expressions Dance Company
Description:
Harvard's Expressions Dance Company (EDC) is a completely student-run company showcasing hip hop dance. 

Founded in 1978 with its inaugural performances in the spring of 1979, EDC has a long legacy of artistic achievement which spans other forms of contemporary dance beyond its current focus on hip hop. The company is built on three guiding principles, which we strive to promote in all areas of the organization: Creativity, Confidence, and Community.
 
Creativity: 
In Expressions, we urge our choreographers and dancers to incorporate a variety of styles into their movement and to use diverse choreography as a platform for their stories, emotions, and concepts. By sharing their own self-expressions with fellow dancers and audience members, Expressions dancers create a transformative experience within every piece.

Confidence: 
Expressions choreographers and dancers collaborate with one another and challenge each another to rise to each individual’s potential, learning skills and gaining confidence for on and off the dance-floor. Expressions strives to provide opportunities for dancers of every level to grow and develop. While Company Piece serves as a non-audition option for dancers of all levels to perform in our bi-annual shows and showcases a variety of styles, dancers also have the opportunity to join pieces led by specific choreographers, which allows for deeper immersion into a specific style or vision over the course of the semester. The performance and competition subset, EXP, provides the opportunity for more experienced dancers to be challenged with more advanced choreography taught at a faster pace. 

Community: 
From Company-wide social events to a series of open workshops, Expressions seeks to create a community on campus, bringing students together to dance, socialize, and learn from one another. Expressions endeavors to shape an inclusive environment where dancers of all levels, backgrounds, and identities feel comfortable and welcome.

Name: AFO CASTRO Projects

Built by artists for artists, CASTRO provides opportunities for emergent talents in Rome. 

CASTRO’s vision is to foster a vibrant and inclusive artistic community where creativity thrives and boundaries are pushed. Through their innovative programs and collaborations, CASTRO aspires to shape the future of contemporary art in Italy and beyond. CASTRO offers a diverse range of educational programs, workshops, and residencies that encourage artistic growth and experimentation. 

Through fundraising efforts, cultural events, and partnerships with institutions in the United States, American Friends of CASTRO Projects aims to provide additional support for artists participating in the program and foster dynamic transatlantic dialogue and collaboration in the arts.

FUKYOUWA signifie Dissonant, Discorde, Disharmonie. Car pourquoi devrions nous évoluer systématiquement dans une société qui nous demande d'êtres des duplicatas, tant dans nos relations sociales, nos expressions de l'art que dans nos carrières professionnelles.

Soyez votre propre genre, cultivez ce qui fait votre individualité, brillez par votre discordance.

Name: Fondazione Converso
Description:
Fondazione Converso is committed to fostering the dialogue of art and architecture through site-specific exhibitions, combining elements of performance, music, poetry and visual art to forge a path for new models of artistic practice.

Housed in the 16th-Century church of San Paolo Converso in central Milan, Converso was founded on the concept of a “total art,” coined by Allan Kaprow in “Notes on the Creation of a Total Art” (1958), where he writes: “Conscious thoughts about a total art … were modeled on earlier examples of the church...”
 
Converso’s program aim to disrupts the distinction between practices through art as a catalyst for conversion in its environment. A nomadic CONVERSO_OFFSITE program focusses on publishing initiatives and site-specific happenings all around the world. 
 
Converso is a non-profit space, a true kunsthalle, and is always free and open to the public. As home to the arts for almost 500 years, San Paolo Converso’s late Renaissance and Mannerist interiors have today been reimagined as two unique exhibition spaces, establishing a context for display beyond the aesthetic paradigm of the white cube.

Name: Actors Realm
Description:
Mission Statement 
The Actors Realm serves as an acting studio where the emphasis is on coaching students to find their innate talent by learning the craft and artistry of Acting.  It offers ongoing classes with a focus on stage performance, and periodic workshops on additional topics. Classes include vocal and physical warm-ups, acting exercises, and scene and character development.  The result is that the students learn to connect with their “voice,” be “in the moment,” and develop characters that are “vital” and uniquely their own.  Actors Realm partners with Volcanic Theater to provide material for further development, as well as opportunities for performance.

Vision Statement 
The Vision of the Actors Realm is to serve as a studio where the craft and art of theatre and dramatic performance is deepened through exploration and practice at the weekly meetings of its participants. Actors Realm is not just for Actors, but includes anyone who is searching to better develop their “true voice” and to more fully live “in the moment.”  Classes are approached as steps on a journey, knowing each journey is unique in its direction and the distance it travels, with the benefits extending into every area of Life.

Name: Women Artists Foward Fund
Description:
The Women Artists Forward Fund calls attention to gender inequities in the arts, explores the history and contemporary practice of women’s philanthropy in the visual arts, and works to solve underlying inequities in their regional arts community. 

Women Artists Forward Fund was inspired by Jean Pond Miner’s Forward sculpture that stands in front of the Wisconsin State Capitol, and the revolutionary women who financially supported her practice back in 1893. Through Pond Miner’s inspirational work, WAFF founders, Brenda Baker and Bird Ross created the social practice piece, Being Forward. This work calls attention to gender inequities in the arts, explores the history and contemporary practice of women’s philanthropy in the visual arts, and works to solve underlying inequities in their regional arts community. Being Forward brings attention to the rich diversity of women. Additionally, Baker and Ross launched the Women Artists Forward Fund Forward Art Prize in 2019 during the 100th anniversary of Wisconsin’s ratification of the 19th Amendment. 

The Women Artists Forward Fund ranks among the top three funds for women artists in the nation in terms of dollars awarded annually. The Fund and Prize open up important new opportunities for women artists, helps rectify current and historical inequities, and contributes positively to a thriving, inclusive arts community. 

Being Forward, the Women Artist Forward Fund and the Forward Art Prize comes at a time when gender inequities in the arts and inadequate arts support in Wisconsin, specifically Dane County, are sadly not a thing of the history books, and require all of our efforts to help rectify.

Name: Urban Decorations Rome
Description:
CHI SIAMO

Urban Decorations è un laboratorio d’ideazione e realizzazione artistica a cui aderiscono personalità creative di tutta Italia . Gli artisti che ne fanno parte provengono da esperienze in molteplici settori delle arti figurative che spaziano dall’interior design alla grafica, dalla scenografia al muralismo, dall’illustrazione all’arte urbana.I membri di questo team riescono ad imprimere alle loro opere quell'unicita' che puo' originarsi soltanto dalla perfetta sintonia ed armonia, nella capacita' dell'uno di dare vita a quello che l'altro ha immaginato.

COSA FACCIAMO

Abbiamo concepito l'idea di creare un'attività che, partendo dalla decorazione delle saracinesche degli esercizi commerciali, si articola poi attraverso la decorazione d'interni, la decorazione di mezzi di locomozione e oggettistica in genere, la riqualificazione pittorica di spazi urbani, interventi di interior design, Interventi di brandizzazione in esterni ed interni, e molto altro.

PERCHE' LO FACCIAMO

Perché siamo convinti che la creazione di un polo artistico, gestito seguendo il principio della condivisione fisica e “intellettuale” di spazi e idee, sia il fulcro da cui scaturisce l’ispirazione creativa, che, supportata dal giusto utilizzo delle tecnologie più innovative, porta a realizzare qualunque cosa l’immaginazione possa aspirare.
Perché vogliamo avere, e creare, la possibilità di vivere in un mondo più colorato.

Name: De Werf - Jazz/Podium/Werkplek
Description:
De Werf in Brugge heeft een ijzersterke traditie in jazz en podiumkunsten. Naast het presenteren van een scherp receptief aanbod uit binnen- en buitenland, produceert De Werf zelf én ondersteunt het artiesten logistiek en financieel in het realiseren van hun project, op maat van hun specifieke noden en ambities. Zo is er de artistieke werkplek, De Groenplaats in hartje Brugge, waar jaarlijks een 70- tal artiesten resideren en is er het muzieklabel, W.E.R.F. Records, dat intussen al meer dan 120 nationale jazzartiesten op zijn palmares heeft staan. De Werf wordt in haar activiteiten ondersteund door twee huisartiesten; Lander Gyselinck en Simon Allemeersch, die respectievelijk de jazz & podiumkunsten voor hun rekening nemen.

 
Met deze werking wil De Werf een brug bouwen tussen kunst, de kunstenaar en de samenleving. Dialoog en maatschappelijk engagement zijn daarbij belangrijke factoren. Cultureel ondernemerschap en innovatie staan centraal. Er wordt gestreefd naar een synergie, waarbij De Werf deel uitmaakt van een artistiek, regionaal weefsel. In de dagelijkse werking hanteert De Werf een open en loyale houding met een enthousiaste dynamiek. Daarnaast vormt duurzaamheid een rode draad doorheen de gehele werking.

Name: Arte para la Vida
Description:
Arte para la Vida, nació en Venezuela en el año 2008, como la Asociación Civil Arte para la Vida, sus principales objetivos se dirigieron hacia:

1.- La Promoción, Proyección y Difusión del Arte Venezolano

Publicaciones digitales e impresas (periódicos, revistas, catálogos, libros, guías de estudio)
Exposiciones individuales y colectivas en Venezuela
Exposiciones individuales y colectivas en el exterior
Tiendas de arte venezolano
Salas de exposiciones en Venezuela y el extranjero.
2.- La Formación para las Artes

Talleres y seminarios dirigidos a todo público
Talleres y seminarios dirigidos a artistas
Foros sobre arte (Arte venezolano , arte internacional, intercambios de experiencias, situación actual de las artes en Venezuela y el mundo, crítica de arte, historia del arte, pedagogía del arte, filosofía del arte, disciplinas artísticas)
Centros de documentación e investigación.
3.- La Creación y la Innovación

Investigaciones sobre las artes en Venezuela
Espacios de producción artística
Talleres residenciales
Centros culturales en las comunidades
Entre los años 2008 y 2012, los proyectos se desarrollaron principalmente en el área de Formación para las Artes, implementando programas educativos para niños, jóvenes y adultos, como los Talleres Del Punto al Espacio, y los Talleres de Arte y Creatividad Visual.

Al mismo tiempo se apoyaron varios proyectos expositivos, tanto de los talleres de Arte para la vida en museos y bibliotecas, así como de artistas de la talla de Zacarías García (Venezuela), entre otros.

En esta nueva etapa, Arte para la Vida como el emprendimiento cultural online arteplvida.com, busca sistematizar toda la experiencia de la Asociación Civil, para constituirse como una referencia cultural en el ámbito digital, con proyección internacional, para brindarle soluciones reales a los profesionales del mundo del arte.

Name: ARTCO Escuela de Arte y Diseño Contemporáneo

Contamos con un equipo de docentes e instructores altamente capacitados, apasionados por la enseñanza y el desarrollo artístico.

Brindamos una amplia variedad de cursos, talleres, capacitaciones, conversatorios y conferencias dedicadas al arte y la cultura, adaptadas a diferentes niveles y necesidades. Además, somos la única escuela de arte que integra directamente los espacios históricos y culturales del país  en su metodología, proporcionando una experiencia de aprendizaje única, inmersiva y enriquecedora.

Once a week a Ballet At Your School instructor transforms a class room into a dance studio.  The instructor teaches small personalized 45 minute classes to those students enrolled in the program.  At the end of the school year, the children participate in a performance to demonstrate what they have learned during the school year.

Name: Evelyn McCorristin Peters Fine Art
Description:
The work of Evelyn McCorristin-Peters springs from a lifelong fascination and dedication to the natural environment. She creates to express commitment to the preservation of native flora and fauna in hopes of celebrating its diversity while documenting its fragility.

Evelyn received a Bachelors Degree from the University of Delaware and has also attended The Pennsylvania Academy of Fine Arts and Ringling College of Art and Design. She has exhibited in National and Regional exhibits throughout the country including The Cooperstown Art Association 77th National Juried Event, and the International event America’s Parks – Through the Beauty of Art. She has been awarded artist residencies and fellowships including: Weir Farm National Historic Site, Zion National Park, Jentel, Dorland Mountain Arts Colony and Brush Creek Foundation for the Arts.

Evelyn’s work is represented by Rhea Chiles’ Studio at Gulf and Pine on Anna Maria Island Florida, DeZion Gallery in Springdale Utah, and held in private collections throughout the US, Australia, France, Spain and the Netherlands. She serves on the governing board of Myakka River State Park with a dedication to bring artists and nature

Name: One Nation Designs
Description:
Josh created One Nation Designs because he believes producing heirloom quality items using local talent is still very much the American way. 

Prior to founding One Nation Designs, Josh served 14 years in Special Operations.  He served his entire time in the military as an Air Force Pararescueman conducting countless real-world combat and civilian missions. Josh has deployed to combat 21 times over his career between Afghanistan, Iraq, and Africa as a Pararescueman and in other government capacities.  He has excelled in his service, but has always looked forward to when he could hang up his spurs and realize his dream of hand-crafting meaningful and beautiful creations.

Josh's lifelong love of working with his hands began at age six with the simple task of holding a flashlight for his Dad while working on the family car.  Since then, he has been doing everything from restoring classic cars, glassing surfboards, building forward-operating bases, and using explosives to bend and make metal artwork.



One Nation Designs began with our steel fabrication shop, specializing in custom cladding and patina finishes that led us to our iconic American flags. It quickly grew into the millwork and steel design company we are today. 



At One Nation Designs we are passionate about building and creating works of art that will become a focal point in your home or business. Through the use of unique materials and techniques each piece we create is unique and genuinely your own.

Name: Aqabawi Art & Culture Studio
Description:
Aqabawi collaborates with local communities in southern Jordan to enhance cultural tourism experiences, preserve coastal heritage, and train local guides as culture experts. By offering unique services that highlight each community's culture, environment, and cuisine, Aqabawi promotes genuine cultural exchange and safe engagement with locals. Aqabawi’s vision includes developing a vibrant Red Sea Food, Art, and Environment Cultural Hub, integrating the region's rich heritage, artistic expressions, and environmental sustainability. This hub attracts locals and tourists to engage with the Red Sea's unique ecosystem, culinary traditions, and artistic contributions. We empower women, promote cultural exchange, and foster sustainability, creating a lasting positive impact on the community, environment, and economy. Through inclusive and educational projects, Aqabawi ensures long-term benefits for all stakeholders, enhancing pride in Jordanian heritage and providing economic opportunities through a sustainable business model and high-quality services.
Since 2019, Aqaba has made significant strides in fostering the participation of women and young girls in the arts and handicraft tourism sector, effectively dismantling societal barriers to female engagement in this burgeoning field. The initiative has resulted in over 100 local women and girls benefiting from these opportunities.

Name: DAYA Histoire
Description:
L’histoire est le récit des temps passés, dit-on. Elle est également ce qui relie une société à sa culture d’appartenance. De tout temps, les romans, les livres et les autres formes d’écrits tels que les journaux pour ne citer que ceux-là, ont permis de relier l’homme à sa culture et à celle des autres. Ces dernières décennies, on assiste à un ralentissement de la lecture, d’une part à cause du développement fulgurant du domaine de l’audiovisuel et d’autre part en raison des nouvelles technologies de l’information et de la communication.

En effet, les NTIC sont aujourd’hui devenus indispensables dans tous les domaines. À l’ère de la digitalisation sans précédent, il convient de tisser la nouvelle corde au bout de l’ancienne en adoptant les nouvelles technologies. C’est pour concilier lecture et NTIC que l’application Daya a vu le jour. De son nom Daya (raconte) en langue Bassar du nord-Togo, Daya est une application qui propose des contenus audios sous forme d’histoires, de contes et d’articles de la presse écrite en ligne.

Daya trouve sa pertinence dans le fait qu’il permet aux africains d’Afrique et de la diaspora de redécouvrir leur histoire. La lecture audio a connu ces dernières années unessor considérable. . Elle permet de se divertir, offre la possibilité de faire plusieurs choses à la fois, favorisant ainsi un gain de temps. Elle permet aussi de saisir avec toutes ses subtilités possibles, les intentions de l’auteur ; particulièrement celles qui ne sont pas  perçues à l’écrit.

Les initiateurs du projet en partenariat avec des écrivains, conteurs et journalistes,

proposent des milliers de contenus audio disponibles dans l’application. Ces contenus seront régulièrement mis à jour. Une belle conjugaison entre histoire et actualité.

Name: PhotoMail
Description:
DISCOVER, DEBATE, DEFINE
The Art of Photography

Publishing since 2016

PhotoMail magazine (www.photomail.org) is a premier platform dedicated to contemporary photography. It showcases the work of photographers while delving into the aesthetics, theory, and philosophy of the medium. With a rich array of content, including critical essays, interviews, and feature articles, PhotoMail offers in-depth analyses and reflections on both historical and contemporary photography.

The magazine critically examines significant events such as the Indian Partition and the COVID-19 pandemic through a photographic lens, providing profound insights into their social and political implications. PhotoMail explores experimental and conceptual photography, highlighting projects that integrate photography with other art forms like theatre and performance.

PhotoMail is a valuable resource for anyone interested in the intersection of photography, art, and cultural studies, fostering critical discussions and a deeper appreciation of the photographic medium.

PhotoMail works on a non-funded & non-paid subscription model. All our distinguished Editorial members and authors have extended their services as volunteers. Being a catalyst in sharing creative visuals and thoughts is our passion. Thank you.

Name: ESTHER CALMA
Description:
Esther calma es una marca de zapatas de alto diseño ,cuya diseñadora bautizó tras elegir su propio nombre y unir sus apellidos Calvo Marín.Esta joven madrileña es la fundadora de la marca y dedica todo su tiempo .

SOBRE MI

Nací en Guadalajara y desde pequeña me pasaba las horas dibujando. Confieso que ahora cuando puedo, sigo haciendo lo mismo.

En el colegio dibujaba zapatos de tacón en los márgenes de los libros, hasta que un día con 7 años… Fui a clase con tacones! Imaginad la cara de mi madre cuando lo descubrió. Tuvo que dejarme unos suyos para estar por casa.

Siempre tuve claro que quería ser diseñadora de zapatos. Por eso estudié diseño de moda en Madrid y me especialicé en diseño de calzado en Elda.

Actualmente tengo dos zapatos en el Museo del Calzado de esta localidad, uno inspirado en una bruja y otro (Primer Premio Internacional Lápiz de Oro en 2006) en un gato.

He trabajado como diseñadora de calzado para marcas como Zara, Sfera y Blanco; y el año pasado lancé mi propia marca, Esther Calma, haciendo realidad uno de mis sueños

Name: ID of Arts
Description:
Le fonds de dotation ID of Arts est né en 2013 avec l’idée première de créer
un lien entre les artistes contemporains et le monde de l’entreprise.
C’est une plateforme artistique et financière contribuant à la création artistique,
la promotion et la diffusion des artistes contemporains.
A l’initiative d’Yvette Gallinaro-Alric, le fonds de dotation ID of ARTS a la vocation d’ouvrir une nouvelle forme de dialogue entre l’art et l’économie, un dialogue à double sens pour une relation gagnant-gagnant.

ID of ARTS redonne au mécénat tout son éclat, en proposant une relation artistique et humaine et non plus seulement financière.
Cette forme de mécénat permet à l’entreprise de participer à la création artistique ou de soutenir un projet particulier avec lequel il pourra tisser un lien privilégié et proposer à ses salariés une aventure artistique unique (avec l’accueil d’expositions, de spectacles ou des rencontres avec les artistes par exemple).
L’aventure artistique se construit en collaboration avec chacune des parties.

En se positionnant sur cette nouvelle idée du mécénat, ID of ARTS oscille ses actions sur deux axes:

> l’Aide à la Création, la promotion et la diffusion des Artistes Contemporains

> faire pénétrer l’art dans l’entreprise, avec une démarche d’entreprise Citoyenne


C’est donc un travail à double niveau que propose le fonds de dotation.

Name: Forest of Our Minds
Description:
The roots of trees connect us to the earth, and their branches in the sky, to the heavens. In their silent magnificence they encourages us that we can live out our wildest dreams!

These artworks of individual trees are inspired by the mighty Baobab Tree, the African Tree of Life. 
I was astounded to find that almost every faith or belief has a Tree of Life written into its storytelling. It has made me wonder if these great silent witnesses are the link that connects us all. 

This collection ‘Forest of our Minds’ is contributing 40% of its total sales to Feeding Schemes in South Africa working with food relief. This is a particularly challenging time with so many people out of work due to the Covid-19 pandemic. These trees are contributing to life. 

A Tree of Life in your home. 
~ Brings nature into your living space.
~ Becomes a conduit to your wildest dreams coming true.
~ Grounds you deeply in the world of possibility with its roots.
~ Connects you to a forest of tree artworks all round the world.
~ Is a gift, saying ‘Thank you’, for helping feed and care for others.
~ Is a celebration of you! 

Together we celebrate, nurture and grow each other in our creativity; our dreams and the way we live our lives. 

You can connect with the Charities directly here

Name: Sybilla Patrizia
Description:
Sybilla Patrizia is an Austrian-born visual artist and creative director based in Tokyo. Please get in touch and say hello at sybillapatrizia@gmail.com 
IG: @sybillapatrizia
W: www.sybillapatrizia.com

Clients and Publications: BBC | VICE | Financial Times | Amazon Prime Japan | AnOther Magazine | Süddeutsche Zeitung | The Sunday Telegraph | Tokyo Weekender | SLEEK Magazine | Yokohama Visitor’s Guide | Suitcase Magazine | SICKY Magazine | Schön! Magazine
_____________

In her work as a documentary photographer and filmmaker, Sybilla Patrizia has covered social, cultural and political topics such as the struggles of the Tibetan Diaspora in Northern India, Hong Kong’s Umbrella Revolution, fetishization of cuteness in contemporary Japanese mainstream culture, Japan's cherry blossom craze and the LGBTQ+ community in Tokyo. 

Her documentary film “Unbroken” was awarded Best Film at the 2019 Ginza Short Film Contest and premiered at the Short Shorts Film Festival & Asia in Tokyo. Sybilla is currently developing a brand-new, feature-length documentary entitled PLASTIC LOVE!, which deals with Japan’s obsessive addiction to plastic. As part of her project, Sybilla was featured in the Social Good Book 2019 by HERMÈS Japon.

Her photographic projects have been published by the BBC, VICE , AnOther Magazine, Financial Times and Süddeutsche Zeitung Magazin, and have been featured and exhibited in Germany, Austria, the USA, Japan and the UK.
