Name: Parrsboro Creative
Description:
The vision of Parrsboro Creative is to create a vibrant artist and artisan community that will spearhead the rejuvenation and re-population of Parrsboro. 

Formally organized in 2013, the Parrsboro Creative Arts Association was an initiative by a group of concerned citizens to revitalize the former Town of Parrsboro and turn back years of slow decline due to the cumulative effects of lost economic drivers resulting from centralization, globalization and the resulting depopulation of rural communities. The establishment of a vital multi-disciplinary arts community is seen as the key to the development of a vibrant cultural economy. 

Parrsboro Creative became a registered non-profit organization in 2015 and operates year-round with the fundamental focus on:

- Our annual Parrsboro International Plein Air Festival, drawing the best of North America’s plein air painters to the Minas Basin and Bay of Fundy.
- Our Cultural Campus offering a curriculum in a unique range of cultural disciplines from fine art and craft to music, theatre and the written word.

Other programs and initiatives include:

- Artist-in-Residence Program
- Artist Attraction Program
- Pop-Up Art Fair Series
- Featured Artist Profiles
- Cumberland Art Bank
- Art Therapy Series

Our office is open Monday to Friday, 10 AM - 5 PM ADT. 
(902) 728-2007
info@parrsborocreative.com

Name: Festival Saint Ouen sur Scène
Description:
Saint-Ouen sur Scène, festival solidaire audonien, est créé à l'été 2020, en pleine pandémie de Covid-19, par un collectif d'artistes, techniciens, acteurs culturels et associatifs et habitants de la ville de Saint-Ouen. Le principal objectif consiste à concilier une reprise de la vie culturelle avec les mesures de distanciations imposées par la crise sanitaire, en tissant
des liens entre les artistes audoniens, les habitant.e.s de Saint-Ouen et les différents Quartiers Prioritaires de la Politique de la Ville.

Dès sa première édition, cette folle idée devient réalité : le Festival donne 17 spectacles pluridisciplinaires, 80 représentations, avec 45 artistes et 15 techniciens professionnels, dans 6 quartiers de la ville, pour 3000 spectateurs.

Depuis, le collectif s'est structuré en association, et l'association s'est développée pour
inclure de nouvelles disciplines artistiques et toucher de nouveaux publics à travers les
émotions artistiques, en travaillant main dans la main avec les associations de terrain. Notre
projet se révèle année après année, à l’image de la ville de Saint-Ouen : multiculturel et plein
d'énergie.

Name: Larkhall Art Club
Description: As the lark delivers its extravagant songs in flight, we too create and share art freely to break the day

Name: Portraits in Oil & Pastel
Description:
Although my painting style is realistic, I find that by loosening the 
over all painting it becomes a  more impressionistic piece of art. My 
objective, is to  have a painting become something to be treasured, 
and passed down from one generation to the next.


A popular request is for composite paintings created from your 
favorite photos.  A family portrait can be painted from many 
different photos. This type of portrait can usually tell a story.
I will study them to determine if the lighting on each will be 
compatible in the finished piece. 

I will also do a photo shoot at your convenience, and this will give me control over lighting, etc.

When asked to create posthumous portraits, I approach this with 
great care and consideration in order to capture the true personality 
and  essence of  the subject.  These portraits are usually of great 
comfort to the client.  If done right, you will feel as though the 
person will be there with you forever.

"I really love the challenge that these present, and become very 
involved with the spirit of the subject."

Name: Charlene Anne Wilson Art
Description: Mixed media artist.

Name: L'Art-Période
Description:
L'un des objectifs de L'Art-Période est de réunir amateurs et spécialistes autour d'un sujet en histoire de l'art, en lien avec l'actualité artistique et des expositions afin d'ouvrir le champ des recherches et de décoder l'actualité.

Aborder les arts et leur histoire sous l'œil de spécialistes, de chercheurs, conservateurs, écrivains et artistes dans le cadre de conférences, discussions, débats, dîners...

Name: Les Imagistes
Description:
“Creating unique images that ripple through time”
 
 This is the philosophy that brought founders Khanh-Linh and Harold together. 

They created Les Imagistes with the belief that every consumer brand is unique and deserves unforgettable and beautiful creative.
 Originally from Toulouse (France), the “pink city” has influenced their creativity and sense of style with its unique architecture, natural surroundings and the memories made there. 
 Educated internationally, and after having lived in many countries (France, Spain, Belgium and the US),
 they met in the cultural melting pot that is Hong Kong and now call it home.

Their passion is to capture the unique essence of the brands they partner with, infusing it with current trends and a little French flair to create beautiful creatives that customers remember.

Les Imagistes is a full end-to-end visual content agency, including photography, art direction, visual consulting and strategy.
 
 They handle all aspects of the creative process from photoshoot set up, photo editing and everything in between and take pride in executing flawlessly and effortlessly.

A bientôt!

Name: Gallagher and Turner
Description:
Modern & Contemporary art gallery | Specialist picture framing based in central Newcastle, UK - Experts since 1990

Gallagher & Turner was established in Newcastle in 1990 by Paul Gallagher and Clare Turner. Formerly based in the St. Thomas Street workshops, our gallery on St. Mary's Place has a lively, changing programme of exhibitions, whilst our workshop in Gateshead houses all of the technical expertise to get your frames looking beautiful. 

We have exhibited and framed work by many highly regarded artists, including David Hockney, Francis Bacon, Barbara Rae, Antony Gormley, and Elizabeth Blackadder. With over seventy years' combined experience, we specialise in Modern British art, as well as antique Japanese woodblock prints, and pieces from mid-Century France and America. 

We also regularly work with exciting, upcoming artists from the North East and elsewhere in the UK in order to showcase the best new work that the region can offer.

We have framed works for several museums, universities and other institutions, including The Hatton Gallery, The Laing Art Gallery, Auckland Castle, Northumbria University and Newcastle University. 

With experience of framing everything from 18th Century portraiture through contemporary art, posters and family photographs, we're sure to be able to provide top-notch service for your framing needs.

We aim to make high-quality art accessible to everyone in Newcastle, and indeed further afield, whether it’s something to treasure on your own walls or something extra special we show in the gallery. 

Our exhibitions, and advice on framing, are always free, and we’re happy to talk through anything you want a better understanding of. Just come and see one of our team when you’re ready.

Name: Le Petit Café De l'Art
Description: Compagnie artistique proposant ateliers et stages en écriture et en théâtre d'improvisation

Name: VODO ARTS SOCIETY AND LAB LTD
Description: Vodo Arts Society and Lab is a Ugandan artists’ collective that was founded to create opportunities for artists through providing tools and networks leading to access to digniﬁed employment by building connections to various spaces in the private sector, civil society and government. Vodo envisions that through this continued engagement, the value of artistry can be recorgnised on a greater scale to increase support for the industry. This feeds into our goal of having artistic discourse at the center of social and civic interaction. With a range of creatives stretching across various disciplines of the arts, we have created a top name in the market with a reputation for excellence in service and delivering superb products.

Name: Commonplaces Art Gallery
Description:
Founded in 2013 by art lovers, Commonplaces is a non-profit organisation composed of a team of passionate and committed volunteers who share a common goal: to help you discover emerging artists from Brussels and Belgium!

Our statement
The art world as it currently exists does not often give "young artists" a chance to make it. Today, the presentation of artistic work seems secondary in comparison with financial speculation, as most galleries do not want to exhibit new artists who are little-known or unknown because of the financial risk they represent. At Commonplaces, we think differently. We are convinced that money should not govern art. 


Our concept
100% fan of fries and art! Commonplaces is Belgian and proud of Belgian artists. Indeed, many artists were born here, are living here, or have been trained here, especially in Brussels. We want you to discover their talents through our website, our social networks and our virtual exhibitions. You no longer need to move: wherever you are in the world, our artists come to you, right into your living room. And no, it’s not surreal...

Our promise
100% fair, 100% local, 100% creative. Commonplaces is a fair trade gallery where the artworks are sold at a fair and affordable price, respectful of artists and art collectors; because what we want to share above all, is our love of contemporary art.

Name: Pencil Studio
Description:
Pencil Studio is an innovative, fun, and cozy art studio opened since 2013. We offer exciting arts and craft learning experiences for kids, adults, corporate parties and families.

Our teachers and staff are youthful, energetic and down-to-earth who are passionate to provide an enjoyable learning experience and a sustainable interest in Art.

Name: Sister Art
Description:
Art. Design. Graphisme.

Sister Art est l'association de 3 sœurs artistes. Nous collaborons avec les entreprises et les marques afin de créer au cœur des lieux de vie. Par nos créations nous accompagnons des projets innovants et portons une attention particulière au bien-être de l'homme et à sa qualité de vie. Les œuvres de Sister Art invitent au voyage, à l'imaginaire et au poétique.

Nous valorisons un espace par une œuvre dessinée sur-mesure. Nous aimons raconter une histoire différente à chaque fois.
Nous travaillons de la conception à l’installation dans des espaces communs, des halls d’accueil de résidences, des hôtels, des sièges sociaux, des vitrines commerciales ou encore chez des particuliers. 

Nous œuvrons entre tradition artisanale et nouvelles technologies. Le métal est notre matériaux de prédilection et la découpe laser notre outil principal. 

Caractère, élégance et qualité des finitions sont nos lignes directrices.

Personnalisez votre projet grâce à nos différents services :
- Sculptures murales sur-mesure
- Design et ferronnerie
- Signalétique et enseigne
- Aménagement autour de l’œuvre

Pour toute question technique, de création, demande de devis, disponibilités pour un rendez-vous, écrivez-nous à contact@sisterart.net

Name: Eileen Murray Art
Description:
Eileen Murray is a painter, printmaker and encaustic artist who works on canvas, paper and wood.  Her work has been exhibited at several solo exhibits, including the Lawrence Pavilion Gallery at Summit Medical Group, NJ in 2007. She has also exhibited in numerous juried and group shows, such as the Smithtown Arts Council juried exhibit, Works on Paper 2006, the national juried exhibition at the Gallery at R&F in Kingston NY, and the NJ juried exhibition in the Park Avenue Club in Madison, 2006-2007. 

Since 2001, Eileen has been the Assistant Director of the Arts Access Program at Matheny Medical and Educational Center, an alternative fine arts program for people with disabilities. 

Eileen received her Bachelor of Arts from the College of New Jersey, and continued her professional growth with coursework at St. John’s University in Queens, NY.  Additionally, she has studied jewelry design, photography and encaustic painting at professional workshops throughout the Northeast.  Eileen has 20+ years of experience as a professional graphic designer and past clients include Hershey’s, Hunter Douglas, and Lucent Technologies.

Name: Watercolor Society of North Carolina
Description: The Watercolor Society of North Carolina (WSNC) is a non-profit organization dedicated to promoting the art of watercolor to North Carolina artists and residents.

Name: Arts Fountain
Description: At Arts Fountain, we believe that every artist or creative can achieve success when armed with the right resources; we also believe that every art lover or collector can find pieces here that can inspire and echo. Our purpose is to create a boundaryless art world where ideas, developments, and passions matter the most. Welcome to Arts Fountain!

Name: OSA Festival - HazArt Cultural Association
Description:
OSA - Festival is an urban art festival run in Diamante (South Italy) since 2017. 

HazArt Cultural Association produces, manages and promotes cultural events, founded by Antonino Perrotta, Letizia Angelini and Angelo Benvenuto. OSA - Operazione Street Art Festival  is its first international urban art event, organized in Diamante (Calabria, South Italy).

Listed by the Ministry of Culture among the 20 most important sites of urban creativity in 2020 in the list curated by the Inward observatory, OSA Festival has also collaborated with several universities and museums such as the Florence Institute of Design International and the MACRO museum in Rome.
Over the years, it has partnered with and received funding from several municipalities such as Diamante, Fuscaldo, Vietri di Potenza, Santa Maria del Cedro and Minneapolis (USA).

OSA aims to continue and renew the artistic tradition of Diamante, known as the "Città dei Murales" since 1981, which has more than 330 works, creating a true open-air museum.

Name: Atelier horlogerie classique
Description: atelier de restauration et de conservation sur les objets mécaniques. Travaux de recherches en stabilisation et conservation, nettoyages et restitutions des dorures et argentures.

Name: Capital Arts Jefferson City
Description:
Capital Arts provides artistic opportunities year round including studio classes for children and adults and the Imagination Station. The Capital Arts Gallery provides a space for artists to exhibit and sell their work. Capital Arts hosts the annual Street Art Fair held in downtown Jefferson City with Jazzfest. Here artists of all ages and experience levels participate in a chalk art competition. 

Website: capitalarts.org 
Classes: http://capitalarts.org/classes
Exhibition Schedule: http://capitalarts.org/gallery/exhibitionschedule

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/pages/Capital-Arts/291381630317
Twitter: https://twitter.com/CapitalArtsJC

Name: CooCircular
Description:
Nuestra misión en CooCircular es difundir, reivindicar y conservar los oficios manuales tradicionales y contemporáneos, contribuyendo a la valorización del trabajo artesanal y el conocimiento cultural que estos representan.

En CooCircular, creemos que los oficios manuales son una parte vital de nuestro patrimonio cultural y una fuente invaluable de creatividad y autoexpresión. Nos esforzamos por mantener vivos estos oficios, adaptándolos al mundo moderno y asegurando que sigan prosperando en el futuro.

Name: Village Pottery Studio
Description: Our mission at Village Clay Studio is to cultivate an inclusive and diverse community where individuals from all backgrounds can learn, grow, and master the art of ceramics in a safe and creative environment. We are committed to breaking down barriers and introducing ceramics as a viable career path, particularly to youth from cultures where art is not traditionally seen as a professional option. By fostering creativity and providing opportunities, we aim to inspire the next generation of ceramic artists and empower them to pursue their passion.

Name: Maniera-The Fine Arts Society Of KMV
Description: 'Maniera,' which means "mannerism in style" in Italian, is a genuine attempt to showcase the students' creative endeavors. It is a first step towards ensconcing the creative corner amidst the monotonous study environment.

Name: ARTAC vzw
Description: Kunsteducatieve organisatie ten behoeve van volwassenen en jongeren zowel in school- & vrijetijdscontext, gericht op socioemotionele en/of professionele ontwikkeling.

Name: Pitter Painter
Description:
Forged from  a childhood of doodling and the  hands-on experience of motherhood, Pitter Painter merges two great loves!  The first for art and the second for children.

Pitter Painter art classes are exemplified by a cozy atmosphere where budding artists get the individual attention they need.   Projects are creatively-themed and developmentally- appropriate.  Painting classes and lessons in art fundamentals are hands-on and disguised as something playful. All in a nurturing space where kids have fun and personal creativity is applauded.

Fueled by tireless teaching energy and contagious creativity,  Pitter Painter art classes are now spreading color  in various locations in Hong Kong.

Name: Phoenix Crowne Holdings, Inc.
Description:
Combining art market innovations with traditional method, Phoenix Crowne establishes criterion that levels the playing field, always looking for first finds while grooming the emergent art and artist for the secondary market. 

To this end, Phoenix Crowne works to create, enhance and propel specific projects designed to best serve art and artists from concept to procurement of funding. In doing so we continually broaden the avenues of exposure and education for both artist and collector, while creating unique opportunities for investing with one goal in mind: The democratic ideal of Living With Art.

At our core, we are industry experts with foundations of long-built relationships and track records. Each is not only a leader, but a trailblazer in their specific field, earning their place as part of the Phoenix Crowne team. Combined effectively, we provide a solid infrastructure and network to guide clients’ decisions in growing collections positioned to build wealth over time.

Name: Nova Academia Lisboa
Description: Escola de Artes em Benfica: Aulas para Crianças, Jovens, Adultos e Séniores de Dança, Música, Teatro, Desenho e Pintura em Benfica.

Name: Kalck & Associés
Description:
Kalck & Associés est l’une des sociétés de vente aux enchères parisiennes qui participe à la vie du plus important hôtel des ventes au monde, Drouot. En concentrant notre activité sur les ventes provenant de successions, partages familiaux et collectionneurs, nous nous attachons à créer une relation privilégiée avec nos clients et à leur apporter notre conseil dans un marché en mutation. 

Maître Catherine Kalck, commissaire-priseur, et ses collaborateurs se tiennent à votre disposition pour l’expertise, l’inventaire et la gestion de vos biens mobiliers, que ce soit dans le cadre d’une vente, d’un partage, d’une succession, d’une expertise pour assurance ou, plus simplement, pour satisfaire votre curiosité. 


Étude de commissaire-priseur judiciaire
Opérateur de vente volontaire aux enchères publiques | Agrément 2002-374

Name: Noua Arts and Culture Center
Description: We aim to develop the art scene in Kuwait to meet the highest standards. We support art and artists and provide every aspect that helps artists to thrive.

Name: Seapunk Studios
Description: Seapunk Studios is a research-and-imagination collective and community interested in fresh solarpunk-inspired imaginaries for Southeast Asia.

Name: Metzli Creations
Description: Metzli Creations offers a wide range of original and unique painting creations both on canvas and ceramic tiles. Specialized in fluid acrylic art, this innovative technique is based on the fluid movement of the paint poured using gravity, creating subtle effects from the interaction of the liquid colors.

Name: The Drive-In Cinema Lebanon
Description:
The Drive In Cinema Lebanon is a non-profit initiative, conducted by freshly graduated students, in the goal of entertaining attendees, but most importantly helping in-need individuals and families in the current socio-economic Lebanese distress.

Its setting is engineered with incorporating health and safety regulations in accordance with the presence of the COVID-19 pandemic.

In just two weekend implementations, in collaboration with Lebanese NGO "Nusaned", the 23-member team has been able to smoothly organize 16 movies screenings, capturing the attention of more than 1500 movie enthusiasts, who in turn helped in feeding more than 850 people.

The Drive-In Cinema Lebanon is led by a hopeful Lebanese youth, to continuously lift everyone’s spirits and draw a smile on all faces, with Lebanon’s prosperity as vision, mission, and objective.

Name: Évolia Transition
Description:
Évolia transition est la pionnière au Québec d'une industrie spécialisée en évaluation et en gestion de biens meubles. Que ce soit pour l'évaluation, la rédaction d'inventaire, le tri, le partage, la liquidation de biens, le bilan patrimonial, l'aide au déménagement, notre équipe offre un service personnalisé qui assure écoute, respect et confiance à ses clients. 

Certifiés par la «Canadian Association of Personnal Property Appraisers» nos rapports répondent aux normes gouvernementales.

Expertise:

Évaluation d'oeuvres d'art, antiquités, meubles, voitures, vaisselle, argenterie, bibelots, vins millésimés, bijoux, électroménagers, collections, et plus encore.

Name: Israeli Center Of Judaica
Description: Israel Center of Judaica is a site that brings together Jewish-Israeli artists who engage in unique handmade art. The company was established to make accessible to Jews from all over the world high-quality and special products, art, and Judaica from the Land of Israel and, on the other hand, to help talented Israeli boutique artists reach all corners of the world. At Israel Center of Judaica, each artist is unique and special. We have meticulously selected talented and unique artists to give you a huge variety of styles, materials, and artistic approaches.

Name: DORDOR Gallery NYC
Description: A gallery with a rich history, Dordor is also a platform and home for artists from all over the world. Revolutionary approach and accessibility made Dordor a key figure in Moscow's underground art scene and are now going global. An overwhelming amount of projects lack the attention of state establishments, contemporary and commercial galleries, which give their preference to classical traditional art, famous artists, or certainly themed works. This environment does not nourish emerging artists who are left with little chance to have their own exhibition. Thus, our primary aim is to provide assistance for those, who need support in the attempt to get seen and heard, pushing boundaries towards the future of art.

Name: Galerie Art By BGR
Description:
Art by bgr propose un service de location-vente d'oeuvres d'art adapté aux entreprises et professions libérales. Halls d'accueil, salles d'attente, salles de réunion et bureaux... autant de possibilités d'accueillir une ou plusieurs oeuvres sur vos murs. Elles incarneront les valeurs et l'éthique de l'entreprise.  Profitez-en : les dispositifs fiscaux facilitent la location et l'achat d'oeuvres d'art créés par des artistes vivants. Pour plus d'informations (tarifs, durée,etc.), consultez le site  www.artbybgr.com

Pour organiser une première visite : Atelier-Galerie Art by Bgr, 14 rue Raymond Poincaré, 78 120 Rambouillet. Contact : 06 30 87 14 50.

Name: Anazao Galleries
Description: Here art-lovers, connoisseurs and patrons alike can browse and acquire one-of-a-kind antiques, gifts, unique original works of art and quality reproductions of masterpieces from centuries gone by.  We represent the Vatican Library Collection, Konstantino Jewelry, Laga Handbags, Robert Held Art Glass, Timothy Richards Architectural Models, Bernardi Wood Art, as well as numerous other artists and collections. Come in and lose yourself in another world.

Name: Productions Multisens Inc.
Description:
Les Productions Multisens Inc. est un organisme à but non lucratif situé dans l'arrondissement de Lachine à Montréal. Notre objectif est d'offrir un cadre vivant, créatif et inspirant à toute la population de Lachine et des environs pour vivre son expression personnelle à travers le langage du théâtre et du mouvement dansé. 

Depuis 25 ans déjà, notre mission est de favoriser le rapprochement entre les gens, les générations, les cultures, les organismes et les institutions principalement au moyen de programmes de formation en théâtre et par la creation et la diffusion de projets artistiques multidisciplinaires.

Name: We Won't Rest
Description:
This is an art project by artists for artists. 

We want to put a face to all the forgotten people in the Belgian culture and event industry. 

This platform is a space for everyone affected to share their story about how they survived the past months.

Name: "Painting With Light" Studio & Gallery
Description:
"Painting With Light" Studio & Gallery
Photo-Paintings by Paul J. McCloskey

I am a graphic artist/photographer/imaging professional/printmaker... somewhat of a "digital alchemist", and like to think of my art/work as "Painting With Light". Please visit my newly renovated "Painting With Light" Studio & Gallery website to read my Artist Statement and samples from my numerous collections.

Name: Arakat Mag
Description: Website for writers who wants to exprese yourself with cultural, mostly movies.

Name: Kursy Artystyczne
Description:
Nasze zajęcia kierujemy do osób, które tak samo jak my kochają sztukę. 

Kursy Artystyczne w Katowicach zostały stworzone z myślą o Tobie, tak abyś mógł poznać i doskonalić swoje umiejętności plastyczne, rozwijać swoje zainteresowania, pasję do sztuki.

Jeśli chcesz szlifować swój warsztat artystyczny i zdobyć wiedzę o technikach to dobrze trafiłeś. Powołaliśmy to miejsce, aby łączyło ludzi we wspólnym działaniu podczas kreatywnego spędzania czasu.

Każdego uczestnika naszych zajęć uczymy indywidualnie, ponieważ każdy z nas jest inny, każdy ma swoją osobowość twórczą. Dla nas liczą się przede wszystkim Twoje pomysły.

Pracujemy w dużej, dobrze oświetlonej przestrzeni w małych, kameralnych grupach. 
Nasze artystyczne miejsce znajduje się na 1 piętrze pięknej modernistycznej kamienicy. 

Uczymy młodzież i dorosłych. 
Nasza oferta to:

KURS RYSUNKU I MALARSTWA

Prowadzimy kursy hobbystyczne dla pasjonatów oraz dla osób początkujących.

Przygotowujemy kandydatów na studia artystyczne, projektowe i architektoniczne. 

WARSZTATY ARTYSTYCZNE

Oprócz kursów organizujemy również warsztaty z grafiki artystycznej i warsztaty introligatorskie.

Name: Pavanisree_author
Description: Pavani Sree- A Passionate and an Upcoming Writer from Hyderabad. Pavani Sree is an up-and-coming writer currently pursuing a Ph.D. in sociology at the University of Hyderabad. Ever the scholar, she’s taken a strong interest in poetry lately and has been trying to spread positivity throughout her home country of India and beyond with her words. She has a limp but hasn’t once allowed it to slow her down. Rather than run with her legs, Pavani sprints toward a bright future with her sharp mind and fierce work ethic.

Name: EMYAN - EuroMed Young Artists Network
Description:
EMYAN is the EuroMed Young Artists Network.

The general objective of the network is to provide valuable networking opportunities within the field of young artists' empowerment, promote the value of artist-driven initiatives, and serve as a voice for the young artists in forums that debate issues of cultural policy. However, its objective is also oriented to:

    * Promote Art as a tool for social and economic development.
    * Enhance the Capacity of Young Artists to feature the issue of dialogue between cultures and mutual respect and the importance of art as a message of peace.
    * Raise public awareness of Adopt thematic-subject campaigns through art like Peace, Gender Equality, Youth Empowerment, Fighting Poverty etc.
    * Become the voice of the young artists in the Euro-Med area.
    * Promote and support youth exchanges related to ART: Euro-Med Youth Programme projects.
    * Promote academic cooperation between art institutes and schools to exchange art students on local, national and international levels.
    * Organize an international exhibition periodically for the young artists to show their creations.
    * Create a cyber space for young artists to show their talents and gain recognition.
    * Promote the mobility of young artists.
    * Support young artists' team initiatives which aim to encourage increased communication, exchange of expertise, and joint creation among Euro-Mediterranean artists.

Name: Ateliers Bôar
Description:
Ateliers Bôar, école d'arts à Genève.
Cours de dessin et peinture semi-privés.

Nous proposons des cours de dessin et de peinture semi-privés de 5 participants pour adultes et adolescents dans notre atelier à Genève.

Name: Brook Gallery
Description: One of the most prestigious galleries outside London.  Based in Devon in Budleigh Salterton, a beautiful Town on the East Devon Coast, the gallery presents a unique and valuable art resource in the South West.  Providing private and commercial clients and collectors alike with the best Fine Art available to buy, sourcing work by past Masters through some of the most influential living artists today, to up and coming new talent!

Name: JFDA Choreography
Description:
The JFDA Choreography team believes dance represents both artistry and athleticism. Our team members have experiences in the dance team world, but also in various commercial and concert dance communities. We believe each routine should highlight the strength of a team, while challenging each team member to new styles and techniques.

We represent a diversity of dance experiences and will help any team achieve their greatest potential. Whether it is your first year competing or you're a seasoned team with multiple titles, we treat each team with the same respect you deserve!

Name: Todd Reese Photography
Description:
Founded and operate small photography business with specialty in landscape/cityscape/architecture, as well as portrait, and weddings/events. 

http://www.todd-reese.pixels.com
Instagram: @t.reese.photography

* Earned recognition for feature-spots on front pages of groups in www.fineartamerica.com.

* Administrator for three groups in FineArtAmerica:
   *  Brilliant Colors - https://fineartamerica.com/groups/brilliant-colors.html
   *  Sunrises and Sunsets -  https://fineartamerica.com/groups/1-sunrises-and-sunsets.html
   *  Waters of the World - https://fineartamerica.com/groups/waters-of-the-world.html

Name: Architecture en Représentation
Description:
2002 - 2022
Architecture & Scénographie
Option de Master de l'École Nationale Supérieure de Nantes (ENSA Nantes)

Name: Kersten's Antiques & Curios, LLC.
Description:
Our mission is to help you find the value of your antiques accurately, economically and quickly. We have appraisers in various fields and multiple disciplines. At Kersten's Antiques we are confident that we can pair you with the best appraiser for your item or YOUR MONEY BACK. 

Getting started is easy; pick a package, answer a few questions about your item, then connect with your appraiser. 

Want to sell your item? We can help you! 

Looking to buy that perfect antique? Go antiquing in our online antique mall! 

Let Kersten's Antiques make your buying, selling and appraising issues an item of the past!

Name: Le Mouchoir
Description: Lemouchoir.com est un nouvel espace d'art en ligne dédié à l'illustration numérique et au design graphique.

Name: Domaine du Muy - Contemporary Sculpture Park
Description:
For nearly 30 years, Jean-Gabriel Mitterrand has given pride of place to sculpture in his gallery in the Marais in Paris, just as he has in numerous exhibitions of monumental works of art in public and private spaces throughout the world.

In 2014, Mitterrand and his son Edward dreamed of creating an outdoor private venue dedicated to showcasing monumental sculpture in the South of France.

Following this intention, one year later, the Domaine du Muy opened. The park lives and evolves through the regular renewal or continuity of the works and projects. Today, it comprises some forty artworks by contemporary artists from a host of different generations, movements, and schools of practice.

The Domaine du Muy is nestled between the Maures and Esterel Massifs. The Esterel’s Mediterranean forest of cork oaks and pines stretches out over several hundred hectares. With its secluded valley, pools, and wild spaces, the Domaine du Muy sets the artworks in a space of exceptional natural beauty.

Name: Contaminate
Description:
Contaminate is an experiential arts organization that produces unique immersive creative experiences and provides consulting and coaching services to artists and creative businesses.

Contaminate unleashes the potential in curators, artists, and viewers by reinventing the traditional art experience with unexpected twists.

Contaminate challenges traditional artistic boundaries with questions of what constitutes an exhibition; calls upon artists to think in terms of art as an experience to be shared with and completed by the audience; creates art and performance languages that leverage technology to interact with the audience and the surrounding environment; provides a social platform for a growing community of creative explorers who love to shake established canons.

Name: Jagged Edge Acrylics
Description:
Jagged Edge Acrylics Studio was created from a love of painting, a couple of salvaged saw blades, and a little creativity. Every blade displayed on this site is hand painted and original. Inspiration is taken from many sources that stem from a Christian view of the world around us. 

Jagged Edge Acrylics is known for, and named after, its saw blade art; however, we also have traditional acrylic paintings for sale. Take a look around at all of the acrylic paintings for sale and choose from a number of different categories or sizes. 

The concept of spray paint art is new to a lot of art lovers. Who knew that beautiful art could be created from a couple of cans of spray paint and some everyday household items? Spray paint art is traditionally done on posterboard; however, it can be done on any non-porous material. Keep checking back with us and you will be surprised how many old treasures are given new life with a fresh coat of paint.

Name: GOLDMARK GALLERY LIMITED
Description: GOLDMARK GALLERY LIMITED is a fine art company based out of 14 Orange St, Uppingham, England, United Kingdom.

Name: KC Clay Guild
Description: KC Clay Guild was founded in 1988 in the home of potter, Michael Smith.  Soon after, KCCG began meeting in Vanderslice Hall on the campus of the Kansas City Art Institute.   By then a group of approximately 70 artists from the Kansas City area were getting together to educate, purchase materials in bulk and socialize with each other.  Over the years KCCG has grown and evolved.  In order to offer classes to the community, KCCG rented a building near 39th and Southwest Trafficway for several years.  KC Clay Guild purchased our current building at 200 West 74th Street in the Waldo Neighborhood of Kansas City, MO in the early part of the century.

Name: Art Cafe
Description: Art Cafe is a child-led process & sensory art studio for kids ages 2-10. Kids can follow their curiosities, take risks, and get messy as they dive into sensory-rich materials and bring their own ideas to life. While they create, grownups can kick back in our cozy coffee bar or grab a brew to-go.

Name: Pitroda Art
Description:
Pitroda Art  

Pitroda Art is a social enterprise which promotes global contemporary art through curated collections. 

Our new initiative MOVEMENT: Art for Social Change will feature quarterly curated art collections that explore pressing social issues around the world.

MOVEMENT celebrates artists as champions of change; fearless in provocation; and vital to social movements. Artists have the ability to inspire people to see, think and act - that's why we seek to promote the transformative power of creative expression. 

Each MOVEMENT Art Collection will kick-off with a Global Call-for-Entries, inviting artists to submit their work on a thematic issue. A panel of expert judges will curate the showcase and select the artwork that will comprise the final Collection.

These Collections will be available exclusively on our online gallery and promoted internationally. The proceeds from the sales of these works of art will be donated to the cause that it is supporting.

But it doesn't end there. The artwork will also be exhibited as public art installations, projected on iconic buildings around the world. We hope to mobilize impact, spark conversation and celebrate the arts as a vehicle for social change.

Name: Teresa Lewis Art
Description:
Teresa is an artist currently living near Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk. 

She is an artist and illustrator, as well as a photographer, producing a unique range of gifts and cards designed for animal lovers. 
Her passion and speciality is equestrians, farming, countryside, pets and wildlife. 
She also does commissions as well as the range of designs on her cards & gifts. 
She captures them in how they look & their personalities, making them a very personal gift.  

As well as this, she also does mixed media artwork, using stitch & paint, while also producing handmade gifts from her skills using crochet, macrame, stitch and paint.  Her mixed media work has been in UK publications. 

As well as being an artist, Teresa has also produced work for businesses, including equestrian illustrations & illustrative work for businesses in the public sector/social services sector. 

Teresa would like to expand the availability of her products in to more retailers both in the UK and worldwide.  
If you would like more information please email to 
Teresa@TeresaLewisArt.co.uk

Teresa also designs cards and gifts as a ‘ghost artist’ for other businesses, as well as producing illustrations for books, colouring books & other items. 

She is keen to collaborate or to work with companies that produce items for animals using her designs for their products, for example, horse rugs, dog beds or illustrations for packaging etc. 

Because it is a small business, you can guarantee that you will receive a very personalised service, good communication & high quality work.

Name: A Diversidade de Todos Nós
Description:
O projeto de extensão “A Diversidade de Todos Nós” tem o objetivo estimular o acesso e o consumo de obras audiovisuais ligadas à diversidade cultural, seja na apresentação do tema em seu conteúdo ou que integre sua origem e/ou produção realizadas em núcleos sociais diversos. Ao propor a realização de ações integradas entre a comunidade unespiana e a sociedade, acreditamos que o audiovisual seja um importante e estratégico agente de sensibilização, conscientização e transformação social.

Trabalhamos com o desenvolvimento de conteúdos que pretendem gerar engajamento e conscientização social por meio do consumo audiovisual, combatendo comportamentos sociais dissonantes ao cumprimento dos Direitos Humanos, como extremismo, radicalismo e violência nas diversas instâncias sociais. Estão em pauta em nosso debate a diversidade manifesta em culturas, credos, gêneros, raças, deficiências etc, buscando, assim, gerar transformações benéficas voltadas para os grupos sociais mais vulneráveis.

Como resultado, acreditamos que a relação de diálogo entre a universidade e a sociedade civil, respeitando o modo de ser e existir de cada um, especialmente os singulares e diversos, possa servir de referencial e estímulo para outras ações futuras de diálogo, produção, pesquisa e construções científicas que contribuam para o desenvolvimento social e humano de maneira respeitosas e construtivas, inclusive por meio de idealizações de políticas públicas que possam ser inspiradas a partir dos resultados alcançados.

O projeto teve início no segundo semestre de 2023 e conta com a colaboração de professores, alunos de graduação e pós-graduação, além de parceiros externos, como a Cinemateca Digital Bauruense.

Name: Madron Gallery
Description:
Madron — home to Madron Gallery, Madron Press, and the Skolnik family’s private art collection — is taking a new approach to artistic patronage. The Skolnik family, the founders of Madron, is committed to supporting Chicago artists, celebrating Jewish heritage, and acting as stewards of the legacy of American art, from some of the key figures in American impressionism like Robert Vonnoh, John Henry Twachtman, Theodore Earl Butler, Lawton Parker, and Robert Reid, to more modern and abstract artists like Bernece Berkman-Hunter, Albert Bloch, Oscar Bluemner, John D. Graham, Ethel Spears, Charles Green Shaw, and Ben Shahn. 

Through scholarship-informed programming and the en suite exhibition of artwork available for purchase alongside pieces from the private collection, Madron has carved out a unique place in Chicago’s artistic landscape, sparking dialogue about the ongoing significance of nineteenth and twentieth-century art in today’s world and fostering a dynamic community for Chicago’s culture-makers, shapers, and appreciators. 

With a collection that started forming over 25 years ago, Madron Gallery showcases the breadth and depth of art in the United States with its diverse inventory of paintings, drawings, sculptures, photographs, and prints by less widely-recognized artists. While the gallery’s American Impressionist pieces initially put it on the map, Madron also features an outstanding and constantly evolving collection of modern and contemporary art, aiming to illuminate artistic connections across decades and centuries.

Madron Press, formally established in 2020, seeks to further scholarship around significant but oft-overlooked American artists. Research and past exhibitions have delved into the creative spirits and legacies of these artists, the culmination of which has resulted into the publications Robert Vonnoh: American Impressionist and William S. Schwartz: Color and Coloratura, both available for purchase online.

Most of us know the situation: You’re on holiday in a foreign country and want to check out some museums or antiques markets, but there are very few guides that specialize in these areas. And if you try Google, you won’t find many results either, because you don’t speak the local language and businesses within these areas are generally not very good at promoting themselves online. But on The Treasure Guides we do all the hard work for you. We meticulously find listings in cities around the world and translate them all into English so you can find all the little gems that you would normally never find.

Name: McCaig Welles Gallery
Description:
ABOUT

Melissa McCaig-Welles

 2001-2021

Melissa McCaig-Welles is an independent curator and founder of McCaig-Welles Gallery, one of the first galleries to establish themselves in Williamsburg, Brooklyn in March of 2001.  

 McCaig-Welles focuses on mid-career, cutting edge artists that have emerged from the urban aesthetics that figured prominently in cities around the U.S. leading up to the millennium. The impact of these styles now feature prominently in media, pop culture and in museums and galleries worldwide.  McCaig-Welles is committed to showcasing impactful and innovative artists that effectively place a mirror in front of the viewer by creating works that touch on current events, present day trends and insightful introspection. 

 McCaig-Welles is recognized for her curatorial endeavors discovering contemporary art talent and placing it at the forefront of her programs, presenting artists recognized as pioneers of the new contemporary art movements including: Swoon, Tristan Eaton, FAILE, Shepard Fairey, FUTURA, Maya Hayuk, Olek, and Tim Okamura among many others.

 Melissa was selected as the head curator for several Pratt MFA exhibitions and was honored by The City of New York as an elected judge on the NYC Curates Panel of Judges. Since 2018 she has served on the advisory panel at RISD, offering carreer advice for MFA candidtates. Melissa McCaig-Welles is a curatorial committee member of The Times Square Alliance, collaborating with contemporary artists to experiment and engage with one of the world's most iconic urban places.  

In 2016 Melissa McCaig-Welles turned her focus internationally, focused on exhibiting international artists in conflict areas of the Middle East, curating murals and organizing social work with children.  These projects took her and her artists to Beirut, Lebanon, Athens, Greece and an exhibition in Biarritz, France which helped fund the first skate park and  elementary school in

Description: Art is something that can bring people together, help them express themselves and connect with others. Over the past few years, I have worked with organizations in Africa to help train more people in the arts so they too can connect with others and expand their horizons. I have seen first-hand the impact the arts have had on the lives of those I have worked with, and I believe that the ability to express oneself is a fundamental human need. Name: Boi Tran Garden
Description:
Boi Tran Garden, also known as Boi Tran Art Gallery, is not only one of the pioneering privately owned art galleries in Vietnam but the very first and only one in the onetime Imperial city of Hue proud to be an exquisite international compound for art, antiques, centuries-old architecture and later Hue-era culinary culture which gave Hue its reputation as a food capital continues today.
Founded in 1995, Boi Tran Garden, along with Minh Chau Art Gallery (2000-2005) in Hanoi, has a heritage and reputation for connoisseurship and exclusive bespoke service for buying and selling art as well as offers an inviting experience for Hue's traditional fine cuisine and history-related stories.
BOI TRAN: 'ARTIST, CHEF AND CREATOR OF HER MAGNIFICENT GARDEN'
Born in Imperial Hue City, in central Vietnam, a city that suffered more than engendered the painful political events of the 20th century, Boi Tran knew nothing of the influences – positive or negative – that nourished “the Schools”.

Nestled on Thien An Hill since 1998 and relocated to Kim Son Hill in 2022, proud but comforting, where the wind frightens the centuries-old pine trees, and the bashful, even prudish, flowers triumph over the rain, a place some leading Vietnamese artists’ masterpieces housed in a more than 100-year-old mansion blended with French Indochina influences.
Boi Tran’s Edenlike garden in Hue bears witness to this: diversity and elegance, but for simplicity as well, a lotus or an epiphyllum, whose flower opens during the night before quickly vanishing, communicates this. The garden would not exist without Boi Tran, yet, Boi Tran the painter would not exist without the garden.
Amongst many dignitaries who have graced Boi Tran Garden is Anthony Bourdain who featured Boi Tran and her royal courses in CNN Parts Unknown in 2014.

Name: tilt - le laboratoire des utopies concrètes
Description:
Le spectacle vivant et la culture ont été parmi les secteurs les plus longtemps confinés, et le contexte sanitaire risque de durablement modifier leurs conditions d’exploitation. Il est pourtant urgent de retrouver ces espaces de vibration commune, d’enrichissement, de questionnement, d’épanouissement, de rencontres, dans une société qui tend à se morceler. Le confinement a montré la place essentielle de la culture dans nos vies, rare moyen d’évasion quand le mouvement est contraint.

Le monde de demain, rêvé, prospecté, sera déterminé par celui d’aujourd’hui, pragmatique, concret, pour lequel il faut trouver au plus vite des solutions permettant une réouverture heureuse des lieux de culture. Pouvons-nous inventer des alternatives  à une version dégradée de ce que nous proposions jusqu’ici, entravée par les protocoles sanitaires et de sécurité. ? Pouvons-nous transformer ces nouvelles contraintes  en opportunités vers des chemins nouveaux, impensés, réinventés ? 

Le Centre International des Arts en Mouvement, le MuCEM, la French Tech Aix-Marseille, circusnext, le Festival International d’Art Lyrique d’Aix-en-Provence et Altran, leader mondial des services d’ingénierie et de recherche et développement, 

s’unissent pour faire émerger des solutions à travers un laboratoire d’utopies concrètes baptisé Tilt.

Name: ALKEDO aps
Description:
L’Associazione è un’organizzazione non lucrativa di utilità sociale che opera senza scopo di lucro
tutelando, valorizzando e promuovendo il patrimonio storico, archeologico, artistico, naturale ed
ambientale favorendone la fruizione e la conoscenza secondo i principi riconosciuti di educazione
ambientale.
Tra gli scopi rientrano gli obiettivi di cui all’Art.1 della Decisione N°508/2000/CE del Parlamento
Europeo e del Consiglio del 14 febbraio 2000 finalizzati alla promozione e diffusione della
conoscenza dei beni culturali e del paesaggio e la loro fruizione nonché al consolidamento della
cooperazione nel campo della tutela e valorizzazione del paesaggio e della cultura materiale ed
immateriale.
L'Associazione Alkedo Onlus è iscritta nel registro dei Soggetti Accreditati della Regione Toscana.
L’Associazione prende parte come Associazione Non Governativa al registro di trasparenza del Parlamento Europeo.
Alkedo Onlus è stata accettata fra le associazioni no profit  del Dipartimento delle Nazioni Unite per gli Affari Economici e Sociali(DESA).
Alkedo è registrata presso il CORDIS ovvero il “Servizio Comunitario di Informazione in materia di Ricerca e Sviluppo”. 
Alkedo Onlus è iscritta all’Anagrafe nazionale delle Ricerche.
L'associazione Alkedo Onlus è membro della Federazione Nazionale Pro Natura associazione riconosciuta dal Ministero dell’ambiente.
Alkedo è membro della rete italiana della Fondazione Anna Lindh per promuovere il partenariato Euro- Mediterraneo.
Alkedo fa parte del database della piattaforma Euro-med Youth e del network ECVET.
Dal 2013 l’associzione Alkedo supporta l’Earth Charter Endorser per uno sviluppo sostenibile e il CCLP WorldWide Education Charter International rivolto all’etica nell’educazione ambientale non formale.
L’associazione è stata promotrice del Comitato “Salviamo la chiesa di Michelagelo- Save Michelangelo’s church” per tutelare e preservare la pieve romanica di S. Martino di Seravezza(LU).
