Un espacio dedicado a el aprendizaje no formal de artes visuales y del fuego, de manera personalizada e intensiva con docentes escultores y pintores recibidos en Bellas Artes, con capacitación constante.
Clases diseñadas para Adultos, Jóvenes y Tercera Edad, en un ambiente distendido en el corazón de Buenos Aires.
Clases Regulares de dos o tres horas semanales. Seminarios Intensivos. Visitas y Recorridos por espacios Culturales. Programas Exclusivos para Empresas. 
Inscripciones todo el año.

Name: Mary Gilkerson Studio
Description: Artist studio space

Name: Psychic Garden
Description:
Psychic Garden is an independent arts and culture magazine founded in 2020. 
 
We cover topics like: art, music, science, spirituality, literature, history, philosophy, travel + sustainability.

Our ethos is aligned with a neo-renaissance; one that is happening now.
 
We share a vision of a reality in which creativity is celebrated; a place where art, science, music, spirituality and nature exist in harmony. We believe that knowledge is power and ideas change the world.

Name: Griffographe
Description:
Plus qu'un pochoir, le griffographe donne les clés pour illustrer,
ensuite c'est à vous de faire le reste du chemin : tester, combiner, imaginer, les combinaisons sont infinies !

Name: Amarillo Academy of Music
Description:
"Music Is a higher revelation than all wisdom and philosophy"

Music gives soul to the universe, wings to the mind, flight to the imagination, and charm and gaiety to life and everything. It is an explosive expression of humanity. It's something we are all touched by no matter what culture we're from. Everyone loves music.

For sixteen years we at Amarillo along with our band of talented musicians work towards helping to bring out the musician in you. By hands on teaching and guiding with expert advice and practice we work towards fine tuning your talents.

Name: Alpha Artistry World CIC
Description: We're a community Interest Company (CIC), passionate about unlocking creative potential in diverse communities and  young people. Our goal is to bridge gaps through art.

Name: Carrie Scott and Partners
Description:
CS&P offers a complete range of individualized art consulting services. From building a long-term collection, to buying and installing a single piece, our services are tailored specifically to our clients. Whether you’re looking for a few select works, a new image for your home or office, or an introduction to the art world, CS&P has the experience and resources to give you discreet and superior counsel.

Ultimately, CS&P believes art adds value and is transformative. We are inspired by its power to enrich people’s experiences and their environments. We want art to be accessible and by utilizing a unique combination of skills, expertise and resources, we afford our clients this luxury. Our long standing associations with galleries, museums and non-profits give our clients confidence in buying as well as unique access to information and inventory. Our experience producing permanent and temporary art commissions and collaborations enables us to offer you visionary and fully integrated strategies for all your needs.

In concert with building exciting exhibitions and collections, CS&P works closely with several artist - including Nick Knight, David Sims, Lord Snowdon and Walter Hugo & Zoniel - to establish strong and sustained print markets on their behalf.  We participate in many aspects of this process, from selecting pieces in their archive, assisting and overseeing print production, and putting together a considered sales strategy that sees placement of the work in museum and exhibition settings.

Carrie E.A. Scott, Founder and Managing Partner, has developed Modern and Contemporary collections in Europe and the United States. She has worked with executives to help them establish, manage, and maintain corporate art collections.

Name: Denise Bibro Fine Art
Description: Denise Bibro Fine Art promotes and exhibits both emerging and established artists, specializing in painting, works on paper, sculpture, and multi-media works. The gallery also presents collaborative projects with other curators and dealers.

Name: H.C. Andersen Priskomite
Description: Siden 1996 har H.C. Andersen Priskomite uddelt sin ærespris til 71 personer og organisationer fordelt på 17 forskellige lande fra Kina til Brasilien – foruden Danmark, naturligvis!

Name: Flyv Fugl art
Description:
Med kunstkonceptet Flyv Fugl art udleves en indre begejstring og barndomsfascination for fuglelivet i Danmark. Med en naivistisk malestil, anarkisme og humor bringer kunstner Jeppe Asholt de ellers velkendte fuglearter fra den danske natur frem i lyset som noget nyt, sjovt og spændende.

Flyv Fugl art vil skabe fornyet tilknytning til den natur, vi har lige uden for døren.

Limited edition kunst af Danmarks fugleliv
- et samarbejde med Den Danske Naturfond

www.flyvfugl.art

Name: Miles & Art - Art Gallery
Description:
Miles & Art c’est bien plus qu'une simple galerie, c'est tout d'abord l'histoire d'une bande de copain complètement “allumée” qui sillonne les rues de Chicago, appareils photos en main, à la rencontre des artistes urbains, des exposants et des artistes de scène. 

De retour à Paris, l’aventure continue et se poursuit avec le blog personnel. Le but : favoriser la promotion de la culture, des artistes, interprètes et des  activités artistiques. 

Plus qu’un blog, aujourd’hui, Miles & Art c’est aussi un Pop Up Art Spot qui expose et retrace le travail de divers artistes. A l’image du travail des artistes urbains, des acteurs du Spectacle Vivant ou encore des Graffeurs, la galerie se veut éphémère et mobile.  

Découvrez le premier Pop Up Spot éphémère à Londres.

Name: ART TM
Description:
ART TM est une galerie d'art au service des particuliers et des entreprises. Elle met en relation des artistes contemporains et des amateurs qui souhaitent acquérir ou louer une oeuvre d'art. 
ART TM propose un service de leasing en partenariat avec un organisme financier. 
Le leasing d'oeuvre d'art est particulièrement adapté pour les professionnels qui souhaitent acquérir plusieurs oeuvres afin de valoriser leur espace professionnel.

Name: Art stationia
Description:
تطبيق يتولى إدارة تعهدات و إدراج المواهب الفنية بأسلوب رقمي نجمع فيه المواهب المتميزة في منصة واحدة ليتم الحجز عن طريق التطبيق سواءً لحفلة خاصة او فعالية بطريقة سهلة بسيطة .
عند قيامك بالتسجيل على التطبيق يمكنك تصفح قائمة الفنانين لدينا و جميع المواهب الفنية التي تبناها التطبيق و الاختيار منهم الموهبة المناسبة لك و من ثم حدد التاريخ و اليوم و عندها ستصلك رسالة بالتأكيد .

Name: Het Gilde - ambachtelijke liederen op maat
Description: Het Gilde schrijft liederen in opdracht voor bijzondere gelegenheden van bedrijven en particulieren. Een goed lied is een waardevolle aanvulling en vestigt op een mooie manier de aandacht op een thema dat u belangrijk vindt. Een lied is een prettige afwisseling tijdens ieder programma, kan een humoristische noot bieden, maar ook een inzicht geven waardoor uw boodschap nog beter beklijft. Het Gilde bestaat uit vijf ervaren liedschrijvers uit kleinkunst en cabaret: Maarten Ebbers, Tjeerd Gerritsen, Bas Marée, Mattijs Verhallen en Eva Zwaving. Wij schrijven in overleg met u een steengoed lied op maat.

Name: Mirella Pavesi Art & Design
Description:
artist and designer using digital photography as main mean of artistic expression.
Limited edition archival prints and panels.
Single original art works in mixed media, paintings oil and watercolor and different materials
Corporate art, wall art, installation

Name: ArtSquare
Description: Welcome to ArtSquare – India’s largest Online Art Platform. Share your art with the world, buy art to beautify your spaces and create your own art. ArtSquare is an open courtyard for artists and art lovers to meet, share, discuss and purchase fine artworks. ArtSquare was founded on the principle - "Art is for Everyone".

Name: Hallo Wereld
Description: Basisonderwijs.

Name: Barnacle Bros. Sculpture & Custom Fabrication
Description:
Barnacle Bros. is an artist studio founded in 1997 by a friendly group of artists, craftspeople, performers, and local personalities. The folks at Barnacle Bros. are well versed in all media and processes. We specialize in wood, metal, fiberglass, composites, foam, resin, bronze, aluminum, stainless steel, stone, sculpting, casting, mold-making, models, miniatures, furniture, architectural elements, prototypes, and, of course, puppets.

We have grown from an artist collective, into a sole proprietorship, officially incorporating in 2009. Our East Los Angeles facility has likewise expanded to accommodate the successful production of challenging artwork on an international scale. Committed to cultivating a sustainable shop environment, we support local vendors and manufacturing, as well as choosing to use green energy and recycled or non-tree based paper products throughout our studio.

Since we are sensitive to the globalized evolution of creative practice, Barnacle Bros. is receptive to the needs of artists across all time zones and responsive to the economy of the artistic community. We emphasize a personal approach to collaborating with artists to because we realize that this is the key to successful projects.

Name: Reb Drawings
Description:
Waardevolle momenten zet ik graag op papier. Of het nou te maken heeft met familie, vriendschappen, liefde, zwangerschap, rouw of een ander aangrijpend of bijzonder moment in je leven. Deze herinnering verwerk ik tot een handgemaakt, uniek maar vooral persoonlijk line-art portret waar je jezelf volledig in herkent. Een kunstwerk met minimalistisch, tijdloos design, maar vooral van grote waarde. 

Een line-art portret is aan te vragen in verschillende formaten en wordt ontworpen op basis van foto naar keuze. Aan te vragen als los portret of inclusief massief houten omlijsting. Naast de line-art portretten creëer ik ook line-art prints aan en realistische grafiettekeningen.

Nieuwsgierig of meer weten? Ga naar www.rebdrawings.nl of kom direct met mij in contact via rebdrawings@hotmail.com.

Name: ART-BOX Occitanie
Description:
Créée en 2008 en Bretagne, la société Art-Box s'est récemment développée en Occitanie. 

Imaginez des œuvres d'art dans votre univers de travail. 
Avec Art-Box, nous vous proposons d'animer vos espaces en y exposant des artistes locaux.

Name: Creador y artista J. Antonio Fontal Álvarez
Description:
El proyecto artístico de J. Antonio Fontal Álvarez es una herramienta artística implementada para impulsar el arte por medio de participaciones colaborativas con el objeto de promover valores artísticos, crear oportunidades, impulsar el talento y fomentar la creatividad. 

Trabajo realizado a través del sacrificio que fomenta las oportunidades para desarrollar iniciativas, impulsar ideas y fomentar la cultura con el objeto de crear un patrimonio inmaterial y artístico.

Name: Figuerola Belles Arts
Description:
Figuerola Belles Arts somos una tienda de materiales para las Bellas Artes, como el dibujo, la pintura y el diseño gráfico. También tenemos los mejores productos para manualidades, como el scrapbooking, y un amplio surtido de materiales escolares.

TIENDA EN SABADELL:

Tenemos una tienda física en la ciudad de Sabadell (de 200 m2), desde la que, desde hace décadas, apoyamos el arte y la creatividad, ofreciendo una atención personalizada por parte de expertos en el sector.

Siguiendo con nuestra política de ofrecer un cuidado servicio, hemos creado un departamento de venta y consulta sobre material escolar para centros educativos, como colegios, institutos, escuelas de Bellas Artes y Diseño, etc. 
Aplicamos descuentos y creamos promociones especiales para este tipo de instituciones educativas, ofreciendo una atención directa y personal.

TIENDA ONLINE:

En nuestra tienda online encontrarás todos los materiales de dibujo, pintura, diseño gráfico y manualidades que existen en el mercado, de las mejores marcas.

Name: Agence Traxzone - musique de films
Description:
Traxzone est une agence de communication implantée à Paris, Toulouse et Lyon et dédiée à la promotion de la filière musique de films.
Nous assurons la promotion des compositeurs, des bandes originales, des ouvrages et événements spécialisés ainsi que  des films (par l'angle musical) en France et à l’international.

L'agence est divisée en 3 départements pour assurer ses différentes missions : 
- Communication : composé de plusieurs services et notamment celui des relations presse.
- Productions audiovisuelles, département dédié à la réalisation de matériel promotionnel pour les BO, les compositeurs et les films (photos, teaser, pastille, captation de séances d’enregistrement et making of pour bonus DVD, interview, portrait…).
- Événementiel : organisation et/ou animation de rencontres professionnelles ou tout public, concours, conférences et gestion de projets.

Name: The Business of Art Center
Description:
The Business of Art Center in Manitou Springs, Colorado is dedicated to the arts and the cultural enrichment of Manitou Springs and the Pikes Peak region. Our primary goals are to provide and create an exciting environment in which the artist and art organizations alike can thrive and grow.

Our facilities are designed to promote the development of artists from all walks of life. Providing subsidized studio spaces, art classes, expansive workshops and business training, we help to enable the artists to provide a living for themselves from their work.

The Business of Art Centers second building provides additional classrooms, meeting rooms, artists studios, office space and more. Additionally, there is also an events area to facilitate receptions, conferences, theater, music, concerts, performances, community and other special events. It's the perfect venue for performers and audiences alike. There is even office space for several smaller non-profits.

Name: Collectorate School and College, Rangpur
Description:
Collectorate School and College, Rangpur, is a renowned educational institution located in the heart of Rangpur city, Bangladesh. With a rich history dating back to [insert founding year], our school has been a cornerstone of academic excellence and community development in the region for [insert number of years] years.

At Collectorate School and College, we are dedicated to nurturing young minds and empowering the leaders of tomorrow. Our institution is known for its commitment to providing a holistic education that encompasses not only academic excellence but also character development, values, and leadership skills.

Key Highlights:

Academic Excellence: We take pride in our academic achievements, with a curriculum designed to challenge and inspire our students to reach their full potential. Our dedicated faculty members ensure that students receive a top-notch education that prepares them for the challenges of the future.

Extracurricular Activities: Beyond academics, we offer a wide range of extracurricular activities, including sports, cultural events, and clubs, to foster creativity, teamwork, and personal growth.

Community Engagement: Collectorate School and College actively engages with the local community through various outreach programs, contributing to the betterment of society.

Alumni Success: Our alumni have gone on to achieve remarkable success in various fields, serving as a testament to the quality of education they received at our institution.

Join us at Collectorate School and College, Rangpur, and become a part of our vibrant and accomplished community. Together, we aim to continue our tradition of excellence and make a positive impact on the world. Connect with us to stay updated on our latest achievements, events, and opportunities. #CollectorateRangpur #EducationExcellence #LeadersOfTomorrow

Name: Images By Julie
Description: Offering fine art images specializing in macro botanical photography.  No computer manipulation is used in any of my photos except for an occasional crop. Most images are available as canvas print, framed print, art print, acrylic print, metal print, and note cards.  Contact for pricing information as all are custom sizes.

Name: The Russian Ark
Description:
The Russian Ark gallery is committed to bringing to you the best of the Western figurative tradition, carried through centuries, uninterrupted.

We support the top young professional artists including the graduates from the Repin State Academic Institute of Painting, Sculpture and Architecture in St.Petersburg, Russia, considered to be one the leading art academies in the world.

Our deepest desire is to create an environment where our artists are able to focus on their practice (without compromises and sacrifices) to create masterpieces that will stand the test of time while our collectors are able to discover and invest into the classics of tomorrow.

Name: Unwhite it
Description: Nous avons créé l’association Unwhite it en juin 2017. Elle vise à promouvoir l’art contemporain et plus particulièrement les arts urbains sur la Côte d’Azur. Cela inclut les scènes street-art et graffiti. Nous soutenons le travail de recherche et de création des artistes urbains en mettant en place des événements. Cela permet également de promouvoir leur art auprès d’un public   initié et non initié. En seulement 2 ans, l’association a su fédérer des adhérents (20 en 2019), des bénévoles réguliers (une dizaine) et des bénévoles ponctuels. Cela grâce notamment aux différents Cafés street-art organisés chaque 1ersamedi du mois dans tout le département des Alpes-Maritimes. Mais aussi grâce aux différents festivals de la craie comme celui de Mouans-Sartoux et évidemment le MUR de Mouans-Sartoux. Celui-ci est devenu lieu incontournable du street-art sur la Côte d’Azur. Afin que nos événements soient accessibles à tous, l’association met un point d’honneur à en maintenir la gratuité pour le public.

Name: Lauren Halsey Studio
Description: Lauren Halsey (b. 1987, Los Angeles) is rethinking the possibilities for art, architecture, and community engagement. She produces both standalone artworks and site-specific projects, particularly in the South Central neighborhood of Los Angeles where her family has lived for several generations. Combining found, fabricated, and handmade objects, Halsey’s work maintains a sense of civic urgency and free-flowing imagination, reflecting the lives of the people and places around her and addressing the crucial issues confronting people of color, queer populations, and the working class. Critiques of gentrification and disenfranchisement are accompanied by real-world proposals as well as celebration of on-the-ground aesthetics. Inspired by Afrofuturism and funk, as well as the signs and symbols that populate her local environments, Halsey creates a visionary form of culture that is at once radical and collaborative.

Name: Stella Jones Gallery
Description: Visit us to see African American, contemporary African and Caribbean fine art!

Name: Hot Scotsmen Fine Art Foundry Inc.
Description: Hot Scotsmen is a full service foundry, providing mold making through patination, metal fabrication, restorations, sculpture commissions, consulting.  We provide exceptional quality and craftsmanship.  We have expertise in multiple high profile projects: including numerous life-size statues located nationwide and pieces ranging in size from miniatures to large scale statues in excess of 30' tall.  Hot Scotsmen specializes in bronze castings and restoration of bronze statues but have the capability to cast in many other materials.  Schedule an appointment to come tour our new facility!

Name: Artizan Collective
Description:
Established in 2014, Artizan Gallery promotes and supports local artists in Torbay and South Devon as well as playing a vital role in the cultural landscape of this region.
The long-term goal is to expand into a larger dedicated art space which will act as a central hub for arts and culture across Torbay as well as making the Bay an attractive destination for arts nationally; whilst the central ethos is local, our reach is already national and international and our promotion is not solely focused locally.  In the short to mid- term, now joined by my son Jacob, we are looking to increase our offer from this space, by expanding into other areas here and continuing to seek opportunities to raise the profile of the gallery and those artists who we support. Additionally, we intend to continue to use the space for other areas of creativity – performance poetry, music, networking events, providing opportunities to introduce artists and their work to a wider audience. 
The first four and a half years have seen a steady growth in awareness of the gallery and it’s aims across all our target audience and the business has established itself as a credible and professional space with a solid ethos.

Name: Galería Balance Cancún
Description: Galería de arte contemporáneo dedicada a la exposición y especialmente a la  venta de piezas únicas de arte, tales como: Pinturas (Acrílico, Óleo, Acuarela, Dibujo, Fotografía),  Esculturas (Bronce y Madera), realizadas por destacados artistas nacionales y extranjeros;  también contamos con Arte mesoamericano y Artesanía local, así mismo ofrecemos los servicios de elaboración de murales, retratos y pinturas bajo pedido.

Name: Vidhyalaya Dancespace
Description:
Vidhyalaya: Preserving Tradition, Inspiring Art

Welcome to Vidhyalaya, a cultural hub dedicated to nurturing and promoting the rich heritage of Bharatnatyam, Carnatic music, traditional arts, and Yoga. Founded with a vision to create an inclusive space for individuals of all ages and backgrounds, we offer structured and high-quality training programs that celebrate discipline, creativity, and cultural values.

At Vidhyalaya, we believe in the transformative power of the arts and wellness practices to build confidence, instill discipline, and foster team spirit. Our offerings include:

Bharatnatyam Dance Classes: Learn the essence of this classical dance form with carefully designed lessons covering Adavus, Margam, intricate techniques, and storytelling through mudras and expressions.
Carnatic Vocal Music Lessons: Explore the timeless beauty of traditional Carnatic music, from basic Varisais to advanced Keerthanams and Varnams, under the guidance of experienced instructors.
Yoga Classes: Experience the holistic benefits of Yoga, from physical strength and flexibility to mental clarity and emotional balance, through tailored sessions for all skill levels.
Workshops and Performances: Engage in enriching workshops and live performances that bring our students closer to the roots of Indian art and culture while building their confidence on stage.
We take pride in fostering a supportive learning environment that prioritizes inclusivity and quality education. At Vidhyalaya, financial challenges will never hinder a student’s access to learning—our goal is to empower every individual to embrace the arts and wellness practices wholeheartedly.

Through a combination of traditional values and modern teaching methods, Vidhyalaya aspires to preserve the cultural essence of Bharatnatyam, Carnatic music, and Yoga for future generations while encouraging creativity, innovation, and well-being.

Join us at Vidhyalaya to celebrate the timeless beauty of art, tradition, and culture.

Name: Quay Gallery New Zealand
Description:
Home of New Zealand Artists and Art.
In home presentations and exibitions.  Painting | Ceramics | Glass Art.  
Bringing Artists and Art Collectors together.

Name: Palacio - Crafted for You!
Description:
Roger Palacio is more than a carpenter he is an artist! 

For local work or custom woodwork, please send us a DM!

Name: Powers Studio
Description:
I have maintained a studio/workshop since 1958.   I was primarily a painter until the late '60's, except for work in mosaic,  Then I began to work in plastic and produced a large body of work.  There was an overall interest in technology here and I became a Northern California pioneer in the use of this material.  In 1972 I had simultaneous one man exhibits in San Francisco and New York.

In the late '70's there was a serious illness, melanoma, probably caused by a solvent {now banned} and I dropped acrylic like a hot potato.  Later, after surgery and while teaching in England, I learned to cast sculpture in bronze which I continue to this day.  I was Coordinator of Spatial Arts at San Jose State and taught drawing, sculpture (primarily metal), and graduate seminars for many years.  I was artist in residence for a semester in Australia and in France.  Both of these, and art history,  honed my interest in primal cultures.   This now combines with a deep interest in contemporary cosmology and I feel a rapport between the two which nourishes  my work in both sculpture and painting.

I have had since student days an interest in the integration of art and architecture and have executed several works in concrete, mosaic. and metal which are sited and integrated with their architectural host.   I have often lectured on this subject to community and professional groups.

  My wife, Lynn,  is a painter and has an adjoining studio.

Name: Kelly Ryner Wildlife Conservation Artist
Description:
Capturing the unique stories and personalities of our wildlife through their portraiture while building awareness and support for wildlife conservation.   

I have enjoyed an amazing career in the worlds of theatre, television, film, theme parks, and location-based entertainment as a whole. I have worked for and with the best in the business and loved every minute of it.

2020 was the year of change for so many people, myself included. What started as an extended vacation in Australia turned into a new path with a new purpose. Shortly after departing from Beijing, my husband and I fell in love with a picturesque little farm in the rural community of Cobargo, NSW almost halfway between Sydney and Melbourne and decided to make a new life for ourselves here.

Living in a place that moves a bit slower, I took the time to rediscover my love of wildlife and watercolors. Returning to my artistic roots has been spiritually fulfilling, living on the farm relaxing, and surrounded by all of this amazing wildlife – inspiring.

Supporting wildlife conservation through my own artwork is rewarding on a whole new level.

Name: San Stae Art Class
Description:
Explore observational drawing, capture the human figure on paper or sketch in situ in the great outdoors with our tutor-led still life, life drawing and architecture art classes suitable for all abilities. 
The sessions are run by Aly Grimes, a trained Artist, Curator and Designer with over 10 years experience of delivering contemporary art projects and exhibitions around the UK and Europe.

Name: Sunny Choi Gallery
Description:
Sunny Choi Gallery represents the work of Sunny Choi and other artists who are dedicated to representing images and ideas of beauty in the disciplines of painting, drawing, sculpture, printmaking and photography. The gallery is a forum to showcase her work, along with other like-minded artists, bringing their creativity to private collectors, corporate collections, designers and architects. Gallery director Jack Atkin offers consultation to all who have an interest in fine art, welcoming the first-time buyer and the seasoned client. 

Sunny Choi - Artist Statement and Biography
One cannot paint a picture of, or make an image of a woman and not deal with the concept of beauty. For artist Sunny Choi, beauty encompasses a sense of freedom, balance and harmony. Her need to create beauty is reflected in her work as a painter and as a fashion designer.

Name: Epix
Description:
Las conexiones humanas generan empatía y desencadenan comprensión, unión y colaboración. Epix es el espacio para descubrir esas conexiones. 

Somos un proyecto artístico y social con la misión de conectar venezolanos para crear empatía.

Vamos a colocarnos en los zapatos del otro!

Name: Antonio Menchón
Description:
Antonio Navarro Menchón: Arte, Luz y Paisaje 

Antonio Navarro Menchón es un pintor español nacido en Alcantarilla, Murcia, aunque reside en Roquetas de Mar, Almería. Es reconocido por su maestría en la representación del paisaje y su dominio del uso de la luz y el color. Su obra destaca por su capacidad para capturar la esencia de la naturaleza mediterránea, con una técnica que combina realismo e impresionismo.

Trayectoria y Estilo

Desde temprana edad, Navarro Menchón mostró un talento excepcional para el dibujo y la pintura, lo que lo llevó a formarse de manera autodidacta y a perfeccionar su técnica a lo largo de los años. Su trabajo se ha centrado en retratar la belleza del paisaje andaluz, especialmente sus playas, atardeceres y escenas naturales que transmiten tranquilidad y profundidad emocional.

Su pincelada precisa y su uso magistral del color lo han convertido en un referente en el mundo del arte contemporáneo, participando en numerosas exposiciones en España y Europa. Además, su estilo se distingue por una fusión entre el hiperrealismo y el impresionismo, logrando un equilibrio único que le permite capturar la luz y la atmósfera de sus composiciones con una sensibilidad especial.

Obras y Colecciones Destacadas

Entre sus colecciones más representativas se encuentran:

 "Luz Mediterránea": Captura la calidez y el resplandor característico del sur de España. Inspirada en la luz y los colores del Mediterráneo, esta serie muestra atardeceres vibrantes, reflejos dorados en el agua y la riqueza cromática de la costa andaluza.

 "Horizontes Eternos": Una serie de paisajes costeros que transmiten serenidad y vastedad. Esta colección destaca por sus horizontes amplios y cielos dinámicos que evocan una sensación de infinito y libertad.

Name: Salemi School of Ceramics SRL
Description:
Salemi Ceramics is a creative studio in Western Sicily dedicated to exploring contemporary ceramics through immersive one- and two-week wheel-throwing courses, as well as special programs such as wood firing, kiln building, and artist residencies.

Our school brings together artists, makers, and curious beginners from around the world to experience the rhythm of Sicilian life while deepening their connection with clay. Surrounded by rolling hills, vineyards, and the historic charm of Salemi, participants learn traditional techniques alongside modern approaches to wheel throwing, hand building, and glaze experimentation.

We believe in slowing down, creating with intention, and finding inspiration in community, culture, and craftsmanship. Every course is hands-on, guided by talented ceramic artists who share not just their skills but their passion for the process.

Salemi Ceramics is part of Leatherback Travel, a family of creative travel experiences that celebrate learning, connection, and the joy of discovery.

Name: MITSU ART
Description:
Creative & Art Direction | Key Concept Illustration

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/mitsu_art

ABOUT: 
Visual art and creative design solutions for the Entertainment industry, including character design, illustration and concept art for game and film/TV, graphic novel and publishing industries.

Name: Lisbon Drawing Club
Description:
Lisbon Drawing Club is a community of live model drawing lovers who meet regularly to draw and have a good time. Based on the principles of Community, Inclusion, Practice and Fun, we organize weekly meetings in different cultural/social venues in Lisbon since May 2021. We believe that drawing together is a great way to get to know each other better and also to get to know ourselves. Drawing can be a vehicle for emancipation, belonging and awareness.

Lisbon Drawing Club is interested in working with a diversity of models that mirror the richness of our social heritage and stimulate a practice of empathy, working with a diversity of bodies, gestures and identities represented by professional models, artists, folk groups, migrants, seniors, etc. Once a month, sessions are dedicated to trans and non-binary models in cooperation with Queer Art Lab. Regular drawing classes (masterclasses) with guest artists are also organised.

Since 2021, Lisbon Drawing Club has already organised more than 100 drawing sessions and masterclasses with more than 3000 participants, having collaborated with more than 40 social and cultural organisations in the city of Lisbon

Name: Jaclyn Gordyan |  Artist  & Sculptor
Description:
I make organic, sculptural, nature centric art.

Our connection to nature is ancestral.

There are draws to it we recognize easily – beauty, nutrients and life. But what interests me is what happens when we pay attention to the small moments. How if you pause to notice them, nature can be a powerful, grounding force simply by observing it.

My work focuses on bringing you reimagined moments. Through using organic elements, acrylics, oils, resins, layers and movement – I invite you to linger on the natural world. 

I hope by bringing a piece of it into your home, it gives you the same permission to pause I experience. And, maybe, just maybe, you start spotting other small moments in nature.

Como você sabe, para ter sucesso em um mercado altamente competitivo, muitas vezes, a qualidade do seu serviço não vai ser um diferencial; fazer com que o público tenha conhecimento do seu nome artístico se torna algo fundamental.

Name: Artizan Gallery
Description:
Established in 2014, Artizan Gallery promotes and supports local artists in Torbay and South Devon as well as playing a vital role in the cultural landscape of this region.
The long-term goal is to expand into a larger dedicated art space which will act as a central hub for arts and culture across Torbay as well as making the Bay an attractive destination for arts nationally; whilst the central ethos is local, our reach is already national and international and our promotion is not solely focused locally.  In the short to mid- term, now joined by my son Jacob, we are looking to increase our offer from this space, by expanding into other areas here and continuing to seek opportunities to raise the profile of the gallery and those artists who we support. Additionally, we intend to continue to use the space for other areas of creativity – performance poetry, music, networking events, providing opportunities to introduce artists and their work to a wider audience. 
The first four and a half years have seen a steady growth in awareness of the gallery and it’s aims across all our target audience and the business has established itself as a credible and professional space with a solid ethos.

Name: Taubert Contemporary
Description:
Founded 2013 in Berlin the gallery focuses on abstract painting, photography and site specific works and projects. Representing 18 national and international emerging and established artists and artist duos specialised in working with space, color, form and material in a specific manner, the gallery invites national and international guest artist and builds up international exchange exhibitions respectively.

Thomas Taubert started in the art world in 1993 in Düsseldorf, Germany, with a non-profit exhibition space focussing exclusively on site specific installations.

Taubert Contemporary participates in international art fairs as The Armory Show, PULSE Miami Beach, Dallas Art Fair, VOLTA New York and Basel. The gallery successfully placed works in a variety of public and private collections, including Fotomuseum Winterthur, Kunstmuseum Bonn, PAMM (Pérez Art Museum Miami) and many others.

The artists represented show worldwide in institutional solo exhibitions and regularly take part in prominent group shows. They have been commissioned to realise large in- and outdoor exhibitions and projects all over the world.

Name: I.I.S Adolfo Venturi

Nel 1923 sorge quindi l'Istituto d'Arte di Modena, intitolato all'ex studente Adolfo Venturi da un quarto di secolo professore di Storia dell'Arte presso l'Università di Roma. 

Dal 2010, con la nuova Riforma riforma scolastica, l'Istituto d'Arte Venturi si trasforma ancora una volta, cambia denominazione e diventa Istituto Superiore d'Arte A. Venturi...

Name: LADYBUG
Description:
LADYBUG is here to help visual artists take the next step in presenting their art to the world.

LADYBUG recognizes that most talented artists - whether new to the profession, mid-career or quite accomplished - are frustrated because they feel unable to build a website they can afford or produce printed materials that will actually pay off. Many are unwilling to spend time on promotion because they want to focus singlemindedly on their art. Perhaps they are uncomfortable with the commercial side of the art business, even though they also want to earn a living as a professional artist.

LADYBUG provides three types of services. First, we build shockingly affordable websites and then effectively train you to maintain them, without difficult technical issues to remember. Second, we design and produce printed materials, such as business cards and postcards, to get the word out. And finally, we create digital and printed catalogues of your artwork.

Our goal is to help artists achieve success.

Name: www.saraconca.com
Description:
Contemporary Abstract Artist 
Sara Conca is a self-taught, New York-based artist Native American and French Italian descent.
Conca credits her family's tendency to relocate several times per year during her childhood in  Florida with inspiring her appreciation for ever-changing environments and settings. By the age of 17, she left America and was living and working in Paris; an experience that reinforced her need for movement, energy, and art. While in Paris, Ms. Conca studied sculpture at Ateliers D’Art De St Maur Des Fosses; an education that she continued when she returned to her home in Florida and assisted the critically lauded outsider artist Pervis Young. She later traveled to Canada from New York where she worked with word renoun painter Graham Gillmore.
Throughout the past 18 years in Manhattan, she has experimented with a diverse variety of art mediums, yet her painting and sculpture practices have remained consistent. She brings a strong, emotive visual and skilled fluency within the forms of her abstract expressionism.
Conca has sold her work to many collectors in Europe, Asia, and the United States, including private chateaus and hotel lobbies in France as well as many celebrities homes.
Conca now lives and creates in South Florida.

Artist's Statement
My work is intended to instantaneously immerse the viewer into the visual
And emotional energies that I have devoted to each piece. Depending on
one's ability and willingness to be guided by the senses, these paintings
can lead one away from the mind and into an alternate and self-made
Reality filled with color and feeling. 
My Works features gold. I love working with this color because it changes in the light and I can manipulate the textures and layering; thus affording each piece movement
And energy from the reflecting and refracting light.
 Gold to me is Solar and Earthly which keeps the integrity of my structures in order in each piece.

Name: UNPACKED: Refugee Baggage
Description:
UNPACKED: Refugee Baggage seeks to humanize the word “refugee.” Created during the summer of 2017, this multicultural -media installation is the work of Syrian-born, New Haven CT artist and architect Mohamad Hafez and Iraqi-born writer and speaker Ahmed Badr.

For UNPACKED: Refugee Baggage Hafez sculpturally re-creates rooms, homes, buildings and landscapes that have suffered the ravages of war. Each is embedded with the voices and stories of real people — from Afghanistan, Congo, Syria, Iraq and Sudan — who have escaped those same rooms and buildings to build a new life in America. Their stories are collected and curated by Badr, who attends Wesleyan University and is himself an Iraqi refugee. Visitors experience short audio clips through headphones and can continue reading the stories online and on exhibit placards.

Description:
Acting Line Studio est une école de théâtre et cinéma en Suisse. 1 studio à Genève, 1 studio à Lausanne.

Nous formons nos élèves à réaliser leur rêve d'être acteur; avec un parcours d'enseignement professionnel ou des ateliers amateurs.
Notre pédagogie se veut respectueuse de l'acteur en personnalisant le coaching, mais surtout humaine et bienveillante.
Nos coachs sélectionnés avec soin son reconnus à l'internationale.

Les cours sont complétés par des workshop et masterclass exclusives abordant des sujets précis tels que le casting, les cascades par exemple. Les intervenants sont des professionnels du métier de renom.

Nous mettons un point d'honneur à préparer et accompagner nos élèves dans leur insertion professionnelle, pour promouvoir un succès à la hauteur de leur travail!

Description: Turning your passion into perfection. Whether you’re a beginner or looking to refine  your skills, we’re here to guide you.

Name: Keravan tanssiopisto
Description: Keravan tanssiopisto on taiteen perusopetusta ja syventävää opetusta antava oppilaitos, jota ylläpitää Keravan tanssiopiston kannatusyhdistys ry. Tanssiopisto tarjoaa oman paikkakunnan ja lähiseutujen lapsille, nuorille ja aikuisille mahdollisuuden sekä harrastaa omaksi ilokseen että opiskella tavoitteellisesti tanssin eri lajeja ammattitaitoisten opettajien ohjauksessa. Tavoitteena on samalla lisätä kiinnostusta tanssitaidetta kohtaan sekä järjestää korkeatasoista esityksiä ja tapahtumia.

Name: Palette & Chisel Academy of Fine Arts
George Adams Gallery
Description:
The George Adams Gallery works closely with the estates of Robert Arneson (1930-1992), Jack Beal (1931-2013), Elmer Bischoff (1916-1991), Joan Brown (1938-1990) and Gregory Gillespie (1936-2000), while regularly exhibiting the work of contemporary artists such as Luis Cruz Azaceta, Chris Ballantyne, Enrique Chagoya, Diane Edison, Amer Kobaslija, Andrew Lenaghan, Tony May, Peter Saul, Katherine Sherwood, William T. Wiley, and other emerging and under-recognized artists.The gallery also maintains an inventory of works on the secondary market by artists such as Jose Bedia, Robert Colescott, Red Grooms, Alfred Leslie, David Park, Ron Nagle, Manuel Neri, Richard Shaw, James Valerio, H.C. Westermann and William T. Wiley, among others.

With a long-standing association with art from the San Francisco Bay Area, the gallery’s program continues to champion art from the region through outreach and exhibitions of work by artists both from its roster and beyond.

Name: Onsite Gallery
Description: Onsite Gallery exhibits professional artists, designers and digital media makers, serving the OCAD University community and the general public.

Name: South Parade
Description: South Parade is a contemporary art gallery in Deptford, South East London.

Name: NORTHERN VIRGINIA FINE ARTS ASSOCIATION
Description:
Historic, beautiful, intimate, and inviting, the Athenaeum is home to the Northern Virginia Fine Arts Association (NVFAA). The NVFAA strives to establish premier arts programs that enrich the cultural life of Northern Virginia and beyond. Whether presenting exhibitions featuring prominent regional artists or performances by top musicians and actors, we invite you to come inside and enjoy the arts in our magnificent building.

Rentals:
   The Athenaeum is a dramatic and memorable site for wedding ceremonies, receptions, parties and seminars. This historic building is a beautiful setting for any event. You and your guests can enjoy a special art exhibit amidst one of the few remaining examples of neo-classical Greek Revival architecture in Alexandria. Whether for business or pleasure, hosting your event at this historic landmark will create the memories of a lifetime.

   The exterior features four soaring Doric columns across the portico and walls of stucco over stone and brick. The elegant rooms have 24-foot high coved ceilings, enormous windows and beautiful woodwork. There are two galleries on the main floor. Located on the lower level, with original exposed granite walls, is a large room that your caterer may use as a food preparation area, plus two restrooms.

*The Athenaeum has been listed as one of Virginia Living’s Top Wedding Vendors 2018!*
*A Wedding Wire Rated Business*

Find us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AthenaeumNVFAA/
Instagram: @athenaeumnvfaa
Twitter: @AthenaeumNVFAA
Pinterest: Northern Virginia Fine Arts Association @ the Athenaeum or at https://www.pinterest.com/northernvirginiafineartsassoci/

Contact us : admin@nvfaa.org or at (703)548-0035.

Name: Corporate Art Trends, Inc.
Description:
With 30 years of artwork experience behind us, Corporate Arts Trends, Inc., was formed to professionally serve clients with extensive and unique solutions in art as well as to offer the best products and service possible.

We collaborate with you and your team to carefully select artwork which reflects who you are, how you want the world to perceive your company, ultimately creating the right atmosphere for you, your staff and your clients.

Carefully selected artwork also perfectly supports Evidence-based design, or EBD, used largely in the healthcare field. EBD helps improve patient and staff well-being, patient healing, and reduces stress. We are a firm believer in EBD and can guide you through this process on your project.

Name: Galleria Monique
Description:
Galleria Monique is a not-for-profit focused on art therapy and related volunteering in the Metro Detroit area. A small and growing organization, we use our love for art to help those in need. We are also interested in partnering with other local nonprofit organizations to raise money for the less fortunate.

In 2010, we held a silent art auction to raise funds for Thanksgiving dinners for Detroit’s low-income families. We have also held art classes at local retirement homes like the Baptist Manor and Tapiola Village.

We use the emotional connection of art for philanthropy; as we say: "Express Yourself!"

Mission Statement: Galleria Monique's mission is to inform the community of the benefits of art therapy and to conduct resemblant events. Galleria Monique is committed to contributing volunteer efforts to other local nonprofit organizations for universal community development.

Galleria Monique does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, ethnic origin, national origin, ancestry, genetic information, religion, creed, age, disability, marital status, political belief, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or veteran status/military service.

Name: ABA Ravenna
ESPACE LVL
Description:
Espace LVL est une galerie nantaise née en 2011. Elle s'emploie à créer et diffuser des expositions empruntant les chemins du design graphique comme de l'art contemporain. Evoluant entre les mediums les plus variés, du digital à la céramique, du dessin à l'installation, l'association s'attache à montrer le travail d'une émergence artistique internationale par des projets entre comme hors les murs de sa galerie de poche. Elle multiplie les partenariats avec des structures et initiatives extérieures ( le lieu unique, le Voyage à Nantes, Stereolux ...) tout en offrant un panel de prestations artistiques auprès d'acteurs privés soucieux de soutenir la création et de participer à son rayonnement. 
•••
1, rue du Bâtonnier Guinaudeau 44100 Nantes

Name: TIE, The International Experimental Cinema Exposition
Description: TIE was conceived in the mountainous western-slope of Colorado in 2000 by film curator, Christopher May – along with the support of founding Board Members: Stan Brakhage, M.M. Serra, Standish Lawder and several hard-working interns. In a vision shared by artists, filmmakers and innovative thinkers from around the world, TIE joined the realm of the avant-garde while exhibiting an invigorating and creative experimental cinema. Since its inception, various TIE events have been held in Europe, South America, Canada and the United States.

Name: Archivio Giuliano Ghelli
Description:
The Archivio Giuliano Ghelli, dedicated to the legacy and works of the eponymous Tuscan painter, was founded in 2015 by Lilia and Vivaldo Ghelli, the late artist's siblings. The Archivio Ghelli is a non-profit organization concerned with the conservation, exhibition and care of works left by the artist, the certification and cataloging of works in private collections, and the management of copyrights inherited by the Ghelli family.
___________________________

L'Archivio Giuliano Ghelli, dedicato alla figura umana e alle opere dell’omonimo pittore toscano è nato nel aprile 2015 per volontà di Vivaldo e Lilia, fratelli del maestro. L'Archivio Giuliano Ghelli è un associazione culturale che si occupa della conservazione e gestione di opere lasciate in eredità dall'artista, della certificazione e catalogazione di opere in collezioni private, e della gestione dei diritti d’immagine passati in successione ai fratelli di Ghelli.

Name: Smile Lines! Caricatures
Description:
Smile Lines! offers caricatures, face-painting, portraits, and more to the good people of Boston, MA and Louisville, KY.  Artist/creator Emily Ruppel has been drawing caricatures at special events and on commission for over 5 years.  Some recent Smile Lines! events and clients of note include the Forecastle Festival, the first annual Ferdinand's Ball, YUM! brands, the University of Louisville, Maker's Mark,  Louisville magazine, LEO, and the Louisville Zoo!

A spirited and energetic caricaturist, Emily would love to delight the guests at your wedding, birthday party, Bar/Bat Mitzvah, gala, graduation, or special event.

Description:
A wholly-owned, intellectual property venture whose merchandising catalog consists of museum quality books, fine art, apparel and stationery based upon the conceptual elements of its premier book "TRAINS OF THOUGHT - Welcome Aboard!" and offered through T-2Life: Patterned After U.

Name: Bemis Art Community
Description:
At any time of the day, creative pursuits are being developed by over 40 dedicated, working painters, photographers, furniture makers, and filmmakers in the Bemis Building. Tucked into the southwest corner of downtown Seattle, the bi-annual art exhibitions have featured hundreds of local artists and attracted thousands of visitors.

 In 2010, the community created the Bemis Art Community Weblog to inspire conversations about the building of community and the cultivation of art.  It serves as a stage for our community members to be featured, tell their story and draw admirers into our world between shows.  Behind the scenes, it serves as a portfolio developer for our volunteer art producers.

 By promoting one another and the people around us, we contribute to the development of culture in the world at large.  People are what they leave behind.  We want our work to be continually built upon for years to come.  Therefore, we are establishing programs with the next organizers in mind.  It is our aspiration that this weblog will not only serve as a place for cultivating our community, but also, a place where others may find inspiration for growing their own.

Name: Bureau des Arts Bizz'Art - ESDES Business School
Description:
Le Bureau des Arts Bizz'Art de l'ESDES est une association étudiante crée en 2016. Le BDA est situé en plein cœur de la Presqu'île lyonnaise, dans les locaux de l’Université Catholique de Lyon (UCLy).

Notre but est de promouvoir l'art et la culture sous toutes ses formes au sein de l'ESDES et plus généralement de l'UCLy.

Nous organisons de nombreux évènements et activités culturels tout au long de l'année, dont notamment :
- Les sessions du BDA :  tous les étudiants du campus sont invités à venir partager un moment musical avec notre groupe de musiciens. Notre groupe de musiciens jouent régulièrement lors d'évènements organisés à l'Université.
- Le Guide du Rout'Art : guide rassemblant des articles culturels rédigés par nos étudiants esdessiens partis étudier à l'étranger.
- Les Jam Session (en collaboration avec une autres association de l'école)
- Vernissage : exposition d’œuvres réalisées par des étudiants au sein de l'Université.

N'hésitez pas à suivre notre actualité sur Facebook et Instagram:
https://www.facebook.com/BizzArtEsdes/
https://www.instagram.com/bizzartesdes/

Name: Davis & Co Fine Art Gallery
Description:
Established by David Davis and Melissa Davis Doron, the mission of Davis and Company, Contemporary Fine Art is to inspire our collectors and guests with original works of art of the highest possible quality. We strive to create an upscale, engaging gallery where artists of paramount caliber can exhibit and sell their works of art.

Davis and Company will be open weekly as well as for special events and juried shows exhibiting high collected contemporary artists as well as current emerging artists.

Davis and Company has hand selected a unique group of fine artists to offer both two and three dimensional work to not only enhance your exclusive space, but provide lasting value for generations to come. Davis and Company promotes and embraces honesty and integrity in collecting fine art and will assist patrons when selecting choice pieces for their distinctive space.


Hours: Wednesday through Sunday 11-5    Monday and Tuesday by Appt only.
Contact: Devinn - Devinn@davisandcompanyart.com

Name: Strategic Art Solutions, LLC
Description:
Founded in 2013, Strategic Art Solutions, LLC's mission is to elevate both spaces and places by integrating museum quality art experiences into public and private spaces to engage diverse audiences where they live, work and play. 

Strategic Art Solutions, LLC is a privately held partnership with a diverse team of professionals located in New York, NY, and Los Angeles, CA, Miami, FL, and Virginia Beach, VA.

Name: Evelann
Description: Evelann  is a conceptual enterprise that strives to capitalise on the fast pace evolving art environment. It provides compliance services to various art business players and maintains an active presence in the local and international art scene with individual projects such as art conferences, private art collection experiences and research. It promotes cultural exchange and cultivates international relationships around art.

Name: Amelia Caruso
Description:
“Effervescence” is Amelia Caruso’s debut line of printed fabrics for Robert Kaufman Fabrics and will debut in April, arriving in stores by May 2011. "Effervescence" includes three designs, which will translate into nine separate fabrics. Amelia is very excited about launching her licensing career with Robert Kaufman. Her "Effervescence" collection will be available through leading home/sewing fabric retailers throughout the country. Amelia is an artist based in Ft. Collins, Colorado. Her fine-art paintings are represented by ArtPic in California, The Malton Gallery in Ohio, and Columbine Gallery in Colorado. She is alumna of The Art Academy of Cincinnati and the University of Cincinnati. Her work can be seen in Colorado's public art program, on Emmy winning television shows, and is widely exhibited and collected throughout the United States; including the permanent collection of the Fort Collins Museum of Contemporary Art in Fort Collins, CO. 
  
Robert Kaufman Fabrics is pleased to present a new collection by Amelia Caruso, "Effervescence". When the images of Amelia's art arrived, we felt it was an excellent match for the portion of textile line where we feature fine artists. We look forward to "Effervescence" being well received in a new arena for her work. ~ Evie Ashworth, Robert Kaufman Fabrics.

Name: Rogerio Fernandes Art
Description:
MUITO PRAZER, ROGÉRIO FERNANDES
 Piauiense radicado em Minas Gerais, expresso minha arte em muralismos, telas, gravuras, esculturas e apresento um estilo com grande influência da xilografia nordestina, com tons de
realismo fantástico.
Algumas vezes estabeleço conexões e diálogos que interagem com a história da arte mundial e seus ícones, numa junção da arte contemporânea com personagens do imaginário popular.
Minha formação é em Design na Fundação Mineira de Artes (FUMA), Publicidade e Propaganda na PUC Minas, Gravura na Fundação de Memória Gráfica – Minas Gerais, Pintura a óleo/acrílico na Escola Panamericana de Artes – São Paulo, Ilustração para livros infantis na Central Saint Martin, em Londres, Inglaterra.
Nas redes sociais, você pode encontrar um pouco mais sobre minha história e parte do meu acervo, em fotos e vídeos registrados ao longo de duas décadas.

Name: Studio of Annie Mitchell
Description: Annie Mitchell is a Light Artist creating immersive experiences that promote critical thinking and cultivate communities. Her projects span a wide range of disciplines including experiential design, immersive technologies, sculpture, electronics, sound design, and light design. Annie creates site-specific installations that elegantly but disruptively weave into the natural fabric of human life; resulting in memorable moments in unexpected places.

Name: Nanne Meulendijks Illustrations
Description:
Nanne Meulendijks (1985) is illustrator en kunstenaar. Met haar werk levert zij een humoristisch, kritisch commentaar op de actualiteit.
Met subtiele, soms cynische humor, verwerkt zij kritiek, emotie, dynamiek en erotiek in een poetisch beeld.

Nanne Meulendijks werkt samen met bekende schrijvers als Ronald Giphart en Arthur Japin, en maakt geregeld illustraties voor NRC Handelsblad, NRC.next, NRC weekblad, de Volkskrant, Trouw, het ministerie van OCW, ROC Amsterdam en anderen.

Tijdens haar afstuderen aan AKV St. Joost in juli 2006 is Nanne Meulendijks genomineerd voor de St Joostpenning en voor de scriptieprijs.
In 2009 werd zij genomineerd voor de Young Illustraters Award tijdens de Illustrative in Berlijn.

www.nannemeulendijks.eu
Reageren? www.facebook.com/nanne.meulendijks

Name: Eline Muriël
Description:
Eline Muriël is an artist based in Europe, The Netherlands. She is an entrepreneur and influencer in creative areas. She likes to make art with a message, with a positive vibe and vibrant with joy.

Her motto? Let’s change our world with art!

Name: Milan Academy of Art
Description:
Nella Milan Academy of Art crediamo fermamente che il disegno e l'educazione all'osservazione siano la base di tutte le discipline artistiche. Ogni corso si concentra sull'affinamento delle competenze necessarie per rappresentare ciò che si vede attraverso il linguaggio figurativo.

Il nostro metodo si ispira alle tradizionali botteghe d'arte, enfatizzando la pratica quotidiana delle tecniche espressive del realismo e dell'arte figurativa. Gli studenti affinano la propria sensibilità artistica immergendosi nell'esperienza pratica e apprendendo diverse tecniche di rappresentazione.

Privilegiamo il confronto e il dialogo con il mondo circostante e la sua immediata rappresentazione. Gli studenti imitano modelli dal vero, lavorando su disegni, rappresentazioni bidimensionali e sculture dal vivo.

Unisciti alla Milan Academy of Art e scopri il potenziale del tuo talento artistico. Esplora le tecniche classiche di disegno, pittura e scultura per creare opere d'arte che lasciano il segno nel mondo contemporaneo. Iscriviti oggi stesso ai nostri corsi e inizia il tuo viaggio nell'universo dell'arte classica figurativa.

Name: Altruist Art Advisory
Description: Altruist Art Advisory is tailored exclusively towards new and existing art collectors. Specialising in collecting, buying, selling and valuations, the firm deals with artworks in all media, including painting, sculpture, work on paper, photography, video and VR art. Altruist Art Advisory will take the time to understand each client's requirements to succeed in a collecting strategy, with full discretion and confidentiality.

Name: TY Art Space
Description:
Tian Yu Art Space is a professional enterprise for the design and manufacturing of paintings, installation, sculpture and public art planning. Our business scope covers the industries such as hotel, model house design, soft decoration accessories, etc. We have office and factory located in Guangzhou with the area 2000 m², and a trading branch with a gallery and store around 300m² in Luohu district, Shenzhen.

We own a professional design team and many pre-eminent artists and designers with degrees of leading colleges of arts, with strong creativity and integrated service system, injecting fresh blood to the decorative painting industry. Devoted to providing products of high quality and novel style, we have established a diversified operation system of professional development, designing, production and sales.

Under steady development, Tian Yu Art Space pursues constant innovation of products, marketing and management, aiming to offer satisfactory goods and excellent service to our clients. Welcome customers all of the world to cooperate with us for mutual benefits, win-win outcome and glorious future!

Name: Somerset Gallery
Description:
Somerset Gallery has original paintings from established and emerging Canadian artists. The mission of Somerset Gallery is to provide paintings to the public and corporations at accessible prices and give artists greater access to the market. Paintings include landscapes, abstract, flora, fauna, paintings for children's spaces etc. Paintings are in oil, acrylic and watercolour.

Somerset Gallery sells paintings on-line which is physically located in Niagara-on-the-Lake, Ontario. Physical viewing of paintings is by appointment only. 

Additional services include:
1) Corporate Sales - We will find and provide art for your corporation and your business based on your criteria and price point.
2) Virtual Design Services - Need help choosing/finding a painting? All we need is a photo of your space and we will produce a virtual image for you, featuring the painting in place. All we need is a photo and a measurement of the largest item (eg. couch, bed, table etc.)
3) Art Placement - Expert advice on placing your art in your home or corporate setting.

Name: Connie’s Attic
Description: “Make the most beautiful thing you can. Try to do that every day. That’s it.”

Name: Art Bureau Gallery
Description:
Bring your business, or home, to life with stunning artworks. 
Access art from hundreds of talented NZ artists in one place.

Hire art for flexibility and a powerful way to update the look of your business. 
Completely modernise a room with an original large-format artwork.

We can select the right art for your space - whether you're a small business or a large firm. 
Our selection service is free with no obligation - you can see different art options superimposed onto your own walls. 

Enjoy flexibility and a complete service - from selection to art installation. 

Hire art, buy art or try before you buy. Art service available to businesses and homes throughout Auckland & Christchurch.

Name: Maskunda
Description:
Maskunda is vision straight out of a creative mind connected to The Original Artistic Source. The Designer has been drawing from his roots and our current times to offer you a unique, original and obsessive création.

This artwork is above all the result of a long creative process. The face of this artistic creation is actually one of the heroes of a story imagined by the creator who hopes to finance his fantasy film project thanks to the sale of the 70 MasKs. 

The African Mask is a mysterious object, full of symbolism. The colors and variations have been carefully chosen and applied manually to produce this effect of attraction. Each mask in the Maskunda collection is unique and carries particular energies and vibrations.

This Artwork is now available on Opensea 

Choose the mask that makes you vibrate!

1 NFT PURCHASED = 1 NFT + 1 AMAZING PRINT

Maskunda is also a PROJECT with almost unlimited possibilities.

Name: Galerie Sintitulo
The Social Art Movement
Description:
The Social Art Movement is developing a platform to connect art lovers and independent artists worldwide. Our curation engine will deliver consumers more of the art they love, and provide artists with the analytics they need to develop their careers, and our business team is constantly exploring new and exciting ways to bring art into the world - and to provide alternate revenue streams for artists.

Read more on our website, at www.thesocialartmovement.com.

Name: COMUNITÀ CULTURALE ITALIA
Description: It celebrates the rich artistic diversity and promotes freedom of expression throughout Italy.

Name: LA GRILLE urban & graffiti gallery
Description:
LA GRILLE is a gallery dedicated to urban art and graffiti. It is self-funded through a unique concept! The gallery takes no commission on artwork sales but supports itself by producing an original serigraph, exclusive and limited to 50 copies.

For each exhibition, the featured artist provides a visual that is manually printed with great care of a professional screen printer: Colormakerz.

Since its inception, the gallery has already produced 60 different silkscreens, which are sold around the world via its online shop: http://lagrille.bigcartel.com

Name: Cultureland.nl
Description:
Cultureland is a foundation that organizes creative work periods, projects and activities at the cutting edge of culture and nature because we think that it’s time to fundamentally rethink our relationship to nature.

The Cultureland Artist in Residency program starts in Amsterdam, where the artist or researcher can explore the cultural and scientific life that the city has to offer. We organize a kick-off meeting with the artist to meet other professionals and to start a conversation about the project. After this introduction, the artist retires for a production period at a rural location called Buitenwerkplaats in the Starnmeer. Halfway the residency the artist presents work in progress in the Storefront 181, a former shop on the Admiraal de Ruijterweg 181.  Finally, the artist returns to Amsterdam to finalize the residency. The residency is finalized by an “artist talk”, the proces and produce of the residency are displays to reflect on the findings.

Name: Cotton Candy Machine
Description: Cotton Candy Machine is the online art boutique created by Tara McPherson and Sean Leonard located in NY. Specializing in limited edition art prints, posters, apparel, books, toys and more by Tara McPherson and select contemporary artists. Cotton Candy Machine is the main online retailer for Tara McPherson's merchandise, and does many fun events and pop up shops all over the world!

Name: Pittura Taller de Arte
Description:
Pittura es un Taller de Artes Plásticas y Desarrollo Humano, donde damos clases continuas para niños, adolescentes y adultos.

A la par, creamos experiencias para empresas:
Te invito a vivir la integración e implementación de valores para tus colegas o equipo de trabajo, por medio de la Arteterapia.

Pregunta por paquetes disponibles o cotiza un taller a la medida.

Name: Pont Aven Art Center
Description:
Pont-Aven Art Center is both a French and American nonprofit composed of an artist residency program and a community gathering place for art classes, workshops, lectures and exhibitions. Our mission is to connect international creators of all levels to continue Pont-Aven's artist colony legacy and to facilitate the discovery of Brittany as a source of endless inspiration.

Pont-Aven Art Center est une association franco-américaine comprenant une résidence d’artistes et un lieu d’échanges qui propose cours d’arts plastiques, ateliers, conférences et expositions. Notre mission est de réunir des créateurs de tous niveaux et nationalités pour perpétuer l’héritage de Pont-Aven comme colonie d’artistes et de promouvoir la source éternelle d’inspiration qu’est la Bretagne.

Name: I Mobius Studio
Description:
Mick Victor's work in art, visual design and creative media has brought a great deal of success to agencies and clients of all sizes and market disciplines. His background includes schooling in the US and London, corporate advertising and public relations management, information design, media consulting and creative direction for clients in New York, San Francisco and Southern California.

I MOBIUS clients include Ingram Micro, Prive Healthcare, Sony Corporation, Post Modern Group, BN Labs, Environ Architecture & Design, NASDAQ, LA County Museum of Art, BBDO Worldwide, Saatchi & Saatchi and Paramount Pictures.

Name: J.Robert Gorfine
Description: Print, illustration, comic art, film, animation, photography, and writing.

Name: Project Grow- part of Port City Development
Description:
Project Grow is an Alternative to Employment (ATE) program located in Portland, Oregon. Founded as part of Port City Development Center in January 2009, Project Grow replaced the former ATE program. At Project Grow we are challenging the idea of what ATE means by providing meaningful alternative employment opportunities in art making and farming rather than just alternative to employment activities. 

Participants in Project Grow earn a paycheck from the sale of their artwork through gallery showings and sale of produce through Community Supported Art and Agriculture subscriptions (CSAAs) and to Portland restaurants. In addition to developing art projects and farming, our participants participate weekly in yoga, field trips, and music time.

Mission: Project Grow enriches the lives of adults of all mental diversities, by recognizing each individual’s gifts, promoting community integration, and skills development through the practice of art making, farming and yoga.

Name: @world
Description: ART / Kunst

Name: Gallery Perfect
Description: Gallery Perfects is a contemporary Georgian Art platform for female artists. Our aim is to create visual alternative Art Space for women artists. Name: Vórtice Cultural
Description:
Vórtice Cultural is an independent artistic initiative with full curatorial autonomy, dedicated to the training, professional development, and internationalization of artists, as well as to the dissemination of contemporary erotic art.

Founded and led by artists Leonardo Maciel and Paulo Cibella, Vórtice strengthens the cultural ecosystem through multiple fronts. Throughout its trajectory, it has collaborated with more than 400 artists across nearly 30 exhibitions, establishing itself as a hub for emerging talent, circulation, research, and experimentation. The Vórtice Community brings together over 160 artists in an active environment of daily exchange and collaboration. The Vórtice Library preserves and provides access to a collection of more than 300 rare books on erotic art. The Vórtice Festival, dedicated to contemporary art, celebrates eroticism, diversity, and love — expanding the visibility of marginalized artists alongside established names, creating a space of resistance and uncensored expression. Completing this ecosystem, the Vórtice Gallery operates as Brazil’s first exclusive marketplace for contemporary erotic art, connecting artists with new audiences and broadening the reach of erotic production in the country.

Name: Stichting Atelier de Kunstvlieg
Description:
Atelier De Kunstvlieg is een non-profitorganisatie die kunstzinnige dagbesteding biedt aan mensen met een verstandelijke, lichamelijke of sociaal-emotionele bijzonderheid. De deelnemers zijn in verband met hun beperking niet in staat reguliere arbeid uit te oefenen.

Bij Atelier De Kunstvlieg kunnen de deelnemers hun dag een zinvolle invulling geven door uiteenlopende kunstzinnige activiteiten uit te oefenen. Dit geschiedt individueel of in groepsverband onder deskundige begeleiding van pedagogisch- en artistiek opgeleide medewerkers. 
Deze begeleiding gaat uit van de individuele mogelijkheden van de deelnemers. De dagbesteding heeft een positief effect op de sociaal-emotionele ontwikkeling en biedt de deelnemers leerzame en plezierige activiteiten.

Name: Théâtre du Gouvernail
Description:
Théâtre Cyber-Acte, puis Théâtre des Deux Rêves, ce lieu de spectacles situé à deux pas du Bassin de la Villette (Paris 19ème) devient depuis le 31 Juillet 2013, Le Théâtre du Gouvernail.

Dirigé par une nouvelle équipe, ce petit théâtre, typique des théâtres de poche parisiens, est un écrin  confortable et équipé dont la vocation première est d’accueillir une programmation éclectique, où la découverte comme la qualité restent des priorités.

Spectacles théâtraux classiques comme contemporains, créations, seuls en scène, spectacles musicaux, sans oublier bien sur, spectacles jeunes publics.

Spectateurs comme compagnies sauront trouver au Gouvernail, un encadrement accueillant et attentif, afin que chaque expérience théâtrale demeure un moment intense et convivial, tant dans la salle que sur la scène.

Lieu dynamique et aux propositions variées, Le Gouvernail abrite également une Ecole de Formation de l’Acteur, des ateliers théâtre pour enfants, des évènements exceptionnels, un Festival d’été consacré aux jeunes publics (le Festival des Pitchouns), ainsi que des espaces pour répétitions, show-case, casting, ou encore organisation de stages.

Alors, embarquez avec nous, destination curiosité.

L’équipe du Théâtre du Gouvernail

Name: Galerie Jos Depypere
Description:
Founded in Kuurne in 1950 by Michel Depypere, Galerie Jos Depypere is one of the most authentic representatives of old, modern, and contemporary art in Belgium.

The year 1969 marked the beginning of a series of exhibitions, including the first expo by José Vermeersch, which launched his career. In 1978, Jos Depypere, together with his brother Rik and sister Katrien, took over the gallery from their deceased father. Following in his father’s footsteps, Jos Depypere was determined to continue his mission and to discover new talents. “No art without passion” has since become the gallery’s mantra ever since.

During this journey, he discovered many talents who shared the same passion for art. This meant a start or breakthrough for many artists such as Koen Scherpereel, Philippe Bouttens, Pjeroo Roobjee, Godfried Vervisch, Christian Silvain, Giampaolo Amoruso, Bernard Pras, and many others.

Galerie Jos Depypere, always on the lookout for new talent, still presents a mix of contemporary, modern, and old art by artists such as F. Jespers, L. Robbe, Permeke, E. Viérin, E. Carpentier, and more.

From generation to generation, Galerie Jos Depypere is known not only for its warm welcome and family approach but also for its expertise. As a member of the Flemish Association of Experts and the AAEIA, Jos Depypere’s experience and know-how have enabled the gallery to make its mark on the Belgian art market.

To this day, we still believe that art is not only a passion but also an emotional feeling that can and should bring people together.

The gallery is now run by Jos Depypere and his daughter Chloé Depypere, who warmly welcome anyone with a passion for art.

Name: Chestertown River Arts
Description: RiverArts is a vibrant community arts center that offers a dynamic, engaging and constantly evolving program of exhibitions, programs, classes and special events.  Over 500 members  bring a great deal of energy to support the arts and creativity in the community.  A non-profit 501(c)(3) organization, RiverArts Mission is “to engage our community in the creation, appreciation, and support of the arts through education, events, and exhibitions.”  RiverArts vision is to “inspire and foster creativity as a positive and sustainable force that enriches our community and establishes the region as a premier arts destination.”

Name: Cary Visual Art
Description:
Cary Visual Art is a non-profit public art organization whose mission is to promote, inspire, encourage, and support visual arts for the uplifting of the human spirit in the Cary community.

Cary Visual Art places art and fosters community engagement through public art in Cary, North Carolina, bringing both beauty and a unique character to our town. Our founders were a group of individuals and business professionals passionate about the ability of public art to enhance and transform a community.

Our programming falls into three categories: Permanent Placements, Exhibitions and Community Programs – all for the purposes of enhancing the quality of life for Cary residents and to create a lasting impression for visitors. Many of our placements have become immediately recognizable and loved throughout the community. The beautiful gate “Overture” by Jim Gallucci welcomes all that enter the Koka Booth Amphitheater and “KATAL” the playful earth dragon at Marla Dorrel Park are two examples. Thanks to our volunteers’ passion, community members and businesses recognize that public art enhance the quality of life and economic vitality in Cary.

Name: SIKÖ AUKTIONER AB
Description:
Sikö Auktioner AB är ett etablerat auktionshus med bas i Skåne, som förmedlar auktioner för både privatpersoner och företag via nätauktioner året om.

Med auktionshus i Kristianstad, Malmö och Karlskrona har Sikö Auktioner AB sedan starten 1996 utvecklats till en av Sveriges största nätauktioner med över 50 000 auktionerade föremål varje år. Genom våra nätauktioner når vi köpare och säljare både i och utanför Sverige.

Vi har mångårig erfarenhet av helhetslösningar och kan erbjuda alla steg från försäljning till flyttstädning vid exempelvis konkurs- och dödsbon. 

Vår unika affärsidé gör att du hos oss hittar föremål för såväl finrum som verkstad vilket gör att vi kan omsätta många fler föremål från ett hem jämfört med traditionella auktionsverk.

Bland våra uppdragsgivare återfinns bland annat juristbyråer, banker, mäklare, boutredare, gode män, företag och privatpersoner.

Välkommen till Sikö Auktioner!

Name: MILENE GUERMONT
Description:
Milène Guermont is an Artist and Engineer.

Weighing anything from a few grams to several tons, her works in Polysensual Concrete react (sounds, lights, vibrations) according to your magnetic field by touching them.

Some of her artworks are permanently installed on classified areas such as INSTANTS (monument for the WW2 at Utah Beach), CAUSSE (tomb at Montparnasse Cemetery), BALANCE (at Père Lachaise) ...

Her PHARES is the first artwork of all History to be born next to the Obelisk of Place de la Concorde. This 30 m high pyramid made of metal and light dialogues with the public, the Obelisk from Luxor and the Eiffel Tower.

Among her distinctions: Artprize Nova XX (international competition for women artists using tech) in 2017, the Peace Hero Award in 2019 and the Maria & Hap Wagner Award in 2020.

She creates a total artwork with 80 companies of French Excellency: www.maisonguermont.com
