Name: Anthony Brunelli Fine Arts
Description:
Established in 2003, Anthony Brunelli Fine Arts is a contemporary fine art gallery located in Binghamton, NY.  The gallery is owned by internationally renowned photorealist painter, Anthony Brunelli.  Under the directorship of his brother John Brunelli, Anthony Brunelli Fine Arts specializes in the finest examples of contemporary realism, photorealism and well-disciplined abstract paintings, drawings, sculpture, original prints and alternative photographic media by emerging, mid-career, and established international artists. Fine quality craftsmanship, labor-intensive production, and innovation are central to the gallery's program.

Anthony Brunelli Fine Arts attracts clients, collectors, and artists from around the world through our participation in international art fairs and collaborations with other notable galleries and institutions worldwide.  We are accessible to first time buyers and seasoned collectors, and we assist individuals and businesses with the acquisition of single works of art to the development of larger private and corporate collections. We also offer discreet and professional brokering services on the secondary market for single works of art to larger, private and corporate collections involving fine art and antiques - Modern and Contemporary Masters as well as pre-20th Century Masters. Our friendly and knowledgeable staff offers various levels of consultation and is ready to assist with all of your inquiries and needs.

Name: Til Vægs
Description:
Til Vægs er en nonprofit udstillingsplatform for kunst i det offentlige rum. 
 
Platformen består af 7 udendørs diodeskærme på 1 x 1,5 meter, der hænger på de store almene boligblokke i Lundtoftegade på Ydre Nørrebro i København. 
Skærmene er indkøbt af områdets afdelings bestyrelse med henblik på at vise informativt materiale til beboerne i boligforeningen. 
 
I starten af 2017 opstod ideen, om at bruge skærmene til at vise samtidens videokunst for offentligheden - og vi har siden udviklet os til at vise andre former for kunst bl.a. Performance kunst. 
 
Vi vil forsøge at skabe dialog mellem 70’ernes almene boligbyggeri, et diverst og mangfoldigt publikum og samtidskunsten gennem en dynamisk udstillingsplatform. 
 
Vores vision er at skabe forundring og nye oplevelser hos tilfældigt forbipasserende og Lundtoftegades beboere. 
Desuden forsøger vi at generobre definitionsretten over vores boligområde og bidrage med positive historier om de almene boligområder. 
Vi oplever, gennem en længere årrække, at være underlagt en diskriminerende diskurs fra politikere og i medier.   
 
Vores håb er, at kunne tiltrække en befolkningsgruppe som ikke ellers ville opsøge et alment boligområde og  give dem en fair og forhåbentlig bevidsthedsudvidende oplevelse af både vores område og samtidskunsten. 
 
Med Til Vægs vil vi danne grundlag for en invitation ind i “Ghettoen” der forhåbentlig kan medvirke til et retvisende billede af et alment boligområde. 
 
Til Vægs drives frivilligt af både beboere og ansatte i  AKB Lundtoftegade og er opstået i en stærk tro på kunstens kræft og forundringens potentiale.

Name: Pneuma Art Foundation
Description: Art has the power to inspire, to change culture. With the Pneuma Foundation we will inspire a New Renaissance by empowering a new generation of Masters to create art with classical techniques and distribute with modern tools. We take inspiration from antiquity and will breathe a new Pneuma into a new Renaissance, starting in Rome and bringing it all across the globe.

Name: Spazio Studio
Description:
En Spazio creemos que el arte es una poderosa herramienta de transformación personal y colectiva.
Somos un espacio creado por artistas activos en el medio, con más de seis años de experiencia, dedicados a la exploración y desarrollo de las artes visuales. Nuestro propósito es llevar la sensibilidad, la creatividad y el pensamiento artístico más allá de las galerías y los talleres, para integrarlos en el corazón de las empresas.

Diseñamos experiencias y programas artísticos a medida que permiten a los colaboradores conectar con su creatividad, relajarse y desarrollar habilidades clave como la atención plena, la comunicación, el trabajo en equipo y la innovación.
En un mundo saturado de tareas, pantallas y estrés, el arte se convierte en un canal para recuperar el equilibrio, fortalecer la motivación y generar vínculos más sólidos entre las personas y la organización.

¿Qué ofrecemos a las empresas?

- Talleres de pintura, dibujo y otras técnicas artísticas adaptadas a las necesidades de las empresas.

- Experiencias creativas personalizadas para eventos corporativos, team building o celebraciones especiales.

- Programas continuos que fomentan la expresión y el bienestar de los colaboradores.

Cada sesión combina técnica y expresión libre, guiada por artistas profesionales que inspiran y acompañan el proceso creativo de forma cercana y personalizada. El resultado: equipos más cohesionados, colaboradores más motivados y un ambiente laboral más saludable.

En Spazio, creemos que el desarrollo artístico es también desarrollo humano. Por eso, nuestro compromiso es crear experiencias que transformen, inspiren y dejen huella.

Arte para conectar. Arte para transformar. Arte para crecer.

Name: Modern Art Family
Description:
Modern Art Family est une marque 100% collaborative de décoration murale dédiée à l’art.
L’ADN de la marque est de collaborer avec des artistes de talent et de privilégier avant tout leur créativité unique. Aujourd’hui, la marque compte plusieurs artistes en collaboration ; principalement des street artistes, mais aussi des tattoo artistes, des peintres, des illustrateurs… Et a pour objectif de faire continuellement grandir cette famille d’artistes. 

Lancée fin juillet 2018, la marque commence d’abord par vendre des stickers de décoration d’intérieur à destination des particuliers. Aujourd’hui, Modern Art Family se diversifie pour vous proposer des oeuvres grands formats sur mesure. Grâce aux artistes et à l’expertise des imprimeurs français qui l’accompagnent, la marque est capable de proposer des décorations murales personnalisées, uniques et artistiques.

Le nom Modern Art Family n’a pas été choisi au hasard. Le mot Family donne ici tout son sens. Au-delà de la coopération de tous les acteurs impliqués, la marque souhaite véhiculer des valeurs qui sont, selon elle, essentielles au bon déroulement de toute relation, projet, coopération telles que l’honnêteté, le respect, la confiance et enfin l’entraide.

Name: Roberto Prado Studio
Description:
We live immersed in a matrix of sounds, moving images, still images and text which represent our reality to us and from which we derive our world view, opinions, tastes and amusements and which we collectively refer to as "the media".

Once unidirectional, our relationship with this matrix is now dialectical. 

Roberto Prado Studio provides a formal framework for individual fine art projects, collaborative ventures and works in film, theater and new media.

The best way to understand the future of art is to create it.

Name: Steidel Fine Art
Description:
Steidel Fine Art is an international, contemporary art gallery and art consultancy providing collaborative advisory and fine art services for private collectors and interior designers for the home, professional office, and corporate environments. We have showrooms available by appointment only located in the Chelsea Fulham District of London and Texas Hill Country near Austin. We work with emerging and established artists to present a diverse exhibition of different disciplines and media congruent with trending concepts and themes thoroughly dedicated to inventiveness and distinction.

What sets us apart is our dedication to providing our clients access to overseas collections and extraordinary commissioning opportunities by maintaining an international presence and strong artist relationships. We have shown contemporary fine art and design work in international art shows in the UK and USA, and uphold an active fair schedule. 

We are experienced to support, develop, and enhance your personal or corporate art collection by sourcing original fine art that will compliment your vision. Name: Mosteiro de Arouca
Description: Documentado desde o século X e assumindo caráter feminino a partir de 1154, o Mosteiro de Arouca adquiriu especial relevância no século XIII com a entrada da Rainha D. Mafalda, tornando-se um dos mais poderosos mosteiros femininos da Ordem de Cister em Portugal. A sua aparência atual resulta de grandes obras dos séculos XVII e XVIII, que substituíram os vestígios mais antigos, ostentando a Igreja (com túmulo da Rainha Dona Mafalda, órgão, e rica talha dourada), coro das monjas, claustros, cozinha conventual, sala do capitulo e um valioso Museu de Arte Sacra responsável pela preservação da história e das tradições monásticas.

Name: Guirado Estate
Description:
The art and philosophy of the critically acclaimed post-war contemporary Spanish painter from Jaén, Andalusia who, escaping a fascist regime, traveled across the world to Australia where he created a unique style of painting. 

With works in major permanent collections including the Museo Reina Sofia Madrid, The Museum of Malta, Museo Gilabert, Arboles, ES, and winner of the gold medal of the Grolla D'rollo, Venice art competition in 1975.

The Estate of Juan Antonio Guirado was originally founded in 2013, by the artist’s only daughter, Catalina Guirado. Its primary aim is to advance and establish the heritage of this critically acclaimed 20th Century artist.

 The Estate is supported by an international loan program, as well as a research and documentation center. This collection has examples of every aspect of Guirado’s versatile artistic output and its typologies. These include preparatory studies, drawings, and paintings, all varying in theme and technique.

 Collection genres include Andalusian landscapes, a large series of portraitures, bullfighting studies, abstract & spray paintings, and the largest and most recognized body of work comprises of visionary paintings, otherwise known as Guirado’s Intrarealist work, which was strongly influenced by his social-political views, his environmental concerns, spiritual beliefs, the study of eastern philosophy and man’s ever-growing quest for enlightenment. At the Guirado Estate, we are dedicated to furthering Guirado’s legacy through the preservation of the object, as well as its cultural, historical & essentialist context, highlighting both Spanish & Latin influences and heritage.

The Guirado Estate is represented by Spanierman Modern. All sales enquiries please visit spaniermanmodern.com

We achieve this goal by always presenting a professional, relaxing, and clean environment where clients can collaborate with artists to render the finest piece of art for their skin. Our customers have privacy from public view to work with their artist.

An art gallery as well as tattooing, we seek to act as a light source, to illuminate the dark stereotype formally cast on these "low brow" arts. We strive to further establish and educate the community to the intrinsic value of tattooing as a true art form and to elevate genres shunned as lesser than, to the fine art status they deserve.

Name: Allison Kallaway Jewelry
Description:
Bold pieces for the unassuming art collector who discovers unusual additions for their collection. Exhibitor at the invite-only Smithsonian Craft2Wear show.

Allison Kallaway has a passion for creating strikingly unique jewelry, which emerged in her childhood amongst the visually stimulating landscapes in and around Fort Collins, Colorado. She began developing her strong metalsmithing skills in high school and college coursework. Then majored in Art Education with the goal of sharing her craft with others around the world. After a solo sojourn through Italy, Allison joined the Peace Corps as an Art Educator and taught young people in Botswana about the creative expression of art. Addicted to the carefree lifestyle, stunning natural world, and unique experiences Southern Africa provides, she independently carved a life for herself teaching and working within the safari industry. Allison returned to the United States twelve years later with her Zimbabwean husband, Rory Young, to raise their son on the very land her family homesteaded at the turn of the century. This is where she spent many vacations as a child and where she now calls home. Surrounded by loving family in Montana’s lower Flathead Valley, Allison brings expression to the myriad of African design elements that have influenced her unique style of modern industrial jewelry.

The gallery has presented first New York solo exhibitions for artists such as El Anatsui, Aida Muluneh, and Santu Mofokeng, and has exhibited works by accomplished South African artists such as William Kentridge and Diane Victor, as well as young artists such as Mongezi Ncaphayi, Senzo Shabangu and Quinten Williams.

In collaboration with Master Printer Philip Sanders, The New York gallery has published work by USA artists such as Chakaia Booker, Joseph Hart and Chuck Webster; facilitated lectures tours to the USA for Cedric Nunn, Diane Victor, and Stephen Hobbs; provided residences to young artists such as Endale Desalegn; and collaborated on traveling museum exhibitions such as the current of THE UNIVERSAL ARCHIVE works by William Kentridge.

Name: ORA ARTS
Description:
ORA is a pioneering tool of production, diffusion, and sales.
It caters to artists, curators, galleries, art fairs and collectors.

1. ORA FACILITATES PRODUCTION

It functions on a project submission-basis, which can be freely and continuously accessed via our online platform. Artists’ projects are pre-selected by a curatorial college made up of young curators. The projects are then reviewed for final selection via a digital interface by ORA’s board of advisors which is made up of various leading figures of the art world (Centre Pompidou, Musée Picasso, FRAC Bretagne, Swiss Institute NYC, MOCO, Serpentine Gallery, Arter, Centre Pompidou-Metz, ADIAF). Through its platform, ORA is developing a new production method that frees artists from the constraints which thus far prevented them from implementing original and ambitious ideas, by providing all the necessary elements for the conception of each project.

2. ORA FACILITATES DIFFUSION

Selected artists enter the production phase and are paired with a curator right from the start. This allows for an upstream preparation of the project’s diffusion throughout several locations, in France and abroad. Additionally, ORA promotes its own innovative online exhibition format.

3. ORA FACILITATES ONLINE SALES

Our marketplace features artworks completed within ORA’s production facility, as well as work from an international selection of partner contemporary art galleries and art fairs. Eventually, ORA also aims to implement an online marketplace for resales between collectors and for galleries operating on the secondary art market, with a commitment to ensuring royalty rights for artists.

Movidos por principios éticos y de compromiso social, los socios fundadores establecieron como parámetros básicos de operación la búsqueda de mecanismos que permitieran ofrecer alternativas de educación de calidad al costo más bajo posible. En ese sentido se estableció la estrategia de conformar currículas flexibles a partir de cursos modulares que permitieran adaptar los planes de estudio a los muy variados intereses de importantes segmentos profesionales contemporáneos.

Name: Art from the Apocalypse
Description:
Art from the Apocalypse is the only place to get art from the Apocalypse.  Curator Brendan Liam offers a variety of items for your perusal.  

Due to increasingly nomadic culture, Portable Paintings were very popular:  Tiny paintings that people carried around to enjoy, collect, trade, and barter with.  Typically these were painted sea shells or painted pieces of glass.  They were conveniently very small, usually fitting in one's pocket or worn as jewelry.   

Most other artwork has at least one additional function or something special about it.  Functionality is a must in the Apocalypse.   You may find Monocular Paintings, Spinning Paintings, Barter Beads, Staffs of Evermore, Orbs of Cassandra, Zombie Balls and many other things you won't find in a gallery.   

Much of the artwork is fit to withstand the elements, while other pieces have a potentially shorter shelf life.  Artists in the Apocalypse used any materials available and painted very quickly as they were always on the move.  Tears, holes, rips and repairs were not uncommon for nomadic artists who were looking for quick barter and survival, not entry into a museum.   Other pieces were designed to last as long as possible.  

Parallel Paintings were very popular:  Two-sided paintings that could be twirled to show either side of the painting as necessary.  Essentially these were two in one paintings where each side gave different information.   They could be mounted anywhere, even on a ceiling.  But they were most commonly found at the entrance of a building or encampment to offer information to those intended to read them.  War Propaganda Signs are the most common type of Parallel Painting as abstract art was used to relay secret messages in plain site.   They are nearly impossible to read for unintended recipients.

 2014 Brendan Liam

Name: Gallery ABBA
Description:
MISSION STATEMENT:
As a student-managed art gallery running out of Beloit College, Gallery ABBA is dedicated to representing Beloit College students, faculty, and alumni while simultaneously educating student workers about the intricacies of running an art gallery. Gallery ABBA views the responsibility of the gallery as the following:

- To work towards the development of each artist's career by providing a space to exhibit their work in a professional setting
- To create a historical archive for each artist in the form of a portfolio
- To act as a liaison to the Beloit community and college in order to sell artists' works
- To act as an accessible public space in which the exhibitions are open to an audience's subjectivity
- To educate student workers on how to operate an art gallery through experiential learning



HISTORY:
Gallery Abba was inaugurated in 2004 as one element of Beloit College's $1.1 million Center for Entrepreneurship in Liberal Education (CELEB) at Beloit. Made possible by generous donors such as alumnus David Myers '49, CELEB is dedicated to encouraging and supporting students to learn and apply their education to all types of entrepreneurial activity with a special focus on arts and communications.

Since 2004, the gallery has represented works in all media by Beloit College students, faculty, and alumni artists. This focus on Beloit College affiliates has set the pace for the entire program of the gallery to exhibit work that is well crafted, both conceptually and physically, and professionally presented. From its downtown Beloit storefront, Gallery Abba maintains a large exhibition space that is accessible to the Beloit community as a whole.

Name: Artwork courier page
Description:
SERVICES PROPOSÉS PAR ARTWORK COURIER

Ce que nous proposons

Les principales missions du convoyeur d’œuvres d'art :

Superviser une expédition d’œuvres depuis son lieu de départ jusqu’à sa destination, clou à clou (par route, avion ou bateau). L’intégralité des opérations de déplacement est placée sous notre responsabilité et, à ce titre, nous réalisons et signons les constats d’état effectués à chaque mouvement d’œuvres ;
Contrôler  les bonnes conditions d’exposition et de sécurité-sûreté des œuvres ;
Accompagner le transport : surveiller toutes les étapes de chargement et de déchargement en gardant la responsabilité des caisses jusqu’à destination ;
Représenter l’institution prêteuse et faire preuve, à cet égard, de professionnalisme et de diplomatie ;
Veiller au bon déroulement du déballage/remballage et à l’installation/désinstallation des œuvres sur le lieu de l’exposition.

Nous proposons nos services à des institutions publiques (musées, bibliothèques nationales…), des organisations privées (galeries, entreprises de transport d’œuvres d’art…) mais aussi à des particuliers (artistes, ayant droit d’artiste, collectionneurs, restaurateurs…).

Constat d'état d'œuvres d'art

En plus de fournir les détails sur l'état d'une œuvre, le constat d'état œuvre d'art regroupe les renseignements sur les matériaux utilisés, la technique de l'artiste et l'historique d'exposition de l'œuvre visée. Cet historique est rattaché à l'œuvre.
Nous réalisons et signons les constats d'état effectués à chaque mouvement d'oeuvres.

Bagage à main

Nous convoyons vos œuvres de petite dimension en bagage à main depuis son lieu de départ jusqu’à sa destination, clou à clou (par route, avion ou bateau). Cette solution peut être préférée à un transport d’œuvres d’art traditionnel, la sécurité d’une petite caisse chargée sur une palette ou dans un container n’étant pas entièrement satisfaisante. Nous conservons le bagage à main pendant toutes les étapes du convoi.

Name: HelloMotion High School
Description:

SMA HelloMotion berusaha menciptakan lingkungan belajar yang merangsang imajinasi dan memupuk kreativitas. Sebagai sekolah formal, SMA HelloMotion telah menjadi wadah bagi para inovator muda untuk menjelajahi potensi diri, memecahkan masalah dunia nyata, dan meraih prestasi gemilang.

HelloMotion High School merupakan Sekolah Menengah Atas yang mengedepankan kreativitas dan berpusat pada kebutuhan peserta didik. Dengan menerapkan kurikulum merdeka dan menjadi sekolah penggerak dengan mengintegrasikan design thinking, menjadikan HelloMotion High School sebagai wadah bagi para inovator muda untuk menjelajahi potensi diri, memecahkan masalah dunia nyata dan meraih prestasi gemilang.

Keterampilan Abad 21 adalah Landasan. SMA HelloMotion memahami bahwa masa depan menuntut lebih dari sekadar pengetahuan. Di tengah revolusi teknologi dan perubahan global, SMA HelloMotion mempersiapkan peserta didiknya dengan keterampilan abad 21 yang esensial: pemikiran kritis, kerjasama, komunikasi, dan pemecahan masalah. Dalam setiap langkah pembelajaran, kami mendorong pengembangan keterampilan yang relevan dan berkelanjutan.

Sejak langkah pertama kami diambil pada tahun 2017, SMA HelloMotion telah bertransformasi menjadi pusat pendidikan yang mengilhami masa depan. SMA HelloMotion bangga melihat bagaimana kepercayaan dan dukungan dari masyarakat telah tumbuh seiring berjalannya waktu. Ini adalah buah dari hasil bahwa SMA HelloMotion berkomitmen untuk terus memberikan pendidikan yang terbaik bagi putra-putri bangsa.

Pada tahun 2019 Direktorat PSMA menunjuk SMA HelloMotion sebagai Sekolah Kewirausahaan. SMA HelloMotion dinilai memiliki program kewirausahaan yang baik, harapannya mampu menciptakan para pemimpin masa depan yang berani berinovasi. Melangkah menuju tahun 2023, SMA HelloMotion kembali ditunjuk sebagai

Name: Venetian Cat Studio Fine Art
Description:
I am a bilingual first generation Italian-American and full time artist. Each work that I create is unique, with careful attention being paid to workmanship and detail.

My creativity manifests itself through oils and clay: specifically, portraiture, landscape and seascape paintings, still life, and until recently, the reproduction of ancient vessels. My vision is to combine painting with my love for history and create original pieces that reflect who I am and how I see the world around me. My mission is to assemble a body of work and then, find a venue to share it, with art lovers in my community and beyond, in galleries, online, or both. My goal is to continue creating indefinitely.


My passion for things ancient began as a child inspired by frequent visits to the Boston Museum of Fine Arts as well as trips to Italy visiting relatives. There, I saw paintings and vases decorated with ornate, delicate designs that included figures set in ancient landscapes, and I wanted very much to learn how to create them myself. Unfortunately, because these methods were not taught in U.S. schools, it has taken me many years of experimentation to learn them. Although I hold a bachelor’s degree in fine arts and an associate’s degree in graphic design, I am mostly self-taught, always searching for new techniques to expand my horizons. Our studio is in Las Vegas New Mexico, where I reside with 3 beautiful kitties, wild peacocks and loving neighbors.

Dino Colamartino, my Beloved partner, Soulmate, and Best Friend, transcended this reality in October of 2017.  RIP, my Love

Name: dART METHOD
Description: The dART METHOD is the FIRST step-by-step process for art valuation, based on tested and proven techniques used by art market experts to accurately value art. Name: Lava Thomas Studio
Description:
This is the company page of nationally recognized artist Lava Thomas. For job inquiries, contact, full bio, connections, etc., please refer to Lava Thomas’ main LinkedIn profile at:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/lava-thomas-76a44121a/ 

Lava Thomas tackles issues of race, gender, representation and memorialization through a multidisciplinary practice that spans drawing, painting, photography, sculpture, and site-specific installations. Drawing from her family’s Southern roots, current and historical socio-political events, intersectional feminism and African American protest and devotional traditions, Thomas’s practice centers ideas that amplify visibility, healing, and empowerment in the face of erasure, trauma and oppression. 

Born in Los Angeles, CA, she studied at UCLA’s School of Art Practice and received a BFA from California College of the Arts. Thomas is a recipient of the 2021 Academy of Arts and Letters Purchase Prize, the 2020 San Francisco Artadia Award and a 2019-2021 Lucas Artists Fellowship Award at Montalvo Arts Center. Thomas has participated in artist residencies at Facebook Los Angeles (2020), Headlands Center for the Arts (2018), and the Djerassi Resident Artist Program. In 2015, she received the Joan Mitchell Grant for Painters and Sculptors.

Name: FRESH FROM POLAND
Description:
Fresh From Poland is an art platform created in 2014 out of the need to fill up the gap in publishing and promoting new Polish photography worldwide. 

Focused on exploring new trends and activities in contemporary photography organisation deliberately crosses the boundaries of the medium in its traditional meaning. Besides showcasing best examples of the photographic works platform looks into to the other art forms existing between traditional photography and disciplines such us: books, digital graphic, documentary, fashion and collage.

 Looking for new perspectives and introducing innovative approach Fresh From Poland aims to share works of young, yet not always well known artists with the wider, international audience and at the same time create opportunities of development.

 In addition to daily online publications platform expands their activity towards organising events, exhibitions, publishing books and zines.

Name: Rare Contemporary Art Gallery
Description:
RARE was founded in 1998 to help shape, nurture, and promote the careers of emerging visual sartists who have not yet widely exhibited.  After 13 years, our mission remains constant.  While many of our artists have benefited from extensive international exposure and have been included in prestigious museum shows and collections, we continue to make room in our schedule every season for artists new to the marketplace.  We were the first gallery to open in the heart of Manhattan’s historic meatpacking district, where we remained for five years before relocating to Chelsea in 2003.  RARE moved to its present space at 547 West 27th Street in 2009.

We seek out artists whose work meets the following criteria: (1) The work must be directly connected to the artists’ life experiences, particularly in terms of their most formative years; (2) the processes and materials utilized must be atypical, unusual, or unique, and not for the sake of mere virtuosity, but rather for the purpose of amplifying content; (3) the artists’ craftsmanship must be evident in the work and part of its visual appeal – in other words, the creators’ hand must be present.  Slick or sleek work will not pass our litmus test; and (4) the final result must be sincere in its intentions – sincerity takes precedence over irony and art about art, at least at RARE.

Name: Boojazz Studios
Description:
Like a ghost playing the saxophone, this is where imagination comes to play. Ready for an adventure in art & design? Splendid!

FINE ART
Painting for over two decades, much of Michael’s work involves coming to terms with the abundance of technology-driven information overload we casually experience in modern-day society. He uses acrylics and india ink on canvas (or wood panels) to create a post-modern world that visually represents data in its raw form, existing within multiple theoretical dimensions of spacetime. Distorted handwritten notes and encrypted keyword ciphers are interwoven throughout mysterious structures and various abstractions including comic illustrations and other non-specific futuristic forms. The result is a data landscape of today’s anxious subconscious mind, presenting how we remember life events and interpret the world around us.

ADVERTISING & DESIGN
At the age of fifteen, Michael began his professional career by drawing children’s menus for a chain of restaurants in the Southwest. His experience in graphics, marketing, illustration, and video production fills an essential need in advertising agencies, printing companies, and design firms.

Some of the clients Michael has worked with include: Microsoft, Casino Shuttle, US – Japan Business Council, Paul Vallas for Chicago, Reliance Accounting, RAINN (co-founded by Tori Amos and Sarah McLaughlin), Embassy of Switzerland in the United States, CBI Organization for International Investment, Prestige Club Hotels, Chicagoland Speedway, Global Automakers, Richard Shay Photography, PIC, Inc., The British Embassy in the United States, Zhou B Art Center, Ben Hollis Worldwide, Aphex, Port Townsend Chocolates, Trinity Construction, Bandza Corporation, Call JULIE, PepsiCo, Lindy’s Gerties Restaurants, Mark Pearson, Crescenzo Communications and 1776 Restaurants. His previous television work has gained the interest of major studios such as Dreamworks SKG.

Name: Bearcloud's Gallery
Description:
Bearcloud opened his own gallery and displayed his works along with many of the Native American friends that were in his world. It was located in gold rush country at the base of the Sierra Mountains. It was close to Yosemite and the mountain passes, where he spent much time working on his visions. They were mountains that reflected the inspiration that is revealed through the landscape. Then in the late 80's, his vision returned him to his origins, the mountains and gorges of Arizona, a journey he had begun at the age of five. Not long after that, he moved there. The area reflected the spirit that he was most inspired to paint. 

There, he opened another gallery in an affluent shopping center, that in itself reflected an essence of spirit, as the trees mingled through the stucco walls. From there he continually returned to the land of ceremony. He said once in his Inipi (sweat lodge), he thanks the Spirit, the Creator, the Great Mystery for loaning him these paintbrushes to do the work that might touch the spirit and heart of the people, that his paintings have reached. 

If you look closely at his work you will see details that show the sky perhaps as an eagle or a stone as a face. The water might reflect what is felt in his minds eye. His work can be found at Bearcloud Gallery located in Tlaquepaque located in Sedona Arizona

Name: Xpressoo (Zwolle)
Description:
Bij xpressoo kun je op één strippenkaart of abonnement verschillende kunstlessen volgen zodat je je creative kant kan ontdekken.

Onze missie is om hét artistieke prikbord van Zwolle te worden waar verschillende kunstenaars hun passie kunnen delen en zij die opzoek zijn naar hun passie het via ons kunnen ontdekken.

Wij geloven dat expressie nodig is. Nodig om te ventileren. Nodig om op te laden. Kunst biedt daar ontelbare vormen voor. Hoe moet je weten welke kunstvorm bij jou past als je het nooit hebt kunnen proberen? Daarom willen wi je helpenj de stap tot kunstbeoefening te zetten!

Wil je graag op dansles maar weet je niet welke stijl bij jou past? Wil je op muziekles maar weet je niet bij welk instrument jou ligt? Of wil je eens een kijkje nemen wat er nog meer is dan wat je al dacht te kennen? Dan bieden wij de plek voor jou!

Name: Babette Claassen Fine Art

Zo begeleidt ze aan- en verkooptrajecten en is ze een expert in negentiende-eeuwse (schilder)kunst. Afkomstig uit een echt ondernemersgezin is Babette Claassen in staat om met een zakelijke bril te kijken naar kunst in algemene zin, waarbij ze haar academische kennis en opgedane ervaring graag ten dienst stelt aan haar particuliere en zakelijke relaties.

Name: Kevin Champeny
Description:
Kevin Champeny was born and raised in Beloit, Wisconsin.  Champeny began drawing before he could speak and says art was something he always felt compelled to create. He attended Beloit College where he studied Art History and Education, graduating with a BA in Studio Art.  After graduating college, Kevin moved to New York City.

Since graduating, every job he’s had has involved art in some form, be it design, painting, or sculpting, though most often behind the scenes.  Kevin has sculpted professionally for the last 17 years, creating pieces for companies such as Warner Brothers, Disney, Lenox, Patron Tequila, and Belvedere Vodka.  He has also done much original work for perfumeries such as Calvin Klein, Polo, DKNY and numerous others. Champeny even created the master model for President Obama's cereal bowl during his tenure in the White House. 

Champeny’s biggest influences are Chuck Close, Kris Kuksi and M.C. Escher.  He currently resides in Long Island, New York where he continues to create works of art for museums, private commissions and art galleries.


ARTIST STATEMENT

“ I create a style of work that blurs the lines between photography, painting and sculpting. Mosaics enable me to elicit the tension and stories between hand sculpted and cast pixels and the overall image they compose. I want my art to open a conversation for the viewer. I hope people discovering and viewing  my pieces will connect their own experiences to the choices I made when creating the work.”

Name: Doubletake Gallery
Description:
Doubletake Gallery is a fine art brokerage service. We work with art collectors to locate specific pieces, and help them resell pieces that no longer fit their collections. We do this through this web site with it's international Internet presence, and a retail gallery located near Minneapolis, Minnesota. At any one time, you can find works by Leroy Neiman, Norman Rockwell, Salvador Dali, Peter Max, Erte, Andy Warhol and many, many others displayed on our web site and in our gallery.

Doubletake Gallery is a hands on brokerage service. What that means is that we're involved in every step of the brokerage transaction. Everything passes through our hands.

Experienced buyers know that we have the most rigid quality standards in the industry. Every piece of artwork that is bought from us, is inspected by us before you are ever charged for it. If the piece is not up to our standards, it is returned to the seller and your credit card is not charged. Our packaging is customized to each piece, insured, and shipped Fedex, whom we trust to get it to you safely. 

If you're a seller, we secure the payment on your behalf so that you can rest assured that you will get paid once the transaction is complete. We will often take the extra step of sending the proper shipping materials to you to insure the artwork will arrive at our gallery in good condition.

Name: Absolutely Studio
Description:
Absolutely Studio is a highly experienced, independent art studio dedicated to artistic practice and application, we've more than a decade working the art circuit - commercially and independently.

We endeavor to uphold cultural, moral and professional standards in our practice, a breath of fresh air amidst the agency-artist industry today, which seems to have lost its way.

Working directly with artists means you support and better the arts, without any barriers to entry through the traditional agency model, as you know exactly who is crafting your baby.

It also means your projects are fully understood, passionately developed and creatively applied as we are dedicated to producing excellent work.

Not only would you be supporting the arts, but you would be applying our creative lens to your world. You would be investing in an elusive artistic integrity that is difficult to come by nowadays.

Name: HIELO A.I.R.
Description:
HIELO is a project space and artist-in-residence program located in the historic Caribbean neighborhood of Miramar, Puerto Rico. Founded by contemporary artist and professor Sofia Maldonado and Berlin-based creative Nicole Rodríguez Woods, the tropical residency provides creatives of all types with a unique experience of urban island life. 

Located in the heart of Puerto Rico’s cultural renaissance, it is the prime spot for artists eager to be at the center of the island's dynamic Caribbean culture. 
 
Mission
To introduce and network visiting artists with the local Puerto Rico scene in an effort to enhance cultural exchange, understanding, and add value to the historic district of Miramar, Santurce.

Name: Ecole de musique Henriette
Description:
L'école de musique Henriette s'adresse à tous les amoureux de la musique, particulièrement celles et ceux qui souhaitent apprendre le piano, le synthé, la composition…
	La particularité de l'enseignement que je propose, réside dans le fait qu'il n'est pas formaté mais au contraire, personnalisé.

	Des débutants, des amateurs confirmés mais également, des musiciens professionnels comptent parmi nos élèves.

	Située près de la station rer Le parc, au coeur de Saint-Maur, l'école de musique Henriette propose aussi une assistance en ligne par internet  ou même par téléphone; ce qui permet un réel progrès car chaque élève peut ainsi être aidé durant la semaine.

		J'attache une grande importance au "confort" de mes élèves. partant du principe qu'il y a toujours une solution à tout, toute personne ayant le désir de pratiquer le piano sera la bienvenue à l'école de musique Henriette.

	La flexibilité de nos horaires, l'écoute des attentes de chacun ont notamment fait la réputation de notre école.

N'hésitez pas à  visiter notre site:

http://www.saramusique.com/


	Nous proposons également aux élèves participant à un concours, aux concertistes, un coaching personnalisé.

	Viennent dans notre école par exemple: 
Des enfants à partir de 6 ans à qui on propose des cours d'une demie heure par semaine, une heure à cet âge serait beaucoup trop long !
Des ados qui pratiquent la musique pour le plaisir ou dans un but plus professionnel.

des élèves des divers conservatoires qui on besoin de soutien pour leurs concours par exemple.

Des adultes de tout âge, amateurs ou pro.

	Notre enseignement est réellement ouvert à tous!!! 

	Le droit de changer d'envie :

Souvent, lorsque l'on souhaite pratiquer une activité, on doit s'engager pour un trimestre voir pour l'année complète!

	C'est pourquoi, je propose des cours sans engagement, afin que tout le monde se sente libre et vienne avec plaisir.
Location: Saint-Maur des Fossés, Ile de France

Name: ChengyanTan Art
Description:
Hello, I am Yan, I am an Independent Artist from Shanghai, China, and living in Italy.

My artworks are an in-depth exploration of consciousness and a meditative experience of the flow of the mind, 
often presenting a natural and organic dynamic form. I feel that there is a deep connection between consciousness and nature, a connection that is primal and inconceivable. 
Consciousness is shown through the form of nature, and in this form, some things in the deepest part of consciousness can be expressed. This makes me think: are humans and nature two different individuals 
or different manifestations of a whole? And this whole thing, what is its state of being?
My creation often begins with an image that naturally emerges 
in my mind, in the process of depicting it, it is always in a constantly changing state: 
the environment, the conscious activities in my mind constantly influence the presentation of this image.

The whole creation is a slow, progressive process, which is composed of countless repetitive movements. 
In this regular repetitive movement, all the emotions, memories, the known and the unknown are left traces on the paper.
Location: 上海市徐汇区, 上海市

Name: ALEXANDRA S - Art of Living
Description:
ART OF LIVING is all about potraying the brilliant chaos that comes with being Alive, through Art!
The colours and images that surround us have a truly powerful impact on our daily life, our mindset and our overall psychology. 
When it comes to Alexandra S creativity, I share the motto is that "Art should comfort the disturbed and disturb the comfortable” – Cesar A. Cruz.
The ones who appreciate the particular artwork are those who crave that fire to ignite them on some days, while on others, they seek serenity... 
There is a dual element that comes with the artwork that is covered by the intense contradictions in most cases. 

The themes are human figures, abstract and a variety of floral illustrations. The media used are mainly acrylics, soft pastel and graphite. However, there are also works created by other media such as oil painting, watercolour, gouache and coloured pencils, due to the fact that experimentation is a key component to a much more free spirit,

For specific inquiries regarding artwork that is for Sale, don't hesitate to contact me on info.alexandrasartofliving@gmail.com

Name: Park Avenue Glass Studio
Description:
Park Avenue Glass features the custom designs and hand blown art glass work of Chris McCarthy.  From energetic, contemporary designs to simple elegant forms, his functional and sculptural art glass pieces are ideal for home, corporate or business interiors (from small functional vases and more, to art glass installations to custom art glass lighting fixtures) as well as unique business gifts, corporate gifts, client gifts and custom awards. 
 
Chris' art glass is a complex mix of both the hot and cold side of the glass medium. Fascinated with the ability to play with fire to create form, he sculpts each piece, thinking about the effect of light and diffraction. His use of the Venetian techniques of Murrini, Incalmo and Battuto gives his work depth and complexity that radiate and glow with warmth.

De même, les stages de danse organisés sur Paris vous sont ouverts à des prix défiants toute concurrence.

Name: Art Gems
Description: Art Gems Click Here is a small reproduction fine art company. We sell framed, museum quality stretched canvas giclée prints of selected European Masters (in stock) and living contemporary artists. Whether you are an individual or an institution, we can provide high quality at the lowest mark-up because we believe that fine art should be affordable and more abundant. It is our goal to promote appreciation for the arts and for living artists. We work with local artists to photograph, reproduce and frame original works. Our prints reproduced from oil or acrylic works are almost identical in look and feel to the original. With a stretched canvas giclée, there is no glass or matting so the look is the closest possible to the original painting. The better the quality of the print and canvas, the closer the look to the original. Our future plans include working with impoverished artists world-wide and donating funds to their communities thus bringing even more meaning to “wall decor”. See our website at ArtGems.org

Name: Carving Studio and Sculpture Center
Description: The Carving Studio and Sculpture center is a premier location for stone carving and sculpture. We are a 501(c)3 non-profit that offers workshops, residencies, and internships in stone carving, metal sculpting, wood carving, and more. Check out our site for a list of programming!

Name: CHOR BOOGIE
Description: The intentions behind my art work are to create timeless dynamic moments of Imagination, Creativity, Originality, Meaning, Style, Self Expression, Audience, Taste, and the Visual Elements of Line, Light, Composition, Form, Space, and Color. This is what defines my work and defines me as an individual, and allows me to still keep an unselfish perspective on "Why do I do this?" Simply because its a talent I've been blessed with to give to you.

Name: Jane McAdam Freud Indipendent Artist
Description:
My practice is informed by psychological concepts and projects inspired by place. This might be in a public exhibition (gallery or museum) or alternative space as a way of engaging the relevant audience who are perhaps new to the aims of art.

It also involves my ongoing research and practice.
www.janemcadamfreud.com

Name: Akademie Schloss Solitude
Description:
Akademie Schloss Solitude is an international and transdisciplinary artists’ residence, located in
a baroque castle on a hill overlooking the cultural and industrial city of Stuttgart.
For over 35 years, Akademie Schloss Solitude has been offering fellows with different cultural
experiences and expertise professional support and solidarity. It has supported approximately
1,700 young artists from more than 120 countries since opening its doors in 1990 and has developed
into an important global network for the international art scene.

Akademie Schloss Solitude’s wide-ranging fellowship program promotes the interrelationship of art and
science across all disciplines and fields of practice.
The long-term fellowships create time and space for multi-focal learning processes and collective
productions. Residencies at Akademie Schloss Solitude enable fellows to devote themselves to their
research projects under favorable material and intellectual conditions. With the realization of numerous
events and its online presence the Akademie allows international visibility of fellows and their projects
and creates space for new digital projects. Thanks to the diverse range of public events, such as
exhibitions, performances, readings, concerts and symposia Akademie Schloss Solitude provides broad
public access to artistic thought and action and creates important momentum for social transformation.
The unique model affords artists and scientists valuable freedom to develop their work and perform
research in both a physical and digital context. This freedom allows us to question existing knowledge
hierarchies and develop alternative plans for the future.

Akademie Schloss Solitude makes a direct contribution to the internationalization of the region.

Name: Productions EM
Description:
Les PRODUCTIONS EM existent depuis 2001 et sont vouées à la gérance d’artistes, elles représentent FRÉDÉRICK BARON et LAURENCE HÉLIE. Les PRODUCTIONS EM interviennent également dans d’autres champs d’activités tels que la production déléguée, la direction artistique, la direction de tournée, la coordination avec les relations de presse et la promotion radio, la coordination avec les maisons de diques pour les activités de commercialisation, et le marketing Web.

Reconnue de ses pairs, mais surtout indispensable au développement des artistes qu’elle représente, Productions EM se positionne comme une réelle entreprise de gérance d’artistes dans la signification juste et initiale que doivent prendre ses activités, sachant aussi qu’une telle entreprise est un partenaire de choix pour une maison de disques, un distributeur et les équipes de promotion. Productions EM s’engage clairement à développer dans le paysage culturel des artistes émergents ayant en commun le talent, l'authenticité et la singularité !

Name: SUNOHC Sculptures
Description:
Sunohc Sculptures started in 2005 in the basement of Sunoh (Daniel) Choe's home in Denver, Colorado when he was 15 years old. He picked up his aunt's dental tools, some Super Sculpey clay, and began accepting private commissions to sculpt miniature portraits for figure collectors who had come across his work on online forums. 

Sunohc Sculptures specializes in 1:6 scale (a popular "figure collecting" scale). These figures stand around 12" tall (30 cm). The actual head sculpt is only 2" (5 cm).

In 2010, Sunohc Sculptures finally released their very own line of custom 1:6 scale figures. With the collaboration of 10 professional artists around the world including Hot Toys Costume Designer, Ellis Cheng, they were able to deliver a $820 collectible figure set with hand painted sculpts, original accessories, outfits, packaging, and certificates of authenticity. These figures were limited to 25 pieces worldwide and sold out within a week.

In 2011, Sunohc Sculptures released another line of Matrix-inspired figures and sold out at $600 a set, 30 pieces worldwide. In over 5 years, Sunohc Sculptures has sold 1,200+ castings and 40+ commissions.

Sunoh manages all projects, art direction, and portrait sculpting. These artists help him with all other aspects:

Caster: Lonnie Hale
Painter: Sean Ho
Jr. Sculptor: Chris Caraveo
Costume Designer: Ellis Cheng
Accessories: Gregg Andrews
Artwork: Ron Lim
Photography: Ray Ferraro

Name: DJ BAN
Description:
Fundada em 09/06/2001, a Ban é o único centro de música eletrônica do mundo. Atuamos nas áreas de ensino, comércio, serviços, eventos, produção editorial e audiovisual, sempre voltados ao universo da música eletrônica.

Nossa sede em São Paulo conta com uma loja especializada, três estúdios de produção musical, três estúdios de DJ, um estúdio híbrido para cursos DJ, gravação de vídeo set entre outros, realizamos live streaming, produção de vídeos, temos um museu, uma mini pista de dança e um terraço coberto com capacidade para 50 pessoas.

Description: More Than Just Art is a veteran owned custom frame shop that provides a well rounded experience. We learn each patron and use our talents to customize a masterpiece that will accentuate the value of your prized memorabilia. In our Oasis you will find framing, original art, prints, and more...

Name: BAAG - BARCELONA ADVERTISING ART GALLERY
Description: BAAG contributes to the promotion of new artists by increasing visibility of advertising brands using campaigns that are smart and attractive. This is our “new way” of interpreting art as a contemporary language for publicity.

Name: Precious Decay Photography
Description:
Brian Precious Decay is who I am, a Dutch photographer fascinated with decayed and abandoned buildings that once had a soul and breathed a wealth of life. 
Through my vision I recreate the emotion that once filled these mesmerising buildings for others to experience my experience.
My work is unconventional but beauty still exists, even in the unconventional.

Name: Bollywood Art Project
Description: Founded by Ranjit Dahiya in 2012, (coincidently a year before Indian cinema turned a glorious 100), BAP has brought Bollywood’s legends like Dilip Kumar, Amitabh Bachchan, Asha Parekh, Waheeda Rehman, Dharmendra, Sridevi, Rishi Kapoor and Irfan Khan on to the streets of Mumbai. In our murals of these greats, reside nostalgia and history. BAP is an ode to this sentiment. Our mission is to beautify Mumbai’s skyline by encapsulating Bollywood’s rich cinematic history.

Name: Pamela Staker Studio
Description: Chicago-based contemporary artist working with both corporate and residential clients. We collaborate with art advisors, interior designers, architects, and private individuals to place existing and create commissioned artworks.

Name: Kalapyaar
Description: Kalapyaar is an online platform to promote the local artists at a global level. It brings up the finest of artworks, across  diversified genres, and sheds light on some of the most unique canvases ever made. With its roots in Ahmedabad, Kalapyaar conducts its exhibitions throughout the world, promoting the Indian art forms and the work of the esteemed artists.

Name: Déstructuralisme Figuratif (DF)
Description: Déstructuralisme Figuratif is an ongoing art project based in France. This project is focussing on the evolution of the figurative world today. We dedicate this project to the figurative artists, photographers, and sculptors who work on the same concept. If you are a bit Picasso but a little Dali and also in between Bacon and mix a little bit, HR Giger, then I think you are the one we are looking for.

Name: Koehn Sculptors
Description:
A family collaboration of artists led by award-winning and nationally renowned sculptor, Norbert Koehn.  His work can be found internationally in private and public collections alike.

In late 2008, Norbert and son Sasha Koehn form subsidiary, SACRED DESIGN GROUP, creating a separate portfolio of sacred art  and providing a more focused and dynamic approach for worship environments.  Some products in include; crosses and crucifixes, sacred art, ritual objected, furnishings, complete interior design and environments, and consulting. Norbert has been creating art and consulting this sector for almost 30 years.

www.sacreddesigngroup.com

Name: BRIZ CERAMIC STUDIO
Description:
BRIZ [BREATH - ˈbɹɛθ] 
Hace referencia a la fonética de respirar en inglés
Una transformación interna a través de la cerámica.

Briz nace en 2022 con el objetivo de ayudar a desconectar del mundo en el que vivimos donde "no tener tiempo" es lo que está de moda. Con ayuda de la cerámica queremos transmitir calma, olvidarnos del estrés, y fomentar la creatividad realizando una actividad 100% manual. 

"Tocar tierra con las manos conecta con la esencia del ser y ayuda a mejorar el bienestar"

Dicen que 3 son multitud, pero para nosotras 3 es el número perfecto, 3 personas formamos el equipo BRIZ. Paula y Carmen, fundadoras de este apasionante proyecto, una experta en Marketing y la otra en Finanzas, amigas y compañeras de trabajo en una multinacional líder de cosmética que se han unido al último vértice clave de este triángulo... Lara, licenciada en Bellas Artes, con ciclo superior de escultura en madera y de cerámica artística y finalizando el ciclo de grado medio de alfarería. Lara será la experta maestra que os guiará y enseñará todo el maravillo mundo de la cerámica y os hará desconectar para reconectar.
Prometemos que nadie sale de una clase de cerámica como llegó. 
Briz nació para dar sentido a muchas necesidades, por un lado ofrecemos servicios de talleres semanales para tener tu momento de calma cada semana. También disponemos de opciones más puntuales para poder tener un primer contacto con la cerámica, los talleres experiencia. Y por último y no menos importante, soluciones creadas para empresas, la mejor forma de hacer equipo, tener 2h solo para vosotros, sin nada en más que pensar, y fomentando creatividad, para ello disponemos de servicio de team buildings.

Description: The art world today needs to respond to the domestic and international scene. Cultural globalization requires adopting nomadic attitudes and an expansion of vision. This will help develop visibility for art works and help them reach collectors, curators, and other members of the cultural scene. In this context, +GALLERyLABs contributes in a significant way, building bridges and developing collaborations between all the necessary parties. As a team of qualified and experienced art professionals, we work with mutual respect and synergy to reach this goal.
Location: Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires

Name: Galerie DerniersJours
Description:
Galerie DerniersJours: lieu de la rencontre de deux passionnés: Laurent Zylberman, photographe-réalisateur et Piritta Sorsa, collectionneuse .... Enrichis de découvertes proches et lointaines (Chine, Bolivie, USA, Finlande, Bulgarie, Mexique ...), ils ont inauguré en mars 2017 leur galerie "DerniersJours" au centre du quartier historique saint Blaise de Paris XX°. 
Leur ligne directrice: des coups de coeur pour des artistes à découvrir, tous médias confondus, animer des échanges de plaisirs, suggérer des rencontres riches d'émotions et découvertes. 
Laurent & Piritta partagent leurs envies, favorisent le dialogue entre publics initiés ou amateurs et les créateurs d'oeuvres originales, déjà lancés aussi bien qu'encore inconnus. 
Déjà rompus aux échanges inattendus et pleins de saveurs entre artistes (graffeurs, peintres, photographes, musiciens) et visiteurs de leur camp de base à Montreuil (Les Copeaux); ils apportent une note décalée à ce côté du periph'.

Name: Benjamin Godfre LLC
Description: Specializing in content production and fine art,  Benjamin Godfre LLC is located in the South Park district of downtown Los Angeles. Benjamin Godfre LLC creates high-end digital content and also offers social media branding services. Benjamin Godfre LLC is owned and operated by Benjamin Godfre who has over 15 years of art experience and continues to evolve with the fast-changing and growing demand of the internet.

Name: Yojigen Dojo
Description:
A dōjō (道場, Japanese pronunciation: [doꜜː(d)ʑoː][note 1]) is a hall or place for immersive learning or meditation

Yojigen Dojo focusses on the people. Everybody can dance. But what kind of dancer are you? We work from the inside out instead of putting a stamp of a specific dance style on people. That way they won't stay in their safe zone while limiting themself in their process.

Name: FACT, Inc.
Description: FACT Secured is a forensic technology company focused on providing innovative solutions to address the biggest challenges facing the fine art and collectible industry.  Our blockchain database serves as an immutable link between the owner, provenance information, and the asset. Our proprietary forensic technology captures unique features on the artwork itself, making FACT the only solution to link authenticity to the physical asset.  Through high resolution 3D imaging and advanced software, we automated analysis and reporting.  Finally, collectors have a quick affordable option to authenticate works, track changes in condition and monitor their assets while in transit.

Name: LTW
Description:
2020 saw a transformation.

A change has come.

Writer.  Artist.  Performer.

Name: DC - Art indisciplinaire
Description: Sa mission est de défendre et promouvoir les intérêts des artistes sourd-es, handicapé-es, mad et neuroatypiques et tous-tes artistes de la diversité capacitaire qui expérimentent des oppressions plurielles et multidimensionnelles.

Name: DEASIL ART
Description:
Deasil exhibits and sells fine art in central England.   

Deasil has been offering accessible, high quality, bespoke venues to artists for the last 4 years in the Warwickshire and West Midland’s regions. 

We are passionate about properly curating our artists’ works to ensure the best match for our venues, providing them with high quality art whilst at the same time offering artists exhibition opportunities that they would not otherwise have access to.

Coming soon: the new Deasil Gallery. We will be showcasing our artists from our own gallery based in the heart of Leamington Spa, Warwickshire. Follow our progress at www.deasil.co.uk

Name: that's what x said
Description: that’s what x said is a socio-politically engaged art space striving for systemic change based in Brussels. We organise exhibitions and events that serve to start a discussion that goes beyond the art itself. that’s what x said is also a shop promoting the Belgian art scene, as well as artists whose work shares our values.

Name: Shno Shana Bergendorff Art
Description:
Visual Artist | Cosmic Storyteller | Exploring Earth, Landscapes, and the Universe

I am Shno Shana Bergendorff, an artist who blends the mysteries of Earth, the vastness of the universe, and the concept of alien life into art that transforms emotions and perceptions. My work bridges the familiar with the unknown, exploring emotional landscapes and cosmic connections. Every piece invites viewers to journey through worlds both seen and unseen. Discover my artistic exploration at shnobergendorff.com.

Name: Art No Fxnk
Description:
Art No Fxnk established in 2016, is a multifaceted digital art gallery. We envision a gallery accessible to everyone as a vibrant public space in service of our community to enable the appreciation and acknowledgement of the different ways in which we express ourselves outwardly. 

Art No Fxnk is currently a non-profit organisation/gallery. ANF does not profit from artists work nor posting on any social media platform, and buyers are strictly informed to enter into direct contact with the artists.

Name: Karmavesh
Description:
Karmavesh is the oldest and most renowned cultural community of Babu Banarasi Das. The word “Karmavesh” is derived from two words: ‘कर्माय ’ and ‘अवेशित:’ and it means doing your ‘karma’ in the right direction with persistent determination. The motto of Karmavesh is ‘The Zeal to Create’. Its emblem has an oil lamp which symbolizes enlightenment and prosperity; the book and the ‘veena’ symbolize the cultural aspect of the community; the different colors used in the logo are also significant. This community mainly focuses on its members' overall personality development and empowerment by organizing various activities and PDPs.

Karmavesh was established in 2002 with the noble intention of empowering students through various means. The community did not just focus on a single domain, instead, it expanded itself to welcome people of different fields of interests so that they can discover their hidden talents too. Even though the community has been giving equal importance to all sectors (like cultural, technical, and social) it is officially known for its Literary and Fine Arts. The community students also have exclusive access to various events across
India which even leads to them bringing laurels for the college. For the past 21 years, Karmavesh has been reaching new heights and this wouldn’t have been possible without the brilliant brains behind the management of the community.

Name: George Stern Fine Arts
Description:
For over forty years, George Stern Fine Arts has specialized in California Impressionism and American Scene painting. We have a large inventory of the finest examples of paintings from 1880 through 1940 and beyond. George Stern Fine Arts is involved in educating the public on the historical development of these artists and the connoisseurship of collecting. We have published books on artists such as Arthur Dominique Rozaire, Conrad Buff, Edwin Roscoe Shrader, and Robert Frame.

George Stern is the founding president of the Fine Art Dealers Association. He currently serves on the boards of FADA, the Art Dealers Association of California, the Board of Governors of Cedars-Sinai Medical Center in Los Angeles, and the Board of Advisors of Claremont Graduate University in Claremont, California.

Name: Exhibit A Studios
Description:
Exhibit A is here to meet the needs of Irish artists, photographers, galleries, museums, agents and curators. We offer a complete range of services including film scanning, artwork photography, photoengraving, retouching, digital darkroom skills, fine art & archival quality printing, mounting, framing as well as many other finishing options.

We have extensive experience in digital imaging and digital fine art printmaking and are the only fine art digital print bureau run by artists. Our range of knowledge and experience provides international standard services for the artistic community here. We are proud to be one of Hahnemuehle's Certified Studios for Digital Fine Art Printing, being fully endorsed by the premier fine art paper mill in the world.  

Exhibit A prides itself on rising to the unique challenges our artistic clientele throw at us. As a result of this we have done many unique and bespoke jobs for our clients. After all making art is not about doing the same thing over and over. All you have to do is ask us!

Name: F-O-R-M (Festival of Recorded Movement)
Description:
F-O-R-M presents films that investigate the body in motion through curiosity, experimentation, and imagination. We are interested in films that creatively explore our personal lived experiences and how such themes can be told through narrative or experimental approaches. Cinematography, experimental editing styles, and post-production effects are also considerations that contribute and add layers to the subject matter. We invite proposals to consider the interplay between the camera and the movement, regardless of the form.

Recorded Movement is the theme—any movement or dance practices, genres, or styles are invited. We are interested in how movement can be utilized as a vehicle for expression. How do you define movement? How do you portray this definition within your practice or discipline? How does this movement collaborate with film? We invite your ideas and concepts around the theme of Recorded Movement, and to challenge this definition as you see fit!

F-O-R-M strongly encourages and prioritizes applications from Youth artists, and those from intersecting identities and traditionally marginalized communities; Black, Indigenous, People of Colour, folks with disabilities, and diverse sexual orientations, gender identities or expressions (LGBTQ2S+).

Name: Palácio das Artes BC
Description: Uma escola focada no aprendizado de música, dança e teatro. Casa do Coro e Orquestra Filarmônica de Balneário Camboriú.

Name: You talking to me.
Description: PSYCHO SCUMO

Name: Galerie Winston
Description:
Située au cœur de la ville de Dinard en Bretagne, la Galerie Winston présente une sélection d'artistes renommés, et un choix d'œuvres variées.
Spécialisée dans l'oeuvre de Bernard BUFFET, la Galerie Winston présente des toiles rares de l'artiste, des années 1950, 60 et 90, de nombreuses lithographies et gravures originales signées de l'artiste.

La Galerie Winston présente également les œuvres des Peintres Officiels de la Marine de 1880 à nos jours, tels que Marin-Marie, Albert Brénet, Mathurin Méheut, Roger Chapelet, Albert Marquet…

Name: Beeldagent
Description:
Beeldagent is een exclusief fotobureau en agentschap en richt zich met een selectie groep gerenommeerde Nederlandse fotografen op aankleding met bestaande fotokunst of full service fotografie (op maat). Of het nu gaat om aankleding van een woonhuis, bedrijf of event. Beeldagent voorziet in een passende fotograaf en stijl, van concept tot realisatie. Ook klanten die de fotografie voor een bepaald project en de organisatie ervan willen uitbesteden, is Beeldagent in te schakelen. De fotografen die Beeldagent o.a. vertegenwoordigt zijn Robin Utrecht, Sacha de Boer, Ewout Huibers, Maartje Roos, Bianca van der Werf, Bastiaan Heus, Hans Heus, Ilvy Njiokiktjien en Leo Hol.

Beeldagent adviseert, zoekt en creëert maatwerkoplossingen voor elke fotovraag. Persoonlijke aandacht gedurende het gehele proces van aanvang tot oplevering staat centraal.

Name: Sculptura
Description:
Sculptura is an international supplier of sculptures, sourced globally from world-class sculpture artists.

With a focus on metal and stainless steel sculpture art, we provide sculptures of exceptional quality that are both a visual and financial asset. Our extensive range includes sculptures by world-renowned artists and pieces that vary in size, style and investment value.

Sculptures from Sculptura can be seen in public spaces, including the city of Stonnington, hotels including The Langham Hotel in Melbourne, The Rydges Hotel Group in Canberra, and Westfield Bondi Junction in Sydney. Whether you’re an architect or property developer looking for monumental sculptures, or an interior designer or individual seeking a piece for a private collection. We can assist you with sculpture art that will visually transform your space from ordinary to extraordinary. Sculptura is a leading Australian sculpture gallery that no only sells sculpture, but also buy sculpture, represent leading sculpture artists, commission sculpture on your behalf, and help you find what and where to buy sculpture anywhere in the world.

Name: Arthaus International
Description: Arthaus is an art marketplace that curates the finest high-quality framed prints from independent artists across the globe. Our mission is to provide artists with the tools and platform they need to succeed while providing art enthusiasts with an unmatched selection of one-of-a-kind artworks. By focusing on quality, innovation, and exceptional customer experiences, we aim to create a thriving community where both artists and customers are rewarded.

Name: Warwick Henderson Gallery
Description:
The Warwick Henderson Gallery specializes in fine contemporary New Zealand Art.  The Gallery represents prominent NZ artists including Robyn Kahukiwa and Fatu Feu'u, established mid-career artists Mark Wooller, Rozi Demant, Viky Garden, Justin Summerton, Chris Pole, Dagmar Dyck, Robyn Gibson, Paul Kim and emerging new generation artists Amy Melchior, Tyrone Layne, Alexander Bartleet, Aaron Waghorn, Grace Wright, Ana Teofilo, Rieko Woodford-Robinson, Jessica Haneui Kim, Rosanne Croucher, and Jessica Ellis.  The Gallery also sells work by other New Zealand artists including Russell Jackson, Hugh Major, Geoff Tune and works from the Secondary market such as A. Maddox, D. Badcock, Dame Louise Henderson, and others.

The Gallery has shown over 300 exhibitions including group and solo exhibitions, and retrospective exhibitions by artists Trevor Moffitt, Dame Louise Henderson, Keith Patterson, Philippa Blair and Kase Jackson. The Gallery has also curated unique shows such as 'The Toy in Art' and 'Naive Art', 'The Automobile in Art' and Early NZ Photography.

Gallery Director Warwick Henderson, has curated two touring shows specifically for public institutions, the 'Toy Show' and the 'Games Show'. The 'Toy Show' toured NZ public Institutions including the Auckland Museum for two years. He is also the author of the publication "Behind the Canvas" An Insider's Guide to the New Zealand Art Market, published in 2012.

This Gallery prides itself on integrity and service, and specializes in advice regarding the purchase, appraisal and valuation of investment and Fine Art. 

With over 30 years’ experience, one of our key services includes valuation for Insurance against fire, theft, and natural disaster, matrimonial and estate division, asset valuation or security.  For peace of mind, contact us now.

We ship artwork New Zealand and Worldwide, and can arrange to have works professionally packed, insured and shipped door to door to the required destination.

Name: BHG Bueno Home Gallery
Description: BHG Bueno Home Gallery une maison galerie

Name: Audra Sewell-Noblique Art Consulting and Curatorial Services
Description:
The practice of contemporary art is dynamic, as is the role of the curator. Through diversified, distinctive and thought provoking imagery my goal is to bring to the audience exhibitions of relevant contemporary art from emerging talent to the accomplished artist.   Whether you're an individual artist that needs an outside curator to produce a show for a space, or 'other walls' such as a restaurant in need of supplemental curatorial help, I can guide you through the entire curatorial process or assist with selected portions of the task.  

For more than a decade I have worked to promote, market and manage artists, galleries and alternative art spaces.  I understand the complexity of today's contemporary art market and how critical it is to the artist’s success that they have a broad and aggressive strategy for integrated marketing communications.  Using the standard elements of the promotional mix (advertising, personal selling, public relations, publicity, direct marketing) and bringing it into the now with social media marketing, my role as consultant is to get the artist out of the office and into the studio where they do what they do best.  Services for the artist include general consulting and guidance, website design and assessment, promotional materials design, resume building, biography and statement editing and full-range marketing/advertising including social media management.

Name: Montero & Pisuerga
Description:
Artes Aplicadas (Litografía) · Arte Contemporáneo
Profesora de grabado, dibujo y pintura en el TPK Art i Pensament Contemporani, en L'Hospitalet de Llobregat.

2025: Acción artística "Mar de tinta imposible" · ECOSISTEMA #1 Solstici 2025

2023: Solstici 023 Zona D · Urgencia, Humanidad y Libertad · TPK Art i Pensament Contemporani · Tecla Sala

Description:

Name: Empowered Music
Description:
Who we are:

The philosophy of Empowered Music is that ALL students are welcome, celebrated, and encouraged to express their authentic selves through music. Everyone, regardless of perceived “musical ability,” can get started - get better - and keep going! By setting short-term and long-term goals, and evaluating them along the way, you get to define what success looks like for you! We are honored to help you reach your goals.

What we offer:

We are music professionals who provide exceptional, highly-personalized instruction to engage and inspire students of all abilities and ages. Whether your goals are in wellness, performance, or learning something new, we’re excited to support your journey in the classroom and beyond.

Performance opportunities are available for students who are willing and ready to experience “on-the-gig” training in a professional and supportive environment with our passionate music mentors.

We host space for workshops and trainings from music industry topics to health and wellness.

Name: Atelier Anders
Description:
Atelier Anders is een galerie en atelier tegelijk waar geëxposeerd wordt, workshops worden gegeven en is de plek waar kunstenaars en publiek elkaar kunnen ontmoeten en spreken. 
Lia van de Goor – Verstegen is de enthousiaste eigenaar, galeriehouder en docent van de workshops. Zij heeft zich tot doel gesteld om kunst te ontsluiten d.m.v. exposities, workshops, lezingen, documentaires en publicaties. Hierbij staat het werk van jonge en/of lokale ambachtelijke kunstenaars centraal. Haar Atelier biedt prikkelende kunst met diepgang die toegankelijk is voor jong en oud, voor de individu en groepen.


Educatie
Atelier Anders ontwikkeld en voert uit verschillende kunst- en cultuur-gerichte educatie, voor scholen, musea, particulier en evenementen. Het is mogelijk om de CJP-pas te besteden bij Atelier Anders.

Geopend op vrijdag en zaterdag tussen 13:00 en 17:00

0625641933 info@atelier-anders.nl

Name: New Brain Xpérience
Description:
NewBrain est un réseau d'acteurs culturels pluridisciplinaire, dans lequel 2 communautés sont formés : le gaming et la musique underground. 

L'expérience NewBrain concerne les 2 univers proposés mais également une expérience matérialisée par un séminaire pour un moment d'échange, de travail, de rencontre. Ces séminaires permettent aux bénévoles de se créer leur propre réseau culturel mais également de développer des compétences tels que la gestion de projets ou le développement de prise d'initiative. L'expérience NewBrain se veut sociale, culturelle, artistique mais aussi solidaire puisque l'association NewBrain Xperience a créé un partenariat avec l'association Kenyan Stories, oeuvrant pour collecter des fonds et construire une serre au Kenya de sorte à ce que les habitants puisse y vivre de façon pérenne.

2 communautés, 1 réseau, 1 association.

Name: Municipal Bonds
Description:
Municipal Bonds is a contemporary art platform with a nomadic exhibition program devoted to emerging and established artists, international in scope and cross-cultural in intention.

Founded in Oakland, California by Emily Miller, Municipal Bonds seeks to enhance artists' support, development, and exposure; and to increase the diversity of art showcased for the betterment of community, collectors, and creativity.
