Name: Moonlit Sea Prints
Description: Moonlit Sea Prints came about from my love of Japanese woodblock prints. While I have a degree in fine art and concentrated in intaglio printmaking, it wasn’t until a chance discovery of a Japanese art gallery while walking home from work in NYC that I found a passion for these prints, specifically the late ukiyo-e and shin-hanga periods (mid 1800s to mid 1900s). Their scenes, moods, and striking quiet beauty is something that I appreciate in the prints, but also when I see it out in the world. As an avid fly fishermen spending as much time as I can in the water in remote woods, I find I take these images with me wherever I go. I hope you will as well.

Name: ORCHESTRE CHABAB AL ANDALOUS
Description:
Presentation of the orchestra

The orchestra Chabab Al Andalous de Rabat was born on March 23, 1987 on the initiative of young music lovers resulting from different horizons, but having jointly an unconditional passion for the artistic inheritance Andalusian and concerned of its safeguarding of the loss. Consequently, these enthusiastic defenders of this secular art that is the Andalusian music did not have of cease to work for its propaganda and its modernization all while endeavouring to preserve its traditional connotation to him.
In October 1993, the orchestra Chabab Al Andalous de Rabat created a religious and artistic organization same name. It assigned to him for principal objective to take care of the safeguard of the Andalusian music and to contribute to its promotion near the young people. With this intention, the orchestra and association organized many artistic events jointly, both in Morocco and abroad. By elsewhere, multiple projects are currently in gestation. 
In March 1998, Association Chabab Al Andalous is inaugurated in its turn a representative office in Paris, in order to promote the Andalusian music within the hexagon. Its first activity, and not of least, consisted in organizing multiple artistic evenings at the time of the time of Morocco in France.
         Thus our message citizenship, brotherhood and peace in an inter -cultural   
         context is transmitted through the best tool that can bring people together,  
         that of music.
                  The orchestra CHABAB AL ANDALOUS is the only group in the Arab World 
                 and Africa, and among the few in the world to receive the ARCH OF EUROPE 
                 BID International Award for Quality and Excellence in the OR category, in 
                Frankfurt in March 2018 .
   
         Orchestra Chabab Al Andalous is an Ambassador of Moroccan art by excellence;
        - Participation in international festivals and cultural events within 4 contnents   
           since 1992 :
        * Europe: Netherland , Switzerland, France , Belgium, Portugal , Spain, Austria ,
           Azerbaidjan,  Germany, Hungary , Italy, Sweden, Israel, Danemark and Russia
        * America : USA, Canada and Mexico 
        * Asia : Indonesia, China, Thailand , Japan, South Korea and India
        * Africa and Arab countries : Algeria , Tunisia, Egypt , Jordan, Lebanon , Qatar          
           Palestine , Kuwait , Saudi Arabia , UAE , Yemen, Syria, Iraq, Senegal ,Gabon and   
           Ivory Coast .
          
                      Hicham BELGHITI
                 Artistic and Administrative Director

Name: United Aliens Artists
Description:
United Aliens Artists
Founded in !997 in London-Paris-Milan

"Zonzibulle ?" nous demanderez-vous. Il y a derrière ce mot impossible à placer dans une partie de Scrabble un désir d’envol et d’onirisme.

Name: SECONDroom
Description:
Art space - Artist initiative
Expo platform organized by: Christophe Floré, David Van Mieghem, Tanja Vrancken and Marc Van Tichel.

Sinds 2006 organiseert SECONDroom (Sr) eendags-tentoonstellingen als onafhankelijk platform. De expo’s vonden wekelijks plaats op zaterdag van 18u tot 21u. Ontstaan in een woonkamer in de Papenvast te Brussel werden er ondertussen al verscheidene mutaties gevormd te Brussel, Gent, Leuven, Antwerpen… en wordt de oorspronkelijke versie nog steeds verder gezet te Antwerpen en/of in samenwerking met andere initiatieven.
Sinds zijn ontstaan heeft SECONDroom meer dan 300 tentoonstellingen georganiseerd.. Dit initiatief wordt getrokken door Christophe Floré, Tanja Vrancken,David Van Mieghem, Athéna Lazarou en Marc Van Tichel. Het principe van de wekelijkse vernissage-expo op zaterdagavond blijft behouden.

Name: IVANA TATTOO ART
Description:
Ivana Tattoo Art is known worldwide for her unique brand of creativity.  Ivana is a self taught artist who has been perfecting her style for the last 17 years.  She has won multiple awards and has participated in some of the most prestigious international tattoo shows in the industry.  

Her work has been displayed in various exhibitions and she has collaborated with several art schools internationally.  She is also a gifted illustrator, clothing designer and photographer.  

Her tattoos are positive, playful, beautiful, sometimes mischievous and always fun.  Her style is innovative, sophisticated, and eclectic; a sexy mixture of multiple genres combining funky, bright colors and abstract elements with street style and high art.

Her artistic intentions are not to replicate pictures and objects as they are seen by others, but rather to capture the object's unique form.  Her trademark style is instantly recognizable and has garnered fans and admirers worldwide.

Name: The Ink Society
Description:
The Ink Society is een winkel, atelier en tattoo studio. De producten zijn uniek; van de tatoeëerstijlen en de op maat gemaakte ontwerpen tot de sieraden en accessoires in de winkel.

Winkel
In de winkel van The Ink Society vind je bijzondere producten die allen het lichaam versieren. Zo verkopen we onze eigen accessoirelijn met Tattoo Jewelry en Tattoo Bags & Bracelets, maar ook de handgemaakte organic sieraden en piercings van TAWAPA uit L.A. en sieraden en accessoires van jong talent van eigen bodem.

Tattoo Studio
The Ink Society is gespecialiseerd in de tattoostijlen watercolor, linework, dotwork, en contemporary tatoeages. We maken custom ontwerpen. Een ontwerp wordt door ons maar één keer gezet.

Description:

Our lessons are aimed toward growth, improvement, and learning from mistakes.

We help students feel proud and confident about their piano skills.

Name: The Baldwin Gallery
Description:
The Baldwin curates dialogue between cultures, nature and art. Representing contemporary artists and specializing in Canadian First Nations art and international environmental art, we curate, procure and consult for museums, cultural institutions, arts organizations and collectors in the UK and abroad.

Recent collaborations or commissions in London include The National Maritime Museum, Canada House, The Horniman Museum and Origins Festival of First Nations, Blacks Club (Soho) and The Hospital Club (Covent Garden).

Our gallery houses The Baldwin’s collection of First Nations art and hosts exhibitions and interdisciplinary salons, featuring prominent musicians, performers, academics and writers. The home-gallery is open by appointment and for events.

The Baldwin was begun in 2016 by novelist and creative director, Dr. Dennison Baldwin Smith, and is co-curated by Oceana Masterman-Smith.

Name: The Feathered Fedora Creative
Description:
A sign is more than a way to display a name or an address. It tells a story that pulls people in. We create unique, hand painted signs and gold leaf gilded window graphics for storefronts and offices that make your business sing.

Designed to be as unique as you are, our approach to traditional hand painted processes and top-quality materials is limited only by your imagination.

A custom sign made by The Feathered Fedora Creative is a one-of-a-kind piece of art. And it’s yours to make your own unique statement. It is time to break away from the monotony and embrace the richness and authenticity of a traditional hand-painted sign.

Name: Heart of Things Studio
Description:
Heart of Things Studio - Bringing Walls to Life with Artful Murals 

Welcome to HoT Studio, where we specialize in turning blank spaces into vibrant visual stories. Our passion lies in hand-painted murals that capture attention and elevate brands through artistic expression.

 Why Choose Heart of Things Studio?
Experience the magic of our handcrafted murals that go beyond paint on walls - they tell your brand's unique story, making a lasting impact.

 Industries We Serve:

#MuralArt #AdvertisementMurals #BrandElevation

Name: Italian Street Painting Marin
Description:
Italian Street Painting Marin showcases the fine art of street painting and supports quality arts-based programs in Marin County, California.

To fulfill our mission, we - 

•	Produce our annual signature performance art event in downtown San Rafael.  City streets become the canvas for our talented Madonnari (street painters) from around the world as visitors experience this captivating performance art.

•	Grant funds to qualified 501c3 nonprofit arts organizations. We awarded our first grants to 11 organizations in April, 2014 benefiting thousands of children, adults and special needs individuals.

•	Provide teen and professional workshops covering everything from the basics of street painting technique to the latest innovations in the art form. 

•	 Deliver Special Events to showcase master Madonnari at venues in and around the San Francisco Bay Area. 

Check out the "Gallery" tab on our website to view amazing artwork from our 2014 and 2013 events!

 
ITALIAN STREET PAINTING MARIN Ciao Bella Roma – JUNE 26-27, 2016

Our signature event, Ciao Bella Roma, will transport you to Italy for the weekend! Over 100 Madonnari from around the globe will gather in downtown San Rafael to celebrate the captivating performance art of street painting.

Also featured at this year’s event:

•	RareArtist Exhibit
•	Live Music
•	Children’s Avenue

Click the "Events" tab on our website for complete details! 

Italian Street Painting Marin is a program of the EveryLife Foundation for Rare Diseases, a 501c3 nonprofit. EveryLife Foundation for Rare Diseases, a national organization headquartered in Marin County, California, is dedicated to accelerating biotech innovation for rare disease treatments through science-driven public policy. The Foundation believes that bridging science and the arts enhances health, inspires hope, and changes lives.

Name: Rasa Art education
Description: Contemporary visual arts are at the heart of each Rasa-project. Based in Antwerp, we have developed and presented travelling exhibitions for children and young people for over twentyfive years. We stimulate children to look at art. Not zapping from image to image, but slowly. To enjoy art and to see what’s real. We invite them to approach art differently: with different eyes. Art eyes.

Name: Reskate!
Description: Reutilización de tablas de skate en desuso. El procedimiento es el siguiente, partimos de tablas de skate usadas e incluso abandonadas, la recortamos dando la forma deseada y las repartimos entre los ilustradores seleccionados. Ellos serán los encargados de customizarlas. Nos atrae pensar que el mítico skate de tu adolescencia que se está pudriendo en el balcón, se convierte en un objeto nuevo que te genera suficiente ilusión como para volver a patinar.

Name: Independent Contractor and Producer - Fine Art Project
Marcus Ashley Gallery
Description:
Marcus Ashley Gallery is Lake Tahoe’s premier fine art gallery located in the bustling new shopping district of the Heavenly Village. In our 4400 sq.ft. art gallery we exhibit an endless array of magnificent oil and acrylic paintings, watercolors, limited edition prints, bronze sculptures, glass art, metal art, gift items, and books.

Marcus Ashley Gallery employs a dynamic team of artistically literate and knowledgeable consultants whose priority is to educate and assist both seasoned and new collectors.

We pride ourselves on offering impeccable service which includes custom framing, private home shows for clients within 60 miles, and worldwide shipping!

Name: Framer's Workshop
Description:
At Framer’s Workshop, we are committed to framing your artwork at the highest-possible quality with the utmost care.

With every framing project, from the high-end, hand-made, carved and gilded, custom picture frame for museum-quality artwork, to the simple frame needed for your child’s artwork or your needlepoint, our goal is is to exceed your expectations and industry standards.

It is our belief that the part of our work that is hidden inside the frame be as well done and as well cared for as the actual display of your art. You can rest assured that whenever a piece framed by Framer’s Workshop is taken apart, you will see that it was done properly, done to the highest standard, and done to protect the valued artwork of each of our clients.

Our fine craftsmanship is coupled with excellent design and tremendous selection to provide our clients with perfect frames. Every time! Our appeal has always been to discerning collectors of art and memorabilia regardless of their sophistication level.

We have the expertise to properly frame your fine art or oil painting, your vintage poster, your limited edition print, your original graphic, or other special piece of art. We frame many things in a historical vein, but also strive to make your art look great in every setting.

Name: Little Istanbul Ebru Studio
Description: Traditional Turkish paper marbling workshops and courses in the heart of Budapest.

Name: Creative Workshops Amsterdam
Description:
Welcome to Creative Workshops Amsterdam, where we transform team dynamics through the power of art. Our turnkey workshops are designed for companies in the Amsterdam area, offering a unique, hands-on approach to inspire creativity, foster innovation, and strengthen collaboration within teams of 7 to 20 people.

Art workshops can offer transformative benefits for both groups and individuals, making them a powerful tool for team leaders who want to cultivate positive change. Here’s how they can enhance group dynamics and individual growth:

For Groups
Enhanced Collaboration:
Working on creative projects together encourages teamwork, mutual respect, and open communication. Teams learn to value diverse perspectives, leading to more cohesive collaboration.
Strengthened Team Spirit:
Shared creative experiences build trust and camaraderie, creating lasting connections among team members in a relaxed, fun environment.
Improved Problem-Solving Skills:
Art workshops challenge teams to think creatively and find innovative solutions, which can translate to better problem-solving in the workplace.
Stress Reduction:
A hands-on, artistic activity provides a break from daily stress, allowing teams to recharge and return to work with renewed focus and energy.
Better Conflict Management:
Exploring creative tasks together teaches teams how to navigate disagreements constructively, fostering a healthier, more understanding work environment.
Reimagine Team Building
Our workshops go beyond traditional team activities, offering an unforgettable experience that leaves lasting results. Whether you’re seeking to celebrate the holidays or invest in your team’s long-term growth, we’re here to help.

Name: Tasart
Description: Tasart es una empresa cultural enfocada en brindar servicios de tasación, registro y consultoría de colecciones de arte por profesionales expertos en la cultura y las artes en Puerto Rico. Los servicios están dirigidos a coleccionistas particulares o institucionales y  nuevos coleccionistas que requieran ser informados sobre los aspectos relacionados a opiniones de valor de obras de arte y al registro, inventario y catalogación de colecciones. A través de la consultoría se generan nuevas formas de coleccionismo que propician un mercado del arte local activo. Brindando estos servicios Tasart mantiene activo el circuito del arte de nuestro país e incentiva a través de la educación sobre la importancia de mantener registros y avalúos del patrimonio cultural y artístico de Puerto Rico.

Name: 212GALLERY
Description:
Globally recognized as an elite source for art acquisition, promotion, and advisory with a profile of important, international artists; 212 has partnered with the renowned Baum Foundation, Christie’s Auction House, and the Warhol Foundation to bring exciting thematic pop-up exhibitions to Aspen’s elite collecting community.

Representing a diverse program of contemporary artists working across various media, 212GALLERY cultivates cutting-edge contemporary art – including Street Art and abstract minimalism – and is regularly featured in publications such as Art+Auction and The New Yorker on-line.

Passionate about sharing our knowledge and expertise, we advise on multi-million-dollar art acquisitions and have sourced seminal paintings, sculptures, and photographs for an elite international clientele in Aspen, Hong Kong, New York, Los Angeles, Miami, London, and beyond.

Name: GALERIA ARTde.LU
Description:
Gallery Artde.lu promotes the most interesting phenomenons of contemporary art. The profile of the gallery is oriented on art, that is being created by young, brave and authentic artists reaching far beyond the reality or presentation. The paintings collected in our gallery refer to surrealism, abstractionism and magic realism, directions in the art, that express very strongly the internal perceptive visualisation. The factor that unites our pieces of art is their element of obscureness and mysteriousness, which should provoke to create your own interpretations.

The Artde.lu Gallery is a place where meet young and brave artists that express authentic understanding of the world throughout their talent. We have been founded because of passion to art. We work because we want make pieces of art (that we select by ourselves) be more reachable to people with subtle sense of esthetics. The goal of the gallery is to expand esthetic space of potential receivers, including professional collectors.

Name: Sahasra Fine Arts
Description:
Welcome to Sahasra Fine Arts (SFA) -the place where one can electrify their senses. 

This is a concept designed with much passion by Sarvani Yadavalli, an established Kuchipudi artiste, not just to provide the students with an alternative source of leisure and learning but also to fulfill the dreams of those who would like to become professionals in the field they choose in fine arts. SFA takes up varied projects using arts to socialize, communicate, educate and as a therapy.

Sarvani, an extremely gifted artist with immense passion to perform and impart the rich tradition of Kuchipudi, has a vision to communicate through arts and take up social issues in her attempt to perpetuate peace and harmony. She is also keen to impart the arts education to the next generation. She has an electrifying stage presence with right propensity for rhythm and expressions. With more than a decade of performing experience over many countries and with two decades of learning experience, Sarvani who is a recipient of several national and international awards/titles started Sahasra Fine Arts to fill the young minds with colors of expressions, grace and rhythm of movement- opening up a new world of imagination which will greatly influence their overall personality development

SFA is open to all age groups (children above 7 years) and all fitness levels. Join our family and explore the new world of dancing to the tune of Kuchipudi. 

MISSION: To be a one point contact for art lovers internationally in the entire spectrum of fine arts.

VISION: To achieve harmony and understanding between people of different cultures through South Asian Arts. 

VALUES: 
• Systematic training of the art form to the taught developing confidence, discipline in them and trying to bring out their inner potential. 
• Potential collaborations to make use of arts for social good
• Choreographing and presenting creative art forms keeping in view the audience expectations with basics and principles of art form remaining intact. 
• Providing an enthusiastic, invigorating and vibrant environment for the improvement and well-being of the students.

Name: Artista IITT
Description: Artista IITT, the Art Club of IIT Tirupati, aims to create a community where each can grow their skills, make memories, and bond through learning and sharing art. Whether a professional, a beginner, or someone interested in starting their art journey, Artista welcomes all by creating opportunities to cherish the colourful world of art together.

Name: Fragrant Wood Gallery
Description:
The first collection at Fragrant Wood consisted of pieces personally curated and collected over years of extensive travel. Established in 2011, the Gallery first focused on Balinese and Chinese works, but upon discovering an opportunity to broaden our artistic reach, we now showcase Asian and Canadian art. In so doing, we wish to explore the connection of Canadian and Eastern art and introduce our visitors to this beautiful spectrum of creativity. These pieces show beautifully in a contemporary gallery setting, and one can easily imagine how these artifacts would express their full exoticism in a bright, modern Vancouver home as well.

The Gallery has close relationships with all of the artists it represents, and is constantly building new relationships. On a continuous search for new talent, established artists are encouraged to submit their artwork for consideration. Fragrant Wood envisions being a venue where art from different cultures can be exposed. Additionally, our goal is to bring traditional art into a modern context, reframing what traditional Asian art can be when set against a western aesthetic. To this aim, the Gallery aims to bring exceptional Canadian artists to the East, as well as introduce excellent eastern artists to the West.

After evaluating how better to service its guests, The Gallery now offers venue and art rental as well as traditional Chinese/Japanese painting restoration.

May you be enraptured by the sensuality and artisanal allure of the work at Fragrant Wood, and feel a sense of serenity and calm as you wander through the space. May you feel the spirit of Canadian and Eastern art at Fragrant Wood when you visit. You are always

Description: Talleres y curos de Plasticina, creamos cuadros en dimensiones 2D y 3D, figuras y caricaturas en plasticina, ademas tenemos el taller de Comics, conceptualización y creación de Comics, storytelling, ilustración y portadas, Curso de Locución para niños, manejo de la voz interpretativa para radio, técnicas de vocalización, manejo de micrófono, implementación de estudio, master y la creción de podcast para Spotify, narrativa interpetativa para Youtubers.

Name: Artist Claire Manicom
Description:
Claire Manicom is a Johannesburg-born and based artist. She has a degree in Industrial Design as well as Fine Arts. Her work frequently deals with concepts of unknowledge and the language of ‘things’. She has worked as a freelance designer, sculptural engineer, and artist. Some of her recent achievements include taking part in the RMB Talent Unlocked program (2021), putting together a small independent showing at Gordon Froud’s Stokvel Gallery
(July 2021), and creating an installation in the elevator at an Ellis House Open Studio event (May 2021).
“I like to try to dissolve the barriers between art and design thinking. I can and do work on both sides of the barrier between art and design, merging them to create impactful work.”

Name: WILLIE
Description:
WILLIE is een collectief van kunstenaars en creatieven die in verschillende disciplines werkzaam zijn en zich gezamenlijk vanuit hun eigen cultureel ondernemerschap inzetten voor een hoogkwalitatief cultureel programma (in Deventer). De kracht van WILLIE is dat zij meerdere kunstvormen en subculturen aan elkaar verbindt, stimuleert en zichtbaar maakt aan een breder publiek. De leden van WILLIE vormen samen de vitale ondergrond en voedingsbodem van de culturele sector in Deventer.

WILLIE verhuisde in 2006 van het IJsselhotel naar het Havenkwartier en stond daarmee aan de oorsprong van de culturele broedplaats in Havenkwartier Deventer.

Het merendeel van de publieksactiviteiten die in de voor de ontwikkeling van het Havenkwartier cruciale periode 2006-2012 hebben plaatsgevonden, zijn georganiseerd door (leden van) WILLIE. Een paar sprekende voorbeelden zijn Podium WILLIE, Slowlands festival, PIKNIK, Ass-crack Stage-hack, uiteenlopende tentoonstellingen, knallende oud&nieuw feesten, Valse Start, Hete Haven, Culture Trail, The Incident Room, Havenkwartier Openingsfestival, MOMI-fest, HK Bazaar en ~DIF festival.

Na een lang en slopend traject bleek WILLIE, ondanks hun inzet en onmiskenbaar belang voor het gebied, niet in staat hun vaste podiumlocatie in het Havenkwartier te behouden. De activiteiten van WILLIE staan daardoor momenteel op een laag pitje.

Name: Amos Eno Gallery
Description:
Amos Eno Gallery is a nonprofit art gallery providing a full season of exhibits by emerging and mid-career artists working in visual, performance, installation, interactive, and/or digital media/video. Our season is complemented by a diverse series of performances as well as educational and public programs for the New York area. A small community of professional artists runs our nonprofit whose members are vetted through a rigorous reviewing process by their peers. 

Amos Eno serves as an alternative, artist-run platform for professional artists in a variety of media, giving precedence to artistic expression freed from commercial restraints. By presenting a rich schedule of exhibits and participatory events, we help promote the cultural growth of our community.

Name: Kyla Artist Prize - ASSOCIATION DE LA LUEUR ÉCLAIRANTE DE L'ART-
Description:
In 2023, Taiwan’s DE Global Art Agency collaborated with Germany’s Eniziart Gallery to establish the Kyla x Eniziart Gallery in Mannheim, Germany. The goal of this partnership was to promote cultural exchange between East and West, celebrating the richness of both traditions. Over the next two years, the gallery successfully participated in art fairs across Germany and Asia, providing an international platform for emerging and established artists to showcase their works.



By 2024, with the increasing digital transformation of the art market, Kyla Art Gallery made a pivotal shift: ending its partnership with Eniziart and transitioning into a virtual international gallery. This transformation expanded the gallery’s global reach, allowing it to participate in art fairs worldwide without physical limitations. At the same time, Kyla continued to promote the Kyla Artist Prize, which includes categories such as visual arts, performing arts, and design arts. The prize offers artists from around the globe the opportunity to showcase their talents and fosters cross-cultural dialogue in the art world.



As a gallery with a strong commitment to the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), we combine art with environmental and ethical principles, actively supporting responsible capitalism and cultural growth. Through exhibitions, events, and international collaborations, we present diverse works of art while championing sustainability in the global art market.

Name: Sirjana College of Fine Arts
Description:
Sirjana College of Fine Arts (SCoFA) was established in 2001 in affiliation with Tribhuvan University. The emergence of this College has come as an outcome of a long debate – and with a common aspiration. Then it was with a noble vision shared by a group of select prominent artists and the art lovers of Nepal. And today, it has resulted, and become a matter of pride and privilege being the first and the only Fine Arts College in Nepal – established exclusively by the Art Community. It functions as a non-profit and
community-based College and is being run under the set courses according to the prescribed curriculum framework of TU. Today, with great pride, it stands as premier and a leading institution of Fine Arts in Nepal.

In its initial years (AD 2001-2003) the College was granted permission to run the Proficiency Certificate Level (PCL) in Fine Arts under the Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences of TU. Later, three-years Bachelor’s program was introduced in the academic year of 2003-04.

As per the decision made by the University to phase out the PCL from the academic session 2010-011, the College was entitled to commence the plus two (+2) level programs in affiliation with the Higher Secondary Education Board (HSEB), Nepal. At present, the new courses on the Higher Secondary level in Fine Arts offer Painting, Applied Arts, Sculpture, History of Arts, Music, and Dance. Regarding the Music course, the subject has been included in compliance with the provision made for the previous PCL of TU.

As TU initiated a four-year Bachelor’s degree in Fine Arts with a new curriculum from the academic session 2012-013, Graphic Communications, Music, and Dance were also added and introduced accordingly by the College at the BFA level, since then. The addition of Traditional Nepali Painting and Traditional Nepali Sculpture was also made in the curriculum of BFA as the major subjects.

Description: A multidisciplinary artist-run centre, Gallery 101 is committed to the professional presentation, dissemination and promotion of contemporary visual arts from a broad range of backgrounds and aesthetics. This is accomplished by providing accessible and engaging exhibitions of local, national and international artists, maintaining a comprehensive web site that hosts our archives and digital projects, sustaining a critical dialogue of contemporary art through publications and bilingual brochures for each exhibition. Gallery 101 has a reputation for its aboriginal and culturally diverse programming, with emphasis on presenting the diversity within aboriginal voices. Our presentation of artists from multicultural, sexual orientation and Franco-Ontarian identities has raised our public image as an accessible and inclusive contemporary art space.

Name: Kruger Gibbons Auctioneers
Description:
Kruger Gibbons have established themselves as a leading auction house within Wirral and Merseyside, covering areas such as Wirral, Liverpool, Cheshire, Southport & Wales.

Their focus from the moment of inception has always been customer care with emphasis on politeness, quality of service and fast payment.

Through their fortnightly auctions, which are held on a Monday, they have auctioned in excess of 500 lots, including: coins, stamps, jewellery, watches, silver and gold, antique furniture, clocks and collectable Items. In addition to these special lots, they also offer modern household goods, including furniture, white woods, TV's, glassware, china, dinner services, garden furniture and many more interesting items. All auctions are available to an  international audience with online bidding facility via the-saleroom.com portal.

Each week the team offers the following services:

* Full house clearances
* FREE verbal valuation days - call prior to book your appointment
* Competitively priced and all vendors will receive payment two weeks of each auction
* Collection & delivery service available
* Professional courteous service guaranteed 
* Probate, estate and insurance valuations 

Kruger Gibbons endeavour to make antique auctions fun and welcome visitors to their  Monday auctions, which commence at 11.00 am each auction day, with viewing on Fridays & Saturdays between 9.30 am and 2pm or on the sale day from 9.00am. Please view the auction calendar for all important dates and upcoming auctions. 

Our 2015 charity of the year is Zoë's Place and all donations from the complimentary tea & coffee facilities support this worthy local charity.

We tailor our services to meet your requirements, contact the office today!

Kruger Gibbons Auctioneers
www.krugergibbons.co.uk
0151 653 8877

Name: Noel Ortiz Art
Description:
Born in San Juan, Puerto Rico, initially, Ortiz pursued a career in engineering, but in 2000 he began to paint, drawing on his experience with drafting, perspective, and form.  After a few years, Ortiz felt that his work was ready to be seen, and he began sharing it with the wider world.
Ortiz draws his palette from the tropical skies of Puerto Rico, colors meant to awaken the viewer's senses.  He begins with representational landscapes, abstracting them as he paints, creating saturated earth from swatches of primary colors.  It is out of this richly imagined dirt that wonderfully textured trees emerge, backlit, often, by a darkening sky.  Working in acrylic, Ortiz offers a unified body of work that concurrently offers individual flare.  "It is always my intention to address the canvas directly, honestly, and boldly," Ortiz says.  "My heart is always pushing my work to find new language."

Name: baadalghar
Description:
Brainchild of artists Shailee Mehta and Aditi Kashyap, Baadalghar is our home and our studio. It houses our individual practices and provides a space for community engagement through open studios, workshops and curatorial projects. We began in March 2021, working out of an apartment in Mumbai and have since moved to an apartment in Goa, where we now live and work with our cat, Saba.

While our mediums differ, the overlaps in our practices have always found a grounding in exploring the possibilities of outreach and collective making where art is no longer an object but a resource, a tool, that can catalyse dialogue

We facilitate workshops in drawing and ceramics. We also host monthly virtual sessions where artists and art-enthusiasts draw together and engage with works.

Name: 17 Rue des Arts
Description:
Le 17 rue des arts est une maison d'édition en ligne participative, couplée à un site web artistique communautaire. Les internautes peuvent s’inscrire, découvrir des artistes dont ils peuvent suivre l’activité, participer à la vie communautaire, discuter avec les artistes et aider des projets à voir le jour. Les artistes qui s’inscrivent sur le site peuvent exposer leur travail, collaborer avec des artistes rencontrés sur le site à des projets artistiques en tous genres et faire éditer leurs projets.


Objectifs :
• Permettre aux artistes de s'exposer et de faire connaître leurs univers artistiques par le biais d'une plateforme web communautaire comportant, entre autres, un système de galeries
• Proposer aux artistes des outils innovants ainsi qu’un lieu original et convivial pour qu'ils
puissent se rencontrer et créer ensemble
• Permettre aux membres du site de devenir journalistes en herbe et de rédiger des articles sur un artiste du site, un domaine artistique ou une expérience artistique personnelle
• Éditer des projets multi-support faisant appel à la collaboration de différents artistes issus du web.

Name: Um dedo de arte
Description:
Diego Moura do projeto “Um Dedo de Arte” é um artista fascinado pela multiplicidade das cores e conhecido por trabalhar com a poética digitalista, no qual usa da tecnologia do celular no processo de criação de suas telas. 

Sua obra de estética surrealista, com a influência da Pop Art, tem como característica marcante olhos e boca sempre em posição de destaque, no intuito de criar uma comunicação direta com público. Sua técnica é desfragmentar instintivamente a anatomia humana para extrair uma estética diferente do que já foi digerido pela sociedade, criando formas ilógicas para levar ao espectador a se perguntar: “Por que a arte ser assim?”.

“Quando me questionam qual é a principal importância do meu trabalho, penso nos milhares de jovens que minha arte tem atraído, pela cor, forma e, principalmente técnica. Essa estética, que foge da criação convencional, também tem estimulado outras pessoas a ousarem em suas criações”, afirma Diego Moura.

Name: Plan 9 Cultural SL
Description: Plan 9 Cultural es una empresa cultural que opera entre Terres de l'Ebre, Tarragona y Barcelona. Especializada en proyectos innovadores que relacionan arte, contexto y tecnología en espacios singulares, trabajamos con artes excepcionales en su más amplia acepción: procesos creativos que relacionan paisaje e investigación, instalaciones artísticas en espacios museísticos o temporalmente habilitados, actuaciones audiovisuales, actividades formativas, espectáculos digital-performativos, teleacciones digitales y piezas de difícil catalogación. Somos los responsables de Eufònic (desde 2012), Eufònic Urbà (2013-2021), Etnoscòpic (2021), Molinex (2022), el ciclo Sons de la Memòria (2019-2020) o Montsònica (2023) entre otros proyectos, además de la dirección artística de Mèdol - Centre d'Arts Contemporànies de Tarragona, con Vicent Fibla como director desde julio de 2021.

Name: AC Boardwalk Con

Founders of the show are deeply rooted within the comics and cosplay communities striving to put the fans first at every touch point with an array of special guests, workshops, exhibits, and events inside and outside the convention halls. 

Inside, the hall has 300,000 square feet of floor space that will feature artPods, 40+ panel rooms, a cosplay main stage, prime photo-op areas, changing rooms, secure storage, and more!

Name: Espacio Islandia
Description:
Espacio Islandia es un proyecto nómada dedicado al proceso y al encuentro artístico interdisciplinar.

Espacio Islandia nace en Madrid en el verano de 2011, concretamente en el número 67 de la calle Palma, local hoy vacío y en desuso.

Durante dos años, la sede física de Espacio Islandia fue lugar de encuentro para el pensamiento crítico y la experimentación, una suerte de factoría de producción y muestra de eventos artísticos, performativos y audiovisuales. Se promovieron y se llevaron a cabo distintos proyectos como recitales, performances, talleres o exposiciones; operando siempre de manera independiente, aunque contando con la interacción de otros agentes y organismos dedicados a la creación contemporánea.

Tras cerrar sus puertas a principios de 2013, Espacio Islandia decide reinventarse y hacerse nómada, basándose para ello en la que probablemente es la línea de de actuación que más identidad ha aportado al proyecto, las “microResidencias”.

Espacio Islandia se encuentra en pleno proceso de reconstrucción, en búsqueda constante de una redefinición de sus objetivos a corto y largo plazo. Y lo hace desde la práctica, a través del intercambio con otros proyectos culturales del panorama artístico nacional e internacional.

Espacio Islandia es una anomalía en el sistema.

Name: Deb O'Neill Art
Description:
Creativity has been a part of my life ever since I can remember.  Working as a photographer and graphic designer allowed me to fulfill my dream of being a working artist but having a paintbrush in hand is when I really feel the spark of creativity ignited. 

I was born in Dubbo, Central West NSW and spent most of my life exploring the wide open spaces and kicking around in the rich red dirt. I guess that is where my love for earthy tones has come from! A recent sea-change with my husband and two teenage sons has brought me to Newcastle where a whole new world of inspiration is mine to explore.

My inspiration comes from nature, architecture, design and fashion and I mostly work with acrylics in abstract expressionism.

Name: Rodrigues Galeria de Artes - Recife
Description:
Objetivos
Continuar o trabalho dos membros da família, sempre dedicados as artes, como FERNANDO RODRIGUES (pai do fundador da Rodrigues), colecionador, incentivador das artes plásticas no Estado, colaborador do projeto de “Nova Jerusalém” em Fazenda Nova e ex-presidente da Escolinha de Arte do Recife); do tio AUGUSTO RODRIGUES, (desenhista, pintor, poeta, educador e jornalista, fundador das Escolinhas de Arte do Brasil e do Recife); do tio ABELARDO RODRIGUES, (paisagista e colecionador de arte sacra); da tia NETINHA RODRIGUES, (pintora); do tio FRANCISCO RODRIGUES, (colecionador de objetos antigos de prata e organizador de um documentário fotográfico das famílias tradicionais do Estado); do primo NELSON RODRIGUES, (escritor, teatrólogo e jornalista); do primo MÁRIO RODRIGUES FILHO, (jornalista e criador dos Jogos da Primavera, tendo hoje o Estádio do Maracanã o seu nome), entre outros.

Promover exposições individuais e coletivas de Artes Plásticas, dando ênfase aos artistas novos e de talento, assim como de grandes mestres, catalogados e destacados no cenário brasileiro.

Promover palestras, reuniões, cursos, etc., sobre Artes Plásticas e seus correlatos.

Manter documentação sobre artistas plásticos brasileiros, servindo para consultas de Instituições Federais, Estaduais e Municipais, assim como a empresas privadas e outros interessados, em resultado a um trabalho de pesquisa permanente sobre a história da arte e dos artistas brasileiros.

Manter um departamento para avaliações de obras de arte (pinturas, desenhos, gravuras e esculturas), de artistas brasileiros ou radicados no Brasil.

Name: Life Drawing Montmartre
Description:
The human figure as an art subject is one of the oldest themes in the visual arts. It is regarded as the most challenging, but at the same time the most satisfying of subjects to draw.

The “Life Drawing Montmartre” (LDM) initiative offers untutored life drawing sessions to professional and amateur artists. Our subjects are always professional life models. In addition to weekly open workshops, LDM offers private life drawing classes for groups and anatomy for artists workshops. We hope to introduce you to the various approaches to figurative work as part of our temporary exhibits.

Name: OAI Art Services
Description:
OAI Art Services was founded in 2010 with the hope of bringing new life and a breath of fresh air to the art and framing industry. We are a full-service art resource and custom framing company located in the Energy Corridor of Houston, TX. We work to unleash our client's creative side by helping them see outside the box and create an artistic vision that fits their needs with art, imaging, and custom framing. We also offer art transport and installation services for interior designers, residential and commercial clientele. Our purpose is to help our clients design masterpieces for their style of living.

OAI is currently working on creating our cause division, OAI Squared to help in the fight against human trafficking and domestic violence in the Houston area and across the globe.

Name: Asgardian Sdn Bhd
Description: We believe we can make a better future through the power of imagination and innovation. Our young generations are force for this movement, our mission is to prep them to be adventurous, curious, persevere, logic thinking and creative along the journey. Because they are the future.

Name: Hiro Fine Art LLC
Description:
Hiro Fine Art specializes in important American and European art of the mid to early 20th Century with a strong focus on early American modernism and regional artists from Minnesota. Hiro Fine Art is a private gallery that is open by appointment. Based in St. Paul, Minnesota we have over 10 years of experience in the field and can be a valuable asset when navigating the world of fine art. We offer a wonderful selection of high quality paintings, works on paper, prints, and sculpture for the discerning collector, interior designer, museum, dealer,  art consultant or institution. We have worked with several important collections and pride ourselves with making our clients our first priority with professional service and expertise. 
Hiro Fine Art offers complete services including consultation, scholarship, curatorial management, auction representation, appraisal, conservation, consignment and acquisition. Our growing inventory of artworks includes exceptional paintings by Edouard Cortes, Alexis Jean Fournier, and Knute Heldner. We are always seeking high quality paintings for acquisition or consignment.

Name: CityLiv
Description: CityLiv is een jaarlijks kunst- en cultuurevent dat kunstenaars en designers uitdaagt te experimenteren met sloopmateriaal. De verwonderende kunstexpo neemt je mee in een wereld van innovatie die je opnieuw laat kijken naar materialen die je dacht al gezien te hebben. CityLiv is een ontdekkingsreis voor zowel het publiek als de ontwerpers en vormt een bruisende broedplaats voor talentontwikkeling, nieuwe materiaaltoepassingen en grensoverschrijdend design.

Name: Bottega del Restauro sas
Description:
Siamo una Piccola Realtà Ligure, precisamente Genovese, attiva da più di 25 anni. 
Lo storico dei lavori effettuati nella provincia di Genova, Spezia, Savona ed Imperia è il più bel biglietto da visita che una realtà artigianale possa desiderare. 
Oggi principalmente conosciuti dalla Soprintendenza delle belle arti di Genova siamo in grado di aver accesso ai lavori più rilevanti del territorio.
Siamo spinti dall'energia e dalla forza che ci trasmettono le Architetture, le Statue, le Fontane, i Quadri e gli Affreschi storici nascosti o meno nei paesi e città della nostra terra. 

Abbiamo parecchia Storia da RaccontarVi !!!

Name: Fountain
Description: Fountain curates, commissions and produces contemporary visual art projects with a focus on international collaboration and exchange.

Name: My Studio 127
Description:
We are all born with the capacity to be creative. However, if you haven't practiced in a while - or since you were a kid,  it can be hard to know where to even start, right? Take a deep breath, you're in the right place. We're here to help you discover, nurture and grow your own unique creativity in a relaxed, encouraging environment.

Enjoy any of our creative experiences either in studio 127 or at home. We offer painting and mixed media parties, art journaling and personal art classes. There is no competition, comparing or stress, just encouragement, inspiration and some beautifully simple techniques you make your own.

You'll be delighted by what you create!

Name: Swapnil Nevgi Fine Art
Description:
I am an Australian artist living in Brisbane, Australia. I was born in the beautiful coastal town of Goa, India. Creativity and art have been my passion since childhood and to enhance that I moved to Brisbane in 2001 for higher education. I have qualification in advertising, design and IT and worked in the corporate world for 10+ years. I gave up full time employment in 2017 to focus on my passion for art. Now I operate my own business in design, art and photography.

Nature intrigues me and I really enjoy capturing wildlife and landscapes on canvas. I am passionate about nature conservation and aim to promote the significance and beauty of wildlife and nature through my art. Realism is my preferred style of art, however I also enjoy working with other styles of painting from time to time.

I spend a lot of time absorbing the elements of nature and photographing references that help me create my paintings. This process not only helps me gather references but also helps me learn about the natural environment and capture the mood of nature that I can translate into my painting. I create my artwork with realistic intricate details to bring the story of nature to life as I experience it.

Name: Little Big Art
Description:
Have you ever wandered around the Tate Modern in London, the Louvre in Paris, or maybe even the MoMA in New York and thought to yourself “there’s not enough LEGO in here”? Well fear not, as Little Big Art have got that covered.
 
Little Big Art see LEGO a little differently to most, not as little plastic bricks, but as art. From Warhol to Hirst; Mondrian to Emin, Little Big Art playfully realises these landmarks of art in LEGO. And when they’re done playing with the little bricks (and after having a nice cuppa) Little Big Art likes to sculpt human-size versions of individual bricks and tiles, and use these giant LEGO pieces to create EVEN MORE ART! Putting you into the little plastic feet of a minifigure and giving you a fresh twist on the way you see LEGO.
 
Little Big Art have broken gallery records on attendance and sales, created galleries in exhibition centres, and even had an exhibition attended by Kjeld Kirk Kristiansen - the billionaire owner of the LEGO Group.
 
Whether you’re a fan of art, LEGO or simply fun, there’ll be something for everyone at Little Big Art!

Name: Prix Carta Bianca
Description: Fondé par Isabelle et Éric Pujade-Lauraine, le Prix Carta Bianca est une initiative majeure de soutien à la création artistique contemporaine développée entre la France et l'Italie. Il a pour vocation de créer un dialogue entre le monde de l'art et celui de la santé.

Name: Fine Arts Studio
Description:
Fine Arts Studio by Dr. Rashmi Goel (Professional Artist) is an art school in Noida, Uttar Pradesh. It established in 2014 which is emerged as ' best Art school' 'portfolio consultancy' ' 'preparing for putting exhibition'. It is guiding over 300 students every year. For admission we take a group discussion for creative potential and career guidance. Students can take admission for 1 year or 3 years diploma in Fine Arts. Student can join our online live classes or classroom offline learning specially for drawing, watercolor, Charcoal work, Poster colour, Acrylic, portrait, crafts and much more. We are open all 7 days a week, students can choose weekdays or weekends as per their convenience. We have our own structured art books (copyright by Delhi Govt) different levels for different age groups .We are providing our students diplomas in fine arts with the satisfaction of learning.

Name: Blue Door Art Center
Description: The Blue Door Art Center is a not-for-profit 501(c)3 organization. Our mission is to bring the arts to Yonkers, and the surrounding communities.

Name: ART TALK SANLITUN
Description: Founded in 2019, Art Talk Sanlitun (ATS) is a non-profit public art program that offers onsite art projects including talk events, pop-up exhibitions, and public art projects, as well as online art content, including self-produced art talk videos. Our mission is to create an innovative and effective communication platform between art professionals and the public, promote a reinvention of communication between Eastern and Western contemporary art, and prioritize knowledge over profits.

Name: MADAME Artist The Art of Valérie LALLEMENT
Description:
MADAME est une artiste plasticienne issue de l’École des Beaux-Arts de Versailles en 2013. MADAME puise son inspiration dans les ressources intangibles et non-renouvelables : le temps, l’identité, les idées, les émotions... 

La perception de ses œuvres évolue au travers de celui qui les contemple.

Name: Albus Arts and Design
Description:
Albus Arts and Design is an art education center based in Singapore, dedicated to offering international art innovation education, portfolio development training, and art exploratory program. y integrating the best practices of Western art education with the distinct needs of Asian students, we have developed a comprehensive and tailored art education system. Our offerings include Youth Art Exploratory Programs, as well as portfolio preparation for undergraduate and postgraduate applications to leading universities in the UK and US.

At Albus Arts and Design, we prioritize an internationally oriented, inquiry-driven teaching methodology, with a strong emphasis on professional excellence and skill development. Our programs enable students to sharpen their design thinking and creativity while enhancing their teamwork and practical abilities. We encourage students to explore diverse disciplines, equipping them to transition seamlessly into an international academic environment.

Name: Rye Ballet Conservatory
Description: Rye Ballet Conservatory was founded in 1978 by Lynne Stetson, who danced with the New York City Ballet under the direction of George Balanchine.  We have taught generations of aspiring dancers to develop a profound love for the art of ballet.  Our school is led by a group of passionate teachers whose mission is to bring exceptional classical ballet training in a nurturing environment to Westchester and Fairfield Counties.

Name: Man Ray Expertise Committee
Description: Founded in 2018 by Andrew Strauss, Timothy Baum and Edouard Sebline, the Man Ray Expertise Committee is the leading organization for the authentication and expertise of Man Ray works. We provide opinions of authenticity and are currently preparing the catalogue raisonnés for Man Ray's Paintings, Works on paper and Objects & Sculpture.

Name: Merlinka - International queer film festival
Description: Merlinka - International Queer Film Festival is founded in 2009 and is organized every year in December in Belgrade, Serbia.

Name: Bureau des Arts de Sciences Po Toulouse
Description:
Le Bureau des Arts (B.D.A) de Sciences Po Toulouse est une association étudiante qui contribue à enrichir la vie culturelle des étudiants de l'école et à promouvoir de jeunes talents. Son intention première est de fédérer les associations à vocation artistique de l'école (cinéma, photographie, théâtre, éloquence, journal, danse, fanfare, etc) 

Suite aux élections étudiantes qui ont lieu en mars-avril de chaque année, le B.D.A élu entend au cours de l'année scolaire suivante s'unir à de nombreux partenaires et autres assos étudiantes dans l'organisation d'événements au sein et à l'extérieur de l'école. 

○ Chaque année est empreinte d'une nouvelle dynamique et de projets phares étalés de septembre à la fin de l'année suivante. 

○ Pour plus de clarté, l'équipe 2018-2019 composée de 15 membres est divisée en pôles : 
• Bureau : 2 co-présidents, 1 vice président, 1 secrétaire, 1 vice-secrétaire, 1 trésorière et 1 vice-trésorière.
• Des pôles temporaires, qui se reforment au cours de l'année en fonction des événements à organiser.
• 1 community manager, chargée des réseaux sociaux

○  Les projets de l'équipe 2018-2019 : 
• Un agenda culturel mensuel
• Des semaines à thèmes : 
    - Sciences Pride (une semaine co-organisée avec le BDE et le BDS sur les problématiques LGBTQ+ : projection cinéma, conférence-débat, soirée caritative, marche, etc)
    - La Semaine de l'Horreur (projections cinéma, soirée déguisée, et autres événements à préciser)
    - La semaine des Arts (concert, expositions, etc : une semaine mettant en avant les talents des étudiants artistes)
• Des événements plus ponctuels : conférences, projections cinéma, carnaval, ateliers
• La création d'un club musique
• Un voyage de fin d'année, entièrement organisé par le BDA !


○ Si vous souhaitez en savoir plus, n'hésitez pas : 
Page Facebook "Bureau des Arts Sciences Po Toulouse" (@bdascpotlse)
Instagram : BDA Sciences Po Toulouse (@bdasciencespotlse)
Twitter : BDA Sciences Po Toulouse (@bdascpotlse)

Name: Two Faced Twins Ltd
Description: Two Faced Twins Ltd (TFT) is a successful art brand based in Worthing, West Sussex on the south coast of England. Founded in 2017 by twin artists ‘Ink Genius’ Stella, and ‘Colour Queen’ Gemma, our brand has become well-known throughout the region, building a popular local following. We create striking artwork for contemporary homes. Our products comprise limited edition prints, bespoke artwork and homeware. Inspired by street scenery and architecture, featuring local scenes and vibrant colours, we sell our work online and in our busy seafront gallery.

Name: anabell paints
Description:
Anabell is an Architectural Designer and Visual Artist born in Havana, Cuba and based in Melbourne (Narrm), Australia.

Anabell is a multi-media artist, in the sense that she has mastered multiple mediums such as gouache, watercolour, pencil & oil. She’s fascinated by people & representations of culture, often depicted through portraits, colour and paintings of structures with unique character. She has a keen interest in the digital sphere, creating animations, NFTs and the design of this website among others.

She obtained a Masters & a Bachelor Degree from Monash University (2016) and graduated with a Premier’s Award in Studio Arts (2010). Throughout her career, Anabell has participated in various exhibitions and has been the recipient of many academic accolades. [+]

In 2020, she reconnected to her never-really-left-it love of fine art over the Great Lockdowns, rapidly growing a thriving following, and sales of her work. 

As a professional, Anabell is no stranger to working with sophisticated clients in a collaborative environment. Get in touch hello@anabell.com.au.

Name: European Art Group

A R T E :: Archeologia :: Recupero :: Turismo :: Eventi

ARTE è un progetto di condivisione della storia, della cultura e del territorio.

ARTE è una ditta individuale nata nel 2013 che si occupa di Archeologia e Beni Culturali. Effettuiamo scavi archeologici, valutazioni preliminari, controllo dei lavori in corso d'opera. Ci dedichiamo con passione e innovazione alla tutela e alla valorizzazione dei beni storico-archeologici del territorio. Operiamo nelle Marche meridionali e nell'Abruzzo settentrionale.

Name: Komo
Description:
Komo began in 2018 as an art advisory specializing in collection management, curatorial projects, and artist commissions. Built from 25+ years of cultivating relationships with artists, collectors, galleries, and institutions around the world, it bloomed into something more expansive five years later. Komo Collective emerged from a desire to support emerging and early-career artists & makers and to tell the story behind their work. Driven further by a collective shift away from throwaway consumerism culture, Komo's focus is on unique pieces made (and in some cases re-made) from materials that will last a lifetime.  

Komoart.com is a platform that enables anyone to be inspired by and shop for one-of-a-kind art and design.

 

Art, Collecting, Investment Management, Portfolio Diversification, Alternative Investing, Financial Planning, Investing, and Alternative Assets

Name: Dinner Gallery
Description: Dinner Gallery (formerly VICTORI+MO) is a collaborative effort among dealers, curators, collectors and artists in Bushwick, Brooklyn dedicated to presenting and developing emerging and mid-career contemporary artists who engage with concepts and ideas relevant to life in an increasingly global community. By providing a space unmoored to particular doctrine, Dinner Gallery aims to transcend geographic and cultural boundaries and create dialogue, not only between the art world and viewing public, but across generations.

Name: Opper & Webb Fine Art Dealers
Description:
Opper & Webb is an international, fresh and dynamic art dealership that seeks out and represents exciting new artists from around the world.

We provide a comprehensive range of services to our clients, simplifying projects by sourcing original art that complements our clients' visions.

Working in strong partnerships with our artists and operating internationally to find the most talented individuals is essential to provide our clients access to the most trending art collections and extraordinary commissioning opportunities. 

Professionalism, integrity and trust form the foundation of all our client and artist relationships.

Our Ethos is flexibility in the way we work and engage with our clients and help them achieve their aspirations.

Name: Studio ZEPA
Description:
Today the internet accelerates cultural diffusion as the world becomes more connected. While balancing realism against abstract forms StudioZEPA explore this theme of globality. The street artist duo are inspired by fauvism and stained glass, symbolizing aspects of modern life and parts of our personalities.

Combining vivid colour application with detailed, illustrative line work allows the artists to create powerful portraits and landscapes. 
By celebrating different cultures through the stained glass lens the consistent theme of equality emerges.

StudioZEPA is a collaboration between ZestaOnline and Page33. Before meeting they produced commissioned work since 2003. They began working together in 2013 in South Africa, and are now based in The Netherlands.

Name: Jean Bechtel School for Music
Description:
About Us

Welcome to the Jean Bechtel School for Music (JBSM), where the language of music comes alive, and a passion for excellence defines our educational ethos. Nestled in the heart of Roseburg, Oregon, and extending our reach to music enthusiasts worldwide through online platforms, JBSM stands as a beacon of musical education, committed to providing affordable and quality music instruction.

Our Vision

At JBSM, we envision a world where the transformative power of music is accessible to all. Our vision is to inspire and nurture a deep love for music, fostering a community of musicians who not only excel in their craft but also carry the joy of music into every facet of their lives.

A Musical Community

Founded on the belief that music is a universal language, JBSM is more than just a school—it's a vibrant community. Our contracted instructors, serving as both the Board of Directors and Officers, bring a wealth of experience and passion for music. They guide students through an immersive musical journey, fostering an environment where creativity flourishes, and a sense of camaraderie prevails.

Diverse Learning Paths

We recognize that every individual's musical journey is unique. Our diverse diploma programs cater to a range of musical aspirations, providing flexible pathways for students to explore and excel in performance, composition, or education. Whether you're a beginner with a passion for learning an instrument or an advanced musician aiming for a career in the music industry, JBSM has a tailored program to suit your goals.

Local Roots, Global Impact

While rooted in the vibrant community of Douglas County, Oregon, our commitment reaches beyond geographical boundaries. Our online platforms open the doors of musical education to enthusiasts worldwide, making the gift of music accessible to diverse cultures and backgrounds.

Innovative Teaching Philosophy

At the core of JBSM's success is our innovative teaching philosophy. Grounded in principles of con

Name: Forward Arts
Description:
Forward Arts is an arts program and project management organization that focuses on initiatives that support and serve the community.  Our aim is to grow, sustain and preserve Detroit’s vibrant arts communities and industries.  As a model for innovative business practices, our mission-based yet business-oriented organization will provide support and opportunities to artists, art organizations and administrators.

Art of all forms, both in the past and present, have always played a major function in the metro-Detroit area, both to our community and to the rest of the world.  Major changes lie ahead for our region and cities and we believe the arts should be apart of that change.

To accomplish our organization’s purpose we have 3 guiding principles we adhere to: develop and cultivate Detroit’s creative industries by providing support, opportunities and leadership for artists and art administrators; support existing art organizations through partnerships, consulting, and business development; and lastly, preserve Detroit’s artistic history and legacy through education and documentation.

Name: Art Language Location
Description: Art Language Location is an annual contemporary visual and performance arts event taking place in Cambridge (UK), featuring prestigious, innovative and experimental contemporary art. Join us once again this October for ALL2016, a festival of the very best in studio-fresh contemporary & performance art from the UK and beyond. This year we will be welcoming over 40 artists to Cambridge, creating a potent mix of installations, interventions and explorations at Anglia Ruskin University and around the city.

Name: Red Sea Academy For Tourism & Entertainment Services
Description:
Welcome to the Red Sea Academy, a global leader in experiential education and cultural exchange. Established in 2007, our academy is dedicated to providing transformative learning experiences for students from around the world.

At the Red Sea Academy, we believe in the power of education to shape lives and create positive change. Our mission is to inspire and empower students by offering a diverse range of educational programs and immersive experiences that foster personal growth, intercultural understanding, and global citizenship.

With a commitment to excellence and innovation, we have curated a dynamic curriculum that combines academic rigor with hands-on learning opportunities. Our programs encompass various disciplines, including art, entertainment, event and stage management, language immersion, cultural workshops, environmental sustainability, leadership development, and entrepreneurship. By embracing a holistic approach to education, we aim to nurture well-rounded individuals who possess the skills, knowledge, and values necessary to thrive in a rapidly changing world.

What sets the Red Sea Academy apart is our unparalleled location. Situated in the stunning Red Sea region of Egypt, our campus offers a unique learning environment surrounded by breathtaking natural beauty and rich cultural heritage. Students have the opportunity to explore vibrant marine ecosystems, visit historical landmarks, engage with local communities, and gain a deeper appreciation for the world around them.

At the heart of our academy are our passionate and dedicated educators who bring expertise, enthusiasm, and a global perspective to the classroom. Our faculty members are experienced professionals who are committed to nurturing students' intellectual curiosity, critical thinking, and creativity. They foster an inclusive and supportive learning community where students feel encouraged to take risks, collaborate, and develop their own unique voices.

Name: Hukkinen Studio
Description: Harry Matti Hukkinen’s work explores the quiet intersection of material and spirit. Through wood and stone, he shapes forms that engage with space—balanced, present, and responsive to their environment. In contrast to the pace of the digital world, these sculptures offer stillness and reflection. They serve as subtle reminders of nature’s enduring presence.

Name: RUAH! Academy & HUB

Benvenuti in RUAH! – Rome Universal Arts, Academy & HUB
La nuova Accademia di Roma è l' istituto di alta formazione costruita sulle solide basi dell'esperienza e delle competenze dei suoi docenti.

Innovazione, creatività e tecnologia sono i pilastri che guidano ogni nostro percorso formativo.

RUAH! Academy & HUB è il futuro delle arti digitali e dei ruoli creativi.
Formazione immersiva, innovazione, competenze e professionalità al servizio delle Arti Creative.

Una vera carriera nel mondo delle Arti Visive?
Si può fare. Unisciti alla nostra rivoluzione creativa e trasforma la tua passione in una professione reale.

Arts, Strategy, Aesthetic Makeup, Artificial Intelligence e molto altro ancora.

RUAH.ACADEMY.

Name: Talking Textiles
Description: Talking Textiles is an art studio founded by Deborah McKellar that produces artworks & textiles for interior spaces. As the name suggests, Talking Textiles tells the stories of Singapore; highlighting its rich culture and heritage.

Name: SYRA Arts
Description:
Based in Cairo and Washington DC, Syra Arts is dedicated to promoting contemporary Egyptian and Middle Eastern art to an international audience. In Washington DC, Syra Arts showcases the works of some of Egypt's leading contemporary artists as well as famed artist and jewelry designer Azza Fahmy, both at their gallery in Canal Square in Georgetown, as well as at major art fairs in the US.

In Cairo Syra Arts organizes rotating art exhibitions and cultural events at the Four Seasons Cairo at the First Residence Hotel thereby helping to position the hotel as one of the leading art hotels in the region

Name: Ravenna Gardens
Description:
Ravenna Gardens was born from a passion for gardening. We are obsessed with bringing the peaceful vibes from the garden into our homes with our hand selected wares. We offer an array botanically inspired home decor & gifts, tropical & outdoor plants, gardening books, and all the tools needed to be a savvy plant parent. 
Our niche is to cater to the urban gardener; therefore, we carefully curate our outdoor plant selection to help small space gardeners be successful. Whether that's with a grouping of pots on a patio, or a collection of perennials for a compact garden bed. We aim to inspire our customers to be closer to nature through the stories we tell with our products & displays.

Name: Andertoons
Description:
There's nothing better than sharing a laugh, and that's what Andertoons is all about.

We make cartoons for you to use in your emails, social media, presentations, books, and more. Buy something ready-made, or commission something made just for you.

You seen our cartoons in the Wall Street Journal, Forbes, Harvard Business Review, Reader's Digest and Good Housekeeping.

Companies that use our cartoon include GE, GM, Intel, Microsoft, Pinterest, and we'd love to add you!

Name: Annemarie Spilker Photography
Description:
AS Photography owns the pictures taken by Annemarie Spilker. 

Annemarie Spilker (born 1980, Hillegom) is a Dutch photographer best known for her self-portraits and landscapes. 
Annemarie Spilker attended The Photography Academy in Amsterdam where she graduaded Cum Laude in 2003, with the series self-portraits "Searching to fill the emptiness..." Her photography focuses on penetrating self-portraits with an uncomfortable and confronting atmosphere, in which she searched for the hidden places in her own personality. Her landscapes appear almost unreal due to the unprecedented silence and timelessness. 
The work of Annemarie is part of art-collections all over the world, from Den Haag (The Netherlands) till New York.

Наші продукти — це баланс між творчістю та системністю.

Що ми робимо:
- Корпоративні арт-івенти для команд будь-якого розміру
- Персональні артбокси та творчі набори
- Спеціальні знижкові пропозиції для співробітників компанії

оффлайн/онлайн
українська/англійська


Для кого ми працюємо:
Для компаній, які цінують wellbeing і розвиток талантів.
Для HR-команд, які шукають нові інструменти командної взаємодії.

Transphotographiques est un festival de photographie créé en 2001 par Olivier Spillebout, et organisé par la Maison de la Photographie de Lille (Nord).

Name: Color Wheel Studio Community Art Program
Description:
The Color Wheel mission is to encourage the growth and development of creative free thinking individuals. To this end, we provide safe, quality, art based classes aimed at nurturing the whole child. Name: Peter Dervin Photography
Description:
I am a professional photographer based in the Seattle area. I specialize in concert photography as well as production stills for film and television, landscapes, people and events.

Concert Performance Highlights include photographing:
Paul McCartney, The Grateful Dead, Los Lobos, DEVO, HEART, Robert Plant, The Monkees, Chris Cornell, Them Crooked Vultures, Aaron Neville, Suzanne Vega, Loudon Wainwright III, Dwight Yoakam, Leon Russell, Elvis Costello, Dave Alvin, Del McCoury Band, Buddy Guy, Robert Cray, Sharon Jones & The Dap Kings, Gov't Mule, Boz Scaggs and many more.

My photographs of the Grateful Dead were included in the artwork/packaging for the Grateful Dead Road Trips Vol. 3 No. 4 CD release in 2010.

Concerts and music festivals I have photographed:
• Coachella Valley Music & Arts Festival, Indio, California

Name: Calico Flower Studio
Description:
I was born and raised in a central Ohio home that celebrated resourcefulness and ingenuity. My artistic ethos was shaped by a culture of repurposing and reimagining. This laid the foundation for my approach to making, where I integrate paper, fabric, paint, ink, graphite, stitching, weaving, and anything else that I can source or upcycle from my everyday life into works of art.

My mixed media artwork harnesses the energy and intricate beauty inherent in my materials, such as tissue paper, junk mail, greeting cards, and old sketches or paintings, which incidentally find their way into my life. As an advocate for the potential of scraps, I uplift the seemingly mundane to a place of greater significance, fostering curiosity and wonder about their form, their history, and their renewed purpose. This practice also leads me to contemplate my own spiritual existence and the cyclical nature of the universe.

Within my creative practice at Calico Flower Studio, I create abstract art as a means of processing life and cultivating joy through the lens of mixed media. Beyond creating, I am passionate about demystifying my process, sharing insights, and forming connections with my audience. Through my YouTube channel, my writing, and my handmade products, I invite everyone, regardless of their background, to explore their creativity. My intent is to provoke meaningful reflection, offering nourishment for both the mind and the soul.

My work has been exhibited internationally. I create custom work for clients, produce and sell handmade paper products, and teach workshops in Los Angeles, CA, where I reside with my husband/creative collaborator and our two cats, Dahlia and Clover.

If you are interested in purchasing my artwork, have any questions about my practice, or would like to collaborate, please reach out. I’d be thrilled to hear from you.

Name: Change The Art
Description:
Change The Art is a brand owned and created by artist, Krystle Marriott. The products have been designed out of a desire to see people recover their sense of wonder, awe and joy and to draw out their own sense of creativity.
Our products are created with the goal of helping you revive your inner child by stirring up your imagination through our art collection. Our most popular collection is based off of the artworks from Krystle's Faith Like a Child series.
We hope to leave you inspired to keep the childlike faith, believing in yourself, God and others. 

Krystle Marriott is a visual artist based in Hamilton, Ontario. She works mainly in acrylic medium and has been painting actively for about 10 years now. She began her works as an artist while taking foundational art studies at the Living Hope Creative Art Studio. Her love for art began as a child where she became interested in drawing images that communicated messages of inspiration. Art has always been a way for Krystle to escape the noise of life and find comfort and healing.
Her motivation for creating art is to inspire others to have faith in God, themselves and each other. She uses her painting to display children in postures of joy, humility and boldness. Krystle hopes to leave a mark on the hearts of those who view her work that will revive their inner child as well as awaken their inner artist. Through her paint parties, Krystle partners with God to help people get set free of their inhibitions and have fun in the creative process.

Description:
Blueprint12 is an artist-centric contemporary art gallery dedicated to the South Asian experience. With a vision that transcends the borders between nations and focuses on the commonalities in the art practices of the region, we are committed to introducing collectors and enthusiasts to both emerging and established artists that are pushing the boundaries.
Founded by Mandira Lamba, Ridhi Bhalla and Sameera Anand in 2012, Blueprint 12’s objectives are based on the pillars of transparency, collaboration and following our heart. We have been inspired by our artists to set up a residency program in Vadodara (2013-2017) and have also launched our Platform section, where we showcase emerging talent with non-exclusive representation and offer our expertise to a new generation of collectors.

Name: The Studio
Description:
Jenny King was a late bloomer in the art world taking her first art class at the age of 27. Aside from a couple of initial art classes, she is virtually self-taught, having honed her skills over the years. Now that she has found her niche, her work is emerging around the country.

Using oil as her medium, Jenny uses vibrant colors and bold brushstrokes to enhance and exaggerate light and shadows in her paintings. Since 2005, her works have been displayed and sold at local shops and restaurants. 
Participating in the art festivals in the Atlanta area has always provided Jenny with inspiration. She loves the flow of energy and the people in the crowds. Jenny paints wherever her inspiration leads and it is always exciting to see her latest works.
In April of 2009, Jenny opened her own working studio off the historic Marietta Square. Her vision was to create a comfortable, relaxed, fun atmosphere where artists could create, support each other and sell their works to the public. Her vision, much like her art, has become a reality.

Name: Rachel's Young At Art Studio
Description: Rachel’s Young at Art Studio fosters a safe, positive, and loving atmosphere to encourage each child’s social and emotional growth and development through art. Children have a natural curiosity to explore and desire to express themselves. Here, we help enable the creative process so that children of all ages may use art as a self-expressive tool to make connections to the world around them. We provide enriching experiences that empower our young artists with a strong sense of confidence, accomplishment, and overall identity that they can carry with them outside the studio and throughout life…all while having fun!

Name: Ventana Cult

Description:
Express Yourself Studios | Mobile & Virtual Art Workshops | Fine Art & Creative Wellness

Founded in 2008, Express Yourself Studios has grown into a mobile and digital creative arts hub, bringing art workshops, team-building experiences, and fine art to schools, corporations, healthcare organizations, and community groups. Led by Simone Anthony-Brown, a professional artist and educator, we specialize in offsite creative workshops, virtual art programs, and curated fine art collections featuring both established and emerging artists.

Our mission is to make art accessible, inspiring, and impactful for all, whether through in-person corporate wellness sessions, arts education for students, or therapeutic creative programs for healthcare spaces. Our interactive workshops encourage self-expression, innovation, and connection, making them ideal for schools, businesses, and wellness initiatives.

Beyond workshops, Express Yourself Studios also offers a curated fine art collection, including original paintings, mixed media collages, and limited-edition prints. Our online store features DIY art kits, digital guides, and pre-recorded courses, making creativity accessible to all, no matter their location.

We also engage with a global audience through our YouTube art channel, providing free tutorials, behind-the-scenes insights, and creative inspiration. Whether you're looking to book an art experience, add original artwork to your collection, or explore your creativity through online learning, Express Yourself Studios is here to bring art without limits to you.

Serving clients nationwide with offsite workshops and a global audience through virtual experiences. For more information about the studio visit www.expressyourselfstudiosllc.com.
